english_verse: “A virgin will have a baby boy, and he will be called Immanuel,” which means “God is with us.”
translation_verse: “Kebitɛ kǝtsyuǝ ka lenyi osani ǝbɔlɛ kafo nya woole ubisaibi. Nya betidi lookpo wǝ bǝnkǝ Imanuel.” Nnya kasɔ ni bǝnkǝ Onanto si ko bo.

english_verse: more to the birth of the Messiah. The Birth of Jesus (Luke
translation_verse: nya Azur léle Sadok wǝ léle Akim wǝ léle Elihud.

english_verse: This is how Jesus Christ was born. A young woman named Mary was engaged to Joseph from King David's family. But before they were married, she learned that she was going to have a baby by God's Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Nnyǝ mǝ ɛyɛ fɛ bále Yesu Kristo. Bátɔ Maria bǝtǝ Yosef, tsya fɛ bookpa wǝǝ, Maria ǝnyǝ nkǝ ufi ɔlɛ kafo. Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale dítǝ íbǝ itǝ nko.

english_verse: Joseph was a good man and did not want to embarrass Mary in front of everyone. So he decided to quietly call off the wedding.
translation_verse: Yosef eyifo utidi sɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi. Fɛɛ se wóanla nkǝ woakpo Maria eto ǝnǝmi kasɔ lǝ kusǝ komǝ eto ǝnǝmi esoo, úbu disi nkǝ lǝ oyani wǝ kpoo kalɔkalɔ.

english_verse: While Joseph was thinking about this, an angel from the Lord appeared to him in a dream. The angel said, “Joseph, the baby that Mary will have is from the Holy Spirit. Go ahead and marry her.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ úfi nsusu bomfoo, Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe utsyuǝ ǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte wǝ lǝ kola kǝmiǝ, nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Yosef, Oka David eto kafo eto ubi, mante sikpi ku fǝ usiǝ Maria bokpa kesuko fǝ ɔflɔ. Itsyise kafo ka ɔnlɛ mfoo, Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ itsyi.

english_verse: Then after her baby is born, name him Jesus, because he will save his people from their sins.”
translation_verse: Nya woole ubisaibi. Nya fǝ Yosef luutǝkǝ wǝ diye fǝ Yesu, itsyise wǝ ni nwǝ luulǝkǝ wǝ betidi utsyiko lǝ abua ǝsuǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: So the Lord's promise came true, just as the prophet had said,
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo ǝbǝ itǝ lǝ Maria ǝsuǝ fe kase Onanto lɛtɛyi utsyǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ unyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝsuǝ nkǝ yuubǝ itǝ sitinti. Ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ,

english_verse: After Joseph woke up, he and Mary were soon married, just as the Lord's angel had told him to do.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso se Yosef lésanklii, ókpa Maria, úyifo wǝ usiǝ fe kase Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi wǝ.

english_verse: But they did not sleep together before her baby was born. Then Joseph named him Jesus.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yosef ku Maria mánte bǝtsyuǝ fe usǝ ku usiǝ isu ese lefe nǝ óle wǝ ubisaibi ǝmǝ. Nya Yosef dítǝkǝ wǝ diye nkǝ Yesu.

english_verse: When Jesus was born in the village of Bethlehem in Judea, Herod was king. During this time some wise men from the east came to Jerusalem
translation_verse: Bále Yesu lǝ umǝ wǝ baakpo Betlehem lǝ Yudea eto kasɔ lǝ lefe nǝ Oka Herodes díkedi seka lǝ ke ǝsuǝ. Nya lǝ lefe nǝmfó ǝsuǝǝ, babesibe bǝtsyuǝ ba léte asa ɛyɛ lǝ olalɛlɛ befandebi eto ǝtsyǝbi ǝsuǝ etsyi kofekatokɔ bǝbǝ Yerusalem.

english_verse: and said, “Where is the child born to be king of the Jews? We saw his star in the east and have come to worship him.”
translation_verse: Nya bátɔ bǝnkǝ, “Sieti bále ubi wǝ luudi Yudafɔ eto oka ǝmǝ? Búnyǝ wǝ sefandebi lǝ kofekatokɔ. Nya búbǝ boǝ boesumu wǝ.”

english_verse: When King Herod heard about this, he was worried, and so was everyone else in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Oka Herodes lɛnɔ ditiki nǝmfoo, difufu ǝmuǝ wǝ ku betidi ba kenke lɛkɛ lǝ Yerusalem mfó.

english_verse: Herod brought together the chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses and asked them, “Where will the Messiah be born?”
translation_verse: Nyaso ókpadi Onanto eto besunyǝ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Sieti boole Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ǝmǝ?”

english_verse: They told him, “He will be born in Bethlehem, just as the prophet wrote,
translation_verse: Mfó nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Betlehem lǝ Yudea eto kasɔ, itsyise nko Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛwɔni útsyǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: ‘Bethlehem in the land of Judea, you are very important among the towns of Judea. From your town will come a leader, who will be like a shepherd for my people Israel.’ ”
translation_verse: ‘Fǝ Betlehem lǝ Yuda eto kasɔ, emenyifo ɔkɛkɛ lǝ Yuda eto kǝmǝnkplɛ nti. Itsyise lǝ fǝǝ, nya nwǝ luudi ɔtɔnkotɔnko wǝ lɔɔyɛnko mɔ betidi Israelfɔɔ, lɔɔbɔ utsyi nɛ.’ ”

english_verse: Herod secretly called in the wise men and asked them when they had first seen the star.
translation_verse: Nyaso Oka Herodes ákpadi bafɔ ba dítsyi kofekatokɔ bamǝ bǝbǝ mfó nya ókpe disi ku mǝ kabiɔ ǝsuǝ, nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ ɔ́nɔ lefe nǝ tutuutu sefandebi siamǝ lɛbɔ bǝnyǝ.

english_verse: He told them, “Go to Bethlehem and search carefully for the child. As soon as you find him, let me know. I also want to go and worship him.”
translation_verse: Mfó fɛ útǝ mǝ kusu nya bédu bésu Betlehem. Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bisu lǝ bisu bɛbɛbɛ dikpefi nǝmǝ kukɔnɔ. Nya lǝ binyǝ wǝǝ, lǝ bisinkli bibǝ bɛtɛyi mɛ, bǝ lǝ mintsya lǝ nsu nsumu wǝ.”

english_verse: When the men went into the house and saw the child with Mary, his mother, they knelt down and worshiped him. They took out their gifts of gold, frankincense, and myrrh and gave them to him.
translation_verse: Nya se bédufǝ diyo nǝmǝ kafo nya bǝnyǝ ubi ǝmǝ ku wǝ ambe Mariaa, báse akonki nya básumu wǝ. Nya basini mǝ kabɔtɔ nya bǝtǝ wǝ ǝtǝsa nnya lefo koya, nnya ni sika ku lufui ku uyudu.

english_verse: Later they were warned in a dream not to return to Herod, and they went back home by another road. The Escape to Egypt
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, Onanto ǝlǝkǝ óte mǝ lǝ kola kǝmiǝ nkǝ bénsisinkli bayɛ Oka Herodes ɔflɔ. Nyaso báyɛ kusu bamba bésinkli bésu mǝ kasɔ. Yosef Étsyetsyiko Maria Ku Yesu Bésu Egipte Eto Kasɔ.

english_verse: After the wise men had gone, an angel from the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream and said, “Get up! Hurry and take the child and his mother to Egypt! Stay there until I tell you to return, because Herod is looking for the child and wants to kill him.”
translation_verse: Se babesibe bamǝ dísinkli bédu eto kamaa, Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe utsyuǝ ǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte Yosef lǝ kola kǝmiǝ. Nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Oka Herodes ebutǝ nkǝ bati dikpefi nǝmǝ kama lǝ balo wǝ. Nyaso taka, lǝ etsyetsyiko dikpefi nǝmǝ ku ni ambe esuko Egipte eto kasɔ. Bisiǝ mfó isu ese lefe nǝ mɔɔtɛyi fǝ minkǝ bisinkli bibǝ.”

english_verse: That night, Joseph got up and took his wife and the child to Egypt,
translation_verse: Ketsye kamfoo, Yosef átaka úfi ubi ǝmǝ ku wǝ ambe útsyetsyiko bésu Egipte eto kasɔ.

english_verse: where they stayed until Herod died. So the Lord's promise came true, just as the prophet had said, “I called my son out of Egypt.” The Killing of the Children
translation_verse: Nya bǝsiǝ mfó isu ese lefe nǝ Oka Herodes díkpǝ. Kase bákɛ mfó ǝbǝ itǝ lǝ asa nnya Onanto lɛtɛyi utsyǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ bɛnyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Egipte kee, mínkpadi mɔ ubi míntsyiko.” Oka Herodes Ǝtǝ Bálo Bebisaibi Kenke Lǝ Betlehem.

english_verse: When Herod found out that the wise men from the east had tricked him, he was very angry. He gave orders for his men to kill all the boys who lived in or near Bethlehem and were two years old and younger. This was based on what he had learned from the wise men.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Oka Herodes dínyǝ nkǝ bafɔ ba dítsyi kofekatokɔ mfó áwɛ wǝ bákpee, kafo ányi wǝ tinti. Nyaso útǝ nkǝ wǝ bamamanyǝ su Betlehem ku kaka letsyilama mfó kenke lǝ balo bebisaibi ba díkafo alɛ ǝnuǝ ku ibǝ kasɔ lǝ kase bafɔ bamǝ léte lefe nǝ sefandebi siamǝ dílǝkǝ ǝsuǝ séte.

english_verse: So the Lord's promise came true, just as the prophet Jeremiah had said,
translation_verse: Mmǝ ibǝ bǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yeremiya eto lesa nǝ ɔ́tɛyi útsyǝǝ, ǝbǝ itǝ nko sitinti, nnya nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ,

english_verse: “In Ramah a voice was heard crying and weeping loudly. Rachel was mourning for her children, and she refused to be comforted, because they were dead.” The Return from Egypt
translation_verse: “Bánɔ bofa butsyuǝ lǝ Rama ini kekuwiwi ku kaminsǝ eto kɔsɔ kekleke. Rahel lɛ keku buwi itǝ wǝ bebi. Nya ɔnnlɛ bɔtɔnɔ nkǝ bammansǝ wǝ lɛkɔ, itsyise bebi bamǝ ǝkpǝ eso.” Yosef Ku Maria Ku Yesu Esinkli Bétsyi Egipte Bǝbǝ Nasaret.

english_verse: After King Herod died, an angel from the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph while he was still in Egypt.
translation_verse: Se Oka Herodes díkpǝ eto kamaa, Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe utsyuǝ ǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte Yosef lǝ kola kǝmiǝ lǝ Egipte.

english_verse: The angel said, “Get up and take the child and his mother back to Israel. The people who wanted to kill him are now dead.”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Taka, lǝ efi ubi ǝmǝ ku wǝ ambe lǝ bisinkli bisu Israel eto kasɔ, itsyise mba léla bǝ baalo ubi ǝmǝ ébukpǝ.”

english_verse: Joseph got up and left with them for Israel.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso Yosef átaka nya ókpa dikpefi nǝmǝ ku ni ambe nya bédu bésu Israel eto kasɔ.

english_verse: But when he heard that Herod's son Archelaus was now ruler of Judea, he was afraid to go there. Then in a dream he was told to go to Galilee,
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lefe nǝ Yosef lɛnɔ nkǝ Arkelao, wǝ ni Oka Herodes eto ubi, béfi bǝtsyǝ seka lǝ Yudea lǝ wǝ anto eto kɛnyɛɛ, óte sikpi ku mfó busu. Nya se Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe utsyuǝ díkǝ wǝ ato lǝ kola kǝmiǝ nkǝ wensu mfoó, ófloma kusu údu úsu Galilea eto lɛkpɔ mfo.

english_verse: and they went to live there in the town of Nazareth. So the Lord's promise came true, just as the prophet had said, “He will be called a Nazarene.”
translation_verse: Nya se úsu mfoó, úsu úsiǝ lǝ umǝ wǝ baakpo Nasaret. Nya mǝ eto mfó busiǝ ǝtǝ bǝ Onanto eto Bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi eto ditiki nǝ bátɛyi bǝtsyǝ bǝ, “Bookpo wǝ bǝ Nasaretnyǝ,” ǝbǝ ítǝ sitinti.

english_verse: Do something to show you have really given up your sins.
translation_verse: Beté lǝ mi eyifosa ǝsuǝ biǝnkǝ bɛtsyi bɛwuninsǝ lǝ mi abua ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: He said, “Turn back to God! The kingdom of heaven will soon be here.”
translation_verse: nkǝ, “Bítsyi mi akɔɛsi bɛwuninsǝ lǝ abuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ, itsyise Onanto eto Sekadidi eboyo selo.”

english_verse: John wore clothes made of camel's hair. He had a leather strap around his waist and ate grasshoppers and wild honey.
translation_verse: Nya awu nnya Yohanes lékpee, ɔtɔmini ku lekoko eto bise béfi bédi nnya. Nya úfi kubukikue eto abɔsu ókle nkɛ. Nya wǝ didisa dídi bekpǝsǝ ku bablɔ.

english_verse: From Jerusalem and all Judea and from the Jordan River Valley crowds of people went to John.
translation_verse: Nya betidi dítsyi Yerusalem eto umǝ ku Yudea eto kasɔ ku Yordan eto Ketu eto lekpake mfó kenke bǝbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: They told how sorry they were for their sins, and he baptized them in the river.
translation_verse: Bǝlǝkǝ mǝ asa bua kasɔ nya úflǝsǝ mǝ ntu lǝ Yordan eto ketu kafo.

english_verse: Many Pharisees and Sadducees also came to be baptized. But John said to them: You bunch of snakes! Who warned you to run from the coming judgment?
translation_verse: Se Yohanes dínyǝ Farisifɔ ku Sadukifɔ kpǝ ba díbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ bǝ lǝ uflǝsǝ mǝ ntuu, ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mi mba nte fe bawa eto befluflu! Owoe lɛlɛ mi kɔlɛ nkǝ bitsyetsyi lǝ Onanto eto kotonǝnǝ ko nlɛ bubǝ eto kɛnyɛ?

english_verse: An ax is ready to cut the trees down at their roots. Any tree that doesn't produce good fruit will be chopped down and thrown into a fire.
translation_verse: “Bebe se banlɛ kefiebi bǝńyǝ bǝ baala eyi nyamǝ taa keyudu ke. Kuyi saa ko laanwɔ ebibi sɛɛ, boola ko befi bakpe lǝ ditefɛnku kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: His threshing fork is in his hand, and he is ready to separate the wheat from the husks. He will store the wheat in a barn and burn the husks in a fire that never goes out. The Baptism of Jesus (Mark
translation_verse: Utsyi wǝ kɔfɛ ko wuufi ɔflɛ wǝ kamɔ ulǝkǝ kofo fɛ lǝ ufi ke okpo lǝ unwu. Fɛɛ kofo ko luubuu, wootonsǝ ko lǝ utǝ wǝ laanni kulefe kulefe, kǝmiǝ!” Yohanes Ǝflǝsǝ Yesu Ntu.

english_verse: Jesus left Galilee and went to the Jordan River to be baptized by John.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfoó, Yesu etsyi Galilea eto kasɔ úbǝ Yohanes ɔflɔ lǝ Yordan eto Ketu nkǝ lǝ Yohanes lǝ uflǝsǝ wǝ ntu.

english_verse: But John kept objecting and said, “I ought to be baptized by you. Why have you come to me?”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se Yohanes mánla nkǝ lǝ uflǝsǝ Yesu ntu esoo, ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ bomu ele bǝ mbǝ fǝ ɔflɔ, nya inni fǝ ele bǝ bǝ mɔ ɔflɔ fǝ mflǝsǝ fǝ ntu.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “For now this is how it should be, because we must do all God wants us to do.” Then John agreed.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Fǝǝ, tɔnɔ lǝ eyifo nnya nko te mɔmɔ. Itsyise nko fɛ yuutǝ buyifo lesa nǝ ni Onanto eto lelabi nɛ.” Nyaso Yohanes átɔnɔ útǝ wǝ.

english_verse: So Jesus was baptized. And as soon as he came out of the water, the sky opened, and he saw the Spirit of God coming down on him like a dove.
translation_verse: Nya se Yohanes díflǝsǝ Yesu ntu ólosǝ koo, ɔ́bɔ lǝ ntu bomǝ ǝsuǝ, nya mfó ǝmǝ kato léna nwaa nya úńyǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nlɛ bɔyifǝ kǝbǝ kasɔ fe lɛblɛkpa seka díbǝ dísiǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then a voice from heaven said, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him.”
translation_verse: Nya bánɔ ɔkɔɛ dítsyi kato ɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Nwǝmfo ni mɔ Ubi Lala wǝ mankeko, wǝ eto asa leedufǝ mɛ ǝnǝ tinti nɛ.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard that John had been put in prison, he went to Galilee.
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛnɔ nkǝ bǝmuǝ Yohanes béti bákpe lǝ diyoo, údu úsu Galilea.

english_verse: But instead of staying in Nazareth, Jesus moved to Capernaum. This town was beside Lake Galilee in the territory of Zebulun and Naphtali.
translation_verse: Wǝnsiǝ lǝ Nasaret, bomu údu úsu úsiǝ lǝ Kapernaum, ni umǝ wǝ nkpe lǝ Galilea eto Ditumbu kplɛ ɔflɔ lǝ Sebulon ku Naftali eto lekpake mfó.

english_verse: After Jesus had gone without eating for
translation_verse: Nya se Yesu lékle kɛnyɛ itǝ eyifosi anaa, kukpɛnsɛ álɛ wǝ.

english_verse: Then the devil came to him and said, “If you are God's Son, tell these stones to turn into bread.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya olontidi ǝmǝ díbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ Onanto eto Ubi fenii, tɛyi abambi nyamfo lǝ efiani didisa.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The Scriptures also say, ‘Don't try to test the Lord your God!’ ”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Fɛɛ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue komǝ ke lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, ‘Manto fǝ Onamute Onanto abe.’ ”

english_verse: Finally, the devil took Jesus up on a very high mountain and showed him all the kingdoms on earth and their power.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Obansam ǝmǝ lékpa Yesu úsuko kɔtini ko letaka eto disinti nya óte wǝ kawunsiǝ eto sekakedikɔ kenke ku ke diyǝnde.

english_verse: The devil said to him, “I will give all this to you, if you will bow down and worship me.”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Muufi asa nnyamfo kenke ntǝ fǝ, lǝ ebose akonki esumu mɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Go away Satan! The Scriptures say: ‘Worship the Lord your God and serve only him.’ ”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Satana, du mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ! Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, ‘Fǝ Onamute Onanto hã ele bǝ se akonki ǝtǝ, esumu.’ ”

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet Isaiah had said,
translation_verse: Úsiǝ mfo nya Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yesaya eto kɛnyɛ ka ɔ́tɛyi útsyǝ díbǝ kǝtǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: Right then the two brothers dropped their nets and went with him.
translation_verse: Mfó báyani mǝ asabu bǝtsyǝ nya bǝtǝkǝko wǝ bédu.

english_verse: While Jesus was walking along the shore of Lake Galilee, he saw two brothers. One was Simon, also known as Peter, and the other was Andrew. They were fishermen, and they were casting their net into the lake.
translation_verse: Nya se Yesu lɛyɛ lǝ Galilea eto ditumbukplɛ ɔflɔ ɔntɔɔ, únyǝ bayimisani inuǝ ba ni mba laata asabu. Mǝ ni Simon wǝ baakpo Petro ku wǝ ɔyimisani Andrea ba díkata asabu lǝ ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: Jesus walked on until he saw James and John, the sons of Zebedee. They were in a boat with their father, mending their nets. Jesus asked them to come with him.
translation_verse: Nya se ɔ́yɛ sɛkɛ úsu sɛtɔɔ, usi únyǝ bayimisani inuǝ ba baakpo Yakobo ku Yohanes ba ni Sebedeo eto bebi. Mǝ ku mǝ anto Sebedeo ǝmǝ ákɛ lǝ ɔklɔ kafo bákalɔ mǝ asabu fɛ Yesu lékpadi mǝ.

english_verse: At once they left the boat and their father and went with Jesus. Jesus Teaches, Preaches, and Heals (Luke
translation_verse: Lamfolamfoo, báyani mǝ anto ku ɔklɔ ǝmǝ bǝtsyǝ nya bǝtǝkǝko wǝ bédu. Yesu Átsya Efimbi Akpa Akpa Lǝ Mǝ Nti.

english_verse: Jesus went all over Galilee, teaching in their synagogues and preaching the good news about God's kingdom. He also healed every kind of disease and sickness.
translation_verse: Yesu áyɛ lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ kenke nya óte asa lǝ Yudafɔ eto ntsyakɔ. Nya óbe Onanto eto Sekadidi eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya. Nya ótsya betidi ba efimbi ate ate nlɛ bulǝ kenke.

english_verse: News about him spread all over Syria, and people with every kind of sickness or disease were brought to him. Some of them had a lot of demons in them, others were thought to be crazy, and still others could not walk. But Jesus healed them all.
translation_verse: Nyamfo ǝtǝ bǝ wǝ diye ku ditiki nǝmǝ áyɛ éfia Siria eto kasɔ kenke. Nyaso betidi ákpa mǝ befimfi ba efimbi ate ate nlɛ bulǝ báboko wǝ ɔflɔ. Mǝ bǝtsyuǝǝ, awɔnɔ bua dísiǝ mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ kakpe mǝ bulǝ. Bǝtsyuǝ kǝkpǝkasankli eto bufi díkǝlǝ nya bǝtsyuǝǝ, ani ku akpa díkpǝ mǝ. Yesu átsya mǝmblɛ kenke.

english_verse: Large crowds followed Jesus from Galilee and the region around the ten cities known as Decapolis. They also came from Jerusalem, Judea, and from across the Jordan River.
translation_verse: Sitiditu kplɛ sia ditsyi Galilea eto kasɔ ku Kǝmǝ Lefosi ka nkpe mfó ku Yerusalem ku Yudea eto kasɔ ku nsɔ bo nkpe lǝ Yordan eto Ketu eto lekpake nǝ nse ǝbǝ bǝtǝkǝ ko wǝ.

english_verse: When Jesus saw the crowds, he went up on the side of a mountain and sat down. Blessings (Luke
translation_verse: Se Yesu dínyǝ sitiditu sia dítǝkǝko wǝǝ, óbe úsu kɔtini kato nya úsiǝ kasɔ. Mfó nya wǝ bakasebi díbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: You must obey God's commands better than the Pharisees and the teachers of the Law obey them. If you don't, I promise you will never get into the kingdom of heaven. Anger
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi wuee minkǝ, fɛ biofo Onanto eto sekakedikɔ budufǝǝ, ele bǝ bisiǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi bo lɛlɛkɛ bonso kase kɔfi eto bateasa ku Farisifɔ kulaa tsya nsi. Yesu Áte Asa Itsyi Lǝ Lɛblɔfi Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: So if you are about to place your gift on the altar and remember that someone is angry with you,
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ ibǝ bǝ efi fǝ ǝtǝsa atɔnko lǝ Onanto kedikǝtǝkɔ eto leba ǝsuǝǝ, nya fakloma fǝ lesatsyuǝ kpe lǝ fǝ ku fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ lenti,

english_verse: and he taught them:
translation_verse: Nya útsyiko mǝ asa bote nkǝ,

english_verse: God blesses those people who depend only on him. They belong to the kingdom of heaven!
translation_verse: “Onanto ákpo atsyɔ betidi ba nyi bǝ beyifo bakombo lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ, itsyise Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eyifo mǝ sele.

english_verse: God blesses those people who grieve. They will find comfort!
translation_verse: Onanto ákpo atsyɔ betidi ba leewi kaminsǝku. Mǝ Onanto loomansǝ lɛkɔ nɛ.

english_verse: God blesses those people who are humble. The earth will belong to them!
translation_verse: Onanto ákpo atsyɔ betidi ba laabokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ. Mǝǝ ni mba luudi sɛkplɛ lǝ kasɔ kamfo eto bikǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God blesses those people who are merciful. They will be treated with mercy!
translation_verse: Onanto ákpo atsyɔ betidi ba lǝǝnyǝ mǝ bǝtsyuǝ kaminsǝ. Onanto ebunyǝ mǝ kaminsǝ.

english_verse: God blesses those people whose hearts are pure. They will see him!
translation_verse: Onanto ákpo atsyɔ betidi ba eto ketu lekpa kɛnkɛ. Mǝ luunyǝ Onanto nɛ.

english_verse: You are the light for the whole world. A city built on top of a hill cannot be hidden,
translation_verse: “Biyifo fe diyǝnde bitǝ kawunsiǝ kenke. Umǝ wǝ bála bǝtǝkǝ lǝ kɔtini ǝsuǝǝ, ambiɔ.

english_verse: But I tell you not to swear by anything when you make a promise! Heaven is God's throne, so don't swear by heaven.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ mankpadi asa ǝtsyǝ kɛnyɛ saa. Mankpadi asa nnya nkpe kato itsyise Onanto eto lekankpomɛ ni mfó.

english_verse: The earth is God's footstool, so don't swear by the earth. Jerusalem is the city of the great king, so don't swear by it.
translation_verse: Mankpadi asa nnya nkpe lǝ kasɔ tsya itsyise Onanto eto akpa eto kǝtǝkɔ ini. Nya mankpadi Yerusalem, itsyise mfó ni baka eto Oka wǝ ni Ǝsuǝalenyǝ Kenke eto umǝ nɛ.

english_verse: You are the salt for everyone on earth. But if salt no longer tastes like salt, how can it make food salty? All it is good for is to be thrown out and walked on.
translation_verse: “Bite fe mmba bitǝ betidi ba kenke. Fɛɛ lǝ kamini ábɔ lǝ mmba bomǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ǝnsiǝmbofo kamini bokpe lǝ mu bio. Nya se bunsibǝ kutǝkǝ saa esoo, buwui hã ele bǝ befi mu bewui lǝ betidi lǝ bayɛ lǝ mu ǝsuǝ bafe.

english_verse: and no one lights a lamp and puts it under a clay pot. Instead, it is placed on a lampstand, where it can give light to everyone in the house.
translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ saa anto okandiɛ kefi asa keti wǝ. Bomu bufi beefi wǝ kǝtǝkǝ lǝ wǝ kǝtǝkǝkɔ ǝsuǝ kaka wuutǝ diyǝnde utsyuǝ saa wǝ nkpe lǝ diyo nǝmǝ.

english_verse: Don't suppose I came to do away with the Law and the Prophets. I did not come to do away with them, but to give them their full meaning.
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Biembu biǝ mbǝ miǝ maninsǝ Moses eto afi nnya ókpe, nye Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi léte. Mǝmbǝ miǝ maaninsǝ nnya kon. Bomu mbǝ miǝ lǝ mbǝ mflɔsǝ nnya.

english_verse: You know our ancestors were told, “Do not murder” and “A murderer must be brought to trial.”
translation_verse: “Kɔɔ bɛnɔ bátɛyi betidi bǝnkǝ, ‘Manlo utidi.’ Nya utidi wǝ leeyifo nkoo, ele bǝ bakponko wǝ lekpo.

english_verse: But I promise you if you are angry with someone, you will have to stand trial. If you call someone a fool, you will be taken to court. And if you say that someone is worthless, you will be in danger of the fires of hell.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, mɔ lɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ, utsyuǝ saa ke luunyǝ ɔblɔ lǝ wǝ ɔyimi ǝsuǝǝ, bookponko wǝ lekpo. Nya utidi wǝ tsya lɔɔtɛyi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ nkǝ, ‘Eyifo utidi bimbaa,’ bookpa wǝ besuko beninǝ eto ǝnǝmi. Nya utidi wǝ lɔɔtɛyi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ nkǝ, ‘Eyifo ubukii,’ Onanto ebunǝ wǝ koto lǝ ditefɛnku manlo kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: leave your gift there in front of the altar. Make peace with that person, then come back and offer your gift to God.
translation_verse: yani fǝ kedi kamǝ ǝtsyǝ lǝ Disumuyo mfó lǝ esu lǝ fonko fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ lǝ bekpo ntu lǝ bǝtsyuǝ nti fɛ lǝ efi fǝ kedi kamǝ esu ǝtǝ Onanto.

english_verse: Before you are dragged into court, make friends with the person who has accused you of doing wrong. If you don't, you will be handed over to the judge and then to the officer who will put you in jail.
translation_verse: “Lǝ utsyuǝ aala nkǝ weefi fǝ usuko kɔfi ɔflɔɔ, bɛbɛ lefe lǝ fonko wǝ lǝ bɛlɔ bǝtsyuǝ nti. Lenni nkoo, lǝ fonko wǝ esu lekpo etii, utidi ǝmfo ebufi fǝ okpe lǝ okponkpo eto ani. Nya wuntsya luufi fǝ okpe mba lɛmuǝ betidi eto ani nya bookpe fǝ lǝ diyo.

english_verse: I promise you will not get out until you have paid the last cent you owe. Marriage
translation_verse: Nya nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi kasini minkǝ ebɔkɛ lǝ mfó isu ese lefe nǝ foofo kayo ka fensi alosǝ. Yanle Bǝ Bǝsǝ Ku Bǝsiǝ Fe Bǝtsyuǝ Kama.

english_verse: You have been taught that a man who divorces his wife must write out divorce papers for her.
translation_verse: “Bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, ‘Utsyuǝ saa ke lɔɔni wǝ usiǝǝ, ele bǝ utǝ wǝ kukue nkǝ ɔ́ni wǝ.’

english_verse: You know our ancestors were told, “Don't use the Lord's name to make a promise unless you are going to keep it.”
translation_verse: “Kɔɔ bɛnɔ tsya bátɛyi betidi bǝnkǝ, ‘Mankpadi asa esi etudi kɛnyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Bomu yifo lǝ ntamu bo faka fǝtǝ Bonamute ǝsuǝ.’

english_verse: When you make a promise, say only “Yes” or “No.” Anything else comes from the devil. Revenge (Luke
translation_verse: Tǝ lǝ mi ee lǝ iyifo ee, nya lǝ mi oowo lǝ iyifo oowo ete. Lesa bamba sa enso nyamfo eto bɔtɛyii, etsyi lǝ olontidi ǝmǝ ɔflɔ. Yesu Áte Bo Nkǝ Boantisǝ Oko.

english_verse: You know you have been taught, “An eye for an eye and a tooth for a tooth.”
translation_verse: “Bɛnɔ bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, ‘Bafo dinǝmi lǝ dinǝmi eto kɛnyɛ, nya lɛnyi lǝ lɛnyi eto kɛnyɛ.’

english_verse: But I tell you not to try to get even with a person who has done something to you. When someone slaps your right cheek, turn and let that person slap your other cheek.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, mɔ lɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ, mantisǝ fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ eto kabua ka úyifo eto oko. Lǝ utsyuǝ ásɔ fǝ lǝ kodianitosii, tsyi nkonse tsya ǝtǝ wǝ.

english_verse: If someone sues you for your shirt, give up your coat as well.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utsyuǝ aala nkǝ woasama fǝ lǝ ofo fǝ awu katoo, wuninsǝ fǝ kafia tsya ǝtǝ wǝ.

english_verse: If a soldier forces you to carry his pack one kilometer, carry it two kilometers.
translation_verse: Nko ke lǝ ǝsuǝalenyǝ eto utsyuǝ anyikǝ fǝ okpe nkǝ tsyi wǝ bikǝ lǝ bɛyɛ disunkpo lɔnii, yɛnko wǝ nnya ǝnuǝ.

english_verse: When people ask you for something, give it to them. When they want to borrow money, lend it to them. Love (Luke
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ atɔ fǝ lesatsyuǝ, fi ni ǝtǝ wǝ. Nya lǝ utsyuǝ tsya atɔ nkǝ dia lesa ǝtǝ wǝ, dia ni ǝtǝ wǝ. Yesu Áte Bo Nkǝ Bola Bo Balo.

english_verse: You have heard people say, “Love your neighbors and hate your enemies.”
translation_verse: “Bɛnɔ bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, ‘La fǝ bayɛtsyuǝ lǝ ekisi fǝ olo!’

english_verse: But I tell you to love your enemies and pray for anyone who mistreats you.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ bela mi balo lǝ beto ola lǝ mba leekisi mi eto disi.

english_verse: Then you will be acting like your Father in heaven. He makes the sun rise on both good and bad people. And he sends rain for the ones who do right and for the ones who do wrong.
translation_verse: Bǝ lǝ befiani Onanto wǝ nkpe kato eto bebi tinti. Itsyise wǝ lǝǝtǝ kofe laafa kǝtǝ betidi bua ku mba leeyifo kasɛɛ kenke tsyɛtsyɛɛtsyɛ. Nya ɔsɔmi tsya laani kǝtǝ betidi ba leeyifo kasɛɛ ku mba leenyifo kasɛɛ ta.

english_verse: If you love only those people who love you, will God reward you for this? Even tax collectors love their friends.
translation_verse: Lǝ betidi ba laala mi ete mi tsya laalaa, nte kayofofo ka Onanto luutǝ mi. Nko ke te mba laafo umǝnko kula tsya leeyifo nɛ.

english_verse: If you greet only your friends, what's so great about this? Don't even unbelievers do that?
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mi bayɛtsyuǝ mate ete biǝsiǝsǝǝ, nyalɛ bienyifo tɔ kulesa nǝ eto ani ele bǝ basɔ mi. Mamfokanɔfɔ tsya eyifo nko ke.

english_verse: But you must always act like your Father in heaven.
translation_verse: Bomuu, bɛflɔ fe kase mi Anto wǝ nkpe kato lɛflɔ seka.

english_verse: When you do good deeds, don't try to show off. If you do, you won't get a reward from your Father in heaven.
translation_verse: “Bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ bienyifo kesumu eto kasɛɛ ka ele bǝ biyifo bilǝkǝ bete lǝ betidi lǝ bǝnyǝ. Itsyise lǝ biyifo nkoo, biensiembunyǝ kayofofo saa itsyi lǝ mi Anto wǝ nkpe kato ɔflɔ.

english_verse: When you give to the poor, don't let anyone know about it.
translation_verse: Nyaso fǝǝ, lǝ awunsǝko okomboo, yifo nko bǝ fǝ ɔyɛtsyuǝ kulaa tsya embote lesa nǝ feyifo.

english_verse: When you pray, don't be like those show-offs who love to stand up and pray in the synagogues and on the street corners. They do this just to look good. I can assure you that they already have their reward.
translation_verse: “Lǝ bɛlɛ ola botoo, bienyifo fe kase ǝnǝmi ǝnǝmi eto betidi leeyifo. Baala buńyǝ lǝ Yudafɔ eto kalakatokɔ ku lǝ obia bǝ lǝ utsyuǝ saa lǝ unyǝ mǝ. Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti miǝ, boofo mǝ kayofofo saa koko.

english_verse: When you pray, go into a room alone and close the door. Pray to your Father in private. He knows what is done in private and will reward you.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ alɛ ola botoo, dufǝ lǝ fǝ diyo kǝmiǝ lǝ eti siku lǝ ato ola ǝtǝ fǝ Anto wǝ kuutsyuǝ saa lǝǝnnyǝ. Nya fǝ Anto wǝ lǝǝnyǝ fǝ eyifosa kulakula saa, ebofo fǝ nya kayo.

english_verse: When you pray, don't talk on and on as people do who don't know God. They think God likes to hear long prayers.
translation_verse: “Lǝ bɛlɛ ola botoo, biendi etiki kpenkpenkpe katɛyi, kalɔ bɔtɛyi fe kase bamamonyǝ leeyifo. Beebu bǝ lǝ batɛyi etiki kpenkpenkpee, nya mǝ bǝfiǝ loofo mǝ olatoto nɛ.

english_verse: Don't be like them. Your Father knows what you need even before you ask.
translation_verse: Bienyifo fe mǝ, itsyise Mi Anto Onanto yi asa nnya behiã fɛ biatɔ wǝ.

english_verse: You should pray like this: Our Father in heaven, help us to honor your name.
translation_verse: Nyaso nnyǝ mmǝ ele bǝ beto ola, ‘Boanto wǝ nkpe kato, tǝ lǝ bakpasǝ fǝ diye.

english_verse: Come and set up your kingdom, so that everyone on earth will obey you, as you are obeyed in heaven.
translation_verse: Fǝ sekakedidi lǝ sibǝ. Beyifo lǝ fǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ lǝ kasɔ mfo fe kase inte kato.

english_verse: If you forgive others for the wrongs they do to you, your Father in heaven will forgive you.
translation_verse: “Nya lǝ bifi mi bǝtsyuǝ eto botakebu bɛtsyɛ mǝǝ, mi Anto Onanto tsya ebufi mi ale tsya ɔtsyɛ mi.

english_verse: But if you don't forgive others, your Father will not forgive your sins. Worshiping God by Going without Eating
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ biemfi mi bǝtsyuǝ eto botakebu bɛtsyɛ mǝǝ, mi Anto Onanto tsya embufi mi botakebu ɔtsyɛ mi. Yesu Áte Asa Itsyi Lǝ Kɛnyɛklekle Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Instead, comb your hair and wash your face.
translation_verse: Lǝ bɛlɛ kɛnyɛ bokle nɛ, biflǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ besadi disi.

english_verse: Then others won't know you are going without eating. But your Father sees what is done in private, and he will reward you. Treasures in Heaven (Luke
translation_verse: Nyamfo luutǝ bǝ betidi embote bǝnkǝ bɛlɛ kɛnyɛ bokle. Bomu bǝ lǝ mi Anto wǝ boǝnnyǝ hã lǝ ote. Bǝ lǝ mi Anto wǝ lǝǝnyǝ lesa saa, lǝ ofo mi nya kayo. Yesu Áte Asa Itsyi Lǝ Onanto Eto Sekakedikɔ Eto Bikenyǝnyǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But more than anything else, put God's work first and do what he wants. Then the other things will be yours as well.
translation_verse: Bomu bitǝ lǝ mi abɛbɛsa tutɛ lǝ idi kase Onanto luudi seka lǝ mi ǝsuǝ le befiani basɛɛ. Nya wuufi asa bamba nya kenke loofe itǝ mi tsya, utǝ mi.

english_verse: Don't worry about tomorrow. It will take care of itself. You have enough to worry about today.
translation_verse: Nyaso biǝnsiǝ bikebu disi itsyi lǝ kusɛ ko nlɛ bubǝ ǝsuǝ. Diyi nǝmfó tsya ebubǝ ku ni bulǝ. Yanle bǝ bufi bulǝ bamba bokpe lǝ mi eto bole ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Don't store up treasures on earth! Moths and rust can destroy them, and thieves can break in and steal them.
translation_verse: “Bianlɔ ǝsuǝ eto bikǝ bitsyǝ lǝ kasɔ kamfo, kaka balɛ ku kosansa laabiasǝ bikǝ nya beyu tsya laaba biku kedufǝ ayo keyu mi.

english_verse: Instead, store up your treasures in heaven, where moths and rust cannot destroy them, and thieves cannot break in and steal them.
translation_verse: Bomu bɛlɔ mi bikǝ bitsyǝ lǝ Onanto eto. Mfoo, balɛ embobiasǝ mi nye beto kosonsa nya beyu tsya lemboba siku beyu mi.

english_verse: But when your eyes are bad, everything is dark. If the light inside you is dark, you surely are in the dark. Money (Luke
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ fǝ ǝnǝmi annlɔ kǝnyǝǝ, fǝ utidi eto umu ǝmǝ kenke ebɔkɛ lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ. Nyaso lǝ diyǝnde nǝ nkpe lǝ fǝ afiani ketuntuu, fǝ ketuntu kamǝ ebɔkɛ ale tinti. Yesu Áte Asa Itsyi Lǝ Onanto Ku Bikǝ Kamabutǝkǝko Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You cannot be the slave of two masters! You will like one more than the other or be more loyal to one than the other. You cannot serve both God and money. Worry (Luke
translation_verse: “Kuutsyuǝ saa embofo banamute inuǝ busumu. Woola ɔni, ukisi unuǝfǝ. Uutsyue ɔni koto nya wɔɔni unuǝfǝ. Ǝmbofo Onanto ku atabi bɔkɔ kesumu.

english_verse: Don't worry and ask yourselves, “Will we have anything to eat? Will we have anything to drink? Will we have any clothes to wear?”
translation_verse: “Lǝ nyaso biensisiǝ bikebu disi katɔ biǝnkǝ, ‘Sieti buunyǝ lesaatsyuǝ budi nye lesaatsyuǝ bunǝ nye lesaatsyuǝ bɔlɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ?’

english_verse: I tell you not to worry about your life. Don't worry about having something to eat, drink, or wear. Isn't life more than food or clothing?
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso minlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ bianso mi nsusu bufi kǝtǝkǝ lǝ lesa nǝ biudi nye biunǝ nye asa nnya biɔlɛ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ. Itsyise nkpǝ afo koya eso didisa. Nya ǝsuǝ eto uyi tsya lefo koya eso asa nnya biɔlɛ.

english_verse: Look at the birds in the sky! They don't plant or harvest. They don't even store grain in barns. Yet your Father in heaven takes care of them. Aren't you worth much more than birds?
translation_verse: Bebe baklɔbɛ, baamfo kakuɛ nya bǝmlǝkǝ edisa nye eyibibi kǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ kewũ, fɛɛ mi Anto Onanto aabe mǝ! Nya ntsyǝ fǝ woombobe mi enso mǝ, lefe nǝ eto lefe befo koya benso mǝ.

english_verse: Why worry about clothes? Look how the wild flowers grow. They don't work hard to make their clothes.
translation_verse: “Bibu bebe kase dituwinimi lǝ dimǝ laanɔ bobee. Kaanta olokotutu nya keendi kafia kefi keti ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But I tell you that Solomon with all his wealth wasn't as well clothed as one of them.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ Oka Salomo kulaa tsya lǝ wǝ kɔlɔkɔ eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝǝ, mánnɔ bobe fe dituwinimi nǝ lǝǝmǝ mfó.

english_verse: God gives such beauty to everything that grows in the fields, even though it is here today and thrown into a fire tomorrow. God will surely do even more for you! Why do you have such little faith?
translation_verse: Lǝ nko Onanto lǝǝtǝ sefa kɔlɔkɔ komfo eto oklee, sefa sia lǝǝńyǝ mmi ete nya kǝsiǝsǝ ete baala se kato kakpé lǝ ditefɛnku kǝmiǝǝ, ntsyǝ Onanto lembutǝ bo alɛsa kpǝ enso sefa eto ale? Ntsyǝ wǝmbutǝ mi kɔlɔkɔ enso? Bimbǝ bofokanɔ kpǝ!

english_verse: Only people who don't know God are always worrying about such things. Your Father in heaven knows you need all of these.
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo eyifo asa nnya bamamonyǝ lǝǝsiǝ kebu disi ketsyiko. Mi Anto wǝ nkpe kato yi nkǝ asa nyamfo kenke ebohiã mi.

english_verse: Don't condemn others, and God won't condemn you.
translation_verse: “Mankponko betidi bamba lekpo bǝ lǝ Onanto tsya lǝ ɔyɛ fǝ lekpo bokponko.

english_verse: God will be as hard on you as you are on others! He will treat you exactly as you treat them.
translation_verse: Kase faaklá asa yeeyi kaba kakpo kǝtǝ utidii, nko ke eto okle Onanto looklá utǝ fintsya nɛ!

english_verse: You can see the speck in your friend's eye, but you don't notice the log in your own eye.
translation_verse: “Ntsyǝ fɛ fanlɛ dikubi kɛkɛ nǝ ntǝkǝ fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ eto dinǝmi bobe fɛ fannlɛ dikubi kplɛ nǝ ntǝkǝ lǝ fǝ léle bunyǝ?

english_verse: How can you say, “My friend, let me take the speck out of your eye,” when you don't see the log in your own eye?
translation_verse: Ntsyǝ fɛ foofo fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ bɔtɛyi fǝnkǝ, ‘Lekpakpa, tǝ lǝ nlǝkǝ dikubi kɛkɛ nǝ ntǝkǝ fǝ lǝ dinǝmi,’ se dikubi kplɛ ntǝkǝ lǝ fǝ kosate eto lele ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: You're nothing but show-offs! First, take the log out of your own eye; then you can see how to take the speck out of your friend's eye.
translation_verse: Fǝ ǝnǝmi ǝnǝmi eto utidi! Ka dikubi kplɛ nǝ ntǝkǝ fǝ lǝ dinǝmi bulǝkǝ fɛ lǝ ǝnyǝ kusu ǝlǝkǝ fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ eto lele kɛkɛ nǝ ntǝkǝ wǝ lǝ dinǝmi.

english_verse: As bad as you are, you still know how to give good gifts to your children. But your heavenly Father is even more ready to give good things to people who ask.
translation_verse: Mimba ni babuayifo kulaa yi kase buifi asa sɛɛ bitǝ mi bebi. Nya ntsyǝ yuutsyǝ ku Boanto wǝ nkpe kato itǝ bo? Ntsyǝ yoofo bubǝ bǝ weembufi wǝ asa, asa sɛɛ, utǝ betidi ba laatɔ wǝ?

english_verse: Would any of you give your hungry child a stone, if the child asked for some bread?
translation_verse: “Minti eto Owoe lǝ wǝ ubi atɔ wǝ abolo, wuufi lebambi utǝ wǝ?

english_verse: Ask, and you will receive. Search, and you will find. Knock, and the door will be opened for you.
translation_verse: “Bɛtɔ asa lǝ befi bǝtǝ mi. Bɛbɛbɛ asa lǝ binyǝ. Bɛsɔ siku lǝ basini mi.

english_verse: Everyone who asks will receive. Everyone who searches will find. And the door will be opened for everyone who knocks.
translation_verse: Itsyise utsyuǝ saa wǝ laatɔ asaa, bǝǝtǝ wǝ. Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ laabɛbɛɛ, wǝǝnyǝ. Nya utsyuǝ saa, wǝ lɛsɔ sikuu, bɔɔsini wǝ.

english_verse: Would you give your child a snake if the child asked for a fish?
translation_verse: Nye lǝ ɔtɔ wǝ lɛkpɛ, wuufi owa utǝ wǝ?

english_verse: Treat others as you want them to treat you. This is what the Law and the Prophets are all about. The Narrow Gate (Luke
translation_verse: Asa nnya biala biǝ betidi bamba yifo bǝtǝ mii, mitsya yifo nnya bitǝ mǝ nko. Nyamfo ete Moses eto kɔfi ku Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi nlɛ bote nɛ. Bɛyɛ Lǝ Kesie Ka Nso Bɔfɛ Befe.

english_verse: Anyone who hears and obeys these teachings of mine is like a wise person who built a house on solid rock.
translation_verse: “Nyaso utidi wǝ ke laanɔ mɔ etiki nya weeyifo lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, wǝ ni obesibe nɛ. Ute fe utidi wǝ léto wǝ diyo uńyǝnsǝ lǝ koba ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But the gate to life is very narrow. The road that leads there is so hard to follow that only a few people find it. A Tree and Its Fruit (Luke
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nkpǝ eto kusu afɛ, nya ko bɔyɛ kesu mfó kpe ale, nya betidi esiani hã lǝǝnyǝ ko. Kuyi Saa Ku Ko Ebibi.

english_verse: Watch out for false prophets! They dress up like sheep, but inside they are wolves who have come to attack you.
translation_verse: “Bebe mi ǝsuǝ sinini lǝ bidiabidia eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝsuǝ. Bǝǝbǝ mi ɔflɔ fe basamu seka lǝ dinyǝbi ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ mǝ kǝmiǝǝ, baso bekiti.

english_verse: You can tell what they are by what they do. No one picks grapes or figs from thornbushes.
translation_verse: Biunyǝ mǝ bitsyǝ lekpo lǝ mǝ eyifosa ǝsuǝ. Kanyi aannwɔ eyibibi nnya bedi. Nya otonkpa anwɔ nnya bendi.

english_verse: A good tree produces good fruit, and a bad tree produces bad fruit.
translation_verse: Nko ini bǝ kuyi sɛɛ saa aanwɔ ebibi sɛɛ. Nya kuyi bua saa aanwɔ ebibi bua.

english_verse: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.
translation_verse: Kuyi sɛɛ saa aannwɔ ebibi bua nko ke kuyi bua saa laannwɔ ebibi sɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: Every tree producing bad fruit will be chopped down and burned.
translation_verse: Kuyi saa ko laannwɔ ebibi sɛɛ, baala ko kefi kakpe lǝ ute.

english_verse: You can tell who the false prophets are by their deeds. A Warning (Luke
translation_verse: Nyaso badiantidi ba lǝǝlǝkǝ Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ kɛnyɛɛ, biunyǝ mǝ bitsyǝ lekpo lǝ mǝ eyifosa ǝsuǝ. Bikeyifo Onanto Eto Alasa.

english_verse: Anyone who hears my teachings and doesn't obey them is like a foolish person who built a house on sand.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa wǝ laanɔ mɔ etiki fɛ woanyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, okateko ubuki. Ute fe utidibuki wǝ léto wǝ diyo uńyǝnsǝ lǝ kɔwinimi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Rain poured down, rivers flooded, and the winds blew and beat against that house. Finally, it fell with a crash.
translation_verse: Ɔsɔmi áni nya ntu díyi bóba bókpo mfó, nya ufiebi kekleke lɛsɔ ɔ́yɛ lǝ diyo nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ ófe, nya léba kploo lékpo lǝ kasɔ.” Yesu Áte Asa Ku Ǝsuǝale.

english_verse: Not everyone who calls me their Lord will get into the kingdom of heaven. Only the ones who obey my Father in heaven will get in.
translation_verse: “Inni utsyuǝ saa ke laakpadi mɛ nkǝ, ‘Bonamute, Bonamutee,’ luudufǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ. Bomu betidi ba leeyifo mɔ Anto wǝ nkpe kato eto alasa luudufǝ mfó.

english_verse: On the day of judgment many will call me their Lord. They will say, “We preached in your name, and in your name we forced out demons and worked many miracles.”
translation_verse: Lǝ diyi fɛfɛ ayoo, betidi kpǝ bɔtɛyi mɛ bǝ, ‘Bonamute, Bonamute! Lǝ fǝ diye ǝsuǝ nya búdi fǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ nya búyifo ayanisa kpǝ bóla awɔnɔ bua kpǝ búlǝkǝ lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ.’

english_verse: But I will tell them, “I will have nothing to do with you! Get out of my sight, you evil people!” Two Builders (Luke
translation_verse: Mfó nya mɔɔtɛyi mǝ minkǝ, ‘Minyi mi kulaa o-o! Bidu mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ, mi babuayifotidi.’ Yesu Ate Asa Itsyi Lǝ Bayoto Inuǝ Bǝtsyuǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Rain poured down, rivers flooded, and winds beat against that house. But it was built on solid rock, and so it did not fall.
translation_verse: Ɔsɔmi áni nya ntu díyi boba bokpo, nya ufiebi kekleke lɛsɔ ɔyɛ lǝ diyo nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ ófe. Fɛɛ díamba itsyise óto ni utǝkǝ lǝ koba ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When Jesus finished speaking, the crowds were surprised at his teaching.
translation_verse: Se Yesu léte asa nyamfo kenke ólosǝǝ, wǝ asatete eyifo mǝmblɛ yanii.

english_verse: He taught them like someone with authority, and not like their teachers of the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Wǝ asatete ményifo fe kase afi eto bateasa laate. Bomu óte asa fe nwǝ nkpe ǝsuǝale lǝ asa nnya óte ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But the ones who should have been in the kingdom will be thrown out into the dark. They will cry and grit their teeth in pain.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mimba ni sekakedikɔ siamǝ eto bebii, boofi mǝ batobakpe lǝ ketuntu ka nkpe lǝ se kama mfo. Mfó boowi nku bayimi anyi.”

english_verse: That evening many people with demons in them were brought to Jesus. And with only a word he forced out the evil spirits and healed everyone who was sick.
translation_verse: Se ditsyitsyo lefe léyoo, bákpa betidi kpǝ ba awɔnɔ bua díkǝlǝ báboko Yesu ɔflɔ. Yesu lǝ ditikididi lɔni ǝsuǝǝ, óla awɔnɔ bua nyamǝ úlǝkǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya ótsya befimfi bamǝ kenke mǝ efimbi.

english_verse: Suddenly a man with leprosy came and knelt in front of Jesus. He said, “Lord, you have the power to make me well, if only you wanted to.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya osani utsyuǝ wǝ nlɛ bufi sía bufi díbǝ óse akonki lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute! Lǝ alaa, ebofo butǝ bǝ mɔ ǝsuǝ le.”

english_verse: Jesus put his hand on the man and said, “I want to! Now you are well.” At once the man's leprosy disappeared.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝnǝ wǝ kɔni útidi wǝ, nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nla. Fǝ ǝsuǝ le.” Lamfolamfo bufi bomǝ ǝyuǝ utidi ǝmǝ.

english_verse: “I will go and heal him,” Jesus replied.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Muusu lɛ nsu ntsya wǝ.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he was so surprised that he turned and said to the crowd following him, “I tell you in all of Israel I've never found anyone with this much faith!
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛnɔ etiki nyamfoo, íyifo wǝ yanii nya ɔ́tɛyi betidi ba dítǝkǝko wǝ mfó nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ lǝ Israelbebi nti kulaa tsyaa, mǝnnyǝ tɔ bofokanɔ kplɛ bomfo eto okle!

english_verse: “Lord, my servant is at home in such terrible pain that he can't even move.”
translation_verse: “Bonamute! Mɔ uyifoyifo lɛ bufi kekleke. Olabe lǝ diyo ɔnnlɛ bofo botaka.”

english_verse: Many people will come from everywhere to enjoy the feast in the kingdom of heaven with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ betidi kpǝ ebutsyi kofekatokɔ ku ko diyokedufǝkɔ bǝbǝ bǝsiǝ kasɔ bedi lesa ku Abraham, Isak ku Yakob lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ.

english_verse: Then Jesus said to the officer, “You may go home now. Your faith has made it happen.” Right then his servant was healed. Jesus Heals Many People (Mark
translation_verse: Nya kamaa, nya Yesu lɛtɛyi bamamanyǝ eto uninǝ ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Du esu diyo, yuubǝ itǝ fǝ fe kase fáfo fánɔ ǝsuǝ.” Nya omamanyǝ ninǝ ǝmǝ eto uyifoyifo eto ǝsuǝ dímuǝ wǝ ale lǝ lefe nǝmfó ǝsuǝ ke. Yesu Átsya Betidi Kpǝ Bufi.

english_verse: Suddenly they shouted, “Jesus, Son of God, what do you want with us? Have you come to punish us before our time?”
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo, báfa ku ɔkɔɛ bembembe nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Fǝ Onanto eto Ubi, be nkpe lǝ bonko fǝ lenti mfo? Bubǝ fǝbǝ fǝ etsyiko bo koto bunǝ katɔnsǝ fɛ lǝ lefe nǝmǝ lǝ leyoo?”

english_verse: Everyone in town came out to meet Jesus. When they saw him, they begged him to leave their part of the country.
translation_verse: Nyaso utsyuǝ saa lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ ésu nkǝ wǝǝnyǝ Yesu. Nya se bǝnyǝ wǝǝ, bálɛ wǝ lekpakpa bǝ udu lǝ mǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: Jesus went to the home of Peter, where he found that Peter's mother-in-law was sick in bed with fever.
translation_verse: Se Yesu dísu Petro eto diyoo, únyǝ nkǝ atikesi ǝmuǝ Petro eto usiǝambe kekleke, nya onlabe.

english_verse: He took her by the hand, and the fever left her. Then she got up and served Jesus a meal.
translation_verse: Mfó ǝmǝ nya Yesu lɛkɔbe wǝ lǝ kɔni nya atikesi nyamǝ léyani wǝ nya ótaka úsu úyifo wǝ afɔ.

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet Isaiah had said, “He healed our diseases and made us well.” Some Who Wanted To Go with Jesus (Luke
translation_verse: Úyifo nyamfo bǝ lǝ ditiki nǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yesaya lɛtɛyi utsyǝ lǝ ibǝ itǝ nkǝ, “Wǝ kosate átsya bo kǝsuǝfi, nya ótsya bo efimbi kenke.” Betidi Inuǝ Ba Léla Bǝ Bǝǝtǝkǝko Yesu.

english_verse: A teacher of the Law of Moses came up to him and said, “Teacher, I'll go anywhere with you!”
translation_verse: Afi eto oteasa utsyuǝ ǝbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ mfó. Nya ɔ́tɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Oteasa, muutǝkǝko fǝ nsu kaka ke fantɔ.”

english_verse: Another disciple said to Jesus, “Lord, let me wait till I bury my father.”
translation_verse: Nya utidi bamba utsyuǝ wǝ ni okasebi lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute, tǝ mɛ kusu lǝ nsu mbikǝ mɔ anto fɛ.”

english_verse: so the disciples went over to him and woke him up. They said, “Lord, wake up! Save us before we drown!”
translation_verse: Bakasebi bamǝ ésu básanklisǝ wǝ nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute, lǝkǝ bo! Boǝbǝ bukpǝ lo.”

english_verse: After Jesus left in a boat with his disciples,
translation_verse: Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi édufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ utsyuǝ kafo.

english_verse: a terrible storm suddenly struck the lake, and waves started splashing into their boat. Jesus was sound asleep,
translation_verse: Yanklɛ ufiebi étsyiko bɔsɔ kekleke lǝ ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya ɔnlɛ ntu bɔsɔ kakpo lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafo, nya íyifo fe woonya udufɔ lǝ ntu kasɔ. Fɛɛ Yesu wǝǝ lábe selabe.

english_verse: The men in the boat were amazed and said, “Who is this? Even the wind and the waves obey him.” Two Men with Demons in Them (Mark
translation_verse: Iyifo utsyuǝ saa mfó yanii. Nya bátɔ ǝsuǝ bǝ, “Nte utidi wǝ eto okle ni nwǝ mfo? Ufiebi ku ntu kulaa tsya eetsyue wǝ koto!” Yesu Átsya Betidi Inuǝ Bǝtsyuǝ Ba Ǝsuǝ Awɔnɔ Bua Dísiǝ.

english_verse: After Jesus had crossed the lake, he came to shore near the town of Gadara and started down the road. Two men with demons in them came to him from the tombs. They were so fierce that no one could travel that way.
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛyila ditumbukplɛ úsu ni lekpake nǝnse údufǝ Gadara eto kasɔɔ, betidi inuǝ ba ǝsuǝ awɔnɔ bua nsi ábɔ betsyi lǝ edi nti bǝbǝ bátsyako wǝ. Nya se bakɛ sikpi tinti esoo, kuutsyuǝ saa mánkatɔnɔ nkǝ woayɛ kusu komfo ofe.

english_verse: Not far from there a large herd of pigs was feeding.
translation_verse: Bakplako eto lekpa kplɛ ditsyuǝ ǝńyǝ lǝ mfó ɔflɔ békedi lesa.

english_verse: So the demons begged Jesus, “If you force us out, please send us into those pigs!”
translation_verse: Nyaso awɔnɔ bua nyamǝ álɛ Yesu lekpakpa bǝnkǝ, “Lǝ ebola bo ǝlǝkǝ lǝ mfoo, nyalɛ la bo esu akpe lǝ bakplako eto lekpa kplɛ nǝ ńyǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus told them to go, and they went out of the men and into the pigs. All at once the pigs rushed down the steep bank into the lake and drowned.
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu dínyǝnki ókpe mǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bidu bisu.” Nyaso bédu mfó bésu bédufǝ lǝ bakplako bamǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya bakplako bamǝ kenke dítsyetsyi báwunini lǝ kɔtini komǝ eto kotosi bésu bédufǝ lǝ ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ nya bǝnǝ ntu bǝkpǝ.

english_verse: The people taking care of the pigs ran to the town and told everything, especially what had happened to the two men.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso mba laase bakplako bamǝ étsyetsyi besu umǝ. Bátɛyi lesa saa nǝ díbǝ lǝ bakplako bamǝ ku betidi ba awɔnɔ bua disiǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus got into a boat and crossed back over to the town where he lived.
translation_verse: Yesu édufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ nya usinkli ɔ́yɛ lǝ ditumbukplɛ ǝsuǝ úsu wǝ umǝ.

english_verse: Jesus heard them and answered, “Healthy people don't need a doctor, but sick people do.
translation_verse: Yesu ánɔ lesa nǝ bátɛyi nyaso útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Betidi ba nkpe ǝsuǝale manhiã ofanyǝ enso mba ni befimfi hã.

english_verse: No one pours new wine into old wineskins. The wine would swell and burst the old skins. Then the wine would be lost, and the skins would be ruined. New wine must be put into new wineskins. Both the skins and the wine will then be safe. A Dying Girl and a Sick Woman (Mark
translation_verse: “Nko ke kuutsyuǝ saa leemfi nte fɔfɔ kakpo lǝ kubukikuetobe koko kafo itsyise nte bomǝ ebɔkpɔ itǝ otobǝ ǝmǝ eboba nya nte bomǝ luuwi nya otobe ǝmǝ loobia. Bomu beefi nte fɔfɔ kakpo lǝ kubukikuetobe fɔfɔ kafo. Nya asakpa ǝnuǝ nyamǝ ebutsyǝ kukɔnɔ.” Yesu Áwunsǝko Usio Utsyuǝ Ku Yairo Eto Ubi Ɔni Tsya.

english_verse: News about this spread all over that part of the country. Jesus Heals Two Blind Men
translation_verse: Ditiki nǝmfo ésensǝ léba lékpo lǝ kasɔ kamǝ eto lekpake nǝmfó kenke. Yesu Átsya Bǝnǝmba Inuǝ Bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Some teachers of the Law of Moses said to themselves, “Jesus must think he is God!”
translation_verse: Mfó afi eto bateasa bǝtsyuǝ ba díńyǝ mfó lɛtɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Utidi ǝmfo lǝ mbusiotiki budi.”

english_verse: But Jesus knew what was in their minds, and he said, “Why are you thinking such evil things?
translation_verse: Yesu ǝnyǝ mǝ nsusu bomfo utsyǝ lekpo nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Beso bɛnlɛ nsusu bua bomfo eto okle bufi?

english_verse: But I will show you that the Son of Man has the right to forgive sins here on earth.” So Jesus said to the man, “Get up! Pick up your mat and go on home.”
translation_verse: Bǝ lǝ nlǝkǝ nte mi miǝ Utidi Eto Ubi kpe ǝsuǝale bǝ lǝ ufi abua ɔtsyɛ lǝ kawunsiǝ mfoo,” ɔ́tɛyi utidi ǝmǝ léba onkpo kasɔ mfó nkǝ, “Taka ǝńyǝ, lǝ efi fǝ belabekǝ lǝ edu esu diyo.”

english_verse: The man got up and went home.
translation_verse: Mfó nya osani ǝmǝ létaka nnya úfi wǝ belabekǝ nnya údu úsu diyo.

english_verse: Go and learn what the Scriptures mean when they say, ‘Instead of offering sacrifices to me, I want you to be merciful to others.’ I didn't come to invite good people to be my followers. I came to invite sinners.” People Ask about Going without Eating (Mark
translation_verse: Bisu lǝ bisu bɛbɛbɛ nnya báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue eto kasɔ bǝnkǝ, ‘Kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ maabɛbɛ, nya inni bebukilolo kǝtǝ kedi.’ Mǝmbǝ miǝ mǝǝbǝ nlǝkǝ betidi sɛɛ, bomu babuayifo eso mimbǝ.” Bátɔ Yesu Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Wǝ Asatete Fɔfɔ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: As Jesus was leaving that place, two blind men began following him and shouting, “Son of David, have pity on us!”
translation_verse: Se Yesu dídu mfó ɔnyɛ ɔntɔɔ, bǝnǝmba inuǝ bǝtsyuǝ átaka bǝtǝkǝko wǝ ku kudu bembembe bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Oka, David eto ubi! Nyǝ bo kaminsǝ!”

english_verse: As Jesus and his disciples were on their way, some people brought to him a man who could not talk because a demon was in him.
translation_verse: Se betidi bamfo dídu bantɔɔ, betidi bǝtsyuǝ ákpa osani utsyuǝ wǝ lɛwɔnɔ bua dítǝ ɔnnlɛ etiki bofo budi báboko Yesu ɔflɔ.

english_verse: As Jesus was leaving, he saw a tax collector named Matthew sitting at the place for paying taxes. Jesus said to him, “Follow me.” Matthew got up and went with him.
translation_verse: Yesu édu mfó nya se ɔnyɛ ɔntɔɔ, únyǝ nwǝ laafo umǝnko utsyuǝ wǝ baakpo Mateo wǝ nsi lǝ wǝ keyifokɔ. Nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Tǝkǝko mɛ.” Mfó ǝmǝ nya Mateo létaka útǝkǝko wǝ.

english_verse: Later, Jesus and his disciples were having dinner at Matthew's house. Many tax collectors and other sinners were also there.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu nsi ɔnlɛ lesa budi lǝ Mateo eto diyoo, mba laafo umǝnko kpǝ ku babuayifo bǝtsyuǝ ǝbǝ bákɔ ku Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi ǝsuǝ lǝ lesakedikɔ mfó.

english_verse: Some Pharisees asked Jesus' disciples, “Why does your teacher eat with tax collectors and other sinners?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Farisifɔ ba dínyǝ nyamfoo, lɛtɔ wǝ bakasebi bǝnkǝ, “Beso mi oteasa ku mba laafo umǝnko ku babuayifo leedi lesa kakɔ?”

english_verse: While Jesus was still speaking, an official came and knelt in front of him. The man said, “My daughter has just now died! Please come and place your hand on her. Then she will live again.”
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu nlɛ mǝ etiki budinkoo, Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ eto uninǝ utsyuǝ ǝbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ nya óse akonki, ɔ́lɛ wǝ lekpakpa ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ ubisiobi ǝkpǝ mɔmɔmɔmɔ, tsya bǝ lǝ ǝbǝ efi fǝ ani ǝtǝkǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ otaka.”

english_verse: Jesus turned. He saw the woman and said, “Don't worry! You are now healed because of your faith.” At that moment she was healed.
translation_verse: Yesu átsyi ɔ́wuninsǝ únyǝ wǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Muǝ utu alɛ, mɔ ubi. Fǝ bofokanɔ átsya fǝ.” Lǝ lefe nǝmfo ǝsuǝ tututuu, bufí bomǝ ǝyuǝ wǝ.

english_verse: After Jesus had forced the demon out, the man started talking. The crowds were so amazed they began saying, “Nothing like this has ever happened in Israel!”
translation_verse: Óla lɛwɔnɔ bua nǝmǝ úlǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Mfó nya utidi ǝmǝ dítsyiko etiki budi. Nyamfo éyifo betidi ba ńyǝ mfó yanii, bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Boǝnnyǝ tɔ nyamfo eto okle bunyǝ kulefe lǝ Israel eto kasɔ!”

english_verse: Some followers of John the Baptist came and asked Jesus, “Why do we and the Pharisees often go without eating, while your disciples never do?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes eto bakasebi díbǝ bátɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Beso bonko Farisifɔ laakle kɛnyɛ lǝ lefe lefe ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ fǝ bakasebi laankle kɛnyɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: The friends of a bridegroom aren't sad while he is still with them. But the time will come when he will be taken from them. Then they will go without eating.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Bibubibu biǝ okafɔsǝ eto baklobo ba nkpe lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ yifo mǝ ǝsuǝ yooyooyoo ku kaminsǝ lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe onkpe lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ? Yanle bǝ ibǝ nko kulefe! Fɛɛ diyi ditsyuǝ ebubǝ nǝ ǝsuǝ bookpa okafɔsǝ ǝmǝ bedunko lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ. Lǝ lefe nǝmfó ǝsuǝǝ, bookle kɛnyɛ bǝsiǝ.

english_verse: No one uses a new piece of cloth to patch old clothes. The patch would shrink and tear a bigger hole.
translation_verse: “Kuutsyuǝ saa emfi kafia eto lefianku fɔfɔ katale kǝtǝkǝ lǝ kakoko ǝsuǝ. Itsyise lefianku fɔfɔ nǝmǝ ebunǝ ni ǝsuǝ dilǝkǝ lǝ lekoko nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ itǝ bǝ dibiǝ koko nǝmǝ ebola disensǝ lekpe.

english_verse: She had said to herself, “If I can just touch his clothes, I will be healed.”
translation_verse: Úyifo nko nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ ntidi wǝ awu koo, mɔ bufi ebɔyɛ mɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples got up and went with the man.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu átaka útǝkǝko wǝ ku wǝ bakasebi.

english_verse: A woman who had been bleeding for twelve years came up behind Jesus and barely touched his clothes.
translation_verse: Se ɔntɔɔ, usionko utsyuǝ wǝ kɔtɔ díkakpo lǝ lefosi alɛ ǝnuǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ ǝsuǝ tsya ǝtǝkǝko Yesu kama nya útidi wǝ awu eto kotosi.

english_verse: When Jesus went into the home of the official and saw the musicians and the crowd of mourners,
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, Yesu ésu katsyakɔ eto uninǝ ǝmǝ eto diyo nya se únyǝ mba leefe nkpatsyaku ku mba nlɛ bofa kewi nkuu,

english_verse: he said, “Get out of here! The little girl isn't dead. She is just asleep.” Everyone started laughing at Jesus.
translation_verse: ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Utsyuǝ saa bɔ usu lekple, disiobi nǝmǝ mǝnkpǝ, bomu selabe ete onlabe.” Mfo bétsyiko wǝ bumǝ.

english_verse: But after the crowd had been sent out of the house, Jesus went to the girl's bedside. He took her by the hand and helped her up.
translation_verse: Nya se bála betidi bamǝ babɔsɛɛ, Yesu édufǝ diyo nǝ ubisiobi ǝmǝ nlabe, nya ɔ́kɔbe wǝ lǝ kɔni, nya ótaka úsiǝ.

english_verse: After Jesus had gone indoors, the two blind men came up to him. He asked them, “Do you believe I can make you well?” “Yes, Lord,” they answered.
translation_verse: Nya se Yesu dísu údufǝ diyoo, bǝnǝmba inuǝ bamǝ edufǝ mfó. Nya Yesu lɛtɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Befo bɛnɔ biǝ moofo mi botsya?” Mfó bǝmǝnkli kɛnyɛ bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Ɛɛ! Bofo bɔnɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus touched their eyes and said, “Because of your faith, you will be healed.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítidi mǝ ǝnǝmi nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Tǝ lǝ ibǝ itǝ fe kase befo bɛnɔ.”

english_verse: They were able to see, and Jesus strictly warned them not to tell anyone about him.
translation_verse: Nya ete mǝ ǝnǝmi lɛsini. Nya Yesu díkǝ mǝ ato kekleke nkǝ, “Biantɛyi kuutsyuǝ saa nyamfo.”

english_verse: But they left and talked about him to everyone in that part of the country. Jesus Heals a Man Who Could Not Talk
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se bédu mfóo, bábe ditiki nǝmfo letsya utidi sa anɔ lǝ lɛkpɔ nǝmfó kenke itsyi lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ. Yesu Átsya Utidi Utsyuǝ Lendi Etiki.

english_verse: But the Pharisees said, “The leader of the demons gives him the power to force out demons.” Jesus Has Pity on People
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Farisifɔ bǝtsyuǝ átɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Awɔnɔ bua eto oka wǝ lǝǝtǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale, nya úfi ɔnlɛ awɔnɔ bua nyamfó bola kǝlǝkǝ nɛ.” Betidi Eto Asa Ǝnǝ Yesu Kafo.

english_verse: Jesus went to every town and village. He taught in their synagogues and preached the good news about God's kingdom. Jesus also healed every kind of disease and sickness.
translation_verse: Yesu áyɛ ótsyilama kǝmǝ ku mbuto bo nkpe lǝ lekpake nǝ lɛfi mfó. Óte asa lǝ Yedafɔ eto ntsyakɔ. Óbe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya óte asa itsyi lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya ótsya betidi efimbi efimbi kenke.

english_verse: When he saw the crowds, he felt sorry for them. They were confused and helpless, like sheep without a shepherd.
translation_verse: Nya se únyǝ sitiditu siamǝǝ, mǝ asa ǝnǝ wǝ kafo itsyise ǝsuǝ ába mǝ, nya bánkɛ ɔwɔnsǝkotsyuǝ saa, nya beyifo fe basamu ba lǝmbǝ obebe.

english_verse: He said to his disciples, “A large crop is in the fields, but there are only a few workers.
translation_verse: Nyaso ɔ́tɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Bɛkuɛnke bia díkayo bulǝkǝ fui, fɛɛ beyifoyifo bamǝ emfui.

english_verse: Ask the Lord in charge of the harvest to send out workers to bring it in.”
translation_verse: Nyaso bɛlɛ ɔkuɛnsate ǝmǝ lekpakpa lǝ otsyese beyifoyifo lǝ bǝbǝ bawunsǝ lǝ bǝlǝkǝ bɛkuɛnkǝ biamǝ.”

english_verse: Philip, Bartholomew, Thomas, Matthew the tax collector, James the son of Alphaeus, and Thaddaeus were also apostles.
translation_verse: ku Filipo ku Bartolomeo ku Toma ku Mateo wǝ laafo umǝnko ku Yakobo wǝ ni Alfeo eto ubi ku Tadeo

english_verse: But when someone arrests you, don't worry about what you will say or how you will say it. At that time you will be given the words to say.
translation_verse: Lǝ bákpa mi bésuko lekpokakpokɔɔ, biembu disi lǝ lesa nǝ biɔtɛyi, nye kase biɔtɛyi nnya. Lǝ lefe nǝmfo ayoo, boote mi lesa nǝ biɔtɛyi.

english_verse: Go only to the people of Israel, because they are like a flock of lost sheep.
translation_verse: Bomu bisu Israel bebi ba diyifo fe basamu ba lénya kusu ɔflɔ.

english_verse: I am sending you like lambs into a pack of wolves. So be as wise as snakes and as innocent as doves.
translation_verse: “Bɛlɔ bɛnɔ! Nlɛ mi botsyese fe basamu lǝ bekiti eto nti. Bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ fe bawa seka, nya bɛlɛ mi ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ fe ablonima.

english_verse: The others were Simon, known as the Eager One, and Judas Iscariot, who later betrayed Jesus. Instructions for the Twelve Apostles (Mark
translation_verse: ku Simon wǝ ditsyi Kana ku Yuda Iskariot wǝ dídu Yesu útǝ. Bisu Bebe Ditiki Sɛɛ Nǝmǝ Letsya.

english_verse: Jesus sent out the twelve apostles with these instructions: Stay away from the Gentiles and don't go to any Samaritan town.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtsyǝ lefosi betidi inuǝ bamfo kusu nya ótsyese mǝ nya úkǝ mǝ ato nkǝ, “Biensu betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ eto kasɔ nye bidufǝ Samariafɔ eto umǝ saa tsya kafo.

english_verse: And don't carry a traveling bag or an extra shirt or sandals or a walking stick. Workers deserve their food.
translation_verse: Mi kuutsyuǝ mentsyi otobe fe mba laatɔ asa, awu nuǝfǝ, afɔkpa nye ɔlɛ uyi ɔyɛ kusu. Uyifoyifo ǝńyǝ utǝ lesa nǝ wuudi.

english_verse: So when you go to a town or a village, find someone able and willing to have you as their guest and stay with them until you leave.
translation_verse: “Lǝ bidufǝ umǝ nye kebuto kǝtsyuǝǝ, bɛbɛbɛ utidi sɛɛ wǝ loola nkǝ woafo mi. Bɛsɔnɔ lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ lǝ bɛkɛ mfo isu ese lefe nǝ biudu.

english_verse: I promise you the day of judgment will be easier for the towns of Sodom and Gomorrah than for that town. Warning about Trouble (Mark
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ lǝ diyi fɛfɛ nǝ Onanto lookponko kawunsiǝ eto betidi lekpo ǝsuǝǝ, wuunyǝ Sodom ku Gomora eto betidi kaminsǝ kulaa tsya oso umǝ ǝmfo eto bale. Betidi Bǝtsyuǝ Ǝǝbɔkpɔ Mi Bǝńyǝ Mi Lǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Brothers and sisters will betray one another and have each other put to death. Parents will betray their own children, and children will turn against their parents and have them killed.
translation_verse: “Betidi ebudu mǝ bayimi bǝtǝ bǝ balo. Nya antomǝ tsya luuyifo nko ke ku mǝ bebi. Bebi ebotaka bǝńyǝ lǝ mǝ antomǝ ǝsuǝ bedu mǝ bǝtǝ bǝ balo.

english_verse: Watch out for people who will take you to court and have you beaten in their synagogues.
translation_verse: Bebe mi ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ, itsyise betidi ebumuǝ mi, bakpa mi besuko akpokakpokɔ. Bɔɔblɛ mi lǝ Yudafɔ eto ntsyakɔ.

english_verse: Because of me, you will be dragged before rulers and kings to tell them and the Gentiles about your faith.
translation_verse: Lǝ mɔ disi esoo, bookponko mi akpo lǝ Aba eto beninǝ ku baka eto ǝnǝmi. Lǝ mfóo, bɛtɛyi mǝ ku mba lenni Yudafɔ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: But you will not really be the one speaking. The Spirit from your Father will tell you what to say.
translation_verse: Itsyise inni mi loote etiki nnya buidi, bomu mi Anto Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ luudi etiki ɔyɛ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Everyone will hate you because of me. But if you remain faithful until the end, you will be saved.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ebukisi mi lǝ mɔ disi eso. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa wǝ luuńyǝ kekleke lǝ wǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ isu ese kalosǝkɔɔ, boofo wǝ lǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: When people mistreat you in one town, hurry to another one. I promise you before you have gone to all the towns of Israel, the Son of Man will come.
translation_verse: Lǝ bati mi kama lǝ umǝ ɔnii, bitsyetsyi bisu umǝ bamba. Nya nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, biembuyifo mi keyifo belosǝ lǝ Israel eto kǝmǝ ka kenke fɛ mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi luubǝ.

english_verse: Students are not better than their teacher, and slaves are not better than their master.
translation_verse: “Okasebi saa aanso wǝ oteasa. Odomunyǝ saa tsya aanso wǝ onamute.

english_verse: It is enough for students to be like their teacher and for slaves to be like their master. If people call the head of the family Satan, what will they say about the rest of the family? The One To Fear (Luke
translation_verse: Nyasoo, ele bǝ imi, okasebi saa nkǝ wuubǝ utsyǝ fǝ wǝ oteasa seka. Nya ndomunyǝ tsya luubǝ utsyǝ fe wǝ onamute. Nya lǝ bákpadi oyosate utsyuǝ bǝ Awɔnɔ bua eto ɔtɔnkotɔnko nyaalɛ nte aye bua nya eto okle bembokpo diyo nǝmǝ eto bebi? Mante Betidi Sikpi.

english_verse: Don't be afraid of people. They can kill you, but they cannot harm your soul. Instead, you should fear God who can destroy both your body and your soul in hell.
translation_verse: Biante mba ini etidisuǝ ete boofo bolo fɛ bembofo okla bolo sikpi. Bomu bete Onanto wǝ loofo utidi eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ku lɛwɔnɔ bolo lǝ ute wǝ laatonsǝ asa sikpi.

english_verse: Aren't two sparrows sold for only a penny? But your Father knows when any one of them falls to the ground.
translation_verse: Lǝ efi kablɛ kanii, foofo ntsyuɛ nnuǝ boya tsyaa, ke kani kplo embukpǝ lǝ inni Boanto Onanto eto lelabi.

english_verse: Even the hairs on your head are counted.
translation_verse: Nya mimii, Onanto yi mi disi eto sɛwɔni eto leklabi kenke.

english_verse: So don't be afraid! You are worth much more than many sparrows. Telling Others about Christ (Luke
translation_verse: Nyaso biante sikpi, itsyise befo koya beso baklɔbɛ kpǝ. Kɛnyɛbulǝkǝ Kate Lǝ Yesu Eto Dikiti Sɛɛ Ǝsuǝ Ku Wǝ Bɔni.

english_verse: If you tell others you belong to me, I will tell my Father in heaven you are my followers.
translation_verse: “Utsyuǝ saa wǝ luulǝkǝ kɛnyɛ lǝ betidi nti ɔtɛyi nkǝ uyifo mɔ olee, mintsya ebofo wǝ fe moole lǝ mɔ Anto Onanto eto ǝnǝmi kato.

english_verse: But if you reject me, I will tell my Father in heaven you don't belong to me. Not Peace, but Trouble (Luke
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ utsyuǝ áni mɛ lǝ betidi ba tã eto ǝnǝmii, mintsya ebɔni wǝ lǝ mɔ Anto wǝ kato eto ǝnǝmi. Betidi Ebusǝnsǝ Lǝ Mɔ Disi.

english_verse: Don't think I came to bring peace to the earth! I came to bring trouble, not peace.
translation_verse: “Biembu biǝ mbǝ diyuǝ kabokokɔ lǝ kawunsiǝ. Owo lo! Mǝmbǝ diyuǝ kabokokɔ, bomu kabia!

english_verse: I came to turn sons against their fathers, daughters against their mothers, and daughters-in-law against their mothers-in-law.
translation_verse: Mbǝ miǝ mǝǝnǝ kabia nkpe ‘lǝ bebisaibi ku mǝ antomǝ lenti, lǝ bebisiobi ku mǝ ambemǝ lenti, lǝ bebisiǝ ku mǝ bese ambe mǝ lenti.

english_verse: Your worst enemies will be in your own family.
translation_verse: Nya utidi eto olo sitintii, ebutsyi wǝ kosate eto diyo kafo.’

english_verse: If you love your father or mother or even your sons and daughters more than me, you are not fit to be my disciples.
translation_verse: “Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ laala wǝ anto nye ambe oso mɛɛ, mǝńyǝ itǝ bǝ uyifo mɔ okasebi. Nko ke ini bǝ utsyuǝ saa ke laala wǝ ubisaibi nye ubisiobi kulaa tsya oso mɛɛ, yǝnńyǝ itǝ bǝ uyifo mɔ okasebi.

english_verse: And unless you are willing to take up your cross and follow me, you are not fit to be my disciples.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke dímentsyi wǝ uyikabie ɔyɛ mɔ kayɛkɔ utǝkǝko mɛɛ, mǝnńyǝ utǝ bǝ uyifo mɔ okasebi.

english_verse: If you try to save your life, you will lose it. But if you give it up for me, you will surely find it. Rewards (Mark
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke lela nkǝ waata wǝ nkpǝ eto disii, ebonyansǝ mu. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa ke loonyansǝ wǝ nkpǝ lǝ mɔ butǝkǝko esoo, wuunyǝ nkpǝ manlo sitinti. Onanto Ebofo Betidi Ba Lefo Yesu Banɔ Kayo.

english_verse: Anyone who welcomes a prophet, just because that person is a prophet, will be given the same reward as a prophet. Anyone who welcomes a good person, just because that person is good, will be given the same reward as a good person.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke loofo Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi nkǝ uyifo Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi esoo, ebunyǝ kedikɔ lǝ unyɛlǝkǝtidi eto kayofofo ka woofo lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Utsyuǝ saa ke loofo utidi wǝ ni ɔsɛɛ itsyise uyifo ɔsɛɛnyǝ esoo, wǝ ku utidi ǝmǝ ebofo kayofofo itsyi lǝ keyifo ka úyifo eso.

english_verse: Anyone who welcomes you welcomes me. And anyone who welcomes me also welcomes the one who sent me.
translation_verse: “Utsyuǝ saa ke loofo mii, mɔ ofo. Nya utsyuǝ saa ke loofo mɛɛ, ofo nwǝ létsyese mɛ tsya.

english_verse: And anyone who gives one of my most humble followers a cup of cool water, just because that person is my follower, will be rewarded.
translation_verse: Bebe nyamfo kukɔnɔ bǝ utsyuǝ saa wǝ luutǝ ntu yududu eto lɛkɔbetɔ mɔ bakasebi bamfo eto utsyuǝ lǝ mǝ nti lǝ mɔ disii, ebunyǝ kayofofo lǝ nnya eso kokooko.”

english_verse: As John's followers were going away, Jesus spoke to the crowds about John: What sort of person did you go out into the desert to see? Was he like tall grass blown about by the wind?
translation_verse: Se Yohanes eto bakasebi bamǝ dídu bantɔɔ, Yesu édi betidi bamǝ etiki itsyi lǝ Yohanes ǝsuǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Se bísu Yohanes ɔflɔ lǝ mfimintii, be béfo bɛnɔ biǝ biunyǝ? Lefanto nǝ ufiebi nlɛ bɔsɔ kafe lee?

english_verse: John the Baptist did not go around eating and drinking, and you said, “That man has a demon in him!”
translation_verse: Itsyise lefe nǝ Yohanes díbǝǝ, ókle kɛnyɛ nya wǝnnǝ nte. Nya utsyuǝ saa lɛtɛyi nkǝ, ‘Utsyi lɛwɔnɔ bua.’

english_verse: After Jesus had finished instructing his twelve disciples, he left and began teaching and preaching in the towns.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu dílǝkǝ wǝ bakasebi lefosi inuǝ bamfo útsyǝ mǝ kusu ólosǝǝ, údu mfó úsu óte asa nnya óbe nnya letsya lǝ kǝmǝ kamǝ ku nka letsyilama mfó.

english_verse: John was in prison when he heard what Christ was doing. So John sent some of his followers
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmǝǝ, se Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes wǝ nkpe lǝ Aba eto diyo lɛnɔ asa nnya Yesu nlɛ buyifoo, ókpe wǝ bakasebi bǝtsyuǝ Yesu ɔflɔ.

english_verse: to ask Jesus, “Are you the one we should be looking for? Or must we wait for someone else?”
translation_verse: Bésu bátɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Tɛyi bo. Fǝ ni utidi wǝ Yohanes lɛtɛyi nkǝ ǝǝbǝ bubǝǝ, lee bobe obamba kusu?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Go and tell John what you have heard and seen.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Bisinkli bisu bɛtɛyi Yohanes asa nnya bɛnlɛ bɔnɔ ku nnya bɛnlɛ bunyǝ.

english_verse: The blind are now able to see, and the lame can walk. People with leprosy are being healed, and the deaf can hear. The dead are raised to life, and the poor are hearing the good news.
translation_verse: Bǝnǝmba lɛ bunyǝ, nya mba leba bankpo lǝ kasɔ lɛ bɔyɛ. Mba nlɛ bufisia bufi eto ǝsuǝ lɛ bokpa, batoti lɛ bɔnɔ, balɛ bekpǝnkpǝ botakasǝ kǝnyǝnsǝ, nya banlɛ bakombo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bɔtɛyi.

english_verse: God will bless everyone who doesn't reject me because of what I do.”
translation_verse: Diyuǝ itǝ mba dimǝnyǝ kabua saa lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: What kind of man did you go out to see? Was he someone dressed in fine clothes? People who dress like that live in the king's palace.
translation_verse: Be bísu kabekɔ fɛɛ? Utidi wǝ nkpe bikǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ bia laanɔ bobe lee? Betidi ba laakpe bikǝ biamfo eto oklee, Lekayo baakɛ.

english_verse: What did you really go out to see? Was he a prophet? He certainly was. I tell you that he was more than a prophet.
translation_verse: Bɛtɛyi mɛ lesa nǝ kon bísu kabekɔ! Biǝ biesu bebe Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi lee? Ee, lǝ sitinti wǝ uni nɛ. Fɛɛ nwǝ bínyǝǝ, so Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi kulaa tsya.

english_verse: I tell you no one ever born on this earth is greater than John the Baptist. But whoever is least in the kingdom of heaven is greater than John.
translation_verse: Nya nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes amɔ oso utsyuǝ saa wǝ usio léle lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo. Fɛɛ nwǝ nso bɔfɛ lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔɔ, amɔ oso Yohanes ǝmǝ.

english_verse: From the time of John the Baptist until now, violent people have been trying to take over the kingdom of heaven by force.
translation_verse: Idu lǝ Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes eto lefe ibǝ ese mɔmɔɔ, balɛ bota kekleke ku kǝnǝmisɛ lǝ kato eto sekakedikɔ siamǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ mba ńyǝ lǝ se ǝsuǝ ku kǝnǝmisɛ tinti lɛ bokplatsya bǝ beeti se bubǝ kusu.

english_verse: And if you believe them, John is Elijah, the prophet you are waiting for.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bela biǝ biafo mɔ dítiki bɛnɔɔ, Yohanes ni Elia, wǝǝ eto bubǝ bátɛyi bǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: You people are like children sitting in the market and shouting to each other,
translation_verse: “Nya mɔmɔɔ, be muufi mmi eto betidi nkatesǝ ko? Beyifo fe bekpefi ba laakpe kɔyɛ lǝ asi. Lekpa lɔni afa kakpadi mǝ bǝtsyuǝ katɛyi nkǝ,

english_verse: “We played the flute, but you would not dance! We sang a funeral song, but you would not mourn!”
translation_verse: ‘Búse kusiǝkpakpa eto ese butǝ mi, Fɛɛ bɛni kewui buwui. Bóto keku eto ese butǝ mi, Fɛɛ bienwi nku.’

english_verse: But the Son of Man goes around eating and drinking, and you say, “That man eats and drinks too much! He is even a friend of tax collectors and sinners.” Yet Wisdom is shown to be right by what it does. The Unbelieving Towns (Luke
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se Utidi Eto Ubi díbǝǝ, údi únǝ. Nya utsyuǝ saa lɛtɛyi nkǝ, ‘Be utidi ǝmfo! Uyifo udikpuu ku utenǝ, mba laafo umǝnko ku babuayifo eto ɔyɛtsyuǝ!’ Fɛɛ utidi eto eyifosa ǝsuǝǝ, nya woǝlǝkǝ Onanto eto kobe ko nkpe wǝ kate nɛ.” Kǝmǝ Kǝtsyuǝ Eto Betidi Mamfo Yesu Banɔ.

english_verse: In the towns where Jesus had worked most of his miracles, the people refused to turn to God. So Jesus was upset with them and said:
translation_verse: Kǝmǝ ka ǝsuǝ Yesu díyifo ayanisa kpǝ eto betidi mántsyi báwuninsǝ bafo banɔ. Nyaso ílǝ wǝ itǝ mǝ.

english_verse: People of Capernaum, do you think you will be honored in heaven? You will go down to hell! If the miracles that took place in your town had happened in Sodom, it would still be standing.
translation_verse: Nya fǝ Kapernaum, bubu fanlɛ fǝ Onanto ebobesǝ fǝ kato? Boobokosǝ fǝ kasɔ bato fǝ bakpe lǝ ditefɛnku kǝmiǝ ke! Lǝ ayanisa nnya minyifo lǝ fǝ ete mínyifo lǝ Sodom, eni usi okpe eyo mmi!

english_verse: So I tell you on the day of judgment the people of Sodom will get off easier than you. Come to Me and Rest (Luke
translation_verse: Nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ lǝ lekpo yi fɛfɛɛ, Onanto ebunyǝ Sodom kaminsǝ tinti oso fǝ!” Yesu Ákpadi Betidi Nkǝ Bǝbǝ Bǝtsyǝ Ɔwɛ Lǝ Wǝ Ɔflɔ.

english_verse: At that moment Jesus said: My Father, Lord of heaven and earth, I am grateful that you hid all this from wise and educated people and showed it to ordinary people.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfoo, Yesu átɛyi nkǝ, “Anto, kato ku kasɔ eto Onamute. Maasɔ fǝ ani, itsyise ǝlǝkǝ asa nnya lɛkula babesibe ku bekuente áté mba lennyi kulesa.

english_verse: Yes, Father, this is what pleased you.
translation_verse: Ee, Anto, sitinti, nko fála fǝ ibǝ itǝ nɛ.

english_verse: My Father has given me everything, and he is the only one who knows the Son. The only one who truly knows the Father is the Son. But the Son wants to tell others about the Father, so they can know him too.
translation_verse: “Mɔ Anto éfi asa nnya kenke útǝ mɛ. Kuutsyuǝ saa enyi Ubi ǝmǝ enso Anto. Nya kuutsyuǝ saa enyi Anto ǝmǝ enso Ubi ǝmǝ ku mba Ubi ǝmǝ laala nkǝ wǝǝlǝkǝ wǝ oté.

english_verse: If you are tired from carrying heavy burdens, come to me and I will give you rest.
translation_verse: “Bibǝ mɔ ɔflɔ mimba ntsyi bike kinkinki bia nlɛ mi bulǝ, lǝ ntǝ lǝ bitsyǝ ɔnwɛ.

english_verse: Take the yoke I give you. Put it on your shoulders and learn from me. I am gentle and humble, and you will find rest.
translation_verse: Bibǝ lǝ busie mɔ bitsyike butǝ bǝtsyuǝ lǝ bekase asa bitsyiko mɔ ɔflɔ, itsyise nkpe lefonǝ nya mimbokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: This yoke is easy to bear, and this burden is light.
translation_verse: Itsyise bitsyikǝ bia muutsyisǝ mi ǝyuǝ, nya bitsyikǝ bia muutsyisǝ mi tsya eyifo fomfloo.”

english_verse: Some Pharisees noticed this and said to Jesus, “Why are your disciples picking grain on the Sabbath? They are not supposed to do this!”
translation_verse: Se Farisifɔ bamǝ dínyǝ nyamfoo, bátɛyi Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Fǝ bakasebi éyifo lesa nǝ díńyǝ lǝ bo Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi eto afi ǝsuǝ!”

english_verse: The crowds were so amazed they asked, “Could Jesus be the Son of David?”
translation_verse: Ayanisa nnya Yesu díyifo mfó éyifo betidi bamfó yanii, nya bátɔ bǝnkǝ, “Inni nwǝmfo ni Oka David eto ufluflu wǝ bákpo ɔhile bǝtsyǝ?”

english_verse: But when I force out demons by the power of God's Spirit, it proves that God's kingdom has already come to you.
translation_verse: Inni Beelsebul bomuu, Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ ni lǝǝtǝ mɛ ǝsuǝale bǝ nla awɔnɔ bua lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ. Nyamfo lɛ bote bǝ Onanto eto Sekadidi ébutsyǝ kasɔ lǝ mi nti koko.

english_verse: Haven't you read in the Law of Moses that the priests are allowed to work in the temple on the Sabbath? But no one says they are guilty of breaking the law of the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Nye bíankla lǝ Moses eto afi biǝnkǝ lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi saa, besumunyǝ ba nkpe lǝ Onanto eto Disumuyo ékeyifo asa nnya díńyǝ lǝ diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ, tsya fɛɛ bánlo mǝ dikpi lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: He went into the house of God, and then they ate the sacred loaves of bread that only priests are supposed to eat.
translation_verse: Údufǝ Onanto eto diyo, nya wǝ ku wǝ betidi dífi lesa nǝ bákpo atsyɔ bǝtǝ Onanto bédi, lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe kɔfi mǝntǝ kusu nko, ini mba lǝǝtǝ Onanto kedi hã nkpe kusu beedi lebolo nǝmǝ.

english_verse: Don't you know what the Scriptures mean when they say, “Instead of offering sacrifices to me, I want you to be merciful to others?” If you knew what this means, you would not condemn these innocent disciples of mine.
translation_verse: Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue nkǝ, ‘Kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ ni lesa nǝ maabɛbɛ, inni bebuki eto keditǝtǝ.’ Lǝ bǝ bɛnɔ nyamfo kasɔ tutuutuu, eni biembokpo akpofukutu belo betidi ekpi.

english_verse: Jesus left and went into one of their synagogues,
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dídu úsu Yudafɔ eto Katsyakɔ kǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Then Jesus told the man, “Hold out your hand.” The man did, and it became as healthy as the other one.
translation_verse: Mfó nya ɔ́tɛyi osani wǝ eto kɔni díkpǝ nkǝ, “Nǝ fǝ kɔni etsyue.” Únǝ ko útsyue, nya kɔni komǝ disi kótsya wǝ fe kase kunuǝfǝ komǝ nte.

english_verse: When Jesus found out what was happening, he left there and large crowds followed him. He healed all of their sick,
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛnɔ nkǝ bákle kɛnyɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝǝ, údu mfó, nya betidi kpǝ dítǝkǝko wǝ. Ótsya befimfi kenke.

english_verse: but warned them not to tell anyone about him.
translation_verse: Nya úti mǝ kusu nkǝ bǝntǝ lǝ betidi lǝ bate bǝ wǝ uni.

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as Isaiah the prophet had said,
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi nyamfo nko bǝ lǝ Onanto eto nnya ɔ́tɛyi útsyǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yesaya ǝsuǝ lǝ ibǝ itǝ sitinti nkǝ,

english_verse: “Here is my chosen servant! I love him, and he pleases me. I will give him my Spirit, and he will bring justice to the nations.
translation_verse: “Nwǝ mfo ni mɔ uyifoyifo wǝ mínlǝkǝ mintsyǝ, nwǝ maala, nya mǝǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ wǝ tinti. Muutǝ mɔ Lɛwɔnɔ lǝ dibǝ disiǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, nya woobe mɔ lekpokponkpo letsya utǝ kawunsiǝ kenke.

english_verse: If you are not on my side, you are against me. If you don't gather in the harvest with me, you scatter it.
translation_verse: “Utidi wǝ ke lentǝkǝko mɛɛ, uńyǝ mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya nwǝ ke lanwunsǝko mɛ lǝ bɔsɛketsyue ǝsuǝ eesensǝ nnya.

english_verse: Some people brought to Jesus a man who was blind and could not talk because he had a demon in him. Jesus healed the man, and then he was able to talk and see.
translation_verse: Mfó nya betidi bǝtsyuǝ lékpa osani utsyuǝ wǝ awɔnɔ bua nlɛ bulǝ, wǝ ni unǝmba nya uyifo nwǝ lendi etiki tsya báboko Yesu ɔflɔ. Yesu átsya wǝ itǝ ófo etiki budi, kǝnyǝ asa tsya.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking, so he said to them: Any kingdom where people fight each other will end up ruined. And a town or family that fights will soon destroy itself.
translation_verse: Yesu áte mǝ nsusu nyaso ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Sekakedikɔ saa sia laama akpa akpa, kǝńyǝ lǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ebɔkɛ sɛklɛ. Nya umǝ nye diyo saa nǝ laama akpa akpa kǝńyǝ lǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, eboba lǝ akpa.

english_verse: If I use the power of Beelzebul to force out demons, whose power do your own followers use to force them out? Your followers are the ones who will judge you.
translation_verse: Lǝ bɛlɛ bɔtɛyi biǝ awɔnɔ bua eto ɔtɔnkotɔnko eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ maayɛ kala awɔnɔ bua kǝlǝkǝ lǝ betidi ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ bawe eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ mba ntǝkǝko mi laayɛ kala mǝ kǝlǝkǝ? Lesa nǝ mi kosate eto mba ntǝkǝko mi leeyifoo, lǝ bote bǝ bɛnlɛ sitinti bɔtɛyi.

english_verse: When an evil spirit leaves a person, it travels through the desert, looking for a place to rest. But when the demon doesn't find a place,
translation_verse: “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ, lǝ bala lɛwɔnɔ bua bǝlǝkǝ lǝ utidi ǝsuǝǝ, diesukayɛ nlebe nlebe bo lekoe kabɛbɛ kasɔnɔkɔ. Nya lǝ diǝnnyǝ kedufǝkɔ saa,
