english_verse: it goes off and finds seven other evil spirits even worse than itself. They all come and make their home there, and the person ends up in worse shape than before. That's how it will be with you evil people of today. Jesus' Mother and Brothers (Mark
translation_verse: Diesinkli kesu kakpa awɔnɔ bua akuanse bamba nnya nkpe ale enso ni nya beesinkli kesu kǝsiǝ mfó. Nya lǝ kalokɔɔ, utidi ǝmǝ eto asayifoyifo aabia kaso nnya kɔ. Nko yuutsyǝ itǝ mi mmi eto betidi bua bamfo nɛ.” Báwoe Ni Yesu Eto Batokpenyǝ Tinti?

english_verse: A good tree produces good fruit, and a bad tree produces bad fruit. You can tell what a tree is like by the fruit it produces.
translation_verse: “Kuyi sɛɛ saa aanwɔ ebibi sɛɛ, nya kuyi bua saa tsya aanwɔ ebibi bua. Bǝǝtsyǝ kuyi lekpo ɛyɛ lǝ ebibi nnya koanwɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You are a bunch of evil snakes, so how can you say anything good? Your words show what is in your hearts.
translation_verse: Mimba lɛbɔ bitsyi lǝ bawa eto kafo ǝsuǝ! Asa sɛɛ aambɔ ketsyi lǝ mi kɛnyɛ! Itsyise lesa nǝ diyi mi ketu ǝsuǝǝ, nnya mi kɛnyɛ lǝǝlǝkǝ katɛyi nɛ.

english_verse: I promise you on the day of judgment, everyone will have to account for every careless word they have spoken.
translation_verse: Nla miǝ ekpa ko mi wee bǝ, lǝ Lekpoyi Fɛfɛɛ, utsyuǝ saa ebutǝ etiki bimba saa nnya lɛbɔ lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ eto nkunta.

english_verse: On that day they will be told they are either innocent or guilty because of the things they have said. A Sign from Heaven (Mark
translation_verse: Itsyise fǝ kosate eto etiki nnya lɛbɔ fǝ lǝ kɛnyɛɛ, nya buufi bakponko fǝ lekpo balofǝ dikpi lee bǝtǝ fǝ lɛbɛ nɛ.” Yesu Áni Nkǝ Weembuyifo Ayanisa Saa Ote.

english_verse: Some Pharisees and teachers of the Law of Moses said, “Teacher, we want you to show us a sign from heaven.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya afi eto bateasa ku Farisifɔ bǝtsyuǝ lɛtɛyi Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, bola boǝ yifo ayanisa ǝtsyuǝ até lǝ bobe.”

english_verse: But Jesus replied: You want a sign because you are evil and won't believe! But the only sign you will get is the sign of the prophet Jonah.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Bebe, mi mmi eto betidi ba leesumu bǝfiǝ ku asa bimba. Bela biǝ biǝnyǝ ayanisa itsyi mɔ ɔflɔ, fɛɛ biembunyǝ ayanisa saa enso nnya dítsyi Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yona ɔflɔ.

english_verse: He was in the stomach of a big fish for three days and nights, just as the Son of Man will be deep in the earth for three days and nights.
translation_verse: Fe kase Yona dísiǝ eyi ǝtsyǝ ku ntsye ntsyǝ lǝ lɛkpɛ kplɛ ditsyuǝ eto kafoo, nko ke Utidi Eto Ubi tsya lɔɔkɛ lǝ eyi ǝtsyǝ ku ntsye ntsyǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ kasɔ kǝmiǝ nɛ.

english_verse: On the day of judgment the people of Nineveh will stand there with you and condemn you. They turned to God when Jonah preached, and yet here is something far greater than Jonah.
translation_verse: Lǝ Lekpoyi Fɛfɛɛ, Ninive eto betidi ebuńyǝ balo mi dikpi itsyise bátsyi bawuninsǝ se bánɔ Yona lébe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya. Nya lǝ ntɛyi mi, utsyuǝ kpe mi lenti mfo wǝ lɛmɔ onso Yona.

english_verse: The Queen of the South will also stand there with you and condemn you. She traveled a long way to hear Solomon's wisdom, and yet here is something much greater than Solomon. Return of an Evil Spirit (Luke
translation_verse: Lǝ Lekpoyi Fɛfɛɛ, Besio eto Oka wǝ dítsyi Ɔnwɛdikue ebotaka uńyǝ olo mi dikpi, itsyise ɔ́yɛ utsyi taa mfó úsu Oka Salomo ɔflɔ nkǝ lǝ usu ɔnɔ Oka Salomo eto abesibetiki. Fɛɛ nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, lesatsyuǝ nǝ nso Oka Salomo eto kobe kpe mi lenti mfo. Lɛwɔnɔ Bua Esi Disinkli Dibǝ Lɛlɛ Kǝsiǝkɔ Bɔbɛbɛ.

english_verse: it says, “I will go back to the home I left.” When it gets there and finds the place empty, clean, and neat,
translation_verse: diatɛyi ni ǝsuǝ nkǝ, ‘Muusinkli nsu kaka mínsiǝ kɔ.’ Lǝ dibǝ dinyǝ nkǝ mfó te fufuu, bákpa mfó nya betsyue bikǝ kukɔnɔ lǝ ni kafoo.

english_verse: While Jesus was still speaking to the crowds, his mother and brothers came and stood outside because they wanted to talk with him.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu nsi nlɛ etiki budi ku betidi bamǝǝ, wǝ ambe ku wǝ bayimisani ǝbǝ bǝńyǝ lǝ lekple mfó nya bála bǝ bedinko wǝ etiki.

english_verse: Someone told Jesus, “Your mother and brothers are standing outside and want to talk with you.”
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba díńyǝ mfó eto ɔni dísu ɔ́tɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Bebe, fǝ ambe ku fǝ bayimisani ńyǝ lǝ lekple bǝ bala bǝ beedinko fǝ etiki.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Who is my mother and who are my brothers?”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Owoe ni mɔ ambe nya bawe ni mɔ bayimisani?”

english_verse: Then he pointed to his disciples and said, “These are my mother and my brothers!
translation_verse: Nya óté wǝ bakasebi kɔni ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nnyǝ mɔ ambe ku mɔ bayimisani!

english_verse: Anyone who obeys my Father in heaven is my brother or sister or mother.”
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa wǝ leeyifo mɔ Anto wǝ nkpe kato eto lelabii, wǝ ni mɔ ɔyimisani ku mɔ ɔyimisio ku mɔ ambe nɛ.”

english_verse: Such large crowds gathered around him that he had to sit in a boat, while the people stood on the shore.
translation_verse: Betidi ba díbǝ bátsyilama wǝ efui tinti eso údufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ utsyuǝ nya úsiǝ lǝ kasɔ, nya sitiditu siamǝ díńyǝ lǝ utuflɔ mfó.

english_verse: Then he taught them many things by using stories. He said: A farmer went out to scatter seed in a field.
translation_verse: Údi mǝ etiki kpǝ ɔ́yɛnko lǝ akpá ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Lefe nǝ léfe mǝǝ, utsyuǝ uni ésu úsǝ eyibibi lǝ ɔkuɛ.

english_verse: Other seeds fell on thin, rocky ground and quickly started growing because the soil wasn't very deep.
translation_verse: Eyibibi nyamǝ ǝtsyuǝ tsya álo ékpo lǝ abanse ǝsuǝ, kaka sitǝ lemfui. Íkǝ mlǝ itsyise site siamǝ memfui.

english_verse: Some other seeds fell where thornbushes grew up and choked the plants.
translation_verse: Eyibibi nyamǝ eto ǝtsyuǝ álo ékpo lǝ biyu nti. Nya se íkee, biyu biamǝ áto íti nnya.

english_verse: Jesus' disciples came to him and asked, “Why do you use stories to speak to the people?”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu eto bakasebi díbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Beso feedi betidi etiki kayɛnko lǝ akpá ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: Everyone who has something will be given more. But people who don't have anything will lose even what little they have.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ ke asa ntee, buusi bǝtǝ wǝ bawunsǝ nya wɔɔkɛ kpǝ. Nya utidi wǝ kulesa lentee, nnya nte wǝ tsyaa, bɔɔlɛ nnya bafo wǝ lǝ ani.

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet Isaiah had said, “These people will listen and listen, but never understand. They will look and look, but never see.
translation_verse: Nyaso Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yesaya eto nnya ɔ́tɛyi utsyǝ ǝbǝ itǝ nko bǝ, ‘Betidi bamfo ebɔnɔ bãã, fɛɛ bǝmbɔnɔ kasɔ! Boonyǝ asa bãã, fɛɛ bǝmbunyǝ ekpanko mǝ

english_verse: Many prophets and good people were eager to see what you see and to hear what you hear. But I tell you they did not see or hear. Jesus Explains the Story about the Farmer (Mark
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ku basɛɛ kpǝ ábɛbɛ bǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ asa nnya bɛnlɛ buunyǝ, fɛɛ bǝnyǝ nya lǝ banɔ asa nnya bɛnlɛ bɔɔnɔ, fɛɛ bánnɔ.” Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Nwǝ Dísǝ Eyibibi Eto Lekpá Kasɔ Óte.

english_verse: The seeds that fell on rocky ground are the people who gladly hear the message and accept it at once.
translation_verse: Eyibibi nnya lélo ékpo lǝ kabansesɔɔ, ńyǝ itǝ betidi ba laanɔ ditiki nǝmǝ nya baafo ni ku disuǝyuǝ lamfolamfo.

english_verse: The seeds that fell along the road are the people who hear the message about the kingdom, but don't understand it. Then the evil one comes and snatches the message from their hearts.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa wǝ laanɔ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ itsyi lǝ Onanto eto Sekadidi eto letsyabebe fɛ woannɔ ni kasɔɔ, eyifo fe eyibibi nnya lélo ékpo lǝ usunte ɔflɔ nya olontidi ǝmǝ lǝǝbǝ kǝnǝ nnya báto mfó kǝlǝkǝ lǝ mǝ akɔɛsi.

english_verse: The seeds that fell among the thornbushes are also people who hear the message. But they start worrying about the needs of this life and are fooled by the desire to get rich. So the message gets choked out, and they never produce anything.
translation_verse: Eyibibi nnya dídufǝ lǝ biyu nti ni betidi ba laanɔ ditiki nǝmǝ. Fɛɛ disibubu lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto bikǝ ku ke setabikɛ sia laawɛ utidi kakpee, aato keti ditiki nǝmǝ, itǝ diannwɔ ebibi.

english_verse: The seeds that fell on good ground are the people who hear and understand the message. They produce as much as
translation_verse: Nya eyibibi nnya lélo ékpo lǝ kasɔ sɛɛ ǝsuǝ ni betidi ba laanɔ ditiki nǝmǝ nya baanɔ ni kasɔ. Nya dianwɔ ebibi, ǝtsyuǝ kolofa, ǝtsyuǝ awosi akua, nya ǝtsyuǝ tsya awosi ǝtsyǝ.” Yesu Átɛyi Lekpá Itsyi Sefa Wunyɛwunyɛ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus then told them this story: The kingdom of heaven is like what happened when a farmer scattered good seed in a field.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ lekpá bamba nkǝ, “Onanto eto sekakedikɔ ale utsyuǝ wǝ díse eyibibi sɛɛ lǝ wǝ ɔkuɛ.

english_verse: But while everyone was sleeping, an enemy came and scattered weed seeds in the field and then left.
translation_verse: Lǝ ketsye eto lefe nǝ utsyuǝ saa nlabe selabee, olontidi utsyuǝ ésu úsǝ eyibibi wuliwuli ókpo lǝ akpa nyamǝ nti nya údu.

english_verse: When the plants came up and began to mature, the farmer's servants could see the weeds.
translation_verse: Se eyibibi nyamǝ lébe itsyiko bɔnwɔɔ, sefa sia olontidi ǝme dísu úse ókpo lǝ ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ tsya étsyiko ǝsuǝ bulǝkǝ kate.

english_verse: The servants came and asked, “Sir, didn't you scatter good seed in your field? Where did these weeds come from?”
translation_verse: “Mfó nya ɔkuɛnsate eto beyifoyifo dísu bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, ‘Boanto, búnyǝ boǝ eyibibi sɛɛ fesǝ lǝ fǝ ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ. Nya se sefa siamfo dítsyi?’

english_verse: “An enemy did this,” he replied. His servants then asked, “Do you want us to go out and pull up the weeds?”
translation_verse: “Útǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, ‘Olontidi utsyuǝ díyifo nyamfo nɛ.’ “Bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, ‘Ala fǝ busu busu sefa siamǝ bulǝkǝ?’

english_verse: Although it is the smallest of all seeds, it grows larger than any garden plant and becomes a tree. Birds even come and nest on its branches.
translation_verse: Diyifo diyibibi nǝ nso bɔfɛ lǝ ni bǝtsyuǝ nti. Fɛɛ lǝ díkǝ lébee, diamɔ kafiani kuyi ko laaso bɔmɔ lǝ ko bǝtsyuǝ kenke nti. Diesense kalɛ nya baklɔbɛ lǝǝbǝ kato ayo lǝ ko kalɛ ǝsuǝ.” Yesu Átɛyi Lekpá Itsyi Lǝ Ǝyǝnkisǝsa Nnya Beefi Katsyakasǝ Ku Nnamfo Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus told them another story: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a farmer plants a mustard seed in a field.
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi mǝ lekpá bamba ditsyuǝ nkǝ, “Onanto eto sekakedikɔ ale utidi wǝ léto diyibibi kɛkɛ ditsyuǝ lǝ wǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: Jesus used stories when he spoke to the people. In fact, he did not tell them anything without using stories.
translation_verse: Yesu éfi akpá óte betidi bamǝ asa nyamfo kenke. Wéndi mǝ etiki saa nnya dímanyɛ lǝ akpá ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet had said, “I will use stories to speak my message and to explain things hidden since the creation of the world.” Jesus Explains the Story about the Weeds
translation_verse: Úyifo nko itǝ lǝ ditiki nǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛtɛyi utsyǝ lǝ ibǝ itǝ nkǝ, “Muudi mǝ etiki nyɛnko lǝ akpá ǝsuǝ. Muudi mǝ etiki nnya nkpe lǝ kakula ǝsuǝ idu lǝ kawunsiǝ eto kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ke.” Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Lekpá Nǝ Ɔ́tɛyi Itsyi Lǝ Sefa Wunyɛwunyɛ Ǝsuǝ Eto Kasɔ.

english_verse: After Jesus left the crowd and went inside, his disciples came to him and said, “Explain to us the story about the weeds in the wheat field.”
translation_verse: Yesu édu lǝ betidi bamǝ ɔflɔ nya úsu diyo. Nya wǝ bakasebi díbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Lǝkǝ lekpá nǝ fátɛyi bo itsyi lǝ sefa wunyɛwunyɛ sia lɛkɛ lǝ ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ kasɔ ate bo.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: The one who scattered the good seed is the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nwǝ dísǝ eyibibi sɛɛ nyamǝ ni mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi.

english_verse: The field is the world, and the good seeds are the people who belong to the kingdom. The weeds are those who belong to the evil one,
translation_verse: Ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ ni kawunsiǝ. Nya eyibibi sɛɛ nyamǝ ni mba nkpe lǝ sekakedikɔ siamǝ. Sefa siamǝ ni betidi ba ni olontidi ǝmǝ eto bale.

english_verse: and the one who scattered them is the devil. The harvest is the end of time, and angels are the ones who bring in the harvest.
translation_verse: Nya olontidi wǝ dísǝ sefa bua siamǝ ni Obonsam. Bidikǝ dilǝkǝfe ni kawunsiǝ eto kalosǝkɔ. Nya mba lǝǝlǝkǝ bidike biamǝ ni Onanto eto batɔnkpe.

english_verse: Weeds are gathered and burned. That's how it will be at the end of time.
translation_verse: “Fe kase baakpa sefa kǝtsyǝ ditsyu katonsǝǝ, nko ke yuubǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto kalosǝkɔ nɛ.

english_verse: The Son of Man will send out his angels, and they will gather from his kingdom everyone who does wrong or causes others to sin.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi, ebotsyese mɔ batɔnkpe lǝ bǝlǝkǝ asa nnya lǝǝtǝ boeyifo abua ku babuayifo kenke betsyiko Onanto eto sekakedikɔ.

english_verse: Then he will throw them into a flaming furnace, where people will cry and grit their teeth in pain.
translation_verse: Boofi mǝmblɛ bato bakpe lǝ ditefɛnku manlo kǝmiǝ. Mfó boowi nku bayimi animi!

english_verse: But everyone who has done right will shine like the sun in their Father's kingdom. If you have ears, pay attention! A Hidden Treasure
translation_verse: Nya Onanto eto betidi luuyǝnde fe kofe lǝ mǝ Onanto eto umǝ. Mba ato nkpee, tsyue ato lǝ banɔ! Yesu Átɛyi Lekpá Itsyi Lǝ Bike Bia Lefo Konya Bia Béfi Bákula Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when someone finds a treasure hidden in a field and buries it again. Such a person is happy and goes and sells everything in order to buy that field. A Valuable Pearl
translation_verse: “Onanto eto sekakedikɔ ale bikǝ bia lefo koya béfi bákula lǝ ɔkuɛ utsyuǝ, nya utsyuǝ dísu ɔ́kɛ nnya nya úsi úfi ɔ́kula. Únyǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti, nyaso úsu úfi wǝ lesa saa óte nya úfí úsu óya ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ.” Yesu Átɛyi Lekpá Itsyi Lǝ Otsyabi Wǝ Léfo Koya Utsyuǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a shop owner is looking for fine pearls.
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Onanto eto sekakedikɔ ale nwǝ laate bikǝ wǝ nlɛ atsyabi nnya laanɔ bobe tinti bɔbɛbɛ.

english_verse: After finding a very valuable one, the owner goes and sells everything in order to buy that pearl. A Fish Net
translation_verse: Se úsu únyǝ ɔni wǝ lefo koya tinti onsoo, úfi lesa saa nǝ nte wǝ úsu óte nya úsu óya otsyabi ǝmǝ.” Yesu Átɛyi Lekpá Itsyi Lǝ Mba Laata Asabu Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a net is thrown into a lake and catches all kinds of fish.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi nkǝ, “Onanto eto sekakedikɔ esi sele asabu nnya báta bákpo lǝ lekpo, nnya bǝlǝkǝ akpɛ ate ate kpǝ.

english_verse: When the net is full, it is dragged to the shore, and the fishermen sit down to separate the fish. They keep the good ones, but throw the bad ones away.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ asabu nyamǝ díyii, bǝnǝ nnya bábɔnko lǝ ntu báboko ditukpenkpe nya bǝsiǝ lǝ kasɔ nya básɛ akpɛ nyamǝ bǝlǝkǝ. Básɛ edidi bákpo lǝ etsyitsya, nya básɛ nnya beendi béwui.

english_verse: That's how it will be at the end of time. Angels will come and separate the evil people from the ones who have done right.
translation_verse: Nko ke yuutsyǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto kalokɔ nɛ. Onanto eto batɔnkpe ebubǝ bǝlǝkǝ betidi sɛɛ betsyiko lǝ babua nti.

english_verse: Then those evil people will be thrown into a flaming furnace, where they will cry and grit their teeth in pain. New and Old Treasures
translation_verse: Nya booto babuayifo bakpe lǝ ditefɛnku manlo kǝmiǝ. Mfó nya nkuwiwi ku anyiyimiyimi lɔɔkɛ.” Yesu Áte Asa Itsyi Lǝ Asa Fɔfɔ Ku Akoko Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus asked his disciples if they understood all these things. They said, “Yes, we do.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Bɛnɔ asa nyamfo kasɔ?” Bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Ee.”

english_verse: So he told them, “Every student of the Scriptures who becomes a disciple in the kingdom of heaven is like someone who brings out new and old treasures from the storeroom.” The People of Nazareth Turn against Jesus (Mark
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nyalɛ, nyamfo lɛ bote nkǝ, afi eto oteasa saa wǝ léfiani Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eto okasebi, ale Onamute utsyuǝ wǝ lǝǝlǝkǝ bike fɔfɔ ku bekoko lǝ mi kakulakɔ kaboko lekple.” Nasaretfɔ Áni Yesu.

english_verse: When Jesus had finished telling these stories, he left
translation_verse: Nya se Yesu lɛtɛyi akpá nyamfo kenke ólosǝǝ, údu mfo.

english_verse: and went to his hometown. He taught in their synagogue, and the people were so amazed that they asked, “Where does he get all this wisdom and the power to work these miracles?
translation_verse: Úsinkli úsu mǝ umǝ, nya óte asa lǝ mǝ katsyakɔ. Nya betidi ba lɛnɔ wǝ asatetee, íyifo mǝ yanii, nya bátɔ bǝ, “Sieti nwǝ mfo lékase kobe komfo eto okle útsyiko? Nya sie únyǝ ǝsuǝale nnya ufi ɔnlɛ ayanisa nyamfo buyifo kate?

english_verse: Isn't he the son of the carpenter? Isn't Mary his mother, and aren't James, Joseph, Simon, and Judas his brothers?
translation_verse: Inni wǝ ni nwǝ laawoe keyi eto ubi ǝmǝ lee? Nya eni Maria tsya ni wǝ ambe, nya wǝ bayimisani tsya ni Yakob, Yosef, Simon ku Yuda, nya wǝ bayimisio kenke tsya nkpe bo lenti mfo lee?

english_verse: Don't his sisters still live here in our town? How can he do all this?”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ sieti ɔkɛ wǝ kobe ku ǝsuǝale nyamfo eto okle utsyiko?”

english_verse: So the people were upset because of what he was doing. But Jesus said, “Prophets are honored by everyone, except the people of their hometown and their own family.”
translation_verse: Nko ini bǝ wǝ asa eyifo mǝ kɛnyɛlele, nyaso báni wǝ. Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi kpe dibu lǝ kalebe saa, enso wǝ umǝ ku wǝ batokpenyǝ hã eto nti bǝ beembu wǝ.”

english_verse: And because the people did not have any faith, Jesus did not work many miracles there.
translation_verse: Se bámfo bánɔ esoo, Yesu ményifo ayanisa kpǝ lǝ mǝ nti.

english_verse: When Jesus got out of the boat, he saw the large crowd. He felt sorry for them and healed everyone who was sick.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛbɔ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafo. Nya se únyǝ sitiditu siamǝ, mǝ asa ǝnǝ wǝ kafo nya ótsya mba ni befimfi. Yesu Ǝtǝ Betidi Akpi Anɔ Lesa Bédi.

english_verse: “Come on!” Jesus said. Peter then got out of the boat and started walking on the water toward him.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bǝ!” Nya Petro lɛbɔ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafo nya útsyiko bɔyɛ lǝ ntu bomǝ kesu Yesu ɔflɔ.

english_verse: so much he swore to give her whatever she wanted.
translation_verse: Mfó útsyǝ kɛnyɛ útǝ wǝ nkǝ, “Ekpe lǝ lesa saa bǝ muutǝ fǝ lesa nǝ ke fatɔ!”

english_verse: and told his officials, “This is John the Baptist! He has come back from death, and that's why he has the power to work these miracles.”
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi wǝ beyifoyifo nkǝ, “Utidi emfo ni Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes wǝ bátakǝsǝ betsyiko ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ, nyaso onkpe ǝsuǝale weeyifo ayanisa kate nɛ.”

english_verse: Herod had earlier arrested John and had him chained and put in prison. He did this because John had told him, “It isn't right for you to take Herodias, the wife of your brother Philip.”
translation_verse: Itsyise Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes átɛyi Herodes nkǝ, “Onanto eto kɔfi mǝntǝ kusu bǝ fi fǝ ɔyimi eto usiǝ Herodia.”

english_verse: But the girl's mother told her to say, “Here on a serving plate I want the head of John the Baptist!”
translation_verse: Wǝ ambe ǝtǝ ɔ́tɔ nkǝ, “Tǝ mɛ mɔmɔ mɔmɔ mfoo, Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes eto disi nǝ béfi bǝtǝkǝ lǝ ɔkpɛ tɛnklɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: It was taken on a serving plate to the girl, and she gave it to her mother.
translation_verse: Béfi disi nǝmǝ nkpe lǝ ɔkpɛ tɛnklɛ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ disiobi nǝmǝ nya wuntsya dífi ni úsu útǝ wǝ ambe.

english_verse: John's followers took his body and buried it. Then they told Jesus what had happened. Jesus Feeds Five Thousand (Mark
translation_verse: Yohanes eto bakasebi ǝbǝ bétsyi wǝ ɔkɔ ǝmǝ bésu bébike, nya bésu bátɛyi Yesu.

english_verse: But when Peter saw how strong the wind was, he was afraid and started sinking. “Save me, Lord!” he shouted.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se únyǝ kase ufiebi ǝmǝ nkpe kɛnyɛ alee, sikpi ǝmuǝ wǝ nya útsyiko bonya kedufǝ lǝ ntu bomǝ kǝmiǝ. Mfó nya Petro lefã ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute, fo ǝtǝ mɛ!”

english_verse: But they said, “We have only five small loaves of bread and two fish.”
translation_verse: Bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Lesa nǝ nte bo ete ni abolo anɔ ku akpɛ ǝnuǝ.”

english_verse: After Jesus heard about John, he crossed Lake Galilee to go to some place where he could be alone. But the crowds found out and followed him on foot from the towns.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu lɛnɔ nkǝ bálo Yohanes, úsiǝ lǝ ɔklɔ údu mfó úsu kaka lɛbiɔ. Fɛɛ se betidi lɛnɔ nkoo, bédu lǝ mǝ kǝmǝ, báyɛ akpa bésu kaka onkpe.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “They don't have to leave. Why don't you give them something to eat?”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Yanle bǝ bedu. Mi kosatee, bitǝ mǝ lesatsyuǝ lǝ bedi.”

english_verse: Jesus asked his disciples to bring the food to him,
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bifi nnya beboko mɛ mfo.”

english_verse: and he told the crowd to sit down on the grass. Jesus took the five loaves and the two fish. He looked up toward heaven and blessed the food. Then he broke the bread and handed it to his disciples, and they gave it to the people.
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi betidi bamfó nkǝ bǝsiǝ kasɔ lǝ sefa ǝsuǝ. Nya ufi abolo anɔ ku akpɛ ǝnuǝ nyamǝ, nya óbesǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi kato nya ɔ́sɔ Onanto ani. Úbudi abolo nyamǝ nya úfi útǝ wǝ bakasebi. Nya bakasebi bamǝ tsya dífi nnya bǝtǝ betidi bamǝ.

english_verse: After everyone had eaten all they wanted, Jesus' disciples picked up twelve large baskets of leftovers.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa édi úmi. Nya se wǝ bakasebi lɛsɛ nnya bédi díbuu, íyi etsyitsya lefosi ǝnuǝ.

english_verse: At once, Jesus made his disciples get into a boat and start back across the lake. But he stayed until he had sent the crowds away.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ wǝ bakasebi lébe bédufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ bákatɔ lǝ ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ eto lekpake nǝ nse. Wǝ akɛ mfó nkǝ lǝ utsyǝ betidi bamǝ kusu.

english_verse: Then he went up on a mountain where he could be alone and pray. Later in the evening, he was still there.
translation_verse: Se útsyǝ betidi bamǝ kusu olosǝǝ, wǝ mate ábe úsu kɔtini kato úsu óto ola. Se ketsye lefe léyoo, wǝ mate hã ákɛ mfó.

english_verse: By this time the boat was a long way from the shore. It was going against the wind and was being tossed around by the waves.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfóo, ɔklɔ ǝmǝ ébɔyɛ ótsyo. Ufiebi lɛ bɔsɔ kekleke ketinkǝsǝ kufuǝ komǝ, nya ntu nlɛ bɔsɔ kedufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafo fe wuufusǝ.

english_verse: A little while before morning, Jesus came walking on the water toward his disciples.
translation_verse: Nya fe kolensiǝntu kplɛ eto abombo ǝtsyǝ ku olosiǝ eto abombo akua nti sekaa, Yesu áyɛ lǝ ntu ǝsuǝ úbǝ údufǝ wǝ bakasebi bamǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: When they saw him, they thought he was a ghost. They were terrified and started screaming.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ bǝnyǝ bǝ ɔyɛ lǝ ntu ǝsuǝ mfóo, báte sikpi nya bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Ɔkɔ uni!” Nyaso bétsyiko bofa ku sikpi bembembe!

english_verse: At once, Jesus said to them, “Don't worry! I am Jesus. Don't be afraid.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu édi mǝ etiki lamfolamfo ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bekpe utu! Mɔ uni! Biante sikpi!”

english_verse: Peter replied, “Lord, if it really is you, tell me to come to you on the water.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Petro lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute, lǝ fǝ uni sitintii, tǝ lǝ nyɛ lǝ ntu ǝsuǝ mbǝ ntu fǝ.”

english_verse: At once, Jesus reached out his hand. He helped Peter up and said, “You surely don't have much faith. Why do you doubt?”
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo Yesu ǝnǝ kɔni útsyue, ɔ́kɔbe wǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ bofokanɔ lǝ mɛ ǝmbǝ ale! Beso fáyaki?”

english_verse: When Jesus and Peter got into the boat, the wind died down.
translation_verse: Se mǝ inuǝ bamǝ dídufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafoo, ufiebi ǝmǝ ko lɛyɛ bɔsɔ.

english_verse: The men in the boat worshiped Jesus and said, “You really are the Son of God!” Jesus Heals Sick People in Gennesaret (Mark
translation_verse: Mfó nya bakasebi bamǝ lése akonki básumu wǝ. Nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Onanto eto ubi feni sitinti!” Yesu Átsya Befimfi Lǝ Genesaret.

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples crossed the lake and came to shore near the town of Gennesaret.
translation_verse: Se báyila ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ báyo ditukpenkpe nǝ nsee, báyifǝ lǝ Genesaret eto kasɔ.

english_verse: The people found out he was there, and they sent word to everyone who lived in this part of the country. So they brought all the sick people to Jesus.
translation_verse: Mfoó, betidi bamǝ ǝnyǝ Yesu bǝtsyǝ lekpo. Nyaso bésu bákpa befimfi ba kenke nkpe lǝ lekpake nǝmfó báboko Yesu ɔflɔ.

english_verse: They begged him just to let them touch his clothes, and everyone who did was healed.
translation_verse: Bálɛ wǝ lekpakpa bǝ lǝ utǝ lǝ befimfi lǝ betidi wǝ awu eto atosi ete. Nya mba kenke dítidi wǝ awu eto atosii, mǝ bufi ǝyuǝ mǝ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Every plant that my Father in heaven did not plant will be pulled up by the roots.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Kuyi saa kuyi ko mɔ Anto wǝ nkpe Kato dímantoo, boosu ko bewi.

english_verse: “Why don't your disciples obey what our ancestors taught us to do? They don't even wash their hands before they eat.”
translation_verse: “Beso fɛ fǝ bakasebi leenyifo lǝ bo banamǝ eto akpa ǝsuǝ? Bǝǝmflǝ mǝ ani kukɔnɔ fe kase bo akpa laate fɛ beedi lesa!”

english_verse: Jesus answered: Why do you disobey God and follow your own teaching?
translation_verse: Yesu átɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Nya beso biani nya bienyifo lǝ Onanto eto afí ǝsuǝ fɛ biǝtǝkǝko mi batekoko, banakoko eto asatete kama?

english_verse: But you let people get by without helping their parents when they should. You let them say that what they have has been offered to God.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mi áte biǝ utidi nwǝ lesatsyuǝ nte nkǝ woofo ni bufi kawunsǝko wǝ anto nye ambe fɛ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, ‘Mfi lesa nǝmfo ntsyǝ kɛnyɛ miǝ muufi ni ntǝ Onanto.’

english_verse: Is this any way to show respect to your parents? You ignore God's commands in order to follow your own teaching.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, yensi fe bǝ bebu mǝ anto mǝ. Kusu komfo ǝsuǝ nya biayɛ kani Onanto eto kɔfi itǝ lǝ bitǝkǝko mi kosate eto asatete kama nɛ.

english_verse: It is useless for you to worship me, when you teach rules made up by humans.” What Really Makes People Unclean (Mark
translation_verse: Bimba ete beeyifo mɔ keyifo. Itsyise kawunsiǝ eto betidi eto asa ete baate lǝ mɔ ale eto kɛnyɛ.’ ” Asa Nnya Leetsyi Utu Kǝmiǝǝ Nnya Laanansǝ Utidi Nɛ.

english_verse: Stay away from those Pharisees! They are like blind people leading other blind people, and all of them will fall into a ditch.”
translation_verse: Nyaso biankpe mǝ kɛnyɛ. Bete fe bǝnǝmba ba nyɛnko bǝnǝmba bamba. Nya lǝ unǝmba ɔni yɛnko unǝmba bambaa, mǝ inuǝ ba tã ebudu banɔ bedufǝ lǝ kubiǝ kafo.”

english_verse: Jesus did not say a word. But the woman kept following along and shouting, so his disciples came up and asked him to send her away.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu ménfe kɛnyɛ ɔtɛyi wǝ kulesa. Mfó nya wǝ bakasebi lɛnyi besu balɛ wǝ lekpakpa bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “La wǝ lǝ udu, itsyise utǝkǝko bo ɔlɛ bofã ketisǝ bo ato!”

english_verse: The food you put into your mouth doesn't make you unclean and unfit to worship God. The bad words that come out of your mouth are what make you unclean.”
translation_verse: Inni lesa nǝ leedufǝ utidi eto kɛnyɛ laabiasǝ wǝ, bomu etiki nnya laabɔ ketsyi lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛɛ, nnya laabiasǝ wǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: Then his disciples came over to him and asked, “Do you know you insulted the Pharisees by what you said?”
translation_verse: Nya wǝ bakasebi díbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Eyi fǝnkǝ se Farisifɔ lɛnɔ asa nnya fátɛyii, éla mǝ kɛnyɛ lele tinti?”

english_verse: Peter replied, “What did you mean when you talked about the things that make people unclean?”
translation_verse: Petro átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lǝkǝ lekpa nǝmfo kasɔ ate bo.”

english_verse: Jesus then said: Don't any of you know by now what I am talking about?
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nyalɛ betidi ba laannɔ asa kasɔ ete binsi binii?

english_verse: Don't you know that the food you put into your mouth goes into your stomach and then out of your body?
translation_verse: Binyi biǝ lesa saa nǝ didufǝ utidi lǝ kɛnyɛ, ayɛ kedufǝ wǝ lǝ kafo, nya weesie ni kabɔsǝ fe ɔflɔ kewi?

english_verse: But the words that come out of your mouth come from your heart. And they are what make you unfit to worship God.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ etiki nnya laabɔ ketsyi lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ, aabɔ ketsyi lǝ wǝ utu kǝmiǝ. Nya nyamfo lǝǝtǝ utidi laanansǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ kesumu eto kusu ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Out of your heart come evil thoughts, murder, unfaithfulness in marriage, vulgar deeds, stealing, telling lies, and insulting others.
translation_verse: Itsyise itsyi lǝ wǝ utu kǝmiǝ nya diǝtǝ weeyifo asa bua fe ditidilo, sɛsɔnɔdi nye disenkpo, setsyetɔ, kuyu ku bidiatɛyitɛyi ku betidi eto ayebiasǝbiasǝǝ, laabɔ ketsyi nɛ.

english_verse: These are what make you unclean. Eating without washing your hands will not make you unfit to worship God. A Woman's Faith (Mark
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo eto kakle laanansǝ utidi nɛ. Fɛɛ lǝ utidi mǝmflǝ kɔni fɛ udi lesa fe kase Farisifɔ laatee, nyamfo aannansǝ utidi.” Yesu Átsya Usio Utsyuǝ Eto Ubi.

english_verse: Jesus said, “I was sent only to the people of Israel! They are like a flock of lost sheep.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu dítǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Israel bebi nte fe basamu ba lénya ɔflɔ hã Onanto lékpe mɛ nkǝ nsu.”

english_verse: Large crowds came and brought many people who were paralyzed or blind or lame or unable to talk. They placed them, and many others, in front of Jesus, and he healed them all.
translation_verse: Betidi kpǝ ǝbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ nya bákpa mba léba bankpoo kasɔ, bǝnǝmba, abafa, bamumu, ku befimfi bamba kpǝ báboko wǝ ɔflɔ, nya ótsya mǝ bufi.

english_verse: Jesus left and went to the territory near the towns of Tyre and Sidon.
translation_verse: Yesu édu mfó úsu lekpake nǝ lɛfi kǝmǝnkplɛ inuǝ ka ni Tiro ku Sidon ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Suddenly a Canaanite woman from there came out shouting, “Lord and Son of David, have pity on me! My daughter is full of demons.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Kana eto usio utsyuǝ díbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ, nya ókafã bembembe kalɛ wǝ lekpakpa nkǝ, “Mɔ Onamute, Oka David eto kafo eto ubi, nyǝ mɛ kaminsǝ! Lɛwɔnɔ bua ǝbǝ disi lǝ mɔ ubisiobi ǝsuǝ nya dítǝ ɔnlɛ kanyi bunyǝ fefe!”

english_verse: The woman came closer. Then she knelt down and begged, “Please help me, Lord!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya usio ǝmfo díbǝ óse akonki lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ Onamute, wunsǝko mɛ!”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “It isn't right to take food away from children and feed it to dogs.”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Yanlɛkɛ bǝ befi bekpefi eto didisa bato bakpe mǝ bakpa.”

english_verse: “Lord, this is true,” the woman said, “but even puppies get the crumbs that fall from their owner's table.”
translation_verse: Usio ǝmǝ ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mɔ Onamute, ite nko sitinti. Fɛɛ bakpa bamǝ tsya aafo didisa wɛlɛwɛlɛ nǝ lélo lékpo kasɔ lǝ mǝ onamute eto ɔpunu kalɔ budii.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Dear woman, you really do have a lot of faith, and you will be given what you want.” At that moment her daughter was healed. Jesus Heals Many People
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Eyifo usio wǝ nkpe bofokanɔ tinti! Lesa nǝ fanlɛ bɔbɛbɛɛ, lǝ ibǝ itǝ fǝ.” Nyaso lǝ lefe nǝmǝ tutuutu wǝ ubisiobi ǝmǝ ǝmuǝ ale. Yesu Átsya Betidi Kpǝ Bufi.

english_verse: From there, Jesus went along Lake Galilee. Then he climbed a hill and sat down.
translation_verse: Yesu édu mfó, nya ɔyɛ lǝ Galilea eto ditumbukplɛ ɔflɔ óbe kɔtini kutsyuǝ nya úsiǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: Everyone was amazed at what they saw and heard. People who had never spoken could now speak. The lame were healed, the paralyzed could walk, and the blind were able to see. Everyone was praising the God of Israel. Jesus Feeds Four Thousand (Mark
translation_verse: Iyifo betidi bamǝ yanii se bǝnyǝ bamumu nlɛ etiki budi, mba léba bankpoo kasɔ nlɛ botaka kayɛ, abafa nlɛ bɔyɛ, bǝnǝmba nlɛ asa bunyǝ nya bátɛsǝ Israel eto Onanto. Yesu Ǝtǝ Betidi Akpi Ana Lesa Bédi.

english_verse: Jesus called his disciples together and told them, “I feel sorry for these people. They have been with me for three days, and they don't have anything to eat. I don't want to send them away hungry. They might faint on their way home.”
translation_verse: Yesu ákpadi wǝ bakasebi óboko wǝ ɔflɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Sitiditu siamfo eto asa lɛ mɛ kaminsǝ, itsyise bǝbǝ mɛ ɔflɔ diyi tsyǝfǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ nɛ, nya kulesa ente mɔmɔ boodi. Manla miǝ lǝ yani mǝ lǝ bedu ku kafo fufu, lǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ isu enako mǝ lǝ kusu.”

english_verse: His disciples said, “This place is like a desert. Where can we find enough food to feed such a crowd?”
translation_verse: Wǝ bakasebi átɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Sieti buunyǝ didisa butǝ mǝ lǝ mfimnti mfo bǝ lǝ betidi ba kpenkpe mfo lǝ bedi bemi?”

english_verse: Jesus asked them how much food they had. They replied, “Seven small loaves of bread and a few little fish.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Didisa lesia nte mi?” Nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Abolo akuanse ku akpɛ kɛkɛ asiani ete nte.”

english_verse: After Jesus had told the people to sit down,
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu átɛyi sitiditu siamǝ nkǝ bǝsiǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: he took the seven loaves of bread and the fish and gave thanks. He then broke them and handed them to his disciples, who passed them around to the crowds.
translation_verse: Úfi abolo akuanse ku akpɛ nyamǝ, nya ɔ́sɔ Onanto ani, nya úbudi nnya nya úfi útǝ wǝ bakasebi bamǝ. Nya bésie nnya bǝtǝ betidi bamǝ.

english_verse: Everyone ate all they wanted, and the leftovers filled seven large baskets.
translation_verse: Mǝmblɛ édi lesa nǝmǝ bemi. Nya se básɛ nnya wɛlɛwɛlɛ nnya díbuu, íyi etsyitsya akuanse.

english_verse: After Jesus had sent the crowds away, he got into a boat and sailed across the lake. He came to shore near the town of Magadan.
translation_verse: Se Yesu dítsyǝ betidi bamǝ kusu olosǝǝ, údufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ nya údu úsu Magadan eto lekpake eti.

english_verse: Don't you know by now that I am not talking to you about bread? Watch out for the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees!
translation_verse: Ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ biannɔ kasɔ biǝ inni didisa ǝsuǝ míndi mi etiki mintsyiko? Bebe sinini lǝ Farisifɔ ku Sadukifɔ lǝ mǝ ǝyǝnkisǝsa ǝsuǝ!”

english_verse: When Jesus and his disciples were near the town of Caesarea Philippi, he asked them, “What do people say about the Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Yesu ésu lekpake nǝ lɛfi Kaisarea Filipi eto umǝ. Mfó nya ɔ́tɔ wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Owoe betidi laatɛyi bǝ mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi, ni?”

english_verse: Finally, the disciples understood that Jesus wasn't talking about the yeast used to make bread, but about the teaching of the Pharisees and Sadducees. Who Is Jesus? (Mark
translation_verse: Nyamfo ǝsuǝ fɛ bakasebi bamǝ lɛnɔ kasɔ bǝ inni ǝyǝnkisǝsa ǝsuǝ ɔnlɛ mǝ kɔlɛ bɔlɛ nɛ. Bomu lǝ asa nnya Farisifɔ ku Sadukifɔ laate ǝsuǝ ɔnlɛ. Petro Ǝlǝkǝ Ɔ́tɛyi Nkǝ Yesu Ni Utidi Wǝ Bákpo Ɔhile Bǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: He told them: If the sky is red in the evening, you say the weather will be good.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lǝ kofe lɛ diyo budufǝ nya binyǝ asɔmiloku lɛsɛ hǝǝ, biatɛyi biǝnkǝ kalesɛ ebusiǝ kusɛɛ.

english_verse: But if the sky is red and gloomy in the morning, you say it is going to rain. You can tell what the weather will be like by looking at the sky. But you don't understand what is happening now.
translation_verse: Nya kolesiǝntu lǝ kofe lɛ boto nya kawunsiǝ ditsyiko bona tũũ, biatɛyi biǝnkǝ ɔsɔmi ǝbǝ bɔni. Bialɛ ola akafo bote kase kawunsiǝ luubǝ kǝtsyǝ lǝ binyǝ asɔmiloku eto ditsyǝbi. Fɛɛ beso biǝmbofo asa nnya luubǝ lǝ lefe nǝmǝ bote!

english_verse: The disciples answered, “Some people say you are John the Baptist or maybe Elijah or Jeremiah or some other prophet.”
translation_verse: Bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Bǝtsyuǝ bǝ fǝ ni Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes. Bǝtsyuǝ tsya bǝ fǝ ni Elia, nya babamba tsya bǝ Yeremiya nye Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi bamba utsyuǝ feni.”

english_verse: From then on, Jesus began telling his disciples what would happen to him. He said, “I must go to Jerusalem. There the nation's leaders, the chief priests, and the teachers of the Law of Moses will make me suffer terribly. I will be killed, but three days later I will rise to life.”
translation_verse: Idu lǝ lefe nǝmfó ɛntɔɔ, Yesu étsyiko wǝ bakasebi etiki bɔtɛyi kakpasǝ wuee nkǝ, “Ele bǝ nsu Yerusalem lǝ nsu nyǝ kanyi lǝ beninǝ, besumunyǝ ninǝ ku lǝ afi eto bateasa eto ani. Boolo mɛ. Fɛɛ lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto ebotakasǝ mɛ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ nsinkli mbǝ nkpǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus then warned them, “Watch out! Guard against the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bebe sinini lǝ Farisifɔ ku Sadukifɔ eto ǝyǝnkisǝsa nnya baakpe lǝ asa ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: The disciples talked this over and said to each other, “He must be saying this because we didn't bring along any bread.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya bétsyiko mǝ ǝsuǝ bɔtɔ bǝnkǝ, “Nnya bóentsyi didisa saa eso ɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi mmǝǝ.”

english_verse: The Son of Man will soon come in the glory of his Father and with his angels to reward all people for what they have done.
translation_verse: Itsyise Utidi Eto Ubi ebubǝ ku Onanto eto batɔnkpe lǝ Onanto eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝ, nya moofo utsyuǝ saa kayo lǝ keyifo ka úyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: So I will call you Peter, which means “a rock.” On this rock I will build my church, and death itself will not have any power over it.
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi minkǝ fǝ Petro, fǝ diye ni leba. Nya leba nǝmfo ǝsuǝ mooto mɔ bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ ńyǝnsǝ, nya ukpǝ eto ǝsuǝale kulaa tsya embutǝkǝ ni kato.

english_verse: Then Jesus asked, “But who do you say I am?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Nya mi nkpǝ? Owoe biatɛyi biǝ wǝ mini?”

english_verse: Simon Peter spoke up, “You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God.”
translation_verse: Simon Petro ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Fǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ. Fǝ ni Onanto wǝ nsi nkpǝ eto Ubi.”

english_verse: Jesus told him: Simon, son of Jonah, you are blessed! You didn't discover this on your own. It was shown to you by my Father in heaven.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Simon, Yona eto ubi, átɛyi nnya ɛlɛkɛ. Itsyise ɔnukualɛ ǝmfo mámbɔ utsyi lǝ utidinini saa eto kɛnyɛ. Bomu mɔ Anto wǝ nkpe katoo, wǝ dílǝkǝ nnya óte fǝ nɛ.

english_verse: I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven, and God in heaven will allow whatever you allow on earth. But he will not allow anything you don't allow.
translation_verse: Muufi Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eto kasafui ntǝ fǝ. Lesa saa nǝ fookle lǝ kasɔ mfoo, bookle ni kato. Nya lesa saa nǝ foonyankli lǝ kasɔ mfoo, boonyankli ni tsya kato.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples not to tell anyone he was the Messiah. Jesus Speaks about His Suffering and Death (Mark
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lékpe wǝ bakasebi kɔfi nkǝ, “Biantɛyi kuutsyǝ saa biǝnkǝ mɔ ni Nwǝ Bákpo Ɔhile Bǝtsyǝ ǝmǝ.” Yesu Édi Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Wǝ Kanyinyǝnyǝ Ku Wǝ Ukpǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Peter took Jesus aside and told him to stop talking like that. He said, “God would never let this happen to you, Lord!”
translation_verse: Petro ákpa wǝ úsuko lɛkpɔ, nya utsyiko buyǝnki kakpe wǝ katɛyi nkǝ, “Kulefe, Bonamute! Nyamfo eto okle okakaaka! Yǝmbǝ fǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ kulefe, kulefe!”

english_verse: Jesus turned to Peter and said, “Satan, get away from me! You're in my way because you think like everyone else and not like God.”
translation_verse: Yesu átsyi ɔ́wuninsǝ ɔ́tɛyi Petro nkǝ, “Obonsam, du mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ! Eyifo nwǝ eto eyifosa dińyǝ mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise fǝ nsusu bomfo menyifo Onanto eto nle, bomu utidinini eto nle.”

english_verse: Then Jesus said to his disciples: If any of you want to be my followers, you must forget about yourself. You must take up your cross and follow me.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Lǝ utsyuǝ aala nkǝ wǝǝtǝkǝko mɛɛ, ele bǝ ɔni wǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ utsyi wǝ uyikabie utǝkǝko mɛ.

english_verse: If you want to save your life, you will destroy it. But if you give up your life for me, you will find it.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa wǝ laala nkǝ waata wǝ nkpǝ eto disii, woonyansǝ mu. Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ loonyansǝ wǝ nkpǝ lǝ mɔ butǝkǝko ǝsuǝǝ, wuunyǝ mu.

english_verse: What will you gain, if you own the whole world but destroy yourself? What would you give to get back your soul?
translation_verse: Nte kutǝkǝ ko utidi luunyǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto bikǝ kenke afiani wǝ bele nya ónyansǝ wǝ nkpǝ. Nye be utidi luufi oflomako bǝ lǝ unyǝ nkpǝ manlo?

english_verse: I promise you some of those standing here will not die before they see the Son of Man coming with his kingdom.
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi kakpasǝ wuee minkǝ, betidi bǝtsyuǝ kpe mi lenti mfo ba lembukpǝ isu ese lefe nǝ bǝnyǝ Utidi Eto Ubi dibǝ fe Oka.”

english_verse: There in front of the disciples, Jesus was completely changed. His face was shining like the sun, and his clothes became white as light.
translation_verse: Se bǝńyǝ mfóo, bǝnyǝ bǝ Yesu eto ǝsuǝ áfloma. Wǝ ǝnǝmi lɛ buyǝnde fe kofe, nya awu nnya onkpe diflubi futututu ɛnlɛ boto lǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Then the disciples understood Jesus was talking to them about John the Baptist. Jesus Heals a Boy (Mark
translation_verse: Mfó bakasebi bamǝ léte bǝ Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes ɔnlɛ. Yesu Ála Lɛwɔnɔ Bua Ditsyuǝ Utsyiko Lǝ Osaibi Utsyuǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Six days later Jesus took Peter and the brothers James and John with him. They went up on a very high mountain where they could be alone.
translation_verse: Eyi akua kamaa, Yesu ákpa Petro ku Yakobo ku wǝ ɔyimi Yohanes mate úsuko kɔtini ko letaka eto disi kato.

english_verse: All at once Moses and Elijah were there talking with Jesus.
translation_verse: Mfó nya bakasebi itsyǝ bamǝ dínyǝ Moses ku Elia banlɛ etiki budi ku Yesu.

english_verse: So Peter said to him, “Lord, it is good for us to be here! Let us make three shelters, one for you, one for Moses, and one for Elijah.”
translation_verse: Nya Petro lébesǝ ɔkɔɛ kato ɔ́tɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Bonamute, ɛlɛkɛ tinti bǝ búbǝ mfo! Lǝ aalaa, mooto ebu ǝtsyǝ. Fǝ lɔni, Moses lɔni nya Elia tsya lɔni.”

english_verse: While Peter was still speaking, the shadow of a bright cloud passed over them. From the cloud a voice said, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him. Listen to what he says!”
translation_verse: Se ɔnlɛ nyamfo bɔtɛyii, lɛsɔmiloku nǝ nlɛ buyǝnde ábɔ díti mǝ, nya bánɔ ɔkɔɛ lɛbɔ utsyi lɛsɔmiloku nǝmǝ kǝmiǝ nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Nyǝ mɔ Ubi lala, wǝ ǝsuǝ mǝǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ. Bitsyue wǝ koto!”

english_verse: When the disciples heard the voice, they were so afraid they fell flat on the ground.
translation_verse: Se bakasebi itsyǝ bamfo lɛnɔ ɔkɔɛ ǝmfoo, sikpi ǝmuǝ mǝ tinti nya béfi ǝnǝmi béfusǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: But Jesus came over and touched them. He said, “Get up and don't be afraid!”
translation_verse: Yesu ésu mǝ ɔflɔ nya útidi mǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Betaka bińyǝ! Biante sikpi!”

english_verse: When they opened their eyes, they saw only Jesus.
translation_verse: Se bátakasǝ ǝnǝmi bábe katoo, bǝnnyǝ kuutsyuǝ saa enso Yesu mate hã.

english_verse: The disciples asked Jesus, “Don't the teachers of the Law of Moses say Elijah must come before the Messiah does?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya bakasebi bamǝ lɛtɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Beso afi eto bateasa laatɛyi bǝnkǝ ele bǝ Elia ka bubǝ ɔtɔnsǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus told them, “Elijah certainly will come and get everything ready.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Sitinti ele bǝ Elia ka bubǝ ɔtɔnsǝ bǝ lǝ ɔlɔ lesa saa utsyǝ.

english_verse: In fact, he has already come. But the people did not recognize him and treated him just as they wanted to. They will soon make the Son of Man suffer in the same way.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ Elia ébubǝ koko, tsya bǝnyǝ wǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo, nya béyifo wǝ disale nǝ kee bála. Nko ke booyifo mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi tsya disiale nɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples returned to the crowd. A man knelt in front of him
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi díbǝ báyo sitiditu siamǝ ɔflɔ, osani utsyuǝ ǝbǝ óse akonki lǝ Yesu ɔflɔ.

english_verse: and said, “Lord, have pity on my son! He has a bad case of epilepsy and often falls into a fire or into water.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute, nyǝ mɔ ubisaibi ǝmfo kaminsǝ! Ɔlɛ budukanɔ eto bufi bufi nya ɔnlɛ kanyi bunyǝ tinti. Lefe kpǝ weedu kanɔ kedufǝ lǝ ute nye ntu ǝsuǝ tsya.

english_verse: I brought him to your disciples, but none of them could heal him.”
translation_verse: Nkpa wǝ mboko fǝ bakasebi ɔflɔ, fɛɛ bámfo wǝ botsya.”

english_verse: Jesus said, “You people are too stubborn to have any faith! How much longer must I be with you? Why do I have to put up with you? Bring the boy here.”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mii, mmi eto betidi, beso biamfo mɛ kanɔ nya bitidi ato mǝ? Nte lefe nǝ eto okle ele bǝ nkɛ mi lǝ ɔflɔ? Nte lefe nǝ eto lefe ele bǝ mfi nnǝ mi! Bekpa osaibi ǝmǝ beboko mɛ mfo!”

english_verse: Then Jesus spoke sternly to the demon. It went out of the boy, and right then he was healed.
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu léto ɔkɔɛ ókpe lɛwɔnɔ bua nǝ nlɛ dikpefi nǝmǝ bulǝ nya lɛbɔ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ! Nya bufi bomǝ díyuǝ wǝ lamfolamfo.

english_verse: Later the disciples went to Jesus in private and asked him, “Why couldn't we force out the demon?”
translation_verse: Kamaa, bakasebi bamǝ mate ǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Beso bóamfo lɛwɔnɔ bua nǝmǝ bola kǝlǝkǝ?”

english_verse: While Jesus and his disciples were going from place to place in Galilee, he told them, “The Son of Man will be handed over to people
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ bakasebi bamǝ kenke díbǝ bátsya lǝ Galilea, Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Boofi Utidi Eto Ubi bakpe betidi lǝ ani,

english_verse: who will kill him. But three days later he will rise to life.” All of this made the disciples very sad. Paying the Temple Tax
translation_verse: nya boolo wǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto ebotakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ oboko nkpǝ.” Nyamfo álo bakasebi bamǝ ani. Báfo Oko Lǝ Onanto Eto Disumuyo.

english_verse: When Jesus and the others arrived in Capernaum, the collectors for the temple tax came to Peter and asked, “Does your teacher pay the temple tax?”
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi díbǝ bédufǝ Kapernaum, Yudafɔ eto mba laafo Disumuyo eto oko ǝbǝ bátɔ Petro bǝnkǝ, “Mi oteasa tsya aafó Disumuyo eto oko ǝmǝ?”

english_verse: “Yes, he does,” Peter answered. After they had returned home, Jesus went up to Peter and asked him, “Simon, what do you think? Do the kings of this earth collect taxes and fees from their own people or from foreigners?”
translation_verse: Petro ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Ee, woafó.” Nya se Petro dísu údufǝ diyo, Yesu áka wǝ bɔtɔ nkǝ, “Simon, be ni fǝ nsusu? Bawoe eto ani ele bǝ bafo oko bǝtǝ kawunsiǝ eto baka? Bǝmǝnyǝ eto ani lee bafɔ?”

english_verse: Peter answered, “From foreigners.” Jesus replied, “Then their own people don't have to pay.
translation_verse: Petro ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Bafɔ.” Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Nyalɛ ete bǝ yanle bǝ bǝmǝnyǝ fo oko saa nɛ.

english_verse: But we don't want to cause trouble. So go cast a line into the lake and pull out the first fish you hook. Open its mouth, and you will find a coin. Use it to pay your taxes and mine.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se boanla boǝ boata kuutsyuǝ saa bubu esoo, su ditumbukplɛ eto kɛnyɛ lǝ ata osakɛ. Lɛkpɛ tutɛ nǝ fuulǝkǝǝ, ebunyǝ atabi lǝ ni kɛnyɛ nnya looyo afo boofǝ eto oko ǝmǝ. Lǝkǝ nya, lǝ esu afo bokufǝ eto oko.”

english_verse: If your eye causes you to sin, poke it out and get rid of it. You would be better off to go into life with only one eye than to have two eyes and be thrown into the fires of hell. The Lost Sheep (Luke
translation_verse: Nya lǝ fǝ dinǝmi ǝǝtǝ feeyifo lebua, lǝkǝ ni ato akpe! Ɛlɛkɛ itǝ fǝ bǝ nyǝ nkpǝ ku dinǝmi lɛwɛ enso bǝ kɛ ǝnǝmi ǝnuǝ lǝ befi fǝ bato bakpe lǝ ditefɛnku manlo kǝmiǝ. Yesu Áte Asa Itsyi Lǝ Osamu Wǝ Lenya Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Don't you think you should show pity to someone else, as I did to you?”
translation_verse: Kase mínyǝ fǝ kaminsǝǝ, nko ke ele bǝ eni fintsya nyǝ fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ uyifoyifo kaminsǝ nɛ.’

english_verse: But if you are as humble as this child, you are the greatest in the kingdom of heaven.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ ni ɔkplɛnyǝ kenke lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔɔ, wǝ ni utidi wǝ laabokosǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ fe dikpefi nǝmfo eto okle.

english_verse: And when you welcome one of these children because of me, you welcome me. Temptations To Sin (Mark
translation_verse: “Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ loofo bekpefi bamfo eto utsyuǝ lǝ mɔ disii, mɔɔ ini ófo. Mǝntǝ Lǝ Kuutsyuǝ Lǝ Udufǝ Lǝ Lebua Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If the follower refuses to listen to them, report the matter to the church. Anyone who refuses to listen to the church must be treated like an unbeliever or a tax collector. Allowing and Not Allowing
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mfó tsya ɔni woannɔ kasɔɔ, nyalɛ tǝ lǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ lǝ banɔ. Nya lǝ mfó tsya woannɔ kasɔɔ, lǝkǝ ato lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ fe utidi wǝ lǝmbǝ bofokanɔ nye nwǝ laafo umǝnko.

english_verse: It will be terrible for people who cause even one of my little followers to sin. Those people would be better off thrown into the deepest part of the ocean with a heavy stone tied around their necks!
translation_verse: “Fɛɛ lǝ utsyuǝ ebutǝ bekpefi ba léfo mɛ bánɔ mfo eto ɔni kplo lǝ onya kusu lǝ mɔ wǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, yɔɔlɛkɛ itǝ wǝ eso lǝ befi ukue batsyasǝ lǝ kukuǝ kplɛ bakpe wǝ lǝ simuǝ bato wǝ bakpe lǝ lekpo eto kaka letsyo, lǝ unǝ ntu ukpǝ.

english_verse: If your hand or foot causes you to sin, chop it off and throw it away! You would be better off to go into life paralyzed or lame than to have two hands or two feet and be thrown into the fire that never goes out.
translation_verse: Lǝ fǝ kɔni nye kokpa ǝǝtǝ feeyifo lebua, la ko ǝlǝkǝ ato akpe. Ɛlɛkɛ itǝ fǝ bǝ yɛ edufǝ lǝ nkpǝ kǝmiǝ kɔni kɔnwɛ nye kokpa kɔnwɛ enso bǝ yɛ ani ǝnuǝ nye akpa ǝnuǝ lǝ befi fǝ bato bakpe lǝ ditefɛnku manlo kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: If one of my followers sins against you, go and point out what was wrong. But do it in private, just between the two of you. If that person listens, you have won back a follower.
translation_verse: “Lǝ fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ áta fǝ úbuu, su wǝ ɔflɔ, lǝ ǝlǝkǝ wǝ botakebu ate wǝ. Nya tǝ lǝ nyamfo lǝ ɛkɛ lǝ fonko wǝ eto nti ete. Lǝ ɔ́nɔ fǝ kasɔɔ, te fǝ esinkli eyifo lɔni ku fǝ ɔyimi nɛ.

english_verse: Don't be cruel to any of these little ones! I promise you their angels are always with my Father in heaven.
translation_verse: Itsyise Utidi Eto Ubi ǝbǝ nkǝ lǝ ofo betidi ba lénya kusu lǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: I am sure that finding it would make you happier than having the
translation_verse: Nya lǝ únyǝ wǝǝ, mɔtɛyi mi miǝ wuunyǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ enso awosi ɔwɔnɔmbǝ ɔwɔnɔmbǝ ba dímanya mfó ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: That's how it is with your Father in heaven. He doesn't want any of these little ones to be lost. When Someone Sins (Luke
translation_verse: Nko ke inte itǝ mi Anto wǝ nkpe kato nɛ, nkǝ woannla nkǝ bekpefi kɛkɛ bamfo eto kuutsyuǝ lǝ onya. Yɛnko Fǝ Ɔyimitsyuǝ Wǝ Léta Fǝ Úbu Lǝ Kusu Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But if that one refuses to listen, take along one or two others. The Scriptures teach that every complaint must be proven true by two or more witnesses.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ wǝmbɔnɔ fǝ kasɔɔ, tǝ lǝ betidi inuǝ nye itsyǝ lǝ banɔ ko mi lǝ adansiɛ seka eso, fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛtɛyi.

english_verse: I promise you God in heaven will allow whatever you allow on earth, but God will not allow anything you don't allow.
translation_verse: “Nyaso nlɛ mimblɛ bɔtɛyi minkǝ lesa saa nǝ biokle lǝ kasɔ mfoo, bookle ni kato. Nya lesa saa ke bionyankli lǝ kasɔ mfoo, boonyakli ni kato tsya.

english_verse: I promise that when any two of you on earth agree about something you are praying for, my Father in heaven will do it for you.
translation_verse: “Nya nsi nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi tsya minkǝ, lǝ mi inuǝ eto kɛnyɛ eyifo kani lǝ kasɔ mfo bɛnlɛ lesaatsyuǝ bɔtɔɔ, mɔ Anto wǝ nkpe kato ebuyifo ni utǝ mi.

english_verse: Whenever two or three of you come together in my name, I am there with you. An Official Who Refused To Forgive
translation_verse: Itsyise kaka mi inuǝ nye itsyǝ letsya lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝǝ, nkpe mi lenti.” Ele Bǝ Bukefi Bo Bayimitsyuǝ Eto Botakebu Bukatsyǝ Mǝ Lefe Saa.

english_verse: Peter came up to the Lord and asked, “How many times should I forgive someone who does something wrong to me? Is seven times enough?”
translation_verse: Nya Petro lɛnyi ɔ́fi Yesu nya ɔ́tɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute, lǝ mɔ ɔyimitsyuǝ ata mɛ ubuu, sesia ele bǝ mfi ntsyɛ wǝ? Sekuanse lee?”

english_verse: As he was doing this, one official was brought in who owed him
translation_verse: Kase útsyǝ kasɔ koo, bákpa osani utsyuǝ wǝ nsi wǝ kayo kplɛ báboko wǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: But he didn't have any money to pay what he owed. The king ordered him to be sold, along with his wife and children and all he owned, in order to pay the debt.
translation_verse: Kulesa ente wǝ wuufi ofo kayo kamǝ esoo, oka ǝmǝ ǝtǝ nkǝ bate wǝ ku wuusiǝ ku wǝ bebi ku lesa saa nǝ nte wǝ lǝ befi bafo kayo kamǝ.

english_verse: The official got down on his knees and began begging, “Have pity on me, and I will pay you every cent I owe!”
translation_verse: “Itǝ uyifoyifo ǝmfo áse akonki lǝ oka ǝmǝ ǝnǝmi ɔ́lɛ wǝ lekpakpa ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, ‘Tsyǝ ǝsuǝ ko mɛ, moofo fǝ kayo kamǝ kenke.’

english_verse: The king felt sorry for him and let him go free. He even told the official that he did not have to pay back the money.
translation_verse: Wǝ asa ǝnǝ oka ǝmǝ kafo, nyaso úfi kayo kamǝ kenke ɔ́tsyɛ wǝ nya óyani wǝ údu.

english_verse: The man got down on his knees and began begging, “Have pity on me, and I will pay you back.”
translation_verse: “Wǝ uyifotsyuǝ ǝmǝ álɛ wǝ lekpakpa ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, ‘Tsyǝ ǝsuǝ ko mɛ, moofo fɛ kayo ka kenke minsi fǝ!’

english_verse: But the first official refused to have pity. Instead, he went and had the other official put in jail until he could pay what he owed.
translation_verse: “Fɛɛ ɔ́ni nya útǝ nkǝ beti wǝ bakpe lǝ Aba eto diyo isu ese lefe nǝ woofo kayo ka kenke unsi wǝ.

english_verse: When some other officials found out what had happened, they felt sorry for the man who had been put in jail. Then they told the king what had happened.
translation_verse: Se wǝ beyifotsyuǝ dínyǝ lesa nǝ díbǝǝ, ílǝ mǝ tinti nya bésu bátɛyi Oka ǝmǝ lesa saa nǝ díbǝ.

english_verse: The king called the first official back in and said, “You're an evil man! When you begged for mercy, I said you did not have to pay back a cent.
translation_verse: “Nyaso ókpadi wǝ uyifoyifo ǝmǝ óboko wǝ ɔflɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, ‘Fǝ ndomunyǝ bua! Mfi fǝ kayo ka fensi mɛ kenke ntsyɛ fǝ itsyise álɛ mǝ lekpakpa eso.

english_verse: The king was so angry that he ordered the official to be tortured until he could pay back everything he owed.
translation_verse: Kafo ányi Oka ǝmǝ tinti nya útǝ nkǝ bǝnǝ wǝ koto bakpe wǝ lǝ diyo isu ese lefe nǝ woofo kayo kamǝ kenke olosǝ.”

english_verse: That is how my Father in heaven will treat you, if you don't forgive each of my followers with all your heart.
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lélosǝ nkǝ, “Nko ke mɔ Anto wǝ nkpe kato luuyifo utsyuǝ saa lǝ mi nti wǝ lembufi ɔtsyɛ wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ itsyi taa wǝ lɛkɔɛsi ke nɛ.”

english_verse: When Jesus finished teaching, he left Galilee and went to the part of Judea east of the Jordan River.
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛtɛyi asa nyamfo ólosǝǝ, údu lǝ Galilea úsu Yudea eto lɛkpɔ nǝ nkpe lǝ Yordan eto ketu eto lekpake nǝ nse.

english_verse: Some people are unable to marry because of birth defects or because of what someone has done to their bodies. Others stay single in order to serve God better. Anyone who can accept this teaching should do so.” Jesus Blesses Little Children (Mark
translation_verse: Esu kpǝ kpe nyaso betidi leemfi bǝsiǝ. Bǝtsyuǝ nko bále mǝ nɛ. Bǝtsyuǝǝ, betidi díyifo mǝ nko. Bǝtsyuǝ tsya emfi bǝsiǝ itsyise bala bǝ beefi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eto keyifo. Nwǝ loofo wǝ ǝsuǝ bufi kǝtǝ asatete nyamfoo, tǝ lǝ uyifo nko.” Bákpa Bekpefi Baboko Yesu Ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Large crowds followed him, and he healed their sick.
translation_verse: Betidi kpǝ ǝtǝkǝko wǝ nya ótsya mǝ efimbi, efimbi mfó.

english_verse: Some Pharisees wanted to test Jesus. They came up to him and asked, “Is it right for a man to divorce his wife for just any reason?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Farisifɔ bǝtsyuǝ díbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ bǝ baato wǝ babe, nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Bo kɔfi ǝtǝ kusu nkǝ osani ni wǝ usiǝ lǝ kusu saa ola ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Don't you know in the beginning the Creator made a man and a woman?
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Biankla tɔ lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ bǝ taa ketsyikokɔɔ, nwǝ díyifo kawunsiǝǝ, usio ku osani úyifo betidi?

english_verse: That's why a man leaves his father and mother and gets married. He becomes like one person with his wife.
translation_verse: Nya Onanto lɛtɛyi nkǝ, ‘Lǝ nyamfo eso osani luudu lǝ wǝ anto ku ambe utsyǝ nya wuufi kusiǝ, nya mǝ inuǝ bamǝ loofiani utidi ɔni.’

english_verse: Then they are no longer two people, but one. And no one should separate a couple God has joined together.”
translation_verse: Itsyise lǝ nnya kamaa, bensiyifo betidi inuǝ. Bomu bafiani utidi ɔni. Nyaso yanle bǝ utidi sense lesa nǝ Onanto dífi ɔ́kɔ lǝ bǝtsyuǝ.”

english_verse: The Pharisees asked Jesus, “Why did Moses say a man could write out divorce papers and send his wife away?”
translation_verse: Farisifɔ bamǝ átɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛ beso Moses dítǝ kusu nkǝ ele bǝ osani tǝ wǝ usiǝ kukue nkǝ ɔlɛ wǝ bɔni fɛ lǝ ɔni wǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “You are so heartless! That's why Moses allowed you to divorce your wife. But from the beginning God did not intend it to be that way.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mi letotidi eso Moses dítǝ kusu nkǝ bɛni bese ku bǝsiǝ nɛ. Yɛntsyǝ nko lǝ kasɔ ketsyikokɔ.

english_verse: I say if your wife has not committed some terrible sexual sin, you must not divorce her to marry someone else. If you do, you are unfaithful.”
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ osani wǝ ke lɛni wǝ usiǝ, nya inni lǝ disenkpo eso nya úsu úfi usio bambaa, ókpo kusiǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus told them, “Only those people who have been given the gift of staying single can accept this teaching.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Inni utsyuǝ saa loofo asatete nyamfo bofo nko, enso mba Onanto dítǝ nnya nko hã.

english_verse: Some people brought their children to Jesus, so he could place his hands on them and pray for them. His disciples told the people to stop bothering him.
translation_verse: Betidi bǝtsyuǝ ákpa bekpefi báboko Yesu ɔflɔ bǝ lǝ ufi ani utǝkǝ lǝ mǝ, lǝ oto ola utǝ mǝ, fɛɛ wǝ bakasebi ényenki bákpe betidi bamǝ.

english_verse: A man came to Jesus and asked, “Teacher, what good thing must I do to have eternal life?”
translation_verse: Osani utsyuǝ ǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ diyi lɔni nya ɔ́tɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Oteasa, nte lesa sɛɛ nǝ ele bǝ nyifo fɛ lǝ nnyǝ nkpǝ manlo?”

english_verse: “Which ones?” the man asked. Jesus answered, “Do not murder. Be faithful in marriage. Do not steal. Do not tell lies about others.
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɔ nkǝ, “Nte afi nnya?” Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Manlo utidi, mendi sɛsɔnɔ, menyu, manla fuutsyuǝ kɛnyɛ,

english_verse: After Jesus had placed his hands on the children, he left. A Rich Young Man (Mark
translation_verse: Nya Yesu dífi wǝ ani útǝkǝ lǝ mǝ ókpo mǝ atsyɔ, nya údu lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ. Yɔɔkɛ Ale Itǝ Batabinyǝ Bǝ Bedufǝ Onanto Eto Sekakedikɔ.

english_verse: Jesus said to him, “Why do you ask me about what is good? Only God is good. If you want to have eternal life, you must obey his commandments.”
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu dítǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Beso fanlɛ mɛ kasɛɛ ka ele bǝ beyifo bɔtɔ? Utidi ɔni hã nkpe wǝ ni ɔsɛɛ. Lǝ ala fǝ ǝǝnyǝ nkpǝ manloo, yɛ lǝ Onanto eto afi nyamǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: But Jesus said, “Let the children come to me, and don't try to stop them! People who are like these children belong to God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ bakasebi bamǝ nkǝ, “Bitǝ bekpefi kusu lǝ bǝbǝ mɛ ɔflɔ, nya bienti mǝ kusu, itsyise Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eyifo fǝ mba laabokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ fe ekpefi bamfo eto okle eto kale.”

english_verse: But many who are now first will be last, and many who are last will be first.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi kpǝ ba ntɔ sɛtɔ mɔmɔɔ, ebubǝ bafe kama. Nya mba ntǝkǝ kama mɔmɔɔ, ebubǝ bafe batɔ sɛtɔ.

english_verse: Respect your father and mother. And love others as much as you love yourself.”
translation_verse: bu fǝ anto ku fǝ ambe, nya lǝ ala fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ fe kase faala fǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: The young man said, “I have obeyed all of these. What else must I do?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya okosobi ǝmfo dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mbuyifo lǝ afi nyamfo kenke ǝsuǝ. Be disi ibu bǝ nyifo?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If you want to be perfect, go sell everything you own! Give the money to the poor, and you will have riches in heaven. Then come and be my follower.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ aala fǝ aaflɔɔ, su lǝ esu efi fǝ lesa saa nǝ nte fǝ ate. Nya lǝ efi atabi nnya fǝnyǝ esu ǝtǝ bakombo, nya fuunyǝ bikǝ ǝtsyǝ kato nɛ. Nyamfo eto kamaa, sinkli ǝbǝ ǝtǝkǝko mɛ.”

english_verse: When the young man heard this, he went away sad, because he was very rich.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se okosobi ǝmǝ lɛnɔ nyamfoo, údu ku bulǝ lǝ lɛkɔɛsi. Itsyise bikǝ kpǝ akɛ wǝ.

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “I tell you, it's terribly hard for rich people to get into the kingdom of heaven!
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi kakpasǝ wuee minkǝ, yɔɔkɛ ale itǝ batabinyǝ bǝ bedufǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ.

english_verse: In fact, it's easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to get into God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Nsi nlɛ bɔtɛyi bio minkǝ, iyuǝ itǝ ɔtɔmini ku lekoko bǝ ɔyɛ lǝ okabikǝ eto ofo ofe enso bǝ otabinyǝ dufǝ lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ.”

english_verse: When the disciples heard this, they were greatly surprised and asked, “How can anyone ever be saved?”
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ bakasebi bamǝ lɛnɔ nyamfoo, íyifo mǝ yanii, nyaso bátɔ bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛ owoe ko luunyǝ nkpǝ manlo?”

english_verse: Jesus looked straight at them and said, “There are some things people cannot do, but God can do anything.”
translation_verse: Yesu ábe mǝ tũũ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Kawunsiǝ eto utidi saa ǝmbofo nyamfo buyifo. Fɛɛ Onanto, wǝ ebofo lesa saa buyifo.”

english_verse: Peter replied, “Remember, we have left everything to be your followers! What will we get?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Petro lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bee! Bóayani lesa saa bútsyǝ bǝ lǝ butǝkǝko fǝ. Be bo luunyǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: Yes, all of you have become my followers. And so in the future world, when the Son of Man sits on his glorious throne, I promise you will sit on twelve thrones to judge the twelve tribes of Israel.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, lefe nǝ mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi, luubǝ lǝ mɔ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ mbǝ nsiǝ lǝ mɔ lekankpomɛ ǝsuǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ fɔfɔ kamǝǝ, mi lefosi inuǝ ba dítǝkǝko mɛ tsya ebusiǝ lǝ akankpomɛ ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ bekponko Israel bebi eto lefosi mmfo nnuǝ bomǝ lekpo.

english_verse: All who have given up home or brothers and sisters or father and mother or children or land for me will be given
translation_verse: Nyaso utsyuǝ saa wǝ léyani diyo nye bayimisani nye bayimisio nye anto nye ambe nye bebi nye kakuɛ utsyǝ nkǝ lǝ utǝkǝko mɛ esoo, ebunyǝ nnya kayofofo kolofa ku kama. Nya Onanto ebutǝ wǝ nkpǝ bo lǝmbɔkɛ kalosǝkɔ.

english_verse: As Jesus was telling what the kingdom of heaven would be like, he said: Early one morning a man went out to hire some workers for his vineyard.
translation_verse: “Onanto eto sekakedikɔ ale eyibibi eto ɔkuɛmfo utsyuǝ wǝ létaka ku olesiǝtu nkǝ weesu ɔbɛbɛ diyi eto beyifoyifo bǝtsyuǝ lǝ beyifo keyifo bǝtǝ wǝ lǝ ɔkuɛ.

english_verse: After he had agreed to pay them the usual amount for a day's work, he sent them off to his vineyard.
translation_verse: Ɔkuɛmfo ǝmǝ ku beyifoyifo bamǝ átɔnɔ lǝ diyi eto keyifo eto kayofofo ǝsuǝ, ini sika flubia sɔni eto atabi, nya bédu bésu eyibibi eto ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ.

english_verse: About nine that morning, the man saw some other people standing in the market with nothing to do.
translation_verse: “Se ɛsɔ abombo ɔwɔnɔmbǝǝ, osani ǝmǝ esi úsu asi nya únyǝ se basani bǝtsyuǝ ńyǝ mfó banlɛ kulesa buyifo.

english_verse: He promised to pay them what was fair, if they would work in his vineyard.
translation_verse: Nyaso ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, ‘Mi tsya su biyifo keyifo lǝ mɔ eyibibi eto ɔkuɛ lǝ mfo mi kayo ka dińyǝ itǝ.’

english_verse: So they went. At noon and again about three in the afternoon he returned to the market. And each time he made the same agreement with others who were loafing around with nothing to do.
translation_verse: Nyaso bésu ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ. “Nya lǝ lefosi abombo ǝnuǝ ku lǝ kakɔmi eto abombo ǝtsyǝ eto lefee, usi úyifo nko ke.

english_verse: Finally, about five in the afternoon the man went back and found some others standing there. He asked them, “Why have you been standing here all day long doing nothing?”
translation_verse: Se ibu sɛkɛ lǝ abombo anɔ lǝ ɛsɔɔ, usi úsu asi mfó nya únyǝ betidi bǝtsyuǝ nsi ńyǝ mfó. Ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, ‘Beso binyǝ mfo diyi wɔlɔlɔlɔ bɛnlɛ diyi bobiasǝ keyifo menyifo menyifo?’

english_verse: “Because no one has hired us,” they answered. Then he told them to go work in his vineyard.
translation_verse: “Bǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, ‘Kuutsyuǝ saa mǝntǝ bo keyifo nkǝ buyifo.’ “Nyaso ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, ‘Nyalɛ, mi tsya su mɔ eyibibi eto ɔkuɛ bisu biyifo keyifo.’

english_verse: That evening the owner of the vineyard told the man in charge of the workers to call them in and give them their money. He also told the man to begin with the ones who were hired last.
translation_verse: “Se ditsyitsyo lefe léyoo, ɔkuɛnsate ǝmǝ átɛyi beyifoyifo eto uninǝ nkǝ, ‘Kpadi beyifoyifo bamǝ lǝ afo mǝ kayo, tsyiko lǝ mba díbǝ fɛfɛ ǝsuǝ, lǝ esu alosǝ lǝ mba leka bubǝ ǝsuǝ.’

english_verse: When the workers arrived, the ones who had been hired at five in the afternoon were given a full day's pay.
translation_verse: “Báfo betidi ba díbǝ keyifo ku ditsyitsyo eto abombo anɔ eto utsyuǝ saa sika flubia sɔni sɔni.

english_verse: they began complaining to the owner of the vineyard.
translation_verse: Se báfo atabi nyamǝǝ, betsyiko bunyenki kakpe ɔkuɛnsate ǝmǝ bǝnkǝ,

english_verse: They said, “The ones who were hired last worked for only one hour. But you paid them the same that you did us. And we worked in the hot sun all day long!”
translation_verse: ‘Betidi fɛfɛ ba báfo éyifo keyifo lebombosɔsɔ lɔni hã, nya bomba mfo díńyǝ lǝ kofe buyifo keyifo diyi wɔlɔlɔlɔ tsyaa, kayofofo kani ete bǝtǝ bo!’

english_verse: The owner answered one of them, “Friend, I didn't cheat you. I paid you exactly what we agreed on.
translation_verse: “Mfó ɔkuɛnsate ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi mǝ ɔni nkǝ, ‘Ɔyimitsyuǝ, nɔ. Mántafa fǝ. Lee, inni diyi lɔni eto keyifo eto kayofofo ka ni sika flubia sɔni ǝsuǝ bókpe asi?

english_verse: Take your money now and go! What business is it of yours if I want to pay them the same that I paid you?
translation_verse: Nyaso fo fǝ kayofofo lǝ edu esu diyo. Iyifo mɔ lelabi miǝ mǝǝtǝ utidi fɛfɛ ǝmfo kayofofo fe kase mínkǝtǝ fǝ ke.

english_verse: Don't I have the right to do what I want with my own money? Why should you be jealous, if I want to be generous?”
translation_verse: Lee, mimbǝ kusu meeyifo ku mɔ atabi kase maala? Lee, mɔ kafoɛkpɛ ka meeyifo nlɛ fǝ ǝnǝmi bɔsɛ?’ ”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “So it is. Everyone who is now last will be first, and everyone who is first will be last.” Jesus Again Tells about His Death (Mark
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu álosǝ ɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Betidi ba ni bafɛfɛ ebofiani betutɛ nya mba ni betutɛ loofiani bafɛfɛ.” Yesu Esi Údi Etiki Ditsyǝfǝ Itsyi Lǝ Wǝ Ukpǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When Jesus heard them, he stopped and asked, “What do you want me to do for you?”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝkǝnǝ únyǝ nya ókpadi mǝ nkǝ bǝbǝ nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Be bela biǝ nyimfo ntǝ mi?”

english_verse: Jesus felt sorry for them and touched their eyes. At once they could see, and they became his followers.
translation_verse: Mǝ asa ǝnǝ Yesu kafo nya utidi mǝ ǝnǝmi. Lamfolamfo, mǝ ǝnǝmi ásini nya bǝnyǝ asa, nya bǝtǝkǝko wǝ.

english_verse: The crowd told them to be quiet, but they shouted even louder, “Lord and Son of David, have pity on us!”
translation_verse: Betidi bamǝ átɛyi bǝnǝmba bamǝ bǝnkǝ bedika. Fɛɛ mfe bomu báfa bembembe enso bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute, Oka David eto ubi! Nyǝ bo kaminsǝ!”

english_verse: As Jesus was on his way to Jerusalem, he took his twelve disciples aside and told them in private:
translation_verse: Se Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi lefosi inuǝ bamǝ lɛyɛ bantɔ lǝ Yerusalem, ókpa mǝ úsuko lɛkpɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: and then they will hand him over to foreigners who will make fun of him. They will beat him and nail him to a cross. But on the third day he will rise from death. A Mother's Request (Mark
translation_verse: Nya boofi wǝ bakpe lǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ eto ani bǝ bakpe wǝ kofani, bablɛ wǝ, basɔ wǝ bamanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ ukpǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto ebotakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ ubǝ nkpǝ.” Yakobo Ku Yohanes Eto Ambe Átɔ Yesu Nkǝ Ɔwunsǝko Wǝ Bebi.

english_verse: The mother of James and John came to Jesus with her two sons. She knelt down and started begging him to do something for her.
translation_verse: Nya Sebedeo eto usiǝ lékpa wǝ bebi inuǝ óboko nya base akonki lǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya ɔ́lɛ wǝ lekpakpa nkǝ ɔwunsǝko mǝ.

english_verse: Jesus asked her what she wanted, and she said, “When you come into your kingdom, please let one of my sons sit at your right side and the other at your left.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Be fanlɛ bɔbɛbɛ?” Mfó usio ǝmǝ dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Tsyǝ mɛ kɛnyɛ fǝnkǝ lǝ edufǝ lǝ fǝ sekakedikɔɔ, ebusiǝsǝ mɔ bebisaibi inuǝ bamfo, ɔni lǝ fǝ kodiani nya unuǝfǝ lǝ fǝ kǝmǝni.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Not one of you knows what you are asking. Are you able to drink from the cup that I must soon drink from?” James and John said, “Yes, we are!”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Biante lesa nǝ bɛnlɛ bɔtɔ. Kanyi ka mǝǝbǝ bunyǝǝ, mi tsya ebofo ke butsyi?” Bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Ee, boofo.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “You certainly will drink from my cup! But it isn't for me to say who will sit at my right side and at my left. This is for my Father to say.”
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Sitinti, biofo butsyi. Fɛɛ mimbǝ kusu mǝǝlǝkǝ futsyǝ luusiǝ lǝ mɔ kodiani nye kǝmǝni. Nsiǝkɔ bomfo te ítǝ betidi ba mɔ Anto lɛlɔ utsyǝ itǝ mǝ.”

english_verse: When the ten other disciples heard this, they were angry with the two brothers.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ bakasebi lefosi fɛfɛ lɛnɔ bayimi inuǝ bamfo eto etiki nyamfoo, kafo ányi mǝ tinti!

english_verse: But Jesus called the disciples together and said: You know foreign rulers like to order their people around. And their great leaders have full power over everyone they rule.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu ákpadi mǝ ɔkɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Biyi biǝ betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ eto baka kpe ǝsuǝale kenke lǝ mǝ betidi ǝsuǝ nya mǝ batɔnkotɔnko tsya nkpe ǝsuǝale kekleke lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But don't act like them. If you want to be great, you must be the servant of all the others.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ inni nko ele bǝ itsyǝ lǝ mimba lefo bɛnɔ nti. Lǝ utsyuǝ lǝ mi nti aala nkǝ weeyifo ɔkplɛnyǝ, ele bǝ uyifo uyifoyifo utǝ bafɛfɛ.

english_verse: And if you want to be first, you must be the slave of the rest.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ utsyuǝ lǝ mi nti aala nkǝ weeyifo ututɛɛ, ele bǝ uyifo wǝ ǝsuǝ uyifoyifo utǝ bafɛfɛ kenke.

english_verse: The Son of Man did not come to be a slave master, but a slave who will give his life to rescue many people. Jesus Heals Two Blind Men (Mark
translation_verse: Nko ke ini nɛ bǝ mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi, mǝmbǝ miǝ besumu mɛ. Bomu bǝ lǝ nsumu nya lǝ mfi mɔ nkpǝ ntǝ lǝ betidi kpǝ eto disi.” Yesu Átsya Bǝnǝmba Inuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus was followed by a large crowd as he and his disciples were leaving Jericho.
translation_verse: Kase Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi nlɛ budu lǝ Yeriko eto umǝ, betidi kpǝ ǝtǝkǝko mǝ.

english_verse: Two blind men were sitting beside the road. And when they heard that Jesus was coming their way, they shouted, “Lord and Son of David, have pity on us!”
translation_verse: Bǝnǝmba inuǝ ba nsi lǝ kusu ɔflɔɔ, ánɔ bǝ Yesu ǝbǝ ɔlɛ bofe, nyaso bétsyiko bofa katɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute, Oka David eto ubi! Nnyǝ bo kaminsǝ!”

english_verse: They answered, “Lord, we want to see!”
translation_verse: Mfó bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Anto, bola boǝ tǝ lǝ bunyǝ asa.”

english_verse: Jesus said: I will tell you a story about a man who had two sons. Then you can tell me what you think. The father went to the older son and said, “Go work in the vineyard today!”
translation_verse: “Ntsyǝ bibu itsyi lǝ ditiki nǝmfo ǝsuǝ? Utidi utsyuǝ ákɛ wǝ lɛkɛ bebisaibi inuǝ. Ɔ́tɛyi uninǝle nkǝ, ‘Ubi, su eyifo keyifo lǝ mɔ eyibibi eto ɔkuɛ mmi.’

english_verse: But when they saw the man's son, they said, “Someday he will own the vineyard. Let's kill him! Then we can have it all for ourselves.”
translation_verse: “Fɛɛ se beyifoyifo bamǝ dínyǝ wǝ ubi ǝmfoo, bátɛyi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, ‘Nnyǝ ɔkuɛmfo eto ubi wǝ lǝǝkǝ bikǝ biamǝ budii. Bibǝ lǝ bolo wǝ lǝ bɔlɛ wǝ kedikɔ bofo.’

english_verse: If anyone asks why you are doing this, just say, ‘The Lord needs them.’ He will at once let you have the donkeys.”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utsyuǝ átɔ mi lesaatsyuǝǝ, bɛtɛyi wǝ biǝnkǝ, ‘Bonamute lɛ mǝ bohiã.’ Ete booyani mǝ lamfolamfo bǝtǝ mi.”

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet had said,
translation_verse: Nyamfo ǝbǝ itǝ fe kase Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi utsyuǝ lɛtɛyi utsyǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: “Announce to the people of Jerusalem: ‘Your king is coming to you! He is humble and rides on a donkey. He comes on the colt of a donkey.’ ”
translation_verse: “Bɛtɛyi Sion eto umǝnkplɛ eto betidi biǝnkǝ, ‘Bebe, mi Oka lɛ mi ɔflɔ bubǝ! Obokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ nya unsi lǝ ɔflimu ku ubi ǝsuǝ ɔnlɛ bubǝ.’ ”

english_verse: The disciples left and did what Jesus had told them to do.
translation_verse: Nyaso bakasebi inuǝ bamfó ésu nya béyifo fe kase Yesu lékpe mǝ nkǝ beyifo.

english_verse: They brought the donkey and its colt and laid some clothes on their backs. Then Jesus got on.
translation_verse: Bákpa ɔflimu ku ubi ǝmǝ báboko, nya béfi mǝ mfia bésensǝ bákpo lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ nya Yesu lébe úsiǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When Jesus came to Jerusalem, everyone in the city was excited and asked, “Who can this be?”
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu dídufǝ Yerusalem, umǝ ǝmǝ kenke ko dítinkǝ. Nya betidi lɛtɔ bǝnkǝ, “Owoe uni?”

english_verse: But the chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses were angry when they saw his miracles and heard the children shouting praises to the Son of David.
translation_verse: Se besumunyǝ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa dínyǝ ayanisa nya Yesu nlɛ buyifo ku bekpefi ba nlɛ kudu bokpo katɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Atɛsǝ itǝ Oka David eto ubi,” lǝ Disumuyo mfóo, kafo ányi mǝ tinti.

english_verse: When the chief priests and the Pharisees heard these stories, they knew Jesus was talking about them.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ besumunyǝ ninǝ ku Farisifɔ lɛnɔ Yesu eto akpá nyamfoo, báte bǝ mǝ ɔnlɛ.

english_verse: He told them, “The Scriptures say, ‘My house should be called a place of worship.’ But you have turned it into a place where robbers hide.”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue bǝ Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, ‘Bookpo mɔ diyo nkǝ, ola katokɔ.’ Fɛɛ mi efi ni bíyifo beyu eto kabiɔkɔ!”

english_verse: If you have faith when you pray, you will be given whatever you ask for.” A Question about Jesus' Authority (Mark
translation_verse: Nya lesa saa nǝ biɔtɔ Onanto lǝ olatoto ǝsuǝ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, biunyǝ ni.” Bátɔ Yesu Ǝsuǝale Nnya Onkpe.

english_verse: The men said to Jesus, “Don't you hear what those children are saying?” “Yes, I do!” Jesus answered. “Don't you know that the Scriptures say, ‘Children and infants will sing praises’?”
translation_verse: Nyaso bátɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Alɛ lesa nǝ bekpefi bamǝ nlɛ bɔtɛyi mfó bɔnɔ?” Nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Nlɛ bɔnɔ. Nya nyi tsya minkǝ békla nyamfo lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue bǝ, ‘Ǝtǝ bekpefi ku bebisambi fǝ befi atɛsǝ nnya lɛflɔ tinti bǝtǝ fǝ.’ ”

english_verse: Then Jesus left the city and went out to the village of Bethany, where he spent the night. Jesus Puts a Curse on a Fig Tree (Mark
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu édu lǝ besumunyǝ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa bamfó ɔflɔ nya úsu údufǝ Betania eto umǝ kaka úsu ólabe. Yesu Ékudi Kudiyi Kutsyuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I have just one question to ask you. If you answer it, I will tell you where I got the right to do these things.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mintsya mɔɔtɔ mi ditiki lɔni hã nnɔ. Nya lǝ bitǝ mɛ mbuayɛɛ, mɔɔtɛyi mi ǝsuǝale nnya minkpe meeyifo asa nyamfo eto okle.

english_verse: When Jesus got up the next morning, he was hungry. He started out for the city,
translation_verse: Se kale dísiǝ nya se úsinkli ɔnlɛ umǝ bubǝ ku olesiǝǝ, kukpǝnsɛ álɛ wǝ.

english_verse: But Jesus said to them, “If you have faith and don't doubt, I promise you can do what I did to this tree. And you will be able to do even more. You can tell this mountain to get up and jump into the sea, and it will.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Sitinti minlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ lǝ bekpe bofokanɔ bo lǝmbǝ kayakii, biofo nnya mínyifo kudiyi komfo buyifo. Fɛɛ inni nyamfo mate. Bomu biofo kɔtini komfo bɔtɛyi biǝ, ‘Nyi lǝ mfo esu edufǝ lǝ lekpo kafo,’ nya yuubǝ itǝ nko.

english_verse: So they told Jesus, “We don't know.” Jesus said, “Then I won't tell you who gave me the right to do what I do.” A Story about Two Sons
translation_verse: Nyaso bǝtǝ Yesu mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Bunyi kaka ófo ǝsuǝale utsyiko.” Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nko ke mintsya lɛmbɔtɛyi mi kaka mímfo ǝsuǝale mintsyiko fɛ meeyifo asa nyamfo eto okle nɛ.” Yesu Áte Asa Itsyi Lǝ Bayimisani Inuǝ Bǝtsyuǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus told the chief priests and leaders to listen to this story: A land owner once planted a vineyard. He built a wall around it and dug a pit to crush the grapes in. He also built a lookout tower. Then he rented out his vineyard and left the country.
translation_verse: “Bɛnɔ lekpa bamba nǝmfo. Ɔkuɛmfo utsyuǝ ǝsiǝ wǝ léfo eyibibi eto ɔkuɛ, nya ókpe ɔkpɔ otsyilama wǝ. Óto kaka beeke eyibibi eto nte kǝlǝkǝ nya óto nwǝ laase ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ eto kǝsiǝkɔ. Nya úfi ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ ókpe beyifoyifo bǝtsyuǝ lǝ ani nkǝ bakase wǝ, nya údu úsu kusu.

english_verse: Jesus had gone into the temple and was teaching when the chief priests and the leaders of the people came up to him. They asked, “What right do you have to do these things? Who gave you this authority?”
translation_verse: Se Yesu dísinkli úbǝ Disumuyo Kplɛ mfó nya ɔnlɛ asa botee, besumunyǝ ninǝ ku Yudafɔ eto beninǝ bamǝ ǝbǝ bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nte ǝsuǝale nnya fankpe feeyifo asa nyamfo eto okle? Nya owoe dítǝ fǝ ǝsuǝale nyamfo?”

english_verse: Who gave John the right to baptize? Was it God in heaven or merely some human being?” They thought it over and said to each other, “We can't say God gave John this right. Jesus will ask us why we didn't believe John.
translation_verse: Owoe ɔflɔ Yohanes léfo ǝsuǝale fɛ úflǝsǝ betidi ntuu? Onanto ɔflɔ lee, nye lǝ utidi ɔflɔ?” Mfó bétsyiko mǝ ǝsuǝ bɔtɔ kanɔ bǝ, “Be ele bǝ bɔtɛyi? Lǝ bɔtɛyi boǝ Onanto ɔflɔɔ, wɔɔtɔ bo nkǝ, ‘Nyalɛ beso biamfo Yohanes bɛnɔ?’
