english_verse: He said, “Don't tell anyone about this. Just go and show the priest that you are well. Then take a gift to the temple as Moses commanded, and everyone will know that you have been healed.”
translation_verse: “Mǝnńyǝ lǝ kusu atɛyi betidi nnya dibǝ, bomu su lǝ efi fǝ ǝsuǝ esu ate Onanto eto Usumunyǝ. Lǝ efi nkpata bo Mose eto kɔfi lɛtɔ esuko. Nyamfo luulǝkǝ ete bǝnkǝ bufi bomǝ ǝyuǝ fǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: The man talked about it so much and told so many people, that Jesus could no longer go openly into a town. He had to stay away from the towns, but people still came to him from everywhere.
translation_verse: Tsya lefe nǝ nwǝ ǝmǝ dídu ɔntɔɔ, útsyiko bofa katɛyi kase Yesu létsya wǝ. Lǝ nnya esoo, Yesu ménsifo umǝ saa busu, itsyise betidi kpǝ lɛ wǝ ɔflɔ bubǝ. Nyamfo esoo, Yesu kosate átsyimɛ lǝ umǝmflɔ kaka kuutsyǝ lǝmbǝ. Nya betidi ditsyi nlebe nlebe kpǝ, bǝbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ mfó.

english_verse: Then so many of them came to the house that there wasn't even standing room left in front of the door. Jesus was still teaching
translation_verse: Nya betidi kpǝ díbǝ diyo nǝ ɔkɛ, ku ni kayoma kenke. Nya ɔkɛ mfó úkedi mǝ etiki.

english_verse: when four people came up, carrying a man on a mat because he could not walk.
translation_verse: Mfó nya betidi ena léboko ufimfi wǝ léba onkpo kasɔ wǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: But because of the crowd, they could not get him to Jesus. So they made a hole in the roof above him and let the man down in front of everyone.
translation_verse: Nya se banlɛ kusu bunyǝ lǝ bayɛnko wǝ lǝ kesie bedufǝnko wǝ diyo kafo lǝ kase betidi mfui esoo, bésu bábe letsya bǝlǝkǝ ofo nya báyɛnko ufimfi ǝmǝ ku wǝ belabekǝ báyifǝsǝ bǝtsyǝ le Yesu eto akɔ.

english_verse: “Why would he say such a thing? He must think he is God! Only God can forgive sins.”
translation_verse: “Beso woatɛyi nko? Ɔlɛ mbusiotiki budi. Onanto hã laafo abua bufi katsyɛ!”

english_verse: I will show you that the Son of Man has the right to forgive sins here on earth.” So Jesus said to the man,
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ itǝ bǝ befo bɛnɔ biǝ Utidi Eto Ubii, nkpe ǝsuǝale bǝ mfi betidi eto abua ntsyɛ le kawunsiǝ kamfo. Bɛnɔ?” Mfó ǝmǝǝ, Yesu esi útsyi wǝ ǝnǝmi útǝ ufimfi ǝmǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: “Get up! Pick up your mat and go on home.”
translation_verse: “Taka lǝ efi fǝ belabekǝ lǝ esu diyo.”

english_verse: Once again, Jesus went to the shore of Lake Galilee. A large crowd gathered around him, and he taught them.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu disi údu úsu Galilea eto Ditumbukplɛ kɛnyɛ nya betidi bamǝ kenke díbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ mfó, nya óte mǝ Anantotiki.

english_verse: Jesus finished by saying, “People were not made for the good of the Sabbath. The Sabbath was made for the good of people.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Onanto ǝtsyǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi itǝ utidi eto lɛlɛkǝsǝ. Inni utidi bǝtsyǝ itǝ diyi nǝmǝ eto lɛlɛkɛsǝ.

english_verse: Later, Jesus and his disciples were having dinner at Levi's house. Many tax collectors and other sinners had become followers of Jesus, and they were also guests at the dinner.
translation_verse: Ketsyitsyokɔmii, Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi ku betidi kpǝ ba ntǝkǝko wǝ, ésu Lewi eto bǝ lǝ besu bedi lesa ku wǝ. Mba dítǝkǝko wǝ eto bǝtsyuǝ éyifo mba laafo umǝnko ku babuayifo.

english_verse: Some of the teachers of the Law of Moses were Pharisees, and they saw Jesus eating with sinners and tax collectors. So they asked his disciples, “Why does he eat with tax collectors and sinners?”
translation_verse: Nya afi eto bateasa ba ni Yudafɔ eto lekpa nǝ baakpo Farisifɔ tsya akɛ mfó. Nyaso lefe nǝ afi eto bateasa ba ni Farisifɔ bamǝ dínyǝ bǝ Yesu si ɔ́lɛ lesa budi ku babuayifo, bátɔ wǝ bakasebi bǝnkǝ, “Ntsyǝso wonko mba laafo umǝnko ku babuayifo nsi banlɛ lesa budi?”

english_verse: The followers of John the Baptist and the Pharisees often went without eating. Some people came and asked Jesus, “Why do the followers of John and those of the Pharisees often go without eating, while your disciples never do?”
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe ditsyuǝ se Yohanes ku wǝ bakasebi ku Farisifɔ lɛkɛ lǝ kɛnyɛkekle ǝsuǝǝ, betidi bǝtsyuǝ ǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Beso fɛ fǝ bakasebi laankle kɛnyɛ fe kase Yohanes eto bakasebi ku Farisifɔ laakle?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: The friends of a bridegroom don't go without eating while he is still with them.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ lǝ lekpa seka ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nyalɛ Okafɔsǝ eto bakloboo, bani lesa budi lǝ kusiǝ kakpakɔ kamǝ? Lee, yanle bǝ bǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ ku okafɔsǝ ǝmǝ nkpe mǝ lentii?

english_verse: But the time will come when he will be taken from them. Then they will go without eating.
translation_verse: Yuubǝ diyi ditsyuǝ bǝ lǝ bǝlǝkǝ okafɔsǝ ǝmǝ lǝ mǝ nti, baklobo bamǝ ebokle kɛnyɛ beyifo yoyoyo.

english_verse: No one patches old clothes by sewing on a piece of new cloth. The new piece would shrink and tear a bigger hole.
translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ saa emfi lefianku fɔfɔ kaka kama lǝ kafia koko ka nlɛ bola ǝsuǝ, lefianku fɔfɔ nǝmǝ ebunǝ kafia koko kamǝ kala lǝ bǝflǝ kǝ, nya luutǝ dibiǝ koko nǝmǝ sǝnsǝ lɛmɔ leso kɔ.

english_verse: No one pours new wine into old wineskins. The wine would swell and burst the old skins. Then the wine would be lost, and the skins would be ruined. New wine must be put into new wineskins. A Question about the Sabbath (Matthew
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, bankpo ntǝ fɔfɔ lǝ kubukikuǝtobe koko wǝ bákakpo ntǝ bǝnyǝ kafo. Ntǝ fɔfɔ bomǝ ebɔkpɔ bobe kato itǝ bǝ kubukikuetobe koko ǝmǝ ebola itǝ bǝ ntǝ ku kubukikuǝtobe ǝmǝ ebuyifo asɔsɔ. Bomu ntǝ fɔfɔɔ, ubukikuǝtobe fɔfɔ ǝsuǝ baakpo mu.” Yesu Ni Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi Eto Onamute.

english_verse: One Sabbath Jesus and his disciples were walking through some wheat fields. His disciples were picking grains of wheat as they went along.
translation_verse: Lefe lɔni lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyii, se Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi nyɛ lǝ anta eto ɔkuɛ utsyuǝ banlɛ bofee, bǝfǝsǝ anta ǝtsyuǝ balɛ bɔyimi.

english_verse: Some Pharisees asked Jesus, “Why are your disciples picking grain on the Sabbath? They are not supposed to do that!”
translation_verse: Nyaso Farisifɔ bǝtsyuǝ átɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Beso fǝ bakasebi lǝǝyifo nko? Bo kɔfi mǝntǝ kusu bǝ beyifo nko lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi.”

english_verse: So the Son of Man is Lord over the Sabbath.”
translation_verse: Nyaso mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubii, mɔ ke ni Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi eto Onamute.”

english_verse: The Pharisees wanted to accuse Jesus of doing something wrong, and they kept watching to see if Jesus would heal him on the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Betidi ba lɛkɛ mfó eto bǝtsyuǝ ńyǝ balɛ bobe lǝ wootsya utidi ǝmǝ lǝ ɔnwɛditsyǝyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ babe lǝ buunyǝ etiki lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus told the man to stand up where everyone could see him.
translation_verse: Yesu ákpadi utidi ǝmǝ eto kɔni díkpǝ útsyǝ lǝ betidi ba kenke eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Jesus was angry as he looked around at the people. Yet he felt sorry for them because they were so stubborn. Then he told the man, “Stretch out your hand.” He did, and his bad hand was healed.
translation_verse: Yesu étsyi ɔ́wuninsǝ nya óbe mǝ ku lɛblɔfi itsyise ílǝ wǝ lǝ lɛkɔɛsi se bánla bǝ baawunsǝko mǝ bǝtsyuǝ eso. Nya ɔ́tɛyi ufimfi ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Nǝ fǝ kɔni etsyue.” Únǝ ko útsyue. Nya ete kɔni komǝ létsya wǝ.

english_verse: Jesus decided to ask some of his disciples to go up on a mountain with him, and they went.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu ábe úsu kɔtini disi. Nya mfóo, ókpadi mba óla nkǝ bakɛ ko wǝ.

english_verse: and to force out demons.
translation_verse: Nya biɔkɛ ǝsuǝale bela awɔnɔ bua bitsyiko lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Some teachers of the Law of Moses came from Jerusalem and said, “This man is under the power of Beelzebul, the ruler of demons! He is even forcing out demons with the help of Beelzebul.”
translation_verse: Nya afi eto bateasa ba ditsyi Yerusalem lɛtɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Lɛwɔnɔ bua ǝbǝ disi lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ. Nya awɔnɔ bua eto ɔtɔnkotɔnkoo, ni nwǝ dítǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale fɛ ɔnlɛ awɔnɔ bua nyamfó bola kabɔnko lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: The crowd sitting around Jesus told him, “Your mother and your brothers and sisters are outside and want to see you.”
translation_verse: Nyaso betidi ba létsyilama wǝ átɛyi Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Be, fǝ ambe ku fǝ bayimisani ńyǝ lǝ lekple bǝ bǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus told the people to gather around him. Then he spoke to them in riddles and said: How can Satan force himself out?
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu ákpadi betidi bamǝ nya údi etiki ko mǝ lǝ lekpa ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Ntsyǝ yuubǝ bǝ Obonsam ebofo wǝ ǝsuǝ bola ketsyiko lǝ utidi ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: Jesus went back home, and once again such a large crowd gathered that there was no chance even to eat.
translation_verse: Se Yesu dídu mfóo, údu úsu diyo ditsyuǝ. Nya betidi kpǝ esi bǝbǝ mǝ ɔflɔ mfó. Itǝ bǝ ibǝ ɛkɛ ale itǝ Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi bǝ bánkɛ lefe kulaa tsya lǝ bedi lesa.

english_verse: So if Satan fights against himself, that will be the end of him.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ Obonsam ataka uńyǝ ɔnlɛ bɔkpɔ ku wǝ ǝsuǝ ku wǝ sekakedikɔ sia lema akpa akpaa, sekakedikɔ siamfó ebusǝnsǝ nya wǝ sekakedidi ebolo.

english_verse: How can anyone break into the house of a strong man and steal his things, unless he first ties up the strong man? Then he can take everything.
translation_verse: “Iyifo etiki eto ɔnukualɛ bǝ utidi ǝmbofo botaka kesu ketu ǝsuǝaletidi lǝ wǝ diyo, ketsyi wǝ bikǝ. Fɛ woofo budufǝ lǝ wǝ diyo nǝmǝǝ, tsyisɛ umuǝ ǝsuǝaletidi ǝmǝ okle.

english_verse: I promise you that any of the sinful things you say or do can be forgiven, no matter how terrible those things are.
translation_verse: “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ Onanto ebufi lebua saa nǝ betidi díyifo ku diye bua saa nǝ baakpadi Onanto ɔtsyɛ.

english_verse: But if you speak against the Holy Spirit, you can never be forgiven. That sin will be held against you forever.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ diye bua saa nǝ utidi lookpadi Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛɛ, Onanto ǝmbufi ni ɔtsyɛ wǝ kulefe. Itsyise wuufi lebua nǝmfo fenkǝ lebua nǝ wembotasuǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this because the people were saying that he had an evil spirit in him. Jesus' Mother and Brothers (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi nyamfo nko itsyise betidi bǝnkǝ lɛwɔnɔ bua kpe lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Bawoe Ni Yesu Eto Batokpenyǝ Tinti?

english_verse: Jesus' mother and brothers came and stood outside. Then they sent someone with a message for him to come out to them.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Yesu eto bayimisani ku wǝ ambe ǝbǝ mfó. Bǝńyǝ lǝ lekple nya bákpe wǝ utidi bǝ bahiã wǝ.

english_verse: Jesus asked, “Who is my mother and who are my brothers?”
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu átɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Owoe ni mɔ ambe? Bawoe ni mɔ bayimisani?”

english_verse: Then he looked at the people sitting around him and said, “Here are my mother and my brothers.
translation_verse: Nya ótsyilamasǝ ǝnǝmi nya óbe betidi ba nsi letsyilama wǝ mfó nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bee, nyǝ mbamfo ni mɔ ambe nye mɔ bayimisani.

english_verse: Anyone who obeys God is my brother or sister or mother.”
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa wǝ leeyifo Onanto eto lelabii, wǝ ni mɔ ɔyimisani nye mɔ ɔyimisio, nye mɔ ambe nɛ.”

english_verse: The next time Jesus taught beside Lake Galilee, a big crowd gathered. It was so large that he had to sit in a boat out on the lake, while the people stood on the shore.
translation_verse: Yesu esi ésu Galilea eto ditumbukplɛ flɔ nya ɔnlɛ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ mǝ bote. Nya lǝ kase betidi ba létsyilama wǝ mfui esoo, údufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ kafo lǝ ntu bomǝ ǝsuǝ, nya úsiǝ kasɔ. Nya betidi bamǝ díńyǝ lǝ ntu kɛnyɛ fɛ Yesu dídi ko mǝ etiki.

english_verse: While the farmer was scattering the seed, some of it fell along the road and was eaten by birds.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝ ɔnlɛ eyibibi nyamǝ busǝǝ, íbǝ bǝ ǝtsyuǝ álo ékpo lǝ usunte ɔflɔ, nya baklɔbɛ díbǝ básɛ nnya bámini.

english_verse: He used stories to teach them many things, and this is part of what he taught:
translation_verse: Lefe kpǝ lǝ wǝ asatete ǝsuǝǝ, údi etiki ɔ́yɛnko lǝ akpa ǝsuǝ lǝ ufi ulǝkǝ asa nnya óla nkǝ loote mǝ kasɔ. Asa nnya óte mǝ ni nkǝ.

english_verse: Now listen! A farmer went out to scatter seed in a field.
translation_verse: “Bɛnɔ! Lefe lɔnii, ɔkuɛmfo ɔni ésu ɔkuɛ nkǝ lǝ usu usiǝ eyibibi ǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Other seeds fell on thin, rocky ground and quickly started growing because the soil wasn't very deep.
translation_verse: Ǝtsyuǝ álo ékpo lǝ aba ǝsuǝ, kaka sitǝ lemfui. Nyaso eyibibi nyamfo ǝkǝ mlǝ.

english_verse: But when the sun came up, the plants were scorched and dried up, because they did not have deep roots.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se kofe lébe kɛnyɛɛ, éblobe nya íkpǝ. Nnya ni bǝ, nnya keyudu mǝnnyǝ didisa itsyi lǝ aba nyamǝ eso.

english_verse: Some other seeds fell where thornbushes grew up and choked out the plants. So they did not produce any grain.
translation_verse: Eyibibi nyamǝ eto ǝtsyuǝ ésu ékpo lǝ biyu nti. Nya kanyi kamǝ léto kéti nnya. Nyaso yámfo bɔnwɔ.

english_verse: Finally, Jesus said: What is God's kingdom like? What story can I use to explain it?
translation_verse: Yesu átɔ nkǝ, “Be muufi nkatesǝ ku Onanto eto sekakedikɔ. Nte lekpa nǝ ele bǝ mfi nlǝkǝ nyamfo eto kasɔ?

english_verse: When Jesus was alone with the twelve apostles and some others, they asked him about these stories.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝ Yesu mate insii, wǝ bakasebi lefosi inuǝ bamǝ ku mba lǝǝtǝkǝko wǝ ǝbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ nya bátɔ wǝ bǝ ulǝkǝ lekpa nǝmǝ kasɔ ote mǝ.

english_verse: But they don't have roots, and they don't last very long. As soon as life gets hard or the message gets them in trouble, they give up.
translation_verse: Tsya ditiki nǝmǝ eto keyudu ǝnńyǝ kasɔ kukɔnɔ. Baafo kanɔ itǝ lefe kliminti ete. Nya lefe nǝ ke kǝnǝ nye bulǝ sɛkɛ díbǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ ditiki nǝmǝ esoo, beesinkli kama.

english_verse: The reason is, “These people will look and look, but never see. They will listen and listen, but never understand. If they did, they would turn to God and be forgiven.” Jesus Explains the Story about the Farmer (Matthew
translation_verse: Nyaso íbǝ itǝ fe kase Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛwɔni útsyǝ nkǝ, ‘Buukabe tsyaa, bǝǝmbunyǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo. Buukǝtsyue ato tsyaa, bǝǝmbɔnɔ kasɔ. Nnya ni bǝ lǝ banɔ nye bǝnyǝ tsyaa, bǝǝmbɔnɔ kasɔ. lǝ betsyi mǝ ǝnǝmi bǝtǝ Onanto, bǝ lǝ ufi mǝ abua ɔtsyɛ mǝ.’ ”

english_verse: The seeds that fell along the road are the people who hear the message. But Satan soon comes and snatches it away from them.
translation_verse: Betidi bǝtsyuǝ ale kase eyibibi ǝtsyuǝ luubǝ ekpo lǝ kusu ɔflɔ. Lǝ kase banlɛ bɔnɔɔ, ete Obonsam ǝǝbǝ nya wǝǝnwǝ nnya kǝlǝkǝ lǝ mǝ nsusu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: What the farmer is spreading is really the message about the kingdom.
translation_verse: Ɔkuɛmfo ǝmǝ lɛ Onanto eto etiki busǝnsǝ.

english_verse: Jesus also said: You don't light a lamp and put it under a clay pot or under a bed. Don't you put a lamp on a lampstand?
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Utidi aato okandiɛ kefi kakpe lǝ ditsyitsya kalɔ nye lǝ mpa kalɔ? Inni okandiɛ eto kǝtǝkǝkɔ baato okandiɛ kǝtǝkǝ?

english_verse: Listen carefully to what you hear! The way you treat others will be the way you will be treated—and even worse.
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bifi mi ato bekpe kukɔnɔ lǝ lesa nǝ bɛnlɛ bɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. Kase faakla asa yeeyi kaba kakpo kǝtǝ utidii, nko ke eto okle Onanto lookla utǝ fintsya nɛ!

english_verse: Again Jesus said: God's kingdom is like what happens when a farmer scatters seed in a field.
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Onanto eto sekakedikɔ ale osani wǝ laato eyibibi.

english_verse: It is the ground that makes the seeds sprout and grow into plants that produce grain.
translation_verse: Nnya ni bǝnkǝ kasɔ ka báto diyibibi nǝmǝǝ, ke laalɛ ni ola nko. Tutɛ, lǝ díkǝǝ, díabɔ afanto, nya uyi laabɔ. Nya lǝ ébee, yeawɔ ebibi kpǝ.

english_verse: Then when harvest season comes and the grain is ripe, the farmer cuts it with a sickle. A Mustard Seed (Matthew
translation_verse: Lǝ ebibi nyamǝ ábe ɛsɛɛ, ɔkuɛmfo ǝmǝ ǝbǝ kala nnya. Itsyise nnya lɛlɛfe eboyo.” Lekpa Itsyi Lǝ Diyibibi Kɛkɛ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: It is like what happens when a mustard seed is planted in the ground. It is the smallest seed in all the world.
translation_verse: Ite fenkǝ utidi éfi diyibibi nǝ nso bɔfɛ lǝ kawunsiǝ úsu óto.

english_verse: But once it is planted, it grows larger than any garden plant. It even puts out branches that are big enough for birds to nest in its shade. The Reason for Teaching with Stories (Matthew
translation_verse: Lefe ditsyuǝ eto kamaa, diǝkǝ kafiani kuyi. Nya nkomǝ eto kuyi komfo laamɔ kaso ɔkuɛ eto ediyi fɛfɛ kenke. Koata kalɛ kpǝ. Nya baklɔbɛ laato ayo lǝ kuyi komǝ eto kalɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: He did not tell them anything without using stories. But when he was alone with his disciples, he explained everything to them. A Storm (Matthew
translation_verse: Etiki saa wuudi mǝǝ, woatɛyi nnya kayɛ lǝ akpa ǝsuǝ. Lǝ lefe nǝ itǝ kusu bǝ wonko wǝ bakasebi bamǝ hã sii, nya fɛ wǝǝlǝkǝ nnya kasɔ kate mǝ nɛ. Yesu Éti Ufiebi Eto Ǝsuale Kusu.

english_verse: That evening, Jesus said to his disciples, “Let's cross to the east side.”
translation_verse: Diyi nǝmfó eto ditsyitsyo lefee, Yesu átɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Bitǝ lǝ bɔyila ditumbukplɛ nǝmfo busu ni lekpake nǝ nse.”

english_verse: Jesus used many other stories when he spoke to the people, and he taught them as much as they could understand.
translation_verse: Yesu édi mǝ etiki nyamfo lǝ kase utsyuǝ sa loofo kasɔ bɔnɔ.

english_verse: So they left the crowd, and his disciples started across the lake with him in the boat. Some other boats followed along.
translation_verse: Nyaso bédu lǝ betidi ǝto ditsyukpa nǝmfo ɔflɔ bésu bedufǝ bǝsiǝ lǝ ɔklɔ wǝ Yesu dísiǝ ǝsuǝ, nya bétsyiko ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ bɔyila. Kaklɔ bamba tsya ǝńyǝ mfó.

english_verse: Suddenly a storm struck the lake. Waves started splashing into the boat, and it was about to sink.
translation_verse: Yanklɛ fɛ ufiebi ko dítsyiko bɔsɔ bembembe nya ɔ́sɔ ntu ókpo lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafo, nya ibu sɛkɛ lǝ ntu lǝ buyi ɔklɔ ǝmǝ lǝ onya udu fǝ lǝ ntu kasɔ.

english_verse: Jesus was in the back of the boat with his head on a pillow, and he was asleep. His disciples woke him and said, “Teacher, don't you care that we're about to drown?”
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfóo, Yesu ǝsiǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ eto kama, úfi wǝ disi útǝkǝ lǝ esunde ǝsuǝ nya ɔnlɛ selabe. Nyaso básanklisǝ wǝ nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, ɛnlɛ fǝ bulǝ bǝnkǝ boǝbǝ bukpǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus got up and ordered the wind and the waves to be quiet. The wind stopped, and everything was calm.
translation_verse: Yesu átaka úńyǝ nya ófa ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Ufiebi, yɛ bɔsɔ!” Nya ɔ́tɛyi ntu bomǝ tsya nkǝ, “Ntu yɛ bonwa!” Nya ufiebi ǝmǝ disinkli ɔ́yɛ bɔsɔ, nya ntu bomǝ eto ǝnǝmi disinkli búyuǝ buɛɛ kananaa.

english_verse: Jesus asked his disciples, “Why were you afraid? Don't you have any faith?”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɔ wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Beso biate sikpi mmǝ? Bíamfo tɔ bɛnɔ?”

english_verse: Now they were more afraid than ever and said to each other, “Who is this? Even the wind and the waves obey him!”
translation_verse: Sikpi ǝmuǝ mǝ sefensǝ, nya bétsyiko mǝ bǝtsyuǝ bɔtɔ bǝnkǝ, “Owoe ko ni utidi ǝmfo? Bǝ ntu bomǝ ku ufiebi kenke etsyue wǝ etiki koto!”

english_verse: She had said to herself, “If I can just touch his clothes, I will be healed.”
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi wǝ ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ mfó wǝ awu butidi koo, eni bufi bomǝ ǝbɔyɛ mɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to the woman, “You are now well because of your faith. May God give you peace! You are healed, and you will no longer be in pain.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ ubisiobi, fǝ bofokanɔ átsya fǝ. Su lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ. Fǝ kanyi ensiǝmbu sinkli kǝbǝ bio.”

english_verse: She had gone to many doctors, and they had not done anything except cause her a lot of pain. She had paid them all the money she had. But instead of getting better, she only got worse.
translation_verse: Ɔkɛ lǝ kanyi ǝsuǝ lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe mba leeyifo afa díkǝtǝ wǝ afa kulaatsya. Wóbiasǝ wǝ atabi kenke ótsya bufi bomfo, tsya bufi bomǝ mányuǝ wǝ. Kato bomu bóbe.

english_verse: Then Jesus went inside and said to them, “Why are you crying and carrying on like this? The child isn't dead. She is just asleep.”
translation_verse: údufǝ lǝ mǝnti nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Be léboko kudu komfo bokpo? Beso bɛnlɛ nku? Dikpefi nǝmfó ménkpǝ. Selabe ete onlabe.”

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples crossed Lake Galilee and came to shore near the town of Gerasa.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi édu bésu Galilea eto Ditumbukplɛ eto situma sia nse lǝ Gerasefɔ eto kasɔ.

english_verse: from the graveyard where he had been living. No one was able to tie the man up anymore, not even with a chain.
translation_verse: Itsyise mfó úkǝsiǝ nɛ. Lǝ lefe nǝ lefe mmǝǝ, betidi ba kenke mámfo wǝ bumuǝ kakpe lǝ amana.

english_verse: He had often been put in chains and leg irons, but he broke the chains and smashed the leg irons. No one could control him.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe kpǝ ǝsuǝǝ, bákafo wǝ ani ku akpa bokle. Fɛɛ wókala nnya bufǝsǝ kabɔ. Utidi ǝmfo akɛ ǝsuǝale tinti, itǝ bǝ kutsyuǝ saa mánkamfo wǝ bumuǝ kǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: Night and day he was in the graveyard or on the hills, yelling and cutting himself with stones.
translation_verse: Kǝtsyǝ ku kakɔmi kenke úkatsyilama lǝ betidi eto edi ku atini nyamǝ nti, nya úkakpo kudu, ékefi abambi katsya wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When the man saw Jesus in the distance, he ran up to him and knelt down.
translation_verse: Utidi ǝmfo ǝńyǝ kɔsɛsɛ fɛ únyǝ Yesu. Nyaso útsyetsyi úsu óse akonki lǝ Yesu eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: He shouted, “Jesus, Son of God in heaven, what do you want with me? Promise me in God's name that you won't torture me!”
translation_verse: Nya ófa bembembe ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Onanto Fanlonlo eto Ubi! Be nkpe lǝ mɔ ku fǝ lenti mfo? Nlɛ fǝ lekpakpa, se mɛ uyi lǝ Onanto eto diye ǝsuǝ fǝnkǝ embunǝ mɛ koto!”

english_verse: He then begged Jesus not to send them away.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́lɛ Yesu lekpakpa nkǝ woanla mǝ lǝ kasɔ kamǝ.

english_verse: Over on the hillside a large herd of pigs was feeding.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfó ǝsuǝǝ, bakplako kpǝ ǝńyǝ lɛ kɔtini komǝ ɔflɔ balɛ budi.

english_verse: So the evil spirits begged Jesus, “Send us into those pigs! Let us go into them.”
translation_verse: Nya awɔnɔ nyamfo lɛlɛ Yesu lekpakpa bǝnkǝ, “La bo akpe lǝ bakplako ba ńyǝ lǝ mmǝ, lǝ budu budufǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: The men taking care of the pigs ran to the town and the farms to spread the news. Then the people came out to see what had happened.
translation_verse: Nya mba nlɛ bakplako bamǝ bobee, dítsyetsyi bésu umǝ ǝmǝ ku mba lɛkɛ lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ mfó, nya bésu batɛyi betidi ba kenke lesa nǝ díbǝ. Mba bátɛyi ésu mfó, bésu bábe lesa nǝ díbǝ.

english_verse: When they came to Jesus, they saw the man who had once been full of demons. He was sitting there with his clothes on and in his right mind, and they were terrified.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ bǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔɔ, bǝnyǝ utidi wǝ awɔnɔ bua kpǝ dísiǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ mfó. Nya únsi lǝ kasɔ, ónkpe awu, íkakpa ko wǝ. Nya sikpi dímuǝ mǝmblɛ kenke.

english_verse: Everyone who had seen what had happened told about the man and the pigs.
translation_verse: Betidi ba leka wǝ búnyǝǝ, átɛyi lesa saa nǝ díbǝ lǝ utidi ǝmǝ ku bakplako bamǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then the people started begging Jesus to leave their part of the country.
translation_verse: Nyaso bálɛ Yesu lekpakpa bǝ udu lǝ mǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: But Jesus would not let him. Instead, he said, “Go home to your family and tell them how much the Lord has done for you and how good he has been to you.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu mántɔnɔ. Bomu ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Sinkli esu fǝ betidi ɔflɔ lǝ atɛyi mǝ kase Onamute ǝmǝ lɛwunsǝ ko fǝ ku kase únyǝ fǝ kaminsǝ.”

english_verse: The man went away into the region near the ten cities known as Decapolis and began telling everyone how much Jesus had done for him. Everyone who heard what had happened was amazed. A Dying Girl and a Sick Woman (Matthew
translation_verse: Nyaso osani ǝmfo édu úsu ótsyilama Kǝmǝ Lefosi kamǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi betidi bamǝ lesa saa nǝ Yesu díyifo útǝ wǝ. Nya íyifo mba lɛnɔ nnya yanii. Yesu Átsya Yairo Wǝ Ndi Yudafɔ Eto Katsyakɔ Eto Uninǝ Eto Ubisiobi Nya Ótsya Usio Fimfi Utsyuǝ Tsya.

english_verse: But the people laughed at him. After Jesus had sent them all out of the house, he took the girl's father and mother and his three disciples and went to where she was.
translation_verse: Se ɔ́tɛyi nkoo, betidi ba ńyǝ mfó étsyiko wǝ bumǝ. Nyaso Yesu ǝtǝ nkǝ mǝmblɛ bɔ besu lekple, nya útǝ ubi ǝmǝ eto anto ku ambe ku wǝ bakasebi itsyǝ bamǝ nkǝ bedufǝ kaka ubi ǝmǝ díkpe ónlabe lǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: Once again Jesus got into the boat and crossed Lake Galilee. Then as he stood on the shore, a large crowd gathered around him.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝsiǝ lǝ ɔklɔ úsinkli úsu ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ eto Yudafɔ eto lekpake nǝ nse. Se úsu údufǝ ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ eto kɛnyɛ mfóo, betidi kpǝ ǝbǝ bátsyilama wǝ.

english_verse: The person in charge of the synagogue was also there. His name was Jairus, and when he saw Jesus, he went over to him. He knelt at Jesus' feet
translation_verse: Nya Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ eto uninǝ ɔni utsyuǝ wǝ baakpo Yairo ǝbǝ mfó. Se únyǝ Yesuu, óse akonki lǝ wǝ akɔ.

english_verse: and started begging him for help. He said, “My little daughter is about to die! Please come and touch her, so she will get well and live.”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́lɛ wǝ lekpakpa kekleke nkǝ, “Mɔ ubisiobi kɛkɛ lɛ bufi kekleke. Nyaso bǝ lǝ ǝbǝ efi fǝ kɔni ǝtǝkǝ lǝ wǝ bǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ imuǝ wǝ ale lǝ ɔkɛ nkpǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus went with Jairus. Many people followed along and kept crowding around.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu átaka útǝkǝko wǝ. Nya lǝ kase betidi ba díkǝko Yesu difui esoo, bátsyilama wǝ se bántɔ.

english_verse: In the crowd was a woman who had been bleeding for twelve years.
translation_verse: Nya usio utsyuǝ akɛ lǝ mǝ nti, wǝ kɔtɔ díkakpo lǝ lefosi alɛ ǝnuǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The woman had heard about Jesus, so she came up behind him in the crowd and barely touched his clothes.
translation_verse: Ɔ́nɔ etiki itsyi lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ, nyaso útǝkǝko betidi ba dítǝkǝko Yesu kama.

english_verse: At that moment Jesus felt power go out from him. He turned to the crowd and asked, “Who touched my clothes?”
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo Yesu áte nkǝ ǝsuǝale ǝtsyuǝ ábɔ wǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Nyaso úkǝnǝ úńyǝ, nya ɔ́tsyi ɔwuninsǝ, nya ɔ́tɔ betidi bamǝ ntǝkǝko wǝ nkǝ, “Owoe ni futsyǝ dítidi mɛ awu?”

english_verse: His disciples said to him, “Look at all these people crowding around you! How can you ask who touched you?”
translation_verse: Wǝ bakasebi bamǝ átɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Be kase betidi bamfo letsyilama fǝ. Beso faatɔ fǝ, owoe ni futsyǝ dítidi fǝ?”

english_verse: But Jesus turned to see who had touched him.
translation_verse: Tsyaa, Yesu esi úkǝnǝ úńyǝ ɔlɛ ǝnǝmi botsyilamasǝ kabe lǝ woofo futsyǝ dítidi wǝ bunyǝ.

english_verse: The woman knew what had happened to her. So she came trembling with fear and knelt down in front of Jesus. Then she told him the whole story.
translation_verse: Usio ǝmǝ mfó ǝnyǝ utsyǝ lekpo nkǝ lesatsyuǝ ǝbǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ. Nyaso lǝ sikpitete ku ketinkǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ɔ́bɔ úbǝ óse akonki lǝ Yesu eto akɔ. Nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝ, lesa nǝ díbǝ.

english_verse: While Jesus was still speaking, some people came from Jairus' home and said, “Your daughter has died! Why bother the teacher anymore?”
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝ Yesu nlɛ nyamfo bɔtɛyii, batɔnkpe bǝtsyuǝ étsyi Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ kamǝ eto uninǝ ǝmǝ eto diyo bǝbǝ nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Fǝ ubi ǝmǝ ébukpǝ koko. Beso fensi fanlɛ Oteasa ǝmfo bulǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus heard what they said, and he said to Jairus, “Don't worry. Just have faith!”
translation_verse: Yesu méntsyue ditiki nǝ mba nlɛ bɔtɛyi mfó ato. Bomu ɔ́tɛyi Yairo nkǝ, “Mante sikpi, fo anɔ ete.”

english_verse: Jesus did not let anyone go with him except Peter and the two brothers, James and John.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lékpa Petro ku Yakobo ku wǝ ɔyimisani Yohanes mate hã, nya bésu Yairo eto diyo.

english_verse: They went home with Jairus and saw the people crying and making a lot of noise.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ bédufǝ diyo nǝmǝ, nya Yesu dínyǝ kase banlɛ kanyi bunyǝ kakpo edu kewi nkuu,

english_verse: He took the twelve-year-old girl by the hand and said, “Talitha, koum!” which means, “Little girl, get up!” The girl got right up and started walking around. Everyone was greatly surprised.
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo, disiobi nǝmǝ nǝ dikafo lefosi alɛ ǝnuǝǝ, átaka úńyǝ nya útsyiko bɔyɛ katsyilama. Se íbǝ nkoo, íyifo mǝmblɛ yanii.

english_verse: But Jesus ordered them not to tell anyone what had happened. Then he said, “Give her something to eat.”
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu ǝkǝ mǝ ato kekleke nkǝ bantɛyi kuutsyuǝ saa. Nya kamaa, ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bitǝ wǝ lesatsyuǝ lǝ udi.”

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples crossed the lake and brought the boat to shore near the town of Gennesaret.
translation_verse: Se bédufǝ ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ eto lekpake nǝ nsee, báyifǝ lǝ Genesaret eto kasɔ. Nya bátsyasǝ mǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ mfó.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “Prophets are honored by everyone, except the people of their hometown and their relatives and their own family.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Onanto eto unyǝlǝkǝtidi kpe dibu lǝ nlebe kpǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ wǝ kosate eto umǝǝ, lǝ wǝ betidi ntii, ku lǝ wǝ kosate eto diyo eto betidi eto ǝnǝmii, umbǝ dibu saa.”

english_verse: But when Herod heard about Jesus, he said, “This must be John! I had his head cut off, and now he has come back to life.”
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Herodes lɛnɔ nyamfóo, wuntsya átɛyi nkǝ, “Yohanes wǝ útǝ bála disi uni disi ósankli utsyi ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ!”

english_verse: After the apostles returned to Jesus, they told him everything they had done and taught.
translation_verse: Batɔnkpe ba Yesu lékpe nkǝ besu batsyilama lekpake mfóo, ésinkli bǝbǝ bátɛyi wǝ nnya kenke bésu beyifo ku asa nnya báte.

english_verse: The next Sabbath he taught in the synagogue. Many of the people who heard him were amazed and asked, “How can he do all this? Where did he get such wisdom and the power to work these miracles?
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Yudafɔ eto Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi ǝsuǝǝ, úsu ɔlɛ Anantotiki búdi lǝ Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ mfó. Nyaso íyifo betidi ba kenke lɛnɔ wǝ asatetee yanii. Bátɔ bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Sieti ókase etiki nyamfo eto okle utsyiko? Nte kobe ko eto okle nkpe wǝ bǝ woafo ayanisa nyamfo eto okle buyifo?

english_verse: Isn't he the carpenter, the son of Mary? Aren't James, Joseph, Judas, and Simon his brothers? Don't his sisters still live here in our town?” The people were upset because of what he was doing.
translation_verse: Inni wǝ ni Maria eto ubi wǝ ni nwǝ laawe keyi? Lee inni wǝ ni Yakobo ku Yose ku Yuda ku Simon eto ɔyimisani? Nya wǝ bayimisio tsya nkpe mfo!” Nyaso betidi bamfo mámfo wǝ.

english_verse: He told them, “You may take along a walking stick. But don't carry food or a traveling bag or any money.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mi kuutsyuǝ saa manlɛ kulesa usuko kusu komǝ, enso uyi wǝ baalɛɛ kɔni hã. Bientsyi didisa nye otobe fenkǝ mba laatɔ asa kafe. Bientsyi atabi lǝ mi katobe.

english_verse: If any place won't welcome you or listen to your message, leave and shake the dust from your feet as a warning to them.”
translation_verse: Lǝ bídufǝ umǝ utsyuǝ nya betidi bamfó dímamfo mi nye báni bǝ beembutsyue mi ditiki kotoo, bidu lǝ bɛflɛ mi nkpafo eto sitǝ bekpo mfó. Nyamfo loote Onanto eto kotonǝnǝ eto ditsyǝbi nǝ lǝǝbǝ bubǝ itǝ mǝ lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ.”

english_verse: Herodias had a grudge against John and wanted to kill him. But she could not do it
translation_verse: Nyaso Yohanes eto etiki ǝkǝlǝ Herodia, nyaso úkǝkisi wǝ. Nya ɔ́bɛbɛ kusu nkǝ lǝ olo wǝ.

english_verse: because Herod was afraid of John and protected him. He knew that John was a good and holy man. Even though Herod was confused by what John said, he was glad to listen to him. And he often did.
translation_verse: Tsyaa, wámfo kusu bunyǝ lǝ Herodes eso. Itsyise Herodes áte Yohanes sikpi se unyi nkǝ Yohanes éyifo ɔnukualɛtidi ku utidi wǝ díyifo kɛnkɛ eso. Nyaso úkase wǝ. Lefe kpǝ, óla nkǝ lǝ úkanɔ wǝ asatete, ite bǝ wǝ etiki nyamǝ káto wǝ lǝ lɛkɔɛsi lɛ ɔ́nɔ nnya tsya fɛ.

english_verse: I swear that I will give you as much as half of my kingdom, if you want it.”
translation_verse: Nya usi ɔ́tɛyi wǝ tsya nkǝ, “Ekpe lǝ mɔ lekankpomɛ, minkǝ muutǝ fǝ lesa nǝ ke fɔɔtɔ mɛ, lǝ mɔ sekakedikɔ eto kutsyǝ kulaa tsya!”

english_verse: The girl left and asked her mother, “What do you think I should ask for?” Her mother answered, “The head of John the Baptist!”
translation_verse: Nyaso usiobi ǝmfo átaka úsu ɔ́tɔ wǝ ambe nkǝ, “Be ele bǝ ntɔ?” Nya wǝ ambe lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Tɔ wǝ Yohanes Ntuflǝsǝtidi eto disi.”

english_verse: The girl hurried back and told Herod, “Here and now on a serving plate I want the head of John the Baptist!”
translation_verse: Disiobi nǝmfo ésinkli kpla dísu diyo nǝmǝ kafo nya ɔ́tɛyi Herodes nkǝ, “Nla minkǝ la Yohanes Ntuflǝsǝtidi eto disi ǝtǝkǝ lǝ ɔkpɛ tɛnklɛ ǝsuǝ ǝtǝ mɛ mɔmɔmɔmɔ!”

english_verse: Herod was very sorry for what he had said. But he did not want to break the promise he had made in front of his guests.
translation_verse: Nyamfo ába oka Herodes lɛkɔɛsi, fɛɛ wǝnsiǝmbofo ntamu bo óka utsyǝ lǝ beninǝtidi bamfó eto ǝnǝmi butu.

english_verse: The guard put the head on a serving plate and took it to the girl. Then she gave it to her mother.
translation_verse: Kamaa, úfi disi nǝmǝ útǝkǝ lǝ ɔkpɛ tɛnklɛ ǝsuǝ nya úfi ni oboko disiobi nǝmǝ. Nya wuntsya dífi ni úsu útǝ wǝ ambe.

english_verse: When John's followers learned that he had been killed, they took his body and put it in a tomb. Jesus Feeds Five Thousand (Matthew
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yohanes eto bakasebi lɛnɔ ditiki nǝmfoo, bésu báfo wǝ ɔkɔ bésu bébikǝ. Yesu Ǝtǝ Betidi Akpi Anɔ Lesa Bédi.

english_verse: But so many people were coming and going that Jesus and the apostles did not even have a chance to eat. Then Jesus said, “Let's go to a place where we can be alone and get some rest.”
translation_verse: Nya kaka mǝ ku Yesu lɛsɔnɔ eto betidi kpǝ ba nlɛ búbǝ kédu étsyiko bufui. Nyaso Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi mánkɛ lefe lǝ bedi lesa kula tsya. Nyaso Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bitǝ lǝ bo hã lǝ busu kaka lɛbiɔ lǝ busiǝ mfó butsyǝ ɔnwɛ sɛkɛ.”

english_verse: They left in a boat for a place where they could be alone.
translation_verse: Nyaso bésu bédufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ lǝ besu kaka betidi lǝmbǝ.

english_verse: That evening the disciples came to Jesus and said, “This place is like a desert, and it's already late.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ ditsyitsyo léyoo, wǝ bakasebi ányi bésu wǝ ɔflɔ nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Kale bolo. Nya kase mfo diyifo ntɛntii, bǝǝmbunyǝ kulesa bedi.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “You give them something to eat.” But they asked him, “Don't you know it would take almost a year's wages to buy all of these people something to eat?”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mi kosatee, bitǝ mǝ lesatsyuǝ lǝ bedi.” Nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nyamfó ebofo fe utsyuǝ eto afa mflamfla eto kayofofo! Ala fǝ bobiasǝ nyamfo lǝ mǝ budi ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “How much bread do you have? Go and see!” They found out and answered, “We have five small loaves of bread and two fish.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Abolo asia bɛnlɛ? Bisu bebe!” Nya se bésu bábee, bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Abolo anɔ ku akpɛ ǝnuǝ ete ntǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples to tell the people to sit down on the green grass.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ bǝtǝ lǝ betidi bamǝ kenke lǝ bǝsiǝ kasɔ lǝ sefa siamǝ ǝsuǝ mfó lǝ etsyukpa etsyukpa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: All of them saw him and were terrified. But at this same time he said, “Don't worry! I am Jesus. Don't be afraid.”
translation_verse: Mǝmblɛ áte sikpi se bǝnyǝ wǝ. Nyaso Yesu átɛyi mǝ lamfolamfo nkǝ, “Biante sikpi! Mɔ uni! Bimuǝ utu bɛlɛ!”

english_verse: Jesus took the five loaves and the two fish. He looked up toward heaven and blessed the food. Then he broke the bread and handed it to his disciples to give to the people. He also divided the two fish, so everyone could have some.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu dífi abolo ku akpɛ nyamǝ, nya se óbe kato, nya ɔ́sɔ Onanto ani. Nya úbudi abolo nyamǝ nya úfi nnya útǝ wǝ bakasebi nkǝ bǝsiǝ bǝtǝ etsyukpa etsyukpa nyamǝ. Nya úsiǝ akpɛ nyamɛ tsya nko útǝ mǝ.

english_verse: After everyone had eaten all they wanted,
translation_verse: Mba kenke lɛkɛ mfó édi bémi.

english_verse: Jesus' disciples picked up twelve large baskets of leftover bread and fish.
translation_verse: Nya se wǝ bakasebi lɛsɛ didisa nǝ díbu bakɔɔ, díyi lefosi etsyitsya kplɛ ǝnuǝ.

english_verse: At once, Jesus made his disciples get into the boat and start back across to Bethsaida. But he stayed until he had sent the crowds away.
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo Yesu átɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ bedufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ lǝ besu umǝ wǝ baakpo Betsaida, lǝ ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ eto lekpake nǝ nse. Nya útǝ nkǝ sitiditu siamǝ sǝnsǝ sidu.

english_verse: Then he told them goodbye and went up on the side of a mountain to pray.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, wuntsya édu óbe kɔtini komǝ nkǝ lǝ usu oto ola.

english_verse: Later in the evening he was still there by himself, and the boat was somewhere in the middle of the lake.
translation_verse: Se éyo ketsyee, ɔklɔ ǝmǝ áyo ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ eto ntinti, Yesu mate hã díbu uńyǝ mfó.

english_verse: He could see that the disciples were struggling hard, because they were rowing against the wind. Not long before morning, Jesus came toward them. He was walking on the water and was about to pass the boat.
translation_verse: Únyǝ nkǝ wǝ betidi édufǝ lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ ku kase bánlɛ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ bofo bonwa itsyise ufiebi lɛ bɔsɔ kǝlǝ mǝ. Nyaso lǝ kolensiǝnto kplɛɛ, Yesu áyɛ lǝ ntu bomǝ ǝsuǝ úsu mǝ ɔflɔ eti nkǝ lǝ ɔyɛ ofe.

english_verse: When the disciples saw Jesus walking on the water, they thought he was a ghost, and they started screaming.
translation_verse: Nya se bǝnyǝ wǝ lǝ ntu bomǝ ǝsuǝǝ, báfa bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Ɔkɔ ni.”

english_verse: He then got into the boat with them, and the wind died down. The disciples were completely confused.
translation_verse: Nya óbe údufǝ lǝ mǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafo, nya ete ufiebi ǝmǝ lɛyɛ bɔsɔ. Nyamfo éyifo wǝ bakasebi yanii ku kafɔsu.

english_verse: Their minds were closed, and they could not understand the true meaning of the loaves of bread. Jesus Heals Sick People in Gennesaret (Matthew
translation_verse: Itsyise bánte kase ko íbǝ fɛ útǝ betidi akpi anɔ bamfo lesa bédi banɔ. Mǝ nsusu mánkpa ko mǝ lǝ nyamfó ǝsuǝ, itsyise bámfo wǝ bánɔ. Yesu Átsya Befimfi Lǝ Genesaret Eto Kasɔ.

english_verse: As soon as they got out of the boat, the people recognized Jesus.
translation_verse: Kase báyifǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ koo, betidi ǝtsyǝ Yesu lekpo.

english_verse: So they ran all over that part of the country to bring their sick people to him on mats. They brought them each time they heard where he was.
translation_verse: Nyaso betidi bamǝ étsyetsyi bésu bátɛyi mǝ betidi kenke lǝ kasɔ kamǝ. Nya kaka ke bánɔ bǝ Yesu kpee, bétsyi befimfi lǝ mǝ belabekǝ ǝsuǝ báboko wǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: In every village or farm or marketplace where Jesus went, the people brought their sick to him. They begged him to let them just touch his clothes, and everyone who did was healed.
translation_verse: Nya kaka ke Yesu dísu koo, umǝ ni o-o, kebuto keni o-o, betidi ko díketsyi mǝ befimfi kaboko obia nya bánlɛ wǝ lekpakpa bǝnkǝ utǝ lǝ betidi wǝ awu eto atosi ete. Nya mba dítidi nnyaa, ǝmuǝ ale.

english_verse: Some Pharisees and several teachers of the Law of Moses from Jerusalem came and gathered around Jesus.
translation_verse: Farisifɔ ku afi eto bateasa ba dítsyi Yerusalem ǝbǝ bátsyilama Yesu.

english_verse: You are good at rejecting God's commands so that you can follow your own teachings!
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bekpe awɛsu ǝtsyuǝ nnya biefi akayɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ kani Onanto eto kɔfi budi, keyifo batekoko ku banakoko eto akpa.

english_verse: They noticed that some of his disciples ate without first washing their hands.
translation_verse: Bǝnyǝ bǝ wǝ bakasebi si balɛ lesa budi nya bǝtsyuǝ mǝmflǝ mǝ ani fe kase Farisifɔ laate betidi bǝ ele bǝ bǝflǝ.

english_verse: The Pharisees and many others obey the teachings of their ancestors. They always wash their hands in the proper way before eating.
translation_verse: Bǝnyǝ nyamfo bǝtsyǝ lekpo itsyise Farisifɔ ku Yudafɔ fɛfɛ kenke eeyifo lǝ mǝ batekoko, banakoko eto akpa nnya báyani bǝtsyǝ nya báte mǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: None of them will eat anything they buy in the market until it is washed. They also follow a lot of other teachings, such as washing cups, pitchers, and bowls.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ báya lesa saa betsyiko bikǝkatekɔ tsyaa, ele bǝ bǝflǝ mǝ ani fɛ lǝ bedi. Nya ele bǝ beyifo lǝ afi kpǝ nnya bǝbǝ bétu, fe kase bǝǝflǝ akɔbe ku ekplibi ku kalɔtsyi.

english_verse: The Pharisees and teachers asked Jesus, “Why don't your disciples obey what our ancestors taught us to do? Why do they eat without washing their hands?”
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso Farisifɔ ku afi eto bateasa átɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Beso fǝ mba ntǝkǝko fǝ lǝǝnyifo lǝ bo batekoko ku banakoko eto akpa ǝsuǝ? Nya banlɛ asa budi lǝ mǝ ani mǝflǝmflǝmflǝ ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: You are nothing but show-offs! The prophet Isaiah was right when he wrote that God had said, “All of you praise me with your words, but you never really think about me.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝlǝkǝ kɛnyɛ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Ǝnǝmi ǝnǝmi eto betidi bini! Lesa nǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yesaya lɛwɔni ɔ́tɛyi utsyǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝǝ, íbǝ ítǝ sitinti! Ɔ́tɛyi bo nkǝ, Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, ‘Betidi bamfoo, ǝnǝmi ǝnǝmi eto dibu ete bǝǝtǝ mɛ, banla mɛ itsyi lǝ mǝ akɔɛsi.

english_verse: It is useless for you to worship me, when you teach rules made up by humans.”
translation_verse: Bimba ete ini bǝ bálɛ mɔ lelabi buyifo. Baate kawunsiǝ eto afi nnya betidi dítsyǝ fenkǝ mɔ afi ini.’

english_verse: You disobey God's commands in order to obey what humans have taught.
translation_verse: Nnya lete bǝ bifi mɔ kɔfi bɛkula nya bɛnlɛ mi kawunsiǝ mfo eto akpa boté.”

english_verse: But you let people get by without helping their parents when they should. You let them say that what they own has been offered to God.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ biatɛyi biǝnkǝ ɛlɛkɛ bǝ utidi ebofo lesa bɔni butǝ wǝ anto ku ambe ba lesa lehiã, ku nsusu bǝ lesa nǝmǝ eyifo kɛnkɛ, kato taflatsyǝ ku nsusu bǝ wuufi lesa nǝmǝ utǝ Onanto bomu eso.

english_verse: You won't let those people help their parents.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ le bo akpa ǝsuǝǝ, boata Onanto eto kɔfi kebu.

english_verse: And you ignore God's commands in order to follow your own teaching. You do a lot of other things just as bad. What Really Makes People Unclean (Matthew
translation_verse: Nko ini bǝ biefi mi bana eto akpa kaninsǝ Onanto eto afi. Nya bieyifo asa bamba kpǝ tsya fe nyamfo eto okle.” Asa Nnya Laabɔ Ketsyi Utidi Eto Lɛkɔɛsi Lǝǝtǝ Weeyifo Lebua Nɛ.

english_verse: Then Jesus said: What comes from your heart is what makes you unclean.
translation_verse: Nya úsukosǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Lesa nǝ lɛbɔ itsyi lǝ utsyuǝ eto lɛkɔɛsii, ni laabiasǝ utidi nɛ.

english_verse: Jesus called the crowd together again and said, “Pay attention and try to understand what I mean.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, Yesu esi ókpadi sitiditu siamǝ nkǝ bányi bafi wǝ. Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mimblɛ kenke bitsyue mɛ ato lǝ bɛnɔ kasɔ.

english_verse: After Jesus and his disciples had left the crowd and gone into the house, they asked him what these sayings meant.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, se údu lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ úsu diyoo, wǝ bakasebi átɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ ulǝkǝ lekpa nǝmǝ eto kasɔ ote mǝ.

english_verse: He answered, “Don't you know what I am talking about by now? You surely know that the food you put into your mouth cannot make you unclean.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ biannɔ lekpa nǝmfo kasɔɔ, nyalɛ mi nsusu ǝmbǝ kulesa kasɔ bofo bɔnɔ! Ekpa bǝnkǝ lesa nǝ didufǝ lǝ utidi kafoo, ǝmbutǝ utidi ǝmǝ yifo lebua,

english_verse: It doesn't go into your heart, but into your stomach, and then out of your body.” By saying this, Jesus meant that all foods were fit to eat.
translation_verse: itsyise yeendufǝ lǝ wǝ utu kǝmiǝ. Wǝ kafo bomu yuudufǝ nya yɔɔyɛ ɛbɔ lǝ wǝ kafo fe lesa biabia.” Nyaso nnya Yesu lɛtɛyi mfoo, ate bǝnkǝ didisa saa alɛkɛ itǝ budi.

english_verse: All of these come from your heart, and they are what make you unfit to worship God. A Woman's Faith (Matthew
translation_verse: Asa bua nyamfo kenke aabɔ ketsyi lǝ utidi eto lɛkɔɛsi, nya laabiasǝ utidi nɛ.” Usio Wǝ Lenni Yudanyǝ Áfo Yesu Ɔ́nɔ.

english_verse: Jesus left and went to the region near the town of Tyre, where he stayed in someone's home. He did not want people to know he was there, but they found out anyway.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu édu úsu umǝ utsyuǝ lǝ Tiro eto kasɔ. Úsu diyo ditsyuǝ kaka wóanla nkǝ kuutsyuǝ saa te nkǝ okpe mfó, tsyafɛ wóamfo bɔbiɔ.

english_verse: A woman whose daughter had an evil spirit in her heard where Jesus was. And at once she came and knelt down at his feet.
translation_verse: Mfóo, se usio utsyuǝ wǝ lɛwɔnɔ bua nlɛ wǝ ubi bulǝ lɛnɔ nkǝ Yesu kpe lǝ mfóo, úbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ akpa akpa nya óse akonki lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: The woman was Greek and had been born in the part of Syria known as Phoenicia. She begged Jesus to force the demon out of her daughter.
translation_verse: Usio ǝmfo enni Yudanyǝ. Bále wǝ lǝ umǝ wǝ baakpo Foinike lǝ Siria eto kasɔ. Nya ɔ́lɛ Yesu lekpakpa nkǝ ola lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ ɔbɔnko lǝ wǝ ubi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “The children must first be fed! It isn't right to take away their food and feed it to dogs.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lékpasǝ wǝ nkǝ, “Tutɛɛ, tǝ bekpefi lesa etɔ. Yanlɛkɛ bǝ befi bekpefi eto lesa bǝtǝ bakpa.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “That's true! You may go now. The demon has left your daughter.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ kase fǝtǝ mbuayɛ mfo esoo, du esu diyo. Ebunyǝ se lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ díkayani fǝ ubi ǝmǝ.”

english_verse: When the woman got back home, she found her child lying on the bed. The demon had gone. Jesus Heals a Man Who Was Deaf and Could Hardly Talk
translation_verse: Nyaso usio ǝmfo édu úsu diyo. Lǝ mfóo, únyǝ nkǝ wǝ ubi labe lǝ wǝ kalabekɔ, nya lɛwɔnɔ bua nǝmǝ lénsisi wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ. Yesu Átsya Osani Wǝ Ni Ototi Ku Ɔmumu.

english_verse: Jesus left the region around Tyre and went by way of Sidon toward Lake Galilee. He went through the land near the ten cities known as Decapolis.
translation_verse: Se Yesu lídu lǝ Tiro eto lekpake mfóo, ɔ́yɛ lǝ Sidon úsu Galilea eto Ditumbukplɛ kama kaka Kǝmǝ Lefosi kamǝ nkpe eti.

english_verse: Some people brought to him a man who was deaf and could hardly talk. They begged Jesus just to touch him.
translation_verse: Nya mfóo, betidi bǝtsyuǝ ákpa utidi utsyuǝ wǝ ni ototi ku ɔmumu báboko wǝ ɔflɔ nya bálɛ wǝ lekpakpa bǝ utǝkǝ ani lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: After Jesus had taken him aside from the crowd, he stuck his fingers in the man's ears. Then he spit and put it on the man's tongue.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu ákpa wǝ usuko lɛkpɔ kaka betidi ku kudu lǝmbǝ, nya úfi wǝ animi ókpe wǝ lǝ ato. Útufǝ ntufǝ ókpo lǝ wǝ animi nya ɔ́kɔbe utidi ǝmǝ eto odiakami.

english_verse: Jesus looked up toward heaven, and with a groan he said, “Effatha!” which means “Open up!”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lébesǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi óbe kato nya ɔ́wɔnɔ fũũ, nya ɔ́tɛyi osani ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Hefata,” eto kasɔ ni bǝǝ, “Sini!”

english_verse: At once the man could hear, and he had no more trouble talking clearly.
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo, osani ǝmǝ eto ato ásini nya wǝ odiakami tsya lényankli nya ófo etiki budi.

english_verse: Jesus told the people not to say anything about what he had done. But the more he told them, the more they talked about it.
translation_verse: Yesu ákpe betidi ba dinyǝ mfó kɔfi nkǝ bántɛyi utidi saa kulesa, itsyi lǝ lesa nǝ bǝnyǝ mfó. Fɛɛ bimbaa ete ɔ́ninko mǝ, itsyise kase ókpe mǝ kɔfii, nko kǝ banlɛ nnya bokpantsyasǝ nɛ.

english_verse: They were completely amazed and said, “Everything he does is good! He even heals people who cannot hear or talk.”
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba kenke lɛnɔ asa nyamfóo, iyifo mǝ naa efensǝ! Nya bátɛyi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ, “Wǝǝyifo lesa saa kukɔnɔ. Wǝǝtǝ bamumu leedi etiki, nya batoti tsya laanɔ asa!”

english_verse: Jesus warned them, “Watch out! Guard against the yeast of the Pharisees and of Herod.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bekpe kobe lǝ bitsyue ato lǝ bɛnɔ etiki itsyi lǝ oka Herodes ku Farisifɔ eto ǝyǝnkisǝsa ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Then Jesus explained clearly what he meant. Peter took Jesus aside and told him to stop talking like that.
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nyamfo ókpasǝ, bǝ lǝ banɔ kasɔ. Nya Petro lékpa wǝ usuko ɔflɔ wonko wǝ inuǝ, nya ɔ́ninko wǝ.

english_verse: “I feel sorry for these people. They have been with me for three days, and they don't have anything to eat.
translation_verse: “Betidi bamfo eto asa lɛ mɛ kaminsǝ, itsyise eyi ǝtsyǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ ni nyamfo se bǝbǝ mɔ ɔflɔ nɛ. Nya mɔmɔɔ, kulesa ente boodi.

english_verse: Some of them live a long way from here. If I send them away hungry, they might faint on their way home.”
translation_verse: Lǝ nyani mǝ beluu, kukpɛnsɛ ebɔlɛ mǝ kola disi lǝ kusu itsyise mǝ bǝtsyuǝ etsyi katsyontsyokɔ.”

english_verse: After Jesus told the crowd to sit down, he took the seven loaves and gave thanks. He then broke the loaves and handed them to his disciples, who passed them out to the crowd.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝmblɛ nkǝ bǝsiǝ kasɔ. Nya úfi abolo akuanse nyamǝ, nya ɔ́sɔ Onanto ani, nya úbudi nnya úfi útǝ wǝ bakasebi nkǝ befi bǝtǝ betidi bamǝ kenke. Nya mǝ tsya dífi nnya bésiǝ bǝtǝ mǝ.

english_verse: They also had a few little fish, and after Jesus had blessed these, he told the disciples to pass them around.
translation_verse: Akpɛ asiani tsya ǝtsyǝ. Yesu éfi nnya tsya nya ɔ́sɔ ani. Nya úfi nnya útǝ wǝ bakasebi nkǝ besiǝ nnya tsya bǝtǝ mǝ.

english_verse: he got into the boat with the disciples and crossed to the territory near Dalmanutha. A Sign from Heaven (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi dídufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ báyila ditumbukplɛ bésu Dalmanuta eto lekpake. Farisifɔ Átɔ Yesu Bǝnkǝ Uyifo Ayanisa Ote Mǝ.

english_verse: The Pharisees came out and started an argument with Jesus. They wanted to test him by asking for a sign from heaven.
translation_verse: Farisifɔ bǝtsyuǝ ǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya bétsyiko wǝ etiki bunǝnko lǝ befi bato wǝ babe. Nyaso bátɛyi wǝ bǝ uyifo ayanisa ǝtsyuǝ ote mǝ lǝ bate bǝ Onanto ɔflɔ útsyi úbǝ.

english_verse: The disciples had forgotten to bring any bread, and they had only one loaf with them in the boat.
translation_verse: Kase banlɛ ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ bɔyilaa, wǝ bakasebi bamǝ áta ǝsuǝ béntsyi abolo kpǝ.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking and asked, “Why are you talking about not having any bread? Don't you understand? Are your minds still closed?
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se Yesu nyi etiki nnya banlɛ bɔtɛyi esoo, ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Beso bɛnlɛ etiki lǝ abolo butsyi ǝsuǝ? Ibǝ ese mɔmɔɔ, biǝnyǝtɔ nye bɛnɔ kasɔ? Bitidi ato ko!

english_verse: how many baskets of leftovers you picked up when I fed those
translation_verse: Bíankloma lefe nǝ ménsie abolo anɔ míntǝ betidi akpi anɔ dídi? Etsyitsya kplɛ asia nnya wɛlɛwɛlɛ díbu díyi?” Bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Lefosi etsyitsya ǝnuǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus took him by the hand and led him out of the village, where he spit into the man's eyes. He placed his hands on the blind man and asked him if he could see anything.
translation_verse: Yesu ákɔbe nwǝ ǝmǝ lǝ kɔni nya ókpa wǝ ɔ́bɔnko lǝ umǝ nti. Se útufǝ ntufǝ ókpo lǝ unǝmba ǝmǝ eto ǝnǝmii, úfi wǝ ani útǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, nya ɔ́tɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Alɛ lesatsyuǝ bunyǝǝ?”

english_verse: The man looked up and said, “I see people, but they look like trees walking around.”
translation_verse: Nya utidi ǝmǝ létakasǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi óbe kato nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Ee, nlɛ betidi bunyǝ, tsya beyifo fe eyi. Fɛɛ balɛ bɔyɛ katsyilama.”

english_verse: Once again Jesus placed his hands on the man's eyes, and this time the man stared. His eyes were healed, and he saw everything clearly.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu disi útidi wǝ ǝnǝmi. Lǝ lefe nuǝfǝ nǝmfoo, utidi ǝmǝ ásini wǝ ǝnǝmi kukɔnɔ, nya wǝ ǝnǝmi lékpa, nya únyǝ lesa saa kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: Jesus said to him, “You may return home now, but don't go into the village.” Who Is Jesus? (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya Yesu dílǝkǝ wǝ kusu nkǝ udu usu wǝ diyo, wensisinkli usu umǝ ǝmǝ nti. Petro Átɛyi Nkǝ Yesu Ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ.

english_verse: Then Jesus asked, “But who do you say I am?” “You are the Messiah!” Peter replied.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu disi ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Mimi nkpǝ, owoe biebu biǝ wǝ mini?” Petro átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ ni nwǝ Onanto lékpo ɔhile útsyǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus warned the disciples not to tell anyone about him. Jesus Speaks about His Suffering and Death (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya Yesu díkǝ mǝ ato nkǝ bántɛyi ku utsyuǝ saa, lesa nǝ benyi itsyi lǝ wǝ mfo. Yesu Édi Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Wǝ Kanyinyǝnyǝ Ku Wǝ Ukpǝ Ku Wǝ Businkli Kataka Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus began telling his disciples what would happen to him. He said, “The nation's leaders, the chief priests, and the teachers of the Law of Moses will make the Son of Man suffer terribly. He will be rejected and killed, but three days later he will rise to life.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu dítsyiko wǝ bakasebi asa ǝtsyuǝ bóte, ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Ele bǝ ibǝ itǝ bǝ Utidi Eto Ubi nyǝ kanyi lǝ Yudafɔ eto beninǝ ku besumunyǝ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa eto ani, bani wǝ. Boolo wǝ, tsya lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝǝ wootaka.”

english_verse: But when Jesus turned and saw the disciples, he corrected Peter. He said to him, “Satan, get away from me! You are thinking like everyone else and not like God.”
translation_verse: Tsyaa, se Yesu díkǝnsǝ óbe wǝ bakasebii, údi etiki ku lɛblɔfi ókpe Petro nkǝ, “Obansam, du mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ!” Nya ɔlɔ bɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Anla asa nnya Onanto lala, bomu nnya betidinini lala!”

english_verse: Jesus then told the crowd and the disciples to come closer, and he said: If any of you want to be my followers, you must forget about yourself. You must take up your cross and follow me.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu ákpadi betidi eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ ku wǝ bakasebi óboko wǝ ɔflɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ utsyuǝ ala nkǝ wǝǝtǝkǝko mɛɛ, ele bǝ ulǝkǝ wǝ ato ku wǝ ǝsuǝ utsyiko lǝ wǝ alasa ǝsuǝ nya lǝ utsyi wǝ uyikabie utǝkǝko mɛ.

english_verse: If you want to save your life, you will destroy it. But if you give up your life for me and for the good news, you will save it.
translation_verse: Itsyise nwǝ ke lela nkǝ wǝǝlǝkǝ wǝ nkpǝǝ, woo nyansǝ mu. Nya utidi wǝ ke loonyansǝ wǝ nkpǝ lǝ mɔ disi ku lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo esoo, wuunyǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: What will you gain, if you own the whole world but destroy yourself?
translation_verse: Nte kutǝkǝ ko utudi luunyǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto bikǝ kenke afiani wǝ bele fɛ wǝnnyǝ nkpǝ manlo?

english_verse: What could you give to get back your soul?
translation_verse: Nye be utidi luufi ofloma ko bǝ lǝ unyǝ nkpǝ manlo?

english_verse: Don't be ashamed of me and my message among these unfaithful and sinful people! If you are, the Son of Man will be ashamed of you when he comes in the glory of his Father with the holy angels.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔ mfoo, betidi kpǝ lǝ asa bua buyifo ketsyi kama kakpe Onanto. Nyaso lǝ utsyuǝ efi mɔ ku mɔ asatete fe afanisa mɔmɔɔ, wuuntsya ebudi kofani lǝ mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi, ɔflɔ lǝ lefe nǝ muubǝ ku Onanto eto Batɔnkpe kɛnkɛ ku lǝ Onanto eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: I can assure you that Elijah has already come. And people treated him just as they wanted to, as the Scriptures say they would. Jesus Heals a Boy (Matthew
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Elia búbǝ koko. Fɛɛ betidi mámfo wǝ ku dibu. Bomu béyifo wǝ kase ke bála. Nyamfo ǝbǝ itǝ fe kase Onanto eto bɛnyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛwɔni bǝtsyǝ lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ.” Yesu Ála Lɛwɔnɔ Bua Nǝ Dísiǝ Lǝ Osaibi Utsyuǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: After Jesus and the disciples had gone back home and were alone, they asked him, “Why couldn't we force out that demon?”
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kama se Yesu dídufǝ diyo ditsyuǝǝ, wǝ bakasebi átɔ wǝ buɛ bǝnkǝ, “Beso bo dímamfo lɛwɔnɔ nǝmfo bola kǝlǝkǝ lǝ ubi ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: Then Jesus asked a child to stand near him. He put his arm around the child and said,
translation_verse: Nya útǝ dikpefi díbǝ únyǝ lǝ mǝ sɛtɔ. Nya útsyi dikpefi nǝmfo útǝkǝ lǝ wǝ akpa nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: And his clothes became much whiter than any bleach on earth could make them.
translation_verse: Nya wǝ awu nnya onkpe léfloma íflubi futututu enso kase utidi luuflǝ wǝ bikǝ ku ntu biole nya bɛnlɛ buyǝnde.

english_verse: Then Elijah and Moses appeared and were talking with Jesus.
translation_verse: Nya bǝnyǝ Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ba koko, Mose ku Elia lɛbɔ bánlɛ etiki budi ku Yesu.

english_verse: The shadow of a cloud passed over and covered them. From the cloud a voice said, “This is my Son, and I love him. Listen to what he says!”
translation_verse: Nya lɛsɔmiloku ditsyuǝ díbǝ díti mǝmblɛ kenke, nya bánɔ ɔkɔɛ lɛbɔ utsyi lǝ asɔmiloku nyamǝ ǝsuǝ nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Nwǝ mfo ni mɔ ubi lala wǝ mankeko. Bitsyue wǝ koto.”

english_verse: At once the disciples looked around, but they saw only Jesus.
translation_verse: Akpaakpa mfóo, bátsyilamasǝ ǝnǝmi tsya bǝnyǝ kuutsyuǝ saa enso Yesu hã ńyǝ ku mǝ mfó.

english_verse: So they kept it to themselves. But they wondered what he meant by the words “raised from death.”
translation_verse: Béti etiki nyamfo bákpe lǝ mǝ nti, fɛ lǝ mǝ mate sii, nya bákatɔ mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Be ni bǝ wootaka utsyi ɔkɔmǝ ubǝ eto kasɔ?”

english_verse: The disciples asked Jesus, “Don't the teachers of the Law of Moses say that Elijah must come before the Messiah does?”
translation_verse: Nya bátɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Beso afi eto bateasa bamǝ laatɛyi bǝnkǝ ele bǝ ibǝ bǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Elia tɔ Kristo eto bubǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: Elijah certainly will come to get everything ready. But don't the Scriptures also say that the Son of Man must suffer terribly and be rejected?
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Sitinti baatɛyi. Ele bǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Elia tɔ Kristo eto bubǝ lǝ ubǝ ɔlɔ lesa saa utsyǝ. Fɛɛ báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ Eto Kukuǝ tsya bǝ Utidi Eto Ubi ebudi ohiã tinti nya bɔɔni wǝ. Be bibu biǝ nyamfo tsya lɛ bote?

english_verse: When Jesus and his three disciples came back down, they saw a large crowd around the other disciples. The teachers of the Law of Moses were arguing with them.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfóo, se Yesu ku bakasebi itsyǝ bamǝ dísinkli bǝbǝ bakasebi fɛfɛ ɔflɔɔ, bǝnyǝ bǝ betidi kpǝ ńyǝ bátsyilama mǝ, nya afi eto bateasa bǝtsyuǝ nlɛ mǝ etiki bunǝ nko.

english_verse: They brought the boy, and as soon as the demon saw Jesus, it made the boy shake all over. He fell down and began rolling on the ground and foaming at the mouth.
translation_verse: Nya bákpa wǝ búsuko Yesu. Nya kase lɛwɔnɔ bua nǝmfo dínyǝ Yesu ko, dítinkǝsǝ ubi ǝmǝ nya dínǝ wǝ lɛɛsɔ lǝ kasɔ lɛnlɛ bowaninsǝ, akaminansǝ lǝ kasɔ, nya efu nlɛ bɔbɔ lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: “When you welcome even a child because of me, you welcome me. And when you welcome me, you welcome the one who sent me.” For or against Jesus (Luke
translation_verse: “Utsyuǝ saa léfo dikpefi lǝ mɔ disii, mɔ ni ófo. Nya utsyuǝ saa loofo mɛɛ, inni mɔ mate ete ofo. Bomu ófo mɔ Anto wǝ létsyese mɛ tsya.” Utsyuǝ Saa Wǝ Leenkisi Mii, Uyifo Lɔni Ku Mi.

english_verse: The crowd was really surprised to see Jesus, and everyone hurried over to greet him.
translation_verse: Se betidi bamfó kenke dínyǝ Yesu nlɛ bubǝǝ, íyifo mǝ yanii, nya bétsyetsyi bésu bátsyako wǝ bǝsiǝsǝ wǝ.

english_verse: Jesus asked, “What are you arguing about?”
translation_verse: Yesu ɔ́tɔ wǝ bakasebi bamǝ nkǝ, “Nte kǝnǝ ka mi ku mǝ nlɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus said, “You people don't have any faith! How much longer must I be with you? Why do I have to put up with you? Bring the boy to me.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Ei! Mii, mmi eto betidi, mi bofo kanɔ ǝmbǝ ale! Nte lefe nǝ eto okle ele bǝ bonko mi yɛ fɛ lǝ befo bɛnɔ? Nye nte lefe kɛntsyɛ nǝ ele bǝ nyɛnko mi fɛ lǝ bɛnɔ asa kasɔ? Bekpa ubi ǝmǝ beboko mɛ!”

english_verse: Jesus asked the boy's father, “How long has he been like this?” The man answered, “Ever since he was a child.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɔ wǝ anto nkǝ, “Se ítsyiko wǝ buyifo mǝǝ, yɔ́ɔ klɛ?” Osani ǝmǝ átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Ítsyǝ wǝ kasɔ lǝ wǝ sikpefi lefe ke.

english_verse: At once the boy's father shouted, “I do have faith! Please help me to have even more.”
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo, ubi ǝmǝ eto anto átɛyi bembembe nkǝ, “Mfo nnɔ, tsyaa bumbǝ ale kpǝ. Wunsǝko mɛ lǝ mɔ bofo kanɔ lǝ bumuǝ ale.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw that a crowd was gathering fast, he spoke sternly to the evil spirit that had kept the boy from speaking or hearing. He said, “I order you to come out of the boy! Don't ever bother him again.”
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ Yesu dínyǝ nkǝ betidi kpǝ lǝ bɔkpɔ lǝ banyi bafi mǝǝ, údi lɛwɔnɔ nǝmfo etiki nkǝ, “Lɛwɔnɔ bua nǝ lǝǝtǝ betidi lannɔ ku leendi etiki, nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi minkǝ bɔ lǝ ubi ǝmfo ǝsuǝ, nya mensi sinkli edufǝ lǝ wǝ kulefe kulefe bio!”

english_verse: The spirit screamed and made the boy shake all over. Then it went out of him. The boy looked dead, and almost everyone said he was.
translation_verse: Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmfo áfa bembembe, nya dítinkǝsǝ wǝ kekleke nya lɛbɔ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ. Ubi ǝmfo álabe mfó fe bukpǝ ukpǝ. Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ ńyǝ mfó nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Ukpǝ!”

english_verse: But Jesus took hold of his hand and helped him stand up.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛkɔbe ubi ǝmǝ lǝ kɔni nya ótaka úńyǝ.

english_verse: Jesus left with his disciples and started through Galilee. He did not want anyone to know about it,
translation_verse: Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi édu mfó báyɛ lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ. Yesu mánla nkǝ kuutsyuǝ saa te kaka onkpe,

english_verse: because he was teaching the disciples that the Son of Man would be handed over to people who would kill him. But three days later he would rise to life.
translation_verse: itsyise úkate wǝ bakasebi asa. Ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Osani utsyuǝ ebufi Betidi kenke eto Ubi utǝ, nya wuufi wǝ utǝ betidi nkǝ balo. Nya lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝ ǝsuǝǝ, wuusinkli otaka ubǝ nkpǝ.”

english_verse: The disciples did not understand what Jesus meant, and they were afraid to ask. Who Is the Greatest? (Matthew
translation_verse: Tsya bánnɔ lesa nǝ ɔ́tɛyi mǝ mfo eto kasɔ, nya báte sikpi ku kase bɔɔtɔ wǝ ditiki nǝ ɔ́tɛyi mfo eto kasɔ. Yesu Áte Asa Itsyi Lǝ Nwǝ Ndi Ɔkplɛnyǝ Kenke Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If your foot causes you to sin, chop it off. You would be better off to go into life lame than to have two feet and be thrown into hell.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ fǝ kokpa kɔni laabiasǝ fǝ bofokanɔɔ, la ko ǝlǝkǝ. Ɛlɛkɛ eso bǝ kɛ kokpa kɔwɛ lǝ ǝnyǝ nkpǝ manlo, enso bǝ akpa ǝnuǝ kɛ fǝ lǝ bato fǝ bakpe lǝ utǝ ǝmǝ kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: The worms there never die, and the fire never stops burning.
translation_verse: wǝ eto asa bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, ‘Ekuklubi nnya laabiasǝ asa mfóo, ǝǝnkpǝ kulefe. Nya ute wǝ laatonsǝ asa mfóo, aanni kulefe.’

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples went to his home in Capernaum. After they were inside the house, Jesus asked them, “What were you arguing about along the way?”
translation_verse: Se bésu bédufǝ Kapernaum eto umǝǝ, bésu bédufǝ diyo lɔni. Mfóo, Yesu átɔ wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Nte ditiki nǝ bɛnlɛ bunǝ lǝ mi nti se bɔ́nlɛ bubǝ?”

english_verse: They had been arguing about which one of them was the greatest, and so they did not answer.
translation_verse: Tsya bǝntǝ wǝ mbuayɛ saa. Itsyise se bánlɛ bubǝǝ, bǝkǝnǝ etiki bǝ bala bǝ baate utsyǝ wǝ ni ɔkplɛ kenke lǝ mǝ nti.

english_verse: After Jesus sat down and told the twelve disciples to gather around him, he said, “If you want the place of honor, you must become a slave and serve others!”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu dísiǝ lǝ kasɔ nya ókpadi wǝ bakasebi lefosi inuǝ bamǝ, nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mi futsyǝ lela nkǝ weedi ɔkplɛnyǝ kenke lǝ mi ntii, ele bǝ uyifo wǝ ǝsuǝ fenkǝ nwǝ lǝmbǝ kulesa nti, nya wuusumu wǝ bǝtsyuǝ.”

english_verse: Salt is good. But if it no longer tastes like salt, how can it be made salty again? Have salt among you and live at peace with each other.
translation_verse: “Mba alɛkɛ. Fɛ lǝ bóyansǝ mu kamini, ǝnsiǝmbofo kamini bokpe lǝ mu bio. Nyaso, tǝ mba eto lɛlɛkǝsǝ lǝ bɔkɛ mi lǝ ǝsuǝ. Lǝ bisiǝ lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ ku mi bǝtsyuǝ.”

english_verse: John said, “Teacher, we saw a man using your name to force demons out of people. But he wasn't one of us, and we told him to stop.”
translation_verse: Nya, okasebi wǝ baakpo Yohanes lɛtɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Oteasa, búnyǝ osani utsyuǝ wǝ nlɛ awɔnɔ bua bóla lǝ fǝ diye ǝsuǝ. Nya búti wǝ kusu buǝ usinkli ɔyɛ, itsyise umbǝ lǝ bo nti.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: Don't stop him! No one who works miracles in my name will soon turn and say something bad about me.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bienti wǝ kusu, itsyise utsyuǝ saa wǝ leeyifo ayanisa lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝǝ, ǝmbudi mɔ etiki bua.

english_verse: Anyone who isn't against us is for us.
translation_verse: Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ lǝǝnnyǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝǝ, bonko wǝ eyifo bani.

english_verse: And anyone who gives you a cup of water in my name, just because you belong to me, will surely be rewarded. Temptations To Sin (Matthew
translation_verse: “Nya mǝtǝ lǝ bete biǝ utsyuǝ saa wǝ luutǝ mi ntu nkǝ binǝ itsyise biyifo mɔ balee, Onanto ebofo wǝ nnya kayo. Biǝntǝ Kulesa Saa Lǝ Iti Mi Bofokanɔ Kusu.

english_verse: It will be terrible for people who cause even one of my little followers to sin. Those people would be better off thrown into the ocean with a heavy stone tied around their necks.
translation_verse: “Lǝ ibǝ bǝ utidi utsyuǝ ǝtǝ bǝ dikpefi nǝ díkǝnyǝ bofokanɔ lǝ mɛ ésinkli kama lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, wuunyǝ kotonǝnǝ tinti. Lǝ befi ukuǝ bátsyasǝ lǝ lebambi kplɛ ǝsuǝ befi bakpe wǝ lǝ simuǝ befi wǝ bato bakpe lǝ ditumbukplɛ, yɔɔlɛkɛ itǝ wǝ eso.

english_verse: So if your hand causes you to sin, cut it off! You would be better off to go into life paralyzed than to have two hands and be thrown into the fires of hell that never go out.
translation_verse: “Nyaso lǝ fǝ kɔni kɔni abiasǝ fǝ bofokanɔɔ, tɔnɔ lǝ ala ko ǝlǝkǝ! Ɛlɛkɛ bǝ yɛ kɔni kɔwɛ esu nkpǝ manlo kǝmiǝ enso bǝ kɛ ani ǝnuǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ oto fǝ okpe lǝ ditǝfɛnku ǝsuǝ kaka baatonsǝ asa bua.

english_verse: If your eye causes you to sin, get rid of it. You would be better off to go into God's kingdom with only one eye than to have two eyes and be thrown into hell.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ fǝ dinǝmi aakpa fǝ kesuko asa bua kǝmiǝǝ, nǝ ni ǝlǝkǝ. Ɛlɛkɛ eso lǝ akpe dinǝmi lɛwɛ nya fedufǝ lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ enso bǝ kɛ ǝnǝmi ǝnuǝ lǝ befi fǝ bato bakpe lǝ utǝ manlo kǝmiǝ,

english_verse: After Jesus left, he went to Judea and then on to the other side of the Jordan River. Once again large crowds came to him, and as usual, he taught them.
translation_verse: Nya se Yesu dídu mfó, ɔ́yila Yordan eto ketu úsu Yudea eto kasɔ. Betidi kpǝ esi bǝbǝ bátsyilama wǝ mfó tsya, nya úkate mǝ asa mfó itsyi lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ fe kase úkala buyifo.

english_verse: A woman who divorces her husband and marries again is also unfaithful.” Jesus Blesses Little Children (Matthew
translation_verse: Nko ke lǝ usio ani wǝ usiǝ nya usu usiǝko úsiǝ kusǝ bamba tsyaa, wuntsya akpo kusǝ óta wǝ usiǝ koko ǝmǝ úbu.” Yesu Ákpo Bekpefi Bǝtsyuǝ Atsyɔ.

english_verse: Some Pharisees wanted to test Jesus. So they came up to him and asked if it was right for a man to divorce his wife.
translation_verse: Farisifɔ bǝtsyuǝ ǝbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ bǝ lǝ itǝ kusuu, lǝ bǝnyǝ kusu lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Bátɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛ Onanto eto kɔfi ǝtǝ kusu bǝnkǝ osani ɔni wǝ usiǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus asked them, “What does the Law of Moses say about this?”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu tsya lítǝ mbuayɛ ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Nte kɔfi ko Mose lékpe mi?”

english_verse: They answered, “Moses allows a man to write out divorce papers and send his wife away.”
translation_verse: Bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Mose ǝtǝ kusu nkǝ osani wǝ ke lensianla wǝ usiǝǝ, ɔwɔni kukuǝ lǝ utǝ wǝ bote fɛ lǝ oyani wǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Moses gave you this law because you are so heartless.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Moses wǝǝ ni Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi áwɔni nyamfo nko útǝ mi itsyi lǝ mi letotidi eso.

english_verse: But in the beginning God made a man and a woman.
translation_verse: Taa kawunsiǝ eto diyifofee, Onanto éyifo osani ku usio, fe kase báwɔni bákpe lǝ Kukue Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: That's why a man leaves his father and mother and gets married.
translation_verse: Awɔnisa Eto Kukuǝ Kɛnkɛ átɛyi nkǝ, ‘Lǝ nyamfo eso osani du lǝ wǝ anto ku ambe ɔflɔ usu ɔkɔ ku wǝ usiǝ,

english_verse: He becomes like one person with his wife. Then they are no longer two people, but one.
translation_verse: nya mǝ inuǝ bamǝ loofiani ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ sɔni.’ Nyaso lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmii, bafiani utidi ɔni. Inni inuǝ!

english_verse: And no one should separate a couple that God has joined together.”
translation_verse: Nyaso betidi ba Onanto lɛkɔ banii, kawunsiǝ kamfo eto utidi saa ǝmbǝ kusu wǝǝsǝnsǝ mǝ nti.”

english_verse: When Jesus and his disciples were back in the house, they asked him about what he had said.
translation_verse: Kama se bésu bédufǝ lǝ diyo kǝmiǝǝ, wǝ bakasebi átɔ wǝ asa itsyi lǝ lǝsanǝ ɔ́tɛyi lǝ kɔfi komfó ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: He told them, “A man who divorces his wife and marries someone else is unfaithful to his wife.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝlǝkǝ kasɔ óte mǝ nkǝ, “Osani wǝ looyani wǝ usiǝ usu nya úfi obambaa, udi kɔsɔnɔ, ota wǝ usiǝ koko ǝmǝ ubu.

english_verse: Some people brought their children to Jesus so he could bless them by placing his hands on them. But his disciples told the people to stop bothering him.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmǝ tutuutuu, betidi bǝtsyuǝ ákpa mǝ bebi báboko Yesu ɔflɔ bǝ lǝ ufi wǝ ani utǝkǝ mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ okpo mǝ atsyɔ. Fɛɛ wǝ bakasebi ǝnyǝnki bákpe mǝ.

english_verse: I promise you that you cannot get into God's kingdom, unless you accept it the way a child does.”
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ utidi wǝ ke lǝmbofo Onanto eto Sekadidi fe kase dikpefi kɛkɛ laabokosǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔɔ, wǝmbudufǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ kulefe.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw this, he became angry and said, “Let the children come to me! Don't try to stop them. People who are like these little children belong to the kingdom of God.
translation_verse: Se Yesu dínyǝ nyamfoo, kafo ányi wǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Bitǝ lǝ ekpefi lǝ bǝbǝ mɔ ɔflɔ, bienti mǝ kusu. Itsyise Onanto eto sekakedikɔ tǝ itǝ mba laabokosǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ fe kase ekpefi kɛkɛ bamfo leeyifo.

english_verse: Jesus looked closely at the man. He liked him and said, “There's one thing you still need to do. Go sell everything you own. Give the money to the poor, and you will have riches in heaven. Then come with me.”
translation_verse: Yesu ábe wǝ ku lelabi nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lesakpa lɔni hã dibu ele bǝ yifo. Su lǝ esu efi fǝ bikǝ bia kenke nte fǝ ate, lǝ efi atabi nyamfó efi ǝtǝ bakombo. Lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, ebofiani otabinyǝ lǝ Onanto eto. Nyamfo eto kamaa, du lǝ ǝbǝ ǝtǝkǝko mɛ lefe saa!”

english_verse: When the man heard Jesus say this, he went away gloomy and sad because he was very rich.
translation_verse: Se osani ǝmfo lɛnɔ ditiki nǝmfoo, élo wǝ ani nnya údu ku nkuɛnlo, itsyise bikǝ kpǝ kpe wǝ.

english_verse: Jesus looked around and said to his disciples, “It's hard for rich people to get into God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Yesu átsyi ɔwininsǝ nya ótsyilamasǝ ǝnǝmi óbe wǝ bakasebi nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Ekpe ale tinti fɛ batabinyǝ loofo Onanto eto sekakedikɔ budufǝ.”

english_verse: The disciples were shocked to hear this. So Jesus told them again, “It's terribly hard to get into God's kingdom!
translation_verse: Ditiki nǝmfo ábiasǝ wǝ bakasebi bamfo eto nsusu. Fɛɛ Yesu esi átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ bebi, bɛnɔ kase enkpe ale itǝ batabinyǝ bǝ bǝnyǝ kusu bedufǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ!

english_verse: In fact, it's easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to get into God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Mǝ mfó budufǝ kpe ale eso kase ɔdɔmini ku lekoko lɔɔyɛ lǝ okaasa eto ofo ofe!”

english_verse: Jesus' disciples were even more amazed. They asked each other, “How can anyone ever be saved?”
translation_verse: Se ɔ́tɛyi mǝ ditiki nǝmfoo, isi ébiasǝ mǝ nsusu ekpe blɛmblɛ! Nya banlɛ mǝ ǝsuǝ bɔtɔ bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛ owoe ko luunyǝ nkpǝ manlo?”

english_verse: Jesus looked at them and said, “There are some things that people cannot do, but God can do anything.”
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu ábe mǝ tũũ, nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Utidi saa ǝmbǝ loofo nyamfo buyifo. Fɛɛ wǝ Onantoo, wǝ ebofo lesa saa buyifo.”

english_verse: The disciples were confused as Jesus led them toward Jerusalem, and his other followers were afraid. Once again, Jesus took the twelve disciples aside and told them what was going to happen to him. He said:
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝ bányɛ lǝ kusu baatɔ lǝ Yerusalem eeto umǝǝ, Yesu átɔ sɛtɔ fɛ wǝ bakasebi dítǝkǝ. Nya bulǝ butsyuǝ eto okle dídufǝ lǝ bakasabi bamfó ǝsuǝ nya sikpi dímuǝ betidi ba ntǝkǝko mǝ tsya. Yesu esi ókpadi wǝ bakasebi nya ókpa mǝ úsuko kaka kudu lǝmbǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ asa nnya lǝǝbǝ wǝ butu.

english_verse: We are now on our way to Jerusalem where the Son of Man will be handed over to the chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses. They will sentence him to death and hand him over to foreigners,
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bɛnɔ! Bɔtɔ lǝ Yerusalem eto umǝ kaka boomuǝ mɛ, mɔɔ ni Utidi Eto Ubi, nya boofi mɛ bakpe lǝ besumunyǝ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa eto ani. Boolo mɛ dikpǝkpi nya buufi mɛ bakpe lǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ eto ani.

english_verse: Jesus asked them what they wanted,
translation_verse: Yesu átɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Be ini?”

english_verse: and they answered, “When you come into your glory, please let one of us sit at your right side and the other at your left.”
translation_verse: Bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Lǝ ǝsiǝ lǝ fǝ lekankpomɛ lǝ fǝ sekakedikɔ eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝǝ, bo tsya aala boǝ lǝ bubǝ busiǝ lǝ fǝ akɔ mfó. Bo ɔni lǝ usiǝ lǝ fǝ kodiani nya unuǝfǝ tsya lǝ usiǝ lǝ fǝ kǝmǝni.”

english_verse: Jesus told them, “You don't really know what you're asking! Are you able to drink from the cup that I must soon drink from or be baptized as I must be baptized?”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Biante lesa nǝ bɛnlɛ bɔtɔ! Befo bɛnɔ biǝ biofo ntu bunǝ lǝ kanyi eto lɛkɔbe nǝ mǝǝnǝ ǝsuǝ? Nya biofo ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa nǝ moofo lǝ kawunsiǝ mfo bofoo?”

english_verse: “Yes, we are!” James and John answered. Then Jesus replied, “You certainly will drink from the cup from which I must drink. And you will be baptized just as I must!
translation_verse: Nya bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Boofo.” Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Ee, biofo bunǝ lǝ lɛkɔbe bua nǝ eto okle mǝǝnǝ, nnya biofo ntu flǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa nǝ eto okle maafo mfo.

english_verse: But it isn't for me to say who will sit at my right side and at my left. This is for God to decide.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mimbǝ kusu bǝ nlǝkǝ utidi wǝ luusiǝ lǝ mɔ kodiani nye kǝmǝni. Mɔ Anto wǝ ni futsyǝ luutǝ betidi ba úkalɔ mfó utsyǝ útǝ.”

english_verse: When the ten other disciples heard this, they were angry with James and John.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ bakasebi lefosi fɛfɛ lɛnɔ etiki nyamfoo, bǝnyǝ ɔblɔ bákpe Yakobo ku Yohanes.

english_verse: But Jesus called the disciples together and said: You know that those foreigners who call themselves kings like to order their people around. And their great leaders have full power over the people they rule.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu ákpadi mǝmblɛ kenke utsyǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Biyi biǝnkǝ Aba eto beninǝ kpe ǝsuǝale lǝ mǝ betidi ba nkpe lǝ mǝ kalɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya nkomǝ eto beninǝ tidi bamfó akɛ ale ǝkǝlǝkǝ kayinkǝ mba nkpe mǝ kalɔ.

english_verse: And if you want to be first, you must be everyone's slave.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mi nti eto utsyuǝ aala nkǝ woafo diye kplɛɛ, ele bǝ uyifo nwǝ lǝǝnnǝ ǝsuǝ, laabokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ kabɛbɛ bafɛfɛ eto lɛlɛkǝsǝ.

english_verse: The Son of Man did not come to be a slave master, but a slave who will give his life to rescue many people. Jesus Heals Blind Bartimaeus (Matthew
translation_verse: Itsyise Utidi Eto Ubi kulaa tsya mǝmbǝ nkǝ besumu mɛ. Bomu bǝ lǝ usumu betidi lǝ ufi wǝ nkpǝ utǝ lǝ betidi kpǝ eto dilǝkǝ.” Yesu Átsya Unǝmba Bartimeo.

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples went to Jericho. And as they were leaving, they were followed by a large crowd. A blind beggar by the name of Bartimaeus son of Timaeus was sitting beside the road.
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi ésu Yeriko. Nya se banlɛ budu lǝ umǝ ǝmǝǝ, betidi kpǝ ǝtǝkǝko mǝ. Nya lefe nǝ bányɛ kusuu, báfe unǝmba utsyuǝ wǝ baakpo Bartimeo eto kasɔ ni Timeo eto ubi. Nya unsi mfó ɔnlɛ asa bɔtɔ.

english_verse: When he heard that it was Jesus from Nazareth, he shouted, “Jesus, Son of David, have pity on me!”
translation_verse: Se ɔ́nɔ nkǝ Yesu Nasaretnyǝ uni nlɛ bofee, ófa bembembe ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Yesu! David eto ubi! Be mɛ lǝ ǝnyǝ mɛ kaminsǝ!”

english_verse: Many people told the man to stop, but he shouted even louder, “Son of David, have pity on me!”
translation_verse: Betidi kpǝ ba nlɛ bofe mfó ǝnyǝnki bákpe wǝ bǝnkǝ usinkli ɔyɛ kudu komǝ. Tsya mfe fɛ usi ófa bembembe nkǝ, “David eto ubi! Be mɛ lǝ ǝnyǝ mɛ kaminsǝ!”

english_verse: Jesus stopped and said, “Call him over!” They called out to the blind man and said, “Don't be afraid! Come on! He is calling for you.”
translation_verse: Nya se Yesu lɛnɔ nkoo, úkǝnǝ úńyǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bekpadi wǝ bitǝ mɛ.” Nyaso bákpadi unǝmba ǝmfo bátɛyi bǝ, “Nyǝ disuǝyuǝ! Taka mlǝ, itsyise ɔlɛ fǝ bokpadi.”

english_verse: The man threw off his coat as he jumped up and ran to Jesus.
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo, úlǝkǝ wǝ awu kato óto ókpe, nya ótaka úńyǝ, nya úsu Yesu flɔ.

english_verse: Jesus asked, “What do you want me to do for you?” The blind man answered, “Master, I want to see!”
translation_verse: Yesu átɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Be faala fǝ nyifo ntǝ fǝ?” Unǝmba ǝmǝ átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Oteasa, tǝ lǝ mɔ ǝnǝmi lǝ ɛsini lǝ nkǝnyǝ!”

english_verse: Jesus told him, “You may go. Your eyes are healed because of your faith.” At once the man could see, and he went down the road with Jesus.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Su. Fǝ bofokanɔ átsya fǝ.” Nya lamfolamfo, wǝ ǝnǝmi lɛsini nya útsyiko asa bunyǝ. Nya útǝkǝko Yesu, nya mǝmblɛ lídu.

english_verse: After Jesus had gone to Jerusalem, he went into the temple and looked around at everything. But since it was already late in the day, he went back to Bethany with the twelve disciples. Jesus Puts a Curse on a Fig Tree (Matthew
translation_verse: Se údufǝ Yerusalem, Yesu ésu Yudafɔ eto Disumuyo. Nya ótsyilamasǝ ǝnǝmi ɔ́lɛ ola óbe lesa saa nǝ nkpe mfó. Fɛɛ se kale mfe nlɛ bolo esoo, údu úsu Betania ku wǝ bakasebi. Yesu Ékudi Kudiyi Kutsyuǝ.

english_verse: That evening, Jesus and the disciples went outside the city. A Lesson from the Fig Tree (Matthew
translation_verse: Se éyo ditsyitsyo lefee, Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi édu lǝ Yerusalem eto umǝ ǝmǝ. Bǝnyǝ Bǝ Kudiyi Komǝ Yesu Díkudi Ǝkpǝ.

english_verse: They asked, “What right do you have to do these things? Who gave you this authority?”
translation_verse: Nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Owoe dítǝ fǝ ǝsuǝale fɛ feeyifo asa nyamfo? Nya owoe tsya dítǝ fǝ kusu nko?”

english_verse: If anyone asks why you are doing this, say, ‘The Lord needs it and will soon bring it back.’ ”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utsyuǝ átɔ mi nkǝ, ‘Beso bɛnlɛ wǝ bulǝkǝ?’ bɛtɛyi wǝ biǝ mi Onamute ahiã wǝ, nya businkli bufi wǝ boboko mlɛ.”

english_verse: The disciples left and found the donkey tied near a door that faced the street. While they were untying it,
translation_verse: Nyaso betidi inuǝ bamfo ésu nya bǝnyǝ bǝ ɔflimubi ńyǝ lǝ ukuǝ, úńyǝ lǝ futsyǝ eto kǝsiǝ. Nya bǝlǝkǝ wǝ ku ukuǝ ǝmǝ.

english_verse: some of the people standing there asked, “Why are you untying the donkey?”
