translation_verse: Betidi bǝtsyuǝ ba ńyǝ mfó átɔ mǝ bǝnkǝ, “Be bɛnlɛ wǝ bonyankli keyifo ko?”

english_verse: They told them what Jesus had said, and the people let them take it.
translation_verse: Bátɛyi mǝ fe kase Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ. Nya mǝ tsya dítǝ mǝ kusu bǝ banyankli wǝ.

english_verse: The disciples led the donkey to Jesus. They put some of their clothes on its back, and Jesus got on.
translation_verse: Se báboko Yesu ubuki ǝmfoo, béfi mǝ mfia bǝtǝkǝ lǝ ubuki ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ nya Yesu lébe úsiǝ lǝ wǝ.

english_verse: In front of Jesus and behind him, people went along shouting, “Hooray! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord!
translation_verse: Betidi ba kenke ntɔ sɛtɔ ku mba ntǝkǝ kamaa káfa bembembe kákatɛyi bǝ, “Hosiana! Bɔlɛ atɛsǝ butǝ nwǝ nlɛ bubǝ lǝ Onanto eto diye ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God bless the coming kingdom of our ancestor David. Hooray for God in heaven above!”
translation_verse: Bifi atɛsǝ bitǝ bo ona Oka David eto sekakedikɔ sia nlɛ bubǝ. Hosiana itǝ Onanto wǝ nkpe kato fanlofanlo.”

english_verse: The chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses heard what Jesus said, and they started looking for a way to kill him. They were afraid of him, because the crowds were completely amazed at his teaching.
translation_verse: Besumunyǝ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa ba lɛkɛ mfó ánɔ etiki nnya Yesu lɛtɛyi. Nyaso bábɛbɛ kusu ko bɔɔyɛ balo wǝ. Tsyaa balɛ sikpi bote ɛyɛ lǝ kase betidi ba tã laala wǝ asatete eso.

english_verse: So Jesus said to the tree, “Never again will anyone eat fruit from this tree!” The disciples heard him say this. Jesus in the Temple (Matthew
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu édi kuyi komǝ etiki ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Ensiembɔnwɔ ebibi bio.” Wǝ bakasebi ánɔ se ɔ́tɛyi nko. Yesu Ála Mba Nlɛ Bikǝ Bote Lǝ Disumuyo.

english_verse: Then he taught the people and said, “The Scriptures say, ‘My house should be called a place of worship for all nations.’ But you have made it a place where robbers hide!”
translation_verse: Nya óte betidi bamfó asa ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bawɔni lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ Eto Kukuǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ, Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, ‘Bookpo mɔ diyo, diyo nǝ kawunsiǝ kenke eto betidi luubǝ bato ola bǝtǝ Onanto.’ Fɛɛ mimi éfi ni bíyifo beyu eto kabiɔkɔ katafa betidi.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples: Have faith in God!
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Befo Onanto bɛnɔ.

english_verse: After Jesus and his disciples reached Jerusalem, he went into the temple and began chasing out everyone who was selling and buying. He turned over the tables of the moneychangers and the benches of those who were selling doves.
translation_verse: Se bésu bédufǝ Yerusalem, Yesu ésu Yudafɔ eto Disumuyo, nya útsyiko betidi ba nlɛ asa bote ku mba nlɛ bikǝ bote lǝ diyo nǝmǝ bola, úkǝ mba nlɛ atabi bofloma eto kapunu úwi. Nya úkǝ mba nsi banlɛ ablonima tsya bote eto akpomɛ úwi itsyise wóanla nkǝ kuutsyuǝ saa ubǝ ukayɛ lǝ Disumuyo ɔflɔ mfó kafe ku mǝ bikǝ.

english_verse: Jesus would not let anyone carry things through the temple.
translation_verse: Nya wóantɔnɔ nkǝ kuutsyuǝ saa fi kulesa úbǝ katekɔ lǝ kesumukɔ eto diyo nǝmǝ mfó.

english_verse: Everything you ask for in prayer will be yours, if you only have faith.
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ, lesa nǝ ke biɔtɔ Onanto ɛyɛ lǝ olatoto ǝsuǝǝ, befo bɛnɔ biǝ dioka mi kɔni. Onanto ebuyifo lesa nǝ mǝ utǝ mi.

english_verse: Whenever you stand up to pray, you must forgive what others have done to you. Then your Father in heaven will forgive your sins. A Question about Jesus' Authority (Matthew
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ biemfi bɛtsyɛ wǝǝ, mi Anto wǝ nkpe kato tsya ǝmbufi ɔtsyɛ mi.” Betidi Ákpe Kǝdiǝ Ku Yesu Itsyi Lǝ Kaka Wǝ Ǝsuǝale Ditsyi.

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples returned to Jerusalem. And as he was walking through the temple, the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses came over to him.
translation_verse: Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi édufǝ Yerusalem. Nya Yesu nyɛ lǝ kesumukɔ mfó botsyilamaa, nya besumunyǝ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa ku umǝ eto beninǝ bǝtsyuǝ díbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I have just one question to ask you. If you answer it, I will tell you where I got the right to do these things.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Tutɛɛ, mɔɔtɔ mi ditiki lɔni hã. Nya lǝ bitǝ ni mbuayɛɛ, mɔɔtɛyi mi nwǝ eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ minlɛ asa nyamfo buyifo.

english_verse: Who gave John the right to baptize? Was it God in heaven or merely some human being?”
translation_verse: Bɛtɛyi mɛ kaka Yohanes léfo ǝsuǝale utsyiko fɛ úflǝsǝ betidi ntu? Ǝsuǝale nyamǝǝ, Onanto ɔflɔ itsyi lee utidi ete dítǝ wǝ kusu?”

english_verse: They thought it over and said to each other, “We can't say that God gave John this right. Jesus will ask us why we didn't believe John.
translation_verse: Bétsyiko etiki nyamfo bunǝ lǝ mǝ nti, nya bátɔ mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Ntsyǝ ele bǝ bɔtɛyi kɛɛ? Lǝ bɔtɛyi boǝ nkomǝ eto ǝsuǝale nyamǝ etsyi Onanto ɔflɔɔ, wɔɔtɔ bo nkǝ, ‘Lǝ nko inii, beso bíamfo Yohanes bɛnɔ?’

english_verse: On the other hand, these people think that John was a prophet. So we can't say it was merely some human who gave John the right to baptize.” They were afraid of the crowd
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ bɔtɛyi wǝ boǝ, utidi ete letsyese wǝ tsyaa!” Balɛ sikpi bote kase bɔtɛyi nko tsya itsyise utsyuǝ saa áfo ɔ́nɔ nkǝ Yohanes eyifo Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi.

english_verse: and told Jesus, “We don't know.” Jesus replied, “Then I won't tell you who gave me the right to do what I do.”
translation_verse: Nyaso bátɛyi Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Bunyi.” Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mintsya ǝmbɔtɛyi mi itsyi lǝ ǝsuǝale nnya minkpe eso fɛ maafo nyamfo buyifo!”

english_verse: It is also true that we must love God with all our heart, mind, and strength, and that we must love others as much as we love ourselves. These commandments are more important than all the sacrifices and offerings that we could possibly make.”
translation_verse: Nya ele bǝ Utidi saa la Onanto itsyi lǝ wǝ utu ku wǝ nsusu kenke ku wǝ ǝsuǝale kenke. Nya ele bǝ ola wǝ utiditsyuǝ fe kase woala wǝ ǝsuǝ. Ɛlɛkɛ eso bǝ utidi di afi ǝnuǝ nyamfo, eso bǝ ufi bebuki ku keditǝtǝ bamba utǝ Onanto.”

english_verse: Jesus asked, “What do you think the owner of the vineyard will do? He will come and kill those renters and let someone else have his vineyard.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Be befo bɛnɔ biǝ osani ǝmfó ebuyifo? Mɔɔtɛyi mi minkǝ wuusu mfó usu olo beyifoyifo bamfó, ɔlɛ ɔkuɛ ǝmfo ofo okpe betidi bambaa kɔni.

english_verse: Teacher, Moses wrote that if a married man dies and has no children, his brother should marry the widow. Their first son would then be thought of as the son of the dead brother.
translation_verse: Bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, Moses áwɔni lǝ afi nnya útǝ bo nkǝ, ‘Lǝ osani utsyuǝ ǝkpǝ nya óyani wǝ usiǝ utsyǝ nya bánle bebi saa, nyalɛ ele bǝ osani ǝmfo eto ɔyimisani, fi usio ǝmǝ ufi. Nya wǝ ku ɔkɔsiǝ ǝmǝ lǝ bale bebi. Nya bebi bamfóo, betidi ebunyǝ mǝ fe osani wǝ dimankɛ ubi saa eto bale.’

english_verse: The renters grabbed the servant, beat him up, and sent him away without a thing.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ beyifoyifo bamfo ko dímuǝ wǝ uyifoyifo ǝmfo báblɛ nya bála wǝ bátsyese nya údu anifufu.

english_verse: Then the man sent another servant, and they killed him. He kept sending servant after servant. They beat some of them and killed some.
translation_verse: Nya osani ǝmfo disi ótsyese wǝ uyifoyifo bamba bio, nya báblɛ wuntsya nya bálo wǝ. Nnya kamaa, usi ótsyese wǝ beyifoyifo kpǝ. Nya báblɛ bǝtsyuǝ nya bálo bafɛfɛ.

english_verse: The owner had a son he loved very much. Finally, he sent his son to the renters because he thought they would respect him.
translation_verse: “Utidi wǝ dibu wǝ bio wootsyese wǝ ni osani ǝmfo kosate eto ubi lala. Lɛfɛfɛɛ, ótsyese wǝ. Nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ ǝsuǝ nkǝ, ‘Mfo nnɔ miǝ boobu mɔ ubi.’

english_verse: But they said to themselves, “Someday he will own this vineyard. Let's kill him! That way we can have it all for ourselves.”
translation_verse: “Fɛɛ beyifoyifo bamǝ átɛyi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, ‘Nyǝ nwǝ luudi Bonamute eto bikǝ. Bibǝ lǝ bumuǝ wǝ bolo, lǝ bɔlɛ wǝ kedikɔ bofo bofianinsǝ bo kale.’

english_verse: So they grabbed the owner's son, killed him, and threw his body out of the vineyard.
translation_verse: Nyaso bǝmuǝ ubi ǝmfo. Nya bálo wǝ. Béfi wǝ bǝduǝ lǝ ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ eto kama.”

english_verse: This is something the Lord has done, and it is amazing to us.’ ”
translation_verse: Bonamute ni nwǝ díyifo nyamfo. Iyifo lesa nǝ laanɔ bobe sitinti!’ ”

english_verse: The leaders knew that Jesus was really talking about them, and they wanted to arrest him. But because they were afraid of the crowd, they let him alone and left. Paying Taxes (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya se bánɔ nyamfoo, Yudafɔ eto beninǝ ákplatsya kekleke bǝ lǝ bǝmuǝ Yesu. Itsyise bǝnyǝ bǝ lekpa nǝmǝ ɔ́tɛyi itsyi lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ báte sitiditu sia ńyǝ mfó sikpi. Nyaso bédu lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ. Yudafɔ Eto Beninǝ Ábio Yesu Uyibi Lǝ Etiki Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were up to, and he said, “Why are you trying to test me? Show me a coin!”
translation_verse: Bofo lee boamfo?” Fɛɛ Yesu yi mǝ nkǝ ǝnǝmi ǝnǝmi eto betidi beni, nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Beso biala biǝ biato mɛ bebe? Beboko mɛ atabi lǝ mbe.”

english_verse: You surely know about people being raised to life. You know that in the story about Moses and the burning bush, God said, “I am the God worshiped by Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ eto businkli kataka ǝsuǝ, Moses áwɔni lesatsyuǝ lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ Eto Kukuǝ ǝsuǝ itsyi lǝ biyu eto eyi kpufɛɛ nnya díńyǝ utǝ ǝsuǝ. Onanto lídi wǝ etiki. Lee biankloma? Mfó ɔ́wɔni nkǝ Onanto átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, ‘Mɔ ni Abraham eto Onanto ku Isak eto Onanto ku Yakob eto Onanto tsya.’

english_verse: The Pharisees got together with Herod's followers. Then they sent some men to trick Jesus into saying something wrong.
translation_verse: Kamaa, bátsyese Farisifɔ ku Herodes eto betidi bǝtsyuǝ lǝ Yesu ɔflɔ bǝ lǝ besu betsyue wǝ etikididi ato lǝ bǝnyǝ kabua lǝ wǝ esuǝ.

english_verse: They went to him and said, “Teacher, we know that you are honest. You treat everyone with the same respect, no matter who they are. And you teach the truth about what God wants people to do. Tell us, should we pay taxes to the Emperor or not?”
translation_verse: Se bésu wǝ ɔflɔɔ, bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, buyi boǝ fǝǝ, ɔnukualɛtidi feni. Nya eentsyi fǝ etiki kawuninsǝ lǝ ǝdufǝ betidi ǝnǝ. Aante betidi eto ǝnǝmi sikpi, ɔkplɛ lee, ɔkɛkɛ. Nya ni bǝ Onanto eto kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ hã faate saa kayɛnko. Nyaso tɛyi bo lǝ ɛlɛkɛ bǝ boko oko butǝ Romafɔ eto Okankplɛ Kaisare

english_verse: They brought him a silver coin, and he asked, “Whose picture and name are on it?” “The Emperor's,” they answered.
translation_verse: Báboko wǝ ani. Nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Owoe eto disi ku diye ntǝkǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ mfo?” Mfó bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝ, “Okankplɛ Kaisare ni.”

english_verse: Then Jesus told them, “Give the Emperor what belongs to him and give God what belongs to God.” The men were amazed at Jesus. Life in the Future World (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nyaso bifi lesa nǝ ni Okankplɛ Kaisare eto lele bitǝ wǝ. Lǝ bifi lesa nǝ ni Onanto eto lele bitǝ Onanto.” Lǝ nyamfo esoo, iyifo mǝ naa. Ditsyukpa Bamba Áto Yesu Bábe Lǝ Bǝkpǝnkpǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: He isn't the God of the dead, but of the living. You Sadducees are all wrong. The Most Important Commandment (Matthew
translation_verse: Nnya kasɔ ni bǝnkǝ betidi ba díkǝkpǝ ebusinkli bǝbǝ nkpǝ, nya wǝ kǝ ni mǝ Onanto. Fɛɛ mi bíonya ɔnukualɛsu komfo koko!” Kɔfi Eto Oteasa Ɔni Átɔ Yesu Nkǝ Nte Kɔfi Ko Nso Bofe Lǝ Afi Nnya Kenke Nti?

english_verse: But they cheat widows out of their homes and pray long prayers just to show off. They will be punished most of all. A Widow's Offering (Luke
translation_verse: Bǝlǝkǝ bakɔbǝsiǝ kɔhɔ. Kamaa, baalɛ mǝ bikǝ kafo. Nya bato kala kɛntsyɛɛ kate ǝsuǝ bǝ beyi Onanto. Mǝ kotonǝnǝ ǝbɔkɛ ale eso betidi fɛfɛ eto ale!” Ɔkɔsiǝ Okombo Utsyuǝ Ǝtǝ Asa Nnya Dídufǝ Onanto Ǝnǝ.

english_verse: The Sadducees did not believe that people would rise to life after death. So some of them came to Jesus and said:
translation_verse: Sadukifɔ bǝtsyuǝ ǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ. Mǝ laate bǝnkǝ lǝ utidi ǝkpǝǝ, woensibusinkli otaka ubǝ nkpǝ. Bǝbǝ bǝ bátɔ Yesu ditiki ditsyuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus answered: You are completely wrong! You don't know what the Scriptures teach. And you don't know anything about the power of God.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Inni nko ini kulaa. Nnyǝ minkǝ bíannɔ ditiki nǝmfo kasɔ, itsyise biannɔ etiki nya nkpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ Eto Kukuǝ eto kasɔ nya binyi Onanto eto ǝsuǝale. Nyaso beta wǝ bibu.

english_verse: When Jesus saw that the man had given a sensible answer, he told him, “You are not far from God's kingdom.” After this, no one dared ask Jesus any more questions. About David's Son (Matthew
translation_verse: Se Yesu dínyǝ kasɔnɔnɔ ka ǝsuǝ osani ǝmfo lɛyɛ útǝ mbuayɛɛ, ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ alɛɛ, ibu sɛkɛ ete lǝ edufǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ.” Nyamfo eto kamaa, kuutsyuǝ saa mensi kpe ɔkɔɛ nkǝ woatɔ Yesu kulesa tsya. Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ.

english_verse: One of the teachers of the Law of Moses came up while Jesus and the Sadducees were arguing. When he heard Jesus give a good answer, he asked him, “What is the most important commandment?”
translation_verse: Afi eto oteasa wǝ díńyǝ mfó ánɔ etiki nya banlɛ bɔtɛyi. Nya ánɔ nkǝ Yesu ǝtǝ etiki nyamǝ eto mbuayɛ kukɔnɔ. Nyaso ɔ́nyi úsu Yesu ɔflɔ nya ɔ́tɔ nkǝ, “Nte kɔfi ko ni nko nso bofe lǝ afi nnya kenke nti?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The most important one says: ‘People of Israel, you have only one Lord and God.
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Kɔfi ko nso bofe ni nko báwɛni bǝnkǝ, ‘Israel eto betidi, bɛlɔ bɛnɔ kukɔnɔ! Onanto ni bo Onamute, nya Onanto ɔni hã nkpe.

english_verse: The second most important commandment says: ‘Love others as much as you love yourself.’ No other commandment is more important than these.”
translation_verse: Nya kɔfi ko nsi ntǝkǝ lǝ nkomfo eto kama ni bǝ, ‘La fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ fe kase faala fǝ ǝsuǝ.’ Kɔfi saa ensibǝ ko ntǝkǝ afi nyamfo kato.”

english_verse: The man replied, “Teacher, you are certainly right to say there is only one God.
translation_verse: Nya osani ǝmǝ dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Oteasa, átɛyi nnya kukɔnɔ! Lesa nǝ fátɛyi eyifo ɔnukualɛ bǝ Onanto ni bo Onamute, wǝ kama Onanto saa ensibǝ.

english_verse: Jesus was sitting in the temple near the offering box and watching people put in their gifts. He noticed that many rich people were giving a lot of money.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu díkǝnǝ úsiǝ lǝ kedi kǝtǝkɔ lǝ Disumuyo kaka banlɛ atabi boko, nya únsi ɔnlɛ bobe kase betidi nlɛ bofe kesu kako asa. Batabinyǝ kpǝ áko atabi kpǝ.

english_verse: Everyone else gave what they didn't need. But she is very poor and gave everything she had. Now she doesn't have a cent to live on.
translation_verse: Sitintii, betidi bamfo kpe kɔni kalende. Fɛɛ nnya nte mǝ eto sɛkɛ ete baboko. Nya usionko ǝmfo alɛɛ, ite bǝ okombo ni tsyaa, ufi lesa nǝ ntǝ wǝ kenke úbǝ óko. Lesa nǝ ele bǝ wuufi oya lesa udii, nnya ni lesa nǝ úfi úbǝ óko mfo nɛ.”

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching in the temple, he said, “How can the teachers of the Law of Moses say the Messiah will come from the family of King David?
translation_verse: Lefenǝ Yesu lɛkɛ lǝ Yudafɔ eto Disumuyo ɔnlɛ Anantotiki bote mfóo, ɔ́tɔ nkǝ, “Ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ afi eto bateasa bamǝ nlɛ bɔtɛyi bǝnkǝ Utidi wǝ Nlɛ Bubǝǝ, ábɔ utsyi Oka David eto kafo?

english_verse: If David called the Messiah his Lord, how can the Messiah be his son?” The large crowd enjoyed listening to Jesus teach. Jesus Condemns the Pharisees and the Teachers of the Law of Moses (Matthew
translation_verse: Nyalɛ lǝ David kosate lǝ Utidi wǝ Nlɛ Bubǝ bokpo nkǝ wǝ Onamutee, nyalɛ ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ wǝ kosate loofo David eto kafo eto ubi budi?” Nya betidi kpǝ dínyǝ banlɛ etiki nnya Yesu nyǝ ɔnlɛ budi bɔnɔ ku disuǝyuǝ. Yesu Ǝkǝ Betidi Ato Lǝ Afi Eto Bateasa Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching, he said: Guard against the teachers of the Law of Moses! They love to walk around in long robes and be greeted in the market.
translation_verse: Se Yesu nlɛ betidi bamfó asa botee, ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bebe sinini lǝ afi eto bateasa ǝsuǝ. Baala awu kplɛ bokpe nya baala bɔyɛ kafe kaka betidi luunyǝ mǝ bǝsiǝsǝ ku dibu.

english_verse: They like the front seats in the synagogues and the best seats at banquets.
translation_verse: Bala nsiǝkɔ kplɛ busiǝ lǝ Yudafɔ eto ntsyakɔ ku lǝ asakedikɔ.

english_verse: Finally, a poor widow came up and put in two coins worth only a few pennies.
translation_verse: Nya ɔkɔsiǝ okombo utsyuǝ tsya díbǝ ófe nya úfi atabi sɛkɛ úsu óko.

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples to gather around him. Then he said: I tell you that this poor widow has put in more than all the others.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lékpadi wǝ bakasebi utsyǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmii, ɔkɔsiǝ okombo ǝmfo eto atabi nnya ókoo, édufǝ ǝnǝ eso nnya betidi bamfo kenke léko.

english_verse: As Jesus was leaving the temple, one of his disciples said to him, “Teacher, look at these beautiful stones and wonderful buildings!”
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛbɔ lǝ Yudafɔ eto Disumuyo mfóo, wǝ bakasebi eto ɔni átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Oteasa, be aba nnya laanɔ bobe mfo beefi báto diyo kplɛ nǝmfo ku kase baato nii! Dianɔ bobe!”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Do you see these huge buildings? They will certainly be torn down! Not one stone will be left in place.” Warning about Trouble (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bɛlɔ bebe diyo kplɛ nǝmfo kukɔnɔ, itsyise aba nya béfi báto ni eto lɛɛ lɔni embubu ditǝkǝ lǝ ni utsyuǝ ǝsuǝ! Diyo nǝmfo kenke eboba lekpo lǝ kasɔ nnya aba nyamfó kenke looba isensǝ ekpo.” Yesu Átɛyi Mba Ntǝkǝko Wǝ Nkǝ Buubǝ Bǝnyǝ Kanyi Balo Mǝ.

english_verse: Jesus answered: Watch out and don't let anyone fool you!
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bebe sinini, nya biǝntǝ lǝ kuutsyuǝ saa lǝ ɔwɛ mi okpe.

english_verse: Many will come and claim to be me. They will use my name and fool many people.
translation_verse: Betidi kpǝ ebubǝ lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝ nya bɔɔtɛyi mi bǝnkǝ, ‘Nnyǝ mɔ ni nwǝ bákpo ɔhile ǝmǝ,’ nya bɔɔwɛ betidi kpǝ bakpe.

english_verse: Later, as Jesus was sitting on the Mount of Olives across from the temple, Peter, James, John, and Andrew came to him in private.
translation_verse: Yesu édu úsu úsiǝ lǝ Nnuǝbi eto Eyi eto Kɔtini komǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya mfóo, úsiǝ ɔnlɛ Disumuyo nǝmǝ bobe katsyese. Nya Petro ku Yakobo ku Yohanes ku Andreas hã díbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ,

english_verse: Someday you will see that “Horrible Thing” where it should not be. Everyone who reads this must try to understand! If you are living in Judea at that time, run to the mountains.
translation_verse: “Mɔmɔɔ, bifǝ ato lǝ bɛlɔ bɛnɔ kukɔnɔ. Lǝ binyǝ lesa nǝ Onanto leekisi nlɛ bubǝ lǝ wǝ Disumuyo kɛnkɛ, ka nlɛ mfo kɔfiɔ bokpe nya dimanle bǝ ɛkɛ mfoo, betidi ba nkpe lǝ Yuda tsyetsyi besu babiɔ lǝ atini ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When you hear about wars and threats of wars, don't be afraid. These things will have to happen first, but that isn't the end.
translation_verse: Nya yenyifo mi bulǝ lǝ bɛnɔ ama eto kɔsɔ lǝ mi ɔflɔ nye lǝ katsyontsyokɔ. Ele bǝ asa nyamfo eto kakle bǝ. Tsya inni nnya kasɔ ni bǝnkǝ kawunsiǝ eto kalokɔ eboyo.

english_verse: This will be the worst time of suffering since God created the world, and nothing this terrible will ever happen again.
translation_verse: Itsyise bulǝ bo luubǝ lǝ lefe nǝmfóo, ǝbɔkɛ ale leso mbo ke díkǝbǝ bófe saa idu lǝ kawunsiǝ eto kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ibǝ ese mi eto lefe nǝmfo. Nya bulǝ bomfo eto okle ensiembubǝ inyǝ kulefe.

english_verse: They asked, “When will these things happen? What will be the sign that they are about to take place?”
translation_verse: “Onamute, dimamfe ayo nyamfó looba? Tɛyi bo asa nnya luubǝ lǝ bote boǝ lefe nǝmǝ eboyo bǝ nkomǝ eto asa nyamfo ebubǝ?”

english_verse: Nations and kingdoms will go to war against each other. There will be earthquakes in many places, and people will starve to death. But this is just the beginning of troubles.
translation_verse: Kasɔ ka ebotaka nka lema. Nya sekakedikɔ ka ebotaka nka lema. Nsɔ ebutinkǝ lǝ kalebe saa, nya kukpɛnsǝ luubǝ. Asa nyamfo ebuyifo fe kase kalefo lǝǝnǝ usionko.

english_verse: Be on your guard! You will be taken to courts and beaten with whips in their synagogues. And because of me, you will have to stand before rulers and kings to tell about your faith.
translation_verse: “Ele bǝ ibǝ bǝ lǝ mi kosate bimuǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyǝ. Boomuǝ mi bakpa mi besuko Yudafɔ eto beninǝ eto ǝnǝmi. Bɔɔblɛ mi lǝ ntsyakɔ. Boolǝkǝ mi bǝńyǝnsǝ lǝ baka ku nsɔ eto beninǝ eto ǝnǝmi lǝ mɔ disi eso, nya biɔtɛyi mǝ ditiki itsyi lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But before the end comes, the good news must be preached to all nations.
translation_verse: Tsya fɛ kalosǝkɔ luubǝǝ, yuubǝ bǝ batɛyi kawunsiǝ eto ǝsǝ kenke eto betidi Onanto eto ditiki nǝmfo.

english_verse: When you are arrested, don't worry about what you will say. You will be given the right words when the time comes. But you will not really be the ones speaking. Your words will come from the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lefe nǝ bǝmuǝ mi besuko lekpokakpokɔɔ, biembu disi bɛtɔnsǝ itsyi lǝ lesa nǝ biɔtɛyi ǝsuǝ. Lǝ lefe nǝmǝ ayoo, lǝ bɛtɛyi ditiki nǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ lookpe mi kɛnyɛ nkǝ bɛtɛyi. Itsyise inni mi kosate lǝǝbǝ etiki budi. Bomu Onanto eto Lɛwɔni loote mi lesa nǝ biɔtɛyi.

english_verse: Brothers and sisters will betray each other and have each other put to death. Parents will betray their own children, and children will turn against their parents and have them killed.
translation_verse: “Ɔyimi ebudu ɔyimi utǝ bǝ balo. Nya antomǝ tsya luuyifo nko ke ku mǝ bebi. Bebi ebotaka bǝńyǝ lǝ mǝ antomǝ ǝsuǝ bedu mǝ bǝtǝ bǝ balo.

english_verse: Everyone will hate you because of me. But if you keep on being faithful right to the end, you will be saved. The Horrible Thing (Matthew
translation_verse: Bookisi mi lǝ mɔ disi. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa wǝ luunyǝ kekleke lǝ wǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ isu ese kalosǝkɔɔ, Onanto ebulǝkǝ wǝ utsyiko lǝ kotonǝne ko bǝtsyǝ itǝ babuayifo ǝsuǝ. Yesu Ǝkǝ Mǝ Ato Lǝ Bule Bo Lǝǝbǝ Bubǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you are on the roof of your house, don't go inside to get anything.
translation_verse: Nwǝ ntǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ditsya ǝsuǝǝ, mensi bu disi nkǝ woayifǝ ubǝ ufi kulesa lǝ wǝ diyo.

english_verse: If the Lord doesn't make the time shorter, no one will be left alive. But because of his chosen and special ones, he will make the time shorter.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto ǝbɔtɛyi utsyǝ nkǝ wuulǝkǝ eyi nyamǝ ubu. Itsyise lenni nkoo, kuutsyuǝ saa embubu usiǝ. Tsya lǝ wǝ betidi ba úkǝlǝkǝ utsyǝ esoo, wuulǝkǝ lefe nǝmǝ ubu.

english_verse: If you are out in the field, don't go back for your coat.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ wǝ nńyǝ lǝ ɔkuɛ membu disi nkǝ wǝǝsinkli ubǝ oto nkǝ wǝǝbǝ ufi wǝ kafia.

english_verse: It will be an awful time for women who are expecting babies or nursing young children.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfó ebɔkɛ ale tinti itǝ besionko ba ni bafondɛ, nye mba nlɛ bebisambi ba nlɛ bɔyimi.

english_verse: Pray that it won't happen in winter.
translation_verse: Bɛlɛ Onanto lekpakpa bǝ lefe nǝmǝ mǝntǝkǝ lǝ lɛyɔ lefe!

english_verse: False messiahs and false prophets will come and work miracles and signs. They will even try to fool God's chosen ones.
translation_verse: Itsyise mba luuyifo mǝ ǝsuǝ fe Kristo nye Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidii, kpǝ ebotaka bǝńyǝ. Booyifo ayanisa kpǝ ku asa nnya nkpe sikpi, itǝ bǝ lǝ boofoo, bɔɔwɛ Onanto eto betidi ba úkǝlǝkǝ utsyǝ taa kɔ kulaa tsya bakpe.

english_verse: But be on your guard! That's why I am telling you these things now. When the Son of Man Appears (Matthew
translation_verse: Nyaso bimuǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyǝ! Ńtɛyi mi lesa saa ntɔnsǝ fɛ lǝ lefe nǝmǝ lǝ leyo. Yesu Átɛyi Kase Utidi Eto Ubi Luubǝ Bio.

english_verse: So when you see all these things happening, you will know that the time has almost come.
translation_verse: Nko ke lǝ ibǝ bǝ binyǝ asa nnya míntɛyi mi mfo lɛ kasɔ butsyǝ ku bubǝǝ, ete biote biǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kalosǝkɔ ǝbɔfi nnya ikǝbǝ eyo fǝ kǝsiǝ pɛɛ!

english_verse: The sky and the earth will not last forever, but my words will. No One Knows the Day or Time (Matthew
translation_verse: Kato ku kasɔ kenke ebubǝ kafe. Fɛɛ mɔ ditiki embubǝ lefe kulefe.

english_verse: The stars will fall, and the powers in the sky will be shaken.”
translation_verse: Befandebi ebuyifo fe bofankli bɛnlɛ ketsyi kato kǝbǝ kasɔ, nya kato eto asa kenke luutinkǝ.’

english_verse: Learn a lesson from a fig tree. When its branches sprout and start putting out leaves, you know summer is near.
translation_verse: “Bekase asa itsyi lǝ koto ǝsuǝ. Lǝ ibǝ bǝ binyǝ se kuyi komfó lɛ afanto fɔfɔ bulǝkǝǝ, eté mi bǝ kasɔmite ǝbɔfi.

english_verse: Then the Son of Man will be seen coming in the clouds with great power and glory.
translation_verse: “Lefe nǝmfóo, betidi ebunyǝ mɛ, Utidi Eto Ubi, nlɛ bubǝ lǝ asɔmiloku ǝsuǝ. Nya muubǝ ku Onanto eto ǝsuǝale lǝ diyǝnde kplɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: He will send his angels to gather his chosen ones from all over the earth. A Lesson from a Fig Tree (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya mootsyese mɔ kato eto batɔnkpe kawunsiǝ eto akpɔ ana nyamǝ lǝ nsu nlǝkǝ mɔ betidi ba mínkǝlǝkǝ míntsyǝ itsyi lǝ kawunsiǝ eto lekpake nǝmfo isu ese lǝ kalosǝkɔ ka nse. Yesu Nkǝ Kuutsyuǝ Saa Enyi Lefe Nǝ Wuusinkli Ubǝ.

english_verse: No one knows the day or the time. The angels in heaven don't know, and the Son himself doesn't know. Only the Father knows.
translation_verse: “Tsyaa, kuutsyuǝ saa enyi diyi nye lefe nǝ asa nyamfo luubǝ itǝ, Onanto eto batɔnkpe ku mɔ, Onanto eto Ubi kulaa tsya enyi, enso mɔ Anto hã nyi.

english_verse: So be alert! You don't know when the master of the house will come back. It could be in the evening or at midnight or before dawn or in the morning.
translation_verse: “Nko kǝ ele bǝ mi tsya muǝ ǝsuǝ binyǝ. Itsyise binnyi lefe nǝ mi Oyosate luubǝ udufǝ. Yoofo bubǝ bǝ wuubǝ ku kakɔmi lefe, nye ntsyetsyi, nye kolensiǝnto kplɛ ko bekusɛ lǝǝtǝ kɛnyɛ, nye olesiǝ.

english_verse: So watch out and be ready! You don't know when the time will come.
translation_verse: Bebe kukɔnɔ lǝ bimuǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyǝ itsyise binyi lefe nǝ nyamfó luubǝ itǝ.

english_verse: You can be sure that some of the people of this generation will still be alive when all this happens.
translation_verse: Sitinti nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ asa nyamfo kenke ebubǝ itǝ fɛ efe nǝmfo eto betidi luukpǝ balo.

english_verse: But if he comes suddenly, don't let him find you asleep.
translation_verse: Lǝ ibǝ bǝ ubǝ ofuaa, yanle bǝ ibǝ bǝ ubǝ unyǝ mi bɛnlɛ selabe.

english_verse: It is like what happens when a man goes away for a while and places his servants in charge of everything. He tells each of them what to do, and he orders the guard to keep alert.
translation_verse: Mɔ bubǝ ebuutsyǝ fe kase osani utsyuǝ luudu lǝ wǝ umǝ nkǝ wǝǝsu kusu, nya óyani wǝ beyifoyifo utsyǝ lǝ diyo. Útǝ utsyuǝ saa keyifo ka wuukeyifo. Nnya kamaa, ɔ́tɛyi nwǝ laase wǝ diyo nkǝ ɔlɔ ose wǝ diyo kekleke.

english_verse: I tell everyone just what I have told you. Be alert!
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ minlɛ mi bɔtɛyi mfoo, nlɛ nnya bɔtɛyi itǝ betidi ba ta. Nnya ni bǝ bimuǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyǝ.”

english_verse: Judas walked right up to Jesus and said, “Teacher!” Then Judas kissed him,
translation_verse: Nyaso se Yuda lɛyɛ úsu útu Yesu, ókpadi wǝ nkǝ, “Oteasa!” Nya ɔ́fiɔ wǝ lǝ kola.

english_verse: Jesus was led off to the high priest. Then the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses all met together.
translation_verse: Nya bákpa Yesu bésuko Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke eto diyo. Mfó nya besumunyǝ beninǝ bamǝ ku umǝ eto beninǝ ku afi eto bateasa létsya bénsi. Mǝ ni Yudafɔ eto beninǝ.

english_verse: She has done all she could by pouring perfume on my body to prepare it for burial.
translation_verse: Usionko ǝmfo éyifo lesa nǝ wofo buyifo. Úfi nnuǝbi bomfo ókpo mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ ɔ́lɔ mɛ utsyǝ itǝ muukpǝ fɛ buubikǝ mɛ.

english_verse: This made some of the guests angry, and they complained, “Why such a waste?
translation_verse: Nyamfo ǝlǝ betidi ba díńyǝ mfó. Nya kafo lɛnyi mǝ bátɛyi bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Beso woabiasǝ nnuǝbi bomfo nko?

english_verse: You may be sure that wherever the good news is told all over the world, people will remember what she has done. And they will tell others. Judas and the Chief Priests (Matthew
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ kaka ke boobe Onanto eto ditiki sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfoo, bɔɔtɛyi nnya usionko ǝmfo tsya díyifo mfo kefi kakloma wǝ.” Yuda Átɔnɔ Nkǝ Wuudu Yesu Utǝ.

english_verse: The two disciples went into the city and found everything just as Jesus had told them. So they prepared the Passover meal.
translation_verse: Bakasebi bamfo édu búsu umǝ, nya bǝnyǝ lesa saa fe kase Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ. Nya béyifo Ukpǝ Ása Bo Ɔ́yila ǝmfo eto lesa nǝmǝ bǝtsyǝ mfó.

english_verse: Judas Iscariot was one of the twelve disciples. He went to the chief priests and offered to help them arrest Jesus.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yuda Iskariot wǝ ni Yesu eto bakasebi lefosi inuǝ bamǝ eto ɔnii, ésu besumunyǝ ninǝ bamǝ ɔflɔ nkǝ woote Yesu udi utǝ mǝ.

english_verse: The Son of Man will die, just as the Scriptures say. But it is going to be terrible for the one who betrays me. That man would be better off if he had never been born.” The Lord's Supper (Matthew
translation_verse: Mɔ, wǝǝ ni Utidi Eto Ubi ebukpǝ fe kase báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ Eto Kukuǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ ilǝ mɛ itǝ futsyǝ ǝmǝ itsyise woǝbǝ ohiã bunyǝ fefe. Lǝ nnya ete bánle utsyǝ ǝmfóo, eni yɔɔlɛkɛ eso!” Bonamute Eto Ditsyitsyosa Fɛfɛ.

english_verse: Jesus picked up a cup of wine and gave thanks to God. He gave it to his disciples, and they all drank some.
translation_verse: Nya úfi lɛkɔbe ku nte, nya se ɔ́sɔ Onanto anii, úfi útǝ mǝ nya bǝnǝ.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “This very night before a rooster crows twice, you will say three times that you don't know me.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi Petro nkǝ, “Nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ fɛ ukusɛ luutǝ kɛnyɛ dinuǝfǝ lǝ kǝtsyǝ kamfoo, fǝ kosate ǝbɔni mɛ sitsyǝ.”

english_verse: He answered, “It is one of you twelve men who is eating from this dish with me.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mi lefosi inuǝ eto ɔni ni. Nya ni bǝ bonko wǝ nlɛ kɔni bokpe lǝ ɔkpɛ ɔni mfo kedi.

english_verse: But Peter was so sure of himself that he said, “Even if I have to die with you, I will never say I don't know you!” All the others said the same thing. Jesus Prays (Matthew
translation_verse: Petro esi óse wǝ uyi óka ntamu ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ ibǝ bǝnkǝ balo bonko fǝ tsyaa, mǝmbɔni fǝ ntɛyi minkǝ minyi fǝ.” Nnya ke wǝ bakasebi bamǝ tsya lɛtɛyi nɛ. Yesu Áto Ola Lǝ Bulǝ Ǝsuǝ Lǝ Getsemane.

english_verse: told them, “I am so sad that I feel as if I am dying. Stay here and keep awake with me.”
translation_verse: ɔ́tsyi ɔ́wininsǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nyamfo lɛ mɛ bulǝ lǝ utu ku kanyinyǝnyǝ itǝ ukpǝ. Bianlabe selabe. Bińyǝ bisǝkǝ mɛ mfo.”

english_verse: Jesus walked on a little way. Then he knelt down on the ground and prayed, “Father, if it is possible, don't let this happen to me! Father, you can do anything. Don't make me suffer by drinking from this cup. But do what you want, and not what I want.”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ Anto, Onanto! Aafo lesa saa buyifo. Lǝ aalaa, nyalɛ takasǝ bulǝ bomfo lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ. Tsya inni lǝ mɔ lelabi ǝsuǝ bomu lǝ fǝ lele ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Stay awake and pray that you won't be tested. You want to do what is right, but you are weak.”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ bisiǝ bikato ola bǝ biǝmbudufǝ lǝ botoo kabe ǝsuǝ. Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ lɛ bola, fɛɛ ǝsuǝale ǝmbǝ.”

english_verse: But after I am raised to life, I will go ahead of you to Galilee.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ ntaka ntsyi lǝ ɔkɔmǝ mbǝǝ, mɔɔtɔ mi nsu Galilea.”

english_verse: Peter spoke up, “Even if all the others reject you, I never will!”
translation_verse: Nya Petro lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ alɛ mǝmbutsyetsyi ndu fǝ lǝ ɔflɔ kulefe, lǝ ibǝ bǝ bafɛfɛ kenke ebuyifo nko kulaa tsya.”

english_verse: and the men grabbed Jesus and arrested him.
translation_verse: Nyaso bǝmuǝ Yesu nya bákɔbe wǝ kekleke.

english_verse: Jesus went back and prayed the same prayer.
translation_verse: Úsinkli úsu bio nkǝ weesu oto ola fe ditutɛ ke.

english_verse: Jesus went with his disciples to a place called Gethsemane, and he told them, “Sit here while I pray.”
translation_verse: Nya bédu Getsemane. Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Bisiǝ lǝ kasɔ mfo lǝ nsu nto ola.”

english_verse: Jesus took along Peter, James, and John. He was sad and troubled and
translation_verse: Nya ókpa Petro ku Yakobo ku Yohanes ɔ́yɛnko. Nya se lesa nǝ nlɛ wǝ bubǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ nlɛ wǝ bulǝ esoo,

english_verse: When Jesus came back and found the disciples sleeping, he said to Simon Peter, “Are you asleep? Can't you stay awake for just one hour?
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ úsinkli úbǝ wǝ bakasebi itsyǝ bamǝ ɔflɔɔ, úbǝ únyǝ nkǝ bálabe selabe. Nya ɔ́tɔ Simon Petro nkǝ, “Simon, selabe fanlɛɛ? Ǝmbofo ǝnǝ butǝkǝ lebombosɔsɔ lɔni kplon tsya ete?”

english_verse: But when he returned to the disciples, he found them sleeping again. They simply could not keep their eyes open, and they did not know what to say.
translation_verse: Úsinkli úbǝ wǝ bakasebi ɔflɔ bio nya usi úbǝ únyǝ nkǝ besi bálɛ selabe. Bánlɛ mǝ ǝnǝmi bofo buminkli. Nya bánte lesa nǝ bɔtɛyi wǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When Jesus returned to the disciples the third time, he said, “Are you still sleeping and resting? Enough of this! The time has come for the Son of Man to be handed over to sinners.
translation_verse: Se úsinkli úbǝ ditsyǝfǝǝ, ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Bola bela biǝ bialabe bitsyǝ ɔnwɛ? Isiǝ, betaka! Lefe nǝmǝ eboyo. Bebe! Ubǝ mɔ, Onanto eto Ubi, bufi kakpe babuayifo eto ani. Bebe mǝǝ, se baankpee kusu banlɛ bubǝ.

english_verse: Get up! Let's go. The one who will betray me is already here.” Jesus Is Arrested (Matthew
translation_verse: Betaka lǝ busu botsyako mǝ. Bebe nwǝ dífi mɛ ókpe mǝ lǝ ani nlɛ bubǝǝ.” Bǝmuǝ Yesu.

english_verse: Someone standing there pulled out a sword. He struck the servant of the high priest and cut off his ear.
translation_verse: Nya mba díńyǝ lǝ Yesu ɔflɔ eto ɔni dílǝkǝ wǝ kalanle nya óla Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke eto odomunyǝ eto koto.

english_verse: Jesus was still speaking, when Judas the betrayer came up. He was one of the twelve disciples, and a mob of men armed with swords and clubs were with him. They had been sent by the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Mǝ ku Yesu si bǝńyǝ mfó bálɛ etiki fɛ Yuda wǝ ni lefosi bakasebi inuǝ bamǝ eto ɔni díbǝ. Besumunyǝ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa ku umǝ ǝmǝ eto beninǝ kpǝ ǝtǝkǝko wǝ bǝbǝ. Bétsyi keyi ku nlanle.

english_verse: Judas had told them ahead of time, “Arrest the man I greet with a kiss. Tie him up tight and lead him away.”
translation_verse: Nwǝ dídu wǝ útǝ mfóo, ébɔtɛyi betidi bamfo utsyǝ nkǝ, “Utidi wǝ biunyǝ muusiǝsǝ mfiɔ lǝ kolaa, wǝ ni nwǝ ǝmǝ nɛ. Bimuǝ wǝ, lǝ bekpa wǝ bidunko.”

english_verse: Jesus said to the mob, “Why do you come with swords and clubs to arrest me like a criminal?
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Beso ele bǝ bitsyi keyi ku nlanle fɛ lǝ bibǝ bimuǝ mɛ lǝ ǝsuale ǝsuǝ fe uyu mini?

english_verse: Day after day I was with you and taught in the temple, and you didn't arrest me. But what the Scriptures say must come true.”
translation_verse: Bo ku mi ete lɛkɛ lǝ Disumuyo mfó diyi saa, nya minkɛ mfó mínkate Anantotiki nyamǝ mfó tsya bíǝmmuǝ mɛ. Bǝ lǝ kase Onanto eto Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ Eto Kukuǝ lɛtɛyi utsyǝǝ, lǝ ibǝ itǝ nko.”

english_verse: All of Jesus' disciples ran off and left him.
translation_verse: Nya wǝ bakasebi kenke dítsyetsyi báyani wǝ bǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: One of them was a young man who was wearing only a linen cloth. And when the men grabbed him,
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmǝ mfoo, okosobi utsyuǝ wǝ nti kafia ǝsuǝ ntǝkǝko wǝǝ, ǝnyǝ lesa nǝ kenke díbǝ. Bamamanyǝ bamǝ ála lǝ bǝmuǝ okosobi ǝmfo. Fɛ ini wǝ kafia ete bákɔbe, nya ɔ́kpɔ

english_verse: he left the cloth behind and ran away naked. Jesus Is Questioned by the Council (Matthew
translation_verse: ɔ́bɔ mǝ lǝ ani. Nya útsyǝtsyi údu leyaleya. Nya óyani wǝ kafia ókpe mǝ lǝ ani. Bákpa Yesu Bésuko Yudafɔ Eto Beninǝ Eto Ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Finally, some men stood up and lied about him. They said,
translation_verse: Nya bǝtsyuǝ létaka bátɛyi nya bála wǝ kɛnyɛ bǝnkǝ,

english_verse: Peter replied, “That isn't true! I don't know what you're talking about. I don't have any idea what you mean.” He went out to the gate, and a rooster crowed.
translation_verse: Nya Petro dítudi kɛnyɛ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bee? Mánnɔ lesa nǝ fanlɛ bɔtɛyi mfo eto kasɔ!” Nya ótaka údu úsu úńyǝ lǝ kesiǝ ɔflɔ. Kase óyo kǝsiǝ kamǝ ko ukusǝ ko dítǝ kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: Peter had followed at a distance, and when he reached the courtyard of the high priest's house, he sat down with the guards to warm himself beside a fire.
translation_verse: Petro ǝtǝkǝko mǝ kama kama nya úsu údufǝ lǝ usumunyǝ ninǝ eto diyo nǝmǝ. Nya úsu úsiǝ lǝ bamamanyǝ bamǝ ɔflɔ ɔ́nlɛ ute bɔyifǝ.

english_verse: The chief priests and the whole council tried to find someone to accuse Jesus of a crime, so they could put him to death. But they could not find anyone to accuse him.
translation_verse: Besumunyǝ ninǝ ku Yudafɔ eto beninǝ kenke ba dísiǝ mfó ákplatsya babe lǝ boofo kabua kǝtsyuǝ bunyǝ lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ lǝ bayɛ bǝmuǝ wǝ balo. Tsya bámfo kabua saa bunyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: At once the high priest ripped his robe apart and shouted, “Why do we need more witnesses?
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfó tututuu, Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke ǝmfo kosate ko léfuadi wǝ awu ku lɛblɔfi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Fǝnkǝ bee? Badansiɛ sa nńsife itǝ bo bio itsyi lǝ mba ńyǝ mfo kama!

english_verse: This time Peter began to curse and swear, “I don't even know the man you're talking about!”
translation_verse: Nya Petro léfa ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Ekpe lǝ Onanto bǝ lǝ sidia minlɛ bɔtɛyii, lǝ unǝ mɛ koto! Minyi utidi ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ bɛnlɛ etiki budi ketsyiko mfo!”

english_verse: “We heard him say he would tear down this temple that we built. He also claimed that in three days he would build another one without any help.”
translation_verse: “Bɔnɔ bǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, ‘Mooba Onanto eto Disumuyo nǝ báto mfo, tsya lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝ ǝsuǝǝ, muusinkli nto lebamba nǝ bémfi betidi eto ani báto.’ ”

english_verse: But even then they did not agree on what they said.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mǝ tsya eto etikididi mánkate ku mǝ bǝtsyuǝ eto ale.

english_verse: The high priest stood up in the council and asked Jesus, “Why don't you say something in your own defense? Don't you hear the charges they are making against you?”
translation_verse: Usumunyǝ ninǝ kenke átaka úńyǝ lǝ mǝ nti nya ɔ́tɔ Yesu nkǝ, “Anlɛ etiki nnya banlɛ bɔtɔ bɔnɔ? Embutǝ mbuayɛ? Be nkpe fǝ fɔɔtɛyi?”

english_verse: But Jesus kept quiet and did not say a word. The high priest asked him another question, “Are you the Messiah, the Son of the glorious God?”
translation_verse: Tsya Yesu édi bi, wémfǝ kɛnyɛ ɔ́tɛyi kulesa. Usumunyǝ ninǝ kenke ǝmfo esi ɔ́tɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ ni Nwǝ mǝ Bákpo Ɔhile, Onanto ǝmǝ boatɛsǝ eto Ubi?”

english_verse: You heard him claim to be God! What is your decision?” They all agreed he should be put to death.
translation_verse: Údi mbusiotiki úńyǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ! Ntsyǝ binyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ?” Nya mǝmblɛ lɛtɔnɔ bálo wǝ dikpi bǝ ele bǝ ukpǝ.

english_verse: Some of the people started spitting on Jesus. They blindfolded him, hit him with their fists, and said, “Tell us who hit you!” Then the guards took charge of Jesus and beat him. Peter Says He Doesn't Know Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Mǝ nti eto bǝtsyuǝ étsyiko ntufǝ butufǝ kákpo Yesu. Nya bákle wǝ ǝnǝmi nya bétsyiko wǝ bɔsɔ. Nya bánlɛ wǝ bɔtɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Tɛyi bo futsyǝ lɛsɔ fǝ!” Nya bamamanyǝ bǝtsyuǝ lékpa Yesu bédunko, nya básɔ wǝ lǝ atosi. Petro Étudi Kɛnyɛ Lǝ Yesu Ǝsuǝ Nkǝ Unyi Wǝ.

english_verse: The servant girl saw Peter again and said to the people standing there, “This man is one of them!”
translation_verse: Usiobi ǝmfo esi úbǝ mfó úbǝ óbe wǝ, nya usi útsyiko betidi ba díńyǝ mfó bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Osani ǝmfo eyifo mǝ nti eto ɔni!”

english_verse: While Peter was still in the courtyard, a servant girl of the high priest came up
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfóo, Petro ébubǝ úsi lǝ Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke ǝmǝ eto diyo fɛ usiobi wǝ nkpe wǝ lǝ ɔflɔ díbǝ.

english_verse: and saw Peter warming himself by the fire. She stared at him and said, “You were with Jesus from Nazareth!”
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ únyǝ Petro nsi lǝ uté ɔflɔ ɔnlɛ wǝ bɔyifǝǝ, ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fintsya ébutǝkǝko Yesu Nasaretnyǝ ǝmǝ ǝnyǝ!”

english_verse: “No, I'm not!” Peter replied. A little while later some of the people said to Peter, “You certainly are one of them. You're a Galilean!”
translation_verse: Tsya Petro esi útudi kɛnyɛ nko ke. Yanklɛ fɛ mba ńyǝ mfó lɛtɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Yanle bǝ ani fǝ enni mǝ ɔni, itsyise fintsya etsyi Galilea eto kasɔ.”

english_verse: At once the rooster crowed a second time. Then Peter remembered that Jesus had told him, “Before a rooster crows twice, you will say three times that you don't know me.” So Peter started crying.
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo, ukusɛ ko disi útǝ kɛnyɛ dinuǝfǝ, nya Petro lékloma nkǝ Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fɛ ukusɛ luutǝ kɛnyɛ dinuǝfǝǝ, ǝbutudi kɛnyɛ sitsyǝ fǝ enyi mɛ.” Nya ílǝ Petro lǝ utu nya úwi keku.

english_verse: Early the next morning the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses met together with the whole Jewish council. They tied up Jesus and led him off to Pilate.
translation_verse: Olesiǝnto ǝmfóo, besumunyǝ ninǝ, átsya ku Yudafɔ eto beninǝ ku afi eto bateasa ku Yudafɔ eto batɔnkotɔnko kenke. Se béfi nsusu lǝ etiki nyamǝ ǝsuǝ ku kase bɔɔyɛ ku nnya. Bákle Yesu nya bákpa wǝ bésuko Aba eto Unyɛsiǝ Ninǝ itǝ Romafɔ eto Aba wǝ baakpo Pilato ɔflɔ.

english_verse: But the chief priests told the crowd to ask Pilate to free Barabbas.
translation_verse: Nya besumunyǝ ninǝ bamǝ lídi betidi bamǝ bákpe bǝnkǝ bátɛyi Pilato bǝnkǝ, óyani Baraba bomu utǝ mǝ.

english_verse: Pilate asked, “But what crime has he done?” “Nail him to a cross!” they yelled even louder.
translation_verse: Pilato átɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Nte kabua ka úyifo eso?” Tsya, mǝmblɛ esi báfa bembembe bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Sɔ wǝ amanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ!”

english_verse: But Jesus did not answer, and Pilate was amazed. The Death Sentence (Matthew
translation_verse: Tsya, Yesu ménsitɛyi kulesa, nyaso íyifo Pilato yanii!

english_verse: They made fun of Jesus and shouted, “Hey, you king of the Jews!”
translation_verse: Nya banlɛ wǝ kɔfiɔ bokpe ákatɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Yuu, yuuduu,! Yudafɔ eto Oka lǝ usiǝ nkpǝ kɛntsyɛɛ!”

english_verse: Then Pilate questioned him again, “Don't you have anything to say? Don't you hear what crimes they say you have done?”
translation_verse: Nyaso Pilato esi ɔ́tɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Ǝmbulǝkǝ kɛnyɛ lǝ etiki saa ǝsuǝ? Tsyue koto lanɔ etiki nnya banlɛ bɔtɛyi lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ!”

english_verse: Pilate wanted to please the crowd, so he set Barabbas free. Then he ordered his soldiers to beat Jesus with a whip and nail him to a cross. Soldiers Make Fun of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Se Pilato léla nkǝ weeyifo lǝ mǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ esoo, óyani Baraba útǝ mǝ. Nya útǝ béfi kekuefiofio báblɛ Yesu, nya úfi wǝ ókpe lǝ bamamanyǝ eto ani nkǝ besu basɔ wǝ bamanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Bamamanyǝ Bamfó Ákpe Yesu Kofani.

english_verse: On it was a sign that told why he was nailed there. It read, “This is the King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Nya báwɔni asa lɛ otabo kɛkɛ ǝsuǝ básɔ lǝ wǝ disi kato nnya nlɛ bote lesa nǝ eso bálo wǝ ni bǝnkǝ, “Ǝnyǝ Yudafɔ Eto Oka.”

english_verse: They yelled, “Nail him to a cross!”
translation_verse: Nya báfa bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Sɔ wǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ!”

english_verse: It was about nine o'clock in the morning when they nailed him to the cross.
translation_verse: Básɔ wǝ bamanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ lǝ olesiǝ ǝmfó eto abombo ɔwɔnɔmbǝ lefe.

english_verse: A Roman army officer was standing in front of Jesus. When the officer saw how Jesus died, he said, “This man really was the Son of God!”
translation_verse: Nya se omamanyǝ ninǝ wǝ díńyǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝmǝ ɔflɔ lɛnɔ Yesu eto bofa nya únyǝ kase úkpǝǝ, ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Sitinti utidi ǝmfo eyifo Onanto eto Ubi.”

english_verse: The soldiers led Jesus inside the courtyard of the fortress and called together the rest of the troops.
translation_verse: Bamamanyǝ bamǝ ákpa Yesu bésuko Aba eto Unyɛsiǝ Ninǝ eto diyo nya bákpadi bamamanyǝ fɛfɛ bǝ bǝbǝ mfó.

english_verse: The crowd now came and asked Pilate to set a prisoner free, just as he usually did.
translation_verse: Nyaso se betidi kpǝ díbǝ bátsyaa, bátɛyi Pilato bǝnkǝ okloma kase wǝǝnyǝ mba baakpe lǝ ayo kaminsǝ fe kase wókala buyifo lɛlɛ saa.

english_verse: Pilate asked them, “Do you want me to free the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Bela biǝnkǝ nyani Yudafɔ eto Oka ǝmǝ ntǝ mi?”

english_verse: Pilate knew that the chief priests had brought Jesus to him because they were jealous.
translation_verse: Pilato átɔ mǝ nko itsyise óte nkǝ kekisi ǝsuǝ eso besumunyǝ ninǝ lékpa Yesu báboko wǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Then Pilate asked the crowd, “What do you want me to do with this man you say is the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Pilato esi údi betidi eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ etiki nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Be bela biǝ nyifo ku utidi ǝmǝ biakpo biǝ Yudafɔ eto Oka mfo?”

english_verse: When the soldiers had finished making fun of Jesus, they took off the purple robe. They put his own clothes back on him and led him off to be nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Se bǝmǝ wǝ nya bákpe wǝ kofani bálosǝǝ, bǝlǝkǝ awu sia nyamǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ nya bésinkliko nnya ókpe kɔ bákpe wǝ. Nya bákpa wǝ bésuko kaka bɔsɔ wǝ bamanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Básɔ Yesu Bámanklasǝ Lǝ Uyikabie Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Simon from Cyrene happened to be coming in from a farm, and they forced him to carry Jesus' cross. Simon was the father of Alexander and Rufus. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ bántɔɔ, bátsyako osani wǝ baakpo Simon wǝ ditsyi dibutu ɔ́ntɔ lǝ Yerusalem. Nyaso bamamanyǝ bamǝ áhiɛ wǝ bǝnkǝ ɔwunsǝko Yesu lǝ utsyinko wǝ uyikabie ǝmǝ. Simon ǝmfó etsyi Sireni eto kasɔ, nya wǝ bebi ni Aleksandra ku Rufo.

english_verse: The chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses also made fun of Jesus. They said to each other, “He saved others, but he can't save himself.
translation_verse: Nko kǝ basumufɔ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa bamǝ tsya dímǝ wǝ bátɛyi mǝ bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Úlǝkǝ betidi bamba utsyiko lǝ ukpǝ ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ wembofo wǝ ǝsuǝ bulǝkǝ ketsyiko lǝ ukpǝ ǝsuǝ!

english_verse: Pilate was surprised to hear that Jesus was already dead, and he called in the army officer to find out if Jesus had been dead very long.
translation_verse: Se Pilato lɛnɔ nkǝ Yesu ébukpǝ kokoo, íyifo wǝ naa. Nyaso ókpadi wǝ omamanyǝ ninǝ wǝ díńyǝ lǝ etsyuesa nyamfó eto kɛnyɛ, nya ɔ́tɔ wǝ lǝ sitinti ini bǝ Yesu ébukpǝ koko.

english_verse: A man named Joseph from Arimathea was brave enough to ask Pilate for the body of Jesus. Joseph was a highly respected member of the Jewish council, and he was also waiting for God's kingdom to come.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ eto okponkpo ɔni wǝ baakpo Yosef wǝ ditsyi Arimatea eto uninǝ, ákpe ɔkɔɛ úsu únyǝ Pilato. Yosef éyifo Yudafɔ eto Uninǝ kplɛ wǝ lɛkɛ dibu nya úkabe kusu itǝ Onanto eto Sekakedidi eto bubǝ. Se óyo Pilato ɔflɔɔ, ɔ́lɛ wǝ lekpakpa nkǝ utǝ wǝ kusu lǝ usu ulǝkǝ Yesu eto ɔkɔ ǝmǝ usu ubikǝ fɛ lǝ eyo Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi ǝmǝ.

english_verse: The soldiers took Jesus to Golgotha, which means “Place of a Skull.”
translation_verse: Bákpa Yesu bésuko kaka baakpo Ditidisikɔbe.

english_verse: They nailed Jesus to a cross and gambled to see who would get his clothes.
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, bamamanyǝ bamǝ ásɔ wǝ bámanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Nya béfi afetu bákpo básɛ lǝ bate lekpa nǝ luutu utsyuǝ saa fɛ bésense awu nyamǝ bǝtǝ bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: People who passed by said terrible things about Jesus. They shook their heads and shouted, “Ha! So you're the one who claimed you could tear down the temple and build it again in three days.
translation_verse: Mba kenke lɛyɛ mfó bafe étinkǝsǝ mǝ esi bákpe Yesu kɔfiɔ bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Ɛhɛɛ! Inni fǝ lɛtɛyi fǝ eboba bo Disumuyo kplɛ akpo lǝ kasɔ esinkli ato kǝ lǝ eyi ǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ kɛɛ?

english_verse: If he is the Messiah, the king of Israel, let him come down from the cross! Then we will see and believe.” The two criminals also said cruel things to Jesus. The Death of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Lǝ wǝ baakpo Israelfɔ eto oka, wǝ ni Kristo ǝmǝǝ, wǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ sitintii, ulǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ ɔyifǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ ubǝ kasɔ bǝ lǝ bofo bɔnɔ!” Betidi inuǝ ba básɔ bafakasǝ lǝ eyikabie ǝsuǝ ku Yesu mfóo, tsya áka wǝ. Yesu Ǝkpǝ.

english_verse: After the officer told him, Pilate let Joseph have Jesus' body.
translation_verse: Nya se uninǝ ǝmfo lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ ɔnukualɛ inii, Pilato ǝtǝ Yosef kusu nkǝ usu ulǝkǝ ɔkɔ ǝmǝ.

english_verse: About noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until around three o'clock.
translation_verse: Se éyo kakɔmi lefee, kasɔ mfó kenke ko léna. Nya ítsyǝ nko ísu ése abombo etsyǝ.

english_verse: Then about that time Jesus shouted, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabachthani?” which means, “My God, my God, why have you deserted me?”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lefe nǝmfóo, Yesu áfa bembembe ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Eli, Eli, lama sabaktani?” Etiki nyamfo eto kasɔ ni bǝ, “Mɔ Onanto, mɔ Onanto! Beso fáyani mɛ fǝtsyǝ?”

english_verse: Some of the people standing there heard Jesus and said, “He is calling for Elijah.”
translation_verse: Betidi bǝtsyuǝ díńyǝ mfó ánɔ lesa nǝ ɔ́tɛyi, nya bátɛyi bǝtsyuǝ bǝ, “Ɔlɛ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Elia bokpadi.”

english_verse: One of them ran and grabbed a sponge. After he had soaked it in wine, he put it on a stick and held it up to Jesus. He said, “Let's wait and see if Elijah will come and take him down!”
translation_verse: Mǝ ɔni étsyetsyi úsu úfi okosa wǝ bákpe lǝ ntǝ eto sonkpe ǝsuǝ nya óbesǝ wǝ kato ku uyi útǝ Yesu nkǝ unǝ. Nya ɔ́tɛyi bafɛfɛ nkǝ, “Bińyǝ lǝ bobe! Bitǝ lǝ bobe lǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Elia ebubǝ ulǝkǝ wǝ utsyiko lǝ uyikabie komfo ǝsuǝ!”

english_verse: Jesus shouted and then died.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu léfa bembembe nya úkpǝ.

english_verse: It was now the evening before the Sabbath, and the Jewish people were getting ready for that sacred day.
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo ǝbǝ lǝ diyi nǝ bǝǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ itǝ bǝ lǝ kofe edufǝ diyoo, lǝ bedi Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi eto diyi. Nya se kale nlɛ boloo,

english_verse: Joseph bought a linen cloth and took the body down from the cross. He had it wrapped in the cloth, and he put it in a tomb that had been cut into solid rock. Then he rolled a big stone against the entrance to the tomb.
translation_verse: Nya Yosef dísu úlǝkǝ Yesu eto ɔkɔ nya úfi kafia kpaa fɔfɔ ka óya úmli wǝ. Nya úfi wǝ úsu úbikǝ lǝ kudi ko bǝlǝkǝ lǝ koba kǝmiǝ bǝtsyǝ koko lǝ kɔtini ɔflɔ. Nya útǝ nkǝ baminansǝ leba kplɛ lɔni beti lǝ kudi komǝ eto kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of Joseph were watching and saw where the body was placed.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfóo, Maria Magdalene ku Maria wǝ ni Yosef eto ambe ǝńyǝ mfó nya bábe kaka bébikǝ Yesu eto ɔkɔ ǝmǝ.

english_verse: Later, Jesus appeared in another form to two disciples, as they were on their way out of the city.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu ǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte bakasebi inuǝ lǝ lefe nǝ bányɛ lǝ kusu bántɔ. Fɛɛ bǝnnyǝ wǝ betsyǝ lekpo mlǝ.

english_verse: Then the disciples left and preached everywhere. The Lord was with them, and the miracles they worked proved that their message was true. ANOTHER OLD ENDING TO MARK'S GOSPEL
translation_verse: Nya wǝ batɔnkpe létsyilama nlebe saa kenke bátɛyi Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ. Nya Onamute ǝmǝ dísiǝ ko mǝ ɔ́wunsǝko mǝ nya béyifo ayanisa nnya lete bǝ mǝ ditiki nǝmǝ eyifo ɔnukualɛ ɛyɛ lǝ ayanisa kpǝ nnya béyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: She left and told his friends, who were crying and mourning.
translation_verse: Úsu ɔ́tɛyi Yesu eto bayɛtsyuǝ ba nlɛ nku buwi lǝ wǝ ukpǝ ǝmǝ eso.

english_verse: Very early on Sunday morning, just as the sun was coming up, they went to the tomb.
translation_verse: Nyaso se kale dísiǝ kɔsida eto olesiǝǝ, bátaka bésu kudi komǝ eti.

english_verse: The women went into the tomb, and on the right side they saw a young man in a white robe sitting there. They were alarmed.
translation_verse: Nyaso se bédufǝ kudi komǝ kafoo, bǝnyǝ okosobi utsyuǝ se únsi lǝ kodiani. Nya ónkpe awu nnya diflubi futututu! Difufu ǝmuǝ mǝ.

english_verse: Now go and tell his disciples, and especially Peter, that he will go ahead of you to Galilee. You will see him there, just as he told you.”
translation_verse: Nyaso bisu bɛtɛyi wǝ bakasebi ku Petro tsya biǝnkǝ, ‘Yesu tɔ mi sɛtɔ, ɔtɔ lǝ Galilea. Mfó ti biunyǝ wǝ fe kase ɔ́tɛyi mi utsyǝ.’ ”

english_verse: They will handle snakes and will drink poison and not be hurt. They will also heal sick people by placing their hands on them. Jesus Returns to Heaven (Luke
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bǝmuǝ owa nye bǝnǝ kenii, yembuyifo mǝ kabua saa. Lǝ bǝtǝkǝ befimfi anii, boomuǝ ale.” Onanto Akpa Yesu Usuko Kato.

english_verse: But when these disciples told what had happened, the others would not believe either. What Jesus' Followers Must Do (Matthew
translation_verse: Kama se bésu bátee, bésinkli bésu bátɛyi bafɛfɛ. Tsyaa, mbamǝ mámfo mǝ bánɔ. Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Wǝ Ǝsuǝ Óte Bakasebi Lefosi Ɔnwɛ Bamǝ.

english_verse: Anyone who believes me and is baptized will be saved. But anyone who refuses to believe me will be condemned.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ lefo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo ɔnɔ nya utǝ bǝǝflǝsǝ wǝ ntuu, Onanto ebufi wǝ abua ɔtsyǝ wǝ. Nya utidi wǝ dimamfo ɔnɔɔ, Onanto embofo wǝ.

english_verse: After the Lord Jesus had said these things to the disciples, he was taken back up to heaven where he sat down at the right side of God.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Bonamute Yesu dídi mǝ etiki ólosǝ mfó eto kamaa, Onanto étsyi wǝ úsuko kato kaka wuunsi lǝ kakplɛkɔ lǝ wǝ Anto ɔflɔ lǝ kodiani.

english_verse: Afterwards, Jesus appeared to his eleven disciples as they were eating. He scolded them because they were too stubborn to believe the ones who had seen him after he had been raised to life.
translation_verse: Fɛfɛfɛɛ, Yesu ǝlǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ óte wǝ lefosi bakasebi ɔnwɛ lǝ lefe nǝ bénsi bánlɛ budi. Nyaso únyenki ókpe mǝ lǝ kase mǝ bofokanɔ lǝmbǝ ale, nya betidi ato fefe, se bamfó betidi ba díkǝnyǝ wǝ se ótaka utsyi ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ bofo kanɔ.

english_verse: Then he told them: Go and preach the good news to everyone in the world.
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bisu kawunsiǝ kenke lǝ bebe Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ditsya bitǝ betidi ba kenke.

english_verse: Everyone who believes me will be able to do wonderful things. By using my name they will force out demons, and they will speak new languages.
translation_verse: Nya Onanto ebutǝ bafokanɔfɔ lǝ mɛɛ, ǝsuǝale beyifo ayanisa kpǝ. Boola awɔnɔ bua lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝ. Bɔɔtɛyi belebele kpǝ bia benyi.

english_verse: Many people have tried to tell the story of what God has done among us.
translation_verse: Mɔ ɔyimisani Tiofilo, betidi kpǝ ákplatsya kase boofo, lǝ bawɔni lesa saa nǝ díbǝ lǝ bo nti bǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: They wrote what we had been told by the ones who were there in the beginning and saw what happened.
translation_verse: Báwɔni nnya fe kase betidi ba dínyǝ asa nyamfó lɛtɛyi bo idu lǝ nnya kasɔ ketsyikokɔ nya bábe Onanto eto Ditiki nǝmǝ letsya báte tsya.

english_verse: So I made a careful study of everything and then decided to write and tell you exactly what took place. Honorable Theophilus,
translation_verse: Nyaso, Tiofilo lala, se míndufǝ lǝ asa nyamfo mínto nnya mímbe kenke idu lǝ kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ke esoo, mfi nsusu lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ minkǝ ɛlɛkɛ bǝ nwɔni asa nyamfo lǝ ekpa ɛyɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ mfi ntǝ fǝ.

english_verse: I have done this to let you know the truth about what you have heard. An Angel Tells about the Birth of John
translation_verse: Nlɛ nyamfo buyifo nko bǝ lǝ ǝnyǝ ɔnukualɛ eto ditiki nǝmǝ bǝ lǝ ate asa nnya báte fǝ. Bátɛyi Yohanes Ntuflǝsǝtidi Eto Bole Bǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: When Herod was king of Judea, there was a priest by the name of Zechariah from the priestly group of Abijah. His wife Elizabeth was from the family of Aaron.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝ Herodes lídi seka lǝ Yudea eto kasɔ ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto eto usumunyǝ utsyuǝ wǝ baakpo Sakaria akɛ mfó. Ɔ́bɔ utsyi lǝ besumunyǝ ba lǝǝtǝ kedi eto ditsyukpa nǝ baakpo Abia ǝsuǝ. Sakaria eto usiǝ wǝ baakpo Elisabet tsya ábɔ utsyi lǝ Onanto eto Usumunyǝ wǝ baakpo Aaron éto kafo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Both of them were good people and pleased the Lord God by obeying all that he had commanded.
translation_verse: Usǝ ku usiǝ bamfo ǝsiǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝ. Nya béyifo lǝ wǝ afi kenke ǝsuǝ kukunɔ.

english_verse: But they did not have children. Elizabeth could not have any, and both Zechariah and Elizabeth were already old.
translation_verse: Ubi saa mankɛ mǝ, itsyise Elisabet anle. Nya mǝ inuǝ bamǝ tsya ébobe báfe.

english_verse: One day Zechariah's group of priests were on duty, and he was serving God as a priest.
translation_verse: Diyi lɔnii, Sakaria akɛ lǝ Yudafɔ eto Kedikǝtǝkɔ ɔlɛ wǝ Kesumuyifo buyifo itsyise wǝ ditsyukpa ítu.

english_verse: According to the custom of the priests, he had been chosen to go into the Lord's temple that day and to burn incense,
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mǝ kesumu eto lekpa ǝsuǝǝ, bákpo básɛ bǝnyǝ bǝ Sakaria ni nwǝ ǝsuǝ ítǝkǝ. Nyaso wǝ ni nwǝ bǝlǝkǝ bǝ usu otonsǝ elufui utǝ Onanto lǝ Kedikǝtǝkɔ eto leba nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ. Mfó nya údufǝ Yudafɔ eto kedikǝtǝkɔ kamǝ.

english_verse: All at once an angel from the Lord appeared to Zechariah at the right side of the altar.
translation_verse: Mfó Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe utsyuǝ wǝ díńyǝ lǝ kaka ɔnlɛ elufui botonsǝ eto sediani dílǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte wǝ.

english_verse: Zechariah was confused and afraid when he saw the angel.
translation_verse: Se Sakaria dínyǝ wǝǝ, óyakla nya óte sikpi tinti.

english_verse: But the angel told him: Don't be afraid, Zechariah! God has heard your prayers. Your wife Elizabeth will have a son, and you must name him John.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe emfó átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Sakaria, mante sikpi! Onanto ánɔ fǝ olatoto, nya fǝ usiǝ Elisabet ebole ubisaibi utǝ fǝ. Nya fuutǝkǝ wǝ diye fǝnkǝ Yohanes.

english_verse: His birth will make you very happy, and many people will be glad.
translation_verse: Lǝ wǝ bole ǝsuǝǝ, ebunyǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti. Nko ke tsya betidi kpǝ luunyǝ disuǝyuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Your son will be a great servant of the Lord. He must never drink wine or beer, and the power of the Holy Spirit will be with him from the time he is born.
translation_verse: Woofiani utidi kplɛ lǝ Bonamute eto ǝnǝmi. Yanle bǝ unǝ ntǝ bo nkpe ale nye ntǝ saa eto okle tsya. Nya idu lǝ wǝ lelefee, Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ebusiǝ ko wǝ.

english_verse: John will lead many people in Israel to turn back to the Lord their God.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Israel bebi ebusinkli bǝbǝ mǝ Onamute Onanto ɔflɔ.

english_verse: He will go ahead of the Lord with the same power and spirit that Elijah had. And because of John, parents will be more thoughtful of their children. And people who now disobey God will begin to think as they ought to. This is how John will get people ready for the Lord.
translation_verse: Wǝ ni nwǝ lɔɔtɔ Bonamute eto bubǝ lǝ ǝsuǝale ku utu bokpe ǝsuǝ fe kase Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Elia dítsyǝ. Nya wuutǝ diyuǝ luubǝ bebi ku antomǝ nti. Nya wuunǝ koto tsyuetsyue okpe lǝ betidi ba ditidi ato ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ bekefi nsusu sɛɛ bayɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ lǝ mǝ asayifoyifo ǝsuǝ. Nyamfo luutǝ Bonamute eto betidi lǝ bǝsiǝ bakabe kusu itǝ wǝ bubǝ.”

english_verse: Zechariah said to the angel, “How will I know this is going to happen? My wife and I are both very old.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Sakaria lɛtɔ ɔtɔnkpe ǝmfó nkǝ, “Be luutǝ bǝ mfo nyamfo nnɔ? Itsyise mbobe mfiani uninǝsǝ nya mɔ usiǝ tsya díkafiani uninǝsiǝ.”

english_verse: The angel answered, “I am Gabriel, God's servant, and I was sent to tell you this good news.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mɔ ni Gabriel wǝ lǝǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi. Wǝ létsyese mɛ nkǝ ntɛyi fǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo.

english_verse: You have not believed what I have said. So you will not be able to say a thing until all this happens. But everything will take place when it is supposed to.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ámamfo mɔ kɛnyɛ eto dikiti nǝmfo ánɔ. Ite bǝ ámamfo anɔ tsyaa, yuubǝ itǝ lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto dítsyue útsyǝ ǝsuǝ. Se fámamfo ánɔ eso ebofiani ɔmumu isu ese lefe nǝ diyi nǝmǝ léyo fɛ fǝ odiakami looyankli edi etiki.”

english_verse: The crowd was waiting for Zechariah and kept wondering why he was staying in the temple so long.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝ asa nyamfo kenke díbǝǝ, íyifo betidi ba kenke díńyǝ bensekǝ Sakaria lǝ lekple mfó yanii, itsyise bánte lesa nǝ eso éfo wǝ lefe kpǝ nko lǝ Yudafɔ eto kedikǝtǝkɔ kamǝ nko.

english_verse: When he did come out, he could not speak, and they knew he had seen a vision. He motioned to them with his hands, but did not say a thing.
translation_verse: Se ɔ́bɔ úbǝ lekplee, wénsifo mǝ etiki budinko. Nyaso bǝnyǝ bǝ únyǝ bulǝkǝkate butsyuǝ lǝ Yudafɔ eto kedikǝtǝkɔ mfó. Nyaso ɔ́nnlɛ etiki bofo budi nɛ, ini ani ete úfi ɔ́nlɛ mǝ etiki budi.

english_verse: When Zechariah's time of service in the temple was over, he went home.
translation_verse: Se Sakaria eto kesumu eto lefe léloo, úsinkli úsu diyo.

english_verse: Soon after this, his wife was expecting a baby, and for five months she did not leave the house. She said to herself,
translation_verse: Nyamfó eto kamaa, Elisabet ésu ɔ́lɛ kafo, itǝ eso wénsikabɔ kesu umǝ bio. Nya ɔ́kula ǝsuǝ itǝ afa anɔ sɔ̃ɔ̃.

english_verse: “What the Lord has done for me will keep people from looking down on me.” An Angel Tells about the Birth of Jesus
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya eso Elisabet átɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔmɔɔ, be asa nnya Bonamute díyifo útǝ mɛɛ, nya úlǝkǝ kofani lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ lǝ betidi ba kenke eto ǝnǝmi.” Bátɛyi Yesu Eto Bole Bǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: One month later God sent the angel Gabriel to the town of Nazareth in Galilee
translation_verse: Lǝ Elisabet eto kafolɛlɛ eto kofa kuande ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto átsyese wǝ ɔtɔnkpe Gabriel nkǝ usu umǝ wǝ baakpo Nasaret lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ.

english_verse: with a message for a virgin named Mary. She was engaged to Joseph from the family of King David.
translation_verse: Onanto eto Ɔtɔnkpe ǝmfo étsyi kɛnyɛ úsuko kebitɛ ka bátɔ bǝtǝ osani wǝ baakpo Yosef wǝ ditsyi Oka David eto kafo. Kebitɛ kamǝ eto diye ni Maria.

english_verse: The angel greeted Mary and said, “You are truly blessed! The Lord is with you.”
translation_verse: Onanto eto Ɔtɔnkpe ǝmfo ǝbǝ Maria ɔflɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nsiǝsǝ fǝ lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ! Fǝǝ bǝnǝ kafo! Bonamute si ko fǝ.”

english_verse: Mary was confused by the angel's words and wondered what they meant.
translation_verse: Ɔtɔnkpe ǝmfo eto kɛnyɛ ka óboko éyifo Maria yanii, nya itǝ wǝ disibubu lǝ kǝsiǝ kamǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then the angel told Mary, “Don't be afraid! God is pleased with you,
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Maria, mante sikpi. Onanto ǝnǝ fǝ kafo tinti.

english_verse: and you will have a son. His name will be Jesus.
translation_verse: Ebɔlɛ kafo nya foole ubisaibi, nya fuutǝkǝ wǝ diye fǝ Yesu.

english_verse: He will be great and will be called the Son of God Most High. The Lord God will make him king, as his ancestor David was.
translation_verse: Woofo diye tinti nya bookpo wǝ bǝ Onanto wǝ ni Ǝsuǝalenyǝ Kenke eto ubi. Nya Boanto Onanto luutǝ nkǝ ubi ǝmǝ di seka fe wǝ ona Oka David ke.

english_verse: He will rule the people of Israel forever, and his kingdom will never end.”
translation_verse: Nya wuudi seka lǝ Yakob eto kafo eto bebi ǝsuǝ isu manlo manlo. Nya wǝ sekakedikɔ embolo kulefe kulefe.”

english_verse: Mary asked the angel, “How can this happen? I am not even married!”
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, Maria átɔ Ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Ntsyǝ nyamfo loofo bubǝ kǝtǝ, se minyi osani?”

english_verse: The angel answered, “The Holy Spirit will come down to you, and God's power will come over you. So your child will be called the holy Son of God.
translation_verse: Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ebɔyifǝ disiǝ lǝ fǝ nya Ǝsuǝalenyǝ Kenke eto ǝsuǝale loola disiǝ lǝ fǝ. Nyaso ubi wǝ foole ebuyifo Ɔkɛnkɛnyǝ nya bookpo wǝ bǝ Onanto eto Ubisaibi.

english_verse: Your relative Elizabeth is also going to have a son, even though she is old. No one thought she could ever have a baby, but in three months she will have a son.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, nla miǝ lǝ ate fǝ, fǝ otokpenyǝ wǝ baakpo Elisabet wǝ ni uninǝsiǝ wǝ baakpo okonɔ, fe ɔ́lɛ kafo kofa kuande nɛ.

english_verse: Nothing is impossible for God!”
translation_verse: Itsyise kulesa ǝmbǝ ale itǝ Onanto eto buyifo.”

english_verse: Mary said, “I am the Lord's servant! Let it happen as you have said.” And the angel left her. Mary Visits Elizabeth
translation_verse: Nya Maria lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bee, Boanto Onanto eto uyifoyifo mini. Utǝ ibǝ itǝ mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ fe kase fátɛyi.” Lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ nya Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ dídu. Maria Ésu Elisabet Ɔflɔ.

english_verse: When Elizabeth heard Mary's greeting, her baby moved within her. The Holy Spirit came upon Elizabeth.
translation_verse: Se Elisabet lɛnɔ Maria eto kǝsiǝ kamǝǝ, ubi wǝ lɛkɛ wǝ lǝ kafo ko lɛkpɔ, nya Elisabet díyi ku Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ kenke.

english_verse: Then in a loud voice she said to Mary: God has blessed you more than any other woman! He has also blessed the child you will have.
translation_verse: Mfó nya óbesǝ ɔkɔɛ kato ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bákpo fǝ atsyɔ lǝ besio kenke nti, nya bákpo ubi wǝ fǝǝbǝ bole tsya atsyɔ!

english_verse: Why should the mother of my Lord come to me?
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ntsyǝ minyǝ disi ɛkpɛ mmǝ bǝ mɔ Onamute eto ambe lǝ ubǝ mɔ ɔflɔ?

english_verse: As soon as I heard your greeting, my baby became happy and moved within me.
translation_verse: Akpa akpa se mínɔ fǝ kǝsiǝǝ, ubi wǝ nkpe mɛ lǝ kafo ábe ósa ku disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: The Lord has blessed you because you believed that he will keep his promise. Mary's Song of Praise
translation_verse: Disuǝyuǝ itǝ fǝ sitinti, itsyise áfo kɛnyɛ ka Bonamute létsyese fǝ ánɔ bǝ yuubǝ itǝ nko.” Maria Ǝsǝ Atɛsǝ Eto Kusǝ.

english_verse: Mary said: With all my heart I praise the Lord,
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, nya Maria lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ okla lɛ mɔ Onamute bɔtɛsǝ.

english_verse: and I am glad because of God my Savior.
translation_verse: Nya mɔ lɛwɔnɔ nlɛ disuǝyuǝ bunyǝ lǝ fǝ Onanto wǝ ni mɔ Ofomfokǝtǝ ǝsuǝ,

english_verse: God cares for me, his humble servant. From now on, all people will say God has blessed me.
translation_verse: itsyise ókloma únǝ mɛ kafo, mɔ, wǝ uyifoyifo wǝ dimanle kulesa. Nya idu mɔmɔ ɛntɔɔ, kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke ebokpo mɛ bǝ nwǝ bákpo atsyɔ.

english_verse: God All-Powerful has done great things for me, and his name is holy.
translation_verse: Itsyise Ǝsuǝalenyǝ Kenke éyifo asa kplɛ útǝ mɛ, nya wǝ diye eyifo kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: He always shows mercy to everyone who worships him.
translation_verse: Wǝ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ kpe lefe saa itǝ wǝ bebi eto bebi ba kenke lǝǝtǝ wǝ dibu.

english_verse: The Lord has used his powerful arm to scatter those who are proud.
translation_verse: Wǝ kɔni éyifo asa kplɛ, nya úsensǝ mba laabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ mǝ nsusu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God drags strong rulers from their thrones and puts humble people in places of power.
translation_verse: Óbokosǝ baka kplɛ kasɔ lǝ mǝ akankpomɛ ǝsuǝ, nya óbesǝ mba laabokosǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔɔ, kato.

english_verse: God gives the hungry good things to eat, and sends the rich away with nothing.
translation_verse: Útǝ nkǝ betidi ba kukpɛnsɛ nlɛ kenke lǝ bǝnyǝ asa sɛɛ bedi bemi tɔ, nya óla batabinyǝ ótsyese ani fufu.

english_verse: God helps his servant Israel and is always merciful to his people.
translation_verse: Ókloma kɛnyɛ ka útsyǝ útǝ bó bana eto bana, nya úbǝ ɔnlɛ Israel eto kuse eto betidi kenke bɔwunsǝko.

english_verse: The Lord made this promise to our ancestors, to Abraham and his family forever!
translation_verse: Ókloma ɔlɛ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ bufi kǝtǝ Abraham ku wǝ bebi eto bebi isu manlo manlo!”

english_verse: Mary stayed with Elizabeth about three months. Then she went back home. The Birth of John the Baptist
translation_verse: Maria ákɛ lǝ Elisabet ɔflɔ fenkǝ afa ǝtsyǝ fɛ úsinkli úsu oto. Bále Yohanes Ntuflǝsǝtidi.

english_verse: When Elizabeth's son was born,
translation_verse: Se Elisabet eto ubi eto lelefe léyoo, óle ubisaibi.

english_verse: her neighbors and relatives heard how kind the Lord had been to her, and they too were glad.
translation_verse: Nya Elisabet eto bayotsya ku wǝ batokpenyǝ lɛnɔ asa sɛɛ nnya Bonamute ǝmǝ díyifo útǝ wǝ. Nya mǝmblɛ dínyǝnko wǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti.

english_verse: Eight days later they did for the child what the Law of Moses commands. They were going to name him Zechariah, after his father.
translation_verse: Se ubi ǝmǝ léfo eyi mflamflaa, bǝbǝ bǝnkǝ baala wǝ lelo nya bála bǝ lǝ befi wǝ anto eto diye Sakaria bǝtǝkǝ wǝ.

english_verse: The people argued, “No one in your family has ever been named John.”
translation_verse: Mfó bétsyiko etiki bunǝ ku wǝ katɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Fǝ otokpenyǝ saa ǝmbǝ baakpo nko.”

english_verse: So they motioned to Zechariah to find out what he wanted to name his son.
translation_verse: Nya bátɔ wǝ anto lǝ ani eto eyifosa ǝsuǝ bǝ ote diye nǝ woala nkǝ bǝfi bǝtǝkǝ wǝ ubi ǝmǝ.

english_verse: Zechariah asked for a writing tablet. Then he wrote, “His name is John.” Everyone was amazed.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Sakaria léfo leba nǝ ǝsuǝ baawɔni asa kǝtǝkǝ nya ɔ́wɔni nkǝ, “Wǝ diye ni Yohanes.” Nya íyifo mǝmblɛ yanii.

english_verse: At once, Zechariah started speaking and praising God.
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo Sakaria étsyiko etiki budi nya ɔ́tɛsǝ Onanto.

english_verse: All the neighbors were frightened because of what had happened, and everywhere in the hill country people kept talking about these things.
translation_verse: Sikpi ǝmuǝ mba wonko mǝ nsi lǝ koyotsya nya ítǝ ditiki nǝmfo dísensǝ dísu kǝmǝ kpǝ lǝ Yudea eto atini ǝsuǝ mfó kenke.

english_verse: Everyone who heard about this wondered what this child would grow up to be. They knew the Lord was with him. Zechariah Praises the Lord
translation_verse: Betidi ba kenke lɛnɔ asa nyamfo etsyiko disi bubu katɔ mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nte utidi wǝ eto okle ubi ǝmfo luubǝ ofiani?” Itsyise ílǝkǝ ete wuee bǝ, Bonamute eto kɔni tǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Sakaria Ǝlǝkǝ Onanto Eto Katɛyikǝtsyǝ Óte.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit came upon Zechariah, and he began to speak:
translation_verse: Mfó nya Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ lɛyifǝ dísiǝ lǝ ubi ǝmǝ eto anto Sakaria ǝsuǝ nya údi Onanto etiki ɔ́tɛyi utsyǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: Praise the Lord, the God of Israel! He has come to save his people.
translation_verse: “Atɛsǝ itǝ Bonamute, Israel eto Onanto, itsyise úbǝ nkǝ woawunsǝko wǝ kuse nya lǝ ulǝkǝ mǝ.

english_verse: Our God has given us a mighty Savior from the family of David his servant.
translation_verse: Úlǝkǝ Ofomfokǝtǝ Kplɛ útǝ bo lǝ Oka David wǝǝ ni wǝ eto uyifoyifo eto kafo eto ubi.

english_verse: Long ago the Lord promised by the words of his holy prophets
translation_verse: Útsyǝ kɛnyɛ kamfó kokooko ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: to save us from our enemies and from everyone who hates us.
translation_verse: wuulǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ balo ku mba leekisi bo kenke eto ani.

english_verse: God said he would be kind to our people and keep his sacred promise.
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi útsyǝ nkǝ wuunyǝ bo banamǝ kaminsǝ nya wookloma kɛnyɛ ka ókle ku mǝ.

english_verse: He told our ancestor Abraham
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi bo anto Abraham kɛnyɛ klekle kamfo utsyǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: that he would rescue us from our enemies. Then we could serve him without fear,
translation_verse: wuulǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ bo balo eto ani, nya wookpe bo ǝsuǝale busumu wǝ sikpi manté manté.

english_verse: You, my son, will be called the prophet of God Most High. You will go ahead of the Lord to get everything ready for him.
translation_verse: Nya fǝ, mɔ ubi, bookpo fǝ bǝnkǝ Onanto wǝ nso kenke eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi. Ɛbɔtɔ̃ Onamute ǝmǝ eto bubǝ nya fɔɔlɔ kusu ǝtsyǝ itǝ wǝ.

english_verse: You will tell his people that they can be saved when their sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Nya ebutǝ wǝ betidi te bǝ boonyǝ bofokǝtǝ itsyise boofi mǝ abua batsyɛ mǝ.

english_verse: God's love and kindness will shine upon us like the sun that rises in the sky.
translation_verse: Bo Onanto kpe lefonǝ nya woabe bo ku kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ. Wuutǝ bofokǝtǝ eto diyǝnde bǝ itǝ bo itsyi kato.

english_verse: On us who live in the dark shadow of death this light will shine to guide us into a life of peace.
translation_verse: Nya wuutǝ diyǝnde nǝmfo nkǝ dibǝ ditǝ lekpasǝ itǝ mba nkpe lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ ku mba nkpe lǝ ukpǝ eto sikpitete ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ okpa bo ɔyɛnko udufǝnko diyuǝ eto kusu ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: As John grew up, God's Spirit gave him great power. John lived in the desert until the time he was sent to the people of Israel.
translation_verse: Nya ubi ǝmǝ lébe nya ɔkɛ ale lǝ ǝsuǝ ku lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya úsiǝ lǝ mfiminti isu ese lefe nǝ ɔ́bɔ úbǝ Israel eto kuse eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: About that time Emperor Augustus gave orders for the names of all the people to be listed in record books.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lefe nǝmfoo, Romamfɔ eto Okankplɛ Kaisare Augusto ǝtǝ ǝsuǝale nkǝ bawɔni betidi ba kenke nkpe lǝ Roma eto sekakedikɔ eto kasɔ eto aye.

english_verse: At this time a man named Simeon was living in Jerusalem. Simeon was a good man. He loved God and was waiting for him to save the people of Israel. God's Spirit came to him
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lefe nǝmfoo, osani utsyuǝ wǝ baakpo Simeon ákɛ lǝ Yerusalem. Nya úyifo utidi sɛɛ wǝ laate Onanto sikpi nya uńyǝ ɔnlɛ kusu bobe itǝ Israel eto bulǝkǝ. Nya Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ dísiǝko wǝ,

english_verse: These first records were made when Quirinius was governor of Syria.
translation_verse: Nya ni betidi eto aye wɔniwɔni tutɛ nɛ, lǝ Aba eto uninǝ wǝ baakpo Kirenio eto Sekadidi lǝ Siria eto kasɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Everyone had to go to their own hometown to be listed.
translation_verse: Nyaso utidi saa ésu wǝ umǝ lǝ usu ɔwɔni wǝ diye.

english_verse: So Joseph had to leave Nazareth in Galilee and go to Bethlehem in Judea. Long ago Bethlehem had been King David's hometown, and Joseph went there because he was from David's family.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfo nya Yosef tsya létaka útsyi Nasaret eto umǝ lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ úsu Betlehem eto umǝ lǝ Yudea eto kasɔ lǝ kaka bále Oka David. Yosef ésu mfó itsyise uyifo Oka David eto kafo eto ubi.

english_verse: Mary was engaged to Joseph and traveled with him to Bethlehem. She was soon going to have a baby,
translation_verse: Ókpa Maria wǝ bátɔ bǝtǝ wǝ nya ɔnlɛ kafo tsya ɔ́yɛnko nkǝ lǝ ɔwɔni wǝ diye.

english_verse: she gave birth to her first-born son. She dressed him in baby clothes and laid him on a bed of hay, because there was no room for them in the inn. The Shepherds
translation_verse: Óle wǝ ubi tutɛ wǝ ni osaibi lǝ diyo nǝ bebuki laalabe. Nya úfi kafia úmini wǝ, nya úfi wǝ ólabesǝ lǝ lesa nǝ ǝsuǝ bebuki bamfó leedi lesa, itsyise kasɔnɔkɔ mánkɛ lǝ bafɔ eto kedufǝkɔ. Onanto Eto Batɔnkpe Áboko Mba Laabe Basamu Kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ Eto Ditiki Sɛɛ.

english_verse: That night in the fields near Bethlehem some shepherds were guarding their sheep.
translation_verse: Lǝ kasɔ kamǝ ǝsuǝ mfóo, mba laabe basamu bǝtsyuǝ akɛ mfo kabe mǝ bebuki ketsye ka kenke.

english_verse: All at once an angel came down to them from the Lord, and the brightness of the Lord's glory flashed around them. The shepherds were frightened.
translation_verse: Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe utsyuǝ ǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte mǝ nya Onanto ǝmǝ eto diyǝnde ǝyǝnde ekpo mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ. Lǝ nyamfo eso bate sikpi tinti!

english_verse: But the angel said, “Don't be afraid! I have good news for you, which will make everyone happy.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Biante sikpi. Mboko mi Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ looboko disuǝyuǝ ku diyuǝ tinti itǝ betidi ba kenke.

english_verse: This very day in King David's hometown a Savior was born for you. He is Christ the Lord.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mmi eto diyi nǝmfoo, bále Ofomfokǝtǝ wǝ ni Bonamute Kristo bǝtǝ mi lǝ Oka David eto umǝ.

english_verse: You will know who he is, because you will find him dressed in baby clothes and lying on a bed of hay.”
translation_verse: Nya lesa nǝ biufi binyǝ bitsyǝ lekpoo, ni bǝ biunyǝ ubisambi wǝ béfi kafia bémli nya onlabe lǝ bebuki eto kedikɔ.”

english_verse: Suddenly many other angels came down from heaven and joined in praising God. They said:
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfo tutuutu, Onanto eto batɔnkpe eto ditsyukpa kplɛ lɔni étsyi kato díbǝ bǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ báte, nya bákɔ ku ɔtɔnkpe ɔni ǝmfó nya banlɛ Onanto bɔtɛsǝ katɛyi bǝnkǝ,

english_verse: “Praise God in heaven! Peace on earth to everyone who pleases God.”
translation_verse: “Dibu ku atɛsǝ itǝ Onanto wǝ nkpe kato fanlofanlo, nya diyuǝsǝ itǝ kasɔ eto betidi ba kenke lǝǝdufǝ Onanto ǝnǝ!”

english_verse: After the angels had left and gone back to heaven, the shepherds said to each other, “Let's go to Bethlehem and see what the Lord has told us about.”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto eto batɔnkpe bamfo dídu lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ bésinkli bésu katoo, mba laabe basamu bamǝ átɛyi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Bitǝ lǝ busu Betlehem lǝ busu bobe asa nnya díbǝ fe kase Boanto dílǝkǝ óte bo.”

english_verse: They hurried off and found Mary and Joseph, and they saw the baby lying on a bed of hay.
translation_verse: Nyaso bákɔse bésu nya bǝnyǝ Maria ku Yosef ku ubisambi wǝ nlabe lǝ bebuki eto kedikɔ mfó.

english_verse: When the shepherds saw Jesus, they told his parents what the angel had said about him.
translation_verse: Nya se bǝnyǝ wǝ nkoo, bátɛyi lesa saa nǝ Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi mǝ itsyi lǝ ubi ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But Mary kept thinking about all this and wondering what it meant.
translation_verse: Maria ákloma asa nyamfo kenke nya úkebu disi ketsyi lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ etsyo.

english_verse: As the shepherds returned to their sheep, they were praising God and saying wonderful things about him. Everything they had seen and heard was just as the angel had said.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfóo, se mba laabe basamu bamǝ dísinklii, bátɛsǝ Onanto lǝ lesa saa nǝ bánɔ ku bǝnyǝ tsya ǝsuǝ, itsyise nyamblɛ kenke ǝbǝ itǝ pɛpɛɛpɛ fe kase Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi mǝ. Bǝtǝkǝ Ubisambi Ǝmǝ Diye.

english_verse: Eight days later Jesus' parents did for him what the Law of Moses commands. And they named him Jesus, just as the angel had told Mary when he promised she would have a baby. Simeon Praises the Lord
translation_verse: Nya lǝ diyi mflamflale ǝsuǝ, se lefe léyo bǝ bala ubi ǝmǝ leloo, bǝtǝkǝ wǝ diye bǝnkǝ Yesu fe kase Onanto eto Ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi utsyǝ fɛ bálɛ wǝ kafo. Bákpa Yesu Bésuko Yudafɔ Eto Disumuyo.

english_verse: The time came for Mary and Joseph to do what the Law of Moses says a mother is supposed to do after her baby is born. They took Jesus to the temple in Jerusalem and presented him to the Lord,
translation_verse: Lefe áyo itǝ bǝ Yosef ku Maria yifo ǝsuǝ eto okla buflǝ eto lekpa fe kase Moses eto kɔfi lɛtɔ. Nyaso bákpa ubisambi ǝmǝ tsya bésuko Yerusalem bǝ lǝ befi wǝ bakpe Bonamute lǝ ani.

english_verse: just as the Law of the Lord says, “Each first-born baby boy belongs to the Lord.”
translation_verse: Nko ini báwɔni bǝtsyǝ lǝ Onanto eto kɔfi eto kukue ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Ubisaibi tutɛ ku ubuki sende tutɛ saa, ele bǝ bǝlǝkǝ wǝ bǝtsyǝ kutsyǝ befi bakpe Bonamute lǝ ani.”

english_verse: The Law of the Lord also says parents have to offer a sacrifice, giving at least a pair of doves or two young pigeons. So that is what Mary and Joseph did.
translation_verse: Nyaso bésu Yerusalem bǝ lǝ befi kedi bǝtǝ Bonamute lǝ kase kɔfi lɛtɔ ǝsuǝǝ, ablonima ǝnuǝ nye ablɛkpa ǝnuǝ beefi kǝtǝ kedi kamǝ.

english_verse: and told him that he would not die until he had seen Christ the Lord.
