translation_verse: nya lése wǝ uyi nkǝ weembukpǝ isu ese lefe nǝ eto lefe uunyǝ Onanto eto Nwǝ Bákpo Ɔhile Bǝtsyǝ, wǝ eto etiki Onanto lɛtɛyi utsyǝ.

english_verse: When Mary and Joseph brought Jesus to the temple to do what the Law of Moses says should be done for a new baby, the Spirit told Simeon to go into the temple.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfoo, Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝmǝ ákpa Simeon úsuko Yudafɔ eto Disumuyo mfó. Nya se anto ku ambe bamǝ lékpa ubisambi Yesu ǝmǝ bésukoo, bátɛyi bǝ bǝbǝ bǝ beyifo lesa saa nǝ ele bǝ beyifo bǝtǝ wǝ fe kase kɔfi létee,

english_verse: Simeon took the baby Jesus in his arms and praised God,
translation_verse: Simeon áfo ubisambi ǝmǝ ɔ́lɛ lǝ wǝ ani, nya ɔ́tɛsǝ Onanto ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ,

english_verse: “Lord, I am your servant, and now I can die in peace, because you have kept your promise to me.
translation_verse: “Boanto Onanto, mɔmɔɔ, se fékeyifo lǝ fǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, ebofo mɛ kusu bulǝkǝ, mɔ fǝ usumunyǝ, bǝ lǝ nsu lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: With my own eyes I have seen what you have done to save your people,
translation_verse: Mɔ kosate ébufi mɔ ǝnǝmi nnyǝ Ofomfokǝtǝ ǝmǝ

english_verse: and foreign nations will also see this.
translation_verse: fǝtǝ fǝ ubǝ lǝ kusǝ komǝ eto betidi kenke lǝ bǝnyǝ wǝ ku dinǝmi.

english_verse: Your mighty power is a light for all nations, and it will bring honor to your people Israel.”
translation_verse: Wǝ ni diyǝnde nǝ luulǝkǝ lesa nǝ faala lǝ lekple lete betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ. Nya wuufi dibu oboko fǝ kusǝ Israel eto betidi eto nti.”

english_verse: Jesus' parents were surprised at what Simeon had said.
translation_verse: Asa nnya Simeon lɛtɛyi mfo éyifo Yosef ku Maria yanii.

english_verse: Then he blessed them and told Mary, “This child of yours will cause many people in Israel to fall and others to stand. The child will be like a warning sign. Many people will reject him,
translation_verse: Nya Simeon lékpo mǝ atsyɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi ubi ǝmǝ eto ambe Maria nkǝ, “Ubi ǝmfo eyifo Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ. Nya wǝ ni Ofomfokǝtǝ nye budukanɔ itǝ Israel bebi kpǝ. Uyifo lekpotsyǝtsyǝ itsyi lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ, nya betidi kpǝ lootaka bǝnyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: and you, Mary, will suffer as though you had been stabbed by a dagger. But all this will show what people are really thinking.” Anna Speaks about the Child Jesus
translation_verse: Nya wuutǝ nkǝ betidi kpǝ lǝkǝ mǝ nsusu bo bakula bate utsyuǝ saa nyǝ. Nya ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ esoo, ebunyǝ kanyi fe kase lesiabi laase utidi eto utu kedunsǝ.”

english_verse: At this time Anna came in and praised God. She spoke about the child Jesus to everyone who hoped for Jerusalem to be set free. The Return to Nazareth
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfó tutuutuu, wuntsya ǝbǝ ɔ́sɔ Onanto ani, nya ɔ́tɛyi itsyi lǝ ubi ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ útǝ betidi ba kenke ńyǝ banlɛ Onanto kusu bobe bǝ wuulǝkǝ Yerusalem. Bésinkli Bésu Nasaret.

english_verse: After Joseph and Mary had done everything that the Law of the Lord commands, they returned home to Nazareth in Galilee.
translation_verse: Nya se Yosef ku Maria lélosǝ mǝ lekpa nǝmǝ buyifo fe kase Onanto eto kɔfi letee, bésinkli bésu mǝ umǝ Nasaret lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ.

english_verse: The child Jesus grew. He became strong and wise, and God blessed him. The Boy Jesus in the Temple
translation_verse: Ubi ǝmǝ ábe ɔ́bɔ disi nya ɔ́kɛ ǝsuǝale, nya óte kobe tinti. Nya Onanto dínyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Yesu Ésu Yudafɔ Eto Disumuyo.

english_verse: And when Jesus was twelve years old, they all went there as usual for the celebration.
translation_verse: Nyaso se Yesu léfo lefosi alɛ ǝnuǝǝ, bési bésu Yerusalem fe kase békeyifo kɔ seka.

english_verse: After Passover his parents left, but they did not know that Jesus had stayed on in the city.
translation_verse: Nya se bédi diyi nǝmǝ bálosǝ nya banlɛ businkli kesu mǝ umǝǝ, Yesu wǝ esi ɔ́kɛ kama lǝ Yerusalem mfó. Fɛɛ wǝ anto ku ambe mánte nko.

english_verse: They thought he was traveling with some other people, and they went a whole day before they started looking for him.
translation_verse: Mǝ ébu bǝnkǝ ɔkɛ lǝ betidi bamǝ nti nyaso bédu báyɛ diyi wɔlɔlɔlɔ eto kusu fɛ bétsyiko wǝ bɔbɛbɛ lǝ bahɔ ku batokpenyǝ nti.

english_verse: When they could not find him with their relatives and friends, they went back to Jerusalem and started looking for him there.
translation_verse: Nya se bǝnnyǝ wǝ esoo, bésinkli bésu Yerusalem bésu balɛ wǝ bɔbɛbɛ.

english_verse: Three days later they found Jesus sitting in the temple, listening to the teachers and asking them questions.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝǝ, bésu bǝnyǝ wǝ lǝ Yudafɔ eto Disumuyo kaka wǝ ku Yudafɔ eto bateasa nsi. Mfó úsiǝ ɔnlɛ mǝ asa nnya bánlɛ bɔtɛyi ato butsyue nya ɔnlɛ mǝ etiki bɔtɔ lɔni lɔni kanɔ.

english_verse: Everyone who heard him was surprised at how much he knew and at the answers he gave.
translation_verse: Nya mba lɛnɔ asa nnya díkabɔ lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛɛ, íyifo mǝ yanii lǝ wǝ asa kasɔnɔnɔ kpǝ ku kase úfi ɔnlɛ asa nnya bátɔ wǝ kasɔ bulǝkǝ eso.

english_verse: When his parents found him, they were amazed. His mother said, “Son, why have you done this to us? Your father and I have been very worried, and we have been searching for you!”
translation_verse: Íyifo wǝ anto ku ambǝ mǝ yanii se bǝnyǝ wǝ lǝ mfo nko. Nya wǝ ambe lɛtɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Ubi, ntsyǝso féyifo bo nyamfo eto okle? Mɔ ku fǝ nto kenke ákɛ lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ nya búsu bɔnlɛ botsyilama kabɛbɛ fǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Why did you have to look for me? Didn't you know that I would be in my Father's house?”
translation_verse: Mfo nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ ɔ́tɔ nkǝ, “Beso ibǝ bǝ bísu bɛlɛ botsyilama kabɛbɛ mɛ? Binyi biǝ mɔ Anto eto diyo ele bǝ nkɛ lee?”

english_verse: But they did not understand what he meant.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mǝǝ, bánnɔ lesa nǝ ɔ́tɛyi mǝ mfó eto kasɔ.

english_verse: Jesus went back to Nazareth with his parents and obeyed them. His mother kept on thinking about all that had happened.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝkǝko mǝ nya bédu bésu Nasaret, nya óbokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ útǝ mǝ. Nya asa nyamfo kenke lɛkɛ lǝ wǝ ambe eto nsusu kǝmiǝ ɛɛyɛ etsyo.

english_verse: Jesus became wise, and he grew strong. God was pleased with him and so were the people.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lebe ɔ́bɔ disi lǝ kobetete ku lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ǝsuǝ, nya ófo diye lǝ betidi kenke ku lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: When tax collectors came to be baptized, they asked John, “Teacher, what should we do?”
translation_verse: Mba laafo umǝnko bǝtsyuǝ tsya ǝbǝ bǝ bǝflǝsǝ mǝ ntu. Bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, be ele bǝ buyifo?”

english_verse: Do something to show that you really have given up your sins. Don't start saying you belong to Abraham's family. God can turn these stones into children for Abraham.
translation_verse: Bete lǝ mi eyifosa ǝsuǝ biǝnkǝ bɛtsyi bɛwuninsǝ lǝ mi abua ǝsuǝ. Nya biembu biǝ se ini Abraham eto befluflu bini esoo, Onanto embunǝ mi koto. Bɛlɔ bɛnɔ biǝ Onanto ebofo befluflu bulǝkǝ ketsyiko aba nyamfo ǝsuǝ kǝtǝ Abraham.

english_verse: But to Herod the ruler, he said, “It was wrong for you to take Herodias, your brother's wife.” John also said Herod had done many other bad things.
translation_verse: Nya se Oka Herodes wǝ ni Aba eto Unyɛsiǝ lɛlɛ wǝ ɔyimi eto usiǝ wǝ baakpo Herodia ófo lǝ ǝsuǝale ku lǝ asa bua kpǝ nya úyifo esoo, Yohanes ǝnyǝnki okpe wǝ.

english_verse: Isaiah the prophet wrote about John when he said, “In the desert someone is shouting, ‘Get the road ready for the Lord! Make a straight path for him.
translation_verse: Nya nko seka ini báwɔni lǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yesaya eto kukue banlɛ bɔtɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Utidi utsyuǝ kpe lǝ mfiminti ɔlɛ bofa katɛyi nkǝ, ‘Bińyǝ bikabe kusu itǝ Bonamute. Bimuǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyǝ kukɔnɔ itǝ wǝ bubǝ.

english_verse: Fill up every valley and level every mountain and hill. Straighten the crooked paths and smooth out the rough roads.
translation_verse: Biti okplo saa okplo nya beba atini ku akpenkpe kenke bekatesǝ. Lǝ bɛtsyɔnsǝ esu nya lebo. Nya nlebe bo diyifo kplobi kplobii, biyifo mu tsyɛtsyɛtsyɛ.

english_verse: Then everyone will see the saving power of God.’ ”
translation_verse: Nya betidi kenke luunyǝ Ofomfokǝtǝ wǝ Onanto letsyese nɛ!’ ”

english_verse: Crowds of people came out to be baptized, but John said to them, “You bunch of snakes! Who warned you to run from the coming judgment?
translation_verse: Betidi kpǝ ǝbǝ bǝ Yohanes flǝsǝ mǝ ntu. Fɛɛ Yohanes átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mi mba nte fe bawa eto befluflu! Owoe lɛlɛ mi kɔlɛ nkǝ bitsyetsyi lǝ Onanto eto kotonǝnǝ ko nlɛ bubǝ eto kɛnyɛ?

english_verse: The crowds asked John, “What should we do?”
translation_verse: Nyaso betidi bamǝ átɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛɛ, be ele bǝ buyifo mɔmɔ?”

english_verse: Some soldiers asked him, “And what about us? What do we have to do?” John told them, “Don't force people to pay money to make you leave them alone. Be satisfied with your pay.”
translation_verse: Bamamanyǝ bǝtsyuǝ tsya átɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nya bo nkpǝ? Be ele bǝ buyifo?” Mfó ɔ́tɛyi mǝ tsya nkǝ, “Bitǝ lǝ mi kayo ka banlɛ mi bofo lǝ kemi mi. Nya lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, biensu bɛnyinkǝ utidi kuutsyuǝ bekpe lǝ ǝsuǝale lǝ befo wǝ atabi saa, nye bela utidi kuutsyuǝ kɛnyɛ lǝ kusu bua ǝsuǝ belo wǝ dikpi.”

english_verse: John said, “I am just baptizing with water. But someone more powerful is going to come, and I am not good enough even to untie his sandals. He will baptize you with the Holy Spirit and with fire.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yohanes ákpasǝ mǝmblɛ nkǝ, “Mɔɔ, ntu ete meefi kǝflǝsǝ mi. Fɛɛ utidi utsyuǝ tǝkǝ mɛ kama ɔlɛ bubǝ wǝ lɛmɔ nya onkpe ǝsuǝale onso mɛ famfamfa! Mǝńyǝ tsya kon ntǝ bǝ mbǝ kasɔ miǝ maanyankli wǝ afokpa eto kekue lǝ akpa ǝsuǝ ntǝ wǝ tsya. Nya utidi ǝmfo ebufi Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ku uté uflǝsǝ mi fe ntu.

english_verse: In many different ways John preached the good news to the people.
translation_verse: Nya Yohanes lídi betidi Anantotiki lǝ esu kpǝ ǝsuǝ, nya ɔ́lɛ mǝ kɔlɛ nkǝ batsyi mǝ ditsyǝbi ku mǝ nkpǝ bo bensi bawuninsǝ.

english_verse: Finally, Herod put John in jail, and this was the worst thing he had done. The Baptism of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Idu ɛkɔ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, útǝ bǝmuǝ Yohanes béti bákpe lǝ diyo. Yohanes Ǝflǝsǝ Yesu Ntu.

english_verse: While everyone else was being baptized, Jesus himself was baptized. Then as he prayed, the sky opened up,
translation_verse: Se Yohanes díflǝsǝ betidi kenke ntu ólosǝǝ, úflǝsǝ Yesu tsya ntu. Nya se Yesu nlɛ ola botoo, kato ásini.

english_verse: and the Holy Spirit came down upon him in the form of a dove. A voice from heaven said, “You are my own dear Son, and I am pleased with you.” The Ancestors of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝ eto ditsyǝbi nte fe lɛblɛkpaa, áyifǝ díbǝ dísiǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Mfó nya bánɔ Onanto eto ɔkɔɛ wǝ dítsyi kato díkatɛyi nkǝ, “Fǝ ni mɔ Ubi lala. Fǝ asa eedufǝ mɛ ǝnǝ tinti.” Nyǝ Betidi Bamfo Ni Yesu Eto Bana.

english_verse: Enosh, and Seth. The family of Jesus went all the way back to Adam and then to God.
translation_verse: wǝ eto anto ni Enos wǝ eto anto ni Set wǝ eto anto ni Adam wǝ eto anto ni Onanto.

english_verse: After the sun had set, people with all kinds of diseases were brought to Jesus. He put his hands on each one of them and healed them.
translation_verse: Nya se kofe nlɛ diyo budufǝǝ, bákpa befimfi ba nlɛ bufi ate ate kenke báboko Yesu ɔflɔ. Nya úfi ani útǝkǝ mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ ɔni, ɔni nya ótsya mǝmblɛ bufi.

english_verse: The devil said to Jesus, “If you are God's Son, tell this stone to turn into bread.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Obonsam lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ Onanto eto Ubi fenii, tɛyi lebambi nǝmfo lǝ efiani didisa.”

english_verse: Then the devil led Jesus up to a high place and quickly showed him all the nations on earth.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, Obonsam esi ókpa wǝ úsuko kaka letaka fanlofanlo. Nya óte wǝ kawunsiǝ eto asa ku nnya sekakedikɔ kenke lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Just worship me, and you can have it all.”
translation_verse: Nyaso asa nyamfo kenke ebofiani fǝ ale lǝ akpe disi kasɔ esumu mɛ.”

english_verse: Finally, the devil took Jesus to Jerusalem and had him stand on top of the temple. The devil said, “If you are God's Son, jump off.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Obonsam ákpa Yesu úsuko Yerusalem lǝ Yudafɔ eto Disumuyo eto kaka nso botaka nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ Onanto eto ubi fenii, yani fǝ ǝsuǝ ǝbǝ asɔ lǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: He taught in the Jewish synagogues, and everyone praised him. The People of Nazareth Turn against Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Óte asa lǝ Yudafɔ eto ntsyakɔ nya utidi saa lɛtɛsǝ wǝ asatete. Báni Yesu Lǝ Nasaret.

english_verse: Jesus went back to Nazareth, where he had been brought up, and as usual he went to the synagogue on the Sabbath. When he stood up to read from the Scriptures,
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfó eto kamaa, Yesu ésu Nasaret eto umǝ wǝ úsiǝ óbe. Nya lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyii, úsu Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ fe kase woala buyifo. Nya ótaka úńyǝ nkǝ lǝ okla asa lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: “The Lord's Spirit has come to me, because he has chosen me to tell the good news to the poor. The Lord has sent me to announce freedom for prisoners, to give sight to the blind, to free everyone who suffers,
translation_verse: “Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ si mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ, bédiki mɛ nnuǝbi, itsyise úlǝkǝ mɛ nkǝ mfó Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo mboko bakombo. Nya ótsyese mɛ nkǝ nsu mbe bulǝkǝ eto letsya ntǝ betidi ba bǝmuǝ bakpe lǝ diyo. Nya mba eto ǝnǝmi lébaa, lǝ bǝnyǝ asa. Nya betidi ba báyinkǝ bakpe lǝ kasɔ nlɛ kanyi bunyǝ, lǝ bǝnyǝ bɔbɔkafe.

english_verse: and to say, ‘This is the year the Lord has chosen.’ ”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ ntǝ lǝ bate bǝ Onanto eto lefe nǝ wuulǝkǝ wǝ betidi eboyo.”

english_verse: Jesus closed the book, then handed it back to the man in charge and sat down. Everyone in the synagogue looked straight at Jesus.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu díti kukue ko mǝ, nya úsinkli ko útǝ wǝ ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ nya úsiǝ kasɔ. Betidi bamǝ kenke éfi mǝ ǝnǝmi bǝtǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ nya bǝńyǝ banlɛ wǝ bobe kpoo.

english_verse: All the people started talking about Jesus and were amazed at the wonderful things he said. They kept on asking, “Isn't he Joseph's son?”
translation_verse: Nya wǝ etiki nnya údi ǝmuǝ mǝ lǝ utu tinti nya kase odiakami tsya létaka wǝ mlǝmlǝmlǝǝ, ǝtǝ iyifo mǝ yanii. Nya bátɔ mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Inni Yosef eto ubi ni nwǝ mfo, fɛɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: You will certainly want to tell me this saying, “Doctor, first make yourself well.” You will tell me to do the same things here in my own hometown that you heard I did in Capernaum.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nyi miǝ biɔtɛyi mɛ lekpa lǝ nnya minlɛ bɔtɛyi mfo ǝsuǝ biǝ, ‘Ofate, tsya fǝ ǝsuǝ.’ Nya binsi biɔtɛyi mɛ tsya biǝ, ‘Asa nnya eto okle bɔ́nɔ bǝ éyifo lǝ Kapernaum, yifo nnya lǝ fǝ kosate eto umǝ mfo tsya.’ ”

english_verse: But you can be sure that no prophets are liked by the people of their own hometown.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu disi ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Fɛɛ nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ, bǝǝntǝ Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi kuutsyuǝ dibu lǝ wǝ kosate eto umǝ.

english_verse: Once during the time of Elijah there was no rain for three and a half years, and people everywhere were starving. There were many widows in Israel,
translation_verse: Ɛkpɛ ini bǝ bakɔbǝsiǝ kpǝ ákɛ lǝ Israel eto kasɔ lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Elia lɛkɛ. Nya ɔsɔmi lɛyɛ bɔni itǝ alɛ ǝtsyǝ ku kutsyǝ. Nya kukpɛnsɛ kplɛ díbǝ lǝ kasɔ kamǝ kenke ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: but Elijah was sent only to a widow in the town of Zarephath near the city of Sidon.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto mánkpe Elia kɔtɔ nkǝ usu kutsyuǝ saa ɔflɔ lǝ Israel, enso ɔkɔsiǝ utsyuǝ lǝ Sarep eto umǝ lǝ Sidon eto kasɔ.

english_verse: During the time of the prophet Elisha, many men in Israel had leprosy. But no one was healed, except Naaman who lived in Syria.
translation_verse: Nya tsyaa, betidi kpǝ ákɛ ba díkefi bufisia lǝ Israel eto kasɔ lǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Elisa eto lefe. Fɛɛ wántsya mǝ kuutsyuǝ enso Naeman wǝ ditsyi Siria eto kasɔ mate hã.”

english_verse: But Jesus slipped through the crowd and got away. A Man with an Evil Spirit (Mark
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu áyɛ lǝ mǝ nti ɔ́bɔ údu. Yesu Ála Lɛwɔnɔ Bua Lǝ Utidi Utsyuǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus went to the town of Capernaum in Galilee and taught the people on the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu édu úsu Kapernaum eto umǝ lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ. Mfó nya útsyiko betidi asa bote lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: His teaching amazed them because he spoke with power.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ wǝ etikididi ku ǝsuǝale esoo, wǝ asatete éyifo betidi bamǝ yanii.

english_verse: There in the synagogue was a man with an evil spirit. He yelled out,
translation_verse: Osani utsyuǝ ákɛ lǝ Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ mfó wǝ ǝsuǝ lɛwɔnɔ bua dísiǝ. Nya ófa ku ɔkɔɛ bembembe ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ,

english_verse: Jesus ordered the evil spirit to be quiet and come out. The demon threw the man to the ground in front of everyone and left without harming him.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu léla Lɛwɔnɔ bua nǝmǝ ɔ́bɔsǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Yɛ kudu bokpo! Lǝ abɔ lǝ utidi ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ!” Lɛwɔnɔ bua nǝmǝ étsyi osani ǝmǝ ɔ́sɔ lǝ kasɔ lǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi, nya lɛbɔ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ dídu. Fɛɛ utidi ǝmǝ mámfo lefabe saa.

english_verse: They all were amazed and kept saying to each other, “What kind of teaching is this? He has power to order evil spirits out of people!”
translation_verse: Iyifo betidi bamfó kenke yanii nya bátɔ bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nte etiki nnya eto okle ni nyamfo? Utidi ǝmfo kpe ǝsuǝle nya wǝǝkumi kakpe awɔnɔ bua kǝlǝkǝ lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: News about Jesus spread all over that part of the country. Jesus Heals Many People (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya asa nnya bátɛyi lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ mfóo, dísensǝ ɛyɛ ísu kuse komfó kenke. Yesu Átsya Betidi Kpǝ.

english_verse: Jesus left the synagogue and went to Simon's home. When Jesus got there, he was told that Simon's mother-in-law was sick with a high fever.
translation_verse: Yesu édu lǝ Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ mfó úsu Simen eto diyo. Atikesi ǝmuǝ Simon eto usiǝambe élabesǝ kekleke. Nya bǝtǝ Yesu léte.

english_verse: So Jesus went over to her and ordered the fever to go away. Right then she was able to get up and serve them a meal.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, úsu úńyǝ lɛ wǝ ɔflɔ lǝ wǝ kalabekɔ, nya óla bufi bomǝ úlǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya lefe nǝ bufi bomǝ lɛyɛ wǝǝ, ótaka nya útsyiko lesa bonwa kǝtǝ mǝ.

english_verse: Demons went out of many people and shouted, “You are the Son of God!” But Jesus ordered the demons not to speak because they knew he was the Messiah.
translation_verse: Awɔnɔ bua kpǝ eto kakle tsya ábɔ lǝ betidi kpǝ ǝsuǝ nya báfa bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Fǝ ni Onanto eto Ubi kosate ǝmǝ!” Fɛɛ Yesu éti awɔnɔ bua nyamǝ kusu nya wǝntǝ kusu nkǝ batɛyi kulesa, itsyise béyi bǝ wǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ. Yesu Áte Asa Ótsyilama.

english_verse: The next morning Jesus went out to a place where he could be alone, and crowds came looking for him. When they found him, they tried to stop him from leaving.
translation_verse: Se kale disiǝǝ, Yesu édu lǝ umǝ ǝmfó úsu kaka lɛbiɔ. Mfó nya betidi dítsyiko wǝ bɔbɛbɛ katsyilama. Nya se bǝnyǝ wǝǝ, bákplatsya bǝ lǝ ɔyɛ budu lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “People in other towns must hear the good news about God's kingdom. This is why I was sent.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Ele bǝ nsu ndi etiki lǝ kǝmǝ bamba tsya itsyi lǝ Onanto eto Sekakedidi ǝsuǝ, itsyise nyamfo eso Onanto létsyese mɛ nɛ.”

english_verse: So he kept on preaching in the synagogues in Judea.
translation_verse: Nyaso údi Anantotiki lǝ Yudafɔ eto ntsyakɔ kenke lǝ kasɔ kamǝ.

english_verse: But Jesus would often go to some place where he could be alone and pray. Jesus Heals a Man Who Could Not Walk (Matthew
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ɔ́kabɔ kesu kaka lɛbiɔ úsu úkato ola. Yesu Átsya Nwǝ Léba Ónkpo Kasɔ.

english_verse: When Jesus saw how much faith they had, he said to the man, “My friend, your sins are forgiven.”
translation_verse: Nya se Yesu dínyǝ mǝ bofokanɔ esoo, ɔ́tɛyi utidi ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Osani, mfi fǝ abua ntsyɛ fǝ!”

english_verse: Jesus got into the boat that belonged to Simon and asked him to row it out a little way from the shore. Then Jesus sat down in the boat to teach the crowd.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lébe údufǝ lǝ Simon eto ole kafo, nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, onwa ɔklɔ ǝmǝ usuko ntu bomǝ ǝsuǝ sɛkɛ. Yesu ǝsiǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafo nya óte betidi bamǝ asa.

english_verse: “Master,” Simon answered, “we have worked hard all night long and have not caught a thing. But if you tell me to, I will let the nets down.”
translation_verse: Nya Simon dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Bonamute, ketsye kamfo kenke búyifo keyifo kekleke tsya bóǝnlǝkǝ kulesa. Fɛɛ lǝ kase fátɛyi esoo, muutǝ lǝ bota asabu nyamǝ.”

english_verse: They did this and caught so many fish that their nets began ripping apart.
translation_verse: Se báta asabu nyamǝǝ, bǝlǝkǝ akpɛ kpǝ itǝ bǝ asabu nyamǝ étsyiko bola.

english_verse: Then they signaled for their partners in the other boat to come and help them. The men came, and together they filled the two boats so full that they both began to sink.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, básɔ ani bákpadi mǝ bǝtsyuǝ ba nkpe lǝ ɔklɔ nuǝfǝ bátɛyi bǝnkǝ bǝbǝ bawunsǝko mǝ. Bǝbǝ nya bǝnǝ asabu nyamǝ bǝlǝsǝ nya binǝ biamǝ díyi kaklɔ inuǝ kamǝ kinkinki ibu sɛkɛ lǝ kanya kedufǝ lǝ ntu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: His partners James and John, the sons of Zebedee, were surprised too. Jesus told Simon, “Don't be afraid! From now on you will bring in people instead of fish.”
translation_verse: Nko ke íyifo Simon eto bayɛtsyuǝ, Yakobo ku Yohanes ba ni Sebedeo eto bebi tsya nɛ. Mfó ǝmǝ nya Yesu lɛtɛyi Simon nkǝ, “Mante sikpi. Idu mɔmɔ ɛntɔɔ, mfe betidi fuukǝlǝkǝ.”

english_verse: The men pulled their boats up on the shore. Then they left everything and went with Jesus. Jesus Heals a Man (Matthew
translation_verse: Se báyo ditukpenkpee, báyani lesa saa bǝtsyǝ nya bédu bǝtǝkǝko Yesu. Yesu Átsya Ufimfi Utsyuǝ Wǝ Nlɛ Bufisia Bufi.

english_verse: News about Jesus kept spreading. Large crowds came to listen to him teach and to be healed of their diseases.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu eto etiki nyamfo ésensǝ ɛyɛ etsyo. Nya betidi kpǝ díbǝ bǝ lǝ banɔ wǝ asatete nya lǝ ótsya mǝ bufi bo nlɛ mǝ bulǝ.

english_verse: But because of the crowd, they could not get him to Jesus. So they went up on the roof, where they removed some tiles and let the mat down in the middle of the room.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi bamǝ eto etu esoo, bámfo kusu bunyǝ. Nko esoo, bétsyi wǝ báyɛnko lǝ diyo eto letsya. Nya bǝlǝkǝ ofo lǝ letsya ǝsuǝ nya báyifǝsǝ wǝ ku wǝ belabekǝ bǝtsyǝ lǝ kasɔ lǝ Yesu eto ǝnǝmi lǝ betidi bamǝ eto nti lǝ diyo kafo mfó.

english_verse: Is it easier for me to tell this man that his sins are forgiven or to tell him to get up and walk?
translation_verse: Nte nnya nso buyuǝ ku bɔtɛyi, ‘Befi fǝ abua bátsyǝ fǝ,’ lee ‘Taka ǝńyǝ lǝ ayɛ edu’?

english_verse: But now you will see that the Son of Man has the right to forgive sins here on earth.” Jesus then said to the man, “Get up! Pick up your mat and walk home.”
translation_verse: Muulǝkǝ nte mi miǝ Utidi Eto Ubi kpe ǝsuǝale lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo bǝ ufi abua ɔtsyɛ.” Nyaso ɔ́tsyi ɔ́wuninsǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi nwǝ léba oonkpo kasɔ nkǝ, “Nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi minkǝ taka lǝ efi fǝ okla lǝ esu diyo!”

english_verse: At once the man stood up in front of everyone. He picked up his mat and went home, giving thanks to God.
translation_verse: Mfo ǝmǝǝ, osani ǝmǝ átaka uńyǝ lǝ betidi bamǝ eto ǝnǝmi nya úfi wǝ okla, nya údu ɔ́ntɔ lǝ diyo ɔnlɛ Onanto bɔtɛsǝ.

english_verse: Everyone was amazed and praised God. What they saw surprised them, and they said, “We have seen a great miracle today!” Jesus Chooses Levi (Matthew
translation_verse: Nyamfó éyifo betidi bamfó kenke yanii! Nya se sikpi dímuǝ mǝmblɛ kenke lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ esoo, bátɛsǝ Onanto nya bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Nte ayanisa nnya búnyǝ mfo mmi mǝǝ?” Yesu Ákpadi Lewi.

english_verse: Later, Jesus went out and saw a tax collector named Levi sitting at the place for paying taxes. Jesus said to him, “Follow me.”
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu ábɔ útsyi lǝ diyo nǝmǝ kafo nya únyǝ utsyuǝ wǝ laafo umǝnko wǝ baakpo Lewi nkpe lǝ wǝ keyifokɔ. Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Taka lǝ ǝtǝkǝko mɛ.”

english_verse: Levi left everything and went with Jesus.
translation_verse: Lewi áyani lesa saa útsyǝ nya ótaka útǝkǝko wǝ.

english_verse: In his home Levi gave a big dinner for Jesus. Many tax collectors and other guests were also there.
translation_verse: Lewi ǝtǝ bánwa lesa kǝn nya úfi útsyue ɔpunu ókpe Yesu disuǝyuǝ lǝ wǝ diyo. Nya betidi kpǝ díbǝ mfó ku mba laafo umǝnko tsya.

english_verse: The Pharisees and some of their teachers of the Law of Moses grumbled to Jesus' disciples, “Why do you eat and drink with these tax collectors and other sinners?”
translation_verse: Farisifɔ ku afi eto bateasa ba díbǝ katsyakɔ mfó étsyiko etiki bunǝ ku Yesu eto bakasebi katɛyi bǝ, “Beso biedi kǝnǝ ku mba laafo umǝnko ku babuayifo bamfo?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Healthy people don't need a doctor, but sick people do.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Betidi ba nkpe ǝsuǝale manhiã ofanyǝ enso mba ni Onanto hã.

english_verse: I didn't come to invite good people to turn to God. I came to invite sinners.” People Ask about Going without Eating (Matthew
translation_verse: Mǝmbǝ miǝ mǝǝbǝ nlǝkǝ betidi sɛɛ, bomu babuayifo eso mímbǝ.” Yesu Édi Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Kɛnyɛklekle Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Some people said to Jesus, “John's followers often pray and go without eating, and so do the followers of the Pharisees. But your disciples never go without eating or drinking.”
translation_verse: Betidi bǝtsyuǝ átɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Ntsyǝ ibǝ bǝ Yohanes eto bakasebi aakle kɛnyɛ nya baato ola, nya mba ntǝkǝko Farisifɔ tsya leeyifo nko, fɛɛ fǝ bale leedi kǝnǝ lefe saa?”

english_verse: Jesus told them, “The friends of a bridegroom don't go without eating while he is still with them.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Bubu bibu biǝnkǝ baklobo ebofo kɛnyɛ bokle lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe okafɔsǝ ǝmǝ nkpe lǝ mǝ lenti? Kulefe! Yembubǝ itǝ nkomǝ!

english_verse: But the time will come when he will be taken from them. Then they will go without eating.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ diyi ditsyuǝ ebubǝ ni lefe nǝ bookpa okafɔsǝ ǝmǝ bedunko lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ. Nya lǝ lefe nǝmfó ǝsuǝǝ, insini utidi saa luubǝ ɔtɛyi mǝ fɛ bookle kɛnyɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus then told them these sayings: No one uses a new piece of cloth to patch old clothes. The patch would shrink and make the hole even bigger.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi mǝ lekpa nǝmfo nkǝ, “Utidi kuutsyuǝ embofuadi kafia fɔfɔ ufi otale kakoko. Lǝ utsyuǝ éyifo nkoo, ebunyǝ fǝ obiasǝ kafia fɔfɔ kamǝ. Nya kakoko kamfó tsya ku kafɔfɔ kamǝ ǝmbɔlɛkɛ itǝ boka kǝtǝkǝ lǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: No one pours new wine into old wineskins. The new wine would swell and burst the old skins. Then the wine would be lost, and the skins would be ruined.
translation_verse: Nya bemfi nte fɔfɔ kakpo lǝ kubukikuetobe. Lenni nkoo, nte fɔfɔ bomǝ ebɔkpɔ bobe kato nnya luutǝ kubukikuetobe komǝ la nya nte bomǝ tsya luuwui buyifo nsɔsɔ.

english_verse: New wine must be put only into new wineskins.
translation_verse: Nyasoo, ntǝ fɔfɔ beefi kakpo lǝ kubukikuetobe fɔfɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: No one wants new wine after drinking old wine. They say, “The old wine is better.”
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔ tsyaa, utidi kuutsyuǝ ǝnnǝ nte koko kesi kala nkǝ wǝǝnǝ mfɔfɔ lamfolamfo, etsyisee, wɔɔtɛyi nkǝ, ‘Ntutɛ, bo ni nkokoo, alɛkɛ boso!’ ”

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking, so he told the man to stand up where everyone could see him. And the man stood up.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se Yesu dínyǝ mǝ nsusu utsyǝ lekpo esoo, ɔ́tɛyi osani ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Taka ǝńyǝ, lǝ abɔ ǝbǝ sɛtɔ mfo.” Nya osani ǝmǝ létaka úbǝ úńyǝ lǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Some Pharisees said, “Why are you picking grain on the Sabbath? You're not supposed to do that!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Farisifɔ bǝtsyuǝ lɛtɔ mǝ bǝnkǝ, “Beso bɛnlɛ lesa nǝ bo kɔfi dimǝntǝ bo kusu nkǝ buyifo lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi ǝsuǝ buyifo?”

english_verse: Long ago your own people did these same things to the prophets. So when this happens to you, be happy and jump for joy! You will have a great reward in heaven.
translation_verse: “Binyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ nyamfo kenke ǝbǝ, lǝ biwi kewi ku disuǝyuǝ, itsyise Onanto ebutǝ mi kayofofo kplɛ lǝ Onanto eto oto kato. Itsyise asa nyamfo eto okle mǝ bana díyifo Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ba lɛkɛ kɔ kenke nɛ.

english_verse: Ask God to bless anyone who curses you, and pray for everyone who is cruel to you.
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba leekudi mii, bekpo mǝ atsyɔ. Nya betidi ba laalo fǝ sɛsi nye beeyifo disialee, to ola lǝ mǝ disi.

english_verse: Then Jesus asked, “On the Sabbath should we do good deeds or evil deeds? Should we save someone's life or destroy it?”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Be kɔfi dítǝ bo kusu nkǝ buyifo lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi ǝsuǝ? Ɛlɛkɛ bǝ buyifo kasɛɛ lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi lee bǝ buyifo kabua? Nye, ɛlɛkɛ bǝ bafo utidi lǝ nkpǝ lee babiasǝ mu bomu?”

english_verse: One was Simon, and Jesus named him Peter. Another was Andrew, Peter's brother. There were also James, John, Philip, Bartholomew,
translation_verse: Mǝ ni Simon wǝ útǝkǝ diye nkǝ Petro ku wǝ ɔyimi Andreas ku Yakobo, Yohanes ku Filipo ku Bartolomeo,

english_verse: On another Sabbath Jesus was teaching in a synagogue, and a man with a paralyzed right hand was there.
translation_verse: Lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi bamba ǝsuǝǝ, Yesu ésu Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ nya ɔnlɛ asa bote. Osani utsyuǝ ákɛ mfó wǝ eto kodiani díkpǝ konyoma.

english_verse: The teachers and the Pharisees were furious and started saying to one another, “What can we do about Jesus?” Jesus Chooses His Twelve Apostles (Matthew
translation_verse: Nyaso mǝmblɛ kenke éyenki ku lɛblɔfi nya bétsyiko nsusu bufi lǝ lesa nǝ boofo Yesu buyifo ǝsuǝ. Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Lefosi Batɔnkpe Inuǝ Bamǝ.

english_verse: The next morning he called his disciples together and chose twelve of them to be his apostles.
translation_verse: Se kale dísiǝǝ, ókpadi wǝ bakasebi kenke útsyǝ nya úlǝkǝ lefosi inuǝ ba útǝkǝ diye nkǝ wǝ Batɔnkpe.

english_verse: Everyone was trying to touch Jesus, because power was going out from him and healing them all. Blessings and Troubles (Matthew
translation_verse: Betidi bamfo kenke ákplatsya bǝ lǝ betidi Yesu lǝ mǝ efimbi lǝ ɛyɛ mǝ, itsyise ǝsuǝale ǝtsyuǝ eto okle ákabɔ ketsyi lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ nnya díkatsya betidi bamǝ kenke. Atsyɔkpokpo Itǝ Bǝtsyuǝ Ku Kanyinyǝnyǝ Itǝ Bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Matthew, Thomas, and James the son of Alphaeus. The rest of the apostles were Simon, known as the Eager One,
translation_verse: ku Mateo ku Tomas, ku Alfeo eto ubi Yakobo ku Simon wǝ baakpo bǝ utidi wǝ laakpɔ kǝtǝ wǝ umǝ

english_verse: Jude, who was the son of James, and Judas Iscariot, who later betrayed Jesus. Jesus Teaches, Preaches, and Heals (Matthew
translation_verse: ku Yakobo eto ubi Yuda ku Yuda Iskariot wǝ léfiani nwǝ lídu Yesu útǝ. Yesu Átsya Betidi Kpǝ Bufi.

english_verse: You well-fed people are in for trouble. You will go hungry! You people who are laughing now are in for trouble. You are going to cry and weep!
translation_verse: Mbɔbɔɛ mǝǝtǝ mimba díkedi bími mɔmɔ, itsyise kukpɛnsɛ ɛbɔlɛ mi! Mbɔbɔɛ mǝǝtǝ mimba nlɛ simǝ bumǝ mɔmɔ, itsyise mi asa ebɔkɛ kaminsǝ nya biuwi nku!

english_verse: These people had come to listen to Jesus and to be healed of their diseases. All who were troubled by evil spirits were also healed.
translation_verse: Bǝbǝ bǝ lǝ banɔ asa nnya Yesu díkate ku lǝ otsya mǝ efimbi kpǝ nnya banlɛ. Betidi ba awɔnɔ bua díkelǝ tsya ǝbǝ nya ótsya mǝ bufi.

english_verse: God will bless you hungry people. You will have plenty to eat! God will bless you people who are now crying. You will laugh!
translation_verse: Ǝsuǝ ebuyuǝ mimba kukpɛnsǝ nlɛ mɔmɔ, itsyise biumi! Ǝsuǝ ebuyuǝ mimba nlɛ nku mɔmɔ, itsyise biumǝ simǝ!

english_verse: God will bless you when others hate you and won't have anything to do with you. God will bless you when people insult you and say cruel things about you, all because you are a follower of the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Ǝsuǝ ebuyuǝ mi lǝ betidi eekisi mi, nya baani mi, nya baaka mi, nya baatɛyi mi bǝnkǝ bekpe ditsyǝbi bua lǝ mɔ wǝ ni Utidi Eto Ubi eso!

english_verse: You are in for trouble when everyone says good things about you. That is what your own people said about those prophets who told lies. Love for Enemies (Matthew
translation_verse: Mbɔbɔɛ mǝǝtǝ mi mba betidi kenke laatɛsǝ mɔmɔ, itsyise nko ke ibǝ bǝ mǝ banamǝ lɛtɛsǝ betidi ba lɛwɛ betidi bǝ mǝ ni Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi nɛ. Bela Mi Balo.

english_verse: If you give to others, you will be given a full amount in return. It will be packed down, shaken together, and spilling over into your lap. The way you treat others is the way you will be treated.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ bitǝ betidi asa bǝ lǝ Onanto tsya lǝ utǝ mi asa. Lǝ sitintii, Onanto ebuyisǝ mi kenwu keyi kaba kakpo ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lefonǝ eso. Kase faaklá asa yeyi kaba kakpo kǝtǝ utidii, nko eto okle ke Onanto looklá utǝ fǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: is like someone who dug down deep and built a house on solid rock. When a flood came and the river rushed against the house, it was built so well that it didn't even shake.
translation_verse: Ute fe utidi wǝ laato diyo nya óba kakplo nya óse ni unyǝnsǝ lǝ aba ǝsuǝ fɛ óto diyo nǝmǝ unyǝnsǝ. Se ketu díyi nya káyɛ mfó káfee, kulesa ményifo diyo nǝmǝ, itsyise dińyǝ lǝ kǝńyǝkɔ sɛɛ.

english_verse: If someone slaps you on one cheek, don't stop that person from slapping you on the other cheek. If someone wants to take your coat, don't try to keep back your shirt.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utsyuǝ ásɔ fǝ lǝ kotosii, tsyi nkonse tsya ǝtǝ wǝ. Nya lǝ utidi utsyuǝ éfi fǝ awu katoo, tǝ lǝ ufi nnya kalɔ tsya lǝ woala.

english_verse: Give to everyone who asks and don't ask people to return what they have taken from you.
translation_verse: Utidi saa wǝ laadia asa lǝ fǝ ɔflɔɔ, tǝ wǝ. Nya lǝ utsyuǝ éfi fǝ lǝsatsyuǝǝ, mantɛyi fǝ usinkliko ni oboko.

english_verse: Treat others just as you want to be treated.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ faala fǝ beyifo bǝtǝ fǝǝ, ni ke ele bǝ fintsya yifo ǝtǝ betidi nɛ.

english_verse: If you love only someone who loves you, will God praise you for that? Even sinners love people who love them.
translation_verse: “Lǝ ibǝ bǝ betidi ba laala mi ete mi tsya laalaa, nte atɛsǝ nye lɛninsɔ nǝ biunyǝ bitsyiko lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ? Mba ni babuayifo tsya aala betidi ba laala mǝǝ.

english_verse: If you are kind only to someone who is kind to you, will God be pleased with you for that? Even sinners are kind to people who are kind to them.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ betidi ba díyifo fǝ kasɛɛ ete fintsya leeyifo kasɛɛ kǝtǝǝ, nte lɛninsɔ nǝ ele bǝ befi bǝtǝ fǝ? Mba ni babuayifo tsya eeyifo nkoo.

english_verse: Have pity on others, just as your Father has pity on you. Judging Others (Matthew
translation_verse: Biyifo mba lǝǝnyǝ asa kaminsǝ fe kase mi Anto Onanto lǝǝnyǝ kaminsǝ. Yesu Áte Asa Itsyi Lǝ Ɔyimitsyuǝ Dikpi Bolo Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus said: Don't judge others, and God won't judge you. Don't be hard on others, and God won't be hard on you. Forgive others, and God will forgive you.
translation_verse: “Biankponko betidi bamba akpo lǝ Onanto tsya lǝ ɔyɛ mi lekpo bokponko. Bianlo betidi dikpi, lǝ Onanto tsya lǝ ɔyɛ mi dikpi bolo, bifi asa bɛtsyɛ betidi lǝ Onanto tsya lǝ ufi ɔtsyɛ mi.

english_verse: Jesus also used some sayings as he spoke to the people. He said: Can one blind person lead another blind person? Won't they both fall into a ditch?
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ lekpa nkǝ, “Unǝmba anyɛnko wǝ unǝmbatsyuǝ. Lenni nkoo, mǝ inuǝ ba tã ebudu banɔ bedufǝ lǝ dibiǝ kafo.

english_verse: Are students better than their teacher? But when they are fully trained, they will be like their teacher.
translation_verse: Okasebi saa ante kaso wǝ oteasa. Fɛɛ lefe nǝ okasebi ǝmǝ lelosǝ asa bokasee, wǝǝtsyǝ fe wǝ oteasa ke.

english_verse: You can see the speck in your friend's eye, but you don't notice the log in your own eye.
translation_verse: “Ntsyǝ fɛ fanlɛ dikubi kɛkɛ nǝ ntǝkǝ fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ lǝ dinǝmi bobe fɛ fannlɛ dikubi kplɛ nǝ ntǝkǝ lǝ fǝ lele bunyǝ?

english_verse: How can you say, “My friend, let me take the speck out of your eye,” when you don't see the log in your own eye? You show-offs! First, get the log out of your own eye; then you can see how to take the speck out of your friend's eye. A Tree and Its Fruit (Matthew
translation_verse: Ntsyǝ fɛ foofo fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ bɔtɛyi fǝnkǝ, ‘Lekpakpa, tǝ lǝ nlǝkǝ dikubi kɛkɛ nǝ ntǝkǝ fǝ lǝ dinǝmi’ se dikubi kplɛ ntǝkǝ lǝ fǝ kosate eto lele ǝsuǝ? Fǝ, ǝnǝmi ǝnǝmi eto utidi! Ka dikubi kplɛ nǝ ntǝkǝ fǝ lǝ dinǝmi bulǝkǝ fɛ lǝ ǝnyǝ kusu ǝlǝkǝ fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ eto lele kɛkɛ nǝ ntǝkǝ lǝ wǝ lele. Kuyi Saa Ku Ko Awɔnsa.

english_verse: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.
translation_verse: “Kuyi sɛɛ aannwɔ ebibi bua, nya kuyi bua tsya laannwɔ ebibi sɛɛ.

english_verse: You can tell what a tree is like by the fruit it produces. You cannot pick figs or grapes from thornbushes.
translation_verse: Kuyi saa eto ebibi ǝsuǝ beefi kǝtsyǝ ko lekpo. Banlɛ koto eto awɔnsa lǝ kanyi ǝsuǝ, nya banlɛ awɔnsa nya beedi lǝ otonkpa tsya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Good people do good things because of the good in their hearts, but bad people do bad things because of the evil in their hearts. Your words show what is in your heart. Two Builders (Matthew
translation_verse: Utidi sɛɛ saa, asa sɛɛ laabɔ ketsyi lǝ wǝ asayifoyifo ǝsuǝ nnya leetsyi lǝ wǝ utu kǝmiǝ. Nya utidi bua tsya lǝǝlǝkǝ asa bua kate ketsyiko lǝ wǝ utu kǝmiǝ. Itsyise asa nnya nkpe lǝ utidi eto utu kǝmiǝǝ, nnya ni lesa nǝ laabɔ ketsyi lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ nɛ. Nɔ Yesu Eto Ditiki Lǝ Ayɛ Lǝ Ni Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Why do you keep on saying that I am your Lord, when you refuse to do what I say?
translation_verse: “Beso biakpadi mɛ biǝ Bonamute, Bonamute, fɛ bienyifo lǝ lesa nǝ maatɛyi mi ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: But anyone who hears what I say and doesn't obey me is like someone whose house wasn't built on solid rock. As soon as the river rushed against that house, it was smashed to pieces!
translation_verse: Fɛɛ utidi saa wǝ laanɔ mɔ ditiki nya woenyifo lǝ ni ǝsuǝǝ, uyifo fe utidi wǝ léto diyo nya wánse ni lǝ kasɔ ka nkpe ale ǝsuǝ nya wénku kasɔ fɛ útsyiko ofatiǝ ǝmǝ bose lǝ umuǝ sui. Nyaso lefe nǝ ketu díyi kába káyɛ lǝ diyo nǝmǝ ɔflɔ káfee, léba kenke lékpo lǝ kasɔ!”

english_verse: I have officers who give orders to me, and I have soldiers who take orders from me. I can say to one of them, ‘Go!’ and he goes. I can say to another, ‘Come!’ and he comes. I can say to my servant, ‘Do this!’ and he will do it.”
translation_verse: Mintsya nyifo uninǝ wǝ nkpe lǝ beninǝ ba nsi nso mɛ eto ǝsuǝale eto kalɔ. Nya nkpe bamamanyǝ ba nkpe mɛ kalɔ. Lǝ ntɛyi nwǝ miǝkǝ, ‘Su,’ woesu. Nya lǝ ntɛyi obamba tsya miǝ, ‘Bǝ,’ wǝǝbǝ. Nya lǝ ntɛyi mɔ uyifoyifo miǝ, ‘Yifo mmǝǝ,’ woǝyifo.”

english_verse: He loves our nation and even built us a synagogue.”
translation_verse: itsyise woala bo kuse eto betidi. Nya wǝ kosate léto bo katsyakɔ útǝ bo.”

english_verse: When the Lord saw the woman, he felt sorry for her and said, “Don't cry!”
translation_verse: Se Yesu dínyǝ usio ǝmfoo, wǝ asa álɛ wǝ kaminsǝ. Mfó nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Sinkli ayɛ keku.”

english_verse: The leaders went to Jesus and begged him to do something. They said, “This man deserves your help!
translation_verse: Bǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya bálɛ wǝ lekpakpa kekleke bǝnkǝ, “Utidi ǝmfo ǝńyǝ utǝ bǝ wunsǝko wǝ,

english_verse: Simon answered, “I suppose it would be the one who had owed more and didn't have to pay it back.” “You are right,” Jesus said.
translation_verse: Nya Simon lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mfo nnɔ miǝ utidi wǝ úfi kayo ka nso utu ɔ́tsyɛ.” Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Átɛyi ɛlɛkɛ.”

english_verse: In this town an army officer's servant was sick and about to die. The officer liked his servant very much.
translation_verse: Romafɔ eto omamanyǝninǝ utsyuǝ akɛ mfó nya ɔkɛ uyifoyifo wǝ eto asa óla tinti. Uyifoyifo ǝmǝ ánɔ bufi kekleke, nya ɔkɛ lǝ ukpǝ ku menkpǝ eto nti.

english_verse: And when he heard about Jesus, he sent some Jewish leaders to ask him to come and heal the servant.
translation_verse: Se uninǝ ǝmfo lɛnɔ Yesu eto kɔsɔɔ, ókpe Yudafɔ eto beninǝ bǝtsyuǝ nkǝ batɛyi wǝ lǝ ubǝ otsya wǝ uyifoyifo ǝmǝ utǝ wǝ.

english_verse: So Jesus went with them. When Jesus wasn't far from the house, the officer sent some friends to tell him, “Lord, don't go to any trouble for me! I am not good enough for you to come into my house.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eso Yesu átaka útǝkǝko mǝ. Yesu ménsitsyonko diyo nǝmǝ fɛ uninǝ ǝmfo lékpe wǝ bayɛtsyuǝ bǝtsyuǝ nkǝ besu batɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Boanto, mensilǝ ǝsuǝ fǝ ǝǝbǝ. Itsyise mɔɔ, mǝnńyǝ ntǝ bǝ lǝ ǝbǝ mɔ diyo.

english_verse: And I am certainly not worthy to come to you. Just say the word, and my servant will get well.
translation_verse: Nya mǝnńyǝ ntǝ tsya bǝ mbǝ ntsyako fǝ, nńyǝ lǝ fǝ ǝnǝmi. Nyasoo, fǝ tɛyi ditiki ete, mɔ uyifoyifo eto ǝsuǝ ebumuǝ ale.

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he was so surprised that he turned and said to the crowd following him, “In all of Israel I've never found anyone with this much faith!”
translation_verse: Se ɔ́tɛyi nkoo, íyifo Yesu yanii. Mfó ǝmǝ nya ɔ́tsyi ɔ́wuninsǝ ɔ́tɛyi sitiditu sia ba dítǝkǝko wǝ mfó nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ mǝnyǝ tɔ bofokanɔ bomfo eto okle lǝ Israelfɔ nti tɔ kulatsya!”

english_verse: As they came near the gate of the town, they saw people carrying out the body of a widow's only son. Many people from the town were walking along with her.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ óyo umǝ ǝmǝ eto kabɔsiee, ótsyako bǝtsyuǝ ba nlɛ keku nya banyɛ banlɛ bɔbɔ lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ. Ɔkɔsiǝ eto ubi ɔni kplo eto ɔkɔ ni wǝ béntsyi banlɛ bɔbɔnko bantɔ kebikǝkɔ nɛ. Nya umǝ eto betidi kpǝ dítǝkǝko wǝ.

english_verse: Jesus went over and touched the stretcher on which the people were carrying the dead boy. They stopped, and Jesus said, “Young man, get up!”
translation_verse: Yesu édufǝ mǝ lenti nya útidi ɔkɔ ǝmǝ, nya mba ntsyi wǝ ǝmǝ díńyǝ. Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Okosobi! Nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi minkǝ taka!”

english_verse: The boy sat up and began to speak. Jesus then gave him back to his mother.
translation_verse: Nya ɔkɔ ǝmǝ létaka úsiǝ nya útsyiko etiki budi. Nya Yesu dífi wǝ ókpe wǝ ambe lǝ kɔni.

english_verse: Everyone was frightened and praised God. They said, “A great prophet is here with us! God has come to his people.”
translation_verse: Íyifo betidi bamfó kenke yanii ku sikpi tinti, nya bátɛsǝ Onanto. Lǝ nyamfo eso bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi wǝ nkpe kɛnyɛ ale tinti ǝbǝ údufǝ bo lenti! Onanto áyifǝ úbǝ nkǝ lǝ ubǝ ulǝkǝ wǝ betidi!”

english_verse: News about Jesus spread all over Judea and everywhere else in that part of the country. John the Baptist (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu eto etiki nyamfó esensǝ éba ékpo lǝ Yudea eto kasɔ ku lekpake nǝmfo kenke. Yohanes Ntuflǝsǝtidi Átsyese Batɔnkpe Yesu Ɔflɔ.

english_verse: John's followers told John everything that was being said about Jesus. So he sent two of them to ask the Lord, “Are you the one we should be looking for? Or must we wait for someone else?”
translation_verse: nya óla mǝ ótsyese Bonamute Yesu ɔflɔ ku kɛnyɛ kamfo nkǝ, “Fǝ ni utidi wǝ bǝ ɔlɛ bubǝ lee, lee buńyǝ bukabe utidi bamba kusu?”

english_verse: When these messengers came to Jesus, they said, “John the Baptist sent us to ask, ‘Are you the one we should be looking for? Or are we supposed to wait for someone else?’ ”
translation_verse: Nyaso se bǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔɔ, batɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes ni nwǝ lékpe bo nkǝ bubǝ bɔtɔ fǝ nkǝ, ‘Fǝ ni utidi wǝ bǝ ɔlɛ bubǝ lee, lee buńyǝ bukabe utidi bamba kusu?’ ”

english_verse: At that time Jesus was healing many people who were sick or in pain or were troubled by evil spirits, and he was giving sight to a lot of blind people.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfó ǝsuǝǝ, Yesu átsya betidi kpǝ bufi nya óla awɔnɔ bua, nya útǝ bǝnǝmba kpǝ dínyǝ asa.

english_verse: Jesus said to the messengers sent by John, “Go and tell John what you have seen and heard. Blind people are now able to see, and the lame can walk. People who have leprosy are being healed, and the deaf can now hear. The dead are raised to life, and the poor are hearing the good news.
translation_verse: Mfoti ǝmǝ nya útǝ mbuayɛ ɔ́tɛyi Yohanes eto batɔnkpe nkǝ, “Bisinkli bisu bɛtɛyi Yohanes asa nnya bínyǝ ku nnya bɛnɔ banlɛ bɔtɛyi bǝnkǝ bǝnǝmba lɛ bunyǝ, mba léba bankpoo kasɔ lɛ bɔyɛ kafe, mba nlɛ bufisia bufi eto ǝsuǝ lɛ bokpa, batoti lɛ asa bɔnɔ, bǝkpǝnkpǝ lɛ botaka kǝbǝ nkpǝ, nya maatɛyi bakombo Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: God will bless everyone who doesn't reject me because of what I do.”
translation_verse: Disuǝyuǝ itǝ utidi wǝ dímǝnnyǝ kabua lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: After John's messengers had gone, Jesus began speaking to the crowds about John: What kind of person did you go out to the desert to see? Was he like tall grass blown about by the wind?
translation_verse: Se Yohanes eto batɔnkpe dídu eto kamaa, Yesu étsyiko etiki budi ketsyiko lǝ Yohanes ǝsuǝ kate betidi bamfó nkǝ, “Lǝ lefe nǝ bɛbɔ bisu kaka Yohanes nkpe lǝ mfiminti mfóo, be ni lesa nǝ bibu biǝ biusu binyǝ? Utidi wǝ nte fe lefanto nǝ ufiebi nlɛ bɔsɔ ketinkǝsǝ lee?

english_verse: What kind of man did you really go out to see? Was he someone dressed in fine clothes? People who wear expensive clothes and live in luxury are in the king's palace.
translation_verse: Be tutuutu ni lesa nǝ bísu kabekɔ? Lee Utidi wǝ nkpe awu nnya laanɔ bobe? Betidi ba laakpe awu nnya lefo koya nya beedi nkpǝǝ, mǝ kakɛnkɔ ni bakankplɛ eto ayo.

english_verse: What then did you go out to see? Was he a prophet? He certainly was! I tell you that he was more than a prophet.
translation_verse: Bɛtɛyi mɛ lesa nǝ bísu kabekɔ! Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi utsyuǝ bísu kabekɔ? Lǝ sitintii, nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ oso Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi.

english_verse: In the Scriptures, God calls John his messenger and says, “I am sending my messenger ahead of you to get things ready for you.”
translation_verse: Itsyise Yohanes ǝsuǝ eto etiki nya Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛtɛyi ni nkǝ, ‘Mootsyese mɔ ɔtɔnkpe ntɔnsǝ fǝ bubǝ, nya wɔɔtɔ ɔlɔ kusu utsyǝ utǝ fǝ bubǝ.’ ”

english_verse: No one ever born on this earth is greater than John. But whoever is least important in God's kingdom is greater than John.
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Yohanes so utidi saa wǝ bale lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo. Fɛɛ utidi wǝ ni ɔkɛkɛ kulaa tsya lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ, so Yohanes.”

english_verse: Everyone had been listening to John. Even the tax collectors had obeyed God and had done what was right by letting John baptize them.
translation_verse: Ɛtɔnsǝǝ, betidi bamǝ kenke ánɔ Yohanes eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ údi nya titlu mǝ ku mba laafo umǝnko tsya áfo lesa nǝ Onanto nlɛ bɔbɛbɛ ketsyiko mǝ ɔflɔɔ, ku mǝ ketu kenke nya Yohanes díflǝsǝ mǝ ntu.

english_verse: But the Pharisees and the experts in the Law of Moses refused to obey God and be baptized by John.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Farisifɔ ku afi eto bateasa kplɛ áni lesa nǝ ni Onanto eto ketsyue itǝ mǝ nya bántɔnɔ bǝ Yohanes flǝsǝ mǝ ntu.

english_verse: Jesus went on to say: What are you people like? What kind of people are you?
translation_verse: Yesu ésukosǝ wǝ etiki sɛtɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mɔmɔɔ, be ele bǝ mfi mi mmi eto betidi nkatesǝ ko kɛɛ? Ntsyǝ bente kɛɛ?

english_verse: You are like children sitting in the market and shouting to each other, “We played the flute, but you would not dance! We sang a funeral song, but you would not cry!”
translation_verse: Bete fe bekpefi kɛkɛ ba laakpe kɔyɛ lǝ obia. Mǝ bǝtsyuǝ lɛ kudu bokpo katɛyi mǝ bǝtsyuǝ bǝ, ‘Búsǝ kusiǝkpakpa eto ǝsǝ bútǝ mi, fɛɛ bíenwui kewui! Búsǝ keku eto ǝsǝ bútǝ mi, tsya bíenwi nku.’

english_verse: John the Baptist did not go around eating and drinking, and you said, “John has a demon in him!”
translation_verse: Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes ǝbǝ, nya ókle kɛnyɛ, nya wǝnnǝ ntǝ saa tsya, fɛɛ bɛlɛ bɔtɛyi biǝ, ‘Lɛwɔnɔ bua si wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ.’

english_verse: But because the Son of Man goes around eating and drinking, you say, “Jesus eats and drinks too much! He is even a friend of tax collectors and sinners.”
translation_verse: Nya Utidi Eto Ubi tsya díbǝ nya wǝǝ, údi únǝ. Nya bɛnlɛ bɔtɛyi biǝnkǝ, ‘Bebe udikpu ku utǝnǝ ǝmfoo! Uyifo mba laafo umǝnko ku babuayifo eto ɔyɛtsyuǝ!’

english_verse: Yet Wisdom is shown to be right by what its followers do. Simon the Pharisee
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi ba kenke lǝǝtǝkǝko Onanto eto kobe kamaa, balɛ bulǝkǝ kate lǝ mǝ eyifosa ǝsuǝ bǝ nnya ni kobe tinti nɛ.” Yesu Ésu Simon Eto Diyo.

english_verse: A Pharisee invited Jesus to have dinner with him. So Jesus went to the Pharisee's home and got ready to eat.
translation_verse: Farisinyǝ utsyuǝ ákpadi Yesu nkǝ ubǝ udi lesa lǝ wǝ diyo. Nya se Yesu dísu mfóo, úsiǝ kasɔ lǝ ɔpunu ɔflɔ nkǝ lǝ udi lesa.

english_verse: When a sinful woman in that town found out that Jesus was there, she bought an expensive bottle of perfume.
translation_verse: Usio wǝ dísiǝ nkpǝ bua utsyuǝ akɛ lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ. Nyaso se ɔ́nɔ nkǝ Yesu ǝbǝ Farisinyǝ ǝmǝ eto diyo lesakedikɔɔ, úfi nnuǝbi bo laanyi fififi bo nkpe lǝ dituntu nǝ laanɔ bobe ǝsuǝ úsuko mfó.

english_verse: Then she came and stood behind Jesus. She cried and started washing his feet with her tears and drying them with her hair. The woman kissed his feet and poured the perfume on them.
translation_verse: Úsu úńyǝ lǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya úwi binǝntu okpo wǝ lǝ akpa. Nya usio ǝmǝ dífi wǝ disi eto sɛwɔni ɔ́si binǝntu bia lékpo lǝ Yesu eto akpa mfoo, nya ɔ́kɔbe wǝ akpa ɔnlɛ bɔfiɔ ku lelabi. Nya úfi nnuǝbi bomǝ ókpo lǝ Yesu eto akpa tsya.

english_verse: The Pharisee who had invited Jesus saw this and said to himself, “If this man really were a prophet, he would know what kind of woman is touching him! He would know that she is a sinner.”
translation_verse: Se Farisinyǝ wǝ lékpadi Yesu dínyǝ nyamfoo, úbu disi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ utidi ǝmfo ete ni Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi tintii, eni ele bǝ ote usio wǝ eto okle díbǝ ɔnlɛ wǝ butidi mfo, eni óte nkpǝ bua bo tsya unsi!”

english_verse: Jesus said to the Pharisee, “Simon, I have something to say to you.” “Teacher, what is it?” Simon replied.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Simon, nkpe lesatsyuǝ nǝ minla miǝ matɛyi fǝ.” Nya Simon lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Oteasa, tɛyi mɛ.”

english_verse: But Jesus told the woman, “Because of your faith, you are now saved. May God give you peace!”
translation_verse: Mfó ǝmǝ nya Yesu lɛtɛyi usio ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ bofokanɔ ǝlǝkǝ fǝ, nyaso du esu lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Since neither of them could pay him back, the moneylender said that they didn't have to pay him anything. Which one of them will like him more?”
translation_verse: Se kulesa dímǝtsyǝ mǝ boofo kayo kamǝ esoo, úfi kayo kamǝ kenke ɔ́tsyɛ mǝ. Nya betidi inuǝ bamfo eto ntii, owoe fafo fanɔ fǝ woola otabinyǝ ǝmfo oso?”

english_verse: He turned toward the woman and said to Simon, “Have you noticed this woman? When I came into your home, you didn't give me any water so I could wash my feet. But she has washed my feet with her tears and dried them with her hair.
translation_verse: Yesu étsyi ɔwuninsǝ óbe usio ǝmǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi Simon nkǝ, “Alɛ usio ǝmfo bunyǝ? Se mímbǝ fǝ ɔflɔɔ, ǝmǝntǝ mɛ ntu fǝ mflǝ akpa. Fɛɛ usio ǝmfo éfi wǝ binǝntu úflǝ mɛ akpa, nya úfi wǝ disi eto sɛwɔni ɔ́si nnya.

english_verse: You didn't greet me with a kiss, but from the time I came in, she has not stopped kissing my feet.
translation_verse: Ámamfo mɛ ku disuǝyuǝ abuta mɛ alɛ. Fɛɛ idu lǝ lefe nǝ mímbǝ mfo, wóanyɛ tɔ mɔ akpa bɔlɛ kafiɔ.

english_verse: You didn't even pour olive oil on my head, but she has poured expensive perfume on my feet.
translation_verse: Fǝǝ, ǝmǝntǝ mɛ nnuǝbi saa fǝ mfi nkpo lǝ disi. Fɛɛ wǝ éfi nnuǝbi bo laanyi fififi ókpo mɛ lǝ akpa.

english_verse: So I tell you that all her sins are forgiven, and that is why she has shown great love. But anyone who has been forgiven for only a little will show only a little love.”
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi minkǝ, lelabi nǝ úlǝkǝ óte mɛ esoo, ófo abua kpǝ nya úyifo kenke eto bufikatsyɛ. Nya utidi wǝ díyifo abua sɛkɛ béfi bátsyɛ wǝ, nko ke wǝ lelabi tsya lɛfɛ nɛ.”

english_verse: Then Jesus said to the woman, “Your sins are forgiven.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi usio ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Befi fǝ abua batsyɛ fǝ.”

english_verse: Some other guests started saying to one another, “Who is this who dares to forgive sins?”
translation_verse: Se betidi ba tsya dísiǝ lǝ kedikɔ mfo lɛnɔ Yesu eto asa nnya ɔ́tɛyii, batɔ mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Owoe ni nwǝ mfo wǝ laafo betidi eto abua kulaa tsya bufi katsyɛ?”

english_verse: and so were some women who had been healed of evil spirits and all sorts of diseases. One of the women was Mary Magdalene, who once had seven demons in her.
translation_verse: Besio ba Yesu létsya bufi akpa akpa ku mba óla awɔnɔ bua úlǝkǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ eto bǝtsyuǝ tsya ǝkǝtǝkǝko wǝ. Nya utsyuǝ wǝ lɛkɛ lǝ mǝ nti ni Maria wǝ baakpo Magdalanyǝ nwǝ ǝsuǝ Yesu léla awɔnɔ bua akuanse úlǝkǝ.

english_verse: The seeds that fell on rocky ground are the people who gladly hear the message and accept it. But they don't have deep roots, and they believe only for a little while. As soon as life gets hard, they give up.
translation_verse: Nya, nnya díbǝ ékpo lǝ akpankplamboe ǝsuǝǝ, te fe betidi ba lɛnɔ ditiki nǝmǝ nya báfo ni ku disuǝyuǝ lamfolamfo, fɛɛ díendufǝ lǝ mǝ akɔɛsi sitinti. Nyaso baafo kanɔ itǝ lefe kliminti hã. Nya lǝ lefe nǝ botokabe sɛkɛ díbǝ mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝǝ, bǝǝtǝ disi.

english_verse: Other seeds fell on rocky ground and started growing. But the plants did not have enough water and soon dried up.
translation_verse: Ǝtsyuǝ tsya álo ekpo lǝ akpankplamboe ǝsuǝ. Nya se íkǝǝ, yǝnyǝ ntu ku sitǝ sɛɛ. Nyaso yɛylɔbe nya íkpǝ.

english_verse: Some other seeds fell where thornbushes grew up and choked the plants.
translation_verse: Eyibibi nyamǝ ǝtsyuǝ édufǝ lǝ biyufa nti. Nya biyufa biamǝ lébe bíti eyibibi nyamǝ, nya békle nnya kenke itǝ íkpǝ.

english_verse: So he answered: I have explained the secrets about God's kingdom to you. But for others I use stories, so they will look, but not see, and they will hear, but not understand. Jesus Explains the Story about a Farmer (Matthew
translation_verse: Mfó ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Onanto éfi wǝ sekakedikɔ eto asakulakula eto kobe útǝ mi. Fɛɛ betidi bambaa, akpá ǝsuǝ bɔɔnɔ nnya itǝ bǝ, ‘balɛ bunyǝ tsyaa, bembunyǝ. Nya balɛ bɔnɔ tsyaa, bǝmbǝ kasɔ bɔnɔ.’ Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Lekpá Lǝ Nwǝ Dísǝ Eyibibi Eto Kasɔ.

english_verse: There is nothing hidden that will not be found. There is no secret that will not be well known.
translation_verse: Lesa saa nǝ béfi bákula lǝ kalebe saa, ebɔbɔ lǝ lekple bǝnyǝ. Nya lesa nǝ ke béti bákpee, ebɔbɔ lǝ lekple bǝnyǝ.

english_verse: and while they were sailing across, he went to sleep. Suddenly a storm struck the lake, and the boat started sinking. They were in danger.
translation_verse: Se bányɛ lǝ ntu bomǝ ǝsuǝ bantɔɔ, Yesu álabe selabe. Nya lǝ lefe nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ufiebi étsyiko bɔsɔ kekleke nya ntu dítsyiko bɔsɔ kedufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafo itǝ bǝ bédufǝ lǝ ukpǝ ku mǝnkpǝ eto nti.

english_verse: This is what the story means: The seed is God's message,
translation_verse: “Lekpá nǝ míntɛyi eto kasɔ ni bǝ, eyibibi nyamǝ ni Onanto eto ditiki.

english_verse: The seeds that fell among the thornbushes are also people who hear the message. But they are so eager for riches and pleasures that they never produce anything.
translation_verse: Eyibibi nya lékpo lǝ biyufa ntii, te fe betidi ba laanɔ ditiki nǝmǝ, fɛɛ kawunsiǝ eto bulǝ ku kǝ asa eto bɔbɛbɛ ku kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kamini eesensǝ keti mǝ, nya yǝǝntǝ kusu bǝ ebibi nyamǝ be, ɛsɛ lǝ balɛ nnya.

english_verse: Those seeds that fell on good ground are the people who listen to the message and keep it in good and honest hearts. They last and produce a harvest. Light (Mark
translation_verse: Nya eyibibi nnya díbǝ ékpo lǝ kasɔ sɛɛ ǝsuǝǝ, te fe betidi ba laanɔ ditiki nǝmǝ nya baafo ni kakpe lǝ utu kǝmiǝ. Nya baabokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ nya bǝǝńyǝ kekleke isu ese lǝ kalosǝkɔ itǝ bǝ baawɔ ebibi kpǝ. Tǝ Lǝ Fǝ Okandiɛ Lǝ Uyǝnde Utǝ Betidi.

english_verse: Then Jesus asked the disciples, “Don't you have any faith?” But they were frightened and amazed. They said to each other, “Who is this? He can give orders to the wind and the waves, and they obey him!” A Man with Demons in Him (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɔ bakasebi bamǝ nkǝ, “Beso bimbǝ bofokanɔ?” Fɛɛ iyifo mǝ naa, nya sikpi tsya dímuǝ mǝ. Nya bátɔ mǝ bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Owoe ko ni utidi ǝmfo? Woedi ufiebi ku lekpo etiki nya yetsyue wǝ koto!” Yesu Ála Awɔnɔ Bua Úlǝkǝ Lǝ Utidi Utsyuǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: No one lights a lamp and puts it under a bowl or under a bed. A lamp is always put on a lampstand, so people who come into a house will see the light.
translation_verse: “Utidi kuutsyuǝ anto okandiɛ kefi asa keti wǝ nye ufi wǝ usu okpe lǝ lesa kalɔ. Bomu weefi wǝ kǝtǝkǝ lǝ wǝ kǝtǝkǝkɔ kaka betidi ba lǝǝbǝ mfó luunyǝ asa wuee.

english_verse: But Jesus answered, “Someone touched me, because I felt power going out from me.”
translation_verse: Tsyaa, Yesu átɛyi nkǝ, “Nnyi miǝ utidi utsyuǝ étidi mɛ, itsyise ǝsuǝale ǝtsyuǝ ábɔ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he told Jairus, “Don't worry! Have faith, and your daughter will get well.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu ánɔ ditiki nǝmǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi Yairo nkǝ, “Mante sikpi. Fǝ fo anɔ fǝ ubi ǝmǝ ebɔkɛ ale.”

english_verse: They begged Jesus not to send them to the deep pit, where they would be punished.
translation_verse: Mfóo, awɔnɔ bua nyamǝ álɛ Yesu lekpakpa yǝnkǝ woanla nnya otsyese kaka awɔnɔ bua lǝǝsiǝ kǝnyǝ kanyi.

english_verse: The people went out to see what had happened, and when they came to Jesus, they also found the man. The demons had gone out of him, and he was sitting there at the feet of Jesus. He had clothes on and was in his right mind. But the people were terrified.
translation_verse: Nya betidi bamǝ lɛbɔ bésu bǝ lǝ besu babe lesa nǝ díbǝ. Nya se bésu báyo Yesu ɔflɔɔ, bǝnyǝ osani wǝ ǝsuǝ Yesu léla awɔnɔ bua utsyiko nya unsi lǝ Yesu eto akɔ untǝkǝ ǝnǝ wuee nya onkpe awu lǝ ǝsuǝ unsi kpoo. Mfóo, mǝmblɛ áte sikpi.

english_verse: Jesus' mother and brothers went to see him, but because of the crowd they could not get near him.
translation_verse: Yesu eto bayimi ku mǝ ambe ǝbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ, fɛɛ bamfó kusu bunyǝ bǝnyǝ Yesu itsyi lǝ sitiditu sia eso.

english_verse: As Jesus was getting out of the boat, he was met by a man from this town. The man had demons in him. He had gone naked for a long time and no longer lived in a house, but in the graveyard.
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛbɔ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ koo, osani utsyuǝ wǝ awɔnɔ bua nsi lǝ ǝsuǝ étsyi umǝ ǝmǝ úbǝ ótsyako wǝ. Yóofo lefe kpǝ se utidi ǝmfo díkayɛ leyaleya katsyilama. Nya wóakatɔnɔ nkǝ woǝsiǝ lǝ diyo enso lǝ edi nti.

english_verse: Just then the man in charge of the synagogue came and knelt down in front of Jesus. His name was Jairus, and he begged Jesus to come to his home
translation_verse: Mfó nya osani wǝ baakpo Yairo wǝ lídi Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ eto uninǝ ɔni ǝbǝ óse akonki lǝ Yesu eto akɔ nya ɔ́lɛ wǝ lekpakpa nkǝ utǝkǝko wǝ lǝ besu wǝ diyo,

english_verse: One day, Jesus and his disciples got into a boat, and he said, “Let's cross the lake.” They started out,
translation_verse: Diyi lɔnii, Yesu édufǝ ɔklɔ kafo ku wǝ bakasebi. Mfó nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bitǝ lǝ bɔyila ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ busu lekpake nǝ nse.” Nyaso bédu bésu.

english_verse: So they went to Jesus and woke him up, “Master, Master! We are about to drown!” Jesus got up and ordered the wind and waves to stop. They obeyed, and everything was calm.
translation_verse: Bakasebi bamǝ ésu básanklisǝ Yesu nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Boanto! Boanto! Boǝbǝ bukpǝ!” Mfó nya Yesu létaka úńyǝ nya óto ɔkɔɛ uti ufiebi ku ntu bo nlɛ bonwa kakpanka, nya nyamblɛ díyuǝ kɛnyɛ nya lesa saa diyuǝ kanana.

english_verse: The man saw Jesus and screamed. He knelt down in front of him and shouted, “Jesus, Son of God Most High, what do you want with me? I beg you not to torture me!”
translation_verse: Se únyǝ Yesuu, ófa nya óto wǝ ǝsuǝ ókpo lǝ kasɔ lǝ Yesu eto akɔ. Nya ɔ́tɔ wǝ bembembe nkǝ, “Yesu, Onanto Fanlofanlo eto Ubi! Be nkpe lǝ bonko ku fǝ lenti mfo? Nlɛ fǝ lekpakpa, mǝnnǝ mɛ koto!”

english_verse: When the men taking care of the pigs saw this, they ran to spread the news in the town and on the farms.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ betidi ba díkabe bakplako bamǝ dínyǝ asa nnya díbǝ mfóo, bétsyetsyi bésu bátɛyi betidi ba lɛkɛ lǝ umǝ ku mbuto bo letsylama mfó kenke.

english_verse: He said this because Jesus had already told the evil spirit to go out of him. The man had often been attacked by the demon. And even though he had been bound with chains and leg irons and kept under guard, he smashed whatever bound him. Then the demon would force him out into lonely places.
translation_verse: Utidi ǝmfo átɛyi nyamfo, itsyise Yesu áto ɔkuɛ ókpe lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nsi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ mfó, nya ɔ́tɛyi ni nkǝ, “Bɔ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ!” Lefe kpǝ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ ǝsiǝ utidi ǝmǝ lǝ ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ bákle wǝ ani ku akpa kulaa tsya bákpe wǝ lǝ amanaa, úkǝfǝsǝ amana nyamǝ nya lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ díkǝnǝ wǝ kesuko mfiminti.

english_verse: Jesus asked the man, “What is your name?” He answered, “My name is Lots.” He said this because there were “lots” of demons in him.
translation_verse: Yesu átɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Ntsyǝ baakpo fǝ?” Mfó nya útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mɔ baakpo bǝ Omantsya.” Ɔ́tɛyi nko itsyise awɔnɔ bua kpǝ dídufǝ ísiǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: A large herd of pigs was feeding there on the hillside. So the demons begged Jesus to let them go into the pigs, and Jesus let them go.
translation_verse: Mfóo, bakplako kpǝ ǝńyǝ lǝ kɔtini ǝsuǝ békedi. Nya awɔnɔ bua nyamǝ lɛlɛ Yesu lekpakpa bǝnkǝ utǝ lǝ bedufǝ lǝ bakplako bamǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya Yesu dítǝ mǝ kusu.

english_verse: Then the demons left the man and went into the pigs. The whole herd rushed down the steep bank into the lake and drowned.
translation_verse: Nyaso bábɔ lǝ utidi ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ nya bédufǝ lǝ bakplako bamǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya mǝmblɛ dítsyetsyi báwunini lǝ kɔtini komǝ eto kotosi nya bédufǝ lǝ ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ nya bánya bátsylɔ kenke.

english_verse: Then all who had seen the man healed told about it.
translation_verse: Betidi ba dínyǝ kase asa nyamfó díbǝǝ, átɛyi mba mfó kase Yesu létsya utidi wǝ ǝsuǝ awɔnɔ bua dísiǝ fɛ íkakpa wǝ.

english_verse: Everyone from around Gerasa begged Jesus to leave, because they were so frightened. When Jesus got into the boat to start back,
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, Gadare eto kasɔ eto betidi átɛyi Yesu bǝnkǝ udu lǝ mǝ kasɔ, itsyise sikpi ǝmuǝ mǝ tinti. Nyaso Yesu édufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ údu.

english_verse: the man who had been healed begged to go with him. But Jesus sent him off and said,
translation_verse: Mfó nya utidi wǝ ǝsuǝ Yesu léla awɔnɔ bua úlǝkǝ álɛ Yesu lekpakpa nkǝ, “Tǝ kusu lǝ ntǝkǝko fǝ.” Fɛɛ Yesu mántɔnɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: “Go back home and tell everyone how much God has done for you.” The man then went all over town, telling everything that Jesus had done for him. A Dying Girl and a Sick Woman (Matthew
translation_verse: “Sinkli esu oto lǝ esu atɛyi lesa nǝ Onanto diyifo útǝ fǝ.” Lǝ nyaso utidi ǝmfó ésu ɔ́yɛ lǝ kǝmǝ ka nkpe mfó úkatɛyi asa nnya kenke Yesu díyifo útǝ wǝ. Yesu Átsya Yairo Eto Ubisiobi Ku Usio Utsyuǝ Wǝ Dítidi Wǝ.

english_verse: In the crowd was a woman who had been bleeding for twelve years. She had spent everything she had on doctors, but none of them could make her well.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ betidi bamfó ntii, usio wǝ kɔtɔ díkakpo itǝ lefosi alɛ ǝnuǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ tsya akɛ mǝ lenti. Usio ǝmfo ábiasǝ wǝ atabi kenke nkǝ lǝ otsya wǝ bufi bomǝ, fɛɛ ókplatsya ɔ́nɔ.

english_verse: Everyone had been waiting for Jesus, and when he came back, a crowd was there to welcome him.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu dísinkli úsu ɔ́yila ditumbukplɛ nǝ nkpe mfó, betidi bamfó áfo wǝ kukɔnɔ, itsyise mǝmblɛ ǝsiǝ bákabe wǝ kusu.

english_verse: because his twelve-year-old child was dying. She was his only daughter. While Jesus was on his way, people were crowding all around him.
translation_verse: itsyise wǝ ubisiobi ɔni wǝ díkafo fe alɛ lefosi ǝnuǝ, labe ɔlɛ bufi nya okpe lǝ ukpǝ ku mǝnkpǝ eto nti. Se Yesu lɛyɛ ɔntɔɔ, betidi kpǝ ǝtǝkǝko wǝ báma wǝ bákpe.

english_verse: As soon as she came up behind Jesus and barely touched his clothes, her bleeding stopped.
translation_verse: Ɔ́yɛ buɛɛ lǝ Yesu eto kama lǝ betidi nti nya útidi wǝ awu eto kotosi. Lamfolamfo kɔtɔ komǝ áyɛ wǝ bokpo.

english_verse: “Who touched me?” Jesus asked. While everyone was denying it, Peter said, “Master, people are crowding all around and pushing you from every side.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɔ nkǝ, “Owoe dítidi mɛ?” Fɛɛ kuutsyuǝ saa mántɔnɔ. Mfó nya Petro lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Boanto, be kase betidi kpǝ ntǝkǝko fǝ nya bama fǝ bakpe!”

english_verse: The woman knew that she could not hide, so she came trembling and knelt down in front of Jesus. She told everyone why she had touched him and that she had been healed at once.
translation_verse: Se usio ǝmǝ léte nkǝ wǝmbofo ǝsuǝ bɔbiɔsǝ esoo, útsyiko butinkǝ nya óse akonki ókpe disi kasɔ lǝ Yesu eto akɔ. Mfó nya ɔ́tɛyi lesa nǝ eso útidi Yesu eto awu lǝ betidi ba kenke eto ǝnǝmi. Nya úlǝkǝ ɔ́tɛyi lesa nǝ eso útidi wǝ awu ku kase bufi bomǝ lɛyɛ wǝ lamfolamfo.

english_verse: Jesus said to the woman, “You are now well because of your faith. May God give you peace!”
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eso Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ ubisiobi, fǝ bofokanɔ átsya fǝ. Su lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: While Jesus was speaking, someone came from Jairus' home and said, “Your daughter has died! Why bother the teacher anymore?”
translation_verse: Lefenǝ Yesu nsi ɔnlɛ etiki budii, ɔtɔyɛ ɔni ǝbǝ údufǝ wǝ dítsyi Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ eto uninǝ wǝ baakpo Yairo ɔflɔ. Nya úbǝ ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ ubisiobi ǝmǝ ébukpǝ koko, nyaso yɛ oteasa ǝmǝ bulǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus went into the house, but he did not let anyone else go with him, except Peter, John, James, and the girl's father and mother.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝ bésu bédufǝ Yairo eto diyo mfóo, wǝntǝ utidi saa kusu nkǝ udufǝ diyo kafo enso Petro ku Yohanes ku Yakobo ku ubisiobi ǝmǝ eto anto ku ambe hã.

english_verse: Everyone was crying and weeping for the girl. But Jesus said, “The child isn't dead. She is just asleep.”
translation_verse: Nya betidi kpǝ díńyǝ mfó banlɛ nku buwi ku kudu lǝ ubi ǝmǝ eso. Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Biensiwi keku. Ubi ǝmǝ mǝnkpǝ. Selabe ete ɔnlɛ.”

english_verse: The people laughed at him because they knew she was dead.
translation_verse: Mfóo, nya mǝmblɛ dímǝ wǝ, itsyise mǝ yi bǝnkǝ úkpǝ.

english_verse: Jesus took hold of the girl's hand and said, “Child, get up!”
translation_verse: Yesu ákɔbe wǝ lǝ kɔni nya ókpadi wǝ nkǝ, “Ubi, taka ǝńyǝ!”

english_verse: She came back to life and got right up. Jesus told them to give her something to eat.
translation_verse: Usiobi ǝmǝ ésinkli úbǝ nkpǝ nya ótaka úńyǝ lamfolamfo. Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ bǝtǝ ubisiobi ǝmǝ lesatsyuǝ lǝ udi.

english_verse: Her parents were surprised, but Jesus ordered them not to tell anyone what had happened.
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo kenke éyifo wǝ antomǝ yanii, fɛɛ Yesu ǝkǝ mǝ ato nkǝ bantɛyi utidi saa lesa nǝ díbǝ mfó.

english_verse: The apostles came back and told Jesus everything they had done. He then took them with him to the village of Bethsaida, where they could be alone.
translation_verse: Se bakasebi bamǝ dísinkli bǝbǝ bátɛyi Yesu lesa saa nǝ béyifo. Mfó nya ókpa mǝ hã ɔ́yɛnko nya bédu bésu umǝ wǝ baakpo Betsaida.

english_verse: They did this, and all the people sat down.
translation_verse: Nya se bakasebi bamǝ ditǝ bǝsiǝ nko,

english_verse: Herod the ruler heard about all that was happening, and he was worried. Some people were saying John the Baptist had come back to life.
translation_verse: Se Oka Herodes wǝ nlɛ seka budi lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ lɛnɔ asa nnya kenke nlɛ bubǝǝ, wǝ nsusu ǝlǝ wǝ itsyise betidi bǝtsyuǝ lɛ bɔtɛyi bǝnkǝ Ntuflǝsǝtidi Yohanes ni nwǝ disi ótaka utsyi ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: He told them, “Don't take anything with you! Don't take a walking stick or a traveling bag or food or money or even a change of clothes.
translation_verse: Fɛ booduu, Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bientsyi kulesa bisuko lǝ mi esu bɔyɛ ǝsuǝ fe uyilɛlɛ nye fe mba laadia asa eto katobe nye didisa nye atabi. Nya bientsyi akpesa bamba kulaa tsya.

english_verse: When you are welcomed into a home, stay there until you leave that town.
translation_verse: Diyo nǝ kee baafo mii, bisiǝ mfó isu ese lefe nǝ ke biudu lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ.

english_verse: Late in the afternoon the twelve apostles came to Jesus and said, “Send the crowd to the villages and farms around here. They need to find a place to stay and something to eat. There is nothing in this place. It's like a desert!”
translation_verse: Se kale nlɛ boloo, lefosi bakasebi inuǝ bamǝ ǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Tǝ lǝ betidi bamfo lǝ bedu lǝ besu mbuto bo nkpe lǝ lekpake mfó, lǝ babɛbɛ lesa ku kasɔnɔkɔ, itsyise mfo eyifo ntɛnti.”

english_verse: While he was praying, his face changed, and his clothes became shining white.
translation_verse: Se ɔnlɛ ola botoo, wǝ ǝnǝmi eto ditsyǝbi afloma nya wǝ awu nnya onkpe léfloma iflubi futututu ɛnlɛ boto lǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Jesus strictly warned his disciples not to tell anyone about this. Jesus Speaks about His Suffering and Death (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu ǝkǝ mǝ ato kekleke nkǝ bántɛyi utidi saa ditiki nǝmfo.

english_verse: “Pay close attention to what I am telling you! The Son of Man will be handed over to his enemies.”
translation_verse: “Bianta lesa nǝ mǝǝbǝ mi bɔtɛyi ǝsuǝ! Nyamblɛ ebubǝ itǝ itsyi lǝ Utidi Eto Ubi ǝsuǝ, buufi wǝ bakpe lǝ betidi eto ani.”

english_verse: But a lot of people found out about this and followed him. Jesus welcomed them. He spoke about God's kingdom and healed everyone who was sick.
translation_verse: Se betidi kpǝ lɛnɔ nkoo, bǝtǝkǝko wǝ bésu mfó. Yesu tsya áfo mǝ nya údi mǝ etiki utsyi lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ ǝsuǝ, nya ótsya mba bufi nlɛ bulǝ.

english_verse: “Don't stop him!” Jesus said. “Anyone who isn't against you is for you.” A Samaritan Village Refuses To Receive Jesus
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ bakasebi bamǝ nkǝ, “Bienti wǝ kusu, bete biǝnkǝ uńyǝ mi kama.” Samaria Eto Betidi Bǝtsyuǝ Áni Yesu.

english_verse: About eight days later Jesus took Peter, John, and James with him and went up on a mountain to pray.
translation_verse: Fe Kɔsida kɔni eto kama se Yesu lɛtɛyi nyamfoo, ókpa Petro ku Yohanes ku Yakobo ɔ́yɛnko bésu bábe kɔtini besu ko disinti ola katokɔ.

english_verse: If you want to save your life, you will destroy it. But if you give up your life for me, you will save it.
translation_verse: Itsyise utidi saa wǝ laala nkǝ waata wǝ disi eto nkpǝ, woonyansǝ mu. Nya utidi saa wǝ loonyansǝ wǝ nkpǝ nkǝ lǝ utǝkǝko mɛ, wuunyǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: What will you gain, if you own the whole world but destroy yourself or waste your life?
translation_verse: Nte kutǝkǝ ko utidi luunyǝ lǝ únyǝ kawunsiǝ ka kenke eto bikǝ nya ónyansǝ wǝ nkpǝ manlo?

english_verse: If you are ashamed of me and my message, the Son of Man will be ashamed of you when he comes in his glory and in the glory of his Father and the holy angels.
translation_verse: Lǝ mɔ ku mɔ asa nnya maate kenke álɛ utidi utsyuǝ kofanii, wǝ tsya ebɔlɛ Utidi Eto Ubi kofani lǝ lefe nǝ uubǝ lǝ wǝ diyǝnde ku wǝ Anto eto diyǝnde ku batɔnkpe kɛnkɛ kenke eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They appeared in heavenly glory and talked about all that Jesus' death in Jerusalem would mean.
translation_verse: Bábɔ ku Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eto diyǝnde nya bédi etiki ku Yesu itsyi lǝ kusu ko diyifo Onanto eto lelabi nkǝ ɔyɛ lǝ ko ǝsuǝ lǝ ukpǝ lǝ Yerusalem.

english_verse: ) While everyone was still amazed at what Jesus was doing, he said to his disciples,
translation_verse: Petro ku wǝ bǝtsyuǝ álabe selabe sio sio sio, tsya básankli bǝnyǝ diyǝnde kplɛ nǝ ǝsuǝ Yesu lɛkɛ ku betidi inuǝ ba wonko mǝ díńyǝ mfó.

english_verse: While Peter was still speaking, a shadow from a cloud passed over, and they were frightened as the cloud covered them.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ úńyǝ ɔnlɛ etiki budii, lɛtɔntɔ ábɔ díti mǝ kenke. Nya bakasebi bamǝ léte sikpi lǝ lefe nǝ lɛtɔntɔ nǝmfo léba lékpo mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: From the cloud a voice spoke, “This is my chosen Son. Listen to what he says!”
translation_verse: Mfó ǝmǝ bánɔ ɔkɔɛ utsyuǝ lǝ lɛtɔntɔ nǝmǝ kafo wǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Nyǝ nwǝ mfo ni mɔ Ubi Wǝ Bákpo Ɔhile Bǝtsyǝ. Bitsyue wǝ ditiki koto!”

english_verse: After the voice had spoken, Peter, John, and James saw only Jesus. For some time they kept quiet and did not say anything about what they had seen. Jesus Heals a Boy (Matthew
translation_verse: Se ditiki eto ɔkɔɛ ǝmǝ lélaa, bǝnyǝ bǝnkǝ Yesu mate ete díńyǝ mfó. Bakasebi bamǝ éfi nnya bǝnyǝ mfó bákula, bántɛyi utidi saa nnya kulesa lǝ lefe nǝmǝ. Yesu Ála Lɛwɔnɔ Bua Utsyiko Lǝ Osaibi Utsyuǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: A demon often attacks him and makes him scream. It shakes him until he foams at the mouth, and it won't leave him until it has completely worn the boy out.
translation_verse: Lɛwɔnɔ bua ditsyuǝ ǝsiǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ nya diǝtǝ woafa bembembe. Diǝtinkǝsǝ wǝ kekleke kǝmuǝ wǝ kasɔ lǝ kasɔ nya waafo afabe nya efu laabɔ wǝ lǝ kɛnyɛ. Yeeyifo wǝ nko kekleke kaklɛ fɛ lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ laataka lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus said to them, “You people are stubborn and don't have any faith! How much longer must I be with you? Why do I have to put up with you?” Then Jesus said to the man, “Bring your son to me.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mi mmi eto betidi, beso biamfo mɛ kanɔ nya bitidi ato mmǝ? Nte lefe nǝ eto okle ele bǝ mfi nkɛ mi lǝ ɔflɔ isu ese? Nya nte lefe nǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ ele bǝ nkpe utu ntǝ mi fɛ lǝ ndu mi lǝ ɔflɔ.” Nya ɔ́tɛyi osani ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Kpa fǝ ubi ǝmǝ aboko mfo.”

english_verse: While the boy was being brought, the demon attacked him and made him shake all over. Jesus ordered the demon to stop. Then he healed the boy and gave him back to his father.
translation_verse: Kase ubi ǝmǝ nlɛ bubǝ koo, lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ ko dísiǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ dímuǝ wǝ lɛsɔ lǝ kasɔnti nya dítinkǝsǝ wǝ. Mfó nya Yesu díti lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ kusu nya ótsya ubi ǝmǝ nya úfi wǝ útǝ wǝ anto.

english_verse: But the disciples did not know what he meant. The meaning was hidden from them. They could not understand it, and they were afraid to ask. Who Is the Greatest? (Matthew
translation_verse: Fɛɛ wǝ bakasebi bamǝ mánnɔ asa nyamfo eto kasɔ. Iyifo lesa nǝ béfi bákula mǝ, fɛɛ báte sikpi lǝ kase bɔɔtɔ wǝ lesatsyuǝ itsyi lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ lǝ banɔ kasɔ. Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Utidi Wǝ Ni Ɔkplɛnyǝ Kenke Óte.

english_verse: Jesus' disciples were arguing about which one of them was the greatest.
translation_verse: Kǝnǝ kǝtsyuǝ ǝbǝ kédufǝ lǝ bakasebi bamǝ nti itsyi lǝ futsyuǝ ni ɔkplɛnyǝ onso lǝ mǝ nti.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking, and he had a child stand there beside him.
translation_verse: Nya se Yesu léte mǝ nsusu esoo, úfi dikpefi ditsyuǝ úbǝ úńyǝnsǝ lǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Then he said to his disciples, “When you welcome even a child because of me, you welcome me. And when you welcome me, you welcome the one who sent me. Whichever one of you is the most humble is the greatest.” For or against Jesus (Mark
translation_verse: Mfó nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Utidi wǝ ke loofo dikpefi nǝmfo lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝǝ, ófo mintsya. Nya utidi wǝ loofo mɛɛ, oofo utidi wǝ létsyese mɛ. Itsyise utidi wǝ laabokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ kenke lǝ mi ntii, wǝ ni utidi wǝ nso kenke nɛ.” Utidi Wǝ Ke Leenkisi Mii, Uńyǝ Mi Kama.

english_verse: John said, “Master, we saw a man using your name to force demons out of people. But we told him to stop, because he isn't one of us.”
translation_verse: Mfó ǝmǝ nya Yohanes lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute, búnyǝ utidi ɔni wǝ nlɛ awɔnɔ bua bola kǝlǝkǝ lǝ fǝ diye ǝsuǝ nya bɔ́tɛyi wǝ boǝnkǝ úsinkli ɔyɛ, itsyise umbǝ bo lenti.”

english_verse: Not long before it was time for Jesus to be taken up to heaven, he made up his mind to go to Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Nya se lefe nǝ ele bǝ Onanto kpa Yesu usuko kato nlɛ boyoo, Yesu áse uyi nkǝ wuusu Yerusalem.

english_verse: He sent some messengers on ahead to a Samaritan village to get things ready for him.
translation_verse: Ótsyese batɔnkpe bǝtsyuǝ nkǝ bátɔ bésu umǝ utsyuǝ wǝ nkpe lǝ Samaria eto kasɔ lǝ besu bǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtsyǝ itǝ wǝ bubǝ.

english_verse: But he was on his way to Jerusalem, so the people there refused to welcome him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se umǝ ǝmfo eto betidi léte bǝ wɔɔyɛ mfo ofe lǝ ɔtɔ lǝ Yerusalem esoo, bámfo wǝ.

english_verse: When the disciples James and John saw what was happening, they asked, “Lord, do you want us to call down fire from heaven to destroy these people?”
translation_verse: Mfó se bakasebi ba ni Yohanes ku Yakobo dínyǝ nko esoo, bátɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute, aala fǝ bokpadi ute utsyi kato ubǝ ɔtsylɔsǝ mǝ?”

english_verse: But Jesus turned and corrected them for what they had said.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtsyi ɔ́wuninsǝ, úyenki ókpe mǝ.

english_verse: Then they all went on to another village. Three People Who Wanted To Be Followers (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi bamǝ léfe bésu umǝ bamba. Betidi Bǝtsyuǝ Ála Bǝ Bǝǝtǝkǝko Yesu.

english_verse: Along the way someone said to Jesus, “I'll follow you anywhere!”
translation_verse: Se banyɛ bantɔɔ, osani utsyuǝ átɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Muutǝkǝko fǝ nsu kaka ke fantɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus said, “Foxes have dens, and birds have nests, but the Son of Man doesn't have a place to call his own.”
translation_verse: Mfó ǝmǝ nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nkpaflɔbɛ kpe ǝbiǝ nnya kafo baalabe, nya baklɔbɛ nkpe ayo. Fɛɛ Utidi Eto Ubi ǝmbǝ kaka wuuluǝ wǝ disi.”

english_verse: Jesus told someone else to come with him. But the man said, “Lord, let me wait until I bury my father.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi utidi bamba nkǝ, “Tǝkǝko mɛ.” Fɛɛ utidi ǝmfo nkǝ, “Bonamute, tǝ mɛ kusu lǝ nsu mbikǝ mɔ anto fɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Let the dead take care of the dead, while you go and tell about God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Mfó ǝmǝ nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Tǝ mba nsi nkpǝ fe bekpǝnkpǝ lǝ besu bebikǝ mǝ bekpǝnkpǝ tsyuǝ. Nya mii, bisu bikatɛyi Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eto ditiki nǝmǝ.”

english_verse: Then someone said to Jesus, “I want to follow you, Lord, but first let me go back and take care of things at home.”
translation_verse: Utidi ɔni tsya nkǝ, “Bonamute, muutǝkǝko fǝ. Fɛɛ tǝ mɛ kusu lǝ nsu nkla mɔ betidi fɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Anyone who starts plowing and keeps looking back isn't worth a thing to God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nwǝ ditsyǝ keyifo kasɔ ku dinwuǝ, fɛ weesinkli kabe kamaa, mǝńyǝ utǝ keyifo kǝtǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ.”

english_verse: He said to them: A large crop is in the fields, but there are only a few workers. Ask the Lord in charge of the harvest to send out workers to bring it in.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bɛkuɛnkǝ bia díkayo bulǝkǝ fui, fɛɛ beyifoyifo bamǝ emfui. Nyaso bɛlɛ ɔkuɛnsate ǝmǝ lekpakpa lǝ otsyese beyifoyifo lǝ bǝbǝ bawunsǝ lǝ bǝlǝkǝ bɛkuɛnkǝ biamǝ.

english_verse: Now go, but remember, I am sending you like lambs into a pack of wolves.
translation_verse: Bisu! Nlɛ mi botsyese fe asamubi lǝ bekiti eto nti.

english_verse: Don't take along a moneybag or a traveling bag or sandals. And don't waste time greeting people on the road.
translation_verse: Bientsyi atabitobe nye asatɔtɔ eto katobe nye afokpa, nya biǝnńyǝ lǝ kusu bisiǝsǝ kuutsyuǝ saa.

english_verse: As soon as you enter a home, say, “God bless this home with peace.”
translation_verse: “Diyo saa biudufǝ, bisiǝsǝ mǝ bɛtɛyi biǝnkǝ, ‘Diyuǝ itǝ diyo nǝmfo ku ni betidi.’

english_verse: If the people living there are peace-loving, your prayer for peace will bless them. But if they are not peace-loving, your prayer will return to you.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utidi utsyuǝ wǝ laala diyuǝ kpe lǝ mfóo, bitǝ lǝ mi diyuǝ lǝ ditǝkǝko futsyǝ ǝmǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ kuutsyuǝ saa ǝmbǝ lǝ mfóo, bidu ku mi diyuǝ eto kǝsiǝ kamǝ.
