english_verse: In a town there was once a judge who didn't fear God or care about people.
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Okponkpo bua utsyuǝ akɛ lǝ umǝ utsyuǝ wǝ dímankate Onanto sikpi nya wénkebu utidi tsya.

english_verse: In that same town there was a widow who kept going to the judge and saying, “Make sure that I get fair treatment in court.”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ kee, ɔkɔsiǝ utsyuǝ akɛ mfo wǝ díkesu wǝ ɔflɔ úsukalɛ wǝ lekpakpa nkǝ, ‘Lǝkǝ mɛ lǝ mɔ olo eto bulǝ ǝsuǝ.’

english_verse: For a while the judge refused to do anything. Finally, he said to himself, “Even though I don't fear God or care about people,
translation_verse: “Éfo lefe kpǝ, okponkpo ǝmǝ áni wényifo kulesa lǝ etiki nyamǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, ɔ́tɛyi wǝ ǝsuǝ nkǝ, ‘Ite bǝ maanté Onanto sikpi nya meemfi utidi keyifo kulesa,

english_verse: I will help this widow because she keeps on bothering me. If I don't help her, she will wear me out.”
translation_verse: lǝ bulǝ bo ɔkɔsiǝ ǝmfo nlɛ mɛ bulǝ esoo, moobe miǝ nwunsǝko wǝ nla wǝ olo eto etiki nyamǝ nlǝkǝ. Lenni nko, wǝǝmbɔyɛ bubǝ nya wǝǝmbutǝ nkɛ lɛnwɔ mfe mfe.’ ”

english_verse: The Lord said: Think about what that crooked judge said.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Bonamute dísukosǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bɛnɔ lesa nǝ okponkpo bua ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi.

english_verse: Won't God protect his chosen ones who pray to him day and night? Won't he be concerned for them?
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, yuubǝ bǝ Onanto embulǝkǝ wǝ betidi ba leewi kakpadi wǝ ketsye ku kakɔmi kato ola kǝtǝ wǝ bǝ ɔwunseko mǝǝ? Nye bomu ebu fǝnkǝ wǝ ofe kama lǝ mǝ bulǝkǝ ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: He will surely hurry and help them. But when the Son of Man comes, will he find on this earth anyone with faith? A Pharisee and a Tax Collector
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ Onanto ebokpo lekpo nya wuutǝ mǝ lɛbɛ lamfolamfo. Fɛɛ lǝ Utidi Eto Ubi ǝbǝǝ, wuunyǝ betidi ba léfo wǝ bánɔ?” Yesu Átɛyi Lekpa Itsyi Lǝ Farisinyǝ Utsyuǝ Ku Nwǝ Laafo Oko Utsyuǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus told a story to some people who thought they were better than others and who looked down on everyone else:
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi lekpa nǝmfo utǝ betidi ba leebu bǝ mǝ kakle hã ni basɛɛ nya bensi embunyǝ utidi sa wǝ ntǝ fǝ mǝ.

english_verse: The Pharisee stood over by himself and prayed, “God, I thank you that I am not greedy, dishonest, and unfaithful in marriage like other people. And I am really glad that I am not like that tax collector over there.
translation_verse: Farisinyǝ ǝmǝ ǝlǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ lete nya óto ola nkǝ, ‘Onanto, maasɔ fǝ ani, itsyise maansɛsǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ atabi ǝsuǝ, nya meenyifo utidi kabua, nya maankpo kusiǝ fe kase betidi bamba leeyifo. Nya maasɔ fǝ ani tsya, itsyise minte fe nwǝ laafo oko wǝ ńyǝ mmǝ tsya seka.

english_verse: I go without eating for two days a week, and I give you one tenth of all I earn.”
translation_verse: Maakle kɛnyɛ eyi ǝnuǝ lǝ kɔsida saa ǝsuǝ. Nya meefi lesa nǝ kee minyǝ eto lekpafosile kǝtǝ fǝ.’

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “When the two men went home, it was the tax collector and not the Pharisee who was pleasing to God. If you put yourself above others, you will be put down. But if you humble yourself, you will be honored.” Jesus Blesses Little Children (Matthew
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi nkǝ, se besinkli bésu ayo, nwǝ laafo oko ǝmǝ ale kɛnkɛnkɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi nya inni Farisinyǝ ǝmǝ. Itsyise utidi saa wǝ laabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato, Onanto ebobokosǝ wǝ kasɔ. Nya utidi saa wǝ laaboko sǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔɔ, Onanto ebobesǝ wǝ kato.” Yesu Aala Bekpefi Eto Etiki Tinti.

english_verse: Some people brought their little children for Jesus to bless. But when his disciples saw them doing this, they told the people to stop bothering him.
translation_verse: Betidi bǝtsyuǝ éfi mǝ bebi báboko Yesu ɔflɔ, katɛyi bǝ ufi wǝ ani utǝkǝ lǝ mǝ. Se Yesu eto bakasebi dínyǝ nyamfo, béyǝnki bákpe betidi bamǝ lǝ nnya eso.

english_verse: will be given much more in this life. And in the future world they will have eternal life.” Jesus Again Tells about His Death (Matthew
translation_verse: wuunyǝ asa nyamfó eto okle kpǝ lǝ nkpǝ bomfo kǝmiǝ ku nkpǝ bo lǝmbɔkɛ kalokɔ ku lǝ lefe nǝ luubǝ tsya kǝmiǝ.” Yesu Esi Údi Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Wǝ Ukpǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus took the twelve apostles aside and said: We are now on our way to Jerusalem. Everything that the prophets wrote about the Son of Man will happen there.
translation_verse: Yesu ákpa wǝ bakasebi lefosi inuǝ ba úkǝlǝkǝ mate hã óboko wǝ ɔflɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bɛnɔ! Bɔtɔ lǝ Yerusalem, kaka asa nnya kenke Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛwɔni bǝtsyǝ lǝ mɛ, Utidi Eto Ubi ǝsuǝ, luubǝ itǝ nko.

english_verse: An important man asked Jesus, “Good Teacher, what must I do to have eternal life?”
translation_verse: Yudafɔ eto uninǝ utsyuǝ átɔ Yesu nkǝ, “Oteasa sɛɛ, be ele bǝ nyifo fɛ lǝ nyǝ nkpǝ manlo?”

english_verse: He told Jesus, “I have obeyed all these commandments since I was a young man.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya utidi ǝmǝ dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Ntsyue afi nyamfo kenke koto kukɔnɔ, itsyi lǝ mɔ sikpefi lefe kǝ.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he said, “There is one thing you still need to do. Go and sell everything you own! Give the money to the poor, and you will have riches in heaven. Then come and be my follower.”
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛnɔ wǝ ditiki nǝmǝ, ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Ibu lesa lɔni ele bǝ yifo. Fi bikǝ bia kenke nte fǝ ate, lǝ efi atabi nyamfó ǝtǝ bakombo. Nyamfo luutǝ ǝnyǝ bikǝ ǝtsyǝ lǝ Onanto eto kato nɛ. Nyamfo kama lǝ edu ǝbǝ ǝtǝkǝko mɛ.”

english_verse: When the man heard this, he was sad, because he was very rich.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lefe nǝ osani ǝmǝ lɛnɔ nya mfo, ǝsuǝ ába wǝ itsyise bikǝ kpǝ kpe wǝ.

english_verse: Jesus saw how sad the man was. So he said, “It's terribly hard for rich people to get into God's kingdom!
translation_verse: Yesu ǝnyǝ kase ǝsuǝ léba wǝ nya údi etiki ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Ekpe ale itǝ otabinyǝ fɛ lǝ ofo Onanto eto sekakedikɔ budufɔ!

english_verse: In fact, it's easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to get into God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Nya ekpe ale itǝ otabinyǝ bǝ lǝ udufǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ, enso kase ɔtɔmli ku lekoko lɔɔyɛ lǝ okasa eto ofo ofe.”

english_verse: When the crowd heard this, they asked, “How can anyone ever be saved?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya betidi ba lɛnɔ nyamfo lɛtɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛ owoe kon luunyǝ bofo?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “There are some things that people cannot do, but God can do anything.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lesa nǝ utidi lembofo buyifoo, iyuǝ itǝ Onanto ku buyifo.”

english_verse: Peter said, “Remember, we left everything to be your followers!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Petro lɛtɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Bebe, bo áyani bo ayo eto asa kenke butsyǝ nya búbǝ búntǝkǝko fǝ.”

english_verse: He will be handed over to foreigners, who will make fun of him, mistreat him, and spit on him.
translation_verse: Betidi ebufi mɛ bakpe lǝ betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ eto ani bǝ lǝ befi mɛ beyifo ǝmǝnsa. Booka mɛ nya bootufǝ ntufǝ bakpo mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They will beat him and kill him, but three days later he will rise to life.
translation_verse: Bɔɔblɛ wǝ nya boolo wǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nsi wootaka utsyi ɔkɔmǝ ubǝ.”

english_verse: When Jesus was coming close to Jericho, a blind man sat begging beside the road.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝ Yesu ńlɛ bɔnyi kafi Yerikoo, unǝmba utsyuǝ ǝsiǝ lǝ kusu ɔflɔ mfó úkatɔ asa.

english_verse: The man heard the crowd walking by and asked what was happening.
translation_verse: Se ɔ́nɔ betidi kpǝ ba nlɛ bofe eto kuduu, ɔ́tɔ nkǝ, “Be nlɛ bubǝ?”

english_verse: Some people told him that Jesus from Nazareth was passing by.
translation_verse: Bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Yesu Nasaretnyǝ uni nlɛ bofe.”

english_verse: So the blind man shouted, “Jesus, Son of David, have pity on me!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya ófa bembembe nkǝ, “Yesu, Oka David eto ubi! Be mɛ lǝ ǝnyǝ mɛ kaminsǝ!”

english_verse: The people who were going along with Jesus told the man to be quiet. But he shouted even louder, “Son of David, have pity on me!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya betidi ba ntɔ sɛtɔ dínyenki bákpe wǝ bátɛyi bǝnkǝ údika. Fɛɛ mɔmɔ bomu óbesǝ ɔkɔɛ kato ófa bembembe nkǝ, “David eto ubi! Be mɛ lǝ ǝnyǝ mɛ kaminsǝ!”

english_verse: Jesus stopped and told some people to bring the blind man over to him. When the blind man was getting near, Jesus asked,
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya eso Yesu ále únyǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ bakpa unǝmba ǝmǝ baboko wǝ ɔflɔ. Se úbǝ óyo wǝ ɔflɔ, Yesu átɔ wǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: “What do you want me to do for you?” “Lord, I want to see!” he answered.
translation_verse: “Be faala fǝ nyifo ntǝ fǝ?” Unǝmba ǝmǝ ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Anto, nla miǝ lǝ nsi nnyǝ asa.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Look and you will see! Your eyes are healed because of your faith.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nyalɛ sinkli ǝnyǝ asa! Fǝ bofokanɔ átsya fǝ.”

english_verse: At once the man could see, and he went with Jesus and started thanking God. When the crowds saw what happened, they praised God.
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo, usinkli únyǝ asa nnya útǝkǝko Yesu nya ɔ́yɛ ɔntɔ ɔnlɛ Onanto bɔtɛsǝ. Nya se betidi kpǝ bamfó dínyǝ nyamfoo, mǝmblɛ kenke átɛsǝ Onanto.

english_verse: Jesus was heading his way, and Zacchaeus wanted to see what he was like. But Zacchaeus was a short man and could not see over the crowd. So he ran ahead and climbed up into a sycamore tree.
translation_verse: Nyaso útsyetsyi ɔ́tɔ betidi bamfo sɛtɔ nya óbe kuyi bǝ lǝ unyǝ Yesu, itsyise óte nkǝ wuubǝ ɔyɛ mfo.

english_verse: When Jesus got there, he looked up and said, “Zacchaeus, hurry down! I want to stay with you today.”
translation_verse: Se Yesu léyo kuyi komǝ kalɔɔ, úkǝnǝ úńyǝ nya óbesǝ ǝnǝmi kato nya ɔ́tɛyi Sakeo nkǝ, “Sakeo, kɔse lǝ ayifǝ ǝbǝ kasɔ, itsyise fǝ diyo mɔɔsɔnɔ mi nɛ.”

english_verse: Zacchaeus hurried down and gladly welcomed Jesus.
translation_verse: Sakeo ákɔse ɔ́yifǝ úbǝ kasɔ nya útǝ Yesu edufǝ ku disuǝyuǝ tinti.

english_verse: Everyone who saw this started grumbling, “This man Zacchaeus is a sinner! And Jesus is going home to eat with him.”
translation_verse: Betidi ba dínyǝ nyamfó étsyiko etiki budi kawɔnɔnɔ lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ katɛyi bǝ, “Osani ǝmfo esukayɛ utidi ǝmfo wǝ ni obuayifo eto diyo.”

english_verse: Later that day Zacchaeus stood up and said to the Lord, “I will give half of my property to the poor. And I will now pay back four times as much to everyone I have ever cheated.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Sakeo létaka úńyǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi Bonamute ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Anto! Muufi mɔ bikǝ bia nkpe mɛ kenke eto kutsyǝ ntǝ bakombo. Nya betidi ba kenke eto bikǝ míntafa mímfoo, moofo mǝ nnya kayo eto sena ntsyǝ lǝ nnya kɛnyɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to Zacchaeus, “Today you and your family have been saved, because you are a true son of Abraham.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mmi ǝmfo bofo ǝbǝ diyo nǝmfo, itsyise utidi wǝ mfo tsya eyifo Abraham eto kafo eto ubi.

english_verse: The Son of Man came to look for and to save people who are lost.” A Story about Ten Servants (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubii, mbǝ miǝ lǝ nlǝkǝ betidi ba kenke lénya kusu mboko nkpǝ.” Yesu Átɛyi Lekpa Itsyi Lǝ Atabi Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But they said, “Sir, he already has ten times as much!”
translation_verse: “Fɛɛ betidi bamfo átɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, ‘Bonamute, uyifoyifo ǝmfó ebunyǝ atabi eto etobe lefosi útsyǝ!’

english_verse: But the people of his country hated him, and they sent messengers to the foreign country to say, “We don't want this man to be our king.”
translation_verse: “Fɛɛ osani ǝmfo eto umǝ eto betidi ékekisi wǝ, nyaso bátsyese batɔnkpe bǝtsyuǝ bǝtǝkǝko wǝ bǝ besu batɛyi Okankplɛ nkǝ, ‘Boanla boǝ osani ǝmfo di bo oka.’

english_verse: He told them, “Go into the next village, where you will find a young donkey that has never been ridden. Untie the donkey and bring it here.
translation_verse: Mfó nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bikatɔ lǝ umǝ kɛkɛ wǝ nkpe sɛtɔ mfó. Nya lǝ bɛlɛ wǝ budufǝǝ, biunyǝ ɔflimu eto lɛkpɔ ditsyuǝ nǝ bátsyasǝ lǝ ukuǝ bǝńyǝsǝ nǝ utidi kuutsyuǝ saa dímǝnsiǝ tɔ unyǝ. Benyankli ni ku ukuǝ lǝ bifi wǝ beboko mfo.

english_verse: The first servant came and said, “Sir, with the money you gave me I have earned ten times as much.”
translation_verse: “Uyifoyifo tutɛ ǝbǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, ‘Bonamute, nnyǝ atabi eto etobe lefosi ntǝkǝ lǝ ɔni ǝmǝ fǝtǝ mɛ mfó ǝsuǝ.’

english_verse: The second one came and said, “Sir, with the money you gave me, I have earned five times as much.”
translation_verse: “Uyifoyifo nuǝfǝ tsya ǝbǝ ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, ‘Bonamute, nnyǝ atabi eto etobe ɛnɔ ntǝkǝ lǝ ɔni wǝ fǝtǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ!’

english_verse: Another servant came and said, “Sir, here is your money. I kept it safe in a handkerchief.
translation_verse: “Uyifoyifo bamba ǝbǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, ‘Bonamute, nyǝ fǝ atabi eto otobe ɔni wǝ fǝtǝ mɛ. Mfí nnya nkle lǝ mɔ ofiamɛ ǝsuǝ nkula.

english_verse: Why didn't you put my money in the bank? On my return, I could have had the money together with interest.”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ eyi nkoo, beso fémemfi mɔ atabi esu akpe lǝ atabi kǝtsyǝkɔ? Mfóo, nyi miǝ muunyǝ kutǝkǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ lǝ nsinkli ntsyi mbǝ.’

english_verse: Then he said to some other servants standing there, “Take the money away from him and give it to the servant who earned ten times as much.”
translation_verse: “Mfó nya ɔ́tɛyi betidi ba ńyǝ mfo nkǝ, ‘Bɛlɛ atabi nyamǝ befo lǝ wǝ ani bitǝ uyifoyifo wǝ nkpe atabi eto etobe lefosi.’

english_verse: The king replied, “Those who have something will be given more. But everything will be taken away from those who don't have anything.
translation_verse: “Mfó nya Onamute ǝmǝ dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, ‘Nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, utidi wǝ asa ntee, wǝ ni nwǝ Onanto luutǝ okpe enso nɛ. Nya utidi wǝ kulesa lentee, nnya nte wǝ kulaa tsyaa, bɔɔlɛ ni bafo wǝ lǝ ani.

english_verse: Now bring me the enemies who didn't want me to be their king. Kill them while I watch!” Jesus Enters Jerusalem (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, binǝ mɔ balo ba dímanla bǝ ndi seka lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ beboko mfo lǝ belo mǝ lǝ mɔ ǝnǝmi.’ ” Yesu Édufǝ Yerusalem.

english_verse: When Jesus had finished saying all this, he went on toward Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ asa nyamfo ólosǝǝ, ɔ́tɔ mǝ sɛtɔ úsu Yerusalem.

english_verse: As he was getting near Bethphage and Bethany on the Mount of Olives, he sent two of his disciples on ahead.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ ɔnlɛ Betfage ku Betania bɔfi lǝ Nnuǝbi eto Eyi eto Kɔtini ɔflɔɔ, ótsyese wǝ bakasebi inuǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ bakatɔ.

english_verse: If anyone asks why you are doing this, just say, ‘The Lord needs it.’ ”
translation_verse: Lǝ utidi utsyuǝ atɔ mi lesa nǝ eso bényankli nii, bɛtɛyi wǝ biǝnkǝ, ‘Bonamute nlɛ ni bohiã.’ ”

english_verse: They went off and found everything just as Jesus had said.
translation_verse: Bakasebi bamǝ áyifǝ lǝ kusu bésu bǝnyǝ lesa saa fe kase Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ.

english_verse: While they were untying the donkey, its owners asked, “Why are you doing that?”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lefe nǝ bǝńyǝ banlɛ ubuki ǝmǝ bonyankli kǝlǝkǝǝ, ubuki ǝmǝ eto basate átɔ mǝ bǝnkǝ, “Beso bɛnlɛ wǝ bonyankli?”

english_verse: They answered, “The Lord needs it.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya bakasebi bamǝ dítǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute ahiã wǝ.”

english_verse: Then they led the donkey to Jesus. They put some of their clothes on its back and helped Jesus get on.
translation_verse: Nya béfi ubuki ǝmǝ báboko Yesu. Mfó nya béfi mǝ mfia bésensǝ bákpo lǝ ubuki ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ nya báwunsǝko Yesu óbe úsiǝ lǝ wǝ.

english_verse: And as he rode along, the people spread clothes on the road in front of him.
translation_verse: Se úsiǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ nya báyɛ bantɔɔ, betidi bǝtsyuǝ éfi mǝ mfia bésensǝ bákpo lǝ kusu.

english_verse: When Jesus started down the Mount of Olives, his large crowd of disciples were happy and praised God because of all the miracles they had seen.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu ńlɛ bɔnyi kafi Yerusalem lǝ kusu kaka ɔnlɛ Nnuǝbi eto Eyi eto Kɔtini bɔyifǝ kǝbǝǝ, wǝ bakasebi kpǝ bamǝ étsyiko Onanto ani bɔsɔ nya báto keyudu banlɛ bofa bembembe lǝ asa kplɛ nnya bǝnyǝ eso.

english_verse: They shouted, “Blessed is the king who comes in the name of the Lord! Peace in heaven and glory to God.”
translation_verse: Nya bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Atɛsǝ itǝ Oka wǝ nlɛ bubǝ lǝ Bonamute eto diye ǝsuǝ! Diyuǝ lǝ lefo kato kenke. Nya diyǝnde itǝ Onanto!”

english_verse: Some Pharisees in the crowd said to Jesus, “Teacher, make your disciples stop shouting!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Farisifɔ ba lɛkɛ lǝ sitiditu siamǝ nti lɛtɛyi Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, ninko fǝ bakasebi lǝ bayɛ kudu bokpo!”

english_verse: When Jesus came closer and could see Jerusalem, he cried
translation_verse: Kase Yesu lɛyɛ ɔntɔ lǝ Yerusalem kedufǝkɔɔ, nya únyǝ umǝ ǝmǝǝ, úwi keku lǝ wǝ disi.

english_verse: and said: It is too bad that today your people don't know what will bring them peace! Now it is hidden from them.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nla sitinti miǝ lǝ nnya ete biunyǝ bete mmi eto diyi nǝmfo eto lesa nǝ loohiã itǝ bǝ lǝ binyǝ diyuǝ ini! Fɛɛ ibǝ ese mɔmɔɔ, bɛnlɛ bunyǝ lǝ bete!

english_verse: Jerusalem, the time will come when your enemies will build walls around you to attack you. Armies will surround you and close in on you from every side.
translation_verse: Lefe ditsyuǝ ebubǝ se mi balo luuńyǝ batsyilama mi lǝ kalebe saa kenke. Nya booti ǝbiǝ kenke nya kulesa lembofo budufǝ nye kabɔ kǝbǝ lekple.

english_verse: They will level you to the ground and kill your people. Not one stone in your buildings will be left on top of another. This will happen because you did not see that God had come to save you. Jesus in the Temple (Matthew
translation_verse: Betidi ebɔtsylɔsǝ umǝ mfo kenke nya boolo betidi ba nkpe lǝ wǝ kenke. Nya leba ku ditsyuǝ sa embubu ditǝkǝ lǝ ni kǝtsyǝkɔ. Itsyise bɛni nya bíǝnyǝ lǝ bete lefe nǝ Onanto díbǝ nkǝ lǝ ofo mi lǝ nkpǝ!” Yesu Ála Mba Laate Bikǝ Lǝ Onanto Eto Kedikǝtǝkɔ.

english_verse: When Jesus entered the temple, he started chasing out the people who were selling things.
translation_verse: Yesu ésu údufǝ Onanto eto kedikǝtǝkɔ nya útsyiko mba nlɛ bikǝ bote mfó bola kabɔsǝ.

english_verse: He told them, “The Scriptures say, ‘My house should be a place of worship.’ But you have made it a place where robbers hide!”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝ Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, ‘Mɔ diyoo, betidi ebokpadi ni bǝ diyo kaka betidi laato ola.’ Nya mi dífi mfó befianisǝ beyu eto kabiɔkɔ!”

english_verse: Each day, Jesus kept on teaching in the temple. So the chief priests, the teachers of the Law of Moses, and some other important people tried to have him killed.
translation_verse: Diyi saa, Yesu ákate asa lǝ Onanto eto Kedikǝtǝkɔ mfó. Onanto eto besumunyǝ ninǝ ku Afi eto bateasa ku betidi eto batɔnkotɔnko ála bǝ lǝ balo wǝ.

english_verse: But they could not find a way to do it, because everyone else was eager to listen to him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bǝnyǝ kusu ko ǝsuǝ bɔɔyɛ, itsyise betidi kpǝ akɛ mfó ba eto ato léfo wǝ etiki nyamǝ kekleke eso.

english_verse: The spies said to him, “Teacher, we know you teach the truth about what God wants people to do. And you treat everyone with the same respect, no matter who they are.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya esoo, mba laabio kanɔ asa bamfó ésu Yesu ɔflɔ. Nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, buyi boǝnkǝ asa nnya faatɛyi ku nnya fate kenke eyifo etiki tlolololo. Nya buyi tsya boǝ aambe utidi eto ǝnǝmi lǝ alɛ asa buyifo. Bomu aate ɔnukualɛtiki nnya ǝsuǝ Onanto laala nkǝ betidi yifo.

english_verse: The Sadducees did not believe that people would rise to life after death. So some of them came to Jesus
translation_verse: Sadukifɔ bǝtsyuǝ mba laatɛyi bǝnkǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ ensi embotakaa, ǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ,

english_verse: When God raises people from death, whose wife will this woman be? All seven brothers had married her.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, diyi nǝ ǝsuǝ bekpǝnkpǝ luusinkli bataka, owoe eto usiǝ usio ǝmǝ luudi se mǝmblɛ kenke dífi wǝ lǝ lefe nǝ lefe mǝ?”

english_verse: asked him, “What right do you have to do these things? Who gave you this authority?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya bǝbǝ bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Tɛyi bo ǝsuǝale nnya fankpe fɛ feeyifo asa nyamfo eto okle. Nya owoe dítǝ fǝ ǝsuǝale nyamǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “I want to ask you a question.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Bitǝ lǝ ntɔ mi etiki ǝtsyuǝ lǝ nnɔ.

english_verse: Who gave John the right to baptize? Was it God in heaven or merely some human being?”
translation_verse: Nte ǝsuǝale nnya Yohanes lɛkɛ fɛ úyifo ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa útǝ betidi, Onanto ɔflɔ itsyi lee, betidi bomu ɔflɔ itsyi?”

english_verse: They talked this over and said to each other, “We can't say God gave John this right. Jesus will ask us why we didn't believe John.
translation_verse: Mfó nya bétsyiko kǝnǝ kasɔ lǝ mǝ nti katɛyi bǝ, “Be ele bǝ bɔtɛyi? Lǝ bɔ́tɛyi boǝ Onanto ɔflɔ únyǝ ǝsuǝale nyamǝ utsyiko, ɔtɔ bo nkǝ, ‘Be díbǝ eso biamfó Yohanes bɛnɔ?’

english_verse: And we can't say it was merely some human who gave John the right to baptize. The crowd will stone us to death, because they think John was a prophet.”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bɔtɛyi boǝ utidi ɔflɔ ófo nnya utsyiko, katsyakɔ eto betidi bamfo kenke ebubǝ bakpɔ bo aba, itsyise mǝmblɛ kenke áfo bánɔ bǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi wǝ Yohanes ni nɛ.”

english_verse: So they told Jesus, “We don't know who gave John the right to baptize.”
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso bǝlǝkǝ kɛnyɛ bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Boante kaka únyǝ ǝsuǝale nyamǝ útsyiko.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Then I won't tell you who gave me the right to do what I do.” Renters of a Vineyard (Matthew
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu tsya lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nko ke eso mintsya mǝmbɔtɛyi mi kaka mimfo ǝsuǝale fɛ meeyifo asa nyamfo eto okle.” Yesu Átɛyi Lekpa Itsyi Lǝ Opanyǝ Utsyuǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Guard against the teachers of the Law of Moses! They love to walk around in long robes, and they like to be greeted in the market. They want the front seats in the synagogues and the best seats at banquets.
translation_verse: “Bebe kukɔnɔ lǝ afi eto bateasa ǝsuǝ. Betidi ba laala botsyilama lǝ mǝ awu kplɛ kplɛ ǝsuǝ. Nya baala bǝ betidi kǝsiǝsǝ mǝ ku dibu lǝ asi kafo. Mǝ laala nlebe kplɛ busiǝ lǝ Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ nya baala ndikɔ kpaa busiǝ lǝ eyikedikɔ.

english_verse: Jesus told the people this story: A man once planted a vineyard and rented it out. Then he left the country for a long time.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi bǝtidi bamǝ lekpa nǝmfo nkǝ, “Lǝ lefe nǝ lefe mǝ, osani utsyuǝ áfo kudiyi eto ɔkuɛ utsyuǝ. Se úsu kusu kutsyuǝ nkǝ lǝ usu usiǝ itǝ lefe nǝ dikulǝ esoo, úfi wǝ ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ ókpe lǝ beyifoyifo bǝtsyuǝ eto ani.

english_verse: When it was time to harvest the crop, he sent a servant to ask the renters for his share of the grapes. But they beat up the servant and sent him away without anything.
translation_verse: Se lefe léyo bǝ betsyiko eyibibi nyamǝ bɔlɛɛ, ótsyese wǝ uyifoyifo utsyuǝ nkǝ usu ofo wǝ kedikɔ lǝ ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ beyifoyifo ɔflɔ oboko wǝ. Fɛɛ beyifoyifo bamǝ áblɛ uyifoyifo ǝmǝ nya bála wǝ babɔsɛ, nya bǝntǝ wǝ kulesa.

english_verse: When the renters saw the owner's son, they said to one another, “Someday he will own the vineyard. Let's kill him! Then we can have it all for ourselves.”
translation_verse: “Fɛɛ se beyifoyifo bamǝ dínyǝ ubi ǝmǝ, bátɛyi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, ‘Biǝnyǝ ɔkuɛnsate ǝmǝ eto ubi kosate ni nwǝ mfo. Bitǝ lǝ bolo wǝ ete wǝ bikǝ biamfo kenke lǝ befiani bo bele!’

english_verse: I'll tell you what. He will come and kill those renters and let someone else have his vineyard.” When the people heard this, they said, “This must never happen!”
translation_verse: Nla miǝ bete biǝ woolo beyifoyifo bamǝ kenke nya wuufi ɔkuɛ ǝmǝ okpe lǝ beyifoyifo bamba lǝ ani.” Se betidi bamǝ lɛnɔ nko, bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Owo lo! Yanle bǝ ibǝ nko!”

english_verse: The chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses knew that Jesus was talking about them when he was telling this story. They wanted to arrest him right then, but they were afraid of the people. Paying Taxes (Matthew
translation_verse: Afi eto bateasa ku Onanto eto besumunyǝ eto beninǝ ákpe nkɛale bǝ lǝ bǝmuǝ Yesu lamfolamfo, itsyise bǝnyǝ bǝ mǝ ɔnlɛ sitinti nyaso ɔ́tɛyi lekpa nǝmǝ nɛ. Fɛɛ báte betidi bamfo sikpi.

english_verse: Jesus' enemies kept watching him closely, because they wanted to hand him over to the Roman governor. So they sent some men who pretended to be good. But they were really spies trying to catch Jesus saying something wrong.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya esoo, bákabɛbɛ kusu bamba ko ǝsuǝ bɔɔyɛ bǝmuǝ wǝ. Bǝlǝkǝ betidi bǝtsyuǝ kalɔ kalɔ. Nya bákle ku mǝ bǝnkǝ besu Yesu ɔflɔ. Nya béyifo ǝsuǝ fe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ mǝ kosate léla bǝ lǝ bate itǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya bátsyese mǝ bǝnkǝ babio Yesu uyibi lǝ etiki ǝsuǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ kusu ko bɔɔyɛ befi wǝ bakpe lǝ Roma eto Aba eto uninǝ eto ani.

english_verse: “Show me a coin.” Then he asked, “Whose picture and name are on it?” “The Emperor's,” they answered.
translation_verse: “Bifi sika flubia eto atabi beboko lǝ mbe. Owoe eto disi ku diye ntǝkǝ mfo?”

english_verse: Then he told them, “Give the Emperor what belongs to him and give God what belongs to God.”
translation_verse: Bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Okankplɛ Kaisare eto ale ini.” Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bifi lesa saa nǝ ni Okankplɛ eto lele bitǝ Okankplɛ. Nya bifi lesa saa nǝ ni Onanto eto lele bitǝ Onanto.”

english_verse: Jesus' enemies could not catch him saying anything wrong there in front of the people. They were amazed at his answer and kept quiet. Life in the Future World (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya lǝ betidi eto ǝnǝmi mfóo, bamfó wǝ bumuǝ lǝ kulesa ǝsuǝ. Mǝ kɛnyɛ ǝkpǝ mǝ nya iyifo mǝ yani lǝ ditiki nǝ Yesu lɛtɛyi eso. Yesu Édi Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Bǝkpǝnkpǝ Eto Businkli Kataka Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: and said: Teacher, Moses wrote that if a married man dies and has no children, his brother should marry the widow. Their first son would then be thought of as the son of the dead brother.
translation_verse: “Oteasa, Moses áwɔni lǝ afi nnya útǝ bo nkǝ, ‘Lǝ osani utsyuǝ ǝkpǝ nya oyani wǝ usiǝ utsyǝ nya bánle bebi saa, nyalɛ ele bǝ osani ǝmfo eto ɔyimisani, fi usio ǝmǝ ufi. Nya wǝ ku ɔkɔsiǝ ǝmǝ lǝ bale bebi. Nya bebi bamfóo, betidi ebunyǝ mǝ fe osani wǝ dimankɛ ubi saa eto bale.’

english_verse: There were once seven brothers. The first one married, but died without having any children.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe ditsyuǝ, bayimisani ekuanse akɛ. Osaibi ninǝ éfi kusiǝ nya úbǝ úkpǝ nya wǝ ku wǝ usiǝ mánle ubi saa.

english_verse: The same thing happened to the third one. Finally, all seven brothers married this woman and died without having any children.
translation_verse: Utsyǝfǝ tsya nko kǝ. Nya lesa nǝmǝ diyifo nko itǝ bayimisani ekuanse bamfo kenke. Mǝmblɛ kenke ǝkpǝ lǝ lefǝ nǝ mǝ kuutsyuǝ saa manle.

english_verse: At last the woman died.
translation_verse: Lǝ kalosǝkɔ kenke, usio ǝmǝ kosate ǝbǝ úkpǝ.

english_verse: Jesus answered: The people in this world get married.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Nkpǝ bomfo ǝsuǝ ete basani ku besio leefi bǝsiǝ kǝsiǝ bese.

english_verse: Some of the teachers of the Law of Moses said, “Teacher, you have given a good answer!”
translation_verse: Mfó afi eto bateasa bamfo eto bǝtsyuǝ dítǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, ǝtǝ mbuayɛ kukɔnɔ!”

english_verse: Jesus asked, “Why do people say that the Messiah will be the son of King David?
translation_verse: Yesu átɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ betidi lɛtɛyi bǝ Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ebutsyi Oka David eto bebi eto kafo?

english_verse: In the book of Psalms, David himself says, ‘The Lord said to my Lord, Sit at my right side
translation_verse: Nya Oka David ǝmǝ kosate átɛyi lǝ kusǝ eto kukue ǝsuǝ nkǝ, ‘Onamute ǝmǝ átɛyi mɔ Onamute nkǝ, “Si ǝsiǝ lǝ mɔ kodiani eto kutsyǝ

english_verse: until I make your enemies into a footstool for you.’
translation_verse: isu ese lefe nǝ muufi fǝ balo nkpe lǝ fǝ kokpa kalɔ.” ’

english_verse: David spoke of the Messiah as his Lord, so how can the Messiah be his son?” Jesus and the Teachers of the Law of Moses (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Oka David ákpadi wǝ nkǝ Onamutee, ntsyǝ íbǝ fɛ Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ luuyifo Oka David eto kafo eto ubi?” Yesu Ǝkǝ Wǝ Bakasebi Ato Itsyi Lǝ Afi Eto Bateasa Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: While everyone was listening to Jesus, he said to his disciples:
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝ betidi ba tã dínyǝ béketsyue ato lǝ asa nnya Yesu nlɛ bɔtɛyi, ɔ́tɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ,

english_verse: But they cheat widows out of their homes and then pray long prayers just to show off. These teachers will be punished most of all.
translation_verse: Beesu bakɔɛsiǝ ɔflɔ bǝ lǝ bawunsǝ ko mǝ, fɛɛ baawɛ mǝ kalɛ mǝ asa kafo. Nya baato kala kǝntsyɛ, kate ǝsuǝ lǝ betidi eto ǝnǝmi. Nyaso mǝ kotonǝnǝ ebɔkɛ ale eso utsyuǝ saa eto kole!”

english_verse: Before all this happens, you will be arrested and punished. You will be tried in your synagogues and put in jail. Because of me you will be placed on trial before kings and governors.
translation_verse: “Nya fɛ asa nyamfo luubǝ ibǝ, betidi ebumuǝ mi nya bookpe mi bulǝ, bate mi ohiã. Betidi ebokpa mi besuko akpokakpokɔ lǝ Yudafɔ eto ntsyakɔ nya bookpe mi lǝ ayo. Nya bookpa mi besuko baka ku Aba eto bǝnyɛsiǝ eto ǝnǝmi bǝ lǝ bakponko mi akpo lǝ mɔ disi eso.

english_verse: Some people were talking about the beautiful stones used to build the temple and about the gifts that had been placed in it. Jesus said,
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfóo, bakasebi bǝtsyuǝ akɛ mfó kedi etiki itsyi lǝ Onanto eto kedikǝtǝkɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya bátɛyi kase kedikǝtǝkɔ kamǝ laanɔ bobe ku kase aba nnya béfi báto diyo nǝmǝ laanɔ bobe ku asa nnya betidi dítǝ béfi bálɔ Onanto eto kedikǝtǝkɔ kamǝ. Mfó ǝmǝ nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: “Do you see these stones? The time is coming when not one of them will be left in place. They will all be knocked down.” Warning about Trouble (Matthew
translation_verse: “Lesa saa nǝ bɛnlɛ bunyǝ mfoo, lefe ditsyuǝ ebubǝ se leba saa lensiembubu lǝ ni kǝsiǝkɔ. Bomu betidi ebusense ditsyuǝ saa lekpo lǝ kasɔ.” Kanyinyǝnyǝ Ku Betidi Eto Bɔkpɔ Ku Mǝ Bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Some people asked, “Teacher, when will all this happen? How can we know when these things are about to take place?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, dimamfe yuubǝ itǝ nko? Nya be ini buufi bunyǝ lǝ bote boǝ lefe nǝ asa nyamfo luubǝ éboyo?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Don't be fooled by those who will come and claim to be me. They will say, “I am Christ!” and “Now is the time!” But don't follow them.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bińyǝ bikabe kusu itǝ bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa ǝmbɔwɛ mi okpe. Betidi kpǝ ebubǝ batɛyi bǝnkǝ mɔ ditiki bǝbǝ bulǝkǝ kate, bookǝbǝ katɛyi bǝnkǝ, ‘Mɔ uni,’ nya ‘Lefe nǝmǝ éboyo.’ Fɛɛ biǝntǝkǝko mǝ kama.

english_verse: When you hear about wars and riots, don't be afraid. These things will have to happen first, but this isn't the end.
translation_verse: Bíanté sikpi lǝ bɛnɔ lema eto kudu nya betidi letaka bǝńyǝ lǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝsuǝ. Asa nyamfo eto kakle ebutsyiko bubǝ, fɛɛ inni nya kasɔ ni bǝnkǝ kalosǝkɔ ebubǝ eyo elo.”

english_verse: Nations will go to war against one another, and kingdoms will attack each other.
translation_verse: Yesu esi úsukosǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Ese ebɔkpɔ ku mǝ bǝtsyuǝ, nya bekakedikɔ lɔɔbɔkpɔ ku mǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: There will be great earthquakes, and in many places people will starve to death and suffer terrible diseases. All sorts of frightening things will be seen in the sky.
translation_verse: Kasɔ ebutinkǝ kekleke. Nya kukpɛnsɛ tsya luubǝ kekleke. Nya efimbi akpa akpa tsya luubǝ nlebe nlebe kenke. Nya ekpinsa kpǝ luutsyiko bubǝ lǝ difule ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You will be betrayed by your own parents, brothers, family, and friends. Some of you will even be killed.
translation_verse: Mi anto mǝ ku bayimisani ku mi betidi ku mi bayɛtsyuǝ ebufi mi bakpe lǝ ani. Nya boolo mi bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Because of me, you will be hated by everyone.
translation_verse: Betidi ba tã ebukisi mi lǝ mɔ disi eso.

english_verse: If you are living in Judea at this time, run to the mountains. If you are in the city, leave it. And if you are out in the country, don't go back into the city.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ mfóo, betidi ba kenke nkpe lǝ Yudea, ele bǝ betsyetsyi bedu besu babiɔ lǝ atini ǝsuǝ lǝ babɔ lǝ kanyi ǝsuǝ. Nya betidi bakenke nkpe lǝ umǝnkplɛ ǝmǝ kafo, ele bǝ babɔ lǝ wǝ bedu. Nya betidi ba kenke nkpe lǝ mbuto ku kǝmǝ ka lɛfi mfo, yanle bǝ besu umǝnkplɛ ǝmǝ kafo.

english_verse: When you see Jerusalem surrounded by soldiers, you will know that it will soon be destroyed.
translation_verse: “Lefe nǝ bínyǝ biǝ bamamanyǝ esu bǝńyǝ batsyilama Yerusalem, ete biote biǝ umǝ ǝmfo eto boba kakpo lǝ kasɔ eto lefe eboyo.

english_verse: This time of punishment is what is written about in the Scriptures.
translation_verse: Itsyise lefe nǝ mfó ni kotonǝnǝ eto eyi nnya ele bǝ ibǝ fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue eto etiki léte.

english_verse: It will be an awful time for women who are expecting babies or nursing young children! Everywhere in the land people will suffer horribly and be punished.
translation_verse: Yɔɔkɛ ale tinti itǝ besio ba ni bafonlɛ ku bebiambe ba nlɛ bebi bɔyimisǝ. Kanyinyǝnyǝ kekleke kǝtsyuǝ ebubǝ kasɔ kamfo ǝsuǝ. Nya Onanto eto kotonǝnǝ ebubǝ betidi bamfo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then Jesus told them a story: When you see a fig tree or any other tree
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ lekpa ditsyuǝ nkǝ, “Bibu disi bitsyi lǝ kudiyi ku eyi bamba kenke ǝsuǝ bebe.

english_verse: So, when you see these things happening, you know that God's kingdom will soon be here.
translation_verse: Nko kǝ ini lǝ binyǝ biǝ asa nyamfo nlɛ bubǝǝ, bete biǝ Onanto eto Sekadidi siamǝ eto dibǝfe fe yaala lǝ eyo.

english_verse: Then the Son of Man will be seen, coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Utidi Eto Ubi ebɔbɔ ubǝ lǝ difule lǝ asɔmi loku kǝmiǝ lǝ ǝsuǝale kplɛ ku lǝ diyǝnde kplɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Strange things will happen to the sun, moon, and stars. The nations on earth will be afraid of the roaring sea and tides, and they won't know what to do.
translation_verse: “Ekpinsa kpǝ ebubǝ lǝ kofe ku kofande ku befandebi eto ǝnǝmi ǝsuǝ. Nya kasɔ eto betidi kenke eboyansǝ kusubebe saa. Nya sikpi kplɛ ebubǝ lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ lǝ kase lekpo eto kudu ku kase diuyǝnki nyanklaa eso.

english_verse: People will be so frightened that they will faint because of what is happening to the world. Every power in the sky will be shaken.
translation_verse: Ǝnǝmi ebutsyiko betidi bonanko lǝ sikpi sia luumuǝ mǝ lǝ lefe nǝ befi bǝńyǝ bensǝkǝ itǝ lesa nǝ luubǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kenke ǝsuǝ eso. Itsyise asa nnya nkpe lǝ difule ensiembuńyǝ lǝ nnya kǝńyǝnkɔ.

english_verse: You can be sure that some of the people of this generation will still be alive when all of this takes place.
translation_verse: “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ asa nyamfo kenke ebubǝ fɛ bǝtsyuǝ ba nsi nkpǝ mfo luukpǝ balo.

english_verse: like a trap. This day will surprise everyone on earth.
translation_verse: Nya yuuyifo fe kase uyibibiobio lǝǝlǝkǝ ubuki seka. Etsyise yuubǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kenke eto betidi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: putting out leaves, you know that summer will soon come.
translation_verse: Lǝ binyǝ biǝ afanto fɔfɔ etsyiko bɔbɔɔ, bete biǝ kasɔmite eboyo elo.

english_verse: The sky and the earth won't last forever, but my words will. A Warning
translation_verse: Kato ku kasɔ ebubǝ efe, fɛɛ mɔ etiki embubǝ efe kulefe. Ele Bǝ Bińyǝ Bikabe Kusu.

english_verse: Don't spend all of your time thinking about eating or drinking or worrying about life. If you do, the final day will suddenly catch you
translation_verse: “Bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ biemfi mi lefe bitǝ budi ku sitekpe eto disuǝyuǝ mate. Nya kuutsyuǝ memfi wǝ ǝsuǝ utǝ bɔkpɔ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto asa ǝsuǝ. Lenni nko, diyi nǝmǝ ebubǝ ditu mi lǝ kafuafua ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Watch out and keep praying that you can escape all that is going to happen and that the Son of Man will be pleased with you.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ lǝ bińyǝ bikato ola lefe saa bǝ lǝ binyǝ ǝsuǝale lǝ bɛbɔ befe lǝ keni saa ǝsuǝ lǝ lesa saa nǝ luubǝ mfo ǝsuǝ lǝ itǝ bǝ biofo buńyǝ lǝ mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi eto lekpokakpokɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus taught in the temple each day, and he spent each night on the Mount of Olives.
translation_verse: Lǝ eyi nyamfó kenke ǝsuǝǝ, Yesu éfi ɔ́lɛ betidi bamfo asa bote lǝ Onanto eto kedikǝtǝkɔ. Nya lǝ ditsyitsyo lefee, úkesu Nnuǝbi eto Eyi eto Kɔtini ékesu kalabe.

english_verse: Everyone got up early and came to the temple to hear him teach.
translation_verse: Nya olesiǝtu saa, betidi bamfo ékesu kedikǝtǝkɔ kamǝ lǝ banɔ wǝ asatete.

english_verse: They were very pleased and offered to pay Judas some money.
translation_verse: Bǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ, nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝ bootǝ wǝ atabi.

english_verse: I tell you I will not eat another Passover meal until it is finally eaten in God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Nya nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ mensiembudi ni bio isu ése lefe nǝ muudi ni lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ.”

english_verse: The chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses were looking for a way to get rid of Jesus, because they were afraid of what the people might do.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se Onanto eto besumunyǝ ninǝ mǝ ku afi eto bateasa díkate betidi bamfó sikpi esoo, bákabɛbɛ kusu ko ǝsuǝ bɔɔyɛ balo Yesu lǝ kabiɔbiɔ ǝsuǝ. Yuda Átɔnɔ Nkǝ Wuudu Yesu Utǝ.

english_verse: Jesus told them, “As you go into the city, you will meet a man carrying a jar of water. Follow him into the house
translation_verse: Nya útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lǝ bidufǝ Yerusalem eto umǝ ǝmǝǝ, osani utsyuǝ ebubǝ otsyako mi wǝ ntsyi ntu ku ɔlɔtsyi. Bitǝkǝko wǝ lǝ bidufǝ diyo nǝ wuudufǝ.

english_verse: Jesus got up from praying and went over to his disciples. They were asleep and worn out from being so sad.
translation_verse: Se Yesu létaka lǝ kaka ɔnlɛ ola boto mfóo, úsinkli úsu wǝ bakasebi bamǝ ɔflɔ. Nya úbǝ únyǝ nkǝ bálabe selabe itsyi lǝ lɛwɛnlo nǝ ǝsuǝ bakɛ eso.

english_verse: Judas went to talk with the chief priests and the officers of the temple police about how he could help them arrest Jesus.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yuda ésu Onanto eto besumunyǝ ninǝ ku Onanto eto kedikǝtǝkɔ eto mba laase mfó eto beninǝ ɔflɔ. Nya bédi etiki itsyi lǝ kusu ko ǝsuǝ wɔɔyɛ fɛ boomuǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: He agreed and started looking for a good chance to betray Jesus when the crowds were not around. Jesus Eats with His Disciples (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya Yuda tsya lɛtɔnɔ nko. Nyaso útsyiko lefe sɛɛ bɔbɛbɛ lǝ kusu ko ǝsuǝ wɔɔyɛ ufi Yesu okpe mǝ lǝ ani lǝ betidi bamǝ eto mante mante ǝsuǝ. Yesu Ǝmuǝ Ǝsuǝ Itǝ Ukpǝ Asa Bo Ɔ́yila Eto Diyi Budi.

english_verse: Jesus took a cup of wine in his hands and gave thanks to God. Then he told the apostles, “Take this wine and share it with each other.
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, Yesu éfi ditǝnǝkɔbe nya ɔ́sɔ ani. Nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Befo nyamfo lǝ binǝ bitǝ bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: The one who will betray me is here at the table with me!
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bete biǝ nwǝ dídu mɛ útǝǝ, si ɔlɛ kɔni bokpe ko mɛ lǝ ɔkpɛ ɔni mfo.

english_verse: You will eat and drink with me in my kingdom, and you will each sit on a throne to judge the twelve tribes of Israel. Jesus' Disciples Will Be Tested (Matthew
translation_verse: Biudi binǝ lǝ mɔ lesakedikɔ lǝ mɔ sekakedikɔ. Nya biusiǝ lǝ akankpomɛ ǝsuǝ lǝ bidi seka lǝ Israel eto lefosi atobi ǝnuǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ.” Yesu Átɛyi Utsyǝ Nkǝ Petro Ebutudi Kɛnyɛ Lǝ Wǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The day had come for the Festival of Thin Bread, and it was time to kill the Passover lambs.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, diyi nǝ baalo basamubi itǝ Ukpǝ Asa Bo Ɔ́yila eto Diyi itǝ Nnamfokuã eto Diyididi ǝbǝ léyo.

english_verse: So Jesus said to Peter and John, “Go and prepare the Passover meal for us to eat.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu létsyese Petro ku Yohanes ɔtɔnsǝ ku kɛnyɛ kamfo nkǝ, “Bisu bɛlɔ Ukpǝ Asa Bo Ɔ́yila eto didisa bitsyǝ itǝ bo budi.”

english_verse: But they asked, “Where do you want us to prepare it?”
translation_verse: Bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Sie faala fǝ bɔlɔ ni butsyǝ?”

english_verse: The Son of Man will die in the way that has been decided for him, but it will be terrible for the one who betrays him!”
translation_verse: Nya mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi, mbǝ nlɛ bofe fe kase Onanto lése uyi utsyǝ. Fɛɛ mbɔbuɛ itǝ utidi wǝ luudu mɛ utǝ.”

english_verse: Then the apostles started arguing about who would ever do such a thing. An Argument about Greatness
translation_verse: Mfó nya beetsyiko bǝtsyuǝ bɔtɔ kanɔ bǝ owoe luuyifo nyamfo. Owoe Ni Ɔkplɛ Lǝ Bakasebi Bamǝ Nti?

english_verse: he said to them, “I have very much wanted to eat this Passover meal with you before I suffer.
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Iyifo mɔ lelabi kokooko bǝ lǝ ndi Ukpǝ Asa Bo Ɔ́yila eto didisa nǝmfo ku mi fɛ lǝ nnyǝ kanyi.

english_verse: After the meal he took another cup of wine in his hands. Then he said, “This is my blood. It is poured out for you, and with it God makes his new agreement.
translation_verse: Nko ke tsya úfi ntǝ ku lɛkɔbe úfi utǝ mǝ lǝ didisa nǝmǝ kama nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Lɛkɔbetɔ nǝmfo eyifo Onanto eto ketsyue fɔfɔ ka utsyue utsyǝ fe ditsyǝbi, nǝ ni mɔ kɔtɔ ko mookpo lǝ kasɔ lǝ mi disi.

english_verse: You have stayed with me in all my troubles.
translation_verse: Bíokpe ɔkɔɛ koko bítǝkǝko mɛ lǝ mɔ lefe kekleke kenke ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: So I will give you the right to rule as kings, just as my Father has given me the right to rule as a king.
translation_verse: Nya fe kase mɔ Anto dítǝ mɛ ǝsuǝale nkǝ ndi sekaa, nko kǝ mintsya luutǝ mi ǝsuǝale nyamǝ eto okle nɛ.

english_verse: Jesus said, “Simon, listen to me! Satan has demanded the right to test each one of you, as a farmer does when he separates wheat from the husks.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi Simon Petro nkǝ, “Simon, Simon! Tsyue ato lǝ anɔ! Onanto ǝtǝ Obonsam kusu nkǝ oto mimblɛ obe lǝ usense mi nti, mba nkpe kɔnɔku mba lǝmbǝ kɔnɔ lǝ fe kase ɔkuɛmfo laaflɛ kamɔ kǝlǝkǝ lǝ kofo nti.

english_verse: Jesus asked his disciples, “When I sent you out without a moneybag or a traveling bag or sandals, did you need anything?” “No!” they answered.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɔ wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Lefe ditsyuǝ nǝ léfe se míntsyese mi kusu nya míntǝ bíentsyi otabitobe nye kusuyɛyɛtobe nye afɔkpa kuǝtsyuǝ, béhiã lesatsyuǝ?” Bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Kulesa mánhiã bo kula kon.”

english_verse: The disciples said, “Lord, here are two swords!” “Enough of that!” Jesus replied. Jesus Prays (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya bakasebi bamǝ lɛtɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute, bee! Nnyǝ nlanle nnuǝ nte mfo!” Mfó nya útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Isiǝ.” Yesu Áto Ola Lǝ Nnuǝbi Eto Eyi Eto Kɔtini Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Peter said, “Lord, I am ready to go with you to jail and even to die with you.”
translation_verse: Nya Petro lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute, nńyǝ nlɛ kusu bobe miǝ bonko fǝ kenke ebolabe lǝ Aba eto diyo nya lǝ nkpǝ ku fǝ kulaa tsya!”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Peter, I tell you that before a rooster crows tomorrow morning, you will say three times that you don't know me.” Moneybags, Traveling Bags, and Swords
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Petro, nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi miǝ ketsye kamfo fɛ ukusɛ luutǝ kɛnyɛɛ, ebutudi sitsyǝ fǝ enyi mɛ.” Otabitobe Ku Kusuyɛyɛtobe Ku Kalande Eto Butsyi.

english_verse: Do this because the Scriptures say, ‘He was considered a criminal.’ This was written about me, and it will soon come true.”
translation_verse: Nya nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue eto lesa nǝ báwɔni bákpe mfó lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, ‘Bákla wǝ bákpe lǝ betidi bua ntii,’ ele bǝ ibǝ itǝ nko lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ. Itsyise lesa nǝ báwɔni itsyi lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝǝ, lɛ bubǝ kǝtǝ.”

english_verse: He said to them, “Why are you asleep? Wake up and pray that you won't be tested.” Jesus Is Arrested (Matthew
translation_verse: Mfo nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Beso bɛnlɛ selabe? Betaka lǝ beto ola lǝ kase biembudufǝ lǝ botokabe ǝsuǝ.” Besumunyǝ Ninǝ Ǝmuǝ Yesu.

english_verse: “Father, if you will, please don't make me suffer by drinking from this cup. But do what you want, and not what I want.”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nto, lǝ alaa, lǝkǝ kanyi eto lɛkɔbe nǝmfo etsyiko lǝ mɔ ɔflɔ. Fɛɛ menyifo lǝ mɔ lelabi ǝsuǝ, bomu lǝ fǝ lele ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus went out to the Mount of Olives, as he often did, and his disciples went with him.
translation_verse: Yesu áyɛ ɔ́bɔ lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ nya úsu Nnuǝbi eto Eyi eto Kɔtini ǝsuǝ fe kase woala buyifo. Nya wǝ bakasebi bamǝ tsya dítǝkǝko wǝ.

english_verse: When they got there, he told them, “Pray that you won't be tested.”
translation_verse: Se óyo kaka ǝmǝǝ, Yesu átɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Beto ola, lǝ bɛyɛ disi butǝ le botokabe ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus walked on a little way before he knelt down and prayed,
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, óyani mǝ utsyǝ mfó ɔ́yɛ usu sɛtɔ sɛkɛ nya óse akonki óto ola.

english_verse: Jesus was in great pain and prayed so sincerely that his sweat fell to the ground like drops of blood.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ kanyi kplɛ ka ɔnlɛ bunyǝ esoo, usi óto ola kekleke ókpe. Nya diwi nǝ lɛbɔ lekpo wǝ eyifo fe atɔbo nya nlɛ bola kakpo lǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: While Jesus was still speaking, a crowd came up. It was led by Judas, one of the twelve apostles. He went over to Jesus and greeted him with a kiss.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu ńyǝ ɔnlɛ etikii, betidi kpǝ bǝtsyuǝ áyɛ bétu wǝ. Yuda wǝ ni bakasebi lefosi inuǝ bamǝ eto ɔni lɛtɔnko mǝ. Ɔ́yɛ úsu Yesu ɔflɔ nkǝ lǝ ɔfiɔ wǝ lǝ kola.

english_verse: and a servant girl saw him. Then after she had looked at him carefully, she said, “This man was with Jesus!”
translation_verse: Se besio eto uyifoyifo ɔni dínyǝ Petro se ute díyǝnde okpo wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ se usi mfóo, óbe wǝ tũũ nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Utidi ǝmfo tsya ǝǝtǝkǝko Yesu.”

english_verse: One of the disciples even struck at the high priest's servant with his sword and cut off the servant's right ear.
translation_verse: Mfó nya bakasebi bamǝ nti eto ɔni lésiabe Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke eto uyifoyifo eto kodianito úfǝ.

english_verse: Jesus asked Judas, “Are you betraying the Son of Man with a kiss?”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu átɛyi Yuda nkǝ, “Yuda, bubǝ fǝbǝ fǝ aafiɔ mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi, lǝ kola lǝ efi mɛ akpe lǝ betidi eto ani?”

english_verse: When Jesus' disciples saw what was about to happen, they asked, “Lord, should we attack them with a sword?”
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ bakasebi ba lɛkɛ mfó ku Yesu dínyǝ lesa nǝ luubǝ ibǝ, bátɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute, bɔkpɔnko mǝ ku bo nlande lee?”

english_verse: “Enough of that!” Jesus said. Then he touched the servant's ear and healed it.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu áni ko mǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Isiǝ! Bitǝ mǝ kusu!” Mfó nya útidi uyifoyifo ǝmǝ eto koto nya wǝ koto dísinkli kótsya wǝ.

english_verse: Jesus spoke to the chief priests, the temple police, and the leaders who had come to arrest him. He said, “Why do you come out with swords and clubs and treat me like a criminal?
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi besumufɔ ninǝ ku mba laase Disumuyo eto beninǝ ku kusǝ eto beninǝ ba díbǝ mfo bǝ lǝ bǝbǝ bǝmuǝ wǝ nkǝ, “Beso ele bǝ bifi keyi ku nlande bibǝ fe uwudifɔ mini?

english_verse: Peter said, “Woman, I don't even know that man!”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Petro áni nyamfo nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Usio, minyi wǝ kulaa tsya!”

english_verse: A little later someone else saw Peter and said, “You are one of them!” “No, I'm not!” Peter replied.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe kliminti ditsyuǝ eto kama, osani utsyuǝ tsya ǝnyǝ Petro wǝ únyi nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fintsya mǝ nti eto ɔnɔ feni?” Fɛɛ Petro esi útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Osani, nni mɔ uni!”

english_verse: They said, “Tell us! Are you the Messiah?” Jesus replied, “If I said so, you wouldn't believe me.
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba díbǝ batsya mfó lɛtɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Tɛyi bo lǝ fǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ǝmǝ.” Mfo nya útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lǝ ntɛyi mi lesatsyuǝ tsyaa, biǝmbofo bɛnɔ.

english_verse: Jesus was arrested and led away to the house of the high priest, while Peter followed at a distance.
translation_verse: Besumunyǝ ninǝ ku baka bamfó ǝmuǝ Yesu, nya béfi wǝ bésuko Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke eto diyo. Nya Petro tsya dítǝkǝko mǝ kama kama.

english_verse: At daybreak the nation's leaders, the chief priests, and the teachers of the Law of Moses got together and brought Jesus before their council.
translation_verse: Se kale dísiǝǝ, kusǝ komǝ eto beninǝ ku besumunyǝ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa ǝbǝ bǝsiǝ. Nya bákpa Yesu bésuko mǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Peter replied, “I don't know what you are talking about!” Right then, while Peter was still speaking, a rooster crowed.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Petro ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Osani, mante lesa nǝ fanlɛ bɔtɛyi mfo kula kula!” Lamfolamfo, fe kase unsi únyǝ ɔnlɛ etiki, ukusɛ ko ditǝ kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: The Lord turned and looked at Peter. And Peter remembered that the Lord had said, “Before a rooster crows tomorrow morning, you will say three times that you don't know me.”
translation_verse: Bonamute ǝmǝ ékensǝ óbe Petro. Mfó ǝmǝ nya Petro lékloma nkǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fɛ ukusɛ luutǝ kɛnyɛ ketsye kamfoo, ebutudi kɛnyɛ sitsyǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ fǝ enyi mɛ.”

english_verse: The men who were guarding Jesus made fun of him and beat him.
translation_verse: Betidi ba díkase Yesu, ǝmǝ wǝ nya báblɛ wǝ.

english_verse: They kept on insulting Jesus in many other ways. Jesus Is Questioned by the Council (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya báka wǝ lǝ esu bamba kpǝ ǝsuǝ tsya. Yesu Ǝnyǝ Lǝ Bakponkpo Eto Ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: And if I asked you a question, you wouldn't answer.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ ntɔ mi etiki ǝtsyuǝ, biǝmbofo kɛnyɛ bulǝkǝ katɛyi mɛ kulesa.

english_verse: But from now on, the Son of Man will be seated at the right side of God All-Powerful.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ idu mɔmɔ ɛntɔɔ, Onanto wǝ ni ǝsuǝalenyǝ kenke ebutsyǝ mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi, lǝ wǝ kodiani.”

english_verse: Then they asked, “Are you the Son of God?” Jesus answered, “You say I am!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya mǝmblɛ lɛtɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛ, fǝ ni Onanto eto Ubi ǝmǝ?” Útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mi kosate nlɛ bɔtɛyi biǝnkǝ wǝ mini, nya nko ini nɛ.”

english_verse: They replied, “Why do we need more witnesses? He said it himself!”
translation_verse: Bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Yensihiã bo bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa si ubǝ udi adansiɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ. Bo kosate ánɔ asa nnya ɔ́tɛyi!”

english_verse: Everyone in the council got up and led Jesus off to Pilate.
translation_verse: Nya mǝmblɛ létaka nya béfi Yesu bésuko Pilato ɔflɔ.

english_verse: They started accusing him and said, “We caught this man trying to get our people to riot and to stop paying taxes to the Emperor. He also claims that he is the Messiah, our king.”
translation_verse: Mfó bétsyiko etiki butsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ katɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Búmuǝ utidi ǝmfo se ɔnlɛ bo kusǝ eto betidi bokpa kayɛnko lǝ kusu bua ǝsuǝ. Nya ɔnlɛ mǝ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, bénsiko umǝnko bǝtǝ Roma eto Okankplɛ. Nya úsi ɔ́tɛyi tsya nkǝ wǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ nya uni Oka tsya.”

english_verse: Herod and his soldiers made fun of Jesus and insulted him. They put a fine robe on him and sent him back to Pilate.
translation_verse: Herodes ku wǝ bamamanyǝ ákpe Yesu kɔfiɔ ku kofani. Nya béfi awu nnya lefo koya ǝtsyuǝ bákpe wǝ nya besi bákpa wǝ bésuko Pilato ɔflɔ.

english_verse: He told them, “You brought Jesus to me and said he was a troublemaker. But I have questioned him here in front of you, and I have not found him guilty of anything that you say he has done.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mi lékpa utidi ǝmfo béboko mɛ biǝ ɔlɛ betidi bokpa kayɛnko lǝ kusu bua ǝsuǝ. Nya mɔmɔɔ, ńtɔ wǝ etiki lǝ mi kosate eto ǝnǝmi. Nya mǝnnyǝ kabua saa lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ fe kase mi léla bítǝkǝ wǝ.

english_verse: But they all kept on saying, “He has been teaching and causing trouble all over Judea. He started in Galilee and has now come all the way here.” Jesus Is Brought before Herod
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mǝmǝ ǝńyǝ kekleke bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Wǝ asa nnya woate ǝtǝ botaka kǝńyǝ ǝbǝ idufǝ lǝ Yudea eto betidi kenke nti. Útsyǝ nyamfo kasɔ lǝ Galilea, nya úkaboko nnya mfo tsya.” Herodes Átɔ Yesu Etiki.

english_verse: But the whole crowd shouted, “Kill Jesus! Give us Barabbas!”
translation_verse: Mǝmblɛ áfa bembembe bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Lo wǝ! Lǝ ayani Baraba ǝtǝ bo!”

english_verse: Pilate asked Jesus, “Are you the king of the Jews?” “Those are your words,” Jesus answered.
translation_verse: Pilato átɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ ni Yudafɔ eto Oka ǝmǝ?” Nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Nko ini fe kase fanlɛ bɔtɛyi nɛ.”

english_verse: Pilate told the chief priests and the crowd, “I don't find him guilty of anything.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Pilato lɛtɛyi besumunyǝ ninǝ ku sitiditu siamǝ nkǝ, “Mǝnnyǝ kulesa lǝ utidi ǝmfo ǝsuǝ nǝ eso ele bǝ nlo wǝ dikpi.”

english_verse: After Pilate learned that Jesus came from the region ruled by Herod, he sent him to Herod, who was in Jerusalem at that time.
translation_verse: Nyaso se óte nkǝ Yesu étsyi Galilea eto lekpake nǝ ǝsuǝ Herodes nlɛ seka budi esoo, úfi wǝ ótsyese Herodes ɔflɔ. Nya Herodes ǝmfo akɛ lǝ Yerusalem lǝ lefe nǝmfó ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: For a long time Herod had wanted to see Jesus and was very happy because he finally had this chance. He had heard many things about Jesus and hoped to see him work a miracle.
translation_verse: Ǝsuǝ ǝyuǝ Herodes tinti se únyǝ Yesu, itsyise wɔ́ɔnɔ wǝ kɔsɔ koko nya óla nkǝ lǝ unyǝ wǝ kokooko. Nya ɔnlɛ kusu bobe nkǝ wuunyǝ Yesu lǝ uyifo ayanisa ǝtsyuǝ lǝ obe.

english_verse: Herod asked him a lot of questions, but Jesus did not answer.
translation_verse: Nyaso Herodes átɔ Yesu etiki kpǝ, fɛɛ Yesu ménfe kɛnyɛ utǝ mbuayɛ saa.

english_verse: Then the chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses stood up and accused him of all kinds of bad things.
translation_verse: Besumunyǝ ninǝ ku afi eto bateasa ábɔ bǝbǝ sɛtɔ nya bála nnyɛ kplɛ, kplɛ bǝtǝkǝ Yesu.

english_verse: That same day Herod and Pilate became friends, even though they had been enemies before this. The Death Sentence (Matthew
translation_verse: Diyi nǝmfo hã ǝsuǝ nya Herodes ku Pilato léfiani bayɛtsyuǝ, itsyise kɔɔ, balo bédi lǝ bǝtsyuǝ. Pilato Álo Yesu Dikpǝnkpi.

english_verse: As Jesus was being led away, some soldiers grabbed hold of a man named Simon who was from Cyrene. He was coming in from the fields, but they put the cross on him and made him carry it behind Jesus.
translation_verse: Bamamanyǝ bamǝ ákpa Yesu bédunko. Nya se bányɛ lǝ kusu bantɔ, bátsyako Kirenenyǝ utsyuǝ wǝ baakpo Simon wǝ dítsyi kebuto kǝtsyuǝ ɔntɔ lǝ Yerusalem. Bǝńyǝnsǝ wǝ báyinkǝ wǝ bákpe bǝnkǝ ofo uyi wǝ Yesu ntsyi mfo utsyi lǝ utǝkǝko wǝ kama.

english_verse: One of the criminals hanging there also insulted Jesus by saying, “Aren't you the Messiah? Save yourself and save us!”
translation_verse: Babuayifo ba básɔ bámanklasǝ lǝ eyi ǝsuǝ eto ɔni lǝ mǝ nti áka Yesu nkǝ, “Inni fǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ? Kpɔ lǝ ǝlǝkǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ, lǝ ǝlǝkǝ bo tsya!”

english_verse: Pilate called together the chief priests, the leaders, and the people.
translation_verse: Pilato ákpadi besumunyǝ ninǝ ku umǝ eto beninǝ ku betidi ba létsya mfo ɔkɔ.

english_verse: Pilate wanted to set Jesus free, so he spoke again to the crowds.
translation_verse: Nya se Pilato léla nkǝ lǝ oyani Yesu esoo, usi údi betidi bamǝ etiki.

english_verse: Pilate spoke to them a third time, “But what crime has he done? I have not found him guilty of anything for which he should be put to death. I will have him beaten with a whip and set free.”
translation_verse: Pilato esi ɔ́tɛyi mǝ ditsyǝfǝ nkǝ, “Nya nte kabua ka úyifo? Mǝnnyǝ kabua ka úyifo eso ele bǝ nlo wǝ dikpǝnkpi! Muutǝ lǝ bablɛ wǝ keyibi lǝ nyani wǝ.”

english_verse: The people kept on shouting as loud as they could for Jesus to be put to death.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bofa ko bensi banlɛ bembembe katɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Ele bǝ lǝ basɔ Yesu bamanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ.” Nya lǝ kalosǝkɔ, bǝtǝkǝ wǝ kato.

english_verse: He freed the man who was in jail for rioting and murder, because he was the one the crowd wanted to be set free. Then Pilate handed Jesus over for them to do what they wanted with him. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Óyani utidi nwǝ baala útǝ mǝ. Utidi wǝ bakponkpo lékpe lǝ diyo itǝ bulǝ bo ókpe ku wǝ utidilolo eso. Nya óyani Yesu ókpe mǝ lǝ ani nkǝ lǝ beyifo lesa nǝ bála ku wǝ. Bamamanyǝ Ásɔ Yesu Bámanklasǝ Lǝ Uyikabie Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If this can happen when the wood is green, what do you think will happen when it is dry?
translation_verse: Itsyise lǝ balɛ asa nyamfo eto okle buyifo lǝ kuyi kuã ǝsuǝǝ, ntsyǝ yuutsyǝ itǝ kuyi koya?”

english_verse: Two criminals were led out to be put to death with Jesus.
translation_verse: Bákpa betidi bamba inuǝ ba ni babuayifo bésu kalokɔ ku Yesu.

english_verse: Someday people will say, “Women who never had children are really fortunate!”
translation_verse: Itsyise lefe ditsyuǝ ebubǝ nǝ betidi lɔɔtɛyi bǝnkǝ, ‘Diyuǝ itǝ bakonɔ ku mba eto belefie ubi dímǝnsiǝtɔ unyǝ ku ami nnya bányimi tɔ bǝnyǝ!’

english_verse: Jesus said, “Father, forgive these people! They don't know what they're doing.” While the crowd stood there watching Jesus, the soldiers gambled for his clothes. The leaders insulted him by saying, “He saved others. Now he should save himself, if he really is God's chosen Messiah!”
translation_verse: Betidi bamǝ kenke ǝńyǝ mfó balɛ bobe nya Yudafɔ eto beninǝ bamǝ ńyǝ bánlɛ Yesu bumǝ katɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Ófo betidi bamba lǝ nkpǝ, bitǝ lǝ ulǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ bobe, lǝ wǝ ni Kristo, Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ǝmǝ!”

english_verse: The soldiers made fun of Jesus and brought him some wine.
translation_verse: Nko ke bamamanyǝ bamfó tsya dímǝ wǝ nɛ. Bésu wǝ ɔflɔ nya béfi ntǝ bo nkpe kalo bǝtǝ wǝ bǝ unǝ.

english_verse: They said, “If you are the king of the Jews, save yourself!”
translation_verse: Nya bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Lǝ fǝ ni Yudafɔ eto Okaa, nyalɛ kpɔ lǝ ǝlǝkǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ!”

english_verse: But the other criminal told the first one off, “Don't you fear God? Aren't you getting the same punishment as this man?
translation_verse: Fɛɛ unuǝfǝ áni ko wǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Aante Onanto sikpi lee? Kotonǝnǝ kɔni eto okle befi bǝtǝ fǝ ku wǝ kenke.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “I promise that today you will be with me in paradise.” The Death of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi sitinti miǝ mmi ǝmfo kee, ebudufǝ Paradiso kafo ku mɛ.” Yesu Ǝkpǝ.

english_verse: Then they went to prepare some sweet-smelling spices for his burial. But on the Sabbath they rested, as the Law of Moses commands.
translation_verse: Nya bésinkli bésu oto nya bǝkuǝ asa nnya laanyi fififi ku nnuǝbi bo beefi kediki bakɔ lǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtsyǝ. Nya bǝtsyǝ ɔnwɛ lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi fe kase mǝ afi nyamǝ léte.

english_verse: Jesus shouted, “Father, I put myself in your hands!” Then he died.
translation_verse: Yesu áfa ku ɔkɔɛ bembembe nkǝ, “Nto, mfi mɔ lɛwɔnɔ ńkpe fǝ lǝ ani!” Se ɔ́tɛyi nyamfó nkoo, óma kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: A crowd had gathered to see the terrible sight. Then after they had seen it, they felt brokenhearted and went home.
translation_verse: Se betidi ba díbǝ bǝ baabe lesa nǝ díbǝ nya bǝnyǝ lesa nǝ díbǝǝ, bésinkli bésu ayo nya béfi ani bétsyi lǝ esi ku kaminsǝ.

english_verse: All of Jesus' close friends and the women who had come with him from Galilee stood at a distance and watched. Jesus Is Buried (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba kenke léte Yesu ku besio ba dítǝkǝko wǝ ditsyi Galilea bǝbǝǝ, ǝńyǝ kɔsɛsɛ balɛ asa nyamfo bobe. Yosef Arimateanyǝ Ébikǝ Yesu.

english_verse: There was a man named Joseph, who was from Arimathea in Judea. Joseph was a good and honest man, and he was eager for God's kingdom to come. He was also a member of the council, but he did not agree with what they had decided.
translation_verse: Osani utsyuǝ ákɛ mfó baakpo Yosef wǝ dítsyi Arimatea lǝ Yudea eto kasɔ. Uyifo utidi sɛɛ wǝ betidi lǝǝtǝ dibu tinti. Nya uńyǝ ɔnlɛ kusu bobe itǝ Onanto eto sekadidi sia nlɛ bubǝ. Ite bǝ ɔ́kɛ lǝ Yudafɔ eto bakponkpo nti tsyaa, wántɔnɔ ko mǝ lǝ lesa nǝ báse uyi ku lesa nǝ béyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Joseph went to Pilate and asked for Jesus' body.
translation_verse: Úsu Pilato ɔflɔ úsu ɔ́tɔ wǝ nkǝ lǝ ofo Yesu eto ɔkɔ.

english_verse: He took the body down from the cross and wrapped it in fine cloth. Then he put it in a tomb that had been cut out of solid rock and had never been used.
translation_verse: Úlǝkǝ ɔkɔ ǝmǝ nya úfi kafia flubia kǝtsyuǝ úmini wǝ kenke. Nya úfi wǝ úsu úbikǝ lǝ leba kafo eto kudi kutsyuǝ ko bembikǝtɔ kuutsyuǝ bǝnyǝ.

english_verse: It was Friday, and the Sabbath was about to begin.
translation_verse: Diyi nǝmfó eyifo Fida wǝ bǝǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ fɛ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi lǝǝsiǝ kale.

english_verse: The women who had come with Jesus from Galilee followed Joseph and watched how Jesus' body was placed in the tomb.
translation_verse: Besio ba dítǝkǝko Yesu se betsyi Galilea, ǝtǝkǝko Yosef bésu kudi komǝ eti nya bésu bábe kase bébikǝ Yesu ǝmǝ.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene, Joanna, Mary the mother of James, and some other women were the ones who had gone to the tomb. When they returned, they told the eleven apostles and the others what had happened.
translation_verse: Besio bamǝ ni Maria Magdalene ku Yohana ku Maria wǝ ni Yakobo eto ambe. Mǝ ku besio bamba ni mba lɛtɛyi batɔnkpe bamfo asa nyamfo.

english_verse: When they found the stone rolled away from the entrance,
translation_verse: Mfóo, bǝnyǝ bǝ kudi komǝ eto kɛnyɛ ásini kute nya leba kplɛ nǝ béfi béti mfó ámina dite kutsyǝ.

english_verse: they went in. But they did not find the body of the Lord Jesus,
translation_verse: Nyaso bédufǝ bésu kudi komǝ kafo, fɛɛ bǝnnyǝ Bonamute Yesu eto ɔkɔ ǝmǝ.

english_verse: and they did not know what to think. Suddenly two men in shining white clothes stood beside them.
translation_verse: Nyamfo ǝtǝ difufu ǝmuǝ mǝ. Nya ete basani inuǝ bǝtsyuǝ dílǝkǝ ǝsuǝ báte mǝ. Nya bikǝ bia banlɛ nlɛ buyǝnde kaba mǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: The women were afraid and bowed to the ground. But the men said, “Why are you looking in the place of the dead for someone who is alive?
translation_verse: Sikpi ǝmuǝ mǝ tinti nyaso báse esi kasɔ bǝtǝ basani bamǝ. Nya basani bamǝ lɛtɔ mǝ bǝnkǝ, “Beso bɛnlɛ utidi wǝ nkpe nkpǝ bɔbɛbɛ lǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ nti?

english_verse: ‘The Son of Man will be handed over to sinners who will nail him to a cross. But three days later he will rise to life.’ ”
translation_verse: ele bǝ befi Utidi Eto Ubi bakpe lǝ betidi bua eto ani. Bɔɔsɔ wǝ bamanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Nya lǝ eyi ǝtsyǝ eto kamaa, wuusinkli otaka utsyi ɔkɔmǝ ubǝ.”

english_verse: That same day two of Jesus' disciples were going to the village of Emmaus, which was about eleven kilometers from Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ diyi nǝmfo ke ǝsuǝǝ, Yesu eto mba ntǝkǝko wǝ eto inuǝ bǝtsyuǝ yɛ lǝ kusu bátɔ lǝ umǝ kɛkɛ utsyuǝ wǝ baakpo Emaus. Nya yuutsyǝ fe esunkpo kɛntsyɛ akuanse idu mfo isu Yerusalem.

english_verse: Jesus asked them, “What were you talking about as you walked along?” The two of them stood there looking sad and gloomy.
translation_verse: Yesu átɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Be ǝsuǝ bɛnyɛ lǝ kusu bɛnlɛ etiki budi ketsyiko?” Bǝkǝnǝ bǝńyǝ. Nya mǝ ǝnǝmi nlɛ bote fe baminsǝtidi.

english_verse: We had hoped that he would be the one to set Israel free! But it has already been three days since all this happened.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ búfi ǝnǝmi butǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ boǝ wǝ loofo Israel eto betidi kenke lǝ nkpǝ. Nya mmi ni diyi tsyǝfǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ se asa nyamfo díbǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Some women in our group surprised us. They had gone to the tomb early in the morning,
translation_verse: Bo nti eto besio bǝtsyuǝ ǝtǝ bo ketu étinkǝ. Itsyise bésu wǝ kudi komǝ ɔflɔ ku olesiǝtu ǝmfo.

english_verse: Some men from our group went to the tomb and found it just as the women had said. But they didn't see Jesus either.
translation_verse: Bo nti eto bǝtsyuǝ ésu kudi komǝ ɔflɔ mfó nya bǝnyǝ fe kase besio bamǝ lɛtɛyi pɛpɛɛpɛ, fɛɛ bǝnnyǝ wǝ kosate.”

english_verse: Then Jesus asked the two disciples, “Why can't you understand? How can you be so slow to believe all that the prophets said?
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bieninǝ! Nya tsyaa, mi bofokanɔ lǝ asa nnya Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛtɛyi mi ǝsuǝ ǝmbǝ ale!

english_verse: Didn't you know that the Messiah would have to suffer before he was given his glory?”
translation_verse: Binyi biǝnkǝ ele bǝ, Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ǝmǝ nyǝ kanyi kamfo eto okle fɛ lǝ udufǝ wǝ sekakedikɔ eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus then explained everything written about himself in the Scriptures, beginning with the Law of Moses and the Books of the Prophets.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu dílǝkǝ asa nyamfo kasɔ óte mǝ lǝ asa nnya báwɔni bakpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ itsyi lǝ Moses eto Ǝkue ku asa nnya kenke Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛwɔni bǝtsyǝ itsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They begged him, “Stay with us! It's already late, and the sun is going down.” So Jesus went into the house to stay with them.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ báninko wǝ bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Kale ébolo kalo nyaso kɛ lǝ bo ɔflɔ mfo.” Nyaso úsu ɔ́sɔnɔ lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: After Jesus sat down to eat, he took some bread. He blessed it and broke it. Then he gave it to them.
translation_verse: Úsiǝ lǝ kasɔ nkǝ lǝ udi lesa ku mǝ. Nya úfi abolo nyamǝ nya ɔ́sɔ Onanto ani, nya úbudi nnya úfi útǝ mǝ.

english_verse: At once they knew who he was, but he disappeared.
translation_verse: Mfó nya mǝ ǝnǝmi lɛsini nya bǝnyǝ wǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo. Fɛɛ ónya fĩĩ lǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: They said to each other, “When he talked with us along the road and explained the Scriptures to us, didn't it warm our hearts?”
translation_verse: Bátɛyi mǝ bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Lefe nǝ ɔ́kɛ mfó úkedinko bo etiki nya úkǝlǝkǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue eto etiki kasɔ kate bo lǝ kusuu, disuǝyuǝ ditsyuǝ eto okle akɛ bo lǝ lɛkɔɛsi!”

english_verse: So they got up and returned to Jerusalem. The two disciples found the eleven apostles and the others gathered together.
translation_verse: Bátaka lamfolamfo nya bésinkli bésu Yerusalem. Nya bésu bǝnyǝ lefosi ɔnwɛ bamǝ ku betidi bamba bákɔ bensi.

english_verse: And they learned from the group that the Lord was really alive and had appeared to Peter.
translation_verse: Nya bánlɛ bɔtɛyi bǝ, “Bonamute átaka útsyi ɔkɔmǝ sitinti, nya úlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte Simon.”

english_verse: Then the disciples from Emmaus told what happened on the road and how they knew he was the Lord when he broke the bread. What Jesus' Followers Must Do (Matthew
translation_verse: Mfó nya betidi inuǝ bamǝ lɛtɛyi mǝ asa nnya díbǝ lǝ kusu ku kase bǝnyǝ Yesu bǝtsyǝ lekpo lefe nǝ úbudi abolo nyamǝ útǝ mǝ. Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Ǝsuǝ Óte Wǝ Bakasebi.

english_verse: While Jesus' disciples were talking about what had happened, Jesus appeared and greeted them.
translation_verse: Se betidi inuǝ bamfo nlɛ mǝ etiki budii, mfó ǝmǝ Yesu kosate ǝbǝ úńyǝ lǝ mǝ nti. Nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Diyuǝ lǝ disiǝko mi.”

english_verse: They were frightened and terrified because they thought they were seeing a ghost.
translation_verse: Báyakla nya bébu bǝnkǝ ɔkɔ banlɛ bunyǝ.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “Why are you so frightened? Why do you doubt?
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Beso bietinkǝ mǝ! Beso biamfo kanɔ?

english_verse: Look at my hands and my feet and see who I am! Touch me and find out for yourselves. Ghosts don't have flesh and bones as you see I have.”
translation_verse: Bebe mɔ ani ku mɔ akpa. Nya bitidi mɛ lǝ bete biǝ mɔ uni. Itsyise ɔkɔ ǝmbǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ku ekubi fe kase bɛnlɛ mɛ bunyǝ minte mmǝ.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, he showed them his hands and his feet.
translation_verse: Se ɔ́tɛyi nkoo, úfi wǝ ani ku akpa óte mǝ.

english_verse: The disciples were so glad and amazed that they could not believe it. Jesus then asked them, “Do you have something to eat?”
translation_verse: Lǝ kase banlɛ disuǝyuǝ bunyǝ tinti nya asa nyamǝ díyifo mǝ yani esoo, bámfo bofo kanɔ. Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Didisa ditsyuǝ te mi mfo?”

english_verse: They gave him a piece of broiled fish.
translation_verse: Béfi lɛkpɛ sǝnsǝ báboko wǝ.

english_verse: He took it and ate it as they watched.
translation_verse: Nya ófo ni ɔ́yimi lǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi mfó.

english_verse: Jesus said to them, “While I was still with you, I told you that everything written about me in the Law of Moses, the Books of the Prophets, and in the Psalms had to happen.”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Asa nyamfo ǝsuǝ tututu míntɛyi mi lefe nǝ minkɛ mi lǝ ɔflɔ nɛ. Lesa saa nǝ báwɔni lǝ Moses eto afi eto kukue nye Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi eto asa nnya báwɔni lǝ Ǝsǝnkue itsyi lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝǝ, ele bǝ ibǝ itǝ nko.”

english_verse: He told them: The Scriptures say that the Messiah must suffer, then three days later he will rise from death.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Báwɔni bǝtsyǝ bǝ Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ mfo ebunyǝ kanyi nya wootaka utsyi bekpǝnkpǝ nti ubǝ lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They also say that all people of every nation must be told in my name to turn to God, in order to be forgiven. So beginning in Jerusalem,
translation_verse: Nya wǝ bakasebi ebobe letsya lǝ wǝ diye ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke bǝ batsyi mǝ akɔɛsi bawuninsǝ itǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ ufi mǝ abua ɔtsyɛ mǝ. Nya letsyabebe nǝmfo ebutsyǝ kasɔ lǝ Yerusalem.

english_verse: you must tell everything that has happened.
translation_verse: Mi luudi adansiɛ bilǝkǝ ditiki nǝmfo bete lǝ kalebe saa.

english_verse: I will send you the one my Father has promised, but you must stay in the city until you are given power from heaven. Jesus Returns to Heaven (Mark
translation_verse: Nya mɔ kosate ebufi lesa nǝ mɔ Anto lɛtɛyi útsyǝ ntsyese mi. Fɛɛ ele bǝ bińyǝ bisǝkǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale nyamfo lǝ Yerusalem isu ese lefe nǝ biofo nyamǝ itsyi kato.” Onanto Ákpa Yesu Úsuko Kato.

english_verse: Jesus led his disciples out to Bethany, where he raised his hands and blessed them.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu ákpa mǝ nya bédu lǝ Yerusalem eto umǝ bésu Betania eti. Mfó óbesǝ ani kato nya ókpo mǝ atsyɔ.

english_verse: As he was doing this, he left and was taken up to heaven.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ tututu ɔnlɛ mǝ atsyɔ bokpo mfóo, údu lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ nya Onanto étsyi wǝ úsuko kato.

english_verse: After his disciples had worshiped him, they returned to Jerusalem and were very happy.
translation_verse: Báse akonki bésumu wǝ nya bésinkli bésu Yerusalem ku disuǝyuǝ tinti.

english_verse: They spent their time in the temple, praising God.
translation_verse: Békesu Onanto eto kedikǝtǝkɔ mlǝ mlǝ mlǝ késu késumu Onanto kasɔ wǝ ani.

english_verse: From the very beginning the Word was with God.
translation_verse: Ditiki nǝmǝ ku Onanto lɛkɛ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ.

english_verse: received its life from him, and his life gave light to everyone.
translation_verse: Ditiki nǝmǝ ǝǝtǝ nkpǝ, nya nkpǝ bomǝ ɔflɔ betidi dínyǝ diyǝnde betsyiko.

english_verse: The light keeps shining in the dark, and darkness has never put it out.
translation_verse: Diyǝnde nǝmǝ ǝǝyǝnde kakpo lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ ketuntu kamǝ mamfotɔ diyǝnde nǝmǝ bɔninsǝ.

english_verse: God sent a man named John,
translation_verse: Onanto átsyese utidi utsyuǝ. Wǝ diye ni Yohanes.

english_verse: who came to tell about the light and to lead all people to have faith.
translation_verse: Úbǝ nkǝ woedi betidi etiki itsyiko lǝ diyǝnde nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ utsyuǝ saa wǝ lɛnɔ ditiki nǝmǝ lǝ ofo ɔnɔ.

english_verse: The true light that shines on everyone was coming into the world.
translation_verse: Nyamfo ni lekpasǝ kosate nǝmǝ nɛ, lekpasǝ nǝ nlɛ kawunsiǝ bubǝ nǝ luuyǝnde ditǝ utsyuǝ saa lekpasǝ.

english_verse: The Word was in the world, but no one knew him, though God had made the world with his Word.
translation_verse: Ditiki nǝmǝ ákɛ lǝ kawunsiǝ, nya wǝ ǝsuǝ Onanto lɛyɛ úyifo kawunsiǝ, fɛɛ kawunsiǝ eto betidi mǝnnyǝ wǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo.

english_verse: He came into his own world, but his own nation did not welcome him.
translation_verse: Úbǝ wǝ kosate eto betidi ɔflɔ, fɛɛ wǝ betidi mámfo wǝ.

english_verse: They were not God's children by nature or because of any human desires. God himself was the one who made them his children.
translation_verse: Bámfiani Onanto eto bebi ɛyɛ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto ditsyǝbi ǝsuǝ nye ɛyɛ lǝ usǝ ku usiǝ eto ubilele eto ketsyue ǝsuǝ. Bomu Onanto kosate lɛtɔnɔ nkǝ woafo mǝ lǝ bafiani wǝ bebi.

english_verse: The Word became a human being and lived here with us. We saw his true glory, the glory of the only Son of the Father. From him the complete gifts of undeserved grace and truth have come down to us.
translation_verse: Ditiki nǝmǝ ǝbǝ léfiani utidinini wǝ dísiǝ lǝ bo nti, nya úyi ku Onanto eto lefonǝ ku sitinti kenke. Nya búnyǝ wǝ diyǝnde kplɛ nǝ eto okle ófo útsyiko wǝ anto ɔflɔ fe Onanto eto Ubi ɔni kplo eso.

english_verse: Because of all that the Son is, we have been given one blessing after another.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lefonǝ kplɛ ǝsuǝǝ, ókpo bomblɛ kenke atsyɔ kpǝ.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. The only Son, who is truly God and is closest to the Father, has shown us what God is like. John the Baptist Tells about Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ saa mǝnnyǝ tɔ Onanto unyǝ. Wǝ ubi ɔni kplo wǝ lekate ko Onanto wǝ nsi lǝ wǝ Anto ǝmǝ eto akɔɔ, wǝ ni díbǝ úlǝkǝ futsyǝ Onanto ni óte bo nɛ. Yohanes Ǝlǝkǝ Óte Nkǝ Inni Wǝ Ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ.

english_verse: The religious authorities in Jerusalem sent priests and temple helpers to ask John who he was. He told them plainly, “I am not the Messiah.”
translation_verse: Mfóo, Yohanes mánni mbuayɛ butǝ bomu ókpasǝ mǝ nkǝ, “Inni mɔ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ.”

english_verse: Then when they asked him if he were Elijah, he said, “No, I am not!” And when they asked if he were the Prophet, he also said “No!”
translation_verse: Bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛ owoe feni? Fǝ ni Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Elia?” Útǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Inni mɔ ni.” Bésukosǝ bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛ, fǝ ni Unyɛlǝkǝtidi wǝ bátɛyi bǝtsyǝ bǝ wuubǝ?” Útǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Owo lo.”

english_verse: Finally, they said, “Who are you then? We have to give an answer to the ones who sent us. Tell us who you are!”
translation_verse: Nyaso bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Tɛyi bo lesatsyuǝ nǝ busu bɔtɛyi mba lékpe bo kɔtɔ! Owoe feni? Nya be fanlɛ bɔtɛyi itsyi lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: John answered in the words of the prophet Isaiah, “I am only someone shouting in the desert, ‘Get the road ready for the Lord!’ ”
translation_verse: Yohanes ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ fe kase Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yesaya lɛwɔni utsyǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ ni utidi wǝ nlɛ bofa lǝ mfiminti kafe eto ɔkɔɛ katɛyi nkǝ, ‘Bɛtsyɔnsǝ Bonamute eto kusu bitsyǝ itǝ wǝ bubǝ!’ ”

english_verse: Some Pharisees had also been sent to John.
translation_verse: Nya betidikpekpe ba dítsyi Yudafɔ ba baakpo Farisifɔ ɔflɔ bǝbǝǝ,

english_verse: They asked him, “Why are you baptizing people, if you are not the Messiah or Elijah or the Prophet?”
translation_verse: lɛtɔ Yohanes bǝ, “Lenni fǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ, nye Elia, nye unyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝmǝǝ, ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ fanlɛ ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa buyifo?”

english_verse: John told them, “I use water to baptize people. But here with you is someone you don't know.
translation_verse: Yohanes ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mɔ alɛɛ, meefi ntu keyifo ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa nǝmfo. Fɛɛ utidi utsyuǝ ńyǝ mi lenti, wǝ binnyi.

english_verse: Even though I came first, I am not good enough to untie his sandals.”
translation_verse: Utǝkǝ mɛ kama ɔlɛ bubǝ nya wǝ afokpa eto kekue mǝnńyǝ ntǝ kulaa tsya bǝ nyankli.”

english_verse: John said this as he was baptizing east of the Jordan River in Bethany. The Lamb of God
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo ǝbǝ lǝ Betania eto umǝ lǝ Yordan eto ketu eto ditukpenkpe nǝ nse. Mfó Yohanes nlɛ ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa buyifo kǝtǝ betidi nɛ. Yesu Ni Onanto Eto Lesamubi Nǝ Boofi Bǝtǝ Kedi.

english_verse: The next day, John saw Jesus coming toward him and said: Here is the Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world!
translation_verse: Kǝsiǝsǝǝ, Yohanes ǝnyǝ Yesu nlɛ wǝ ɔflɔ bubǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi mba ńyǝ wǝ lǝ ɔflɔ nkǝ, “Nyǝ Onanto eto Lesamubi nǝ ntsyi kawunsiǝ eto abua ɔntɔnko.

english_verse: He is the one I told you about when I said, “Someone else will come, who is greater than I am, because he was alive before I was born.”
translation_verse: Wǝ ni utidi wǝ ǝsuǝ míntɛyi mintsyiko lefe nǝ míndi etiki míntɛyi minkǝ, ‘Utidi utsyuǝ tǝkǝ mɛ kama ɔnlɛ bubǝ wǝ lɛmɔ onso mɛ, itsyise okpe kokooko fɛ bále mɛ.’

english_verse: I didn't know who he was. But I came to baptize you with water, so that everyone in Israel would see him.
translation_verse: Mɔ kosate tsya mánte utidi ǝmǝ. Fɛɛ wǝ bubǝ eso mímbǝ minlɛ ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa nǝmfo buyifo bǝ lǝ nlǝkǝ wǝ nte Israel eto kusǝ eto betidi.”

english_verse: I was there and saw the Spirit come down on him like a dove from heaven. And the Spirit stayed on him.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yohanes disi ɔ́tɛyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Nnyǝ miǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ áyifǝ dítsyi kato dísiǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ fe lɛblɛkpa seka.

english_verse: Before this I didn't know who he was. But the one who sent me to baptize with water had told me, “You will see the Spirit come down and stay on someone. Then you will know that he is the one who will baptize with the Holy Spirit.”
translation_verse: Tutɛ mánte miǝ wǝ uni. Fɛɛ lefe nǝ Onanto létsyese mɛ nkǝ mbǝ keyifo ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa nǝmǝǝ, ɔ́tɛyi mɛ nkǝ, ‘Ebunyǝ se mɔ Lɛwɔnɔ lɔɔyifǝ ditsyi kato dibǝ disiǝ lǝ utsyuǝ ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ, ete ebote fǝ wǝ ni utidi wǝ luufi Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ukeyifo ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa nǝmǝ nɛ.’

english_verse: I saw this happen, and I tell you that he is the Son of God. The First Disciples of Jesus
translation_verse: Nya mínyǝ se íbǝ nkomǝ lǝ utidi ǝmfo ǝsuǝ. Nya minlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti miǝ wǝ ni Onanto eto Ubi kosate ǝmǝ nɛ.” Betidi Tutɛ Ba Dítǝkǝko Yesu.

english_verse: The next day, John was there again, and two of his followers were with him.
translation_verse: Kǝsiǝsǝǝ, Yohanes ku wǝ bakasebi inuǝ si bǝńyǝ mfó ke,

english_verse: When he saw Jesus walking by, he said, “Here is the Lamb of God!”
translation_verse: nya únyǝ Yesu díbǝ ɔnlɛ bofe. Nya se únyǝ wǝǝ, ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bebee, nyǝ Onanto eto Lesamubi nǝmǝǝ!”

english_verse: John's two followers heard him, and they went with Jesus.
translation_verse: Bakasebi inuǝ bamfo ánɔ nnya Yohanes lɛtɛyi nya bédu bésu bǝtǝkǝko wǝ.

english_verse: When Jesus turned and saw them, he asked, “What do you want?” They answered, “Rabbi, where do you live?” The Hebrew word “Rabbi” means “Teacher.”
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛtsyi ɔwuninsǝ únyǝ nkǝ bǝtǝkǝko wǝǝ, ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Be biabɛbɛ?” Bǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Rabi,” eto kasɔ ni Oteasa, “Lekpakpa, se fankpe?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Come and see!” It was already about four o'clock in the afternoon when they went with him and saw where he lived. So they stayed on for the rest of the day.
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bibǝ bebe.” Lefe nǝmfó ebutsyǝ fe ditsyitsyo eto abombo ana seka. Nyaso bǝtǝkǝko wǝ bésu kaka onkpe, nya bǝsiǝ wǝ lǝ ɔflɔ diyi fɛfɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: One of the two men who had heard John and had gone with Jesus was Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter.
translation_verse: Bakasebi inuǝ ba lɛnɔ Yohanes eto ditiki nǝmǝ fɛ bǝtǝtǝko Yesuu, eto ɔni ni Andrea wǝ ni Simon Petro eto ɔyimi.

english_verse: The first thing Andrew did was to find his brother and tell him, “We have found the Messiah!” The Hebrew word “Messiah” means the same as the Greek word “Christ.”
translation_verse: Lesa tutɛ nǝ Andrea ǝmǝ díyifo ni bǝ úsu ɔ́bɛbɛ wǝ ɔyimi, ini Simon nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Búnyǝ Mesia ǝmǝ,” eto kasɔ ni Kristo wǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ.

english_verse: Andrew brought his brother to Jesus. And when Jesus saw him, he said, “Simon son of John, you will be called Cephas.” This name can be translated as “Peter.” Jesus Chooses Philip and Nathanael
translation_verse: Nya ókpa Simon úsuko Yesu ɔflɔ. Yesu ábe wǝ tũũ, nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ ni Simon, Yohanes eto ubi. Idu mɔmɔ ɛntɔɔ, bookpo fǝ bǝ Kefas,” nye Petro eto kasɔ ni kobansǝ. Yesu Ákpadi Filipo Ku Nataniel.
