english_verse: Philip then found Nathanael and said, “We have found the one that Moses and the Prophets wrote about. He is Jesus, the son of Joseph from Nazareth.”
translation_verse: Se Filipo dísu únyǝ Nataniel, ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Búunyǝ utidi ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ Moses ku Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛwɔni asa betsyiko bǝtsyǝ lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ! Wǝ ni Yosef eto ubi Yesu wǝ ditsyi Nasaret!”

english_verse: Nathanael asked, “Can anything good come from Nazareth?” Philip answered, “Come and see.”
translation_verse: Nataniel átɔ nkǝ, “Lesa sɛɛ ditsyuǝ ebofo bɔbɔ ketsyi Nasaret kǝbǝǝ?” Filipo átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bǝ lǝ ǝbǝ abe!”

english_verse: When Jesus saw Nathanael coming toward him, he said, “Here is a true descendant of our ancestor Israel. And he isn't deceitful.”
translation_verse: Se Yesu dínyǝ Nataniel lɛyɛ ɔnlɛ wǝ ɔflɔ bubǝǝ, ɔ́tɛyi itsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Nyǝ Israelnyǝ tinti nlɛ bubǝ mǝǝ, woanwɛ betidi.”

english_verse: “How do you know me?” Nathanael asked. Jesus answered, “Before Philip called you, I saw you under the fig tree.”
translation_verse: Nataniel átɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Ntsyǝ féyifo fáte utidi wǝ eto okle mini?” Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Fɛ Filipo díbǝ ókpadi fǝ lǝ lefe nǝ fakɛ lǝ koto komǝ kalɔɔ, mbúnyǝ fǝ koko.”

english_verse: Nathanael said, “Rabbi, you are the Son of God and the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: Nataniel átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Oteasa, eyifo Onanto eto Ubi kosate. Fǝ ni Israelfɔ eto Oka ǝmǝ!”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Did you believe me just because I said that I saw you under the fig tree? You will see something even greater.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Eni nnya míntɛyi fǝ miǝ nnyǝ fǝ lǝ koto komǝ kalɔ eso fáfo fánɔɔ? Ebunyǝ asa nnya nsi nso nyamfo.”

english_verse: I tell you for certain you will see heaven open and God's angels going up and coming down on the Son of Man.”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Sitinti minlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ, biunyǝ se kato lɔɔsini nya Onanto eto batɔnkpe nlɛ kato bobe kesu kayifǝ kǝbǝ mɔ, Utidi eto Ubi, ɔflɔ.”

english_verse: Three days later Mary, the mother of Jesus, was at a wedding feast in the village of Cana in Galilee.
translation_verse: Lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝ ǝsuǝǝ, bákpa kusiǝ kutsyuǝ lǝ umǝ wǝ baakpo Kana lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ. Yesu eto ambe Maria ákɛ mfó.

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples had also been invited and were there.
translation_verse: Nya bákpadi Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi tsya báboko kusiǝ kakpakɔ kamǝ.

english_verse: When the wine was all gone, Mary said to Jesus, “They don't have any more wine.”
translation_verse: Se nte bo banlɛ bunǝ léloo, Yesu eto ambe ǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nte bo banlɛ bunǝ álo.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Mother, my time hasn't yet come! You must not tell me what to do.”
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mbe, yanle bǝ tɛyi mɛ lesa nǝ ele bǝ nyifo. Mɔ lefe mányo tɔ.”

english_verse: Mary then said to the servants, “Do whatever Jesus tells you to do.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu eto ambe lɛtɛyi besumubi bamǝ nkǝ, “Biyifo lesa nǝ kee wɔɔtɛyi mi nkǝ biyifo.”

english_verse: At the feast there were six stone water jars that were used by the people for washing themselves in the way that their religion said they must. Each jar held about
translation_verse: Se ini lekpa ídi itǝ Yudafɔ bǝ bǝflǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, bǝtsyǝ ntu eto kalɔtsyi kplɛ ekua ka bǝlǝkǝ lǝ abansǝ ǝsuǝ mfó. Nya ketulɔtsyi ɛnɔ nye ekua leeyi ɔlɔtsyi kplɛ ɔni.

english_verse: Jesus told the servants to fill them to the top with water. Then after the jars had been filled,
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi besumubi bamǝ nkǝ békuti ntu béyisǝ kalɔtsyi kplɛ kamǝ. Nyaso békuti ntu béyisǝ kalɔtsyi kplɛ kamǝ klɛlɛlɛlɛ.

english_verse: he said, “Now take some water and give it to the man in charge of the feast.” The servants did as Jesus told them,
translation_verse: Mfó nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bikuti ntu bomǝ eto ntsyuǝ bisuko utidi wǝ nsi lǝ ketsyue kamǝ eto kɛnyɛ.” Nya békuti mu bésuko wǝ.

english_verse: and the man in charge drank some of the water that had now turned into wine. He did not know where the wine had come from, but the servants did. He called the bridegroom over
translation_verse: Se útu ntu bo léfiani nte óbee, wǝ ánte kaka nte bomǝ dítsyi. Fɛɛ besumubi ba díkuti ntu bomǝ bésuko alɛɛ, mǝmǝ áte. Nyaso nwǝ nsi lǝ ketsyue kamǝ eto kɛnyɛ ákpadi okafɔse ǝmǝ,

english_verse: and said, “The best wine is always served first. Then after the guests have had plenty, the other wine is served. But you have kept the best until last!”
translation_verse: nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Utsyuǝ saa, nte sɛɛ woaka betidi butǝ bǝǝnǝ, nya lǝ betidi ǝnǝ bǝkpǝ eto kamaa, nya fɛ weefi mbo dimanlɛkɛ kǝtǝ betidi lǝǝnǝ nɛ. Fɛɛ fǝ ébu nsɛɛ ǝtsyǝ kama!”

english_verse: But Jesus was talking about his body as a temple.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bánte bǝ wǝ sinǝ ǝsuǝ ɔnlɛ etiki budi ketsyiko fe Onanto eto Disumuyo.

english_verse: Not long before the Jewish festival of Passover, Jesus went to Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Ukpǝ Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto didife eboyo elo, nyaso Yesu ésu Yerusalem.

english_verse: So he took some rope and made a whip. Then he chased everyone out of the temple, together with their sheep and cattle. He turned over the tables of the moneychangers and scattered their coins.
translation_verse: Nyaso ófio ukuǝ nya úfi wǝ óla basamu ku banantsyui kenke ɔ́bɔsǝ lǝ Disumuyo mfó. Úsensǝ mba nlɛ atabi boba eto atabi úwui nya úkǝ mǝ kapunu ókpo lǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: The disciples then remembered that the Scriptures say, “My love for your house burns in me like a fire.”
translation_verse: Nya wǝ bakasebi lékloma nnya Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Onanto, mɔ lelabi itǝ fǝ Disumuyoo, ǝtǝ ǝnǝmi asɛ mɛ lǝ ni ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: “Destroy this temple,” Jesus answered, “and in three days I will build it again!”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Beba Onanto eto Disumuyo kamfo, nya mootakasǝ ke ńyǝnsǝ lǝ diyi tsyǝfǝ ǝsuǝ!”

english_verse: There he found people selling cattle, sheep, and doves in the temple. He also saw moneychangers sitting at their tables.
translation_verse: Se údufǝ Onanto eto Disumuyoo, únyǝ se betidi nlɛ banantsyui ku basamu ku ablonuma bote ku mba laafloma atabi tsya nsi lǝ mǝ kapunu eto akɔ.

english_verse: Jesus said to the people who had been selling doves, “Get those doves out of here! Don't make my Father's house a marketplace.”
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi mba nlɛ ablonuma bote nkǝ, “Bitsyi asa nyamfo bɛbɔnko lǝ mfo, nya biemfi mɔ Anto eto diyo biyifo bikǝkatekɔ.”

english_verse: The Jewish leaders asked Jesus, “What miracle will you work to show us why you have done this?”
translation_verse: Yudafɔ eto beninǝ ǝbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Se féyifo asa nyamfo mǝǝ, nte ayanisa nnya fuuyifo ate bo bǝ akpe kusu feeyifo nnya okle?”

english_verse: And when he was raised from death, his disciples remembered what he had told them. Then they believed the Scriptures and the words of Jesus. Jesus Knows What People Are Like
translation_verse: Nyaso lefe nǝ Onanto létakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝǝ, nya fɛ wǝ bakasebi lékloma bǝ ɔ́tɛyi nko utsyǝ. Nyaso báfo asa nnya báwɔni bakpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ku nnya Yesu lɛtɛyi bánɔ. Yesu Yi Asa Itsyi Lǝ Utidinini Ǝsuǝ Wuee.

english_verse: In Jerusalem during Passover many people put their faith in Jesus, because they saw him work miracles.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu lɛkɛ lǝ Yerusalem lǝ Ukpe Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto diyididi lefee, betidi kpǝ áfo wǝ bánɔ lǝ ayanisa kpǝ nnya bǝnyǝ úyifo eso.

english_verse: But Jesus knew what was in their hearts, and he would not let them have power over him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu mémfi wǝ ǝsuǝ utǝ mǝ, itsyise uyi betidi kenke.

english_verse: No one had to tell him what people were like. He already knew.
translation_verse: Yensife bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa si ɔtɛyi wǝ kulesa itsyi lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ itsyise wǝ kosate áte lesa nǝ lɛkɛ lǝ mǝ ketu kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: There was a man named Nicodemus who was a Pharisee and a Jewish leader.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfóo, Yudafɔ eto uninǝ ɔni wǝ baakpo bǝ Nikodemo akɛ lǝ mǝ ditsyukpa nǝ baakpo Farisifɔ nti.

english_verse: One night he went to Jesus and said, “Rabbi, we know that God has sent you to teach us. You could not work these miracles, unless God were with you.”
translation_verse: Kǝtsyǝ kanii, úbǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Oteasa, buyi boǝ fǝ ni nwǝ ditsyi Onanto ɔflɔ fǝbǝ, itsyise kutsyuǝ saa embofo ayanisa nnya feeyifo buyifo lenni Onanto nsi ko wǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “I tell you for certain that you must be born from above before you can see God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Sitinti minlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi minkǝ, lǝ bensinkli utidi balee, wǝmbunyǝ Onanto eto Sekadidi siamǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I tell you for certain that before you can get into God's kingdom, you must be born not only by water, but by the Spirit.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, lǝ bánle utidi betsyiko lǝ ntu ku Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, weembofo budufǝ lǝ Onanto eto Sekadidi siamǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Humans give life to their children. Yet only God's Spirit can change you into a child of God.
translation_verse: Utidininii, bále wǝ ɛyɛ lǝ etidisuǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ nnya ditsyi lǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝǝ, bále wǝ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Don't be surprised when I say that you must be born from above.
translation_verse: Nyaso mǝntǝ lǝ iyifo fǝ naa lǝ ntɛyi fǝ miǝ ele bǝ bale fǝ bio.

english_verse: Only God's Spirit gives new life. The Spirit is like the wind that blows wherever it wants to. You can hear the wind, but you don't know where it comes from or where it is going.
translation_verse: Ufiebi aasɔ kesu kakake ola, nya wǝ kɔsɔ hã faanɔ, fɛɛ inni lǝ kaka utsyi ku kaka ɔntɔ. Nko inte itǝ utsyuǝ saa wǝ bále ɛyɛ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: “How can this be?” Nicodemus asked.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Nikodemo lɛtɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Ntsyǝ nyamfo loofo bubǝ kǝtǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: How can you be a teacher of Israel and not know these things?
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Oteasa kplɛ feni lǝ Israel, ntsyǝ ibǝ fámannɔ nyamfo kasɔ?

english_verse: I tell you for certain we know what we are talking about because we have seen it ourselves. But none of you will accept what we say.
translation_verse: Nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi sitinti miǝ asa nnya bunyii, nnya ǝsuǝ boedi etiki ketsyiko nɛ. Nya lesa nǝ ke búkenyǝǝ, ni ǝsuǝ boedi adansiǝ nɛ. Fɛɛ biamfo bo etiki nyamǝ kanɔ.

english_verse: If you don't believe when I talk to you about things on earth, how can you possibly believe if I talk to you about things in heaven?
translation_verse: Lǝ ndi fǝ etiki itsyi lǝ kasɔ mfo eto asa ǝsuǝ nya fámamfo mɛ ánɔɔ, ntsyǝ foofo mɛ bofo kanɔ lǝ ndi fǝ etiki itsyi lǝ kato eto asa ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: No one has gone up to heaven except the Son of Man, who came down from there.
translation_verse: Nya kuutsyuǝ saa ménsu tɔ kato unyǝ enso mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi wǝ ditsyi kato úbǝ kawunsiǝ mfo.

english_verse: And the Son of Man must be lifted up, just as the metal snake was lifted up by Moses in the desert.
translation_verse: “Fe kase Moses lébesǝ owa wǝ béfi situ béyifo kato lǝ uyi ǝsuǝ lǝ mfimintii, nko ke ele bǝ babesǝ mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi kato nɛ,

english_verse: Then everyone who has faith in the Son of Man will have eternal life.
translation_verse: bǝ utidi wǝ ke léfo mɛ ɔ́nɔɔ, lǝ unyǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: God loved the people of this world so much that he gave his only Son, so that everyone who has faith in him will have eternal life and never really die.
translation_verse: “Itsyise Onanto ála kawunsiǝ kamfo kon bǝnkǝ úfi wǝ Ubi ɔni kplo útǝ nkǝ utsyuǝ saa ke laafo wǝ kanɔɔ, lǝ ɔyɛ bukpǝ kanya, bomu lǝ unyǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: God did not send his Son into the world to condemn its people. He sent him to save them!
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto mántsyese wǝ Ubi kawunsiǝ nkǝ lǝ ubǝ olo ke dikpi, bomu bǝ lǝ uyifo ke Ofomfokǝtǝ.

english_verse: No one who has faith in God's Son will be condemned. But everyone who doesn't have faith in him has already been condemned for not having faith in God's only Son.
translation_verse: “Utidi wǝ ke laafo wǝ Ubi kanɔɔ, bembolo wǝ dikpi. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa wǝ laamfo wǝ kanɔɔ, bóolo wǝ dikpi koko itsyise wóamfo Onanto eto Ubi ɔni kplo ǝmǝ ɔnɔ eso.

english_verse: The light has come into the world, and people who do evil things are judged guilty because they love the dark more than the light.
translation_verse: Kase baayɛ kaalo dikpi nǝmǝ ni bǝnkǝ, diyǝnde nǝmǝ ǝbǝ kawunsiǝ, fɛɛ betidi aala ketuntu kaso diyǝnde nǝmǝ, itsyise baala asa buayifoyifo kaso.

english_verse: People who do evil hate the light and won't come to the light, because it clearly shows what they have done.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa wǝ leeyifo asa buaa, weekisi diyǝnde, nya woannyi kafi ni. Itsyise woate sikpi nkǝ lǝ ɔnyi ɔfi diyǝndee, yuulǝkǝ wǝ asa bua nnya weeyifo ote bǝnyǝ.

english_verse: But everyone who lives by the truth will come to the light, because they want others to know that God is really the one doing what they do. Jesus and John the Baptist
translation_verse: Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa wǝ nsi nkpǝ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝǝ, aanyi kafi diyǝnde, itsyise woala nkǝ diyǝnde nǝmǝ lǝkǝ lete nkǝ kase unsi nkpǝ yɛ lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝ.” Yohanes Ntuflǝsǝtidi Ǝmǝ Édi Etiki Lǝ Yesu Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Later, Jesus and his disciples went to Judea, where he stayed with them for a while and was baptizing people.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi édu bésu Yudea eto lekpake mfó. Bǝsiǝ mfó itǝ lefe ditsyuǝ, nya úkeyifo betidi ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa.

english_verse: John's followers got into an argument with a Jewish man about a ceremony of washing.
translation_verse: Diyi lɔnii, etikinǝnǝ ǝtsyuǝ édufǝ lǝ Yohanes eto bakasebi ku Yudanyǝ utsyuǝ eto nti itsyi lǝ ǝsuǝflǝflǝ eto lekpa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They went to John and said, “Rabbi, you spoke about a man when you were with him east of the Jordan. He is now baptizing people, and everyone is going to him.”
translation_verse: Nyaso bǝbǝ Yohanes ɔflɔ bátɛyi wǝ bǝ, “Oteasa, akloma utidi utsyuǝ wǝ fǝ ku wǝ díńyǝ lǝ Ketu Yordan eto ditukpenkpe nǝ nse, ini wǝ ǝsuǝ fédi adansiɛ fetsyiko? Wǝ ni nwǝ mfe nlɛ betidi ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa buyifo nɛ, nya betidi ba kenke nlɛ budu kesu wǝ ɔflɔ.”

english_verse: John replied: No one can do anything unless God in heaven allows it.
translation_verse: Yohanes átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Kuutsyuǝ saa embofo kulesa bɔkɛ, lenni Onanto dífi ni útǝ wǝ.

english_verse: You surely remember how I told you that I am not the Messiah. I am only the one sent ahead of him.
translation_verse: Mi kosate ni mɔ badansiɛ bǝ ntɛyi mi nkpasǝ wuee miǝ inni mɔ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ǝmǝ. Fɛɛ Onanto létsyese mɛ nkǝ ntɔ wǝ sɛtɔ.

english_verse: At a wedding the groom is the one who gets married. The best man is glad just to be there and to hear the groom's voice. That's why I am so glad.
translation_verse: Nwǝ ni Okafɔsee, wǝ ni nwǝ mbǝ Okafɔ ǝmǝ nɛ. Fɛɛ nwǝ ni Okafɔse ǝmǝ eto okloboo, lǝ unyǝ ɔlɛ Okafɔse ǝmǝ eto ɔkɔɛ bɔɔnɔ, yeakpe wǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti. Nko ǝmǝ eso mintsya nlɛ disuǝyuǝ bunyǝ tinti fe okafɔse ǝmǝ eto oklobo nɛ.

english_verse: Jesus must become more important, while I become less important. The One Who Comes from Heaven
translation_verse: Nya nko ele bǝ wǝ diye be kato lǝ mɔ lele lǝ dibǝ kasɔ nɛ.

english_verse: God's Son comes from heaven and is above all others. Everyone who comes from the earth belongs to the earth and speaks about earthly things. The one who comes from heaven is above all others.
translation_verse: “Nwǝ ditsyi kato ubǝǝ, so utsyuǝ saa. Nya nwǝ ditsyi kasɔ mfo tsyaa, kasɔ mfo eto utidi ete uni. Nya kasɔ mfo eto asa eto etiki ete weedi. Fɛɛ nwǝ ditsyi kato úbǝǝ, tǝkǝ mǝmblɛ kato.

english_verse: He speaks about what he has seen and heard, and yet no one believes him.
translation_verse: Waatɛyi lesa nǝ úkǝnyǝ ku nnya úkanɔ mfó. Fɛɛ kuutsyuǝ saa aamfo wǝ sedansiɛdidi siamǝ.

english_verse: But everyone who does believe him has shown that God is truthful.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nwǝ ke léfo wǝ kɛnyɛ kamǝ ɔ́nɔɔ, lɛ uyi bose kǝtǝ nkǝ Onanto eyifo utintinyǝ.

english_verse: The Son was sent to speak God's message, and he has been given the full power of God's Spirit.
translation_verse: Nwǝ Onanto létsyesee, eedi Onanto eto etiki, itsyise Onanto éfi wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ úyisǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ kenke.

english_verse: The Father loves the Son and has given him everything.
translation_verse: Anto ǝmǝ aala wǝ Ubi ǝmǝ nya úfi lesa saa ókpe wǝ lǝ ani nɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who has faith in the Son has eternal life. But no one who rejects him will ever share in that life, and God will be angry with them forever.
translation_verse: “Nwǝ léfo Ubi ǝmǝ ɔ́nɔɔ, kpe nkpǝ manlo. Nya nwǝ laani weentsyue Ubi ǝmǝ kotoo, weembunyǝ nkpǝ manlo bomǝ. Bomu Onanto eto kotonǝnǝ manlo ebutǝkǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: But Jesus' disciples were really the ones doing the baptizing, and not Jesus himself. Jesus and the Samaritan Woman
translation_verse: Lǝ sitintii, Yesu kosate ményifo ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa útǝ kuutsyuǝ saa, bomu wǝ bakasebi hã díkeyifo nko.

english_verse: This time he had to go through Samaria,
translation_verse: Nya lǝ kusu ko ɔnyɛ ɔntɔɔ, ele bǝ ɔyɛ Samaria eto kasɔ ofe.

english_verse: “You are a Jew,” she replied, “and I am a Samaritan woman. How can you ask me for a drink of water when Jews and Samaritans won't have anything to do with each other?”
translation_verse: Usio ǝmǝ átɛyi nkǝ, “Beso fǝ Yudanyǝ laatɔ mɔ Samariasio fǝ ntǝ fǝ ntu lǝ ǝnǝ?” Usio ǝmǝ átɔ nko itsyise Yudafɔ ku Samariafɔ anka.

english_verse: “Sir,” the woman said, “you don't even have a bucket, and the well is deep. Where are you going to get this life-giving water?
translation_verse: Usio ǝmǝ átɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Boanto, ǝmbǝ lesa nǝ beefi kekuti ntu, nya lɛtidibo nǝmǝ tsya atsyo. Sie fuunyǝ ntu bo lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ bomǝ etsyiko?

english_verse: Our ancestor Jacob dug this well for us, and his family and animals got water from it. Are you greater than Jacob?”
translation_verse: Lee fǝ nso bo Ona Yakob wǝ díku lɛtidibo nǝmfo útǝ bo, kaka wǝ ku wǝ bebi ku wǝ bebuki kenke dínǝ ntu betsyiko?”

english_verse: But no one who drinks the water I give will ever be thirsty again. The water I give will become in that person a flowing fountain that gives eternal life.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ntu bo mɔ luutǝǝ, utukuɛ ensi ǝmbɔlɛ nwǝ luunǝ mu. Ntu bo mɔ luutǝ wǝ ebofiani nkpǝ eto ntu eto kayifǝkɔ lǝ wǝ. Ntu bomfo ebukabɔdi lǝ wǝ nya buutǝ wǝ nkpǝ manlo.”

english_verse: The woman replied, “Sir, please give me a drink of that water! Then I won't get thirsty and have to come to this well again.”
translation_verse: Usio ǝmfo átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Boanto, tǝ mɛ ntu bomfo bǝ lǝ utukuɛ lǝ ɔyɛ mɛ bɔlɛ bio, nya lǝ nyɛ mfo bubǝ kekuti ntu.”

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Go and bring your husband.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Su akpadi fǝ usǝ lǝ bibǝ.”

english_verse: The woman said, “Sir, I can see that you are a prophet.
translation_verse: Usio emǝ átɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Bonamute, nnyǝ miǝ eyifo Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi.

english_verse: My ancestors worshiped on this mountain, but you Jews say Jerusalem is the only place to worship.”
translation_verse: Bo Samariafɔɔ, bo banamǝ ésumu Onanto lǝ kɔtini komfo ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ mi Yudafɔ aatɛyi biǝnkǝ Yerusalem ni kaka ele bǝ busumu Onanto.”

english_verse: Jesus said to her: Believe me, the time is coming when you won't worship the Father either on this mountain or in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Usionko, fo mɛ anɔ fǝ lefe ditsyuǝ lǝ bubǝ nǝ betidi lensiembusumu Onanto lǝ kɔtini komfo ǝsuǝ nye lǝ Yerusalem.

english_verse: You Samaritans don't really know the one you worship. But we Jews do know the God we worship, and by using us, God will save the world.
translation_verse: Mi Samariafɔɔ, binyi lesa nǝ biesumu. Fɛɛ bo Yudafɔɔ, buyi futsyǝ boesumu. Itsyise Yudafɔ ǝsuǝ nnya bofokǝtǝ laayɛ kǝbǝ.

english_verse: But a time is coming, and it is already here! Even now the true worshipers are being led by the Spirit to worship the Father according to the truth. These are the ones the Father is seeking to worship him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lefe lɛ bubǝ nya díkǝbǝ tsya koko, se betidi luusumu Anto ǝmǝ ɛyɛ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ku lǝ lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale ku lǝ sitinti ǝsuǝ. Itsyise mǝ ni besumunyǝ ba eto okle Onanto laala nkǝ besumu wǝ nɛ.

english_verse: God is Spirit, and those who worship God must be led by the Spirit to worship him according to the truth.
translation_verse: Se Onanto ni Lɛwɔnɔ esoo, betidi ba luusumu wǝǝ, ele bǝ bayɛ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ eto ǝsuǝale ku lǝ sitinti ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: The woman said, “I know that the Messiah will come. He is the one we call Christ. When he comes, he will explain everything to us.”
translation_verse: Usio ǝmǝ átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nyi miǝ Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ, wǝ baakpo Kristoo, ebubǝ. Nya lǝ ubǝǝ, wuulǝkǝ lesa saa kasɔ ote bo.”

english_verse: “I am that one,” Jesus told her, “and I am speaking to you now.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ nwǝ nlɛ etiki budi ku fǝ mfoo, mɔ ni wǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: The disciples returned about this time and were surprised to find Jesus talking with a woman. But none of them asked him what he wanted or why he was talking with her.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfóo, wǝ bakasebi bamǝ ǝbǝ bédufǝ nya íyifo mǝ naa se bǝnyǝ wǝ ɔnlɛ etiki budi ku usio. Fɛɛ mǝ kuutsyuǝ saa mántɔ usio ǝmǝ bǝ be woabɛbɛ nye bátɔ wǝ bǝ beso ɔnlɛ etiki budi ku usio ǝmǝ.

english_verse: The woman left her water jar and ran back into town, where she said to the people,
translation_verse: Usio ǝmǝ áyani wǝ ɔlɔtsyi ǝmǝ útsyǝ lǝ lɛtidibo nǝmǝ ɔflɔ nya údu úsu umǝ úsu ɔ́tɛyi betidi nkǝ,

english_verse: “Come and see a man who told me everything I have ever done! Could he be the Messiah?”
translation_verse: “Bibǝ bebe osani utsyuǝ wǝ lɛtɛyi mɛ lesa saa nǝ mínkeyifo mínyǝ lǝ mɔ nkpǝ! Lee wǝ ni Onanto eto nwǝ Bákpo Ɔhile Bǝtsyǝ ǝmǝ?”

english_verse: Everyone in town went out to see Jesus.
translation_verse: Nyaso betidi bamǝ ábɔ bétsyi umǝ ǝmǝ bésu bǝ beesu bǝnyǝ wǝ.

english_verse: While this was happening, Jesus' disciples were saying to him, “Teacher, please eat something.”
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfóo, bakasebi bamǝ álɛ Yesu lekpakpa bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, bedi lesa!”

english_verse: But Jesus told them, “I have food you don't know anything about.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nkpe lesa nǝ muudi nǝ ǝsuǝ binyi kulesa saa bitsyiko.”

english_verse: His disciples started asking each other, “Has someone brought him something to eat?”
translation_verse: Nyaso bakasebi bamǝ étsyiko mǝ ǝsuǝ bɔtɔ bǝnkǝ, “Lee utsyuǝ áboko wǝ lesa údi?”

english_verse: Jesus said: My food is to do what God wants! He is the one who sent me, and I must finish the work that he gave me to do.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ didisa ni bǝ nyifo nwǝ lékpe mɛ eto lelabi, nya lǝ nlosǝ keyifo ka útǝ mɛ nkǝ nyifo.

english_verse: You may say there are still four months until harvest time. But I tell you to look, and you will see that the fields are ripe and ready to harvest.
translation_verse: Biatɛyi biǝnkǝ, ‘Afa ana sɔ̃ɔ̃ kama fɛ lesa loobe oto.’ Fɛɛ nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ bɛlɛ ola bebe kakuɛ eto ditsyǝbi lǝ bebe kase bidikǝ biamǝ díkabe! Bíoyo nnya bulǝkǝ.

english_verse: Even now the harvest workers are receiving their reward by gathering a harvest that brings eternal life. Then everyone who planted the seed and everyone who harvests the crop will celebrate together.
translation_verse: Onanto aafo kayo nwǝ lǝǝlǝkǝ bidikǝ lǝ ɔkuɛ nya waakpa mi kakpo lǝ unwu itǝ nkpǝ manlo. Lǝ nyamfo eso nwǝ laato ku nwǝ lǝǝlǝkǝǝ, mǝmblɛ ebunyǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti.

english_verse: So the saying proves true, “Some plant the seed, and others harvest the crop.”
translation_verse: Nyaso nnya baatɛyi bǝ utidi ɔni laato nya obamba lǝǝlǝkǝ, eyifo sitinti.

english_verse: A lot of Samaritans in that town put their faith in Jesus because the woman had said, “This man told me everything I have ever done.”
translation_verse: Samariafɔ kpǝ lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ áfo Yesu bánɔ ɛyɛ lǝ nnya usio ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Ɔ́tɛyi mɛ lesa saa nǝ mínkeyifo lǝ mɔ nkpǝ ǝsuǝ mínyǝ,” eso.

english_verse: They came and asked him to stay in their town, and he stayed on for two days.
translation_verse: Nyaso se Samariafɔ bamǝ díbǝ bǝnyǝ Yesu lǝ lɛtidibo nǝmǝ ɔflɔɔ, bálɛ wǝ lekpakpa bǝ usiǝ lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ nya Yesu dísiǝ mfó eyi ǝnuǝ.

english_verse: Many more Samaritans put their faith in Jesus because of what they heard him say.
translation_verse: Betidi bamba kpǝ esi báfo wǝ bánɔ lǝ wǝ ditiki nǝ údi mǝ eso.

english_verse: They told the woman, “We no longer have faith in Jesus just because of what you told us. We have heard him ourselves, and we are certain that he is the Savior of the world!” Jesus Heals an Official's Son (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya bátɛyi usio ǝmǝ bǝnkǝ, “Bófo bɔ́nɔ mɔmɔ inni lǝ nnya fátɛyi bo eso, bomu bo kosate ánɔ etiki nnya údi eso, nya buyi boǝ wǝ ni kawunsiǝ kamfo eto Ofomfokǝtǝ tinti ǝmǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus had said, “Prophets are honored everywhere, except in their own country.” Then two days later he left
translation_verse: Itsyise wǝ kosate ǝlǝkǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Dibu ankɛ kǝtǝ Onanto Eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi lǝ wǝ kosate eto kasɔ.”

english_verse: and went to Galilee. The people there welcomed him, because they had gone to the festival in Jerusalem and had seen everything he had done.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se Yesu dísu údufǝ Galilea, betidi bamǝ áfo wǝ atuu ku disuǝyuǝ, itsyise se bésu Ukpǝ Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto Diyisɛɛ kedikɔ lǝ Yerusalem, bǝnyǝ asa nnya kenke úyifo.

english_verse: While Jesus was in Galilee, he returned to the village of Cana, where he had turned the water into wine. There was an official in Capernaum whose son was sick.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, Yesu ésinkli úsu Kana lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ, kaka úkatsyi ntu ɔ́wuninsǝ bófiani nte. Lefe nǝmfóo, Aba eto unyɛsiǝ ninǝ utsyuǝ wǝ dítsyi Kapernaum eto ubi ánɔ bufi.

english_verse: And when the man heard that Jesus had come from Judea, he went and begged him to keep his son from dying.
translation_verse: Se ɔ́nɔ nkǝ Yesu etsyi Yudea úbǝ Galilea, úsu wǝ ɔflɔ nya ɔ́lɛ wǝ lekpakpa nkǝ úsu Kapernaum lǝ usu otsya wǝ ubisaibi utǝ wǝ, itsyise wǝ ubi ǝmǝ fe woala lǝ ukpǝ.

english_verse: Jesus told the official, “You won't have faith unless you see miracles and wonders!”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ biǝnnyǝ nyifo ayanisa ntee, biamfo mɛ kanɔ.”

english_verse: The man replied, “Lord, please come before my son dies!”
translation_verse: Uninǝ ǝmfo álɛ wǝ lekpakpa ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute, bǝ lǝ ǝbǝ abe mɔ ubi ǝmǝ bǝ lǝ ɔyɛ bukpǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “Your son will live. Go on home to him.” The man believed Jesus and started back home.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Su! Fǝ ubi ǝmǝ ebɔkɛ nkpǝ.” Uninǝ ǝmǝ áfo etiki nnya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ ɔ́nɔ nya úsinkli údu.

english_verse: Some of the official's servants met him along the road and told him, “Your son is better!”
translation_verse: Se úsinkli ɔntɔɔ, wǝ diyo eto beyifoyifo betsyuǝ átsyako wǝ lǝ kusu nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ wǝ ubi ǝmǝ kpe nkpǝ.

english_verse: He asked them when the boy got better, and they answered, “The fever left him yesterday at one o'clock.”
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɔ mǝ lefe nǝ tutuutu íyuǝ wǝ ubi ǝmǝ. Nya bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Kǝnǝ ku kakɔmi lefe, fe lebombo lɛwɛ eti nnya bɔyila bomǝ léyani wǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: The boy's father realized that at one o'clock the day before, Jesus had told him, “Your son will live!” So the man and everyone in his family put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Ubi anto ǝmǝ ákloma nkǝ lefe nǝmfo ǝsuǝ tutuutu Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ ubi ǝmǝ ebɔkɛ nkpǝ.” Nya uninǝ ǝmfo ku wǝ diyo eto betidi kenke léfo Yesu bánɔ.

english_verse: This was the second miracle that Jesus worked after he left Judea and went to Galilee.
translation_verse: Nyamfo díyifo ayanisa nuǝfǝ nnya Yesu díyifo lǝ Galilea se utsyi Yudea eto kasɔ úsu mfó nɛ.

english_verse: Later, Jesus went to Jerusalem for another Jewish festival.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu ésu Yerusalem se Yudafɔ eto diyisɛɛ ditsyuǝ didife léyo.

english_verse: In the city near the sheep gate was a pool with five porches, and its name in Hebrew was Bethzatha.
translation_verse: Lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ eto kaka baakpo Basamu eto Kesie ɔflɔɔ, ditumbu ditsyuǝ kpe mfó nǝ baakpo bǝ Betesda lǝ Hebrifɔ eto sele ǝsuǝ. Bákpo mpatampa ɛnɔ beńyǝnsǝ lǝ ditumbu nǝmǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Beside the pool was a man who had been sick for
translation_verse: Osani utsyuǝ kálabǝ mfó wǝ díkǝfi alɛ fosi ǝtsyǝ alɛ mflamfla sɔ̃ɔ̃.

english_verse: You have not believed his message, because you refused to have faith in the one he sent.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ biamfo wǝ ditiki nǝmǝ kakpe lǝ mi akɔɛsi itsyise biamfo utidi wǝ ótsyese bɛnɔ.

english_verse: When Jesus saw the man and realized that he had been crippled for a long time, he asked him, “Do you want to be healed?”
translation_verse: Se Yesu dínyǝ wǝ nya unyi nkǝ onlabe lǝ ufinkla ǝsuǝ mfó itǝ alɛ kpǝǝ, ɔ́tɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Ala bǝ, fǝ bufi yɛ fǝ?”

english_verse: The man answered, “Sir, I don't have anyone to put me in the pool when the water is stirred up. I try to get in, but someone else always gets there first.”
translation_verse: Ufimfi ǝmǝ ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Uninǝ, mimbǝ kuutsyuǝ wǝ lɔɔwunsǝko mɛ ndufǝ ntu bomǝ kafo lǝ bémunisǝ mu. Lǝ nkplatsya miǝ meedufǝ tsyaa, utidi bamba éboka mɛ budufǝ koko.”

english_verse: Jesus told him, “Pick up your mat and walk!”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Taka ǝńyǝ, fi fǝ okla lǝ ayɛ edu!”

english_verse: Right then the man was healed. He picked up his mat and started walking around. The day on which this happened was a Sabbath.
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo, osani ǝmǝ eto ǝsuǝ ǝmuǝ wǝ ale! Úfi wǝ okla nya ɔ́yɛ údu. Diyi nǝ nyamfo díbǝǝ, eyifo Yudafɔ eto Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi.

english_verse: When the Jewish leaders saw the man carrying his mat, they said to him, “This is the Sabbath! No one is allowed to carry a mat on the Sabbath.”
translation_verse: Nyaso Yudafɔ eto beninǝ átɛyi osani wǝ Yesu létsya bufi bǝnkǝ, “Mmi eyifo Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi. Kɔfi mǝntǝ kusu bǝ lǝ etsyi fǝ okla.”

english_verse: But he replied, “The man who healed me told me to pick up my mat and walk.”
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nwǝ létsya mɛ bufi ke lɛtɛyi mɛ nkǝ, ‘Taka ǝńyǝ, fi fǝ okla lǝ ayɛ edu!’ ”

english_verse: They asked him, “Who is this man that told you to pick up your mat and walk?”
translation_verse: Bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Owoe ni utsyǝ lɛtɛyi fǝ nkǝ, ‘Tsyi fǝ okla lǝ ayɛ’?”

english_verse: But he did not know who Jesus was, and Jesus had left because of the crowd.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nwǝ bátsya bufi bomǝ mánte nkǝ utsyǝ ǝmǝ ni Yesu. Nya Yesu tsya ébonya údufǝ lǝ betidi kpǝ ba díńyǝ mfó eto nti.

english_verse: Later, Jesus met the man in the temple and told him, “You are now well. But don't sin anymore or something worse might happen to you.”
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu ǝnyǝ wǝ lǝ Onanto eto kedikǝtǝkɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bebe! Ǝsuǝ búmuǝ fǝ ale. Nyaso mensiyifo lebua bio! Lenni nkoo, lesa nǝ nkpe ale enso mmǝ ebuyifo fǝ!”

english_verse: The man left and told the leaders that Jesus was the one who had healed him.
translation_verse: Nya osani ǝmǝ dídu nya úsu ɔ́tɛyi Yudafɔ eto beninǝ bamǝ nkǝ Yesu ni utidi wǝ létsya wǝ bufi.

english_verse: They started making a lot of trouble for Jesus because he did things like this on the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Nyaso bétsyiko Yesu bulǝ, itsyise ótsya utidi bufi lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi ǝsuǝ

english_verse: But Jesus said, “My Father has never stopped working, and this is why I keep on working.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ Anto si ɔlɛ keyifo buyifo lefe saa, nyaso ele bǝ mintsya yifo nko.”

english_verse: Now the leaders wanted to kill Jesus for two reasons. First, he had broken the law of the Sabbath. But even worse, he had said God was his Father, which made him equal with God. The Son's Authority
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ɔ́tɛyi mfo esoo, Yudafɔ eto beninǝ esi bábɛbɛ esu kekleke bǝ baalo wǝ. Itsyise inni Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi ǝsuǝ eto kɔfi ete óta úbu, bomu usi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ Onanto eyifo wǝ Anto. Nya nyamfo eto kasɔ ni bǝ wǝ ku Onanto akate. Yesu Eto Ǝsuǝale

english_verse: Jesus told the people: I tell you for certain the Son cannot do anything on his own. He can do only what he sees the Father doing, and he does exactly what he sees the Father do.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, Onanto eto Ubi embofo kulesa buyifo lǝ wǝ kosate eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ. Bomu lesa nǝ wǝǝnyǝ wǝ Anto leeyifoo, ni wintsya leeyifo nɛ.

english_verse: The Father loves the Son and has shown him everything he does. The Father will show him even greater things, and you will be amazed.
translation_verse: Itsyise Anto ǝmǝ aala wǝ Ubi ǝmǝ nya woate wǝ lesa saa nǝ wǝ kosate nlɛ buyifo. Nya woote wǝ asa kplɛ kpǝ enso nyamfo nnya luuyifo mimblɛ yanii.

english_verse: Just as the Father raises the dead and gives life, so the Son gives life to anyone he wants to.
translation_verse: Fe kase Anto ǝmǝ laatakasǝ bǝkpenkpe ketsyiko ɔkɔmǝ kaboko nkpǝǝ, nko ke Ubi ǝmǝ tsya luutǝ nkpǝ mba úlǝkǝ nɛ.

english_verse: The Father doesn't judge anyone, but he has made his Son the judge of everyone.
translation_verse: Nya Anto ǝmǝ kosate tsya ankponko kuutsyuǝ lekpo, bomu útǝ wǝ Ubi kusu nkǝ okponko betidi kenke lekpo,

english_verse: The Father wants all people to honor the Son as much as they honor him. When anyone refuses to honor the Son, this is the same as refusing to honor the Father who sent him.
translation_verse: bǝ lǝ utsyuǝ saa lǝ ufi dibu utǝ Ubi ǝmǝ fe kase bǝǝtǝ Anto ǝmǝ dibu. Futsyǝ kee dímembu Ubi ǝmǝǝ, mémbu Anto ǝmǝ létsyesǝ wǝ tsya.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who hears my message and has faith in the one who sent me has eternal life and will never be condemned. They have already gone from death to life.
translation_verse: “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, utsyuǝ saa wǝ laanɔ mɔ ditiki nya ófo nwǝ létsyese mɛ ɔ́nɔɔ, wuunyǝ nkpǝ manlo. Bembokponko wǝ lekpo, fɛɛ ɔ́yɛ lǝ ukpǝ ǝsuǝ ófe údufǝ lǝ nkpǝ ǝsuǝ koko.

english_verse: I tell you for certain the time will come, and it is already here, when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of God. And those who listen to it will live!
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti miǝ, lefe lɛ bubǝ nǝ bekpǝnkpǝ luutsyue Onanto eto Ubi koto, nya mba leetsyue we ɔkɔɛ koto ebunyǝ nkpǝ tinti. Lefe nǝmǝ kulaatsya ébubǝ koko.

english_verse: The Father has the power to give life, and he has given that same power to the Son.
translation_verse: Fe kase Anto ǝmǝ ni nkpǝ eto ketsyikokɔ, nko ke útǝ nkǝ wǝ Ubi tsya yifo nkpǝ eto ketsyikokɔ nɛ.

english_verse: And he has given his Son the right to judge everyone, because he is the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Nya útǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale nkǝ okponko kawunsiǝ kenke lekpo, itsyise wǝ ni Utidi Eto Ubi ǝmǝ.

english_verse: Don't be surprised! The time will come when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of Man,
translation_verse: “Biǝntǝ lǝ nyamfo lǝ iyifo mi yanii, itsyise lefe lɛ bubǝ nǝ bekpǝnkpǝ ba nkpe lǝ edi lɔɔnɔ Utidi Eto Ubi ǝmǝ eto ɔkɔɛ.

english_verse: and they will come out of their graves. Everyone who has done good things will rise to life, but everyone who has done evil things will rise and be condemned.
translation_verse: Nya bɔɔbɔ lǝ edi bǝbǝ. Mba dísiǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ ebotaka bǝnyǝ nkpǝ manlo. Nya mba dísiǝ nkpǝ bua, tsya ebotaka bafo dikpilolo.

english_verse: I cannot do anything on my own. The Father sent me, and he is the one who told me how to judge. I judge with fairness, because I obey him, and I don't just try to please myself. Witnesses to Jesus
translation_verse: “Mǝmbofo kulesa buyifo lǝ mɔ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ. Lesa nǝ Onanto laatɛyi mɛɛ, nnya meefi kakpo lekpo nɛ. Nyaso mɔ lekpokponkpo yɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ, itsyise meenyifo kulesa lǝ mɔ lelabi ǝsuǝ, bomu lǝ nwǝ létsyese mǝ eto lelabi ǝsuǝ.” Yohanes Ǝlǝkǝ Yesu Kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: If I speak for myself, there is no way to prove I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ nlǝkǝ kɛnyɛ lǝ mɔ kosate ǝsuǝǝ, yanle bǝ bafo lesa nǝ míntɛyi ǝmbǝ kalende.

english_verse: But there is someone else who speaks for me, and I know what he says is true.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ utidi bamba kpe wǝ leedi adansiɛ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ, nya nyi miǝ adansiɛ nnya ɔnlɛ budi lǝ mɛɛ, kpe kalende.

english_verse: You sent messengers to John, and he told them the truth.
translation_verse: “Bíokpe batɔnkpe Yohanes ɔflɔ nya úkatɛyi mi sitinti siamǝ itsyi lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I don't depend on what people say about me, but I tell you these things so that you may be saved.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔɔ, minlɛ bɔtɛyi miǝ utidinini eto sedansiɛdidi lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ afe itǝ mɛ. Bomu ńtɛyi nyamfo bǝ lǝ binyǝ bofokǝtǝ.

english_verse: John was a lamp that gave a lot of light, and you were glad to enjoy his light for a while.
translation_verse: Yohanes ǝtsyǝ fe okandiɛ wǝ nlɛ bunyǝ nya ɔnlɛ lekpasǝ butǝ, nya béla biǝ biǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ wǝ lekpasǝ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ itǝ lefe sɛkɛ ete.

english_verse: But something more important than John speaks for me. I mean the things that the Father has given me to do! All of these speak for me and prove that the Father sent me.
translation_verse: “Fɛ mɔɔ, sedansiɛ sia lɛflɔ senso Yohanes eto selee, se nkpe mɛ nɛ. Itsyise keyifo ka mɔ Anto dítǝ mɛ nkǝ nyifo nlose, ka minlɛ buyifoo, ke nlɛ adansiɛ budi lǝ mɛɛ nɛ. Ke nlɛ bote bǝ mɔ Anto ǝmǝ létsyese mɛ.

english_verse: The Father who sent me also speaks for me, but you have never heard his voice or seen him face to face.
translation_verse: Nya Anto wǝ létsyese mɛ tsyaa, wǝ kosate leedi adansiǝ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ. Bíannɔ tɔ wǝ ɔkɔɛ bɛnɔ, nya bíǝnyǝ tɔ kase unte bínyǝ.

english_verse: You search the Scriptures, because you think you will find eternal life in them. The Scriptures tell about me,
translation_verse: Biakase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue eto asa itsyise bibu biǝ biunyǝ nkpǝ manlo lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Nya ko etiki nyamfoo, lɛ etiki budi ketsyi lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ!

english_verse: but you refuse to come to me for eternal life.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bɛni biǝ biembubǝ mɛ ɔflɔ lǝ binyǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: I don't care about human praise,
translation_verse: “Minlɛ kasɔ mfo eto betidi eto atɛsǝ bɔbɛbɛ,

english_verse: but I do know that none of you love God.
translation_verse: itsyise nyi betidi ba eto okle bini, nya nyi miǝ bianla Onanto lǝ mi akɔɛsi.

english_verse: I have come with my Father's authority, and you have not welcomed me. But you will welcome people who come on their own.
translation_verse: Mbǝ lǝ mɔ Anto eto diye ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ biamfo mɛ. Nya lǝ utidi bamba ebubǝ lǝ wǝ kosate eto diye ǝsuǝ alɛɛ, biofo wǝ.

english_verse: How could you possibly believe? You like to have your friends praise you, and you don't care about praise that the only God can give!
translation_verse: Ntsyǝ yuubǝ fɛ biofo mɛ bɛnɔ lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe bɛnlɛ atɛsǝ bɔbɛbɛ ketsyiko mi bǝtsyuǝ ɔflɔ, nya biambɛbɛ atɛsǝ nnya ditsyi Onanto ɔni kplo ǝmǝ ɔflɔ?

english_verse: Don't think that I will be the one to accuse you to the Father. You have put your hope in Moses, yet he is the very one who will accuse you.
translation_verse: “Fɛɛ biembu biǝ mɔ ni nwǝ loolo mi dikpi lǝ mɔ Anto ɔflɔ. Bomu Moses, nwǝ ǝsuǝ bífi mi kusubebe bítǝkǝ, wǝ ni futsyǝ loolo mi dikpi nɛ.

english_verse: Moses wrote about me, and if you had believed Moses, you would have believed me.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ete béfo Moses bɛnɔ sitintii, eni béfo mɛ bɛnɔ, itsyise ɔ́wɔni asa utsyǝ itsyi lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But if you don't believe what Moses wrote, how can you believe what I say?
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se bíamfo lesa nǝ ɔ́wɔni utsyǝ bɛnɔɔ, ntsyǝ yuubǝ fɛ biofo lesa nǝ maatɛyi bɛnɔ?”

english_verse: The disciples gathered them up and filled twelve large baskets with what was left over from the five barley loaves.
translation_verse: Nyaso básɛ nnya díbu bakɔ. Nya nnya díbu lǝ abolo anɔ nnya bédi ǝsuǝǝ, éyi lefosi etsyitsya ǝnuǝ.

english_verse: The disciples wanted to take him into the boat, but suddenly the boat reached the shore where they were headed. The Bread That Gives Life
translation_verse: Mfó fɛ ǝsuǝ diyuǝ mǝ nɛ! Nya bǝtǝ údufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ nya ete bédufǝ kaka bántɔ tsya nɛ.

english_verse: They replied, “What miracle will you work, so that we can have faith in you? What will you do?
translation_verse: Bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nte ayanisa nnya fuuyifo ate bo, bǝ lǝ bofo fǝ bɔnɔ? Be fuuyifo?

english_verse: No one can come to me, unless the Father who sent me makes them want to come. But if they do come, I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ embofo mɛ ɔflɔ bubǝ lenni mɔ Anto ǝmǝ lékpa wǝ óboko mɔ ɔflɔ. Nya mootakasǝ wǝ mboko nkpǝ lǝ diyi fɛfɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: “There is a boy here who has five small loaves of barley bread and two fish. But what good is that with all these people?”
translation_verse: “Okosobi utsyuǝ si mfo wǝ ntsyi abolo anɔ ku akpɛ ǝnuǝ. Fɛɛ bǝ ni nyamfo itǝ betidi ba kpenkpe mfo?”

english_verse: The ground was covered with grass, and Jesus told his disciples to tell everyone to sit down. About
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bitǝ lǝ betidi bamǝ lǝ bǝsiǝ lǝ kasɔ lǝ kaka lékpa wuee.” Nyaso betidi bamǝ kenke ǝsiǝ lǝ kasɔ. Basani mate eyifo fe akpi anɔ.

english_verse: They got into a boat and started across for Capernaum. Later that evening Jesus had still not come to them,
translation_verse: Bédufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ utsyuǝ ǝsuǝ nya bétsyiko ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ bɔyila kesu Kapernaum eti. Kale ébolo, tsya fɛɛ Yesu mǝmbǝ óyotɔ mǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Jesus crossed Lake Galilee, which was also known as Lake Tiberias.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu áyila Galilea eto Ditumbukplɛ nǝ bensi baakpo bǝ Tiberia eto Ditumbukplɛ úsu ni lekpake nǝ nse.

english_verse: A large crowd had seen him work miracles to heal the sick, and those people went with him.
translation_verse: Nya betidi kpǝ dítǝkǝko wǝ, itsyise bǝnyǝ ayanisa nnya úyifo ótsya mba nlɛ bufi eso.

english_verse: It was almost time for the Jewish festival of Passover, and Jesus went up on a mountain with his disciples and sat down.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yudafɔ leedi Ukpe Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto Diyi éboyo elo.

english_verse: Philip answered, “Don't you know that it would take almost a year's wages just to buy only a little bread for each of these people?”
translation_verse: Filipo ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lǝ bufi betidi alofa ǝnuǝ eto diyi eto kayofofo eto atabi boya didisa kulaa tsyaa, diemboyo bǝ betidi bamfo eto utsyuǝ saa nyǝ sɛkɛ udi!”

english_verse: Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter, was one of the disciples. He spoke up and said,
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu eto okasebi wǝ ni Simon Petro, eto ɔyimi wǝ baakpo Andrea, lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: Jesus took the bread in his hands and gave thanks to God. Then he passed the bread to the people, and he did the same with the fish, until everyone had plenty to eat.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu dífi abolo nyamǝ, nya ɔ́sɔ Onanto ani nya úsie nnya útǝ betidi bamǝ nsi mfó. Nko ke úyifo ku akpɛ nyamǝ tsya nɛ, nya mǝ utsyuǝ saa lɛkɛ kase óla.

english_verse: The people ate all they wanted, and Jesus told his disciples to gather up the leftovers, so that nothing would be wasted.
translation_verse: Se bédi bémii, Yesu átɛyi wǝ bakasebi bamǝ nkǝ, “Bɛsɛ nnya díbu, bǝ lǝ ku ni ditsyuǝ saa lǝ lɛyɛ bobia.”

english_verse: Jesus realized that they would try to force him to be their king. So he went up on a mountain, where he could be alone. Jesus Walks on the Water (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya, Yesu áte nkǝ bǝǝbǝ wǝ bubǝ kǝmuǝ lǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ kǝtsyǝ seka. Itǝ eso úlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ mǝ nti úsu ɔkɛ lǝ akpenkpe nnya nkpe mfó nti wǝ mate. Yesu Áyɛ Lǝ Ntu Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The people who had stayed on the east side of the lake knew that only one boat had been there. They also knew that Jesus had not left in it with his disciples. But the next day
translation_verse: Se kale dísiǝǝ, betidi ba díbu bǝńyǝ lǝ ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ eto situma sia nsee, ǝnyǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo bǝ diyi nǝ léfee, ɔklɔ ɔni hã díńyǝ lǝ utuflɔ mfó. Báte bǝ Yesu méndufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ ku wǝ bakasebi fɛ bétsyiko ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ bɔyila. Bakasebi bamǝ mate ete dídufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafo.

english_verse: Don't work for food that spoils. Work for food that gives eternal life. The Son of Man will give you this food, because God the Father has given him the right to do so.”
translation_verse: Biankplatsya itǝ didisa nǝ laabia, bomu bekplatsya itǝ didisa nǝ lambia, nǝ luutsyǝ itǝ nkpǝ manlo. Didisa nǝmfoo, ni ni nǝ Utidi Eto Ubi luutǝ mi nɛ, itsyise Anto Onanto ébutǝkǝ wǝ kɔni utsyǝ.”

english_verse: One of the prophets wrote, “God will teach all of them.” And so everyone who listens to the Father and learns from him will come to me.
translation_verse: Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi áwɔni bǝnkǝ, ‘Onanto ebote mǝmblɛ kenke asa.’ Nyaso utsyuǝ saa wǝ leetsyue ato nya woakase asa ketsyi lǝ Anto ǝmǝ ɔflɔɔ, ǝǝbǝ mɔ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: They started arguing with each other and asked, “How can he give us his flesh to eat?”
translation_verse: Nyamfo áboko kǝnǝ kekleke lǝ Yudafɔ bamǝ nti nya bátɔ bǝ, “Ntsyǝ utidi ǝmfo loofo wǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ bufi kǝtǝ bo nkǝ budi?”

english_verse: That evening, Jesus' disciples went down to the lake.
translation_verse: Se ditsyitsyo lefe léyoo, Yesu eto bakasebi áyifǝ bésu ditumbukplɛ nemǝ kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: and a strong wind was making the water rough.
translation_verse: Ditumbukplɛ nǝmǝ eto ntu étsyiko bonwa ketu flɛmflɛmflɛ, itsyise ufiebi étsyiko bɔsɔ kekleke.

english_verse: When the disciples had rowed for five or six kilometers, they saw Jesus walking on the water. He kept coming closer to the boat, and they were terrified.
translation_verse: Bakasebi bamǝ ébonwa ɔklɔ ǝmǝ báyɛ fe esunkpo ǝtsyǝ nye ana ku kama fɛ bǝnyǝ se Yesu nyɛ lǝ ntu bomǝ ǝsuǝ ɔnlɛ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ ɔflɔ bubǝ. Se bǝnyǝ wǝǝ, sikpi ko dímuǝ mǝ!

english_verse: But he said, “I am Jesus! Don't be afraid!”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi, mǝ nkǝ, “Biante sikpi! Mɔ uni.”

english_verse: some boats from Tiberias sailed near the place where the crowd had eaten the bread for which the Lord had given thanks.
translation_verse: Nya efue bamba nnya ditsyi Tiberia eto umǝ ǝbǝ ídufǝ kaka dímantsyonko kaka bédi abolo, se Bonamute lékasɔ Onanto ani ólosǝ eto kama.

english_verse: They saw that Jesus and his disciples had left. Then they got into the boats and went to Capernaum to look for Jesus.
translation_verse: Se sitiditu nǝmǝ dínyǝ nkǝ Yesu nye wǝ bakasebi mankɛ mfó esoo, bédufǝ lǝ efue nyamǝ nya bédu bésu Kapernaum bésu banlɛ Yesu bɔbɛbɛ. Yesu Ni Didisa Nǝ Lǝǝtǝ Nkpǝ.

english_verse: They found him on the west side of the lake and asked, “Rabbi, when did you get here?”
translation_verse: Se betidi bamǝ dínyǝ Yesu lǝ ditumbukplɛ eto lekpake nǝ nsee, bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, dimamfe fǝbǝ mfo?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that you are not looking for me because you saw the miracles, but because you ate all the food you wanted.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, inni ayanisa nnya bínyǝ mínyifo bɛnɔ kasɔ eso bɛnlɛ mɛ bɔbɛbɛ, bomu lǝ didisa nǝ bɛkɛ bídi bími eso.

english_verse: “What exactly does God want us to do?” the people asked.
translation_verse: Mfó nya betidi bamǝ lɛtɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Be ele bǝ buyifo lǝ ete bǝ bɔlɛ Onanto eto keyifo buyifo?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “God wants you to have faith in the one he sent.”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lesa nǝ Onanto lela nkǝ biyifo ni bǝ befo utidi wǝ ótsyese bɛnɔ.”

english_verse: For example, when our ancestors were in the desert, they were given manna to eat. It happened just as the Scriptures say, ‘God gave them bread from heaven to eat.’ ”
translation_verse: Bo banamǝ édi didisa nǝ baakpo mana lǝ mfiminti fe kase báwɔni bǝtsyǝ lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, ‘Útǝ mǝ didisa nǝ dítsyi kato nkǝ bedi.’ ”

english_verse: Jesus then told them, “I tell you for certain that Moses wasn't the one who gave you bread from heaven. My Father is the one who gives you the true bread from heaven.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ inni Moses ni nwǝ dítǝ mi didisa nǝ dítsyi kato. Bomu mɔ Anto ni nwǝ lǝǝtǝ mi didisa tinti nǝ ditsyi kato.

english_verse: And the bread that God gives is the one who came down from heaven to give life to the world.”
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto eto didisa ni nwǝ ditsyi kato úbǝ. Wǝ ni nwǝ lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ kawunsiǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: The people said, “Sir, give us this bread and don't ever stop!”
translation_verse: Bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute, tǝ bo didisa nǝmfo lefe saa.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am the bread that gives life! No one who comes to me will ever be hungry. No one who has faith in me will ever be thirsty.
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ ni didisa nǝ lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ nɛ. Fǝǝ ke díbǝ mɔ ɔflɔɔ, kukpɛnsɛ ǝmbɔlɛ fǝ kulefe, nya nwǝ léfo mɛ ɔ́nɔɔ, utukuɛ ǝmbɔlɛ wǝ kulefe kulefe.

english_verse: I have told you already that you have seen me and still do not have faith in me.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ntɛyi mi minkǝ ite bǝ bíunyǝ mɛ tsyaa, bíamfo mɛ bɛnɔ.

english_verse: Everything and everyone that the Father has given me will come to me, and I won't turn any of them away.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke mɔ Anto ǝmǝ dífi útǝ mɛɛ, ebubǝ mɛ ɔflɔ, nya nwǝ díbǝ mɛ ɔflɔɔ, mǝmbɔni wǝ kulefe.

english_verse: I didn't come from heaven to do what I want! I came to do what the Father wants me to do. He sent me,
translation_verse: Itsyise ntsyi kato mbǝ inni bǝ lǝ nyifo lǝ mɔ lelabi ǝsuǝ, bomu mbǝ miǝ lǝ nyifo lǝ nwǝ létsyese mɛ eto lele ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: and he wants to make certain that none of the ones he has given me will be lost. Instead, he wants me to raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Nya utidi wǝ létsyese mɛ eto lelabi ni nkǝ mba kenke úfi útǝ mɛ eto kutsyuǝ mannya, bomu bǝ lǝ ntakasǝ mǝ nńyǝnsǝ lǝ diyi fɛfɛ ǝsuǝ lǝ mǝmblɛ kenke lǝ bǝnyǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: My Father wants everyone who sees the Son to have faith in him and to have eternal life. Then I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Itsyise mɔ Anto eto lelabi ni nkǝ, utsyuǝ saa wǝ dínyǝ mɔ Onanto eto Ubi nya ófo mɛ ɔ́nɔɔ, lǝ unyǝ nkpǝ manlo, nya mootakasǝ wǝ nńyǝnsǝ lǝ diyi fɛfɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: The people started grumbling because Jesus had said he was the bread that had come down from heaven.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yudafɔ bamǝ dítsyiko bɔwɔnɔnɔ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ itsyise ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ ni didisa nǝ ditsyi kato díbǝ” eso.

english_verse: They were asking each other, “Isn't he Jesus, the son of Joseph? Don't we know his father and mother? How can he say that he has come down from heaven?”
translation_verse: Nyaso bátɔ mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Inni Yesu ǝmfo wǝ ni Yosef eto Ubi lee? Buyi wǝ anto ku ambe. Ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ woatɛyi nkǝ, utsyi kato úbǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus told them: Stop grumbling!
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bɛyɛ kǝnǝ lǝ mi nti.

english_verse: The only one who has seen the Father is the one who has come from him. No one else has ever seen the Father.
translation_verse: Nyamfo mante bǝ utsyuǝ ébunyǝ Anto ǝmǝ unyǝ enso nwǝ ditsyi Onanto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ hã díkǝnyǝ wǝ unyǝ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who has faith in me has eternal life.
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ nwǝ lefo ɔnɔɔ, nkpǝ manlo kpe wǝ.

english_verse: I am the bread that gives life!
translation_verse: Mɔ ni dídisa nǝ lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: Your ancestors ate manna in the desert, and later they died.
translation_verse: Mi banamǝ édi lesa nǝ baakpo mana lǝ mfiminti, fɛɛ bekpǝ.

english_verse: But the bread from heaven has come down, so that no one who eats it will ever die.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ didisa nǝ ditsyi kato díbǝǝ, eyifo didisa nǝ utsyuǝ saa ke leedi nii, embukpǝ.

english_verse: I am that bread from heaven! Everyone who eats it will live forever. My flesh is the life-giving bread I give to the people of this world.
translation_verse: Mɔ ni didisa nǝ lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ, nǝ dítsyi kato díbǝ. Utsyuǝ saa wǝ leedi lesa nǝmfoo, wuusiǝ nkpǝ lefe saa. Nya didisa nǝ muufi ntǝ kawunsiɛ eto betidi bǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ nkpǝǝ, eyifo mɔ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ sia muumfi ntǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I tell you for certain that you won't live unless you eat the flesh and drink the blood of the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, lǝ biendi mɔ Utidi Eto Ubi eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ, binǝ mɔ kɔtɔɔ, biembunyǝ nkpǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But if you do eat my flesh and drink my blood, you will have eternal life, and I will raise you to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke leedi mɔ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ nya wǝǝnǝ mɔ kɔtɔɔ, ebunyǝ nkpǝ manlo, nya mootakasǝ wǝ mboko nkpǝ, lǝ diyi fɛfɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My flesh is the true food, and my blood is the true drink.
translation_verse: Itsyise mɔ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ni didisa tinti nya mɔ kɔtɔ ni ǝnǝsa tinti.

english_verse: If you eat my flesh and drink my blood, you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke leedi mɔ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ nya wǝǝnǝ mɔ kɔtɔɔ, okpe lǝ mɛ, nya mintsya nsi nkpǝ lǝ wǝ.

english_verse: The living Father sent me, and I have life because of him. Now everyone who eats my flesh will live because of me.
translation_verse: Fe kase Anto wǝ nsi nkpǝ lǝ mɛ nya minsi nkpǝ lǝ wǝǝ, nko ke utidi wǝ leedi mɔ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝǝ, luusiǝ nkpǝ ɛyɛ lǝ mɛ eso nɛ.

english_verse: The bread that comes down from heaven isn't like what your ancestors ate. They died, but whoever eats this bread will live forever.
translation_verse: Nyamfo ni didisa nǝ ditsyi kato díbǝ. Dinte fe didisa nǝ eto okle mi banamǝ dídi nya bǝkpǝ. Utsyuǝ saa kee leedi didisa nǝ maatɛyi mfoo, ebusiǝ nkpǝ itǝ lefe nǝmǝ kenke.”

english_verse: Jesus was teaching in a synagogue in Capernaum when he said these things. The Words of Eternal Life
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo Yesu léte mǝ lǝ Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ lǝ Kapernaum nɛ. Nkpǝ Manlo Eto Etiki

english_verse: Many of Jesus' disciples heard him and said, “This is too hard for anyone to understand.”
translation_verse: Se Yesu eto bakasebi kpǝ lɛnɔ etiki nyamfoo, bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Ditiki nǝmfo eto kasɔnɔnɔ kpe ale tinti! Owoe loofo ni bofo?”

english_verse: Jesus knew that his disciples were grumbling. So he asked, “Does this bother you?
translation_verse: Ite bǝ mǝ kuutsyuǝ mémfe kɛnyɛ ɔ́tɛyi kulesa tsyaa, Yesu áte nkǝ íkǝlǝ mǝ lǝ akɔɛsi nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Nyamfo ǝlǝ mi?

english_verse: What if you should see the Son of Man go up to heaven where he came from?
translation_verse: Nyalɛ, lǝ ibǝ bǝ binyǝ Utidi eto Ubi ǝmǝ ɔntɔ kato kaka usiǝ kɔɔ, ntsyǝ biuyifo?

english_verse: The Spirit is the one who gives life! Human strength can do nothing. The words that I have spoken to you are from that life-giving Spirit.
translation_verse: Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ. Utidi eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ saa. Etiki nnya kenke míntɛyi eyifo Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ eto etiki nnya lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: But some of you refuse to have faith in me.” Jesus said this, because from the beginning he knew who would have faith in him. He also knew which one would betray him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bǝtsyuǝ kpe lǝ mi nti ba dímamfo bánɔ.” Yesu áte taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ mba dímamfo wǝ bánɔ ku nwǝ luufi wǝ okpe kɔni.

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “You cannot come to me, unless the Father makes you want to come. That is why I have told these things to all of you.”
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi úsukosǝ nkǝ, “Nyamfo eso míntɛyi mi miǝ kuutsyuǝ saa embofo mɛ ɔflɔ bubǝ lenni Anto ǝmǝ dítǝ wǝ kusu.”

english_verse: Because of what Jesus said, many of his disciples turned their backs on him and stopped following him.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, mba dítǝkǝko wǝ kpǝ ésinkli lǝ wǝ kama nya bǝkǝtǝkǝko wǝ kama bio.

english_verse: Jesus then asked his twelve disciples if they also were going to leave him.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɔ wǝ bakasebi lefosi inuǝ bamǝ nkǝ, “Mi tsyaa, biusinkli mɛ kama?”

english_verse: Simon Peter answered, “Lord, there is no one else that we can go to! Your words give eternal life.
translation_verse: Simon Petro ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Bonamute, owoe ɔflɔ buudu busu? Fǝ nkpe nkpǝ manlo eto etiki nyamǝ!

english_verse: We have faith in you, and we are sure that you are God's Holy One.”
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, bófo bɔ́nɔ nya bunyi boǝ fǝ ni Onanto eto Ubi, wǝ ni Ɔkɛnkɛnyǝ ǝmǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “I chose all twelve of you, but one of you is a demon!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mɔ ni nwǝ dílǝkǝ mi lefosi inuǝ bamǝ tsyaa, ɔni eyifo oboatidi lǝ mi nti!”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot. He would later betray Jesus, even though he was one of the twelve disciples.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi nyamfo itsyi lǝ Yuda wǝ ni Simon Iskariot eto ubi ǝsuǝ. Itsyise uyifo bakasebi lefosi inuǝ bamǝ eto ɔni wǝ luufi wǝ okpe kɔni.

english_verse: Jesus decided to leave Judea and to start going through Galilee because the leaders of the people wanted to kill him.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu ésu ɔ́yɛ lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ, nya wánla nkǝ weesu Yudea eto kasɔ itsyise Yudafɔ akabɛbɛ kusu lǝ balo wǝ eso.

english_verse: It was almost time for the Festival of Shelters,
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfoo, Yudafɔ eto Mpatampa Kalɔsiǝsiǝ eto Diyisɛɛ nǝmǝ éboyo.

english_verse: and Jesus' brothers said to him, “Why don't you go to Judea? Then your disciples can see what you are doing.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu eto bayimisani átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Du mfo lǝ esu Yudea eto kasɔ lǝ fǝ bakasebi lǝ bǝnyǝ asa nnya fanlɛ buyifo.

english_verse: No one does anything in secret, if they want others to know about them. So let the world know what you are doing!”
translation_verse: Itsyise utidi wǝ laala nkǝ bate wǝǝ, enyifo asa kakula. Se fanlɛ asa nyamfo buyifoo, lǝkǝ nnya ate kawunsiǝ kenke lǝ betidi lǝ bate fǝ!”

english_verse: Even Jesus' own brothers had not yet become his followers.
translation_verse: Bátɛyi wǝ nko itsyise wǝ bayimisani kulaa tsya mámfo wǝ bánɔ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My time hasn't yet come, but your time is always here.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ lefe mányo tɔ. Fɛɛ mii, lefe saa alɛkɛ itǝ mi.

english_verse: The people of this world cannot hate you. They hate me, because I tell them that they do evil things.
translation_verse: Kawunsiǝ embofo mi bukisi. Fɛɛ mɔɔ, keekisi mɛ itsyise nlɛ bulǝkǝ kate minkǝ ke asayifoyifo eyi ku abuayifoyifo.

english_verse: Go on to the festival. My time hasn't yet come, and I am not going.”
translation_verse: Mii, bisu diyisɛɛ nǝmǝ kedikɔ. Mɔɔ, membusu diyi nǝmǝ kedikɔ itsyise mɔ lefe mányo tɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this and stayed on in Galilee. Jesus at the Festival of Shelters
translation_verse: Se ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nyamfoo, ɔ́tsyimɛ ɔkɛ lǝ Galilea mfó.

english_verse: After Jesus' brothers had gone to the festival, he went secretly, without telling anyone.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se wǝ bayimisani bamǝ dídu bésu diyi nǝmǝ kedikɔ eto kamaa, Yesu tsya ésu mfó, fɛɛ wǝnlǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ote, ɔ́kula ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: During the festival the leaders of the people looked for Jesus and asked, “Where is he?”
translation_verse: Yudafɔ eto beninǝ ákabɛbɛ wǝ lǝ diyisɛɛ nǝmǝ kedikɔ ákatɔ bǝ, “Sieti osani ǝmǝ nkpe?”

english_verse: The crowds even got into an argument about him. Some were saying, “Jesus is a good man,” while others were saying, “He is lying to everyone.”
translation_verse: Betidi kpǝ lǝ sitiditu nǝmǝ nti ékedi etiki kawɛkawɛ lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ katɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Uyifo utidi sɛɛ.” Nya bǝtsyuǝ tsya díkatɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Owo lo! Ɔlɛ betidi bɔwɛ kakpe kanyansǝ!”

english_verse: But the people were afraid of their leaders, and none of them talked in public about him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se banlɛ Yudafɔ sikpi bote esoo, kuutsyuǝ mámfo nnya bulǝkǝ katɛyi lǝ betidi lǝ banɔ. Yesu Áte Asa Lǝ Diyi Nǝmǝ Kedikɔ.

english_verse: When the festival was about half over, Jesus went into the temple and started teaching.
translation_verse: Se diyisɛɛ nǝmǝ didi eto eyi leyo ni ntinti etii, Yesu ésu Yudafɔ eto Disumuyo nya úsu óte asa mfó.

english_verse: The leaders were surprised and said, “How does this man know so much? He has never been taught!”
translation_verse: Wǝ asatete nyamǝ éyifo Yudafɔ bamǝ yanii, nya bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Sieti okosobi ǝmfo ditsyi ku kobe komfo eto okle, se wénsu asa kakasekɔ lǝ kukalebe saa?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am not teaching something I thought up. What I teach comes from the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ asatete méntsyi mɔ kosate ɔflɔ. Bomu itsyi Onanto wǝ létsyese mɛ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: If you really want to obey God, you will know if what I teach comes from God or from me.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ laala nkǝ weeyifo Onanto eto lelabii, ebote lǝ asa nnya maate etsyi Onanto ɔflɔ lee, mɔ kosate eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ maate nnya.

english_verse: If I wanted to bring honor to myself, I would speak for myself. But I want to honor the one who sent me. This is why I tell the truth and not a lie.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ leedi etiki itsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝǝ, wǝ ǝsuǝ eto atɛsǝ waabɛbɛ. Fɛ, utidi wǝ laala nkǝ waatɛsǝ nwǝ létsyese wǝǝ, weeyifo asa kayɛnko lǝ sitinti ǝsuǝ nya waantɛyi sidia.

english_verse: Didn't Moses give you the Law? Yet none of you obey it! So why do you want to kill me?
translation_verse: Inni Moses ni nwǝ dítǝ mi kɔfi komǝ lee? Fɛɛ mi kuutsyuǝ entsyue kɔfi komǝ koto. Beso bela biǝ bialo mɛ?”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “You're crazy! What makes you think someone wants to kill you?”
translation_verse: Mfó sitiditu siamǝ dítǝ wǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Lɛwɔnɔ bua tǝkǝko fǝ! Owoe nlɛ bola nkǝ waalo fǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I worked one miracle, and it amazed you.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Ayanisa ani nyamfo mínyifo nya íyifo mimblɛ tã yanii mmǝ.

english_verse: Moses commanded you to circumcise your sons. But it wasn't really Moses who gave you this command. It was your ancestors, and even on the Sabbath you circumcise your sons
translation_verse: Moses ǝtǝ mi kɔfi nkǝ bela mi bebisaibi eto alo. Ite bǝ inni Moses uni dítsyiko nko, bomu itsyi taa mi bana lefe. Nyaso biala osaibi lelo lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi nɛ.

english_verse: in order to obey the Law of Moses. Why are you angry with me for making someone completely well on the Sabbath?
translation_verse: Nya lǝ boofo osaibi lelo bola lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi ǝsuǝ lǝ kase yembonta Moses eto kɔfi ibuu, beso biǝnyǝ ɔblɔ kakpe mɛ biǝ ntsya utidi wǝ nlɛ bufi, úmuǝ ale kenke lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: Some of the people from Jerusalem were saying, “Isn't this the man they want to kill?
translation_verse: Betidi bǝtsyuǝ ba dítsyi Yerusalem átɔ bǝ, “Inni utidi ǝmfo banlɛ bɔbɛbɛ bǝ baalo?

english_verse: Yet here he is, speaking for everyone to hear. And no one is arguing with him. Do you suppose the authorities know he is the Messiah?
translation_verse: Bebe wǝ! Ɔlɛ etiki budi lǝ obianti, nya bántɛyi wǝ kulesa! Lee, bote bákate sitinti biǝnkǝ wǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ǝmǝ?

english_verse: But how could that be? No one knows where the Messiah will come from, but we know where this man comes from.”
translation_verse: Lǝ Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ǝmǝ ǝbǝǝ, kuutsyuǝ saa embote kaka utsyi úbǝ. Fɛɛ utidi ǝmfo alɛɛ, bomblɛ yi kaka utsyi úbǝ.”

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching in the temple, he shouted, “Do you really think you know me and where I came from? I didn't come on my own! The one who sent me is truthful, and you don't know him.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu díkate asa lǝ Disumuyo mfóo, ófa bembembe ɔ́tɔ nkǝ, “Inni biǝnkǝ biyi mɛ sitinti ku kaka mintsyii? Mǝmbǝ mfo lǝ mɔ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ! Nwǝ létsyese mɛɛ, waantɛyi sidia. Nya mii, binyi wǝ.

english_verse: But I know the one who sent me, because I came from him.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔɔ, nyi wǝ, itsyise intsyi wǝ ɔflɔ nya wǝ ni nwǝ létsyese mɛ.”

english_verse: Some of the people wanted to arrest Jesus right then. But no one even laid a hand on him, because his time had not yet come.
translation_verse: Nya bákplatsya bǝ bǝmuǝ wǝ. Fɛɛ mǝ kuutsyuǝ saa mámfo wǝ butidi, itsyise wǝ lefe mányo tɔ.

english_verse: A lot of people in the crowd put their faith in him and said, “When the Messiah comes, he surely won't perform more miracles than this man has done!” Officers Sent To Arrest Jesus
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kpǝ lǝ mǝ nti áfo wǝ bánɔ nyaso bátɔ bǝnkǝ, “Nya lǝ Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ díbǝǝ, uteyifo ayanisa ote enso nnya utidi ǝmfo díkeyifoo?” Batsyese Mba Laase Disumuyo Bǝ Bǝmuǝ Yesu.

english_verse: When the Pharisees heard the crowd arguing about Jesus, they got together with the chief priests and sent some temple police to arrest him.
translation_verse: Farisifɔ bamǝ ánɔ se sitiditu siamǝ nlɛ etiki nyamfo bɔtɛyi lǝ kawɛ lǝ mǝ nti lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ, nyaso mǝ ku besumunyǝ ninǝ átsya nya batsyese kedikǝtǝkɔ eto mba laase mfo bǝ besu bǝmuǝ Yesu baboko.

english_verse: But Jesus told them, “I will be with you a little while longer, and then I will return to the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nsi mɔɔkɛ mi lenti itǝ lefe kliminti ditsyuǝ ete muusinkli nsu nwǝ letsyese mɛ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: You will look for me, but you won't find me. You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: Biɔbɛbɛ mɛ, fɛɛ biembunyǝ mɛ, itsyise kaka mɔɔkɛɛ, biembofo mfó bubǝ.”

english_verse: The people asked each other, “Where can he go to keep us from finding him? Is he going to some foreign country where our people live? Is he going there to teach the Greeks?
translation_verse: Ete Yudafɔ eto beninǝ lɛtɔ mǝ ǝsuǝ benkǝ, “Sieti nwǝ mfo laala nkǝ weesu fɛ boembunyǝ wǝ? Lee, bubu ɔnlɛ nkǝ weedu usu Helafɔ eto kǝmǝ ka bo betidi nkpe bǝ lǝ ote Helafɔ bamǝ asa mfóo?

english_verse: What did he mean by saying that we will look for him, but won't find him? Why can't we go where he is going?” Streams of Life-Giving Water
translation_verse: Nnya ɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, ‘Biɔbɛbɛ mɛ, fɛɛ biembunyǝ mɛ,’ nya ‘Kaka mɔɔkɛɛ, biǝmbofo mfó bubǝǝ,’ eto kasɔ ni be?”

english_verse: On the last and most important day of the festival, Jesus stood up and shouted, “If you are thirsty, come to me and drink!
translation_verse: Lǝ diyi fɛfɛ nǝ ni diyi nǝ nso bofe lǝ diyididi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Yesu átaka úńyǝ nya óbesǝ ɔkɔɛ kato ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ utukuɛ lɛ utsyuǝǝ, utsyǝ ǝmǝ bǝ mɔ ɔflɔ lǝ ubǝ unǝ ntu.

english_verse: Have faith in me, and you will have life-giving water flowing from deep inside you, just as the Scriptures say.”
translation_verse: Fe kase báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, ‘Utidi wǝ léfo mɛ ɔ́nɔɔ, ketukplo ka lǝǝtǝ ntu bo lǝǝtǝ utidi lǝǝsiǝ nkpǝ eto ntuu, ebɔbɔdi butsyi lǝ wǝ utu kǝmiǝ.’ ”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the Holy Spirit, who would be given to everyone that had faith in him. The Spirit had not yet been given to anyone, since Jesus had not yet been given his full glory. The People Take Sides
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi nyamfo itsyi lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ mba léfo wǝ bánɔ loofo ǝsuǝ. Itsyise éyo lefe nǝmfoo, bǝntǝ tɔ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ, se bántakasǝ tɔ Yesu betsyiko ɔkɔmǝ báboko wǝ diyǝnde esuǝ eso.

english_verse: When the crowd heard Jesus say this, some of them said, “He must be the Prophet!”
translation_verse: Se betidi bamǝ lɛnɔ etiki nyamfoo, bátɛyi benkǝ, “Sitintii, utidi ǝmfo eyifo Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝmǝ.”

english_verse: Others said, “He is the Messiah!” Others even said, “Can the Messiah come from Galilee?
translation_verse: Babamba tsya átɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Nwǝ mfo ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ nɛ.” Fɛɛ mǝ bǝtsyuǝ átɔ bǝnkǝ, “Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝǝ, ebofo Galilea butsyi?

english_verse: The Scriptures say that the Messiah will come from the family of King David. Doesn't this mean that he will be born in David's hometown of Bethlehem?”
translation_verse: Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue átɛyi nkǝ Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ebutsyi Oka David eto kafo lǝ Betlehem eto umǝ kaka Oka David dísiǝ.”

english_verse: The people started taking sides against each other because of Jesus.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya eso kabakǝfǝ édufǝ lǝ betidi bamǝ eto nti itsyi lǝ Yesu eso.

english_verse: Some of them wanted to arrest him, but no one laid a hand on him. The Leaders Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus
translation_verse: Bǝtsyuǝ ala bǝ bǝǝmuǝ wǝ, fɛɛ kuutsyuǝ saa méntidi wǝ. Yudafɔ Eto Beninǝ Mámfo Yesu Banɔ.

english_verse: When the temple police returned to the chief priests and Pharisees, they were asked, “Why didn't you bring Jesus here?”
translation_verse: Se mbalaase Disumuyo eto mba bákpe dísinkli besuu, Farisifɔ ku besumunyǝ ninǝ bamǝ ɔflɔ, bátɔ mǝ bǝnkǝ, “Beso bíǝmmuǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝale beboko?”

english_verse: They answered, “No one has ever spoken like this man!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Boannɔ tɔ kuutsyuǝ saa di etiki fe kase utidi ǝmfo didi kulefe!”

english_verse: The Pharisees said to them, “Have you also been fooled?
translation_verse: Farisifɔ bamǝ átɔ mǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛ úflu mi tsyaa, mi nsusu, ɔ́wɛ mi ókpe?

english_verse: Not one of the chief priests or the Pharisees has faith in him.
translation_verse: Bíɔnɔ tɔ bɛnɔ biǝ beninǝ bǝtsyuǝ nye Farisinyǝ utsyuǝ áfɔ wǝ ɔ́nɔ?

english_verse: And these people who don't know the Law are under God's curse anyway.”
translation_verse: Kulefe, kulefe! Ditiditu nǝmfo enyi Moses eto kɔfi eto kulesa. Nyaso Onanto eto ekudi tǝkǝko mǝ!”

english_verse: Nicodemus was there at the time. He was a member of the council, and was the same one who had earlier come to see Jesus. He said,
translation_verse: Farisifɔ eto uninǝ ɔni wǝ baakpo Nikodemo, ébusu Yesu ɔflɔ únyǝ. Ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: “Our Law doesn't let us condemn people before we hear what they have to say. We cannot judge them before we know what they have done.”
translation_verse: “Nyalɛ, bo kɔfi ǝtǝ bo kusu nkǝ bokponko utidi lekpo bolo wǝ dikpi lefe nǝ eto lefe boannɔ tɔ wǝ kɛnyɛ eto etiki nye batɔ wǝ lesa nǝ úyifo?”

english_verse: Then they said, “Nicodemus, you must be from Galilee! Read the Scriptures, and you will find that no prophet is to come from Galilee.” A Woman Caught in Sin
translation_verse: Bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nyalɛ, fintsya Galileanyǝ feni? Dufǝ lǝ Anantotiki eto Ekue abe, ete ebote fǝ Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi kuutsyuǝ embɔbɔ utsyi lǝ Galilea.”

english_verse: but Jesus walked out to the Mount of Olives.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu wǝ édu úsu Nnuǝbi eto Eyi eto Kɔtini ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then early the next morning he went to the temple. The people came to him, and he sat down and started teaching them.
translation_verse: Kǝsiǝsǝ eto olesiǝ tuu, úsinkli úsu Yudafɔ eto Disumuyo. Betidi bamǝ kenke ǝbǝ bátsyilama wǝ, nya úsiǝ lǝ mǝ nti, útsyiko mǝ asa bote.

english_verse: The Pharisees and the teachers of the Law of Moses brought in a woman who had been caught in bed with a man who wasn't her husband. They made her stand in the middle of the crowd.
translation_verse: Mfóo, kɔfi eto bateasa ku Farisifɔ lékpa usio utsyuǝ wǝ bǝmuǝ kɔni kɔni lǝ disǝnkpo ǝsuǝ báboko mfó. Nya bǝńyǝnsǝ wǝ lǝ mǝmblɛ kenke eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Then they said, “Teacher, this woman was caught sleeping with a man who isn't her husband.
translation_verse: Bátɛyi Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, bǝmuǝ usio ǝmfo kɔni kɔni lǝ disǝnkpo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The Law of Moses teaches that a woman like this should be stoned to death! What do you say?”
translation_verse: Lǝ Moses eto kɔfi ǝsuǝǝ, ele bǝ boto wǝ okle aba bolo,” lǝ bǝnyǝ etiki lǝ wǝ, “Ntsyǝ fanlɛ bɔtɛyi lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: They asked Jesus this question, because they wanted to test him and bring some charge against him. But Jesus simply bent over and started writing on the ground with his finger.
translation_verse: Bátɔ wǝ nyamfo bǝ lǝ befi bato wǝ babe lǝ bayɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ bǝmuǝ wǝ. Fɛɛ Yesu ǝbǝ kasɔ nya úfi wǝ lɛnimi útsyiko asa bɔwɔni lǝ kasɔnti.

english_verse: They kept on asking Jesus about the woman. Finally, he stood up and said, “If any of you have never sinned, then go ahead and throw the first stone at her!”
translation_verse: Nya se bensi bǝńyǝ banlɛ wǝ etiki bɔtɔɔ, óbesǝ ǝsuǝ kato nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mi nti eto nwǝ dímenyifo tɔ lebua unyǝǝ, di ututɛ lǝ oto wǝ leba.”

english_verse: Once again he bent over and began writing on the ground.
translation_verse: Nya usi úbǝ kasɔ, ɔ́wɔni asa lǝ kasɔnti ku wǝ lɛnimi.

english_verse: The people left one by one, beginning with the oldest. Finally, Jesus and the woman were there alone.
translation_verse: Se beninǝ bamǝ lɛnɔ nnya nkoo, mǝmblɛ kenke édu ɔni, ɔni, idu lǝ beninǝtidi ǝsuǝ. Isi íbu Yesu ku usio ǝmǝ mate nsi nyǝ mfó.

english_verse: Jesus stood up and asked her, “Where is everyone? Isn't there anyone left to accuse you?”
translation_verse: Yesu átakasǝ ǝsuǝ únyǝ nya ɔ́tɔ usio ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Boambe, se báfe? Nyalɛ, mǝ kuutsyuǝ mémbu loolo fǝ dikpi?”

english_verse: “No sir,” the woman answered. Then Jesus told her, “I am not going to accuse you either. You may go now, but don't sin anymore.” Jesus Is the Light for the World
translation_verse: Mfó usio ǝmǝ dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Owo lo, Bonamute.” Nyaso Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nko ke mintsya lǝmbolo fǝ dikpi nɛ. Nyaso du esu. Fɛɛ mensisu eyifo lebua bio.” Yesu Ni Kawunsiǝ Eto Diyǝnde.

english_verse: Once again Jesus spoke to the people. This time he said, “I am the light for the world! Follow me, and you won't be walking in the dark. You will have the light that gives life.”
translation_verse: Yesu esi údi Farisifɔ etiki ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ ni kawunsiǝ eto diyǝnde. Utidi wǝ ke ntekǝko mǝǝ, wuunyǝ diyǝnde nǝ lǝǝtǝ utidi nkpǝ tinti nya wǝǝmbɔyɛ lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ kulefe.”

english_verse: The Pharisees objected, “You are the only one speaking for yourself, and what you say isn't true!”
translation_verse: Farisifɔ bamǝ átɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Alɛ etiki budi ketsyi lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ. Nyaso nnya fanlɛ bɔtɛyi ǝmbǝ kalende saa.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Even if I do speak for myself, what I say is true! I know where I came from and where I am going. But you don't know where I am from or where I am going.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Owo lo, ite bǝ nlɛ etiki budi ketsyi lǝ mɔ ǝsuǝ tsyaa, lesa nǝ minlɛ bɔtɛyi kpe kalende, itsyise nyi kaka mintsyi, nya minyi kaka mintɔ. Fɛɛ mimii, binyi kaka mintsyi nye kaka mintɔ.

english_verse: You judge in the same way that everyone else does, but I don't judge anyone.
translation_verse: Mii, kawunsiǝ eto nsusu ǝsuǝ nnya biefi kakponko asa lekpo nɛ, fɛ mɔɔ, mankponko kuutsyuǝ lekpo.

english_verse: If I did judge, I would judge fairly, because I would not be doing it alone. The Father who sent me is here with me.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ bǝ nyifo nkoo, mɔ lekpokponkpo ebɔyɛ lǝ sitinti eto kusu ǝsuǝ. Itsyise inni mɔ mate lookpo ni. Bomu Anto wǝ létsyese mɛɛ, ǝǝńyǝ mɛ kama.

english_verse: I am one of my witnesses, and the Father who sent me is the other one.
translation_verse: Mɔɔ, meedi adansiɛ lǝ lesa nǝ maatɛyi ǝsuǝ, nya mɔ Anto wǝ létsyese mɛ tsya eedi adansiɛ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: “Where is your Father?” they asked. “You don't know me or my Father!” Jesus answered. “If you knew me, you would know my Father.”
translation_verse: Mfó bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Se fǝ anto ǝmǝ nkpe?” Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Binyi mɛ nya binyi mɔ Anto ǝmǝ tsya. Lǝ bote ete bete mɛɛ, eni biote mɔ Anto tsya.”

english_verse: Jesus said this while he was still teaching in the place where the temple treasures were stored. But no one arrested him, because his time had not yet come. You Cannot Go Where I Am Going
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi nyamfo lǝ okokakokɔ se ɔnlɛ asa bote lǝ Disumuyo nǝmǝ. Fɛɛ kuutsyuǝ saa mǝmmuǝ wǝ, itsyise wǝ lefe mányo tɔ.

english_verse: Jesus also told them, “I am going away, and you will look for me. But you cannot go where I am going, and you will die with your sins unforgiven.”
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mǝǝbǝ budu lǝ mi ɔflɔ, nya biɔbɛbɛ mɛ, fɛɛ biukpǝ lǝ mi abua ǝsuǝ. Nya kaka mintɔɔ, biembofo mfó bubǝ.”

english_verse: The people asked, “Does he intend to kill himself? Is that what he means by saying we cannot go where he is going?”
translation_verse: Nyaso Yudafɔ bamǝ átɔ mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Wǝ ǝsuǝ ɔntɔ kalokɔ eso ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, ‘Biembofo kaka mintɔ bubǝ lee’?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You are from below, but I am from above. You belong to this world, but I don't.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mimii, kasɔ mfo eto betidi bini. Nya mɔɔ, ntsyi kato. Mi etsyi kawunsiǝ mfo, fɛɛ mɔɔ, mentsyi kawunsiǝ mfo.

english_verse: This is why I said you will die with your sins unforgiven. If you don't have faith in me for who I am, you will die, and your sins will not be forgiven.”
translation_verse: Nyaso míntɛyi mi minkǝ biukpǝ lǝ mi abua ǝsuǝ nɛ. Nya lǝ biamfo bɛnɔ biǝ mɔ ni nwǝ minii, biukpǝ lǝ mi abua ǝsuǝ sitinti.”

english_verse: “Who are you?” they asked Jesus. Jesus answered, “I am exactly who I told you at the beginning.
translation_verse: Bátɔ wǝ bǝ, “Owoe feni?” Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lesa nǝ míntɛyi mi itsyi taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔɔ, ni ǝmǝ ete nɛ.

english_verse: There is a lot more I could say to condemn you. But the one who sent me is truthful, and I tell the people of this world only what I have heard from him.”
translation_verse: Nkpe etiki kpǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ nnya ele bǝ mfi nlo mi dikpi. Fɛɛ nwǝ létsyese mɛɛ, sitintitidi uni. Nya asa nnya minɔ mintsyiko wǝ ɔflɔɔ, nnya mimfi minlɛ letsya bobe kǝtǝ kawunsiǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: No one understood that Jesus was talking to them about the Father.
translation_verse: Mfóo, bánnɔ kasɔ bǝ Yesuu, Anto ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ ɔnlɛ etiki budi ketsyiko.

english_verse: Jesus went on to say, “When you have lifted up the Son of Man, you will know who I am. You will also know that I don't do anything on my own. I say only what my Father taught me.
translation_verse: Nyaso ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ bebesǝ Utidi Eto Ubi ǝmǝ katoo, nyafɛ biote biǝ mɔ ni nwǝ mini nɛ, nya meenyifo kulesa lǝ mɔ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ. Bomu lesa nǝ mɔ Anto léte mɛ nkǝ ntɛyii, ni hã maatɛyi nɛ.

english_verse: The one who sent me is with me. I always do what pleases him, and he will never leave me.”
translation_verse: Nwǝ lekpe mɛ kɔtɔɔ, si ko mɛ. Wóanyani mɔ mate utsyǝ, itsyise meeyifo lesa nǝ lǝǝyuǝsǝ wǝ kafo lefe saa.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, many of the people put their faith in him. The Truth Will Set You Free
translation_verse: Nya se ɔ́tɛyi nyamfo mmǝǝ, betidi kpǝ ba lɛnɔ ɔ́tɛyi nyamfoo, áfo wǝ bánɔ. Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Betidi Ba Ni Abraham Eto Bebi Óte.

english_verse: Jesus told the people who had faith in him, “If you keep on obeying what I have said, you truly are my disciples.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu átɛyi Yudafɔ ba léfo wǝ bánɔ nkǝ, “Lǝ biyifo lǝ mɔ asatete ǝsuǝǝ, ete bǝ biyifo mɔ bakasebi sitinti nɛ.

english_verse: You will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.”
translation_verse: Biote sitinti siamǝ, nya sitinti siamǝ ebutǝ bisiǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: They answered, “We are Abraham's children! We have never been anyone's slaves. How can you say we will be set free?”
translation_verse: Bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Abraham eto befluflu buni, nya bóendi tɔ ndomufɔ butǝ kuutsyuǝ saa tɔ búnyǝ! Ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ faatɛyi fǝnkǝ, bootǝ busiǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I tell you for certain that anyone who sins is a slave of sin!
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ utsyuǝ saa ke leeyifo lebuaa, uyifo ndomunyǝ utǝ lebua.

english_verse: And slaves don't stay in the family forever, though the Son will always remain in the family.
translation_verse: Ndomunyǝ aamfiani oyobi wǝ nkpe kedikɔ kulefe. Bomu oyosate eto ubii, wǝ kpe kedikɔ lefe saa.

english_verse: I know that you are from Abraham's family. Yet you want to kill me, because my message isn't really in your hearts.
translation_verse: Nyi miǝ Abraham eto bebi bini. Fɛɛ bela biǝ bialo mɛ, itsyise biamfo asa nnya maate mi bɛnɔ, eso.
