english_verse: I am telling you what my Father has shown me, just as you are doing what your father has taught you. Your Father Is the Devil
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ mímfo mintsyiko mɔ Anto ɔflɔɔ, ni maatɛyi nɛ. Nya mi tsyaa, lesa nǝ bɛnɔ bitsyiko mi anto ɔflɔɔ, ni bɛnlɛ buyifo nɛ.”

english_verse: The people said to Jesus, “Abraham is our father!” Jesus replied, “If you were Abraham's children, you would do what Abraham did.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ bamǝ átɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Abraham ni bo anto.” Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ Abraham eto bebi bini sitintii, eni biuyifo asa nnya Abraham díyifo seka.

english_verse: Instead, you want to kill me for telling you the truth that God gave me. Abraham never did anything like that.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bela biǝ bialo mɔ nwǝ laatɛyi mi sitinti sia mínɔ mintsyiko Onanto ɔflɔ. Abraham ményifo nko.

english_verse: But you are doing exactly what your father does.” “Don't accuse us of having someone else as our father!” they said. “We just have one father, and he is God.”
translation_verse: Asa nnya mi anto kosate díyifoo, nya bɛnlɛ buyifo nɛ.” Mfó bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Bunni basɔnɔbi! Anto ɔni nkpe bo, wǝ ni Onanto!” Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Betidi Ba Ni Balo Eto Bebi Ote.

english_verse: Jesus answered: If God were your Father, you would love me, because I came from God and now I am here. He sent me. I did not come on my own.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ Onanto ete ni mi antoo, eni biala mɛ. Itsyise Onanto ɔflɔ míntsyi mímbǝ mfo. Inni mɔ kosate eto lelabi ǝsuǝ mímbǝ. Bomu wǝ ni nwǝ létsyese mɛ.

english_verse: Why can't you understand what I am talking about? Can't you stand to hear what I am saying?
translation_verse: Ntsyǝ eso biannɔ lesa nǝ minlɛ mi bɔtɛyi kasɔ? Nnya ni bǝ bianla biǝ bianɔ ditiki nǝ minlɛ mi bɔtɛyi.

english_verse: Your father is the devil, and you do exactly what he wants. He has always been a murderer and a liar. There is nothing truthful about him. He speaks on his own, and everything he says is a lie. Not only is he a liar himself, but he is also the father of all lies.
translation_verse: Mi anto Obonsam eto bebi bini, nya bela biǝ bieyifo wǝ lelabi. Idu taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔɔ, uyifo nwǝ laalo betidi. Nya woanla ditiki tinti nǝmǝ itsyise woantɛyi sitinti kulefe. Lǝ ɔtɛyi sidiaa, wǝǝlǝkǝ wǝ ditsyǝbi kate. Itsyise nwǝ laatɛyi sidia uni, nya wǝ ni bidia kenke eto anto.

english_verse: Everything I have told you is true, and you still refuse to have faith in me.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔɔ se ini sitinti maatɛyi mi esoo, biamfo mɛ kanɔ.

english_verse: Can any of you accuse me of sin? If you cannot, why won't you have faith in me? After all, I am telling you the truth.
translation_verse: Mi nti eto owoe loofo mɛ dikpi bolo nkǝ nyifo lebua? Lǝ ntɛyi mi sitintii, beso biamfo mɛ kanɔ?

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to God will listen to his message. But you refuse to listen, because you don't belong to God. Jesus and Abraham
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ ni Onanto eto olee, aanɔ Onanto eto etiki. Nnya eso biannɔ Onanto eto etiki ni bǝ binni wǝ bale.” Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Asa Nnya Óte Kasɔ Óte Yudafɔ.

english_verse: The people told Jesus, “We were right to say that you are a Samaritan and that you have a demon in you!”
translation_verse: Yudafɔ átɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Lǝ bɔ́tɛyi boǝnkǝ Samarianyǝ feni nya lɛwɔnɔ bua tǝkǝko fǝǝ, bɔ́tɛyi sidia?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I don't have a demon in me. I honor my Father, and you refuse to honor me.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lɛwɔnɔ bua saa ǝntǝkǝko mɛ. Nlɛ mɔ Anto dibu butǝ, fɛɛ mi ǝntǝ mɛ dibu.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you obey my words, you will never die.”
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, lǝ utsyuǝ eetsyue mɔ asatete kotoo, wǝmbukpǝ kulefe!”

english_verse: Then the people said, “Now we are sure that you have a demon. Abraham is dead, and so are the prophets. How can you say that no one who obeys your words will ever die?
translation_verse: Yudafɔ átɛyɛ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Mfe fɛ buunyǝ boǝ lɛwɔnɔ bua tǝkǝko fǝ nɛ! Abraham ǝkpǝ, nya Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi tsya díkpǝ, fɛɛ fǝ lɛ bɔtɛyi fǝ nwǝ ke ditsyue fǝ asatete kotoo, ǝmbukpǝ kulefe!

english_verse: Are you greater than our father Abraham? He died, and so did the prophets. Who do you think you are?”
translation_verse: Bubu feebu fǝ fǝ lɛmɔ fanso Boanto Abraham wǝ díkpǝ, fɛɛ? Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi tsya ǝkpǝ! Owoe eto okle feebu fǝ wǝ feni?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If I honored myself, it would mean nothing. My Father is the one who honors me. You claim that he is your God,
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lǝ mɔ ǝsuǝ maatɛsɛɛ, nyalɛ mɔ atɛsǝ nyamǝ manle kulesa. Fɛɛ nwǝ laatɛsǝ mɛɛ, wǝ ni mɔ Anto. Wǝ ni nwǝ bíatɛyi biǝ wǝ ni mi Onanto nɛ.

english_verse: even though you don't really know him. If I said I didn't know him, I would be a liar, just like all of you. But I know him, and I do what he says.
translation_verse: Mii, binyi wǝ. Fɛ mɔɔ, nyi wǝ. Lǝ ntɛyi miǝ minnyi wǝǝ, nyalɛ moofiani odia fe mi ke, fɛɛ nyi wǝ, nya meetsyue wǝ ditiki koto.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that even before Abraham was, I was, and I am.”
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti miǝ, mɔɔ, mfe nkpe koko fɛ bále Abraham.”

english_verse: The people picked up stones to kill Jesus, but he hid and left the temple.
translation_verse: Ete básɛ abambi bǝ baato wǝ, fɛɛ Yesu ákula ǝsuǝ nya ɔ́bɔ údu lǝ Kedikǝtǝkɔ mfó.

english_verse: As Jesus walked along, he saw a man who had been blind since birth.
translation_verse: Se Yesu díbǝ ófe ɔntɔɔ, únyǝ utidi utsyuǝ wǝ bále unǝmba.

english_verse: Jesus' disciples asked, “Teacher, why was this man born blind? Was it because he or his parents sinned?”
translation_verse: Wǝ bakasebi átɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Oteasa, owoe eto lebua dítǝ bále osani ǝmfo unǝmba? Wǝ kosate eso lee wǝ antomǝ eto abua eso?”

english_verse: “No, it wasn't!” Jesus answered. “But because of his blindness, you will see God work a miracle for him.
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu dítǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Inni nwǝ mfo nye wǝ antomǝ díyifo lebua eso. Bomu bále wǝ nko bǝ lǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ ulǝkǝ wǝ keyifo eto ǝsuǝale ote betidi.

english_verse: As long as it is day, we must do what the one who sent me wants me to do. When night comes, no one can work.
translation_verse: Se bonkpe lǝ kalesiǝsiǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, ele bǝ buyifo keyifo butǝ nwǝ létsyese mɛ. Kale ǝǝbǝ bolo nya kuutsyuǝ saa lensiembofo keyifo buyifo.

english_verse: While I am in the world, I am the light for the world.”
translation_verse: Lefenǝ eto lefe minsi minkpe lǝ kawunsiǝǝ, mɔ ni kawunsiǝ eto diyǝnde.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, he spit on the ground. He made some mud and smeared it on the man's eyes.
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛtɛyi nko ólosǝǝ, ókpo ntufǝ lǝ kasɔ, ɔ́wɔ site úfi se údikiti wǝ lǝ ǝnǝmi,

english_verse: Then he said, “Go wash off the mud in Siloam Pool.” The man went and washed in Siloam, which means “One Who Is Sent.” When he had washed off the mud, he could see.
translation_verse: nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Su lǝ esu ǝflǝ ntu lǝ Siloa eto Ditubiǝ ǝsuǝ.” Siloa eto kasɔ ni nkǝ Bákpe wǝ. Nyaso osani ǝmǝ ésu úflǝ ntu bomǝ. Nya wǝ ǝnǝmi lɛsini ɔnlɛ asa bunyǝ, nya úsinkli úbǝ oto.

english_verse: The man's neighbors and the people who had seen him begging wondered if he really could be the same man.
translation_verse: Wonko mba nkpe lǝ koyotsya ku betidi ba kenke díkǝnyǝ wǝ ɔnlɛ asa bɔtɔɔ, átɔ bǝnkǝ, “Inni osani ǝmfo ni nwǝ díkǝsiǝ lǝ mfó úkatɔ asa?”

english_verse: Some of them said he was the same beggar, while others said he only looked like him. But he told them, “I am that man.”
translation_verse: Bǝtsyuǝ átɛyi bǝ wǝ uni. Fɛɛ babamba átɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Owo lo, inni wǝ uni. Bole ete ole wǝ.” Mfó nya utidi ǝmǝ kosate lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ uni!”

english_verse: “Then how can you see?” they asked.
translation_verse: Bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ fanlɛ asa bunyǝ?”

english_verse: He answered, “Someone named Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. He told me to go and wash it off in Siloam Pool. When I did, I could see.”
translation_verse: Útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Utidi wǝ baakpo Yesu lɛwɔ sitǝ udikiti mɛ lǝ ǝnǝmi nya ɔ́tɛyi mɛ nkǝ nsu mflǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ Siloa eto ditubiǝ. Nyaso nsu, nya se mímflǝ ǝnǝmi mínlosǝ ete míntsyiko asa bunyǝ.”

english_verse: “Where is he now?” they asked. “I don't know,” he answered. The Pharisees Try To Find Out What Happened
translation_verse: Bátɔ wǝ bǝ, “Sieti onkpe?” Útǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mante kaka onkpe.” Farisifɔ Átɔ Unǝmba Ǝmǝ Kase Báyɛ Bátsya Wǝ.

english_verse: The day when Jesus made the mud and healed the man was a Sabbath. So the people took the man to the Pharisees.
translation_verse: Diyi nǝ Yesu lɛnwɔ sitǝ údikiti lǝ unǝmba ǝmǝ eto ǝnǝmi fɛ ótsya wǝǝ, éyifo Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi.

english_verse: They asked him how he was able to see, and he answered, “Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. Then after I washed it off, I could see.”
translation_verse: Nya Farisifɔ bamǝ tsya lɛtɔ osani ǝmǝ kase íyifo fɛ útsyiko asa bunyǝ. Ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Sitǝ ɔ́nwɔ úfi údikiti mɛ lǝ ǝnǝmi. Nya mímflǝ mɔ ǝnǝmi ete míntsyiko asa bunyǝ.”

english_verse: Some of the Pharisees said, “This man Jesus doesn't come from God. If he did, he would not break the law of the Sabbath.” Others asked, “How could someone who is a sinner work such a miracle?” Since the Pharisees could not agree among themselves,
translation_verse: Mfó nya Farisifɔ bamǝ eto bǝtsyuǝ lɛtɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Utidi wǝ díyifo nyamfo embofo Onanto ɔflɔ butsyi! Itsyise weenyifo lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi eto kɔfi ǝsuǝ.” Fɛɛ mǝ bǝtsyuǝ bamba átɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Ntsyǝ yoofo bubǝ bǝ obuayifo ebofo ayanisa nyamfo eto okle buyifo kate?” Itǝ kǝsǝnsǝ édufǝ mǝ lenti.

english_verse: they asked the man, “What do you say about this one who healed your eyes?” “He is a prophet!” the man told them.
translation_verse: Nyaso Farisifɔ bamǝ esi bátɔ osani ǝmǝ bǝnkǝ, “Se fanlɛ bɔtɛyi fǝnkǝ wǝ lɛsini fǝ ǝnǝmii, be ni fǝ nsusu itsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ?” Mfó nya osani ǝmǝ dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi uni.”

english_verse: But the Jewish leaders would not believe that the man had once been blind. They sent for his parents
translation_verse: Yudafɔ bamǝ mámfo bánɔ sitinti bǝ osani ǝmǝ ába ǝnǝmi fɛ usi útsyiko asa bunyǝ isu ese lefe nǝ bákpadi wǝ anto mǝ díbǝ.

english_verse: and asked them, “Is this the son that you said was born blind? How can he now see?”
translation_verse: Bátɔ mǝ bǝ, “Mi ubisaibi ni nwǝ mfo? Biǝ béle wǝ unǝmba, nya ntsyǝ iyifo fɛ omfe ɔnlɛ asa bunyǝ mɔmɔ?”

english_verse: The man's parents answered, “We are certain that he is our son, and we know that he was born blind.
translation_verse: Wǝ anto mǝ ǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Buyi boǝ bo ubi uni. Nya bunyi tsya boǝ bole wǝ unǝmba.

english_verse: But we don't know how he got his sight or who gave it to him. Ask him! He is old enough to speak for himself.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bunyi kase íyifo fɛ omfe ɔnlɛ asa bunyǝ. Nya bunyi futsyǝ tsya létsya wǝ ǝnǝmi nyamǝ. Bɛtɔ wǝ kosate lǝ ɔtɛyi mi itsyise wóobe!”

english_verse: The leaders called the man back and said, “Swear by God to tell the truth! We know that Jesus is a sinner.”
translation_verse: Bákpadi nwǝ bále unǝmba ǝmǝ dinuǝfǝ nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Te Onanto sikpi lǝ atɛyi bo sitinti! Buyi boǝ utidi wǝ létsya fɛ mfó eyifo obuayifo!”

english_verse: The man replied, “I don't know if he is a sinner or not. All I know is that I used to be blind, but now I can see!”
translation_verse: Osani ǝmǝ ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mɔɔ, minnyi lǝ obuayifo ni osani ǝmfo lee unni. Lesa lɔni minyi mɔɔtɛyi ni bǝnkǝ, kɔɔ mba ǝnǝmi. Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, mfe nlɛ bunyǝ!”

english_verse: “What did he do to you?” they asked. “How did he heal your eyes?”
translation_verse: Bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Be úyifo fǝ nya ntsyǝ ɔ́yɛ ótsya fǝ ǝnǝmi nyamǝ?”

english_verse: The man answered, “I have already told you once, and you refused to listen. Why do you want me to tell you again? Do you also want to become his disciples?”
translation_verse: Útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mboka mi bɔtɛyi éfe, fɛɛ bianla biǝ biafo nnya. Beso bela biǝ bisi bianɔ nnya? Lee, bela biǝ miitsya afiani wǝ bakasebii?”

english_verse: The leaders insulted the man and said, “You are his follower! We are followers of Moses.
translation_verse: Báka wǝ bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Fǝ ete ni wǝ okasebi. Boo, Moses eto bakasebi buni.

english_verse: We are sure God spoke to Moses, but we don't even know where Jesus comes from.”
translation_verse: Buyi boǝ Onanto édiko Moses etiki. Nya nwǝ mfo alɛɛ, boante kaka utsyi kulaa tsya!”

english_verse: “How strange!” the man replied. “He healed my eyes, and yet you don't know where he comes from.
translation_verse: Mfó nya osani ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nte ditiki nǝ eto okle ni nǝmfo? Binyi kaka utsyi, fɛɛ wǝ lɛsini mɛ ǝnǝmi nɛ!

english_verse: We know that God listens only to people who love and obey him. God doesn't listen to sinners.
translation_verse: Buyi boǝ Onanto eentsyue babuayifo koto, fɛɛ lǝ utsyuǝ eesumu Onanto, nya weeyifo wǝ lelabii, weetsyue wǝ koto kanɔ wǝ olatoto.

english_verse: And this is the first time in history anyone has ever given sight to someone born blind.
translation_verse: Idu taa kawunsiǝ eto kasɔ ketsyikokɔɔ, bóannɔ tɔ bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa wǝ átsya nwǝ bále unǝmba.

english_verse: Jesus could not do anything unless he came from God.”
translation_verse: Lenni Onanto ɔflɔ utsyii, eni wǝmbofo kulesa buyifo.”

english_verse: The leaders told the man, “You have been a sinner since the day you were born! Do you think you can teach us anything?” Then they said, “You can never come back into any of our synagogues!”
translation_verse: Batɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Fǝǝ bále ku lebua fábe ku nii! Nya fǝ bomu lela fǝ aate bo asaa?” Nyaso bála wǝ, bábɔnko lǝ Yudafɔ eto katsyakɔ kamǝ. Betidi Bǝtsyuǝ Eebu Bǝ Bǝǝnyǝ Asa Wuee.

english_verse: When Jesus heard what had happened, he went and found the man. Then Jesus asked, “Do you have faith in the Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Yesu ánɔ nkǝ bála wǝ nyaso se únyǝ osani ǝmǝǝ, ɔ́tɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Áfo Utidi Eto Ubi ánɔ?”

english_verse: He replied, “Sir, if you will tell me who he is, I will put my faith in him.”
translation_verse: Osani ǝmǝ ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Nto, te mɛ futsyǝ uni, bǝ lǝ mfo wǝ nnɔ.”

english_verse: “You have already seen him,” Jesus answered, “and right now he is talking with you.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Ébunyǝ utidi ǝmǝ koko, nnyǝ wǝ ni nwǝ nlɛ fǝ etiki budinko mfo mɔmɔ nɛ.”

english_verse: The man said, “Lord, I put my faith in you!” Then he worshiped Jesus.
translation_verse: Osani ǝmǝ átɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute, mfo nnɔɔ!” Nya óse akonki lǝ Yesu eto ǝnǝmi úsumu wǝ.

english_verse: Jesus told him, “I came to judge the people of this world. I am here to give sight to the blind and to make blind everyone who can see.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi nkǝ, “Mbǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo bǝ lǝ nkponko betidi lekpo, bǝ lǝ bǝnǝmba lǝ bǝnyǝ asa, nya mba lǝǝnyǝǝ, lǝ bafiani bǝnǝmba.”

english_verse: When the Pharisees heard Jesus say this, they asked, “Are we blind?”
translation_verse: Farisifɔ ba díńyǝ mfo lɛnɔ nnya Yesu lɛtɛyii, átɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Nyalɛ bɔtɛyi fanlɛ fǝ bo tsya ába ǝnǝmi lee?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “If you were blind, you would not be guilty. But now that you claim to see, you will keep on being guilty.”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lǝ boba mi ǝnǝmi lebaa, eni biebudi dikpi, fɛɛ se biǝ bɛlɛ bunyǝ esoo, mi abua tǝkǝ mi lǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain only thieves and robbers climb over the fence instead of going in through the gate to the sheep pen.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti miǝ, utsyuǝ saa ke dímanyɛ lǝ lesamuyo eto kesie údufǝ lesamuyo nǝmǝǝ, bomu ɔ́yɛ kusu bamba saa údufǝ lǝ ni kafoo, eyifo uyu ku nwǝ laabiasǝ asa.

english_verse: But the gatekeeper opens the gate for the shepherd, and he goes in through it. The sheep know their shepherd's voice. He calls each of them by name and leads them out.
translation_verse: Nya nwǝ laase lesamuyo eto kesie aasini kesie eto siku kǝtǝ wǝ. Woakpadi basamu bamǝ lǝ mǝ aye nya baanɔ wǝ ɔkɔɛ nya woakpa mǝ kabɔnko.

english_verse: When he has led out all of his sheep, he walks in front of them, and they follow, because they know his voice.
translation_verse: Lǝ okpadi mǝ nya ɔyɛnko mǝ ɔbɔnkoo, woatɔ mǝ sɛtɔ kayɛnko mǝ nya bǝǝtǝkǝko wǝ kama itsyise beeyi wǝ ɔkɔɛ.

english_verse: The sheep will not follow strangers. They don't recognize a stranger's voice, and they run away.
translation_verse: Bǝmbutǝkǝko kuutsyuǝ bamba kama. Bomu bootsyetsyi bedu itsyise benyi wǝ ɔkɔɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus told the people this story. But they did not understand what he was talking about. Jesus Is the Good Shepherd
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ lekpa nǝmfo, fɛɛ bánnɔ nnya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ eto kasɔ.

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain that I am the gate for the sheep.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ sitintii, mɔ ni kesie itǝ basamu bamǝ.

english_verse: Everyone who came before me was a thief or a robber, and the sheep did not listen to any of them.
translation_verse: Betidi ba kenke lɛtɔ mɛ sɛtɔ bǝbǝǝ, beyifo beyu ku mba laabiasǝ asa. Fɛɛ basamu bamǝ méntsyue mǝ koto.

english_verse: I am the gate. All who come in through me will be saved. Through me they will come and go and find pasture.
translation_verse: Mɔ ni kesie kamǝ. Lǝ utsyuǝ ayɛ lǝ mɛ udufǝ lǝ kafoo, wuunyǝ bofo. Wuudufǝ lǝ mfó ukabɔ, nya wuunyǝ didisa sɛɛ ukedi.

english_verse: A thief comes only to rob, kill, and destroy. I came so everyone would have life, and have it fully.
translation_verse: Uyuu, bubǝ ete woǝbǝ nkǝ lǝ uyu, olo utidi, obiasǝ asa. Mɔɔ, mbǝ miǝ lǝ binyǝ nkpǝ, nkpǝ bo lɛflɔ.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd, and the good shepherd gives up his life for his sheep.
translation_verse: “Mɔ ni utinti wǝ laayɛnko basamu, nwǝ lɛtɔnɔ nkǝ weefi wǝ nkpǝ utǝ lǝ wǝ basamu eto disi.

english_verse: Hired workers are not like the shepherd. They don't own the sheep, and when they see a wolf coming, they run off and leave the sheep. Then the wolf attacks and scatters the flock.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ laayɛnko basamu wǝ baafo diyi eto kayo nya benni wǝ kosate eto balee, weetsyetsyi kedu lǝ unyǝ ukiti nlɛ bubǝ. Ukiti ǝmǝ eedufǝ mǝ lenti kǝmuǝ mǝ nya wǝǝsensǝ mǝ.

english_verse: Hired workers run away because they don't care about the sheep.
translation_verse: Utidi ǝmfo eetsyetsyi kedu itsyise diyi eto uyifoyifo ete uni. Nya basamu bamǝ eto bɔflɔ nye mǝ kasɛɛ aanka wǝ.

english_verse: Just as the Father knows me, I know the Father, and I give up my life for my sheep.
translation_verse: “Mɔ ni utinti wǝ laayɛnko basamu. Fe kase Anto ǝmǝ nyi mɛɛ, nya mintsya nyi wǝǝ, nko ke mintsya nyi mɔ basamu, nya mǝǝtsya nyi mɛ nɛ. Nya míntɔnɔ miǝ mǝǝkpǝ lǝ mǝ disi.

english_verse: I have other sheep that are not in this sheep pen. I must also bring them together, when they hear my voice. Then there will be one flock of sheep and one shepherd.
translation_verse: Nkpe basamu bamba ba lǝmbǝ lǝ lesamuyo nǝmfo tɔ. Ele bǝ nyɛnko mǝ tsya mboko, nya mǝ tsya lǝ banɔ mɔ ɔkɔɛ. Nya mǝmblɛ loofíani basamu eto ditsyukpa lɔni lǝ ɔyɛnkoyɛnko ɔni eto kalɔ.

english_verse: The Father loves me, because I give up my life, so I may receive it back again.
translation_verse: “Anto ǝmǝ aala mɛ, itsyise ntɔnɔ miǝ mǝǝkpǝ lǝ mǝ disi, bǝ lǝ nsinkli mbǝ nsiǝ nkpǝ bio.

english_verse: No one takes my life from me. I give it up willingly! I have the power to give it up and the power to receive it back again, just as my Father commanded me to do.
translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ saa embofo mɔ nkpǝ bofo lǝ mɔ ani, bomu mɔ kosate dífi mu míntǝ miǝ mǝǝkpe. Nkpe ǝsuǝale bǝ moofo mu bufi kǝtǝ. Nya ǝsuǝale si ekpe mɛ bǝ nsinkli mfo mu. Nko ǝmǝ mɔ Anto dítǝ mɛ nkǝ nyifo nɛ.”

english_verse: The people took sides because of what Jesus had told them.
translation_verse: Lǝ etiki nnya Yesu lɛtɛyi mfo esoo, kabakǝfǝ esi kédufǝ lǝ Yudafɔ bamǝ nti.

english_verse: Many of them said, “He has a demon in him! He is crazy! Why listen to him?”
translation_verse: Mǝ nti eto bǝtsyuǝ kpǝ átɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Lɛwɔnɔ bua tǝkǝko wǝ. Ɔlɛ kumunǝ bukpǝ! Beso ele bǝ besi betsyue wǝ koto fɛ?”

english_verse: But others said, “How could anyone with a demon in him say these things? No one like this could give sight to a blind person!” Jesus Is Rejected
translation_verse: Fɛɛ babamba tsya átɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Utidi wǝ ǝsuǝ lɛwɔnɔ bua nkpee, embofo etiki nyamfo eto okle bɔtɛyi! Ntsyǝ lɛwɔnɔ bua luuyifo unǝmba si unyǝ asa fɛ?” Yudafɔ Mámfo Yesu Bánɔ.

english_verse: That winter, Jesus was in Jerusalem for the Temple Festival.
translation_verse: Lɛyɔlefee, nya beedi Yudafɔ eto Disumuyo Bufikakpe lǝ Onanto kɔni eto Diyi lǝ Yerusalem.

english_verse: One day he was walking in the part of the temple known as Solomon's Porch,
translation_verse: Yesu ákayɛ kafe lǝ Disumuyo eto lekpake nǝ baakpo Solomo eto Ablanase mfó.

english_verse: and the people gathered all around him. They said, “How long are you going to keep us guessing? If you are the Messiah, tell us plainly!”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yudafɔ bamǝ létsyilama wǝ, nya bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Isu ese dimamfe lefe kon fookpe bo lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ esu ase? Tɛyi bo sitinti siamǝ, lǝ fǝ ni Utidi ǝmǝ Bákpo Ɔhile Bǝtsyǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I have told you, and you refused to believe me. The things I do by my Father's authority show who I am.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mbɔtɛyi mi nyamfo koko, tsya biamfo mɛ akanɔ. Asa nnya meeyifo lǝ mɔ Anto eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝǝ, lɛ mɛ bulǝkǝ kate.

english_verse: But since you are not my sheep, you don't believe me.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ biǝmbofo mɛ bɛnɔ, itsyise bientsyi mɔ basamu bamǝ nti.

english_verse: My sheep know my voice, and I know them. They follow me,
translation_verse: Mɔ basamu eetsyue mɛ koto. Nyi mǝ, nya bǝǝtǝkǝko mɛ.

english_verse: and I give them eternal life, so that they will never be lost. No one can snatch them out of my hand.
translation_verse: Ntǝ mǝ nkpǝ manlo, nya bemuukpǝ kulefe. Nya kuutsyuǝ saa embofo mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ lǝ mɔ kɔni.

english_verse: My Father gave them to me, and he is greater than all others. No one can snatch them from his hands,
translation_verse: Mɔ Anto wǝ dífi mǝ útǝ mɛɛ, kpe ale oso lesa saa. Kuutsyuǝ saa embofo mǝ bofo lǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ lǝ mɔ Anto eto kɔni kulefe kulefe.

english_verse: and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Anto ǝmǝ ku mɔɔ, eyifo bani.”

english_verse: Once again the people picked up stones in order to kill Jesus.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yudafɔ bamǝ dísi básɛ aba bǝ bato wǝ.

english_verse: But he said, “I have shown you many good things my Father sent me to do. Which one are you going to stone me for?”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Nyifo nnyifo sɛɛ kpǝ bo mɔ Anto lékpe mɛ lǝ mi nti. Nya nte nnya eso bela biǝ biakpɔ mɛ aba?”

english_verse: They answered, “We are not stoning you because of any good thing you did. We are stoning you because you did a terrible thing. You are just a man, and here you are claiming to be God!”
translation_verse: Yudafɔ bamǝ ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Inni nnyifo sɛɛ bo féyifo eso boǝ boakpɔ fǝ aba. Bomu mbusiotiki nnya fédi eso! Utidinini ete feni, fɛɛ éfi fǝ ǝsuǝ éyifo fe Onanto!”

english_verse: Jesus replied: In your Scriptures doesn't God say, “You are gods”?
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Báwɔni bákpe lǝ mi kosate eto Kɔfi eto Kukue bǝ Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, ‘Beyifo fe bananto.’

english_verse: You can't argue with the Scriptures, and God spoke to those people and called them gods.
translation_verse: Buyi boǝ lesa nǝ báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue, eyifo sitinti itǝ lefe saa. Nya mfó Onanto lékpadi betidi ba léfo wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ nkǝ, ‘Beyifo fe bananto.’

english_verse: So why do you accuse me of a terrible sin for saying that I am the Son of God? After all, it is the Father who prepared me for this work. He is also the one who sent me into the world.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔɔ, Anto ǝmǝ dílǝkǝ mɛ nya ótsyese mɛ kawunsiǝ nɛ. Nya ntsyǝ eso fɛ biɔtɛyi biǝ ndi mbusiotiki lǝ nnya míntɛyi miǝ nyifo Onanto eto Ubi?

english_verse: If I don't do as my Father does, you should not believe me.
translation_verse: Lǝ minlɛ mɔ Anto eto nnyifo buyifoo, nyalɛ biamfo mɛ bɛnɔ.

english_verse: But if I do what my Father does, you should believe because of that, even if you don't have faith in me. Then you will know for certain that the Father is one with me, and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ nlɛ mu buyifoo, lǝ biamfo mɛ bɛnɔ tsyaa, ele bǝ befo asa nnya meeyifo bɛnɔ, bǝ lǝ bete lǝ bɛnɔ nnya kasɔ biǝ Anto ǝmǝ si lǝ mɛ, nya mintsya nsi nkpǝ lǝ wǝ.”

english_verse: Again they wanted to arrest Jesus. But he escaped
translation_verse: Mfó tsyaa, besi bála bǝ bǝǝmuǝ Yesu, fɛɛ usi ɔ́bɔ lǝ mǝ nti údu.

english_verse: and crossed the Jordan to the place where John had earlier been baptizing. While Jesus was there,
translation_verse: Yesu esi úsu ɔ́yila Ketu Yordan úsu kaka Yohanes díyifo betidi ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa tutɛ, nya ɔ́tsyimɛ mfó.

english_verse: many people came to him. They were saying, “John didn't work any miracles, but everything he said about Jesus is true.”
translation_verse: Betidi kpǝ ǝbǝ wǝ ɔflɔ nya bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Yohanes ményifo ayanisa saa óte. Fɛɛ lesa saa nǝ ɔ́tɛyi itsyi lǝ utidi ǝmfo ǝsuǝ eyifo sitinti.”

english_verse: A lot of those people also put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Nya betidi kpǝ lǝ mfó léfo wǝ bánɔ.

english_verse: The sisters sent a message to the Lord and told him that his good friend Lazarus was sick.
translation_verse: Wǝ bayimisio bamfo átsyese Yesu kɛnyɛ bǝ, “Bonamute, fǝ ɔyɛtsyuǝ lala ánɔ bufi!”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he said, “His sickness won't end in death. It will bring glory to God and his Son.”
translation_verse: Se Yesu léfo kɛnyɛ kamfoo, ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bufi bomfo enni bukpǝmfi itǝ wǝ, bomu iyifo nnya ǝsuǝ buufi babesǝ Onanto eto diye kato, nya ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ babesǝ Onanto eto Ubi tsya kato.”

english_verse: But he stayed where he was for two more days.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se ɔ́nɔ nkǝ ɔ́nɔ bufii, usi ɔ́kɛ mfó eyi ǝnuǝ okpe.

english_verse: Then he said to his disciples, “Now we will go back to Judea.”
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, ɔ́tɛyi wǝ bakasebi nkǝ, “Bitǝ lǝ businkli busu Yudea.”

english_verse: “Teacher,” they said, “the people there want to stone you to death! Why do you want to go back?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya wǝ bakasebi lɛtɛyɛ wǝ nkǝ, “Oteasa, kayinkǝnǝ ete Yudafɔ díkabɛbɛ kusu bǝ baakpɔ fǝ aba, nya fanlɛ bɔtɛyi fǝnkǝ busi boesu mfó?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Aren't there twelve hours in each day? If you walk during the day, you will have light from the sun, and you won't stumble.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Inni lefosi abombosɔsɔ ǝnuǝ nkpe lǝ diyi eto kalekpakpa ǝsuǝ? Lǝ utsyuǝ lɛ bɔyɛ lǝ kalekpakpa ǝsuǝǝ, weentusǝ itsyise ɔlɛ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto lekpasǝ bunyǝ.

english_verse: But if you walk during the night, you will stumble, because you don't have any light.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ ketsye ɔnlɛ bɔyɛɛ, wuutusǝ itsyise lekpasǝ ǝmbǝ itǝ wǝ.”

english_verse: Then he told them, “Our friend Lazarus is asleep, and I am going there to wake him up.”
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛtɛyi nyamfo ólosǝǝ, usi ɔ́tɛyi úkǝ nkǝ, “Bo ɔyɛtsyuǝ Lazaro lɛ selabe, nyaso ntɔ wǝ kasanklisǝ kɔ.”

english_verse: They replied, “Lord, if he is asleep, he will get better.”
translation_verse: Se bakasebi bamǝ lɛnɔ nkoo, bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute, lǝ selabe onlabee, nyalɛ yuuyuǝ wǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus really meant that Lazarus was dead, but they thought he was talking only about sleep.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu wǝ lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ Lazaro ébukpǝ, fɛɛ wǝ bakasebi ébu bǝnkǝ selabe tinti ɔ́tɛyi utsyiko.

english_verse: I am glad I wasn't there, because now you will have a chance to put your faith in me. Let's go to him.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ mi esoo, ɛlɛkɛ itǝ bǝ mánkɛ lǝ mfó fɛ úkpǝ, bǝ lǝ befo bɛnɔ esoo. Nyaso bítǝ lǝ busu wǝ ɔflɔ mfó.”

english_verse: Thomas, whose nickname was “Twin,” said to the other disciples, “Come on. Let's go, so we can die with him.” Jesus Brings Lazarus to Life
translation_verse: Mfó nya Toma wǝ baakpo Ɔfimfinyǝ lɛtɛyi wǝ bakaseyimitsyuǝ bamǝ nkǝ, “Bitǝ lǝ bo tsya lǝ butǝkǝko Oteasa busu bǝ lǝ busu bukpǝ ku wǝ!” Yesu Ámansǝ Lazaro Eto Bayimi Lɛkɔ.

english_verse: When Jesus got to Bethany, he found that Lazarus had already been in the tomb four days.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu dísu údufǝ mfoo, ɔ́nɔ nkǝ bébikǝ Lazaro diyi nale ni diyi nǝmfó nɛ.

english_verse: Bethany was less than three kilometers from Jerusalem,
translation_verse: Idu lǝ Betania isu Yerusalem eyifo fe esunkpo ǝnuǝ seka.

english_verse: and many people had come from the city to comfort Martha and Mary because their brother had died.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yudafɔ kpǝ ǝbǝ mfó bǝ bǝǝbǝ bamansǝ Maria ku Marta lɛkɔ se mǝ ɔyimisani díkpǝ eso.

english_verse: When Martha heard that Jesus had arrived, she went out to meet him, but Mary stayed in the house.
translation_verse: Se Marta lɛnɔ nkǝ Yesu lɛ bubǝǝ, úsu nkǝ weesu otsyako wǝ, fɛɛ Maria ebu ɔkɛ lǝ diyo.

english_verse: Martha said to Jesus, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.
translation_verse: Marta átɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Bonamute, lǝ nnya ete fakɛ mfoo, eni mɔ ɔyimisani mǝnkpǝ!

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Your brother will live again!”
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ ɔyimisani ebotaka ubǝ nkpǝ.”

english_verse: Martha answered, “I know he will be raised to life on the last day, when all the dead are raised.”
translation_verse: Nya Marta lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Nyi miǝ wootaka ubǝ nkpǝ lǝ lefe nǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ lootaka lǝ Diyi Fɛfɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “I am the one who raises the dead to life! Everyone who has faith in me will live, even if they die.
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ ni nwǝ lǝǝtǝ bǝkpǝkpǝ eto botaka kǝńyǝ ku businkli kǝbǝ bǝsiǝ lǝ nkpǝ nɛ. Utsyuǝ saa ke léfo mɛ ɔ́nɔɔ, lǝ úkpǝ kulaa tsyaa, wuusiǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: “Yes, Lord!” she replied. “I believe you are the Christ, the Son of God. You are the one we hoped would come into the world.”
translation_verse: Útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Ee, Bonamute. Mfo nnɔ miǝ fǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ, Onanto eto Ubi nwǝ bátɛyi bǝtsyǝ bǝ wuubǝ kawunsiǝ.”

english_verse: After Martha said this, she went and privately said to her sister Mary, “The Teacher is here, and he wants to see you.”
translation_verse: Se Marta lɛtɛyi nyamfo ólosǝǝ, úsu ókpadi wǝ ɔyimisio Maria, nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ buɛɛ nkǝ, “Oteasa ǝmǝ ebubǝ nya ɔnlɛ fǝ disi bɔtɔ.”

english_verse: As soon as Mary heard this, she got up and went out to Jesus.
translation_verse: Se Maria lɛnɔ nkoo, ótaka mlǝ nya úsu wǝ katsyakokɔ.

english_verse: He was still outside the village where Martha had gone to meet him.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfoo, Yesu méndufǝ tɔ umǝ kafo. Bomu usi úńyǝ lǝ kaka Marta díbǝ otsyako wǝ mfó.

english_verse: Many people had come to comfort Mary, and when they saw her quickly leave the house, they thought she was going out to the tomb to cry. So they followed her.
translation_verse: Se Yudafɔ ba nsi lǝ diyo lǝ Maria ɔflɔ banlɛ wǝ lɛkɔ bomansǝ dínyǝ bǝ ótaka kplaa, mǝ tsya átaka bǝtǝkǝko Maria kama. Bébu bǝ kudi komǝ eti ɔntɔ lǝ usi usu uwi keku.

english_verse: Mary went to where Jesus was. Then as soon as she saw him, she knelt at his feet and said, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.”
translation_verse: Se Maria dísu údufǝ kaka Yesu ńyǝǝ, óse akonki lǝ wǝ akɔ nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute, lǝ nnya ete fákɛ mfoo, eni mɔ ɔyimisani mǝnkpǝ!”

english_verse: When Jesus saw that Mary and the people with her were crying, he was terribly upset
translation_verse: Yesu ǝnyǝ kase Maria ku betidi ba dítǝkǝko wǝ nlɛ nku. Ílǝ wǝ lǝ utu nya óla ɔ́wɔnɔ hũũ.

english_verse: and asked, “Where have you put his body?” They replied, “Lord, come and you will see.”
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Sieti bíbikǝ wǝ?” Bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute, bǝ lǝ ǝbǝ abe.”

english_verse: Jesus started crying,
translation_verse: Mfóo, Yesu éwi keku.

english_verse: and the people said, “See how much he loved Lazarus.”
translation_verse: Nya Yudafɔ bamǝ lɛtɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Bebe kase ko óla wǝǝ!”

english_verse: Some of them said, “He gives sight to the blind. Why couldn't he have kept Lazarus from dying?”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mǝ bǝtsyuǝ átɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Ɔ́sini unemba ǝnǝmi nya ɔnlɛ asa bunyǝ. Beso wǝntǝ lǝ Lazaro lǝ ɔyɛ bukpǝ?” Yesu Átakasǝ Lazaro Útsyiko Ɔkɔmǝ.

english_verse: Jesus was still terribly upset. So he went to the tomb, which was a cave with a stone rolled against the entrance.
translation_verse: Isi ílǝ Yesu tinti, nya ɔ́nyi úsu kudi komǝ ɔflɔ. Kudi komǝ eyifo dibiǝ lǝ koba kafo nya béfi leba béti ko kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: Then he told the people to roll the stone away. But Martha said, “Lord, you know that Lazarus has been dead four days, and there will be a bad smell.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bɛnyi leba nǝmǝ lǝ kudi komǝ eto kɛnyɛ.” Mfó nya Lazaro ǝmǝ eto ɔyimisio Marta lɛtɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Bonamute, wuukanyi mɔmɔ, itsyise mmi ni diyi nale se bébikǝ wǝ nɛ!”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Didn't I tell you that if you had faith, you would see the glory of God?”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mántɛyi fǝ minkǝ lǝ áfo mɛ ánɔɔ, ebunyǝ Onanto eto diyǝnde?”

english_verse: After the stone had been rolled aside, Jesus looked up toward heaven and prayed, “Father, I thank you for answering my prayer.
translation_verse: Nyaso bányi leba nǝmǝ lǝ kudi komǝ eto kɛnyɛ. Yesu ábesǝ ǝnǝmi kato óbe nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nto, maasɔ fǝ ani, itsyise eetsyue mɛ koto lǝ nkpadi fǝ.

english_verse: I know that you always answer my prayers. But I said this, so the people here would believe you sent me.”
translation_verse: Nyi miǝ eetsyue mɛ koto lefe saa. Fɛɛ mba ńyǝ mfo eso minlɛ nyamfo bɔtɛyi nko, bǝ lǝ bafo banɔ bǝ fǝ lékpe mɛ kɔtɔ.”

english_verse: When Jesus had finished praying, he shouted, “Lazarus, come out!”
translation_verse: Se ɔ́tɛyi nyamfo nkoo, ófa bembembe nkǝ, “Lazaro, bɔ ǝbǝ!”

english_verse: The man who had been dead came out. His hands and feet were wrapped with strips of burial cloth, and a cloth covered his face. Jesus then told the people, “Untie him and let him go.” The Plot To Kill Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya ukpǝnkpǝ ǝmǝ lɛbɔ úbǝ ku kafia ka béfi bémini wǝ ǝsuǝ ku nka béfi bémini wǝ ǝnǝmi. Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Beyankli we bikǝ biamǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ udu.” Yudafɔ Ákpe Disi Bǝ Baalo Yesu.

english_verse: Many of the people who had come to visit Mary saw the things Jesus did, and they put their faith in him.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, Yudafɔ ba díbǝ Maria ɔflɔ nya bǝnyǝ nnya Yesu díyifoo, eto bǝtsyuǝ kpǝ áfo wǝ bánɔ.

english_verse: Others went to the Pharisees and told what Jesus had done.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mǝ bǝtsyuǝ édu bésu Farisifɔ ɔflɔ nya bátɛyi mǝ lesa nǝ Yesu díyifo.

english_verse: Then the chief priests and the Pharisees called the council together and said, “What should we do? This man is working a lot of miracles.
translation_verse: Nyaso Farisifɔ ku besumunyǝ ninǝ ákpe disi ku Yudafɔ eto batɔnkotɔnko nya bátɔ bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Be ele bǝ buyifo? Bebe ayanisa kpǝ nnya osani ǝmfo nlɛ buyifo kate!

english_verse: If we don't stop him now, everyone will put their faith in him. Then the Romans will come and destroy our temple and our nation.”
translation_verse: Lǝ butǝ wǝ kusu ɔnlɛ nyamfo buyifo nkoo, utsyuǝ saa ebofo wǝ ɔnɔ. Nya Romafɔ luubǝ baba bo Disumuyo kɛnkɛ kamǝ ku kusǝ komǝ tsya!”

english_verse: One of the council members was Caiaphas, who was also high priest that year. He spoke up and said, “You people don't have any sense at all!
translation_verse: Mfóo, mǝ nti eto nwǝ baakpo Kayafa, wǝ ni Usumunyǝ Ninǝ lɛlɛ nǝmfoo, lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Ntsyǝ asakasɔnɔnɔ lǝǝlǝ mi mmǝ!

english_verse: Don't you know it is better for one person to die for the people than for the whole nation to be destroyed?”
translation_verse: Binyi tɔ biǝ ɛlɛkɛ bǝ utidi ɔni kpǝ lǝ kusǝ komǝ eto disi enso bǝ kusǝ komǝ kenke eto betidi tsylɔ lee?”

english_verse: Caiaphas did not say this on his own. As high priest that year, he was prophesying that Jesus would die for the nation.
translation_verse: Lǝ sitintii, wóantɛyi nyamfo ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ kosate eto nsusu ǝsuǝ. Bomu fe nwǝ ni Usumunyǝ Ninǝ itǝ lɛlɛ nǝmfo esoo, Onanto áyɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ útǝ nkǝ ɔtɛyi nyamfo, nnya ni katɛyikǝtsyǝ bǝ Yesu ebubǝ ukpǝ lǝ Yudafɔ kenke eto disi.

english_verse: Yet Jesus would not die just for the Jewish nation. He would die to bring together all of God's scattered people.
translation_verse: Inni bǝnkǝ lǝ ukpǝ lǝ kusǝ komǝ eto disi mate ete. Bomu bǝ ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ ɔsɔ Onanto eto bebi ba kenke dísensǝ bankpo lǝ kawunsiǝ eto akpɔ akpɔ nnya kenke lebo, beyifo bani.

english_verse: From that day on, the council started making plans to put Jesus to death.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso ídu dinǝmfo ǝsuǝ, Yudafɔ eto beninǝ bamǝ dítsyiko esu bɔbɛbɛ kase bomuǝ Yesu lǝ balo wǝ.

english_verse: Because of this plot against him, Jesus stopped going around in public. He went to the town of Ephraim, which was near the desert, and he stayed there with his disciples.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, Yesu ménsifo bɔyɛ kafe mmǝ lǝ Yudafɔ nti. Bomu údu úsu úsiǝ lǝ umǝbibi wǝ baakpo Efraim kaka lefi mfiminti. Mfó wonko wǝ bakasebi dísiǝ.

english_verse: It was almost time for Passover. Many of the Jewish people who lived out in the country had come to Jerusalem to get themselves ready for the festival.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfoo, Yudafɔ eto Ukpǝ Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto Diyi didife éboyo elo. Nya betidi kpǝ dítsyi kasɔ kamǝ eto akpɔakpɔ bésu Yerusalem lǝ besu bǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ beyifo ǝsuǝflǝflǝ eto lekpa nǝmǝ fɛ lɛ diyididi nǝmǝ lǝ leyo.

english_verse: They looked around for Jesus. Then when they were in the temple, they asked each other, “You don't think he will come here for Passover, do you?”
translation_verse: Se bǝńyǝ lǝ Disumuyo nǝmǝǝ, bákabɛbɛ Yesu nya bákatɔ bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Ntsyǝ bibu? Nyi miǝ wǝmbofo diyi nǝmǝ kedikɔ bubǝ, lee ntsyǝ ini?”

english_verse: The chief priests and the Pharisees told the people to let them know if any of them saw Jesus. This is how they hoped to arrest him.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfóo, besumunyǝ ninǝ ku Farisifɔ ébutǝ bote bǝ lǝ utsyuǝ yi kaka Yesu nkpee, lǝ ubǝ utǝ mǝ bote, lǝ besu bǝmuǝ wǝ.

english_verse: If you serve me, you must go with me. My servants will be with me wherever I am. If you serve me, my Father will honor you.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke lela nkǝ weeyifo mɔ keyifoo, ele bǝ utǝkǝko mɛ, itǝ bǝ mɔ uyifoyofo ǝmǝ ebusiǝ lǝ kaka minsi. Nya utsyuǝ saa ke ni mɔ uyifoyifoo, mɔ Anto ebokpe wǝ dibu. Yesu Édi Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Wǝ Ukpǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Judas did not really care about the poor. He asked this because he carried the moneybag and sometimes would steal from it.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ inni lǝ kase Yuda dífi kǝtsyuǝ lǝ bakombo eto asa eso ɔtɛyi nyamfo nko. Bomu uyu uni. Wǝ ɔflɔ atabi eto otobe dítsyǝ, nya úkeyu atabi nyamǝ eto ǝtsyuǝ kǝlǝkǝ kǝtǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: they took palm branches and went out to greet him. They shouted, “Hooray! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord! God bless the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: Nyaso béfi katodi nya bésu bǝ baatsyako wǝ. Bákafa katɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Hosiana! Atɛsǝ itǝ Onanto! Bɛtɛsǝ nwǝ nlɛ bubǝ lǝ Bonamute eto diye ǝsuǝ! Atɛsǝ itǝ Israelfɔ eto Oka!”

english_verse: Jesus found a donkey and rode on it, just as the Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Yesu ǝnyǝ ɔflimubi utsyuǝ nya úsiǝ lǝ wǝ fe kase báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ,

english_verse: Mary took a very expensive bottle of perfume and poured it on Jesus' feet. She wiped them with her hair, and the sweet smell of the perfume filled the house.
translation_verse: Mfó ǝmǝ nya Maria dífi nnuǝbi bo laanyi fififi béyifo betsyiko lǝ nnya baakpo naadi ǝsuǝ, nya bofo koya tinti eto dituntu kplɛ tɔ úsu ókpo Yesu lǝ akpa. Nya úfi wǝ disi eto sɛwɔni ɔ́si wǝ akpa. Bɔnyi fififi bomǝ éyi diyo nǝmǝ kenke.

english_verse: A lot of people came when they heard that Jesus was there. They also wanted to see Lazarus, because Jesus had raised him from death.
translation_verse: Se Yudafɔ kpǝ lɛnɔ bǝ Yesu kpe lǝ Betania, béti wǝ bésu mfó. Nya inni Yesu mate eso bésu mfó, bomu lǝ bǝnyǝ Lazaro wǝ Yesu létakasǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ tsya.

english_verse: A meal had been prepared for Jesus. Martha was doing the serving, and Lazarus himself was there.
translation_verse: Mfóo, banwa ditsyitsyosa bǝtǝ wǝ bǝ lǝ udi. Marta ni nwǝ lɛwunsǝko mǝ lǝ lesa nǝmǝ kedikɔ. Lazaro tsya akɛ lǝ mba ku Yesu dídi lesa nǝmǝ nti.

english_verse: A disciple named Judas Iscariot was there. He was the one who was going to betray Jesus, and he asked,
translation_verse: Nya Yesu eto okasebi ɔni wǝ ni Yuda Iskariot, nwǝ luubǝ udu Yesu utǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ,

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Leave her alone! She has kept this perfume for the day of my burial.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi nkǝ, “Beyani wǝ kpoo. Bitǝ lǝ uyifo lesa nǝ woofo buyifo kǝtsyǝ itǝ mɔ kǝbikǝ.

english_verse: You will always have the poor with you, but you won't always have me.” A Plot To Kill Lazarus
translation_verse: Bakombo kpe lǝ mi ɔflɔ lefe saa. Fɛɛ mɔɔ, mǝmɔɔkɛ lǝ mi ɔflɔ lefe saa.” Yudafɔ Efi Nsusu Bua Lǝ Lazaro Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: So the chief priests made plans to kill Lazarus.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso besumunyǝ ninǝ átsya béfi nsusu bǝ boolo wuntsya.

english_verse: Philip from Bethsaida in Galilee was there too. So they went to him and said, “Sir, we would like to meet Jesus.”
translation_verse: Bésu Filipo wǝ dítsyi Betsaida lǝ Galilea ɔflɔ, nya bátɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Boanto, bola boǝ boǝnyǝ Yesu.”

english_verse: But the Pharisees said to each other, “There is nothing we can do! Everyone in the world is following Jesus.” Some Greeks Want To Meet Jesus
translation_verse: Mfó Farisifɔ bamǝ lɛtɛyi mǝ bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Bebe, kulesa anlɛ bɔlɛkɛ kǝtǝ bo! Binyǝ biǝ kawunsiǝ kenke édu bésu bǝtǝkǝko wǝ!” Yesu Átɛyi Útsyǝ Nkǝ Wǝǝbǝ Bukpǝ.

english_verse: So Father, bring glory to yourself. A voice from heaven then said, “I have already brought glory to myself, and I will do it again!”
translation_verse: Nyaso Nto, tǝ lǝ babesǝ fǝ diye kato!” Nya ɔkɔɛ lɛbɔ utsyi kato nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Mbóbesǝ ni kato koko. Nya nsi muuyifo nko.”

english_verse: “The Lord has blinded the eyes of the people, and he has made the people stubborn. He did this so that they could not see or understand, and so that they would not turn to the Lord and be healed.”
translation_verse: Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, “Mba mǝ ǝnǝmi nya míninǝsǝ mǝ, bǝ lǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ ɛyɛ asa bunyǝ. Nya lǝ mǝ nsusu lǝ bɔyɛ asa kasɔ bɔnɔ. Itǝ bǝmbɔtsyi bawuninsǝ befi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ mɛ, bǝ lǝ ntsya mǝ bufi.”

english_verse: The next day a large crowd was in Jerusalem for Passover. When they heard that Jesus was coming for the festival,
translation_verse: Se kale dísiǝ, betidi eto ditsyukpa kplɛ nǝ díbǝ Ukpǝ Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto diyisɛɛ nǝmǝ kedikɔɔ, ánɔ bǝ Yesu lɛ Yerusalem bubǝ.

english_verse: “People of Jerusalem, don't be afraid! Your King is now coming, and he is riding on a donkey.”
translation_verse: “Biante sikpi mi Sion eto umǝ eto betidi! Nyǝ fǝ Oka nsi lǝ ɔflimubi ǝsuǝ ɔnlɛ bubǝ!”

english_verse: At first, Jesus' disciples did not understand. But after he had been given his glory, they remembered all this. Everything had happened exactly as the Scriptures said it would.
translation_verse: Tutɛɛ, wǝ bakasebi mánnɔ nyamfo kasɔ. Fɛɛ lefe nǝ Onanto díkatakasǝ Yesu utsyi ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ ku dibuu, nya fɛ bákloma bǝ nnya báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ etsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, nya nnya ni asa nyamfo kenke béyifo bǝtǝ wǝ nɛ.

english_verse: A crowd had come to meet Jesus because they had seen him call Lazarus out of the tomb. They kept talking about him and this miracle.
translation_verse: Nyamfo esoo, betidi kpǝ ésu bátsyako wǝ, itsyise bánɔ ayanisa nnya úyifo óte eso.

english_verse: Some Greeks had gone to Jerusalem to worship during Passover.
translation_verse: Grikifɔ bǝtsyuǝ tsya akɛ lǝ betidi ba dísu Disumuyo lǝ Yerusalem lǝ diyi nǝmǝ kedikɔ nti.

english_verse: Philip told Andrew. Then the two of them went to Jesus and told him. The Son of Man Must Be Lifted Up
translation_verse: Filipo ésu ɔ́tɛyi Andrea nya mǝ inuǝ bamǝ dídu bésu bátɛyi Yesu.

english_verse: Jesus said: The time has come for the Son of Man to be given his glory.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Lefe nǝmǝ eboyo bǝ babesǝ Utidi Eto Ubi ǝmǝ eto diye kato.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that a grain of wheat that falls on the ground will never be more than one grain unless it dies. But if it dies, it will produce lots of wheat.
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti miǝ lǝ banto lentabi nǝmǝ lǝ kasɔ dibuu, lentabi lɔɔni ete disi diudi. Fɛɛ lǝ dibuu, nya fɛ diɔnwɔ ebibi kpǝ nɛ.

english_verse: If you love your life, you will lose it. If you give it up in this world, you will be given eternal life.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ lela wǝ kosate eto nkpǝǝ, ebonyansǝ mu. Fɛɛ nwǝ dikisi wǝ kosate eto nkpǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfoo, ebɔlɔ mu utsyǝ itǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: Now I am deeply troubled, and I don't know what to say. But I must not ask my Father to keep me from this time of suffering. In fact, I came into the world to suffer.
translation_verse: “Mɔmɔɔ, ɛlɛ mɛ bulǝ lǝ mɔ lɛkɔɛsi. Fɛɛ be ko ele bǝ ntɛyi? Bɔtɛyi ele bǝ ntɛyi minkǝ, ‘Nto, mǝntǝ lǝ kanyi kamfo eto okle lǝ kǝtǝkǝ mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ lee’? Owo lo! Fɛɛ nyamfo eso mímbǝ kawunsiǝ, bǝ lǝ nnyǝ kanyi kamfo eto okle nɛ.

english_verse: When the crowd heard the voice, some of them thought it was thunder. Others thought an angel had spoken to Jesus.
translation_verse: Se betidi ba dińyǝ mfo lɛnɔ ɔkɔɛ ǝmǝǝ, mǝ bǝtsyuǝ átɛyi bǝnkǝ ɔsɔmi uni díkumi. Nya bǝtsyuǝ lɛtɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe utsyuǝ ni lɛtɛyi wǝ lesaatsyuǝ.”

english_verse: Then Jesus told the crowd, “That voice spoke to help you, not me.
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Inni mɔ eso ɔkɔɛ ǝmfó lɛbɔ, bomu mi eso.

english_verse: This world's people are now being judged, and the ruler of this world is already being thrown out!
translation_verse: “Mɔmɔ ni lefe nǝ Onanto lookponko kawunsiǝ kamfo eto betidi lekpo. Nya Onanto luutu kawunsiǝ kamfo eto ǝsuǝalenyǝ lǝ wǝ seka ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If I am lifted up above the earth, I will make everyone want to come to me.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ betsyi mɛ lǝ kasɔ babesǝ katoo, muunǝ betidi kenke mboko mɔ ɔflɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the way he would be put to death.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu lɛtɛyi nyamfoo, óte ukpǝ wǝ eto okle wǝǝbǝ bukpǝ.

english_verse: The crowd said to Jesus, “The Scriptures teach that the Messiah will live forever. How can you say that the Son of Man must be lifted up? Who is this Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya sitiditu siamǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bo kɔfi eto kukue lɛ bo bɔtɛyi nkǝ, Utidi Wǝ Bákpo Ɔhile Bǝtsyuǝ ebusiǝ nkpǝ isu manlo manlo. Nya ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ fanlɛ bɔtɔyi fǝnkǝ boobesǝ Utidi Eto Ubi ǝmǝ kato? Owoe ni Utidi Eto Ubi ǝmǝ mfo?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The light will be with you for only a little longer. Walk in the light while you can. Then you won't be caught walking blindly in the dark.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Diyǝnde nǝmǝ si diɔkɛ lǝ mi nti itǝ lefe sɛkɛ ete. Se diyǝnde nǝmǝ nsi nkpe mi lenti esoo, bɛyɛ bɛtɔ, bǝ lǝ kale lǝ kayɛ mi bolo lǝ bidufǝ lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ. Itsyise nwǝ laayɛ lǝ ketuntuu, ante kaka ɔntɔ.

english_verse: Have faith in the light while it is with you, and you will be children of the light.” The People Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus After Jesus had said these things, he left and went into hiding.
translation_verse: Nyaso se lekpasǝ nkpe lǝ mi ntii, befo lekpasǝ nǝmǝ bɛnɔ bǝ lǝ biyifo lekpasǝ eto betidi.” Se Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nyamfo ólosǝǝ, údu lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ úsu ɔbiɔ. Yudafɔ Ǝlǝkǝ Bate Bǝ Bámfo Yesu Banɔ.

english_verse: He had worked a lot of miracles among the people, but they were still not willing to have faith in him.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ Yesu éyifo ayanisa kpǝ lǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi óte tsyaa, bámfo wǝ bánɔ.

english_verse: This happened so that what the prophet Isaiah had said would come true, “Lord, who has believed our message? And who has seen your mighty strength?”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nyamfo ǝbǝ itǝ nko, bǝ lǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yesaya eto lesa nǝ ɔ́tɛyi utsyǝ lǝ ibǝ itǝ nko nkǝ, “Bonamute, owoe léfo ditiki nǝ bɔ́tɛyi ɔnɔ? Nya owoe Bonamute ǝmǝ dílǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale óte?”

english_verse: The people could not have faith in Jesus, because Isaiah had also said,
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfó eso bámfo bofo kanɔ, itsyise Yesaya esi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ,

english_verse: Isaiah said this, because he saw the glory of Jesus and spoke about him.
translation_verse: Yesaya átɛyi nyamfo itsyise úbunyǝ Yesu eto diyǝnde kokoko, nya údi etiki utsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Even then, many of the leaders put their faith in Jesus, but they did not tell anyone about it. The Pharisees had already given orders for the people not to have anything to do with anyone who had faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ite nko tsyaa, Yudafɔ eto beninǝ kpǝ áfo Yesu banɔ. Fɛɛ lǝ Farisifɔ bamǝ eso baamfo etiki nyamfo budi kabɔsǝǝ lekple betidi nɔ, bǝ lǝ bayɛ mǝ bola lǝ mǝ katsyakɔ eso.

english_verse: And besides, the leaders liked praise from others more than they liked praise from God. Jesus Came To Save the World
translation_verse: Baala bǝ baafo betidi eto atɛsǝ enso atɛsǝ nya ditsyi Onanto ɔflɔ.

english_verse: In a loud voice Jesus said: Everyone who has faith in me also has faith in the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu édi etiki ófa bembembe ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Utsyuǝ saa ke laafo mɛ kanɔɔ, inni mɔ mate ete ófo ɔ́nɔ. Bomu ófo nwǝ létsyese mɛ tsya ɔ́nɔ.

english_verse: And everyone who has seen me has seen the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Nya utsyuǝ saa ke lǝǝnyǝ mɛɛ, ǝǝnyǝ nwǝ létsyese mɛ tsya.

english_verse: I am the light that has come into the world. No one who has faith in me will stay in the dark.
translation_verse: Mbǝ kawunsiǝ fe lekpasǝ, nya utsyuǝ saa ke léfo mɛ ɔnɔɔ, ensiembɔkɛ lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ bio.

english_verse: I am not the one who will judge those who refuse to obey my teachings. I came to save the people of this world, not to be their judge.
translation_verse: “Lǝ utsyuǝ aanɔ mɔ ditiki nya weentsyue ni koto, mǝmbolo wǝ dikpi, itsyise mǝmbǝ miǝ maalo kawunsiǝ eto betidi dikpi. Bomu mbǝ miǝ lǝ mmfo ntǝ mǝ.

english_verse: But everyone who rejects me and my teachings will be judged on the last day by what I have said.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ kee lɛni mɛ nya wámmfo mɔ ditikii, kpe nwǝ lookponko wǝ lekpo. Etiki nya míndii, nya lookponko wǝ lekpo lǝ diyi fɛfɛ nǝmǝ nɛ.

english_verse: I don't speak on my own. I say only what the Father who sent me has told me to say.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eyifo sitinti itsyise mántɛyi kulesa lǝ mɔ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ. Bomu mɔ Anto wǝ létsyese mɛɛ, léte mɛ lesa nǝ ele bǝ ntɛyi ku kase ele bǝ ntɛyi ni.

english_verse: I know that his commands will bring eternal life. This is why I tell you exactly what the Father has told me.
translation_verse: Nya nnyi miǝ wǝ kɔfi komǝ ǝǝtǝ nkpǝ manlo. Nyaso lesa nǝ kee míntɛyii, ni ni lesa nǝ Anto ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi mɛ nkǝ ntɛyi nɛ.”

english_verse: It was before Passover, and Jesus knew that the time had come for him to leave this world and to return to the Father. He had always loved his followers in this world, and he loved them to the very end.
translation_verse: Ibu diyi lɔni fɛ lǝ bedi Ukpǝ Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto diyisɛɛ nǝmǝ. Yesu áte nkǝ wǝ lefe éboyo bǝ udu lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo usu wǝ Anto ɔflɔ. Úkala mba ni wǝ bale lǝ kawunsiǝ mfo, nya óla mǝ sitinti isu ese taa kalosǝkɔ.

english_verse: Even before the evening meal started, the devil had made Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot, decide to betray Jesus.
translation_verse: Yesu ku wǝ bakasebi akɛ lǝ lesakedikɔ ku ditsyitsyo nǝmfó. Olo ǝmǝ ébusu údufǝ lǝ Yuda wǝ ni Simon Iskariot eto ubi eto nsusu nkǝ lǝ udi wǝ okpe lǝ udu Yesu utǝ wǝ balo.

english_verse: Jesus knew he had come from God and would go back to God. He also knew that the Father had given him complete power.
translation_verse: Yesu áte nkǝ wǝ Anto éfi ǝsuǝale saa útǝ wǝ lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ. Uyi nkǝ útsyi Onanto ɔflɔ nya usinkli ɔntɔ lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ.

english_verse: So during the meal Jesus got up, removed his outer garment, and wrapped a towel around his waist.
translation_verse: Nyaso ótaka lǝ lesakedikɔ kamǝ nya úlǝkǝ wǝ awubunte kplɛ nnya kato útsyǝ nya úfi sebo ótsyasɛ lǝ nkɛ.

english_verse: He put some water into a large bowl. Then he began washing his disciples' feet and drying them with the towel he was wearing.
translation_verse: Úkuti ntu ókpo lǝ ɔkpɛ kplɛ utsyuǝ kafo nya útsyiko wǝ bakasebi bamǝ eto akpa buflǝ, ákasi nnya ku sebo sia ótsyasǝ lǝ nkɛ.

english_verse: But when he came to Simon Peter, this disciple asked, “Lord, are you going to wash my feet?”
translation_verse: Se éyo Simon Petro ǝsuǝǝ, ɔ́tɔ Yesu nkǝ, “Bonamute, buflǝ fǝǝbǝ mɛ akpa lee?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You don't really know what I am doing, but later you will understand.”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Amannɔ tɔ lesa nǝ minlɛ buyifo mfo eto kasɔ, fɛɛ kamaa, ǝbɔnɔ nnya kasɔ.”

english_verse: “You will never wash my feet!” Peter replied. “If I don't wash you,” Jesus told him, “you don't really belong to me.”
translation_verse: Simon Petro ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Kulefe! Mǝmbutǝ kusu miǝ lǝ ǝflǝ mɔ akpa kulefe.” Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ mǝmflǝ fǝ akpaa, nyalɛ ensiembuyǝ kedikɔ lǝ mɛ.”

english_verse: Peter said, “Lord, don't wash just my feet. Wash my hands and my head.”
translation_verse: Simon Petro átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute, nyalɛ mǝmflǝ mɔ akpa mate, bomu flǝ mɔ ani ku mɔ disi tsya!”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “People who have bathed and are clean all over need to wash just their feet. And you, my disciples, are clean, except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Utsyuǝ saa ke díkǝflǝ ntuu, ole. Nya weensihiã bǝ uflǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ bio, nnya lehiã ete ni bǝ uflǝ akpa. Itsyise wǝ kalebe saa ebole koko. Mi ǝsuǝ ébole, fɛɛ inni mimblɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus knew who would betray him. That is why he said, “except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Yesu fe úyi nwǝ lǝǝbǝ wǝ bokpe lǝ ani, nyaso ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Inni mimblɛ kenke lele.”

english_verse: After Jesus had washed his disciples' feet and had put his outer garment back on, he sat down again. Then he said: Do you understand what I have done?
translation_verse: Se Yesu díflǝ mǝ akpa ólosǝǝ, úsinkli úfi wǝ awu ókpe, nya úsinkli úsu úsiǝ lǝ kasɔ lǝ kedikɔ kamǝ. Mfó nya ɔ́tɔ wǝ bakasebi bamǝ nkǝ, “Bɛnɔ lesa nǝ mínyifo mi mfo eto kasɔ?

english_verse: You call me your teacher and Lord, and you should, because that is who I am.
translation_verse: Biakpadi mɛ biǝ Oteasa ku Onamute, nya ɛflɔ bǝ bekpadi mɛ nko. Itsyise wǝ mini nɛ.

english_verse: I have set the example, and you should do for each other exactly what I have done for you.
translation_verse: Ditsyǝbi dini mínyifo mínte mi, bǝ mi tsya lǝ biyifo fe kase mínyifo mínte mi.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that servants are not greater than their master, and messengers are not greater than the one who sent them.
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti miǝ uyifoyifo mamɔ oso wǝ Onamute. Nko ke ini bǝ ɔtɔyɛ mamɔ onso nwǝ lékpe wǝ kɔtɔ.

english_verse: I am not talking about all of you. I know the ones I have chosen. But what the Scriptures say must come true. And they say, “The man who ate with me has turned against me!”
translation_verse: “Inni mimblɛ eto etiki minlɛ bɔtɛyi mfo. Nyi mba mínlǝkǝ lǝ mi nti. Fɛɛ ele bǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue eto etiki bǝ itǝ fe kase báwɔni nnya bǝtsyǝ, ‘Utidi wǝ lékpe kɔni lǝ ɔkpɛ ɔni ku mɛ búdi lesaa, wǝ ni nwǝ létaka úńyǝ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ nɛ.’

english_verse: I am telling you this before it all happens. Then when it does happen, you will believe who I am.
translation_verse: “Nlɛ mi nyamfo bɔtɛyi katɔnsǝ fɛ lǝ ibǝ ibǝ, bǝ lǝ ibǝ ibǝ nko sitintii, biofo bɛnɔ biǝ Mɔ ni Nwǝ Mini.

english_verse: So the disciple leaned toward Jesus and asked, “Lord, which one of us are you talking about?”
translation_verse: Nyaso wuntsya étsyue kɛnyɛ lǝ Yesu ɔflɔ nya ɔ́tɔ wǝ buɛ nkǝ, “Bonamute, owoe ni futsyǝ?”

english_verse: After Jesus had said these things, he was deeply troubled and told his disciples, “I tell you for certain that one of you will betray me.”
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛtɛyi etiki nyamfo ólosǝǝ, ílǝ wǝ tinti lǝ lɛkɔɛsi. Nya ɔ́tɛyi ókpasǝ nkǝ, “Sitinti minlɛ mi bɔtɛyi mi nkǝ, mi nti eto ɔni ebudu mɛ utǝ.”

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple was sitting next to him at the meal,
translation_verse: Bakasebi bamǝ eto ɔni wǝ Yesu laala tintii, ǝsiǝ ɔfi Yesu.

english_verse: and Simon motioned for this disciple to find out which one Jesus meant.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso Simon Petro áma ǝnǝmi ókpe okasebi ǝmǝ, ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Tɔ wǝ futsyǝ ɔnlɛ.”

english_verse: No one at the meal understood what Jesus meant.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bafɛfɛ ba nsi lǝ lesakedikɔ mfó mánnɔ kasɔ lesa nǝ eso Yesu lɛtɛyi Yuda nko.

english_verse: But because Judas was in charge of the money, some of them thought that Jesus had told him to buy something they needed for the festival. Others thought that Jesus had told him to give some money to the poor.
translation_verse: Mǝ bǝtsyuǝ ébu bǝ se ini Yuda díkalɛ mǝ otabitobe esoo, bɔtɛyi Yesu nlɛ wǝ nkǝ usu oya bikǝ bia boohiã itǝ mǝ diyisɛɛ nǝmǝ eto budi oboko lee usu utǝ bakombo lesatsyuǝ.

english_verse: Judas took the piece of bread and went out. It was already night. The New Command
translation_verse: Nya se Yuda léfo lesa nǝmǝ koo, ete ɔ́bɔ údu. Kǝtsyǝ tsya idi lefe nǝmfó. Yesu Ǝtǝ Wǝ Bakasebi Kɔfi Fɔfɔ.

english_verse: Then, after God is given glory because of him, God will bring glory to him, and God will do it very soon.
translation_verse: Lǝ bábesǝ Onanto eto diye kato ɛyɛ lǝ Utidi Eto Ubi ǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ Onanto ebulǝkǝ Utidi Eto Ubi eto diyǝnde nǝ ǝsuǝ onkpe ote. Nya wuuyifo nkomǝ mɔmɔ mfoti.

english_verse: My children, I will be with you for only a little while longer. Then you will look for me, but you won't find me. I tell you just as I told the people, “You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: “Mɔ bebi, mensiembusiǝ lǝ mi ɔflɔ ɛklɛ bio. Biɔbɛbɛ mɛ, fɛɛ nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi mɔmɔ fe kase míntɛyi Yudafɔ eto beninǝ léfee miǝ, ‘Kaka mintɔɔ, biembofo mfó bubǝ.’

english_verse: Simon Peter asked, “Lord, where are you going?” Jesus answered, “You can't go with me now, but later on you will.”
translation_verse: Simon Petro átɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute, se fantɔ?” Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Kaka mintɔɔ, embofo mɛ butǝkǝko kesu mɔmɔ. Fɛɛ kamaa, ebutǝkǝko mɛ ǝbǝ mfó.”

english_verse: Peter asked, “Lord, why can't I go with you now? I would die for you!”
translation_verse: Petro átɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute, beso mǝmbofo fǝ butǝkǝko mɔmɔ kesu? Muukpǝ lǝ fǝ disi faa!”

english_verse: “Would you really die for me?” Jesus asked. “I tell you for certain before a rooster crows, you will say three times that you don't even know me.”
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Ebofo bukpǝ sitinti lǝ mɔ disi fɛ? Sitinti, nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi miǝ, fɛ ukusɛ luutǝ kɛnyɛɛ, ǝbɔni mɛ sitsyǝ, fǝ enyi mɛ kon.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Don't be worried! Have faith in God and have faith in me.
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Biǝntǝ lǝ ilǝ mi lǝ lɛkɔɛsi. Fe kase béfo Onanto bɛnɔɔ, befo mintsya bɛnɔ.

english_verse: There are many rooms in my Father's house. I wouldn't tell you this, unless it was true. I am going there to prepare a place for each of you.
translation_verse: Lǝ mɔ Anto eto diyoo, nsiǝkɔ kpǝ kpe. Ntɔ lǝ nsu nlɔ nsiǝkɔ ntsyǝ mi. Nya mǝmbɔtɛyi mi nko, lenni nko ini.

english_verse: After I have done this, I will come back and take you with me. Then we will be together.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nsu nlɔ nsiǝkɔ ntsyǝ ntǝ mi nlosǝǝ, muusinkli mbǝ nkpa mi nsuko mɔ ɔflɔ, itǝ bǝ kaka minkpee, lǝ mi tsya lǝ bisiǝ mfó.

english_verse: You know the way to where I am going.”
translation_verse: Biyi kusu ko ntɔ lǝ kaka mintɔ.” Yesu Ni Kusu Tinti Ko Ǝsuǝ Baayɛ Kesu Onanto Ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Thomas said, “Lord, we don't even know where you are going! How can we know the way?”
translation_verse: Toma átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute, bunyi kaka fantɔ. Nya ntsyǝ buuyifo bote kusu ko bɔɔyɛ bubǝ fǝ aflɔ?”

english_verse: “I am the way, the truth, and the life!” Jesus answered. “Without me, no one can go to the Father.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mɔ ni kusu komǝ, sitinti siamǝ ku nkpǝ bomǝ. Kuutsyuǝ saa embubǝ Anto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ lǝ woanyɛ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: If you had really known me, you would have known the Father. But from now on, you do know him, and you have seen him.”
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mɔmɔ ǝmǝ bimfi biinyi mɛɛ, bíote mɔ Anto ǝmǝ tsya. Nya idu mɔmɔ ɛntɔɔ, bifi biyi wǝ nya bíkǝnyǝ wǝ tsya.”

english_verse: Philip said, “Lord, show us the Father. That is all we need.”
translation_verse: Filipo átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute, te bo Anto ǝmǝ ete imi bo.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Philip, I have been with you for a long time. Don't you know who I am? If you have seen me, you have seen the Father. How can you ask me to show you the Father?
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Filipo, kokooko ǝmǝ minkpe mi lǝ ɔflɔɔ, ete binyi mɛ tɔ? Nwǝ ke díkǝnyǝ mɛɛ, ǝnyǝ mɔ Anto ǝmǝ tsya nɛ. Ntsyǝ eso fanlɛ bɔtɛyi fǝnkǝ, ‘Te bo Anto ǝmǝ’?

english_verse: Don't you believe that I am one with the Father and that the Father is one with me? What I say isn't said on my own. The Father who lives in me does these things.
translation_verse: Filipo, nyalɛ ámamfo ánɔ fǝ nkpe lǝ Anto ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ nya wuntsya nkpe lǝ mɛ? Etiki nnya míntɛyi mii, mentsyi mɔ kosate ɔflɔ. Anto wǝ nkpe lǝ mɛɛ, leeyifo wǝ kosate eto keyifo.

english_verse: Have faith in me when I say that the Father is one with me and that I am one with the Father. Or else have faith in me simply because of the things I do.
translation_verse: Befo mɛ bɛnɔ lǝ ntɛyi mi minkǝ, nkpe lǝ Anto ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ, nya wuntsya nkpe lǝ mɛ. Lǝ biamfo bɛnɔɔ, befo bɛnɔ lǝ ayanisa nnya meeyifo mate eso.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you have faith in me, you will do the same things I am doing. You will do even greater things, now that I am going back to the Father.
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, nwǝ ke léfo mɛ ɔ́nɔɔ, ebuyifo asa nnya meeyifo. Sitinti, wuuyifo asa nnya nso nko kulaa tsya, itsyise ntɔ lɔ mɔ Anto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Ask me, and I will do whatever you ask. This way the Son will bring honor to the Father.
translation_verse: Nya muuyifo lesa saa nǝ ke bɛtɔ lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝ ntǝ mi, bǝ lǝ babesǝ Anto ǝmǝ eto diye kato ɛyɛ lǝ Ubi ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I will do whatever you ask me to do. The Holy Spirit Is Promised
translation_verse: Lǝ bɛtɔ lesa saa lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝǝ, muuyifo ni ntǝ mi.” Yesu Átɛyi Wǝ Bakasebi Nkǝ Wuutǝ Mǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: If you love me, you will do as I command.
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ biala mɛɛ, biutsyue mɔ afi koto.

english_verse: Then I will ask the Father to send you the Holy Spirit who will help you and always be with you.
translation_verse: Mɔɔtɔ Anto ǝmǝ lǝ utǝ mi Ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ bamba wǝ luusiǝ ko mi lefe saa.

english_verse: The Spirit will show you what is true. The people of this world cannot accept the Spirit, because they don't see or know him. But you know the Spirit, who is with you and will keep on living in you.
translation_verse: Wǝ ni Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ lǝǝlǝkǝ sitinti lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ kate. Fɛɛ kawunsiǝ eto betidi ǝmbofo wǝ bunyǝ fɛ lǝ besu bǝtsyǝ wǝ lekpo. Fɛɛ mii, biyi Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ itsyise usi ko mi nya onkpe lǝ mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I won't leave you like orphans. I will come back to you.
translation_verse: “Lɛ ndu lǝ mi ɔflɔɔ, memoonyani mi mate ntsyǝ fe bakɔbebi. Bomu muusinkli mbǝ mi ɔflɔ.

english_verse: In a little while the people of this world won't be able to see me, but you will see me. And because I live, you will live.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝǝ, kawunsiǝ eto betidi ensiembunyǝ mɛ. Fɛɛ mi ebunyǝ mɛ. Nya se minsi nkpǝ esoo, mi tsya ebusiǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: Then you will know I am one with the Father. You will know you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfóo, biunyǝ bitsyǝ lekpo biǝ nkpe lǝ Anto ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ, nya mi tsya nkpe lǝ mɛ, fe kase mintsya nkpe lǝ mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you love me, you will do what I have said, and my Father will love you. I will also love you and show you what I am like.
translation_verse: “Utsyuǝ saa wǝ laafo mɔ afi nya woeyifo lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ, wǝ ni nwǝ laala mɛ nɛ. Mɔ Anto ebola nwǝ laala mɛ. Nya mintsya loola wǝ nya muulǝkǝ mɔ ǝsuǝ nte wǝ.”

english_verse: The other Judas, not Judas Iscariot, then spoke up and asked, “Lord, what do you mean by saying that you will show us what you are like, but you will not show the people of this world?”
translation_verse: Nya Yuda, wǝ lenni Iskariot, lɛtɔ Yesu nkǝ, “Bonamute, ntsyǝ fɛ ini bo mate ete fuulǝkǝ ǝsuǝ ate, nya fǝmbulǝkǝ ǝsuǝ ate kawunsiǝ eto betidi?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: If anyone loves me, they will obey me. Then my Father will love them, and we will come to them and live in them.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu dítǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Utsyuǝ saa ke laala mɛɛ, wuutsyue ditiki nǝ maate koto, nya mɔ Anto loola wǝ. Nya mɔ ku mɔ Anto ǝmǝ luubǝ bɔsɔnɔ wǝ, busiǝ wǝ lǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: But anyone who doesn't love me, won't obey me. What they have heard me say doesn't really come from me, but from the Father who sent me.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke laanla mɛɛ, entsyue mɔ asatete koto. Nya asatete nnya bíkanɔɔ, enni mɔ kosate eto ale. Bomu mɔ Anto wǝ létsyese mɛ eto ale ini.

english_verse: I have told you these things while I am still with you.
translation_verse: “Mbɔtɛyi mi nyamfo kenke lǝ lefe minsi minkpe mi lǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: But the Holy Spirit will come and help you, because the Father will send the Spirit to take my place. The Spirit will teach you everything and will remind you of what I said while I was with you.
translation_verse: Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝ ni Ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ wǝ Onanto lootsyese lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝǝ, ebote mi lesa saa nya wooklomasǝ mi lesa saa nǝ míntɛyi mi.

english_verse: I give you peace, the kind of peace only I can give. It isn't like the peace this world can give. So don't be worried or afraid.
translation_verse: “Diyuǝ lǝ disiǝko mi. Nya mɔ diyuǝ mimfi minlɛ mi butǝ. Inni lǝ kase kawunsiǝ eto betidi lǝǝtǝ. Biǝntǝ lǝ ilǝ mi lǝ lɛkɔɛsi. Nya biante sikpi.

english_verse: You have already heard me say I am going and I will also come back to you. If you really love me, you should be glad I am going back to the Father, because he is greater than I am.
translation_verse: Bɛnɔ se míntɛyi mi miǝ, ‘Nlɛ budu lǝ mi ɔflɔ, nya muusinkli mbǝ mi ɔflɔ.’ Lǝ nnya ete biala mɛɛ, eni biunyǝ disuǝyuǝ bǝ ndu ntɔ lǝ Anto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ. Itsyise ɔmɔ oso mɛ.

english_verse: I am telling you this before I leave, so when it does happen, you will have faith in me.
translation_verse: Mbɔtɛyi mi nyamfo mɔmɔ fɛ lǝ ibǝ ibǝ, bǝ lǝ ibǝ ibǝ itǝǝ, lǝ befo bɛnɔ.

english_verse: I cannot speak with you much longer, because the ruler of this world is coming. But he has no power over me.
translation_verse: Mensiembofo mi etiki budinko kaklɛ itsyise kawunsiǝ kamfo eto oka lɛ bubǝ. Umbǝ ǝsuǝale lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I obey my Father, so everyone in the world might know that I love him. It is time for us to go now.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ele bǝ kawunsiǝ te nkǝ maala Anto ǝmǝ, nyaso meeyifo lǝ kase ɔ́tɛyi mɛ nkǝ nyifo. “Mɔmɔɔ, bibǝ lǝ budu mfo.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: I am the true vine, and my Father is the gardener.
translation_verse: “Mɔ ni kudiyi tinti komǝ, nya mɔ Anto ni kudiyi komǝ eto ɔkuɛmfo ǝmǝ.

english_verse: He cuts away every branch of mine that doesn't produce fruit. But he trims clean every branch that does produce fruit, so that it will produce even more fruit.
translation_verse: Waala mɔ kalɛ ka laannwɔ kǝlǝkǝ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ nya nka laanwɔ ebibii, waalɔ ke ǝsuǝ lǝ kase ufiebi lɔɔsɔ okpo ke bǝ lǝ kafo bɔnwɔ kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: You are already clean because of what I have said to you.
translation_verse: Mimii, bɔ́ɔlɔ mi ǝsuǝ bǝtsyǝ koko tsya, ɛyɛ lǝ asa nnya mínte mi eso.

english_verse: Stay joined to me, and I will stay joined to you. Just as a branch cannot produce fruit unless it stays joined to the vine, you cannot produce fruit unless you stay joined to me.
translation_verse: Bɛkɔ lǝ mɛ lǝ mintsya lǝ nyifo lɔni ku mi. Kuyi eto ɔlɛ ǝmbofo bɔnwɔ lǝ wǝ mate ǝsuǝ, woofo bɔnwɔ lǝ ɔlɛ ǝmǝ akɔ lǝ kuyi komǝ ǝsuǝ. Nko ke biembofo ebibi bɔnwɔ lǝ biankɔ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: I am the vine, and you are the branches. If you stay joined to me, and I stay joined to you, then you will produce lots of fruit. But you cannot do anything without me.
translation_verse: “Mɔ ni kudiyi komǝ nɛ, nya mi ni ko kalɛ. Utidi wǝ ke lɛkɔ lǝ mɛɛ, nya mintsya lɛkɔ ku wǝǝ, ɛbɔnwɔ ebibi kpǝ. Itsyise biembofo kulesa buyifo lǝ mimbǝ lǝ mi.

english_verse: If you don't stay joined to me, you will be thrown away. You will be like dry branches that are gathered up and burned in a fire.
translation_verse: Futsyǝ ke dimankɔ ku mɛɛ, booto wǝ bakpe fe uyilɛ nya wookoe ofiani ɔtɔni. Baakpa kalɛ kamfo eto okle kǝtsyǝ ditsyu kakpe lǝ ute katonsǝ.

english_verse: Stay joined to me and let my teachings become part of you. Then you can pray for whatever you want, and your prayer will be answered.
translation_verse: Lǝ biyifo lɔni ku mɛ nya mɔ etiki tsya nkpe lǝ mii, bɛtɔ lesa saa nǝ ke lefe itǝ mi, ete biofo ni.

english_verse: When you become fruitful disciples of mine, my Father will be honored.
translation_verse: Mɔ Anto eto diyǝnde ni bǝ lǝ bɛnwɔ ebibi kpǝ, nya ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, nnya yuulǝkǝ ete bǝ biyifo mɔ bakasebi nɛ.

english_verse: I have loved you, just as my Father has loved me. So remain faithful to my love for you.
translation_verse: Maala mi fe kase mɔ Anto laala mɛ. Nyaso bitǝ lǝ mɔ lelabi lǝ lɛkɛ mi lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you obey me, I will keep loving you, just as my Father keeps loving me, because I have obeyed him.
translation_verse: Lǝ bitsyue mɔ afi kotoo, mɔ lelabi itǝ mi ebɔkɔ lǝ mi fe kase mintsya leetsyue mɔ Anto koto, nya mintsyimɛ lǝ wǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ lefe saa.

english_verse: I have told you this to make you as completely happy as I am.
translation_verse: “Nlɛ mi asa nyamfo bɔtɛyi bǝ lǝ disuǝyuǝ nǝ nkpe lǝ mɛɛ, lǝ lɛkɛ mi tsya lǝ ǝsuǝ lɛflɔ.

english_verse: Now I tell you to love each other, as I have loved you.
translation_verse: Kɔfi ko minlɛ mi butǝ ni nkǝ bela bǝtsyuǝ fe kase maala mi.

english_verse: The greatest way to show love for friends is to die for them.
translation_verse: Lelabi nǝ utidi loofo bufi kǝtǝ wǝ bayɛtsyuǝ enso kenke ni bǝnkǝ lǝ ufi wǝ nkpǝ utǝ lǝ mǝ disi.

english_verse: And you are my friends, if you obey me.
translation_verse: Lǝ biyifo lǝ mɔ afi ǝsuǝǝ, ete bǝ biyifo mɔ bayɛtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Servants don't know what their master is doing, and so I don't speak to you as my servants. I speak to you as my friends, and I have told you everything my Father has told me.
translation_verse: Mensiembokpo mi miǝ mɔ beyifoyifo mɔmɔ, itsyise nwǝ leeyifo utidi bamba eto keyifo aante asa nnya wǝ onamute leeyifo. Bomu maakpo mi miǝ mɔ bayɛtsyuǝ. Itsyise asa nnya kenke mínɔ mintsyiko mɔ Anto ɔflɔɔ, mbɔtɛyi mi nnya.

english_verse: You did not choose me. I chose you and sent you out to produce fruit, the kind of fruit that will last. Then my Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Inni mi díkǝlǝkǝ mɛ. Bomu mɔ dílǝkǝ mi. Nya nlǝkǝ mi miǝ lǝ bisu bɛnwɔ ebibi kpǝ, nya ebibi nnya biɔnwɔɔ, lǝ itsyǝ lefe saa. Itǝ bǝ lesa saa nǝ biɔtɔ Anto lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝǝ, wuutǝ mi ni.

english_verse: So I command you to love each other. The World's Hatred
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso kɔfi ko minlɛ mi butǝ ni nkǝ bela mi bǝtsyuǝ.” Kawunsiǝ Eto Betidi Eekisi Yesu Eto Bakasebi.

english_verse: If the people of this world hate you, just remember that they hated me first.
translation_verse: Yesu ésukosǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi eekisi mii, bete biǝ mɔ baka bukisi nko.

english_verse: If you belonged to the world, its people would love you. But you don't belong to the world. I have chosen you to leave the world behind, and this is why its people hate you.
translation_verse: Lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto betidi binii, eni boola mi fe mǝ ke. Fɛɛ nlǝkǝ mi ntsyiko kawunsiǝ kamfo eto betidi nti nyaso binsini mǝ bale. Nyamfo eso beekisi mi nɛ.

english_verse: Remember how I told you that servants are not greater than their master. So if people mistreat me, they will mistreat you. If they do what I say, they will do what you say.
translation_verse: Bekloma ditiki nǝ míntɛyi mi minkǝ, ‘Ndomunyǝ saa ammɔ kaso wǝ onamute.’ Lǝ betidi ǝńyǝ mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝǝ, bete biǝ boońyǝ mi tsya lǝ ǝsuǝ. Lǝ bétsyue mɔ etiki kotoo, bootsyue mi ale tsya koto.

english_verse: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not be guilty of sin. But now they have no excuse for their sin.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ete mǝmbǝ ntɛyi mǝ kulesaa, eni bǝmbolo mǝ lebua yifoyifo eto dikpi. Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, béyifo lebua nya taflatsyɛ saa ensibǝ booto bǝ bánte.

english_verse: Everyone who hates me also hates my Father.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa wǝ leekisi mɛɛ, eekisi mɔ Anto tsya.

english_verse: I have done things no one else has ever done. If they had not seen me do these things, they would not be guilty. But they did see me do these things, and they still hate me and my Father too.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ete ményifo keyifo ka kuutsyuǝ saa dímenyifo tɔ únyǝ lǝ mǝ ntii, eni bǝmbolo mǝ lebua yifoyifo eto dikpi. Fɛɛ bǝnyǝ asa nnya mínyifo, tsyaa balɛ mɔ ku mɔ Anto kenke bukisi.

english_verse: This is why the Scriptures are true when they say, “People hated me for no reason.”
translation_verse: Ele bǝ nyamfo bǝ itǝ nko bǝ lesa nǝ báwɔni bákpe lǝ mǝ kɔfi eto kukue ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ ibǝ itǝ nko bǝ, ‘Bukisi bimba ete békisi mɛ.’

english_verse: I will send you the Spirit who comes from the Father and shows what is true. The Spirit will help you and will tell you about me.
translation_verse: “Lǝ nyasoo, mootsyese mi Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝ ni Ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ itsyi lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ. Wǝ luulǝkǝ sitinti lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ ote. Lefe nǝ utsyi Anto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ ubǝǝ, wuudi adansiǝ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ utǝ mi.

english_verse: Then you will also tell others about me, because you have been with me from the beginning.
translation_verse: Mi tsya badansiɛ biudi bitǝ mɛ, itsyise bekpe lǝ mɔ ɔflɔ idu taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ke.

english_verse: I am telling you these things, so that you will not turn away.
translation_verse: “Ntɛyi mi etiki nyamfo kenke bǝ lǝ betidi lǝ bayɛ butǝ lǝ ani lǝ elo mi lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You will be chased out of the synagogues. And the time will come when people will kill you and think they are doing God a favor.
translation_verse: Boolǝkǝ mi lǝ mǝ nti lǝ katsyakɔ, nya lefe ebubǝ nǝ lǝ utsyuǝ lɛ mi bolo tsyaa, wuubu nkǝ ɔlɛ Onanto busumu lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They will do these things because they don't know either the Father or me.
translation_verse: Betidi ebuyifo mi nyamfo eto okle, itsyise benyi mɛ nye Anto ǝmǝ tsya.

english_verse: I am saying this to you now, so that when the time comes, you will remember what I have said. The Work of the Holy Spirit I was with you at the first, and so I didn't tell you these things.
translation_verse: Bomu mbɔtɛyi mi nyamfo ntɔnsǝ bǝ lǝ lefe nǝmǝ áyo bǝ beyifo nnya nkoo, lǝ bekloma biǝ ntɛyi mi nnya nko. “Mántɛyi mi nyamfo lǝ kasɔ ketsyikokɔ itsyise nkɛ mi lǝ ɔflɔ lefe nǝmfo.

english_verse: But now I am going back to the Father who sent me, and none of you asks me where I am going.
translation_verse: Fɛ mɔmɔɔ, ntɔ lǝ nwǝ létsyese mɛ ɔflɔ. Fɛɛ mi kuutsyuǝ saa anlɛ mɛ bɔtɔ nkǝ sieti mintɔ.

english_verse: You are very sad from hearing all of this.
translation_verse: Nya se míntɛyi mi nyamfoo, mi ketu eyi ku nkuɛnlo.

english_verse: But I tell you I am going to do what is best for you. This is why I am going away. The Holy Spirit cannot come to help you until I leave. But after I am gone, I will send the Spirit to you.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, ɛlɛkɛ itǝ mi bǝ ndu lǝ mi ɔflɔ. Itsyise lǝ mensuu, Ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ ǝmǝ embubǝ mi ɔflɔ. Fɛɛ lǝ nsuu, mootsyese wǝ mi.

english_verse: The Spirit will come and show the people of this world the truth about sin and God's justice and the judgment.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ ubǝǝ, wuulǝkǝ ote kawunsiǝ eto betidi ekpa wue bate bǝ bánya kusu lǝ lesa nǝ ni lebua ku lesa nǝ ni kasɛɛ yifoyifo ku lesa nǝ ni Onanto eto lekpo kpokpo.

english_verse: The Spirit will show them that they are wrong about sin, because they didn't have faith in me.
translation_verse: Bembote lesa nǝ ni lebua itsyise bámfo mɛ bánɔ eso.

english_verse: They are wrong about God's justice, because I am going to the Father, and you won't see me again.
translation_verse: Nya boonyǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo se banyɛ lǝ kusu sɛɛ komǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise ntɔ lǝ Anto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ nya biensiembunyǝ mɛ bio.

english_verse: And they are wrong about the judgment, because God has already judged the ruler of this world.
translation_verse: Nya bebote lesa nǝ ni lekpo kpokpo itsyise Onanto ébolo kawunsiǝ kamfo eto ǝsuǝalenyǝ ǝmǝ dikpi koko.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but right now it would be more than you could understand.
translation_verse: “Asa kpǝ si ekpe nnya ele bǝ ntɛyi mi. Fɛɛ yooso mi butsyi mɔmɔ.

english_verse: The Spirit shows what is true and will come and guide you into the full truth. The Spirit doesn't speak on his own. He will tell you only what he has heard from me, and he will let you know what is going to happen.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lefe nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ lǝǝlǝkǝ sitinti lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ kate ǝbǝǝ, diutǝ bete sitinti siamǝ kenke itsyi lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ. Nya wǝǝmbɔtɛyi kulesa lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ. Bomu wɔɔtɛyi mi lesa nǝ waanɔ ku nnya lǝǝbǝ bubǝ.

english_verse: The Spirit will bring glory to me by taking my message and telling it to you.
translation_verse: Wuutǝ babesǝ mɔ diye kato itsyise wuulǝkǝ lesa nǝ ófo utsyiko mɔ ɔflɔ ote mi.

english_verse: Everything the Father has is mine. This is why I have said that the Spirit takes my message and tells it to you. Sorrow Will Turn into Joy
translation_verse: Lesa saa nǝ ni Anto ǝmǝ eto lelee, eyifo mɔ lele. Nyaso míntɛyi mi minkǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ ebufi lesa nǝ mintǝ wǝ ubǝ ote mi.” Bakasebi Bamǝ Eto Nkuɛnlo Ebofiani Disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “For a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.”
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Ibu sɛkɛ biensiembunyǝ mɛ bio, nya lǝ lefe sɛkɛ kama bisi biunyǝ mɛ.”

english_verse: They said to each other, “What does Jesus mean by saying that for a little while we won't see him, but after a while we will see him? What does he mean by saying he is going to the Father?
translation_verse: Mfó nya wǝ bakasebi bǝtsyuǝ lɛtɔ mǝ bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nya ɔ́tɛyi mfo eto kasɔ nkpǝ? Ɔ́tɛyi bo nkǝ, Ibu sɛkɛ boensi embunyǝ wǝ bio. Nya sɛkɛ tsya lǝ nnya kamaa, busi buunyǝ wǝ. Nya usi ɔ́tɛyi bo tsya nkǝ, ‘Itsyise ntɔ lǝ Anto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ.’

english_verse: What is this ‘little while’ that he is talking about? We don't know what he means.”
translation_verse: Nnya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, ‘Ibu sɛkɛ,’ eto kasɔ ni be? Bóannɔ lesa nǝ ɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi eto kasɔ!”

english_verse: Jesus knew they had some questions, so he said: You are wondering what I meant when I said that for a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.
translation_verse: Yesu áte nkǝ etiki ǝtsyuǝ kpe bála lǝ batɔ wǝ. Nyaso ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Ntɛyi minkǝ ibu sɛkɛ biensi embunyǝ mɛ bio, nya sɛkɛ lǝ nnya kamaa, bisi biunyǝ mɛ bio. Etiki nyamfo bɛnlɛ bɔlɛ kabe lǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ nti lee?

english_verse: I tell you for certain that you will cry and be sad, but the world will be happy. You will be sad, but later you will be happy.
