translation_verse: Sitinti minlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ biuwi kaminsǝku, bilǝkǝ binǝntu. Fɛɛ kawunsiǝ eto betidi luunyǝ disuǝyuǝ. Nya mii, nkuɛnlo ebumuǝ mi, fɛɛ mi nkuɛnlo bomǝ ebofiani disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: When a woman is about to give birth, she is in great pain. But after it is all over, she forgets the pain and is happy, because she has brought a child into the world.
translation_verse: Lǝ usio labe kolee, woakɛ lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ itsyise ɔlɛ kanyi bunyǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ óle ubi ǝmǝ ólosǝǝ, woata kanyi ka únyǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise wǝǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ nkǝ óle ubi ókpe lǝ kawunsiǝ.

english_verse: You are now very sad. But later I will see you, and you will be so happy that no one will be able to change the way you feel.
translation_verse: Nko seka inte itǝ mi tsya nɛ. Mɔmɔɔ, bekpe lǝ nkuɛnlo ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ muunyǝ mi bio. Nya disuǝyuǝ luuyi mi akɔɛsi kenke, disuǝyuǝ nǝ eto okle kuutsyuǝ saa lǝmbofo bofo ketsyiko mi ani kulefe.

english_verse: When that time comes, you won't have to ask me about anything. I tell you for certain the Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: “Lǝ diyi nǝmǝ ayoo, biembɔtɔ mɛ kulesa. Itsyise nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti miǝ lesa nǝ ke biɔtɔ mɔ Anto lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝǝ, wuufi ni utǝ mi.

english_verse: You have not asked for anything in this way before, but now you must ask in my name. Then it will be given to you, so you will be completely happy.
translation_verse: Ibǝ ese mɔmɔɔ, bíantɔ tɔ kulesa lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝ. Bɛtɔ ete lǝ utǝ mi lǝ mi disuǝyuǝ lǝ lɛflɔ lelo.

english_verse: I have used examples to explain to you what I have been talking about. But the time will come when I will speak to you plainly about the Father and will no longer use examples like these.
translation_verse: “Ndi mi etiki ɛyɛ lǝ akpa ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ lefe ebubǝ nǝ mensiembudi mi etiki nyɛnko lǝ akpa ǝsuǝ. Bomu muudi mi etiki wuee itsyi lǝ Anto ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You will ask the Father in my name, and I won't have to ask him for you.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmǝ ayoo, bɛtɔ wǝ asa lǝ mɔ diye ǝsuǝ. Minlɛ bɔtɛyi miǝ mɔɔ, mɔɔtɔ ntɛ mi.

english_verse: God the Father loves you because you love me, and you believe I have come from him.
translation_verse: Itsyise Anto ǝmǝ kosate aala mi. Waala mi itsyise mi tsya aala mɛ, nya béfo bɛnɔ biǝ Onanto ɔflɔ mintsyi mímbǝ.

english_verse: I came from the Father into the world, but I am leaving the world and returning to the Father.
translation_verse: Sitintii, Anto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ mintsyi mímbǝ kawunsiǝ, nya mɔmɔ nsi nlɛ budu lǝ kawunsiǝ kesu Anto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ.”

english_verse: The disciples said, “Now you are speaking plainly to us! You are not using examples.
translation_verse: Nya wǝ bakasebi lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔmɔɔ, efe alɛ etiki budi kakpasǝ wuee, insini lǝ akpa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: At last we know that you understand everything, and we don't have any more questions. Now we believe you truly have come from God.”
translation_verse: Mfe ko bote boǝ eyi lesa saa, nya yensife bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa si ɔtɔ fǝ etiki eto kasɔ. Nyamfo mate ǝtǝ bofo bɔnɔ boǝ Onanto ɔflɔ fétsyi.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Do you really believe me?
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Mɔmɔ alɛ befo bɛnɔ?

english_verse: The time will come and is already here when all of you will be scattered. Each of you will go back home and leave me by myself. But the Father will be with me, and I won't be alone.
translation_verse: Lefe lɛ bubǝ, nya díubǝ tsya lélo nǝ boosensǝ mi nya utsyuǝ saa luusu wǝ umǝ beyani mɔ mate bitsyǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ sitintii, yembuyifo mɔ mate. Itsyise Anto ǝmǝ si ko mɛ.

english_verse: I have told you this, so that you might have peace in your hearts because of me. While you are in the world, you will have to suffer. But cheer up! I have defeated the world.
translation_verse: Ntɛyi mi nyamfo lǝ binyǝ diyuǝ se biyifo lɔni ku mɛ eso. Kawunsiǝ eto betidi ebutǝ binyǝ kanyi. Fɛɛ bińyǝ kekleke! Itsyise mbutǝkǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo kato!”

english_verse: After Jesus had finished speaking to his disciples, he looked up toward heaven and prayed: Father, the time has come for you to bring glory to your Son, in order that he may bring glory to you.
translation_verse: Se Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nyamfo ólosǝǝ, óbesǝ ǝnǝmi kato nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nto, lefe nǝmǝ éboyo. Besǝ fǝ Ubi eto diye kato bǝ lǝ fǝ Ubi tsya lǝ obesǝ fǝ diye kato.

english_verse: And you gave him power over all people, so he would give eternal life to everyone you give him.
translation_verse: Itsyise éfi ǝsuǝale kenke ǝtǝ wǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke ǝsuǝ bǝ mba kenke féfi fǝtǝ wǝǝ, lǝ utǝ mǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: Eternal life is to know you, the only true God, and to know Jesus Christ, the one you sent.
translation_verse: Nya nkpǝ manlo ni bǝ lǝ betidi lǝ bate fǝ, fǝ nwǝ hã mate ni Onanto kosate ǝmǝ nya lǝ bate Yesu Kristo wǝ fátsyese.

english_verse: I have brought glory to you here on earth by doing everything you gave me to do.
translation_verse: Mbesǝ fǝ diye kato nte lǝ betidi nti. Nya mínyifo keyifo ka fákpe mɛ lǝ kɔni fǝ nyifo lǝ kawunsiǝ mínlosǝ.

english_verse: Now, Father, give me back the glory I had with you before the world was created.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, Nto, besǝ fǝ Ubi eto diyǝnde kato lǝ fǝ ǝnǝmi, diyǝnde nǝ ǝsuǝ mínkɛ ku fǝ fɛ béyifo kawunsiǝ. Yesu Áto Ola Lǝ Wǝ Bakasebi Eto Disi.

english_verse: You have given me some followers from this world, and I have shown them what you are like. They were yours, but you gave them to me, and they have obeyed you.
translation_verse: “Ntǝ miǝ mba fǝlǝkǝ fǝtǝ mɛ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi ntii, te fǝ. Fǝ bale beni nya féfi mǝ fǝtǝ mɛ nya bétsyue fǝ ditiki koto.

english_verse: They know that you gave me everything I have.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, beyi bǝ lesa saa nǝ féfi fǝtǝ mɛɛ, etsyi fǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: I told my followers what you told me, and they accepted it. They know I came from you, and they believe you are the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Mfi kɛnyɛ ka fǝtǝ mɛ fǝ nsu ntɛyi mǝ nsuko mǝ nya báfo ke. Nya beyi sitinti bǝ fǝ ɔflɔ mintsyi, nya fǝ ni nwǝ létsyese mɛ.

english_verse: I am praying for them, but not for those who belong to this world. My followers belong to you, and I am praying for them.
translation_verse: Nlɛ ola boto lǝ mǝ disi, minlɛ ola boto lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke eto disi. Bomu lǝ mba féfi fǝtǝ mɛ eto disi, itsyise fǝ kosate eto bale beni.

english_verse: All I have is yours, and all you have is mine, and they will bring glory to me.
translation_verse: “Mba kenke ni mɔ bale eyifo fǝ bale, nko ke fǝ bale tsya diyifo mɔ bale nɛ. Nya mɔ diyǝnde lébe kato ɛyɛ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Holy Father, I am no longer in the world. I am coming to you, but my followers are still in the world. So keep them safe by the power of the name you have given me. Then they will be one with each other, just as you and I are one.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, nlɛ fǝ ɔflɔ bubǝ. Minsibǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ mfo. Fɛɛ mǝǝ, besi bakpe lǝ ke. Anto Kɛnkɛ, fǝ kosate fi fǝ diye eto ǝsuǝale nnya fǝtǝ mɛ abe mǝ bǝ lǝ beyifo bani fe kase bo ku fǝ diyifo bani.

english_verse: While I was with them, I kept them safe by the power you have given me. I guarded them, and not one of them was lost, except the one who had to be lost. This happened so that what the Scriptures say would come true.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ mínkɛ lǝ mǝ ɔflɔɔ, nlɛ mǝ wɛkɛkɛkɛkɛ nya mínse mǝ ɛyɛ lǝ diye nǝ fǝtǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ. Nse mǝ, itǝ bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa mánnya lǝ mǝ nti, enso utidi wǝ ele bǝ onya kokooko, bǝ lǝ nnya báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ lǝ ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: I am on my way to you. But I say these things while I am still in the world, so my followers will have the same complete joy that I do.
translation_verse: “Nya mɔmɔɔ, nlɛ fǝ ɔflɔ bubǝ. Ntɛyi nyamfo lǝ kawunsiǝ bǝ lǝ mǝ tsya lǝ beyi kenke lǝ mǝ akɔɛsi ku mɔ disuǝyuǝ nǝ minlɛ bunyǝ.

english_verse: I have told them your message. But the people of this world hate them, because they don't belong to this world, just as I don't.
translation_verse: Mbe fǝ ditiki nǝmǝ letsya ntǝ mǝ, nya benni kawunsiǝ kamǝ eto bale fe kase mintsya lenni kawunsiɛ kamfo eto ole ke. Lǝ nyasoo, kawunsiǝ kamǝ eekisi mǝ.

english_verse: Father, I don't ask you to take my followers out of the world, but keep them safe from the evil one.
translation_verse: “Minlɛ bɔtɔ miǝ lǝkǝ mǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamǝ. Bomu nlɛ bɔtɔ miǝ lǝ ase mǝ, ǝlǝkǝ mǝ etsyiko Obuale ǝmǝ eto ani.

english_verse: They don't belong to this world, and neither do I.
translation_verse: Fe kase minni kawunsiǝ kamfo eto olee, nko ke mǝ tsya lenni kawunsiǝ kamfo eto bale nɛ.

english_verse: Your word is the truth. So let this truth make them completely yours.
translation_verse: Yifo mǝ kɛnkɛ lǝ sitinti siamǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise fǝ ditiki nǝmǝ eyifo sitinti.

english_verse: I am sending them into the world, just as you sent me.
translation_verse: Ntsyese mǝ kawunsiǝ fe kase fintsya létsyese mɛ kawunsiǝ seka.

english_verse: I have given myself completely for their sake, so they may belong completely to the truth.
translation_verse: Lǝ mǝ esoo, nyifo mɔ ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛ ntǝ fǝ, bǝ lǝ mǝ tsya lǝ beyifo kɛnkɛ lǝ sitinti siamǝ ǝsuǝ. Yesu Áto Ola Lǝ Bafokanɔfɔ Kenke Eto Disi.

english_verse: I am not praying just for these followers. I am also praying for everyone else who will have faith because of what my followers will say about me.
translation_verse: “Minlɛ nyamfo bɔtɔ kǝtǝ mǝ mate, bomu nlɛ bɔtɔ kǝtǝ mba kenke loofo mɛ banɔ ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ mǝ bɔɔtɛyi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I want all of them to be one with each other, just as I am one with you and you are one with me. I also want them to be one with us. Then the people of this world will believe that you sent me.
translation_verse: Anto, nlɛ bɔtɔ miǝ lǝ ǝtǝ bǝ lǝ beyifo bani fe kase fankpe lǝ mɛ nya mintsya nkpe lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ. Tǝ lǝ beyifo bani ku bo bǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi lǝ bafo banɔ bǝ fǝ uni létsyese mɛ.

english_verse: I have honored my followers in the same way you honored me, in order that they may be one with each other, just as we are one.
translation_verse: “Ntǝ mǝ diyǝnde nǝ eto okle ke fǝtǝ bǝ lǝ mǝmblɛ lǝ beyifo bani fe kase bo fǝ diyifo bani.

english_verse: I am one with them, and you are one with me, so they may become completely one. Then this world's people will know that you sent me. They will know that you love my followers as much as you love me.
translation_verse: Nkpe lǝ mǝ, nya fintsya nkpe lǝ mɛ. Tǝ lǝ beyifo bani kenke bǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi lǝ bate bǝ fǝ létsyese mɛ nya faala mǝ fe kase faala mɛ.

english_verse: Father, I want everyone you have given me to be with me, wherever I am. Then they will see the glory you have given me, because you loved me before the world was created.
translation_verse: “Anto, nla miǝ mba féfi fǝtǝ mɛ lǝ bǝsiǝ mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ lǝ kaka minsi bǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ mɔ diyǝnde, diyǝnde nǝ fǝtǝ mɛ itsyise ála mɛ fɛ béyifo kawunsiǝ.

english_verse: Good Father, the people of this world don't know you. But I know you, and my followers know that you sent me.
translation_verse: “Anto Sɛɛ, kawunsiǝ eto betidi enyi fǝ, fɛɛ mɔ yi fǝ nya mba mfo tsya yi bǝ fǝ létsyese mɛ.

english_verse: I told them what you are like, and I will tell them even more. Then the love you have for me will become part of them, and I will be one with them.
translation_verse: Ntǝ báte fǝ wuee, nya muutǝ besi bate fǝ eso nko, bǝ lǝ lelabi nǝ féfi fǝtǝ mɛɛ, lǝ lɛkɛ lǝ mǝ nya lǝ mintsya lǝ nkɛ lǝ mǝ.”

english_verse: One of the high priest's servants was there. He was a relative of the servant whose ear Peter had cut off, and he asked, “Didn't I see you in the garden with that man?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke eto ndomunyǝ ɔni eto ɔyimi wǝ eto koto Petro léwe lɛtɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Inni fǝ uni mínyǝ lǝ ɔkuɛ mfó lee?”

english_verse: Jesus again asked, “Who are you looking for?” “We are looking for Jesus from Nazareth,” they answered.
translation_verse: Usi ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Owoe bɛnlɛ bɔbɛbɛ?” Bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Yesu Nasaretnyǝ ǝmǝ.”

english_verse: This time Jesus replied, “I have already told you that I am Jesus. If I am the one you are looking for, let these others go.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ́tɛyi mi koko minkǝ, nyǝ mɔ ni wǝ mfoo. Nyaso lǝ mɔ uni bɛnlɛ bɔbɛbɛɛ, bitǝ lǝ mbamfo lǝ bedu.”

english_verse: Then everything will happen, just as I said, ‘I did not lose anyone you gave me.’ ”
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi nyamfo nko, bǝ lǝ lesa nǝ úkatɛyi kokoo, lǝ ibǝ itǝ sitinti nkǝ, “Nto, mányansǝ mba féfi fǝtǝ mɛ eto lɛ ɔni lǝ mǝnti.”

english_verse: Simon Peter had brought along a sword. He pulled it out and struck at Malchus, the servant of the high priest, cutting off his right ear.
translation_verse: Mfó Simon Petro dínǝ kalande nǝ untsyi úlǝkǝ lǝ akpatsya, nya ówe Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke eto uyifoyifo eto kodianito úfǝ. Ndomunyǝ ǝmǝ eto diye ni Malko.

english_verse: The Roman officer and his men, together with the temple police, arrested Jesus and tied him up.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Romafɔ eto bamamanyǝ eto ditsyukpa ku mǝ ɔtɔnkotɔnko ku Yudafɔ eto batɔnkpe bǝtsyuǝ ǝmuǝ Yesu lǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ bákle.

english_verse: Peter stayed outside near the gate. But the other disciple came back out and spoke to the girl at the gate. She let Peter go in,
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Petroo, ǝńyǝ lǝ kesie. Okasebi bamba ǝmǝ ésinkli úbǝ údi etiki ku usiobi wǝ díńyǝ lǝ kesie kɛnyɛ mfó, nya útǝ nkǝ Petro tsya dufǝ lǝ diyo nǝmǝ kafo.

english_verse: but asked him, “Aren't you one of that man's followers?” “No, I am not!” Peter answered.
translation_verse: Mfó nya usiobi ǝmǝ lɛtɔ Petro nkǝ, “Fintsya, osani ǝmfo eto bakasebi eto ɔni fenii, lee?” Mfó Petro dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Owo, minni!”

english_verse: It was cold, and the servants and temple police had made a charcoal fire. They were warming themselves around it, when Peter went over and stood near the fire to warm himself. Jesus Is Questioned by the High Priest (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya se lɛyɔ nlɛ mǝ esoo, beyifobi ku mba laase mfó átsyaka ute nya bǝńyǝ banlɛ bɔyifǝ. Nya Petro tsya lɛnyi úsu úńyǝ lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ mfó ɔnlɛ ute ǝmǝ bɔyifǝ.

english_verse: The high priest questioned Jesus about his followers and his teaching.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfóo, Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke ákatɔ Yesu asa itsyi lǝ wǝ bakasebi ku asa nnya waate ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Why are you questioning me? Why don't you ask the people who heard me? They know what I have said.”
translation_verse: Nya beso ini mɔ fanlɛ etiki nyamfo bɔtɔ? Tɔ betidi bamfo lesa nǝ míntɛyi mǝ. Beyi lǝsanǝ míntɛyi.”

english_verse: Jesus was still tied up, and Annas sent him to Caiaphas the high priest. Peter Again Denies that He Knows Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Mfó nya Annas dífi Yesu wǝ disi ɔkɛ lǝ bokle lǝ ukuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ótsyese Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke Kayafa ɔflɔ. Petro Esi Ɔ́ni Yesu.

english_verse: It was early in the morning when Jesus was taken from Caiaphas to the building where the Roman governor stayed. But the crowd waited outside. Any of them who had gone inside would have become unclean and would not be allowed to eat the Passover meal.
translation_verse: Olesiǝnto ǝmfóo, bákpa Yesu lǝ Kayafa eto diyo bésuko Romafɔ eto Aba eto Unyɛsiǝ eto kǝsiǝkɔ. Fɛɛ Yudafɔ bamǝ méndufǝ mfó, itsyise bánla bǝ bakpe mǝ ǝsuǝ kɔfiɔ fɛ lǝ bedi Ukpǝ Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto Diyisɛɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: Pilate came out and asked, “What charges are you bringing against this man?”
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, Pilato ábɔ úbǝ ótsyako mǝ lǝ kesie kɛnyɛ mfó, nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Nte kabua ka osani ǝmfo díyifo?”

english_verse: They answered, “He is a criminal! That's why we brought him to you.”
translation_verse: Bǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Lenni kabua kplɛ kukǝtsyuǝ úyifo, eni boǝmbokpa wǝ boboko fǝ ɔflɔ.”

english_verse: And so what Jesus said about his death would soon come true.
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo ǝbǝ nko bǝ lǝ lesa nǝ Yesu lɛtɛyi itsyi lǝ ukpǝ wǝ eto okle wǝǝbǝ bukpǝ lǝ ibǝ itǝ nko sitinti.

english_verse: Pilate then went back inside. He called Jesus over and asked, “Are you the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Pilato dísinkli úsu údufǝ wǝ lekanyo mfó, nya ókpadi Yesu ɔ́tɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ ni Yudafɔ eto Oka ǝmǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Are you asking this on your own or did someone tell you about me?”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ ɔ́tɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ kosate ete nlɛ mɛ etiki nyamfo bɔtɔ lee, betidi bamba lɛtɛyi fǝ nko itsyi lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: “You know I'm not a Jew!” Pilate said. “Your own people and the chief priests brought you to me. What have you done?”
translation_verse: Pilato ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Ebu fǝ Yudanyǝ mini? Mi kosate eto betidi ku besumunyǝ ninǝ dífi fǝ bákpe mɛ lɛ kɔni. Be féyifo?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My kingdom doesn't belong to this world. If it did, my followers would have fought to keep me from being handed over to our leaders. No, my kingdom doesn't belong to this world.”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Mɔ sekakedikɔ mentsyi kasɔ mfo. Lǝ nya ete mɔ sekakedikɔ dítsyi kasɔ mfo ini, eni mɔ batɔnkpe ebota mɛ disi bǝlǝkǝ mɛ betsyiko Yudafɔ eto ani. Fɛɛ mɔ sekakedikɔ mentsyi kawunsiǝ mfo.”

english_verse: “So you are a king,” Pilate replied. “You are saying that I am a king,” Jesus told him. “I was born into this world to tell about the truth. And everyone who belongs to the truth knows my voice.”
translation_verse: Se ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nko, Pilato átɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Nyalɛ Oka feni?” Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Fǝ nlɛ bɔtɛyi fǝ Oka mini. Nyamfo eso bale mɛ mímbǝ kawunsiǝ nɛ, bǝ lǝ mbǝ nlǝkǝ sitinti siamǝ nte. Nya utsyuǝ saa ke lǝǝtǝkǝko sitinti siamǝǝ, aanɔ lesa nǝ maatɛyi.”

english_verse: And since I usually set a prisoner free for you at Passover, would you like for me to set free the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ mi lekpa ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ éyo Ukpǝ Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto Diyi eto didifee, ele bǝ nlǝkǝ mba bákpe lǝ diyo eto ɔni ntǝ mi. Nyaso bela biǝ nyani Yudafɔ eto Oka ǝmǝ ntǝ mi?”

english_verse: They shouted, “No, not him! We want Barabbas.” Now Barabbas was a terrorist.
translation_verse: Mfó nya mǝmblɛ léfã bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Owo lo! Inni nwǝ mfo, bomu Baraba!” Nya Baraba ǝmfo eyifo nwǝ létaka úńyǝ lǝ aba ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Pilate gave orders for Jesus to be beaten with a whip.
translation_verse: Nyaso Pilato ǝtǝ bákpa Yesu bédunko nya báblɛ wǝ fefe ku katambo.

english_verse: The soldiers made a crown out of thorn branches and put it on Jesus. Then they put a purple robe on him.
translation_verse: Nya bamamanyǝ bamǝ dífi biyu eto kalɛmɛ béyifo lekpakpa béti wǝ lǝ disi. Nya béfi kafia sia béti wǝ fe Oka seka.

english_verse: They came up to him and said, “Hey, you king of the Jews!” They also hit him with their fists.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bányi bésu wǝ ɔflɔɔ bákatɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Yuu, yuuduu! Yudafɔ eto Oka o-o!” Nya lǝ bátɛyi wǝ nkoo, bákanyi kafi wǝ kasɔ wǝ lǝ atosi.

english_verse: Once again Pilate went out. This time he said, “I will have Jesus brought out to you again. Then you can see for yourselves that I have not found him guilty.”
translation_verse: Pilato esi ɔ́bɔ úsu sitiditu nǝmǝ ɔflɔ lǝ lekple nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bebe, mookpa wǝ mboko mi lǝ bete biǝ mǝnnyǝ kabua saa ka úyifo bǝ lǝ nlo wǝ dikpǝnkpi.”

english_verse: Jesus came out, wearing the crown of thorns and the purple robe. Pilate said, “Here is the man!”
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu ábɔ úbǝ lekple mfó, ku biyu eto lekpakpa lǝ wǝ disi nya onkpe awusia kǝntsyɛ. Mfó Pilato átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bebe! Nyǝ utidi ǝmǝ ńyǝ mfo!”

english_verse: When the chief priests and the temple police saw him, they yelled, “Nail him to a cross! Nail him to a cross!” Pilate told them, “You take him and nail him to a cross! I don't find him guilty of anything.”
translation_verse: Se besumunyǝ ninǝ ku mba laase Disumuyo dínyǝ wǝǝ, báfa bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Sɔ wǝ amanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ! Sɔ wǝ amanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ!” Pilato átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Mi kosate kpa wǝ bisuko, lǝ bisu bɛsɔ wǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Mǝnnyǝ lebua saa lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ nǝ eso moolo wǝ dikpǝnkpi.”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “He claimed to be the Son of God! Our law says that he must be put to death.”
translation_verse: Yudafɔ bamǝ ǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Bokpe kɔfi ko léte nkǝ ele bǝ ukpǝ. Itsyise ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ uyifo Onanto eto Ubi.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he was terrified.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Pilato lɛnɔ nnya bátɛyi mfoo, sikpi esi símuǝ wǝ sekpe.

english_verse: He went back inside and asked Jesus, “Where are you from?” But Jesus did not answer.
translation_verse: Usinkli údufǝ lekayo nǝmǝ nya ɔ́tɔ Yesu nkǝ, “Se fetsyi?” Fɛɛ Yesu mǝntǝ wǝ mbuayɛ saa.

english_verse: “Why won't you answer my question?” Pilate asked. “Don't you know I have the power to let you go free or to nail you to a cross?”
translation_verse: Pilato átɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Nyalɛ, bɔni fani fǝ embudiko mɛ etiki? Lee enyi fǝ nkpe ǝsuǝale moofo butǝ miǝ bayani fǝ nye basɔ fǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If God had not given you the power, you couldn't do anything at all to me. But the one who handed me over to you did something even worse.”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Eni embɔkɛ ǝsuǝale saa lǝ mɔ ǝsuǝ lenni Onanto dítǝ fǝ nnya. Nya ǝmǝ eso nwǝ dífi mɛ ókpe fǝ lǝ kɔni díyifo lebua enso fǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: Then Pilate wanted to set Jesus free. But the crowd again yelled, “If you set this man free, you are no friend of the Emperor! Anyone who claims to be a king is an enemy of the Emperor.”
translation_verse: Se Pilato lɛnɔ nyamfoo, ɔ́bɛbɛ kusu nkǝ eni lǝ oyani wǝ. Fɛɛ betidi bamǝ áfa bembembe bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Lǝ ayani wǝǝ, nyalɛ ensini Romafɔ eto Okankplɛ eto ɔyɛtsyuǝ! Utsyuǝ saa wǝ dífi wǝ ǝsuǝ úyifo oka, átaka úńyǝ lǝ Romafɔ eto Okankplɛ Kaisare ǝsuǝ!”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he brought Jesus out. Then he sat down on the judge's bench at the place known as “The Stone Pavement.” In Aramaic this pavement is called “Gabbatha.”
translation_verse: Se Pilato lɛnɔ etiki nyamfoo, ókpa Yesu ɔ́bɔnko nya úsiǝ lǝ lekpokpomɛ ǝsuǝ lǝ kaka baakpo bǝ leba eto kasɔ nya baakpo bǝ Gabata lǝ Hebri eto sele ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: It was about noon on the day before Passover, and Pilate said to the crowd, “Look at your king!”
translation_verse: Diyi nǝmǝ éyifo fe kakɔmi eto lefosi ǝnuǝ eti lǝ diyi nǝ eto kǝsiǝsǝ boodi Ukpǝ Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto diyi. Nya Pilato lɛtɛyi betidi bamǝ nkǝ, “Nyǝ mi Oka!”

english_verse: Then Pilate handed Jesus over to be nailed to a cross. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Se bátɛyi wǝ nkoo, Pilato áyani Yesu útǝ bamamanyǝ nkǝ basɔ wǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Nyaso bákpa Yesu bédunko. Bamamanyǝ Ásɔ Yesu Bámanklasǝ Lǝ Uyikabie Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The soldiers first broke the legs of the other two men who were nailed there.
translation_verse: Itǝ bamamanyǝ bamǝ ǝbǝ bǝfǝsǝ utidi tutɛ ku nwǝ nse eto akpa. Mǝ básɔ báfakasǝ lǝ keyikabie ǝsuǝ lǝ Yesu ɔflɔ.

english_verse: So the chief priests went to Pilate and said, “Why did you write that he is King of the Jews? You should have written, ‘He claimed to be King of the Jews.’ ”
translation_verse: Besumunyǝ ninǝ áni etiki nyamfo nya bátɛyi Pilato bǝnkǝ, “Manwɔ ni fǝnkǝ, ‘Yudafɔ eto Oka,’ bomu wɔni fǝnkǝ, ‘Utidi ǝmfo átɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ ni Yudafɔ eto Oka.” ’ ”

english_verse: When Jesus saw his mother and his favorite disciple with her, he said to his mother, “This man is now your son.”
translation_verse: Se Yesu dínyǝ wǝ ambe ku wǝ okasebi wǝ eto asa waala tinti ńyǝ mfóo, ɔ́tɛyi wǝ ambe nkǝ, “Mbe, nnyǝ fǝ ubi!”

english_verse: and he carried his cross to a place known as “The Skull.” In Aramaic this place is called “Golgotha.”
translation_verse: Bǝtǝ wǝ kosate étsyi wǝ uyi ǝmǝ úsu údufu kaka baakpo Ditidisi Ku Kalua. Baakpo mfó lǝ Hebri eto sele bǝ Golgata.

english_verse: There Jesus was nailed to the cross, and on each side of him a man was also nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Mfó básɔ wǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Básɔ betidi inuǝ bamba tsya lǝ mǝ keyikabie bamba ǝsuǝ bakɔ ku wǝ, ɔni lǝ Yesu eto kǝmǝni nya unuǝfǝ lǝ wǝ kodiani.

english_verse: Pilate ordered the charge against Jesus to be written on a board and put above the cross. It read, “Jesus of Nazareth, King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Pilato áwɔni etiki ǝtsyuǝ útǝ béfi básɔ lǝ uyi ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ Yesu eto disi kato. Nnya báwɔni ni bǝ, “Yesu Nasaretnyǝ, Yudafɔ Eto Oka Ǝmǝ.”

english_verse: The words were written in Hebrew, Latin, and Greek. The place where Jesus was taken wasn't far from the city, and many of the people read the charge against him.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ kpǝ ákla etiki nyamfo, itsyise kaka básɔ Yesu bamanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie mantsyo ku umǝnkplɛ ǝmǝ. Báwɔni asa nyamǝ lǝ Hebri ku Roma ku Griki eto bele ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But Pilate told them, “What is written will not be changed!”
translation_verse: Mfó Pilato dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lesa nǝ míwɔnii, mbɔwɔni nlosǝ.”

english_verse: The soldiers said to each other, “Let's not rip it apart. We will gamble to see who gets it.” This happened so the Scriptures would come true, which say, “They divided up my clothes and gambled for my garments.” The soldiers then did what they had decided.
translation_verse: Bamamanyǝ bamǝ átɛyi mǝ bǝtsyuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Boembusie awu nyamfo bǝtsyuǝ. Bomu bitǝ lǝ bokpo asa bɔsɛ lǝ bobe futsyǝ luudi lǝ bufi nnya butǝ wǝ.” Nyamfo ǝbǝ itǝ nko bǝ nnya báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝǝ, ǝbǝ itǝ nko sitinti bǝ, “Bésie mɔ awu bǝtǝ bǝtsyuǝ. Nya bákpo asa basɛɛ lǝ mɔ awu ǝsuǝ.” Nya lǝ sitinti tsyaa, nko bamamanyǝ bamǝ díyifo nɛ.

english_verse: Jesus' mother stood beside his cross with her sister and Mary the wife of Clopas. Mary Magdalene was standing there too.
translation_verse: Nya mba díńyǝ lǝ Yesu eto uyikabie komǝ ɔflɔ ni Yesu eto ambe ku wǝ ambe eto ɔyimisio ku Maria wǝ ni Klopa eto usiǝ, ku Maria Magdalenyǝ.

english_verse: But when they came to Jesus, they saw he was already dead, and they did not break his legs.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se báyo Yesu ɔflɔɔ, bǝnyǝ bǝ wǝ ébukpǝ koko. Nyaso bénsifǝsǝ wǝ akpa.

english_verse: In the place where Jesus had been nailed to a cross, there was a garden with a tomb that had never been used.
translation_verse: Nya ɔkɔɛ kɛkɛ utsyuǝ akɛ lǝ kaka bálo Yesu ɔflɔ. Nya lǝ mfóo, béku kudi fɔfɔ ko kafo bembikǝtɔ kuutsyuǝ bǝnyǝ.

english_verse: Jesus knew that he had now finished his work. And in order to make the Scriptures come true, he said, “I am thirsty!”
translation_verse: Yesu áte nkǝ mɔmɔɔ, wóolosǝ lesa saa nǝ ele bǝ uyifo. Nya, bǝ lǝ lesa nǝ báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ lǝ ibǝ itǝ nko esoo, Yesu átɛyi nkǝ, “Utukɔɛ lɛ mɛ.”

english_verse: A jar of cheap wine was there. Someone then soaked a sponge with the wine and held it up to Jesus' mouth on the stem of a hyssop plant.
translation_verse: Lǝ mfóo, ɔlɔtsyi utsyuǝ ǝtsyǝ mfó wǝ béyisǝ ku nte bo dínyǝnki. Nyaso béfi sekuayɛbo bákpe lǝ nte bomǝ ǝsuǝ nya béfi bákle lǝ uyi utsyuǝ wǝ baakpo hisopo ǝsuǝ bábesǝ kato bǝtǝkǝ wǝ lǝ kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: kilograms of spices made from myrrh and aloes. This was the same Nicodemus who had visited Jesus one night.
translation_verse: Se Yesu dínǝ nte bomǝ ólosǝǝ, ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔmɔɔ, yóolo!” Nya óbokosǝ wǝ disi kasɔ, nya ɔ́ma kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: The next day would be both a Sabbath and the Passover. It was a special day for the Jewish people, and they did not want the bodies to stay on the crosses during this day. So they asked Pilate to break the men's legs and take their bodies down.
translation_verse: Diyi nǝmfo eyifo Fida, nya ni kǝsiǝsǝ eyifo Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi kplɛ itǝ Yudafɔ, nyaso bánla bǝ bekpǝnkpǝ kɛ bafaka lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ eyo Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi mfó. Nyaso bátɔ Pilato bǝ utǝ mǝ kusu lǝ besu bǝfǝsǝ mǝ akpa lǝ bǝlǝkǝ mǝ betsyiko lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: One of the soldiers stuck his spear into Jesus' side, and blood and water came out.
translation_verse: Bomu omamanyǝ ɔni éfi wǝ lefle óto wǝ lǝ lekpake. Lamfolamfo kɔtɔ ku ntu ko lɛbɔ.

english_verse: We know this is true, because it was told by someone who saw it happen. Now you can have faith too.
translation_verse: Nwǝ dínyǝ asa nyamfo, wǝ dídi nnya adansiɛ bǝ lǝ mi tsya lǝ befo bɛnɔ. Nya nnya ɔ́tɛyi eyifo sitinti. Nya uyi wuee nkǝ sitinti ini ɔ́tɛyi.

english_verse: All this happened so that the Scriptures would come true, which say, “No bone of his body will be broken”
translation_verse: Béyifo nyamfo bǝ lǝ nnya nkpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ lǝ ibǝ itǝ fe kase báwɔni bǝnkǝ, “Lɛ wǝ dikubi lɔni kulaa tsyaa, bembufǝsǝ ni.”

english_verse: and “They will see the one in whose side they stuck a spear.” Jesus Is Buried (Matthew
translation_verse: Nya báwɔni asa bamba bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ tsya nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Betidi ebotakasǝ ǝnǝmi babe nwǝ eto lekpake báse lefle bédunsǝ.” Bébikǝ Yesu.

english_verse: The tomb was nearby, and since it was the time to prepare for the Sabbath, they were in a hurry to put Jesus' body there.
translation_verse: Se diyi nǝmfo eto kǝsiǝsǝ luudi Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi nya kudi komǝ tsya lɛfi mfó esoo, béfi Yesu eto ɔkɔ ǝmǝ bésu bébikǝ mfó.

english_verse: Joseph from Arimathea was one of Jesus' disciples. He had kept it secret though, because he was afraid of the Jewish leaders. But now he asked Pilate to let him have Jesus' body. Pilate gave him permission, and Joseph took it down from the cross.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Yosef wǝ ditsyi umǝ wǝ baakpo Arimatia, ǝbǝ ɔ́tɔ Pilato nkǝ lǝ oyani Yesu eto ɔkɔ utǝ wǝ. Yosef ǝmfo eyifo Yesu eto okasebi utsyuǝ. Fɛɛ wóanla nkǝ betidi te, itsyise úkate Yudafɔ eto beninǝ sikpi eso. Pilato átɔnɔ útǝ wǝ. Nyaso Yosef ǝbǝ ófo ɔkɔ ǝmǝ údunko.

english_verse: The two men wrapped the body in a linen cloth, together with the spices, which was how the Jewish people buried their dead.
translation_verse: Betidi inuǝ bamfo éfi afa nyamfo bédiki Yesu eto ɔkɔ ǝmǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ nya béfi kafia flubia ka lefo koya bémli wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ fe kase Yudafɔ díkalɔ ɔkɔ itǝ bubikǝ.

english_verse: Thomas replied, “You are my Lord and my God!”
translation_verse: Tomasi ǝlǝkǝ kɛnyɛ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ Onamute ku mɔ Onanto!”

english_verse: On Sunday morning while it was still dark, Mary Magdalene went to the tomb and saw that the stone had been rolled away from the entrance.
translation_verse: Kɔsida eto kolensiǝnto se kale dímǝnsiǝ tɔ kaloo, Maria Magdalene ésu kudi komǝ ɔflɔ nya únyǝ nkǝ báminansǝ leba nǝ díti lǝ kudi komǝ kɛnyɛ mfó.

english_verse: So the two of them went back to the other disciples. Jesus Appears to Mary Magdalene (Mark
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kama nya bakasebi bamǝ dísinkli bésu oto.

english_verse: The disciple who got there first then went into the tomb, and when he saw it, he believed.
translation_verse: Mfó nya okasebi wǝ leka kudi komǝ ɔflɔ búdufǝ tsya dídufǝ ko kafo. Únyǝ asa nyamǝ, nya ófo ɔ́nɔ.

english_verse: Although Thomas the Twin was one of the twelve disciples, he wasn't with the others when Jesus appeared to them.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Yesu díbǝǝ, Toma, lefosi bakasebi inuǝ bamǝ eto ɔni wǝ bensi baakpo Ɔfimfinyǝǝ, mankɛ mǝ lenti.

english_verse: and saw two angels inside. They were dressed in white and were sitting where Jesus' body had been. One was at the head and the other was at the foot.
translation_verse: Mfó únyǝ Onanto eto batɔnkpe inuǝ ba nlɛ mfia flubia bensi lǝ kafo mfó. Ɔni si lǝ kaka Yesu eto disi dítsyǝ nya unuǝfǝ nsi lǝ wǝ akpa eti.

english_verse: She ran to Simon Peter and to Jesus' favorite disciple and said, “They have taken the Lord from the tomb! We don't know where they have put him.”
translation_verse: Nyaso útsyetsyi úsu Simon Petro ku okasebi wǝ Yesu laala ɔflɔ. Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bǝtsyǝ ǝbǝ bétsyi Bonamute bédunko lǝ kudi komǝ kafo. Nya bunyi kaka bétsyi wǝ bésu bǝtsyǝ!”

english_verse: Peter and the other disciple started for the tomb.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Petro ku okasebi ɔni ǝmǝ dídu bǝ beesu kudi komǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: They ran side by side, until the other disciple ran faster than Peter and got there first.
translation_verse: Mǝ inuǝ bamǝ étsyetsyi batɔ, fɛɛ okasebi ǝmǝ áfe Petro nya oka wǝ kudi komǝ ɔflɔ mfó budufǝ.

english_verse: He bent over and saw the strips of linen cloth lying inside the tomb, but he did not go in.
translation_verse: Úbǝ kasɔ útsyue ǝnǝmi óbe kudi komǝ kafo. Únyǝ mfia flubia bomǝ, fɛɛ wéndufǝ ko kafo.

english_verse: When Simon Peter got there, he went into the tomb and saw the strips of cloth.
translation_verse: Simon Petro wǝ dítǝkǝ kama ubǝǝ, áyɛ údufǝ kudi komǝ kafo nya únyǝ se mfia flubia bomǝ nkpo lǝ kudi kafo lǝ kasɔ mfó.

english_verse: He also saw the piece of cloth that had been used to cover Jesus' face. It was rolled up and in a place by itself.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ béfi kafia ka béfi bákle Yesu disi bǝtsyǝ lete, ke mánkɔ ku mfia flubia fɛfɛ bomǝ. Bǝkǝnǝ ke bǝtsyǝ lete.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene stood crying outside the tomb. She was still weeping, when she stooped down
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Maria ǝbǝ únyǝ lǝ kudi komǝ ɔflɔ kewi keku. Nya lefe nǝ úńyǝ mfó ɔnlɛ keku buwii, usi úbǝ kasɔ óbe kudi komǝ kafo.

english_verse: The angels asked Mary, “Why are you crying?” She answered, “They have taken away my Lord's body! I don't know where they have put him.”
translation_verse: Bátɔ wǝ bǝ, “Boambe, beso fanlɛ keku buwi?” Mfó nya Maria tsya dítǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Bǝtsyǝ ǝbǝ bétsyi mɔ Onamute bedunko, nya mante kaka bétsyi wǝ besuko!”

english_verse: Jesus asked her, “Why are you crying? Who are you looking for?” She thought he was the gardener and said, “Sir, if you have taken his body away, please tell me, so I can go and get him.”
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Boambe, beso fanlɛ keku buwi? Owoe fanlɛ bɔbɛbɛ?” Fɛɛ úbu nkǝ, nwǝ laabe mfó uni, nyaso ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Boanto, lǝ fǝ uni dítsyi wǝ fédunko, nyalɛ tɛyi mɛ kaka fétsyi wǝ fésuko lǝ nsu ntsyi wǝ ndunko.”

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Don't hold on to me! I have not yet gone to the Father. But tell my disciples I am going to the one who is my Father and my God, as well as your Father and your God.”
translation_verse: Mfó Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Sinkli ayɛ mɛ butidi etɔ, itsyise ménsinkli tɔ nsu Anto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ kato. Bomu du esu atɛyi mɔ bayimi fǝ nsinkli ntɔ lǝ nwǝ ni mɔ Anto ku mǝ Anto, mɔ Onanto ku mǝ Onanto ɔflɔ.”

english_verse: and showed them his hands and his side. When the disciples saw the Lord, they became very happy.
translation_verse: Se ɔ́tɛyi nyamfo ólosǝǝ, úfi wǝ ani ku lekpake óte mǝ. Ǝsuǝ ǝyuǝ bakasebi bamǝ se bǝńyǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ eso.

english_verse: The disciples were afraid of the Jewish leaders, and on the evening of that same Sunday they locked themselves in a room. Suddenly, Jesus appeared in the middle of the group. He greeted them
translation_verse: Kɔsida komǝ eto ditsyitsyo lefee, bakasebi bamǝ ákɔ besi lǝ diyo nya béti mǝ ǝsuǝ bákpe kekleke, se banlɛ Yudafɔ eto beninǝ sikpi bote eso. Nya Yesu díbǝ unyǝ lǝ mǝ ntinti, nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Diyuǝ lǝ disiǝko mi.”

english_verse: After Jesus had greeted them again, he said, “I am sending you, just as the Father has sent me.”
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, Yesu esi ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Diyuǝ lǝ disiǝko mi. Fe kase Anto ǝmǝ létsyese mɛɛ, nko ke mintsya nlɛ mi botsyese nɛ.”

english_verse: Then he breathed on them and said, “Receive the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Se ɔ́tɛyi nyamfo ólosǝǝ, ɔ́wula ókpo lǝ mǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Befo Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: If you forgive anyone's sins, they will be forgiven. But if you don't forgive their sins, they will not be forgiven.” Jesus and Thomas
translation_verse: Lǝ bifi betidi eto abua bɛtsyɛ mǝǝ, Onanto éfi nnya ɔ́tsyɛ mǝ, fɛɛ mba eto abua bɛni bufi katsyɛɛ, Onanto tsya mémfi nnya ɔtsyɛ mǝ.” Yesu Ǝlǝkǝ Ǝsuǝ Ote Toma.

english_verse: So they told him, “We have seen the Lord!” But Thomas said, “First, I must see the nail scars in his hands and touch them with my finger. I must put my hand where the spear went into his side. I won't believe unless I do this!”
translation_verse: Nyaso se úbǝǝ, bakasebi fɛfɛ bamǝ átɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Búnyǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ.” Mfó nya Toma lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ mǝnnyǝ belakabi eto afabe lǝ wǝ ani bǝ lǝ mfi mɔ lɛnimi inkpe lǝ nnya kafo nya mimfi mɔ kɔni minkpe lǝ wǝ lekpakee, mǝmbofo nnɔ kulefe.”

english_verse: A week later the disciples were together again. This time, Thomas was with them. Jesus came in while the doors were still locked and stood in the middle of the group. He greeted his disciples
translation_verse: Kɔsida kɔni eto kamaa, bakasebi bamǝ esi bákɔ bési lǝ diyo kafo, nya Toma ákɛ mǝ lenti. Besi béti biku le diyo nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ bakɛ. Tsya fɛɛ, Yesu ǝbǝ úńyǝ lǝ mǝ ntinti nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Diyuǝ lǝ disiǝko mi.”

english_verse: and said to Thomas, “Put your finger here and look at my hands! Put your hand into my side. Stop doubting and have faith!”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi Toma nkǝ, “Bǝ lǝ ǝbǝ efi fǝ lɛnimi akpe mfo, lǝ abe mɔ ani. Lǝ efi fǝ kɔni akpe lǝ mɔ lekpake, lǝ ayɛ fǝ mamfokanɔ, nya lǝ afo anɔ!”

english_verse: Jesus said, “Thomas, do you have faith because you have seen me? The people who have faith in me without seeing me are the ones who are really blessed!” Why John Wrote His Book
translation_verse: Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Se fǝnyǝ mɛ esoo, áfo ánɔ. Diyuǝ itǝ mba dímǝnyǝ mɛ, fɛɛ báfo bánɔ!”

english_verse: Jesus worked many other miracles for his disciples, and not all of them are written in this book.
translation_verse: Yesu esi úyifo ayanisa kpǝ óte lǝ wǝ bakasebi kpǝ eto ǝnǝmi nnya báwɔni bákpe lǝ kukue komfo.

english_verse: But these are written so that you will put your faith in Jesus as the Messiah and the Son of God. If you have faith in him, you will have true life.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ báwɔni nyamfo bǝtsyǝ bǝ lǝ befo bɛnɔ biǝ Yesu ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ku Onanto eto Ubi kosate ǝmǝ. Nya ɛyɛ lǝ boofo kanɔ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝǝ, biunyǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: Jesus later appeared to his disciples along the shore of Lake Tiberias.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu esi úlǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ óte wǝ bakasebi lǝ Tiberia eto Ditumbukplɛ ɔflɔ. Nya nyǝ kase íbǝ.

english_verse: Simon Peter, Thomas the Twin, Nathanael from Cana in Galilee, and the brothers James and John, were there, together with two other disciples.
translation_verse: Diyi lɔnii, Yesu eto bakasebi bǝtsyuǝ átsya besi. Mǝ ni Simon Petro ku Tomasi nwǝ tsya bensi baakpo Ɔfimfinyǝ ku Nataniel nwǝ ditsyi Kana lǝ Galilea eto kasɔ ku Sebedeo eto bebi ku Yesu eto bakasebi bamba.

english_verse: Simon Peter said, “I'm going fishing!” The others said, “We will go with you.” They went out in their boat. But they didn't catch a thing that night.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Simon Petro lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Meesu nta asabu lǝ mbǝ.” Mfó nya mǝ tsya lɛtɛyi wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Bontsya ebutǝkǝko fǝ busu.” Nyaso bésu bédufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝsuǝ nya bédu bésu. Fɛɛ lǝ ketsye ka kenkee, bǝnlǝkǝ akpɛ saa.

english_verse: Early the next morning Jesus stood on the shore, but the disciples did not realize who he was.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ kofe lela koǝ koatoo, Yesu ǝbǝ úńyǝ lǝ ditimbu nǝmǝ kɛnyɛ. Fɛɛ bakasebi bamǝ mǝnnyǝ wǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo.

english_verse: Jesus shouted, “Friends, have you caught anything?” “No!” they answered.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ, “Bakosobi, bíǝnlǝkǝ akpɛ saa lee?” Bǝtǝ mbuayɛ bǝnkǝ, “Owo lo!”

english_verse: So he told them, “Let your net down on the right side of your boat, and you will catch some fish.” They did, and the net was so full of fish that they could not drag it up into the boat.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Beta mi asabu nyamǝ bekpo lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ eto kodiani, lǝ binyǝ lesaatsyuǝ bilǝkǝ.” Nyaso béyifo nko. Binǝ bia bǝlǝkǝ efui bǝǝ, bamfo asabu nyamǝ bunǝ kǝlǝkǝ.

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple told Peter, “It's the Lord!” When Simon heard it was the Lord, he put on the clothes he had taken off while he was working. Then he jumped into the water.
translation_verse: Okasebi wǝ eto asa Yesu laala átɛyi Petro nkǝ, “Bonamute uni!” Se Simon Petro lɛnɔ nkǝ Bonamute unii, úfi wǝ awukɛntsyɛ ótsyasǝ lǝ nkɛ, itsyese úlǝkǝ nnya utsyǝ, nya ósa údufǝ lǝ ntu bomǝ ǝsuǝ tuu.

english_verse: When the disciples got out of the boat, they saw some bread and a charcoal fire with fish on it.
translation_verse: Se bábɔ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafo bǝńyǝ kasɔɔ, bǝnyǝ se bátsyaka aka eto ute wǝ ǝsuǝ bákpe akpɛ ǝtsyuǝ. Abolo utsyuǝ tsya ǝtsyǝ mfó.

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “Bring some of the fish you just caught.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bifi akpɛ ǝtsyuǝ nnya bílǝkǝ mɔmɔ beboko.”

english_verse: Jesus said, “Come and eat!” But none of the disciples dared ask who he was. They knew he was the Lord.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bibǝ bidi lesa.” Fɛɛ bakasebi bamǝ eto kuutsyuǝ mámfo ɔkɔɛ bokpe katɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Owoe feni?” Itsyise báte bǝ Bonamute uni.

english_verse: Jesus took the bread in his hands and gave some of it to his disciples. He did the same with the fish.
translation_verse: Nyaso Yesu ésu mǝ ɔflɔ nya úfi abolo ǝmǝ útǝ mǝ. Nko ke úfi akpɛ nyamǝ tsya útǝ mǝ nɛ.

english_verse: This was the third time Jesus appeared to his disciples after he was raised from death. Jesus and Peter
translation_verse: Nyamfo ni ditsyǝfǝ se Yesu dílǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ óte wǝ bakasebi se bátakasǝ wǝ betsyiko ɔkɔmǝ nɛ.

english_verse: When Jesus and his disciples had finished eating, he asked, “Simon son of John, do you love me more than the others do?” Simon Peter answered, “Yes, Lord, you know I do!” “Then feed my lambs,” Jesus said.
translation_verse: Se bédi lesa bálosǝ, Yesu átɔ Simon Petro nkǝ, “Simon, Yohanes eto ubi, aala mɛ aso kase bafɛfɛ bamfo laala mɛ?” Útǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Ee, Bonamute! Fǝ kosate yi fǝnkǝ maala fǝ.” Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lɛ mɔ basamubi ola.”

english_verse: Jesus asked a second time, “Simon son of John, do you love me?” Peter answered, “Yes, Lord, you know I love you!” “Then take care of my sheep,” Jesus told him.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu esi ɔ́tɔ wǝ dinuǝfǝ nkǝ, “Simon, Yohanes eto ubi, aala mɛ?” Petro esi útǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Ee, Bonamute! Fǝ kosate yi fǝnkǝ maala fǝ.” Mfó Yesu disi ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lɛ mɔ basamu ola!”

english_verse: Jesus asked a third time, “Simon son of John, do you love me?” Peter was hurt because Jesus had asked him three times if he loved him. So he told Jesus, “Lord, you know everything. You know I love you.” Jesus replied, “Feed my sheep.
translation_verse: Yesu esi ɔ́tɔ wǝ ditsyǝfǝ nkǝ, “Simon, Yohanes eto ubi, aala mɛ?” Bɔtɔ bomfo ǝlǝ Petro, itsyise ditsyǝfǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ ni nǝmfo nɛ se Yesu lɛtɔ wǝ nkǝ, “Aala mɛ?” Nyaso ɔ́tɛyi Yesu nkǝ, “Bonamute, eyi lesa saa. Nya fǝ kosate nyi fǝnkǝ maala fǝ!” Mfó nya Yesu lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Lɛ mɔ basamu ola.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that when you were a young man, you dressed yourself and went wherever you wanted to go. But when you are old, you will hold out your hands. Then others will wrap your belt around you and lead you where you don't want to go.”
translation_verse: Sitinti minlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi minkǝ, lefe nǝ fedi okosobii, ákafo kafia buti fǝ kosate kesu kaka ke fála. Fɛɛ lefe nǝ fákabee, ebobesɛ fǝ ani kato nya utidi bamba luubǝ okle fǝ kafia fɛ wookpa fǝ usuko kaka fanla fǝ eesu.”

english_verse: Jesus said this to tell how Peter would die and bring honor to God. Then he said to Peter, “Follow me!” Jesus and His Favorite Disciple
translation_verse: Yesu átɛyi nyamfo nko lǝ ufi ulǝkǝ ukpǝ wǝ eto okle Petro lǝǝbǝ bukpǝ wǝ luulǝkǝ Onanto eto diyǝnde ote. Nyamfo eto kamaa, Yesu átɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Tǝkǝko mɛ.”

english_verse: Peter turned and saw Jesus' favorite disciple following them. He was the same one who had sat next to Jesus at the meal and had asked, “Lord, who is going to betray you?”
translation_verse: Se Petro lɛtsyi ɔwuninsǝǝ, únyǝ se okasebi wǝ Yesu laala ńyǝ wǝ kama. Wǝ ni okasebi wǝ dísiǝ ɔkpiɔ Yesu, lǝ lefe nǝ békedi ditsyitsyosa fɛfɛ fɛ ɔ́tɔ Yesu nkǝ, “Bonamute, owoe luudu fǝ utǝ?”

english_verse: When Peter saw this disciple, he asked Jesus, “Lord, what about him?”
translation_verse: Nyaso se Petro dínyǝ wǝǝ, ɔ́tɔ Yesu nkǝ, “Bonamute, ntsyǝ ini lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “What is it to you, if I want him to live until I return? You must follow me.”
translation_verse: Yesu ǝtǝ wǝ mbuayɛ nkǝ, “Lǝ nla miǝ usiǝ nkpǝ isu ese lefe nǝ muusinkli mbǝ bioo, be eka fǝ ela? Fǝǝ, tǝkǝko mɛ!”

english_verse: So the rumor spread among the other disciples that this disciple would not die. But Jesus did not say he would not die. He simply said, “What is it to you, if I want him to live until I return?”
translation_verse: Etiki nyamfo ába ékpo lǝ mba ntǝkǝko Yesu kama nti bǝ okasebi ǝmfo ǝmbǝ bukpǝ. Fɛɛ Yesu mántɛyi wǝ nkǝ wǝǝmbukpǝ. Nnya ɔtɛyi ni nkǝ, “Lǝ nla miǝ usiǝ nkpǝ isu ese lefe nǝ muubǝǝ, be eka fǝ ela?”

english_verse: This disciple is the one who told all of this. He wrote it, and we know he is telling the truth.
translation_verse: Wǝ ni okasebi wǝ nlɛ adansiɛ budi lǝ asa nyamfo ǝsuǝ, nya wǝ tsya ni nwǝ lɛwɔni nnya utsyǝ nɛ. Nya buyi boǝ nnya ǝsuǝ údi adansiɛɛ, eyifo sitinti.

english_verse: Jesus did many other things. If they were all written in books, I don't suppose there would be room enough in the whole world for all the books.
translation_verse: Yesu esi úyifo asa bamba kpǝ tsya. Lǝ nnya ete báwɔni nyamblɛ bǝtsyǝ lɔni lɔni lɔnii, mfo nnɔ miǝ eni bembunyǝ ekue nyamǝ eto kǝtsyǝkɔ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo kenke kulaa tsya.

english_verse: until he was taken up to heaven. But before he was taken up, he gave orders to the apostles he had chosen with the help of the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Mɔyimisani Tiofilo, lǝ mɔ kukue tutɛ ko míwɔnii, ntɛyi asa nnya kenke Yesu díyifo idu lǝ lefe nǝ útsyǝ wǝ keyifo ku asatete kasɔ isu ese lefe nǝ Anto Onanto díbǝ ókpa wǝ úsuko kato. Fɛ wookpa wǝ usuko katoo, Yesu áyɛ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ óte asa wǝ batɔnkpe ba úlǝkǝ asa.

english_verse: While he was still with them, he said: Don't leave Jerusalem yet. Wait here for the Father to give you the Holy Spirit, just as I told you he has promised to do.
translation_verse: Se bǝbǝ bátsya bensii, ókpe mǝ kɔfi nkǝ, “Biendu lǝ Yerusalem, bomu bisiǝ bikabe kusu itǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝ míntɛyi mi mintɔnsǝ miǝ mɔ Anto lɛtɛyi utsyǝ nkǝ wootsyese mi.

english_verse: John baptized with water, but in a few days you will be baptized with the Holy Spirit. Jesus Is Taken to Heaven
translation_verse: Yohanes alɛɛ, ntu te úfi úyifo betidi ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa nǝmǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ eyi asiani eto kamaa, Onanto ebufi Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ uflǝsǝ mi.” Anto Onanto Ákpa Yesu Úsuko Kato.

english_verse: While the apostles were still with Jesus, they asked him, “Lord, are you now going to give Israel its own king again?”
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ batɔnkpe bamǝ ku Yesu létsya bioo, bátɔ wǝ bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute, dimamfe foola fǝ atakasǝ Israel eto Sekadidi siamǝ ǝńyǝnsǝ bio, mɔmɔ lee?”

english_verse: Jesus said to them, “You don't need to know the time of those events that only the Father controls.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu lɛtɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Yanle bǝ bete lefe nye eyi nnya mɔ Anto lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝǝ, lɛtɛyi utsyǝ nkǝ lesatsyuǝ ebubǝ itǝ.

english_verse: But the Holy Spirit will come upon you and give you power. Then you will tell everyone about me in Jerusalem, in all Judea, in Samaria, and everywhere in the world.”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lefe nǝmǝ ayo bǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ bǝ mi ɔflɔɔ, wuubǝ udufǝ mimblɛ kenke lǝ ǝsuǝ nya wuufi wǝ ǝsuǝale okpe mi nya biudi mɔ badansiɛ lǝ Yerusalem ku Yudea kenke ku Samaria idu isu ese kawunsiǝ eto nsekɔ ke.”

english_verse: After Jesus had said this and while they were watching, he was taken up into a cloud. They could not see him,
translation_verse: Se ɔ́tɛyi nyamfo ólosǝǝ, Onanto étsyi wǝ úsuko kato nya bǝńyǝ banlɛ wǝ bobe isu ese lefe nǝ údufǝ lǝ difule ǝsuǝ ónya lǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: but as he went up, they kept looking up into the sky. Suddenly two men dressed in white clothes were standing there beside them.
translation_verse: Nya se bǝńyǝ banlɛ kato bobe tũũ lǝ kase údu ɔ́ntɔɔ, lamfolamfo basani inuǝ bǝtsyuǝ ba nkpe awu flubia ǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ báte mǝ,

english_verse: They said, “Why are you men from Galilee standing here and looking up into the sky? Jesus has been taken to heaven. But he will come back in the same way you have seen him go.” Someone To Take the Place of Judas
translation_verse: nya bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Galilea eto basani, beso bińyǝ bɛnlɛ kato bobe mǝ? Yesu ǝmfo, wǝ bínyǝ Onanto dítsyi úsuko katoo, ebusinkli ubǝ fe kase bínyǝ ɔnlɛ budu kesu kato mmǝ.” Matias Ǝbǝ Ófo Úsiǝ Lǝ Yuda Eto Kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: The Mount of Olives was about a kilometer from Jerusalem. The apostles who had gone there were Peter, John, James, Andrew, Philip, Thomas, Bartholomew, Matthew, James the son of Alphaeus, Simon, known as the Eager One, and Judas the son of James. After the apostles returned to the city, they went upstairs to the room where they had been staying.
translation_verse: Se bédufǝ umǝǝ, bésinkli bésu kaka bakɛ lǝ abanslo kato. Mǝ mba lɛkɛ mfó ni Petro, Yohanes, Yakobo, Andreas, Filipo, Tomas, Bartolomeo, Mateo, Yakobo wǝ ni Alfeo eto ubisaibi, Simon wǝǝ léta mǝ kasɔ eto disi ku Yuda wǝ ni Yakobo eto ubisaibi.

english_verse: The apostles often met together and prayed with a single purpose in mind. The women and Mary the mother of Jesus would meet with them, and so would his brothers.
translation_verse: Betidi bamfo ákatsya mlǝmlǝmlǝ ku besio bǝtsyuǝ ku Maria, Yesu eto ambe ku Yesu eto bayimisani fe ditsyukpa ákato ola ku nsusu bɔni.

english_verse: He said: My friends, long ago by the power of the Holy Spirit, David said something about Judas, and what he said has now happened. Judas was one of us and had worked with us, but he brought the mob to arrest Jesus.
translation_verse: Yuda éyifo mba lɛkɛ lǝ bo ditsyukpa nǝmfo eto ɔni, itsyise Yesu ǝlǝkǝ wǝ nkǝ wuntsya nyǝ kedikɔ lǝ bo keyifo kamfo kǝmiǝ.”

english_verse: Then Judas bought some land with the money he was given for doing that evil thing. He fell headfirst into the field. His body burst open, and all his insides came out.
translation_verse: Nyaa, béfi kabua ka úyifo eto atabi bésu báya kasɔ ka ǝsuǝ úsu úkpǝ. Kaka ófankli úbǝ ɔ́sɔ kasɔɔ, óba úsensǝ nya wǝ befonkǝ kenke lɛbɔ békpo lǝ kasɔ mfó.

english_verse: When the people of Jerusalem found out about this, they called the place Akeldama, which in the local language means “Field of Blood.”
translation_verse: Wǝ ukpǝ ǝmfo eto etiki ába ékpo lǝ Yerusalem itǝ betidi bata ánɔ nnya. Nyaso béfi kaka úkpǝ mfó bǝtǝkǝ bǝ Akeldama lǝ mǝ sele ǝsuǝ eto kasɔ ni bǝ Kɔtɔ eto Kasɔ.

english_verse: In the book of Psalms it says, “Leave his house empty, and don't let anyone live there.” It also says, “Let someone else have his job.”
translation_verse: Petro ésukosǝ nkǝ, “Nyaso báwɔni bákpe lǝ David eto Ǝsǝ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, ‘Beyani wǝ diyo bitsyǝ nya kutsyuǝ saa mǝnsiǝ lǝ ni!’ Besi báwɔni bǝ, ‘Bitǝ lǝ utidi bamba lǝ usiǝ lǝ wǝ keyifo eto kɛnyɛ.’

english_verse: So we need someone else to help us tell others that Jesus has been raised from death. He must also be one of the men who was with us from the very beginning. He must have been with us from the time the Lord Jesus was baptized by John until the day he was taken to heaven.
translation_verse: Nyaso ele bǝ utsyuǝ dufǝ bo nti fe futsyǝ luudi adansiɛ itǝ Bonamute Yesu itsyi lǝ wǝ botaka ketsyi ɔkɔmǝ kǝbǝ nkpǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya ele bǝ uyifo futsyǝ lɛkɛ lǝbo nti idu lǝ lefe nǝ kenke bo ku Yesu díkatsyilama, idu lefe nǝ Yohanes lébe letsya itsyi lǝ ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa ǝsuǝ ibǝ ese lefe nǝ Onanto léfo Yesu úsuko kato.”

english_verse: Two men were suggested: One of them was Joseph Barsabbas, known as Justus, and the other was Matthias.
translation_verse: Nyaso bǝlǝkǝ betidi inuǝ ba ni Matias ku Yosef wǝ baakpo Barsaba nya bensi baakpo wǝ tsya bǝ Yusto.

english_verse: They drew names, and Matthias was chosen to join the group of the eleven apostles.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ bákpo aba básɛ lǝ bǝlǝkǝ betidi inuǝ bamfo eto ɔnii, Matias ni nwǝ bǝlǝkǝ bákpe lǝ betidi lefosi ɔnwɛ bamǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: On the day of Pentecost all the Lord's followers were together in one place.
translation_verse: Nyaso se Pentekoste eto Diyi léyoo, bafokanɔfɔ kenke átsya lǝ kalebe kani kplo.

english_verse: Suddenly there was a noise from heaven like the sound of a mighty wind! It filled the house where they were meeting.
translation_verse: Lamfolamfoo, bánɔ kɔsɔ fe ufiebi kekleke eto bɔsɔ ditsyi kato. Nya ufiebi ǝmǝ díyi diyo nǝ kafo bakɛ kenke.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit took control of everyone, and they began speaking whatever languages the Spirit let them speak.
translation_verse: Nya Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ dídufǝ lǝ mǝmblɛ ǝsuǝ, nya bétsyiko Onanto bɔtɛsǝ lǝ bele ate ate ǝsuǝ fe kase Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ dítǝ mǝ nkǝ bedi.

english_verse: Many religious Jews from every country in the world were living in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lefe nǝmfó tututuu, Yudafɔ ba lǝǝtǝ Onanto dibu ba dítsyi kawunsiǝ eto ese ese ǝbǝ bakɛ lǝ Yerusalem.

english_verse: And when they heard this noise, a crowd gathered. But they were surprised, because they were hearing everything in their own languages.
translation_verse: Nyaso lefe nǝ bánɔ kudu kplɛ komfóo, betidi kpǝ ésu bátsya mfó. Iyifo mǝ yanii ku sikpi se mǝ utsyuǝ saa lɛnɔ banlɛ etiki budi lǝ wǝ sele ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They were excited and amazed, and said: Don't all these who are speaking come from Galilee?
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, íyifo mǝ yanii ku sikpi nya bétsyiko mǝ ǝsuǝ bɔtɔ bǝnkǝ, “Nya betidi ba kenke nlɛ etiki budi mfoo, inni Galileafɔ beni fɛ?

english_verse: Then why do we hear them speaking our very own languages?
translation_verse: Nya ntsyǝ ibǝ fɛ bo utsyuǝ saa nlɛ etiki bɔnɔ lǝ bo bele ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: Crete, and Arabia. Some of us were born Jews, and others of us have chosen to be Jews. Yet we all hear them using our own languages to tell the wonderful things God has done.
translation_verse: ku Kretafɔ ku Arabiafɔ. Bomblɛ lɛ bɔnɔ se banlɛ Onanto eto asa kplɛ nnya ɔnlɛ buyifo bulǝkǝ kate lǝ bo bele ǝsuǝ!”

english_verse: Everyone was excited and confused. Some of them even kept asking each other, “What does all this mean?”
translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ saa wǝ díńyǝ mfó mánnɔ eyifosa nyamǝ kasɔ. Íyifo mǝ yanii, nya bákatɔ mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Nnya díbǝ mfo eto kasɔ nkpǝ?”

english_verse: Others made fun of the Lord's followers and said, “They are drunk.” Peter Speaks to the Crowd
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mba díńyǝ mfó eto bǝtsyuǝ ǝkǝmǝ mǝ ákatɛyi bǝ, “Ntǝ ete békpǝ, inni kulesa ini kon!” Petro Édi Yudafɔ Bamǝ Etiki.

english_verse: Peter stood with the eleven apostles and spoke in a loud and clear voice to the crowd: Friends and everyone else living in Jerusalem, listen carefully to what I have to say!
translation_verse: Mfó nya Petro létaka úńyǝ ku lefosi ɔnwɛ fɛfɛ bamǝ nya óbesǝ ɔkɔɛ kato ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Mi Yudafɔ ku mimba nkpe lǝ Yerusalem, nla miǝ bitsyue ato lǝ nkpasǝ mi lǝ bɛnɔ lesa nǝ díbǝ mfo.

english_verse: You are wrong to think that these people are drunk. After all, it is only nine o'clock in the morning.
translation_verse: Inni nte betidi bamfo díkpǝ fe kase bǝtsyuǝ díbu seka, itsyise olesiǝ eto abombo ɔwɔnɔmbǝ ete ni nyamfo nɛ.

english_verse: But this is what God told the prophet Joel to say,
translation_verse: Bomu lesa nǝ nlɛ bubǝ mfoo, eyifo lesa nǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yoel lɛtɛyi utsyǝ kokooko nkǝ,

english_verse: “When the last days come, I will give my Spirit to everyone. Your sons and daughters will prophesy. Your young men will see visions, and your old men will have dreams.
translation_verse: ‘Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ eyi fɛfɛ nnya luubǝ ǝsuǝǝ, muufi mɔ Lɛwɔnɔ nkpo lǝ utsyuǝ saa ǝsuǝ, nya mi bebisaibi ku bebisiobi loobe mɔ ditiki letsya, nya mi bakosobi luunyǝ Onanto eto asakulakula, nya mi beninǝ tsya luusiǝ ala.

english_verse: In those days I will give my Spirit to my servants, both men and women, and they will prophesy.
translation_verse: Ee, sitinti lǝ lefe nǝmfoo, muutǝ mɔ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ yifǝ disiǝ lǝ mɔ beyifoyifo, besio ku basani kenke ǝsuǝ. Nya boolǝkǝ mɔ ditiki kɛnyɛ bate.

english_verse: “I will work miracles in the sky above and wonders on the earth below. There will be blood and fire and clouds of smoke.
translation_verse: Nya muutǝ asa kplɛ kplɛ ku anyinsa bǝ lǝ difule ku kasɔ kenke utsyuǝ saa nyǝ. Biunyǝ kɔtɔ ku ute ku kuyuǝ kplɛ bɔ.

english_verse: The sun will turn dark, and the moon will be as red as blood before the great and wonderful day of the Lord appears.
translation_verse: Kofe ebona tũũ, nya kofande eto ǝnǝmi lɔɔsɛ hǝǝ fe kɔtɔ, fɛ Bonamute eto diyǝnde eto diyi kplɛ nǝmǝ looyo.

english_verse: Then the Lord will save everyone who asks for his help.”
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfoo, boofo utsyuǝ saa ke lookpadi Bonamute eto diye, nya wɔɔtɔ bɔwunsǝkoo, wɔɔkɛ bofo.” ’ ”

english_verse: Now, listen to what I have to say about Jesus from Nazareth. God proved he sent Jesus to you by having him work miracles, wonders, and signs. All of you know this.
translation_verse: Petro esi údi etiki ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Israelfɔ bɛnɔ etiki nyamfo. Yesu Nasaretnyǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ. Nya óte nyamfo lefe nǝ ɔ́yɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ úlǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale óte, nya úyifo asa kplɛ ku ayanisa kpǝ óte fe kase mi kosate nyi. Itsyisee, íbǝ lǝ mi nti mfo.

english_verse: God had already planned and decided that Jesus would be handed over to you. So you took him and had evil men put him to death on a cross.
translation_verse: Nya Onanto lɛtɔnɔ faa lǝ wǝ ketsyue ǝsuǝ óyani wǝ útǝ mi nya bítǝ babuayifo lélo wǝ lǝ lefe nǝ bɛsɔ wǝ bémanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But God set him free from death and raised him to life. Death could not hold him in its power.
translation_verse: Tsyaa, Onanto esi ótakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ nya ɔ́bɔ útsyi lǝ ukpǝ eto ani, itsyise ukpǝ embofo wǝ buti kakpe.

english_verse: What David said are really the words of Jesus, “I always see the Lord near me, and I will not be afraid with him at my right side.
translation_verse: Nyamfo Oka David lɛtɛyi itsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ nkǝ, ‘Nnyǝ se Bonamute ńyǝ lǝ mɔ kodiani nya unsiko mɛ lefe saa esoo, mante kulesa sikpi.

english_verse: Because of this, my heart will be glad, my words will be joyful, and I will live in hope.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, disuǝyuǝ eyi mɛ ǝsuǝ, nyaso muufi atɛsǝ ntǝ wǝ lefe saa! Ite bǝ utidi wǝ luukpǝ mini tsyaa, muusiǝ nkpǝ nkabe wǝ kusu.

english_verse: The Lord won't leave me in the grave. I am his holy one, and he won't let my body decay.
translation_verse: Itsyise ǝmbutǝ kusu ukpǝ tǝkǝ mɛ kato. Nya fǝmbutǝ tsya bǝ fǝ ubi kɛnkɛ eto sinǝ bu.

english_verse: He has shown me the path to life, and he makes me glad by being near me.”
translation_verse: Fǝ dítǝ mínte nkpǝ eto kusu itǝ lǝ nńyǝ lǝ fǝ ǝnǝmi koo, muunyǝ disuǝyuǝ lefe saa.’

english_verse: My friends, it is right for me to speak to you about our ancestor David. He died and was buried, and his tomb is still here.
translation_verse: “Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, bo ona Oka David wǝ lefo diye ǝkpǝ nya bébikǝ wǝ nya wǝ kudi nkpe lǝ bo nti mfo eyo mmi.

english_verse: But David was a prophet, and he knew that God had made a promise he would not break. He had told David someone from his own family would someday be king.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ uyifo Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi. Nyaso óte lesa nǝ Onanto lɛtɛyi utsyǝ nkǝ wootsyese David eto kafo eto ubi lǝ ubǝ udi seka lǝ David eto kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: David knew this would happen, and so he told us Christ would be raised to life. He said God would not leave him in the grave or let his body decay.
translation_verse: Se David léte nyamfo ɔtɔnsǝ esoo, ɔ́tɛyi utsyǝ nkǝ Kristo ebotaka utsyi ɔkɔmǝ. Ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ Onanto mányani wǝ utsyǝ lǝ ɔkɔmǝ, nya wǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ tsya mémbu lǝ wǝ kudi kafo mfó.

english_verse: All of us can tell you that God has raised Jesus to life!
translation_verse: Wǝ ni Yesu ǝmǝ Onanto létakasǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ, nya ini etiki eto ɔnukualɛɛ, bomblɛ ni wǝ badansiɛ.

english_verse: Jesus was taken up to sit at the right side of God, and he was given the Holy Spirit, just as the Father had promised. Jesus is also the one who has given the Spirit to us, and this is what you are now seeing and hearing.
translation_verse: Wǝ Anto Onanto ábesǝ wǝ kato úsu unsi lǝ wǝ kodiani, nya ófo Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ utsyiko lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ fe kase ɔ́tɛyi utsyǝ. Lesa nǝ bɛnlɛ bunyǝ, kanɔ mfoo, eyifo wǝ ǝtǝsa nnya úfi útǝ bo.

english_verse: Everyone in Israel should then know for certain that God has made Jesus both Lord and Christ, even though you put him to death on a cross.
translation_verse: Nyaso nla miǝ mi Israelfɔ kenke te biǝnkǝ wǝ Anto Onanto ni futsyǝ dítǝ Yesu wǝ básɔ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ bélo Onanto dítǝ ófiani Bonamute ku Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Bǝtsyǝ.”

english_verse: When the people heard this, they were very upset. They asked Peter and the other apostles, “Friends, what should we do?”
translation_verse: Nya se betidi bamfo lɛnɔ Petro eto etiki nyamfoo, ílǝ mǝ lǝ akɔɛsi. Nyaso bátɔ Petro ku batɔnkpe fɛfɛ bǝnkǝ, “Bayimi, be ele bǝ buyifo?”

english_verse: Peter said to them, “Turn to God and be baptized, every one of you, in the name of Jesus Christ for the forgiveness of your sins, and you will receive the gift of the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Nyaso Petro átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Ele bǝ mi utsyuǝ saa sinkli ɔyɛ abua buyifo, lǝ ofloma, lǝ ofo ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa nǝmǝ lǝ Yesu Kristo eto diye ǝsuǝ, lǝ Onanto lǝ ufi wǝ abua ɔtsyɛ wǝ, lǝ ofo Onanto eto ǝtǝsa nnya ni Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: This promise is for you and your children. It is for everyone our Lord God will choose, no matter where they live.”
translation_verse: Nkomǝ eto kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ te itǝ mi ku mi bebi ku mba kenke ditsyi katsyontsyokɔ ku betidi ba kenke Bonamute bo Anto lookpadi bafiani wǝ bale.”

english_verse: Peter told them many other things as well. Then he said, “I beg you to save yourselves from what will happen to all these evil people.”
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, Petro édi adansiɛ údi mǝ etiki kpǝ nya ɔ́lɛ mǝ kɔlɛ, ɔ́lɛ mǝ lekpakpa nkǝ, “Bilǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ kotonǝnǝ ko nlɛ bubǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ bua kamfo eto betidi ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: They spent their time learning from the apostles, and they were like family to each other. They also broke bread and prayed together. Life among the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Béfi mǝ lefe bǝtǝ batɔnkpe bamǝ nya báte mǝ asa, nya bákato ola kǝtǝ Onanto, nya békedi lesa kakɔ tsya, nya bǝsiǝ ku bǝtsyuǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ. Bafokanɔfɔ Ǝsiǝ Nkpǝ Lǝ Lɔniyifoyifo Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Everyone was amazed by the many miracles and wonders that the apostles worked.
translation_verse: Se batɔnkpe bamǝ díyifo ayanisa kpǝ esoo, íyifo betidi bamǝ yanii.

english_verse: All the Lord's followers often met together, and they shared everything they had.
translation_verse: Nyaso bafokanɔfɔ lǝ mfo ákatsya lefe saa nya békesie mǝ asa kenke kǝtǝ bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: They would sell their property and possessions and give the money to whoever was in need.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ báte mǝ bikǝǝ, békefi atabi nnya bǝnyǝ késuko békesie, utsyuǝ saa lǝ kase éhiã wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Day after day they met together in the temple. They broke bread together in different homes and shared their food happily and freely,
translation_verse: Nya békesu kátsya lǝ Anto Onanto eto Disumuyo diyi saa, nya bákatsya lǝ etsyukpa etsyukpa kédi asa lǝ mǝ ayo ku disuǝyuǝ ku utu faa.

english_verse: while praising God. Everyone liked them, and each day the Lord added to their group others who were being saved.
translation_verse: Nya bákatɛsǝ Onanto. Itǝ betidi ba tã ékebu mǝ. Nya diyi saa, Bonamute kǝtǝ betidi fɔfɔ ba bofo lǝ nkpǝ díkǝbǝ kákɔ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The time of prayer was about three o'clock in the afternoon, and Peter and John were going into the temple.
translation_verse: Diyi lɔnii, Petro ku Yohanes ésu Onanto eto Disumuyo lǝ lefe nǝ Yudafɔ laato ola kǝtǝ Onanto. Iyifo fe kakɔmi eto abombo ǝtsyǝ lefe.

english_verse: A man who had been born lame was being carried to the temple door. Each day he was placed beside this door, known as the Beautiful Gate. He sat there and begged from the people who were going in.
translation_verse: Se báyo Disumuyo nǝmǝ eto kesie ka baakpo Kesie Ka Laanɔ Bobee. Mfó bǝnyǝ osani utsyuǝ wǝ léba onkpo lǝ kasɔ taa wǝ lelefe ke. Wǝ betidi éketsyi wǝ kǝbǝkǝtsyǝ mfo diyi saa bǝ lǝ úkatɔ asa lǝ betidi ba laayɛ kedufǝ Disumuyo nǝmǝ.

english_verse: The man saw Peter and John entering the temple, and he asked them for money.
translation_verse: Se únyǝ Petro ku Yohanes nlɛ bofe kédufǝ diyo nǝmǝǝ, ɔ́tɔ mǝ nkǝ bǝtǝ wǝ lesatsyuǝ.

english_verse: But they looked straight at him and said, “Look up at us!”
translation_verse: Bále bǝńyǝ nya bábe wǝ tũũ, nya Petro lɛ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Be bo mfo!”

english_verse: The man stared at them and thought he was going to get something.
translation_verse: Nya utidi ǝmǝ létakasǝ ǝnǝmi útǝkǝ lǝ mǝ, ku nsusu nkǝ bǝǝbǝ wǝ lesatsyuǝ butǝ.

english_verse: But Peter said, “I don't have any silver or gold! But I will give you what I do have. In the name of Jesus Christ from Nazareth, get up and start walking.”
translation_verse: Mfó nya Petro dídi etiki ɔ́tɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔɔ, atabi saa ente mɛ muutǝ fǝ! Nyaso muutǝ fǝ lesa nǝ nte mɛ. Nlɛ fɛ bɔtɛyi lǝ Yesu Kristo Nasaretnyǝ eto diye ǝsuǝ minkǝ taka ǝńyǝ lǝ ayɛ edu!”

english_verse: Peter then took him by the right hand and helped him up. At once the man's feet and ankles became strong,
translation_verse: Nya Petro lɛkɔbe utidi ǝmfo eto kodiani nya útǝ nkǝ otaka uńyǝ. Nya lamfolamfoo, wǝ akpa ku bɛkplɔbɛ eto ekubi dímuǝ ale!

english_verse: and he jumped up and started walking. He went with Peter and John into the temple, walking and jumping and praising God.
translation_verse: Nya óbe ósa úńyǝ lǝ wǝ akpa ǝsuǝ. Mfó útsyiko bɔyɛ kesu kesinkli. Nya útǝkǝko mǝ údufǝ Disumuyo mfó, kayɛ kabé kasa katɛsǝ Onanto.

english_verse: Everyone saw him walking around and praising God.
translation_verse: Betidi ba kenke lɛkɛ mfó, ǝnyǝ wǝ ɔnlɛ bɔyɛ nya ɔnlɛ Onanto bɔtɛsǝ.

english_verse: They knew he was the beggar who had been lying beside the Beautiful Gate, and they were completely surprised. They could not imagine what had happened to the man. Peter Speaks in the Temple
translation_verse: Se bǝnyǝ wǝǝ, bǝtsyǝ lekpo bǝ wǝ ni futsyǝ díkǝsiǝ lǝ Kesie Ka Laanɔ Bobe kátɔ asa mfó. Nyaso íyifo mǝ yanii ku sikpi lǝ lesa nǝ béyifo bǝtǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Petro Édi Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Yesu Eto Ǝsuǝale Ǝsuǝ Lǝ Disumuyo.

english_verse: While the man kept holding on to Peter and John, the whole crowd ran to them in amazement at the place known as Solomon's Porch.
translation_verse: Se osani ǝmǝ dímuǝ Petro ku Yohanes ɔnlɛ kekle lǝ lekpake nǝ baakpo Oka Solomo eto Lekpata nǝ nkpe lǝ Onanto eto Disumuyo mfóo, betidi kpǝ étsyetsyi bésu mǝ ɔflɔ. Wǝ botsya éyifo mǝ yanii sekasitsyuǝ.

english_verse: Peter saw that a crowd had gathered, and he said: Friends, why are you surprised at what has happened? Why are you staring at us? Do you think we have some power of our own? Do you think we were able to make this man walk because we are so religious?
translation_verse: Nya se Petro dínyǝ betidi bamǝǝ, ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Israelfɔ, bǝ díyifo mi yanii lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ fɛ? Nya beso bɛnlɛ bo bobe fe bo kosate eto ǝsuǝale ku Boanto eto sikpitete ǝsuǝ eso utidi emfo lɛyɛ?

english_verse: The God that Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, and our other ancestors worshiped has brought honor to his Servant Jesus. He is the one you betrayed. You turned against him when he was being tried by Pilate, even though Pilate wanted to set him free.
translation_verse: Nnya ni bǝnkǝ Onanto lébesǝ wǝ Usumubi Yesu kato. Onanto ǝmfo ni Abraham ku Isak ku Yakob tsya eto Onanto nɛ. Wǝ tsya nsi ni bo bana eto Onanto. Wǝ Ubi ni Yesu wǝ bífi bítǝ biǝ balo. Nya bɛni wǝ lǝ Pilato eto ǝnǝmi lǝ lefe nǝ bɛtɛyi biǝ binyi wǝ kulaa tsya, lǝ lefe nǝ Pilato wǝ léla nkǝ wóayani wǝ fɛ.

english_verse: You rejected Jesus, who was holy and good. You asked for a murderer to be set free,
translation_verse: Bɛni utidi kɛnkɛ ku ɔsɛɛ, nya bɛtɔnɔ biǝ oyani uwudifɔ bomu lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: and you killed the one who leads people to life. But God raised him from death, and all of us can tell you what he has done.
translation_verse: Bélo utidi wǝ lǝǝtǝ betidi nkpǝ. Nya Onanto dísinkli ótakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ! Nya bo kosate dínyǝ wǝ ku bo ǝnǝmi!

english_verse: You see this man, and you know him. He put his faith in the name of Jesus and was made strong. Faith in Jesus made this man completely well while everyone was watching.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ Yesu eto diye ǝsuǝǝ, nya utidi wǝ lɛtsyini bɛnlɛ bunyǝ mfoo, dímuǝ ǝsuǝale nɛ. Nya se ófo Yesu ɔ́nɔ esoo, nnya dítǝ únyǝ bufitsyatsya fe kase mimblɛ nlɛ bunyǝ ku mi ǝnǝmi mfo nɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I am sure you and your leaders didn't know what you were doing.
translation_verse: “Mɔ bayimi, nyi miǝ mi ku mi beninǝ éyifo nyamfo eto okloe ɛyɛ lǝ mante mante ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But God had his prophets tell that his Messiah would suffer, and now he has kept this promise.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto ébɔtɛyi utsyǝ nkǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝsuǝ wǝ ubi Kristo, Utidi Wǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ebudi ohiã. Nko eso útǝ nkǝ wǝ bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi eto lesa nǝ bátɛyi bǝtsyǝ bǝ itǝ.

english_verse: Then the time will come when the Lord will give you fresh strength. He will send you Jesus, his chosen Messiah.
translation_verse: Nyaso bisinkli lǝ abuayifoyifo kama lǝ bitǝkǝko Onanto, lǝ uflǝ mi abua uwi. Lǝ biyifo nkoo, buinyǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsuǝale itsyi lǝ Bonamute ɔflɔ, nya wootsyese Yesu wǝ ni Kristo Wǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ.

english_verse: But Jesus must stay in heaven until God makes all things new, just as his holy prophets promised long ago.
translation_verse: Nko ini eso Yesu luusiǝ kato isu ese lefe nǝ Onanto lɔɔlɔ lesa saa utsyǝ fe kase útǝ wǝ bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi kɛnkɛ lɛtɛyi bǝtsyǝ taa kɔ ke.

english_verse: Moses said, “The Lord your God will choose one of your own people to be a prophet, just as he chose me. Listen to everything he tells you.
translation_verse: Fe kase Moses lɛtɛyi utsyǝ nkǝ, ‘Bonamute Onanto ebulǝkǝ unyɛlǝkǝtidi utsyuǝ utsyiko lǝ mi nti fe kase útǝ mímbɔ. Nyaso bitsyuǝ wǝ ditiki nǝ ke wɔɔtɛyi mi koto.

english_verse: No one who disobeys this prophet will be one of God's people any longer.”
translation_verse: Nyaso nwǝ ke lembutsyue unyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝmǝ kotoo, Onanto ebulǝkǝ wǝ lǝ wǝ betidi nti nya wɔɔtsylɔsǝ wǝ.’

english_verse: Samuel and all the other prophets who came later also spoke about what is now happening.
translation_verse: “Lǝ sitintii, Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi kenke idu lǝ Samuel ɛntɔɔ, ébɔtɛyi asa nnya nlɛ bubǝ mfo mmi bǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: You are really the ones God told his prophets to speak to. And you were given the promise God made to your ancestors. He said to Abraham, “All nations on earth will be blessed because of someone from your family.”
translation_verse: Nnya Onanto lɛtɛyi utsyǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝsuǝ eyifo mi ale. Nya mi tsya kpe kedikɔ lǝ kɛnyɛ ka Onanto lékle ku mi bana ǝsuǝ. Fe kase ɔ́tɛyi Abraham nkǝ, ‘Ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ ufluflu ǝsuǝǝ, mookpo kasɔ eto betidi kenke atsyɔ.’

english_verse: God sent his chosen Son to you first, because God wanted to bless you and make each one of you turn away from your sins.
translation_verse: Nyaso se Onanto dílǝkǝ wǝ Uyifoyifo Kristo ótee, tutɛ ótsyese wǝ mi ɔflɔ nkǝ lǝ okpo mi atsyɔ, nya lǝ utǝ mi utsyuǝ saa lǝ ɔyɛ abua buyifo.”

english_verse: The apostles were still talking to the people, when some priests, the captain of the temple guard, and some Sadducees arrived.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Petro ku Yohanes ńyǝ banlɛ betidi bamǝ etiki budii, Yudafɔ eto besumunyǝ ku Disumuyo eto mba laase mfó eto beninǝ ku Sadukifɔ tsya ǝbǝ mfó.

english_verse: These men were angry because the apostles were teaching the people that the dead would be raised from death, just as Jesus had been raised from death.
translation_verse: Se bánɔ bǝ Petro ku Yohanes ńyǝ mfó balɛ etiki itsyi lǝ Yesu eto botaka ketsyi ɔkɔmǝ ǝsuǝ, nnya nlɛ bote bǝnkǝ utidi wǝ díkǝkpǝ ebotaka ubǝ nkpǝǝ, kafo ányi mǝ tinti.

english_verse: It was already late in the afternoon, and they arrested Peter and John and put them in jail for the night.
translation_verse: Nyaso bǝmuǝ mǝ. Nya se kale mfe nlɛ bolo esoo, béti mǝ bákpe le diyo isu ǝsǝ kǝsiǝsǝ.

english_verse: But a lot of people who had heard the message believed it. So by now there were about
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi kpǝ ba lɛnɔ mǝ etikii, báfo etiki sɛɛ nyamfo bánɔ. Mǝ utú ebuyifo fe basani akpi anɔ.

english_verse: The next morning the leaders, the elders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses met in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Nya se kale dísiǝǝ, ibǝ bǝ Yudafɔ eto bǝsuǝaletidi ku beninǝ ku afi eto bateasa ákpe disi lǝ Yerusalem.

english_verse: The high priest Annas was there, as well as Caiaphas, John, Alexander, and other members of the high priest's family.
translation_verse: Bátsya ku Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke Annas ku Kayafa ku Yohanes ku Aleksandro ku besumunyǝ ninǝ eto betidi tsya.

english_verse: They brought in Peter and John and made them stand in the middle while they questioned them. They asked, “By what power and in whose name have you done this?”
translation_verse: Nyaso bákpa Petro ku Yohanes bamǝ báboko mǝ ǝnǝmi. Nya bátɔ mǝ bǝnkǝ, “Owoe eto diye ku ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ bíyifo nyamfo?”

english_verse: Peter was filled with the Holy Spirit and told the nation's leaders and the elders:
translation_verse: Petro wǝ díyi ku Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsuǝale átaka úńyǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bo bǝsuǝaletidi ku umǝ eto beninǝ,

english_verse: You are questioning us today about a kind deed in which a man who could not walk was healed.
translation_verse: lǝ bela biǝnkǝ bianɔ lesa sɛɛ nǝ búyifo bútǝ utidi wǝ lɛtsyini mfo ku kase bótsya wǝǝ,

english_verse: But there is something we must tell you and everyone else in Israel. This man is standing here completely well because of the power of Jesus Christ from Nazareth. You put Jesus to death on a cross, but God raised him to life.
translation_verse: bitǝ mɛ kusu lǝ ntɛyi mi ku Israel eto betidi kenke lesatsyuǝ. Yesu Kristo wǝ ditsyi Nasaret wǝ bítǝ básɔ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ, nya Onanto disi ótakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝǝ, wǝ diye ǝsuǝ nya utidi ǝmfo dímuǝ ale nɛ.

english_verse: He is the stone you builders thought was worthless, and now he is the most important stone of all.
translation_verse: Nya Yesu ǝmfo ǝsuǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, ‘Leba nǝ mba laato ayo lɛni bǝ dimbǝ kɔnɔɔ, ni bomu díbǝ lefiani nǝ nso bofe lǝ afɛfɛ kenke nti.’

english_verse: Only Jesus has the power to save! His name is the only one in all the world that can save anyone.
translation_verse: Wǝ hã ni futsyǝ loofo utidi bulǝkǝ, itsyise wǝ hã ni futsyǝ Onanto dítǝkǝ diye nya útǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale lǝ betidi ba tã nti, nkǝ utǝ utidi nkpǝ.”

english_verse: The officials were amazed to see how brave Peter and John were, and they knew that these two apostles were only ordinary men and not well educated. The officials were certain these men had been with Jesus.
translation_verse: Se bǝsuǝaletidi ku beninǝ dínyǝ kase Petro ku Yohanes ba lenni bekuente nya bámfo bunǝ saa, nlɛ etiki budi ku ute ku ute ku ǝsuǝale nkoo, íyifo mǝ yanii. Nya bǝnyǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo sitinti bǝ mǝ ku Yesu áyɛ béyifo keyifo lǝ bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: But they could not deny what had happened. The man who had been healed was standing there with the apostles.
translation_verse: Nya se bǝnyǝ utidi ǝmǝ bátsya ńyǝ mfó lǝ mǝ ɔflɔɔ, kɛnyɛ ǝkpǝ mǝ, bánte lesa nǝ baatɛyi bio.

english_verse: The officials commanded them to leave the council room. Then the officials said to each other,
translation_verse: Nyaso bátɛyi mǝ bǝ banyi besu kama etɔ, nya mǝ hã dísiǝ mfó kefi nsusu lǝ lesa nǝ booyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: “What can we do with these men? Everyone in Jerusalem knows about this miracle, and we cannot say it didn't happen.
translation_verse: Mǝ bǝtsyuǝ átɔ bǝ, “Be ele bǝ buyifo ku betidi bamfo? Boǝmbofo bɔtɛyi boǝ lesa nǝ béyifo mfo enni ayanisa itsyise utidi saa wǝ nkpe lǝ Yerusalem yi nya ɔ́nɔ ditiki nǝmfo.

english_verse: But to keep this thing from spreading, we will warn them never again to speak to anyone about the name of Jesus.”
translation_verse: Bomu bǝ lǝ etiki nyamfo lǝ ɛyɛ bokpantsyaa, bitǝ lǝ bukǝ mǝ ato boǝ bensidi etiki saa lǝ Yesu eto diye ǝsuǝ bio.”

english_verse: So they called the two apostles back in and told them they must never, for any reason, teach anything about the name of Jesus.
translation_verse: Nya bésinkli bákpadi mǝ báboko disikakpekɔ mfó nya bákpe mǝ kɔfi bǝ idu lefe nǝmfó ɛntɔɔ, bénsidi kutsyuǝ saa etiki nye báte kulesa itsyi lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ bio.

english_verse: Peter and John answered, “Do you think God wants us to obey you or to obey him?
translation_verse: Nya Petro ku Yohanes dífe kɛnyɛ bátɛyi mǝ bǝnkǝ, “Mi kosate bibu nnya bebe biǝ nte nnya lɔɔkɛ Onanto ɔkɔɛ? Bǝ buyifo lǝ mi kɔfi ǝsuǝ lee, lǝ Onanto eto kole ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: We cannot keep quiet about what we have seen and heard.”
translation_verse: Bo alɛɛ, asa nnya búnyǝ ku bɔ́nɔɔ, boembofo kɛnyɛ boma lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ kǝsiǝ kpoo nko.”

english_verse: The officials could not find any reason to punish Peter and John. So they threatened them and let them go. The man who was healed by this miracle was more than
translation_verse: Utidi ǝmǝ bátsya ébofo alɛ fosi ana ku kama. Bafokanɔfɔ Áto Ola Bǝ Lǝ Bakpe Nkɛ Ale.

english_verse: As soon as Peter and John had been set free, they went back and told the others everything the chief priests and the leaders had said to them.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ báyani mǝ kamaa, Petro ku Yohanes ésu mǝ betidi bamǝ ɔflɔ nya bátɛyi mǝ lesa nǝ betidi bamǝ lɛtɛyi mǝ lǝ disikakpekɔ kamǝ.

english_verse: When the rest of the Lord's followers heard this, they prayed together and said: Master, you created heaven and earth, the sea, and everything in them.
translation_verse: Nyaso bafokanɔfɔ lǝ mfó kenke átsya nya báto ola bǝtǝ Onanto bǝ, “Bonamute, fǝ díyifo kato ku kasɔ ku lekpo ku asa nnya kenke nkpe lǝ nya.

english_verse: And by the Holy Spirit you spoke to our ancestor David. He was your servant, and you told him to say: “Why are all the Gentiles so furious? Why do people make foolish plans?
translation_verse: Fǝ lɛyɛ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ fǝtǝ bo Ona David wǝ ni fǝ Uyifoyifo dídi etiki ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, ‘Beso kawunsiǝ eto betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ nlɛ bunyenki kefi nsusu bua?

english_verse: The kings of earth prepare for war, and the rulers join together against the Lord and his Messiah.”
translation_verse: Kawunsiǝ mfo eto baka átsya, báto ákpatsya, nya bǝsuǝaletidi lékpe disi béfi nsusu lǝ Onanto ǝmǝ ku Utidi Wǝ Ókpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ ǝsuǝ.’

english_verse: Here in Jerusalem, Herod and Pontius Pilate got together with the Gentiles and the people of Israel. Then they turned against your holy Servant Jesus, your chosen Messiah.
translation_verse: Ɔnukualɛ uni bǝ Herodes ku Pontio Pilato ku Israelfɔ ku mba lenni Israelfɔ átsya lǝ umǝ ǝmfó nya bátaka bǝńyǝ lǝ fǝ Uyifoyifo Kɛnkɛ Yesu wǝ fákpo ɔhile fǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They did what you in your power and wisdom had already decided would happen.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝale ku kobe ǝsuǝǝ, ábe fǝnkǝ lǝ batsyaa, beyifo lǝ asa nnya fétsyue fǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Lord, listen to their threats! We are your servants. So make us brave enough to speak your message.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, O Bonamute, be sikpi sia banlɛ bo bokpe, lǝ ǝtǝ bo fǝ beyifoyifo lɛkɔɛsi nǝ luutǝ boofo fǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ budi.

english_verse: Show your mighty power, as we heal people and work miracles and wonders in the name of your holy Servant Jesus.
translation_verse: Nnǝ fǝ kɔni etsyue lǝ atsya betidi, lǝ eyifo ayanisa kpǝ, lǝ fǝ Uyifoyifo Kɛnkɛ Yesu eto diye ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: After they had prayed, the meeting place shook. They were all filled with the Holy Spirit and bravely spoke God's message. Sharing Possessions
translation_verse: Se báto ola bálosǝǝ, diyo nǝ kafo bankpe ko dítinkǝ nya Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ lɛyifǝ dísiǝ lǝ mǝmblɛ ǝsuǝ nya bétsyiko Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bɔtɛyi ku ǝsuǝale. Bafokanɔfɔ Bamǝ Áwunsǝko Bǝtsyuǝ.
