translation_verse: Lǝ mɔ dinyǝbi ǝsuǝǝ, sitinti lǝ befi kanyi ka bɔnlɛ bunyǝ mɔmɔ mfoo, kanle kulesa saa kon lǝ befi bakatesǝko ku diyǝnde ku disuǝyuǝ nǝ Onanto luutǝ bunyǝ.

english_verse: In fact, all creation is eagerly waiting for God to show who his children are.
translation_verse: Asa nnya Onanto díyifo kenke si ɛlɛ kusu bobe kekleke itǝ lefe nǝ Onanto luulǝkǝ wǝ bebi ote.

english_verse: Meanwhile, creation is confused, but not because it wants to be confused. God made it this way in the hope
translation_verse: Nya Onanto eto asayifoyifo nyamfo kenkee, kpe lǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ inni asa nyamfo mate ete dítǝ ibǝ nko, bomu Onanto kosate wǝ dítǝ kusu nko. Nya utǝ kusu nkǝ bǝnyǝ kusubebe bǝ

english_verse: that creation would be set free from decay and would share in the glorious freedom of his children.
translation_verse: wuulǝkǝ asa nnya Onanto díyifo kenke utsyiko lǝ ukpǝ eto sedomu eto kabiasǝ eto ani lǝ bǝtsyǝ ɔnwɛ, nya wuutǝ kusu nkǝ bǝyǝnde fe wǝ bebi ke.

english_verse: We know that all creation is still groaning and is in pain, like a woman about to give birth.
translation_verse: Nya buyi boǝ ibǝ ese mɔmɔɔ, asa nnya Onanto díyifo kenke lɛ kanyi bunyǝ tinti, kakɔɛ fe usio wǝ nlabe kole.

english_verse: The Spirit makes us sure about what we will be in the future. But now we groan silently, while we wait for God to show that we are his children. This means that our bodies will also be set free.
translation_verse: Nya inni nyamfo mate ete, bomu bo mba Onanto dífi wǝ ditǝsa tutɛ nǝ ni wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ útǝ tsyaa, lɛ kanyi bunyǝ kukakɔɛ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ kemiǝ, nya buufi ǝnǝmi butǝkǝ kekleke boǝ Onanto lǝ ufi bo fe wǝ bebi lǝ butsyǝ ɔnwɛ.

english_verse: And this hope is what saves us. But if we already have what we hope for, there is no need to keep on hoping.
translation_verse: Nya se bonkpe kusubebe komfo esoo, búnyǝ bofo. Fɛɛ asa nnya boǝnyǝ ku bo ǝnǝmii, boensiabe nnya kusu. Itsyise kuutsyuǝ ensi ambe kusu kǝtǝ asa nnya mfi nkpe wǝ koko.

english_verse: However, we hope for something we have not yet seen, and we patiently wait for it.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ bufi bo ǝnǝmi butǝkǝ lǝ asa nnya boǝnnyǝtɔ ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ ele bǝ bokpe utu buɛɛ, bukabe nnya kusu.

english_verse: In certain ways we are weak, but the Spirit is here to help us. For example, when we don't know what to pray for, the Spirit prays for us in ways that cannot be put into words.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nko eto kusu komfo ǝsuǝǝ, nya Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ laawunsǝko bo kekleke nɛ, itsyise bumbǝ ale nya bunyi kase ele bǝ boto ola butǝ Onanto bɔyɛnko. Fɛɛ wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ kosate laakɔɛ kalɛ lekpakpa kǝtǝ bo fe kase ińyǝ itǝ bo lǝ kusu ko boǝmbofo bulǝkǝ kate ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: All of our thoughts are known to God. He can understand what is in the mind of the Spirit, as the Spirit prays for God's people.
translation_verse: Nya Onanto wǝ nyi betidi eto ketu kemiǝǝ, yi lesa nǝ nkpe lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ eto nsusu ǝsuǝ tsya. Itsyise Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ aalɛ Onanto lekpakpa lǝ bo disi fe kase Onanto laala.

english_verse: We know that God is always at work for the good of everyone who loves him. They are the ones God has chosen for his purpose,
translation_verse: Buyi boǝ lesa saa nǝ Onanto leeyifoo, iyifo itǝ lɛlɛkɛsǝ itǝ betidi ba laala wǝ nya ókpadi mǝ nkǝ beyifo wǝ keyifo.

english_verse: and he has always known who his chosen ones would be. He had decided to let them become like his own Son, so his Son would be the first of many children.
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba Onanto léte utsyǝǝ, úlǝkǝ mǝ utsyǝ nkǝ lǝ bale wǝ Ubi itǝ bǝ wǝ Ubi lǝ udi ututɛ utǝ wǝ bayimi kpǝ bamǝ.

english_verse: God then accepted the people he had already decided to choose, and he has shared his glory with them. God's Love
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso mba Onanto dílǝkǝ utsyǝǝ, mǝ ókpadi nɛ. Nya mba ókpadii, úyifo mǝ basɛɛ. Nya mba úyifo basɛɛ, mǝ ókpasǝ ǝsuǝ bǝyǝnde fe wǝ ke. Yesu Kristo Ǝlǝkǝ Kase Onanto Laala Bo Tinti Óte.

english_verse: What can we say about all this? If God is on our side, can anyone be against us?
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, be ele bǝ bɔtɛyi? Lǝ Onanto ńyǝ bo kamaa, owoe loofo buńyǝ bo lǝ ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: God did not keep back his own Son, but he gave him for us. If God did this, won't he freely give us everything else?
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Onanto mánni wǝ Ubi bufi kǝtǝ bo, bomu úfi wǝ útǝ kedi lǝ bo disii, beso wǝmbufi asa nnya ta utǝ bo kafo faa ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝmfo ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: If God says his chosen ones are acceptable to him, can anyone bring charges against them?
translation_verse: Nya owoe luufi etiki lǝ Onanto eto betidi ba úlǝkǝ utsyǝ ǝsuǝ? Onanto kosate ébulǝkǝ mǝ kɛnyɛ nkǝ bédi lɛbɛ.

english_verse: Or can anyone condemn them? No indeed! Christ died and was raised to life, and now he is at God's right side, speaking to him for us.
translation_verse: Nya owoe loofo mǝ dikpi bolo? Kuutsyuǝ saa ǝmbǝ! Kristo Yesu wǝ ni utidi wǝ díkpǝ, nya nnya nsi nso ni bǝǝ, wǝ ni nwǝ bátakasǝ betsyiko ɔkɔmǝ nya unsi lǝ Onanto eto kodiani nlɛ bofo kǝtǝ bo.

english_verse: Can anything separate us from the love of Christ? Can trouble, suffering, and hard times, or hunger and nakedness, or danger and death?
translation_verse: Nya owoe loofo lelabi nǝ nkpe lǝ bonko Kristo eto nti bola? Kanyinyǝnyǝ lee bulǝ, lee ohiãtete, lee kukpɛnsɛ, lee leyasiǝsiǝ, lee sikpi bokpe, lee ukpǝ lee lesiabi eto kɛnyɛ?

english_verse: It is exactly as the Scriptures say, “For you we face death all day long. We are like sheep on their way to be butchered.”
translation_verse: Ekpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝ, “Lǝ fǝ disi esoo, bokpe lǝ ukpǝ eto bulǝ ǝsuǝ diyi saa diyi. Nya beeyifo bo fe basamu ba bantɔɔ kalokɔ.”

english_verse: In everything we have won more than a victory because of Christ who loves us.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nyamfo kenke ǝsuǝǝ, butǝkǝ kato ɛyɛ lǝ kase Kristo laala bo eso.

english_verse: I am a follower of Christ, and the Holy Spirit is a witness to my conscience. So I tell the truth and I am not lying when I say
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ minlɛ bɔtɛyi eyifo ɔnukualɛ, inni sidia minlɛ bɔtɛyi, itsyise nyifo Kristo eto ole. Mɔ lɛkɔɛsi nǝ ǝsuǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nsii, lɛ mɛ bɔtɛyi sitinti nkǝ minlɛ sidia bɔtɛyi.

english_verse: my heart is broken and I am in great sorrow.
translation_verse: Nnla miǝ bete biǝ ɛlɛ mɛ bulǝ lǝ taa utu nya yɛnlɛ mɛ bufi tinti taa lǝ mɔ utu kemiǝǝ?

english_verse: I would gladly be placed under God's curse and be separated from Christ for the good of my own people.
translation_verse: Iyifo mɔ lelabi miǝ, lǝ yɔɔwunsǝ ko mɔ betidi ba bonko mǝ ni kusǝ kɔni eto betidi eto disii, muutǝ kusu bǝ Onanto kudi mɛ nkǝ woǝfǝ mɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They are the descendants of Israel, and they are also God's chosen people. God showed them his glory. He made agreements with them and gave them his Law. The temple is theirs and so are the promises that God made to them.
translation_verse: Itsyise mǝ ni Israel eto kusǝ ko Onanto dílǝkǝ utsyǝ. Nya úfi mǝ uyifo wǝ bebi. Nya úlǝkǝ wǝ sekakedikɔ eto diyǝnde óte mǝ. Nya úlǝkǝ kɛnyɛ ka ókle ku mǝ óte. Nya útǝ mǝ wǝ afi. Mǝ ni mba Onanto léte kase ele bǝ bayɛ besumu wǝ nɛ. Nya mǝ ni mba ókle kɛnyɛ ko utsyǝ.

english_verse: They have those famous ancestors, who were also the ancestors of the Christ. I pray that God, who rules over all, will be praised forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Mǝ bana ni mba lefo aye, ba ni baseke, ba Onanto dílǝkǝ utsyǝ. Nya lǝ mǝ ntii, nya Kristo lɛbɔ utsyi úbǝ fe kawunsiǝ eto utidi. Idu mɔmɔ ɛntɔ lefe saa bitǝ lǝ bufi atɛsǝ butǝ Onanto, wǝ ntǝkǝ lesa saa kato. Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: It cannot be said that God broke his promise. After all, not all of the people of Israel are the true people of God.
translation_verse: Inni bɔtɛyi minlɛ miǝ Onanto eto kɛnyɛ ka ɔ́tɛyi utsyǝ eyifo kebimba, nya wényifo lǝ ke ǝsuǝ. Itsyise inni Israelfɔ kenke ni Onanto eto betidi.

english_verse: In fact, when God made the promise to Abraham, he meant only Abraham's descendants by his son Isaac. God was talking only about Isaac when he promised
translation_verse: Nyamfo lɛ bote nkǝ, inni Abraham eto bebi ba kenke ole ni Onanto eto bebi. Bomu Onanto eto bebi ni mba lefo wǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ banɔ. Nya mbamfo woǝnyǝ fǝnkǝ Abraham eto bebi kosate nɛ.

english_verse: Sarah, “At this time next year I will return, and you will already have a son.”
translation_verse: Ditiki nǝ Onanto lɛtɛyi lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ ni nkǝ, “Muusinkli mbǝ lɛlɛ amba mfiǝmato. Nya Sara ebole ubisaibi.”

english_verse: Don't forget what happened to the twin sons of Isaac and Rebekah.
translation_verse: Nya inni nyamfo mate. Fɛɛ Rebeka tsya ále bafimfi ini bebisaibi itsyi lǝ anto ɔni hã wǝ ni bo ona Isak ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Even before they were born or had done anything good or bad, the Lord told Rebekah that her older son would serve the younger one. The Lord said this to show he makes his own choices and it wasn't because of anything either of them had done.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto kpe kusu ko woayɛ kǝlǝkǝ betidi. Nya fe kase ibǝ itǝ nkoo, Onanto átɛyi lesatsyuǝ utsyǝ fɛ bále bafimfi bamfo, fɛ lǝ bafimfi bamfo lǝ beyifo keyifo sɛɛ lee kabua saa. Nya kusu ko ǝsuǝ woayɛ mfo enni lǝ mǝ keyifo saa ǝsuǝ. Bomu ɔ́tɛyi Rebeka nkǝ, “Ubi ninǝ ebofiani nwǝ luusumu dikpǝfile.”

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say that the Lord liked Jacob more than Esau.
translation_verse: Íbǝ itǝ fe kase Onanto lɛtɛyi lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Nla Yakob, nya mínkisi Esau.”

english_verse: The Lord told Moses that he has pity and mercy on anyone he wants to.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ɔ́tɛyi Moses nkǝ, “Utidi wǝ maala miǝ muunǝ kafoo, wǝ muunǝ kafo nɛ. Nya utidi wǝ minla miǝ mǝǝnyǝ kaminsǝǝ, wǝ muunyǝ kaminsǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: Everything then depends on God's mercy and not on what people want or do.
translation_verse: Nyaso kase Onanto lǝǝnyǝ utidi kaminsǝǝ, aanyɛ lǝ utidi ǝmǝ eto lesa nǝ woala nye wǝǝyifo ǝsuǝ. Bomuu, itsyi lǝ kase Onanto kosate laabe lǝ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: In the Scriptures the Lord says to the king of Egypt, “I let you become king, so that I could show you my power and be praised by all people on earth.”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto átɛyi Egipte eto Oka Farao nkǝ, “Lǝ nyamfo esoo, nlɛ fǝ seka butsyǝ bǝ lǝ nlǝkǝ mɔ ǝsuǝale nte betidi ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ, nya bǝ lǝ mɔ diye lǝ lɛyɛ letsyo bǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke lǝ banɔ.”

english_verse: Everything depends on what God decides to do, and he can either have pity on people or make them stubborn. God's Anger and Mercy
translation_verse: Lǝ nyasoo, utidi wǝ Onanto laala nkǝ wǝǝnyǝ kaminsǝǝ, wǝ wǝǝnyǝ kaminsǝ nɛ. Nya nwǝ waala nkǝ utidi atoo, wǝ wǝǝtǝ wǝǝtidi ato nɛ. Onanto Ǝǝnyǝ Ɔblɔ Lǝ Bo Ǝsuǝ Nya Wǝǝnyǝ Bo Kaminsǝ Tsya.

english_verse: Someone may ask, “How can God blame us, if he makes us behave in the way he wants us to?”
translation_verse: Mi bǝtsyuǝ ebɔtɔ mɛ nkǝ, “Lǝ ite nkoo, beso Onanto nsi laalo utidi dikpi? Owoe loofo botaka kǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto lɛkɔɛle ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: But, my friend, I ask, “Who do you think you are to question God? Does the clay have the right to ask the potter why he shaped it the way he did?
translation_verse: Nya owoe feni kon bǝ lǝ edi etiki ǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ? Dikplibi antɔ utidi wǝ léto ni nkǝ, “Beso fɛ fáto mɛ mmǝ?”

english_verse: God wanted to show his anger and reveal his power against everyone who deserved to be destroyed. But instead, he patiently put up with them.
translation_verse: Nya nko ke Onanto tsya díyifo nɛ. Woala nkǝ wǝǝlǝkǝ wǝ lɛblɔfi ote mba ǝsuǝ únyǝ ɔblɔ, bǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale. Fɛɛ woefi disuǝtsyǝ tinti kǝtǝ mba ɔnlɛ ɔblɔ bunyǝ kakpe lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe úkase uyi nkǝ wɔɔtsylɔsǝ mǝ.

english_verse: He did this by showing how glorious he is when he has pity on the people he has chosen to share in his glory.
translation_verse: Nya nko ini bǝ óla nkǝ lǝ ulǝkǝ asa sɛɛ nnya nkpe lǝ wǝ diyǝnde kplɛ kemiǝ ote mba woola nkǝ wǝǝnyǝ kaminsǝ. Nya buyifo betidi ba ɔlɔ utsyǝ nkǝ lǝ bubǝ bunyǝ wǝ diyǝnde kplɛ.

english_verse: Whether Jews or Gentiles, we are those chosen ones,
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso úlǝkǝ bo tsya, inni Yudafɔ mate. Bomu ku mba lenni Yudafɔ tsya.

english_verse: just as the Lord says in the book of Hosea, “Although they are not my people, I will make them my people. I will treat with love those nations that have never been loved.
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi ekpa wuee lǝ Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Hosea eto kukue ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Betidi ba dímendi mɔ balee, mookpadi mǝ ‘Mɔ betidi.’ Nya kuse ko eto betidi maanlaa, mookpadi mǝ ‘Mɔ balala.’

english_verse: “Once they were told, ‘You are not my people.’ But in that very place they will be called children of the living God.”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ kaka tutuutu bátɛyi mǝ bǝ, Binni mɔ betidi, mfo ǝmǝ tutuutu bookpadi mǝ bǝ Onanto Wǝ Nsi Nkpe Lefe Saa eto bebi.”

english_verse: And this is what the prophet Isaiah said about the people of Israel, “The people of Israel are as many as the grains of sand along the beach. But only a few who are left will be saved.
translation_verse: Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Yesaya ábe letsya bembembe útǝ Israelfɔ katɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ ibǝ bǝ Israelfɔ fui kpenkpenkpe fe lekpo eto lɛwinimi tsyaa, mǝ nti esiani hã luunyǝ bulǝkǝ.

english_verse: The Lord will be quick and sure to do on earth what he has warned he will do.”
translation_verse: Itsyise Bonamute ebokponko kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke lekpo mlǝ.”

english_verse: Isaiah also said, “If the Lord All-Powerful had not spared some of our descendants, we would have been destroyed like the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah.” Israel and the Good News
translation_verse: Nya yuubǝ itǝ fe kase Yesaya lɛtɛyi lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mǝ nkǝ, “Lenni Bonamute Ǝsuǝaletidi Kenke díbu bo kafo eto bebi bǝtsyuǝ utsyǝǝ, eni bɔ́ɔtsylɔsɔ bo tsya fe Sodom seka, nya butsyǝ fe Gomora seka!” Ditiki Sɛɛ Nǝmǝ Te Ditǝ Yudafɔ Tsya.

english_verse: What does all of this mean? It means that the Gentiles were not trying to be acceptable to God, but they found that he would accept them if they had faith.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, be ini bɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi? Nko ini bǝ betidi ba lenni Israelfɔ nya bennsi nkpǝ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝǝ, mǝ díbǝ báfiani betidi ba ni basɛɛ mɔmɔ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnemi se báfo wǝ bánɔ eso.

english_verse: It also means that the people of Israel were not acceptable to God. And why not? It was because they were trying to be acceptable by obeying the Law instead of by having faith in God. The people of Israel fell over the stone that makes people stumble,
translation_verse: Nya beso íbǝ nko? Itsyise bányɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ bafo kasɛɛ buyifo, bomu béfi mǝ ǝnǝmi bǝtǝkǝ lǝ mǝ kosate eto eyisafa ǝsuǝ, nya bétusǝ lǝ Kristo wǝ nte fe leba nǝ ǝsuǝ utidi leetusǝ.

english_verse: Dear friends, my greatest wish and my prayer to God is for the people of Israel to be saved.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, iyifo mɔ lelabi nǝ ditsyi lǝ mɔ utu kemiǝ ku mɔ olatoto itǝ Onanto miǝ Yudafɔ lǝ bǝnyǝ bofo.

english_verse: I know they love God, but they don't understand
translation_verse: Nńyǝ mǝ kama nlɛ bɔtɛyi minkǝǝ, baakpe otsyekle sitinti lǝ Onanto busumu ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ benyi kusu komǝ.

english_verse: what makes people acceptable to him. So they refuse to trust God, and they try to be acceptable by obeying the Law.
translation_verse: Itsyise bánte kusu ko Onanto laala nkǝ utidi yɛ lǝ uyifo ɔsɛɛ lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi. Bomu mǝ kosate lɛbɛbɛ mǝ kusu bǝtǝ ǝsuǝ. Lǝ nyamfo eso bámbokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bǝtǝ Onanto itǝ bǝ lǝ ote mǝ kusu ko ǝsuǝ bɔɔyɛ lǝ uyifo mǝ basɛɛ.

english_verse: But Christ makes the Law no longer necessary for those who become acceptable to God by faith. Anyone Can Be Saved
translation_verse: Itsyise Kristo díbǝ ófo ǝsuǝale lǝ Moses eto afi eto ani. Nya utidi saa léfo Kristo ɔ́nɔɔ, úyifo wǝ ɔsɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi. Utidi Saa Ebofo Butǝ Bǝ Onanto Fo Wǝ Lǝ Nkpe.

english_verse: Moses said a person could become acceptable to God by obeying the Law. He did this when he wrote, “If you want to live, you must do all the Law commands.”
translation_verse: Moses áwɔni asa utsyiko lǝ kase utidi leeyifo ɔsɛɛ ɛyɛ lǝ afi ǝsuǝ katɛyi nkǝ, “Utidi saa wǝ leeyifo lǝ afi nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, afi nyamfo ebutǝ wǝ nkpǝ.”

english_verse: But people whose faith makes them acceptable to God will never ask, “Who will go up to heaven to bring Christ down?”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue átɛyi itsyi lǝ kase utidi leeyifo ɔsɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Mantɔ fǝ ǝsuǝ fǝnkǝ, ‘Owoe loobe usu Kato?’ Nya kasɔ ni bǝ, ‘Owoe loobe usu Kato usu okpa Kristo oboko?’

english_verse: Neither will they ask, “Who will go down into the world of the dead to raise him to life?”
translation_verse: Nya mantɔ fǝ ǝsuǝ fǝnke, ‘Owoe luudufǝ usu kasɔ mfo ke?’ Nya kɔsɔ ni bǝ, ‘Owoe luusu ɔkɔmǝ usu oboko Kristo ku wǝ?’ ”

english_verse: All who are acceptable because of their faith simply say, “The message is as near as your mouth or your heart.” And this is the same message we preach about faith.
translation_verse: Bomu lesa nǝ ɛnlɛ bote ni bǝnkǝ, “Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ ebɔfi fǝ pɛɛ, nya lenkpe lǝ fǝ kɛnyɛ ku fǝ lɛkɔɛsi kemiǝ.” Nya nyamfo ni bofokanɔ eto ditiki nǝ bɔnlɛ letsya bobe nɛ.

english_verse: So you will be saved, if you honestly say, “Jesus is Lord,” and if you believe with all your heart that God raised him from death.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ emenkli kɛnyɛ, fatɛyi fǝ Yesu ni Bonamute, nya fafo fanɔ lǝ fǝ lɔkɔɛsi kemiǝ fǝ Onanto átakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝǝ, Onanto ebutǝ fǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: God will accept you and save you, if you truly believe this and tell it to others.
translation_verse: Itsyise ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ lɛkɔɛsi kemiǝ nya faafo kanɔɔ, nya feeyifo ɔsɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi nɛ. Nya ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ kɛnyɛ ka fefi fǝlǝkǝ nyamfo fatee, nya ǝsuǝ fuunyǝ bofo nɛ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say no one who has faith will be disappointed,
translation_verse: Itsyise lǝ nyamfo seka ǝsuǝ nya Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Utsyuǝ saa wǝ léfo wǝ ɔ́nɔɔ, kofani ǝmbɔlɛ wǝ kulefe.”

english_verse: no matter if that person is a Jew or a Gentile. There is only one Lord, and he is generous to everyone who asks for his help.
translation_verse: Nyamfo lɛ bote nkǝ, letekɛkɛ saa ǝmbǝ lǝ Yudafɔ ku mba lenni Yudanyǝ nti. Nya Onanto ni bomblɛ eto Onamute, nya wookpo betidi ba kenke laato ola kǝtǝ wǝ atsyɔ.

english_verse: All who call out to the Lord will be saved.
translation_verse: Fe kase enkpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ, “Utidi saa wǝ laato ola kakpadi Bonamute eto diyee, ebunyǝ bofo.”

english_verse: How can people have faith in the Lord and ask him to save them, if they have never heard about him? And how can they hear, unless someone tells them?
translation_verse: Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa ke dímamfo ɔ́nɔɔ, ntsyǝ woofo wǝ bokpadi katɔ wǝ lesa? Nya utidi wǝ kee eto ditiki bámfo bábe ni letsyaa, ntsyǝ fɛ boofo wǝ bofo kanɔ? Nya lǝ kuutsyuǝ mámbe ditiki nǝmǝ letsya bǝtǝ mǝ lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mmǝǝ, ntsyǝ fɛ bɔɔnɔ ni?

english_verse: And how can anyone tell them without being sent by the Lord? The Scriptures say it is a beautiful sight to see even the feet of someone coming to preach the good news.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bántsyese batɔnkpee, ntsyǝ boobe ditiki nǝmǝ letsya? Báwɔni bakpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝ, “Kase mba léboko Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ díbǝ bédufǝ, aanɔ bobe tinti.”

english_verse: Yet not everyone has believed the message. For example, the prophet Isaiah asked, “Lord, has anyone believed what we said?”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ inni mǝmblɛ kenke ni mba díkafo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ mǝ. Itsyise Yesaya kosate átɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute, owoe léfo ditiki nǝ bóbe letsya ɔ́nɔ?”

english_verse: No one can have faith without hearing the message about Christ.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyasoo, bofokanɔ yɛ lǝ ditiki nǝ bɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya ditiki nǝmǝ bɔnɔ yɛ lǝ Kristo letsya bobe ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But am I saying that the people of Israel did not hear? No, I am not! The Scriptures say, “The message was told everywhere on earth. It was announced all over the world.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lesa nǝ minlɛ bɔtɔ ni bǝǝ, sitinti ini bǝ Israelfɔ mánnɔ ditiki nǝmǝ? Bánɔ ni fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bánɔ mǝ kudu lǝ kawunsiǝ kenke, nya mǝ ditiki dísensǝ dísu kawunsiǝ eto kasekɔ kenke.”

english_verse: Did the people of Israel understand or not? Moses answered this question when he told that the Lord had said, “I will make Israel jealous of people who are a nation of nobodies. I will make them angry with people who don't understand a thing.”
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nsi ntɔ nnɔ miǝ nyalɛ Israel eto kusǝ mánnɔ ni kasɔɔ? Moses kosate ni utidi tutɛ wǝ dítsyiko Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ kɛnyɛ bulǝkǝ kate katɛyi nkǝ, “Muutǝ miǝ bɛsɛsɛ ǝnǝmi lǝ betidi ba lenni kusǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya ɛyɛ lǝ betidibuki ba eto ǝnǝmi dimansini tɔ lǝ bǝtǝ binyǝ ɔblɔ.”

english_verse: Isaiah was fearless enough to tell that the Lord had said, “I was found by people who were not looking for me. I appeared to the ones who were not asking about me.”
translation_verse: Nya Yesaya esi ókpe ɔkɔɛ ɔ́tɛyi mǝ wuee nkǝ Onanto atɛyi nkǝ, “Betidi ba dímambɛbɛ mɛɛ, mɔmɔ bǝnyǝ mɛ. Nya mínlǝkǝ mɔ ǝsuǝ mínte betidi ba dímantɔ kulesa itsyi lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ bánɔ.”

english_verse: And Isaiah said about the people of Israel, “All day long the Lord has reached out to people who are stubborn and refuse to obey.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ Israelfɔ ǝsuǝǝ, ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nsensǝ mɔ ani ntsyǝ lefe nǝ ta, bǝ lǝ mfo betidi ba lembu kuutsyuǝ saa nya bátaka bǝńyǝ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Am I saying that God has turned his back on his people? Certainly not! I am one of the people of Israel, and I myself am a descendant of Abraham from the tribe of Benjamin.
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ bɔtɔ mɔmɔ miǝ nyalɛ Onanto áni wǝ Betidi? Owo lo. Inni nko ini kulaa! Mɔ kosate eyifo Israelnyǝ nya mini Abraham eto kafo eto ubi wǝ ditsyi Benyamin eto kafo.

english_verse: God did not turn his back on his chosen people. Don't you remember reading in the Scriptures how Elijah complained to God about the people of Israel?
translation_verse: Onanto manni wǝ betidi ba unyi, úlǝkǝ utsyǝ taa kasɔketsyikɔ ke. Nya biyi lesa nǝ báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue bǝ Unyɛlǝkǝtidi Elia átɛyi Onanto itsyi lǝ Israelfɔ eto disiale ǝsuǝ nkǝ,

english_verse: He said, “Lord, they killed your prophets and destroyed your altars. I am the only one left, and now they want to kill me.”
translation_verse: “Bonamute, betidi bamfo lélo fǝ bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi nya bésensǝ fǝ kedi eto leba kenke! Ini mɔ hã ni utidi wǝ díbu, nya banlɛ bɔbɛbɛ bǝ lǝ balo mɛ!”

english_verse: This means that only a chosen few of the people of Israel found what all of them were searching for. And the rest of them were stubborn,
translation_verse: Nyalɛ ntsyǝ nɛ? Lesa nǝ ǝsuǝ Israelfɔ dífi kusubebe bǝtǝkǝ keklekee, bǝnnyǝ ni. Fɛɛ mba sɛkɛ Onanto dílǝkǝ utsyǝ ǝnyǝ ni. Bafɛfɛ éti ato bǝtǝ Onanto eto bokpadi.

english_verse: It is the same way now. God treated the people of Israel with undeserved grace, and so a few of them are still his followers.
translation_verse: Nko ke itsyǝ fe kase inte mɔmɔ nɛ. Israel eto betidi esiani bǝtsyuǝ ebu ba Onanto dílǝkǝ utsyǝ itǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lefonǝ eso.

english_verse: This happened because of God's undeserved kindness and not because of anything they have done. It could not have happened except for God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Wǝ lefonǝ ǝsuǝ nya ɔ́yɛ úlǝkǝ mǝ, nya inni lesa nǝ béyifo eso úlǝkǝ mǝ. Nya lǝ Onanto ǝlǝkǝ betidi lǝ mǝ keyifo ka banlɛ esoo, nyalɛ eni wǝ lefonǝ menyifo lefonǝ tinti.

english_verse: just as the Scriptures say, “God made them so stupid that their eyes are blind, and their ears are still deaf.”
translation_verse: Fe nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue átɛyi nkǝ, “Onanto ǝlǝkǝ mǝ ani, nya kuninǝ dídi mǝ utu ku mǝ nsusu kenke. Nya ibǝ nko ibǝ ese taa mi eto bale tsya ǝsuǝ, beentsyue koto nya bǝǝnyǝ kulesa kǝtsyǝ lekpo.”

english_verse: Then David said, “Turn their meals into bait for a trap, so that they will stumble and be given what they deserve.
translation_verse: Nyaso Oka David átɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ itǝ mǝ diyi saa eto lesa kedikɔ lǝ efiani uyibi wǝ bábio lǝ banɔ lǝ wǝ. Nya lǝ bédu bánɔ bédufǝ lǝ kotonǝnǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Blindfold their eyes! Don't let them see. Bend their backs beneath a burden that will never be lifted.” Gentiles Will Be Saved
translation_verse: Nya lǝ itǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ eba bǝ bensiembunyǝ kulesa bǝtsyǝ lekpo. Nnya lǝ itǝ mǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ lǝ kafiani bitsyike itǝ mǝ lefe saa.”

english_verse: Do I mean that the people of Israel fell, never to get up again? Certainly not! Their failure made it possible for the Gentiles to be saved, and this will make the people of Israel jealous.
translation_verse: Nya maatɔ tsya minkǝ lefe nǝ Yudafɔ lɛtsyinini bédu bánɔɔ, bánya kenke nya bénsifo botaka keńyǝǝ? Owo! Inni nko ini? Bomu itsyi lǝ mǝ botakebu esoo, mba lenni Yudafɔ tsya ǝbǝ bǝnyǝ bofo bǝ lǝ itǝ lǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ ɛsɛ mǝ lǝ Yudafɔ bakpɔ mɛ kutsyuǝsɛ.

english_verse: I am now speaking to you Gentiles, and as long as I am an apostle to you, I will take pride in my work.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔ mimba lenni Yudafɔɔ, nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi lǝ lefe nǝmfo nǝ minyifo nwǝ bátsyese mi mfoo, bǝ nlǝkǝ mɔ keyifo eto bofe nte mi.

english_verse: I hope in this way to make some of my own people jealous enough to be saved.
translation_verse: Nya ǝtsyuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, muutǝ ǝnǝmi ebɔsɛ mɔ betidi, bakpɔ kutsyuǝsɛ itǝ ǝtsyuǝ Onanto ebofo mǝ bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: When Israel rejected God, the rest of the people in the world were able to turn to him. So when God makes friends with Israel, it will be like bringing the dead back to life.
translation_verse: Itsyise se Onanto dílǝkǝ mǝ anii, diyuǝ ǝbǝ Onanto ku kawunsiǝ eto betidi eto nti. Nya be luubǝ lǝ Onanto esinkli ofo mǝ? Yuuyifo fe kase utidi leekpe kesinkli kataka kǝbǝ nkpǝ!

english_verse: If part of a batch of dough is made holy by being offered to God, then all of the dough is holy. If the roots of a tree are holy, the rest of the tree is holy too.
translation_verse: Lǝ didisa eto kutsyǝ tutɛ ko befi bǝtǝ Onanto eyifo kɛnkɛɛ, nyalɛ didisa nǝmǝ kenke eyifo kɛnkɛ, Nko ke lǝ kuyi komǝ eto keyudu eyifo kɛnkɛ, nyalɛ ko kalɛ tsya eyifo kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: You Gentiles are like branches of a wild olive tree made to be part of a cultivated olive tree. You have taken the place of some branches that were cut away from it. And because of this, you enjoy the blessings that come from being part of that cultivated tree.
translation_verse: Bála kuyi ko bétsyi eto kalɛ, nya béfi mimba lenni Yudafɔ ba nte fe dibutu eto kuyi ko bála bákle bámaklasǝ lǝ nko bétsyi eto ɔlɛ wǝ bála eto kɛnyɛ. Itǝ bǝ mi tsya ǝbǝ bɛlɛ kedi bunyǝ ketsyiko lǝ kuyitsyitsyi komǝ, ko ni Yudafɔ eto keyudu ɔflɔ.

english_verse: But don't think you are better than the branches that were cut away. Just remember you are not supporting the roots of this tree. Its roots are supporting you.
translation_verse: Nyaso bebe sinini biǝ biambesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ uyilɛ wǝ bála ǝsuǝ. Itsyise lǝ biyifo nkoo, ele bǝ binyǝ bitsyǝ lekpo biǝ inni mi ni ko uyudu. Bomu uyudu nlɛ mi lǝ nkpǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Maybe you think those branches were cut away, so you could be put in their place.
translation_verse: Ebofo bɔtɛyi fǝnkǝ, “Bála uyilɛ ǝmǝ bǝlǝkǝ bǝ lǝ befi fǝ bǝkǝ lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ.”

english_verse: That's true enough. But they were cut away because they did not have faith, and you are where you are because you do have faith. So don't be proud, but be afraid.
translation_verse: Nya nko ini nɛ. Fɛɛ biyi biǝ mǝ mamfokanɔ eso bála mǝ bǝlǝkǝ. Nya mi ǝnyǝ kafĩɔkɔ se befo bɛnɔ eso. Fɛɛ nyamfo anlɛ bote bǝ bebesǝ mi ǝsuǝ kato, bomu ele bǝ bikate sikpi.

english_verse: If God cut away those natural branches, couldn't he do the same to you?
translation_verse: Itsyise lǝ Onanto mǝnyǝ mǝ kaminsǝ ɔkɔbe Yudafɔ ba ni fe kuyi komfo eto ɔlɛ ɔlɛɛ, befo bɛnɔ biǝ wuunyǝ mi kaminsǝ ɔkɔbe mi ɔlɛ?

english_verse: Now you see both how kind and how hard God can be. He was hard on those who fell, but he was kind to you. And he will keep on being kind to you, if you keep on trusting in his kindness. Otherwise, you will be cut away too.
translation_verse: Nyamfo lɛ bo bote kase Onanto lǝǝnyǝ kaminsǝ ku kase wǝ ditiki nkpe ale. Okpe ale itǝ betidi ba dímentsyue wǝ koto, nya woefi wǝ lefonǝ kǝtǝ mi mba léfo wǝ bɛnɔ kekleke lefe saa. Lǝ bienyifo nkoo, Onanto ebola mi ulǝkǝ lǝ kuyi komǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If those other branches will start having faith, they will be made a part of that tree again. God has the power to put them back.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Yudafɔ tsya áyɛ mǝ mamfokanɔɔ, Onanto ebufi mǝ tsya okpe lǝ kuyi komǝ ǝsuǝ. Itsyise Onanto kpe ǝsuǝale bǝ usinkli otsyasǝ kuyi eto kalɛ lǝ kuyi komǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ ɛkɔbe ɛlɛ.

english_verse: After all, it wasn't natural for branches to be cut from a wild olive tree and to be made part of a cultivated olive tree. So it is much more likely that God will join the natural branches back to the cultivated olive tree. The People of Israel Will Be Brought Back
translation_verse: Mimba lenni Yudafɔ te fe kuyi ko ńyǝ lǝ dibutu, nya bála ko kalɛ bǝbǝ bákle bǝkǝ lǝ umǝ eto kuyi ko bétsyi ǝsuǝ. Israel eto kusǝ eyifo fe kuyi ko bétsyi. Eso imbǝ ale itǝ Onanto bǝ ufi kuyitsyitsyi komǝ eto kalɛ ka bála usinkliko ke otsyasǝ ukɔ lǝ nko ǝsuǝ bála ke, nya yɔɔlɛkɛ eso. Onanto Eto Betidi Kenke Ebunyǝ Bofo.

english_verse: My friends, I don't want you Gentiles to be too proud of yourselves. So I will explain the mystery of what has happened to the people of Israel. Some of them have become stubborn, and they will stay like that until the complete number of you Gentiles has come in.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, asa ǝtsyuǝ kpe nnya lɛkula mi nya minla miǝ mǝǝlǝkǝ nte mi bǝ yensikula mi lǝ bɛyɛ bubu biǝ biyi kobe tinti beso. Nnya ni bǝ, Yudafɔ bǝtsyuǝ eto atotitidi nnya bankpe embutsyǝ ɛklɛ. Bomu atotitidi nyamfo ebola lefe nǝ Onanto dínyǝ sitiditu sia woala lǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ eto nti ólosǝ.

english_verse: In this way all of Israel will be saved, as the Scriptures say, “From Zion someone will come to rescue us. Then Jacob's descendants will stop being evil.
translation_verse: Nya kusu komfo ǝsuǝ yɔɔyɛ bǝ Yudafɔ kenke lǝ bǝnyǝ bofo fe kase Onanto lɛtɛyi lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue nkǝ, “Ofomfokǝtǝ ebutsyi Sion ubǝ, nya wuubǝ ulǝkǝ disiale saa lǝ Yakob eto kato eto bebi nti.

english_verse: This is what the Lord has promised to do when he forgives their sins.”
translation_verse: Nya kɛnyɛklekle kamfo ebɔkɛ lǝ bonko mǝ eto nti lǝ lefe nǝ minlǝkǝ abuayifoyifo lǝ mǝ nti.”

english_verse: The people of Israel are treated as God's enemies, so the good news can come to you Gentiles. But they are still the chosen ones, and God loves them because of their famous ancestors.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ eyifo Onanto eto balo, itsyise bámfo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ banɔ. Lǝ nyamfo esoo, mimba lenni Yudafɔ kpe kǝńyǝnkɔ. Fɛɛ se Onanto dílǝkǝ mǝ utsyǝ taa banamǝ lefe esoo, woala mǝ.

english_verse: God doesn't take back the gifts he has given or disown the people he has chosen.
translation_verse: Itsyise lǝ Onanto ǝlǝkǝ betidi bǝtsyuǝ nya úte mǝ wǝ lefonǝ ditsyuǝǝ, wǝmbofloma ni.

english_verse: At one time you Gentiles rejected God. But now Israel has rejected God, and you have been shown mercy.
translation_verse: Nya mimba lenni Yudafɔɔ, béta Onanto bíbu lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mǝ ǝsuǝ, fɛ mɔmɔɔ, Onanto ǝnyǝ mi kaminsǝ lǝ Yudafɔ eto atotitidi esoo,

english_verse: And because of the mercy shown to you, they will also be shown mercy.
translation_verse: nko ini bǝ lǝ kase Onanto dínyǝ mi kaminsǝ esoo, Yudafɔ ensientsyue Onanto koto mɔmɔ bǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ unyǝ mǝ tsya kaminsǝ.

english_verse: All people have disobeyed God, and that's why he treats them as prisoners. But he does this, so that he can have mercy on all of them.
translation_verse: Onanto ǝlǝkǝ betidi ba ta ani, nya mǝ atotitidi díti mǝ kusu iyifo fe diyo bákpe mǝ, lǝ itǝ bǝ unyǝ mǝmblɛ kaminsǝ. Tǝ Lǝ Bɔtɛsǝ Onanto.

english_verse: “Has anyone known the thoughts of the Lord or given him advice?
translation_verse: Nko eso báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Owoe laanɔ Bonamute eto nsusu kasɔ? Nya owoe ni wǝ ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ?

english_verse: Has anyone loaned something to the Lord that must be repaid?”
translation_verse: Owoe díkǝtǝ wǝ lesatsyuǝ unyǝ bǝ lǝ ubǝ utsyǝ wǝ lǝ nnya kɛnyɛ?”

english_verse: Everything comes from the Lord. All things were made because of him and will return to him. Praise the Lord forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Wǝ díyifo lesa saa, nya wǝ dímuǝ asa nnya kenke ɔnlɛ, nya wǝ ni lesa saa eto kalosǝkɔ. Atɛsǝ itǝ Onanto idu mɔmɔ isu manlo manlo. Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: Dear friends, God is good. So I beg you to offer your bodies to him as a living sacrifice, pure and pleasing. That's the most sensible way to serve God.
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, se Onanto nlɛ bo kaminsǝ bunyǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ kafo ɛkpɛ tinti esoo, nlɛ mi lekpakpa sitinti miǝ, bifi mi ǝsuǝ bitǝ Onanto fe keditǝtǝ seka nnya diyifo kɛnkɛ, nnya lǝǝyuǝsǝ wǝ kafo tsya lǝ mi nkpǝ bo binsi mfo eso. Nyamfo ni kase ele bǝ bɔyɛ busumu Onanto lǝ lɛkɔɛsi kǝmiǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Don't be like the people of this world, but let God change the way you think. Then you will know how to do everything that is good and pleasing to him.
translation_verse: Biensiǝ nkpǝ fe kase kawunsiǝ kamfo eto betidi lǝǝsiǝ mu. Bomu bitǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ ɔtsyi mi nsusu ɔwuninsǝ lǝ befiani betidi fɔfɔ. Nyamfo luutǝ binyǝ lesa nǝ Onanto laala, ku lesa nǝ lɛlɛkɛ, nya diakɛ wǝ ɔkɔɛ nya lɛflɔ kenke tsya.

english_verse: I realize God has treated me with undeserved grace, and so I tell each of you not to think you are better than you really are. Use good sense and measure yourself by the amount of faith that God has given you.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ keyifo ka útǝ mɛ lǝ wǝ lefonǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, nlɛ mimblɛ bɔtɛyi minkǝ biambesǝ ǝsuǝ kato enso kase ele bǝ itsyǝ. Bomu bitǝ lǝ mi nsusu lǝ bote bǝ bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ nya utsyuǝ saa lǝ ukato wǝ ǝsuǝ ukabe lǝ wǝ bofakanɔ bo Onanto dítǝ wǝ eto ale ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: A body is made up of many parts, and each of them has its own use.
translation_verse: Fe kase bonkpe ǝsuǝ ani nnya nkpe akpa akpa nnya leeyifo keyifo kani eto oklee,

english_verse: That's how it is with us. There are many of us, but we each are part of the body of Christ, as well as part of one another.
translation_verse: nko ke ini bǝ buyifo betidi kpǝ tsya. Buyifo utidi eto ǝsuǝ ani nnya ntsyi akpa akpa kpǝ nyamfo lǝ bo lɔniyifoyifo ku Kristo eso, nya akpa akpa nyamǝ lɛkɔɔ bǝtsyuǝ iyifo utidi ɔni.

english_verse: God has also given each of us different gifts to use. If we can prophesy, we should do it according to the amount of faith we have.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bufi ǝtǝsa akpa akpa nnya Onanto dítǝ bo ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lefonǝ ǝsuǝ buyifo keyifo. Lǝ utidi utsyuǝ afo Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto bulǝkǝkate eto ǝtǝsaa, ele bǝ obe ni letsya ku bofokanɔ bo nkpe wǝ.

english_verse: If we can encourage others, we should encourage them. If we can give, we should be generous. If we are leaders, we should do our best. If we are good to others, we should do it cheerfully. Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Lǝ betidi nkɛale kpekpe inii, ele bǝ okpe betidi nkɛale lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Lǝ kafoɛkpɛ buyifo kǝtǝ betidi inii, ele bǝ uyifo nnya ku kafo faa. Nya lǝ betidi bɔyɛnko tsya inii, ele bǝ ufi wǝ kobe kenke utǝ keyifo kamǝ eto buyifo, lǝ ɔtɔnko mǝ. Lǝ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ inii, ele bǝ unyǝ kaminsǝ ku wǝ utu kenke.

english_verse: Be sincere in your love for others. Hate everything that is evil and hold tight to everything that is good.
translation_verse: Bela mi betidi ku lelabi kenke. Bikisi lebua lǝ bɛkɔbe lesa sɛɛ bɛlɛ kekleke.

english_verse: Love each other as brothers and sisters and honor others more than you do yourself.
translation_verse: Bifi lelabi bitǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ ku utu faa fǝnkǝ bayimi ba léfo bánɔ. Nya bitǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ dibu enso mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Never give up. Eagerly follow the Holy Spirit and serve the Lord.
translation_verse: Bienyifo sɛflɔ, bomu bekpe ɔtsyini lǝ mi keyifo ǝsuǝ. Bisumu Bonamute ǝmǝ ku mi utu kenke.

english_verse: Let your hope make you glad. Be patient in time of trouble and never stop praying.
translation_verse: Se bɛnlɛ kusu bobe itǝ lesatsyuǝ esoo, binyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ keyifo saa ka bɛnlɛ buyifo ǝsuǝ. Nya binyǝ kekleke lǝ kanyi ǝsuǝ. Nya bikato ola lefe saa.

english_verse: Take care of God's needy people and welcome strangers into your home.
translation_verse: Bɛwunsǝko mi bayimitsyuǝ ba léfo bánɔ ba asa nlɛ bohiã. Nya bifi kafo faa befo bafɔ.

english_verse: Ask God to bless everyone who mistreats you. Ask him to bless them and not to curse them.
translation_verse: Bɛtɔ Onanto lǝ okpo betidi ba laabɛbɛ mi kabua atsyɔ. Tɔ atsyɔkpokpo ǝtǝ mǝ, menkudi mǝ.

english_verse: When others are happy, be happy with them, and when they are sad, be sad.
translation_verse: Binyǝ disuǝyuǝ ku mba nlɛ disuǝyuǝ bunyǝ. Nya biwinko mba nlɛ buwi.

english_verse: Be friendly with everyone. Don't be proud and feel that you know more than others. Make friends with ordinary people.
translation_verse: Biyifo bani ku mi bǝtsyuǝ lǝ mǝ nkpǝsiǝsiǝ ǝsuǝ. Biambesǝ ǝsuǝ kato, bomu bɛkɔ ani ku mba dimanle betidi lǝ betidi eto ǝnǝmi. Nya mǝnyǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ fe nwǝ ni obesibe onso.

english_verse: Don't mistreat someone who has mistreated you. But try to earn the respect of others,
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ eyifo mi kabua biemfi kabua bɛtisǝ wǝ oko. Kplatsya lǝ eyifo lesa nǝ lɛlɛkɛ lǝ bitidi eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: and do your best to live at peace with everyone.
translation_verse: Bɛyɛ kusu saa ko luunǝ diyuǝ eboko mi ku betidi bamba eto nti.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't try to get even. Let God take revenge. In the Scriptures the Lord says, “I am the one to take revenge and pay them back.”
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, biantisɛ utidi eto lebua oko kulefe. Bomu bitǝ Onanto kusu lǝ utǝ utidi ǝmǝ ni kayofofo utǝ mi. Itsyise Onanto átɛyi lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue nkǝ, “Mɔ ni Onamute wǝ laatɔ kɛnyɛ kǝtǝ, nya mɔ ni futsyǝ lǝǝtǝ kayofofo.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “If your enemies are hungry, give them something to eat. And if they are thirsty, give them something to drink. This will be the same as piling burning coals on their heads.”
translation_verse: Bomu lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ, bátɛyi bo bǝ, “Lǝ kukpɛnsɛ lǝ fǝ oloo, tǝ wǝ lesa lǝ udi. Lǝ utukuɛ lɛ wǝǝ, tǝ wǝ ntu lǝ unǝ.” Itsyise lǝ eyifo nkoo, akpa kutǝmbli akpo wǝ lǝ disinti, nye ǝtǝ kofani alɛ wǝ

english_verse: Don't let evil defeat you, but defeat evil with good.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lǝ kabua lǝ kedi mi utu, bomu bifi kasɛɛ buyifo bitǝkǝ lebua kato.

english_verse: Obey the rulers who have authority over you. Only God can give authority to anyone, and he puts these rulers in their places of power.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ utidi saa fi dibu utǝ Aba eto ɔtɔnkotɔnko. Itsyise aba saa ǝmbǝ ǝsuǝale leni Onanto ɔflɔ itsyi. Nya Aba wǝ nsi mɔmɔɔ, Onanto dífi mǝ utsyǝ mfó.

english_verse: People who oppose the authorities are opposing what God has done, and they will be punished.
translation_verse: Lǝ utidi utsyuǝ átaka uńyǝ lǝ Aba utsyuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto eto lesa nǝ útsyue útsyǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ni ótaka uńyǝ nɛ. Nya betidi ba leeyifo nkoo, bǝǝnǝ kotonǝnǝ kaboko ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Rulers are a threat to evil people, not to good people. There is no need to be afraid of the authorities. Just do right, and they will praise you for it.
translation_verse: Betidi ba leeyifo kasɛɛ, aante Aba sikpi, bomu betidi buaa, mǝ laate asa sikpi nɛ. Lǝ bela biǝ biayɛ Aba sikpi botee, ele bǝ biyifo lesa saa lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ lǝ befo atɛsǝ.

english_verse: After all, they are God's servants, and it is their duty to help you. If you do something wrong, you ought to be afraid, because these rulers have the right to punish you. They are God's servants who punish criminals to show how angry God is.
translation_verse: Itsyise uyifo Onanto eto uyifoyifo wǝ laabɛbɛ fǝ kasɛɛ. Fɛɛ lǝ eeyifo kabua, nyalɛ te wǝ sikpi. Itsyise inni bimba ini bǝ bǝtǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale! Onanto eto uyifoyifo uni. Nya uyifo utidi wǝ laabe nkǝ beyifo lesa saa lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ nya wǝǝnǝ obuayifo saa koto.

english_verse: But you should obey the rulers because you know it is the right thing to do, and not just because of God's anger.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso ele bǝ bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ batɔnkotɔnko. Nya inni lǝ Onanto eto lɛblɔfi mate nɛ luubǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ eso, bomu lǝ fǝ lɛkɔɛsi nǝ loolo fǝ dikpi tsya eso.

english_verse: You must also pay your taxes. The authorities are God's servants, and it is their duty to take care of these matters.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo tsya eso ele bǝ befo oko bitǝ mi kasɔ eto batɔnkotɔnko, itsyise Onanto eto keyifo banlɛ buyifo. Nya béfi mǝ lefe kenke bǝtǝ bǝ lǝ batɔnko betidi.

english_verse: In the Law there are many commands, such as, “Be faithful in marriage. Do not murder. Do not steal. Do not want what belongs to others.” But all of these are summed up in the command that says, “Love others as much as you love yourself.”
translation_verse: Afi nnya bǝtǝ bo lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Mankpo kusiǝ nye kusǝ, manlo utidi, menyu, mansɛsǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ kuutsyuǝ eto asa ǝsuǝ,” nya lǝ befi afi nnya kenke bakɔɔ, eka lesa lɔni klon nǝ ni bǝ, “La fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ fe fǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: No one who loves others will harm them. So love is all that the Law demands. The Day When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Lǝ aala fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝǝ, embuyifo wǝ kabua. Nyaso lelabi ni lesa nǝ ǝsuǝ afi nyamfo kenke nkpǝsǝ.

english_verse: You know what sort of times we live in, and so you should live properly. It is time to wake up. You know that the day when we will be saved is nearer now than when we first put our faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Besankli lǝ selabe ǝsuǝ! Lǝ bɛyɛ lǝ kusu komfo ǝsuǝ. Itsyise biyi lefe nǝ ǝsuǝ bonkpe mɔmɔ. Lefe nǝ ǝsuǝ Onanto luulǝkǝ bo ebɔfi mɔmɔ enso lefe nǝ boto Kristo bofo kanɔ.

english_verse: Night is almost over, and day will soon appear. We must stop behaving as people do in the dark and be ready to live in the light.
translation_verse: Ketsye lefe ébubǝ éfe, nya kale fe kalɛ busiǝ. Nyaso bɛyɛ ketsye eto asa buyifo, lǝ bifi amamawu nya dińyǝ itǝ betidi ba nkpe lǝ lekpasǝ eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝ bekpe.

english_verse: So behave properly, as people do in the day. Don't go to wild parties or get drunk or be vulgar or indecent. Don't quarrel or be jealous.
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ bɔlɛ bo ǝsuǝ ola fe betidi ba laayɛ lǝ lekpasǝ eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝ. Nya yenyifo udikpuu eto budi ku sitǝkpǝ ku asɔnɔdidi eto abua ku disialeyifoyifo eto asa ku ntimama ku kenǝmisɛ eto eyifosa.

english_verse: Let the Lord Jesus Christ be as near to you as the clothes you wear. Then you won't try to satisfy your selfish desires.
translation_verse: Bomu bifi Bonamute Yesu Kristo bekpe fe awu, lǝ bilǝkǝ nsusu bitsyiko lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto asa bimba nnya laakle mi lǝ ɔkɔɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Welcome all the Lord's followers, even those whose faith is weak. Don't criticize them for having beliefs that are different from yours.
translation_verse: Befo mi utidi wǝ eto bofokanɔ dimǝmmuǝ tɔ ale ku kafo faa bekpe lǝ mi nti. Biemfi kediǝ betsyako wǝ lǝ lesa nǝ ele bǝ uyifo lee yanle nǝ bǝ uyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Some think it is all right to eat anything, while those whose faith is weak will eat only vegetables.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ eto bofokanɔ ǝtǝ wǝ kusu bǝ ofo lesa saa budi, fɛ, bǝtsyuǝ ba eto bofokanɔ mǝmmuǝ tɔ alee, didisa nǝ bánkpesinǝ ni nǝ hã beedi.

english_verse: What right do you have to criticize someone else's servants? Only their Lord can decide if they are doing right, and the Lord will make sure that they do right.
translation_verse: Owoe feni bǝ lǝ akponko utidi bamba eto uyifoyifo lekpo? Wǝ kosate eto Onamute eto ǝnǝmi eebe lǝ nwǝ mǝ ńyǝ kekleke utǝ wǝ lee, lee unńyǝ. Nya uyifoyifo ǝmǝ tsya ebuńyǝ kekleke, itsyise Bonamute ebofo butǝ nkǝ uńyǝ kekleke utǝ wǝ.

english_verse: Some of the Lord's followers think one day is more important than another. Others think all days are the same. But each of you should make up your own mind.
translation_verse: Utidi utsyuǝ eebu nkǝ diyi ditsyuǝ afé leso abamba. Nya utsyuǝ tsya ǝǝnyǝ eyi nnya kenke nkǝ iyifo ani. Ele be utsyuǝ saa nyǝ nkǝ lesa nɛ weeyifo alɛkɛ.

english_verse: Any followers who count one day more important than another day do it to honor their Lord. And any followers who eat meat give thanks to God, just like the ones who don't eat meat.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke leefi dibu kǝtǝ diyi dutsyuǝǝ, woeyifo nko kefi kǝtǝ Bonamute dibu. Nya utidi utsyuǝ wǝ ke leedi didisa ditsyuǝ tsya, woedi ni kefi kǝtǝ Bonamute dibu, itsyise woasɔ Onanto ani lǝ didisa nǝmǝ eto disi. Nya utidi wǝ lɛnni nkǝ woembudi lesa ditsyuǝ eto okle tsyaa, woeyifo nko kefi kǝtǝ Bonamute dibu. Nya woasɔ Onanto ani.

english_verse: Whether we live or die, it must be for God, rather than for ourselves.
translation_verse: Bo kuutsyuǝ saa ensi nkpǝ itǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ hã. Nya nko ke ini bǝ bo kuutsyuǝ saa tsya ǝnkpǝ kǝtǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Whether we live or die, it must be for the Lord. Alive or dead, we still belong to the Lord.
translation_verse: Lǝ busi nkpǝǝ, busi mu itǝ Bonamute. Nya lǝ bukpǝ tsyaa, bukpǝ itǝ Bonamute. Nyaso lǝ busi o-o nye bukpǝ o-o, buyifo Bonamute eto bale.

english_verse: This is because Christ died and rose to life, so that he would be the Lord of the dead and of the living.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso sitintii, Kristo ǝkpǝ, nya usi ótaka utsyi ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ bǝ lǝ ofiani Onamute utǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ ku bǝkpǝnsiǝ kenke.

english_verse: Why do you criticize other followers of the Lord? Why do you look down on them? The day is coming when God will judge all of us.
translation_verse: Beso ele bǝ lo fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ dikpi? Nyee, beso fǝǝnyǝ fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ fǝ wǝ mamflɔ? Bomblɛ ebunyǝ lǝ Onanto eto lekankpomɛ eto ǝnǝmi bǝ lǝ okponkobo lekpo.

english_verse: In the Scriptures God says, “I swear by my very life that everyone will kneel down and praise my name!”
translation_verse: Itsyise báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔninsa Eto Kukue Kɛnkɛ bǝ, “Bonamute átɛyi nkǝ, ‘Lǝ lefe nǝ minsi nkpǝ mfoo, nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi kekleke minkǝ, utsyuǝ saa ebose akonki utǝ mɛ. Nya utidi saa ebofo ɔnɔ nkǝ mɔ mi Onanto.’ ”

english_verse: And so, each of us must give an account to God for what we do. Don't Cause Problems for Others
translation_verse: Nyaso utsyuǝ saa lǝ bo nti ebulǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ kɛnyɛ lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ. Menyifo Kulesa Nǝ Luutǝ Fǝ Ɔyimitsyuǝ Lǝ Udu Ɔnɔ Lǝ Wǝ Bofokanɔ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The Lord Jesus has made it clear to me that God considers all foods fit to eat. But if you think some foods are unfit to eat, then for you they are not fit.
translation_verse: Se minsi nkpǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku Bonamute Yesu esoo, nyi sitinti lǝ mɔ lɛkɔɛsi kemiǝ miǝ didisa saa ǝmbǝ nǝ laabiasǝ kuutsyuǝ. Fɛ lǝ utsyuǝ ǝnyǝ lesatsyuǝ fe lesa nǝ laabiasǝ wǝ, lesa nǝ ǝmǝ ebobiasǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you are hurting others by the foods you eat, you are not guided by love. Don't let your appetite destroy someone Christ died for.
translation_verse: Lǝ eedi lesatsyuǝ nnya fenyi fǝ nnyakpe fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ bulǝǝ, yenyifo lelabi fanlɛ bulǝkǝ kate wǝ. Mǝntǝ lǝ lesa nǝ feedi lǝ lebiasǝ fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ eto bofokanɔ, itsyise Kristo ǝkpǝ lǝ wǝ disi tsya.

english_verse: Don't let your right to eat bring shame to Christ.
translation_verse: Nya biǝntǝ lǝ betidi bamba lǝ bakpe lesa nǝ mi nyi biǝ diyifo lesa sɛɛ, kɔfiɔ.

english_verse: God's kingdom isn't about eating and drinking. It is about pleasing God, about living in peace, and about true happiness. All this comes from the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Itsyise lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ katoo, budi ku bunǝ manle kulesa. Bomu nnya ǝsuǝ inkpesǝ ni kasɛyifoyifo, diyuǝ ku disuǝyuǝ nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ lǝǝtǝ.

english_verse: If you serve Christ in this way, you will please God and be respected by people.
translation_verse: Itsyise nwǝ leesumu Kristo lǝ kusu komfo ǝsuǝǝ, wǝ Onanto laala nya betidi tsya lǝǝtǝ dibu nɛ.

english_verse: We should try to live at peace and help each other have a strong faith.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bokpe nkɛale saa boofo lǝ buyifo lesa nǝ laaboko betidi diyuǝ lǝ itǝ betidi lǝ babé disi lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Don't let your appetite destroy what God has done. All foods are fit to eat, but it is wrong to cause problems for others by what you eat.
translation_verse: Bianyɛ lǝ didisa eso bebiasǝ Onanto eto keyifo. Edisa saa eyifo kɛnkɛ, fɛɛ yanlɛkɛ bǝ ɛyɛ lǝ didisa nǝ utidi luudi eso yuutǝ utsyuǝ dufǝ lǝ kabua ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: It is best not to eat meat or drink wine or do anything else that causes problems for other followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Lesa sɛɛ ete ini bǝnkǝ, yɛ sinǝ nye nte nye lesa nǝ luunǝ fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ lekpe lǝ lebua ǝsuǝ budi nye bunǝ.

english_verse: What you believe about these things should be kept between you and God. You are fortunate, if your actions don't make you have doubts.
translation_verse: Nyaso tǝ lǝ lesa nǝ fafo fanɔ lǝ asa nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ ɛkɛ lǝ fǝ ku Onanto eto nti ete. Disuǝyuǝ aakɛ utidi lǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ wǝ lɛkɔɛsi aanlo wǝ dikpi lǝ lesa nǝ úyifo alɛkɛ itǝ wǝ.

english_verse: But if you do have doubts about what you eat, you are going against your beliefs. And you know that is wrong, because anything you do against your beliefs is sin.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ utidi utsyuǝ edi lesa nǝ wǝ lɛkɔɛsi dimǝntǝ wǝ kusuu, Onanto aalo wǝ dikpi lǝ udi ni, itsyise weentsyue lesa nǝ ófo ɔ́nɔ koto. Nya lesa saa nǝ béyifo dímanyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, eyifo lebua.

english_verse: If our faith is strong, we should be patient with the Lord's followers whose faith is weak. We should try to please them instead of ourselves.
translation_verse: Bomba eto bofokanɔ díkǝmuǝ alee, ele bǝ bɔwunsǝko mba eto bofokanɔ lǝmbǝtɔ ale bǝńyǝ. Nya yanle bǝ búyifo nya lɛlɛkɛ itǝ bo ǝsuǝ ete.

english_verse: We should think of their good and try to help them by doing what pleases them.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso ele bǝ bo nti eto utsyuǝ saa yifo lesa nǝ lɔɔlɛkɛ itǝ wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ nya luutǝ bǝ obe lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Even Christ did not try to please himself. But as the Scriptures say, “The people who insulted you also insulted me.”
translation_verse: Itsyise Kristo kulaa tsyaa, inni lesa nǝ lɛlɛkɛ itǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ úyifo. Báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝ, Kristo átɛyi Onanto nkǝ, “Aka nnya betidi laaka fǝǝ, ǝbǝ ékpo mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: God is the one who makes us patient and cheerful. I pray that he will help you live at peace with each other, as you follow Christ.
translation_verse: Onanto wǝ laawunsǝko bo bǝ lǝ bofo buńyǝ kekleke lǝ kanyi nyǝnyǝ saa ǝsuǝ, nya woakpe bo nkɛalee, lǝ utǝ lɔniyifoyifo lǝ lɛkɛ mi lǝ nti lǝ Kristo Yesu eto kama butǝnko ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then all of you together will praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. The Good News Is for Jews and Gentiles
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mimblɛ lǝ bufi ɔkɔɛ ɔni bebesǝ Onanto wǝ ni Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto Anto kato. Bátɛyi Mba Lenni Yudafɔ Tsya Ditiki Sɛɛ Nǝmǝ.

english_verse: I tell you that Christ came as a servant of the Jews to show that God has kept the promises he made to their famous ancestors. Christ also came,
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi kakpasǝ minkǝ Kristo ǝbǝ ófiani Yudafɔ eto usumunyǝ bǝ lǝ ulǝkǝ ditiki nǝ Onanto lɛtɛyi Yudafɔ eto bana eto bana útsyǝ ote nkǝ ditiki nǝmfo eyifo ɔnukualɛ nya bǝ lǝ ibǝ itǝ nko sitinti.

english_verse: so that the Gentiles would praise God for being kind to them. It is just as the Scriptures say, “I will tell the nations about you, and I will sing praises to your name.”
translation_verse: Nya bǝ betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ tsya lǝ batɛsǝ Onanto lǝ wǝ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ eso. Báwɔni lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Lǝ nyamfo esoo, mɔɔtɛsǝ fǝ lǝ betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ eto nti. Nya muusǝ ǝsǝ mfi ntɛsǝ fǝ diye.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say to the Gentiles, “Come and celebrate with God's people.”
translation_verse: Nya besi bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Mimba lenni Yudafɔ nyǝ disuǝyuǝ ku Onanto eto kusǝ.”

english_verse: Again the Scriptures say, “Praise the Lord, all you Gentiles. All you nations, come and worship him.”
translation_verse: Besi bátɛyi tsya bǝ, “Mimba lenni Yudafɔ kenke bɛtɛsǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ. Nya mi ese ese eto betidi kenke bɛtɛsǝ wǝ.”

english_verse: Isaiah says, “Someone from David's family will come to power. He will rule the nations, and they will put their hope in him.”
translation_verse: Yesaya tsya esi ɔ́wɔni ɔlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Yese eto kafo eto ubi ebuke ɔbɔ. Nya wǝ ni utidi wǝ lootaka udi seka lǝ ese ese eto betidi ba kenke lenni Yudafɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya buufi mǝ kusubebe bǝtǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives hope, will bless you with complete happiness and peace because of your faith. And may the power of the Holy Spirit fill you with hope. Paul's Work as a Missionary
translation_verse: Nlɛ lekpakpa miǝ Onanto wǝ ni bo kusubebe tǝ lǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ diyi mi ǝsuǝ kenke, nya lǝ binyǝ diyuǝ lǝ kase bífi mi ǝsuǝ bítǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ, lǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsuǝale lǝ itǝ bǝ mi kusubebe lǝ kobe kokpe mi lǝ ǝsuǝ. Paulo Ǝlǝkǝ Nnya Eso Ɔ́wɔni Kukue Ko Nkpe Kasɔnɔnɔ Kpǝ Mfo Ótsyese Mǝ.

english_verse: My friends, I am sure that you are very good and that you have all the knowledge you need to teach each other.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, mɔ kosate mfo nnɔ sitinti miǝ asa sɛɛ buyifo aba ekpo mi lǝ ǝsuǝ kenke. Nya biyi asa nnya kenke itǝ bǝ biofo mi bǝtsyuǝ asa bote lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But I have spoken to you plainly and have tried to remind you of some things. God treated me with undeserved grace!
translation_verse: Mfí mɔ utu ntǝkǝ sitinti lǝ ni nya minwɔni asa kpǝ lǝ kukue komfo fe kaklomasǝ itǝ mi lǝ asa nyamfo ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ nǝ útǝ mɛ eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: He chose me to be a servant of Christ Jesus for the Gentiles and to do the work of a priest in the service of his good news. God did this so that the Holy Spirit could make the Gentiles into a holy offering, pleasing to him.
translation_verse: Itsyise úyifo mɛ nkǝ ntsyi nwuninsǝ nyifo Kristo eto uyifoyifo ntǝ betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ. Nya lǝ nyifo kesumu eto keyifo ka ni bǝnkǝ mbe Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya ntǝ betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ bǝ lǝ nnǝ mǝ mboko Onanto fe kesumu eto asa nnya nnya luudufǝ Onanto ǝnǝ, ini Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ díyifo nnya kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: Because of Christ Jesus, I can take pride in my service for God.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eso moofo lɛkɔɛsi bɔsɔ lǝ lesa nǝ Yesu Kristo díyifo ɛyɛ lǝ keyifo ka minlɛ buyifo kǝtǝ Onanto eso.

english_verse: Indeed, I will tell how Christ worked miracles and wonders by the power of the Holy Spirit. I have preached the good news about him all the way from Jerusalem to Illyricum.
translation_verse: Nya úyifo nko ɛyɛ lǝ asa nnya mínlǝkǝ mínte ku ayanisa nnya bǝnyǝ mínyifo ɛyɛ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsuǝalɛ ǝsuǝ eso. Lǝ nyaso ídu lǝ Yerusalem ɛyɛ etsyilama ísu Iliriko eto lɛkpɔ mfó, mbe Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya éfia kenke.

english_verse: But I have always tried to preach where people have never heard about Christ. I am like a builder who doesn't build on someone else's foundation.
translation_verse: Ídu taa kɔ kenkee, íyifo mɔ lelabi kekleke minkǝ lǝ mbé Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya lǝ nlebe bo bánnɔ tɔ Kristo eto diye. Nya inni bǝ lǝ nto ntǝkǝ lǝ utsyuǝ bamba eto lesa nǝ útsyǝ kasɔ ku boto ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “All who haven't been told about him will see him, and those who haven't heard about him will understand.” Paul's Plan To Visit Rome
translation_verse: Bomu bǝ lesa nǝ báwɔni bǝtsyǝ lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue kafo lǝ ibǝ itǝ nko bǝ, “Betidi ba bántɛyi mǝ itsyi lǝ ditiki nǝmǝ lefe nǝ léfee, mǝ luunyǝ bǝtsyǝ wǝ lekpo bate wǝ nɛ. Nya mba tsya dimannɔ tɔ kulesa lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ lefe nǝ léfee, mǝ lɔɔnɔ wǝ kasɔ nɛ.”

english_verse: My work has always kept me from coming to see you.
translation_verse: Keyifo ka minlɛ buyifo mfo ǝntǝ mɛ kusu nyaso maamfo mi ɔflɔ bubǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Now there is nothing left for me to do in this part of the world, and for years I have wanted to visit you.
translation_verse: Fɛ mɔmɔɔ, se mínkalosǝ mɔ keyifo lǝ lɛkpɔ nǝmfoo, nya se minlɛ kusu bɔbɛbɛ lǝ alɛ kpǝ nnya léfe bǝ lǝ mbǝ nyǝ mi esoo,

english_verse: So I plan to stop off on my way to Spain. Then after a short, but refreshing, visit with you, I hope you will quickly send me on.
translation_verse: mfi nsusu miǝ lǝ mbǝ nlɛ Spania bofee, lǝ nyɛ mi ɔflɔ. Nla miǝ maayɛ mi ɔflɔ lǝ bɛwunsǝko mɛ lǝ mɔ mfó busu ǝsuǝ lǝ nsiǝ lǝ mi ɔflɔ lǝ búnyǝ disuǝyuǝ ku bǝtsyuǝ itǝ lefe kliminti ditsyuǝ eto kama bólosǝ.

english_verse: I am now on my way to Jerusalem to deliver the money that the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia collected for God's needy people.
translation_verse: Itsyise iyifo bafokanɔfɔ lǝ Makedonia ku Akaia eto lelabi faa bǝ baako atabi ǝtsyuǝ lǝ befi batsyese bakombo ba nkpe lǝ bafokanɔfɔ nti lǝ Yerusalem mfó.

english_verse: This is something they really wanted to do. But sharing their money with the Jews was also like paying back a debt, because the Jews had already shared their spiritual blessings with the Gentiles.
translation_verse: Iyifo mǝ lelabi kafo faa bǝ beyifo nko. Nya lǝ sitintii, beyifo bayodi lǝ mɔ ɔflɔ! Itsyise lǝ betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ ǝnyǝ kedikɔ ku Yudafɔ eto lɛwɔnɔ eto asa sɛ ǝsuǝǝ, eyi fǝnkǝ ele bǝ mǝ tsya wunsǝko Yudafɔ ku mǝ asa nnya banlɛ bunyǝ ketsyiko lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: After I have safely delivered this money, I will visit you and then go on to Spain.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ nyifo keyifo kamfo nlosǝ nya bafo asa nnya bǝnyǝ basɔ leboo, muusu Spania nya mɔɔyɛ mi ɔflɔ mfó lǝ mfe ntɔ.

english_verse: And when I do arrive in Rome, I know it will be with the full blessings of Christ.
translation_verse: Nyi miǝ lefe nǝ muubǝ mi ɔflɔɔ, nyɛnko Kristo eto atsyɔkpokpo kenke nlɛ mi boboko.

english_verse: My friends, by the power of the Lord Jesus Christ and by the love that comes from the Holy Spirit, I beg you to pray sincerely with me and for me.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, nlǝ mi lekpakpa tinti lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto diye ǝsuǝ ku Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto lelabi ǝsuǝ miǝ bɛwunsǝko mɛ lǝ boto ola kekleke butǝ Onanto lǝ mɔ disi.

english_verse: Pray that God will protect me from the unbelievers in Judea, and that his people in Jerusalem will be pleased with what I am doing.
translation_verse: Beto ola bɛlɛ Onanto lekpakpa bǝ lǝ ulǝkǝ mɛ utsyiko Yudea eto betidi ba ni mankokafɔ eto ani nya lǝ mɔ keyifo lǝ Yerusalem mfó lǝ kakɛ Onanto eto betidi mfó ɔkɔɛ bamǝ.

english_verse: Ask God to let me come to you and have a pleasant and refreshing visit.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Onanto atɔnɔɔ, muubǝ ndufǝ mi nti ku disuǝyuǝ, bǝ lǝ bomblɛ lǝ bola bɔwɔnɔ busiǝ.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will be with all of you. Amen.
translation_verse: Onanto wǝ lǝǝtǝ diyuǝǝ, lǝ usiǝko mimblɛ kenke. Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: I have good things to say about Phoebe, who is a leader in the church at Cenchreae.
translation_verse: Nla miǝ mǝǝlǝkǝ bo ɔyimisio Foebe nte mi. Uyifo ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ utǝ Kenkrea lǝ bafokanɔfɔ nti.

english_verse: Welcome her in a way that is proper for someone who has faith in the Lord and is one of God's own people. Help her in any way you can. After all, she has proved to be a respected leader for many others, including me.
translation_verse: Nya nlɛ mi lekpakpa miǝ lǝ befo wǝ kukɔnɔ lǝ Bonamute eto diye ǝsuǝ lǝ kusu ko dińyǝ itǝ Onanto eto betidi ǝsuǝ. Bitǝ wǝ bɔwunsǝko saa bo wɔɔtɔ utsyiko mi ɔflɔ, itsyise ɔ́wunsǝko betidi kpǝ ku mɔ ǝmǝ tsya.

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila. They have not only served Christ Jesus together with me,
translation_verse: Siǝsǝ Priska ku wǝ usǝ Akwila ba bomǝ diyifo mɔ beyifoyifotsyuǝ lǝ Kristo Yesu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: but they have even risked their lives for me. I am grateful for them and so are all the Gentile churches.
translation_verse: Bǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ bǝńyǝ bǝ boofo bukpǝ lǝ mɔ disi kulaa tsya. Nya inni mɔ mate ete nlɛ mǝ ani bɔsɔ, bomu ku betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ eto bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa bamba ǝtsyuǝ kenke tsya.

english_verse: Greet the church that meets in their home. Greet my dear friend Epaenetus, who was the first person in Asia to have faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Lǝ ǝsiǝsǝ bafokanɔfɔ ba laatsya lǝ mǝ diyo mfó tsya. Siǝsǝ mɔ ɔyɛtsyuǝ lala Epaineto wǝ ni ututɛ wǝ lɛtsyi lɛkɔɛsi ɔwuninsǝ ófo Kristo lǝ Asia eto kasɔ mfó.

english_verse: Greet Mary, who has worked so hard for you.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ ǝsiese Maria wǝ díyifo keyifo kekleke útǝ mi ditsyukpa nǝmfó.

english_verse: Greet my relatives Andronicus and Junia, who were in jail with me. They are highly respected by the apostles and were followers of Christ before I was.
translation_verse: Siǝsǝ Androniko ku Yunia ba ni mɔ kusǝ eto betidi ba ni bonko mǝ bákpe lǝ aba eto diyo mfó. Betidi yi mǝ tinti fe mba baatsyese nkpe lǝ batɔnkpe nti. Nya bɔ́tɔ mɛ lǝ Kristo bofo kanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Greet Ampliatus, my dear friend whose faith is in the Lord.
translation_verse: Siǝsǝ Amplia wǝ maala tinti lǝ Bonamute ǝsuǝ ǝtǝ mɛ.

english_verse: Greet Urbanus, who serves Christ along with us. Greet my dear friend Stachys.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ ǝsiǝsǝ Urbana wǝ ni bo uyifotsyuǝ ku ɔyɛtsyuǝ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ ǝtǝ mɛ. Nya lǝ ǝsiǝsǝ mɔ ɔyimitsyuǝ lala Staki.

english_verse: Greet Apelles, a faithful servant of Christ. Greet Aristobulus and his family.
translation_verse: Siǝsǝ Apele wǝ bóto bóbe nya búnyǝ boǝ uńyǝ itǝ Kristo. Nya lǝ ǝsiǝsǝ Aristobulo eto diyo eto betidi kenke ǝtǝ mǝ.

english_verse: Greet Herodion, who is a relative of mine. Greet Narcissus and the others in his family, who have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Siǝsǝ Herodion mɔ otokponyǝ ǝtǝ mɛ. Nya lǝ ǝsiǝsǝ Narkiso eto diyo eto betidi ba dífi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ Kristo.

english_verse: Greet Tryphaena and Tryphosa, who work hard for the Lord. Greet my dear friend Persis. She also works hard for the Lord.
translation_verse: Siǝsǝ besio ba ni Trifaena ku Trifosa ba diyifo Bonamute eto keyifo. Nya lǝ ǝsiǝsǝ mɔ ɔyimitsyuǝ lala Persi wǝ ni usio ɔni wǝ tsya díyifo keyifo tinti utǝ Bonamute.

english_verse: Greet Rufus, that special servant of the Lord, and greet his mother, who has been like a mother to me.
translation_verse: Siǝsǝ Rufo wǝ Bonamute dílǝkǝ fe wǝ ole ku wǝ ambe wǝ tsya lɛlɛ mɛ fe mɔ ambe ke.

english_verse: Greet Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, and Hermas, as well as our friends who are with them.
translation_verse: Siǝsǝ Asinkrito, Flegon, Herme, Patroba, Herma ku mǝ bayimi bafokanɔfɔ ba nkpe lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Greet Philologus, Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all of God's people who are with them.
translation_verse: Siǝsǝ Filologo, Yulia, Nereo ku wǝ ɔyimisio, ku Olimpa ku Onanto eto betidi kenke ba nkpe lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Be sure to give each other a warm greeting. All of Christ's churches greet you.
translation_verse: Bisiǝsǝ bǝtsyuǝ lǝ bɛkɔbe bǝtsyuǝ bɛlɛ lǝ Kristo eto kusu ǝsuǝ. Bafokanɔfɔ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ eto etsyukpa kenke bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ mi o-o.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to watch out for anyone who causes trouble and divides the church by refusing to do what all of you were taught. Stay away from them!
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, nlɛ mi kɔlɛ bɔlɛ kekleke minkǝ bimuǝ ǝsuǝ bińyǝ bikabe kusu itǝ betidi ba lela bǝ beesensǝ mi nti. Kǝnyǝ lǝ asa nnya bóte mi ǝsuǝ kefi keti mi kusu. Bilǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They want to serve themselves and not Christ the Lord. Their flattery and fancy talk fool people who don't know any better.
translation_verse: Itsyise betidi ba leeyifo asa nyamfo eto kaklee, beenyifo Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto keyifo. Bomu mǝ kosatee, mǝ alasa nnya beeyifo nɛ. Nya bakpe kɛnyɛ mlimlimli lǝ mǝ etikididi nnya baawɛ betidi ketitlisǝ asa kakpe mba lanlɛ kulesa bote.

english_verse: I am glad that everyone knows how well you obey the Lord. But still, I want you to understand what is good and not have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Utidi saa ánɔ kase bietsyue Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ koto, lǝ nyaso mǝǝnyǝ disuǝnyǝ tinti lǝ mi ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ lesa nǝ mimbɛbɛ mintsyiko mi ɔflɔ ni bǝ binyǝ lesa sɛɛ bitsyǝ lekpo. Nya lǝ befiani betidi ba lanla asa bua buyifo.

english_verse: Then God, who gives peace, will soon crush Satan under your feet. I pray that our Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Onanto wǝ lǝǝtǝ diyuǝsǝ, ebusǝnsǝ oba Obonsam kenke okpo, nya wuutǝ nkǝ bitǝkǝ wǝ kato lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ. Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto lefonǝ lǝ disiǝko mi.

english_verse: Timothy, who works with me, sends his greetings, and so do my relatives, Lucius, Jason, and Sosipater.
translation_verse: Timoteo wǝ ni mɔ uyifotsyuǝ nkǝ wǝǝsiǝsǝ mi. Nko ke ini Lukio tsya ku Yason ku Sosipatro ba bomǝ ni kusǝ kɔni eto betidi bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ mi.

english_verse: I, Tertius, also send my greetings. I am a follower of the Lord, and I wrote this letter.
translation_verse: Mɔ Tertio wǝ lɛwɔni kukue komfo ǝsiǝsǝ mi lǝ Bonamute eto diye ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Praise God! He can make you strong by means of my good news, which is the message about Jesus Christ. For ages and ages this message was kept secret,
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, bitǝ lǝ bɔtɛsǝ Onanto, wǝ loofó mi nkɛale bokpe nkǝ lǝ bińyǝ kekleke fe kase minlɛ bɔtɛyi lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ minlɛ bulǝkǝ kate itsyi lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ. Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo aka asa nnya bakula nya Onanto dílǝkǝ óte nya lɛkula bo alɛ kpǝ nnya léfe ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: but now at last it has been told. The eternal God commanded his prophets to write about the good news, so that all nations would obey and have faith.
translation_verse: Fɛ, mɔmɔɔ, bǝlǝkǝ asa bate bǝ lǝ betidi ba kenke lǝ banɔ kasɔ fe kase wǝ bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛwɔni bǝtsyǝ. Onanto wǝ nsi nkpǝ lefe saa eto lelabi ni bǝnkǝ, ele bǝ babe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo letsya itǝ kawunsiǝ ka kenke lǝ bafo wǝ banɔ lǝ betsyue wǝ ditiki koto.

english_verse: And now, because of Jesus Christ, we can praise the only wise God forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ bɔtɛsǝ Onanto wǝ hã ni obesibe idu mɔmɔ ɛntɔ lefe saa ɛyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo eto diye ǝsuǝ! Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Sosthenes, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, wǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝ mimfiani Yesu Kristo eto ɔtɔnkpee, mɔ ku bo ɔyimisani Sostene nlɛ mi kukue komfo bɔwɔni nɛ.

english_verse: To God's church in Corinth. Christ Jesus chose you to be his very own people, and you worship in his name, as we and all others do who call him Lord.
translation_verse: Bɔ́wɔni kukue komfo bɔlɛ Korintofɔ eto bafokanɔfɔ ba ɛyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ Onanto dílǝkǝ nya ókpadi mǝ nkǝ bafiani wǝ betidi kɛnkɛ. Fe kase úyifo betidi ba kenke tsya lefo Bonamute Yesu Kristo banɔ. Wǝ ni bonko mǝmblɛ eto Onamute.

english_verse: My prayer is that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ bɔtɔ boǝ Boanto Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto lefonǝ ku diyuǝ lǝ ditǝkǝko mi. Onanto Ǝǝtǝ Bo Asa Sɛɛ Ɛyɛ Lǝ Yesu Kristo Eso.

english_verse: I never stop thanking my God for treating you with undeserved grace by giving you Christ Jesus,
translation_verse: Maasɔ Onanto ani lefe saa lǝ mi disi lǝ wǝ lefonǝ nǝ úfi útǝ mi ɔyɛnko lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: Now you are certain that everything we told you about our Lord Christ Jesus is true.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo eto ditiki nǝmfo afo disiǝ lǝ miinti kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: You are not missing out on any blessings, as you wait for him to return.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, lǝ lefe nǝ biinyǝ binsǝke Boanto Onanto bǝ utǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo kusu lǝ ulǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ otee, Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝtǝsa saa eyi mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God can be trusted, and he chose you to be partners with his Son, our Lord Jesus Christ. Taking Sides
translation_verse: Onanto wǝ lékpadi mi nkǝ biyifo lɔni ku wǝ ubi Bonamute Yesu Kristo, wǝ ni nwǝ ǝsuǝ bioka bese nɛ. Bebe Sinini Biǝ Kǝsǝnsǝ Embudufǝ Mi Lenti.

english_verse: My dear friends, as a follower of our Lord Jesus Christ, I beg you to get along with each other. Don't take sides. Always try to agree in what you think.
translation_verse: Nyɛ lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto ǝsuǝale nya utǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ, nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi kekleke fe mɔ bayimi bafokanɔfɔ miǝ lǝ mimblɛ lǝ bɛnɔ bǝtsyuǝ kasɔ itǝ bǝ kǝsǝnsǝ embɔkɛ mi lenti. Nya lǝ mi kɛnyɛ lǝ keyifo kani lǝ asa nnya biebu disi ketsyiko ku nsusu bo ǝsuǝ bese uyi.

english_verse: Several people from Chloe's family have already reported to me that you keep arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Itsyise bayimi, betidi bǝtsyuǝ ba dítsyi Klo eto diyo átɛyi mɛ bǝ kǝdiǝ kpe mi lenti mfó.

english_verse: Has Christ been divided up? Was I nailed to a cross for you? Were you baptized in my name?
translation_verse: Mɔɔtɔ mi miǝ nyalɛ boofo Kristo boba kakpe lǝ akpa akpa? Nye Paulo ni nwǝ díkpǝ lǝ uyi ǝsuǝ lǝ mi disi? Nye bǝflǝsǝ utsyuǝ ku ntu lǝ Paulo eto diye ǝsuǝ? Owo lo!

english_verse: I thank God that I didn't baptize any of you except Crispus and Gaius.
translation_verse: Maasɔ Onanto ani bǝ ményifo kutsyuǝ saa ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa lǝ mi nti enso Krispo ku Gaio mate hã.

english_verse: Not one of you can say that you were baptized in my name.
translation_verse: Nyaso kutsyuǝ saa, embofo bɔtɛyi nkǝ mɔ diye kpe lǝ mba diflǝsǝ wǝ ntu nti.

english_verse: I did baptize the family of Stephanas, but I don't remember if I baptized anyone else.
translation_verse: Mookloma miǝ ńyifo Stefana ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa ntǝ wǝ ku wǝ diyo eto betidi, nya mensikloma lǝ ḿflǝsǝ kuutsyuǝ bamba saa tsya ntu.

english_verse: Christ did not send me to baptize. He sent me to tell the good news without using words that sound wise and would make the cross of Christ lose its power. Christ Is God's Power and Wisdom
translation_verse: Kristo mántsyese mɛ nkǝ mbǝ nkeyifo ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa kǝtǝ betidi. Bomu ótsyese mɛ nkǝ mbe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya ntǝ betidi. Nya maanyɛ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kobetete eto kusu ǝsuǝ kabe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya. Itsyise lǝ nyifo nkoo, nyalɛ Yesu Kristo eto ukpǝ wǝ úkpǝ eto ǝsuǝale ebuyifo ubimba. Kristo Eto Ditiki Sɛɛ Ni Onanto Eto Ǝsuǝale Ku Kobe.

english_verse: The message about the cross doesn't make any sense to lost people. But for those of us who are being saved, it is God's power at work.
translation_verse: Nyi kase betidi bamǝ eto ditsyǝbi ditǝ bǝ balɛ bukpǝ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. Kristo eto ukpǝ lǝ kuyi ǝsuǝ eto etiki eyifo ebukisa lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ. Fɛɛ bomba Onanto lǝǝtǝ nkǝ bunyǝ bofoo, buyi boǝ Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eyifo Onanto eto wǝ ǝsuǝale.

english_verse: As God says in the Scriptures, “I will destroy the wisdom of all who claim to be wise. I will confuse those who think they know so much.”
translation_verse: Lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ, Onanto átɛyi nkǝ “Mɔɔtsylɔsǝ babesibe eto kobetete. Nya muulǝkǝ nte miǝ bekuente eto etiki eyifo ǝsuǝale itǝ mi.”

english_verse: What happened to those wise people? What happened to those experts in the Scriptures? What happened to the ones who think they have all the answers? Didn't God show that the wisdom of this world is foolish?
translation_verse: Nyamfo lɛ bote bǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto babesibe ku bekuente ku betidi ba kpǝ nyɛ laafo etiki bunǝ kenke eyifo ebimbasa.

english_verse: God was wise and decided not to let the people of this world use their wisdom to learn about him. Instead, God chose to save only those who believe the foolish message we preach.
translation_verse: Onanto yi, ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ kobetete ǝsuǝ úyifo betidi nko, nkǝ lǝ bayɛ bɔyɛ lǝ mǝ kawunsiǝ eto kobetete ǝsuǝ bate wǝ. Nya wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ eto letsya boabe mfoo, nya woǝlǝkǝ eyifo ebukisa lǝ betidi bǝtsyuǝ ɔflɔ. Fɛɛ Onanto aayɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ nya woǝlǝkǝ betidi ba léfo bánɔ lǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: Jews ask for miracles, and Greeks want something that sounds wise.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ aabɛbɛ bǝ bǝǝnyǝ ayanisa buyifo. Nya Grikifɔ, mǝ aala bɛ baate kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kobe.

english_verse: But we preach that Christ was nailed to a cross. Most Jews have problems with this, and most Gentiles think it is foolish.
translation_verse: Fɛ boo, Kristo wǝ básɔ bámanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie usuǝ eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto letsya boabe. Nya Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo laayɛ kedufǝ kelǝ Yudafɔ lǝ akɔɛsi. Nya betidi ba lenni Yudafɔ tsya, laanɔ nya fe ebukisa.

english_verse: Our message is God's power and wisdom for the Jews and the Greeks that he has chosen.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi ba Onanto dílǝkǝ utǝ lǝ Yudafɔ ku Grikifɔ ntii, Kristo wǝ eto Ditiki Sɛɛ boabe letsya mfo, wǝ ni Onanto eto ǝsuǝale ku wǝ kobetete nɛ.

english_verse: Even when God is foolish, he is wiser than everyone else, and even when God is weak, he is stronger than everyone else.
translation_verse: Itsyise lesa nǝ betidi lǝǝnyǝ bǝ iyifo Onanto eto ebukisaa, iyifo kobetete eso betidi eto ale. Nya Onanto eto eyifosa nya diyifo fe yɔkpɔɔ, kpe ǝsuǝale eso betidi eto ale.

english_verse: My dear friends, remember what you were when God chose you. The people of this world didn't think that many of you were wise. Only a few of you were in places of power, and not many of you came from important families.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, fɛ Onanto lǝ ulǝkǝ mii, biokloma kase bítsyǝ lǝ betidi eto ǝnǝmi! Mi kpǝ mánte kobe nya bíankɛ ǝsuǝale saa. Nye bíambɔ bítsyi mmfo bo lɛkɛ dibu kafo saa.

english_verse: But God chose the foolish things of this world to put the wise to shame. He chose the weak things of this world to put the powerful to shame.
translation_verse: Bomu Onanto étsyue úlǝkǝ betidi ba lǝ kawunsiǝ eto ǝnǝmi leeninǝ nkǝ lǝ okpe kawunsiǝ kamfo eto babesibe kofani. Nya úlǝkǝ betidi ba dimanle kulesa lǝ kawunsiǝ eto ǝnǝmi itǝ lǝ ufi okpe kawunsiǝ eto bǝsuǝaletidi bamfo kofani.

english_verse: What the world thinks is worthless, useless, and nothing at all is what God has used to destroy what the world considers important.
translation_verse: Onanto ǝlǝkǝ betidi ba dimanle kulesa lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi eto ǝnǝmi, nya beembu mǝ kakpe ku lesa nti nkǝ lǝ ɔyɛ lǝ mǝ usuǝ okpe betidi ba kawunsiǝ leebu bǝ mǝ ni mba nkpǝ dibu nya bankpǝ kalende kofani, se benni kulesa eso.

english_verse: God did all this to keep anyone from bragging to him.
translation_verse: Nyamfo luutǝ bǝ kutsyuǝ saa embofo botaka keńyǝ kasɔ lɛkɔɛsi lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: So if you want to brag, do what the Scriptures say and brag about the Lord.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Utidi wǝ laasɔ wǝ lɛkɔɛsii, ele bǝ ɔsɔ wǝ lɛkɔɛsi lǝ lesa nǝ Bonamute díyifo utǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Friends, when I came and told you the mystery that God had shared with us, I didn't use big words or try to sound wise.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, lefe nǝ mímbǝ mi ɔflɔ miǝ lǝ mbé Onanto eto etiki kulakula tinti letsya nte mii, ményifo nko ku kɛnyɛ kamini nye lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kobe ǝsuǝ ntǝ mi.

english_verse: In fact, while I was with you, I made up my mind to speak only about Jesus Christ, who had been nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ mímbǝ mínkɛ mi lǝ ɔflɔɔ, ni mi etiki itsyi lǝ Yesu Kristo ete ǝsuǝ. Nya naya nsi nso kenke ni lǝ wǝ ukpǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: At first, I was weak and trembling with fear.
translation_verse: Nyaso lefe nǝ mímbǝ mi ɔflɔɔ, mbǝ fe ɔsɔsɔbi. Nya sikpi dímuǝ mɛ ku ketinkǝ tsya.

english_verse: When I talked with you or preached, I didn't try to prove anything by sounding wise. I simply let God's Spirit show his power.
translation_verse: Nya biunyǝ biǝ asa nnya mínte áte nko ke, yényifo fe utidi wǝ eto kɛnyɛ nkpe kobe nya únyi kobe. Bomu mɔ etiki nya mikǝdii, áte sitinti kase Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nkpe ǝsuǝale.

english_verse: That way you would have faith because of God's power and not because of human wisdom.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, inni kawunsiǝ eto utidi eto kobetete ǝsuǝ bɛyɛ béte Kristo, bomu ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ. Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ Yi Lesa Saa Lǝ Onanto Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We do use wisdom when speaking to people who are mature in their faith. But it isn't the wisdom of this world or of its rulers, who will soon disappear.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔ etiki nnya meedi, meedi nya kǝtǝ betide ba nyi kobe nya bekesu sɛtɔ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ eto asa kasɔnɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya yanka kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kobetete nye bǝsuǝaletidi ba leedi seka lǝ kasɔ kamfo ǝsuǝ nya banlɛ mǝ ǝsuǝ bonyansǝ.

english_verse: We speak of God's hidden and mysterious wisdom that God decided to use for our glory long before the world began.
translation_verse: Kobetete ko eto etiki minlɛ bɔtɛyi mfoo, etsyi lǝ Onanto eto kobe ko bákula betidi ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ Onanto étsyue ketsyue kamfo útsyǝ kokoko nkǝ wuulǝkǝ bo fɛ úyifo kawunsiǝ.

english_verse: The rulers of this world didn't know anything about this wisdom. If they had known about it, they would not have nailed the glorious Lord to a cross.
translation_verse: Kawunsiǝ kamfo eto bǝsuǝaletidi eto kuutsyuǝ mánte kulesa itsyi lǝ kobe komfo ǝsuǝ. Itsyise lǝ nnya ete bátee, eni bánsɔ Bonamute le uyikabie ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But it is just as the Scriptures say, “What God has planned for people who love him is more than eyes have seen or ears have heard. It has never even entered our minds!”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Lesa nǝ kuutsyuǝ saa mǝnyǝ nye woannɔ tɔɔ, nya kuutsyuǝ saa mémbu tɔ disi utsyiko tsya nkǝ yuubǝ itǝ, nya tutuutu ni lesa nǝ Onanto dítsyue utsyǝ utǝ betidi ba laala wǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: God's Spirit has shown you everything. His Spirit finds out everything, even what is deep in the mind of God.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bo alɛɛ, Onanto dilǝkǝ wǝ asakulakula nyamfo lǝ lekple óte bo, ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ eedufǝ lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ nya kaate, nya diate Onanto eto asakulakula kulaa tsya.

english_verse: You are the only one who knows what is in your own mind, and God's Spirit is the only one who knows what is in God's mind.
translation_verse: Fe kase utidi eto lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nkpe lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ hã nyi wǝ kemiǝ eto lesa saa itsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, nko ke ini bǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ hã nyi lesa saa itsyi lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: But God has given us his Spirit. This is why we don't think the same way that the people of this world think. This is also why we can recognize the blessings God has given us.
translation_verse: Nya boo, inni kawunsiǝ kamfo eto lɛwɔnɔ nǝ lǝǝtǝ beeyifo asa bua nkpe lǝ bo ǝsuǝ. Bomu Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ luutǝ bote ǝtǝsa nnya bófo butsyiko lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ, kafo faa, ni ni nnǝ nkpǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Every word we speak was taught to us by God's Spirit, not by human wisdom. And this same Spirit helps us teach spiritual things to spiritual people.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, inni kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kobe eto asa nnya betidi laate bófo búfi bɔnlɛ mi etiki budi. Bomu asa nnya Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ dílǝkǝ óte bo, nya ni asa nnya boǝlǝkǝ kate mba léfo Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ nɛ.

english_verse: People who are guided by the Spirit can make all kinds of judgments, but they cannot be judged by others.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ lefo disiǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ, wǝ loofo lesa saa bunyǝ kǝtsyǝ nɛ. Fɛɛ wǝ alɛɛ, betidi embofo wǝ bunyǝ ketsyǝ lekpo nɛ.

english_verse: The Scriptures ask, “Has anyone ever known the thoughts of the Lord or given him advice?” But we understand what Christ is thinking.
translation_verse: Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Utidi saa enyi lesa nǝ nkpǝ lǝ Bonamute eto nsusu. Nya kuutsyuǝ saa tsya anté wǝ kulesa.” Fɛɛ boo, Kristo eto nsusu kpe lǝ bo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My friends, you are acting like the people of this world. That's why I could not speak to you as spiritual people. You are like babies as far as your faith in Christ is concerned.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, mǝmbofo mi etiki budinko lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ fe kase muudinko betidi ba Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ díkafo dísiǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ. Bomu muudinko mi etiki fe betidi ba eto ǝnǝmi nsi ntǝkǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto asa ǝsuǝ. Nya bisi biyifo ekpefi kɛkɛ lǝ Kristo bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.
