english_verse: Languages others don't know may mean something to unbelievers, but not to the Lord's followers. Prophecy, on the other hand, is for followers, not for unbelievers.
translation_verse: Nyaso bele bele bɔtɛyi eyifo lesatsyuǝ bulǝkǝkate manfokanɔfɔ fɛɛ inni itǝ bafokanɔfɔ. Fɛɛ Onanto eto ditiki kɛnyɛ bulǝkǝǝ, nnya ni lesa nǝ muufi nte bafokanɔfɔ asa nnya inni itǝ mamfokanɔfɔ.

english_verse: Suppose everyone in your worship service started speaking unknown languages, and some outsiders or some unbelievers come in. Won't they think you are crazy?
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, lǝ bafokanɔfɔ kenke eto utsyuǝ saa etsyiko etiki budi lǝ bele bele ǝsuǝ nya utidi utsyuǝ bamba kpe mfo lǝ mi nti nye betidi ba mamfokanɔfɔ nkpe mi lǝ ntii, biǝnyǝ biǝ bɔɔtɛyi bǝnkǝ disi abia mi fe bebuki?

english_verse: But suppose all of you are prophesying when those unbelievers and outsiders come in. They will realize that they are sinners, and they will want to change their ways because of what you are saying.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ mi nti eto utsyuǝ saa eyifo Onanto eto Unyɛlǝkǝtidi nya utidi bimba nye utidi wǝ mamfokanɔnyǝ utsyuǝ ǝbǝ údufǝ lǝ mi ntii, wuunyǝ wǝ lebua utsyuǝ lekpo ɛyɛ lǝ lesa nǝ wɔanɔ eso. Asa nnya woanɔ eboté wǝ nkǝ Onanto ebokponko wǝ lekpo.

english_verse: They will tell what is hidden in their hearts. Then they will kneel down and say to God, “We are certain that you are with these people.” Worship Must Be Orderly
translation_verse: Nya wǝ kosate ebulǝkǝ asa nnya lɛbiɔ enkpe lǝ wǝ lǝ lekple nya woobokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ ɔtɛsǝ Onanto ɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Sitinti, Onanto kpe mi lenti!”

english_verse: My friends, when you meet to worship, you must do everything for the good of everyone there. That's how it should be when someone sings or teaches or tells what God has said or speaks an unknown language or explains what the language means.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, nla miǝ matɛyi lesatsyuǝ nǝ nkpe lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ lǝ mi disikakpekɔ. Lǝ betsya biǝ biato olaa, utsyuǝ kpe kusǝ ko waala nkǝ wǝǝsǝ, nya utsyuǝ kpe lesatsyuǝ waala nkǝ waate. Nya utsyuǝ tsya ala nkǝ wǝǝlǝkǝ Onanto eto lesatsyuǝ ote. Nya utsyuǝ tsya kpe kɛnyɛ lǝ bele bele ǝsuǝ, nya utsyuǝ tsya ala nkǝ wǝǝlǝkǝ asa nyamfo kasɔ. Fɛɛ bebe biǝ biyifo asa nyamfo kenke bǝ ɛwunsǝko bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ.

english_verse: No more than two or three of you should speak unknown languages during the meeting. You must take turns, and someone should always be there to explain what you mean.
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ kpe kɛnyɛ kǝtsyuǝ ka ola nkǝ waatɛyi lǝ bele bele ǝsuǝǝ, utidi fe inuǝ nye itsyǝ hã te ele bǝ bedi etiki nnya nkpe mǝ ɔni, ɔni. Nya ele bǝ bǝnyǝ uti bamba wǝ tsya luulǝkǝ asa nyamǝ bátɛyi mfó eto kasɔ.

english_verse: If no one can explain, you must keep silent in church and speak only to yourself and to God.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mba mfó wǝ luulǝkǝ nnya kasɔɔ, utidi wǝ nlɛ etiki mfó, ele bǝ ɔyɛ lǝ wǝ ku Onanto hã lǝ bedi etiki lǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If someone sitting there receives a message from God, the speaker must stop and let the other person speak.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mba nkpe lǝ katsyakɔ mfó eto utsyuǝ áfo kɛnyɛ ketsyuǝ itsyi lǝ Onanto ɔflɔɔ, ele bǝ utidi wǝ nlɛ etiki budi mfo yɛ wǝ etiki nnya ɔnlɛ budi lǝ utǝ utidi ǝmǝ kusu.

english_verse: Let only one person speak at a time, then all of you will learn something and be encouraged.
translation_verse: Mimblɛ kenke ebofo mi kɛnyɛ ka bɛnyɛnko bɔtɛyi ɔni ɔni itǝ bǝ utsyuǝ saa ebofo lesatsyuǝ nnya lookpe wǝ ǝsuǝale.

english_verse: A prophet should be willing to stop and let someone else speak.
translation_verse: Betidi ba lǝǝlǝkǝ Onanto eto ditiki kɛnyɛ aafo ǝsuǝ bunwǝ kalɛ lǝ etiki nnya budi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God wants everything to be done peacefully and in order. When God's people meet in church,
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto aala nkǝ buyifo asa lǝ kusu ku diyuǝ ǝsuǝ. Kase seka inte lǝ Onanto eto bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa kenke ntii,

english_verse: the women must not be allowed to speak. They must keep quiet and listen, as the Law of Moses teaches.
translation_verse: ele bǝ besio di kãã lǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto katsyakɔ. Bomuu, ele bǝ babokosǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ fe kase Onanto eto kɔfi laate. Nya bǝmbǝ kusu bǝ lǝ bedi etiki.

english_verse: If there is something they want to know, they can ask their husbands when they get home. It is disgraceful for women to speak in church.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bala bǝ baatɔ lesatsyuǝ eto kasɔ banɔɔ, mǝ bǝsǝ ele bǝ batɔ lǝ mǝ ayo. Itsyise iyifo afanisa bǝ usio ńyǝ ukedi etiki lǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto katsyakɔ.

english_verse: God's message did not start with you people, and you are not the only ones it has reached.
translation_verse: Nye, bɔtɛyi bɛnlɛ bǝ mi ɔflɔ Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ dítsyi dibǝǝ? Nye mi ɔflɔ ete ditiki nǝmǝ díbǝ leyoo?

english_verse: If you think of yourself as a prophet or a spiritual person, you will know I am writing only what the Lord has commanded.
translation_verse: Lǝ mi nti eto utsyuǝ eebu nkǝ Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi unii, nye okpe Lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝtǝsaa, ele bǝ ibǝ bǝ ote nkǝ, nya minlɛ bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi eyifo kɔfi itsyi lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ.

english_verse: So don't pay attention to anyone who ignores what I am writing.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utidi ǝmǝ áni ditiki nǝmfoo, ele bǝ mi tsya ni wǝ.

english_verse: My friends, be eager to prophesy and don't stop anyone from speaking languages that others don't know.
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, bifi mi kusubebe kenke bitǝkǝ lǝ Onanto eto ditiki kɛnyɛlǝkǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ bienti mba laatɛyi bele bele kusu.

english_verse: But do everything properly and in order.
translation_verse: Nyaso ele bǝ biyifo lesa saa lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to remember the message I preached and that you believed and trusted.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, mɔmɔɔ, nla miǝ bekloma ditiki sɛɛ nǝ mímboko mi béfo. Ditiki nǝ béfo bɛnɔ nya bińyǝ lǝ ni ǝsuǝ kekleke lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You will be saved by this message, if you hold firmly to it. But if you don't, your faith was all for nothing.
translation_verse: Nya nyamfó ni ditiki sɛɛ nǝmǝ ku ni letsya nǝ mímbe míntǝ mi nɛ. Ditiki nǝ mǝ ebutǝ mi nkpǝ lǝ bɛlɛ ni kekleke, le inni nko mi bofokanɔ eyifo ebimba.

english_verse: I told you the most important part of the message exactly as it was told to me. This part is: Christ died for our sins, as the Scriptures say.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ mímfo mintsyiko Boanto Onanto ɔflɔɔ, ni ke mímfi míntǝ mi nɛ. Nya nyamfo ni lesa nǝ mímfo ku koya kpǝ enso kenke bǝ Kristo ǝkpǝ lǝ bo abua eto disi fe kase báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue kemiǝ.

english_verse: He was buried, and three days later he was raised to life, as the Scriptures say.
translation_verse: Nya bébikǝ wǝ, nya Onanto létakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ óboko nkpǝ lǝ eyi ǝtsyǝ eto kama, nya ubǝ unsi lǝ nkpǝ fe kase bawɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Christ appeared to Peter, then to the twelve.
translation_verse: Nya ulǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte Petro ku batɔnkpe lefosi inuǝ bamǝ.

english_verse: After this, he appeared to more than five hundred other followers. Most of them are still alive, but some have died.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, wǝǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte mba ditǝkǝko wǝ ba eso betidi lofa anɔ lǝ lefe ditsyuǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya mǝ nti eto bǝtsyuǝ kpǝ si besi nkpǝ mmi, ite bǝ mǝ bǝtsyuǝ ébukpǝ koko.

english_verse: He also appeared to James, then to all of the apostles.
translation_verse: Nya nyamfo eto kamaa, úlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte Yakobo ku batɔnkpe bamǝ kenke.

english_verse: Finally, he appeared to me, even though I am like someone who was born at the wrong time.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, úlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ óte mintsya, mɔ nte fe utidi wǝ bále lǝ lefe nǝ dímanyo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I am the least important of all the apostles. In fact, I caused so much trouble for God's church that I don't even deserve to be called an apostle.
translation_verse: Itsyise mɔ ni batɔnkpe kenke nti eto nwǝ nso bɔfɛ. Nya mǝńyǝ ntǝ bǝ bakpo mɛ bǝ ɔtɔnkpe kulaa tsya, etsyise ntǝkǝko Onanto eto bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa kama nte mǝ ohiã.

english_verse: But God treated me with undeserved grace! He made me what I am, and his grace wasn't wasted. I worked much harder than any of the other apostles, although it was really God's grace at work and not me.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ esoo, nyifo utidi wǝ mini mmi. Nya wǝ lefonǝ eto asa nnya útǝ mɛ, ǝbǝ kutǝkǝ. Nya mínyifo keyifo kekleke enso batɔnkpe bamba ba ǝsuǝ kulaa betidi dífi ǝnǝmi bǝtǝkǝ nya inni lǝ mɔ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ. Bomu lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale nya lɛwunsǝko mɛ mímfo nyamfo buyifo.

english_verse: But it doesn't matter if I preached or if they preached. All of you believed the message just the same. God's People Will Be Raised to Life
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ mɔ ni lɛtɛyi mi lesaatsyuǝ o-o, nye mǝ lɛtɛyi mi o-o, lesa lɔni nǝmǝ ete bɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi nɛ. Nya nyamfo ni nnya béfo bɛnɔ nɛ. Onanto Átakasǝ Kristo Úńyǝnsǝ Utsyiko Bǝkpǝnkpǝ Nti.

english_verse: If we preach that Christ was raised from death, how can some of you say the dead will not be raised to life?
translation_verse: Mɔmɔ se bɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi boǝ Onanto átakasǝ Kristo úńyǝnsǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝǝ, beso ini bǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, Onanto ensiembotakasǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ oboko nkpǝ bio?

english_verse: If they won't be raised to life, Christ himself wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Lǝ nko ini sitintii, nyalɛ Onanto mántakasǝ Kristo utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ óboko nkpǝ.

english_verse: And if Christ wasn't raised to life, our message is worthless, and so is your faith.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Onanto mántakasǝ Kristo utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ sitintii, nyalɛ nnya letsyabebe ǝmbɔkɛ kutǝkǝ itǝ mi. Nya mi bofokanɔ tsya eyifo bimba.

english_verse: If the dead won't be raised to life, we have told lies about God by saying he raised Christ to life, when he really did not.
translation_verse: Nya nte lesa nǝ nsi lookpe bo nkɛale lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe inni sidia bɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ boǝ ótakasǝ Yesu utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ sitinti ini bǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ aantaka ketsyi ɔkɔmǝ kǝbǝ nkpǝǝ, nyalɛ wátakasǝ Yesu utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ.

english_verse: So if the dead won't be raised to life, Christ wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ sitinti ini bǝ baatakasǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ ketsyiko ɔkɔmǝ, nyalɛɛ, bete biǝ wantakasǝ Yesu utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ óboko nkpǝ.

english_verse: Unless Christ was raised to life, your faith is useless, and you are still living in your sins.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Onanto mántakasǝ Yesu utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ sitintii, nyalɛ mi bofokanɔ ǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ saa, nya bisi benkpe lǝ mi abua ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And those people who died after putting their faith in him are completely lost.
translation_verse: Nya kasɔ ni bǝnkǝ mba léfo Kristo bánɔ ba díkpǝ tsya ánya.

english_verse: If our hope in Christ is good only for this life, we are worse off than anyone else.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto nkpǝ eso ete bufi bo kusubebe butǝkǝ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ bo nkpǝ kpe kaminsǝ enso lǝ kawunsiǝ kenke eto betidi nti.

english_verse: But Christ has been raised to life! And he makes us certain that others will also be raised to life.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ɔnukualɛ ini bǝnkǝ Onanto átakasǝ Kristo utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ. Nya wǝ ni utidi tutɛ wǝ létaka utsyi ɔkɔmǝ lǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ nti nnya nlɛ bo uyi bose nkǝ mba kenke díkekpǝ si bootaka.

english_verse: Just as we will die because of Adam, we will be raised to life because of Christ.
translation_verse: Itsyise fe kase ukpǝ lɛyɛ lǝ utidi ɔni ǝsuǝ úbǝ kawunsiǝ, nko ke ini bǝ bekpǝnkpǝ ebotaka betsyi ɔkɔmǝ ɛyɛ lǝ utidi ɔni hã ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: But we must each wait our turn. Christ was the first to be raised to life, and his people will be raised to life when he returns.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto ebotakasǝ utsyuǝ saa wǝ nsi nkpǝ lǝ kusu ko Onanto kosate ditsyue utsyǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya Kristo ni ututɛ. Nya lǝ lefe nǝ luubǝ bio ǝsuǝǝ, mba dífi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ Kristoo, mǝ usi wootakasǝ uńyǝnsǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Then after Christ has destroyed all powers and forces, the end will come, and he will give the kingdom to God the Father.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, kalosǝkɔ ebubǝ. Nya Kristo ebɔtsylɔsǝ lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale saa, betidi ba nsi lǝ ndikɔ ndikɔ kɛnyɛ ku mba nkpǝ lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale saa eto okle. Nya Kristo luufi sekakedikɔ siamǝ okpe lǝ Onanto wǝ ni Anto eto ani.

english_verse: Christ will rule until he puts all his enemies under his power,
translation_verse: Itsyise ele bǝ Kristo di seka isu ese lefe nǝ Onanto luufi wǝ balo kenke okpe lǝ Kristo eto akpa kalɔ.

english_verse: and the last enemy he destroys will be death.
translation_verse: Nya olo fɛfɛ wǝ eto ditsyǝbi wɔɔtsylɔsǝ ni ukpǝ.

english_verse: When the Scriptures say he will put everything under his power, they don't include God. It was God who put everything under the power of Christ.
translation_verse: Itsyise Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue átɛyi nkǝ, “Onanto éfi asa kenke ókpe lǝ wǝ akpa kalɔ.” Nya ekpa wuee bǝ lǝ bátɛyi bǝ asa kenkee, nyamfo anlɛ bote bǝ Onanto wǝ dífi asa nyamfo ókpe lǝ Kristo eto akpa kalɔ tsya bébu wǝ bakpe lenti.

english_verse: After everything is under the power of God's Son, he will put himself under the power of God, who put everything under his Son's power. Then God will mean everything to everyone.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto difi asa nnya kenke ókpe lǝ Kristo kalɔ ólesǝǝ, wǝ Kristo wǝ ni Onanto Eto Ubi ǝmǝ ebufi wǝ ǝsuǝ okpe lǝ Onanto ǝmǝ eto kalɔ bǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ udi seka lǝ asa nnya kenke ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If the dead are not going to be raised to life, what will people do who are being baptized for them? Why are they being baptized for those dead people?
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, itsyi lǝ betidi ba laafo ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa ǝsuǝ, lǝ betidi ba díkekpǝ koko eto disi, be ni diyifobi nǝmǝ eto kasɔ? Nya be nkpe lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ? Lǝ sitinti ini fe kase bǝtsyuǝ laatɛyi bǝnkǝ bensiembotakasǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ bǝbǝ nkpǝǝ be ini eso ele bǝ bǝflǝsǝ betidi bamǝ ntu lǝ mba díkekpǝ bafe eto disi?

english_verse: and face death every day? The pride that I have in you because of Christ Jesus our Lord is what makes me say this.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, ukpǝ eto bulǝ tǝkǝko mɛ diyi saa nǝ kale disiǝ! Nya maabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato kǝtǝ ukpǝ lǝ mi disi itsyi lǝ kase buyifo bani ku Bonamute Kristo Yesu eso. Nyaso mǝǝlǝkǝ nyamfo kate wuee nɛ.

english_verse: Don't fool yourselves. Bad friends will destroy you.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lǝ bawɛ mi bakpe. Sɛyɛtsyuǝ bua eto betidi aabiasǝ ditsyǝbi sɛɛ eto ole.

english_verse: Be sensible and stop sinning. You should be embarrassed that some people still don't know about God. What Our Bodies Will Be Like
translation_verse: Bisinkli bifi nsusu lǝ asa sɛɛ buyifo ǝsuǝ, lǝ bɛyɛ asa bua buyifo. Nlɛ mi etiki budi wuee bǝ lǝ kofani lǝ kɔlɛ mi, itsyise mi bǝtsyuǝ enyi Onanto. Paulo Édi Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Bǝkpǝnkpǝ Eto Businkli Kataka Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Some of you have asked, “How will the dead be raised to life? What kind of bodies will they have?”
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ ebɔtɔ nkǝ, “Ntsyǝ bunsi bootakasǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ nya ntsyǝ boosinkli bǝbǝ bǝsiǝ nkpǝ? Nya nte ǝsuǝ nnya eto okle lɔɔkɛ mǝ?”

english_verse: Don't be foolish. A seed must die before it can sprout from the ground.
translation_verse: Mi betidi eto bamumu! Lǝ ato diyibibi lǝ kasɔɔ, dienkǝ kafiani lesa nǝ nkpe nkpǝ lǝ díembu lǝ sitǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: This is because God gives everything the kind of body he wants it to have.
translation_verse: Onanto ǝtǝ diyibibi nǝmǝ ditsyǝbi nǝ ke woala. Wǝǝtǝ diyibibi saa ku ni uyi eto okle nǝ lɛlɛkɛ itǝ ni.

english_verse: Everything in the heavens has a body, and so does everything on earth. But each one is very different from all the others.
translation_verse: Kato eto asa kpe. Nya kasɔ mfo eto asa tsya nkpe. Asa nnya nkpe kato eto ǝsuǝ eto bɔnɔ bobe kpe lete lǝ nnya nkpe lǝ kasɔ mfo eto ǝsuǝ eto bɔnɔ bobe.

english_verse: The sun isn't like the moon, the moon isn't like the stars, and each star is different.
translation_verse: Kofe ku ko diyǝndebi ku kofande tsya eto diyǝndebi nkpe lete. Nya befandebi tsyaa, mǝ diyǝnde kpe lete. Nya lǝ befandebi nti kulaa tsyaa, letekɛkɛ kpe lǝ mǝ diyǝndebi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: That's how it will be when our bodies are raised to life. These bodies will die, but the bodies that are raised will live forever.
translation_verse: Nko ke yuutsyǝ lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto lootakasǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ nya boosinkli bǝbǝ bǝsiǝ nkpǝ nɛ. Lǝ bebikǝ utidi eto sinǝǝ, siyifo lesa nǝ luubu ebia. Nya lǝ batakasǝ wǝ baboko nkpǝǝ, weensi embukpǝ.

english_verse: These ugly and weak bodies will become beautiful and strong.
translation_verse: Lǝ bebikǝ wǝǝ, weensiannɔ bobe nya wǝǝyuǝ. Nya lefe nǝ bátakasǝ wǝ betsyiko ɔkɔmǝǝ, woanɔ bobe nya woakɛ ǝsuǝale.

english_verse: As surely as there are physical bodies, there are spiritual bodies. And our physical bodies will be changed into spiritual bodies.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ bebikǝ wǝǝ, uyifo kawunsiǝ eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ sia díkpǝ. Nya lǝ batakasǝ wǝ baboko nkpǝ, uyifo lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝ. Lǝ kawunsiǝ eto ǝsuǝ kpee, nyalɛ bete biǝ lɛwɔnɔ kemiǝ eto ǝsuǝ tsya kpe.

english_verse: The first man was named Adam, and the Scriptures tell us that he was a living person. But Jesus, who may be called the last Adam, is a life-giving spirit.
translation_verse: Itsyise ekpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝ, “Utidi tutɛ wǝ ni Adam, Onanto uni diyifo wǝ nya útǝ wǝ nkpǝ fe kawunsiǝ eto utidi.” Nya Adam fɛfɛ ǝmfoo, wǝ ni Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ nɛ.

english_verse: We see that the one with a spiritual body did not come first. He came after the one who had a physical body.
translation_verse: Inni lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nkpe lǝ bo lǝǝtǝ boeyifo asaa, laatɔ. Bomu ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ laatɔ̃. Nya kama fɛ lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nkpǝ kemiǝ lǝǝlǝkǝ.

english_verse: The first man was made from the dust of the earth, but the second man came from heaven.
translation_verse: Adam tutɛ wǝ Onanto díyifoo, úlǝkǝ wǝ utsyiko sitǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya Adam nuǝfǝ alɛ, kato utsyi úbǝ.

english_verse: Everyone on earth has a body like the body of the one who was made from the dust of the earth. And everyone in heaven has a body like the body of the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba nkpe lǝ kasɔ mfoo, mǝ eyifo fe utidi wǝ bulǝkǝ betsyiko lǝ kasɔ eto sitǝ hã ǝsuǝ. Nya mba beyifo itǝ katoo, mǝ tsya eyifo fe utidi wǝ ditsyi katoo, úbǝ.

english_verse: Just as we are like the one who was made out of earth, we will be like the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Fe kase bunte fe utidi wǝ lɛbɔ utsyi lǝ kasɔ mfo eto ditsyǝbii, nko ke ini bǝ utidi wǝ ditsyi kato ubǝǝ, ebutǝ nkǝ bofo wǝ ditsyǝbi nɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that our bodies of flesh and blood will decay. This means they cannot share in God's kingdom, which lasts forever.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, nyamfo eto kasɔ lǝkǝlǝkǝ ni bǝnkǝ lesa nǝ ni ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ku kɔtɔɔ, ǝmbofo kedikɔ bunyǝ lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ. Nya lesa nǝ laabiaa, embofo kedikɔ bunyǝ lǝ lesa nǝ laambia ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: It will happen suddenly, quicker than the blink of an eye. At the sound of the last trumpet the dead will be raised. We will all be changed, so we will never die again.
translation_verse: Bɛnɔ akulasa nyamfo. Inni bomblɛ kenke luukpǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ bǝfǝ kakpatsyaku fɛfɛɛ, bɔɔtsyi bomblɛ eto ditsyǝbi bawuninsǝ. Nya wuuyifo nnya nko lǝ dinǝmisɔsɔ lɔni kplo ǝsuǝ. Itsyise lǝ kakpatsyaku fɛfɛ ǝfǝǝ, Onanto ebotakasǝ bǝkpǝnkpǝ ɔboko nkpǝ itǝ bensiembukpǝ kulefe. Nya woofloma bo ditsyǝbi kenke.

english_verse: The bodies we now have are weak and can die. But they will be changed into bodies that are eternal. Then the Scriptures will come true, “Death has lost the battle!
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ asa nyamfo ǝbǝ itǝ nko nya baafloma asa nnya laabia isu nnya lensiambiaa, nyalɛ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue eto etiki nnya nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Bátsylɔ ukpǝ eto ditsyǝbi butǝkǝ wǝ kato!” ǝbǝ itǝ nko sitinti.

english_verse: Sin is what gives death its sting, and the Law is the power behind sin.
translation_verse: Ukpǝ ǝǝnyǝ ǝsuǝale nya woata bo obé ɛyɛ lǝ lebuayifoyifo eso. Nya ǝsuǝale nnya lebua lǝǝnyǝ etsyi lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But thank God for letting our Lord Jesus Christ give us the victory!
translation_verse: Fɛɛ boasɔ Onanto ani. Wǝ uni ditǝ nkǝ butǝkǝ lebua kato ɛyɛ lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ!

english_verse: My dear friends, stand firm and don't be shaken. Always keep busy working for the Lord. You know that everything you do for him is worthwhile.
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bayimi lala, bińyǝ kekleke, biǝntǝ disi. Nya bińyǝ kekleke lǝ Bonamute eto keyifo ǝsuǝ lefe saa. Itsyise biyi biǝ kulesa ǝmbǝ bǝ biuyifo ni lǝ Bonamute Yesu eto keyifo ǝsuǝ ka luuyifo kebimbale.

english_verse: When you collect money for God's people, I want you to do exactly what I told the churches in Galatia to do.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, bɛwɔni mɛ lesatsyuǝ itsyi lǝ atabi nnya bela biǝ biako lǝ bifi bisu bɛwunsǝko Onanto eto betidi ba nkpǝ lǝ Yudea eto kasɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya ɛlɛkɛ bǝ biyifo nya eto okle míntɛyi Galatiafɔ eto bafokanɔfɔ miǝ beyifo.

english_verse: That is, each Sunday each of you must put aside part of what you have earned. If you do this, you won't have to take up a collection when I come.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Kɔsida saa Kɔsida eto diyi ǝsuǝǝ, ele bǝ utsyuǝ saa muǝ ǝsuǝ utsyǝ ku lesa nǝ woofo boko itsyi lǝ lesa nǝ ofo bunyǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ yembusu iyifo bǝ bako oko ǝmǝ lekolɛwɛ lǝ lefe nǝ mínkǝ míndufǝ mi ɔflɔ mfó.

english_verse: Choose some followers to take the money to Jerusalem. I will send them on with the money and with letters which show that you approve of them.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mbǝ ndufǝǝ, mɔɔwɔni kukue nkpe lǝ betidi ba bilǝkǝ lǝ kɔni, ko boofi balɛ bayɛnko ku mi ǝtǝsa nnya befi bantɔnko lǝ Yerusalem.

english_verse: If you think I should go along, they can go with me. Paul's Travel Plans
translation_verse: Nya lǝ ɛlɛkɛ bǝ mintsya suu, nyalɛ bonko mǝ ebɔyɛ busu. Paulo Eto Kusuyɛyɛ Eto Ketsyue.

english_verse: After I have gone through Macedonia, I hope to see you
translation_verse: Mɔɔyɛ Makedonia fɛ mooyo mi ɔflɔ, itsyise ele bǝ nyɛ mfó fɛ lǝ mbǝ.

english_verse: and visit with you for a while. I may even stay all winter, so that you can help me on my way to wherever I will be going next.
translation_verse: Iyifo mɛ fe muudi eyi asiani lǝ mi ɔflɔ mfó. Ditsyuǝ mɔɔkɛ lǝ mi ɔflɔ ku lɛyɔ lefe. Lǝ nnya kamaa, biɔwunsǝko mɛ lǝ mɔ kusuyɛyɛ ǝsuǝ kesu kaka ke elǝ bǝ nsu.

english_verse: If the Lord lets me, I would rather come later for a longer visit than to stop off now for only a short visit.
translation_verse: Manla miǝ maakpɔ mbǝ nyɛ mi ɔflɔ ete. Bomuu, moola miǝ maakɛ lǝ mi ɔflɔ itǝ lefe sɛkɛ ditsyuǝ lǝ Bonamute ǝtǝ mɛ kusu nko.

english_verse: I will stay in Ephesus until Pentecost,
translation_verse: Mɔɔkɛ lǝ Efeso mfo isu ese lǝ Pentekoste eto diyi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: because there is a wonderful opportunity for me to do some work here. But there are also many people who are against me.
translation_verse: Kusu sɛɛ asini mɛ tinti lǝ mfó, bǝ nyifo keyifo ka nkpe kutǝkǝ tinti, ite bǝ betidi ba ńyǝ mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ fui itsyi lǝ keyifo ka meeyifo ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: When Timothy arrives, give him a friendly welcome. He is doing the Lord's work, just as I am.
translation_verse: Lǝ Timoteo ǝbǝ udufǝ mi ɔflɔɔ, bebe biǝ befo wǝ kukɔnɔ. Itsyise Bonamute eto keyifo tsya ete ɔnlɛ buyifo fe mɔ ke.

english_verse: Don't let anyone mistreat him. I am looking for him to return to me together with the other followers. So when he leaves, send him off with your blessings.
translation_verse: Yanle bǝ mi kuutsyuǝ saa ńyǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ ubu wǝ sikpefi. Bomu befo wǝ, lǝ bɛwunsǝko wǝ bǝ lǝ wǝ kusu bɔyɛ ǝsuǝ ku diyuǝ bǝ lǝ usi usinkli ubǝ mɔ ɔflɔ buɛɛ. Itsyise nlɛ wǝ kusu bobe miǝ wǝ usinkli ubǝ ku bo bayimisani lefo banɔ.

english_verse: I have tried hard to get our friend Apollos to visit you with the other followers. He doesn't want to come just now, but he will come when he can. Personal Concerns and Greetings
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ itsyi lǝ bɔyimi Apolo eto etiki ǝsuǝǝ, mbɔlɛ wǝ kola kekleke miǝ ubǝ mi ɔflɔ ku wǝ bayimi bǝtsyuǝ. Fɛɛ woantɔnɔ tɔ nkǝ wǝǝbǝ lǝ lefe nǝmfo ǝsuǝ tɔ. Fɛɛ mfo nnɔ miǝ lǝ lefe ǝtǝ wǝ kusu koo, wuubǝ. Bokla Ku Kusutɔtɔ.

english_verse: Keep alert. Be firm in your faith. Stay brave and strong.
translation_verse: Bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ, lǝ bińyǝ kekleke lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ. Bekpe utu lǝ binyǝ kekleke.

english_verse: Show love in everything you do.
translation_verse: Nya biyifo mi keyifo saa ku lelabi.

english_verse: You know that Stephanas and his family were the first in Achaia to have faith in the Lord. They have done all they can for God's people. My friends, I ask you
translation_verse: Biyi Stefana ku wǝ diyo eto betidi. Mǝ ni betidi tutɛ ba lɛtsyi bawuninsǝ báfo bánɔ lǝ Akaia eto kasɔ eto lekpake mfó. Nya béfi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝkawunsǝko mba eto ǝsuǝ bákpasǝ. Mɔ bayimi, nlɛ mi lekpakpa minkǝ

english_verse: to obey leaders like them and to do the same for all others who work hard with you.
translation_verse: bitǝ kusu faa batɔnkotɔnko bamfo ku babamba ba laawunsǝko mǝ lǝ mǝ keyifo lǝ batɔnko mi.

english_verse: I was glad to see Stephanas and Fortunatus and Achaicus. Having them here was like having you.
translation_verse: Yiafo mɛ disuǝyuǝ bǝ Stefana ku Fortunato ku Akaiko ǝbǝ bedufǝ, nya eyifo mɛ fe mi ini minyǝ.

english_verse: They made me feel much better, just as they made you feel better. You should appreciate people like them.
translation_verse: Bǝtǝ bǝ insi nyǝ ǝsuǝale fe kase bákpe mi ǝsuǝale. Nya betidi bamfo eto oklee, inyǝ bǝ bitǝ mǝ dibu sitinti nɛ.

english_verse: Greetings from the churches in Asia. Aquila and Priscilla, together with the church that meets in their house, send greetings in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Bafokanɔfɔ ba nkpe lǝ Asia eto kasɔ eto lekpake mfo kenke bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ mi! Akwila ku Priskila ku mǝ mbaa laatsya lǝ mǝ diyo bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ mi kukɔnɔ lǝ Bonamute eto diye ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: All the Lord's followers send their greetings. Give each other a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Bo bayimi ba nkpe mfo kenke bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ mi o-o! Bɛbuta bǝtsyuǝ lǝ bisiǝsǝ bǝtsyuǝ fe bayimi lala.

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo kosate, dífi mɔ kɔni minlɛ nyamfo bɔwɔni kǝsiǝsǝ mi.

english_verse: I pray that God will put a curse on everyone who doesn't love the Lord. And may the Lord come soon.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa wǝ laanla Bonamutee, yoole wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ. O Bonamute, bǝ!

english_verse: I pray the Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Bonamute Yesu eto lefonǝ lǝ disiǝko mi.

english_verse: I love everyone who belongs to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Mfi mɔ lelabi tinti nlɛ mimblɛ kenke butǝ lǝ Kristo Yesu eto diye ǝsuǝ. Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Jesus Christ, and from Timothy, who is also a follower. To God's church in Corinth and to all of God's people in Achaia.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, wǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝ mimfiani Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto ɔtɔnkpee, mɔ ku bo ɔyimisani Timoteo nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi, Onanto eto bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝ nkpe lǝ Korinto ku betidi ba kenke Onanto eto betidi lǝ Akaia eto kasɔ kenke.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul Gives Thanks
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ bɔtɔ boǝ Boanto Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto lefonǝ ku diyuǝ lǝ disiǝko mi. Paulo Aasɔ Onanto Ani Lǝ Bo Kanyinyǝnyǝ Saa Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! The Father is a merciful God, who always gives us comfort.
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ bufi atɛsɛ butǝ Onanto wǝ ni Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto Anto. Wǝ ni anto wǝ lǝǝnyǝ bo kaminsǝ, nya woawunsǝko bo.

english_verse: We share in the terrible sufferings of Christ, but also in the wonderful comfort he gives.
translation_verse: Itsyise fe kase boǝnyǝ kanyi kpǝ fe nka eto okle Kristo tsya dínyǝǝ, nko ke ini bǝ lǝ bo lɔniyifoyifo ku Kristoo, Onanto tsya laamansǝ bo lɛkɔ sitinti nɛ.

english_verse: We suffer in the hope that you will be comforted and saved. And because we are comforted, you will also be comforted, as you patiently endure suffering like ours.
translation_verse: Lǝ báte bo ohiãa, báte bo ohiã bǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ omansǝ mi lɛkɔ, lǝ ofo mi lǝ nkpǝ. Lǝ bámansǝ bo lɛkɔɔ, bámansǝ bo lɛkɔ itǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ omansǝ mi lɛkɔ bǝ lǝ befo buńyǝ kekleke lǝ mi kanyinyǝnyǝ kamfo eto okle ǝsuǝ fe kase bo tsya leeyifo lǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ kamfo eto okle seka kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: You never disappoint us. You suffered as much as we did, and we know that you will be comforted as we were.
translation_verse: Kulesa saa embofo bo kusubebe lǝ mi disi butinkǝsǝ, itsyise fe kanyi ka biǝnyǝ fe bo ke sekaa, nko ke Onanto loomansǝ mi lɛkɔ fe kase úkamansǝ bo tsya lɛkɔ seka.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know what a hard time we had in Asia. Our sufferings were so horrible and so unbearable that death seemed certain.
translation_verse: Bayimi, bola boǝ bete bulǝ bo eto okle dítu bo lǝ Asia eto kasɔ kukɔnɔ. Kanyi ka búnyǝ ákɛ ale itǝ bo tinti itǝ bǝ bóensibe kusu boǝ bɔɔkɛ nkpǝ kulaa tsya.

english_verse: In fact, we felt sure we were going to die. But this made us stop trusting in ourselves and start trusting God, who raises the dead to life.
translation_verse: Lǝ sitintii, iyifo bo fe dikpǝnkpi bálo bo! Fɛɛ nyamfo ǝbǝ itǝ nko bǝ lǝ bufi bo kusubebe butǝkǝ lǝ Onanto wǝ laatakasǝ bekpǝnkpǝ ketsyiko ɔkɔmǝ kaboko nkpǝ ǝsuǝ, inni lǝ bo mate eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God saved us from the threat of death, and we are sure that he will do it again and again.
translation_verse: Úlǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ ukpǝ eto bulǝ kplɛ kǝmiǝ. Nya unsi wuukǝlǝkǝ bo tsya lefe saa. Sitintii, wǝ ini bɔnlɛ kusu bobe boǝ usi wuulǝkǝ bo tsya kokoko,

english_verse: Please help us by praying for us. Then many people will give thanks for the blessings we receive in answer to all these prayers. Paul's Change of Plans
translation_verse: lǝ kase biato ola lǝ bo disi eso. Itsyise lǝ betidi kpǝ aato olaa, Onanto ebɔnɔ mǝ olatoto nya betidi kpǝ lɔɔsɔ wǝ ani lǝ kase ɔ́wunsǝko bo eso. Paulo Átɛyi Lesa Nǝ Eso Ɔ́tsyi Wǝ Ketsyue Ɔ́wuninsǝ.

english_verse: We can be proud of our clear conscience. We have always lived honestly and sincerely, especially when we were with you. And we were guided by God's gift of undeserved grace instead of by the wisdom of this world.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ eso boabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato ni bǝnkǝ bo akɔɛsi anlo bo dikpi, itsyise bɔ́lɛ bo ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ lǝ betidi kenke eto ǝnǝmi. Nya bo ku mi eto nkpǝsiǝsiǝ áyɛ lǝ Onanto eto kusu ǝsuǝ, nya kawɛ lǝmbǝ lǝ nnya kǝmiǝ. Inni kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kobetete ǝsuǝ buufi bunsi nkpǝ ku mi nko, bomu lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ ku wǝ ǝsuǝale nnya ǝsuǝ bútǝkǝko eso.

english_verse: I was so sure of your pride in us that I had planned to visit you first of all. In this way you would have the blessing of two visits from me—
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya mimfo nyamfo kenke minɔ nko esoo, minka nsusu búlǝkǝ miǝ eni lǝ nka mi ɔflɔ bɔyɛ bǝ lǝ mi disuǝyuǝ lǝ diyifo sinuǝ.

english_verse: once on my way to Macedonia and again on my return from there. Then you could send me on to Judea.
translation_verse: Tutɛɛ, eni lǝ mbǝ nyɛ mfó lǝ ntɔ lǝ Makedoniaa, ku lǝ nlɛ businkli nlɛ bubǝǝ, bǝ lǝ bɛwunsǝko mɛ lǝ nsu Yudea.

english_verse: Do you think I couldn't make up my mind about what to do? Or do I seem like someone who says “Yes” or “No” simply to please others?
translation_verse: Se mínlǝkǝ mɔ nsusu miǝ lǝ nyifo nkoo, bote nyamfo nlɛ bǝ meenyifo asa lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ? Nya bote nyamfo nlɛ bǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto nsusu meefi keyifo asa fe utidi wǝ laatsyi wǝ nsusu kawuninsǝ mlǝmǝmlǝ katɛyi nkǝ, ee ku owo lǝ lefe lɔni nǝmǝ ke ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: God can be trusted, and so can I, when I say our answer to you has always been “Yes” and never “No.”
translation_verse: Bomu fe kase Onanto laatɛyi ɔnukualɛɛ, nko ke ini lesa saa nǝ bɔ́wɔni bótsyese mi ni nɛ. Nya inni fe kase utidi laakpɔ katɛyi nkǝ ee kesinkli katɛyi nkǝ owo, inni.

english_verse: This is because Jesus Christ the Son of God is always “Yes” and never “No.” And he is the one Silas, Timothy, and I told you about.
translation_verse: Onanto eto Ubi Yesu Kristo eto ditiki nǝ mɔ ku Silvano ku Timoteo lébe letsya bútǝ mii, inni nwǝ laatɛyi nkǝ ee usi ɔtɛyi nkǝ owo tsya. Bomu uyifo nwǝ eto ditiki ni ee lefe saa.

english_verse: Christ says “Yes” to all God's promises. This is why we have Christ to say “Amen” for us to the glory of God.
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto eto kɛnyɛ saa ka ɔ́tɛyi útsyǝǝ, ǝbǝ itǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ. Nyamfo eso boatɛyi ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ boǝnkǝ, “Ibǝ itǝ nko.” Bǝ lǝ bufi atɛsǝ butǝ Onanto.

english_verse: And so God makes it possible for you and us to stand firmly together with Christ. God is also the one who chose us
translation_verse: Onanto ǝtǝ nkǝ bo ku mimblɛ kenke yifo bani ku Kristo nya wǝ kosate dílǝkǝ bo útsyǝ nkǝ buyifo wǝ kekyifo.

english_verse: God is my witness that I stayed away from Corinth, just to keep from being hard on you.
translation_verse: Onanto ni adansiɛ lǝ mɔ ku mi nti nkǝ kaminsǝ mínyǝ mi eso mínnyɛ Korinto busu nɛ.

english_verse: We are not bosses who tell you what to believe. We are working with you to make you glad, because your faith is strong.
translation_verse: Inni bǝnkǝ lǝ bufi lesa nǝ bofo bɔnɔ bɔnyinkǝ mi bokpe eso, itsyise mi bofokanɔ fe dińyǝ kekleke koko. Nyaso bɔnlɛ keyifo buyifo ku mi bǝ lǝ binyǝ disuǝyuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: I have decided not to make my next visit with you so painful.
translation_verse: Nyaso nyifo mɔ nsusu minkǝ mensiembubǝ mi ɔflɔ bǝ lǝ mbǝ nló mi ani.

english_verse: If I make you feel bad, who would be left to cheer me up, except the people I had made to feel bad?
translation_verse: Itsyise lǝ mbǝ nló mi anii, owoe nsi lɔɔkɛ wǝ lookpe mɛ disuǝyuǝ, enso mimba mǝ ke mintǝ ani léló mfó?

english_verse: The reason I want to be happy is to make you happy. I wrote as I did because I didn't want to visit you and be made to feel bad, when you should make me feel happy.
translation_verse: Nyaso míwɔni kukue kekleke nkomǝ míntsyese mi nɛ, itsyise mánla miǝ lǝ mbǝ mfó, yuutǝ buitǝ bǝ ani ló mɛ. Fɛɛ mi ni betidi ba ele bǝ bekpe mɛ disuǝyuǝ nɛ. Nya mfo nnɔ miǝ lǝ nlɛ disuǝyuǝ bunyǝǝ, mi tsya ǝǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ nkomǝ ke.

english_verse: At the time I wrote, I was suffering terribly. My eyes were full of tears, and my heart was broken. But I didn't want to make you feel bad. I only wanted to let you know how much I cared for you. Forgiveness
translation_verse: Sitintii, kukue ko míwɔni míntǝ mi mfóo, nwɔni ko lǝ bulǝ kpǝ ku lǝ binǝntu ǝsuǝ. Nya mánwɔni ko bǝ lǝ itǝ ani lǝ eló mi kutsyuǝ, bomu bǝ le binyǝ bitsyǝ lekpo kase maala mi sitinti eso. Paulo Éfi Obuayifo Utsyuǝ Eto Lebua Ɔ́tsyɛ Wǝ.

english_verse: I don't want to be hard on you. But if one of you has made someone feel bad, I am not really the one who has been made to feel bad. Some of you are the ones.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ utsyuǝ útǝ ani áló utsyǝǝ, inni mɔ mate ete úyifo nko. Bomu boofo bɔtɛyi lǝ kusu kutsyuǝ ǝsuǝ boǝ bomblɛ kenke utǝ ani léló. Fɛɛ manla miǝ boǝkǝ wǝ kotomɛ bosonsǝ.

english_verse: Most of you have already pointed out the wrong that person did, and this is punishment enough for what was done.
translation_verse: Kase mi kpǝ díkǝnǝ utidi ǝmfo koto lǝ mi ntii, ǝsiǝ itǝ wǝ.

english_verse: When people sin, you should forgive and comfort them, so they won't give up in despair.
translation_verse: Nyaso bifi lesa nǝ úyifo bɛtsyɛ wǝ lǝ bekpe wǝ nkɛale bǝ lǝ ɛyɛ wǝ bulǝ lǝ eló wǝ ani kenke.

english_verse: You should make them sure of your love for them.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, nlɛ mi lekpakpa miǝ bekpe wǝ nkɛale lǝ bilǝkǝ bete wǝ biǝ bisi biala wǝ sitinti.

english_verse: I also wrote because I wanted to test you and find out if you would follow my instructions.
translation_verse: Nwɔni mi kukue komfo itsyise nla miǝ lǝ mfi nto mi mbe miǝ bińyǝ kekleke ku lǝ bietsyue asa nnya kenke maate mi koto lefe saa.

english_verse: I will forgive anyone you forgive. Yes, for your sake and with Christ as my witness, I have forgiven whatever needed to be forgiven.
translation_verse: Lǝ bífi utsyuǝ eto botakebu bɛtsyɛ wǝǝ, mintsya éfi ntsyɛ wǝ. Nya lǝ mfi botakebu butsyuǝ ntsyɛ lǝ butsyuǝ kpe bǝ ele bǝ mfi ntsyɛ kulaa tsyaa, lǝ mi eso mímfi míntsyɛ lǝ Kristo eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: I have done this to keep Satan from getting the better of us. We all know what goes on in his mind.
translation_verse: Nnyifo nyamfo nko lǝ kase Obonsam lǝmbotafa mi, itsyise buyi wǝ kobe. Paulo Ála Nkǝ Lǝ Ɔnɔ Mǝ Etiki Lǝ Tito Ɔflɔ.

english_verse: When I went to Troas to preach the good news about Christ, I found that the Lord had already prepared the way.
translation_verse: Se mínsu míndufǝ Troas eto Umǝ miǝ lǝ nsu mbe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya itsyi lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, nnyǝ miǝ Bonamute ébɔsini kusu itǝ keyifo kamǝ lǝ mfó.

english_verse: But I was worried when I didn't find my friend Titus there. So I left the other followers and went on to Macedonia.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ílǝ mɛ tinti itsyise mǝnnyǝ mɔ ɔyimisani Tito mfó. Lǝ nyaso ntɔ kusu nya mímfe mínsu Makedonia. Boǝtǝkǝ Kato Lǝ Kristo Eso.

english_verse: I am grateful that God always makes it possible for Christ to lead us to victory. God also helps us spread the knowledge about Christ everywhere, and this knowledge is like the smell of perfume.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ boasɔ Onanto ani! Nya ɛyɛ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku Kristoo, Onanto aayɛnko bo lefe saa fe ndomufɔ ba lǝǝtǝkǝko Kristo lǝ wǝ katobutǝkǝ eto bɔyɛ ǝsuǝ. Nya Onanto aayɛ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ kabe Kristo letsya kate kawunsiǝ kenke fe kase nnuǝbi bo laanyi fififi eto ufiebi laayɛ katsyo kesu kalebe saa.

english_verse: In fact, God thinks of us as a perfume that brings Christ to everyone. For people who are being saved, this perfume has a sweet smell and leads them to a better life. But for people who are lost, it has a bad smell and leads them to a horrible death. No one really has what it takes to do this work.
translation_verse: Itǝ betidi ba lembunyǝ nkpǝ manloo, buyifo fe ufiebi wǝ laate mǝ bǝ bonya eto ole beni. Fɛɛ betidi ba luunyǝ bofoo, buyifo fe ufiebi wǝ lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ manlo itǝ mǝ. Nya lǝ sitinti, owoe loofo keyifo kamfo eto okle buyifo?

english_verse: A lot of people try to get rich from preaching God's message. But we are God's sincere messengers, and by the power of Christ we speak our message with God as our witness.
translation_verse: Bunte fe betidi kpǝ ba laafo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ kayɛnko fe bikǝ bia baate lǝ asi. Fɛɛ se ini Onanto dílǝkǝ bo esoo, buyifo bani ku Kristo nya boedi etiki lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi fe Kristo eto beyifoyifo.

english_verse: Are we once again bragging about ourselves? Do we need letters to you or from you to tell others about us? Some people do need letters telling about them.
translation_verse: Bote nyamfo nlɛ nkǝ busi bɔlɛ bo ǝsuǝ bɔtɛsɛ? Fe kase inte itǝ betidi bǝtsyuǝ sekaa, isi ehiã kukue bofo ketsyiko mi ɔflɔ nye kaboko mi itǝ bo bulǝkǝ kate?

english_verse: But you are our letter, and you are in our hearts for everyone to read and understand.
translation_verse: Mi kosate ni kukue ko nkpe bo, ko bákawɔni bákpe lǝ bo ketu kǝmiǝ itǝ le utsyuǝ saa loofo bote ku lǝ okla.

english_verse: You are like a letter written by Christ and delivered by us. But you are not written with pen and ink or on tablets made of stone. You are written in our hearts by the Spirit of the living God.
translation_verse: Ekpa wuee bǝ Kristo kosate lɛyɛ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ nya útǝ nkǝ bofo bɔnɔ. Nyaso mi ni kukue ko ɔ́wɔni. Inni awɔnisa eto ntu úfi ɔ́wɔni asa nyamfo. Bomu Onanto Eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nsi nkpǝ eto ǝsuǝalǝ úfi ɔ́wɔni nnya. Nya wánwɔni nnya lǝ aba ǝsuǝ fe kase úyifo nnya lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mmǝ, bomu lǝ betidi eto ketu kǝmiǝ. Kɛnyɛklekle Fɔfɔ Eto Batɔyɛ.

english_verse: We are sure about all this. Christ makes us sure in the very presence of God.
translation_verse: Boofo bɔtɛyi nko boǝ bokpe kǝńyǝkɔ ka Onanto dítǝ bo ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: We don't have the right to claim that we have done anything on our own. God gives us what it takes to do all we do.
translation_verse: Bumbǝ kɛnyɛ boofo bɔtɛyi boǝ bokpe ǝsuǝale lǝ bo ǝsuǝ boafo keyifo kamfo buyifo. Bomu ǝsuǝale nnya nkpe bo etsyi Onanto ɔflɔ.

english_verse: He makes us worthy to be the servants of his new agreement that comes from the Holy Spirit and not from a written Law. After all, the Law brings death, but the Spirit brings life.
translation_verse: Wǝ ni nwǝ díyifo nkǝ bɔkɛ ǝsuǝale lǝ bofiani kɛnyɛklekle fɔfɔ kamǝ eto batɔnkpe. Nya kɛnyɛklɛklɛ fɔfɔ kamfo anyɛ lǝ afi koko nnya báwɔni bǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ. Bomu kayɛ lǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. Itsyise afi nya báwɔni bǝtsyǝǝ, aaboko ukpǝ. Fɛɛ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ ǝǝtǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: The Law of Moses brought only the promise of death, even though it was carved on stones and given in a wonderful way. Still the Law made Moses' face shine so brightly the people of Israel could not look at it, even though it was a fading glory.
translation_verse: Onanto eto afi nnya báwɔni kokoko mfóo, eyifo etiki nnya báwɔni bǝtǝkǝ lǝ aba ǝsuǝ. Nya lefe nǝ béfi nnya bǝtǝ betidi, Onanto eto diyǝnde ǝtǝ bǝ Moses eto ǝnǝmi ǝyǝnde. Nya íte bǝ diyǝnde nǝmǝ ǝlǝkǝ ibu lǝ Moses eto ǝnǝmi tsyaa, Israel bebi mámfo buńyǝ kabe wǝ ǝnǝmi. Nya lǝ afi nnya laafo bo dikpǝnkpi bolo ǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ ete ku Onanto eto diyǝnde nkoo,

english_verse: So won't the agreement the Spirit brings to us be even more wonderful?
translation_verse: nya lɛ wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ eto lɛbɔbi eto diyǝnde so ditutɛ famfamfa.

english_verse: If something that brings the death sentence is glorious, won't something that makes us acceptable to God be even more glorious?
translation_verse: Nya lǝ kɔfi koko ko laalo utidi dikpǝnkpi áfo diyǝnde nǝmfo eto okle butǝ, ele bǝ bote boǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ leeyifo bomba leeyifo kasɛɛ eto diyǝnde eboso ditutɛ eto lele kenke.

english_verse: In fact, the new agreement is so wonderful that the Law is no longer glorious at all.
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ bɔtɛyi nko itsyise diyǝnde kplɛ nǝ nkpe mfo mɔmɔɔ, éyifo dinyǝndǝ nǝ lɛkɛ kɔ fe lɛni.

english_verse: The Law was given with a glory that faded away. But the glory of the new agreement is much greater, because it will never fade away.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lesa nǝ lɛkɛ itǝ lefe kliminti ǝnyǝ diyǝnde nǝmfo eto oklee, nyalɛ lesa nǝ nte itǝ manlo manlo eto diyǝnde eboso famfamfa. Ni diyǝnde so nǝmfó kon.

english_verse: We are not like Moses. His face was shining, but he covered it to keep the people of Israel from seeing the brightness fade away.
translation_verse: Nya bunte fe Moses wǝ dífi ofiamɛ úti wǝ ǝnǝmi itǝ lǝ Israel bebi lǝ buunnyǝ bǝ Onanto eto diyǝnde nǝ lɛkɛ lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi lɛ bɔni kalo.

english_verse: The people were stubborn, and something still keeps them from seeing the truth when the Law is read. Only Christ can take away the covering that keeps them from seeing.
translation_verse: Sitintii, mǝ nsusu mányɛ etsyo, ibǝ ese lǝ mi. Ite fe ofiamɛ wǝ mfo eto okle si uti mǝ lǝ nsusu lǝ balɛ kɔfi koko eto kukue komfo eto ditiki bokla. Itsyise lesa nǝ hã luutǝ bǝlǝkǝ ofiamɛ ǝmfó bato bakpe ni lǝ utidi lǝ ufi wǝ ǝsuǝ okpe lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When the Law of Moses is read, they have their minds covered over
translation_verse: Sitinti ibǝ ese taa mmii, lǝ balɛ Moses eto afi eto kukue eto etiki nyamfo boklaa, iyifo fe ofiamɛ ǝmǝ si uti mǝ lǝ nsusu.

english_verse: with a covering that is removed only for those who turn to the Lord.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ utidi átsyi ɔwuninsǝ úfi ǝsuǝ útǝ Bonamutee, ófiamɛ wǝ leeti wǝ nsusuu, aasini nya waanɔ etiki nyamǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: The Lord and the Spirit are one and the same, and the Lord's Spirit sets us free.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, Bonamute wǝ bɔnlɛ bokpadi mfo, ni Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ nɛ. Nya kaka Bonamute eto Lɛwɔnɔ nkpee, ǝǝtǝ kusu itǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ eto busiǝ.

english_verse: So our faces are not covered. They show the bright glory of the Lord, as the Lord's Spirit makes us more and more like our glorious Lord.
translation_verse: Nya bomba mblɛ kenke ba kulesa saa enti bo lǝ ǝnǝmi bɔnlɛ Bonamute eto diyǝnde nǝmǝ bulǝkǝ kate wuee. Balɛ bo bɔtsyi kawuninsǝ kǝtsyǝ lǝ wǝ ditsyǝbi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ nya bo diyǝnde nǝmǝ nlɛ kato bobe kakpe. Bonamute ǝmǝ ni Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nlɛ nyamfo buyifo nko nɛ.

english_verse: God has been kind enough to trust us with this work. This is why we never give up.
translation_verse: Onanto lǝ wǝ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ ǝsuǝǝ, dífi keyifo kamfo ókpe bo lǝ kɔni. Lǝ nyaso ani anló bo lǝ ke buyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We don't do shameful things that must be kept secret. And we don't try to fool anyone or twist God's message around. God is our witness that we speak only the truth, so others will be sure we can be trusted.
translation_verse: Búlǝkǝ ato lǝ asabiɔmbiɔ ku afanisa saa buyifo ǝsuǝ. Bɔ́ni awɛsu saa ku Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ bɔtsyi kawuninsǝ lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ. Bomu boǝlǝkǝ ɔnukualɛ kate. Boǝsiǝ nkpǝ bo lekpa wuee lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi itǝ utsyuǝ saa ebunyǝ bo ditsyǝbi sɛɛ utsyǝ lekpo.

english_verse: If there is anything hidden about our message, it is hidden only to someone who is lost.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ boabé letsya mfo eyifo akulasa itǝ betidi betsyuǝǝ, bete biǝ mba nyɛ lǝ konyasu ǝsuǝ ete iyifo akulasaa itǝ.

english_verse: The god who rules this world has blinded the minds of unbelievers. They cannot see the light, which is the good news about our glorious Christ, who shows what God is like.
translation_verse: Nya betidi bamfó mámfo bánɔ itsyise kawunsiǝ kamfo eto olo, Obonsam, éti mǝ ǝnǝmi. Nya weeti mǝ kusu bǝ baamfo Ditiki Sɛɛ eto lekpasǝ nǝ mǝ bunyǝ. Lekpasǝ nǝ laabɔ ketsyi lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ ditsyi Kristo eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝ wǝ ni Onanto kosate eto ditsyǝbi.

english_verse: We are not preaching about ourselves. Our message is that Jesus Christ is Lord. He also sent us to be your servants.
translation_verse: Boambe bo kosate eto ǝsuǝ letsya kǝtǝ mi, bomu Yesu Kristo ni nwǝ eto ditiki boabé letsya kǝtǝ mi boǝ wǝ ni Bonamute. Nya bo eyifo beyifoyifo itǝ mi lǝ Yesu eto disi eso.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God commanded light to shine in the dark.” Now God is shining in our hearts to let you know that his glory is seen in Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Onanto wǝ lɛtɛyi lǝ kawunsiǝ eto ketsyikokɔ nkǝ, “Lekpasǝ yǝnde lɛbɔ ditsyi ketuntu ǝsuǝ,” ke ni Onanto wǝ dítǝ nkǝ wǝ lekpasǝ yǝnde lǝ bo ketu kǝmiǝ lǝ ditǝ nkǝ bunyǝ Onanto eto diyǝnde nǝ nlɛ buyǝnde lǝ Yesu Kristo eto ǝnǝmi butsyǝ lekpo.

english_verse: We are like clay jars in which this treasure is stored. The real power comes from God and not from us.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bomba léfo asafokoya nyamfo itsyi Onanto ɔflɔɔ, te fe sɛfɔte eto ekplibi. Nya ite nko lǝ ilǝkǝ eté sitinti bǝ, inni bo ɔflɔ ǝsuǝale kplɛ kenke nyamǝ ditsyi, bomu itsyi Onanto ɔflɔ.

english_verse: We often suffer, but we are never crushed. Even when we don't know what to do, we never give up.
translation_verse: Boǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ lefe kpǝ ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ bulǝ bomǝ aanso bo ani. Yaakpe bo nsusu bulǝ, fɛɛ yaanló bo ani.

english_verse: In times of trouble, God is with us, and when we are knocked down, we get up again.
translation_verse: Balo kpǝ ǝǝtǝkǝko bo, fɛɛ Onanto aanyani bo kǝtsyǝ. Ite bǝ baayinkǝ bo kakpe lǝ kasɔ tsyaa, bambiasǝ bo.

english_verse: We face death every day because of Jesus. Our bodies show what his death was like, so his life can also be seen in us.
translation_verse: Lǝ sitintii, nkpǝ bo bunsi kenke kpe lǝ ukpǝ eto bulǝ kǝmiǝ lǝ Yesu eto disi eso bǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ Yesu eto nkpǝ eto ditsyǝbi lǝ bo ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo lǝ bo.

english_verse: This means that death is working in us, but life is working in you.
translation_verse: Lǝ mmǝ esoo, ukpǝ lɛ keyifo lǝ bo lefe saa, fɛɛ nkpǝ lɛ keyifo lǝ mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: In the Scriptures it says, “I spoke because I had faith.” We have this same kind of faith. So we speak
translation_verse: Báwɔni lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Mfo nnɔ, nyaso mímbe wǝ letsya nɛ.” Nko ke ini bǝ bo tsya áfo bɔ́nɔ eso bóbe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya nɛ.

english_verse: because we know that God raised the Lord Jesus to life. And just as God raised Jesus, he will also raise us to life. Then he will bring us into his presence together with you.
translation_verse: Nya buyi boǝ Onanto wǝ létakasǝ Bonamute Yesu utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ óboko nkpǝǝ, wǝ ǝmǝ ke ebotakasǝ bo tsya ku Yesu oboko nkpǝ nya wookpa bo ku mi kenke oboko wǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: All of this has been done for you, so more and more people will know how kind God is and will praise and honor him. Faith in the Lord
translation_verse: Mi lɛlɛkǝsǝ eso asa nyamfo kenke nte nko. Nya kase mba Onanto nlɛ wǝ lefonǝ bote nlɛ bufui kakpe, ebutǝ bǝ mǝ lɛninsɔ lǝ lebe kato lekpe bǝ lǝ befi batɛsǝ Onanto. Buunyǝ Dibu Ku Dusuǝnyuǝ Kpǝ.

english_verse: We never give up. Our bodies are gradually dying, but we ourselves are being made stronger each day.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eso boǝntǝ ani laalo bo, lǝ bo ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ lɛ buku kulaa tsyaa, buyi boǝ bo lɛwɔnɔ kǝmiǝ eto nkpǝ lɛ boto kǝtǝkǝ lefe saa.

english_verse: These little troubles are getting us ready for an eternal glory that will make all our troubles seem like nothing.
translation_verse: Nya kanyi sɛkɛ ka bɔnlɛ bunyǝ mɔmɔɔ, embutsyǝ ɛklɛ, bomu bɔlɔ kanlɛ bo ǝsuǝ kǝtsyǝ itǝ diyǝnde kplɛ nǝ lǝmbǝ kalosǝkɔ. Boǝmbofo ni bufi katesɛ ko kanyi saa.

english_verse: Things that are seen don't last forever, but things that are not seen are eternal. This is why we keep our minds on the things that cannot be seen.
translation_verse: Inni asa nnya boǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ boefi bo ǝnǝmi kǝtǝkǝ, bomu lǝ asa nnya boǝnnyǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya asa nnya boǝnyǝ ku ǝnǝmi te itǝ lefe kliminti ditsyuǝ ete. Nya nnya bo ǝnǝmi lembofo bunyǝǝ, te itǝ lefe saa.

english_verse: Our bodies are like tents that we live in here on earth. But when these tents are destroyed, we know that God will give each of us a place to live. These homes will not be buildings someone has made, but they are in heaven and will last forever.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bo ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ sia ni dibú nǝ kafo boǝsiǝ lǝ kasɔ mfo abaa, bokpe diyo bamba lǝ Onanto eto Umǝ kato. Nya diyo nǝmfoo, wǝ kosate dífi wǝ ani óto, nya diuńyǝ lefe saa.

english_verse: While we are here on earth, we sigh because we want to live in that heavenly home.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ ǝsuǝ bunsi lǝ kasɔ mfo lǝ sinǝ ǝsuǝǝ, boala kawɔnɔ. Nya boabe kusu kekleke boǝ lǝ bofo Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eto umǝ eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ.

english_verse: We want to put it on like clothes and not be naked.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bofo kato eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ siamfo, yensiembutsyǝ fe busi leya.

english_verse: These tents we now live in are like a heavy burden, and we groan. But we don't do this just because we want to leave these bodies that will die. It is because we want to change them for bodies that will never die.
translation_verse: Nya se bunsi lǝ kasɔ kamfo eto sinǝ eto dibú kafo, busi boala kawɔnɔ lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya inni bǝnkǝ bola boǝ lǝ bɔbɔ lǝ kasɔ kamfo eto sinǝ ǝsuǝ. Bomu bola boǝ lǝ bofo Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eto sinǝ buti lǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ sinǝ sia lǝǝnkpǝ lǝ sefo nsia lǝǝkpǝ eto kɛnyɛ kenke.

english_verse: God is the one who makes all this possible. He has given us his Spirit to make us certain he will do it.
translation_verse: Onanto ni nwǝ lɛlɔ bo utsyǝ itǝ nko eto bofloma bomfo eto bubǝ. Nya úfi wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ útǝ bo fe lesa nǝ bufi bɔnlɛ kusu bobe uyi bose itǝ asa nnya kenke ɔ́lɔ utsyǝ bo eto bubǝ.

english_verse: So always be cheerful! As long as we are in these bodies, we are away from the Lord.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso bonkpe ɔkɔɛ lefe saa nɛ. Nya buyi boǝnkǝ lǝ bokpe lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ siamfo ǝsuǝ, boanyotɔ Bonamute ɔflɔ nye wǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: We should be cheerful, because we would rather leave these bodies and be at home with the Lord.
translation_verse: Bokpe ɔkɔɛ tinti nya enkpe bo ɔkɔɛ enso lǝ boyani ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ siamfo butsyǝ lǝ budufǝ Bonamute eto ku bo ǝnǝmi bomu.

english_verse: But whether we are at home with the Lord or away from him, we still try our best to please him.
translation_verse: Nya lesa nǝ bɔnlɛ bɔbɛbɛ enso kenke ni bǝ, bokpe mfo o-o, bokpe lǝ Onanto eto umǝ o-o, ele bǝ buyifo lesa nǝ luudufǝ wǝ ǝnǝ.

english_verse: We know what it means to respect the Lord, and we encourage everyone to turn to him. God himself knows what we are like, and I hope you also know what kind of people we are.
translation_verse: Se bunyi boǝ ele bǝ bote Bonamute ǝmǝ sikpii, eso boakplatsya kefi nya kakpe betidi bamba ǝsuǝ bǝ mǝ tsya yifo nko. Onanto wǝ yi kase bunte kenke nya mfo nnɔ miǝ mi tsya yi bo ditsyǝbi taa utu kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: We are not trying once more to brag about ourselves. But we want you to be proud of us, when you are with those who are not sincere and brag about what others think of them.
translation_verse: Inni bǝnkǝ busi bɔlɛ bo ǝsuǝ bɔtɛsǝ kate mi, bomu bɔlɛ bokplatsya boǝ boǝtǝ mi lǝ bebesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ bo disi eso. Nnla miǝ binyǝ kǝńyǝnkɔ befo mbuayɛ butǝ betidi ba leefi ǝsuǝ eto dinyǝsa kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato, nya inni bǝ lǝ ditsyǝbi sɛɛ eso.

english_verse: If we seem out of our minds, it is between God and us. But if we are in our right minds, it is for your good.
translation_verse: Lǝ iyifo bǝtsyuǝ fe betidi ba disi lebia bunii, nyalɛ itsyi lǝ keyifo ka boeyifo ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto wǝ boala eso. Nya lǝ disi mambia boo, ite nko itǝ mi lɛlɛkɛsǝ.

english_verse: We are ruled by Christ's love for us. We are certain that if one person died for everyone else, then all of us have died.
translation_verse: Kristo eto lelabi nǝ onkpe itǝ bo eyi bo ǝsuǝ. Nya se ekpako bo boǝ utidi ɔni ete díkpǝ lǝ betidi ba kenke eto disi esoo, nyamfo lɛ bote bǝ bomblɛ díkpǝ.

english_verse: And Christ did die for all of us. He died so we would no longer live for ourselves, but for the one who died and was raised to life for us.
translation_verse: Kristo ǝkpǝ lǝ betidi ba kenke eto disi bǝ lǝ mba nsi nkpǝ, mensisiǝ nkpǝ itǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ nye mǝ lelabi. Bomu lǝ bǝsiǝ nkpǝ itǝ Kristo wǝ díkpǝ lǝ mǝ disi esoo, wǝ batakasǝ betsyiko ɔkɔmǝ.

english_verse: We are careful not to judge people by what they seem to be, though we once judged Christ in this way.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, boensiemfi kawunsiǝ kamfo eto betidi eto kɛnyɛ kakponko kuutsyuǝ lekpo. Ite bǝ bókponko Kristo lekpo lǝ kusu komfo ǝsuǝ lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mmǝǝ, mɔmɔɔ, boesienyifo nko.

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to Christ is a new person. The past is forgotten, and everything is new.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ utsyuǝ ku Kristo éyifo banii, útǝ nkǝ ofiani utidi fɔfɔ. Nya wǝ utidi eto ditsyǝbi koko nǝmǝ ébubǝ lefe. Nya lɛfɔfɔ ébubǝ lefo lǝ ni kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: God has done it all! He sent Christ to make peace between himself and us, and he has given us the work of making peace between himself and others.
translation_verse: Onanto ni nwǝ díyifo asa nyamfo kenke. Nya úlǝkǝ asa nnya lébiasǝ bo ku wǝ nti bǝ lǝ buyifo bani ku wǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ. Nya wǝ ke ni nwǝ dífi keyifo kamfo ókpe bo lǝ ani nkǝ lǝ bunǝ betidi bamba boboko wǝ ɔflɔ lǝ ɔlɔ mǝ ku wǝ nti bafiani bahɔ.

english_verse: What we mean is that God was in Christ, offering peace and forgiveness to the people of this world. And he has given us the work of sharing his message about peace.
translation_verse: Nya letsyabebe nǝmfo ni nkǝ, Onanto, ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, ɔ́lɔ wǝ ku betidi ba kenke eto nti. Nya úlǝkǝ ato lǝ mǝ abuayifoyifo kenke ǝsuǝ. Nya keyifo ka úfi ókpe bo lǝ kɔni ni nkǝ, lǝ bɔtɛyi betidi ba kenke ditiki nǝ díyifo mǝ wǝ bahɔ.

english_verse: We were sent to speak for Christ, and God is begging you to listen to our message. We speak for Christ and sincerely ask you to make peace with God.
translation_verse: Nya bo buni nyǝ lǝ Kristo eto kɛnyɛ. Nya Onanto kosate ni nwǝ nyǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ ɔnlɛ mi kɔlɛ bɔlɛ. Nyamfo eso bunyǝ lǝ Kristo eto kɛnyɛ bɔnlɛ mi lekpakpa boǝ bitǝ lǝ balɔ mi ku Onanto eto nti.

english_verse: Christ never sinned! But God treated him as a sinner, so Christ could make us acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Kristo ménnyifo lebua saa. Fɛɛ lǝ bo disi esoo, Onanto eyifo wǝ ófo bo abua útsyi, bǝ lǝ buyifo bani ku wǝ, lǝ bofiani mba nyɛ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: We work together with God, and we beg you to make good use of God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Se ini bonko Onanto nyɛ bɔnlɛ keyifo esoo, bɔlɛ mi lekpakpa boǝ mimba díkafo Onanto eto lefonǝǝ, biambiasǝ ni.

english_verse: In the Scriptures God says, “When the time came, I listened to you, and when you needed help, I came to save you.” That time has come. This is the day for you to be saved.
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, “Se lefe léyo bǝ nnyǝ fǝ kaminsǝǝ, nnɔ fǝ olatoto. Nya se éyo diyi nǝ ele bǝ mmfo fǝ tsyaa, nwunsǝko fǝ.” Bɛnɔ! Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ mɔmɔ ni lefe nǝ ele bǝ Onanto nyǝ mi kaminsǝ nɛ. Nya mmi ni diyi nǝ ele bǝ Onanto fo fǝ lǝ nkpǝ nɛ. Paulo Ǝnyǝ Kanyi.

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with our work, and so we try hard not to cause problems.
translation_verse: Boanla boǝ kuutsyuǝ saa nyǝ kabua lǝ bo keyifo ǝsuǝ. Lǝ nyaso boanla boǝ boeyifo kulesa nǝ luuti kuutsyuǝ saa bofokanɔ eto kusu.

english_verse: But in everything and in every way we show we truly are God's servants. We have always been patient, though we have had a lot of trouble, suffering, and hard times.
translation_verse: Bomu lǝ lesa saa nǝ boeyifo ǝsuǝǝ, boǝlǝkǝ kate wuee boǝ Onanto eto beyifoyifo buni. Boǝńyǝ kekleke lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ, lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ ku lǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ ku lǝ ohiã kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: We have been beaten, put in jail, and hurt in riots. We have worked hard and have gone without sleep or food.
translation_verse: Lǝ báblɛ bo nye bákpe bo lǝ Aba eto diyo nye báyele bo nye búyifo keyifo bosonsǝ ǝsuǝ nye bóǝnnyǝ lefe bolabe selabe nye búsiǝ kukpɛnsɛ tsya.

english_verse: But we have kept ourselves pure and have been understanding, patient, and kind. The Holy Spirit has been with us, and our love has been real.
translation_verse: Boǝlǝkǝ kate boǝ buyifo Onanto eto beyifoyifo ɛyɛ lǝ kase boalɛ ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛ lǝ kobe ku dibusǝ ku kafo ɛkpɛ ǝsuǝ. Nya Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nsi ko bo nya boala betidi ku kafo faa.

english_verse: We have spoken the truth, and God's power has worked in us. In all our struggles we have said and done only what is right.
translation_verse: Boanwɛ betidi lǝ bo Ditiki Sɛɛ eto letsyabebe ǝsuǝ. Nya Onanto eto ǝsuǝale nnya ntǝkǝko bo tsya aate nkǝ buyifo wǝ beyifoyifo. Bo nkpǝ sɛɛ siǝsiǝ eyifo fe bemamakǝ bia boefi kakpɔ lema, kata bo ǝsuǝ disi tsya.

english_verse: Whether we were honored or dishonored or praised or cursed, we always told the truth about ourselves. But some people said we did not.
translation_verse: Bǝtsyuǝ ǝǝtǝ bo dibu nya bǝtsyuǝ tsya laakpe bo kofani. Bǝtsyuǝ aaka bo nya bǝtsyuǝ tsya laatɛsǝ bo. Betidi ǝǝnyǝ bo fe badia, fɛɛ ditiki eto ɔnukualɛ ni nǝ boatɛyi.

english_verse: We are unknown to others, but well known to you. We seem to be dying, and yet we are still alive. We have been punished, but never killed,
translation_verse: Betidi eyifo fe benyi bo, fɛɛ beyi bo kenke. Fe búkpǝ, fɛɛ busi nkpǝ! Bǝnǝ bo koto sitinti, tsya bánlo bo.

english_verse: and we are always happy, even in times of suffering. Although we are poor, we have made many people rich. And though we own nothing, everything is ours.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ beefi bo fe baminsǝtidi tsyaa, bɔlɛ disuǝyuǝ bunyǝ lefe saa. Bǝǝnyǝ bo fe bakombo, fɛɛ boǝtǝ betidi laafiani Onanto eto umǝ eto batabinyǝ. Bǝǝnyǝ bo fe betidi ba kulesa lente. Fɛɛ bo bomu lesa saa nte nɛ.

english_verse: Friends in Corinth, we are telling the truth when we say there is room in our hearts for you.
translation_verse: Bo bayimi, Korintofɔ, búdi mi etiki kafo faa nya búmenkli bo akɔɛsi faa bútǝ mi.

english_verse: We are not holding back on our love for you, but you are holding back on your love for us.
translation_verse: Inni bo dímansini bo akɔɛsi bútǝ mi! Mi, bomu, dímansini mi akɔɛsi bítǝ bo.

english_verse: I speak to you as I would speak to my own children. Please make room in your hearts for us. The Temple of the Living God
translation_verse: Nnlɛ mi etiki budi mɔmɔ fe kase ubianto leedi wǝ bebi etiki. Nya fe kase búmenkli bo akɔɛsi bófo mii, mi tsya menkli mi akɔɛsi bitǝ bo lǝ befo bo nko. Mimba Ni Bafokanɔfɔ Ku Mamfokanɔfɔ Eni Bani.

english_verse: Stay away from people who are not followers of the Lord! Can someone who is good get along with someone who is evil? Are light and darkness the same?
translation_verse: Bebe biǝ mimba ni bafokanɔfɔ ku mba ni mamfokanɔfɔ menyifo bani. Itsyise lesa nǝ nyɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ ku lesa nǝ lannyɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ ǝmbofo bɔkɔ keyifo lesa lɔni kon. Nko ke diyǝnde ku ketuntu lembofo bɔkɛ lǝ kalebe kani nɛ.

english_verse: Is Christ a friend of Satan? Can people who follow the Lord have anything in common with those who don't?
translation_verse: Kristo ku Obonsam embofo bani buyifo. Nko ini bǝ nwǝ léfo ɔ́nɔ ku nwǝ dímamfo ɔ́nɔ ǝmbofo bani buyifo nɛ.

english_verse: Do idols belong in the temple of God? We are the temple of the living God, as God himself says, “I will live with these people and walk among them. I will be their God, and they will be my people.”
translation_verse: Ntsyǝ difiǝyo ku Lenantoyo loofo bɔkɔ kakɛ lǝ kalebe kani? Nyaso bo tsya mǝnńyǝ butǝ difiǝyo, itsyise bo ni Onanto wǝ leenkpǝ eto kakɛnkɔ nye kǝsiǝkɔ. Fe kase Onanto kosate lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Muutsyǝ kǝsiǝkɔ lǝ mǝ nti nya muusiǝko mǝ, nya moofiani mǝ Onanto, nya mǝ tsya loofiani mɔ betidi.”

english_verse: The Lord also says, “Leave them and stay away! Don't touch anything that isn't clean. Then I will welcome you
translation_verse: Nyaso Bonamute lɛ wǝ betidi bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Bɛbɔ lǝ mǝ nti, nya bilǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ betidi ba lǝǝtǝ bǝfiǝ kedi nti. Bientidi mǝ asa nnya laanansǝ ǝsuǝ mfó, nya moofo mi atuu.

english_verse: and be your Father. You will be my sons and my daughters, as surely as I am God, the All-Powerful.”
translation_verse: Nya moofiani mi Anto, nya mi tsya loofiani mɔ bebisani ku bebisio. Nko Bonamute Ǝsuǝalenyǝ Kenke lɛtɛyi nɛ.”

english_verse: My friends, God has made us these promises. So we should stay away from everything that keeps our bodies and spirits from being clean. We should honor God and try to be completely like him. The Church Makes Paul Happy
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi lala, se Onanto dítsyǝ bo nyamfo kenke eto kɛnyɛ esoo, bitǝ lǝ buyifo bo ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛ, lǝ bulǝkǝ bo ǝsuǝ butsyiko lǝ lesa saa nǝ loonansǝ bo ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ku lɛwɔnɔ. Nya lǝ buyifo bo ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛ butǝ Onanto, se boebu wǝ nya boate wǝ sikpi eso. Paulo Ǝnyǝ Disuǝyuǝ Se Korintofɔ Lɛtsyi Mǝ Nkpǝ Báwuninsǝ.

english_verse: Make a place for us in your hearts! We haven't mistreated or hurt anyone. We haven't cheated anyone.
translation_verse: Bifi lelabi bitǝ bo lǝ mi akɔɛsi. Bóanta kuutsyuǝ saa búbu nya bóantafa mi kuutsyuǝ saa ku bɔ́wɛ kutsyuǝ saa bókpe.

english_verse: I am not saying this to be hard on you. But, as I have said before, you will always be in our thoughts, whether we live or die.
translation_verse: Minlɛ nyamfo bɔtɛyi lǝ nlo mi dikpi. Itsyise mɔ́tɛyi mi lǝ lefe ditsyuǝ léfe miǝ, bóla mi asa sitinti bǝ lǝ ukpǝ kǝmiǝ o-o, nkpǝ kǝmiǝ o-o, kulesa embofo bo nti busensǝ.

english_verse: I trust you completely. I am always proud of you, and I am greatly encouraged. In all my trouble I am still very happy.
translation_verse: Mmfo mi nnɔ tinti! Nya maasɔ lɛkɔɛsi kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ mi disi. Lǝ mi kanyinyǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ tsyaa, mǝǝmuǝ utu kalɛ lǝ disuǝyuǝ nǝ diyi mɛ ǝsuǝ kenke lǝ mi eso!

english_verse: After we came to Macedonia, we didn't have any chance to rest. We were faced with all kinds of problems. We were troubled by enemies and troubled by fears.
translation_verse: Se búsu búdufǝ Makedonia kulaa tsyaa, boeńyǝ lefe butsyǝ ɔnwɛ saa. Bulǝ kpǝ etu bo, betidi ǝdiǝnko bo lǝ kalebe saa. Nya betidi díkakpɔnko bo nya búkate sikpi.

english_verse: But God cheers up people in need, and this is what he did when he sent Titus to us.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto wǝ laamansǝ betidi ba nlɛ nku buwi ku nkuɛnlo lɛkɔɔ, ákpe bo nkɛale se Tito dítsyi mi ɔflɔ úbǝ údufǝ.

english_verse: Of course, we were glad to see Titus, but what really made us glad is the way you cheered him up. He told how sorry you were and how concerned you were about me. And this made me even happier.
translation_verse: Nya inni wǝ bubǝ mate ete dítǝ bǝ búnyǝ disuǝyuǝ. Bomu ɔ́tɛyi bo kase békpe wǝ otsyekle nya lɛkɛ wǝ ɔkɔɛ nya ɔ́tɛyi kase béla kekleke biǝ biǝnyǝ mɛ lǝ befo mɛ kafo faa, ku kase ílǝ mi itǝ mɛ lǝ nnya díbǝ ǝsuǝ ku kase bíńyǝ mǝ kama kekleke lǝ beta mɛ disi. Nyamfo eso minsi mínyǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti minso nɛ.

english_verse: I don't feel bad anymore, even though my letter hurt your feelings. I did feel bad at first, but I don't now. I know that the letter hurt you for a while.
translation_verse: Kukue ko míwɔni míntǝ mii, álo mi ani tinti. Fɛɛ yɛnlɛ mɛ bǝ nwɔni ko ntǝ mi. Ite bǝ kukue ko míntsyese mi álo mi ani tsyaa, álo mi ani itǝ lefe kliminti ete. Tutɛɛ, ílǝ mɛ,

english_verse: Now I am happy, but not because I hurt your feelings. It is because God used your hurt feelings to make you turn back to him, and none of you were harmed by us.
translation_verse: fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, nlɛ disuǝyuǝ bunyǝ. Inni nnya ani lélo mi eso, bomu bǝ ítǝ bǝ mi lebua nǝ bíyifo éfi mi nya bɛtsyi bɛwuninsǝ lǝ nnya eso. Se bínyǝ kanyi fe kase Onanto lélaa, nyaso bóenyifo mi kabua saa lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When God makes you feel sorry enough to turn to him and be saved, you don't have anything to feel bad about. But when this world makes you feel sorry, it can cause your death.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utsyuǝ ǝnyǝ kanyi fe kase Onanto laalaa, wǝǝnyǝ bɔtsyi kawuninsǝ nya baafo wǝ lǝ nkpǝ, itǝ yensiǝnlǝ wǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ utsyuǝ ǝǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ kawunsiǝ eto bola ǝsuǝǝ, ukpǝ hã wuunyǝ utǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Just look what God has done by making you feel sorry! You sincerely want to prove you are innocent. You are angry. You are shocked. You are eager to see that justice is done. You have proved that you were completely right in this matter.
translation_verse: Bebe kase kanyi kamfo eto okle ka Onanto lɛbɛbɛ útǝ mi nlɛ keyifo lǝ mi ǝsuǝ. Itǝ biakplatsya kekleke keyifo asa kǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ ketsyiko lǝ lebuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ, kǝsiǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ. Itǝ biantɔnɔko asa nnya lǝmbǝ kɔnɔ eto buyifo nya itǝ biate sikpi. Itǝ biabe kusu itǝ asa nnya luubǝ nya biankpe otsyekle lǝ asabuyifo ǝsuǝ ku itǝ biala biǝ bǝnǝ nwǝ leeyifo kabua koto. Lǝ asa nnya kenke ǝsuǝ, bílǝkǝ bete fe mba nyɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ, ba kabua saa lǝmbǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ etiki nyamǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When I wrote you, it wasn't to accuse the one who was wrong or to take up for the one who was hurt. I wrote, so God would show you how much you do care for us.
translation_verse: Nya ite bǝ ńwɔni kukue komfo ntsyese mi tsyaa, ini lǝ nwǝ díyifo kabua nye nwǝ báta bébu eso. Bomu ńwɔni ko miǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmii, nlǝkǝ nte mi kase dibu biǝtǝ bo mfui tinti.

english_verse: And we were greatly encouraged. Although we were encouraged, we felt even better when we saw how happy Titus was, because you had shown he had nothing to worry about.
translation_verse: Nyamfo kenke lékpe bo nkɛale nɛ. Inni bǝ ékpe bo nkɛale ete, bomu lǝ kase Tito lékpe bo disuǝyuǝ ku wǝ disuǝyuǝ nǝ únyǝ ku kase bɛwunsǝ békpe wǝ anyɔ eso. Itsyise mimblɛ ǝtǝ bǝ wǝ nsusu ǝsiǝ kasɔ buɛɛ.

english_verse: We had told him how much we thought of you, and you did not disappoint us. Just as we have always told you the truth, so everything we told him about you has also proved to be true.
translation_verse: Bíǝntǝ ndi kofani lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi se mímbesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ mi disi eso. Nya lǝ kase lesa saa nǝ bɔ́tɛyi mi eyifo ɔnukualɛɛ, nyaso kase bɔ́sɔ lɛkɔɛsi lǝ mi ǝsuǝ bútǝ Tito tsyaa, ǝbǝ itǝ itsyise ɛyɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Titus loves all of you very much, especially when he remembers how you obeyed him and how you trembled with fear when you welcomed him.
translation_verse: Nyaso wǝ lelabi itǝ aabe kakanwu lǝ okloma kase bítsyue wǝ asatete koto ku kase béfo wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bobokosǝ ku dibu ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: It makes me really glad to know I can depend on you.
translation_verse: Iyifo mɛ disuǝyuǝ bǝ moofo mi bofo kanɔ lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My friends, we want you to know that the churches in Macedonia have shown others God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, bola boǝ bete asa nnya Onanto díyifo útǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa nnya kenke nkpe lǝ Makedonia ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lefonǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They even asked and begged us to let them have the joy of giving their money for God's people.
translation_verse: bálɛ boo lekpakpa sitinti bǝ lǝ butǝ mǝ kusu lǝ bawunsǝko betidi ba leeyifo Onanto eto keyifo lǝ Yudea eto kasɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And they did more than we had hoped. They gave themselves first to the Lord and then to us, just as God wanted them to do.
translation_verse: Nya asa nnya béyifo mfóo, so kase bo kosate lébe kusu boǝ bátafo buyifo! Tutɛɛ, béfi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ Bonamute nya lǝ nnya kamaa, lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝ, báyani mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ bo tsya.

english_verse: Titus was the one who got you started doing this good thing, so we begged him to help you finish what you had begun.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, bɔ́tɛyi Tito wǝ dítsyǝ keyifo kamfo kasɔ lǝ mi nti boǝ, úsukosǝ lǝ ɔwunsǝko mi lǝ belosǝ lelabi eto keyifo kamfo.

english_verse: You do everything better than anyone else. You have stronger faith. You speak better and know more. You are eager to give, and you love us better. Now you must give more generously than anyone else.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, bíusu sɛtɔ lǝ lesa saa nǝ nkpe mi ǝsuǝ. Sitintii, bíusu sɛtɔ lǝ mi bofokanɔ ku etikididi ku kobetete ku otsyekle kpekpe ku kase biala bo tsya ǝsuǝ. Nyaso bola boǝ bekpe nkɛale lǝ bisu sɛtɔ̃ lǝ mi lelabi faa eto asatǝtǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ nko tsya.

english_verse: I am not ordering you to do this. I am simply testing how real your love is by comparing it with the concern that others have shown.
translation_verse: Inni kɔfi minlɛ mi bokpe, bomu mfi lekplatsya nǝ betidi bamba nlɛɛ, bufi kakatesǝ ko mi lele lǝ mbe lǝ mi ditidila tsya eyifo lelabi tinti.

english_verse: You know our Lord Jesus Christ treated us with undeserved grace by giving up all his riches, so you could become rich.
translation_verse: Itsyise biyi kase Bonamute Yesu Kristo dífi lefonǝ útǝ mi. Nya ite bǝ otabinyǝ uni tsyaa, úyifo wǝ ǝsuǝ okombo lǝ mi disi eso bǝ lǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ sekombo ǝsuǝǝ, uyifo mi batabinyǝ.

english_verse: A year ago you were the first ones to give, and you gave because you wanted to. So listen to my advice.
translation_verse: Nsusu bo muutǝ mi ni bǝnkǝ yɔɔlɛkɛ bǝ belosǝ mɔmɔɔ, keyifo ka bítsyǝ kasɔ lɛlɛko. Mi ni betutɛ ba dítsyǝ kasɔ nyamfo buyifo nya bini betidi tutɛ kulaa tsya lǝ nsusu bomfo eto bufi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I think you should finish what you started. If you give according to what you have, you will prove you are as eager to give as you were to think about giving.
translation_verse: Nya fe kase bífi lelabi bítsyǝ keyifo kamfo kasɔɔ, bisukosǝ ke sɛtɔ fe kase ini mi kosate dífi nnya buyifo eto nsusu bomǝ. Nya bífi lesa nǝ nte mi biyifo ke belosǝ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter how much you have. What matters is how much you are willing to give from what you have.
translation_verse: Lǝ iyifo mi lelabi kekleke biǝ biǝtǝ betidi asaa, Onanto ebofo lesa nǝ nte mi biǝ biǝtǝ. Nya inni lǝ lesa nǝ lente mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: for you to share with them when you have so much, and they have so little. Later, when they have more than enough, and you are in need, they can share with you. Then everyone will have a fair share,
translation_verse: Inni bɔtɛyi minlɛ miǝ meeyifo lǝ itǝ betidi bamba eto bitsyikǝ lǝ biyifo fomflo, lǝ nyifo mi bele lǝ bɛkɛ kalende, fɛɛ se asa kpǝ nte mi mɔmɔ esoo, ɛlɛkɛ bǝ bɛwunsǝko mba inte. Nya lefe nǝ ehiã mi fɛ kpǝ nte mǝ tsyaa, bɔɔwunsǝko mi. Lǝ ibǝ nkoo, ete bɛwunsǝko bǝtsyuǝ lǝ kase ińyǝ itǝ nɛ.

english_verse: just as the Scriptures say, “Those who gathered too much had nothing left. Those who gathered only a little had all they needed.” Titus and His Friends
translation_verse: Nko seka báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue nɛ bǝnkǝ, “Nwǝ dínyǝ bikǝ kpǝǝ, mǝnnyǝ kpǝ osonsǝ nya nwǝ dínyǝ sɛkɛɛ, klolesa máhiã wǝ.” Bátsyese Tito Ku Wǝ Bayɛtsyuǝ Korinto.

english_verse: I am grateful that God made Titus care as much about you as we do.
translation_verse: Boasɔ Onanto ani, itsyise útǝ ǝnǝmi ásɛ Tito nkǝ lǝ ɔwunsǝko mi fe kase bola boǝ boawunsǝko mi.

english_verse: When we begged Titus to visit you, he said he would. He wanted to because he cared so much for you.
translation_verse: Se bɔ́tɔ butsyiko wǝ ɔflɔ boǝ ubǝ ɔwunsǝko mii, ɔ́tɔnɔ itsyise iyifo wǝ lelabi nko, nkǝ lǝ ubǝ ɔwunsǝ, inni lǝ kase bɔ́tɔ wǝ eso, bomu iyifo wǝ lelabi nko, nkǝ lǝ ubǝ mi ɔflɔ.

english_verse: With Titus we are also sending one of the Lord's followers who is well known in every church for spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Nya kamaa, bɔlɛ Tito ku ɔyimisani wǝ nkpe dibu lǝ bafokanɔfɔ kenke nti botsyese mi lǝ kase woedi etiki kesensǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eso.

english_verse: The churches chose this follower to travel with us while we carry this gift that will bring praise to the Lord and show how much we hope to help.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, uyifo utidi wǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa dílǝkǝ bǝ utǝkǝko bo lǝ ubǝ ɔwunsǝ lǝ lelabi eto ǝsuǝbufikǝtǝ eto keyifo ka boeyifo kefi atɛsǝ kǝtǝ Bonamute lǝ bufi bote tsya bǝnkǝ iyifo bo lelabi boǝ boawunsǝko bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: But we want to do what pleases the Lord and what people think is right.
translation_verse: Itsyise inni lǝ Bonamute eto ǝnǝmi mate ete bola boǝ boeyifo lesa nǝ lɛlɛkɛ, bomu lǝ betidi kenke eto ǝnǝmi tsya.

english_verse: We are also sending someone else with Titus and the other follower. We approve of this man. In fact, he has already shown us many times that he wants to help. And now he wants to help even more than ever, because he trusts you so much.
translation_verse: Nyamfo esoo, búfi bo ɔyimi ǝmfo bɔ́kɔ ku mǝ bótsyese mi nɛ. Bóto wǝ bóbe kpǝ búnyǝ boǝ bófo wǝ bɔ́nɔ nya buyi wǝ bǝ okpe otsyekle tinti. Nya se ófo mi ɔ́nɔ nko esoo, iyifo wǝ lelabi kekleke nkǝ woawunsǝko mi.

english_verse: Titus is my partner, who works with me to serve you. The other two followers are sent by the churches, and they bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Nya itsyi lǝ Tito ǝsuǝǝ, uyifo mɔ ɔyɛtsyuǝ kekleke wǝ leeyifo keyifo ku mɛ kefi kawumsǝko mi. Nya bayimi fɛfɛ ba nyɛ ku wǝǝ, ni bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa eto bǝnyɛsiǝ. Nya beefi dibu kǝtǝ Kristo.

english_verse: Treat them in such a way that the churches will see your love and will know why we bragged about you.
translation_verse: Nyaso bilǝkǝ mi lelabi bete mǝ lǝ bafokanɔfɔ fɛfɛ kenke lǝ bǝnyǝ lǝ bate sitinti bǝ, ɔnukualɛ ini bǝ nyamfo eso boabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ mǝ disi nɛ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the money you plan to give for God's people.
translation_verse: Nyǝ miǝ yanle bǝ nsi nwɔni kukue ntǝ mi itsyi lǝ bɔwunsǝko bo ele bǝ butǝ Onanto eto bafokanɔfɔ lǝ Yudea eto kasɔ.

english_verse: I know how eager you are to give. And I have proudly told the Lord's followers in Macedonia that you people in Achaia have been ready for a whole year. Now your desire to give has made them want to give.
translation_verse: Nyi minkǝ iyifo mi lelabi biǝ biawunsǝko betidi bamfó. Nya maasɔ lɛkɔɛsi lǝ mi disi lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ lefe saa kate bafokanɔfɔ nkpe lǝ Makedonia. Ntɛyi mǝ minkǝ bayimi ba nkpe lǝ Akaia eto kasɔɔ, ǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtsyǝ taa lɛlɛko bǝ buutǝ bɔwunsǝko bomfo. Nya itsyi lǝ mi ute bokpe lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ, nya lésanklisǝ mǝ nti betidi kpǝ nɛ.

english_verse: This is why I am sending Titus and the two others to you. I want you to be ready, just as I promised. This will prove we were not wrong to brag about you.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, nlɛ bayimi bamfo botsyese mi bǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ bǝ bo ǝsuǝ katobesǝbesǝ lǝ mi disii, eni bimba. Nya fe kase maatɛyi mǝ lefe saa, nla miǝ biumuǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyǝ ku mi bɔwunsǝko.

english_verse: Some followers from Macedonia may come with me, and I want them to find that you have the money ready. If you don't, I would be embarrassed for trusting you to do this. But you would be embarrassed even more.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nnya ete bayimi ba nkpe lǝ Makedonia bǝtsyuǝ dítǝkǝko mɛ bǝbǝ mi ɔflɔ nya bǝbǝ bǝnyǝ bǝ bíǝmmuǝ ǝsuǝ bítsyǝ fe kase míntɛyii, bo ku mi ta eto ǝnǝmi ebokpoo kasɔ sitinti, tsya fɛɛ mi kole eboso le kase bufi ǝnǝmi butǝkǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: So I have decided to ask Titus and the others to spend some time with you before I arrive. This way they can arrange to collect the money you have promised. Then you will have the chance to give because you want to, and not because you feel forced to.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso mímbu miǝ efe bǝ ntsyese bayimi bamfo mi ntɔnsǝ nɛ. Be lǝ bawunsǝko mi bɛbɛ ǝtǝsa nnya bɛtɛyi biǝ biutǝ bitsyǝ fɛ lǝ mbǝ ndufǝ. Nyamfo loote bǝ mi kǝtǝ kamǝ eyifo lesa nǝ bítǝ ku kafo faa. Inni bǝ kuutsyuǝ lɛnyinkǝ mi ókpe eso bɛnlɛ asa nyamǝ butǝ. Onanto Aala Utidi Wǝ Lǝǝtǝ Lesa Ku Kafo Faa.

english_verse: Remember this saying, “A few seeds make a small harvest, but a lot of seeds make a big harvest.”
translation_verse: Bekloma biǝ utidi wǝ laato asa sɛkɛɛ, sɛkɛ ete wuufǝsǝ. Nya nwǝ laato asa kpǝǝ, nko ke wuufǝsǝ asa kpǝ tsya nɛ.

english_verse: Each of you must make up your own mind about how much to give. But don't feel sorry that you must give and don't feel you are forced to give. God loves people who love to give.
translation_verse: Nyaso mi utsyuǝ saa tǝ lesa nǝ wǝ kosate léla nkǝ wǝǝtǝ kafo faa. Nya inni ku kanyinyǝnyǝ nye iyifo fe kuutsyuǝ ńyǝ kuutsyuǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ fɛ útǝ nnya. Itsyise Onanto aala nwǝ lǝǝtǝ lesa ku disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: God can bless you with everything you need, and you will always have more than enough to do all kinds of good things for others.
translation_verse: Nya Onanto ebofo fǝ lesa saa butǝ enso kase lehiã fǝ. Itǝ bǝ lǝ lefe saa ǝbɔkɛ kpǝ nya foofo keyifo sɛɛ saa buyifo ku nnya.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God freely gives his gifts to the poor, and always does right.”
translation_verse: Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue átɛyi itsyi lǝ utidi ǝmfo eto okle ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Wǝ lǝǝtǝ betidi ba ni bakombo asa ku kafo faa, nya wǝ kafoɛkpɛ te lefe saa.”

english_verse: God gives seed to farmers and provides everyone with food. He will increase what you have, so you can give even more to those in need.
translation_verse: Onanto wǝ lǝǝtǝ ɔkuɛmfo eyibibi nkǝ oto nya woǝnyǝ didisa kedii, ebutǝ fǝ eyibibi nnya kenke lefe itǝ fǝ. Nya wuutǝ yoobe itǝ fǝ didisa kpǝ itsyi lǝ fǝ lefonǝ eto keyifo itǝ betidi kpǝ eso.

english_verse: You will be blessed in every way, and you will be able to keep on being generous. Then many people will thank God when we deliver your gift.
translation_verse: Wuutǝ nkǝ asa kpǝ kɛ fǝ lefe saa bǝ lǝ ekeyifo kafoɛkpɛ, bǝ betidi kpǝ ebɔsɔ Onanto ani ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ ǝtǝsa nnya baafo kayɛnko lǝ bo ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: What you are doing is much more than a service that supplies God's people with what they need. It is something that will make many others thank God.
translation_verse: Itsyise bɔwunsǝko bo biǝtǝǝ, aawunsǝko Onanto eto betidi. Fɛɛ isi ensoo, yǝǝtǝ Onanto lɛninsɔ kpǝ lefe saa.

english_verse: The way in which you have proved yourselves by this service will bring honor and praise to God. You believed the message about Christ, and you obeyed it by sharing generously with God's people and with everyone else.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bɔwunsǝko bomfo eto nnya laabɔ ketsyiko lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, betidi kpǝ ebufi atɛsǝ bǝtǝ Onanto lǝ bofokanɔ nkpe mi lǝ Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ béfo bɛnɔ, ku mi kafoɛkpɛ ka bifi bitǝ mǝ ku utsyuǝ saa.

english_verse: Now they are praying for you and want to see you, because God used you to bless them so very much.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lelabi kplɛ ǝsuǝǝ, mǝ eboto ola lǝ mi disi lǝ lefonǝ kpǝ nǝ Onanto ditǝ mi eso.
