english_verse: Thank God for his gift that is too wonderful for words!
translation_verse: Bitǝ bɔsɔ Onanto ani lǝ wǝ ditǝsa nǝ boebofo bɔtɛyi nǝ úfi útǝ bo eso.

english_verse: Do you think I am a coward when I am with you and brave when I am far away? Well, I ask you to listen, because Christ himself was humble and gentle.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, kosate éfi Kristo eto ǝsuǝ kasɔ bokosǝ bokosǝ ku ǝsuǝ buyuǝsǝ nlɛ mi kɔlɛ bɔlɛ ku lekpakpalɛlɛ miǝ mɔ nwǝ laabokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ lǝ mi ǝnǝmi fɛ meeyifo asa ku utu lǝ mimbǝ mi lǝ ɔflɔ uni.

english_verse: Some people have said we act like the people of this world. So when I arrive, I expect I will have to be firm and forceful in what I say to them. Please don't make me treat you that way.
translation_verse: Lekpakpa minlɛ mi bǝ lǝ mbǝ mi ɔflɔɔ, biǝntǝ bǝ etiki kumi ku mi lǝ senyanya ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ mi nti eto bǝtsyuǝ ba leebu bǝnkǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kobe ǝsuǝ ete boeyifo bo asa kayɛnkoo, muunyǝnki nkpe mǝ.

english_verse: We live in this world, but we don't act like its people
translation_verse: Sitinti ini bǝ bokpǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo, fɛɛ inni kase kawunsiǝ kamfo laakpɔ lema bɔnlɛ bɔkpɔ.

english_verse: or fight our battles with the weapons of this world. Instead, we use God's power that can destroy fortresses. We destroy arguments
translation_verse: Itsyise bemakǝ bia boefi kakpɔ lemaa, mentsyi kawunsiǝ kamfo. Bomu Onanto eto ǝsuǝale nnya nkpe ale boefi katsylɔsɔ balo bamǝ eto ńyǝnkɔ kekleke bomǝ.

english_verse: and every bit of pride that keeps anyone from knowing God. We capture people's thoughts and make them obey Christ.
translation_verse: Boatsylɔsǝ bidia, bidia eto etikinǝnǝ ku lesa saa nǝ beefi kataka kǝńyǝ nnya leeti betidi kusu bǝ bate Onanto. Nya boǝmuǝ nsusu saa fe betidi ba lema lɛkpɔ boǝ butsyue Kristo koto.

english_verse: And when you completely obey him, we will punish anyone who refuses to obey.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ bunyǝ buǝ beyani mi ǝsuǝ kenke bitǝ Kristo eto ditikii, buunǝ koto utsyuǝ saa ke dímentsyue wǝ kotoo.

english_verse: You judge by appearances. If any of you think you are the only ones who belong to Christ, then think again. We belong to Christ as much as you do.
translation_verse: Asa nnya ni ǝnǝmi ǝnǝmi eto asa hã ete bɛnlɛ bobe. Lǝ mi utsyuǝ áfo ɔ́nɔ nkǝ uyifo Kristo eto olee, okloma nkǝ fe kase wuuntsya ni Kristo eto olee, nko ke bo tsya ńyǝ butǝ Kristo nɛ.

english_verse: Maybe I brag a little too much about the authority that the Lord gave me to help you and not to hurt you. Yet I am not embarrassed to brag.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nsɔ lɛkɔɛsi ḿbesǝ ǝsuǝ kato enso kase ele bǝ nyifo lǝ ǝsuǝale nnya Bonamute dífi útǝ bo nkǝ bufi bunǝ mi lǝ bebe lǝ wǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, nya inni bǝ lǝ bufi bunǝ mi bobokosǝ kamaa, kofani embɔlɛ mɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And I am not trying to scare you with my letters.
translation_verse: Mǝmbola miǝ bibu biǝ sikpi minlɛ mi bokpe ɛyɛ lǝ ekue nnya maawɔni kǝtǝ mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Some of you are saying, “Paul's letters are harsh and powerful. But in person, he is a weakling and has nothing worth saying.”
translation_verse: Lǝ mi ntii, utsyuǝ ebɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Paulo eto ekue nya waawɔni kǝtǝ mi eto kɛnyɛ kpe ale ku ǝsuǝale tinti. Fɛɛ lǝ okpe lǝ bo ɔflɔɔ, uyuǝ nya wǝ etiki ǝǝmbǝ kasɔnɔnɔ saa.”

english_verse: Those people had better understand that when I am with you, I will do exactly what I say in my letters.
translation_verse: Nla miǝ utidi emfo eto okle te nkǝ, asa nnya boawɔni katsyese mi lǝ ekue ǝsuǝ ku nnya boeyifo lǝ bokpe mi lǝ ɔflɔɔ, letetekɛkɛ saa ǝmbǝ lǝ nnya nti.

english_verse: We won't dare compare ourselves with those who think so much of themselves. But they are foolish to compare themselves with themselves.
translation_verse: Imbǝ bo ɔkɔɛ kon tsya boǝ boefi ǝsuǝ bokatesǝko betidi ba diyifo fe mba leebu bǝ bakplɛnyǝ beni. Beyifo mba leeninǝ. Beefi mǝ ǝsuǝ kakatesǝko mǝ betsyuǝ lǝ mǝ asayifoyifo ǝsuǝ nya mǝ kosate dítsyǝ nnya beefi ǝsuǝ kakatesǝko.

english_verse: We won't brag about something we don't have a right to brag about. We will only brag about the work God has sent us to do, and you are part of that work.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ boo, bo ǝsuǝ katobesǝbesǝ ǝmboso kase ińyǝ itǝ. Nya boombesǝ ǝsuǝ kato boso keyifo ka Onanto dítǝ bo nya nka bɔnlɛ buyifo lǝ mi nti tsyaa, nkpe lǝ nti.

english_verse: We are not bragging more than we should. After all, we did bring the message about Christ to you.
translation_verse: Nya se mi tsya nkpe lǝ kaka Onanto dítǝ bo nkǝ buyifo ke bose esoo, bóenyifo ke bɔyilasǝ ke kasekɔ. Itsyise bo ni mba dítsyiko mi ɔflɔ bubǝ ku Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: We don't brag about what others have done, as if we had done those things ourselves. But I hope as you become stronger in your faith, we will be able to reach many more of the people around you. That has always been our goal.
translation_verse: Nyaso boambesǝ ǝsuǝ kato kayila betidi bamba eto keyifo ka béyifo itsyise kaso nka Onanto dítǝ bo. Bomu bo kusubebe tǝkǝ lǝ mi bofokanɔ eto katobebe ǝsuǝ nya lǝ bofo asa buyifo kaso nko lǝ mi nti le kase Onanto dítǝ bo nkǝ buyifo.

english_verse: Then we will be able to preach the good news in other lands where we cannot take credit for work someone else has already done.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, boofo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bɔtɛyi lǝ nlebe bo kuutsyuǝ dímanyɛtɔ óyo tsya. Nya yembudi bǝ bɔlɛ ǝsuǝ kato bobesǝ lǝ keyifo ka betidi bamba díyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You may brag about yourself, but the only approval that counts is the Lord's approval.
translation_verse: Itsyise inni utidi wǝ laatɛsǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ni utidi sɛɛ, bomu nwǝ Onanto laatɛsǝ.

english_verse: I am as concerned about you as God is. You were like a virgin bride I had chosen only for Christ.
translation_verse: Maakpɔ kutsyuǝsɛ lǝ mi disi fe kase Onanto leeyifo lǝ mi disi. Ntɔ mi disi ntǝ Kristo hã fe kase baatɔ kebitɛ ka lenyitɔ osani disi kǝtǝ kusǝ.

english_verse: But now I fear that you will be tricked, just as Eve was tricked by that lying snake. I am afraid that you might stop thinking about Christ in an honest and sincere way.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nlɛ sikpi bote miǝ Obonsam ebobiasǝ mi nsusu bǝ biembudi ɔnukualɛ bitǝ Kristo mate, bisumu wǝ fe kase bíkeyifo. Nko íbǝ bǝ owa ǝmǝ efi wǝ kawɛsu obiasǝ Eva eto nsusu nɛ.

english_verse: We told you about Jesus, and you received the Holy Spirit and accepted our message. But you let some people tell you about another Jesus. Now you are ready to receive another spirit and accept a different message.
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi nyamfo bɔtɛyi nko itsyise biatɔnɔ mlǝ kafo utidi saa wǝ lǝǝbǝ katɛyi mi ditiki bamba nǝ lɛbɔ lete itsyilǝ lǝ Yesu wǝ ǝsuǝ bobe letsya butǝ mi. Nya biafo lɛwɔnɔ ku ditiki nǝ lɛbɔ lete lǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ ku bo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ kanɔ.

english_verse: I may not speak as well as they do, but I know as much. And this has already been made perfectly clear to you.
translation_verse: Lǝ maamfo etiki budi kukɔnɔ tsyaa, inni lǝ Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ ǝsuǝ minyi. Lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝǝ, bútǝ bɛnɔ nyamfo kasɔ wuee lǝ kusu saa kusu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Was it wrong for me to lower myself and honor you by preaching God's message free of charge?
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ mímbé Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya míntǝ mii, mámfo mi kulesa fe kayofofo seka. Bomu mbokosǝ mɔ ǝsuǝ kasɔ ntǝ mi bǝ lǝ ebesǝ mi kato. Nyaalɛ se mínyifo nyamfo nko esoo, kabua keni mínyifo?

english_verse: Even when I was in need, I still didn't bother you. In fact, some of the Lord's followers from Macedonia brought me what I needed. I have not been a burden to you in the past, and I will never be a burden.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ mínkɛ lǝ mi nti mínkabe mɔ ǝsuǝǝ, mǝnlǝ mi itǝ bɔwunsǝko se atabi lehiã mɛ. Bayimi ba ditsyi Makedonia dikawunsǝko mɛ lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ. Nya mémfi bulǝ saa ntǝkǝ mi lǝ ǝsuǝ nya membufi bulǝ saa tsya mbǝ nkǝtǝkǝ mi lǝ ǝsuǝ kulefe.

english_verse: As surely as I speak the truth about Christ, no one in Achaia can stop me from bragging about this.
translation_verse: Se Kristo eto ɔnukualɛtiki nkpe lǝ mɛ esoo, nlɛ bokakase miǝ kuutsyuǝ saa embofo mɛ kusu buti lǝ lɛkɔɛsi nǝ maasɔ lǝ ditiki nǝmfo ǝsuǝ lǝ Akaia eto kasɔ lǝ kalebe saa.

english_verse: And it isn't because I don't love you. God himself knows how much I do love you.
translation_verse: Bɔtɛyi minlɛ nyamfo nko se manla mi eso lee? Onanto kosate yi nkǝ maala mi.

english_verse: I plan to go on doing just what I have always done. Then those people won't be able to brag about doing the same things we are doing.
translation_verse: Muusukosǝ keyifo ka minlɛ buyifo nya membofo kulesa intsyiko miǝ ɔflɔ. Nya luutǝ bǝ mba nlɛ mǝ ǝsuǝ bokpo bǝ batɔnkpe beni kabesǝ ǝsuǝ katoo, bayɛ kusu bunyǝ katɛyi bǝnkǝ keyifo ka banlɛ akateko nka bɔnlɛ.

english_verse: Anyway, they are no more than false apostles and dishonest workers. They only pretend to be apostles of Christ.
translation_verse: Betidi bamfó eni batɔnkpe kosate. Baawɛ betidi katɛyi bidia lǝ mǝ keyifo ǝsuǝ. Beeyifo mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ betidi lǝ bǝnyǝ mǝ fe Kristo eto batɔnkpe kosate beni.

english_verse: And it is no wonder. Even Satan tries to make himself look like an angel of light.
translation_verse: Nya nyamfo menyifo lesa fɔfɔ, itsyise Obonsam aafo ǝsuǝ bofloma keyifo fe kato eto ɔtɔnkpe wǝ lǝǝyǝnde.

english_verse: So why does it seem strange for Satan's servants to pretend to do what is right? Someday they will get exactly what they deserve. Paul's Sufferings for Christ
translation_verse: Nyaso nyamfo menyifo bo naa bǝ mba ntǝkǝko wǝ aatsyi mǝ ǝsuǝ kawuninsǝ keyifo fe basɛɛ ba leeyifo Onanto eto keyifo. Fɛɛ lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, boonyǝ nnya kayofofo fe kase ińyǝ itǝ. Paulo Ábesǝ Ǝsuǝ Kato Lǝ Asa Nnya Úlǝkǝ Óte Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I don't want any of you to think I am a fool. But if you do, then let me be a fool and brag a little.
translation_verse: Nsi nlɛ bɔtɛyi miǝ, kuutsyuǝ saa membu nkǝ meeninǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ utsyuǝ eebu nkoo, bifi nnya nko bitǝ mɛ bǝ moofo ǝsuǝ kato bobesǝ sɛkɛ ete eso.

english_verse: When I do all this bragging, I do it as a fool and not for the Lord.
translation_verse: Nya lesa nǝ minlɛ bɔtɛyi mfoo, eni lesa nǝ Bonamute loola nkǝ ntɛyi. Fɛɛ ǝsuǝ kato bobesǝ eto ditiki nǝ minlɛ bɔtɛyi mfo, eyifo fe kase nwǝ leeninǝ laabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato kedi ebukitiki.

english_verse: Yet if others want to brag about what they have done, so will I.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se betidi kpǝ leefi kawunsiǝ kamfo eto asa kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato esoo, bitǝ lǝ mintsya lǝ mbesǝ ǝsuǝ kato sɛkɛ.

english_verse: And since you are so smart, you will gladly put up with a fool.
translation_verse: Se mi kosate diyifo babesibe nko esoo, nyaso bitsyǝsuǝko mba leeninǝ lǝ disuǝyuǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: In fact, you let people make slaves of you and cheat you and steal from you. Why, you even let them strut around and slap you in the face.
translation_verse: Biakɛ lefe kulaa tsya kǝtǝ lǝ utsyuǝ efi mi uyifo wǝ odomunyǝ nye díyifo mi lesafimfi, nye otafa mi nye woǝnyǝ mi lǝ kulesa ǝsuǝ nye ɔsɔ mi lǝ kotosi kulaa tsya.

english_verse: I am ashamed to say we are too weak to behave in such a way. If they can brag, so can I, but it is a foolish thing to do.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ boo, iyifo bo kofani bǝ bóenyifo mi nyamfo eto okle. Lee bíbu biǝ eni búyifo nko? Fɛɛ lǝ utsyuǝ ebofo utu bokpe kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ lesatsyuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nlɛ etiki budu fe nwǝ leeninǝ lo, nyalɛɛ, mintsya ebofo utu bokpe nko seka, mbesǝ ǝsuǝ kato.

english_verse: Are they Hebrews? So am I. Are they Jews? So am I. Are they from the family of Abraham? Well, so am I.
translation_verse: Bɔtɛyi banlɛ bǝ Hebrifɔ benii lee? Mintsya mǝ mini nɛ. Bɔtɛyi banlɛ bǝ Israelfɔ beni lee? Mintsya mǝ mini nɛ. Bɔtɛyi banlɛ bǝ Abraham eto kafo eto bebi beni tsya lee? Mintsya mǝ mini nɛ.

english_verse: Are they servants of Christ? I am a fool to talk this way, but I serve him better than they do. I have worked harder and have been put in jail more times. I have been beaten with whips more and have been in danger of death more often.
translation_verse: Kristo eto beyifoyifo beni lee? Nlɛ etiki budi fenkǝ nwǝ disi lebia, fɛɛ etiki eto ɔnukualɛ ni nlɛkɛ nso mǝ. Nyifo keyifo kekleke nso mǝ, bakpe mɛ lǝ Aba eto diyo sesia sesia baso mǝ. Bablɛ mɛ tsya sesia sesia baso mǝ. Nya minkɛ lǝ ukpǝ ku mǝnkpǝ eto nti sesia sesia.

english_verse: Five times my own people gave me
translation_verse: Sɛnɔ sɔ̃ɔ̃ Yudafɔ lɛblɛ mɛ awosi ǝtsyǝ sɛwɔnɔmbǝ ku ukue fiofio.

english_verse: Three times the Romans beat me with a big stick, and once my enemies stoned me. I have been shipwrecked three times, and I even had to spend a night and a day in the sea.
translation_verse: Nya Romafɔ lɛblɛ mɛ ku lekete sitsyǝ. Báto mɛ aba sɔni. Nsiǝ lǝ ɔklɔ sitsyǝ nya séba ku mɛ nya míndufǝ lǝ lekpo eto ntu ǝsuǝ. Nya lefe lɔnii, nkɛ lǝ ntu ketsye kani ku diyi wɔlɔlɔlɔ.

english_verse: During my many travels, I have been in danger from rivers, robbers, my own people, and foreigners. My life has been in danger in cities, in deserts, at sea, and with people who only pretended to be the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Sesia sesia sesia sia mínyɛ kusuu, ńdufǝ lǝ bulǝ akpa akpa ǝsuǝ. Lǝ mɔ kusu bɔyɛ kpǝ kǝmiǝ, ndufǝ lǝ ketuyiyi ku beyu eto ani. Meedufǝ lǝ bulǝ kǝmiǝ lǝ mɔ betidi Yudafɔ kosate ku mba lenni Yudafɔ tsya eto ani. Meedufǝ lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ kǝmǝ nkplɛ eto betidi eto ani ku lǝ ntɛnti. Ńdufǝ lǝ bulǝ lǝ lekpo ǝsuǝ ku bayimi ba ni bayimi ba ni badia eto ani.

english_verse: I have worked and struggled and spent many sleepless nights. I have gone hungry and thirsty and often had nothing to eat. I have been cold from not having enough clothes to keep me warm.
translation_verse: Ńkplatsya ńyifo keyifo kekleke. Mánkɛ lefe nlabe selabe ntsye kpǝ. Mǝǝsiǝ kukpɛnsɛ nya utukɔɛ laalɛ mɛ, nya lefe kpǝ maankɛ lesa kedi kemi. Lɛyɔ aalɛ mɛ, nya mǝǝnyǝ kulesa nǝ muufi nti ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When others are weak, I am weak too. When others are tricked into sin, I get angry.
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ ǝbǝ kama lǝ wǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, yǝǝtǝ bǝ ani aalo mintsya. Nya lǝ bǝtǝ utsyuǝ edufǝ lǝ lebua ǝsuǝǝ, yǝǝlǝ mɛ lǝ utu.

english_verse: If I have to brag, I will brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Lǝ ele bǝ mbesǝ ǝsuǝ katoo, yuutsyi lǝ kase minyɔkpɔ eso.

english_verse: God, the Father of our Lord Jesus, knows I am not lying. And God is to be praised forever!
translation_verse: Onanto wǝ ni Bonamute Yesu eto Anto, wǝ ni nwǝ boatɛsɛ lefe saa, wǝ ni nwǝ nyi sitinti nkǝ asa nnya minlɛ bɔtɛyi mfoo, minlɛ sídia bɔtɛyi.

english_verse: The governor of Damascus at the time of King Aretas had the city gates guarded, so he could capture me.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ minkɛ lǝ Damasko, Aba eto Unyɛsiǝ ninǝ wǝ lɛkɛ lǝ Oka Areta kalɔ, ala nkǝ lǝ umuǝ mɛ. Lǝ nyaso unyǝnsǝ mba laase asa lǝ ofati wǝ báto batsyilama umǝ ǝmǝ eto mbɔsie nkǝ lǝ bǝmuǝ mɛ.

english_verse: But I escaped by being let down in a basket through a window in the city wall.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ befi mɛ bakpe lǝ ditsyitsya bayɛnko ku ukuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ ofo wǝ nkpe lǝ ofati ǝmǝ babokosǝ kasɔ ḿbɔ ńtsyetsyi ńdu lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: I have to brag. There is nothing to be gained by it, but I must brag about the visions and other things that the Lord has shown me.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ nsɔ lɛkɔɛsi mbesǝ ǝsuǝ kato ite bǝ kutǝkǝ saa ǝmbǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ muudi etiki itsyi lǝ asa nnya minyǝ ku asa nnya Bonamute dítǝ mɛ ku nnya úlǝkǝ óte mɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I am planning to visit you for the third time. But I still won't make a burden of myself. What I really want is you, and not what you have. Children are not supposed to save up for their parents, but parents are supposed to take care of their children.
translation_verse: Ditsyǝfǝ ni nǝmfo se mímuǝ ǝsuǝ minlɛ mi ɔflɔ bubǝ nɛ, tsya memohiã bɔwunsǝko saa ntsyiko mi ɔflɔ. Mi kosate minhiã, inni mi atabi. Itsyise inni bekpefi ele bǝ bǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtsyǝ lǝ befi babe mǝ antomǝ. Bomu antomǝ ni mba ele bǝ bǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtsyǝ lǝ befi babe mǝ bebi.

english_verse: I will brag about that man, but not about myself, except to say how weak I am.
translation_verse: Nyaso moobesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ osani ǝmfo ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ mebosǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ mɔ kosate ǝsuǝ, enso asa nnya dítsyi lǝ mɔ bɔyɔkpɔ ǝsuǝ hã ete.

english_verse: Yet even if I did brag, I would not be foolish. I would simply be speaking the truth. But I will try not to say too much. That way, none of you will think more highly of me than you should because of what you have seen me do and say.
translation_verse: Lǝ ńla kulaa tsya miǝ maabesǝ ǝsuǝ katoo, membuninǝ nyifo nko. Itsyise ɔnɔkualɛ eto ditiki ni nǝ muudi. Fɛɛ memuyifo nko, itsyise manla miǝ kuutsyuǝ nyǝ mɛ utidi bamba enso nwǝ mini lǝ asa nnya úkǝnyǝ mínyifo ku nnya míntɛyi eso.

english_verse: Of course, I am now referring to the wonderful things I saw. One of Satan's angels was sent to make me suffer terribly, so that I would not feel too proud.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ itǝ bǝ lǝ nyɛ mɔ ǝsuǝ kato bobesǝ lǝ asa kpǝ nnya Onanto dílǝkǝ óte mɛ ǝsuǝ esoo, útǝ nkǝ nyǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto kanyi. Kanyinyǝnyǝ kamfo te fe Obonsam eto ɔtɔnkpe utsyuǝ wǝ nlɛ mɛ bɔblɛ kekleke nya yǝǝtǝ maayɛ ǝsuǝ kato bobesǝ.

english_verse: Three times I begged the Lord to make this suffering go away.
translation_verse: Ńto ola ńkpadi Bonamute sitsyǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ otakasǝ mɛ nnya lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But he replied, “My gift of undeserved grace is all you need. My power is strongest when you are weak.” So if Christ keeps giving me his power, I will gladly brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Bomu ɔ́tɛyi mɛ nkǝ, “Mɔ lefonǝ ni lesa nǝ hã lehiã itǝ fǝ, itsyise mǝǝlǝkǝ mɔ ǝsuǝale kate lǝ asa nnya meeyifo kǝtǝ betidi ba lǝmbǝ ǝsuǝale saa enso.” Lǝ nyamfo esoo, mǝǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ kaso lǝ mɔ bɔyɔkpɔ ǝsuǝ itǝ lǝ Kristo eto ǝsuǝale lǝ lefo disiǝ lǝ mɛ kenke.

english_verse: Yes, I am glad to be weak or insulted or mistreated or to have troubles and sufferings, if it is for Christ. Because when I am weak, I am strong. Paul's Concern for the Lord's Followers at Corinth
translation_verse: Lǝ Kristo eto disi esoo, ɛlɛkɛ itǝ mɛ bǝ nyɔkpɔ ku betidi aka mɛ ku nlɛ kanyi bunyǝ ku lǝ betidi ati mɛ kama ku lǝ asa anlɛ bɔtsyɔ kukɔknɔ kǝtǝ mɛ. Itsyise lefe nǝ ǝsuǝale lelo mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nya mǝǝnyǝ ǝsuǝale bamba nɛ. Bafokanɔfɔ Lǝ Korinto Eto Ditsyǝbi Ǝlǝ Paulo.

english_verse: I have been making a fool of myself. But you forced me to do it, when you should have been speaking up for me. I may be nothing at all, but I am as good as those super apostles.
translation_verse: Meedi etiki fe nwǝ leeninǝ seka, fɛɛ mi diíǝ íbǝ nko. Itsyise mi ni mba ele bǝ eni bɛtɛsǝ mɛ fɛ. Lǝ ibǝ bǝ manle kulesa kulaa tsyaa, batɔnkpe kpaa bamfó manlɛkɛ baso mɛ kon.

english_verse: When I was with you, I was patient and worked all the powerful miracles and signs and wonders of a true apostle.
translation_verse: Ayanisa ku ekpinsa kpǝ nnya mínyifo lǝ dibusǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ mi ntii, áse uyi sitinti nkǝ ɔtɔnkpe kpa mini.

english_verse: You missed out on only one blessing the other churches received. That is, you didn't have to support me. Forgive me for doing you wrong.
translation_verse: Mǝnnyǝ kulesa nǝ mínyifo míntǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa bamba ǝnso mi, enso bǝ mámfo kulesa ntsyiko mi ɔflɔ bǝ nyifo mi bitsyikǝ lee. Nyalɛ nlɛ mi lekpakpa miǝ bifi bɛtsyɛ mɛ bǝ ményifo nko!

english_verse: So I will gladly give all I have and all I am. Will you love me less for loving you too much?
translation_verse: Yuuyifo mɛ disuǝyuǝ bǝ muufi lesa nǝ nte mɛ ku mɔ ǝsuǝ kulaa tsya nwunsǝko mi. Nya se maala mi sɔ̃ɔ̃ nko esoo, beso ele bǝ mi lelabi itǝ mɛ bǝ kasɔ bomu nko?

english_verse: You agree that I wasn't a burden to you. Maybe that's because I was trying to catch you off guard and trick you.
translation_verse: Biɔtɔnɔ ku mɛ biǝ, mǝmbǝ mfiani bitsyikǝ ntǝ mi. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ ebɔtɛyi nkǝ nyɛnko mi lǝ kɔwɛbe eto kusu ǝsuǝ nnyǝ kutǝkǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Were you cheated by any of those I sent to you?
translation_verse: Lee, nyɛ lǝ betidi ba mínkpe mi eto utsyuǝ ǝsuǝ ntafa mi?

english_verse: I urged Titus to visit you, and I sent another follower with him. But Titus didn't cheat you, and we felt and behaved the same way he did.
translation_verse: Nlɛ Tito lekpakpa nya míkpe wǝ ku bo ɔyimisani bamba ɔni tsya miǝ bǝbǝ mi ɔflɔ. Nya bɔtɛyi bɛnlɛ biǝ Tito áyɛ lǝ kusu kutsyuǝ ǝsuǝ ótafa mi lee? Inni nsusu bɔni ete nkpe bonko wǝ búfi búyifo nnya? Nya inni kusu kɔni ete bɔ́yɛ?

english_verse: Have you been thinking all along that we have been defending ourselves to you? Actually, we have been speaking to God as followers of Christ. But, my friends, we did it all for your good.
translation_verse: Bubu bɛnlɛ lefe nǝmfó kenke biǝ bo ǝsuǝ eto disi ete bɔnlɛ bota lǝ mi ǝnǝmi? Owo lo! Bɔlɛ mi etiki budinko fe kase Kristo lela nkǝ budi lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi. Balala, lesa saa nǝ bɔ́tɛyi mii, nnya ete ni bǝnkǝ lǝ bɔwunsǝko mi lǝ mi bofokanɔ lǝ bumuǝ ale boso.

english_verse: I am afraid when I come, we won't be pleased with each other. I fear that some of you may be arguing or jealous or angry or selfish or gossiping or insulting each other. I even fear that you may be proud and acting like a mob.
translation_verse: Nlɛ sikpi bote miǝ lǝ mbǝ mfóo, ǝtsyuǝ ditsyǝbi nǝ ǝsuǝ muubǝnyǝ mii, ebɔbɔ lete lǝ nɛ ǝsuǝ moola miǝ mǝǝnyǝ mi. Nko ke ini bǝ mi tsya ebunyǝ mɛ fe mfloma lǝ kase biola biǝ biǝnyǝ mɛ. Nlɛ sikpi bote miǝ muubǝnyǝ miǝ bɛlɛ ndiǝ, kasɛsǝ ǝnǝmiǝ kekleke nya lefonyi lɔɔkɛ lǝ mi nti nya biola biǝ ɛlɛkɛ itǝ mi hã ete ku bikakpadi bǝtsyuǝ aye bua kedi bǝtsyuǝ ketikima ku bikabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato nya kabakǝfǝ luudufǝ mi lenti lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I am afraid God will make me ashamed when I visit you again. I will feel like crying because many of you have never given up your old sins. You are still doing things that are immoral, indecent, and shameful.
translation_verse: Nlɛ sikpi bote miǝ lǝ nsi mbǝ mfóo, ani ebolo mɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi. Nya muuwi keku lǝ betidi kpǝ eto disi, itsyise bantsyi bawuninsǝ lǝ mǝ ketu bǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ asa bua nnya béyifo lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mmǝ eso. Asa nnya béyifo bábiasǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ ini, akɔɛnsa ku disǝnkpo ku disiǝkpo ku nkpǝ bua busiǝ.

english_verse: I am on my way to visit you for the third time. And as the Scriptures say, “Any charges must be proved true by at least two or three witnesses.”
translation_verse: Ditsyǝfǝ ni nǝmfo se minlɛ mi ɔflɔ bubǝ nɛ. Bawɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Lǝ befi etiki lǝ utidi ǝsuǝǝ, ele bǝ bǝnyǝ badansiɛ inuǝ nye itsyǝ lǝ etiki nyamǝ ǝsuǝ fɛ lǝ balo wǝ dikpi.”

english_verse: During my second visit I warned you that I would punish you and anyone else who doesn't stop sinning. I am far away from you now, but I give you the same warning.
translation_verse: Se mímbǝ mi ɔflɔ dinuǝfǝǝ, nnkǝ mba díyifo abua kɔ ku babamba saa ato. Mɔmɔɔ, minsibǝ mi lǝ ɔflɔ mfó, nya nsi nlɛ mǝ ato bukǝ bio, bɔtɛyi minlɛ miǝ lǝ nsi mbǝ mi ɔflɔɔ, mǝmbɔni mba kenke diyifo asa bua koto bunǝ.

english_verse: This should prove to you that I am speaking for Christ. When he corrects you, he won't be weak. He will be powerful!
translation_verse: Nyamfo ebuyifo uyibose itǝ mi se bela biǝ biate biǝ Kristo eedi etiki ɛyɛ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ. Wǝǝnyuǝsǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ nnya weeyifo ku mi kulaa, bomu wǝǝlǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale kate lǝ mi nti sitinti.

english_verse: Although he was weak when he was nailed to the cross, he now lives by the power of God. We are weak, just as Christ was. But you will see that we will live by the power of God, just as Christ does.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ bɔyɔkpɔ ǝsuǝ básɔ wǝ bámanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝǝ, tsya eyɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝǝ, ótaka úbǝ nkpǝ. Nko esoo, bo mba tsya diyifo bani ku wǝǝ, ayɔkpɔ. Fɛɛ Onanto ebokpe bo nkɛale nya otakasǝ bo bǝ bo tsya bofo lesa nǝ ele bǝ buyifo lǝ mi nti buyifo, itsyise bo ku wǝ si nkpǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Test yourselves and find out if you really are true to your faith. If you pass the test, you will discover that Christ is living in you. But if Christ isn't living in you, you have failed.
translation_verse: Beto mi ǝsuǝ bebe lǝ bisi nkpǝ lǝ bofokanɔ bomǝ ǝsuǝ. Bekatesǝ mi ǝsuǝ bebe kukɔnɔ. Lee bíunyǝ bítsyǝ lekpo biǝ Yesu Kristo kpe lǝ mi ǝsuǝ sitinti? Biyi nko, nyalɛ ibǝ bǝ binyǝ bitsyǝ lekpo biǝ bíambɔ béfe lǝ botokabe bomǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I hope you will discover we have not failed.
translation_verse: Mfo nnɔ miǝ biunyǝ bitsyǝ lekpo biǝ bo alɛɛ, bɔ́flɔ.

english_verse: We pray you will stop doing evil things. We don't pray like this to make ourselves look good, but to get you to do right, even if we are failures.
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ ola boto katɔ Onanto boǝ wǝntǝ lǝ biyifo kolesa saa nǝ leni lɛsɛ. Bɔlɛ nyamfo bɔtɔ, inni lǝ bufi boté betidi boǝ bɔflɔ lǝ bo batɔnkpe eto keyifo ka bɔnlɛ buyifo ǝsuǝ eso. Bomu bɔlɛ nyamfo bɔtɛyi bǝ lǝ mi kosate lǝ bikeyifo lesa nǝ ni lɛsɛ lǝ ibǝ bǝ bóabɔ bófe lǝ boto kabe bomǝ ǝsuǝ kulaa tsya.

english_verse: All we can do is to follow the truth and not fight against it.
translation_verse: Itsyise boǝmbofo kulesa buyifo kǝńyǝ lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ, bomu lesa nǝ buyifo hã ni nǝ luusukosǝ ni sɛtɔ.

english_verse: Even though we are weak, we are glad that you are strong, and we pray you will do even better.
translation_verse: Ǝsuǝ ǝǝyuǝ bo lǝ binyǝ sɛtɔsusu lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ, nya iyifo fe bo ǝsuǝale ǝǝbǝ kasɔ lǝ mi nti lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Nyaso tsya boato ola boǝ lǝ bebe bɛbɔ disi lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: I am writing these things to you before I arrive. This way I won't have to be hard on you when I use the authority the Lord has given me. I was given this authority, so I could help you and not destroy you.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eso minlɛ nyamfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi lefe nǝ mimmbǝ mi lǝ ɔflɔ nɛ, itǝ bǝ lǝ mbǝ mi ɔflɔɔ, lǝ nyɛ mi etiki bunǝnko kekleke lǝ ǝsuǝale nnya Bonamute ditǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ. Útǝ mɛ ǝsuǝale nyamfo bǝ lǝ mi bofokanɔ lǝ bobe kato bumuǝ ale boso, nya inni bǝ lǝ ntǝ lǝ buyuǝ kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: Goodbye, my friends. Do better and pay attention to what I have said. Try to get along and live peacefully with each other. Now I pray that God, who gives love and peace, will be with you.
translation_verse: Lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, mɔ bayimi, nlɛ mi bokla miǝ bisiǝ kukɔnɔ. Bebe bɛbɔ disi kenke lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ. Bitsyue koto bɛnɔ asa nnya kenke ǝsuǝ mínlɛ mi kɔlɛ lǝ kukue komfo ǝsuǝ. Bitǝ lǝ mi kɛnyɛ lǝ keyifo kani nya lǝ bisiǝ lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya Onanto wǝ laala betidi nya wǝ ǝtǝ diyuǝǝ, lǝ usiǝko mi.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. All God's people send their greetings.
translation_verse: Bisiǝsǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ fe bayimi seka.

english_verse: From the apostle Paul and from all the Lord's followers with me. I was chosen to be an apostle by Jesus Christ and by God the Father, who raised him from death. No mere human chose or appointed me to this work. To the churches in Galatia:
translation_verse: Mɔ ku mɔ bayimi bafokanɔfɔ kenke ba nkpe mfo nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝsiǝsǝ mi bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa kenke nnya nkpe lǝ Galatia katsyese.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Lǝ Boanto Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto lefonǝ lǝ disiǝko mi, ditǝ mi diyuǝ.

english_verse: Christ obeyed God our Father and gave himself as a sacrifice for our sins to rescue us from this evil world.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo éfi wǝ ǝsuǝ útǝ lǝ bo abua eto disi nkǝ lǝ ulǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ mmi eto kawunsiǝ bua ka bunsi mfo eto abuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ. Yesu Kristo éyifo nyamfo, nnya ni bo Anto Onanto eto lelabi nɛ.

english_verse: God will be given glory forever and ever. Amen. The Only True Message
translation_verse: Atɛsǝ itǝ Onanto itsyi manlo isu manlo. Ibǝ itǝ. Onanto Eto Ditiki Sɛɛ Lɔni Ete Nkpe.

english_verse: I am shocked that you have so quickly turned from God, who chose you with his gift of undeserved grace. You have believed another message,
translation_verse: Iyifo mɛ naa tinti bǝ kayinkǝnǝ mfo ete ini nya bimfi bɛnlɛ budu lǝ nwǝ lékpadi mi ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo eto lefonǝ ǝsuǝ, ekesu kǝtǝkǝko ditiki bamba kama.

english_verse: when there is really only one true message. But some people are causing you trouble and want to make you turn away from the good news about Christ.
translation_verse: Sitintii, “Ditiki Sɛɛ bamba saa ensibǝ,” nya nlɛ nyamfo bɔtɛyi itsyise betidi bǝtsyuǝ lɛ bola bǝ baabiasǝ mi nsusu, nya banlɛ bokplatsya bǝ baafloma Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: I pray that God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from our message to you! It doesn't matter if that person is one of us or an angel from heaven.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ bo nye Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe utsyuǝ etsyi kato, nya ubǝ nkǝ woatɛyi mi Ditiki Sɛɛ bamba nǝ lenni lesa nǝ bóbe letsya bɔ́tɛyi mii, Onanto lǝ unǝ wǝ koto ɔtsylɔsǝ wǝ lǝ utǝ.

english_verse: I have said it before, and I will say it again. I hope God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from what you have already believed.
translation_verse: Bɔ́ɔtɛyi mi nnya bunyǝ nya minsi minlɛ mi nnya ke bɔtɛyi bio minkǝ, lǝ utsyuǝ bamba saa esi ubǝ nkǝ woatɛyi mi Ditiki Sɛɛ bamba nǝ lenni lesa nǝ bóbe letsya bɔ́tɛyi mii, Onanto lǝ unǝ wǝ koto ɔtsylɔsǝ wǝ lǝ utǝ.

english_verse: I am not trying to please people. I want to please God. Do you think I am trying to please people? If I were doing that, I would not be a servant of Christ. How Paul Became an Apostle
translation_verse: Nyalɛ nnya minlɛ bɔtɛyi mfoo, bibu biǝ betidi eto atɛsǝ minlɛ bɔbɛbɛ? Owo lo! Inni nko ini. Lesa nǝ mimbɛbɛ ni bǝ lǝ Onanto eto kɔni lǝ kutǝkǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Bola minla miǝ maalɛkɛ lǝ betidi ɔflɔ lee? Lǝ nko ini minla miǝ meeyifoo, eni membuyifo Kristo eto uyifoyifo. Paulo Ǝbǝ Ofiani Ɔtɔnkpe.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that no one made up the message I preach.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, nla miǝ maatɛyi mi miǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ maabe letsyaa, dientsyi utidinini saa ɔflɔ.

english_verse: It wasn't given or taught to me by some mere human. My message came directly from Jesus Christ when he appeared to me.
translation_verse: Mámfo ni ntsyiko utidi saa ɔflɔ, nye kutsyuǝ saa tsya léte mɛ ni. Bomuu, Yesu Kristo kosate dílǝkǝ ni óte mɛ.

english_verse: You know how I used to live as a Jew. I was cruel to God's church and even tried to destroy it.
translation_verse: Bɛnɔ nkpǝ bo mínsiǝ mímfe lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe mindi Yudanyǝ kosate kosate. Bátɛyi mi kase mínti Onanto eto besumunyǝ eto ditsyukpa kama kaminsǝ mǝnyǝmǝnyǝ nya míkplatsya kekleke miǝ lǝ mba ni.

english_verse: I was a much better Jew than anyone else my own age, and I obeyed every law our ancestors had given us.
translation_verse: Mbǝ nso mɔ Yudafɔ eto babentsyuǝ kpǝ lǝ Yudafɔ eto kesumu ǝsuǝ nya minkɛ otsyekle kekleke lǝ bo banamǝ eto akpayifoyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I didn't say a word, not even to the men in Jerusalem who were apostles before I was. Instead, I went at once to Arabia, and afterwards I returned to Damascus.
translation_verse: nye nsu Yerusalem nsu nyǝ mba ni batɔnkpe mfó fɛ Onanto dílǝkǝ mɛ. Bomuu, ndu nsu Arabia lamfolamfo fɛ kamaa, mínsinkli mímbǝ Damasko.

english_verse: Three years later I went to visit Peter in Jerusalem and stayed with him for
translation_verse: Alɛ ǝtsyǝ kama fɛ mínsu Yerusalem mínsu mínyǝ Petro nya mínsiǝ lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ lefosi eyi anɔ.

english_verse: The only other apostle I saw was James, the Lord's brother.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mǝnnyǝ batɔnkpe bamǝ eto kuutsyuǝ tsya, enso Yakobo wǝ ni Bonamute eto ɔyimisani hã.

english_verse: And in the presence of God I swear I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ sitintii, Onanto kosate yi nkǝ ditiki nǝ minlɛ mi bɔwɔni mfoo, inni sidia minlɛ bɔtɛyi.

english_verse: Later, I went to the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kama tsyaa, nsu Siria ku Kilikia eto akpɔ mfó.

english_verse: But no one who belonged to Christ's churches in Judea had ever seen me in person.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfoo, Kristo eto bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa nnya nkpe lǝ Yudea eto kasɔ mfóo, mǝnyǝ mɛ tɔ bǝnyǝ.

english_verse: They had only heard that the one who had been cruel to them was now preaching the message that he had once tried to destroy.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ hã bánɔ betidi díkatɛyi ni bǝnkǝ, “Osani utsyuǝ wǝ lɛkɛ úkate bo ohiã nya ókplatsya nkǝ lǝ ɔtsyɔlɔsǝ bofokanɔ bomǝǝ, wǝ bomu díbǝ ɔnlɛ mu letsya bobe mɔmɔ nɛ.”

english_verse: And because of me, they praised God.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso básɔ Onanto ani lǝ mɔ disi.

english_verse: Fourteen years later I went to Jerusalem with Barnabas. I also took along Titus.
translation_verse: Lefosi alɛ ana kamaa, nsinkli nsu Yerusalem ku Barnaba. Nkpa Tito tsya nyɛnko.

english_verse: But I went there because God had told me to go, and I explained the good news I had been preaching to the Gentiles. Then I met privately with the ones who seemed to be the most important leaders. I wanted to make sure my work in the past and my future work would not be for nothing.
translation_verse: Nsu mfó itsyise Onanto dílǝkǝ nnya óte mɛ nko. Nya lǝ mɔ botsya butsyuǝ ku mba ni batɔnkotɔnko maate hã ǝsuǝǝ, nlǝkǝ letsya nǝ maabe kǝtǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ itsyi lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nte mǝ. Itsyise maanla miǝ keyifo ka mínyifo lǝ lefe nǝ lefee ku nka minlɛ buyifo lǝ kayɛ buyifo kebimba.

english_verse: Titus went to Jerusalem with me. He was a Greek, but still he wasn't forced to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Bánhiɛ Tito, mɔ ɔyɛtsyuǝ, wǝ ni Grikinyǝ boǝ ola lelo.

english_verse: We went there because of those who pretended to be followers and had sneaked in among us as spies. They had come to take away the freedom Christ Jesus had given us, and they were trying to make us their slaves.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ bǝtsyuǝ ála bǝ eni ola ni kokooko. Fɛɛ betidi bǝtsyuǝ ba díyifo mǝ ǝsuǝ fe bayimitsyuǝ ba léfo bánɔɔ, éyu bédufǝ lǝ bo ditsyukpa nti fe mba laasɔ asakanɔ lǝ babɛbɛ kusu ko bɔɔyɛ babiasǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ busiǝ bo Kristo Yesu dítǝ bo, lǝ beyifo lǝ bofiani ndomufɔ.

english_verse: But we wanted you to have the true message. This is why we didn't give in to them, not even for a second.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se ini bola boola boǝ ɔnukualɛ wǝ nkpe lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ lǝ lɛbɔ lǝ utsyuǝ saa lǝ unyǝ esoo, bóantɔnɔ lǝ mǝ ditiki nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ kon.

english_verse: Some of them were supposed to be important leaders, but I didn't care who they were. God doesn't have any favorites! None of these so-called special leaders added anything to my message.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi ba mǝǝnyǝ fe batɔnkotɔnko benii, mǝntǝ mɛ nsusu fɔfɔ saa. Nlɛ mǝ bokpo nko tsyaa, mɔɔ, ini ɔtɔnkotɔnko lefe mɛ. Itsyise Onantoo, waambe betidi eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: They realized God had sent me with the good news for Gentiles, and he had sent Peter with the same message for Jews.
translation_verse: Bomuu, bǝnyǝ bǝ Onanto dítǝ mɛ keyifo nkǝ nsu mbe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya ntǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ, fe kase úfi Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto letsyabebe kǝtǝ Yudafɔ ókpe lǝ Petro eto kɔni.

english_verse: God, who had sent Peter on a mission to the Jews, was now using me to preach to the Gentiles.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝǝ, ótsyese mɛ, fe wǝ ɔtɔnkpe itǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ fe kase ɔyɛlǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ ótsyese Petro wǝ ɔtɔnkpe itǝ Yudafɔ seka.

english_verse: James, Peter, and John realized that God had given me the message about his gift of undeserved grace. And these men are supposed to be the backbone of the church. They even gave Barnabas and me a friendly handshake. This was to show that we would work with Gentiles and that they would work with Jews.
translation_verse: Yakobo ku Petro ku Yohanes ba beefi fe batɔnkotɔnko itǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpaa, ǝnyǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo bǝ Onanto dífi keyifo kamǝ ókpe mɛ lǝ ani. Nyaso bǝtǝ Barnaba ku mɔ kɔni, nyamfo lete bǝ báfo bo fe mba nlɛ keyifo kani eto okle buyifo lǝ bǝtsyuǝ. Bóse nnya uyi boǝ Barnaba ku mɔɔ, ebuyifo keyifo lǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ nti, nya mǝǝ tsya luuyifo keyifo lǝ Yudafɔ nti.

english_verse: They only asked us to remember the poor, and this was something I had always been eager to do. Paul Corrects Peter at Antioch
translation_verse: Nnya hã bátɔ betsyiko lǝ bo ɔflɔ ni bǝ, lǝ bokloma kase bɔɔlɛ bakombo ba nkpe mǝ lenti, bunyǝ mǝ kaminsǝ. Nnya nyamfo eyifo lesa nǝ mintsya dítsyue míntsyǝ miǝ muuyifo. Paul Átaka Uńyǝ Lǝ Petro Ǝsuǝ Lǝ Antiokia.

english_verse: When Peter came to Antioch, I told him face to face that he was wrong.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Petro díbǝ Antiokiaa, ntaka ńyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ itsyise úyifo lesa nǝ dimanlɛkɛ kon.

english_verse: He used to eat with Gentile followers of the Lord, until James sent some Jewish followers. Peter was afraid of the Jews and soon stopped eating with Gentiles.
translation_verse: Itsyise fɛ betidi ba Yakobo létsyese lúubǝ bedufǝǝ, Petro ku wǝ bayimi ba lenni Yudafɔ kátsya kedi lesa kakɔ. Fɛɛ se betidi bamǝ díbǝ koo, ɔ́yɛ lesa budi ku mǝ nya údu úsu mba díbǝ eto lekpake, itsyise óte sikpi lǝ betidi ba díkatɛyi bǝ ele bǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ la lelo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: He and the others hid their true feelings so well that even Barnabas was fooled.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ eto bafokanɔfɔ bamba tsya étsyiko sikpi bote kǝtǝkǝko Petro kama. Barnaba tsya éyifo nko ke útǝkǝko mǝ kama.

english_verse: But when I saw they were not really obeying the truth that is in the good news, I corrected Peter in front of everyone and said: Peter, you are a Jew, but you live like a Gentile. So how can you force Gentiles to live like Jews?
translation_verse: Nya se mínyǝ miǝ bányɛ lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto kusu ǝsuǝ esoo, ntɛyi Petro lǝ mǝmblɛ kenke eto ǝnǝmi minkǝ, “Yudanyǝ feni, fɛɛ esi nkpǝ fe nwǝ lenni Yudanyǝ, nya inni nko ele bǝ Yudanyǝ siǝ nkpǝ. Ntsyǝ ibǝ bǝ alɛ bokplatsya fǝ aayinkǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ akpe fǝ bǝsiǝ nkpǝ fe Yudafɔ?” Yudafɔ Ku Mba Lenni Yudafɔ Ǝnyǝ Bulǝkǝ Ɛyɛ Lǝ Bofokanɔ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We are Jews by birth and are not sinners like Gentiles.
translation_verse: Sitintii, Yudafɔ buni bále bo, bunni mba bále lenni Yudafɔ ba ni babuayifo.

english_verse: But we know that God accepts only those who have faith in Jesus Christ. No one can please God by simply obeying the Law. So we put our faith in Christ Jesus, and God accepted us because of our faith.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ buyi boǝ Onanto aalɔ wǝ ku utidi eto nti ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ bofokanɔ bo utidi nkpe lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ. Nya inni lǝ wǝ buyifo lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ eso. Bontsya áfo Kristo Yesu bɔnɔ, lǝ nnya eso Onanto álɔ bonko wǝ eto nti ɛyɛ lǝ bo Kristo bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ eso. Nya inni lǝ nnya boeyifo lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ eso. Itsyise Onanto mánlɔ wǝ ku kuutsyuǝ saa eto nti ɛyɛ lǝ kɔfi komǝ eto kotobutsyue ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: When we Jews started looking for a way to please God, we discovered that we are sinners too. Does this mean that Christ is the one who makes us sinners? No, it doesn't!
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso bɔlɛ bokplatsya boǝ Onanto lɔ bonko wǝ eto nti ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ buyifo nko fɛ utsyuǝ lǝǝnyǝ bo fe mba leeyifo asa bua fe kase mba lenni Yudafɔ ntee, bote ɛnlɛ bǝ Kristo aatɔnɔ ku lebuayifoyifo? Owo lo, kulefe!

english_verse: But if I tear down something and then build it again, I prove that I was wrong at first.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyɛ kɔfi buyifoo, míndi ko minwui, nya mínsinkli minlɛ ko botakasǝ kǝnyǝnsǝǝ, nyalɛ mɔ kosate lɛ mɔ ǝsuǝ bulǝkǝ kate fe nwǝ laanyɛ lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: It was the Law itself that killed me and freed me from its power, so I could live for God. I have been nailed to the cross with Christ.
translation_verse: Itsyi lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝǝ, mbofiani ukpǝnkpǝ, kɔfi komǝ kosate lélo mɛ, bǝ lǝ nsiǝ nkpǝ ntǝ Onanto bomu.

english_verse: I have died, but Christ lives in me. And I now live by faith in the Son of God, who loved me and gave his life for me.
translation_verse: Bonko Kristo básɔ bámanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Nya insini mɔ ni nsi nkpǝ, bomu Kristo nsi nkpǝ lǝ mɛ. Nya nkpǝ bo minsi mɔmɔ lǝ sinǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nsi mu ɛyɛ lǝ ǝsuǝale nnya maafo se mímfo Onanto eto Ubi mínɔ eso. Wǝ ni nwǝ dífi wǝ nkpǝ útǝ lǝ mɔ disi, itsyise waala mɛ.

english_verse: I don't turn my back on God's gift of undeserved grace. If we can be acceptable to God by obeying the Law, it was useless for Christ to die.
translation_verse: Mǝmbulǝkǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ nǝ weefi kǝtǝ betidi nwui kulefe. Itsyise lǝ yofobudi bǝ utidi ebuyifo ɔsɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi ɛyɛ lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ ɛlɛ bote bǝ Kristo eto ukpǝ wǝ úkpǝǝ, eyifo ubimba.

english_verse: You stupid Galatians! I told you exactly how Jesus Christ was nailed to a cross. Has someone now put an evil spell on you?
translation_verse: Mi, Galatiafɔ, bamumu! Owoe kon lébiasǝ mi nsusu mmǝ? Inni mi kosate eto ǝnǝmi bǝlǝkǝ báte mi kase Kristo eto ukpǝ lɛyɛ lǝ wǝ bɔsɔ kamanklasǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: I want to know only one thing. How were you given God's Spirit? Was it by obeying the Law of Moses or by hearing about Christ and having faith in him?
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ ntɔ mi ditiki nǝmfo. Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ béfoo, béfo ni ɛyɛ lǝ kɔfi komǝ buyifo ǝsuǝ lee, ɛyɛ lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bɔnɔ kafo ni kanɔ ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: How can you be so stupid? Do you think that by yourself you can complete what God's Spirit started in you?
translation_verse: Bamumu bini nkomǝ? Se bítsyǝ nkpǝ kasɔ ku Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝalee, bela bɛnlɛ mɔmɔ biǝ biefi mi kosate eto ǝsuǝale belosǝ?

english_verse: Have you gone through all of this for nothing? Is it all really for nothing?
translation_verse: Nyalɛ, bela biǝ nnya kenke ǝsuǝ bɛyɛ bínyǝ, yifo ebimbale? Fɛɛ yembuyifo ebimbale nko nkpǝ!

english_verse: God gives you his Spirit and works miracles in you. But does he do this because you obey the Law of Moses or because you have heard about Christ and have faith in him?
translation_verse: Kase bíyifo lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ eso Onanto dífi wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ útǝ mi, nya ɔnlɛ ayanisa buyifo lǝ mi nti lee, ɛyɛ lǝ kase bianɔ wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ kafo ni kanɔ eso?

english_verse: The Scriptures say that God accepted Abraham because Abraham had faith.
translation_verse: Bibu Abraham bebe lǝ kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Se ófo Onanto ɔ́nɔ esoo, Onanto ǝnyǝ nkǝ úyifo utidi sɛɛ.”

english_verse: And so, you should understand that everyone who has faith is a child of Abraham.
translation_verse: Nyaso ele bǝ binyǝ bitsyǝ lekpo biǝ mba nkpe bofokanɔɔ, mǝ ni Abraham eto bebi nɛ.

english_verse: Long ago the Scriptures said God would accept the Gentiles because of their faith. This is why God told Abraham the good news that all nations would be blessed because of him.
translation_verse: Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ nyamǝ átɛyi itsyǝ nkǝ Onanto ebɔlɔ wǝ ku mba lenni Yudafɔ eto nti. Nyaso Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ ábe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya útǝ Abraham nkǝ, “Ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ Onanto ebokpo betidi kenke atsyɔ.”

english_verse: This means everyone who has faith will share in the blessings given to Abraham because of his faith.
translation_verse: Abraham áfo ɔ́nɔ, nyaso bákpo wǝ atsyɔ nya ku mba kenke léfo bánɔ tsya.

english_verse: Anyone who tries to please God by obeying the Law is under a curse. The Scriptures say, “Everyone who doesn't obey everything in the Law is under a curse.”
translation_verse: Ekudi te itǝ mba nsi nkpǝ lǝ afi ǝsuǝ, itsyise báwɔni bǝtsyǝ lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ bǝ, “Utsyuǝ saa ke lembutsyue asa nnya kenke báwɔni bákpe lǝ Afi eto Kukue kotoo, ekudi ebutǝkǝko wǝ.”

english_verse: No one can please God by obeying the Law. The Scriptures also say, “The people God accepts because of their faith will live.”
translation_verse: Sitinti ekpa wuee bǝnkǝ Onanto eembu kuutsyuǝ saa nkǝ uyifo ɔsɛɛ ɛyɛ lǝ kase úyifo lǝ kɔfi komǝ ǝsuǝ eso, itsyise báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ bǝ, “Utidi wǝ ke díyifo ɔsɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, wǝ hã luusiǝ nkpǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: The Law isn't based on faith. It promises life only to people who obey its commands.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kɔfi komǝ ménfi kukǝtsyuǝ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ. Bomu fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ lɛtɛyi, “Utsyuǝ saa ke leeyifo lǝ lesa saa nǝ kɔfi komǝ lɛtɔ ǝsuǝ, ebusiǝ nkpǝ ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: But Christ rescued us from the Law's curse, when he became a curse in our place. This is because the Scriptures say that anyone who is nailed to a tree is under a curse.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se Kristo léfiani ekudi lǝ bo disi esoo, úlǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ kɔfi komǝ eto ekudi ǝsuǝ, itsyise báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Onanto eto ekudi ebutǝkǝko utsyuǝ saa wǝ boolo lǝ bofakasǝ lǝ uyi ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: And because of what Jesus Christ has done, the blessing promised to Abraham was taken to the Gentiles. This happened so that by faith we would be given the promised Holy Spirit. The Law and the Promise
translation_verse: Kristo éyifo nyamfo bǝ lǝ atsyɔkpokpo nnya Onanto lɛtɛyi utsyǝ nkǝ yuutǝkǝko Abraham, lǝ itǝkǝko mba lenni Yudafɔ tsya ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo Yesu ǝsuǝ, bǝ lǝ ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, bo tsya lǝ bofo Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ Onanto dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ útsyǝ bo. Letekɛkɛ Ditsyuǝ Kpe Lǝ Kɔfi Ku Kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ Eto Nti.

english_verse: My friends, I will use an everyday example to explain what I mean. Once someone agrees to something, no one else can change or cancel the agreement.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, nla miǝ meefi ditsyǝbi ditsyuǝ nkatesǝ ko bo diyi saa diyi eto nkpǝ bo bunsi. Lǝ betidi inuǝ átɔnɔ nya báse uyi lǝ ditiki ditsyuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, mǝ nti eto kuutsyuǝ ǝmbǝ kusu laaba ni nye ufi kulesa okpe lǝ ni.

english_verse: That is how it is with the promises God made to Abraham and his descendant. The promises were not made to many descendants, but only to one, and that one is Christ.
translation_verse: Kase inii, kɛnyɛ ka Onanto dítsyǝǝ, útsyǝ ke útǝ Abraham ku wǝ ubi. Nya lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto méndi etiki ɔtɛyi nkǝ Abraham ku wǝ bebi. Lǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ ku wǝ bebii, nyalɛ ɛlɛ bote bǝ bebi bamǝ fui. Bomu nnya ɔ́tɛyi ni nkǝ wǝ ubi. Nya nyamfo lɛ bote nkǝ utidi ɔni kplo ɔnlɛ. Nya utidi ǝmǝ ni Kristo.

english_verse: If we have to obey the Law in order to receive God's blessings, those blessings don't really come to us because of God's promise. But God was kind to Abraham and made him a promise.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Onanto eto ǝtǝsa nyamǝ yɛ lǝ kɔfi komǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ yinsiyɛ lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ kamǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ inni nko ini. Bomu ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto kosate eto lefonǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nya úfi ǝtǝsa nyamǝ útsyǝ kɛnyɛ útǝ Abraham nɛ.

english_verse: What is the use of the Law? It was given later to show that we sin. But it was only supposed to last until the coming of that descendant who was given the promise. In fact, angels gave the Law to Moses, and he gave it to the people.
translation_verse: Nyalɛ be ni kɔfi komǝ eto kutǝkǝ kon? Béfi kɔfi komǝ báboko bǝ lǝ bunyǝ lesa nǝ ni lebua, nya yuutsyǝ nko isu ese lefe nǝ Abraham eto ubi ǝmǝ luubǝ. Wǝ ini eso Onanto dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ kamǝ nɛ. Onanto eto batɔnkpe léfo kɔfi komǝ báboko bo ɛyɛ lǝ utidi wǝ ńyǝ lǝ bonko Onanto lǝ nti.

english_verse: There is only one God, and the Law did not come directly from him. Slaves and Children
translation_verse: Fɛɛ utidi lǝnti mensife, se ini wǝ ɔni ǝmǝ ke nlɛ lesa saa buyifo eso. Nya wǝ ɔni ǝmǝǝ ni Onanto. Kɔfi Ayɛnko Bo Bǝ Bunyǝ Kristo.

english_verse: Does the Law disagree with God's promises? No, it doesn't! If any law could give life to us, we could become acceptable to God by obeying that law.
translation_verse: Bote yɛnlɛ bǝ kɔfi komǝ ńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ? Owo lo, kulefe! Itsyise lǝ nnya ete kɔfi komǝ nkpe ǝsuǝale bǝ kutǝ utidinini nkpǝǝ, eni efe bǝ utsyuǝ saa ebuyifo lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ lǝ uyifo ɔsɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: But the Scriptures say that sin controls everyone, so that God's promises will be for anyone who has faith in Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue átɛyi nkǝ kawunsiǝ kenke kpe lǝ lebua eto ǝsuǝale kalɔ, nyaso ǝtǝsa nnya Onanto dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ útsyǝ nkǝ wuutǝ betidi ba nkpe bofokanɔ lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, mǝ ni mba Onanto leefi kǝtǝ nɛ.

english_verse: The Law controlled us and kept us under its power until the time came when we would have faith.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ isu ese lefe nǝ bofokanɔ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ díbǝǝ, kɔfi komǝ éti bo kokpe fe mba béti bákpe banlabe lǝ diyo isu ese lefe nǝ Onanto luulǝkǝ bofokanɔ lǝ Kristo bomfo oboko.

english_verse: In fact, the Law was to be our teacher until Christ came. Then we could have faith and be acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Nyaso kɔfi komǝ ékabe bo, isu ese lefe nǝ Kristo díbǝ, bǝ lǝ buyifo basɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: All of you are God's children because of your faith in Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Mimblɛ kenke áfiani Onanto eto bebi ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo Yesu bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was as though you had put on Christ in the same way you put on new clothes.
translation_verse: Mimba kenke léfo ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa nǝmǝ bǝ lǝ biyifo bani ku Kristoo, bifi Kristo bekpe fe awu seka.

english_verse: Faith in Christ Jesus is what makes each of you equal with each other, whether you are a Jew or a Greek, a slave or a free person, a man or a woman.
translation_verse: Nyaso letekɛkɛ saa ensibǝ lǝ Yudanyǝ nye Grikinyǝ eto nti, lee ndomunyǝ nye nwǝ nsi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ eto nti lee osani nye usio eto nti. Itsyise mimblɛ kenke áfiani bani lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku Kristo Yesu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: So if you belong to Christ, you are now part of Abraham's family, and you will be given what God has promised.
translation_verse: Lǝ biyifo Kristo eto olee, itǝ bǝ biyifo Abraham eto kafo eto bebi, itǝ bǝ biyifo kɛnyɛ ka Onanto dítsyǝ eto mba luudi ke bikǝ.

english_verse: Children who are under age are no better off than slaves, even though everything their parents own will someday be theirs.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ minlɛ bɔtɛyi ni bǝnkǝ, lefe nǝ ubi wǝ luudi wǝ anto eto bikǝ fɛ díyifo dikpefii, ubi ǝmǝ eyifo fe utidi wǝ ni ndomunyǝ seka. Ite bǝ lesa saa eyifo wǝ lele tsya fɛ.

english_verse: This is because children are placed in the care of guardians and teachers until the time their parents have set.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ uni dikpefii, betidi kpe laabe wǝ kalɛ wǝ ku wǝ bikǝ ola isu ese lefe nǝ wǝ anto dítsyǝ.

english_verse: This is how it was with us. We were like children ruled by the powers of this world.
translation_verse: Nko ǝmǝ ke ini itǝ bo ǝmǝ tsya lǝ bo sikpefi lefe, bɔkɛ lǝ awɔnɔ nya lɛkɛ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto ǝsuǝale kalɔ fe ndomufɔ seka.

english_verse: But when the time was right, God sent his Son, and a woman gave birth to him. His Son obeyed the Law,
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se lefe nǝmǝ léyoo, Onanto átsyese wǝ kosate eto ubi. Útǝ usio ále wǝ nya ɔkɛ lǝ Yudafɔ eto kɔfi kalɔ

english_verse: so he could set us free from the Law, and we could become God's children.
translation_verse: bǝ lǝ ofo mǝ disi eto kayo utǝ mba nkpe lǝ kɔfi komǝ kalɔ bǝ lǝ bofiani wǝ Onanto kosate eto bebi.

english_verse: Now that we are his children, God has sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts. And his Spirit tells us that God is our Father.
translation_verse: Onanto aala nkǝ wǝlǝkǝ ote nkǝ wǝ bebi bini, nyaso ótsyese wǝ Ubi eto Lɛwɔnɔ lǝ bo utu kǝmiǝ katɛyi nkǝ, “Abba” eto kasɔ ni nkǝ, “Mɔ Anto!”

english_verse: You are no longer slaves. You are God's children, and you will be given what he has promised. Paul's Concern for the Galatians
translation_verse: Nko ini bǝ lǝ Onanto esoo, ensini ndomunyǝ bio, bomu Onanto eto ubi wǝ luudi wǝ bikǝ. Paulo Eto Nsusu Ǝlǝ Wǝ Lǝ Galatiafɔ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Before you knew God, you were slaves of gods that are not real.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ léfe mǝǝ, bíante Onanto, nyaso bíyifo ndomufɔ bitǝ ǝsuǝale nya lenni Onanto eto ale.

english_verse: But now you know God, or better still, God knows you. How can you turn back and become the slaves of those weak and pitiful powers?
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔmɔ ǝmǝ bimfi binyi Onanto nye mɔɔtɛyi minkǝ Onanto mfe nyi mii, beso bela biǝ biesinkli bifi ǝsuǝ bitǝ kawunsiǝ eto awɔnɔ nnya lǝmbǝ ǝsuǝale saa? Beso bela biǝ biafiani mǝ ndomufɔ bio?

english_verse: I am afraid I have wasted my time working with you.
translation_verse: Sikpi aalɛ mɛ kǝtǝ mi lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Nya yeeyifo mɛ fe keyifo ka mínyifo míntǝ mi kenke eyifo kebimba.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to be like me, just as I once tried to be like you. Did you mistreat me
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, nlɛ mi lekpakpa miǝ bekase mɛ lǝ bele mɛ. Itsyise mintsya te fe mi ke. Nya bíenyifo mɛ kabua saa.

english_verse: when I first preached to you? No you didn't, even though you knew I had come there because I was sick.
translation_verse: Biokloma diyi tutɛ nǝ mímbǝ mi ɔflɔ mfóo, se ini Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ete mímbǝ míntɛyi mii, ǝsuǝ tsya mánkɛ mɛ ale.

english_verse: My illness must have caused you some trouble, but you didn't hate me or turn me away because of it. You welcomed me as though I were one of God's angels or even Christ Jesus himself.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ kase ǝsuǝ dítsyǝ mɛ ini bufi lékpe mɛ bulǝ nya díyifo mi boto kabe tsyaa, bianyani mɛ bitsyǝ nye bɛni mɛ. Bomu befo mɛ fe kase biofo Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe, nya béfo mɛ tsya fe kase biofo Kristo Yesu ǝmǝ kosate.

english_verse: Where is that good feeling now? I am sure if it had been possible, you would have taken out your own eyes and given them to me.
translation_verse: Disuǝyuǝ ku lelabi nǝ béte mɛ lefe nǝmfó, se yéfe mɔmɔ? Moofó nnya adansiɛ budi katɛyi minkǝ, lǝ nnya ete yoofo kusu butǝ eni bitatɛyi biǝ biǝnǝ mi ǝnǝmi bilǝkǝ bitǝ mɛ fɛ.

english_verse: Am I now your enemy, just because I told you the truth?
translation_verse: Lee, se míntɛyi mi ditiki nǝmǝ eto ɔnukualɛ eso mímfiani mi olo?

english_verse: Those people may be paying you a lot of attention, but it isn't for your good. They only want to keep you away from me, so you will pay them a lot of attention.
translation_verse: Mba lɛsɛsǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ mi ǝsuǝǝ, bɔwɛ ete banlɛ mi. Kusu ete banlɛ bɔbɛbɛ bǝ lǝ bǝfǝ mi lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ, bǝ lǝ bitsyi bɛwuninsǝ bifi mi ǝsuǝ bitǝ mǝ hã mate eso.

english_verse: I wish I were with you now. Then I would not have to talk this way. You really have me puzzled. Hagar and Sarah
translation_verse: Lǝ mi ɔflɔ minkpe mɔmɔɔ, eni ɛlɛkɛ itǝ mɛ tinti, nya mɔ ɔkɔɛ ta floma ilǝkǝ ete kase binte itǝ mɛ. Ɛlɛ mɛ bulǝ tinti lǝ lɛkɔɛsi lǝ kase binte ǝsuǝ! Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Hagar Ku Sara Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Some of you would like to be under the rule of the Law of Moses. But do you know what the Law says?
translation_verse: Nla míǝ maatɔ mimba lela biǝ kɔfi komǝ tǝkǝ mi kato etiki nyamfo, bɛnlɛ bɔnɔ kase kɔfi komǝ nlɛ bɔtɛyi?

english_verse: In the Scriptures we learn that Abraham had two sons. The mother of one of them was a slave, while the mother of the other one had always been free.
translation_verse: Kɔlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, bebisaibi inuǝ lɛkɛ Abraham. Ututɛ ni ndomunyǝsio eto ole. Nya unuǝfǝ eyifo diyo eto kusiǝ ko bǝtǝ wǝ eto ole.

english_verse: The son of the slave woman was born in the usual way. But the son of the free woman was born because of God's promise.
translation_verse: Ubi wǝ ndomunyǝsio ǝmǝ léle útǝ wǝǝ, bále wǝ fe kase osani ku usio lǝǝsiǝ kale ubi. Fɛɛ ubi nuǝfǝ ǝmǝ ábɔ utsyi lǝ diyo eto kusiǝ ko bǝtǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ wǝ ini ǝtǝsa nnya Onanto lɛtɛyi útsyǝ lǝ lefe nǝ osani ku usio dímensibe kusu itǝ bolé.

english_verse: All of this has another meaning as well. Each of the two women stands for one of the agreements God made with his people. Hagar, the slave woman, stands for the agreement that was made at Mount Sinai. Everyone born into her family is a slave.
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo lɛ asa ǝtsyuǝ eto okle bote. Besio inuǝ bamfo ńyǝ lǝ kɛnyɛklekle koko ku kafɔfɔ eto kɛnyɛ. Mǝ ɔni ni Hagar, nya bebi ba óle, eyifo ndomufɔ, nya ińyǝ itǝ kɛnyɛ ka bákle lǝ Sinai eto Kɔtini.

english_verse: Hagar also stands for Mount Sinai in Arabia and for the present city of Jerusalem. She and her children are slaves.
translation_verse: Hagar wǝ ńyǝ itǝ Sinai eto Kɔtini lǝ Arabia eto kasɔ ǝsuǝǝ, eyifo fe lekpa nǝ nlɛ bote kase mmi eto Yerusalem ku mba nkpe lǝ wǝ kenke nsi ni ndomufɔ kokooko.

english_verse: But our mother is the city of Jerusalem in heaven above, and she isn't a slave.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yerusalem wǝ nkpe kato alɛ si ute lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ. Wǝ ni ńyǝ itǝ bo ambe nɛ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say about her, “You have never had children, but now you can be glad. You have never given birth, but now you can shout. Once you had no children, but now you will have more children than a woman who has been married for a long time.”
translation_verse: Itsyise Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue átɛyi nkǝ, “Fǝ okonɔ, nyǝ disuǝyuǝ! Fǝ usio wǝ dímanle tɔ ubi ǝnyǝ, fã ku disuǝyuǝ eto binǝntu, fǝ nwǝ dímǝnyǝ kalelefo eto bunǝ tɔ ǝnyǝ! Itsyise usio wǝ wǝ usǝ dílǝkǝ nsusu lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝǝ, wǝ bebi ebufui baso usio wǝ nsi ku kusǝ lefe saa eto bale.”

english_verse: My friends, you were born because of this promise, just as Isaac was.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, mɔ bayimi, mi eyifo Onanto eto bebi ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ ka útsyǝ ǝsuǝ fe kase útsyǝ Isak eto kale fɛ bále wǝ.

english_verse: But the child who was born in the natural way made trouble for the child who was born because of the Spirit. The same thing is happening today.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfóo, nwǝ bále fe kase utidinini laale ubii, áti ubi wǝ bále ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ kama nkǝ lǝ okpe wǝ bulǝ, nya nko ke insi inte mmi nɛ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Get rid of the slave woman and her son! He won't be given anything. The son of the free woman will receive everything.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ be Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue nlɛ bɔtɛyi? Kɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “La ndomunyǝsio ǝmǝ ku wǝ ubi lǝ bedu, itsyise ndomunyǝsio eto ubi ǝmǝ ǝmbɔkɛ kedikɔ saa ku diyo eto usio ǝmǝ eto ole lǝ mǝ anto eto bikǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: My friends, we are children of the free woman and not of the slave.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, mɔ bayimi, bunni ndomunyǝsio ǝmǝ eto bebi, bomu diyo eto kusiǝ komǝ eto bale buni.

english_verse: Christ has set us free! This means we are really free. Now hold on to your freedom and don't ever become slaves of the Law again.
translation_verse: Kristo ǝlǝkǝ bo nkǝ lǝ busiǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ. Nyaso bińyǝ kekleke, biǝntǝ lǝ banyinkǝ mi bakpe lǝ kasɔ bǝ lǝ bisi befiani ndomufɔ bio.

english_verse: I, Paul, promise you that Christ won't do you any good if you get circumcised.
translation_verse: Bɛnɔ nyamfo! Mɔ, Paulo, nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkǝ lǝ bítǝ bála mi leloo, nyaalɛ bíenyǝ kutǝkǝ saa lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And if you try to please God by obeying the Law, you have cut yourself off from Christ and his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Mimba nlɛ bokplatsya biǝ bieyifo basɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi lǝ buyifo lǝ kɔfi komǝ ǝsuǝǝ, te biǝ bílǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ. Nya biensi embunyǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ bio.

english_verse: But the Spirit makes us sure God will accept us because of our faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Bo alɛɛ, bo kusubebe ni bǝnkǝ Onanto ebuyifo bo basɛɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ itsyise bófo Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ ɛyɛ lǝ bo bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you are a follower of Christ Jesus, it makes no difference whether you are circumcised or not. All that matters is your faith that makes you love others.
translation_verse: Lǝ buyifo bani ku Kristo Yesuu, bála utsyuǝ lelo o-o, bánla o-o, yenyifo kulesa. Lesa nǝ nso bofe ete ni bofokanɔ bo nyɛ lǝ bo bǝtsyuǝ eto lelabi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You were doing so well until someone made you turn from the truth.
translation_verse: Kɔɔ békakplatsya tinti. Owoe díti mi kusu nkǝ bientsyue ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ koto?

english_verse: And that person was certainly not sent by the one who chose you.
translation_verse: Inni Onanto wǝ lékpadi mi oboko lɛtsyi mi nsusu ɔwuninsǝ nko.

english_verse: A little yeast can change a whole batch of dough,
translation_verse: Ǝyǝnkisǝsa sɛkɛ ete baakpe lǝ nnamfowɔwɔ ǝsuǝ fɛ boataka.

english_verse: but you belong to the Lord. This makes me certain you will do what I say, instead of what someone else tells you to do. Whoever is causing trouble for you will be punished.
translation_verse: Mifo nnɔ miǝ Bonamute ebutǝ nkǝ boensiembofo kuutsyuǝ bamba saa eto nsusu enso mɔ nle hã. Nya nwǝǝ ke nlɛ mi nsusu bɔtsyi kawuninsǝ tsyaa, Onanto ebunǝ wǝ koto kokooko.

english_verse: My friends, if I still preach that people need to be circumcised, why am I in so much trouble? The message about the cross would no longer be a problem, if I told people to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, lǝ nnya ete minsi minlɛ letsya bobe kate betidi miǝ ele bǝ bala lelo kokooko, beso bensi banlɛ mɛ kama bɔti? Lǝ nko ini, nyalɛ mɔ letsyabebe itsyi lǝ Kristo eto ukpǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ emboboko bulǝ saa nkpǝ.

english_verse: I wish everyone who is upsetting you would not only get circumcised, but would cut off much more!
translation_verse: Nla miǝ eni betidi ba nlɛ mi nsusu bulǝ bokpe sukosǝ sɛtɔ, lǝ bǝkǝ ǝsuǝ kula tsya ko ete lǝ elo!

english_verse: My friends, you were chosen to be free. So don't use your freedom as an excuse to do anything you want. Use it as an opportunity to serve each other with love.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, bokpadi bákpadi mi báboko bǝ bibǝ bisiǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ mi busiǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, menyifo kusutǝtǝ itǝ mi abuayifoyifo. Bomuu, ele bǝ bifi nnya lǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ bɔwunsǝko lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: All the Law says can be summed up in the command to love others as much as you love yourself.
translation_verse: Itsyise kɔfi komǝ eto nnya kɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi kenke ete ni bǝnkǝ, “La fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ fe kase faala fǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: But if you keep attacking each other like wild animals, you had better watch out or you will destroy yourselves. God's Spirit and Our Own Desires
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bekpe kobe kukɔnɔ bǝ lǝ bɛlɛ asafimfi buyifo bǝtsyuǝ, kǝmuǝ bǝtsyuǝ kayimii, nyalɛ biǝbǝ bǝtsyuǝ bɔtsylɔsǝ kalosǝ. Onanto Eto Lɛwɔnɔ Ku Utidi Eto Ditsyǝbi.

english_verse: The Spirit and your desires are enemies of each other. They are always fighting each other and keeping you from doing what you feel you should.
translation_verse: Itsyise lesa nǝ utidi eto ditsyǝbi laala, ńyǝ lǝ lesa nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ laala ǝsuǝ nya lesa nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ tsya laala, ńyǝ lǝ lesa nǝ utidi eto ditsyǝbi tsya laala ǝsuǝ. Asakpa ǝnuǝ nyamfo eyifo balo lǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝsuǝ, nnya eto kasɔ ni bǝnkǝ biembofo lesa nǝ ke biala buyifo.

english_verse: But if you obey the Spirit, the Law of Moses has no control over you.
translation_verse: Lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ nyɛnko mii, ete bǝ binsibǝ lǝ kɔfi komǝ kalɔ.

english_verse: People's desires make them give in to immoral ways, filthy thoughts, and shameful deeds.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ utidi eto ditsyǝbi leeyifo akpa wuee. Diate ni ditsyǝbi lǝ sɛnɔdi, asinsa yifoyifo ku akuɛnsa yifoyifo,

english_verse: They worship idols, practice witchcraft, hate others, and are hard to get along with. People become jealous, angry, and selfish. They not only argue and cause trouble, but they are
translation_verse: lǝ bǝfiǝ kpakpa ku lǝ sɛsilolo ǝsuǝ. Kolo tsyǝtsyǝ ku ndiǝ diǝdiǝ, kǝnǝnsɛ ku kafo nyinsǝnyinsǝ ku mɔ ale hã lǝ ɛlɛkɛ ǝsuǝ. Nyamfo eesensǝ betidi ku etsyukpa eto nti

english_verse: envious. They get drunk, carry on at wild parties, and do other evil things as well. I told you before, and I am telling you again: No one who does these things will share in the blessings of God's kingdom.
translation_verse: yǝǝtǝ kǝnǝminsɛ, sitekpe ku disuǝyuǝ bimba nyǝnyǝ ku nyamfo eto kakle. Nlɛ mi kɔlɛ bɔlɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ fe kase mínkakabɔtɛyi lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mǝ miǝ betidi ba leeyifo asa nyamfo eto kaklee, embunyǝ kedikɔ lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ!

english_verse: gentle, and self-controlled. There is no law against behaving in any of these ways.
translation_verse: ku ǝsuǝ kasɔ bobokosǝ ku ǝsuǝ bumuǝ kalɛ. Kɔfi saa ǝmbǝ ńyǝ lǝ asa nyamfo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And because we belong to Christ Jesus, we have killed our selfish feelings and desires.
translation_verse: Nya mba ni Kristo Yesu eto balee, ébɔsɔ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto ditsyǝbi ku nnya laalɛ mǝ ɔkɔɛ kǝnǝ mǝ kakpe lǝ lebua ǝsuǝǝ, bálo.

english_verse: God's Spirit has given us life, and so we should follow the Spirit.
translation_verse: Nya se ini Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ bɔnyɛ bunsi nkpǝǝ, nyalɛ bitǝ lǝ busiǝ nkpǝ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ eto lelabi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But don't be conceited or make others jealous by claiming to be better than they are.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lǝ bobesǝ bo ǝsuǝ kato, nye bunyǝ ɔblɔ bokpe bǝtsyuǝ, nye bɔsɛsǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My friends, you are spiritual. So if someone is trapped in sin, you should gently lead that person back to the right path. But watch out, and don't be tempted yourself.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, lǝ lebua ǝbǝ léso utsyuǝ ani lǝ mi ntii, ele bǝ mi mba Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nyɛnko tsyǝsuǝ ko wǝ buǝ bɛlɔ wǝ bitsyǝ bǝ lǝ ɔyɛ lebua nǝmǝ buyifo. Fɛɛ bebe mi disi kukɔnɔ bǝ mi tsya mendufǝ lǝ bulǝ bomfó eto okle kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: You obey the law of Christ when you offer each other a helping hand.
translation_verse: Bɛwunsǝko bǝtsyuǝ lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, biɔyɛ lǝ Kristo eto kɔfi ko okpe mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you think you are better than others, when you really aren't, you are wrong.
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ ebu nkǝ utsyuǝ eto okle uni fɛ unni nkoo, wǝ ǝsuǝ ete ɔnlɛ bɔwɛ.

english_verse: Do your own work well, and then you will have something to be proud of. But don't compare yourself with others.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ utsyuǝ saa to wǝ ǝsuǝ obe. Lǝ unyǝ nkǝ ɛlɛkɛ, nyalɛ woofo wǝ ǝsuǝ kato bobesǝ lǝ nnya úyifo ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ inni bǝ lǝ ufi nnya okatesǝko ku utsyuǝ bamba saa eto ale tsya.

english_verse: We each must carry our own load.
translation_verse: Itsyise ele bǝ utsyuǝ saa tsyi wǝ kosate eto bikǝ.

english_verse: Share every good thing you have with anyone who teaches you what God has said.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ banlɛ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bofokanɔ botee, ele bǝ wuntsya ufi asa sɛɛ nnya kenke nkpe wǝ usie ku wǝ oteasa.

english_verse: You cannot fool God, so don't make a fool of yourself! You will harvest what you plant.
translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ saa manwɛ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Itsyise kuutsyuǝ saa embofo Onanto sibuki bubu. Lesa nǝ ke utidi laatoo, ni ke wǝǝfǝsǝ nɛ.

english_verse: If you follow your selfish desires, you will harvest destruction, but if you follow the Spirit, you will harvest eternal life.
translation_verse: Lǝ áto asa lǝ sinǝ eto alasa ǝsuǝǝ, asa nnya fuufǝsǝ ni ukpǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ áto asa lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝǝ, lesa nǝ fuufǝsǝ ni nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: Don't get tired of helping others. You will be rewarded when the time is right, if you don't give up.
translation_verse: Boǝntǝ lǝ ani lǝ elo bo lǝ kasɛbuyifo ǝsuǝ. Itsyise lǝ ani manlo boo, lefe ebubǝ nǝ buufǝsǝ lesa nǝ bóto.

english_verse: We should help people whenever we can, especially if they are followers of the Lord. Final Warnings
translation_verse: Nyaso se kusu nsi nkpǝ boo, bitǝ lǝ buyifo kasɛɛ butǝ utsyuǝ saa, enso kulaa ni mba buyifo lɔni ko lǝ bofokanɔ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ. Lesa Nǝ Lefe Itǝ Bo Ni Nkpe Fɔfɔ Siǝsiǝ.

english_verse: You can see what big letters I make when I write with my own hand.
translation_verse: Bebe awɔnisa kplɛ nnya mímfi mɔ kosate eto kɔni míwɔni mfo.

english_verse: Those people who are telling you to get circumcised are only trying to show how important they are. And they don't want to get into trouble for preaching about the cross of Christ.
translation_verse: Betidi ba nlɛ mi bɔnyinkǝ kakpe bǝnkǝ bela alo mfó, mǝ ni mba laabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ ǝsuǝ eto asa ǝsuǝ nɛ. Beeyifo nyamfo lǝ betidi lǝ bayɛ mǝ bulǝ bokpe lǝ Kristo eto ukpǝ lǝ uyikabie eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eso.

english_verse: They are circumcised, but they don't obey the Law of Moses. All they want is to brag about having you circumcised.
translation_verse: Mba laala alo mfó kulaa tsya entsyue kɔfi komǝ koto. Fɛɛ baala bǝ mi tsya la alo bǝ lǝ babesǝ ǝsuǝ kato bǝ mi tsya efi mi ǝsuǝ bekpe lǝ mǝ kɔfi kalɔ, bítǝ bála mi alo.

english_verse: But I will never brag about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of his cross, the world is dead as far as I am concerned, and I am dead as far as the world is concerned.
translation_verse: Mɔ alɛ, mensila miǝ maabesǝ mɔ ǝsuǝ kato enso lǝ ukpǝ wǝ Yesu Kristo díkpe lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Itsyise ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ukpǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ nya básɔ kawunsiǝ kamǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ lǝ mɔ disi. Nya ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝmǝ kẽ ǝsuǝ nya básɔ mintsya lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ itǝ kawunsiǝ mensile kulesa saa itǝ mɛ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are circumcised or not. All that matters is that you are a new person.
translation_verse: Bála utsyuǝ lelo o-o, bánla utsyuǝ lelo o-o, nnya mamfé. Bomu utidi fɔfɔ bofiani ni nnya lefé nɛ.

english_verse: If you follow this rule, you will belong to God's true people. God will treat you with undeserved kindness and will bless you with peace.
translation_verse: Onanto eto diyuǝ ku kamisǝ nyǝnyǝ lǝ disiǝko mba laayɛ lǝ kusu komfo ǝsuǝ lǝ mǝ nkpǝ, ku Onanto eto betidi kenke.

english_verse: On my own body are scars that prove I belong to Christ Jesus. So I don't want anyone to bother me anymore.
translation_verse: Fɛfɛɛ, kuutsyuǝ saa mensilosǝ mɛ ɔnwɛ, itsyise mɔɔ, bɛmɔ bia ntǝkǝ mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ, lǝ bote bǝ Yesu eto ndomunyǝ mini.

english_verse: My friends, I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you! Amen.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, nlɛ bɔtɔ miǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto lefonǝ lǝ disiǝko mimblɛ kenke. Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus. To God's people who live in Ephesus and are faithful followers of Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, wǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝ eso mini Kristo Yesu eto ɔtɔnkpee, mɔ nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mimba léfo Onanto bɛnɔ nkpe lǝ Efeso nya biyifo bani ku Kristo Yesu nya bietsyue wǝ etiki koto.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Christ Brings Spiritual Blessings
translation_verse: Lǝ Boanto Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo lǝ befi mǝ lefonǝ ku diyuǝ bǝtǝ mi. Onanto Aakpo Bo Atsyɔ Lǝ Kristo Eso.

english_verse: Praise the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ for the spiritual blessings that Christ has brought us from heaven!
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ bɔsɔ Onanto wǝ ni Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto Anto ani. Wǝ ni nwǝ dífi lɛwɔnɔ eto atsyɔkpokpo nya nkpe kato kenke útǝ bo, se buyifo bani ku Kristo eso.

english_verse: Before the world was created, God had Christ choose us to live with him and to be his holy and innocent and loving people.
translation_verse: Itsyise fɛ Onanto lǝ uyifo kawunsiǝ, wúulǝkǝ bo utsyǝ koko nkǝ lǝ bubǝ buyifo bani ku Kristo, bǝ lǝ buyifo kɛnkɛ ku mba ǝsuǝ lebua lǝmbɔkɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: God was kind and decided that Christ would choose us to be God's own adopted children.
translation_verse: Se Onanto laala bo esoo, wúutsyue utsyǝ koko nkǝ ɛyɛ lǝ bo lɔniyifoyifo ku Yesu Kristo esoo, lǝ bubǝ bofiani wǝ bebi. Nyamfo kon didi wǝ nsusu kokoko nɛ.

english_verse: God treated us with undeserved grace because of the Son he dearly loves, and so we should praise God.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eso ele bǝ bɔtɛsɛ Onanto lǝ wǝ lefonǝ kplɛ nǝ úfi útǝ bo kafo faa ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ubi lala ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: Christ sacrificed his life's blood to set us free, which means our sins are now forgiven. Christ did this because of God's gift of undeserved grace to us. God has great wisdom and understanding,
translation_verse: Lefonǝ nǝ eto kakle lǝmbǝ bɔtɛyi. Ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ kobetete ku kase wǝ nsusu nyi lesa saa eso.

english_verse: and by what Christ has done, God has shown us his own mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Útǝ bɔnɔ kasɔ ékpa wuee ketsyue kulakula ka béyifo bǝtsyǝ itǝ kǝ bolosǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ.

english_verse: Then when the time is right, God will do all he has planned, and Christ will bring together everything in heaven and on earth.
translation_verse: Nyamfo ni bǝnkǝ lǝ lefe nǝmǝ ayoo, bookpa eyifosa kenke bakɔ, lesa saa nǝ nkpe kato ku kasɔ nya boofi asa nyamfo kenke bakpe lǝ Kristo eto kalɔ.

english_verse: He did this so we Jews would bring honor to him and be the first ones to have hope because of him.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ bomba ni betidi tutɛ Onanto díkǝlǝkǝ útsyǝ kokoko bɔnlɛ kusu bobe itǝ Kristo, lǝ busiǝ nkpǝ bɔtɛsǝ Onanto eto diyǝnde.

english_verse: Christ also brought you the truth, which is the good news about how you can be saved. You put your faith in Christ and were given the promised Holy Spirit to show you belong to God.
translation_verse: Nya mi tsya léfiani Onanto eto betidi se bɛnɔ ɔnukualɛtiki nǝmǝ ini Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto letsyabebe, be bínyǝ bofo, itsyise béfo wǝ bɛnɔ eso. Úfi Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝ eto kɛnyɛ ɔ́tɛyi útsyǝ nkǝ wootsyese bo, útsyǝ mi lekpo nkǝ biyifo wǝ bale.

english_verse: The Spirit also makes us sure we will be given what God has stored up for his people. Then we will be set free, and God will be honored and praised. Paul's Prayer
translation_verse: Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmfo ni nnya Onanto dífi óse uyi útǝ bo nkǝ bo tsya ebunyǝ asa nnya útsyǝ kɛnyǝ útǝ mba ni wǝ bale kokooko. Uyisese ǝmfo lɛ bo bote bǝ Onanto ebutǝ bomba ni wǝ bale nyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ. Bitǝ bɔtɛsǝ wǝ diyǝnde! Paulo Áto Ola Lǝ Mba Léfo Kukue Komfo Eto Disi.

english_verse: I have heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, idu lǝ lefe nǝ mínɔ miǝ béfo Bonamute Yesu bɛnɔ, ku kase biala mba kenke díkafo Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ banɔɔ,

english_verse: So I never stop being grateful for you, as I mention you in my prayers.
translation_verse: maanyɛ Onanto ani bɔsɔ lǝ mi disi. Maakloma mi lefe saa lǝ mɔ olatoto ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I ask the glorious Father and God of our Lord Jesus Christ to give you his Spirit. The Spirit will make you wise and let you understand what it means to know God.
translation_verse: Nya maatɔ Onanto wǝ ni Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto Anto, ɔkɛnkɛnyǝ kenke miǝ utǝ mi wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ luutǝ bitsyǝ ǝnǝ nya lǝ ulǝkǝ Onanto ǝmǝ ote mi, bǝ lǝ bete wǝ kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: My prayer is that light will flood your hearts and you will understand the hope given to you when God chose you. Then you will discover the glorious blessings that will be yours together with all God's people.
translation_verse: Nya maatɔ wǝ minkǝ lǝ ɔsini mi ǝnǝmi, bǝ lǝ binyǝ nnya eso ókpadi mi óboko nkǝ lǝ bibǝ bete kusubebe ko eso ókpadi mi ku kase atsyɔkpokpo itǝ mba ni wǝ balee, lefo koya

english_verse: I want you to know about the great and mighty power that God has for us followers. It is the same wonderful power he used
translation_verse: ku kase wǝ ǝsuǝale kplɛ nyamǝ nlɛ keyifo kekleke lǝ bomba léfo wǝ bɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya ǝsuǝale nyamfo, nnya nlɛ keyifo lǝ boo, lekateko wǝ ǝsuǝale kplɛ nyamǝ,

english_verse: when he raised Christ from death and let him sit at his right side in heaven.
translation_verse: nnya úfi ótakasǝ Kristo utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ nya úfi wǝ útsyǝ lǝ wǝ kodiani lǝ kato kenke.

english_verse: There Christ rules over all forces, authorities, powers, and rulers. He rules over all beings in this world and will rule in the future world as well.
translation_verse: Mfó Kristo nsi ɔnlɛ seka budi nya kato eto sekadidi saa ku kasɔ mfo eto ǝsuǝale saa ǝsuǝ ku ǝsuǝale bamba saa nkpe wǝ kalɔ. Wǝ diye teke kato ǝsuǝale saa ku sekakedikɔ saa lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo ku nka nsi luubǝ.

english_verse: God has put all things under the power of Christ, and for the good of the church he has made him the head of everything.
translation_verse: Onanto éfi lesa saa ókpe lǝ Kristo eto akpa kalɔ nya úfi wǝ útǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa kenke fe asa kenke eto Onamute wǝ nso kenke.

english_verse: The church is the body of Christ and is filled with Christ who completely fills everything.
translation_verse: Bafokanɔfɔ bamfo ni Kristo eto ǝsuǝ nnya dítǝ ɔflɔ kenke, nya Kristo tsya ni nwǝ lǝǝtǝ asa nnya kenke laaflɔ kalo.

english_verse: In the past you were dead because you sinned and fought against God.
translation_verse: Kɔɔ se béta bibu nya bíyifo lebua itsyi lǝ mi koto mentsyuǝmentsyue ǝsuǝ esoo, bíyifo fe betidi ba díkpe lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You followed the ways of this world and obeyed the devil. He rules the world, and his spirit has power over everyone who doesn't obey God.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfóo, bísiǝ nkpǝ fe kawunsiǝ bua kamfo eto nkpǝsiǝsiǝ seka. Bítǝkǝko ǝsuǝale nnya nlɛ difule kato eto seka budi eto kama. Wǝ ni lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nlɛ keyifo mɔmɔ lǝ mba lɛni bǝ bembutsyue Onanto koto.

english_verse: Once we were also ruled by the selfish desires of our bodies and minds. We had made God angry, and we were going to be punished like everyone else.
translation_verse: Lǝ sitintii, bomblɛ kenke ǝtsyǝ fe mǝ nya búsiǝ nkpǝ lǝ bo alasa ǝsuǝ, lǝ kase ińyǝ itǝ bo ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ku nsusu seka. Ditsyǝbi nǝmfo lɛkɛ lǝ bo eso Onanto dínyǝ ɔblɔ ókpe bo, fe kase únyǝ ókpe kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke, únǝ mǝ koto nɛ.

english_verse: But God was merciful! We were dead because of our sins, but God loved us so much he made us alive with Christ, and God's gift of undeserved grace is what saves you.
translation_verse: se búkpǝ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ lǝ bo abua yifoyifo esoo, útǝ busikli búbǝ nkpǝ ku Kristo. Nya ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ ǝsuǝǝ, búnyǝ bofokǝtǝ nɛ.

english_verse: God raised us from death to life with Christ Jesus, and he has given us a place beside Christ in heaven.
translation_verse: Se buyifo bani ku Kristo Yesu esoo, ótakasǝ bo úńyǝnsǝ ku wǝ, nya útǝ buudi seka ku Kristo lǝ kato.

english_verse: God did this so in the future world he could show how truly good and kind he is to us because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Onanto éyifo nyamfo nkǝ lǝ ufi ote mba luubǝ kama kenke wǝ lefonǝ nǝ lǝmbǝ bokatesǝko ku kulesa saa ku wǝ kafoɛkpɛ lǝ kase únyǝ bo kaminsǝ lǝ Kristo Yesu eso.

english_verse: God planned for us to do good things and to live as he has always wanted us to live. This is why he sent Christ to make us what we are. United by Christ
translation_verse: Onanto díyifo bo ku wǝ kosate eto ani nkǝ lǝ buyifo bani ku Kristo Yesu nkǝ lǝ busiǝ kasɛɛ yifoyifo eto nkpǝ bo wǝ kosate lɛlɔ utsyǝ nkǝ bubǝ busiǝ. Kristo Éfi Betidi Kenke Ɔ́kɔ Beyifo Bani.

english_verse: Don't forget that you are Gentiles. In fact, you used to be called “uncircumcised” by those who take pride in being circumcised.
translation_verse: Bekloma biǝ bíambɔ bitsyi lǝ Yudafɔ ǝsuǝ, bomu bále mi fe betidi ba lenyi Onanto. Yudafɔ eyifo mba laala alo, nya baaka mi bafɛfɛ bǝ betidi laanla alo. Fɛɛ sitintii, mba laala alo eeyifo ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto lekpa nǝ betidi leefi ani keeyifo.

english_verse: At that time you did not know about Christ. You were foreigners to the people of Israel, and you had no part in the promises God had made to them. You were living in this world without hope and without God,
translation_verse: Bekloma biǝ lǝ lefe nǝmfóo, bínyǝ kɔsɛsɛ lǝ Kristo ɔflɔ nya bíyifo bafɔ nya bíenyifo Onanto eto betidi ba úlǝkǝ fe kase Yudafɔ. Nya bíankɛ lǝ kɛnyɛ ka Onanto lékle ku wǝ betidi ku asa nnya eto kɛnyɛ útsyǝ ku mǝ. Nya isi enso ni bǝ kusubebe kukutsyuǝ saa mankɛ mi itǝ kulesa nya Onanto saa tsya mankɛ mi.

english_verse: and you were far from God. But Christ offered his life's blood as a sacrifice and brought you near God.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo eto ukpǝ wǝ úkpǝ lǝ disi ǝsuǝǝ, bóokpa mi mba díńyǝ kɔsɛsɛ kɔ tsya bíbǝ bíyifo bani ku Kristo Yesu.

english_verse: Christ has made peace between Jews and Gentiles, and he has united us by breaking down the wall of hatred that separated us. Christ gave his own body
translation_verse: Itsyise Kristo kosate léboko diyuǝ lǝ bo nti lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe únǝ lɔniyifoyifo óboko Yudafɔ ku mba lenni Yudafɔ nti. Nya úfi wǝ ǝsuǝ óba kekisi ka nte fe ofati wǝ lɛkɛ lǝ mi nti úlǝkǝ.

english_verse: to destroy the Law of Moses with all its rules and commands. He even brought Jews and Gentiles together as though we were only one person, when he united us in peace.
translation_verse: Úlǝkǝ Yudafɔ eto kɔfi ku mǝ akpayifoyifo lenti ɛyɛ lǝ mǝ nkpǝ bo úsiǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ ɔkɔ akpa ǝnuǝ nyamǝ beyifo mǝ utidi fɔfɔ ɔni bǝ lǝ beyifo bani ku wǝ, itǝ lǝ diyuǝ lǝ dibǝ lǝ mǝ nti.
