english_verse: On the cross Christ did away with our hatred for each other. He also made peace between us and God by uniting Jews and Gentiles in one body.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo eto ukpǝ wǝ úkpe lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝǝ, ókpla kǝdiǝ ka lɛkɛ lǝ akpa ǝnuǝ nyamǝ eto nti. Nya ɛyɛ lǝ ukpǝ ǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ótsyasǝ betidi akpa ǝnuǝ bamǝ eto nti béyifo utidi ɔni nya úyifo mǝ bani ku Onanto.

english_verse: Christ came and preached peace to you Gentiles, who were far from God, and peace to us Jews, who were near God.
translation_verse: Nyaso se Kristo díbǝǝ, óbe diyuǝ eto Ditiki Sɛɛ letsya útǝ mi betidi ba letsyonko Onanto ku bomba lɛfi wǝ.

english_verse: And because of Christ, all of us can come to the Father by the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ nnya bo akpa ǝnuǝ nyamǝ kenke, Yudafɔ ku mba lenni Yudafɔ ɛyɛ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝǝ, bofo buńyǝ lǝ Anto Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: You Gentiles are no longer strangers and foreigners. You are citizens with everyone else who belongs to the family of God.
translation_verse: Nyaso mimba lenni Yudafɔ ensini bafɔ ku bayɛkusutidi bio. Biyifo betidi bani ku mba ni Onanto eto bebi, ku bǝmǝmbi lǝ wǝ diyo eto betidi nti.

english_verse: You are like a building with the apostles and prophets as the foundation and with Christ as the most important stone.
translation_verse: Mi tsya eyifo fe ofati wǝ báto bǝtǝkǝ kekleke lǝ ketsyikokɔ eto leba nǝ batɔnkpe ku bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi lékpe lǝ kasɔ nya Kristo Yesu kosate ni oseke ǝmǝ.

english_verse: Christ is the one who holds the building together and makes it grow into a holy temple for the Lord.
translation_verse: Wǝ ni utidi wǝ lɛkɔbe diyo nǝ báto bǝtǝkǝ mfó eto akpa nnya kenke ɔkɔ, nya útǝ léfiani Onanto eto kedikǝtǝkɔ kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: And you are part of that building Christ has built as a place for God's own Spirit to live.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mi lɔniyifoyifo ku wǝǝ, balɛ mi tsya booto fe diyo kakɔ ku mi bǝtsyuǝ bǝ lǝ befiani kǝsiǝkɔ itǝ Onanto ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You have surely heard about God's gift of undeserved grace in choosing me to help you.
translation_verse: Sitintii, mfo nnɔ miǝ bíɔnɔ kase Onanto lǝ wǝ lefonǝ ǝsuǝǝ, dífi keyifo kamfo ókpe mɛ lǝ kɔni nkǝ nyifo itǝ mi kasɛɛ eso.

english_verse: In fact, this letter tells you a little about how God has shown me his mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Fe kase mínkawɔni kliminti míntsyese mii, Onanto ǝlǝkǝ wǝ ketsyue ka úyifo ɔ́kulaa, óte mɛ.

english_verse: As you read the letter, you will also find out how well I really do understand the mystery about Christ.
translation_verse: Lǝ bekla kukue komfoo, biunye kase minɔ akulasa nnya nkpe lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: No one knew about this mystery until God's Spirit told it to his holy apostles and prophets.
translation_verse: Kɔɔ Onanto mǝntǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi te akulasa nyamfo. Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, útǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ úlǝkǝ asa nyamfo ótǝ wǝ batɔnkpe kɛnkɛ ku wǝ bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi.

english_verse: And the mystery is this: Because of Christ Jesus, the good news has given the Gentiles a share in the promises God gave to the Jews. God has also let the Gentiles be part of the same body.
translation_verse: Asakulakula nyamǝ ni bǝ útǝ nkǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, mba lenni Yudafɔ tsya ǝbǝ báfiani mba leedi Onanto eto bikǝ ku Yudafɔ, bákɔ beyifo ǝsuǝ eto uyi ɔni, bǝnyǝ kedikɔ lǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ ka Onanto dítsyǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo Yesu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God treated me with kindness. His power worked in me, and it became my job to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Onanto éyifo mɛ wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo eto uyifoyifo ɛyɛ lɛ wǝ ǝtǝsa nnya úfi útǝ mɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: I am the least important of all God's people. But God was kind and chose me to tell the Gentiles that because of Christ there are blessings that cannot be measured.
translation_verse: Mɔ nwǝ ni ɔfɛfɛ kenke minso lǝ mba léfo Onanto bánɔ ntii, ǝtǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lefonǝ ǝsuǝ mfi wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ fokoya nɛ nkpe lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ mbe letsya ntǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ.

english_verse: God, who created everything, wanted me to help everyone understand the mysterious plan that had always been hidden in his mind.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nyifo betidi lǝ bǝnyǝ kase ele bǝ befi Onanto eto akulasa eto ketsyue beyifo keyifoo, Onanto wǝ ni nwǝ díyifo asa nnya ta, éfi wǝ akulasa nyamfo ɔ́kula taa lǝ lefe kokoko nǝ léfe ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then God would use the church to show the powers and authorities in the spiritual world that he has many different kinds of wisdom.
translation_verse: Itǝ lǝ bayɛ lǝ bafokanɔfɔ ǝsuǝ bǝlǝkǝ Onanto eto kobe ateate kpǝ nyamǝ bate kato eto batɔnkpe ku bǝsuǝalenyǝ ba nlɛ seka budi lǝ kato eto kawunsiǝ.

english_verse: God did this according to his eternal plan. And he was able to do what he had planned because of all Christ Jesus our Lord had done.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eyifo ketsyue manlo ka Onanto díyifo útsyǝ taa kokoko. Mɔmɔɔ, útǝ ketsyue kamfo ǝbǝ itǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Christ now gives us courage and confidence, so we can come to God by faith.
translation_verse: Lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku Kristo se bófo wǝ bɔ́nɔ esoo, ókpe bo nkɛale bǝ bɔnyi bɔfi Onanto lǝ bokakase ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: This is why you should not be discouraged when I suffer for you. After all, it will bring honor to you. Christ's Love for Us
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ mi lekpakpa minkǝ lǝ kanyi ka minlɛ bunyǝ lǝ mi kɛnyɛ esoo, mǝntǝ lǝ elo mi ani itsyise biunyǝ kutǝkǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Kristo Aala Bo.

english_verse: All beings in heaven and on earth receive their life from him.
translation_verse: Wǝ ɔflɔ asa nnya kenke nkpe kato ku kasɔ laafo mǝ diye ketsyiko.

english_verse: God is wonderful and glorious. I pray that his Spirit will make you become strong followers
translation_verse: Nlɛ ola boto miǝ Onanto lǝ utǝ wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ lǝ difi ni ǝsuǝale nǝ nkpe lǝ wǝ diyǝnde nǝ léba lékpoo, lǝ didufǝ lǝ mi ketu kǝmiǝ ke.

english_verse: and that Christ will live in your hearts because of your faith. Stand firm and be deeply rooted in his love.
translation_verse: Nya nlɛ bɔtɔ tsya miǝ Kristo lǝ uyifo wǝ kǝsiǝkɔ lǝ mi ketu kǝmiǝ ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nya lǝ mi lelabi eto keyudu lǝ kedufǝ lǝ kasɔ kekleke fe kase kuyi eto kale leeyifo nya lǝ dimuǝ ale,

english_verse: I pray that you and all God's people will understand what is called wide or long or high or deep.
translation_verse: bǝ lǝ mi ku mba léfo Onanto bánɔ kenke lǝ binyǝ ǝsuǝale lǝ bɛnɔ kase Kristo laala mi kasɔ, lelabi nǝ leba lenkpo, lɛyɛ letsyo, lebe kato fanloo nya letsyo disu kasɔ tsya.

english_verse: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bibǝ bete Kristo eto lelabi nǝ biembofo kasɔ bɔnɔ kalosǝ bǝ lǝ Onanto eto ditsyǝbi nǝmǝ lǝ diyi mi ǝsuǝ kenke. Paulo Átɛsǝ Onanto.

english_verse: I pray that Christ Jesus and the church will forever bring praise to God. His power at work in us can do far more than we dare ask or imagine. Amen.
translation_verse: Atɛsǝ itǝ Onanto lǝ bafokanɔfɔ nti ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo Yesu ǝsuǝ itǝ lefe saa ku idu mɔmɔ isu manlo manlo! Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
translation_verse: Nyaso mɔ nwǝ nlabe lǝ diyo, se meeyifo Bonamute eto keyifo esoo, nlɛ mi kɔlɛ bɔlɛ minkǝ bisiǝ nkpǝ bo lɛflɔ bokate ko bokpadi bo Onanto lékpadi mi.

english_verse: Always be humble and gentle. Patiently put up with each other and love each other.
translation_verse: Bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ lefe saa, biyuǝ buɛɛ ku lǝ bɛkɛ disuǝtsyǝ. Bilǝkǝ mi lelabi bete bǝtsyuǝ ku lǝ bɛkɛ dibusǝ bitǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
translation_verse: Bekplatsya lǝ biyifo lesa saa lǝ kɛnyɛ kani ǝsuǝ fe kase Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝmǝ dífi mi ɔ́kɔ, lǝ bisiǝ nkpǝ lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: All of you are part of the same body. There is only one Spirit of God, just as you were given one hope when you were chosen to be God's people.
translation_verse: Ǝsuǝ ani ku Lɛwɔnɔ lɔni ete nkpe fe kase kusubebe kɔni hã nkpe mi nya ini nko eso Onanto lékpadi mi nɛ.

english_verse: We have only one Lord, one faith, and one baptism.
translation_verse: Onamute ɔni ku bofokanɔ bɔni ku ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa lɔni tsya ete nkpe.

english_verse: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Nko ini bǝ Onamute ku Anto ɔni ete nkpe itǝ betidi ba kenke nya uyifo asa kenke eto Onamute, weeyifo keyifo kayɛ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ nya onkpe lǝ bomblɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Christ has generously divided out his gifts to us.
translation_verse: Nya ǝtǝsa nnya únǝ kafo útǝ bo utsyuǝ saa, akate ko kase Kristo dítǝ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “When he went up to the highest place, he led away many prisoners and gave gifts to people.”
translation_verse: Nyaso Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Se óbe úsu kato fanlofanloo, ókpa mba kpǝ úlǝkǝ utsyiko lǝ sidomu ǝsuǝ úsuko. Nya úsie ǝtǝsa útǝ betidi.”

english_verse: When it says, “he went up,” it means that Christ had been deep in the earth.
translation_verse: Nya se bátɛyi bǝ óbe úsu kato fanlofanloo, nnya kasɔ nkpǝ? Nnya kasɔ ni bǝ tutɛɛ, ɔ́yifǝ úbǝ taa kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kasɔ ke.

english_verse: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
translation_verse: Nya utidi ɔni ǝmǝ lɛyifǝ úbǝ kasɔɔ, wǝ ke disi óbe úsu kato fanlofanlo nɛ, oso utsyuǝ saa nya ófo unsi lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ lǝ kato ku kasɔ kenke.

english_verse: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
translation_verse: Onanto éyifo nyamfo nkǝ lǝ bomblɛ lǝ bubǝ buyifo bani lǝ nnya bofo bɔnɔ ǝsuǝ, ku lǝ bubǝ bote Onanto eto Ubi ǝmǝ. Lǝ bubǝ bobe bɔflɔ butsyǝ fe Kristo nya lǝ wǝ ditsyǝbi nǝmǝ kenke lǝ leba didufǝ bo lǝ ǝsuǝ butsyǝ fe wǝ ke.

english_verse: We must stop acting like children. We must not let deceitful people trick us by their false teachings, which are like winds that toss us around from place to place.
translation_verse: Nya boensi embutsyǝ fe bekpefi ba eto nsusu dímambe, ba asatete fɔfɔ saa nte fǝ ufiebi wǝ laasɔ keke mǝ kesuko sɛtɔ ku kama, nya bidiabidia eto bateasa laawɛ mǝ kakpe lǝ mǝ nsusu bua ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Love should always make us tell the truth. Then we will grow in every way and be more like Christ, the head
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kɛnyɛ, bǝ lǝ bɔtɛyi ɔnukualɛ lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝǝ, bubǝ bobé lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ fe Kristo wǝ nwǝ ni bo disi.

english_verse: of the body. Christ holds it together and makes all of its parts work perfectly, as it grows and becomes strong because of love. The Old Life and the New Life
translation_verse: Wǝ lɛkɔbe utidi eto uyi ǝmǝ kenke eto ntsyakɔ ku kate kenke ɔnlɛ ɔni, itǝ bǝ utidi eto uyi ǝmǝ kenke eeyifo keyifo lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ, kabé kaflɔ kawunsǝ lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ. Bisiǝ Nkpǝ Fe Onanto Eto Bebi Seka.

english_verse: As a follower of the Lord, I order you to stop living like stupid, godless people.
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi kɔlɛ bɔlɛ lǝ Bonamute eto diye ǝsuǝ minkǝ biensisiǝ nkpǝ fe mba lenyi Onanto, ini asa bimba hã eto disi beebu.

english_verse: Their minds are in the dark, and they are stubborn and ignorant and have missed out on the life that comes from God. They no longer have any feelings about what is right,
translation_verse: Nya mǝ nsusu nkpe lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ. Nya bǝmbǝ kedikɔ saa lǝ Onanto eto nkpǝ bo wǝǝtǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise benyi nnya kulesa kon tsya, nya bankpe letotidi.

english_verse: and they are so greedy they do all kinds of indecent things.
translation_verse: Benyi kofani nyaso asa buayifoyifo eto kama hã bǝǝtǝkǝko. Nya baasɛsǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ asa nnya laabiasǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ saa eto buyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
translation_verse: Mɔ éfi nnya minkǝ bɛnɔ asa itsyi lǝ wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya fe mba ntǝkǝko wǝ kamaa, báte mi ɔnukualɛtiki nnya nkpe lǝ Yesu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
translation_verse: Beyani ditsyǝbi koko eto nkpǝ bo bísiǝ, nǝ dítǝ bísiǝ nkpǝ bo eto okle bísiǝ léfe. Asa nyamfo díkawɛ mi kakpe nya bíkǝtǝkǝko ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto eyifosa eto nkpǝ bo laabiasǝ utidi eto nkpǝ.

english_verse: Let the Spirit change your way of thinking
translation_verse: Bɛtsyi mi ketu ku nsusu bɛwuninsǝ lǝ biyifo bafɔfɔ.

english_verse: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
translation_verse: Nya bifi ditsyǝbi fɔfɔ nǝ béyifo lǝ Onanto eto ditsyǝbi ǝsuǝ nya weeyifo asa lǝ kusu ko diyifo kɛnkɛ bekpe fe awu.

english_verse: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
translation_verse: Nyaso bɛyɛ sidia bɔtɛyi. Utsyuǝ saa tɛyi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ ɔnukualɛ itsyise bo nti eto utsyuǝ saa lɛkɔ buyifo Kristo eto ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: and don't give the devil a chance.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ Obonsam kusu saa.

english_verse: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ leeyuu, sinkli ɔyɛ buyu lǝ ufi wǝ ani uyifo keyifo sɛɛ lǝ ɔkɛ lesatsyuǝ nǝ ofo bufi kawunsǝko bakombo.

english_verse: Stop all your dirty talk. Say the right thing at the right time and help others by what you say.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lǝ ditiki bua saa lǝ lɛbɔ ditsyi lǝ mi kɛnyɛ, bomu bidi etiki nnya lɔɔwunsǝko utidi lɔ wǝ utsyǝ, lǝ iyifo lɛwunsǝkobi itǝ mba lɛnɔ nnya.

english_verse: Don't make God's Spirit sad. The Spirit makes you sure that someday you will be free from your sins.
translation_verse: Bienyifo kulesa nǝ lembutǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nyǝ disuǝyuǝ. Itsyise Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ befi bǝtsyǝ mi lekpo nǝ lete bǝ nǝ Onanto ebofo mi lǝ nkpǝ lǝ diyi fɛfɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lefonfi lɛkɛ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ, bilǝkǝ ɔblɔ kekleke ku lefonyi bitsyiko lǝ mi akɔɛsi. Bilǝkǝ lǝ mi nti kudukpokpo bimba, betidi eto diebiasǝbiasǝ ku nsusu bua saa kenke fifi lǝ utidi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Do as God does. After all, you are his dear children.
translation_verse: Se biyifo Onanto eto bebi lala esoo, ele bǝ bekplatsya lǝ bitsyǝ fe wǝ.

english_verse: Let love be your guide. Christ loved us and offered his life for us as a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Bilǝkǝ lelabi bete lǝ mi nkpǝsiǝsiǝ ǝsuǝ fe kase Kristo laala bo nya úfi wǝ ǝsuǝ fe kedi ka laanyi fififi útǝ Onanto lǝ bo disi. Nyamfo eyifo keditǝtǝ ka laakpe Onanto disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
translation_verse: Se biyifo Onanto eto betidi esoo, yensile bǝ bakpo sɛsɔnɔdi ku asinsayifoyifo saa nye kunǝkpǝ eto diye ko lǝ mi nti.

english_verse: Don't use dirty or foolish or filthy words. Instead, say how thankful you are.
translation_verse: Nko ke yensile bǝ bɔtɛyi kulesa butsyiko lǝ asinsa ǝsuǝ ku akɔɛnsa nye amumusa ǝsuǝ. Bomu ele bǝ bufi lɛninsɔ butǝ Onanto.

english_verse: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
translation_verse: Itsyise mi kosate yi biǝ utidi wǝ kee ni ɔsɔnɔdi nye leeyifo asinsa nye nkpe kunǝkpǝǝ, embunyǝ kedikɔ lǝ Kristo ku Onanto eto sekakedikɔ kǝmiǝ. Lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝǝ, kǝnǝnsɛ lǝ asa ǝsuǝ akateko sifiǝsumu.

english_verse: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lǝ kuutsyuǝ saa lǝ ɔwɛ mi okpe ku etiki bimba saa, itsyise asa nyamfo eto kakle eso Onanto eto lefonyi looba lekpo lǝ mba nkpe letotidi ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
translation_verse: Nyaso mi ku mǝ mamfloma ani bǝtsyuǝ lǝ mǝ eyifosa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
translation_verse: Itsyise kɔɔ, bɛkɛ lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, se bíkafiani Bonamute eto betidi esoo, bifi bekpe lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ. Nyaso bisiǝ nkpǝ fe betidi ba nkpe lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ,

english_verse: as you try to please the Lord.
translation_verse: Bekplatsya lǝ bekase asayifoyifo nnya laakpe Bonamute disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: Don't take part in doing those worthless things that are done in the dark. Instead, show how wrong they are.
translation_verse: Biankɔ ani ku mba eto eyifosa nsi nyɛ lǝ ketuntu nnya laambɔ awɔnsa saa ǝsuǝ. Bomu bilǝkǝ mǝ bete.

english_verse: It is disgusting even to talk about what is done in the dark.
translation_verse: Itsyise iyifo afanisa tinti bǝ bedi etiki itsyiko lǝ eyifosa nyamfo eto okle ǝsuǝ lǝ kabiɔbiɔ ǝsuǝ kula tsya.

english_verse: But the light will show what these things are really like.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bǝlǝkǝ asa nyamǝ kenke lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ batée, ete boonyǝ mǝ ditsyǝbi nǝmǝ kosate wuee nɛ.

english_verse: Light shows up everything, just as the Scriptures say, “Wake up from your sleep and rise from death. Then Christ will shine on you.”
translation_verse: Itsyise lesa saa nǝ bǝlǝkǝ batee lekplee, aabɔ bǝǝnyǝ lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ. Nyamfo eso baatɛyi bǝ, “Sankli fǝ nwǝ nlɛ selabe, taka etsyi ɔkɔmǝ ǝbǝ, lǝ Kristo lǝ uyǝnde okpo fǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
translation_verse: Le nyasoo, bienyifo mi ǝsuǝ fe betidibuki. Bomu bɛbɛbɛ lǝ bete asa nnya Bonamute ǝmǝ laala nkǝ biyifo.

english_verse: Don't destroy yourself by getting drunk, but let the Spirit fill your life.
translation_verse: Biǝnnǝ nte bikpǝ itsyise nyamfo akpe mi lǝ abuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ. Bomu bitǝ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ lǝ lefo disiǝ lǝ mi kenke.

english_verse: When you meet together, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, as you praise the Lord with all your heart.
translation_verse: Nya bifi Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue eto ǝsǝ eto etiki, ku atɛsɛ eto ǝsǝ, ku bofokanɔ eto ǝsǝ bidinko mi bǝtsyuǝ etiki. Nya bifi atɛsɛ eto ǝsǝ ku ǝsǝ minimini bɛtɛsǝ Bonamute lǝ mi akɔɛsi.

english_verse: Always use the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to thank God the Father for everything. Wives and Husbands
translation_verse: Bɛsɔ Boanto Onanto ani lefe saa lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto diye ǝsuǝ. Usǝ Ku Usiǝ Eto Nkpesiǝsiǝ

english_verse: Honor Christ and put others first.
translation_verse: Bebokosǝ mi ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ bǝtsyuǝ fe kase biebu Kristo seka.

english_verse: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
translation_verse: Besio bokosǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bǝtǝ mǝ kosate eto bǝsǝ fe kase baabokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ kǝtǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ.

english_verse: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
translation_verse: Itsyise usǝ ni disi utǝ usiǝ fe kase bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa eto disi ni Kristo. Ditsyukpa nǝmǝ ni Kristo eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ nya Kristo kosate ǝmǝ ni se Ofomfokǝtǝ.

english_verse: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
translation_verse: Bǝsǝ, bela mi bǝsiǝ fe kase Kristo léla bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ nya úfi wǝ nkpǝ útǝ lǝ ni disi seka.

english_verse: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
translation_verse: Úyifo nyamfo lǝ ufi uyifo bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ kɛnkɛ utǝ Onanto lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe úflǝ ni ku wǝ ditiki fe ntu ókpasǝ.

english_verse: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
translation_verse: Mmǝ ke ele bǝ bǝsǝ la mǝ bǝsiǝ fe kase baala mǝ kosate eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ nɛ. Nya osani wǝ laala wǝ usiǝǝ, wǝ kosate ɔnlɛ bola.

english_verse: None of us hate our own bodies. We provide for them and take good care of them, just as Christ does for the church,
translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ saa eenyifo wǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ disiale. Bomuu, waalɛ se ola bǝ lǝ sɛkɛ ale, fe kase Kristo leeyifo kǝtǝ mba bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ.

english_verse: because we are each part of his body.
translation_verse: Itsyise wǝ ǝsuǝ eto lekpa buni butǝ wǝ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
translation_verse: Fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ nyamfo eso osani du lǝ wǝ anto ku ambe ɔflɔ usu ɔkɔ ku wǝ usiǝ nya mǝ inuǝ bamǝ loofiani ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ sɔni.”

english_verse: This is a great mystery, but I understand it to mean Christ and his church.
translation_verse: Kasɔnɔnɔ ka letsyoo, abiɔ kakpe lǝ ditiki nǝmfo kǝmiǝ. Mɔ éfi nnya fe Kristo ku bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa ǝsuǝǝ, banlɛ etiki budi ketsyiko.

english_verse: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ɛlɛ etiki budi ketsyiko lǝ fintsya ǝsuǝ. Nya ni bǝ, ele bǝ mi utsyuǝ saa la wǝ usiǝ fe wǝ ǝsuǝ, nya usiǝ saa tsya lǝ ubu wǝ usǝ.

english_verse: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
translation_verse: Mi bebii, bitsyue mi antomǝ ku ambemǝ koto fe kase ɛnyɛ lɛ Kristo eto kusu ǝsuǝ itsyise nnya ni lesa nǝ lɛtsyɛ bǝ biyifo nɛ.

english_verse: and you will have a long and happy life.”
translation_verse: Isukosǝ ɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bǝ lǝ ɛlɛkɛko fǝ lǝ ǝsiǝ nkpǝ kǝntsyɛ lǝ kasɔ kamfo ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. Raise them properly. Teach them and instruct them about the Lord. Slaves and Masters
translation_verse: Antomǝǝ, biankpe mi bebi lɛblɔfi. Bomuu, bikulɛsǝ mǝ lǝ binǝ mǝ ku kɔlɛlɛlɛ ɛyɛ lǝ Bonamute eto bofokanɔ eto kusu ǝsuǝ. Ele Bǝ Bisiǝ Nkpe Kukɔnɔ Ku Mi Banamute.

english_verse: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
translation_verse: Ndomufɔ, mimba leeyifo betidi bamba eto nyifoo, bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ lǝ bitsyue mi kasɔ mfo eto banamute koto itsyi taa mi ketu kǝmiǝ fe kase bietsyue Kristo eto ditiki koto.

english_verse: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Bienyifo nko lǝ lefe nǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi ntǝkǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ batɛsǝ mi eso bomuu, bifi mi ǝsuǝale kenke biyifo lesa nǝ Onanto laala, fe Kristo eto ndomufɔ.

english_verse: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
translation_verse: Bilǝkǝ kafo faa biyifo keyifo fe Bonamute ǝmǝ bɛnlɛ ke buyifo kǝtǝ seka, nya inni utidinini saa.

english_verse: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
translation_verse: Bekloma biǝ Bonamute ebofo utsyuǝ saa kayo, ndomunyǝ feni o-o, nwǝ nsi wǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ feni o-o ɛyɛ lǝ keyifo sɛɛ ka feeyifo kumǝ.

english_verse: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
translation_verse: Banamute, mi tsya yifo nkomǝ ke bitǝ mi ndomufɔ. Biankpe mǝ sikpi, itsyise biyi biǝ nwǝ ni mi ku mǝ Onamute ǝmǝ kpe kato. Waambe utidi eto ǝnǝmi lǝ etiki bola kǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ. Bifi Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ Eto Bemake Bikakpɔ Lema.

english_verse: Finally, let the mighty strength of the Lord make you strong.
translation_verse: Lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, kase biyifo bani ku Bonamute, lǝ isi ɛkɛ ale beso ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale kplɛ nyamǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Put on all the armor that God gives, so you can defend yourself against the devil's tricks.
translation_verse: Bekpe mi bemake kenke bia Onanto dítǝ mi bǝ lǝ befo buńyǝ kekleke lǝ Obonsam eto awɛsu bua nyamǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We are not fighting against humans. We are fighting against forces and authorities and against rulers of darkness and powers in the spiritual world.
translation_verse: Itsyise inni bo kuu betidi nlɛ bɔkpɔ. Bomu bo ku awɔnɔ bua eto ǝsuǝale, lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale eto baka, kawunsiǝ tuu kamfo eto ǝsuǝale eto baka, ku asa buayifoyifo eto baka ba nkpe kato eto ǝsuǝale bɔnlɛ bɔkpɔnko.

english_verse: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, bifi Onanto eto bemake kenke bekpe. Bǝ lǝ diyi bua nǝmǝ ǝbǝ ditu mii, biofo buńyǝ kekleke kakpɔ lema nǝmǝ isu kalosǝkɔ, nya lǝ ǝsuǝale lǝ isi ibu ɛkɛ mi lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Be ready! Let the truth be like a belt around your waist, and let God's justice protect you like armor.
translation_verse: Nyaso bińyǝ kekleke! Bifi ɔnukualɛ eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bekle nkɛ fe abɔsu lǝ bifi kasɛyifoyifo biti fe akɔɛsibi eto situ eto etisa.

english_verse: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
translation_verse: Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ lǝǝnǝ diyuǝ kabokoo eto bɔtɛyi, lǝ diyifo mi afɔkpa nya biokpe bisu lema.

english_verse: Let God's saving power be like a helmet, and for a sword use God's message that comes from the Spirit.
translation_verse: Nya bifi situ eto lemankpakpa nǝ ni Onanto eto nkpǝ bofokǝtǝ biti lǝ disi ku Onanto eto ditiki nǝ ni kalande nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ dítǝ mi bɛlɛ kekleke lǝ kɔni.

english_verse: Never stop praying, especially for others. Always pray by the power of the Spirit. Stay alert and keep praying for God's people.
translation_verse: Bikato ola lefe saa kǝtǝ Onanto. Bɛtɔ Onanto eto bɔwunsǝko kekleke fe kase Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ loote. Lǝ nyamfo esoo, bińyǝ bikabe kusu, nya yaanlo mi ani. Bikato ola lefe saa lǝ mba lefiani Onanto eto betidi kenke eto disi.

english_verse: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo eso mini ɔtɔnkpe wǝ béti bákpe lǝ diyo mfo nɛ. Beto ola bǝ lǝ mfo ni bɔtɛyi ku unnyǝ fe kase ele bǝ ntɛyi ni. Bɔlɛ Mi Bokla.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
translation_verse: Boanto Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo lǝ bǝtǝ mi bafokanɔfɔ kenke, diyuǝ ku lelabi ku bofokanɔ.

english_verse: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Onanto eto lefonǝ lǝ ditǝkǝko betidi ba kenke laala Bonamute Yesu Kristo ku lelabi manlo.

english_verse: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, ku Timoteo ba ni Kristo Yesu eto beyifoyifo lɛwɔni kukue komfo. Bufi bɔnlɛ kǝtǝ mi Onanto eto bafokanɔfɔ kenke ba nkpe lǝ Filipi nya biyifo bani ku Kristo Yesu, ɛwunsǝ lǝ mi batɔnkotɔnko ku mi bawunsǝkotsyuǝ tsya.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul's Prayer for the Church in Philippi
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ bɔtɔ boǝ Boanto Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto lefonǝ ku diyuǝ lǝ disiǝko mi. Paulo Áto Ola Lǝ Bafokanɔfɔ Ba Nkpe Lǝ Filipi Eto Disi.

english_verse: Every time I think of you, I thank my God.
translation_verse: Lefe saa nǝ ke minkloma mii, maasɔ mɔ Onanto ani lǝ mi disi

english_verse: And whenever I mention you in my prayers, it makes me happy.
translation_verse: Nya lefe saa nǝ ke minlɛ ola boto lǝ mimblɛ kenke eto disii, maato wǝ ku disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: This is because you have taken part with me in spreading the good news from the first day you heard about it.
translation_verse: Itsyi lǝ kase bɛwunsǝko mɛ lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto keyifo ǝsuǝ idu lǝ kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ibǝ ese mɔmɔ eso.

english_verse: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
translation_verse: Mfo nnɔ miǝ Onanto wǝ dítsyiko keyifo sɛɛ kamfo kasɔ lǝ mi ntii, ebusukosǝ ke isu ese kalosǝkɔ lǝ Kristo Yesu eto dibǝfe nǝmǝ.

english_verse: You have a special place in my heart. So it is only natural for me to feel the way I do. All of you have helped in the work God has given me, as I defend the good news and tell about it here in jail.
translation_verse: Bekpe mɛ lǝ nsusu lefe saa nya ɛlɛkɛ itǝ bǝ nkebu disi ketsyiko lǝ mimblɛ ǝsuǝ nko. Itsyise mimblɛ efi kǝtsyuǝ lǝ kusu ko Onanto dítǝ mɛ, mɔmɔ ǝmǝ minlabe lǝ diyo ku lǝ lefe nǝ mísiǝ lǝ mɔ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ nta Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ disi bǝ lǝ betidi lǝ bafo ni banɔ bǝńyǝ kekleke.

english_verse: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
translation_verse: Onanto ni mɔ odansiɛ nkǝ sitinti minlɛ bɔtɛyi minkǝ lelabi nǝ eto okle nkpe lǝ Kristo Yesu ǝsuǝ útɛ boo, ni okle minfi minlɛ mi butǝ nɛ.

english_verse: I pray that your love will keep on growing and you will fully know and understand
translation_verse: Nlɛ ola boto miǝ mi lelabi nǝ nkpe mii, lǝ disi lebe kato lekpe leso, lǝ befo ditiki nǝmǝ kasɔ bɔnɔ kala kǝlǝkǝ kukɔnɔ kǝtǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: how to make the right choices. Then you will still be pure and innocent when Christ returns. And until that day,
translation_verse: Nyamfo luutǝ befo lesa sɛɛ bulǝkǝ kǝtǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ Kristo eto diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, biuyifo basɛɛ ba ǝsuǝ dikpilolo saa lǝmbɔkɛ.

english_verse: Jesus Christ will keep you busy doing good deeds that bring glory and praise to God. What Life Means to Paul
translation_verse: Ɛwunsǝ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, bǝ lǝ kasɛyifoyifo ka eto okle Yesu Kristo hã lǝǝtǝ utidi leeyifoo, lǝ keyi mi ǝsuǝ, bǝ lǝ befi babesɛ Onanto kato, bǝtǝ wǝ dibu ku atɛsǝ. Utidi Wǝ Leeyifo Yesu Eto Keyifo, Ebunyǝ Nkpe.

english_verse: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, nla miǝ bete sitinti miǝ asa nnya dítu mɛɛ, ǝbǝ ɛwunsǝ bǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nemǝ ǝbǝ dínyǝ sɛtɔsusu bomu.

english_verse: The Roman guards and all the others know I am here in jail because I serve Christ.
translation_verse: Itǝ nyasoo, bamamanyǝ ba kenke nkpe lǝ lekayo mfo ku betidi bamba kpǝ ba kenke nkpe lǝ lekayo mfo ǝnyǝ bǝtsyuǝ lekpo bǝ bákpe mɛ lǝ diyo itsyise nyifo Kristo eto uyifoyifo eso.

english_verse: Now most of the Lord's followers have become brave and are fearlessly telling the message.
translation_verse: Ɛwunsɛ ku nyamfoo, mɔ bokpe lǝ diyo esi itǝ bafokanɔfɔ kpǝ esi bakpe utu bawunsǝ lǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ itǝ bensiate sikpi lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ budi ku ute.

english_verse: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
translation_verse: Lǝ sitintii, mǝ nti betidi eto bǝtsyuǝ aayɛ lǝ kutsyuǝsɛ kpɔkpɔ ǝsuǝ kedi Kristo eto ditiki nǝmǝ kate, nya baala bǝ baatanko mɛ lǝ ni bɔtɛyi ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ bǝtsyuǝ eeyifo nnya ku nsusu sɛɛ.

english_verse: They love Christ and know I am here to defend the good news about him.
translation_verse: Lelabi dítǝ betidi eto lekpa nuǝfǝ nǝmfo bǝ babe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya mmǝ, itsyise beyi bǝnkǝ bokpe Onanto lékpe mɛ nke nta Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ disi.

english_verse: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi eto lekpa tutɛ ábe Kristo letsya lǝ kusu ko ǝmǝ boonyǝ kutǝkǝ kǝtǝ mǝ suǝ eso, nya inni lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝ, bomu bǝ lǝ beyifo nko lǝ kanyi ka minlɛ bunyǝ lǝ diyo nǝmǝ kafo lǝ kabe kato kaso.

english_verse: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nyamfo menyifo kulesa. Nya ni bǝ utsyuǝ abe Kristo letsya lǝ sidia, sidia ǝsuǝ o-o, lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝ o-o, mɔ alɛɛ, bǝ bábe Kristo letsyaa, nnya mate aakpe mɛ disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
translation_verse: Nya muusukosǝ disuǝyuǝ nǝmǝ bunyǝ itsyise nyi miǝ ɛyɛ lǝ mi olatoto ǝsuǝ ku lǝ bɔwunsǝko bo laabɔ ketsyi lǝ Yesu Kristo eto Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝǝ, boolǝkǝ mɛ lǝ diyo.

english_verse: I honestly expect and hope I will never do anything to be ashamed of. Whether I live or die, I always want to be as brave as I am now and bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Nnya ǝsuǝ mimfi ǝnǝ mintǝkǝ ku minlɛ kusu bobe kekleke ni bǝ medi kofani lǝ mɔ keyifo ǝsuǝ. Bomu bǝ lefe saa, ku lǝ titlu mɔmɔɔ, lǝ nkpe nkɛale ku mɔ ǝsuǝale kenke, bǝ muunǝ dibu mboko Kristo, lǝ nkpe nkpǝ o-o nye lǝ bukpǝ mínkpe tsya.

english_verse: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
translation_verse: Nya be ni nkpǝ? Lǝ mɔ kutsyǝǝ, nnya ni bǝ lǝ nsi nkpǝ ntǝ Kristo. Nya lǝ nkpee, nnya bomu luusi yooboko mɛ kutǝkǝ eso nɛ.

english_verse: I don't know what to choose. I could keep on living and doing something useful.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ete minsi muusiǝ nkpǝǝ, eni muuyifo keyifo ka luubǝ kutǝkǝ. Fɛɛ mante nnya ele bǝ mfi lenti, ukpǝ lee nkpǝ.

english_verse: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
translation_verse: Mɔ nsusu áma lǝ akpa ǝsuǝ. Eni moola tinti miǝ maabɔ lǝ nkpǝ bomfo nsu nsiǝ lǝ Kristo ɔflɔ, itsyise nyamfo alɛkɛ eso famfamfamfa.

english_verse: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
translation_verse: Se mimfo nyamfo minɔ nko esoo, nyi miǝ muusiǝ lǝ mimblɛ kenke ɔflɔ nsukosǝ nyifo bo kenke minlɛ buyifo bǝ lǝ busu sɛtɔ, lǝ bunyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ Kristo bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
translation_verse: Nyamfo luutǝ bǝ lǝ mbǝ mi ɔflɔ bioo, biunyǝ kusu bebesǝ ǝsuǝ kato ɛyɛ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ bǝ biyifo bani ku Kristo Yesu eso.

english_verse: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ lefé mɔmɔ ni bǝnkǝ bisiǝ nkpǝ bo dinyǝnko mba léfo Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bánɔ. Itǝ bǝ lǝ mbǝ mi ɔflɔ o-o, mǝmbǝ o-o, lǝ nnɔ ntsyiko lǝ mi ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ bińyǝ kekleke lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ku nsusu ǝsuǝ nya bińyǝ kɛnyɛkani lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ bɛnlɛ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ disi bota.

english_verse: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
translation_verse: Biante mi balo sikpi. Bomu bińyǝ ku utu kekleke. Nyamfo loote mǝ bǝ mǝ ebonya bedufǝǝ kasɔ nya mi ebutǝkǝ mǝ kato, itsyise Onanto nwǝ nlɛ bɔkpɔ kǝtǝ mi, ebutǝ bitǝkǝ kato.

english_verse: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
translation_verse: Itsyise bǝtǝ mi kusu bǝ bisumu Kristo inni bǝ lǝ befo wǝ bɛnɔ ete eso, bomu bǝ lǝ binyǝ kanyi tsya lǝ wǝ disi eso.

english_verse: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, bɛkpɔnko mɛ lema nǝmǝ. Lema nǝmǝ bínyǝ míkakpɔ kɔ ǝmǝ ete nɛ. Nya fe kase bɛɛnɔ, ni ǝmǝ ke ete minsi minlɛ bɔkpɔ nɛ.

english_verse: Christ encourages you, and his love comforts you. God's Spirit unites you, and you are concerned for others.
translation_verse: Mfo nnɔ miǝ mi nkpǝ bo benkpe lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, ǝtǝ bínyǝ ǝsuǝale. Nya wǝ lelabi lǝǝyuǝsǝ mi ketu. Biyifo bani ku wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ, nya bɛnlɛ mi ǝsuǝ wɔkɔkɔkɔɔkɔ lǝ kafoɛkpɛ ku kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ bitǝ bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
translation_verse: Nnya lǝ nko ini sitintii, nyalɛ muukǝnko mi miǝ bitǝ lǝ nyǝ disuǝyuǝ bǝ nsusu bɔni ku lelabi lǝ lɛkɛ bo nya lǝ biyifo lɔni lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ku disibubu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Don't be jealous or proud, but be humble and consider others more important than yourselves.
translation_verse: Bienyifo kulesa nǝ lete mɔ mate hã eto lɛlɛkɛsǝ nye ǝsuǝ katobǝsǝbesǝ eto ditsyǝbi. Bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ, nya bibu betidi bamba fe balɛkɛ baso mi.

english_verse: Care about them as much as you care about yourselves
translation_verse: Nya bɛbɛbɛ betidi bamba eto kasɛɛ, inni fǝ mate eto lɛlɛkɛsɛ ete.

english_verse: and think the same way that Christ Jesus thought:
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ nsusu bo lɛkɛ Kristo Yesu, lǝ bɔkɛ mi tsya.

english_verse: Christ was truly God. But he did not try to remain equal with God.
translation_verse: Nnya ni bǝ ite bǝ okpe Onanto eto ditsyebi tsyaa, wóemfi nnya lǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ nkǝ lǝ okate ku Onanto.

english_verse: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
translation_verse: Bomu lǝ wǝ kosate eto lelabi ǝsuǝǝ, úfi lesa saa nǝ nte wǝ útǝ kafo faa, nya úyifo wǝ ǝsuǝ usumutidi. Nya úbǝ bále fe kawunsiǝ kamfo eto utidi.

english_verse: Christ was humble. He obeyed God and even died on a cross.
translation_verse: Utidi eto ditsyǝbi lɛkɛ wǝ nya óbokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ nya ɔ́yɛ lǝ kototsyuetsyue eto kusu ǝsuǝ úsu taa ukpǝ kǝmiǝ, ukpǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo esoo, Onanto ábesǝ wǝ kato ka nso kenke, nya úfi diye nǝ nso bɔmɔ kaso diye saa útǝkǝ wǝ.

english_verse: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bakpadi Yesu eto diyee, ele bǝ asayifoyifo nnya kenke nkpe kato ku kasɔ ku nnya nkpe lǝ kasɔnti se akonki bǝtǝ wǝ.

english_verse: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
translation_verse: Nya mǝmblɛ luufe kɛnyɛ batɛyi bǝ Yesu Kristo ni Bonamute, bǝ lǝ befi batɛsǝ Onanto wǝ ni Boanto. Biyǝnde Fe Befandebi Lǝ Kawunsiǝ Kamfo.

english_verse: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, fe kase bietsyue mɛ koto lefe saa, ite bǝ mimbǝ lǝ mi ɔflɔ mɔmɔ tsyaa kulaa, isi efe bǝ bitsyuǝ koto beso. Bekplatsya kekleke lǝ bifi sikpitete ku ketinkǝ biyifo keyifo ka diyǝnko mi bulǝkǝ.

english_verse: God is working in you to make you willing and able to obey him.
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto lɛ keyifo lǝ mi ǝsuǝ lefe saa nkǝ lǝ yuutǝ bɛtɔnɔ bitsyue asa nnya útsyue utsyǝ koto.

english_verse: Do everything without grumbling or arguing.
translation_verse: Biankpe kǝnǝ nye beto taflatsyǝ lǝ kulesa buyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
translation_verse: Itǝ bǝ lǝ kawunsuǝ biabia ka diyi ku abuayifoyifo mfoo, mii, biyifo Onanto eto bebi ba lekpa nya beele ku dikpilolo saa lǝmbǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ. Lǝ biyǝnde lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi eto nti fe kase befandebi lǝǝyǝnde lǝ kato seka.

english_verse: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
translation_verse: Befo ditiki nǝ lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ nǝmǝ bɛlɛ kekleke, bǝ lǝ Kristo eto diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, moofo lɛkɔɛsi bɔsɔ katɛyi minkǝ méntsyetsyi bimba nye ményifo keyifo bimba.

english_verse: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
translation_verse: Mi bofokanɔ lǝ Bonamute ǝsuǝ ku mi keyifoyifoyifo te fenkǝ keditǝtǝ kǝtǝ wǝ. Eni mɔ kɔtɔ bokpo lǝ kasɔ ekɔko keditǝtǝ kamfo. Nya lǝ ibǝ nkoo, yɔɔkɛ mɛ ɔkɔɛ nya muunyǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti ku mi mblɛ.

english_verse: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
translation_verse: Nko ke ini nɛ bǝ mi tsya nyǝ disuǝyuǝ beto keyudu ku mɛ nɛ! Timoteo Ku Epafrodito.

english_verse: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
translation_verse: Lǝ Bonamte atɔnɔɔ, yɛmbɔklɛ, mootsyese Timoteo mi ɔflɔ, bǝ lǝ usinkli ubǝ ɔtɛyi mɛ kase asa nte lǝ mi ɔflɔ, lǝ nsi nyǝ disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
translation_verse: Lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝǝ, mimbǝ kuutsyuǝ saa wǝ leefi kǝtsyuǝ lǝ mɔ ku mi etiki ǝsuǝ fe wǝ.

english_verse: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Nya bafɛfɛɛ, utsyuǝ saa lɛ wǝ lɛlɛkǝsǝ ete bobe, nya inni nnya ni Yesu Kristo eto kusu eto ale.

english_verse: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mi kosate yi biǝ Timoteo alɛɛ, ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ uni utǝ mɛ, kase wǝǝkǝnko mɛ lǝ keyifo kamǝ ǝsuǝ fe ubi ku anto itǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto busǝnsǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ kusu bobe miǝ, lǝ nyǝ kase asa nyamǝ luubǝ itsyǝ ku mɛ koo, mootsyese wǝ mi ɔflɔ mlǝ.

english_verse: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
translation_verse: Nya mfo nnɔ tsya miǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ kosate ebutǝ mɛ kusu nkǝ mbǝ mi ɔflɔ lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
translation_verse: Mbu tsya miǝ ele bǝ ntsyese bo ɔyimi Epafrodito mi ɔflɔ, wǝ díńyǝko mɛ kekleke lǝ Onanto eto keyifo ǝsuǝ. Wǝ ni mi ɔtɔyɛ wǝ bétsyese mɔ ɔflɔ biǝ ubǝ ɔwunsǝko mɛ.

english_verse: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
translation_verse: Se unyi nkǝ bɛnɔ biǝ ǝsuǝ abia wǝ esoo, ílǝ wǝ tinti nya óla kekleke nkǝ wǝǝbǝ unyǝ mimblɛ.

english_verse: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
translation_verse: Lǝ sitintii, ɔ́nɔ bufi kekleke ibu sɛkɛ lǝ ukpǝ. Fɛɛ Onanto ǝnyǝ wǝ kaminsǝ, nya inni wǝ mate bomu ku mɔ tã. Lenni nko eni mɔ kanyinyǝnyǝ eto bitsyikǝ eboso mɛ ani ku butsyi.

english_verse: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
translation_verse: Nyamfo kulaa eso minla miǝ matsyese wǝ mi ɔflɔ lǝ binyǝ wǝ, lǝ binyǝnko wǝ disuǝnyǝ, nya mintsya loola nwɔnɔ mɔ utu siǝ kasɔ sɛkɛ.

english_verse: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
translation_verse: Nyaso befo wǝ ani ǝnuǝ, binyǝko wǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ Bonamute eto diye ǝsuǝ. Bitǝ betidi bamfo eto okle dibu.

english_verse: He almost died working for Christ, and he risked his own life to do for me what you could not.
translation_verse: Itsyise ufi wǝ ǝsuǝ utǝ nya untǝ kpǝ lǝ Kristo eto keyifo ka nkǝ woawunsǝko mɛ lǝ nyifo ka biamfo mǝ bɔwunsǝko nyifo eso.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
translation_verse: Kafɛfɛkɔɔ, mɔ bayimi, binyǝ disuǝyuǝ bǝ biyifo bani ku Bonamute. Yenlǝ mɛ bǝ nsi nwɔni asa nyamfo ke ntsyese mi, itsyise nyamfo luutǝ buinyǝ kekleke nɛ.

english_verse: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
translation_verse: Bɛlɛ ola bińyǝ bikabe babuayifo bamfó ba leeyifo asa fe bakpa, betidi ba lǝǝńyǝ kekleke bǝ bala ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ, ini lelolala.

english_verse: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
translation_verse: Bo ni mba léfo lelolala eto lekpa inni mǝ, itsyise boesumu Onanto ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ nya boǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ se buyifo bani ku Kristo Yesu eso. Nya boemfi ǝsuǝ butǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ bola eto lekpayifoyifo.

english_verse: although I could. Others may brag about themselves, but I have more reason to brag than anyone else.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utsyuǝ ebu nkǝ woofo ǝsuǝ bufi kǝtǝ lelolala eto lekpa buyifoo, eni mɔ bomu ele bǝ mfo ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto lekpayifoyifo eto asa ntǝ ǝsuǝ nso.

english_verse: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Mɔɔ, se bále mɛ eto diyi flamfla lee, nnya bála mɛ lelo nɛ, Israelnyǝ tinti mini nya mbɔ ntsyi lǝ Benyamin eto kafo. Hebrinyǝ kosate kosate wǝ eto anto ni Hebrinyǝ tinti wǝ mini nɛ. Nya lǝ Yudafɔ eto kɔfi ǝsuǝǝ, nyifo Farisinyǝ.

english_verse: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ kǝtsyuǝfifi lǝ Yudanyǝdidi ǝsuǝǝ, nyifo lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ kekleke itǝ bǝ ntǝkǝko Kristo eto bafokanɔfɔ kama nte mǝ ohiã tinti. Nya lǝ bɔyɛ lǝ Yudafɔ eto kɔfi ǝsuǝǝ, dikpilolo saa ǝmbɔkǝ lǝ mɛ itsyise, nyifo lǝ ko ǝsuǝ tinti.

english_verse: But Christ has shown me that what I once thought was valuable is worthless.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ kutǝkǝ kutsyuǝ akɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ itǝ mɛ kɔ ǝmǝ tsyaa, mɔmɔɔ, lǝ Kristo esoo, efiani asa bimba nnya lǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ saa itǝ mɛ.

english_verse: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
translation_verse: lǝ mfi mɔ ǝsuǝ kenke ntǝ wǝ. Nyasoo, minsini ɔsɛɛ itǝ mɔ ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ asayifoyifo lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ lǝ kɔfi komǝ kalɔ. Kasɛɛ ka ni lǝ Kristo bofo kanɔ ǝsuǝ hã moofo buyifo. Kasɛɛ ka Onanto hã lǝǝtǝ ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
translation_verse: Nya lesa nǝ minla ni bǝ lǝ nte Kristo ku ǝsuǝale nnya dítǝ ótakasǝ wǝ utsyi ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ. Nya lǝ nnyǝ kanyi ku wǝ, lǝ nyifo lɔni ku wǝ lǝ wǝ ukpǝ ǝsuǝ,

english_verse: so that somehow I also may be raised to life. Running toward the Goal
translation_verse: ku kusubebe bǝ Onanto ebotakasǝ mintsya utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ oboko nkpǝ. Paulo Átɛyi Kase Ele Bǝ Uyifo Bǝ Lǝ Unyǝ Kayofofo.

english_verse: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
translation_verse: Minlɛ bɔtɛyi minkɛ mbutǝkǝ kato nye mbɔflɔ nlo. Bomu nlɛ bokplatsya kekleke bǝ lǝ mfo kayofofo ka Kristo Yesu luufi utǝ mɛ. Itsyise Kristo Yesu éyifo mɛ nkǝ mfiani wǝ ole.

english_verse: My friends, I don't feel I have already arrived. But I forget what is behind, and I struggle for what is ahead.
translation_verse: Lǝ sitintii, mɔ bayimi lala, mamfo nnɔ miǝ mɔ kɔni éboka kayofofo kamǝ. Bomu lesa nǝ minlɛ bokplatsya lǝ nyifo ni lǝ nta nnya díkafe ǝsuǝ le mfi ǝnǝmi ntǝkǝ lǝ nnya nte sɛtɔ eto kɔniboka ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Nyaso meetsyetsyi bebembe bǝ lǝ nsu nsa usunklu ǝmǝ nyila, bǝ lǝ mfo kayofofo ka Onanto lékpadi mɛ nkǝ mbǝ mfo lǝ kato ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo Yesu eso.

english_verse: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ nsusu bomfo lǝ bɔkɛ bomba díkabe lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ. Nya lǝ mi utsyuǝ kpe nsusu bamba ntsyuǝ, Onanto ebulǝkǝ nyamfo ote mi ekpa wuee.

english_verse: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
translation_verse: Niǝ, niǝ, nniǝǝ, bitǝ lǝ bɔyɛ busu sɛtɔ lǝ kusu ko ǝsuǝ búkayɛ ibǝ ese mɔmɔ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, bebe mɔ eyifobi ǝsuǝ bɛyɛ. Bɛlɛ ola bebe mba nsi nkpǝ lǝ ditsyǝbi sɛɛ ǝsuǝ fe kase búsiǝ bote mi seka.

english_verse: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
translation_verse: Mbɔtɛyi mi nyamfo sesia, sesia mfe nya mɔmɔɔ, nsi nlɛ mi nnya bɔtɛyi ku binǝntu miǝ bǝtsyuǝ kpǝ eto nkpǝ bo bensi ǝtǝ beyifo balo itǝ Kristo eto ukpǝ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
translation_verse: Betidi bamfo eebudufɛ lǝ kanyimanlo manlo eto ute ǝsuǝ. Itsyise mǝ kafo ni mǝ onanto. Nnya ni afanisaa, nnya ǝsuǝ bomu bǝǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ nya befi mǝ nsusu bǝtǝkǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto bikǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
translation_verse: Fɛ, bo alɛɛ, bo umǝ ni kato nya buńyǝ bɔnlɛ bo Ofomfokǝtǝ wǝ ni Bonamute Yesu Kristo kusu bobe bǝ lǝ utsyi kato ubǝ.

english_verse: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bayimi lala ba lefe bitǝ mɛ, ba minla miǝ mǝǝkǝnyǝ. Biakpe mɛ disuǝyuǝ tinti nya maasɔ lɛkɔɛsi kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ mi disi. Mɔ bayimi lala, nko ele bǝ bińyǝ kekleke lǝ mi nkpǝ lǝ Bonamute ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Nlɛ Ewodia ku Sinteke lekpakpa miǝ bɛnɔ bǝtsyuǝ kasɔ lǝ besinkli bisiǝ fe bayimisio lǝ Bonamute eso.

english_verse: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
translation_verse: Nya mi tsya ba ni mɔ beyifotsyuǝ lalaa, nla miǝ bɛwunsǝko besio bamfo. Itsyise béyifo keyifo kekleke báwunsǝko mɛ bǝ lǝ busǝnsǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ku Klemens ku mɔ beyifotsyuǝ bamba kenke ba eto aye nkpe lǝ Onanto eto Nkpǝ eto Kukue kafo.

english_verse: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
translation_verse: Binyǝ disuǝyuǝ lefe saa bǝ biyifo bani ku Bonamute ǝmǝ. Nsi nlɛ bɔtɛyi bio miǝ binyǝ disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
translation_verse: Bɛkɛ disuǝtsyǝ bitǝ utsyuǝ saa. Itsyise Bonamute ǝmǝ eto dibǝfe ebɔfi.

english_verse: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
translation_verse: Biǝnsiǝ bikala kawɔnɔ lǝ kulesa ǝsuǝ, bomu bikato ola bikǝtǝ Onanto lǝ lesa saa nǝ lehiã mi ǝsuǝ, bikasɔ wǝ ani itsyi taa mi ketu kǝmiǝ ke.

english_verse: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
translation_verse: Nya Onanto eto diyuǝ nǝ nso kawunsiǝ eto utidi eto kasɔnɔnɔ saa, lǝ lɛlɔ mi ketu ku nsusu ditsyǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku Kristo Yesu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Finally, my friends, keep your minds on whatever is true, pure, right, holy, friendly, and proper. Don't ever stop thinking about what is truly worthwhile and worthy of praise.
translation_verse: Lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, mɔ bayimi, bitǝ lǝ lesa nǝ nso kɔnɔ ku nnya dińyǝ itǝ atɛsǝ lǝ iyi mi nsusu kǝmiǝ, nyamfo ni lesa nǝ ni ɔnukualɛ, lesa saa nǝ dińyǝ itǝ dibu, lesa saa nǝ ni lɛsɛɛ, lesa saa nǝ lekpa, lesa saa nǝ laanɔ bobe ku lesa sa nǝ dinyǝnko utidi nɛ.

english_verse: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
translation_verse: Bisiǝ nkpǝ lǝ lǝsanǝ békase ku béfo bitsyiko mɔ ɔflɔ, itsyi lǝ mɔ etikididi ku mɔ eyifosa tã ǝsuǝ. Nya lǝ Onanto wǝ lǝǝtǝ diyuǝ lǝ usiǝko mi. Paulo Ásɔ Filipifɔ Ani Lǝ Ǝtǝsa Nya Bǝtǝ Wǝ Eso.

english_verse: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
translation_verse: Lǝ mɔ lɔniyifoyifo ku Bonamute ǝsuǝǝ, iyifo mɛ disuǝyuǝ tinti bǝ lǝ lefe kɛntsyɛ kamaa bisi bɛlɛ bulǝkǝ kate mɛ biǝ bifi kǝtsyuǝ lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ. Inni bɔtɛyi minlɛ miǝ bɛni mɛ lǝ lefe nǝmǝ, bomu kusu ete yǝntǝ bǝ bilǝkǝ bete nko.

english_verse: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
translation_verse: Nya inni bɔtɛyi minlɛ miǝ lesaatsyuǝ ahiã mɛ, bomu mbókase lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ ku lǝ kalebe saa miǝ lesa nǝ kee nte mɛɛ, dufǝ mɛ ǝnǝ.

english_verse: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
translation_verse: Nya lesa nǝ ini bǝ lesa hiã fǝ ku lesa nǝ ini bǝ, lǝsa tsyǝ fǝ eso kase fahiãa, mbokase kobe komfo. Itǝ bǝ lǝ kalebe saa ku lefe saa nyi kase muusiǝ nkpǝ, imi mɛ o-o, kukpɛnsǝ lɛ mɛ o-o, ɛlɛkɛ itǝ mɛ. Lǝ ite mɛ kpǝ o-o nye elonko mɛ tsya.

english_verse: Christ gives me the strength to face anything.
translation_verse: Ǝsuǝale nnya Kristo ditǝ mɛɛ, nnya lǝǝtǝ maafo nyamfo kenke ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bíyifo ɛlɛkɛ tinti bǝ bɛwunsǝko mɛ lǝ mɔ bulǝ kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
translation_verse: Nya mi Filipifɔ kosate yi biǝ idu lefe nǝ míndu lǝ Makedoniaa, nya mítsyiko Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya bobe kasɔɔ, mi hã ni bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝ nlɛ mɛ bɔwunsǝko, kǝtǝ mɛ asa. Kutǝkǝ mínyǝ o-o, bɔsɔ ɛsɔ mɛ o-o, mi hã ni mba díkǝnko mɛ.

english_verse: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ minkɛ lǝ Tesalonika kulaa tsyaa, se mínhiã bɔwunsǝko, bɛwunsǝko mɛ lefe kpǝ.

english_verse: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
translation_verse: Nya inni ǝtǝsa minhiã itsyi mi ɔflɔ eso, bomu kutǝkǝ ko mi luunyǝ bɛyɛnko lǝ ǝtǝsa nyamfo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Béfo mɛ kayo kenke. Nya béfo mɛ kayo besonsǝ kase ele be itsyǝ. Ǝtǝsa nya kenke bétsyese mɛ bɛyɛnko lǝ Epafrodito ǝsuǝ ǝbǝ éka mɛ kɔni. Ǝtǝsa nyamfo eyifo fe keditǝtǝ eto asa nnya laanyi fifififi befi bǝtǝ Onanto nnya dídufǝ wǝ ǝnǝ nya ékpe wǝ disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
translation_verse: Nya bo Onanto kosate ebutǝ mi ǝtǝsa nnya kenke loohiã mi ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo Yesu eto setabikɛ ku diyǝnde kplɛ nǝmǝ esuǝ.

english_verse: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ bɔtɛsǝ Boanto Onanto itsyi manlo isu manlo kenke. Ibǝ itǝ. Kǝsiǝ Fɛfɛ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Mǝǝsiǝsǝ mba ni Onanto eto bebi ba ni Kristo Yesu eto bale kenke o-o. Nya bayimi ba nkpe lǝ mɔ ɔflɔ mfo tsyaa, bǝ bǝǝ siǝsǝ mi o-o!

english_verse: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
translation_verse: Betidi ba kenke léfo Onanto bánɔ nkpe mfo ǝsiǝsǝ mi kukɔnɔ, titlu mba nkpe lǝ Roma eto Okankplɛ eto diyo.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless your life!
translation_verse: Lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto lefonǝ lǝ disiǝko mi.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, wǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto ketsyue ǝsuǝ eso mimfiani Kristo Yesu eto ɔtɔnkpee, boko bo ɔyimisani Timoteo wǝ nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni.

english_verse: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
translation_verse: Bufi ko bɔlɛ bo bayimi ba nkpe lǝ Kolose ba díkafo Kristo bánɔ sitinti butǝ. Bɔlɛ Onanto wǝ ni bo Anto bɔtɔ boǝ lǝ ufi wǝ lefonǝ ku diyuǝ utǝ mi. Paulo Ásɔ Onanto Ani Lǝ Kolosefɔ Eto Disi.

english_verse: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Lefe saa lǝ bɔlɛ ola botoo, boasɔ Onanto wǝ ni Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto Anto ani lǝ mi disi.

english_verse: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
translation_verse: Itsyise bɔ́nɔ kase béfo Kristo Yesu bɛnɔ ku kase biala mi bayimitsyuǝ bafokanɔfɔ kenke.

english_verse: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ tinti nǝmǝ leka mi ɔflɔ bubǝǝ, bɛnɔ kusubebe ko nkpe lǝ ni. Yanso mi bofokanɔ ku lelabi teke lǝ lesa nǝ bɛnlɛ kusu bobe balɔ bǝtsyǝ mi lǝ Onanto eto kato ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
translation_verse: Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ lɛ bobe kakpe nya lɛnlɛ ebibi bɔnwɔ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamǝ kenke, fe kase díyifo lǝ mi tsya ǝsuǝ seka, idu lefe nǝ bɛnɔ kase Onanto lǝǝnǝ utidi kafo nya bɛnɔ ni kasɔ tututu.

english_verse: from our good friend Epaphras. He works together with us for Christ and is a faithful worker for you.
translation_verse: Bɛnɔ Onanto eto lefonǝ nǝmfo eto etiki ɛyɛ lǝ bo uyifotsyuǝ lala Epafra wǝ díyifo Kristo eto keyifo ku ɔnukualɛ lǝ bo kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
translation_verse: Wǝ díbǝ ɔ́tɛyi bo lelabi nǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ dífi útǝ mi.

english_verse: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
translation_verse: Lǝ nya esoo, idu lǝ lefe nǝ bɔ́nɔ mi kɔsɔɔ, búkato ola lefe saa lǝ mi disi katɔ Onanto boǝ, ufi wǝ bote ku lelabi eto nsusu okpe mi lǝ ǝsuǝ, ɛyɛ lǝ kobe kenke ku kasɔnɔnɔ ka Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ lǝǝtǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
translation_verse: Itǝ lǝ befo nkpǝ busiǝ fe kase Bonamute ǝmǝ laala nya lǝ bofo wǝ lelabi buyifo lefe saa. Lǝ mi nkpǝsiǝsiǝ lǝ buyi ku kasɛyifoyifo ku Onanto eto bote kakpe.

english_verse: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
translation_verse: Onanto lǝ ufi wǝ ǝsuǝale kplɛ nnya ntǝkǝ ǝsuǝale saa kato okpe mi lǝ befo buńyǝ lǝ bulǝ saa eto kɛnyɛ ku dibusǝ. Lǝ bifi disuǝnyuǝ ku lɛninsɔ bitǝ Boanto Onanto wǝ dítǝ bɔ́flɔ bofo kedikɔ bunyǝ lǝ nka ɔ́lɔ útsyuǝ wǝ betidi lǝ wǝ sekakedikɔ eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
translation_verse: Wǝ dílǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ ketuntu eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ nya ókpa bo oboko wǝ Ubi lala eto sekakedikɔ.

english_verse: Christ is exactly like God, who cannot be seen. He is the first-born Son, superior to all creation.
translation_verse: Kristo eto ditsyǝbi ǝǝlǝkǝ Onanto wǝ boǝnyǝ ku ǝnǝmi eto ditsyǝbi kate. Ɔkɛ fɛ béyifo asayifoyifo saa kenke.

english_verse: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
translation_verse: Itsyise ɛyɛ lǝ wǝǝ, nya Onanto díyifo asa nnya kenke nkpe kato ku kasɔ, nnya bǝǝnyǝ ku nnya bǝnnyǝ, ɛkɔ lǝ awɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale kenke, banamute, baka ku ǝsuǝalefɔ saa tsya eto okle. Onanto éyifo kawunsiǝ kenke ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ itǝ wǝ.

english_verse: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
translation_verse: Kristo akɛ fɛ Onanto díyifo lesa saa, nya ɛyɛ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku wǝǝ, nya lesa saa dínyǝ ni kǝńyǝnkɔ pɛpɛɛpɛ nɛ.

english_verse: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
translation_verse: Wǝ ni disi itǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ nnya ni bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ. Wǝ ni kaka diǝnyǝ ni nkpe ketsyiko. Onanto eto Ubi ǝmǝ ni ututɛ nya wǝ ni nwǝ létaka utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ, bǝ lǝ udi ututɛ lǝ asa nnya kenke nti.

english_verse: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
translation_verse: Iyifo Onanto eto lalabi nkǝ ditsyǝbi nǝ tutuutu nkpe wǝǝ, lǝ lɛkɛ wǝ ubi ǝmǝ tsya.

english_verse: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
translation_verse: Isi iyifo wǝ lelabi tsya nkǝ lǝ uyifo bani ku kawunsiǝ kenke, nnya nkpe lǝ kasɔ mfo ku nnya nkpe kato kenke. Ubi ǝmǝ eto kɔtɔ ko ókpo kasɔ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ukpǝ lǝ uyikabie esuǝǝ, ko dínǝ diyuǝ nǝmfo leboko nɛ.

english_verse: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
translation_verse: Kɔ kabia ákɛe lǝ mi ku Onanto eto nti, nya bikisi wǝ lǝ mi nsusu kǝmiǝ lǝ abua nnya biyifo eso.

english_verse: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
translation_verse: Fɛ mɔmɔɔ, úsikli ófo mi kafo faa, ɛyɛ lǝ uyikabie eto ukpǝ wǝ Ubi díkpe lǝ mi disi eso. Ɛyɛ lǝ ukpǝ ǝmfo ǝsuǝǝ, nya Onanto dísinkli ɔ́lɔ mi utsyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi fe mba bǝflǝsǝ ntu nya keni nye dikpilolo saa lǝmbǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ, lékpa kɛnkɛ seka.

english_verse: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
translation_verse: Nyaso efe tinti bǝ befo buńyǝ bɛlɛ mi bofokanɔ lǝ kɔni kekleke. Bunte kekleke lǝ bofo bunyǝ sitinti, nya boembu lǝkǝ bo nsusu butsyiko lǝ kusubebe ko Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ dinǝ léboku bo ǝsuǝ. Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo ǝsuǝ bábe letsya bǝtǝ kawunsiɛ eto asayifoyifo kenke, nnya eto uyifoyifo mɔ Paulo díbǝ ófiani. Paulo Éyifo Keyifo Fe Bafokanɔfɔ Eto Ditsyukpa Eto Uyifoyifo.

english_verse: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔ, iyifo mɛ disuǝyuǝ bǝ nlɛ kanyi bunyǝ lǝ mi disi eso. Nya kanyi ka minlɛ bunyǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ǝsuǝ mfoo, lɛ mɛ bɔwunsǝko bǝ lǝ mflɔsǝ Kristo eto kanyi útǝ nkǝ nyǝ lǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝ ni wǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto disi.

english_verse: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
translation_verse: Onanto átsyese mɛ nkǝ mfiani wǝ uyifoyifo bǝ lǝ mbe wǝ ditiki nǝmǝ letsya ntǝ mi ku betidi ba kenke lǝ banɔ kasɔ ekpa wuee.

english_verse: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
translation_verse: Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo eyifo lekulasa kɔɔ, nya úkǝlǝkǝ óte wǝ betidi.

english_verse: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
translation_verse: Onanto eto ketsyue keni bǝ lǝ ulǝkǝ akulasa nyamfo ote wǝ betidi lǝ bate, akulasa fo asi nya diyi ku atɛsɛ mfo. Nya akulasa nyamfo ni bǝ Kristo nkpe lǝ mi ketu kǝmiǝ itǝ mi tsya nkpe kedikɔ lǝ Onanto eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
translation_verse: Nya Kristo ǝmfo bɔnlɛ letsya bobe kǝtǝ utsyuǝ saa nɛ, nya lǝ kobe saa ǝsuǝ boalɛ mǝ kɔlɛ kate mǝ asa bǝ lǝ bokpa mǝ utsyuǝ saa busuko Onanto eto ǝnǝmi fe mba diyifo bani ku Kristo ba díkabe baflɔ seka.

english_verse: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto otsyekle mimlɛ kakplatsya ku ǝsuǝale nnya kenke Kristo leefi kakpe mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ nnya nlɛ keyifo lǝ mɛ nɛ.

english_verse: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
translation_verse: Nla miǝ bete lekplatsya nǝ minlɛ lǝ mi ku Laodikeafɔ ku betidi ba kenke bo ku mǝ dimantsya tɔ ǝnǝmi ku ǝnǝmi bote bǝtsyuǝ eto disi.

english_verse: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
translation_verse: Meeyifo nko bǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ ǝsuǝale lǝ mǝ ketu kǝmiǝ lǝ beyifo bani tsya ku mǝ bǝtsyuǝ lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ. Isi ensoo, itǝ kase boofo asa kasɔ bɔnɔ kukɔnɔ, bǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo Onanto eto asakulakula ǝmǝ ni Kristo. Nyamfo ni bikesinɔke bia lefo koya tinti.

english_verse: but all wisdom and knowledge are hidden away in him.
translation_verse: Kristo ni safui sia laasini Onanto eto kobe ku kobetete eto akulasafo koya nyamfo.

english_verse: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi minkɛ biǝntǝ lǝ kuutsyuǝ saa lǝ ɔwɛ mi okpe ku etiki eto kǝnǝ bimba niǝ niǝ niǝ ete fe ɔnukualɛ kpe lǝ nnya tsya.

english_verse: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
translation_verse: Itsyise ite bǝ bɛnlɛ mɛ bunyǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ǝsuǝ tsyaa, nkpe lǝ mi nti lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ, nya iyifo mɛ disuǝnyuǝ lǝ kase bɛkɔ binyǝ kekleke lǝ mi Kristo bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ eso. Utidi Eto Nkpesiǝsiǝ Bo Lɛflɔɔ, Kpe Lǝ Kristo Kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
translation_verse: Kase befo Kristo Yesu ku mi lɛkɔɛsi kenke fe mi Onamutee, biyifo bani ku wǝ nko.

english_verse: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ keyudu lǝ kǝńyǝ kedufǝkɔ katsyo lǝ wǝ, fe kuyi eto keyudu leedufe lǝ kasɔ. Beto mi nkpǝ bitǝkǝ lǝ wǝ mi bofokanɔ lǝ bumuǝ ale fe kase báte mi. Lǝ biyi ku lɛninsɔ itǝ Onanto lefe saa.

english_verse: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
translation_verse: Nyaso bebe biǝ kuutsyuǝ saa manwɛ mi uyifo mi ndomufɔ ɛyɛ lǝ betidinini eto kobetete bimba ko nyɛ lǝ akpa nya báyani bǝtsyǝ betidi ku kawunsiǝ eto awɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale eto kate ka lanyɛ lǝ Kristo eto asatete eto esu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
translation_verse: Nya se buyifo bani ku wǝ, wǝǝ ni disi itǝ awɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale saa ku awɔnɔ eto baka saa, ete bǝ bo nkpǝ tsya aflɔ lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
translation_verse: Itsyise lefe nǝ bǝflǝsǝ mi ntuu, bébikǝ mi ku Kristo, nya ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, bátakasǝ mi bǝńyǝnsǝ ku Kristo lǝ mi bofokanɔ eso, lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale nyamǝ ǝsuǝ, wǝ nwǝ ni létakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ óboko nkpǝ.

english_verse: You were dead, because you were sinful and were not God's people. But God let Christ make you alive, when he forgave all our sins.
translation_verse: Lefe ditsyuǝ nǝ léfee, bíkpe lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ lǝ mi abua nnya bíyifo eso, itsyise biedi Yudafɔ ba dímankɛ lǝ kɔfi kalɔ. Fɛ mɔmɔɔ, Onanto ébokpa mi óboko nkpǝ kǝmiǝ ku Kristo. Onanto éfi mi abua kenke ɔ́tsyɛ mi.

english_verse: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
translation_verse: Ótsya ɔfiɔ lǝ kayo ka búsiǝ ku nnya afi nnya kenke lékle bo úlǝkǝ bo lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ kenke ɔ́sɔ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ ku Kristo.

english_verse: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ uyikabie komfo ǝsuǝǝ, Kristo ǝlǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ɔ́bɔnko lǝ awɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale ku baka saa eto kalɔ nya ótsyilamako mǝ ókpe mǝ kofani nya úlǝkǝ mǝ óte fe ndomufɔ ba óso ani utǝkǝ mǝ kato.

english_verse: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
translation_verse: Nyaso biǝtǝ lǝ kuutsyuǝ saa lǝ okpe mi afi lǝ lesa nǝ biudi nye biunǝ lee biembudi nye buinǝ ǝsuǝ, nye nnya ni eyi sɛɛ lee, lǝ kofa fɔfɔ abe lee nye Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
translation_verse: Nyamfo kenke eyifo nnya nkpe kama ɛnlɛ bubǝ eto koyo ete! Nnya eto koyo bɛnlɛ bunyǝ ni Kristo kosate.

english_verse: Don't be cheated by people who make a show of acting humble and who worship angels. They brag about seeing visions. But it is all nonsense, because their minds are filled with selfish desires.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lǝ ǝnǝmi ǝnǝmi eto utidi kuutsyuǝ wǝ laatɛyi nkǝ utǝtǝ kato itsyise wǝǝnyǝ ǝnǝtǝkǝtǝkǝ eto kǝlǝkǝkate, ba laayinkǝ betidi kakpe lǝ kawɛ eto ǝsuǝ bokosǝbokosǝ kasɔ ku kato eto batɔnkpe eto bɔsumu ǝsuǝ lǝ balo mi dikpi. Asa bimba ku utidi eto nsusu lǝkǝlǝkǝ ete ini. Lǝ bitǝkǝko utidi ǝmfo eto okle eto kamaa, biemunyǝ asa nnya eto kama bɛnlɛ bɔti.

english_verse: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
translation_verse: Nwǝmfo eto okle ménsikɔ uyifo lɔni lǝ Kristo, wǝ nwǝ ni disi utǝ utidi ǝmǝ. Wǝ ǝsuǝ utidi ǝmǝ eto ǝsuǝ eto nlokɔ ku wǝ ǝmǝ eto umu kenke tsya nkpǝsǝ, wǝ ɔflɔ wǝǝnyǝ lesa sɛɛ saa, nya woabe fe kase Onanto laala. Nkpefɔfɔ Siǝsiǝ Ɛyɛ Lǝ Kristo Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
translation_verse: Se bíkpǝ ku Kristo esoo, bɛbɔ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto awɔnɔ eto ǝsuǝale kalɔ. Beso binsi biǝtǝ baakpe mi afi fe bisi bekpe lǝ kawunsiǝ kamǝ kalɔ seka?

english_verse: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
translation_verse: Asa nnya eto afi bákpe mi mfo eyifo asa nnya lǝ beyifo nnya keyifo balosǝ koo, iyifo ebimbasa nnya lensibe kutǝkǝ saa. Afi nyamfo kenke eyifo betidi eto ketsyue ku asatete ete.

english_verse: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
translation_verse: Ele fe asa nnya bátɛyi mi mfo te fe kobe kutsyuǝ kpe lǝ nnya nya iyifo fe bǝlǝkǝ nnya betsyiko lǝ Onanto eto ketsyue ka útsyue utsyǝ ǝsuǝ. Yǝǝtǝ bǝ utidi bokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ, utǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ eto sine nyǝ kanyi nnya luutǝ ola Onanto oso ku ofo ǝsuǝ bumuǝ kalɛ. Fɛɛ asa nyamfo eto okle buyifo anwunsǝko kuutsyuǝ bǝ lǝ oso wǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto alasa ani.

english_verse: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
translation_verse: Se ini botakasǝ Onanto létakase mi ku Kristo utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ óboko nkpǝ esoo, bɛti asa nnya nkpe kato kama kaka Kristo kosate nsi lǝ wǝ lekankpomɛ ǝsuǝ lǝ Onanto eto kodiani.

english_verse: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
translation_verse: Bitǝ mi nsusu lǝ butǝkǝ lǝ asa nnya nkpe kato mfó ǝsuǝ, inni lǝ asa nnya nkpe lǝ kasɔ mfo.

english_verse: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
translation_verse: Itsyise se bíkpee, mi nkpǝ efi bokpe lǝ Kristo eto nle ǝsuǝ bo lɛbiɔ bonkpe lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ tsya.

english_verse: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
translation_verse: Mi nkpǝ kosate eyifo nkpǝ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ. Nya lefe nǝ wɔɔbɔ bǝnyǝǝ, mi tsya ebɔbɔ ku wǝ nya buinyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ sekakedikɔ eto diyǝnde ǝsuǝ. Befiani Betidi Fɔfɔ.

english_verse: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
translation_verse: Nyaso belo kasɔ mfo eto asa eto nkpǝ bo nkpe lǝ mi ǝsuǝ fenkǝ asɔnɔdidi, asinasayifoyifo, ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto kamininyǝnyǝ, kǝnǝnsɛ lǝ kawunsiǝ eto bikǝ bɔkɛ ǝsuǝ sia diyifo ufiǝsumusumu.

english_verse: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo eto okle ǝǝnǝ Onanto eto lɛblɔfi kaboko mba ditidi ato lentsyue wǝ koto ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
translation_verse: Lǝ nkpǝ bo bísiǝ kɔ ǝsuǝǝ, mi tsya éyifo asa nyamfo eto kakle.

english_verse: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, ele bǝ bɛyɛ asa nyamfo kenke eto kakle buyifo nnya ni ɔblɔnyǝnyǝ, lefonyi, kabua bɔbɛbɛ kǝtǝ fǝ utsyuǝ, aka ku etikibua saa didi.

english_verse: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
translation_verse: Se bíkǝlǝkǝ mi ditsyǝbi koko nǝmǝ ku ni eyifosa lǝ mi ǝsuǝ esoo, biesitɛyi bǝtsyuǝ bidia bio.

english_verse: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
translation_verse: Bifi békpe lǝ ditsyǝbi fɔfɔ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ mɔmɔ. Nya ditsyǝbi fɔfɔ nǝmfo ni wǝ Onanto kosate eto ditsyǝbi nǝ ɔnlɛ bufi kakpe lǝ mi lefe saa, lǝ bébé bisu sɛtɔ bǝ lǝ bibǝ bete wǝ bɛwunsǝ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, kaba kǝfǝ saa ensibǝ lǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ ku mba ni Yudafɔ, mba bála alo ku mba bánla alo, bafɔ ku mba dimankpa ǝsuǝ, ndomufɔ ku mba nsi lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ nti. Mǝmblɛ kenke eyifo bani lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ, nya Kristo nkpe lǝ mǝmblɛ kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: God loves you and has chosen you as his own special people. So be gentle, kind, humble, meek, and patient.
translation_verse: Mimblɛ eyifo Onanto eto betidi, nya óla mimblɛ nya úlǝkǝ mimblɛ uyifo wǝ kosate eto bale. Lǝ nyasoo, bifi ditsyǝbi nǝ dińyǝ ditǝ nkomǝ seka bɛyɛnko ǝsuǝ. Nya ni kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ, kafoɛkpɛ, ǝsuǝ kasɔ bokosǝbokosǝ, diyuǝsǝ ku disuǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Put up with each other, and forgive anyone who does you wrong, just as Christ has forgiven you.
translation_verse: Bitsyǝsuǝ ku mi bǝtsyuǝ, lǝ bifi bɛtsyɛ bǝtsyuǝ lǝ utsyuǝ áta wǝ utsyuǝ ubu. Ele bǝ bifi bɛtsyɛ bǝtsyuǝ fe kase Bonamute dífi ɔtsyɛ mi.

english_verse: Love is more important than anything else. It is what ties everything completely together.
translation_verse: Ɛwunsǝ lǝ nyamfo kenke ǝsuǝǝ, bifi lelabi bitǝ bǝtsyuǝ, itsyise ni laakɔ lesa saa kalɛ lǝ bǝtsyuǝ keyifo mǝ bani nɛ.

english_verse: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Kristo eto diyuǝ nǝ wǝǝtǝ, lǝ didi seka lǝ mi ketu ǝsuǝ, itsyise nyamfo eso Onanto lékpadi mi ɔkɔ biyifo bani nɛ. Lɛ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, bɛsɔ Onanto ani.

english_verse: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ, nǝ lefo koya tinti lǝ diyi mi ketu kǝmiǝ. Bete bǝtsyuǝ asa, bɛlɛ bǝtsyuǝ kɔlɛ lǝ kobe ǝsuǝ. Bifi Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsǝ ku bafokanɔfɔ eto ǝsǝ ku lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝsǝ bitǝ lɛninsɔ Onanto lǝ mi ketu kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lesa saa nǝ biɔtɛyi nye buiyifoo, lǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Bonamute Yesu ǝsuǝ, le bifi lɛninsɔ bitǝ Boanto Onanto ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ diye ǝsuǝ. Bisiǝ Nkpǝ Fɔfɔ Fe Mba Ni Kristo Eto Bale Seka.

english_verse: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Mi besensiǝ, bebokesǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ mi bese, itsyise nko dińyǝ itǝ bǝ biyifo fe Kristo eto bafokanɔfɔ nɛ.

english_verse: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
translation_verse: Nko ke, mi bǝsiǝfi tsyaa, bifi lelabi bitǝ mi bǝsiǝ. Nya bienyifo mǝ disiale.

english_verse: Children must always obey their parents. This pleases the Lord.
translation_verse: Mi bebi, bitsyue anto ku ambe mǝ koto lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ, itsyise nyamfo laakɛ Onanto ɔkuɛ nɛ.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
translation_verse: Mi bebiantomǝ, biankpe mi bebi lɛblɔfi bǝ lǝ ani lǝ nyanlo mǝ.

english_verse: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
translation_verse: Mi ndomufɔ, bitsyuǝ mi banamutemǝ koto lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ, inni lǝ lefe nǝ mǝ ǝnǝmi ntǝkǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ ete, bǝ lǝ batɛsǝ mi lǝ keyifo ǝsuǝ eso, bomuu, biyifo ke ku mi ketu kenke lǝ dibu biǝtǝ Bonamute eso.

english_verse: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
translation_verse: Nya keyifo saa biuyifoo, biyifo ke ku kafo faa fe Bonamute bɛnlɛ ke buyifo kǝtǝ inni utidinini saa.

english_verse: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
translation_verse: Bekloma biǝ Bonamute ebofo mi kayo fe kayofofo ka ɔ́lɛ utsyǝ utǝ wǝ betidi. Itsyise Kristo ni Onamute wǝ bɛnlɛ busumu.
