english_verse: But Christ has no favorites! He will punish evil people, just as they deserve.
translation_verse: Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ luuyifo kabuaa, ebunyǝ kayofofo itǝ kabua ka weeyifo. Itsyise Onanto aakponko utsyuǝ saa lekpo lǝ kusu tsyɔntsyɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
translation_verse: Mba ni banamute, bɛlɛ mi ndomufɔ ba leeyifo mi nyifo ola lǝ kusu sɛɛ ko dińyǝ itǝ ǝsuǝ. Bekloma biǝ mi tsya kpe Onamute wǝ nkpe kato. Kɔlɛlɛlɛ Ku Kate Eto Asa.

english_verse: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
translation_verse: Bianyɛ ola boto kǝtǝ Onanto lefe saa. Bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ lǝ bɛlɛ ola boto lǝ bifi lɛninsɔ bikǝtǝ Onanto.

english_verse: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
translation_verse: Beto ola lǝ bo tsya eto disi, bǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ ɔsini bo kusu lǝ bofo Kristo eto ditiki nǝ diyifo lekulasa kɔɔ, nǝ eso minlabe lǝ aba eto diyoo, letsya bobe kǝlǝ ni kate.

english_verse: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
translation_verse: Beto ola bǝ lǝ mfo lekulasa nǝmfo bulǝkǝ kate lǝ lekpa wuee fe kase ele bǝ nyifo.

english_verse: When you are with unbelievers, always make good use of the time.
translation_verse: Bɛyɛ ku mamfokanɔfɔ lǝ kobe ǝsuǝ, lǝ biyifo kusu saa ko lɔɔsini kutǝ mi eto keyifo fe kase efe itǝ.

english_verse: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Bidi etiki ku dibu, bǝ lǝ lɛlɛkɛ bɔnɔ ku koto lefe saa, lǝ bete kase buitǝ etiki eto mbuayɛ sɛɛ itǝ utsyuǝ saa. Bɔlɛ Mi Bokla.

english_verse: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
translation_verse: Bo ɔyimisani Tasiko lala, wǝ nwǝ leeyifo asa lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ ku uyifoyifotsyuǝ lǝ Bonamute eto keyifo ǝsuǝ, eebɔtɛyi mi lesa saa nǝ nlɛ mɛ bubǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ mfo.

english_verse: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso minlɛ wǝ botsyese mi ɔflɔ bǝ lǝ ɔtɛyi mi bo mfo eto etiki saa nya lǝ okpe mi otsyekle tsya.

english_verse: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
translation_verse: Onesimo wǝ ni bo ɔyimi lala wǝ bofobɔnɔ nwǝ ni mi nti eto ɔnii, tsya akɔ ku wǝ balɛ bubɛ. Bɔɔtɛyi mi lesa saa nǝ nlɛ bubǝ mfo eto etiki.

english_verse: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
translation_verse: Aristarko nwǝ boko wǝ nlabe lǝ diyo mfo ku Marko wǝ ni Barnaba eto ɔyimisani bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ mi o-o! Bóotǝ mi bote koko bǝ lǝ Marko ǝmfo ǝbǝ mi ɔflɔ, bisensǝ ani befo wǝ kafo faa.

english_verse: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
translation_verse: Yosua wǝ bensi bakpo Yusto tsya ǝǝsiǝsǝ mi. Mǝ itsyǝ bamfo hã ni Yudafɔ eto bafokanɔfɔ ba nlɛ keyifo ku mɛ itǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ kamǝ nɛ. Beyifo bawunsǝkotsyuǝ tinti bǝtǝ mɛ.

english_verse: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
translation_verse: Epafra wǝ ni mi nti eto ɔni wǝ ni Kristo eto uyifoyifo tsya nkǝ wǝǝsiǝsǝ mi o-o. Woato ola kekleke lefe saa lǝ mi disi katɔ Onanto nkǝ lǝ binyǝ kekleke, lǝ bɛflɔ lǝ kototsyuentsyue Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ.

english_verse: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
translation_verse: Moofo wǝ kɛnyɛ budi lǝ keyifo kekleke ka weeyifo kǝtǝ mi ku betidi ba nkpe lǝ Laodikea ku Hierapoli.

english_verse: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
translation_verse: Bo ɔyimitsyuǝ lala ofala kplɛ Luka ku Dema bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ mi o-o.

english_verse: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
translation_verse: Boǝsiǝsǝ bayimi ba nkpe lǝ Laodikea ku Bɔyimisio Nimfa ku bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝ laakpe disi lǝ wǝ diyo o-o.

english_verse: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
translation_verse: Lǝ bekla kukue komfo belosǝǝ, bifi ko betsyese bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝ nkpe lǝ Laodikea lǝ mǝ tsya lǝ bakla. Nko kee, mi tsya lǝ bekla kukue ko míwɔni míntǝ Laodikea eto bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa tsya.

english_verse: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bɛtɛyi Arkipo biǝ lǝ okpe otsyese lǝ olosǝ Bonamute eto keyifo ka úfi ókpe wǝ lǝ ani mfó.

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, kosate dífi mɔ kɔni minlɛ kǝsiǝ kamfo bɔwɔni katsyese mi. Nya bianta ǝsuǝ biǝ nsi nlabe lǝ aba eto diyo. Nlɛ Onanto bɔtɔ miǝ utǝ lǝ wǝ lefonǝ lǝ disiǝko mi.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, ku Silvano ku Timoteo bo lɛwɔni kukue komfo bɔnlɛ mi mba ni Boanto Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto bale lǝ Tesalonika butǝ. Nya bɔnlɛ ola boto kǝtǝ Boanto Onanto katɔ wǝ lefonǝ ku diyuǝ kǝtǝ mi. Boasɔ Onanto Ani Bǝ Bífi Mi Ǝsuǝ Bítǝ Wǝ.

english_verse: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
translation_verse: Boasɔ Onanto ani lǝ mimblɛ eto disi. Nya lefe sa lǝ bɔlɛ ola botoo, boalɛ wǝ lekpakpa lǝ mi disi.

english_verse: we tell God our Father about your faith and loving work and about your firm hope in our Lord Jesus Christ. The Thessalonians' Faith and Example
translation_verse: Nya boanyɛ Boanto Onanto bɔtɛyi lǝ mi bofokanɔ lǝ keyifo ka bɛnlɛ buyifo eso. Boatɛyi wǝ tsya kase bɛnlɛ betidi lelabi butǝ, nya bɛnlɛ kusu bobe kekleke itǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo.

english_verse: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
translation_verse: Bo bayimi, buyi boǝnkǝ Onanto aala mi tinti nya úlǝkǝ mi fe wǝ bale.

english_verse: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
translation_verse: Nya Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ búbǝ bɔ́tɛyi mii, menyifo ditiki fufu nǝ ete bóboko mi. Bomu ɛyɛ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsuǝale nya nlɛ ni ǝsuǝale bulǝkǝ kate bǝ nya béfo bɛnɔ eyifo sitinti. Bínyǝ kase bɔ́lɛ bo ǝsuǝ lǝ mi nti, nya búyifo nko itǝ lǝ mi lɛkɛsǝ eso.

english_verse: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ ɔnukualɛɛ, mi tsya áfo nnya binsi bo ku Bonamute eto nkpǝ bomǝ. Ite bǝ bɛlɛ kanyi bunyǝ tsyaa, béfo ditiki nǝmfo ku disuǝyuǝ nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ dítǝ mi.

english_verse: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eso bafokanɔfɔ nkpe lǝ Makedonia ku Akaia eto kasɔ kenkee, lɛ bobe kakase asa ketsyiko mi ɔflɔ.

english_verse: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ inni Bonamute eto ditiki nǝmfo ete dísǝnsǝ ditsyi mi ɔflɔ dísu Makedonia ku Akaia kenke. Bomu mi Onanto bofokanɔ tsya ébusǝnsǝ isu kalebe saa. Nya insi ni bo nsi lɔɔtɛyi kulesa, itsyise betidi ba tã ébɔnɔ nya.

english_verse: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
translation_verse: Nya mǝ kosate nlɛ etiki budi ketsyiko lǝ kase béfo bo lǝ lefe nǝ búbǝ mi ɔflɔ ku kase bisinkli bɛyɛ bǝfiǝ kedi butǝ, nya bífi mi ǝsuǝ bítǝ Onanto wǝǝ hã nkpe nkpǝ.

english_verse: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
translation_verse: Nya biińyǝ binsǝkǝ wǝ Ubi Yesu wǝ ótakasǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ, nya úbǝ usiǝ nkpǝ ku Onanto, nya wuutsyi Onanto eto kato ubǝ. Yesu ǝmfo hã loofo bo bofo ketsyiko kotonǝnǝ ko Onanto luutǝ babuayifo kenke.

english_verse: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, mi kosate yi lesa nǝ eso búbǝ mi ɔflɔ, nya bo mi ɔflɔ bubǝ ményifo bimba.

english_verse: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
translation_verse: Nya biyi kase búnyǝ kanyi nya banlɛ bo boka kakpo bo ǝnǝmi kasɔ lǝ Filipi fɛ bubǝ boyo mi ɔflɔ lǝ Tesalonika mfó. Ite bǝ bǝlǝ bo lǝ mi mfó tsya, Bonamute ákpe bo nkɛale nya bɔ́tɛyi mi wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
translation_verse: Nya kɔlɛ ko bɔ́nlɛ mi bɔlɛɛ, mentsyi lǝ bo mantebutsyuǝ nye lǝ nsusu bua saa nye lǝ bɔwɛ kuutsyuǝ saa bokpe.

english_verse: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
translation_verse: Biyi biǝ inni kawɛ eto etiki búfi bóboko mi. Nya bóantɛyi mi Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ lǝ bunyǝ kutǝkǝ itsyi lǝ mi ǝsuǝ. Nya Onanto kosate ebudi bo odansiɛ lǝ ditiki nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
translation_verse: Se boala mi sitinti esoo, iyifo bo lelabi boǝ mi tsya lǝ bɛnɔ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo. Nya inni Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ mate. Bomu bufi bo nkpǝ tsya bútǝ lǝ mi disi, itsyise befo koya tinti bitǝ bo.

english_verse: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, bekloma biǝ lefe nǝ búbǝ mi ɔflɔ búbǝ bɔ́tɛyi mi Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ mfóo, bókplatsya bóto diwi ketsye ku kakɔmi búyifo keyifo itǝ bǝ, bóǝmfi bo ǝsuǝ buyifo bitsyikǝ butǝkǝ lǝ mi kutsyuǝ saa lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Mi kosate ku Onanto ebudi bo adansiɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ lǝ kase bɔ́lɛ bo ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ lǝ mi mba dikafo bɛnɔ nti. Búyifo lesa saa kukɔnɔ. Nya kuutsyuǝ saa mǝnyǝ kabua saa lǝ bo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
translation_verse: Biyi tsya biǝ bɔ́lɛ mi utsyuǝ saa fe kase ubianto laalɛ wǝ bebi ola wɛkɛkɛkɛ.

english_verse: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
translation_verse: Bókpe mi nkɛale, bómansǝ mi lɛkɔ nya búkalɛ mi kɔlɛ kase biusiǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ itǝ bǝ Boanto Onanto ebunyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ. Itsyise wǝ kosate wǝ lékpadi mi nkǝ lǝ binyǝ bofo lǝ wǝ sekakedikɔ ku diyǝnde kenke.

english_verse: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
translation_verse: Nya eso ele bǝ bɔsɔ Onanto ani tsya ni bǝnkǝǝ, lefe nǝ bɔ́tɛyi mi Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfoo, bíemfi ni fe ditiki bimba. Bomu béfo ni fenkǝ Onanto eto ditiki. Ɔnukualɛ ini bǝ wǝ ditiki dini. Nya íkaboko bɔtsyikawuninsǝ tsya lǝ mi mba díkafo bɛnɔ eto nkpǝsiǝsiǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, asa nnya díbǝ mi lǝ ǝsuǝ mfóo, nya ke ni lesa nǝ díbǝ lǝ Onanto eto betidi ǝsuǝ lǝ Yudafɔ eto kasɔ nɛ. Nya kanyi ka bínyǝ lǝ mi betidi eto anii, nko kǝ íbǝ lǝ Yudafɔ eto kasɔ eto betidi ba léfo Yesu bánɔ lǝ Yudafɔ eto ani nɛ.

english_verse: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ bamfó álo Bonamute Yesu ku Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi tsya nya báte bo tsya ohiã. Mǝ eyifosa átaka ińyǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ nya bátaka ku sikpi bǝńyǝ betidi ba tã lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
translation_verse: Bákplatsya bǝ lǝ beti bo kusu bǝ boatɛyi mba lenni Yudafɔ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ nkpǝ manlo. Lǝ nyaso mǝ asa buayifoyifo ǝbǝ ifui ékpia efe isu eyo kaka mɔmɔɔ, ísu ínǝ Onanto eto kotonǝnǝ eboko mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ. Befo Koya Bitǝ Bo Tinti.

english_verse: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, yoofo eyi asiani se búdu lǝ miǝ ɔflɔ. Tsya bekpe bo lǝ nsusu kǝmiǝ. Nya bokplatsya lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ boofo, lǝ bubǝ botsya ku mi ǝnǝmi ku ǝnǝmi tsya yǝntǝ kusu.

english_verse: We really wanted to come. I myself tried several times, but Satan always stopped us.
translation_verse: Bóla boǝ lǝ busi bubǝ bunyǝ mi. Nya mɔ, Paulo, kosatee, nyɛ esu saa nya moofo bǝ lǝ mfo bubǝ. Fɛɛ obuale ǝmǝ mǝntǝ kusu.

english_verse: After all, when the Lord Jesus appears, who else but you will give us hope and joy and be like a glorious crown for us?
translation_verse: Nla tinti miǝ lǝ mbǝ nyǝ mi, itsyise bufi bo ǝnǝ butǝkǝ lǝ mi. Nya mi ni bo disuǝyuǝ, itsyise mi ku bafokanɔfɔ bamba ni bo kutǝkǝ ko eso boofo lɛkɔɛsi bɔsɔ lǝ lefe nǝ Bonamute Yesu luubǝ bio.

english_verse: You alone are our glory and joy!
translation_verse: Sitintii, mi ni bo lɛmɔ ku bo disuǝyuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
translation_verse: Nya se ɛnlɛ bo bulǝ se boensinyǝ mi tɔ esoo, bóse nya uyi boǝ bo inuǝ lǝ bɔtsyimɛ lǝ Atene.

english_verse: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
translation_verse: Nya bótsyese Timoteo lǝ ubǝ okpe mi nkɛ alɛ, nya lǝ ɔwunsǝ ko mi lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ. Uyifo bo ɔyimisami wǝ laawunsǝko bo lǝ kanantoyifo ku Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ eto bɔtɛyi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
translation_verse: Bo nsusu ni bǝnkǝ boanla bǝ bulǝ ku kanyi ka bɛnlɛ bunyǝ lǝ elo mi kuutsyuǝ saa ani. Mi kosate fe biyi koko biǝ bulǝ ku kanyibunyǝ ni nnya leetu nwǝ ke ntǝkǝko Kristo.

english_verse: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
translation_verse: Biokloma biǝ lefe nǝ bɔkɛ mi lǝ ɔflɔɔ, bútǝ mi bote katɔnsǝ boǝnkǝ bulǝ kpǝ ebutu mi. Nya fe kase binyii, íbǝ itǝ nko sitinti.

english_verse: At last, when I could not wait any longer, I sent Timothy to find out about your faith. I hoped Satan had not tempted you and made all our work useless.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso míntsyese Timoteo minkǝ ubǝ obe lǝ bisi bińyǝ keklǝkǝ lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ. Itsyise mmuǝ utu nnɔ. Nya mɔ sikpitete ni bǝnkǝ ǝtsyuǝ oboale ǝmǝ ébubǝ óbiasǝ mi nsusu itǝ bǝ bo bokplatsya kenke ǝbǝ íyifo bimba. Mi Bofokanɔ Ǝǝtǝ Bo Disuǝnyuǝ.

english_verse: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
translation_verse: Nya se Timoteo dísinkli ubǝǝ, ɔ́tɛyi bo ku disuǝyuǝ nkǝ bisi bińyǝ kekleke lǝ mi bofokanɔ ku mi lelabi itǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ insi enso. Ɔ́tɛyi bo tsya nkǝ biakloma bo tinti nya bɛnlɛ kusu bobe biǝ biǝnyǝ bo fe kase bo tsya nlɛ bola boǝ boǝnyǝ mi.

english_verse: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, mɔ bayimi, ite bǝ bɔlɛ kanyi bunyǝ nya asa nyamfo lekle bo tsyaa, mi bofokanɔ aakpe bo disuǝyuǝ kǝyuǝsǝ bo ketu.

english_verse: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
translation_verse: Se bɔ́nɔ kase bińyǝ kekleke lǝ Bonamute eto bofokanɔ esuǝǝ, mfe fɛ nkpǝ fɔfɔ dídufǝ bo lǝ ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
translation_verse: Boǝmbofo Onanto ani bɔsɔ yooyo disuǝyuǝ nǝ bɔnlɛ bunyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ mi disi eso.

english_verse: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ Boanto Onanto lekpakpa bɔlɛ ketsye ku kakɔmi boǝ utǝ lǝ busi botsya lǝ bokpe mi nkɛale lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
translation_verse: Nyaso mɔmɔɔ, Boanto Onanto kosate ku Bonamute Yesu lǝ basini bo kusu bǝ lǝ bofo mi ɔflɔ bubǝ.

english_verse: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
translation_verse: Nya Bonamute lǝ utǝ kusu bǝ mi lelabi itǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ ku betidi bamba lǝ difui lekpe fe kase boala mi ke. Nya lǝ bela betidi bamba tsya fe kase boala mi.

english_verse: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
translation_verse: Nyamfo luutǝ Boanto Onanto lookpe mi ǝsuǝale, ulǝkǝ mi utsyiko lǝ Obonsam eto esu kenke ǝsuǝ nya lǝ uyifo mi kɛnkɛ lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi isu ese diyi nǝ Bonamute Yesu luusinkli ubǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo ku wǝ mba kenke diyifo kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, mɔ ditiki fɛfɛ nǝ minla miǝ malɛ mi lekpakpa lǝ ntɛyi ni bǝ, bisiǝ nkpǝ bo lɔɔkɛ Boanto Onanto ɔkɔɛ fe kase bóte mi. Bɛlɛnko nko kekleke, tsya bɔlɛ mi nkɛale bokpe lǝ Bonamute Yesu eto diye ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ bisi biyifo beso nko.

english_verse: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
translation_verse: Itsyise biyi asa nnya bote mi ɛyɛ lǝ Bonamute Yesu eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
translation_verse: Onanto aala nkǝ biyifo mi ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛ lǝ bilǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ asɔnɔdidi kenke ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
translation_verse: Nya biǝntǝkǝko ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto kamini bisiǝ nkpǝ fe betidi ba laante Onanto sikpi.

english_verse: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, kuutsyuǝ saa mansɛsǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ eto usiǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ usu ota wǝ ubu. Bɔtɛyi mi nko bunyǝ nya bɔlɛ mi ato bukǝ kekleke boǝnkǝǝ, Bonamute ebunǝ mba lǝǝyifo asa nyamfo eto kakle koto kekleke.

english_verse: God didn't choose you to be filthy, but to be pure.
translation_verse: Onanto ákpadi bo nkǝ buyifo betidi kɛnkɛ. Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bulǝkǝ bo ǝsuǝ butsyiko lǝ asinsa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ mi nti eto utsyuǝ ani buyifo lǝ etsyuesa nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, inni betidi ǝsuǝ ótaka úńyǝ. Bomu Onanto, nwǝ leefi wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ kǝtǝ mi, eto ǝsuǝ ótaka úńyǝ.

english_verse: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
translation_verse: Nya lǝ lelabi itǝ mi bayimitsyuǝ bafokanɔfɔɔ, yensife bǝ bɔwɔni kulesa butǝ mi lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Itsyi Onanto ébote mi kase ele bǝ bela mi bǝtsyuǝ koko.

english_verse: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝǝ, sitinti ini bǝ biala mi bayimitsyuǝ ba kenke díkafo banɔ ba nkpe lǝ Makedonia eto kasɔ kenke. Nya bunsi bɔnlɛ mi bɔtɛyi lekpakpalɛlɛ ǝsuǝ boǝnkǝ biyifo beso nko.

english_verse: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
translation_verse: Bisiǝ nkpǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bobokosǝ ǝsuǝ, nya utsyuǝ saa eto ǝnǝmi lǝ itǝkǝ lǝ wǝ keyifo ǝsuǝ, nya bifi mi ani biyifo keyifo bɛbɛbɛ lesa nǝ biudi fe kase bɔ́tɛyi mi bofe.

english_verse: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
translation_verse: Nyamfo luutǝ bǝ mba dímamfo banɔɔ, ebubu mi nya biemukpese lǝ kuutsyuǝ saa ǝsuǝ itǝ lesa nǝ loohiã mi. Biensikewi Fe Bitidi Ba Lǝmbǝ Kusubebe.

english_verse: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, bola boǝ bete ɔnukualɛ itsyi lǝ betidi ba díkekpe ǝsuǝ, itǝ bǝ lǝ bɛyɛ nku buwi nku ku kaminsǝ fe betidi ba lǝmbǝ sɛtɔ saa.

english_verse: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
translation_verse: Bofo bɔnɔ boǝ Yesu ǝkpǝ nya usi ótaka utsyi ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ. Nya Onanto luutǝ Yesu kpa mba ǝmǝ oboko ku wǝ lǝ wǝ bubǝ bio ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ Bonamute lɛtɛyi, ni ǝsuǝ buuńyǝ bɔɔnlɛ mi bɔtɛyi boǝǝ, bo mba nsi nkpǝ lǝ Bonamute eto businkli kǝbǝ lefee, boǝmbɔtɔ mba díkekpe kato busu.

english_verse: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfo o-o, bɔɔnɔ Bonamute eto bubǝ eto kulu ku ɔkɔɛ eto boto. Boɔnɔ Onanto eto Ɔtɔnkpe ninǝ kenke eto ɔkɔɛ. Nya buufǝ Onanto eto kakpatsyaku. Nya Bonamute kosate lɔɔyifǝ utsyi kato ubǝ. Nya betidi ba lefo Kristo baanɔ fɛ bǝkpǝǝ, mǝ loka botaka kǝbǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Onanto ebokpa bomba dibu nsi nkpǝ nya wookpa bo usu ɔkɔ ku betidi ba letaka busu botsyako Bonamute kato. Nya buusiǝ ku Bonamute isu manlo manlo.

english_verse: Encourage each other with these words.
translation_verse: Nyaso bifi etiki nyamfo bemansǝ bǝtsyuǝ lɛkɔ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, yamfe bǝ nsi nwɔni mi kulesa itsyi lǝ lefe nye eyi nnya asa nyamfo luubǝ.

english_verse: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
translation_verse: Itsyise mi kosate yi sitinti biǝ Bonamute eto diyi nǝ wuubǝ ebuyifo fe kase uyu laabɔ lǝ wǝ kabiakɔ ku ketsye,

english_verse: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
translation_verse: kǝbǝ keyu utidi. Nya lǝ lefe nǝ utidi saa nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ lesa saa tǝ buɛ ku diyuǝǝ, lefe nǝmfo ni lefe nǝ lesabua nǝ banlɛ kusu bobee nya diǝbǝ kasɔ lǝ nti nɛ. Diubǝ fe kase kalelefo lǝǝnǝ ofonlɛ. Kalebe saa butsyetsyi kesu ǝmbǝ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ, mɔ bayimi, mimii binsibǝ lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ. Nyaso yanle bǝ diyi nǝmǝ bǝ lefua mi fe kase uyu leeyifo.

english_verse: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
translation_verse: Itsyise mimblɛ kenke kpe lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ. Nya buunte fe betidi ba leefi mǝ ǝsuǝ kakpe lǝ abua ǝsuǝ keyifo asa kakula.

english_verse: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
translation_verse: Itsyise mba laalabe selabee, ketsye baalabe se. Nya mba ba nlɛ ntǝ bukpǝ tsyaa, kǝtsyǝ nya beekpǝ mu nɛ.

english_verse: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
translation_verse: Fɛ bo mba nkpe lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝǝ, bitǝ lǝ butǝkǝ ǝnǝ kukɔnɔ. Le bufi bo bofokanɔ ku bo lelabi bukase ǝsuǝ fe kase lɛkɔɛsibi eto situ eto awu laawunsǝ ko bamamanyǝ. Nya lǝ bufi bo ǝnǝmi butǝkǝ lǝ Boanto Onanto eto bofokǝtǝ ǝsuǝ fe kase omamanyǝ eto disi eto lema ankpakpa laafo wǝ lǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto mǝnlǝkǝ bo itǝ wǝ lefonyi nɛ nlɛ bubǝ. Bomu bǝ lǝ bɔyɛ lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ lǝ bunyǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
translation_verse: Yesu ǝmfo ǝkpǝ lǝ bo disi bǝ lǝ busi nkpǝ o-o, bukpǝ o-o, buusiǝ ku wǝ lǝ wǝ dibǝ bio ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, bikakpe nkɛale lǝ bikawunsǝko bǝtsyuǝ fe kase bɛnlɛ buyifo mɔmɔ. Bɛlɛ Ǝsuǝ Ola Lǝ Bilǝkǝ Asa Bua Saa Lǝ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
translation_verse: Bo bayimi, bɔlɛ mi lekpakpa bǝ bifi dibu kpǝ bitǝ mi batɔnkotɔnko ba laakplatsya kate mi Kristo eto nkpǝ busiǝ eto esu.

english_verse: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
translation_verse: Bela mǝ lǝ bibu mǝ kukɔnɔ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ko ǝsuǝ banlɛ mi bokpa akanyǝnko eso. Lǝ mimblɛ lǝ bisiǝ lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, bo bayimi, bola tinti boǝ bɛlɛ kɔlɛ mba lanlɛ otsyekle bokpe. Bekpe mba laate sikpi nkɛale. Bɛwunsǝ ko mba lehiã bɔwunsǝ ko. Nya lǝ bifi dibusǝ bitǝ utsyuǝ saa.

english_verse: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
translation_verse: Bɛlɔ bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ kuutsyuǝ saa mǝmfi kabua ofo kabua kayo. Bomu lefe saa, bikeyifo kasɛɛ bikǝtǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ ku betidi ba kenke.

english_verse: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Nya bifi lɛninsɔ bitǝ Boanto Onanto lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ. Itsyise nyamfo ni lesa nǝ Onanto nlɛ bɔtɔ ketsyiko lǝ mimba kenke ntǝkǝko Yesu Kristo nɛ.

english_verse: Don't turn away God's Spirit
translation_verse: Bienti Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ kusu lǝ mi nti.

english_verse: and don't have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Bilǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ lebua saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Nya bɔlɛ Onanto wǝ lǝǝtǝ bo diyuǝ saa bɔtɔ bǝ lǝ uyifo bo kɛnkɛ lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ. Nya lǝ ose mi lɛwɔnɔ ku nsusu ku mi ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ kenke bǝ bemunyǝ kabua saa lǝ mi ǝsuǝ lǝ lefe nǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo nsi luubǝ.

english_verse: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
translation_verse: Nya Onanto wǝ lékpadi mi nkǝ befiani wǝ balee ebɔwunsǝko mi isu ese lǝ kalosǝkɔ. Itsyise lesa nǝ ke ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ wuuyifoo, weeyifo ni.

english_verse: Friends, please pray for us.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, bikato ola kǝtǝ Onanto lǝ bo disi.

english_verse: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Bilǝkǝ kafo faa bɛbuta lǝ bisiǝsǝ bafokanɔfɔ.

english_verse: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
translation_verse: Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti fe nwǝ ńyǝ lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto kɛnyɛ minkǝ bekla kukue komfo bete bafokanɔfɔ kenke.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto lefonǝ lǝ disiǝ ko mi.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, ku Silvano ku Timoteo bo lɛwɔni kukue komfo butǝ mi mba ni bo Boanto Onanto ku Banamute Yesu Kristo eto bale lǝ Tesalonika.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ bɔtɔ minkǝ Boanto Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto diyuǝ ku lefonǝ lǝ disiǝ ko mi. Bɔlɛ Onanto Lekpakpa Bǝ Fe Nkpesiǝsiǝ Lǝ Bokate Ko Bokpadi Bo Ókpadi Fǝ.

english_verse: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, ele bǝ bɔsɔ Onanto ani lefe saa lǝ mi disi. Lǝ nyaso ɛlɛkɛ bǝ bukato ola, kasɔ wǝ ani bǝ mi bofokanɔ lǝ busi bɔkɛ ale boso ku mi lelabi tsya lǝ difui lekpe enso.

english_verse: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso boakpo mi diye sɛɛ lǝ mba lefo Onanto banɔ nti. Iyifo bo lɛmɔ nya boatɛsǝ mi itsyise bińyǝ kekleke lǝ mi bofo kanɔ ǝsuǝ nya bɛnlɛ otsyekle bokpe lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe banlɛ mi bulǝ kakpɔ mi ku kanyi ka bɛnlɛ bunyǝ eso.

english_verse: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
translation_verse: Nyamfo lɛ bote nkǝ Onanto aakpo akpo lǝ kusutsyɔntsyɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya wuutǝ mi kǝsiǝkɔ lǝ wǝ sekakedikɔ kasɔ bɛnlɛ kanyi ka bɛnlɛ bunyǝ eso.

english_verse: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
translation_verse: Onanto ebuyifo lesa nǝ lɛyɛ. Nya wuunǝ mba nlɛ mi bulǝ kenke koto.

english_verse: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
translation_verse: Nya wuutǝ nkǝ bo ku mi mba kenke nlɛ kanyi bunyǝ lǝ buunyǝ ɔnwɛkǝtsyǝkɔ sɛɛ. Onanto ebuyifo nyamfo lǝ lefe nǝ Bonamute Yesu ku Onanto eto batɔnkpe nkpe asuale kplɛ lɔɔbɔ betsyi kato ku ǝsuǝale.

english_verse: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
translation_verse: Buunǝ betidi ba lǝǝmbu Onanto nya bámfo Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ banɔɔ, koto.

english_verse: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
translation_verse: Nya Bonamute loola mǝ udunko lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi. Nya bǝǝmbunyǝ wǝ diyǝnde ku wǝ ǝsuǝale. Nya wɔɔtsylɔsǝ mǝ ku mǝ ditsyǝbi bua nǝmǝ.

english_verse: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo ebubǝ itǝ lǝ diyi kplɛ nǝ ǝsuǝ Yesu luusinkli ubǝ. Nya lǝ diyi nǝmfo ǝsuǝǝ, bafokanɔfɔ kenke ebutǝkǝko wǝ ku atɛsǝ eto ǝsǝ ku kudu. Nya miitsya ǝbɔkɛ mǝ lenti, itsyise béfo wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ bɔ́tɛyi mi mfó bɛnɔ.

english_verse: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso boato ola lǝ mi disi lefe saa nɛ. Nya boalɛ bo Onanto lekpakpa boǝ lǝ utǝ lǝ mi nkpǝsiǝsiǝ lǝ bokate ku mi bokpadi bo ókpadi mi. Nya lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale lǝ ɛwunsǝ ko mi lǝ itǝ mi nsusu sɛɛ bo lookpe mi nkɛale bǝ lesa saa nǝ biuyifo lǝ mi wǝ bofokanɔ esoo lǝ ibǝ itǝ kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ asa nyamfo bɔtɔ kǝtǝ mi ku lekpakpalɛlɛ bǝ lǝ babesǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto diye kato ɛyɛ lǝ mi eso. Nya wuuntsya lǝ obesǝ mi diye kato lǝ wǝ ku Onanto eto kafoɛkpɛ eso.

english_verse: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, itsyi lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto businkli kǝbǝ bio ku bo bɔkɔ botsyanko wǝ.

english_verse: not to be easily upset or disturbed by people who claim the Lord has already come. They may say they heard this directly from the Holy Spirit, or from someone else, or even that they read it in one of our letters.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lǝ nyamfo lǝ ile mi nsusu nye ekpe mi bule, lǝ nnya banlɛ bɔtɛyi bǝ Bonamute eto dibǝyi ébubǝ koko. Ǝtsyuǝ biubu bǝ ébɔ lǝ Onanto eto kɛnyɛ bulǝkǝ kate nye bo asatete nye etiki nnya bɔ́wɔni bútǝ mi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But don't be fooled! People will rebel against God. Then before the Lord returns, the wicked one who is doomed to be destroyed will appear.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lǝ kuutsyuǝ saa lǝ ɔwuɛ mi lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ kon. Itsyise Bonamute eto diyi nǝmǝ ǝmbubǝ tɔ isu ese lefe nǝ usialetidi ǝmǝ lootaka uńyǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ nya obuale ǝmǝ lǝǝbǝ bɔtsylɔ lǝ ute luulǝkǝ ǝsuǝ ote.

english_verse: He will brag and oppose everything holy or sacred. He will even sit in God's temple and claim to be God.
translation_verse: Nya wootaka uńyǝ nkǝ lǝ uti Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsuǝale kusu lǝ ote nkǝ wǝ hã ni awɔnɔ kenke eto ǝsuǝaletidi. Nya wootaka ubǝ usiǝ lǝ Onanto eto Disumuyo nya wuuyifo wǝ ǝsuǝǝ, fe wǝ ni Onanto.

english_verse: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
translation_verse: Bíakloma biǝ lefe nǝ minkɛ mi lǝ ɔflɔɔ, ntɛyi mi asa nyamfo kenke.

english_verse: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lesatsyuǝ leeti asa nyamfo kusu nkǝ yǝǝbǝ tɔ mɔmɔ. Nya mi kosate yi lesa nǝ ini. Nya obuale ǝmǝ ebulǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ lekple lǝ wǝ lefe ayo.

english_verse: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
translation_verse: Nya disiale eto asa nnya banlɛ buyifo kakula kokoko efe ɛlɛ bubǝ. Nya asa nnya luubǝǝ, ǝmbubǝ tɔ isu ese le fe nǝ Onanto dilǝkǝ nwǝ diti obusle ǝmǝ kusu.

english_verse: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Onanto ebulǝkǝ obuale ǝmǝ ote. Nya lǝ lefe nǝ Bonamute Yesu luubǝǝ, wuufi wǝ kɛnyɛ eto ufiebi ku wǝ diyǝnde otonsǝ wǝ obiasǝ wǝ ditsyǝbi kenke.

english_verse: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
translation_verse: Usialetidi ǝmǝ bǝ ku Obonsam eto ǝsuǝale, nya wuuyifo bidia eto ayanisa akpa akpaa ote.

english_verse: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba kenke lɔɔyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, ebonya kenkee, wɔɔyɛ lǝ disiale ku kɔwɛsu saa bǝ lǝ ɔwɛ mǝ okpe. Boonya itsyise bamfo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ Onanto lete mǝ bǝ bǝnyǝ nkpǝ banɔ.

english_verse: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso Onanto eboyani mǝ utǝ kawɛ eto lɛwɔnɔ nǝ luutǝ bafo bidia banɔ.

english_verse: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
translation_verse: Lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, Onanto ebolo mǝ dikpi, itsyise bamfo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ banɔ. Bomu bǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ asa buayifoyifo ǝsuǝ. Bińyǝ Kekleke.

english_verse: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, ele bǝ bokasɔ Onanto ani lefe saa lǝ mi disi eso. Buyi boǝ woala mi sitinti. Mi ni betidi tutɛ Onanto dílǝkǝ nkǝ binyǝ bofo. Úfi Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ úflǝ mi abua úwi nya béfo ɔnukualɛ bɛnɔ.

english_verse: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ bo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo budi ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto ákpadi mi nkǝ bibǝ befo diye fe kase Bonamute Yesu Kristo léfo.

english_verse: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, mɔ bayimi, bińyǝ kekleke lǝ bɛkɔbe ɔnukualɛ eto asatete nnya bóte mi lǝ bo kukue ko bɔ́wɔni ku etiki nnya búdi mi, bɛlɛ nya kɔni kekleke.

english_verse: God our Father loves us. He treats us with undeserved grace and has given us eternal comfort and a wonderful hope. We pray that our Lord Jesus Christ and God our Father
translation_verse: Nyaso bɔlɛ bɔwunsǝko bɔtɔ ku lekpakpalɛlɛ itsyi lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo ku Boanto Onanto wǝ laala bo, nya ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lefonǝ ǝsuǝ ókpe bo nkɛale nya útǝ bo kusubebe tinti.

english_verse: will encourage you and help you always to do and say the right thing.
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ wǝ lekpakpa buǝnkǝ, utǝ mi ǝsuǝale lǝ okpe mi utu wǝ nkpe osa, bǝ lǝ bidi etiki ku lǝ biyifo asa sɛɛ lefe saa.

english_verse: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
translation_verse: Lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, mɔ bayimi, bekloma lǝ bikato ola kǝtǝ Onanto lǝ bo disi, itǝ bǝ lǝ Bonamute eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo lǝ disǝnsǝ disu nlebe ku dibu fe kase miitsya seka.

english_verse: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bɛtɔ Boanto Onanto tsya biǝ lǝ ulǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ betidibua ku besialetidi eto ani ǝsuǝ, itsyise inni betidi ba tã léfo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ mǝ bánɔ.

english_verse: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
translation_verse: Bonamute eyifo ɔnukualɛtidi, uuńyǝ mi kama, ookpe mi nkɛale nya woobe mi bǝ olo Obonsam ǝmbutǝkǝ bo kato.

english_verse: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
translation_verse: Bonamute ǝtǝ bufi bo utu butǝkǝ lǝ mi bǝ bɛlɛ bɔyɛ lǝ esu nya bote mi ǝsuǝ, nya buyi boǝnkǝ biofo buyifo lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ enso.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ Bonamute lekpakpa bǝ ɔsini mi ǝnǝmi lǝ binyǝ lǝ bete kase wǝ, Kristo laakpe bo nkɛale ku kase Onanto laala bo. Binyǝ Kekleke Itǝ Keyifoyifoyifo.

english_verse: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, bɔlɛ mi kɔfi bokpe kekleke lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto diye ǝsuǝ boǝ bilǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ bayimi ba ni baflɔ nya banlɛ buyifo lǝ bo asatete ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
translation_verse: Mi kosate biyi kukɔnɔ biǝ ele bǝ biyifo keyifo fe kase buyifo, itsyise bóenyifo sɛflɔ lefe nǝ bɔ́kɛ mi lenti.

english_verse: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
translation_verse: Bóamfo bɔwunsǝko itsyi lǝ kuutsyuǝ saa ɔflɔ bǝ bóamfo kayo. Bomu búyifo keyifo kekleke ketsye ku kakɔmi bǝ bo bobǝ ményifo bitsyikǝ itǝ kuutsyuǝ saa.

english_verse: We had the right not to work, but we wanted to set an example for you.
translation_verse: Inni nnya kasɔ ni bǝnkǝ bumbǝ kusu boatɛyi mi bǝ bebe bo eso. Bomu bóla boǝ bekase kase ele be beyifo keyifo.

english_verse: We also gave you this rule: If you don't work, you don't eat.
translation_verse: Biokloma biǝ lefe nǝ bɔkɛ mi lentii, bókpe mi kɔfi boǝnkǝ utidi wǝ ke laani nkǝ woǝmbuyifo keyifoo, mendi tsya.

english_verse: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ mi nyamfo bɔtɛyi itsyise bɔlɛ bɔnɔ boǝ baflɔ bǝtsyuǝ kpe mi lenti nya ini mǝ bayimitsyuǝ eto ketikima hã te baayɛ kedi.

english_verse: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
translation_verse: Bɔninko betidi bamfo ditsyǝbi nǝmfo kekleke lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto diye ǝsuǝ, bǝ lǝ balɛ mǝ ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ lǝ be fi mǝ ani beyifo keyifo bedi.

english_verse: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mii, bayimi, biǝntǝ lǝ ani lǝ elo mi lǝ lesa sɛɛ buyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utsyuǝ nkǝ woǝmbuyifo lǝ ditiki nǝ bɔtɛyi mi lǝ kukue ko mfoo, bitsyǝ wǝ lekpo nya lǝ bilǝkǝ wǝ lǝ mi nti, lǝ kofami lǝ kɔlɛ wǝ.

english_verse: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Tsyaa bienkisi utidi ǝmǝ. Bomu ele bǝ bɛlɛ wǝ kɔlɛ fe mi ɔyimi seka. Bɔlɛ Mi Bokla.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ Bonamute kosate wǝ lǝǝtǝ diyuǝsǝ lekpakpa bɔlɛ bǝ lǝ utǝ mi kǝmiǝ eto diyuǝsǝ lǝ mi lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ. Lǝ Bonamute lǝ ɔlɛ mimblɛ kenke ola.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ ola boto boǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo lǝ ɔlɛ mi mblɛ kenke ola lǝ wǝ lefonǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, wǝ ni Yesu Kristo eto nwǝ ótsyese ɛyɛ lǝ bo Ofomfokǝtǝ Boanto Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo wǝ bɔnlɛ kusu bobee, nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni.

english_verse: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
translation_verse: Nya mimfi minlɛ fǝ Timoteo botsyese. Eyi fǝ eyifo mɛ fe ubi lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ. Nyaso minlɛ Bonamute Onanto Ku Boanto Yesu bɔtɔ miǝ lǝ mǝ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ lǝ kǝtǝkǝko fǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ fǝ kaminsǝ lǝ bǝtǝ fǝ diyuǝsǝ. Paulo Álɛ Wǝ Kɔlɛ Itsyi Lǝ Bidia Eto Bateasa Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
translation_verse: Tɛyi mǝ lǝ bayɛ lefe bobiasǝ lǝ akokosatete ku bakoko eto ntsyikɔ eto katobobesǝ ǝsuǝ. Asa nyamfo eto okle bote akpe kǝnǝ lǝ betidi nti. Nya yaanyɛ lǝ Onanto eto nsusu ǝsuǝ. Nsusu bo nyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ hã ele bǝ bote.

english_verse: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
translation_verse: Fɛ betidi bǝtsyuǝ étsyi kama bakpe asa nyamfo. Nyaso bányɛ kusu sɛɛ komfo. Nya bǝǝnǝ etiki bimba nya lǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ.

english_verse: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
translation_verse: Baala bǝ baatsyi bawuninsǝ bafiani Mose eto kɔfi eto bateasa. Fɛɛ mǝ bamǝ kosate mannɔ etiki nyamǝ kasɔ tsya. Beedi etiki kekleke itsyi lǝ kɔfi komǝ ǝsuǝ, fɛ mǝ bamǝ kosate maannɔ lesa nǝ banlɛ bɔtɛyi kasɔ.

english_verse: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
translation_verse: Bomblɛ kenke yi boǝ Mose eto kɔfi komǝ alɛkɛ, fɛɛ ele bǝ bǝtsyue ko koto fe kase boate ko.

english_verse: We also understand it wasn't given to control people who please God, but to control lawbreakers, criminals, godless people, and sinners. It is for wicked and evil people, and for murderers, who would even kill their own parents.
translation_verse: Nya ele bǝ bukakloma tsya boǝǝ, inni betidi sɛɛ eso béyifo afi kǝkǝ mǝ ato, bomu mba ditidi ato baata Onanto eto afi kebu ku mba leeyifo asa bua ku mǝ kakle ba eto nkpǝ diyi ku abuayifoyifo. Mǝ ni betidi ba lǝmbǝ bofokanɔ saa, mba laalo mǝ antomǝ ku ambemǝ ku mba ni bewudifɔ.

english_verse: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
translation_verse: Mba ni betidi ba leedi asɔnɔ ku basani ba laalabeko mǝ basanitsyuǝ. Mǝ ni betidi ba leeyu betidi bamba kǝmuǝ kate ku mba ni badia ku mba laasɔ akɔɛsi nye kakpadi asa katɛyi bidia. Nya ku mba kenke ba dímamfo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto asatete bánɔɔ, mǝ ni mba baanlɛ ato nyamfo bukǝ nɛ.

english_verse: of the good news the glorious and wonderful God has given me. Being Thankful for God's Kindness
translation_verse: Boonyǝ asa nnya minlɛ bote lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ béfi bákpe mɛ lǝ kɔni bǝ nte itsyi diyǝnde eto Onanto wǝ boatɛsǝ nte ɔflɔ. Paul Ásɔ Onanto Ani Lǝ Wǝ Kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ Eso.

english_verse: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
translation_verse: Mǝmbofo Bonamute Yesu Kristo ani bɔsɔ lǝ ǝsuǝale nnya ufi utǝ mɛ nkǝ lǝ mfo keyifo kamfo buyifo eso. Nya lǝ ɔnukualɛɛ, úfi ke ókpe mɛ lǝ ani. Itsyise únyǝ mɛ nya uunyi nkǝ mǝmbutsyetsyi ke nyani wǝ ntsyǝ.

english_verse: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ lǝ lefe ditsyuǝ nǝ lefee, nńyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, lǝ etikibuadidi ku lǝ aka ǝsuǝ fɛ mímbǝ míntsyi mɔ lɛkɔɛsi minwuninsǝ, Onanto ǝnyǝ mɛ kaminsǝ. Itsyise lǝ lefe nǝmfoo, mámfo wǝ nnɔ tɔ nya mánte lesa nǝ mínkeyifo tsya.

english_verse: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
translation_verse: Bonamute ǝnǝ mɛ kafo tinti nya útǝ mɛ bofokanɔ ku lelabi se buunyǝ lǝ bo lɔniyifoyifo ku Yesu Kristo.

english_verse: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
translation_verse: Ditiki nǝ minlɛ bɔtɛyi mfo eyifo etiki eto ɔnukualɛ, nya ele bǝ utidi saa fo ɔnɔ. Kristo Yesu wǝ ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ, díbǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo nkǝ lǝ ubǝ ulǝkǝ babuayifo. Nya mɔ ni obuayifo kenke enso lǝ babuayifo nti.

english_verse: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto dínyǝ mɛ kaminsǝ nkǝ lǝ ɛyɛ lǝ mɔɔ ni obuayifo kenke enso ǝsuǝǝ, Kristo Yesu lǝ utǝ lǝ betidi lǝ bǝnyǝ bǝ okpe lelabi nǝ eso woefi katsyɛ babuayifo ba lefo wǝ banɔ. Lǝ nya esoo, wuutǝ mǝ nkpǝ bo lǝmbǝ kalosǝkɔ kulefe tsya.

english_verse: I pray that honor and glory will always be given to the only God, who lives forever and is the invisible and eternal King! Amen.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bukatɛsǝ bo Oka wǝ nkpe kato wǝ boǝnyǝ ku bo ǝnǝmi wǝǝ hã ni Onanto wǝ nsi nkpǝ isu manlo manlo. Nya lǝ bukabesǝ wǝ Onanto wǝ leenkpǝ eto diye kato lefe saa. Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
translation_verse: Mɔ ubi Timoteo, keyifo ku afi nnya mimfi mintǝ fǝ mfoo, eka asa nnya bo Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛ́tɛyi itsyi le fǝ ǝsuǝ. Lɛ etiki nyamfo kɔni kekleke fe bemake, ebutǝkǝ kabua kato lǝ lema nǝmfo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
translation_verse: Lɛ fǝ bofokanɔ kɔni kekleke, tǝ bǝ fǝ utu manlo fǝ dikpi. Betidi bǝtsyuǝ ba dímǝntsyue mǝ ketu eto kɔlɛ kotoo, mǝ dídu bánɔ banyansǝ mǝ bofokanɔ nɛ.

english_verse: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ mǝ ntii, ni Himeneo ku Aleksandro. Nnǝ mǝ ato lǝ se mímfi mǝ míntǝ Obonsam bǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ wǝ ani. Nyamfo luutǝ bǝ bakase bǝ bayɛ etiki bua budi lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
translation_verse: Lesa tutɛ nǝ moola miǝ bete ni bǝ bikato ola bikǝtǝ Onanto lǝ bikalɛ wǝǝ lekpakpa kasɔ wǝ ani lǝ betidi ba tã eto disi. Bikǝfi mi ku mǝ mblɛ eto ahiã bikǝtsyǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
translation_verse: Nya bikato ola kǝtǝ Onanto lǝ baka ku betidi ba kenke ntɔnko betidi bǝ lǝ bomblɛ lǝ bɔkɛ lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ kalebe saa. Itǝ bǝ lǝ bobokosǝ bo ǝsuǝ kasɔ butǝ Onanto nya bufi dibu butǝ utsyuǝ saa.

english_verse: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
translation_verse: Olatoto eyifo lesa nǝ laakɛ bo Ofomfokǝtǝ Onanto ɔkɔɛ.

english_verse: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
translation_verse: Itsyise ola nkǝ utsyuǝ saa te wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ lǝ ote ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ bǝ lǝ utǝ wǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
translation_verse: Lǝ ɔnukualɛɛ, Onanto ɔni ete nkpe. Nya Ofomfokǝtǝ tsya ɔni ete nkpe. Wǝ ni utidi wǝ baakpo Kristo Yesu. Wǝ ni futsyǝ laalɔ bonko Onanto eto nti.

english_verse: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso Onanto lékpe mɛ fe wǝ ɔtɔnkpe ku wǝ oteasa. Nyamfo menyifo bǝ sidia minlɛ bɔtɛyi. Nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ wǝ dílǝkǝ mɛ fe oteasa nkǝ lǝ mbǝ nlǝkǝ wǝ bofokanɔ eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ nte betidi ba lennitɔ Yudafɔ.

english_verse: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Lǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto katsyakɔ saa, nla minkǝ basani besǝ mǝ ani kato bato ola ku ketu ka lekpa kɛnkɛ. Nya ɔblɔ nye kǝnǝ saa mankɛ mi lǝ nti.

english_verse: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
translation_verse: Nla tsya miǝ besio lɛ mǝ ǝsuǝ ola ɛyɛ lǝ mǝ bikelɛlɛ ǝsuǝ, lǝ ete bǝ balɛ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bobokosǝ. Inni bǝ bakle mǝ esi ku sika eto bikǝ akpa akpa nya lefo koya kpǝ nya loote bǝ balɛ mǝ ǝsuǝ kato bobesǝ.

english_verse: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
translation_verse: Bomuu, ele bǝ mǝ ditsyǝbi sɛɛ te bǝ beyifo besio ba laate Onanto sikpi.

english_verse: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
translation_verse: Nya ele bǝ usio saa bokosǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ lǝ okase asa, lǝ busiǝ kpo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
translation_verse: Minlɛ mǝ kusu butǝ minkǝ baté basani asa nye bǝtǝkǝ basani kato. Bomu ele bǝ bǝsiǝ kpoo, betsyue koto.

english_verse: After all, Adam was created before Eve,
translation_verse: Itsyise Adam ni futsyǝ Onanto leka buyifo fɛ úlǝkǝ Eva utsyiko lǝ wǝ.

english_verse: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
translation_verse: Nya inni Adam ni nwǝ olo ǝmǝ lɛwɛ, bomu usio ǝmǝ ni nwǝ ɔwɛ. Nya útǝ úyifo lebua.

english_verse: But women will be saved by having children, if they stay faithful, loving, holy, and modest.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ usio ebuńyǝ kekleke lǝ wǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ ku lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ nya wuusiǝ nkpǝ kɛnkɛ nya woobokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔɔ, wɔɔyɛ lǝ kanyi ka nkpe lǝ ubilele ǝsuǝ ɔbɔ ofe.

english_verse: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
translation_verse: Ɔnukualɛ uni, baatɛyi bǝnkǝǝ, lǝ utsyuǝ aala nkǝ woeyifo bafokanɔfɔ eto ɔtɔnkotɔnkoo, ete bǝ woala nkǝ woeyifo keyifo sɛɛ.

english_verse: That's why officials must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. They must be self-controlled, sensible, well-behaved, friendly to strangers, and able to teach.
translation_verse: Fe bafokanɔfɔ eto ɔtɔnkotɔnkoo, ele bǝ uyifo utidi wǝ bulǝ saa lǝmbǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ, uufi kusiǝ kɔni, uyifo obesibe, ɔkɛ dibusǝ, ɔlɛ ǝsuǝ ola, nya betidi leebu wǝ. Ɔkɛ kafoɛkpɛ kafo bafɔ nya uyifo oteasa sɛɛ.

english_verse: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
translation_verse: Yanle bǝ uyifo utǝkpǝ, nya woankpɔ ekiti. Ele bǝ uyifo utidi wǝ diyuǝ, nya woenyifo nwǝ lǝǝnǝ etiki, nya woansɛsǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ atabi ǝsuǝ tsya.

english_verse: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ uyifo nwǝ laalɛ wǝ diyo eto betidi ola, nya wǝǝtǝ nkǝ wǝ bebi tsyue ditiki koto lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utidi utsyuǝ kpe wǝ leenyi kase woobe wǝ diyoo, ntsyǝ wɔɔyɛ obe Onanto eto betidi ba wɔɔyɛnko?

english_verse: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
translation_verse: Yanle bǝ uyifo nwǝ léfo Onanto ɔnɔ fɔfɔ kase woembobesǝ ǝsuǝ kato, nya ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ ote ǝsuǝ, lǝ ubǝ udu ɔnɔ, nya Onanto luunǝ wǝ koto fe kase únǝ olontidi ǝmǝ koto.

english_verse: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
translation_verse: Ele bǝ uyifo utidi wǝ nkpe diye sɛɛ lǝ mba dímamfo banɔ tsya eto ǝnǝmi, nya luutǝ bǝmbɔtɛyi kulesa bua saa bakpe wǝ kofani bǝ lǝ obuale ǝmǝ lǝ unyǝ wǝ umuǝ.

english_verse: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ beyifo bǝtsyuǝ léfo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ báboko mfo banɔ kekleke ketu ka laanlo mǝ dikpi.

english_verse: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
translation_verse: Nya ele bǝ beto mǝ ditsyibi bebe fɛ. Nya lǝ bǝnyǝ kabua saa lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝǝ, bitǝ lǝ beyifo bawunsǝkotsyuǝ.

english_verse: Women must also be serious. They must not gossip or be heavy drinkers, and they must be faithful in everything they do.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ mǝ bǝsiǝ tsya, yifo besio ba nkpe ditsyǝbi sɛɛ, nya benyifo betidi ba leedi betidi eto ntikima. Bomu ele bǝ beyifo besio ba leekpǝ ntǝ, nya beeyifo lesa saa lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
translation_verse: Be fǝ, bawunsǝkotsyuǝ bamfo eto utsyuǝ saa fi kusiǝ kɔni kplon, nya woalɛ wǝ bebi ku wǝ diyo eto betidi kenke ola.

english_verse: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
translation_verse: Nya bawunsǝkotsyuǝ ba nlɛ mǝ keyifo olaa, mǝ kosate ebunyǝ dibu ku kǝńyǝsǝ sɛɛ lǝ betidi eto ǝnǝmi. Nya bɔɔkɛ utu bedi etiki lǝ mǝ bofokanɔ lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ kate betidi bamba.

english_verse: so if I am delayed, you will know how everyone who belongs to God's family ought to behave. After all, the church of the living God is the strong foundation of truth.
translation_verse: Nlɛ bobe bǝ yǝmbɔklɛ muubǝ nyǝ mi. Fɛɛ nlɛ asa nyamfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ fǝ bǝ lǝ minlɛ bubǝ mlǝǝ, lǝ efo fǝ bɔwunsǝko lǝ ate lesa nǝ ele bǝ yifo fe ɔtɔnkotɔnko lǝ Onanto eto bebi nti. Nya mǝ ba ni Onanto wǝǝ nkpe nkpǝ eto bebii, mǝ ni omayi itǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
translation_verse: Onanto eto ditiki kɛnkɛ nǝ bǝlǝkǝ bátee, kpe kalende tinti nya kuutsyuǝ saa ǝmbofo bɔni nko. Nya ni bǝnkǝ, “Bonamute ǝbǝ bale fe kawunsiǝ eto utidi. Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ǝlǝkǝ óte nkǝ uyifo kɛnkɛ. Nya Onanto eto batɔnkpe dínyǝ wǝ. Nya bǝlǝkǝ wǝ báte lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke nti. Kawunsiǝ eto betidi kpǝ áfo wǝ bánɔ. Nya Onanto dítsyi wǝ úsuko kato lǝ diyǝnde kplɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
translation_verse: Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ǝlǝkǝ óte bo ókpasǝ nkǝ, fɛ kawunsiǝ eto kalosǝkɔ looyoo, betidi bǝtsyuǝ ebɔbɔ lǝ bofokanɔ eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo ǝsuǝ bǝtǝkǝko bidia eto awɔnɔ nnya mba luufi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ obuale ǝmǝ eto asatete.

english_verse: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
translation_verse: Bidia eto asa betidi bamfo laate, nya buufi mǝ disiale eto asatete bakula, itsyise mǝ akɔɛsi ǝkpǝ fe situ ku ute béfi bátonsǝ nnya, bǝmbǝ ɔnukualɛ.

english_verse: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
translation_verse: Mǝ laate bǝ yanle bǝ betidi fi kusiǝ. Nya baatɛyi bǝnkǝ yanle bǝ bedi edisa ǝtsyuǝ eto okle tsya. Fɛɛ Onanto wǝ díyifo edisa kenke utsyǝ nkǝ mba léfo wǝ ditiki banɔ bentekǝko wǝǝ, lǝ bedi ku lɛninsɔ.

english_verse: Everything God created is good. And if you give thanks, you may eat anything.
translation_verse: Nya sitintii, asa nnya kenke Onanto díyifoo, alɛkɛ. Nyaso yanle bǝ utidi saa kisi didisa kuditsyuǝ. Bomu ele bǝ bafo ditsyuǝ saa ku olatoto ku lɛninsɔ.

english_verse: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ ku bo lɛninsɔ lǝǝyifo didisa nǝmǝ kɛnkɛ. Kristo Yesu Eto Usumunyǝ Sɛ.

english_verse: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
translation_verse: Lǝ até fǝ bayimitsyuǝ asa nyamfoo, nya ǝsuǝ fɔɔyɛ afiani Yesu Kristo eto ɔwunsǝko sɛɛ nɛ. Lǝ nya féfi bofokanɔ eto etiki nyamǝ ku asatete fékluǝsǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, nyamfo luutǝ fǝ ǝsuǝle nɛ.

english_verse: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝkǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ etsyiko lǝ amamosa nnya betidi laatɛyi nya dimanyɛ lǝ konantosu nya lǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ saa. Nya kase konantosu lǝ ǝtǝkǝko ko kekleke.

english_verse: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso bɔnlɛ keyifo kekleke nya bɔnlɛ kanyi saa bunyǝ nɛ. Itsyise bo kusubebe tǝkǝ lǝ nkpǝ manlo bo Onanto wǝ ni betidi ba tã eto Ofomfokǝtǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya mba luunyǝ wǝ bofokǝtǝ ni mba léfo wǝ bánɔ.

english_verse: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
translation_verse: Nyamfo ni asa nnya ele bǝ te mǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
translation_verse: Mǝntǝ lǝ betidi bǝtsyuǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ fe amamflɔ itsyise eyifo okosobi eso. Bomuu, fiani ditsyǝbi sɛɛ itǝ bafokanɔfɔ kenke ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ etikididi ku fǝ ditsyǝbi ku fǝ lelabi itǝ betidi ku fǝ bofokanɔ ku fǝ nkpǝ kɛnkɛ busiǝ tsya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Ńyǝ kekleke lǝ akakla Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝkǝtǝ bafokanɔfɔ kenke. Nyaso lǝkǝ nya kasɔ lǝ ate mǝ asa nyamǝ isu ese lefe nǝ muusinkli mbǝ.

english_verse: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
translation_verse: Nya manyɛ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ eto ǝtǝsa nnya úfi útǝ fǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ku bafokanɔfɔ eto batɔnkotɔnko ba dítǝkǝ fǝ anii, eto keyifo buyifo.

english_verse: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
translation_verse: Tǝ lǝ fǝ nsusu lǝ butǝkǝ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ, nya lǝ alɛ nko ekeyifo itǝ lǝ betidi ba tã lǝ bǝnyǝ lǝ fǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ bo fensi eto sɛtɔsusu.

english_verse: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
translation_verse: Lɛ fǝ ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ ku asa nnya faate. Nyǝ kekleke lǝ keyifo ka fanlɛ ǝsuǝ. Itsyise lǝ eyifo nkoo, ebulǝkǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ ku betidi kenke ba laanɔ fǝ ditiki etsyiko lǝ kotonǝnǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
translation_verse: Meyenki akpe nye manlɔ osani wǝ ni fǝ sininǝ ǝtsyǝ ku kudu. Bomu lǝkǝ asa kasɔ ate wǝ ku utu buɛɛ fe fanto seka. Lǝ bakosobi fe bayanisani.

english_verse: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
translation_verse: Lɛ besio ba lebe banso fǝ fe fambe mǝ. Nya lǝ alɛ mbitɛ tsya fe fǝ bayimisio, nya lǝ alɛ fǝ ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: Take care of any widow who is really in need.
translation_verse: Bakɔbǝsiǝ ba lǝmbǝ bawunsǝkotsyuǝǝ, lɛ mǝ kukɔnɔ ku dibu.

english_verse: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
translation_verse: Fɛ lǝ bakɔbǝsiǝ bǝtsyuǝ kpe bebi nye bǝflufluu, tǝ lǝ bebi bamǝ lǝ bakase tutɛ, bakase kase bɔɔlɛ mǝ diyo eto betidi ku mǝ mba léle mǝ ola fe kase mǝ bofokanɔ eto keyifo lete. Ele bǝ bedi betidi ba lǝǝtsyǝ mba léle mǝ kɔlɛ. Nyamfo lǝǝdufǝ Onanto ǝnǝ nɛ.

english_verse: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
translation_verse: Nya ɔkɔsiǝ wǝ lǝmbǝ ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ saa, ufi wǝ kusubebe utǝkǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ lǝ ukato ola ukǝtǝ Onanto ketsye ku kakɔmi itsyise ohiã wǝ bɔwunsǝko.

english_verse: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ ɔkɔsiǝ wǝ leedi sɛsɔnɔɔ, umbǝ nkpǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi, ite bǝ usi nkpǝ tsya.

english_verse: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
translation_verse: Di mǝ etiki ǝkǝ mǝ ato itsyi lǝ asa nyamfo ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ mǝ bǝtsyuǝ nye betidi bamba lembudi mǝ ketikima.

english_verse: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utsyuǝ lǝ mi nti áni nkǝ woǝmbɔlɛ wǝ diyo eto betidi ola kukɔnɔɔ, nyalɛ te fǝ ɔ́ni wǝ bofokanɔ eto kusu komǝ, nya wǝ etiki abia eso utidi wǝ dimamfo ɔnɔ kulaa tsya.

english_verse: She must also be well-known for doing all sorts of good things, such as raising children, giving food to strangers, welcoming God's people into her home, helping people in need, and always making herself useful.
translation_verse: Uyifo nwǝ betidi laakpadi diye sɛɛ lǝ kase unsi nkpǝ sɛɛ eso. Ele bǝ udi usio wǝ nkpe ditsyǝbi sɛɛ wǝ dínǝ wǝ bebi kukɔnɔ nya onkpe kafoɛkpɛ itǝ bafɔbofo. Ele bǝ uyifo usio wǝ nkpe kafo ɛkpɛ itǝ wǝ bǝtsyuǝ ku bafokanɔfɔ tsyuǝ. Nya woawunsǝ ko betidi ba kenke nkpe lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya lǝ ɔnukualɛɛ, ufi nkpǝ bo kenke unsi itǝ kasɛɛ eto buyifo.

english_verse: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
translation_verse: Bakɔbǝsiǝ ba dimamfo tɔ alɛ fosi akuaa, mǝmfi mǝ aye akɔ lǝ bakɔbǝsiǝ eto ditsyukpa nǝmfo nti. Itsyise lǝ kusǝsiǝsiǝ lǝ mǝ ɔkɔɛ, boosinkli lǝ Kristo kama besu bǝsiǝ bese fɔfɔ.

english_verse: and become guilty of breaking their promise to him.
translation_verse: Nya nyamfo ebutǝ bata kakle ka nkpe lǝ mǝ ku Onanto nti bebu itǝ bedi dikpi.

english_verse: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, boofiani baflɔ bakatsyilama betidi eto ayo kedi etiki bimba nnya lǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ. Nya nnya nsi lebia enso ni bǝǝ, bookakpadi betidi aye bua kedi mǝ ketikima katɛyi etiki nnya dimamfe.

english_verse: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
translation_verse: Nyasoo, nla miǝ bakɔbǝsiǝ bamfo eto kakle siǝ bese lǝ bale bebi lǝ bǝsiǝ babe mǝ ayo bomu. Nyamfo ebutǝ bǝ bembuyifo asa nnya dimǝńyǝ itǝ nya luutǝ bo balo kusu bǝ bǝkedi etiki bua saa lǝ bo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
translation_verse: Lǝ bakɔbǝsiǝ bǝtsyuǝ kpe lǝ usio wǝ díkafo banɔ eto diyoo, ele bǝ obe mǝ ɔlɛ mǝ ola, itǝ bǝ mǝ bitsyikǝ ǝmbubǝ itǝkǝ lǝ Onanto eto bafokanɔfɔ ǝsuǝ. Nyamfo luutǝ kusu bǝ bafokanɔfɔ mfó eto ditsyukpa ebofo bakɔɛsiǝ bamba ba lǝmbǝ bawunsǝkotsyuǝ ola bɔlɛ.

english_verse: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Nya bafokanɔfɔ eto batɔnkotɔnko ba nlɛ mǝ keyifo kamǝ olaa, ele bǝ bǝtǝ mǝ kayofofo ka disu sɛtɔ eto sinuǝ. Titlu mba laate asa fɛ bensi beedi betidi Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ tsya.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
translation_verse: Itsyise bátɛyi lǝ Awɔnisa Eto Kukue Kɛnkɛ bǝnkǝ, “Mankle onantsyui wǝ laafodi kamɔ kǝtǝ fǝ eto kɛnyɛ lǝ ɔlɛ keyifo.” Besi bátɛyi tsya bǝǝ, “Ele bǝ uyifoyifo saa nyǝ wǝ kayofofo itsyi lǝ keyifo ka ɔnlɛ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
translation_verse: Lǝ utidi utsyuǝ ǝbǝ ɔlɛ ɔtɔnkotɔnko utsyuǝ kɛnyɛ bolaa, mamfo nnya anɔ isu ese lefe nǝ ɛflɔ betidi inuǝ ku kama.

english_verse: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba lǝǝsiǝ nkpǝ buaa, lǝkǝ mǝ até lǝ mǝ bǝtsyuǝ nti lǝ ǝkǝ mǝ ato lǝ bafokanɔfɔ kenke eto ǝnǝmi. Nyamfo luutǝ bafɛfɛ te sikpi nɛ.

english_verse: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ fǝ kɔlɛ bɔlɛ lǝ Onanto ku Kristo ku Onanto eto batɔnkpe kenke eto ǝnǝmi minkǝ lɛ nyamfo ola kukɔnɔ lǝ ayɛ betidi eto ǝnǝmi bobe bǝ lǝ esu ala utsyuǝ aso utsyuǝ.

english_verse: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
translation_verse: Tsyǝ ǝsuǝ, mankpɔ lǝ ani butǝkǝ lǝ utsyuǝ ǝsuǝ itǝ kanantoyifo buyifo. Nya makɔko babuayifo saa, bomu lǝkǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ lebuayifoyifo saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
translation_verse: Nya se kafo eto bufi nkpe fǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, mantɛyi fǝ ǝkǝnǝ ntu fufu ete. Yɔɔlɛkɛ bǝ ǝkǝnǝ nte sɛkɛ sɛkɛ fe kofa seka.

english_verse: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
translation_verse: Betidi bǝtsyuǝ eto abua nnya beeyifo amfo bɔbiɔ nyaso yǝǝlǝkǝ mǝ dikpididi kate koko. Fɛ bǝtsyuǝǝ, kama kama fɛ mǝ asabuayifoyifo tsya lǝǝbǝ kabɔ bǝǝnyǝ.

english_verse: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
translation_verse: Nko kǝ ini bǝ asasɛyifoyifo tsya ǝmbofo bɔbiɔ, nya nnya lɛbiɔ tsya ebubǝ ɛbɔɔ lekple utsyuǝ saa nyǝ.

english_verse: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
translation_verse: Tɛyi bafokanɔfɔ ba ni ndomufɔ kenke fǝnkǝ ele bǝ babokosǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bǝtǝ mǝ banamute lǝ keyifokɔ, bǝ betidi saa embudi etiki bua saa itsyi lǝ Onanto ku bo bofokanɔ eto asatete ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
translation_verse: Nya ndomufɔ eto banamute ni bafokanɔfɔɔ, mántaka bǝńyǝ lǝ banamute bamǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ bofokanɔ eto sɛyimididi bataka. Bomu ele bǝ babokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bǝtǝ mǝ bawunsǝko mǝ kulaa enso. Itsyise betidi ba baanlɛ bɔwunsǝko mfoo, beyifo mba lefo Yesu banɔ. Nya mǝ ku mǝmǝ kenke eyifo wǝ bale ba woala tinti. Nyamfo ele bǝ te mǝ lǝ akpe mǝ nkɛale lǝ beyifo ele bǝ beyifo lǝ bakpe mǝ nkɛale. Binyǝ Kekleke Lǝ Mi Onanto Kama Butǝkǝko Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ ke laate asa bamba nya laanlɛ bɔyɛ lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ ǝsuǝ, utsyǝ ǝmǝ lɛ wǝ ǝsuǝ kato bobesǝ unyi kulesa. Iyifo etiki bunǝ bimba ku kǝdiǝ ku bulǝ bimba ete woakpe. Nyamfo lǝǝtǝ betidi kǝnǝnsɛ, ndiǝkpekpe ku abiesese, ku nsusu bua bufi lǝ utidi ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
translation_verse: Nya bǝǝnǝ etiki kǝntsyɛɛ lefe saa. Betidi bamfo eto okle eto nsunsu ebukpǝ nya bensiyi Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto ɔnukualɛ. Mǝ nsusu ete ni bǝnkǝ bǝǝtǝkǝko Ditiki Sɛɛ nɛ mǝ kama lǝ bayɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ bafiani batabinyǝ. Lǝkǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ etsyiko mbamfo eto okle ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ utidi akpe ɔtsyini kekleke lǝ Onanto eto bɔsumu ǝsuǝ nya asa nnya nte wǝ tsya dídufǝ wǝ ǝnǝǝ, uyifo otabinyǝ.

english_verse: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
translation_verse: Itsyise fe kase bále boo, bóanlɛ kulesa boboko kawunsiǝ. Nya lǝ bukpe tsyaa, boǝmbufi kulesa busuko.

english_verse: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bikǝ ku edisa nya ntǝ bo lǝ imi bo.

english_verse: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi ba laasɛsǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ bikǝ eto bɔkɛ ǝsuǝǝ, mǝ leedufǝ lǝ Obonsam eto uyibi wǝ obio utsyǝ mǝ nɛ. Nya beetsyiko asa bimba buyifo, nya beefi kawunsiǝ eto bikǝ bɔbɛbɛ kakpimi lǝ ǝsuǝ nya baabiasǝ mǝ nkpǝ itǝ bǝǝkpǝ kanya kulaa.

english_verse: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
translation_verse: Itsyise ǝnǝmi bɔsɛsǝ lǝ atabi bɔbɛbɛ ǝsuǝ laayɛnko asa bua kpǝ eto buyifo. Betidi bǝtsyuǝ lǝ kǝnǝsɛ lǝ atabi eto bɔkɛ eso áyansǝ mǝ bofokanɔ eto kusu. Nya mǝ nkpǝ kenke édufǝ lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ. Ńyǝ Lǝ Bofokanɔ Eto Keyifo Eto Kusu Ǝsuǝ Kekleke.

english_verse: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
translation_verse: Nya se feyifo utidi wǝ dífi fǝ ǝsuǝ utǝ Onanto esoo, lǝkǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ asa bua nyamfo kenke eto buyifo ǝsuǝ lǝ efi fǝ ǝnǝmi ǝtǝkǝ lǝ asa sɛɛ buyifo ǝsuǝ. Tǝkǝko Boanto Onanto lǝ bofokanɔ ku lelabi ǝsuǝ. Kɛ dibusǝ lǝ alɛ betidi buɛɛ.

english_verse: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
translation_verse: Ńyǝ kekleke lǝ bofokanɔ eto keyifo ǝsuǝ lǝ akpe nkɛale lǝ ǝnyǝ nkpǝ manlo manlo. Nkpǝ bomfo eso Onanto lékpadi fǝ lǝ lefe nǝ fáfo wǝ bokpadi eto bofokanɔ fáte lǝ mba díkafo babɔ ku babamba eto ǝnǝmi nɛ.

english_verse: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Onanto wǝ diyifo lesa saa ku Kristo wǝ dífǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ úlǝkǝ wǝ bofokanɔ óte lǝ Pontio Pilato eto ǝnǝmii, nlɛ mɔ Ditiki Sɛɛ bufi kǝtǝ fǝ, ini mɔ kɔfi.

english_verse: Promise to obey completely and fully all that you have been told until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi minkǝ lɛ asa nyamfo ola kase kuutsyuǝ lǝmbɔtɛyi kulesa bua itsyi lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ isu ese lefe nǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo luusinkli ubǝ.

english_verse: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
translation_verse: Nya Onanto ebutǝ Yesu Kristo sinkli ubǝ lǝ lefe nǝ ɛlɛkɛ itǝ wǝ. Onanto ni nwǝ nso kenke ku ni nwǝ fate nlɛ seka budi lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ, nya uni baka kenke eto oka. Nya lesa saa laakpo wǝ Bonamute Onanto. Nya wǝ ni nwǝ boatɛsǝ.

english_verse: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
translation_verse: Wǝ fate insi nkpǝ itsyise wǝǝkpe kulefe kulefe. Nya wǝǝyǝnde itǝ bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa ǝmbofo buńyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ ɔlɛ bubǝ. Kuutsyuǝ saa mǝnnyǝ wǝ tɔ unyǝ nya kuutsyuǝ saa tsya ǝmbofo wǝ ǝnǝmi bobe. Nya atɛsǝ ku ǝsuǝale ni wǝ ale lefe saa. Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
translation_verse: Tɛyi mba nkpe kawunsiǝ kamfo eto bikǝ fǝnkǝ, bambesǝ ǝsuǝ kato befi mǝ ǝnǝmi bǝtǝkǝ lǝ mi, bikǝ bia lalo ǝsuǝ. Bomu befi mǝ ǝnǝmi bǝtǝkǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ. Wǝ uni lǝǝtǝ bo lesa saa kafo faa nkǝ lǝ bunyǝ disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
translation_verse: Tɛyi mǝ fǝ bekeyifo kasɛɛ nya luutǝ boofiani batabinyǝ bǝnyǝ atsyɔkpokpo lǝ nnya buuyifo ǝsuǝ. Nya lǝ bǝkǝtǝ betidi asa kafo faa.

english_verse: This will lay a solid foundation for the future, so they will know what true life is like.
translation_verse: Lǝ beyifo nkoo, balɛ bikǝ bia lambia bɔɔlɔ kǝtsyǝ itǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ kama ka nlɛ bubǝ. Lǝ nya ǝsuǝ boonyǝ nkpǝ tinti bǝtǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
translation_verse: Timoteo, be fǝ alɔ asa nnya Onanto dífi útǝ fǝ ǝtsyǝ kukɔnɔ. Memfi fǝ ǝsuǝ akpe lǝ eyifosa bimba ku etikinǝnǝ bimba ǝsuǝ. Nyamfo ǝsuǝ betidi bǝtsyuǝ laayɛ kawɛ betidi fe mba ni babesibe.

english_verse: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Itsyise bǝtsyuǝ efi bǝ beyi asa nyamfo. Fɛɛ ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ bányansǝ mǝ bofokanɔ eto kusu. Nlɛ Onanto bɔtɔ miǝ ufi wǝ lefonǝ obe mi.

english_verse: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus. God himself chose me to be an apostle, and he gave me the promised life that Jesus Christ makes possible.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, wǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ ǝsuǝ mimfiani Yesu Kristo eto ɔtɔnkpe, wǝ nlɛ letsya bobe itsyi lǝ nkpǝ bo buunyǝ lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ lǝ bo ku wǝ eto lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɛni kǝtǝ fǝ.

english_verse: Timothy, you are like a dear child to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Christ Jesus will be kind and merciful to you and will bless you with peace! Do Not Be Ashamed of the Lord
translation_verse: Mɔ ubi lala Timoteo, nlɛ Boanto Onanto ku Bonamute Kristo Yesu bɔtɔ miǝ mǝ lefonǝ lǝ disiǝko fǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ fǝ kaminsǝ, lǝ bǝtǝ fǝ diyuǝsǝ. Nyǝ Kekleke Lǝ Bofokanɔ Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
translation_verse: Maasɔ Onanto wǝ meesumu fe kase mɔ banamǝ díyifo ani. Nya meeyifo nko ku mɔ utu wǝ laanlo mɛ dikpi ǝsuǝ. Nya, masɔ wǝ ani ketsye ku kakɔmi kalɛ wǝ lekpakpa lǝ fǝ disi lǝ nlɛ ola boto.

english_verse: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nkloma binǝntu bia féwii, mala tinti miǝ mǝǝnyǝ fǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ iyuǝ mɛ.

english_verse: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
translation_verse: Maakloma bofokanɔ kekleke bo nkpe fǝ. Bofokanɔ bo eto okle lɛkɛ fǝ ewu Lois ku fambe Eunike mǝ. Mfo nnɔ miǝ fintsya kpe mu okle.

english_verse: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
translation_verse: Nsusu bomfo eso minlɛ fǝ kukue komfo bɔwɔni bǝ lǝ alɛ kekleke ǝtǝsa nnya Onanto dítǝ fǝ lǝ lefe nǝ mímfi ani míntǝkǝ fǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ mínto ola.

english_verse: God's Spirit doesn't make cowards out of us. The Spirit gives us power, love, and self-control.
translation_verse: Itsyise lɛwɔnɔ nǝ Onanto dítǝ boo, ǝǝntǝ boate sikpi. Bomuu, útǝ bo lɛwɔnɔ nǝ lǝǝtǝ boǝnyǝ ǝsuǝale, ku lelabi, ku ǝsuǝ eto lɛkɔɛle kato butǝkǝ tsya.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, mǝntǝ lǝ kofani lǝ kɔlɛ fǝ bǝ ǝńyǝ alɛ Bonamute eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ mǝ bɔtɛyi nye lǝ kofani lǝ kɔlɛ fǝ lǝ mɔ disi nwǝ bákpe le diyo lǝ Kristo eto disi.
