Bomuu, fintsya ńyǝ kekleke lǝ ǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ wǝ disi lǝ ǝlǝkǝ Bonamute eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ate. Itsyise Onanto ǝtǝ fǝ ǝsuǝale bǝ lǝ afo nyamfo buyifo.

english_verse: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
translation_verse: Onanto ni nwǝ dítǝ bo nkpǝ nya ókpadi bo nkǝ bofiani wǝ betidi. Inni lǝ bo kasɛɛ ka búyifo eso. Bomuu, iyifo wǝ Onanto eto nsusu ku kafo ɛkpɛ ka úfi útǝ bo eso. Nya ɛyɛ lǝ bo lɔniyifoyifo ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ nya búnyǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ nǝmfo fɛ úyifo kawunsiǝ kulaa tsya.

english_verse: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, Onanto ébulǝkǝ nyamfo óte bo ekpa wuǝ lǝ Ofomfokǝtǝ Kristo Yesu ǝmfo eto bubǝ ǝsuǝ. Wǝ ni futsyǝ léso ukpǝ ku eto ǝsuǝale ani. Nya ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ ǝsuǝǝ, óboko bo nkpǝ bo kalosɛkɔ lǝnsiembɔkɛ kulefe.

english_verse: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
translation_verse: Onanto efi mɛ uyifo nwǝ loobe wǝ letsya ku ɔtɔnkpe ku wǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo eto oteasa.

english_verse: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ nyamfo esoo, nya minlɛ kanyi bunyǝ nɛ. Fɛɛ kofani annlɛ mɛ. Itsyise mfo nnɔ sitinti, nya nyi utidi wǝ ǝsuǝ mɔ bofokanɔ nkpe. Nya nyi tsya miǝ woose mɛ ku nya kenke mimfi minlɛ bokpe lǝ wǝ ani isu ese lǝ Diyi nǝmǝ.

english_verse: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
translation_verse: Lɛ etiki sɛɛ ku nnya kenke mínte fǝ kukɔnɔ kekleke, nya lǝ ayɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Fo nya anɔ kekleke nya lǝ eyifo lɔni ku Kristo Yesu lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsuǝale nya nkpe lǝ bo ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ alɛ asa sɛɛ nya kenke béfi bǝtǝ fǝ kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
translation_verse: Eyi fǝ Asiafɔ eto bafokanɔfɔ kenke édu mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ, nko ke ni Figelo ku Hermefene tsya lídu mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ nɛ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
translation_verse: Nlɛ Bonamute lekpakpa miǝ unyǝ Onesiforo ku wǝ diyo eto betidi kaminsǝ itsyise yéanlɛ wǝ kofani bǝ bákpe mɛ lǝ diyo. Bomuu, úńyǝ ko mɛ nnya ɔ́wunsǝ ko mɛ tinti.

english_verse: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ úbǝ Romaa, ótsyilama kenke ɔ́bɛbɛ mɛ isu ese lefene eto lefe únyǝ mɛ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
translation_verse: Nlɛ bɔtɔ miǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ unyǝ wǝ kaminsǝ lǝ wǝ Lekpoyi ǝsuǝ. Fǝ kosate yi esu kpǝ nnya ǝsuǝ ɔ́wunsǝko mɛ lǝ Efeso.

english_verse: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Nya fǝ, mɔ ubi, kpe nkɛale ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ nǝ úfi útǝ bo bǝ bookpe lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku Kristo Yesu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ asa nnya fánɔ bǝ nte lǝ betidi kpǝ eto ǝnǝmii, nko kǝ ele bǝ fintsya fi akpe lǝ betidi ba léfobanɔ eto ani bǝ lǝ befi besu bate betidi bamba tsya.

english_verse: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
translation_verse: Ńyǝ kekleke lǝ kanyi ǝsuǝ fe kase omamanyǝ sɛɛ lǝǝńyǝ, ǝtǝ Kristo Yesu.

english_verse: Soldiers on duty don't work at outside jobs. They try only to please their commanding officer.
translation_verse: Omamanyǝ wǝ ńyǝ sitinti itǝ wǝ keyifoo, woola nkǝ wǝ eyifosa lǝ ekpe wǝ uninǝ disuǝyuǝ. Nyaso woǝnsiǝmbufi ani okpe lǝ betidi ba lenni bamamanyǝ eto asa nnya beeyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: No one wins an athletic contest without obeying the rules.
translation_verse: Nko ini nɛ bǝ fɛ nwǝ leetsyetsyi lǝ udi ututɛɛ, ele bǝ uyifo lǝ afi nnya baakpe ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
translation_verse: Ɔkuɛmfo wǝ leeyifo keyifo ku otsyekle lǝ wǝ ɔkuɛɛ, wǝ ni futsyǝ laaka wǝ bidikǝ bia budi nɛ.

english_verse: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
translation_verse: Bu disi lǝ etiki nnya minlɛ fǝ bɔtɛyi mfo kenke laabe, itsyise nyi minkǝ Bonamute ebutǝ anɔ nyamblɛ kenke kasɔ.

english_verse: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
translation_verse: Kloma Yesu Kristo wǝ ni Oka David eto ufluflu wǝ Onanto létakasǝ úńyǝnsǝ utsyi ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ fe kase Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ minlɛ bɔtɛyi mfo nlɛ bote.

english_verse: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
translation_verse: Nnlɛ kanyi bunyǝ lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ maatɛyi eso. Nya bakpe mɛ lǝ amana kulaa tsya fe utidi wǝ leeyifo asa bua. Fɛɛ Onanto eto etiki alɛɛ, bǝmbofo ni kusu buti!

english_verse: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eso maafo lesa saa akamini itǝ Onanto eto betidi ba ukǝlǝkǝ utsyǝ esoo, bǝ lǝ mǝ tsya lǝ bǝnyǝ bofo bo ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo Yesu mate ǝsuǝ lǝ bɔyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ bunyǝ nkpǝ manlo eto disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
translation_verse: Ɔnukualɛ uni baatɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Lǝ búkpe ku wǝǝ, bo tsya ebusiǝ nkpǝ ku wǝ.

english_verse: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
translation_verse: Lǝ bofo buńyǝ kekleke lǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ saa ǝsuǝǝ, buudi seka ku wǝ. Lǝ bɔni wǝǝ, wuntsya ebɔni bo.

english_verse: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
translation_verse: Lǝ ibǝ bǝ bɔ́yɛ bofokanɔ lǝ wǝ kula tsyaa, wǝǝ, ǝmbɔyɛ buyifo lǝ kɛnyɛ ka utsyǝ ǝsuǝ. Itsyise wǝmbɔni wǝ ǝsuǝ kulefe.” Lɛ Fǝ Ǝsuǝ Kukɔnɔ Bǝ Lǝ Onanto Lǝ Ofo Fǝ Kayo Sɛ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
translation_verse: Kaklomasǝ mǝ asa nyamfo nya lǝ ǝkǝ mǝ ato kekleke lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi bǝ lǝ bayɛ etiki bunǝ. Itsyise kasɛɛ saa aambɔ le nya ǝsuǝ. Bomu asa nyamfo ǝtǝ bǝ yaabiasǝ mba laanɔ nya. Mǝ bofokanɔ ebɔyuɛ.

english_verse: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
translation_verse: Lɛ fǝ ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ Onanto utǝ fǝ kayofofo sɛɛ. Yifo fǝ keyifo kukɔnɔ bǝ kofani lǝ kɔyɛ fǝ bɔlɛ. Bomu yifo utidi wǝ laate Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛ kosate ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Keep away from worthless and useless talk. It only leads people farther away from God.
translation_verse: Lǝkǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ etsyiko lǝ akuɛntiki ku asa bimba bɔtɛyi ǝsuǝ. Itsyise betidi ba leeyifo asa nyamfo eto oklee, yǝǝlǝkǝ mǝ nsusu ketsyiko lǝ Onanto sikpibote ǝsuǝ famfamfa.

english_verse: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo eto okle bote ale lefabe nǝ leenkpǝ nǝ laanyi kpitikpitikpiti. Nya betidi inuǝ ba léte asa nyamfo eto kakle ni Himeneo ku Fileto.

english_verse: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
translation_verse: Banya kusu itsyi lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝ, nya banlɛ bafokanɔfɔ eto nsusu bobiasǝ katɛyi bǝnkǝ botaka ketsyi ɔkɔmǝ kǝbǝ nkpǝ eto lefe ébubǝ éfe.

english_verse: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto eto diyo eto leba nǝ ǝsuǝ óse ofati úńyǝnsǝǝ, ni nsi ńyǝ. Nya leba nǝmfo ǝsuǝǝ, ɔ́wɔni etiki nya lǝǝbǝ mfo nkǝ, “Bonamute yi betidi ba ni wǝ bale nya,” nya “Utidi wǝ laatɛyi nkǝ ɔlɛ Bonamute busumuu, ele bǝ usinkli lǝ asa bua buyifo kama.”

english_verse: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
translation_verse: Lǝ diyo kplɛ saa, kedikpɛ akpa akpa lǝǝtsyǝ mfo. Befi sika sia béyifo kǝtsyuǝ kǝtsyuǝ ku sika flubia. Nya kǝtsyuǝ tsya sitǝ beefi baato kǝ fɛ nka baawoe tsya nkpe. Beeyifo kakpɛ kamfo lǝ esu esu ǝsuǝ, kǝtsyuǝ itǝ eyi sɛɛ eto budi eto keyifo. Nya kǝtsyuǝ tsya itǝ diyi saa eto keyifo buyifo.

english_verse: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ utidi utsyuǝ ǝlǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ utsyiko lǝ asa bua ǝsuǝ nya uyifo wǝ ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛɛ, ofo koya utǝ Bonamute fenkǝ kakpɛ ka baalɔ bǝǝtsyǝ itǝ eyisɛdidi. Itǝ bǝ boofo wǝ bufi itǝ keyifo sɛɛ saa buyifo.

english_verse: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
translation_verse: Lǝkǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ etsyiko lǝ bakosobi eto alasa bimba butǝkǝko ǝsuǝ. Nya yifo lesa saa lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ, lǝ ǝsiǝ bofokanɔ eto nkpǝ sɛɛ, lǝ akala betidi, nya lǝ ǝsiǝ nkpǝ kpoo ku mǝ lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ. Yifo asa nyamfo ku mba nsi nkoǝ sɛɛ, laato ola ku ketu ka lekpa bǝ ɔwunsǝko mi.

english_verse: Stay away from stupid and senseless arguments. These only lead to trouble,
translation_verse: Lǝkǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ etsyiko lǝ ebukitiki ku etiki bimba budi ǝsuǝ, itsyise kǝdiǝ ete asa nyamfo eto oklee, lǝǝnǝ kaboko.

english_verse: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
translation_verse: Nya yanle bǝ Bonamute eto usumunyǝ, lǝ ukǝdiǝ kǝdiǝ. Bomu ele bǝ ukǝyifo kafoɛkpɛ kǝtǝ utsyuǝ saa, udi oteasa sɛɛ, nya uyifo utidi wǝ diyuǝ.

english_verse: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba laataka kǝnyǝ lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo ǝsuǝǝ, ele bǝ ofo asa kasɔ bulǝkǝ kate mǝ ku utu buɛɛ. Nya ditsyuǝ Onanto ebutǝ nkǝ batsyi lɛkɔɛsi bawuninsǝ lǝ bafo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, mǝ nsusu ebɔsini bǝ lǝ bani Obonsam wǝ dífi mǝ úyifo mba leyifo wǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
translation_verse: Tsyǝ nyamfo lekpo fǝǝ, lǝ eyi fɛfɛ ǝsuǝǝ, lefe nǝ lɔɔkɛ ale ebubǝ.

english_verse: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
translation_verse: Betidi bamfo eto okle ákplatsya kate bǝ mǝ ni betidi sɛɛ, fɛɛ bámfo Onanto eto ǝsuǝale bǝ bɔkɛ lǝ mǝ nkpǝ bo bensi ǝsuǝ. Nǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ ǝlǝkǝ lǝ betidi bamfi nti.

english_verse: Some men fool whole families, just to get power over those women who are slaves of sin and are controlled by all sorts of desires.
translation_verse: Itsyise betidi bamfo eto okloee, beeyu kedufǝ lǝ betidi eto ayo kabiasǝ besio ba eto nsusu lǝmbǝ ale. Besio bamfó eto abua eyifo bitsyike itǝ mǝ itsyise beyifo abua akpa akpa nnya laakpa mǝ kakpe lǝ abua kpǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: These women always want to learn something new, but they never can discover the truth.
translation_verse: Besio bamfo eto kakle aakase asa lefe saa, tsya bamfó etiki nyamǝ kasɔ bɔnɔ sitinti kulefe.

english_verse: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi bamfo eto okle ǝmbǝ sɛtɔ buusu, itsyise mǝ sɛmumu sia nkpe mǝ ebɔbɔ ete utidi saa nyǝ fe mba nlɛ asa nyamfo eto okle buyifo nko, fe kase ibǝ lǝ Yane ku Yambre ǝsuǝ. Boanto Onanto Ebulǝkǝ Fǝ Utsyiko Lǝ Bulǝ Saa Eto Okle Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Timothy, you know what I teach and how I live. You know what I want to do and what I believe. You have seen how patient and loving I am, and how in the past I put up with
translation_verse: Fɛ fǝǝ, ébunyǝ nya feenyi mɔ asatete, mɔ nkpǝ bo minsi, mɔ nsusu ku mɔ bofokanɔ, kase maakplatsya, kase maala betidi, ku kase mǝǝmuǝ utu kalɛ lǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: trouble and suffering in the cities of Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. Yet the Lord rescued me from all those terrible troubles.
translation_verse: Eyi kase bǝtǝnko mɛ, bákpe mɛ bulǝ, mínyǝ kanyi lefe nǝ mímbǝ Antiokia ku Ikonion ku Listra. Kloma ohiã kplɛ wǝ báte mɛ. Fɛ lǝ nnya amblɛ ǝsuǝǝ, Bonamute ǝlǝkǝ mɛ utsyiko lǝ nnya kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
translation_verse: Ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ ni bǝnkǝǝ, betidi ba kenke lǝǝsiǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, boonyǝ kanyi nya bookpe mǝ bulǝ bǝńyǝ mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Betidi bua ku bidiabidia eto bateasa mǝǝ, kato ko mǝ asa bua buyifo loobe fe kase baanlɛ betidi bɔwɛ kakpe ke. Nya mǝ kosate tsya betidi bamba ebukawɛ mǝ kakpe.

english_verse: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
translation_verse: Nya fǝǝ, nla miǝ lǝ ǝńyǝ lǝ asa nnya fákase nya fáfo fánɔ tsya ǝsuǝ kekleke. Itsyise eyi betidi ba ɔflɔ fákase nya.

english_verse: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
translation_verse: Idu lǝ fǝ sikpefi lefe kee, áte Kukue Kɛnkɛ eto Awɔnisa eto etiki nya díbǝ yɛwunsǝko fǝ fafiani obesibe, lǝ nyaso bofokǝtǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ fánɔ.

english_verse: Everything in the Scriptures is God's Word. All of it is useful for teaching and helping people and for correcting them and showing them how to live.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ nya bɔyɛɛ buunyǝ asa nnya kenke baawɔni baakpe lǝ Kukue Kɛnkɛ eto Asawɔniwɔni kǝmiǝ. Nya ɛlɛkɛ itǝ asatete ku bunyenki kakpe utidi ku kɔlɛlɛ ku bunǝfofo itǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ siǝsiǝ.

english_verse: The Scriptures train God's servants to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Báwɔni nya nko bǝ lǝ utidi saa wǝ difi wǝ ǝsuǝ utǝ Onanto ebɔflɔ nya yɔɔlɔ wǝ itsyǝ itǝ keyifo sɛɛ saa buyifo.

english_verse: When Christ Jesus comes as king, he will be the judge of everyone, whether they are living or dead. So with God and Christ as witnesses, I command you
translation_verse: Nnyǝ lǝ Onanto ku Kristo Yesu wǝ luusinkli ubǝ okponko kawunsiǝ eto betidi ku bǝkpǝnkpǝ akpo eto kɛnyɛ. Nya se wuusinkli ubǝ bio lǝ wǝ Sekadidi ǝsuǝ esoo, nlɛ fǝ kɔlɛ bɔlɛ kekleke minkǝ,

english_verse: to preach God's message. Do it willingly, even if it isn't the popular thing to do. You must correct people and point out their sins. But also cheer them up, and when you instruct them, always be patient.
translation_verse: bekpe kɔni o-o, bimbǝ kɔni o-o tsyaa, bilǝkǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ kɛnyɛ bete. Bɛlɛ mǝ kɔlɛ, nya binyɛnki bekpe mǝ, lǝ bekpe mǝ nkɛale. Nya lǝ alɛ asakasɔ bulǝkǝ kate mǝǝ, tsyǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ efi utu buɛ ku disuǝtsyǝ até mǝ.

english_verse: The time is coming when people won't listen to good teaching. Instead, they will look for teachers who will please them by telling them only what they are itching to hear.
translation_verse: Itsyise lefe ditsyuǝ ebubǝ lefe nǝ betidi lensiǝmbɔtɔnǝ bǝ bǝǝtsyue ato banɔ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo. Bomu boola bǝ baanɔ bateasa bamba ba lɔɔtɛyi mǝ etiki nya eto okle boola bǝ baakanɔ.

english_verse: They will turn from the truth and eagerly listen to senseless stories.
translation_verse: Bootsyiko kama butsyi kakpe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo kǝtǝko etiki tsyuɛntsyuɛ eto kama.

english_verse: But you must stay calm and be willing to suffer. You must work hard, telling the good news and to do your job well.
translation_verse: Nya fǝǝ, lɛ fǝ ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ lǝ ayɛ lǝ kusu ko lɛlɛkɛ ǝsuǝ lǝ ekakpe ale lǝ kanyi saa ǝsuǝ. Nya lǝ eyifo keyifo kamǝ fe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eto nwǝ laabe ni letsya. Nya lǝ eyifo fǝ keyifo kukɔnɔ fe bafokanɔfɔ eto ɔtɔnkotɔnko.

english_verse: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
translation_verse: Itsyise mɔɔ, mɔ nkpǝ fe bɔlɛ kalosǝkɔ bubǝ nya boofi mɛ fe keditǝtǝ. Nya lefe tsya boyo bǝ mfe ndu lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo.

english_verse: I have fought well. I have finished the race, and I have been faithful.
translation_verse: Nkpɔ bɔkpɔ sɛɛ nya mínlosǝ mɔ keyifo fe nwǝ leetsyetsyi etsyi sɛɛ. Nya minlɛ mɔ bofokanɔ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ isu ese lǝ kalosǝkɔ.

english_verse: So a crown will be given to me for pleasing the Lord. He judges fairly, and on the day of judgment he will give a crown to me and to everyone else who wants him to appear with power. Personal Instructions
translation_verse: Nya idu mɔmɔɔ, Onanto ebutǝ mɛ kayofofo sɛɛ ka nlɛ bote nkǝ nsi nkpǝ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ fe nwǝ lefo ɔnɔ eto kayofofo ka bálɔ bǝtsyǝ itǝ mɛ. Iyifo kayofofo sɛɛ ka Bonamute wǝ laakpo lekpo lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ luutǝ mɛ lǝ duyi fɛfɛ ǝsuǝ. Nya inni mɔ mate ete loofo ni, bomu bonko betidi bamba ba kenke tsya díkǝfi mǝ kusubebe bǝtǝkǝ lǝ Bonamute eto bubǝ bio ǝsuǝ. Bǝ Mlǝ, Lǝ Ǝbǝ Ǝnyǝ Mɛ.

english_verse: Come to see me as soon as you can.
translation_verse: Yɛ kusu saa foofo lǝ ǝbǝ ǝnyǝ mɛ.

english_verse: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
translation_verse: Itsyise Dema edu mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ lǝ usu utǝkǝko kawunsiǝ kamfo eto bikǝ lǝ Tesalonika. Nya Kreskee, usu Galatia nya Tito dísu Dalmatia.

english_verse: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
translation_verse: Luka hã dibu onkpe mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ mfo. Nyaso kpa Marko lǝ bibǝ, itsyise uuyifo ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ tinti utǝ mɛ.

english_verse: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
translation_verse: Ntsyese Tihiko Efeso.

english_verse: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ alɛ bubǝ, fo mɔ lɛyɔlefe eto awu nya míyani mintsyǝ lǝ Karpo ɔflɔ lǝ Troia aboko mɛ. Nya lǝ efi mɔ ekue titlu nya béfi kubukikue béyifo tsya aboko.

english_verse: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
translation_verse: Aleksandro wǝ ni ɔtsyuɛntsyuɛ eyifo mɛ kabua tinti. Nya Bonamute ebofo wǝ kayo lǝ nnya kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
translation_verse: Nyaso fintsya ńyǝ kekleke lǝ abe kukɔnɔ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise ótaka uńyǝ lǝ bo asa nnya bɔnlɛ bote ǝsuǝ kekleke.

english_verse: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ bákpadi mɛ ditutɛ lǝ lekpo etii, kutsyuǝ sa mámfo bubǝ kǝńyǝ mɛ kama lǝ etiki nyamǝ eti, bomu báyani mɛ bǝtsyǝ bédu. Fɛɛ nlɛ Onanto lekpakpa minkǝ wǝǝnnǝ mǝ koto lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Bonamute ǝńyǝ mɛ kama nya ókpe mɛ nkɛale nya dítǝ mimfo Bonamute eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya bobe kǝtǝ mba lenni Yudafɔ mfo. Nya Bonamute dílǝkǝ mɛ utsyiko lǝ ukpǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Bonamute ebulǝkǝ mɛ utsyiko lǝ kabua saa ǝsuǝ, nya wookpa mɛ ɔyɛnko buɛ buɛ isu ese lefe nǝ mindufǝ wǝ sekakedikɔ kato. Diyǝnde eto atɛsǝ bufi bɔnlɛ Wǝ butǝ idu mɔmɔ isu manlo manlo. Ibǝ itǝ. Nnlɛ Mi Bokla.

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
translation_verse: Mǝǝsiǝsǝ Priska ku Akwila ku Onesiforo eto diyo eto betidi kenke.

english_verse: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
translation_verse: Erasto si okpe lǝ Korinto. Trofimo tsya lɛ bufi, nyaso nyani wǝ ntsyǝ lǝ Mileto.

english_verse: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Kpe ǝsuǝ ku nkɛale lǝ ǝbǝ etu mɛ mfo fɛ lɛyɔlefe lǝ eyo. Eubulo ku Pude ku Lino ku Klaudia ku bayimi fɛfɛ kenke bafokanɔfɔ kenke bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ kukɔnɔ!

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Bonamute lǝ usiǝko fǝ, nya nlɛ wǝ lekpakpa bǝ lǝ ɔlɛ mi ola lǝ wǝ lefonǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: From Paul, a servant of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. I encourage God's own people to have more faith and to understand the truth about religion.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, wǝ ni Onanto eto usumunyǝ ku Yesu Kristo eto ɔtɔnkpe, mɔ ni futsyǝ nlɛ fǝ kukue komfo bɔwɔni. Onanto dílǝkǝ mɛ nya ótsyese mɛ nkǝ nsu nwunsǝko wǝ betidi ba úlǝkǝ útsyǝ eto bafobanɔ lǝ nyɛnko mǝ lǝ bafo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bánɔ lǝ bo bafokanɔsu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then they will have the hope of eternal life God promised long ago. And God never tells a lie!
translation_verse: Bofokanɔsu komfo dítǝ bɔnlɛ kusu bobe itǝ nkpǝ manlo bo ǝsuǝ bófo bɔ́nɔ nɛ. Nya Onanto wǝ lǝmbɔwɛ bo kosatee, wǝ lɛtɛyi ditiki nǝmfo útsyǝ fɛ úyifo kawunsiǝ.

english_verse: Titus, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and Christ Jesus our Savior will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! What Titus Was To Do in Crete
translation_verse: Mɔ olala Tito, nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ fǝ itsyise eyifo mɔ ubi tinti lǝ bofokanɔ bɔni bo ǝsuǝ bonkpe eso. Nya nlɛ Boanto Onanto ku Kristo Yesu wǝ ni bo Ofomfokǝtǝ lekpakpa bǝ ɔlɛ fǝ ku lefonǝ ku diyuǝ ǝsuǝ, nya lǝ utǝ fǝ diyuǝsǝ. Paulo Ǝtǝ Tito Keyifo Kǝtsyuǝ Lǝ Kreta.

english_verse: I left you in Crete to do what had been left undone and to appoint leaders for the churches in each town. As I told you,
translation_verse: Nyani fǝ ntsyǝ lǝ Kreta ku nsusu bǝ lǝ alɔ lesa saa nǝ díbu bɔlɔkǝtsyǝ ǝtsyǝ. Nya lǝ umǝ saa, lǝkǝ batɔnkotɔnko ba loofo buńyǝ lǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto kɛnyɛ fe kase míntɛyi fǝ miǝ yifo.

english_verse: they must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. Their children must be followers of the Lord and not have a reputation for being wild and disobedient.
translation_verse: Fe bafokanɔfɔ eto batɔnkotɔnkoo, yanle bǝ etiki bua saa kɛ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya ele bǝ uyifo utidi wǝ mfi kusiǝ kɔni hã. Nya wǝ bebi tsya eyifo bebi ba léfo banɔ kekleke, nya beenyifo mba ditidi ato, nya beebu mǝ antomǝ.

english_verse: Church officials are in charge of God's work, and so they must also have a good reputation. They must not be bossy, quick-tempered, heavy drinkers, bullies, or dishonest in business.
translation_verse: Fe bafokanɔfɔ eto ɔtɔnkotɔnko wǝ laabe Onanto eto keyifoo, yanle bǝ bǝnyǝ nye befi etiki bua saa lǝ wǝ nye ukabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato nye kafo kanyi wǝ mlǝmlǝmlǝ. Nya yanle bǝ udui utekpe, nya yanle bǝ okakpɔ ekiti kekleke nye ukasɛsǝ ǝnǝmi tsya lǝ atabi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Instead, they must be friendly to strangers and enjoy doing good things. They must also be sensible, fair, pure, and self-controlled.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ ofo bafɔ bofo, keyifo kafoɛkpɛ nya woala asa sɛɛ nya woalɛ wǝ ǝsuǝ ola. Nya ele bǝ uyifo utidi wǝ nkpe ditsyǝbi sɛɛ, nya uyifo kɛnkɛ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ, nya wooyɛ lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: There are many who don't respect authority, and they fool others by talking nonsense. This is especially true of some Jewish followers.
translation_verse: Itsyise betidi kpǝ kpe ba nlɛ betidi bɔwɛ nya bátaka bǝńyǝ lǝ ditiki nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ ku mǝ ebukisa buyifo. Nya mba nso asa nyamfo kenke buyifo, mǝ ni Yudafɔ eto bafokanɔfɔ.

english_verse: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
translation_verse: Nya Kreta eto utidi ɔni wǝ ni mǝ unyǝlǝkǝtidi lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Kretafɔ, bidia baatɛyi mi lefe saa nya beeyifo mba laabiasǝ asa kakpe fe bebuki, nya bedikpũ beni nya bankpe sɛflɔ tsya.”

english_verse: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
translation_verse: Asa nya unyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝmfo lɛtɛyi eyifo ɔnukualɛ. Nyaso bikǝ mǝ ato bǝ lǝ bayɛ ditsyǝbi bua nǝmfo bote itǝ lǝ mǝ bofokanɔ lǝ buyifo sitinti.

english_verse: Don't pay any attention to any of those senseless Jewish stories and human commands. These are made up by people who won't obey the truth.
translation_verse: Nyamfo luutǝ bǝ bǝlǝkǝ mǝ ato betsyiko lǝ Yudafɔ eto etikitsyuɛntsyuɛ ku betidi ba eto asatete nnya lanyɛ lǝ ɔnukualɛ eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Everything is pure for someone whose heart is pure. But nothing is pure for an unbeliever with a dirty mind. That person's mind and conscience are destroyed.
translation_verse: Betidi ba kenke diyifo mǝ ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛɛ, mǝ eyifosa tsya eyifo kɛnkɛ. Fɛɛ lǝ betidi ba diyifo mǝ ǝsuǝ betidi bua nya bámfo banɔ ɔflɔɔ, kulesa menyifo kɛnkɛ. Mǝ esibubu ku mǝ ketu eyi ku asa bua, lǝ nyaso bǝǝmbofo nya ni asɛ lekpo butsyǝ ketsyiko lǝ abua ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
translation_verse: Mǝ kosate aatɛyi bǝ beebu Onanto, fɛɛ mǝ eyifosa mante nko. Beyifo betidi ba laabiasǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ nya beembu kulesa nya bǝǝńyǝ bǝtǝ lesa sɛɛ saa buyifo.

english_verse: Titus, you must teach only what is correct.
translation_verse: Fɛ fǝǝ, te asa nnya nyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ eto kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Tell the older women to behave as those who love the Lord should. They must not gossip about others or be slaves of wine. They must teach what is proper,
translation_verse: Nko ke ini itǝ besioninǝ tsya nɛ, te mǝ kase ele bǝ bǝsiǝ nkpǝ bo dinyǝ itǝ besio ba diyifo kɛnkɛ. Yanle bǝ bakakpadi betidi aye bua. Nya yanle bǝ bǝnǝ nte bǝkpǝ tsya. Bomu ele bǝ bate betidi ditsyǝbi sɛɛ.

english_verse: so the younger women will be loving wives and mothers.
translation_verse: Nya ele bǝ baté besiobitɛ ba nsi bese kase ele bǝ bala mǝ bese ku mǝ bebi tsya.

english_verse: Each of the younger women must be sensible and kind, as well as a good homemaker, who puts her own husband first. Then no one can say insulting things about God's message.
translation_verse: Nya ele bǝ bate mɛ kase bɔɔlɛ mǝ ǝsuǝ ola, nya ele bǝ bǝsiǝ nkpǝ bo diyifo kɛnkɛ, nya lǝ beyifo bǝsiǝ ba laalɛ mǝ bese ola kukɔnɔ, mba leebu mǝ bese. Nyamfo luutǝ bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa ǝmbɔtɛyi kulesa bua saa iitsyi lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ ditsyi lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Use clean language that no one can criticize. Do this, and your enemies will be too ashamed to say anything against you.
translation_verse: Be kukɔnɔ lǝ ekedi betidi etiki ku lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ itǝ bǝ bǝmbunyǝ kabua saa itsyi lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ, nya luutǝ bǝ fǝ baló tsya ɛmbɔtɛyi kabua saa lǝ bo ǝsuǝ, bomu lǝ kofani lǝ kɔlɛ mǝ.

english_verse: Tell slaves always to please their owners by obeying them in everything. Slaves must not talk back to their owners
translation_verse: Ele bǝ ndomufɔ bokosǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bǝtǝ mǝ banamute. Nya ele bǝ mǝ eyifosa kpe mǝ banamute disuǝyuǝ lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ. Nya yanle bǝ bǝnǝnko mǝ etiki.

english_verse: or steal from them. They must be completely honest and trustworthy. Then everyone will show great respect for what is taught about God our Savior. God's Kindness and the New Life
translation_verse: Yanle bǝ beyu mǝ tsya, bomu ele bǝ baté mǝ bǝnkǝ betidi sɛɛ beni, nya beeyifo asa lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ kǝtǝ mǝ. Nyamfo luutǝ buunyǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo bǝ bo asa nnya boate iitsyi lǝ Boanto Onanto wǝ ni bo Ofomfokǝtǝ ǝsuǝǝ, eyifo asa sɛɛ.

english_verse: God has shown us undeserved grace by coming to save all people.
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto ǝlǝkǝ wǝ lefonǝ onkpe óte bo, bǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke nyǝ dilǝkǝ.

english_verse: He taught us to give up our wicked ways and our worldly desires and to live decent and honest lives in this world.
translation_verse: Onanto eto kafoɛkpɛ kamǝ lɛ bo bote nkǝ, bulǝkǝ bo ato butsyiko lǝ nkpǝ bua busiǝ ku kawunsiǝ eto asa bimba kama butǝkǝko ǝsuǝ. Nyaso ele bǝ bɔlɛ bo ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ, nya lǝ busiǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ, lǝ buyifo ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo ǝsuǝ

english_verse: We are filled with hope, as we wait for the glorious return of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Kusu komfo buufi bukabe sɛtɔ itǝ diyi kplɛ nǝ ǝsuǝ búfi bo kusubebe bútǝkǝ nɛ. Diyi nǝmfo ni diyi nǝ ǝsuǝ bo Onanto Ɔkplɛnyǝ, bo Ofomfokǝtǝ Yesu Kristo eto diyǝnde lɔɔbɔ utsyuǝ saa nyǝ.

english_verse: He gave himself to rescue us from everything evil and to make our hearts pure. He wanted us to be his own people and to be eager to do right.
translation_verse: Úfi wǝ ǝsuǝ útǝ lǝ bo disi, bǝ lǝ ulǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ bo abua saa ǝsuǝ lǝ bofiani betidi kɛnkɛ ba ni wǝ kosate eto bale, nyaso bíala bǝ biekeyifo kasɛɛ hã nɛ.

english_verse: Remind your people to obey the rulers and authorities and not to be rebellious. They must always be ready to do something helpful
translation_verse: Klomasǝ mǝ lǝ mǝmblɛ bakloma lǝ babokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ kǝtǝ mǝ batɔnkotɔnko ku aba lǝ bǝtsyue mǝ ditiki koto, nya lǝ bekeyifo kasɛɛ lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: and not say cruel things or argue. They should be gentle and kind to everyone.
translation_verse: Tɛyi mǝ fǝnkǝ bankatɛyi betidi eto kabua. Bomu beyifo sɛhɔ ku utsyuǝ saa lǝ bǝsiǝ lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ ku utsyuǝ saa. Nya lǝ bekebu utidi saa lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We used to be stupid, disobedient, and foolish, as well as slaves of all sorts of desires and pleasures. We were evil and jealous. Everyone hated us, and we hated everyone.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bo ǝmǝ tsya ébuyifo ebukisa bunyǝ ku ato titli, nya bóta bubu kɔ ǝmǝ. Nya ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto abua yifoyifo butǝkǝko tsya diyi bo ǝsuǝ kɔ. Nya búfi bo lefe bútǝ disialeyifoyifo, asabuyifo ku kǝnǝminsɛ, nya betidi díkisi bo nya bo tsya díkisi mǝ.

english_verse: God our Savior showed us how good and kind he is.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ lefe nǝ Boanto Onanto, bo Ofomfokǝtǝ, dílǝkǝ wǝ kafoɛkpɛ ku lelabi óte boo,

english_verse: He saved us because of his mercy, and not because of any good things we have done. God washed us by the power of the Holy Spirit. He gave us new birth and a fresh beginning.
translation_verse: ófo bo lǝ nkpǝ. Inni lǝ bo kasɛɛ ka búyifo eso, bomu ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto lǝ wǝ kosate eto kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise útǝ nkǝ wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ bǝ didufǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ. Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmfo esi dítǝ besinkli bále bo nya dítǝ bo nkpǝ fɔfɔ, nya díflǝ bo itǝ bǝ buyifo kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: God sent Jesus Christ our Savior to give us his Spirit.
translation_verse: Onanto efi wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ útǝ bo kpǝ ɛyɛ lǝ bo Ofomfokǝtǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus treated us much better than we deserve. He made us acceptable to God and gave us the hope of eternal life.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lefonǝ esoo, bonko wǝ eto nti ǝbǝ bɔlɛkɛ itǝ eso bontsya ditiki ǝbǝ búnyǝ nkpǝ manlo bo bɔnlɛ kusu bobe.

english_verse: This message is certainly true. These teachings are useful and helpful for everyone. I want you to insist that the people follow them, so that all who have faith in God will be sure to do good deeds.
translation_verse: Ditiki nǝmfo eyifo ɔnukualɛ. Nya nla miǝ lǝ afo nya kekleke. Nya betidi ba díkafo Onanto banɔɔ, ele bǝ befi mǝ lefe bǝtǝ asa sɛɛ buyifo nya looboko kutǝkǝ itǝ betidi ba kenke.

english_verse: But don't have anything to do with stupid arguments about ancestors. And stay away from disagreements and quarrels about the Law of Moses. Such arguments are useless and senseless.
translation_verse: Mǝǝnnǝ etiki ku utidi lǝ asa bimba ǝsuǝ. Mambiasǝ lefe lǝ betidi eto ketsyikɔ bokla kate ǝsuǝ, mǝndiǝ kǝdiǝ lǝ efi Mose eto afi eto etiki eyifo kǝnǝ eto etiki. Asa nyamfo kenke ǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ saa.

english_verse: Warn troublemakers once or twice. Then don't have anything else to do with them.
translation_verse: Kǝ ato utidi wǝ laakpe ntisensǝsensǝ lǝ bafokanɔfɔ nti sinuǝ. Lǝ nnya kamaa, yani wǝ.

english_verse: You know their minds are twisted, and their own sins show how guilty they are. Personal Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Eyi fǝ utidi ǝmfo eto oklee, lebua edi wǝ ǝsuǝ nya wǝ asa buayifoyifo ǝǝlǝkǝ wǝ kate, nya ókalo wǝ ǝsuǝ dikpi. Etiki Fɛfɛ Ku Nkla.

english_verse: I plan to send Artemas or Tychicus to you. After he arrives, please try your best to meet me at Nicopolis. I have decided to spend the winter there.
translation_verse: Lǝ ntsyese fǝ Artema nye Tihikoo, yɛ kusu saa ǝsuǝ lǝ ǝbǝ ǝnyǝ mɛ lǝ Nikopoli. Itsyise mfó mimfi nsusu miǝ mɔɔkɛ lǝ lɛyɔ lefe nɛ.

english_verse: When Zenas the lawyer and Apollos get ready to leave, help them as much as you can, so they won't have need of anything.
translation_verse: Kplatsya lǝ ayɛ kusu saa lǝ awunsǝko Zena wǝ ni afi eto ukuente ku Apolo bǝ lǝ bǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ itǝ mǝ kusu komǝ busu. Nya laabe fǝ bakɛ lesa saa nǝ baahiã.

english_verse: Greetings to you from everyone here. Greet all of our friends who share in our faith. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Bayimi ba kenke nkpe mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ mfo bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ fǝ. Fintsya siǝsǝ bayimi mba dikafo baanɔ ba nkpe mfó ǝtǝ bo. Onanto lǝ ɔlɛ mimblɛ kenke lǝ wǝ lefonǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: and to the church that meets in your home. It is also to our dear friend Apphia and to Archippus, who serves the Lord as we do.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, wǝ nlabe lǝ Aba eto diyo lǝ Kristo Yesu eto disi, ɛyɛ lǝ letsya nǝ mímbe wǝ eso ku bo ɔyimi Timoteo, bo nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ fǝ Filemon bo uyifotsyuǝ lala, bo ɔyimisio Apia ku bo ɔyɛtsyuǝ ku uyifotsyuǝ Arkipo ku bafokakɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝ laatsya lǝ fǝ diyo.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Philemon's Love and Faith
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ bɔtɔ boǝ Onanto wǝ ni Boanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto lefonǝ ku diyuǝ lǝ disiǝko mi. Filemon Eto Lelabi Ku Wǝ Bofokanɔ.

english_verse: Philemon, each time I mention you in my prayers, I thank God.
translation_verse: Ɔyimi Filemon, maakloma fǝ lefe saa lǝ mɔ olatoto ǝsuǝ. Nya maasɔ Onanto ani lǝ fǝ disi.

english_verse: I hear about your faith in our Lord Jesus and about your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Itsyise maanɔ kase faala Onanto eto betidi ku kase fáfo Bonamute Yesu fánɔ.

english_verse: As you share your faith with others, I pray they may come to know all the blessings Christ has given us.
translation_verse: Maato ola minkǝ bo sɛyɛtsyuǝ ku fǝ fe bafokanɔfɔɔ, eboboko kasɔnɔnɔ enso lǝ bonti. Itǝ ínǝ atsyɔkpokpo kenke nnya nkpe lǝ nkpǝ ɛyɛ lǝ bo lɔniyifoyifo ku Kristo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My friend, your love has made me happy and has greatly encouraged me. It has also cheered the hearts of God's people. Paul Speaks to Philemon about Onesimus
translation_verse: Ɔyimi lala, lelabi nǝ nkpe fǝ ǝtǝ nyǝ disuǝyuǝ kpǝ ku nkɛalekpekpe! Ǝtǝ diyuǝsǝ mba kenke lefo Onanto banɔ eto ketu. Paulo Álɛ Filemon Lekpakpa Nkǝ Usinkli Ofo Onesimo.

english_verse: I beg you to help Onesimus! He is like a son to me because I led him to Christ here in jail.
translation_verse: Nyaso mɔmɔɔ, nlɛ fǝ lekpakpa lǝ Onesimo wǝ díkafiani mɔ kosate eto ubi eto disi lǝ lefe nǝ bakpe mɛ lǝ amla lǝ aba eto diyo.

english_verse: Before this, he was useless to you, but now he is useful both to you and to me.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ wǝ diye eto kasɔ ni kutǝkǝ tsyaa, kɔɔ utidi ko ete udi, wánkɛ kutǝkǝ saa utǝ fǝ. Fɛ mɔmɔɔ, okpe kutǝkǝ útǝ bonko fǝ ta.

english_verse: Sending Onesimus back to you makes me very sad.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, nsinkliko wǝ nlɛ fǝ botsyese. Iyifo mɛ fe mɔ kosate eto utu minfi minlɛ fǝ botsyese.

english_verse: I would like to keep him here with me, where he could take your place in helping me while I am here in prison for preaching the good news.
translation_verse: Eni moola miǝ ɔkɛ mɛ lǝ ɔflɔ mfo lefe nǝ eto lefe minlabe lǝ diyo lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ eso, bǝ lǝ ofo mɛ bɔwunsǝko lǝ fǝ kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: But I won't do anything unless you agree to it first. I want your act of kindness to come from your heart, and not be something you feel forced to do.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ manla miǝ maanyinkǝ fǝ nkpe miǝ lǝ awunsǝko mɛ. Bomu moola miǝ iyifo lesa nǝ ditsyi fǝ utu kǝmiǝ, diyifo fǝ lelabi. Nyaso membuyifo kulesa nǝ dimenyifo fǝ lelabi.

english_verse: Perhaps Onesimus was taken from you for a little while so you could have him back for good,
translation_verse: Ditsyuǝ nnya eso Onesimo dídu lǝ fǝ ɔflɔ lefe kliminti ditsyuǝ nǝmfo ni bǝ lǝ ofo busikli kǝbǝ kǝsiǝ fǝ lǝ ɔflɔ itǝ lefe nǝ ta.

english_verse: but not as a slave. Onesimus is much more than a slave. To me he is a dear friend, but to you he is even more, both as a person and as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, unsini ndomunyǝ fufu, bomu oso ndomunyǝ. Uyifo ɔyimi lala lǝ Kristo eso. Ofo koya utǝ mɛ tinti. Fɛɛ itǝ fǝǝ, ofo koya utǝ fǝ oso, itsyise uyifo fǝ ndomunyǝ fe utidinini, nya unsi uni ɔyimisani lǝ Bonamute ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you consider me a friend because of Christ, then welcome Onesimus as you would welcome me.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ ǝǝnyǝ mɛ fe fǝ uyifotsyuǝ, sinkli afo wǝ fe kase foofo mɔ kosate.

english_verse: If he has cheated you or owes you anything, charge it to my account.
translation_verse: Lǝ óta fǝ ubu nye unsi fǝ kayo kǝtsyuǝ, bu kǝ ǝtǝ mɛ.

english_verse: With my own hand I write: I, PAUL, WILL PAY YOU BACK. But don't forget you owe me your life.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Paulo, kosate difi mɔ kɔni míwɔni nyamfo minkǝ moofo fǝ ke. Fɛɛ manla miǝ maaklomasǝ fǝ miǝ esi mɛ fǝ nkpǝ eto koya.

english_verse: My dear friend and follower of Christ our Lord, please cheer me up by doing this for me.
translation_verse: Nya mɔ ɔyimi, tǝ lǝ nnyǝ kutǝkǝ sɛkɛ ntsyi lǝ fǝ ɔflɔ, lǝ Bonamute eso ete. Yifo nyamfo nko lǝ lekpe mɛ lǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ lɛkɔɛsi kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: Please get a room ready for me. I hope your prayers will be answered, and I can visit you.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, lɔ kasɔnɔkɔ ǝtsyǝ mɛ mfó. Itsyise mfo nnɔ miǝ Onanto ebɔnɔ mimblɛ eto olatoto utǝ bayani mɛ nsinkli mbǝ mi ɔflɔ. Paul Eto Kǝsiǝ Fɛfɛ.

english_verse: Epaphras is also here in jail for being a follower of Christ Jesus. He sends his greetings,
translation_verse: Epafra, wǝ bonko nkpe lǝ Aba eto diyo lǝ Kristo Yesu eto disi esoo, nkǝ wǝsiǝsǝ fǝ!

english_verse: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, who work together with me.
translation_verse: Nko ke ini Marko ku Aristarko ku Dema ku Luka ba ni mɔ keyifo eto bawunsǝkotsyuǝǝ, tsya bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ fǝ kukɔnɔ!

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto lefonǝ lǝ disiǝko mimblɛ kenke.

english_verse: Long ago in many ways and at many times God's prophets spoke his message to our ancestors.
translation_verse: Koko lefee, Onanto édi bo banamǝ etiki sesia sesia sesia, nya lǝ esu kpǝ ǝsuǝ tsyaa, ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But now at last, God sent his Son to bring his message to us. God created the universe by his Son, and everything will someday belong to the Son.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ eyi fɛfɛ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, údi bo etiki ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝsuǝ. Wǝ ǝsuǝ Onanto lɛyɛ úyifo kawunsiǝ, nya wǝ ni nwǝ Onanto dílǝkǝ nkǝ udi wǝ bikǝ kenke nɛ.

english_verse: God's Son has all the brightness of God's own glory and is like him in every way. By his own mighty word, he holds the universe together. After the Son had washed away our sins, he sat down at the right side of the glorious God in heaven.
translation_verse: Ubi ǝmfo dílǝkǝ Onanto eto diyǝnde óte nya Onanto eto ditsyǝbi tututu nkpe wuntsya. Nya úfi Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ kplɛ nǝmǝ úmuǝ kawunsiǝ kenke ɔnlɛ. Se úflǝ bo abua kenke úwii, úsu úsiǝ lǝ Onanto, Ǝsuǝalenyǝ Kenke, eto kodiani kato. Onanto Eto Ubi Eto Sɛkplɛ.

english_verse: He had become much greater than the angels, and the name he was given is far greater than any of theirs. God's Son Is Greater than Angels
translation_verse: Onanto eyifo wǝ ubi ɔkplɛ enso wǝ batɔnkpe, fe kase wǝ diye nǝ Onanto dítǝ wǝ nso mǝ lele.

english_verse: God has never said to any of the angels, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!” Neither has God said to any of them, “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son!”
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto mántɛyi wǝ batɔnkpe eto kuutsyuǝ saa nkǝ, “Fɛ ni mɔ Ubi. Mmii, minle fǝ.” Nye Onanto mántɛyi itsyi lǝ wǝ ɔtɔnkpe saa ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Muudi wǝ Anto, nya wuuyifo mɔ Ubi.”

english_verse: When God brings his first-born Son into the world, he commands all of his angels to worship him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lefe nǝ Onanto léla nkǝ woatsyese wǝ Ubi tutɛ kawunsiǝ kamfoo, ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Onanto eto batɔnkpe kenke ebusumu wǝ.”

english_verse: And when God speaks about the angels, he says, “I change my angels into wind and my servants into flaming fire.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto átɛyi lǝ wǝ batɔnkpe ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Onanto eeyifo wǝ batɔnkpe fe ufiebi, nya wǝ kato eto besumunyǝ bamfó fe ute eto kadiakami.”

english_verse: But God says about his Son, “You are God, and you will rule as King forever! Your royal power brings about justice.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto átɛyi itsyi lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝsuǝ nkǝ, “Onanto, fǝ sekakedikɔɔ, kalosǝkɔ embɔkɛ lǝ se kulefe kulefe! Fǝ sekakedidi lǝ fǝ betidi ǝsuǝ ebuyi ku kasɛyifoyifo.

english_verse: You loved justice and hated evil, and so I, your God, have chosen you. I appointed you and made you happier than any of your friends.”
translation_verse: Aala kasɛyifoyifo nya feekisi kabuayifoyifo. Nyamfo eso Onanto, fǝ Onantoo, dílǝkǝ fǝ, nya úfi disuǝyuǝ nǝ nso nǝ útǝ fǝ bayɛtsyuǝ kenke útǝ fǝ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “In the beginning, Lord, you were the one who laid the foundation of the earth and created the heavens.
translation_verse: Usi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Fǝ, Bonamute, fǝ ni nwǝ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ díyifo kasɔ, nya féyifo kato ku fǝ kosate eto ani.

english_verse: They will all disappear and wear out like clothes, but you will last forever.
translation_verse: Asa nyamfo kenke ebubǝ efe. Fɛɛ fǝ ebubu akɛ lefe saa. Asa nyamfo kenke ebobia isensǝ fe kase mfia laala kafiani afianku.

english_verse: You will roll them up like a robe and change them like a garment. But you are always the same, and you will live forever.”
translation_verse: Ebukǝnǝ nnya fe kase bǝǝkǝnǝ awu ku mfia itǝ bofloma. Fɛɛ fǝǝ, nko ete fuutsyǝ nɛ, embofloma, nya fǝ nkpǝ embolo kulefe.”

english_verse: God never said to any of the angels, “Sit at my right side until I make your enemies into a footstool for you!”
translation_verse: Nte ɔtɔnkpe wǝ Onanto lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Siǝ lǝ mɔ kodiani, isu ese lefe nǝ muufi fǝ balo nkpe fǝ kalɔ bafiani nnya ǝsuǝ fuutǝkǝ akpa”?

english_verse: Angels are merely spirits sent to serve people who are going to be saved.
translation_verse: Nyalɛɛ, bawoe ni kato eto batɔnkpe fɛ? Mǝ ni awɔnɔ nnya leesumu Onanto nya woakpe mǝ atɔ nkǝ besu bawunsǝko mba ele bǝ bafo lǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: We must give our full attention to what we were told, so we won't drift away.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso ele bǝ bɔlɛ ɔnukualɛtiki nnya bɔ́nɔ ola kekleke nɛ. Lenni nkoo, boonya kusu lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The message spoken by angels proved to be true, and all who disobeyed or rejected it were punished as they deserved.
translation_verse: Kɛnyɛ ka Onanto eto batɔnkpe dítǝ bo banamǝǝ, eyifo ɔnukualɛ, nya lǝ utsyuǝ úta úbu nye útidi ato lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ, bǝnǝ wǝ koto sitinti fe kase íńyǝ itǝ.

english_verse: So if we refuse this great way of being saved, how can we hope to escape? The Lord himself was the first to tell about it, and people who heard the message proved to us that it was true.
translation_verse: Nyalɛɛ, ntsyǝ boofo butsyetsyi lǝ kotonǝnǝ eto kɛnyɛ, lǝ bɔni koto butsyue akafo Ditiki Sɛɛ kplɛ nǝmfo? Bonamute kosate leka bofo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo bɔtɛyi tutɛ tutɛ, fɛ mba kenke lɛnɔ ni lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ tsya díbǝ bátɛyi ni báse uyi bǝtǝ bo bǝ, diyifo ɔnukualɛ.

english_verse: God himself showed that his message was true by working all kinds of powerful miracles and wonders. He also gave his Holy Spirit to anyone he chose to. The One Who Leads Us To Be Saved
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto kosate tsya édi nnya adansiɛ ku ɔnukualɛ, lǝ nyaso úyifo ayanisa ku ayanisa lǝ esu kpǝ ǝsuǝ, nya úsie Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝtǝsa útǝ lǝ kase waala ǝsuǝ. Nwǝ Ǝsuǝ Bɔɔyɛ Bunyǝ Nkpe Manlo.

english_verse: We know that God did not put the future world under the power of angels.
translation_verse: Onanto mémfi kawunsiǝ fɔfɔ ka lǝǝbǝ bubǝ ka ǝsuǝ bɔnlɛ etiki budi ókpe lǝ batɔnkpe kalɔ.

english_verse: Somewhere in the Scriptures someone says to God, “What makes you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for weaklings such as we?
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Anantotiki eto lekpa ditsyuǝ édi nnya adansiɛ ɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Be ni utidi, O Onanto, bǝ fǝ ǝnǝmii, lǝ itǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ nko? Be ko ni utidinini bǝ lǝ aalɛ wǝ ola nko?

english_verse: You made us lower than the angels for a while. Yet you have crowned us with glory and honor.
translation_verse: Ábokosǝ wǝ kasɔ itǝ lefe kliminti ditsyuǝ enso Onanto eto batɔnkpe. Fɛɛ ǝbǝ éfi diyǝnde kplɛ ku dibu étsyisǝ wǝ fe lekankpakpa.

english_verse: And you have put everything under our power!” God has put everything under our power and has not left anything out of our power. But we still don't see it all under our control.
translation_verse: Nya fǝtǝ údi seka lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ.” Bátɛyi bǝnkǝ Onanto éyifo utidi nkǝ udi seka lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ nya nyamfo lɛ bote wuee bǝnkǝ, lesa saa banlɛ. Tsya lǝ kase intee, bɔnlɛ tɔ bunyǝ kase utidi nlɛ seka budi lǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: What we do see is Jesus, who for a little while was made lower than the angels. Because of God's gift of undeserved grace, Jesus died for everyone. And now that Jesus has suffered and died, he is crowned with glory and honor!
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Yesu ǝmfoo, wǝ lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ bábokosǝ kasɔ fe okpe lǝ Onanto eto batɔnkpe kalɔɔ, itǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ ukpǝ lǝ utsyue saa eto disi. Bɔlɛ wǝ bunyǝ mɔmɔ nwǝ béti ǝtǝsa ku dibu kenke eto lenkpakpa, ɛyɛ lǝ ukpǝ wǝ úkpǝ eso.

english_verse: Everything belongs to God, and all things were created by his power. So God did the right thing when he made Jesus perfect by suffering, as Jesus led many of God's children to be saved and to share in his glory.
translation_verse: Ɛlɛkɛ bǝ Onanto wǝ díyifo nya woalɔ lesa saa kǝtsyǝǝ, tǝ Yesu lǝ ɔflɔ ɛyɛ lǝ kanyi ka únyǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ unǝ bebi kpǝ oboko lǝ bǝnyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ. Itsyise Yesu ni nwǝ lookpa mǝ usuko nkpǝ manlo kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: Jesus and the people he makes holy all belong to the same family. This is why he isn't ashamed to call them his brothers and sisters.
translation_verse: Wǝ lǝǝflǝ abua lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ kewui, nya wǝ ku mba ǝsuǝ bǝflǝ abua béwui, anto ɔni uni mǝ. Nyaso yenyifo Yesu afanisa bǝ ókpadi mǝ nkǝ wǝ bayimi.

english_verse: He even said to God, “I will tell them your name and sing your praises when they come together to worship.”
translation_verse: Woatɛyi Onanto nkǝ, “Mɔɔtɛyi mɔ bayimi lesa nǝ féyifo. Nya mɔɔtɛsǝ fǝ lǝ mǝ katsyakɔ.”

english_verse: He also said, “I will trust God.” Then he said, “Here I am with the children God has given me.”
translation_verse: Usi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Muufi mɔ kusubebe ntǝkǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ.” Nya usi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nnyǝ mɔ ku bebi ba Onanto dífi útǝ mɛ.”

english_verse: We are people of flesh and blood. This is why Jesus became one of us. He died to destroy the devil, who had power over death.
translation_verse: Se betidi ba woakpadi nkǝ bebi ni betidi ba lɛbɔ betsyi lǝ sinǝ ku kɔtɔ ǝsuǝǝ, Yesu kosate ǝbǝ ófiani fe mǝ nnya úsiǝ nkpǝ fe mǝ ke. Úyifo nyamfo nko bǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ukpǝ ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ ɔtsylɔsǝ Obonsam wǝ nkpe ukpǝ eto ǝsuǝale.

english_verse: But he also died to rescue all of us who live each day in fear of dying.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ kusu komfo ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ ulǝkǝ mba kenke lɛkɛ lǝ sidomu ǝsuǝ lǝ mǝ nkpǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ nnya báte ukpǝ sikpi eso.

english_verse: Jesus clearly did not come to help angels, but he did come to help Abraham's descendants.
translation_verse: Nya ekpa bǝ inni Onanto eto batɔnkpe úbǝ kawunsǝko kɔ, bomu Abraham eto bebi eto bebi.

english_verse: He had to be one of us, so he could serve God as our merciful and faithful high priest and sacrifice himself for the forgiveness of our sins.
translation_verse: Nnya kasɔ ni bǝnkǝ, ele bǝ ofiani fe wǝ bayimi lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ ofiani ominsǝnyǝtidi ku nwǝ leesumu Onanto lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ eto Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke lǝ utǝ kedi lǝ betidi eto abua eto disi.

english_verse: And now that Jesus has suffered and was tempted, he can help anyone else who is tempted.
translation_verse: Nya se wǝ kosate dínyǝ kanyi nya báto wǝ bábe esoo, woofo mba nkpe lǝ botokabe ǝsuǝ bɔwunsǝko.

english_verse: My friends, God has chosen you to be his holy people. So think about Jesus, the one we call our apostle and high priest!
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi lala lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ, mi mba Onanto tsya lékpadi! Bibu Yesu bebe, nwǝ Onanto létsyese nkǝ ubǝ ofiani Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke lǝ bofokanɔ bo bonkpe ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus was faithful to God, who appointed him, just as Moses was faithful in serving all God's people.
translation_verse: Úyifo wǝ keyifo lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ útǝ nwǝ dílǝkǝ wǝ nkǝ uyifo wǝ keyifo fe kase Moses díyifo asa lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ lǝ wǝ keyifo ǝsuǝ lǝ Onanto eto diyo.

english_verse: But Jesus deserves more honor than Moses, just as the builder of a house deserves more honor than the house.
translation_verse: Beefi dibu kǝtǝ nwǝ léto diyo kaso diyo nǝ báto kosate. Nko ke Yesu nkpe dibu kplɛ enso Moses nɛ.

english_verse: Of course, every house is built by someone, and God is really the one who built everything.
translation_verse: Itsyise diyo saa kpe ni otonto. Fɛɛ Onanto ni nwǝ léto lesa saa.

english_verse: Moses was a faithful servant and told God's people what would be said in the future.
translation_verse: Moses éyifo uyifoyifo ɔnukualɛnyǝ lǝ Onanto eto diyo. Nya ɔ́tɛyi asa nnya ǝsuǝ Onanto luubǝ udi etiki utsyiko lǝ lefe nǝ luubǝǝ, ɔ́tɔnsǝ.

english_verse: But Christ is the Son in charge of God's people. And we are those people, if we keep on being brave and don't lose hope. A Rest for God's People
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Kristo eyifo ɔnukualɛnyǝ fe Onanto eto Ubi wǝ nsi lǝ Onanto eto diyo eto kɛnyɛ. Bo ni wǝ diyo nǝmǝ nɛ, lǝ bokpe utu nya bofo bɔnɔ kekleke lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ bɔnlɛ kusu bobe. Ɔwɛkǝtsyǝkɔ Kpe Itǝ Onanto Eto Betidi.

english_verse: It is just as the Holy Spirit says, “If you hear God's voice today,
translation_verse: Nnya Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ bɛnɔ Onanto eto ɔkɔɛ mmii,

english_verse: don't be stubborn! Don't rebel like those people who were tested in the desert. *
translation_verse: bientidi ato fe kase ítsyǝ lǝ mi banamǝ eto lefe, nya bátaka bǝńyǝ mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ fe kase báto mɛ bábe lǝ mfiminti mfó.

english_verse: For forty years your ancestors tested God and saw the things he did.
translation_verse: Mfó nya báto mɛ bábe, lǝ babe lesa nǝ muuyifo, ite bǝ bǝnyǝ asa nnya mínyifo lǝ alɛ fosi ana ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: “Then God got tired of them and said, ‘You people never show good sense, and you don't understand what I want you to do.’
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya eso nnyǝ ɔblɔ nkpe betidi bamǝ. Nya míntɛyi minkǝ, ‘Baamfo mɛ akanɔ, nya baani beentsyue mɔ afi koto.’

english_verse: God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ”
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso kafo ányi mɛ nya mínka ntamu míntɛyi minkǝ, ‘Bembudufǝ kasɔ ka eni míntǝ tǝ mǝ ɔnwɛkǝtsyǝkɔ kulefe!’ ”

english_verse: My friends, watch out! Don't let evil thoughts or doubts make any of you turn from the living God.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi bafokanɔtsyuǝ, bebe sinini biǝ mi nti eto kuutsyuǝ ǝmbɔkɛ lɛkɔɛsi bua nya wǝmbɔkɛ bofokanɔ bǝ wǝǝmbɔtsyi kama okpe Onanto wǝ nsi nkpǝ.

english_verse: You must encourage one another each day. And you must keep on while there is still a time that can be called “today.” If you don't, then sin may fool some of you and make you stubborn.
translation_verse: Bomuu, bɛlɛ mi bǝtsyuǝ kɔlɛ diyi saa fe kase Mmii ǝmǝ báwɔni bákpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ leka mi. Lǝ itǝ bǝ biǝmbɔwɛ mi ǝsuǝ bekpe lǝ lebua lǝ befiani mba ditidi ato.

english_verse: We were sure about Christ when we first became his people. So let's hold tightly to our faith until the end.
translation_verse: Itsyise buyifo bani ku Kristo lǝ bɔlɛ bo bofokanɔ lǝ kɔni kekleke isu ese lǝ kalosǝkɔ fe kase bútsyiko kasɔ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “If you hear his voice today, don't be stubborn like those who rebelled.”
translation_verse: Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue átɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ bɛnɔ Onanto eto ɔkɔɛ mmii, bientidi ato fe kase ítsyǝ lǝ mi bana mǝ eto lefe, nya bátaka bǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Who were those people that heard God's voice and rebelled? Weren't they the same ones that came out of Egypt with Moses?
translation_verse: Bawe ni betidi ba lɛnɔ Onanto eto ɔkɔɛ nya bátaka bǝńyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ? Mba kenke Moses lékpa ɔ́yɛnko utsyiko Egipte eto kasɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And who did God say would never enter his place of rest? Weren't they the ones that disobeyed him?
translation_verse: Bawoe ǝsuǝ Onanto léka ntamu ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Kulefe, bembudufǝ kasɔ ka ǝsuǝ eni míntǝtǝ mǝ ɔnwɛkǝtsyǝkɔ.” Bawoe ɔnlɛ? Mba létaka bǝńyǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We see that those people did not enter the place of rest because they did not have faith.
translation_verse: Bunyǝ boǝ lǝ nnya eso bámfo kasɔ kamǝ budufǝ, itsyise bámfo banɔ.

english_verse: The promise to enter the place of rest is still good, and we must take care that none of you miss out.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, se kusubebe nsi nkpe bo bǝ buunyǝ ɔnwɛtsyǝtsyǝ wǝ Onanto dítsyǝ bo kɛnyɛ útsyǝǝ, bitǝ lǝ bobe kukɔnɔ bǝ, yǝǝmbǝ bǝ mi kuutsyuǝ saa mamfo ɔnwɛtsyǝtsyǝ wǝ útsyǝ bo kɛnyɛ útsyǝ.

english_verse: We have heard the message, just as they did. But they failed to believe what they heard, and the message did not do them any good.
translation_verse: Itsyise bátɛyi bo Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ fe kase bátɛyi mǝ tsya. Bánɔ kɛnyɛ kamǝ, fɛɛ yényifo mǝ keyifo sɛɛ saa lǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise se banɔ nii, bámfo ni bánɔ tsya.

english_verse: Only people who have faith will enter the place of rest. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ” God said this, even though everything has been ready from the time of creation.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bomba léfo bɔ́nɔɔ, búdufǝ ɔnwɛkǝtsyǝkɔ kamǝ, ka Onanto dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ. Ite fe kase ɔ́tɛyi útsyǝ nkǝ, “Kafo ányi mɛ nya mínka ntamu míntsyǝ miǝ, ‘Bembudufǝ kasɔ ka eni míntatǝ mǝ ɔnwɛtsyǝtsyǝ kulefe!’ ” Ɔ́tɛyi nyamfo nko ite bǝ wǝ kosate eto keyifo álo, idu lǝ lefe nǝ úyifo kawunsiǝ ólosǝ fɛ.

english_verse: In fact, somewhere the Scriptures say that by the seventh day, God had finished his work, and so he rested.
translation_verse: Itsyise lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝǝ, báwɔni asa ǝtsyuǝ itsyi lǝ diyi kuansele ǝsuǝ bǝnkǝ, “Onanto ǝtsyǝ ɔnwɛ lǝ diyi kuansele ǝsuǝ lǝ keyifo saa buyifo ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: We also read that he later said, “You people will never enter my place of rest!”
translation_verse: Besi bátɛyi ditiki nǝmfo bǝ, “Bembudufǝ kasɔ ka eni míntatǝ mǝ bafo ɔnwɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝmǝ!”

english_verse: This means that the promise to enter is still good, because those who first heard about it disobeyed and did not enter.
translation_verse: Mba leka Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bɔ́nɔ mámfo ɔnwɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝmǝ, itsyise bámfo ni banɔ. Fɛɛ itǝ bǝtsyuǝǝ, kusu si kokpe bǝ bafo ɔnwɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝmǝ.

english_verse: Much later God told David to make the promise again, just as I have already said, “If you hear his voice today, don't be stubborn!”
translation_verse: Bǝlǝkǝ nyamfo báte itsyise Onanto esi útsyǝ diyi bamba nǝ baakpo Mmi. Alɛ kpǝ lǝ nnya kamaa, fɛ údi etiki utsyi lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ, ɛyɛ lǝ Oka David ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto nnya búkatɛyi bofe bǝ, “Lǝ bɛnɔ Onanto eto ɔkɔɛ mmii, bientidi ato.”

english_verse: If Joshua had really given the people rest, there would not be any need for God to talk about another day of rest.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ete Yosua lɛyɛnko betidi bamǝ bédufǝ lǝ ɔnwɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝmǝ Onanto dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ útsyǝǝ, eni Onanto ménsidi etiki kama kama utsyiko lǝ diyi bamba ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But God has promised us a Sabbath when we will rest, even though it has not yet come.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi bamba si lekpe itǝ Onanto eto betidi fe diyi kuansele nǝ ǝsuǝ Onanto dítsyǝ ɔnwɛ.

english_verse: On that day God's people will rest from their work, just as God rested from his work.
translation_verse: Itsyise nwǝ kee léfo Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi nǝ Onanto lɛtɛyi utsyǝǝ, ebutsyǝ ɔnwɛ lǝ wǝ kosate eto keyifo kenke ǝsuǝ fe kase Onanto dítsyǝ ɔnwɛ lǝ wǝ kale ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We should do our best to enter the place of rest, so none of us will disobey and miss going there, as they did.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bokplatsya lǝ bofo ɔnwɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝmfo, bǝ lǝ bo kuutsyuǝ saa mentidi ato lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ fe kase béyifo.

english_verse: God's word is alive and powerful! It is sharper than any double-edged sword. His word can cut through our spirits and souls and through our joints and marrow, until it discovers the desires and thoughts of our hearts.
translation_verse: Itsyisee, Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ kpe nkpǝ nya lɛnlɛ keyifo kekleke, nya lenkpe kobe lenso lesiabi nyɛ nnuǝ. Diala lesa saa kǝlǝkǝ lǝ nsusu ku lɛwɔnɔ kǝmiǝ, isu ese taa ǝsuǝ eto ntsyakɔ ku dikubi ku afɔ eto katsyakɔ eto nti nya diakpo utidi eto nsusu ku utu kǝmiǝ kasɛɛ kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: Nothing is hidden from God! He sees through everything, and we will have to tell him the truth. Jesus Is the Great High Priest
translation_verse: Asayifoyifo saa menyifo akulasa lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi. Wǝǝnyǝ asayifoyifo saa tɛnklɛɛ nya ekpa wuee lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi. Nya wǝ ni nwǝ ele bǝ bo utsyuǝ saa tǝ wǝ nkpǝ eto nkunta. Yesu Ni Onanto Eto Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke.

english_verse: We have a great high priest, who has gone into heaven, and he is Jesus the Son of God. This is why we must hold on to what we have said about him.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bɔlɛ bo bofokanɔ bo boǝlǝkǝ kate kekleke. Itsyise bokpe Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke wǝ ni Yesu, Onanto eto Ubi wǝ díkatɔ bo úsu kato úsu úńyǝ lǝ Onanto kosate eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Jesus understands every weakness of ours, because he was tempted in every way that we are. But he did not sin!
translation_verse: Bo Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke enni nwǝ lǝǝnnyǝ bo kaminsǝ, se bumbǝ ale eso. Bomu bokpe utidi wǝ báto babe lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ fe bo ke. Fɛɛ wényifo lebua saa.

english_verse: So whenever we are in need, we should come bravely before the throne of our merciful God. There we will be treated with undeserved grace, and we will find help.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso bitǝ lǝ buńyǝ bembe, lǝ bɔnyi bɔfi Onanto eto lekankpomɛ kaka buunyǝ wǝ lefonǝ. Mfó wuunyǝ bo kaminsǝ bunyǝ wǝ lefonǝ nǝ lɔɔwunsǝko bo lǝ lefe nǝ ke ehiã bo.

english_verse: Every high priest is appointed to help others by offering gifts and sacrifices to God because of their sins.
translation_verse: Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke saa, betidinini nti ete bǝǝlǝkǝ wǝ ketsyiko, nya bǝǝtsyǝ wǝ bǝ lǝ uńyǝ lǝ mǝ kɛnyɛ lǝ Onanto eto kesumu ǝsuǝ, lǝ utǝ wǝ kedi lǝ bǝnyǝ mǝ abua eto bufikatsyɛ.

english_verse: A high priest has weaknesses of his own, and he feels sorry for foolish and sinful people.
translation_verse: Se wǝ kosate, lǝ esu kpǝ ǝsuǝ, lǝmbǝ ale lǝ okla ǝsuǝ esoo, okpe disuǝtsyǝ kǝtǝ mba lenyi kusu ko ǝsuǝ ele bǝ bayɛ eso baata kebu.

english_verse: This is why he must offer sacrifices for his own sins and for the sins of others.
translation_verse: Nya se wǝ kosate lǝmbǝ ale lǝ esu kpǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, ele bǝ utǝ kedi, enni lǝ wǝ betidi hã eto abua eto disi te bomuu, lǝ wǝ kosate tsya eto abua eto disi.

english_verse: But no one can have the honor of being a high priest simply by wanting to be one. Only God can choose a priest, and God is the one who chose Aaron.
translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ saa ǝnlǝkǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke kefi dibu nǝ laamankla lǝ ni kǝtǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Bomu Onanto hã laakpadi utidi, keyifo wǝ Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke fe kase ókpadi Aaron seka.

english_verse: This is how it was with Christ. He became a high priest, but not just because he wanted the honor of being one. It was God who told him, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!”
translation_verse: Nko ǝmǝ ke, Kristo mémfi Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke eto dibu útǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, bomu Onanto lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ Ubisaibi fe ni. Mmi mínle fǝ.”

english_verse: In another place, God says, “You are a priest forever just like Melchizedek.”
translation_verse: Usi ɔ́tɛyi lǝ kalebe bamba tsya nkǝ, “Usumunyǝ feni idu manlo isu manlo fe Melkisedek eto okle.”

english_verse: God had the power to save Jesus from death. And while Jesus was on earth, he begged God with loud crying and tears to save him. He truly worshiped God, and God listened to his prayers.
translation_verse: Se Yesu dídi utidi lǝ kasɔ kamfoo, óto ola ku lekpakpalɛlɛ kekleke ku bofa bembembe ku binǝntu útǝ nwǝ loofo wǝ bulǝkǝ ketsyiko ukpǝ kǝmiǝ. Nya se óbokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ nya woate Onanto sikpi esoo, Onanto ánɔ wǝ olatoto.

english_verse: Jesus is God's own Son, but still he had to suffer before he could learn what it really means to obey God.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ uyifo Onanto eto Ubi tsyaa, lǝ wǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ ókase kase baabokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: Suffering made Jesus perfect, and now he can save forever all who obey him.
translation_verse: Se Onanto díyifo wǝ nwǝ lɛflɔ lǝ kusu saa ǝsuǝ ólosǝǝ, úbǝ úyifo wǝ nwǝ ǝsuǝ mba kenke leetsyue wǝ koto laayɛ kǝnyǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: This is because God chose him to be a high priest like Melchizedek. Warning against Turning Away
translation_verse: Wǝ ni nwǝ Onanto lɛtɛyi útsyǝ nkǝ wuubǝ ofiani Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke fe Melkisedek eto okle.

english_verse: Much more could be said about this subject. But it is hard to explain, and all of you are slow to understand.
translation_verse: Etiki kpǝ kpe bo lǝ kɛnyɛ bo ele bǝ bɔtɛyi itsyi lǝ etiki nyamfo ǝsuǝ fɛ, fɛɛ nnya bɔtɛyi kpe bulǝ, itsyise bɛnlɛ asa kasɔ bɔnɔ mlǝmlǝmlǝ.

english_verse: By now you should have been teachers, but once again you need to be taught the simplest things about what God has said. You need milk instead of solid food.
translation_verse: Lefe kpǝ ákɛ bǝ eni befiani bateasa, fɛɛ bisi behiã utsyuǝ bǝ lǝ ote mi asa tutɛ itsyi lǝ Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ, lefe nǝ eto lefe ele bǝ bidi lesa nǝ nkpe ale, isi efe bǝ bɛyimi mmintu.

english_verse: People who live on milk are like babies who don't really know what is right.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa wǝ ele bǝ ɔyimi mmintuu, esi uyifo ubisambi wǝ lenyitɔ lesa nǝ ni lɛsɛ nye lebua.

english_verse: Solid food is for mature people who have been trained to know right from wrong.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ nkpe alee, eyifo lesa nǝ lɛlɛkɛ itǝ mba díkabe ɛyɛ lǝ buyifokǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ, loofo lekpo butsyǝ lǝ nǝ ni lɛsɛ ku lebua eto nti.

english_verse: We must try to become mature and start thinking about more than just the basic things we were taught about Christ. We shouldn't need to keep talking about why we ought to turn from deeds that bring death and why we ought to have faith in God.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ busu sɛtɔ lǝ bobé lǝ asatete ǝsuǝ, lǝ bɔbɔ lǝ asatete tutɛ nnya bófo itsyi lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ. Nyamfo ni bǝnkǝ bɔtsyi bo akɔɛsi bɔwuninsǝ bɔbɔ lǝ abua ǝsuǝ ku nyifo bo lǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ saa ku lǝ Onanto bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And we shouldn't need to keep teaching about baptisms or about the laying on of hands or about people being raised from death and the future judgment.
translation_verse: Báte mi asa lǝ ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ, anitǝkǝtǝkǝ lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ, lǝ bekpǝnkpǝ eto businkli kataka kǝbǝ nkpǝ ku lǝ lekpokponkpo fɛfɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But what about people who turn away after they have already seen the light and have received the gift from heaven and have shared in the Holy Spirit? What about those who turn away after they have received the good message of God and the powers of the future world? There is no way to bring them back. What they are doing is the same as nailing the Son of God to a cross and insulting him in public!
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ǝsuǝǝ, báni mǝ bofokanɔ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ! Esoo, yɔɔkɛ ale bǝ besi bǝnǝ mǝ baboko bɔtsyikawuninsǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise besi balɛ Onanto eto Ubi bɔsɔ lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ, kǝnǝ wǝ kakpe lǝ kofani ǝsuǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kenke eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: A field is useful to farmers, if there is enough rain to make good crops grow. In fact, God will bless such a field.
translation_verse: Onanto aakpo atsyɔ kasɔ ka lǝǝnǝ nsɔmintu bo laani kakpo lǝ ke, ka leeke eyi ku sefa nnya laalɛkɛ itǝ mba eso baafo ke kakpe bidikǝ.

english_verse: But land that produces only thornbushes is worthless. It is likely to fall under God's curse, and in the end it will be set on fire.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kasɔ ka leeke biyu ku kanyii, kaanlɛkɛ kǝtǝ kulesa, kakpe lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ Onanto ebukudi ke nya wootonsǝ ke ku ute.

english_verse: My friends, we are talking this way. But we are sure that you are doing those really good things people do when they are being saved.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ balala, lǝ búdi etiki mmǝ tsyaa, bófo mi bɔnɔ boǝ lǝ mi kutsyǝ alɛɛ, buyi boǝ béfo atsyɔkpokpo sɛɛ nnya loofo mi lǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: God is always fair. He will remember how you helped his people in the past and how you are still helping them. You belong to God, and he won't forget the love you have shown his people.
translation_verse: Onanto enni nwǝ lanyɛ lǝ kusutsyɔntsyɔ ǝsuǝ. Weembota keyifo ka bíyifo nye lelabi nǝ bítǝ wǝ lǝ lɛwunsǝko bo bítǝ nya binsi bɛnlɛ butǝ bafokanɔfɔ bamba.

english_verse: We wish each of you would always be eager to show how strong and lasting your hope really is.
translation_verse: Bo lelabi itǝ mi ni bǝnkǝ mi utsyuǝ saa lɛ nnya kekleke nko isu ese lǝ kalosǝkɔ, bǝ lesa nǝ bɛnlɛ kusu bobee, le ibǝ itǝ nko.

english_verse: Then you would never be lazy. You would be following the example of those who had faith and were patient until God kept his promise to them. God's Promise Is Sure
translation_verse: Boanla boǝ biyifo sɛflɔ, bomu lǝ biyifo asa fe bafokanɔfɔ ba nkpe dibusǝ bǝ lǝ bafo lesa nǝ Onanto dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ útǝ mǝ. Onanto Eto Kɛnyɛ Ka Útsyǝ Eyifo Sitinti.

english_verse: No one is greater than God. So he made a promise in his own name when he said to Abraham,
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Onanto dítsyǝ Abraham kɛnyɛɛ, ɔ́tɛyi óse uyi nkǝ, wuuyifo lǝ lesa nǝ ɔ́tɛyi útsyǝ ǝsuǝ. Se kuutsyuǝ lǝmbǝ lɛmɔ onso wǝ esoo, úfi wǝ kosate eto diye úńyǝnsǝ kama.

english_verse: “I, the Lord, will bless you with many descendants!”
translation_verse: Ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nlɛ fǝ kɛnyɛ butsyǝ minkǝ, mookpo fǝ atsyɔ, ntǝ fǝ befluflu kpǝ.”

english_verse: Then after Abraham had been very patient, he was given what God had promised.
translation_verse: Nya se Abraham lɛkɛ dibusǝ, úmuǝ utu ɔlɛ esoo, únyǝ asa nnya kenke Onanto dítsyǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: When anyone wants to settle an argument, they make a vow by using the name of someone or something greater than themselves.
translation_verse: Betidi aakpadi asa nnya lɛmɔ enso mǝ kosate eto diye lǝ befi bala etiki nnya bátɛyi, lǝ befi bala etiki nnya tã.

english_verse: So when God wanted to prove for certain his promise to his people could not be broken, he made a vow.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso Onanto lékpadi asa úfi óse wǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ uyi nɛ, bǝ lǝ ekpako mba luubǝ bafo wǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ wuee bǝ wǝ ketsyue amfloma kulefe.

english_verse: God cannot tell lies! And so his promises and vows are two things that can never be changed. We have run to God for safety. Now his promises should greatly encourage us to take hold of the hope that is right in front of us.
translation_verse: Onanto áyɛ lǝ esu ǝnuǝ ǝsuǝ, nya ni kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ ku asakpadikpadi nnya lantsyi kawuninsǝ, nya bembufi batɛyi sidia tsya, nya bomba díkǝnyǝ kabiɔkɔ lǝ wǝ, bonkpe kusubebe lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, lǝ bɔkɔbe nnya bɔlɛ kekleke ku kusubebe ko eto kɛnyɛ bǝtsyǝ bo.

english_verse: This hope is like a firm and steady anchor for our souls. In fact, hope reaches behind the curtain and into the most holy place.
translation_verse: Kusubebe ko nkpe bo mfo eyifo fe lesa nǝ dímuǝ bo nkpǝ butsyǝ kekleke. Nya kusubebe komfo aakpia kafia ka nti Disumuyo eto sɛtɔ kafe kedufǝ lǝ kedikǝtǝkɔ kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: Jesus has gone there ahead of us, and he is our high priest forever, just like Melchizedek.
translation_verse: Mfó ǝmǝ Yesu díkatɔ úsu lǝ bo kɛnyɛ fe ɔtɔusu seka. Wǝ díbǝ ofiani fe Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke Melkisedek eto okle isu ese manlo manlo.

english_verse: Melchizedek was both king of Salem and priest of God Most High. He was the one who went out and gave Abraham his blessing, when Abraham returned from killing the kings.
translation_verse: Melkisedek ǝmfo édi seka lǝ Salem, nya úyifo usumunyǝ útǝ Onanto wǝ ntǝkǝ kato fanlo fanlo. Ɔ́bɔ ótsyako Abraham lǝ lefe nǝ útsyi lema nǝ úsu ɔ́kpɔ nya útǝkǝ baka ena ba létsyilama mfó kato. Melkisedek ǝmfo ésu ótsyako wǝ nya ókpo wǝ atsyɔ.

english_verse: Then Abraham gave him a tenth of everything he had. The meaning of the name Melchizedek is “King of Justice.” But since Salem means “peace,” he is also “King of Peace.”
translation_verse: Nya Abraham dítǝ wǝ bikǝ bia ɔkɛ utsyiko mfó eto lekpafosile. Tutɛɛ, diye Melkisedek eto kasɔ ni Kasɛyifoyifo eto Oka. Nnya kama se údi Salem eto Oka esoo, wǝ diye eto kasɔ ni Diyuǝsǝ eto Oka.

english_verse: We are not told he had a father or mother or ancestors or beginning or end. He is like the Son of God and will be a priest forever.
translation_verse: Bánwɔni kulesa bǝtsyǝ itsyi lǝ wǝ anto nye ambe nye lǝ wǝ ketsyikɔ ǝsuǝ nye wǝ leleyi lee lǝ wǝ ukpǝ ǝsuǝ. Uyifo fe Onanto eto Ubi, nya úyifo usumunyǝ ídu lǝ ketsyikokɔ isu kalosǝkɔ.

english_verse: Notice how great Melchizedek was! Our famous ancestor Abraham gave him a tenth of what he had taken from his enemies.
translation_verse: Bebe kase úyifo utidi wǝ lefo diye. Abraham wǝ ni bo ona wǝ léfo diye éfi bikǝ bia útsyiko kamato eto lekpafosile kulaa tsya útǝ wǝ!

english_verse: The Law teaches that even Abraham's descendants must give a tenth of what they possess. And they are to give this to their own relatives, who are the descendants of Levi and are priests.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, bǝtsyǝ kɔfi ko dítǝ kusu bǝnkǝ, Lewi eto befluflu di besumunyǝ. Baafo bikǝ bia Israel bebi ba ni mǝ betidi eto lekpafosile lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ, ite bǝ mǝ betidi bamǝ tsya eyifo Abraham eto befluflu tsya fɛ.

english_verse: Although Melchizedek wasn't a descendant of Levi, Abraham gave him a tenth of what he had. Then Melchizedek blessed Abraham, who had been given God's promise.
translation_verse: Melkisedek ǝmfo ményifo Lewi eto kafo eto ubi, tsyaa ófo lekpafosile utsyiko lǝ Abraham ɔflɔ, wǝǝ ni utidi Onanto dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ nya ókpo wǝ atsyɔ tsya.

english_verse: Everyone agrees a person who gives a blessing is greater than the one who receives the blessing.
translation_verse: Ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ ni bǝnkǝ, utidi wǝ laakpo atsyɔ kpe kalende oso utidi wǝ bákpo atsyɔ.

english_verse: Priests are given a tenth of what people earn. But all priests die, except Melchizedek, and the Scriptures teach that he is alive.
translation_verse: Lǝ besumunyǝ eto kutsyǝǝ, mba laafo asa eto lekpafosilee, eyifo besumunyǝ ba lǝǝkpǝ. Lǝ Melkisedek eto kutsyǝǝ, ófo lekpafosile nǝmǝ fe usumunyǝ, fɛɛ wǝ nsi nkpǝ manlo fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue nlɛ bɔtɛyi.

english_verse: Levi's descendants are now the ones who receive a tenth from people. We could even say that when Abraham gave Melchizedek a tenth, Levi also gave him a tenth.
translation_verse: Nya boofo bɔtɛyi kulaa tsya boǝ Lewi wǝ laafo lekpafosile nǝmfoo, ɔ́yɛ lǝ Abraham eto kutsyǝ ófo asa eto lekpafosile nǝmfo útǝ Melkisedek.

english_verse: This is because Levi was born later into the family of Abraham, who gave a tenth to Melchizedek.
translation_verse: Itsyise lefe nǝ Abraham létsyako Melkisedek nya útǝ wǝ asa eto lekpafosile nǝmfo, bánle tɔ Lewi, usi ɔ́kɛ lǝ wǝ ona eto kɔtɔ kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: Even though the Law of Moses says the priests must be descendants of Levi, those priests cannot make anyone perfect. So there needs to be a priest like Melchizedek, rather than one from the priestly family of Aaron.
translation_verse: Lewi bebi eto besumunyǝdidi ǝsuǝ nnya kɔfi lɛyɛ kubǝ itǝ Israel bebi nɛ. Nya lǝ nnya ete Lewi bebi eto besumunyǝdidi lɛflɔɔ, eni yensife bǝ usumunyǝ bamba eto okle si ubǝ, nwǝ lɛbɔ utsyi lǝ Melkisedek eto okle eto kutsyǝ ǝsuǝ, inni lǝ Aaron eto kutsyǝ.

english_verse: And when the rules for selecting a priest are changed, the Law must also be changed.
translation_verse: Lǝ besumunyǝdidi eto kutsyǝ átsyi kɔwuninsǝǝ, ele bǝ kɔfi ko nyɛnko ko tsya tsyi kɔwuninsǝ.

english_verse: The person we are talking about is our Lord, who came from a tribe that had never had anyone to serve as a priest at the altar.
translation_verse: Nya Bonamute wǝ ǝsuǝ bátɛyi asa nyamfo betsyikoo, étsyi lekpake bamba nǝ eto utidi kuutsyuǝ dímendi tɔ usumunyǝ unyǝ.

english_verse: Everyone knows he came from the tribe of Judah, and Moses never said priests would come from that tribe.
translation_verse: Ékpa wuee bǝ bále wǝ lǝ Yuda eto kafo, nya Moses mánkpo kafo kamfo eto diye ókpe lǝ mba luudi besumunyǝ nti. Usumunyǝ Bamba Wǝ Ni Fe Melkisedek.

english_verse: All of this becomes clearer, when someone who is like Melchizedek is appointed to be a priest.
translation_verse: Etiki nyamfo esi ekpa eso, lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe usumunyǝ bamba eto okle fe Melkisedek disi úbǝ údufǝ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say about him, “You are a priest forever, just like Melchizedek.”
translation_verse: Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ nyamǝ átɛyi ekpa wuee nkǝ, “Usumunyǝ feni idu manlo isu manlo fe Melkisedek eto okle.”

english_verse: In this way a weak and useless command was put aside,
translation_verse: Nyamfo lɛ bote nkǝ bǝlǝkǝ kɔfi koko komǝ bǝtsyǝ kutsyǝ itsyise kumbǝ kɛnyɛale nya koǝńyǝ kutǝ kulesa.

english_verse: because the Law cannot make anything perfect. At the same time, we are given a much better hope, and it can bring us close to God.
translation_verse: Itsyise Moses eto kɔfi mamfo kulesa nǝ lɛflɔ buyifo. Nya mɔmɔɔ, bǝtǝ bo kusubebe fɔfɔ ko lɛlɛkɛ konso, nya bɔɔyɛ lǝ ko ǝsuǝ bɔfi Onanto enso.

english_verse: God himself made a promise when this priest was appointed. But he did not make a promise like this when the other priests were appointed. The promise he made is, “I, the Lord, promise that you will be a priest forever! And I will never change my mind!”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se Yesu léfiani usumunyǝǝ, Onanto áka ntamu útǝ wǝ ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute áka ntamu, nya wǝmbɔtsyi wǝ kɛnyɛ ɔwuninsǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ nkǝ, ‘Usumunyǝ feni idu manlo isu manlo.’ ”

english_verse: This means that Jesus guarantees us a better agreement with God.
translation_verse: Nyamfo ǝtǝ bǝ Yesu ǝbǝ ófiani nwǝ ńyǝ kɛnyɛklekle kamfo kama, ka lɛlɛkɛ kanso.

english_verse: There have been a lot of other priests, and all of them have died.
translation_verse: Bɔtsyi kawuninsǝ bamba tsya ǝbǝ. Besumunyǝ ba kɔ éfui tinti, nya bánkaklɛ lǝ mǝ keyifo ǝsuǝ. Itsyise békekpǝ.

english_verse: But Jesus will never die, and so he will be a priest forever!
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se Yesu, wǝ nsi nkpǝ itǝ manlo manlo esoo, wǝ keyifo fe usumunyǝ amfloma ani kesu utidiamba ɔflɔ.

english_verse: He is forever able to save the people he leads to God, because he always lives to speak to God for them.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyasoo, woafo mba lǝǝbǝ Onanto ɔflɔ lǝ nkpǝ lefe saa ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ kosate ǝsuǝ, itsyise usi nkpǝ lefe saa ɔlɛ bofokǝtǝ mǝ lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Jesus is the high priest we need. He is holy and innocent and faultless, and not at all like us sinners. Jesus is honored above all beings in heaven,
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, ele bǝ Usumunyǝ Ninǝ fe Yesu kɛ bo. Nwǝ diyifo kɛnkɛ, nya kabua saa lǝmbǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ, nya woambiasǝ ǝsuǝ, wǝ bǝlǝkǝ lete lǝ babuayifo nti, wǝ bábesǝ kato fanlofanlofanlo.

english_verse: and he is better than any other high priest. Jesus doesn't need to offer sacrifices each day for his own sins and then for the sins of the people. He offered a sacrifice once for all, when he gave himself.
translation_verse: Yanhiã kulaa bǝ Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke ɛmfo eto oklee, kǝtǝ Onanto kedi lefe saa, tutɛ lǝ wǝ kosate eto disi esoo, nnya kama lǝ betidi bamba eto disi eso, fe kase besumunyǝ ninǝ kenke fɛfɛ leeyifo. Uyifo nyamfo diyifo lɛwɛ itǝ lefe nǝ kenke lǝ lefe nǝ úfi wǝ ǝsuǝ útǝ.

english_verse: The Law appoints priests who have weaknesses. But God's promise, which came later than the Law, appoints his Son. And he is the perfect high priest forever.
translation_verse: Lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝ, Moses eto kɔfi komǝ ǝtsyǝ betidinini ba dímamflɔɔ, besumunyǝ ninǝ kplɛ, fɛɛ Onanto eto ntamu bo óka lǝ Moses eto kɔfi komǝ kamaa, ǝtsyǝ wǝ Ubi Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke wǝ úyifo lɛflɔ itǝ lefe nǝ kenke.

english_verse: What I mean is we have a high priest who sits at the right side of God's great throne in heaven.
translation_verse: Nnya kenke bɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi ete ni bǝnkǝ, bokpe Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke ǝmfo eto okle, wǝ nsi lǝ Ɔkplɛnyǝ Kenke eto lekankpomɛ eto kodiani lǝ kato.

english_verse: He also serves as the priest in the most holy place inside the real tent there in heaven. This tent of worship was set up by the Lord, not by humans.
translation_verse: Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke ǝmfo eesumu lǝ kakɛnkɛkɔ ka ni Disumuyo tinti ka Bonamute díyifo, inni betidi díyifo.

english_verse: Since all priests must offer gifts and sacrifices, Christ also needed to have something to offer.
translation_verse: Bǝtsyǝ Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke saa bǝ lǝ ufi ǝtǝsa saa ku bebuki utǝ Onanto. Nyaso ele bǝ bo usumunyǝ tsya kɛ lesaatsyuǝ nǝ uufi utǝ kedi.

english_verse: If he were here on earth, he would not be a priest at all, because here the Law appoints other priests to offer sacrifices.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ kasɔ mfo ete onkpee, eni wǝ ǝmbuyifo usumunyǝ, itsyise besumunyǝ ba lǝǝtǝ kedi lǝ Yudafɔ eto kɔfi eto kusuu, fe bakpe koko.

english_verse: But the tent where they serve is just a copy and a shadow of the real one in heaven. Before Moses made the tent, he was told, “Be sure to make it exactly like the pattern you were shown on the mountain!”
translation_verse: Keyifo ka beeyifo fe besumunyǝ mfo eyifo nka nte beeyifo lǝ Onanto eto kato eto koyo ete. Nko esoo, lǝ lefe nǝ Moses nkǝ woato disumunyoo, Onanto lɛtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Be fǝnkǝ eyifo ni lekateko ku ditsyǝbi nǝ báte fǝ lǝ kɔtini ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Now Christ has been appointed to serve as a priest in a much better way, and he has given us much assurance of a better agreement.
