translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, bǝtǝ Yesu kesumu eto keyifo ka ntǝkǝ mǝ kale kato, fe kase kɛnyɛklekle ka útsyue lǝ wǝ betidi ku Onanto eto ntii, alɛkɛ kaso nka kɔ, itsyise wǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ eto asa alɛkɛ eso asa nnya nkpe lǝ nka kɔ.

english_verse: If the first agreement with God had been all right, there would not have been any need for another one.
translation_verse: Lǝ nya ete kulesa dimambia lǝ kɛnyɛklekle tutɛ kamǝ ǝsuǝ, eni yensife itǝ kǝnuǝfǝ kamfo.

english_verse: But the Lord found fault with it and said, “I tell you the time will come, when I will make a new agreement with the people of Israel and the people of Judah.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto ǝnyǝ kabua lǝ wǝ betidi ǝsuǝ se ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Lefe lɛ bubǝ se mɔ, fǝ Onamutee, lookle kɛnyɛ fɔfɔ ku Israel eto betidi ku Yuda eto betidi.

english_verse: It won't be like the agreement that I made with their ancestors, when I took them by the hand and led them out of Egypt. They broke their agreement with me, and I stopped caring about them!
translation_verse: Kɛnyɛklekle kamfo embutsyǝ fe nka mínkle ku mǝ bana mǝ, lǝ lefe nǝ mínkɔbe mǝ minlɛ lǝ kɔni nya mínkpa mǝ mímbɔnko lǝ Egipte eto kasɔ. Itsyise béntsyue mɔ kɛnyɛklekle kamǝ koto. Nyaso míntsyi kama mínkpe mǝ nɛ. Mmǝ Bonamute nlɛ bɔtɛyi nɛ!

english_verse: “But now I tell the people of Israel this is my new agreement: ‘The time will come when I, the Lord, will write my laws on their minds and hearts. I will be their God, and they will be my people.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, nyǝ kɛnyɛ ka mookle ku Israel eto betidi lǝ lefe nǝ lǝǝbǝ mǝ. Muufi mɔ kɔfi nkpe mǝ lǝ mǝ nsusu kǝmiǝ. Nya mɔɔwɔni ko nkpe lǝ mǝ ketu kǝmiǝ. Muuyifo mǝ Onanto, nya mǝǝ tsya ebuyifo mɔ betidi.

english_verse: Not one of them will have to teach another to know me, their Lord.’ “All of them will know me, no matter who they are.
translation_verse: Nya mǝ kuutsyuǝ ensi embote wǝ utsyuǝ kulesa nye wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ tɛyi nkǝ bete Bonamute ǝmǝ. Itsyise mǝ utsyuǝ saa ebote mɛ idu lǝ dikpefi isu ese lǝ uninǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I will treat them with kindness, even though they are wicked. I will forget their sins.”
translation_verse: Nya muufi mǝ abua nnya kenke béyifo ntsyɛ mǝ. Nya mensiembokloma mǝ abua nya béyifo kulefe.”

english_verse: When the Lord talks about a new agreement, he means that the first one is out of date. And anything that is old and useless will soon disappear.
translation_verse: Se Onanto lídi etiki utsyiko lǝ kɛnyɛklekle fɔfɔ ǝsuǝǝ, ete kasɔ bǝ nka kɔ eyifo kakoko. Nya lesa saa nǝ lefiani lekoko nǝ lesibǝ kutǝkǝǝ, ǝmbɔklɛ fɛ dionya kenke.

english_verse: The first promise included rules for worship and a tent for worship here on earth.
translation_verse: Kɛnyɛklekle tutɛ eto afi ákɛ kesumu eto afi, nya béyifo kasɔ mfo eto Disumuyo tsya bǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: The first part of the tent was called the holy place, and a lampstand, a table, and the sacred loaves of bread were kept there.
translation_verse: Béyifo Kafia eto Mpatampa Kɛnkɛ nya bésie ni lǝ akpa ǝnuǝ ku kafia. Baakpo sɛtɔ eto lekpa bǝ Kakɛnkɛkɔ. Mfó bǝńyǝnsǝ okandiɛ eto keyi ku kesumu eto ɔpunu wǝ ǝsuǝ bǝǝtǝkǝ abolo nnya beefi kǝtǝ Onanto kedi.

english_verse: Behind the curtain was the most holy place.
translation_verse: Lǝ Disumuyo eto kaka befi kafia bala eto kamaa, ni kaka baakpo Kakɛnkɛkɔ Kenke.

english_verse: The gold altar for burning incense was in this holy place. The gold-covered sacred chest was also there, and inside it were three things. First, there was a gold jar filled with manna. Then there was Aaron's walking stick that sprouted. Finally, there were the flat stones with the Ten Commandments written on them.
translation_verse: Mfó béfi sika sia eto ɔpunu wǝ ǝsuǝ baatonsǝ lifui ku kɛnyɛklekle eto lelaka nǝ befi sika sia beti batsyilama bǝtsyǝ. Nya kɛnyɛklekle eto lelaka nǝmǝ kafoo, bákpe asa nnya ni sika sia eto okase utsyuǝ wǝ eto kafo bákpe didisa nǝ baakpo mana, ku Aaron eto uyilɛlɛ wǝ díkǝ ku afanto, ku aba blɛkɛtɛ ǝnuǝ nya ǝsuǝ báwɔni Onanto eto afi bǝtǝkǝ.

english_verse: On top of the chest were the glorious creatures with wings opened out above the place of mercy. Now isn't the time to go into detail about these things.
translation_verse: Lǝ lelaka nǝmǝ eto kato báwe Onanto eto asa nnya nkpe nkpǝ baakpo bǝ Kerubi eto ditsyǝbi bǝtǝkǝ ba nlɛ Onanto eto diyǝnde bulǝkǝ kate. Mǝ mbamba eto koyo éti kaka bǝǝnyǝ betidi kaminsǝ kefi mǝ abua katsyɛ mǝ. Fɛɛ boǝmbofo etiki budi mfo kǝlǝkǝ asa nyamfo kenke kasɔ kate mɔmɔ.

english_verse: But this is how everything was when the priests went each day into the first part of the tent to do their duties.
translation_verse: Nko ini bétsyue asa nyamfo bǝtsyǝ mfó nɛ. Besumunyǝ bamǝ eedufǝ Disumuyo tutɛ kamǝ diyi saa kesu keyifo mǝ kesumuyifo mfó.

english_verse: However, only the high priest could go into the second part of the tent, and he went in only once a year. Each time he carried blood to offer for his sins and for any sins that the people had committed without meaning to.
translation_verse: Kǝmiǝ eto Disumuyo nǝmǝǝ, Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke hã nkpe kusu weedufǝ mfó lɛlɛ sɔni hã. Nya lǝ ɔtɔɔ, ele bǝ ufi ubuki eto kɔtɔ usuko mfó usu utǝ Onanto kedi lǝ wǝ ku kusǝ komǝ kenke eto betidi eto abua nnya béyifo lǝ mǝ mante mante ǝsuǝ eto disi.

english_verse: All of this is the Holy Spirit's way of saying no one could enter the most holy place while the tent was still the place of worship.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ, Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ǝlǝkǝ óte nkǝ se sɛtɔ eto Disumuyo nǝmǝ nsi nte koo, yǝntǝ kusu bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa kpia mfó ofe udufǝ lǝ Kakɛnkɛkɔ Kenke kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: These rules are merely about such things as eating and drinking and ceremonies for washing ourselves. And rules about physical things will last only until the time comes to change them for something better.
translation_verse: Itsyise nyamfo kenke nyǝ lǝ budi ku bunǝ ku akpa eto etsyuesa kpǝ kpǝ, nnya lɛyɛ lǝ utidi eto ǝsuǝ bokpasǝ eto esu ǝsuǝ ete. Béyifo etsyuesa nyamfo kenke itǝ utidi isu ese lefe nǝ Onanto luubǝ ɔlɔ lesa saa utsyǝ ɛyɛ lǝ kusu fɔfɔ ǝsuǝ. Kristo Eto Kɔtɔ Ǝǝlǝkǝ Abuayifoyifo Kalosǝ Lǝ Betidi Ǝsuǝ!

english_verse: Christ came as the high priest of the good things that are now here. He also went into a much better tent that wasn't made by humans and that doesn't belong to this world.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Kristo ebubǝ koko fe Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke itǝ asa sɛɛ nya díkǝbǝ. Uyifo usumunyǝ lǝ Kafia eto Mpatampa nǝ lɛmɔ, nya lɛflɔ lenso Kafia eto Mpatampa nǝ kɔ. Dienyifo dibu nǝ utidinini dífi wǝ ani uyifo eto kasɔ ni bǝnkǝ dienyifo kasɔ kamfo eto asayifoyifo.

english_verse: Then Christ went once for all into the most holy place and freed us from sin forever. He did this by offering his own blood instead of the blood of goats and bulls.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝ Kristo dídufǝ disumuyo nǝ mǝǝ, ɔ́yɛ lǝ ni ofe lɔni kplo, údufǝ lǝ kaka ni Kakɛnkɛkɔ Kenke. Nya wémfi bate nye banantsyui eto kɔtɔ uyifo fe keditǝtǝ, bomu wǝ kosate eto kɔtɔ itǝ lefe nǝ ta! Nya úyifo nko bǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ utǝ bo nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: According to the Law of Moses, those people who become unclean are not fit to worship God. Yet they will be considered clean, if they are sprinkled with the blood of goats and bulls and with the ashes of a sacrificed calf.
translation_verse: Weefi bate ku banantsyui eto kɔtɔ ku onantsyui eto lɛkpɔ nǝ baatonsǝ eto ntɔ beefi kese lǝ nwǝ eto ǝsuǝ dimanle itǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ ele, iyifo wǝ kenkɛ.

english_verse: But Christ was sinless, and he offered himself as an eternal and spiritual sacrifice to God. This is why his blood is much more powerful and makes our consciences clear. Now we can serve the living God and no longer do things that lead to death.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eyifo sitinti, nyalɛ ntsyǝ yuutsyǝ bǝ Kristo eto kɔtɔ bomu embokpasǝ bo esuǝ eso nko! Ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nsi nkpǝ lefe saa ǝsuǝǝ, úfi wǝ ǝsuǝ útǝ fe keditǝtǝ ka lɛflɔ utǝ Onanto. Wǝ kɔtɔ ebuflǝsǝ bo akɔɛsi itsyiko lǝ akpa bimba eto eyifosa nnya lǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ saa bǝ lǝ busumu Onanto wǝ nsi nkpǝ lefe saa.

english_verse: Christ died to rescue those who had sinned and broken the old agreement. Now he brings his chosen ones a new agreement with its guarantee of God's eternal blessings!
translation_verse: Nyaso Kristo ni nwǝ ɛyɛ lǝ kɛnyɛklekle fɔfɔ kamǝ ǝsuǝǝ, dínyǝ lǝ bo kɛnyɛ ófo útǝ bo, bǝ lǝ betidi ba Onanto lékpadi lǝ bǝnyǝ nkpǝ manlo eto kedikɔ ka Onanto dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ útsyǝ. Nyamfo ebofo bubǝ kǝtǝ itsyise utidi ɔni wǝ díkpee, dílǝkǝ abuayifoyifo nnya lɛkɛ lǝ kɛnyɛklekle koko eto lefe úwui, bǝnyǝ bufikatsyɛ.

english_verse: In other words, a will doesn't go into effect as long as the one who made it is still alive.
translation_verse: Lǝ utidi wǝ dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ si usi nkpǝǝ, bǝmbofo utidi ǝmǝ eto bike busǝnsǝ.

english_verse: Blood was also used to put the first agreement into effect.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya eso béfi kɔtɔ bákpe ǝsuǝale kɛnyɛklekle koko kamǝ ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Moses told the people all the Law said they must do. Then he used red wool and a hyssop plant to sprinkle the people and the book of the Law with the blood of bulls and goats and with water.
translation_verse: Tutɛɛ, Moses ábe letsya úlǝkǝ aklesa nnya nkpe lǝ kɔfi komǝ óte kusǝ komǝ kenke eto betidi. Nya úfi bate ku banatsyui eto kɔtɔ otsyakasǝ ku ntu ku basamu eto bisǝ sia ku afantosi nnya laanyi fififi fɛ úfi úse lǝ kɔfi eto kukue ku betidi bamǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: He told the people, “With this blood God makes his agreement with you.”
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nyamfo ni kɔtɔ ko Onanto dífi ose kɔfi ko utǝ bo uyi nkǝ butsyue ko koto.”

english_verse: Moses also sprinkled blood on the tent and on everything else used in worship.
translation_verse: Nko ke Moses dífi kɔtɔ komǝ úsǝ lǝ Kafia eto Mpatampa nǝmǝ ku asa nnya kenke béfi béyifo kesumu kamǝ nɛ.

english_verse: The Law says that almost everything must be sprinkled with blood, and no sins can be forgiven unless blood is offered. Christ's Great Sacrifice
translation_verse: Sitinti lǝ kɔfi komǝ ǝsuǝ kɔtɔ beefi kǝflǝ lesa saa ǝsuǝ. Nya lǝ bankpo kɔtɔɔ kasɔɔ, beemfi lebua katsyɛ. Kristo Eto Ǝsuǝ Nya Úfi Útǝ Te Fe Kedi Ka Lǝǝflǝ Bo Abua Kewui.

english_verse: These things are only copies of what is in heaven, and so they had to be made holy by these ceremonies. But the real things in heaven must be made holy by something better.
translation_verse: Ińyǝ itǝ bǝ béyifo nkomǝ eto akpa nyamfo lǝ befi bakpasǝ asa nnya lele kato eto ale ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ asa nnya ni kato eto ale eto kutsyǝ, befi keditǝtǝ eto asa nnya lekpa ǝsuǝ enso kasɔ mfo eto alee, bákpasǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: This is why Christ did not go into a tent made by humans and was only a copy of the real one. Instead, he went into heaven and is now there with God to help us.
translation_verse: Itsyise Kristo mensu kakɛnkɛkɔ ka befi kawunsiǝ kamfo eto betidi eto ani beyifo, ka ni kakɛnkɛkɔ kato eto okle ete. Bomu úsu kato kosate, kaka woala kǝńyǝ kǝtǝ bo lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Christ did not have to offer himself many times. He wasn't like a high priest who goes into the most holy place each year to offer the blood of an animal.
translation_verse: Kristo ménsu mfó nkǝ lǝ ufi wǝ ǝsuǝ utǝ kedi sesia sesia lǝ bo disi, fe kase Yudafɔ eto Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke leedufǝ Kakɛnkɛkɔ Kenke mfó keyifo lɛlɛ saa lɛlɛ ku ubuki eto kɔtɔ, ko lenni wǝ kosate eto kole.

english_verse: If he had offered himself every year, he would have suffered many times since the creation of the world. But instead, near the end of time he offered himself once and for all, so he could be a sacrifice that does away with sin.
translation_verse: Lǝ nko ini, eni yoofe bǝ ufi wǝ ǝsuǝ utǝ, unyǝ kanyi sesia sesia idu lǝ kawunsiǝ eto ketsyikokɔ ke. Bomu kase inte mɔmɔ, Kristo ǝbǝ lɔni kplo lǝ kawunsiǝ eto kalokɔ eto eyi nyamfo lǝ ufi wǝ kosate eto ǝsuǝ utǝ fe kedi lǝ ulǝkǝ lebua uwui, lǝ bo disi.

english_verse: We die only once, and then we are judged.
translation_verse: Onanto dítsyǝ nnya nkǝ utidi kpǝ sɔni kplo, nya lǝ nnya kamaa, bakponko wǝ lekpo.

english_verse: So Christ died only once to take away the sins of many people. But when he comes again, it will not be to take away sin. He will come to save everyone who is waiting for him.
translation_verse: Nko ke ini Kristo dífi wǝ ǝsuǝ útǝ fe kedi sɔni kplo, itǝ betidi kpǝ eto bofo ketsyiko lǝ abua ǝsuǝ. Wuusinkli ubǝ dinuǝfǝ, insini lǝ lebua eso, bomu bǝ lǝ ubǝ ulǝkǝ mba nsi banlɛ wǝ kusu bobe itǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: The Law of Moses is like a shadow of the good things to come. This shadow isn't the good things themselves, because it cannot free people from sin by the sacrifices offered year after year.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ eto kɔfi komǝǝ, asa sɛɛ nnya nlɛ bubǝ eto koyo ete kuni, inni asɛ nnya kosate lǝǝbǝ bubǝ ini. Nyaso kɔfi komǝ embofo bɔyɛ lǝ keditǝtǝ ka beeyifo lɛlɛ saa lɛlɛ keyifo betidi ba laanyi kafi Onantoo, baflɔ balo kulefe.

english_verse: If there were worshipers who already have their sins washed away and their consciences made clear, there would not be any need to go on offering sacrifices.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ete boofo betidi ba nlɛ Onanto busumu buyifo kɛnkɛnkɛ babɔ lǝ mǝ abua ǝsuǝǝ, eni mǝ ketu ensiembolo mǝ dikpi bio, nya keditǝtǝ saa ebolo.

english_verse: But the blood of bulls and goats cannot take away sins. It only reminds people of their sins from one year to the next.
translation_verse: Itsyise bate ku banantsyui eto kɔtɔ embofo abua buflǝ kewui lǝ utidi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When Christ came into the world, he said to God, “Sacrifices and offerings are not what you want, but you have given me my body.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eso fɛ Kristo luubǝ kawunsiǝ kamfoo, ɔ́tɛyi Onanto nkǝ, “Ámanhiã keditǝtǝ ku asatǝtǝ, bomu éyifo ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ǝtǝ mɛ.

english_verse: No, you are not pleased with animal sacrifices and offerings for sin.”
translation_verse: Bebuki botonsǝ kǝtǝ kedi ku lebuayifoyifo eto asatǝtǝ lǝ kedikǝtǝkɔ eto leba ǝsuǝǝ, aankpe fǝ disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: Then Christ said, “And so, my God, I have come to do what you want, as the Scriptures say.”
translation_verse: Nya míntɛyi minkǝ, ‘Nyǝ mɔɔ, mbǝ miǝ meyifo fǝ lelabi fe kase bawɔni lǝ mɛ ǝsuǝ lǝ kɔfi eto Kukue kǝmiǝ.’ ”

english_verse: The Law teaches that offerings and sacrifices must be made because of sin. But why did Christ mention these things and say that God did not want them?
translation_verse: Tutɛɛ, ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Ámanhiã keditǝtǝ ku asatǝtǝ, bebuki botonsǝ kǝtǝ kedi ku lebuayifoyifo eto keditǝtǝ.” Nya yǝnyuǝsǝfǝ kafo tsya, ite bǝ kɔfi komǝ áte nkǝ beyifo nko fɛ.

english_verse: Well, it was to do away with offerings and sacrifices and to replace them. This is what he meant by saying to God, “I have come to do what you want.”
translation_verse: Mfó ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Nyǝ mɔ mfo. Mbǝ miǝ meeyifo fǝ lelabi.” Ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ esoo, Onanto ǝlǝkǝ keditǝtǝ eto asa nnya kɔ útsyǝ kutsyǝ. Nya úfi Kristo eto keditǝtǝ útsyǝ lǝ nnya kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: The priests do their work each day, and they keep on offering sacrifices that can never take away sins.
translation_verse: Diyi saa, Yudafɔ eto usumunyǝ ǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto Disumuyo. We efi ǝtǝsa nyamǝ ke kǝtǝ kedi lefe saa, ite bǝ yembofo abua nyamǝ buflǝ kewui tsya.

english_verse: But Christ offered himself as a sacrifice that is good forever. Now he is sitting at God's right side,
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se Kristo díbǝ útǝ kedi kani kamǝ hã lǝ abua eto disi itǝ lefe nǝ kenke ólosǝǝ, úsu úsiǝ lǝ Onanto eto kodiani.

english_verse: and he will stay there until his enemies are put under his power.
translation_verse: Mfó unsi mɔmɔ idu isu ese lefe nǝ Onanto luufi wǝ balo okpe lǝ wǝ nkpakalɔ.

english_verse: By his one sacrifice he has forever set free from sin the people he brings to God.
translation_verse: Kristo efi wǝ ǝsuǝ útǝ fe kedi ditǝ lɛwɛ, nya úyifo mba eto ǝsuǝ bákpasǝ lɛflɔ beyifo kɛnkɛ isu manlo.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit also speaks of this by telling us that the Lord said,
translation_verse: Nyaa, Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ ǝlǝkǝ nya ote wee nkǝ,

english_verse: “When the time comes, I will make an agreement with them. I will write my laws on their minds and hearts.
translation_verse: “Nyǝ kɛnyɛ ka mookle ku mǝ lǝ eyi nnya lǝǝbǝ mmǝ kama. Muufi mɔ kɔfi nkpe lǝ mǝ ketu kǝmiǝ. Nya mɔɔwɔni nya lǝ mǝ nsusu kǝmiǝ.”

english_verse: Then I will forget about their sins and no longer remember their evil deeds.”
translation_verse: Nya usi ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Mensi embokloma mǝ abua ku mǝ eyifosa bua saa.”

english_verse: When sins are forgiven, there is no more need to offer sacrifices. Encouragement and Warning
translation_verse: Lǝ befi asa nyamfo bátsyɛɛ, yensiembofe bǝ, besi bǝtǝ kedi lǝ abua eto disi.

english_verse: My friends, the blood of Jesus gives us courage to enter the most holy place
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, mɔ bayimi, bokpe kusu buedufǝ Kakɛnkɛkɔ Kenke kamǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Yesu eto ukpǝ wǝ úkpǝ eso.

english_verse: by a new way that leads to life! And this way takes us through the curtain that is Christ himself.
translation_verse: Itsyise ɔ́sini kusu fɔfɔ utǝ bo, ko ni nkpǝ eto kusu ɛyɛ lǝ kafia ka béti lǝ Kakɛnkɛkɔ Kenke eto kɛnyɛ mfó ka ńyǝ itǝ wǝ kosate eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ.

english_verse: We have a great high priest who is in charge of God's house.
translation_verse: Bokpe Usumunyǝ Kplɛ wǝ nsi lǝ Onanto eto diyo nǝmǝ eto kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: So let's come near God with pure hearts and a confidence that comes from having faith. Let's keep our hearts pure, our consciences free from evil, and our bodies washed with clean water.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bɔnyi bɔfi Onanto ku sitinti eto utu, ku bofokanɔ kekleke ku akɔɛsi nnya bǝflǝ éle kɛnkɛnkɛ bǝlǝkǝ betsyiko lǝ abua ǝsuǝ ku ntu bo keni saa lǝmbǝ bǝ bo akɔɛsi ensi aalo bo dikpi.

english_verse: We must hold tightly to the hope we say is ours. After all, we can trust the one who made the agreement with us.
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ bɔlɛ nnya bofo bɔnɔ, bɔnlɛ kusu bobe kǝtǝ nya boǝlǝkǝ katee lǝ kɔni kekleke, itsyise Onanto wǝ ditsyǝ bo kɛnyɛɛ, eyifo ɔnukualɛnyǝ.

english_verse: We should keep on encouraging each other to be thoughtful and to do helpful things.
translation_verse: Bitǝ bukebu disi lǝ bukakpe bo bǝtsyuǝ otsyekle lǝ lɛyimila ku nkpǝ sɛɛ busiǝ ku bǝtsyuǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Some people have given up the habit of meeting for worship, but we must not do that. We should keep on encouraging each other, especially since you know that the day of the Lord's coming is getting closer.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lǝ bɔyɛ disikakpekɔ busu fe kase bo nti eto bǝtsyuǝ leeyifo seka. Bomu bitǝ lǝ bokpe bǝtsyuǝ nkɛale enso, se binyi biǝ Bonamute eto Diyi nǝmǝ fe lɛlɛ bɔnyi kafi.

english_verse: No sacrifices can be made for people who decide to sin after they find out about the truth.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ buyi ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ, fɛ busi butsyǝ bɔnlɛ asa bua buyifo, nyalɛ keditǝtǝ saa ensibǝ ka dulǝkǝ abua iwui itǝ bunyǝ bufikatsyɛ bio.

english_verse: They are God's enemies, and all they can look forward to is a terrible judgment and a furious fire.
translation_verse: Bomu nya lesa saa nǝ luubu ni bǝ Onanto ookponko bo lekpo, nya wɔɔtsylɔsǝ mba létaka bǝńyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ ditefɛnku nǝ nkpe kɛnyɛ ale!

english_verse: If two or more witnesses accused someone of breaking the Law of Moses, that person could be put to death.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke dímentsyue Moses eto kɔfi kotoo, bolo baalo wǝ kaminsǝ mǝnyǝmǝnyǝ, lǝ bakponko wǝ lekpo balo wǝ dikpi lǝ badansiɛ inuǝ nye itsyǝ eto kɛnyɛ kama.

english_verse: But it is much worse to dishonor God's Son and to disgrace the blood of the promise that made us holy. And it is just as bad to insult the Holy Spirit, who shows us mercy.
translation_verse: Nya ntsyǝ yuutsyǝ itǝ nwǝ laani Onanto eto Ubi, nwǝ lǝǝntǝ dibu Onanto eto kɛnyɛklekle eto kɔtɔ ko díflǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ nya úlǝkǝ wǝ utsyiko lǝ lebua ǝsuǝ nya waaka lefonǝ eto Lɛwɔnɔ? Ntsyǝ fɛ kotonǝnǝ kekleke kutsyuǝ eto okle lembunyǝ kutǝ wǝ!

english_verse: We know that God has said he will punish and take revenge. We also know that the Scriptures say the Lord will judge his people.
translation_verse: Itsyise buyi nwǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Muutsyǝ nnya kɛnyɛ. Mɔɔ, maatisǝ oko.” Nya owoe tsya lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute ebokponko wǝ betidi lekpo.”

english_verse: It is a terrible thing to fall into the hands of the living God!
translation_verse: Mbɔbɔɛ mǝǝtǝ nwǝ luudufǝ lǝ Onanto wǝ nkpe nkpe eto lefonyi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Don't forget all the hard times you went through when you first received the light.
translation_verse: Bekloma kase ítsyǝ lǝ lefe nǝ lefe mmǝ. Lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto eto diyǝnde díkabɔ lékpo mi lǝ ǝsuǝ, nya bulǝ kpǝ dítu mi, fɛɛ bulǝ bomǝ mǝntǝkǝ mi kato.

english_verse: Sometimes you were abused and mistreated in public, and at other times you shared in the sufferings of others.
translation_verse: Lefe ditsyuǝ, baaka mi kulaa tsya lǝ betidi nti nya beeyifo mi disiale, nya lǝ afe bamba ǝtsyuǝ tsyaa, beebu mi kakpe lǝ mba ǝsuǝ banlɛ asa nyamfo buyifo kakpe eto nti.

english_verse: You were kind to people in jail. And you gladly let your possessions be taken away, because you knew you had something better, something that would last forever.
translation_verse: Bińyǝ kanyi ku mba befi bakpe lǝ aba eto diyo. Nya lefe nǝ bǝmuǝ mi balɛ mi bikǝ bafo lǝ ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ tsyaa, yǝnlǝ mi itsyise bete biǝ bisi bekpe bikǝ bia lefo koya enso mi, bia lembobia kulefe.

english_verse: Keep on being brave! It will bring you great rewards.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso biǝntǝ lǝ elo mi ani itsyise yuunǝ kutǝkǝ kpǝ eboko mi.

english_verse: Learn to be patient, so you will please God and be given what he has promised.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ bekpe dibusǝ lǝ biyifo Onanto eto lelabi lǝ befo lesa nǝ útsyǝ kɛnyɛ utsyǝ mi.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “God is coming soon! It won't be very long.
translation_verse: Itsyise fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛtɛyii, “Ibu sɛkɛɛ, lǝ nwǝ nlɛ bubǝ lǝ ubǝ udufǝ, wǝǝmbofe kama ku bubǝ.

english_verse: The people God accepts will live because of their faith. But he isn't pleased with anyone who turns back.”
translation_verse: Mɔ utidi wǝ ni ɔsɛɛ, ebunyǝ bofokanɔ usiǝ nkpǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ mǝ utsyuǝ etsyi kama okpe mɛɛ, membunyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: We are not like those people who turn back and get destroyed. We will keep on having faith until we are saved.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ boo, bunni betidi ba leetsyi kama kakpe bo bofakanɔ bǝ lǝ bonya. Bomu boo, bófo bɔ́nɔ, nya Onanto léfo bo.

english_verse: Faith makes us sure of what we hope for and gives us proof of what we cannot see.
translation_verse: Lǝ akpe bofokanɔɔ, eté bǝ akpe kusubebe kekleke itǝ lesa nǝ fanlɛ kusu bobe kǝtǝ. Ite bǝ anlɛ ni bunyǝ tsya.

english_verse: It was their faith that made our ancestors pleasing to God.
translation_verse: Bofokanɔ dítǝ Onanto dínyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ bo bana ǝsuǝ lǝ kokolefe.

english_verse: Because of our faith, we know that the world was made at God's command. We also know that what can be seen was made out of what cannot be seen.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, nya bɔ́nɔ kasɔ boǝ Onanto éyifo kawunsiǝ kenke lǝ wǝ ditiki ǝsuǝ. Nya úyifo nnya utsyiko lǝ lesa nǝ dimankɛ bǝnyǝ kɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Because Abel had faith, he offered God a better sacrifice than Cain did. God was pleased with him and his gift, and even though Abel is now dead, his faith still speaks for him.
translation_verse: Bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ nya Abel dífi asa nnya lɛlɛkɛ enso Kain eto ale útǝ Onanto kedi eso Onanto dínyǝ wǝ nwǝ leeyifo kasɛɛ. Onanto áfo wǝ ǝtǝsa nnya ɔ́yɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ údi wǝ kɛnyɛ nkǝ uyifo ɔsɛɛ. Ite bǝ Abel ékpe tsyaa, wǝ bofokanɔ si bɔlɛ etiki budi ketsyiko lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Enoch had faith and did not die. He pleased God, and God took him up to heaven. This is why his body was never found.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ Enok eto bofokanɔ esoo, weenkpe. Onanto étsyi wǝ úsuko kato. Kuutsyuǝ saa mǝnnyǝ wǝ, itsyise Onanto étsyi wǝ usuko kato. Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, fɛ útsyi Enok úsuko katoo, wǝ asa édufǝ Onanto ǝnǝ.

english_verse: But without faith no one can please God. We must believe that God is real and rewards everyone who searches for him.
translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ eto etiki embudufǝ Onanto ǝnǝ, lenni ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ. Itsyise utsyuǝ saa wǝ ke lǝǝbǝ Onanto ɔflɔ, ele bǝ ofo ɔnɔ nkǝ Onanto kpe nya wǝǝtǝ mba laabɛbɛ wǝ lǝǝnyǝ wǝ.

english_verse: Because Noah had faith, he was warned about something that had not yet happened. He obeyed and built a boat that saved him and his family. In this way the people of the world were judged, and Noah was given the blessings that come to everyone who pleases God.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nnya Onanto díkǝ Noa ato kekleke itsyi lǝ asa nnya lǝǝbǝ bubǝ nya wǝǝnnyǝ tɔ unyǝ ǝsuǝ. Útsyue Onanto koto nya ówe lelaka eto ɔklɔ nǝ léfo wǝ ku wǝ diyo eto betidi lǝ nkpǝ. Ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ bofokanɔ bomfo ǝsuǝ Noa ǝlǝkǝ óte nkǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke édi dikpi. Nya ófiani ɔsɛɛ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi nya únyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Abraham had faith and obeyed God. He was told to go to the land that God had said would be his, and he left for a country he had never seen.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nnya Abraham lɛnɔ Onanto eto bokpadi bo ókpadi wǝ nkǝ usu kasɔ ka Onanto dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ útsyǝ nkǝ wuufi utǝ wǝ fe wǝ kedikɔ ǝsuǝ. Údu lǝ wǝ kasɔ úsu kaka wánte kulaa tsya.

english_verse: Because Abraham had faith, he lived as a stranger in the promised land. He lived there in a tent, and so did Isaac and Jacob, who were later given the same promise.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, úsiǝ fe ɔfɔ lǝ kasɔ ka Onanto dítsyǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ. Úsiǝ lǝ ebu fe Isak ku Yakob ba léfo kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ itsyi lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Abraham did this, because he was waiting for the eternal city God had planned and built.
translation_verse: Abraham ákabe kusu itǝ umǝnkplɛ wǝ báto bǝńyǝnsǝ wǝ ni nwǝ Onanto kosate léto.

english_verse: Even when Sarah was too old to have children, she had faith that God would do what he had promised, and she had a son.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, ite bǝ Abraham wǝ díkabe ófee, léfiani anto nya Sara wǝ díkabe ofiani uninǝsia tsya lɛlɛ kafo, Onanto ǝtǝ nkǝ Abraham fiani ubianto itsyise uyi nkǝ Onanto wǝ dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ útsyǝ, éyifo lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Her husband Abraham was almost dead, but he became the ancestor of many people. In fact, there are as many of them as there are stars in the sky or grains of sand along the seashore.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ Abraham obobe uku tsya, ɛyɛ lǝ utidi ɔni ǝmfo ǝsuǝ, nya befluflu kpǝ lɛbɔ betsyi fe befandebi nkpe kato, fe kase lekpa eto kɔwunumi ko bǝmbofo lǝ lekpa kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: Every one of those people died. But they still had faith, even though they had not received what they had been promised. They were glad just to see these things from far away, and they agreed that they were only strangers and foreigners on this earth.
translation_verse: Betidi bamfo kenke ǝsiǝ nkpǝ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ isu ese lefe nǝ bǝkpǝ. Bámfo asa nnya Onanto dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ útsyǝ. Fɛɛ bǝnyǝ nya famfamfamfa nya bǝtǝ nya edufǝ nya batɛyi bǝnkǝ sitinti bafɔ ku mba nyɛ kusu ete beni lǝ kasɔ kamfo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When people talk this way, it is clear they are looking for a place to call their own.
translation_verse: Nya betidi ba latɛyi asa nyamfoo, ǝǝlǝkǝ kate wuee bǝnkǝ balɛ kusu bobe kǝtǝ mǝ kosate eto kǝmǝnsɔ.

english_verse: If they had been talking about the land where they had once lived, they could have gone back at any time.
translation_verse: Lǝ kasɔ ka ǝsuǝ bétu ete banlɛ bɔbɛbɛɛ, eni bátafo businkli kesu mfó.

english_verse: But they were looking forward to a better home in heaven. This is why God wasn't ashamed for them to call him their God. He even built a city for them.
translation_verse: Bomuu, bákabe kusu itǝ kasɔ ka lɛlɛkɛ kanso nkamfó. Ke ni Onanto eto kato. Nyamfo eso yaanlɛ Onanto kofani lǝ bakpadi wǝ bǝ mǝ Onanto nɛ, itsyise ɔ́lɔ umǝnkplɛ utsyuǝ útsyǝ itǝ mǝ.

english_verse: Abraham had been promised that Isaac, his only son, would continue his family. But when Abraham was tested, he had faith and was willing to sacrifice Isaac,
translation_verse: Ite bǝ Onanto ébɔtɛyi wǝ nkǝ, “Ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ ubi Isak ǝsuǝ nya fuunyǝ befluflu kpǝ ba míntɛyi míntsyǝ.”

english_verse: because he was sure that God could raise people to life. This was just like getting Isaac back from death.
translation_verse: Abraham éfi nnya nkǝ, Onanto ebofo wǝ ubi Isak botakasǝ ketsyiko ɔkɔmǝ kaboko nkpǝ. Nya fe kase íbǝǝ, Abraham ésinkli ófo Isak fe ɔkɔmǝ útsyi úbǝ.

english_verse: Isaac had faith, and he promised blessings to Jacob and Esau.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nnya Isak lékpo Yakob ku Esau atsyɔ itǝ sɛtɔ sia nlɛ bubǝ.

english_verse: Later, when Jacob was about to die, he leaned on his walking stick and worshiped. Then because of his faith he blessed each of Joseph's sons.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nya Yakob le lefe nǝ ɔnlɛ bukpǝǝ, ókpo Yosef eto bebi atsyɔ, nya ɔ́tɛsǝ Onanto se úkpǝsǝ lǝ uyi wǝ waalɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And right before Joseph died, he had faith that God would lead the people of Israel out of Egypt. So he told them to take his bones with them.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ se Yosef dínyǝ nkǝ wǝ dikpǝfe éboyoo, údi etiki utsyi lǝ Israel bebi eto budu lǝ Egipte eto kasɔ ǝsuǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi mǝ kase ele bǝ beyifo ku wǝ ɔkɔ.

english_verse: Because Moses' parents had faith, they kept him hidden until he was three months old. They saw that he was a beautiful child, and they were not afraid to disobey the king's orders.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ eso Moses eto antomǝ dífi wǝ bákula lǝ afa ǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ se bále wǝ. Bǝnyǝ bǝ úyifo dikpefi nǝ laanɔ bobe nya bánte sikpi ku oka ǝmǝ eto kɔfi bota kebu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then after Moses grew up, his faith made him refuse to be called the king's grandson.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nya Moses lɛni nkǝ bánkpadi wǝ bǝ Oka Farao eto ubisiobi eto ubi lefe nǝ úkabé.

english_verse: He chose to be mistreated with God's people instead of having the good time that sin could bring for a little while.
translation_verse: Iyifo wǝ lelabi nkǝ lǝ unyǝ kanyi ku Onanto eto betidi enso bǝ unyǝ kamini lǝ lebuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ itǝ lefe kliminti.

english_verse: Moses knew that the treasures of Egypt were not as wonderful as what he would receive from suffering for the Messiah, and he looked forward to his reward.
translation_verse: Úbu nnya óbe nkǝ lǝ bakpé wǝ kofani lǝ Kristo eto disii, ɛlɛkɛ famfamfamfa eso kedi ka wuunyǝ lǝ utǝkǝko Egipte eto kasɔ eto asa nnya wuunyǝ kama. Itsyise úfi wǝ ǝnǝmi utǝkǝ lǝ kutǝkǝ ko Onanto luutǝ wǝ lǝ sɛtɔ́ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Because of his faith, Moses left Egypt. Moses had seen the invisible God and wasn't afraid of the king's anger.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ bomǝ esoo, údu lǝ Egipte eto kasɔ nya wǝánte oka ǝmǝ eto kafo ka lɔɔnyi wǝ sikpi. Nya fenkǝ únyǝ Onanto wǝ bo ǝnǝmi lǝmbofo bunyǝ, ɔ́ni nkǝ wembusinkli kama.

english_verse: His faith also made him celebrate Passover. He sprinkled the blood of animals on the doorposts, so that the first-born sons of the people of Israel would not be killed by the destroying angel.
translation_verse: Bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ nya útsyǝ Ukpe Ása Bo Ɔ́yila eto lekpa kasɔ lefe nǝ béfi kɔtɔ bese lǝ biku ku keyi ǝsuǝ. Nya ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ, Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe wǝ díbǝ ólo Egiptefɔ eto ubisaibi ninǝ saa lǝ Egipte eto kasɔ nya yanlɛ bǝ utidi Israelfɔ eto bebi saa.

english_verse: Because of their faith, the people walked through the Red Sea on dry land. But when the Egyptians tried to do it, they were drowned.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nnya dítǝ Israel bebi léfo Lekpo Sia bɔyila fe kasɔnti fufu ǝsuǝ bákayɛ nɛ. Fɛɛ lefe nǝ Egiptefɔ lekplatsya bǝ baayila ni, ntu bomǝ étsyiko mǝ búdunko.

english_verse: God's people had faith, and when they had walked around the city of Jericho for seven days, its walls fell down.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ, se Israel bebi lɛyɛ bátsyilama kafati ka báto batsyilama Yeriko eto umǝ eyi akuansee, nnya dítǝ kafati kamǝ léba kákpoo kasɔ nɛ.

english_verse: Rahab had been a prostitute, but she had faith and welcomed the spies. So she wasn't killed with the people who disobeyed.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nyaso bánlo Rahab wǝ ni otsyetɔ mfó fe kase bálo mba dimamfo Onanto banɔ. Itsyise ófo Israelfɔ eto betidi ba bátsyese ba dísu mfó bésu bátsyilama béyu kasɔ kamǝ bábe kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: What else can I say? There isn't enough time to tell about Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jephthah, David, Samuel, and the prophets.
translation_verse: Be tsya ele bǝ nsi ntɛyi mi? Lefe kpǝ ǝmbǝ mɛ bǝ lǝ ndi etiki ntsyiko lǝ Gideon, Barak, Samson, Yefta, David ku Samuel ku Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Their faith helped them conquer kingdoms, and because they did right, God made promises to them. They closed the jaws of lions
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, bákpɔ nsɔ kpǝ bǝtǝkǝ mǝ kato. Béyifo lesa nǝ dińyǝ itǝ nya bǝnyǝ kɛnyɛ ka Onanto dítsyǝ útǝ mǝ. Nya bǝtsyuǝ díti batsyata eto nnyɛ.

english_verse: and put out raging fires and escaped from the swords of their enemies. Although they were weak, they were given the strength and power to chase foreign armies away.
translation_verse: Nya bǝtsyuǝ lɛninsǝ etefɛnku kplɛ nnya díkatonsǝ asa. Nya bǝtsyuǝ lɛbɔ báfe lǝ lesiabi eto kɛnyɛ lǝ lema ǝsuǝ. Ite bǝ betidi bamfó kenke mankɛ ǝsuǝale saa tsya, Onanto ǝtǝ nkǝ bǝnyǝ ǝsuǝale! Bǝnyǝ ǝsuǝale fe bamamanyǝ ba lɛkɛ ale kekleke, nya bǝtǝkǝ bafɔ eto bamamanyǝ bamǝ kenke kato.

english_verse: Some women received their loved ones back from death. Many of these people were tortured, but they refused to be released. They were sure they would get a better reward when the dead are raised to life.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, besio léfo mǝ batokpenyǝ ba díkpǝ disi bǝbǝ nkpǝ. Nya bǝtsyuǝǝ, lɛnni bǝ betidi mǝnlǝkǝ mǝ betsyiko lǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ ka ǝsuǝ bákɛ, bomu bála bǝ lǝ bǝkpǝ, bǝ lǝ bǝnyǝ botaka kǝbǝ nkpǝ bo nso kɔnɔ.

english_verse: Others were made fun of and beaten with whips, and some were chained in jail.
translation_verse: Bákpe bǝtsyuǝ kɔfiɔ nya báblɛ mǝ ku keyibi. Nya bákpe bǝtsyuǝ lǝ amena nya beti mǝ bákpe lǝ Aba eto diyo.

english_verse: Still others were stoned to death or sawed in two or killed with swords. Some had nothing but sheep skins or goat skins to wear. They were poor, mistreated, and tortured.
translation_verse: Bákpɔ bǝtsyuǝ aba nya bákpe bǝtsyuǝ tsya eku ǝnuǝ ku nlande, nya báto bǝtsyuǝ ku asiabi bálo. Nya béfi basamu ku bate eto ekue bémini mǝ ǝsuǝ nya báyɛ bákafe itsyise kulesa mǝntsyǝ mǝ. Nya betidi lékpe mǝ bulǝ, nya bǝnyǝ kanyi tinti.

english_verse: The world did not deserve these good people, who had to wander in deserts and on mountains and had to live in caves and holes in the ground.
translation_verse: Lǝ mǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ bo bǝsiǝ esoo, kawunsiǝ kamfo eto betidi mámfo mǝ. Nyaso bákayɛ bákafe lǝ mfiminti ku atiniku ku kanyinyǝnyǝ fe mba bála lǝ mǝ nsɔ, nya bákɛ lǝ aba kalɔ ku lǝ ǝbiǝ lǝ kasɔnti.

english_verse: All of them pleased God because of their faith! But still they died without being given what had been promised.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ bátɛsǝ betidi bamfo kenke ba bákpe bofokanɔ tsyaa, bámfo kɛnyɛ ka Onanto lɛ́tɛyi útsyǝ mǝ.

english_verse: This was because God had something better in store for us. And he did not want them to reach the goal of their faith without us.
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto ǝnye asa bamba nya lɛlɛkɛ enso útsyǝ bo. Nya lǝ bo mankɛ mǝ lǝ ntii, bembuyifo mǝ báflɔ balo.

english_verse: Such a large crowd of witnesses is all around us! So we must get rid of everything that slows us down, especially the sin that just won't let go. And we must be determined to run the race that is ahead of us.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso se bonkpe bamanyǝ kpǝ bamfo ba letsyilama bo nya banlɛ bo otsyekle bokpe esoo, bitǝ lǝ bulǝkǝ asa nnya leeti bo kusu ku lebua nǝ laakpa bo kekleke kalɛ lefe kpǝ buwui. Nya lǝ butsyetsyi etsyi nnya nte bo sɛtɔ ku unyǝ, kama bebe mankɛ.

english_verse: We must keep our eyes on Jesus, who leads us and makes our faith complete. He endured the shame of being nailed to a cross, because he knew later on he would be glad he did. Now he is seated at the right side of God's throne!
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ bo ǝnǝmi lǝ itǝkǝ lǝ Yesu hã ǝsuǝ. Wǝ hã ni nwǝ ǝsuǝ bo bofokanɔ nkpǝsǝ itsyi lǝ kasɔ ketsyikokɔ isu ese lǝ kalosǝkɔ. Se óte disuǝyuǝ nǝ nte sɛtɔ wuunyǝ esoo, ókpe utu únyǝ kanyi lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Nya wémfi kofani ko wuudi lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ kulesa. Nya mɔmɔɔ, úsu usi lǝ Onanto eto lekankpomɛ ɔflɔ lǝ wǝ kodiani.

english_verse: So keep your mind on Jesus, who put up with many insults from sinners. Then you won't get discouraged and give up.
translation_verse: Bibu Yesu bebe, lǝ kanyi ka únyǝ lǝ babuayifo ba dínyǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ eto ani, bǝ lǝ ani lǝ ɛyɛ mi bolo lǝ bitǝ disi.

english_verse: None of you have yet been hurt in your battle against sin.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ bɛlɛ lema bɔkpɔ ku lebua tsyaa, yányo kaka ele bǝ bɛkpɔ lǝ bakpo mi kɔtɔ lǝ kasɔ tɔ.

english_verse: But you have forgotten that the Scriptures say to God's children, “When the Lord punishes you, don't make light of it, and when he corrects you, don't be discouraged.
translation_verse: Nye biota ǝsuǝ Onanto eto lɛkɔmansǝmansǝ eto etiki nnya ɔ́tɛyi úfi ókpe mi nkɛale fe wǝ bebi? Ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ Ubi, tsyue ato nya memfi Bonamute eto bunǝtǝtǝ fe asa bimba. Nya mǝntǝ lǝ ilǝ fǝ lǝ unyǝki okpe fǝ.

english_verse: The Lord corrects the people he loves and disciplines those he calls his own.”
translation_verse: Itsyise nwǝ Bonamute laalaa, wǝ wǝǝnǝ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ nɛ. Nya nwǝ tsya woafo fe ubii, wǝ wǝǝnǝ koto nɛ.”

english_verse: Be patient when you are being corrected! This is how God treats his children. Don't all parents correct their children?
translation_verse: Bifi mi kanyi saa ka biǝnyǝ fe Onanto nlɛ mi bunǝ butǝ fe wǝ bebi. Ubi utsyuǝ kpe bǝ anto ǝǝnǝ wǝ?

english_verse: God corrects all his children, and if he doesn't correct you, then you don't really belong to him.
translation_verse: Lǝ bǝǝnnǝ mi fe kase bunyi boǝ bǝǝnǝ ubi saa, nyalɛ bienyifo wǝ bebi tinti. Etǝ bǝ biyifo fe bebi ba anto dímamfo seka.

english_verse: Our earthly fathers correct us, and we still respect them. Isn't it even better to be given true life by letting our spiritual Father correct us?
translation_verse: Lǝ bo betidinini eto antomǝ seka lǝ kasɔ mfoo, bǝǝnǝ bo nya boebu mǝ tsya lǝ nyamfo eso. Ntsyǝ eso yanle bǝ bobokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ enso butǝ Onanto wǝ ni bo Anto lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ bǝ busiǝ nkpǝ!

english_verse: Our human fathers correct us for a short time, and they do it as they think best. But God corrects us for our own good, because he wants us to be holy, as he is.
translation_verse: Bo kasɔ mfo eto antomǝ ǝǝnǝ bo itǝ lefe kliminti ditsyuǝ fe kase bǝnyǝ bǝ iińyǝ itǝ bo. Fɛɛ Onanto wǝ ǝǝnǝ bo fe kase ɛlɛkɛ itǝ bo bǝ lǝ bo tsya lǝ bunyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ sɛkɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: It is never fun to be corrected. In fact, at the time it is always painful. But if we learn to obey by being corrected, we will do right and live at peace.
translation_verse: Bunǝtǝtǝ utidii, aankɛ kutsyuǝ kamini, bomu yeefi wǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ nnya kamaa, mba bǝtǝ bunǝ nkoo, ǝǝtǝ beeyifo asa lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ, nnya lǝǝtǝ bǝǝsiǝ nkpǝ lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: and walk a straight path. Then lame people will be healed, instead of getting worse. Warning against Turning from God
translation_verse: Bilǝkǝ esu nnya lekpa lǝ bɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ mba eto akpa lǝmbǝ ale lǝ bafo bɔyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ bǝ bentusǝ. Bomu lǝ bǝtǝkǝko mi kama lǝ bǝnyǝ ǝsuǝale balosǝ.

english_verse: Try to live at peace with everyone! Live a clean life. If you don't, you will never see the Lord.
translation_verse: Bekplatsya bǝ lǝ diyuǝ lǝ lɛkɛ lǝ mi ku betidi kenke eto nti, nya lǝ bekplatsya lǝ bisiǝ nkpǝ kɛnkɛ. Itsyise kuutsyuǝ saa embunyǝ Bonamute lǝ wenyifo kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: Make sure no one misses out on God's wonderful kindness. Don't let anyone become bitter and cause trouble for the rest of you.
translation_verse: Bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ eto kusu manya mi. Bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ biǝntǝ kuutsyuǝ saa tǝ lǝ binyǝ ɔblɔ kekleke bǝ inǝ bulǝ eboko betidi kpǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ bafiani babuayifo.

english_verse: Watch out for immoral and ungodly people like Esau, who sold his future blessing for only one meal.
translation_verse: Bebe biǝ mi kuutsyuǝ saa mamfiani ɔsɔnɔdi nye fe nwǝ lǝmbǝ bofokanɔ fe Esau seka, wǝ dífi wǝ sininǝdidi ófloma ku didisa eto ɔkpɛ ɔni hã.

english_verse: You know how he later wanted it back. But there was nothing he could do to change things, even though he begged his father and cried.
translation_verse: Kama kama fe kase binyii, ɔ́bɛbɛ ku binǝntu nkǝ eni lǝ ofo wǝ anto eto atsyɔkpoko. Fɛɛ wátɔnɔ útǝ wǝ, itsyise wámfo kusu saa bunyǝ lǝ ofloma lesa nǝ úkeyifo útsyǝ.

english_verse: You have not come to a place like Mount Sinai that can be seen and touched. There is no flaming fire or dark cloud or storm
translation_verse: Itsyise inni Sinai eto kɔtini ko utidi loofo bunyǝ ketidi ɔflɔ bíbǝ, fe kase Israel bebi díyifo. Mfó ketuntu suu ka diti kpii, nya ufiebi nlɛ bɔsɔ kekleke nkpe, fɛɛ kɔtɔni komǝ nlɛ bunyǝ diadiadia.

english_verse: or trumpet sound. The people of Israel heard a voice speak. But they begged it to stop,
translation_verse: Kakpatsyaku ka nlɛ bufǝ ku ɔkɔɛ wǝ nlɛ bɔbɔ ketsyi mfó lɛ bole, nya mba nlɛ nya bɔnɔ álɛ lekpakpa bǝnkǝ bensila bǝ baanɔ kolesa nko bio.

english_verse: because they could not obey its commands. They were even told to kill any animal that touched the mountain.
translation_verse: Itsyise bembofo buńnyǝ kanɔ kɔfi ko nlɛ mǝ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Lǝ ubuki uni kulaa tsya wǝ eto kokpa ditidi kɔtini komǝǝ, bakpɔ wǝ aba balo.”

english_verse: The sight was so frightening that Moses said he shook with fear.
translation_verse: Lǝ sitintii, nya bǝlǝkǝ báte mfó kpe sikpi tinti bǝ Moses kosate átɛyi nkǝ, “Sikpi ko dímuǝ mɛ, nya mintinkǝ!”

english_verse: You have now come to Mount Zion and to the heavenly Jerusalem. This is the city of the living God, where thousands and thousands of angels have come to celebrate.
translation_verse: Bomu mi alɛɛ, Sion eto kɔtini komǝ ɔflɔ bíbǝ. Bíbǝ Onanto wǝ nsi nkpǝ eto umǝ wǝ ni Yerusalem kato ku wǝ batɔnkpe ba bembofo bokla ba lekpe disi mfo ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Here you will find all of God's dearest children, whose names are written in heaven. And you will find God himself, who judges everyone. Here also are the spirits of those good people who have been made perfect.
translation_verse: Bíbǝ disuǝyuǝ eto disikakpekɔ ku Onanto eto bebininǝ ba eto aye báwɔni bakpe lǝ Onanto eto kukue kato ɔflɔ. Bíbǝ bińyǝ lǝ Onanto, kawunsiǝ kenke eto okponkpo ku basɛɛ ba béyifo lɛflɔ eto awɔnɔ eto nti.

english_verse: And Jesus is here! He is the one who makes God's new agreement with us, and his sprinkled blood says much better things than the blood of Abel.
translation_verse: Nya mfó bíbǝ Yesu wǝ laafo kǝtǝ lǝ kakle fɔfɔ kamǝ ɔflɔ kaka kɔtɔ ko ókpo lǝ bo disi luunǝ asa sɛɛ kpǝ eboko nnya nso Abel eto kɔtɔ.

english_verse: Make sure you obey the one who speaks to you. The people did not escape, when they refused to obey the one who spoke to them at Mount Sinai. Do you think you can possibly escape, if you refuse to obey the one who speaks to you from heaven?
translation_verse: Bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ bianni nwǝ nlɛ mi etiki budinko eto ɔkɔɛ. Itsyise lǝ mba dímentsyue koto nwǝ léboko mǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ lǝ kasɔ mfo mámfo butsyetsyi kedu lǝ mǝ kotonǝnǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ntsyǝ yoofo bubǝ bǝ bo mba bátɛyi Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ itsyi kato ebofo butsyetsyi lǝ ni kɛnyɛ?

english_verse: When God spoke the first time, his voice shook only the earth. This time he has promised to shake the earth once again, and heaven too.
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmfó wǝ ɔkɔɛ étinkǝsǝ kawunsiǝ kenke. Fɛɛ mɔmɔ útsyǝ bo kɛnyɛ nkǝ, “Bioo, mǝǝbǝ kawunsiǝ kamǝ butinkǝsǝ. Nya inni nko mate tsya, bomu muutinkǝsǝ kato tsya nwunsǝ.”

english_verse: The words “once again” mean that these created things will someday be shaken and removed. Then what cannot be shaken will last.
translation_verse: Ditiki nǝmfo bǝ, “Bioo” lǝ bote bǝ, Onanto ebulǝkǝ asa nnya dítinkǝ nnya ni asa nnya úyifo uwui lǝ nnya kǝńyǝnkɔ. Nya asa nnya dímentinkǝǝ, ebubu itsyǝ.

english_verse: We should be grateful we were given a kingdom that cannot be shaken. And in this kingdom we please God by worshiping him and by showing him great honor and respect.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bɔsɔ ani bǝ sekakedikɔ ka lembofo butinkǝ áka bo kɔni. Lǝ nnya esoo, bítǝ lǝ bufi dibu ku sikpitete busumu wǝ lǝ kusu ko lɔɔkɛ wǝ ɔkɔɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Our God is like a destructive fire!
translation_verse: Itsyise bo Onanto ǝmǝ eyifo ute wǝ laatonsǝ lesa saa.

english_verse: Keep being concerned about each other as the Lord's followers should.
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ sɛyimila lǝ siyi mi ǝsuǝ fe bayimi.

english_verse: Be sure to welcome strangers into your home. By doing this, some people have welcomed angels as guests, without even knowing it.
translation_verse: Bianni bafɔ bofo, itsyise ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, bǝtsyuǝ áfo Onanto eto batɔnkpe, fɛɛ bánte nko.

english_verse: Remember the Lord's people who are in jail and be concerned for them. Don't forget those who are suffering, but imagine you are there with them.
translation_verse: Bekloma mba bákpe lǝ Aba eto diyo tsya fe mba mi ku mǝ nlabe mfó. Nko kee, bekloma mba banlɛ ohiã bote fe mi ku mǝ banlɛ ohiã bote.

english_verse: Have respect for marriage. Always be faithful to your partner, because God will punish anyone who is immoral or unfaithful in marriage.
translation_verse: Usǝ ku usiǝ siǝ nkpǝ lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ, nya ele bǝ utsyuǝ saa fi dibu utǝ kǝsiǝ. Nya kuutsyuǝ mamfe wǝ utsyuǝ kama, itsyise Onanto ebokponko mba leedi asɔnɔ, kakpo kusǝ nye kusiǝ lekpo.

english_verse: Don't fall in love with money. Be satisfied with what you have. The Lord has promised that he will not leave us or desert us.
translation_verse: Mansɛsǝ ǝnǝmi tsya lǝ atabi ǝsuǝ. Bomu bitǝ lǝ lesa nǝ nte mi lǝ didufǝ mi ǝnǝ. Itsyise Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, “Mǝmboyani mi ntsyǝ kulefe, nya membulǝkǝ ato lǝ mi ǝsuǝ tsya kulefe.”

english_verse: This should make you feel like saying, “The Lord helps me! Why should I be afraid of what people can do to me?”
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bɔtɛyi taa bo ketu kǝmiǝ boǝ, “Bonamute ni mɔ ɔwunsǝkotsyuǝ, nyaso mǝmbote sikpi. Be utiditsyuǝ loofo mɛ buyifo?”

english_verse: Don't forget about your leaders who taught you God's message. Remember what kind of lives they lived and try to have faith like theirs.
translation_verse: Bekloma mi batɔnkotɔnko ba dísiǝ ba lɛtɛyi mi Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ. Bekloma kase bǝsiǝ nkpǝ ku kase báfo Onanto bánɔ lǝ bɛyɛ le mǝ kayɛkɔ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Jesus Christ never changes! He is the same yesterday, today, and forever.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo aamfloma kulefe. Fe kase útsyǝ lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mǝǝ, nko ke unte mɔmɔ ku lefe nǝ luubǝ kenke tsya nɛ.

english_verse: Don't be fooled by any kind of strange teachings. It is better to receive strength from God's gift of undeserved grace than to depend on certain foods. After all, these foods don't really help the people who eat them.
translation_verse: Biǝntǝ lǝ asatete akpa akpa nnya lǝmbǝ disi ku akpa lǝ ɛwɛ mi ekpe lǝ benya kusu. Onanto eto lefonǝ hã laakpe bo nkɛale, nya inni afi nnya lɛyɛ lǝ lesadidi ǝsuǝ. Mba laayɛ lǝ afi nyamfo ǝsuǝ ǝǝnnyǝ bɔwunsǝko nye kutǝkǝ ketsyiko lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But we have an altar where even the priests who serve in the place of worship have no right to eat.
translation_verse: Boo, bokpe kedikǝtǝkɔ eto leba nǝ ǝsuǝ asa nnya boedi, nya mba lǝǝtǝ kedi lǝ Yudafɔ eto kedikǝtǝkɔ, yanle bǝ bedi betsyiko lǝ bo ole.

english_verse: After the high priest offers the blood of animals as a sin offering, the bodies of those animals are burned outside the camp.
translation_verse: Usumunyǝ Ninǝ Kenke ǝmǝ eefi ubuki eto kɔtɔ kedufǝnko kaka ni Kakɛnkɛkɔ Kenke. Mfó weesu kǝtǝ kedi katɔ bufikatsyɛ lǝ betidi ba kenke eto abua eto disi. Fɛɛ baatonsǝ bebuki eto sinǝ siamǝ lǝ kabanto.

english_verse: Jesus himself suffered outside the city gate, so his blood would make people holy.
translation_verse: Mmǝ kenke seka ini bǝ Yesu tsya ǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ umǝ ǝmǝ eto kabanto bǝ lǝ uflǝ betidi eto abua uwui ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ kɔtɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: This is why we should go outside the camp to Jesus and share in his disgrace.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ busu botsyako wǝ lǝ kabanto mfó lǝ bakpe bo kofani faa, fe kase bákpe wuntsya kofani.

english_verse: On this earth we don't have a city that lasts forever, but we are waiting for such a city.
translation_verse: Itsyise umǝ saa ǝmbǝ bo lǝ kasɔ mfo wǝ luutsyǝ lefe saa manlo manlo. Bomu bunyǝ bɔlɛ kusu bobe itǝ umǝ wǝ luubǝ.

english_verse: Our sacrifice is to keep offering praise to God in the name of Jesus.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bɔyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝ bufi atɛsǝ fe keditǝtǝ bukǝtǝ Onanto lefe saa. Nya ni nnya laabɔ ketsyi lǝ mba léfo wǝ diye bánɔ eto kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: But don't forget to help others and to share your possessions with them. This too is like offering a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Bianta asa sɛɛ buyifo kǝtǝ bǝtsyuǝ ku bǝtsyuǝ bɔwunsǝko ǝsuǝ. Itsyise ite fe keditǝtǝ ka eto okle laakpe Onanto disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: Obey your leaders and do what they say. They are watching over you, and they must answer to God. So don't make them sad as they do their work. Make them happy. Otherwise, they won't be able to help you at all.
translation_verse: Bitsyue mi batɔnkotɔnko koto lǝ bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ mǝ itsyise mǝ nlɛ mi kakla bobe lefe saa nɛ, itsyise ele bǝ bǝlǝkǝ nya kɛnyɛ lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ. Lǝ bitsyue mǝ kotoo, booyifo mǝ keyifo ku disuǝyuǝ, fɛɛ lenni nkoo, kuulǝ mǝ ku buyifo nya lǝmbǝwunsǝko mi.

english_verse: Pray for us. Our consciences are clear, and we always try to live right.
translation_verse: Bikato ola lǝ bo disi. Buyi boǝ bo akɔɛsi akpa wuee, itsyise bola boǝ boeyifo kasɛɛ lefe saa.

english_verse: I especially want you to pray that I can visit you again soon. Final Prayers and Greetings
translation_verse: Nya nlɛ mi lekpakpa kekleke miǝ lǝ beto ola biǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ utǝ kusu lǝ nsinkli mbǝ mi ɔflɔ mlǝ. Olatoto Fɛfɛ.

english_verse: God gives peace, and he raised our Lord Jesus Christ from death. Now Jesus is like a Great Shepherd whose blood was used to make God's eternal agreement with his flock.
translation_verse: Nlɛ bɔtɔ miǝ Onanto wǝ lǝǝtǝ diyuǝ, wǝ létakasǝ Bonamute Yesu wǝ ni basamu eto ɔyɛnkonyǝ kplɛ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ ɛyɛ lǝ kɛnyɛklekle manlo eto kɔtɔ komǝ ǝsuǝ,

english_verse: I pray God will make you ready to obey him and that you will always be eager to do right. May Jesus help you do what pleases God. To Jesus Christ be glory forever and ever! Amen.
translation_verse: lǝ ufi asa sɛɛ kenke utǝ mi kafo faa bǝ lǝ befo wǝ lelabi buyifo. Lǝ eyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ uyifo lesa nǝ nkpe wǝ ɔkɔɛ lǝ bo nti. Wǝ ale lǝ idi diyǝnde kplɛ idu manlo isu manlo ǝsuǝ! Ibǝ itǝ. Etiki Fɛfɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I have written only a short letter to encourage you, and I beg you to pay close attention to what I have said.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, nlɛ mi lekpakpa tinti miǝ lǝ bitsyue ato lǝ bɛnɔ kɔlɛ ko minlɛ mi bɔlɛ itsyi lǝ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo ǝsuǝ. Itsyise kukue kliminti ete miwɔni minlɛ mi botsyese.

english_verse: By now you surely must know that our friend Timothy is out of jail. If he gets here in time, I will bring him with me when I come to visit you.
translation_verse: Nla miǝ mǝǝtǝ mi bote miǝ bǝlǝkǝ bo ɔyimi Timoteo lǝ Aba eto diyo. Lǝ wuubǝ mɔ ɔflɔ mlǝǝ, bonko wǝ ebubǝ bunyǝ mi busiǝsǝ.

english_verse: Please give my greetings to your leaders and to the rest of the Lord's people. His followers from Italy send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Bisiǝsǝ mi batɔnkotɔnko kenke ku Onanto eto betidi bamfó kenke bitǝ bo. Bo bayimi ba nkpe lǝ Italia kenke tsya ǝsiǝsǝ mi.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ lǝ disiǝko mimblɛ kenke.

english_verse: From James, a servant of God and of our Lord Jesus Christ. Greetings to the twelve tribes scattered all over the world. Faith and Wisdom
translation_verse: Mɔ, Yakobo, wǝ ni Onanto ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto uyifoyifo nlɛ mi Onanto eto betidi ba kenke disensǝ bankpo lǝ kawunsiǝ eto akpa nyamǝ kenke busiǝsǝ. Binyǝ Disuǝyuǝ Lǝ Bulǝ Lɛ Mi Butu.

english_verse: My friends, be glad, even if you have a lot of trouble.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, binyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ bulǝ kpǝ lete, lete lɛ mi butu.

english_verse: But you must learn to endure everything, so you will be completely mature and not lacking in anything.
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ mi bofo buńyǝ kekleke disimǝntǝmǝntǝǝ, lǝ ekpa mi ɛyɛnko bǝ lǝ bɛflɔ belo kenke, bǝ kulesa saa ensiebofe itǝ mi.

english_verse: If any of you need wisdom, you should ask God, and it will be given to you. God is generous and won't correct you for asking.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ mi nti eto utsyuǝ ebu dímamflɔ lǝ kobetete ǝsuǝǝ, ɔtɔ Onanto nya wuufi utǝ wǝ, itsyise Onanto eefi asa kǝtǝ utidi saa kafo faa lǝ kafoɛkpɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But when you ask for something, you must have faith and not doubt. Anyone who doubts is like an ocean wave tossed around in a storm.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ alɛ ola boto katɔ wǝ lesatsyuǝǝ, ele bǝ fo wǝ anɔ fǝ wuutǝ fǝ lesa nǝ mǝ, manyaki wǝ. Itsyise utidi wǝ kayakii, uyifo fe lekpo eto utuwa ufiebi laasɔ ketsyi katsyilamako.

english_verse: If you are that kind of person, you can't make up your mind, and you surely can't be trusted. So don't expect the Lord to give you anything at all. Poor People and Rich People
translation_verse: Utidi wǝ nte nko, mi mba eto nsusu lafloma mlǝ mlǝ lǝ lesa nǝ ɔnlɛ buyifo ǝsuǝǝ, membu nkǝ woofo kulesa utsyiko lǝ Bonamute ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Any of God's people who are poor should be glad he thinks so highly of them.
translation_verse: Lǝ Onanto abesǝ ɔyimi okombo wǝ ni ofokanɔnyǝ katoo, ele bǝ unyǝ disuǝyuǝ.

english_verse: But any who are rich should be glad when God makes them humble. Rich people will disappear like wild flowers
translation_verse: Nko ke ini itǝ otabinyǝ wǝ ni ofokanɔnyǝ nɛ, bǝ lǝ Onanto ábokosǝ wǝ kasɔɔ, ele bǝ unyǝ disuǝyuǝ. Itsyise otabinyǝ eto nkpǝ ebubǝ bofe fe kase efukpokpo laalo lǝ ofa ǝsuǝ kakpo lǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: scorched by the burning heat of the sun. The flowers lose their blossoms, and their beauty is destroyed. This is how the rich will disappear, as they go about their business. Trials and Temptations
translation_verse: Lǝ kofe ato kobe kɛnyɛ keklekee, koafa kakpo lǝ sefa eto esi ǝsuǝǝ, itǝ efukpokpo nyamǝ aylɔbe, kaalo kakpo lǝ kasɔ nya katsylɔ. Nko ke ini itǝ otabinyǝ tsya wǝ lookakplatsya lǝ wǝ keyifoyifo ǝsuǝ kekleke fɛ ubǝ ukpǝ nɛ.

english_verse: God will bless you, if you don't give up when your faith is being tested. He will reward you with a glorious life, just as he rewards everyone who loves him.
translation_verse: Onanto ebokpo atsyɔ nwǝ ke lékpe utu uńyǝ kekleke lǝ botokabe ǝsuǝ nya útǝkǝ bulǝ nye kabua kamǝ kato. Itsyise ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ wuunyǝ kayofofo ka nkpe, ini bo Onanto luufi utǝ mba laala wǝ.

english_verse: Don't blame God when you are tempted! God cannot be tempted by evil, and he doesn't use evil to tempt others.
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ edufǝ lǝ botokabe ǝsuǝǝ, wantɛyi nkǝ Onanto ɔflɔ itsyi. Itsyise kulesa embofo Onanto boto kabe lǝ uyifo lebua, nya wǝ tsya emfi lebua kanto kuutsyuǝ kabe.

english_verse: We are tempted by our own desires that drag us off and trap us.
translation_verse: Bomu utidi eto ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto alasaa, nnya laawɛ wǝ kǝnǝ wǝ kakpe lǝ botokabe ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Our desires make us sin, and when sin is finished with us, it leaves us dead.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto alasa nyamfo alɛ kafoo, kaale lebuayifoyifo. Nya lǝ lebuayifoyifo nǝmǝ abee, diale ukpe.

english_verse: Don't be fooled, my dear friends.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, biǝntǝ lǝ kutsyuǝ saa lǝ ɔwɛ mi okpe.

english_verse: Every good and perfect gift comes down from the Father who created all the lights in the heavens. He is always the same and never makes dark shadows by changing.
translation_verse: Asa sɛɛ nnya nkpe bo kenke ku ǝtǝsa nnya lɛflɔ kenke boǝnyǝǝ, etsyi Boanto Onanto wǝ díyifo kato eto ǝnyǝlesa ɔflɔ. Nya woamfloma kakpe ketuntu fe kase úyifo kofe ku kofande leeyifo.

english_verse: He wanted us to be his own special people, and so he sent the true message to give us new birth. Hearing and Obeying
translation_verse: Onato áyɛ lǝ wǝ kosate eto lelabi ǝsuǝ, nya úlǝkǝ bo ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ɔnukualɛtiki ǝsuǝ bǝ lǝ budi betutɛ lǝ wǝ asayifoyifo kenke nti. Ele Bǝ Bikeyifo Lǝ Bonamute Eto Ditiki Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you should be quick to listen and slow to speak or to get angry.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi lala, bekloma lǝ bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ. Bɛkɔse lǝ bitsyue ato mlǝ lǝ utsyuǝ lɛ etiki budi, fɛɛ bitsyǝsuǝ lǝ etikididi ku ɔblɔnyǝnyǝ mlǝ mlǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you are angry, you cannot do any of the good things God wants done.
translation_verse: Itsyise ɔblɔ ǝntǝ utidi leeyifo kasɛɛ ka Onanto laala nkǝ uyifo.

english_verse: You must stop doing anything immoral or evil. Instead be humble and accept the message planted in you to save you.
translation_verse: Nyaso bilǝkǝ ani bitsyiko lǝ asinsa saa yifoyifo ku nkpǝ bua saa eto okle busiǝ ǝsuǝ. Bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ Onanto bǝ lǝ befo wǝ ditiki nǝ ókpe mi lǝ akɔɛsi, nnya ni loofo utǝ mi lǝ nkpǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Obey God's message! Don't fool yourselves by just listening to it.
translation_verse: Bianwɛ mi ǝsuǝ biǝ bɛlɛ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ bɔnɔ ete, bomu bifi ni bekpe lǝ mi eyifosa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But you must never stop looking at the perfect law that sets you free. God will bless you in everything you do, if you listen and obey, and don't just hear and forget.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nwǝ leebu disi lǝ kɔfi ko lɛflɔ koǝtǝ utidi lǝsiǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nya woalɛ ola keyifo lǝ ko ǝsuǝ inni bɔnɔ te waanɔ koo, Onanto ebokpo wǝ atsyɔ lǝ lesa saa nǝ weeyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you think you are being religious, but can't control your tongue, you are fooling yourself, and your religion is useless.
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ eebu nkǝ nwǝ leesumu Onanto uni, fɛ woanlɛ wǝ odiakami ola lǝ etikididi ǝsuǝǝ, ɔwɛ ǝsuǝ nya wǝ kesumu ǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ saa.

english_verse: Religion that pleases God the Father must be pure and spotless. You must help needy orphans and widows and not let this world make you evil.
translation_verse: Kesumu ka nyɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ, ka Boanto Onanto lǝǝnyǝ nkǝ kakpa nya botakebu saa lǝmbǝ lǝ muu, ni mbo mfo nɛ bǝ, balɛ bakɔbebi ku bakɔbǝsiǝ ba nlɛ kanyi bunyǝ ola, nya lǝ balɛ ǝsuǝ ola, bǝlǝkǝ ǝsuǝ betsyiko lǝ kawunsiǝ eto abuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My friends, if you have faith in our glorious Lord Jesus Christ, you won't treat some people better than others.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, fe mba lefo Bonamute Yesu Kristo, wǝ nwǝ ni Diyǝnde eto Onamute bɛnɔɔ, yanle bǝ bikabe betidi eto ǝnǝmi ku mǝ nyǝnkɔɔ, bikeyifo asa.

english_verse: Suppose a rich person wearing fancy clothes and a gold ring comes to one of your meetings. And suppose a poor person dressed in worn-out clothes also comes.
translation_verse: Boefi boǝ betidi inuǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝbǝ mi katsyakɔ. Ɔni eyifo ɔkplɛnyǝ wǝ nti kafia kplɛ ka lefo koya nya onkpe sika sia eto lɛsukpɛ lǝ lɛnimi, nya unuǝfǝ wǝ ni okombo nti lefianku.

english_verse: You must not give the best seat to the one in fancy clothes and tell the one who is poor to stand at the side or sit on the floor.
translation_verse: Békpasǝ ǝnǝmi bítǝ ɔkplɛnyǝ ǝmǝ nya béfo wǝ ku dibu, bɛtɛyi wǝ biǝnkǝ, “Nlɛ fǝ lekpakpa, bǝ ǝsiǝ lǝ kakplɛkɔ mfo.” Nya bɛtɛyi okombo ǝmǝ biǝkǝ, “Fǝǝ ńyǝ mmǝǝ, nye bǝsiǝ lǝ kasɔnti lǝ mɔ ɔflɔ mfo.”

english_verse: This is the same as saying that some people are better than others, and you would be acting like a crooked judge.
translation_verse: Lǝ biyifo nkomǝǝ, nyalɛ eni nsusu bua ini bífi béla etiki bílǝkǝ, békpe kabakefe lǝ betidi nti nɛ?

english_verse: My dear friends, pay attention. God has given a lot of faith to the poor people in this world. God has also promised them a share in his kingdom that he will give to everyone who loves him.
translation_verse: Bɛnɔ! Mɔ bayimi lala, Onanto ǝlǝkǝ bakombo lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo nkǝ bafiani lɛwɔnɔ eto bakplɛnyǝ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ, lǝ bǝnyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ sekakedikɔ ka úlǝkǝ utsyǝ itǝ mba laala wǝ.

english_verse: You mistreat the poor. But isn't it the rich who boss you around and drag you off to court?
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mii, biembu bakombo nya biakpe mǝ kafani. Inni batabinyǝ bomu laanyinkǝ mi kakpe kasɔ? Inni mǝ lǝǝnǝ mi kesuko akpokakpokɔ?

english_verse: Aren't they the ones who make fun of your Lord?
translation_verse: Nya inni bakplɛnyǝ bamfo laatɛyi kabua ketsyiko dibu eto diye nǝ béfi bǝtǝkǝ mi se béfiani Kristo eto bafokanɔfɔ?

english_verse: You will do all right, if you obey the most important law in the Scriptures. It is the law that commands us to love others as much as we love ourselves.
translation_verse: Lǝ biyifo lǝ Onanto eto sekakedikɔ eto kɔfi komǝ ǝsuǝ tututu, fe kase báwɔni bakpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ bǝ, “La fǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ fe fǝ ǝsuǝ sekaa,” ete eyifo lesa nǝ dińyǝ itǝ nɛ.

english_verse: But if you treat some people better than others, you have done wrong, and the Scriptures teach that you have sinned.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ biabe betidi eto ǝnǝmi fɛ bieyifo asaa, nyalɛ biyifo lebua. Nya kɔfi komǝ tsya lélo mi dikpi fe babuayifo.

english_verse: If you obey every law except one, you are still guilty of breaking them all.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke léta kɔfi kɔni ubuu, údi dikpi, óta nyamblɛ kenke ubu.

english_verse: The same God who told us to be faithful in marriage also told us not to murder. So even if you are faithful in marriage, but murder someone, you still have broken God's Law.
translation_verse: Itsyise nwǝ lékpe kɔfi komǝ nkǝ, “Mankpo kusiǝ nye kusǝ.” Wǝ ke lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Manlo utidi nɛ.” Nyaso lǝ émendi sɛsɔnɔ fɛ fálo utidii, ete bɛ áta kɔfi ebu.

english_verse: Speak and act like people who will be judged by the law that sets us free.
translation_verse: Nyaso bitǝ lǝ bo etikididi ku bo eyifosa lǝ ilǝkǝ ete bǝ kɔfi ko dítǝ bófo bunsi lǝ bo ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ko kefi Onanto luufi okponko bo lekpo tsya nɛ.

english_verse: Do this, because on the day of judgment there will be no pity for those who have not had pity on others. But even in judgment, God is merciful! Faith and Works
translation_verse: Itsyi lǝ lekpokponkpo nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto embunyǝ kaminsǝ kuutsyuǝ saa wǝ lǝǝnnyǝ wǝ utsyuǝ kaminsǝ. Fɛɛ Onanto embolo dikpi nwǝ lǝǝnyǝ wǝ utsyuǝ kaminsǝ. Biyifo Asa Nnya Laate Bǝ Béfo Bɛnɔ.

english_verse: My friends, what good is it to say you have faith, when you don't do anything to show you really do have faith? Can this kind of faith save you?
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, lǝ mi utsyuǝ nkǝ okpe bofokanɔ fɛ wǝ eyifosa lǝnlǝkǝ nnya kate nkoo, nte kutǝkǝ ko uunyǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ? Wǝ bofokanɔ bomfo ebofo wǝ bulǝkǝ?

english_verse: If you know someone who doesn't have any clothes or food,
translation_verse: Bifi nnya biǝ, bayimisani nye bayimisio bǝtsyuǝ kpe ba mfia léla mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ nye bǝmbǝ lesa nǝ looyo mǝ budi ekemi.

english_verse: you shouldn't just say, “I hope all goes well for you. I hope you will be warm and have plenty to eat.” What good is it to say this, unless you do something to help?
translation_verse: Nte kasɛɛ ka nkpe lǝ nnya lǝ mi ɔni átɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bisu lǝ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ, mi ǝsuǝ lǝ iyifo kpankpa, lǝ bidi bimi,” fɛ biambɛbɛ asa nnya lefe itǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto nkpǝkɛkɛ bitǝ mǝǝ, nte kutǝkǝ ko nkpe lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ?

english_verse: Faith that doesn't lead us to do good deeds is all alone and dead!
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ bofokanɔ mate kpe utsyuǝ nya keyifo sa dimankɔ lǝ mu, wǝ bofokanɔ bomǝ eyifo bufufu.

english_verse: Suppose someone disagrees and says, “It is possible to have faith without doing kind deeds.” I would answer, “Prove that you have faith without doing kind deeds, and I will prove that I have faith by doing them.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bǝtsyuǝ ebɔtɛyi bǝ, “Utidi ɔni kpe bofokanɔ, nya obamba tsya leeyifo keyifo.” Mɔ mbuayɛ ni nkǝ, “Lǝkǝ ate mɛ kase utsyuǝ lɔɔkɛ bofokanɔ fɛ weenyifo keyifo sɛɛ. Muulǝkǝ mɔ bofokanɔ nte wǝ ɛyɛ lǝ keyifo sɛɛ ka meeyifo ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: You surely believe there is only one God. That's fine. Even demons believe this, and it makes them shake with fear.
translation_verse: Afo anɔ fǝ Onanto ɔni ete nkpe? Nko ini sitinti nɛ. Fɛɛ kloma fǝ awɔnɔ bua tsya áfo banɔ nko, nya baate sikpi, ketinkǝ.

english_verse: Does some stupid person want proof that faith without deeds is useless?
translation_verse: Ɔmumu! Ala fǝ nlǝkǝ nte fǝ bǝ bofokanɔ bo keyifo sɛɛ saa dímakɔkoo, eyifo bofokanɔ fufu?

english_verse: Now you see how Abraham's faith and deeds worked together. He proved his faith was real by what he did.
translation_verse: Bɛnlɛ bunyǝ? Wǝ bofokanɔ ku keyifo lɛkɔ iyifo lɔni. Nya keyifo ka úyifo lɛkɔ nya fɛ wǝ bofokanɔ lɛflɔ bolo nɛ.

english_verse: This is what the Scriptures mean by saying, “Abraham had faith in God, and God accepted him.” That's how Abraham became God's friend.
translation_verse: Itǝ etiki nnya nkpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue ǝsuǝ ǝbǝ itǝ bǝ, “Abraham áfo Onanto ɔnɔ, nya lǝ wǝ bofokanɔ esoo, Onanto ákpe wǝ dibu fe utidi wǝ ni ɔsɛɛ.” Nyaso Onanto dífi wǝ fe wǝ ɔyɛtsyuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: You can now see that we please God by what we do and not only by what we believe.
translation_verse: Bíunyǝ mɔmɔ! Onanto ǝnnyǝ utidi eto bofokanɔ mate ete kebu wǝ bǝ uyifo ɔsɛɛ, wǝ keyifoyifoyifo ka laakɔko mu eso. Nya inni lǝ kase ófo ɔ́nɔ eso ete.

english_verse: For example, Rahab had been a prostitute. But she pleased God when she welcomed the spies and sent them home by another way.
translation_verse: Nko ǝmǝ ke eso Onanto léfo útǝ Rahab, otsyetɔ ǝmǝ nɛ. Wǝ ku Onanto eto nti ǝbǝ ɛlɛkɛ ɛyɛ lǝ kase ófo Israelfɔɔ eto batɔnkpe ba laabiɔ kabe asa lǝ wǝ diyo, nya ɔ́wunsǝko mǝ báyɛ kusu bamba bétsyetsyi bédu eso.

english_verse: Anyone who doesn't breathe is dead, and faith that doesn't do anything is just as dead!
translation_verse: Nyaso ekpa wuee be fe kase lǝ utidi eto ǝsuǝ eyifo lesakpenkpe lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝmbǝ lǝ nii, nko ini lǝ eyifosa saa mankɔkoo, bofokanɔ tsya ekpe.

english_verse: My friends, we should not all try to become teachers. In fact, teachers will be judged more strictly than others.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, biǝntǝ lǝ mi nti eto betidi kpǝ lǝ bafiani bateasa. Buyi buǝ bo mba ni bateasaa, Onanto ebokponko bo lekpo kekleke lǝ diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ eso utsyuǝ saa.

english_verse: All of us do many wrong things. But if you can control your tongue, you are mature and able to control your whole body.
translation_verse: Itsyise bomblɛ kenke aata kebu. Fɛ lǝ utidi utsyuǝ kpe wǝ laanta kebu lǝ lesa nǝ waatɛyi ǝsuǝ nyalɛ utidi ǝmfo aflɔ nya waafo wǝ ǝsuǝ kenke tsya bɔlɛ kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: By putting a bit into the mouth of a horse, we can turn the horse in different directions.
translation_verse: Boefi situ kakle ɔtɔmimi eto kɛnyɛ bǝ lǝ utsyue bo koto bǝ lǝ bɔyɛnko wǝ busuko kaka kee boala.

english_verse: It takes strong winds to move a large sailing ship, but the captain uses only a small rudder to make it go in any direction.
translation_verse: Bibu ɔklɔ kplɛ wǝ ufiebi kplɛ laafo se bukǝ kayɛnko lǝ lekpo ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ wǝ ɔyɛnkoyi kɛkɛ ete laaka wǝ kayɛnko. Nya baaka wǝ kayɛnko kesuko kaka kee okanka ǝmǝ lela nkǝ weesuko ko.

english_verse: Our tongues are small too, and yet they brag about big things. It takes only a spark to start a forest fire!
translation_verse: Nko ke ini odoakami tsya nɛ. Ite bǝ ɔfɛ tinti lǝ etidisuǝ kǝmiǝ tsyaa, wǝ ǝsuǝ utidi laayɛ kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato lǝ eyifosa kplɛ ǝsuǝ nɛ. Bebe kase ini bǝ ute eto odiakami kɛkɛ te lǝtǝ kusǝmbia kplɛ lǝǝnyǝ ute kaato.

english_verse: The tongue is like a spark. It is an evil power that dirties the rest of the body and sets a person's entire life on fire with flames that come from hell itself.
translation_verse: Nko seka odiakami tsya nte fe ute nɛ. Uyifo fe kawunsiǝ ka diyi ku lebua eto asa nnya nkpe lǝ bo lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ nti. Woanansǝ ǝsuǝ eto uyi ǝmǝ kenke nya woatsylɔsǝ bo nkpǝsiǝsiǝ. Fɛɛ wǝ kosate, ute manlo kosate laato ute kakpe lǝ wǝ nya woanyǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ flaflafla.

english_verse: All kinds of animals, birds, reptiles, and sea creatures can be tamed and have been tamed.
translation_verse: Utidi áfo bebutubuki buyuǝsǝ, nya wǝǝtsyǝ mba tsya nkpe sisenle ku baklɔbɛ ku mba laakpii kasɔ ku akpɛ ku abamba kenke.

english_verse: But our tongues get out of control. They are restless and evil, and always spreading deadly poison.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kuutsyuǝ saa mámfo tɔ odiakami eto nkpǝ buyuǝsǝ. Uyifo obuale wǝ bembofo binyinkǝ kakpe, wǝ diyi ku keni ka laalo utidi fe owa eto keni.

english_verse: My dear friends, with our tongues we speak both praises and curses. We praise our Lord and Father, and we curse people who were created to be like God, and this isn't right.
translation_verse: Aninsɔtiki ku ekuditikii, nyamblɛ aabɔ ketsyi lǝ kɛnyɛ kamǝ ke ǝsuǝ. Mɔ bayimi, yanle bǝ nyamfo tsyǝ nko nkpǝ.

english_verse: Can clean water and dirty water both flow from the same spring?
translation_verse: Ditubiǝ kuditsyuǝ aanyifǝ ntu bo nkpe kamini kesi kaayifǝ mbo nkpe mba.

english_verse: Can a fig tree produce olives or a grapevine produce figs? Does fresh water come from a well full of salt water? Wisdom from Above
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, kototsyabi ebofo lɛbɛsi bɔnwɔ? Nye aketekubi eto ukue nwɔ kototsyabi eto awɔnsa? Nko ke ditubiǝ nǝ laayifǝ mbantu lǝmbofo ntu bo nkpe kamini bɔyifǝ tsya nɛ. Onanto Eto Kobe Ǝtǝ Utidi Aabokosǝ Ǝsuǝ Kasɔ.

english_verse: Are any of you wise or sensible? Then show it by living right and by being humble and wise in everything you do.
translation_verse: Owoe ni obesibe ku nwǝ laanɔ asa kasɔ lǝ mi nti? Ufi nkpǝsiǝsǝ sɛɛ ulǝkǝ nyamfo ote lǝ wǝ eyifosa ǝsuǝ, nya uyifo nnya ku ǝsuǝ kasɔ bokosǝbokosǝ ku lǝ kobe ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But if your heart is full of bitter jealousy and selfishness, don't brag or lie to cover up the truth.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ mi ketu kǝmiǝ biasɛsǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ asa ǝsuǝ, lefonyi nkpe mi, nya mi nti eto utsyuǝ saa laabɛbɛ wǝ mate eto lɛlɛkǝsǝǝ, biantɛyi sidia bela ɔnukualɛ kɛnyɛ, bifi mi bebesǝ ǝsuǝ kato biǝ biyi kobe.

english_verse: This kind of wisdom doesn't come from above. It is earthly and selfish and comes from the devil himself.
translation_verse: Kobe komfo eto okle mentsyi kato, bomu kawunsiǝ mfo eto kole kuni, kunni nko nyɛ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ sɛɛ ǝsuǝ bomu nko nyɛ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ bua ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Whenever people are jealous or selfish, they cause trouble and do all sorts of cruel things.
translation_verse: Itsyise kaka kutsyuǝsɛ kpɔnkpɔ ku mɔ hã eto ale lǝ ɛlɛkɛ nkpee, kǝnǝ ku asa buayifoyifo saa eto okle hã laakɛ mfo.

english_verse: But the wisdom that comes from above leads us to be pure, friendly, gentle, sensible, kind, helpful, genuine, and sincere.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ tutɛɛ, kobe ko ditsyi kato akpa, kuyi ku diyuǝ, disuǝtsyuǝ ku sɛyɛmitsyuǝ kasɔnɔnɔ, kuyi ku kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ, nya koawɔ ebibi sɛɛ. Koannla ntisensense lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ, nya bǝtsyuǝ mamfokanɔ ku kawɛ saa ankɛ lenti.

english_verse: When peacemakers plant seeds of peace, they will harvest justice.
translation_verse: Betidi ba laakpla bǝtsyuǝ nti, kǝnǝ diyuǝ kaboko lǝ betidi ntii, aato eyibibi nnya eto awɔnsa ni nkpǝ sɛɛ siǝsiǝ.

english_verse: Why do you fight and argue with each other? Isn't it because you are full of selfish desires that fight to control your body?
translation_verse: Be lǝǝnǝ amakpɔnkpɔ ku niǝ kakpe mi lenti? Yeetsyi lǝ mi kǝnǝnsɛ lǝ nkpǝdidi eto alasa nnya nlɛ mi bɔkpɔnko lǝ kǝmiǝ lefe saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You want something you don't have, and you will do anything to get it. You will even kill! But you still cannot get what you want, and you won't get it by fighting and arguing. You should pray for it.
translation_verse: Biabɛbɛ kawunsiǝ eto bikǝ, fɛɛ biǝmbofo mi bɔkɛ. Nyaso bialo bǝtsyuǝ. Biabɛbɛ asa kekleke, fɛɛ biamfo nnya bunyǝ, nyaso biǝdiǝ niǝ kakpɔ bǝtsyuǝ. Biankɛ lesa nǝ biabɛbɛ, itsyise biantɔ Onanto biǝ utǝ mi nnya.

english_verse: Yet even when you do pray, your prayers are not answered, because you pray just for selfish reasons.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ bɛtɔ Onanto asa tsyaa, biamfo nnya, itsyise biantɔ nnya ku nsusu sɛɛ, biatɔ asa kǝtǝ mi ǝsuǝ mate. Asa nnya biufi bekpe ǝsuǝ disuǝyuǝ hã biatɔ.

english_verse: You people aren't faithful to God! Don't you know if you love the world, you are God's enemies? And if you decide to be a friend of the world, you make yourself an enemy of God.
translation_verse: Biyifo betidi ba lendi ɔnukualɛ! Binyi biǝ mba difi mǝ ǝsuǝ beyifo sɛyɛtsyuǝ ku kawunsiǝ kamfo eto nkpǝdidi eyifo Onanto eto balo? Nyaso fǝǝ ke lela fǝnkǝ ǝlǝkǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo sɛyɛtsyuǝǝ, éfi fǝ ǝsuǝ éyifo Onanto eto olo.

english_verse: Do you doubt the Scriptures that say, “God truly cares about the Spirit he has put in us”?
translation_verse: Biembu biǝnkǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝmbǝ lǝ Anantotiki nnya lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ Onanto dífi ókpe lǝ boo, eyifo lɛwɔnɔ nǝ laakpɔ sitsyuǝsɛ kekleke lǝ bo disi.”

english_verse: In fact, God treats us with even greater kindness, just as the Scriptures say, “God opposes everyone who is proud, but he blesses all who are humble with undeserved grace.”
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto eto lefonǝ nǝ wǝǝtǝ boo, kpe ale leso kulaa. Fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ nyamǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Onanto ǝǝńyǝ lǝ mba laabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ wǝǝtǝ wǝ lefonǝ mba laabokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ.”

english_verse: Surrender to God! Resist the devil, and he will run from you.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyasoo, bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ Onanto. Bińyǝ lǝ Obonsam lǝ ǝsuǝ, ete wuutsyetsyi udu lǝ mi ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Come near to God, and he will come near to you. Clean up your lives, you sinners. Purify your hearts, you people who can't make up your mind.
translation_verse: Bɛyi bɛfi Onanto, ete wuutsya ebɔyi ɔfi mi. Biflǝ mi ani, mi mba ni babuayifo. Biflǝ abua bilǝkǝ lǝ mi akɔɛsi, mi mba eto nsusu laafloma lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ!

english_verse: Be sad and sorry and weep. Stop laughing and start crying. Be gloomy instead of glad.
translation_verse: Binyǝ kanyi lǝ mi akɔɛsi, befa bembembe, biwu keku. Befloma mi simǝmǝmǝ lǝ sefiani nkuwuiwui, lǝ mi disuǝyuǝ lǝ diyifo kpɔminii.

english_verse: Be humble in the Lord's presence, and he will honor you. Saying Cruel Things about Others
translation_verse: Bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ, ete woobesǝ mi kato.

english_verse: My friends, don't say cruel things about others! If you do, or if you condemn others, you are condemning God's Law. And if you condemn the Law, you put yourself above the Law and refuse to obey either it
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, biendi ditiki nǝ dińyǝ itǝ lǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ ǝsuǝ. Nwǝ laatɛyi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ ditiki nǝ dimatsyɛ nye ditiki fimfi, nye laakpoko wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ lekpoo, aatɛyi ditiki nǝ dimanlɛkɛ ińyǝ lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ, nya waakponko kɔfi komǝ lekpo. Lǝ kɔfi komǝ faakponko lekpoo, nyalɛ ǝmǝnyifo nwǝ leeyifo lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ, bomu ko okponkpo feni.

english_verse: or God who gave it. God is our judge, and he can save or destroy us. What right do you have to condemn anyone? Warning against Bragging
translation_verse: Onanto hã ni nwǝ laakpe afi nya uni okponkpo tsya. Wǝ hã loofo bofo kǝtǝ utidi nye ɔtsylɔsǝ wǝ tsya. Owoe feebu fǝ wǝ feni fɛ faakponko fuutsyuǝ lekpo? Mambesǝ Ǝsuǝ Kato.

english_verse: You should know better than to say, “Today or tomorrow we will go to the city. We will do business there for a year and make a lot of money!”
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, bitsyue koto bɛnɔ, mimba laatɛyi biǝkǝ, “Mmi nye kusɛɛ, buusu kusu umǝ nkplɛ utsyuǝ nya budi fe lɛlɛ lɔni mfó, buuyifo nyifo bɔkɛ atabi kpenkpe.”

english_verse: What do you know about tomorrow? How can you be so sure about your life? It is nothing more than mist that appears for only a little while before it disappears.
translation_verse: Biyi lesa nǝ luubǝ kusɛɛ? Mi nkpǝ te fe kuyuǝ ko laabɔ itǝ lefe kliminti, kesinkli kanya.

english_verse: You should say, “If the Lord lets us live, we will do these things.”
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ ele bǝ bɛtɛyi ni bǝnkǝ, “Lɛ Bonamute atɔnɔ bonkpe nkpǝǝ, buyifo nǝmfo nye nǝmǝ.”

english_verse: Yet you are stupid enough to brag, and it is wrong to be so proud.
translation_verse: Fɛ mɔmɔɔ, biaka kase kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato. Ǝsuǝ kato bobesǝ bomfo kenke manlɛkɛ.

english_verse: If you don't do what you know is right, you have sinned.
translation_verse: Lǝ nya esoo, nwǝ ke nyi lɛsɛ ele bǝ uyifo fɛ ɔni weenyifo nii, aata kebu keyifo lebua.

english_verse: You rich people should cry and weep! Terrible things are going to happen to you.
translation_verse: Nya mɔmɔɔ, mi batabinyǝ bɛnɔ! Biwi nku bɛsɔ ani kɛnyɛ lǝ bulǝ kplɛ bo lǝǝbǝ mi butu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Your treasures have already rotted, and moths have eaten your clothes.
translation_verse: Mi betabikǝ ábia nya balɛ dídi mi awu ku mfia bábiasǝ kenke.

english_verse: Your money has rusted, and the rust will be evidence against you, as it burns your body like fire. Yet you keep on storing up wealth in these last days.
translation_verse: Mi sika sia ku sika flubia áto nkanda nya nyamfo luudi sedansiɛ ińyǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ nya yotonsǝ mi ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ fe ute seka. Bɛbɛbɛ bikǝ bińyǝnsǝ léto lǝ eyi fɛfɛ nyamfo.

english_verse: You refused to pay the people who worked in your fields, and now their unpaid wages are shouting out against you. The Lord All-Powerful has surely heard the cries of the workers who harvested your crops.
translation_verse: Bebee! Beyifoyifo ba díyifo keyifo bǝtǝ mi lǝ kakuɛɛ, bɛni bíamfo mǝ nyo. Bidi kaa bɛnɔ kase banlɛ mminsǝku buwui bembembee! Nya mba dífǝsǝ bɛkuɛnkɛ bǝtǝ mi fɛ bɛni bíamfo mǝ nyo eto kudu díkayo Boanto Onanto Ɔkplɛnyǝ ǝmǝ eto kotoo.

english_verse: While here on earth, you have thought only of filling your own stomachs and having a good time. But now you are like fat cattle on their way to be butchered.
translation_verse: Mi nkpǝ bo binsi lǝ kasɔ mfo eyi ku nkpǝdidi ku disuǝyuǝnyǝnyǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃. Nya bíyifo mi ǝsuǝ bísiǝ ayinkua itǝ diyi nǝmǝ itǝ bolo.

english_verse: You have condemned and murdered innocent people, who couldn't even fight back. Be Patient and Kind
translation_verse: Bélo betidi ba dímanta mi bebu dikpi, nya bélo mǝ lǝ lefe nǝ bántaka bǝńyǝ mi lǝ ǝsuǝ kulaa tsya. Bekpe Utu Buɛɛ, Bińyǝ Bisǝkǝ Bonamute Ǝmǝ Eto Bubǝ Bio.

english_verse: My friends, be patient until the Lord returns. Think of farmers who wait patiently for the autumn and spring rains to make their valuable crops grow.
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, bifi disuǝtsyǝ lǝ bekpe utu buɛɛ bińyǝ isu ese lefe nǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ luubǝ bio. Bebe kase ɔkuɛmfo nkpe disuǝtsyǝ! Bebe kase woǝńyǝ buɛɛ kǝsǝkǝ bɛkuɛnkǝ kpenkpe bia wǝǝbǝ bunyǝ ketsyiko lǝ wǝ kasɔ, nya wǝǝńyǝ buɛɛ kǝsǝkǝ ɔsɔmi eto bɔni lǝ lefe sɛɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Be patient like those farmers and don't give up. The Lord will soon be here!
translation_verse: Nko ele bǝ mi tsya muǝ utu bɛlɛ nɛ. Biǝntǝ lǝ ani elo mi, itsyise Bonamute ǝmǝ eto dibǝfe bio eboyo elo.

english_verse: Don't grumble about each other or you will be judged, and the judge is right outside the door.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, biǝndiǝ niǝ lǝ bǝtsyuǝ, bǝ lǝ Onanto lǝ ɔyɛ mi lekpo bokponko. Itsyise okponkpo ǝmǝ eto bubɛ bɔfi.

english_verse: My friends, follow the example of the prophets who spoke for the Lord. They were patient, even when they had to suffer.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, bekloma Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ba lébe ditiki nǝ mǝ letsya lǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ eti diye ǝsuǝ. Bitǝ lǝ bobe kase bǝnyǝ kanyi nya bǝmuǝ utu balɛɛ, lǝ bokase asa lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: In fact, we praise the ones who endured the most. You remember how patient Job was and how the Lord finally helped him. The Lord did this because he is so merciful and kind.
