translation_verse: Boakpo betidi bamba boǝ mba bakpo atsyɔ, itsyise bǝńyǝ bembe lǝ kanyi ǝsuǝ. Biɔnɔ kase Hiob dímuǝ utu ɔlɛ ku kase Onanto léfo wǝ nnya layo lǝ kalosǝkɔ. Itsyise Bonamute kpe kafoɛkpɛ nya woǝnyǝ utidi kaminsǝ.

english_verse: My friends, above all else, don't take an oath. You must not swear by heaven or by earth or by anything else. “Yes” or “No” is all you need to say. If you say anything more, you will be condemned.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, ditiki kekleke nǝ mɔɔtɛyi mi ni bǝnkǝ biankpadi asa, kato keni o-o, kasɔ keni o-o, nye lesa bamba saa dini o-o, biankpadi. Lǝ ditiki nǝmǝ kpee, bɛtɛyi biǝ ee. Nya lǝ dimbǝǝ, bɛtɛyi biǝ oowo, lǝ Onanto lǝ ɔyɛ mi dikpi bolo.

english_verse: If you are having trouble, you should pray. And if you are feeling good, you should sing praises.
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ kpe lǝ bulǝ ǝsuǝ nye ɔnlɛ kanyi bunyǝ lǝ mi ntii, oto ola utǝ Onanto. Lǝ utsyuǝ lɛ disuǝyuǝ bunyǝǝ, usǝ atɛsǝ eto ǝsǝ.

english_verse: If you are sick, ask the church leaders to come and pray for you. Ask them to put olive oil on you in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Lǝ mi nti eto utsyuǝ lɛ bufii, bekpadi bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa eto beninǝ lǝ bato ola lǝ wǝ disi, lǝ bediki wǝ nuǝbi lǝ Bonamute eto diye ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you have faith when you pray for sick people, they will get well. The Lord will heal them, and if they have sinned, he will forgive them.
translation_verse: Ola wǝ báto lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ ǝbotsya ufunfi ǝmǝ, nya Bonamute lootakasɛ wǝ, nya lufi wǝ abua ɔtsyɛ wǝ.

english_verse: If you have sinned, you should tell each other what you have done. Then you can pray for one another and be healed. The prayer of an innocent person is powerful, and it can help a lot.
translation_verse: Nyaso bilǝkǝ mi abua kasɔ bitǝ bǝtsyuǝ lǝ beto ola lǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ eto disi lǝ binyǝ bufitsyantsya. Utidi sɛɛ eto olatoto kpe ǝsuǝale nya weeyifo keyifo tinti.

english_verse: Elijah was just as human as we are, and for three and a half years his prayers kept the rain from falling.
translation_verse: Elia éyifo utidi fe kase bo tsya ni. Se óto ala kekleke nkǝ ɔsɔmi yɛ bɔnii, ɔ́yɛ bɔni lǝ alɛ ǝtsyǝ ku kutsyǝ ǝsuǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃.

english_verse: But when he did pray for rain, it fell from the skies and made the crops grow.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, usi óto ola, nya Onanto dítǝ ɔsɔmi lɛni nya bidikǝ lɛlɛkɛ lǝ kasɔ kamǝ.

english_verse: My friends, if any followers have wandered away from the truth, you should try to lead them back.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi, lǝ utsyuǝ ǝbǝ kama lǝ ɔnukualɛtiki nǝmǝǝ, bekplatsya lǝ beekpa wǝ beboko,

english_verse: If you turn sinners from the wrong way, you will save them from death, and many of their sins will be forgiven.
translation_verse: bekloma biǝ utsyuǝ saa ke lookpa obuayifo utsyiko lǝ kabuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ obokoo, wuutǝ obuayifo ǝmǝ nyǝ nkpǝ ku abua kpǝ nnya úyifo eto bufukatsyɛ.

english_verse: From Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ. To God's people who are scattered like foreigners in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia.
translation_verse: Kukue komfo etsyi mɔ, Petro, wǝ ni Yesu Kristo eto ɔtɔnkpe ɔflɔ. Nlɛ ko bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mimba ni Onanto eto betidilǝkǝlǝkǝ ba dísensǝ bísu benkpe fe bafɔ lǝ Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia ku Bitinia eto nsɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God the Father decided to choose you as his people, and his Spirit has made you holy. You have obeyed Jesus Christ and are sprinkled with his blood. I pray that God will be kind to you and will keep on giving you peace! A Real Reason for Hope
translation_verse: Anto Onanto kosate dílǝkǝ mi ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ. Nya itǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ lékpasǝ mi ǝsuǝ biyifo betidi kɛnkɛ bǝ lǝ bitsyue Yesu Kristo koto, lǝ befi wǝ kɔtɔ bǝflǝ mi lǝ bele. Lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ ku diyuǝ lǝ difui disiǝko mi lefe saa. Bafokanɔfɔ Eto Lesa Nǝ Banlɛ Kusu Bobe Kǝtǝ.

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. God is so good, and by raising Jesus from death, he has given us new life and a hope that lives on.
translation_verse: Bitǝ lǝ bɔsɔ Onanto wǝ ni Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto Anto ani. Lǝ wǝ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ kplɛ ǝsuǝǝ, útǝ bo nkpǝ fɔfɔ ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ótakase Yesu Kristo utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ óboko nkpǝ eso. Nyamfo ǝtǝ bo kusubebe fɔfɔ ko lɛflɔ.

english_verse: God has something stored up for you in heaven, where it will never decay or be ruined or disappear.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyasoo, bɛlɛ kusu bobe kǝtǝ kedikɔ eto atsyɔkpokpo fokoya ko Onanto lɛlɔ utsyǝ lǝ kato itǝ wǝ betidi ke lembobia, ka lemboto kɔti, ka lǝmbɔflɛ tsya.

english_verse: You have faith in God, whose power will protect you until the last day. Then he will save you, just as he has always planned to do.
translation_verse: Kedikɔ kamfo luudi mi kale, mimba ɛyɛ lǝ bofo kanɔ ǝsuǝ bálɔ mi bǝtsyǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ itǝ bofokǝtǝ lǝ nkpǝ bo buulǝkǝ bate lǝ lefe fɛfɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: On that day you will be glad, even if you have to go through many hard trials for a while.
translation_verse: Binyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝ, ite bǝ biunyǝ kanyi lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ botokabe kpǝ ǝsuǝ tsya.

english_verse: Your faith will be like gold that has been tested in a fire. And these trials will prove that your faith is worth much more than gold that can be destroyed. They will show that you will be given praise and honor and glory when Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Nnya ni bǝ lǝ befi bato mi babe bǝ befo bɛnɔ sitinti. Fe kase baato sika sia laafo bobia kabe lǝ utee, nko ke bǝǝbǝ mi bofokanɔ bo lefo koya bonso sika kulaa tsya boto kabe lǝ ute ǝsuǝ, lǝ befi babe bǝ buutsyǝ itǝ lefe saa. Nyamfo ebutǝ Onanto atɛsǝ mi obesǝ mi kato ufi dibu utǝ mi lǝ diyi nǝ Yesu Kristo lɔɔbɔ ubǝ bǝnyǝ wǝ.

english_verse: You have never seen Jesus, and you don't see him now. But still you love him and have faith in him, and no words can tell how glad and happy
translation_verse: Ite bǝ biǝnyǝ wǝ tɔ binyǝ tsyaa, biala wǝ. Se bɛnnlɛ wǝ bunyǝ mɔmɔ tsyaa, béfo wǝ bɛnɔ nya mi disuǝyuǝnyǝnyǝ nso bulǝkǝ katɛyi.

english_verse: you are to be saved. This is why you have faith.
translation_verse: Kase béfo wǝ bɛnɔ esoo, itǝ bǝ Onato ǝtǝ nkǝ mi kakla nyǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: Some prophets told how God would treat you with undeserved grace, and they searched hard to find out more about the way you would be saved.
translation_verse: Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi ba lébe letsya itsyi lǝ kase Onanto lǝǝbǝ mi ǝtǝsa butǝǝ, átɔ bánɔ nya báfefe kekleke lǝ kase Onanto lǝǝbǝ mi bofo lǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: The Spirit of Christ was in them and was telling them how Christ would suffer and would then be given great honor. So they searched to find out exactly who Christ would be and when this would happen.
translation_verse: Báfefe bǝ lǝ bate itsyi lǝ lefe nǝ yuubǝ ku kase yǝǝbǝ bubǝ. Lefe nǝmfo ni lefe nǝ Kristo eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nkpe lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ nlɛ kɔni bote, kǝlǝkǝ kate kanyi ka Kristo ele bǝ unyǝ ku diyǝnde nǝ luutǝkǝ nnya kama.

english_verse: But they were told that they were serving you and not themselves. They preached to you by the power of the Holy Spirit, who was sent from heaven. And their message was only for you, even though angels would like to know more about it. Chosen To Live a Holy Life
translation_verse: Onanto ǝlǝkǝ óte bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi bamfo nkǝ inni itǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ eto kutǝkǝ eso banlɛ keyifo, bomu itǝ mi. Bédi etiki betsyiko asa nnya mba nlɛ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya bobe kǝtǝ mi mɔmɔ ɛyɛ lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝ Onanto létsyese itsyi kato eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ. Onanto eto batɔnkpe kulaa tsya ála kokoko bǝ eni lǝ bate lesaatsyuǝ itsyi lǝ asa nyamfo ǝsuǝ fɛ. Ele Bǝ Bafokanɔfɔ Siǝ Nkpe Kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: Be alert and think straight. Put all your hope in how God will treat you with undeserved grace when Jesus Christ appears.
translation_verse: Nyaso bimuǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyǝ itǝ keyifo. Bimuǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyǝ kukɔnɔ lǝ bikabe kusu kekleke itǝ Onanto eto atsyɔkpokpo nnya wuutǝ mi lǝ lefe nǝ Yesu Kristo lɔɔbɔ bǝnyǝ.

english_verse: Behave like obedient children. Don't let your lives be controlled by your desires, as they used to be.
translation_verse: Bitsyue Onanto eto ditiki koto nya biǝntǝ lǝ asa nnya díkǝnǝ mi kakpe lǝ abua ǝsuǝ kɔ, lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto eto ditiki dímankpako mi tɔɔ, lǝ isi eso mi ani mɔmɔ.

english_verse: Always live as God's holy people should, because God is the one who chose you, and he is holy.
translation_verse: Bomuu, fe kase Onanto wǝ lékpadi mi nte kɛnkɛɛ, mi tsya tsyǝ kɛnkɛ lǝ lesa saa nǝ biuyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say, “I am the holy God, and you must be holy too.”
translation_verse: Itsyise báwɔni bakpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ bǝ Onanto átɛyi nkǝ, “Biyifo kɛnkɛ, itsyise nyifo kɛnkɛ.”

english_verse: You say that God is your Father, but God doesn't have favorites! He judges all people by what they do. So you must honor God while you live as strangers here on earth.
translation_verse: Biakpadi wǝ biǝ Boanto lǝ bɛlɛ ola boto kǝtǝ Onanto wǝ laambe utidi eto ǝnǝmi lǝ ɔlɛ lekpo bokpo ku utidi lǝ lesa nǝ utsyuǝ saa díyifo ǝsuǝ. Lǝ nyasoo, fe bafɔ lǝ kasɔ mfoo, bisiǝ mi nkpǝ fɛfɛ bifi dibu bitǝ Onanto.

english_verse: You were rescued from the useless way of life you learned from your ancestors. But you know you were not rescued by such things as silver or gold that don't last forever.
translation_verse: Itsyise biyi kayo ka Onanto léfo lǝ mi disi fɛ úlǝkǝ mi utsyiko lǝ nkpǝsiǝsiǝ lǝmbǝ kutǝkǝ bo béfo bitsyiko lǝ mi banamǝ ɔflɔ. Inni lesa nǝ boofo bobiasǝ fe sika sia lee sika flubia seka.

english_verse: You were rescued by the precious blood of Christ, that spotless and innocent lamb.
translation_verse: Bomu iyifo Kristo eto kɔtɔ ko lefo koya, wǝ díyifo fe Lesamubi nǝ lebua saa lǝmbǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ, lékpa lɛflɔ kenke Onanto dífi útǝ kedi lǝ mi disi.

english_verse: Christ was chosen even before the world was created, but because of you, he did not come until these last days.
translation_verse: Onanto ǝlǝkǝ wǝ utsyǝ fɛ béyifo kawunsiǝ nya úlǝkǝ wǝ óte lǝ eyifɛfɛ nyamfo ǝsuǝ lǝ mi disi eso.

english_verse: And when he did come, it was to lead you to have faith in God, who raised him from death and honored him in a glorious way. This is why you have put your faith and hope in God.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝmfo ǝsuǝ esoo, béfo Onanto bɛnɔ. Nya wǝ ni futsyǝ létakasǝ wǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ nya útǝ wǝ kedikɔ ka nkpe dibu kanso kenke. Lǝ nyamfo eso béfo Onanto bɛnɔ, nya bífi mi kusubebe bítǝkǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You obeyed the truth, and your souls were made pure. Now you sincerely love each other. But you must keep on loving with all your heart.
translation_verse: Nya se bitsyue ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ koto, ɛyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ békpasǝ mi ǝsuǝ biǝ biola mi bafokanɔfɔ tsyuǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ esoo, ele bǝ bela mi bǝtsyuǝ itsyi taa mi utu kǝmiǝ ke.

english_verse: Do this because God has given you new birth by his message that lives on forever.
translation_verse: Onanto ǝtǝ mi nkpǝ fɔfɔ eto businkli kale. Inni utidi wǝ leekpe dísinkli óle mi, bomu nwǝ leenkpe kulefe léle mi ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto ditiki nǝ nsi nkpǝ lefe saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Humans wither like grass, and their glory fades like wild flowers. Grass dries up, and flowers fall to the ground.
translation_verse: Itsyise Anantotiki átɛyi nkǝ, “Betidi kenke te fe sefa seka. Nya mǝ kɔlɔkɔ kenke te fe sefa eto efukpokpo seka. Nya se efukpokpo laaylɔbe kalo kewui.

english_verse: But what the Lord has said will stand forever.” Our good news to you is what the Lord has said.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto eto ditiki te lefe saa.” Ditiki nǝmfo ni Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝ bábe letsya bǝtǝ mi nɛ.

english_verse: Stop being hateful! Quit trying to fool people, and start being sincere. Don't be jealous or say cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Nyaso bisinkli bɛyɛ asa bua saa eto okle buyifo. Bilǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ sediatɛyitɛyi, ǝnǝmi ǝnǝmi eto nkpǝsiǝsiǝ, kutsyuǝsɛkpɔnkpɔ, ku utidi eto diyebiasǝbiasǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Be like newborn babies who are thirsty for the pure spiritual milk that will help you grow and be saved.
translation_verse: Bela Onanto eto ditiki tinti nǝmǝ fe kase bebisambi laala mmintu kekleke bǝ lǝ bebe bekpe lǝ mi bofo kanɔ ǝsuǝ fe kase Onanto laala.

english_verse: You have already found out how good the Lord really is.
translation_verse: Itsyise Anantotiki átɛyi nkǝ, “Mi kosate ebunyǝ kase Bonamute nkpe kafo ɛkpɛ.”

english_verse: Come to Jesus Christ. He is the living stone people have rejected, but which God has chosen and highly honored.
translation_verse: Bibǝ Bonamute ɔflɔ. Wǝ ni nkpǝ eto leba nǝ batonto lɛni bǝ dimbǝ kulesa nti, fɛɛ Onanto ǝlǝkǝ ni utsyǝ nkǝ lefo koya tinti lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: And now you are living stones being used to build a spiritual house. You are also a group of holy priests, and with the help of Jesus Christ you will offer sacrifices that please God.
translation_verse: Mi tsya eyifo fe aba nnya nkpe nkpǝ, nyaso bifi mi ǝsuǝ bitǝ Onanto lǝ oto lɛwɔnɔ eto diyo. Diyo nǝmfo kafo biɔkɛ fe besumunyǝ kɛnkɛ, nya biɔyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝ bitǝ Onanto Lɛwɔnɔ eto kedi ka lɔɔkɛ wǝ ɔkɔɛ.

english_verse: It is just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a choice and precious cornerstone. No one who has faith in this one will be disappointed.”
translation_verse: Itsyise Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue átɛyi nkǝ, “Nlǝkǝ leba nǝ lefo koya, nya mimfi ni míntǝkǝ lǝ Sion eto diyo eto kaka nso bofe. Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ loofo wǝ ɔnɔɔ, wembudi kofani kulefe.”

english_verse: You are followers of the Lord, and this stone is precious to you. But it isn't precious to those who refuse to follow him. They are the builders who tossed aside the stone that turned out to be the most important one of all.
translation_verse: Nya leba nǝmfo áfo koya tinti lǝ mimba lefo wǝ bɛnɔ ɔflɔ, nya lǝ mba dímamfo wǝ banɔ ɔflɔɔ, ele bǝ bate bǝnkǝ, diyifo “Leba nǝ batonto lɛni bǝ dimbǝ kɔnɔ, fɛɛ ni bomu díbǝ léfiani leba nǝ léfo koya lenso kenke nɛ.”

english_verse: But you are God's chosen and special people. You are a group of royal priests and a holy nation. God has brought you out of darkness into his marvelous light. Now you must tell all the wonderful things he has done. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mii, biyifo betidi ba Onanto dílǝkǝ utsyǝ fe besumunyǝ ba laatɛsɛ wǝ wǝ ni oka, ku kusǝ kenke ko bákpo atsyɔ, Onanto eto betidi ba bǝlǝkǝ bǝtsyǝ bǝ babe Onanto eto eyifosa kplɛ nyamǝ letsya. Nya ókpadi mi utsyiko lǝ ketuntu kamǝ kǝmiǝ óboko wǝ diyǝnde kplɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: “Once you were nobody. Now you are God's people. At one time no one had mercy on you. Now God has treated you with kindness.” Live as God's Servants Should
translation_verse: Lefe ditsyuǝ nǝ léfee, bíenyifo Onanto eto betidi fɛ mɔmɔɔ, biyifo wǝ betidi. Fɛ lefe nǝ léfe mǝǝ, báante Onanto eto kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ fɛ mɔɔ, biofo wǝ kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ. Bisiǝ Nkpe Bo Lɔɔtɛsǝ Onanto.

english_verse: Dear friends, you are foreigners and strangers on this earth. So I beg you not to surrender to those desires that fight against you.
translation_verse: Mɔ balala, nlɛ mi kɔlɛ bɔlɛ fe mba ni bafɔ ku mba nyɛ kusu lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo minkǝ, bilǝkǝ ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ etidisuǝ eto alasa bua nnya nlɛ lema bɔkpɔnko mi lefe saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Always let others see you behaving properly, even though they may still accuse you of doing wrong. Then on the day of judgment, they will honor God by telling the good things they saw you do.
translation_verse: Bisiǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ lǝ bamamonyǝ ba nti benkpe bǝ lǝ bédi etiki bua lǝ mi ǝsuǝ bǝ biyifo babuayifo tsyaa, kamaa, lǝ bǝbǝ bǝnyǝ bǝtsyǝ lekpo kasɛɛ ka bíyifo bítsyǝ itǝ lǝ batɛsǝ Onanto lǝ wǝ Lekpoyi Fɛfɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: The Lord wants you to obey all human authorities, especially the Emperor, who rules over everyone.
translation_verse: Lǝ Bonamute ǝmǝ esoo, bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ betidi eto aba saa ke bǝtsyǝ lǝ kɔfi ǝsuǝ ku Romafɔ eto Okankplɛ wǝ ni uninǝ kenke,

english_verse: You must also obey governors, because they are sent by the Emperor to punish criminals and to praise good citizens.
translation_verse: ku aba eto bǝnyɛsiǝ ba útǝ ǝsuǝale nkǝ bǝnǝ babuayifo koto nya lǝ batɛsǝ betidi ba leeyifo kasɛɛ tsya.

english_verse: God wants you to silence stupid and ignorant people by doing right.
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto aala nkǝ biti mba ini ebukitiki ete beedi eto nyɛ lǝ asa sɛɛ nya bieyifo eso.

english_verse: You are free, but still you are God's servants, and you must not use your freedom as an excuse for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Bisiǝ nkpǝ fe betidi ba nsi lǝ mi ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ biemfi mi ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ busiǝ bomfo biyifo asa bua. Bomu bisiǝ nkpǝ fe Onanto eto ndomufɔ seka.

english_verse: Respect everyone and show special love for God's people. Honor God and respect the Emperor. The Example of Christ's Suffering
translation_verse: Bitǝ utidi saa dibu. Bela mi bafokanɔfɔ tsyuǝ. Bete Onanto sikpi. Nya lǝ bitǝ Okankplɛ tsya dibu. Bebokosǝ Ǝsuǝ Kasɔ Bitǝ Mi Banamute.

english_verse: Servants, you must obey your masters and always show respect to them. Do this, not only to those who are kind and thoughtful, but also to those who are cruel.
translation_verse: Mimba ni beyifoyifoo, bebokosǝ mi ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ mi banamute lǝ bibu mǝ tsya. Nya inni banamute ba nkpe kafo ɛkpɛ nya baala mi ete, bomu mba leeyifo mi disiale tsya.

english_verse: God will bless you, even if others treat you unfairly for being loyal to him.
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ lǝ kanyi bunyǝ lǝ kusu ko dimantsyɛ ǝsuǝ fɛ ini lǝ Onanto eto disi eso uńyǝ keklekee, Onanto ebokpo wǝ atsyɔ.

english_verse: You don't gain anything by being punished for some wrong you have done. But God will bless you, if you have to suffer for doing something good.
translation_verse: Lǝ bíyifo kabua nya lǝ nnya eso bǝnǝ mi kotoo, nte atɛsǝ nnya biunyǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ? Fɛɛ lǝ bíyifo kasɛɛ nya bínyǝ kanyi lǝ ke buyifo esuǝǝ, Onanto ebokpo mi atsyɔ lǝ nnya disi.

english_verse: After all, God chose you to suffer as you follow in the footsteps of Christ, who set an example by suffering for you.
translation_verse: Nya nyamfo ni nnya Onanto lela nkǝ bikeyifo nɛ. Itsyise Kristo kosate ǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ mi disi nya óte mi nkǝ bɛyɛ lǝ wǝ kayɛkɔ.

english_verse: Christ did not sin or ever tell a lie.
translation_verse: “Wényifo lebua saa, nya wántɛyi sedia saa tsya.”

english_verse: Although he was abused, he never tried to get even. And when he suffered, he made no threats. Instead, he had faith in God, who judges fairly.
translation_verse: Se báka wǝǝ, wánka kuutsyuǝ saa lǝ nnya kɛnyɛ. Se báte wǝ ohiã wénkudi wǝ balo saa. Bomu úfi lesa saa útǝ Onanto wǝ laakpo lekpo lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Christ carried the burden of our sins. He was nailed to the cross, so we would stop sinning and start living right. By his cuts and bruises you are healed.
translation_verse: Kristo kosate léfo bo abua útsyi, úsu úkpe lǝ uyikabie ǝsuǝ. Úyifo nyamfo nko bǝ lǝ bɔbɔ butsyi lǝ bo abua ǝsuǝ lǝ busiǝ nkpǝ butǝ kasɛyifoyifo. Úfi afabe nnya ófo ótsya mi bufi.

english_verse: You had wandered away like sheep. Now you have returned to the one who is your shepherd and protector.
translation_verse: Lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝǝ, kɔɔ bíyifo fe basamu ba lénya kusu. Fɛɛ mɔmɔɔ, Onanto ákpa mi óboko bǝ bitǝkǝko nwǝ laayɛnko mi ku nwǝ laase mi ɔflɔ.

english_verse: If you are a wife, you must put your husband first. Even if he opposes our message, you will win him over by what you do. No one else will have to say anything to him,
translation_verse: Nya mi besio tsyaa, nko ele bǝ bebokosǝ mi ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ mi bese. Nyamfo luutǝ bǝ lǝ mǝ utsyuǝ mámfo ɔ́nɔ tsyaa, wuufi wǝ ǝsuǝ utǝ Onanto ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ ditsyǝbi sɛɛ nǝmǝ eso. Nya inni bǝ ele bǝ bɛtɛyi mǝ kulesa kulaa tsya.

english_verse: because he will see how you honor God and live a pure life.
translation_verse: Bomu mǝ kosate ebunyǝ kase mi ditsyǝbi lekpa nya bébokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: Don't depend on things like fancy hairdos or gold jewelry or expensive clothes to make you look beautiful.
translation_verse: Biǝnlǝkǝ mi bɔnɔbobe bete lǝ asa nnya biakpe nye kase biakle esi nye atsyabi nnya biakpe kefi kalɔkɔsǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Be beautiful in your heart by being gentle and quiet. This kind of beauty will last, and God considers it very special.
translation_verse: Bomuu, bɛlɔkɔsǝ lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nkpe lǝ mi ǝsuǝ ku alɔkɔsǝsa nnya luutǝ bǝ ditsyǝ kpoo nya diyuǝ buɛɛ tsya. Kɔlɔkɔ komfo ambia kulefe nya kofo koya tinti lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Long ago those women who worshiped God and put their hope in him made themselves beautiful by putting their husbands first.
translation_verse: Nkomǝ seka besio kɛnkɛ ba dísiǝ kɔ, ba dífi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝkǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝǝ, lébokosǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bǝtǝ mǝ bese nnya iyifo kɔlɔkɔ itǝ mǝ nɛ.

english_verse: For example, Sarah obeyed Abraham and called him her master. You are her true children, if you do right and don't let anything frighten you.
translation_verse: Nko ke Sara tsya dítsyue Abraham koto nya ókpo wǝ nkǝ, “Mɔ onamute.” Mi tsya afiani Sara ǝmfo eto bebisiobi lǝ biyifo asa sɛɛ, nya sikpi laanlɛ mi lǝ kulesa saa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If you are a husband, you should be thoughtful of your wife. Treat her with honor, because she isn't as strong as you are, and she shares with you in the gift of life. Then nothing will stand in the way of your prayers. Suffering for Doing Right
translation_verse: Nko ke ini itǝ mi bese tsya nɛ, bitǝ lǝ asakasɔnɔnɔ lǝ ɛkɛ lǝ mi ku mi bǝsiǝ nti, binyǝ mǝ fe mba lǝmbǝ ǝsuǝale fe mi. Bitǝ mǝ dibu itsyise mi ku mǝ ta Onanto léfo utǝ nkǝ bibǝ bisiǝ nkpǝ lǝ binyǝ nkpǝ manlo. Lǝ biyifo nkoo, kulesa embuti mi olatoto kusu lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ. Biemfi Lebua Befo Lebua Kayo.

english_verse: Finally, all of you should agree and have concern and love for each other. You should also be kind and humble.
translation_verse: Lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, bitǝ lǝ mimblɛ eto nsusu lǝ buyifo bɔni, utidi eto asa lǝ ɛlɛ mi kaminsǝ, bela bǝtsyuǝ fe bayimi, biyifo kafoɛkpɛ nya lǝ bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Don't be hateful and insult people just because they are hateful and insult you. Instead, treat everyone with kindness. You are God's chosen ones, and he will bless you. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Biemfi lebua befo lebua kayo, nye bukudi lǝ bukidi eto kɛnyɛ. Bomu bɛlɛ Onanto lekpakpa lǝ utǝ mǝ atsyɔkpokpo, itsyise nyamfo Onanto ditsyǝ kɛnyɛ nkǝ bibǝ bɛkɛ se ókpadi mi nɛ.

english_verse: “Do you really love life? Do you want to be happy? Then stop saying cruel things and quit telling lies.
translation_verse: Fe kase Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛtɛyii, “Utsyuǝ saa ke lela nkǝ wǝǝsiǝ nkpǝ lǝ unyǝ mu kamini, nya lǝ usiǝ nkpǝ kɛntsyɛɛ, wǝǝntǝ lǝ ditiki bua saa lǝ lɛbɔ itsyi lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ nya yanle bǝ ɔtɛyi sidia tsya.

english_verse: Give up your evil ways and do right, as you find and follow the road to peace.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ ɔyɛ lebua buyifo lǝ uyifo kasɛɛ, nya lǝ ɔbɛbɛ diyuǝ ku wǝ utu kenke.

english_verse: The Lord watches over everyone who obeys him, and he listens to their prayers. But he opposes everyone who does evil.”
translation_verse: Itsyise Bonamute ǝǝtǝkǝ ǝnǝ lǝ mba leeyifo kasɛɛ ǝsuǝ, nya woanɔ mǝ olatoto. Fɛɛ mba ni babuayifoo, waataka kǝńyǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: Can anyone really harm you for being eager to do good deeds?
translation_verse: Lǝ biakplatsya keyifo kasɛɛ, owoe lookpe mi bulǝ?

english_verse: Even if you have to suffer for doing good things, God will bless you. So stop being afraid and don't worry about what people might do.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ efe bǝ nyǝ kanyi lǝ kasɛɛ ka feyifo eto disi esoo, nyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Biante mǝ sikpi, nya biǝntǝ kulesa lǝ ilǝ mi.

english_verse: Honor Christ and let him be the Lord of your life. Always be ready to give an answer when someone asks you about your hope.
translation_verse: Bomu bifi dibu bitǝ Kristo lǝ mi akɔɛsi lǝ bitǝ wǝ dibu fe mi Onamute. Nya biofo mi ǝsuǝ kɛnyɛ bulǝkǝ kate utsyuǝ saa wǝ lela nkǝ woanɔ itsyiko lǝ kusubebe ko ǝsuǝ benkpe. Nya lǝ biyifo nko ku disuǝtsyǝ ku ǝsuǝ kasɔ bokosǝbokosǝ.

english_verse: Give a kind and respectful answer and keep your conscience clear. This way you will make people ashamed for saying bad things about your good conduct as a follower of Christ.
translation_verse: Biyifo nnya ku utu wuee, bǝ lǝ utsyuǝ aka mi lǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ bo binsi lǝ Kristo esoo, lǝ kofani lǝ kɔlɛ mǝ lǝ nnya bátɛyi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You are better off to obey God and suffer for doing right than to suffer for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Itsyise ɛlɛkɛ eso bǝ nyǝ kanyi lǝ kasɛɛ ka feeyifo eso lǝ nyamfo eyifo Onanto eto lelabi, enso bǝ lǝ kabua eso.

english_verse: Christ died once for our sins. An innocent person died for those who are guilty. Christ did this to bring you to God, when his body was put to death and his spirit was made alive.
translation_verse: Itsyise Kristo wǝ ni ɔsɛɛ, ékpe lǝ betidi ba ni babuayifo eto disi dikpe lɛnwɛ itǝ lefe nǝ kenke, bǝ lǝ ofó bo bokpa kesuko Onanto ɔflɔ. Bálo wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ Onanto lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ átakasǝ wǝ úbǝ nkpǝ.

english_verse: Christ then preached to the spirits that were being kept in prison.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝǝ, úsu óbé Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ letsya útǝ bekpenkpe ba béti bákpe lǝ edi kafo mfó.

english_verse: They had disobeyed God while Noah was building the boat, but God had been patient with them. Eight people went into that boat and were brought safely through the flood.
translation_verse: Mbamfó ni betidi ba dímentsyue Onanto eto kɔlɛ koto lǝ lefe nǝ ɔkɛ dibusǝ utǝ mǝ lǝ lefe nǝ Noa díkawe wǝ ɔklɔ kplɛ ǝmǝ nɛ. Betidi esiani ba ni mflamfla ba dídufǝ lǝ ɔklɔ ǝmǝ kafoo, mǝ báfo lǝ nkpǝ se ntu bomǝ díyi nɛ.

english_verse: Those flood waters were like baptism that now saves you. But baptism is more than just washing your body. It means turning to God with a clear conscience, because Jesus Christ was raised from death.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eyifo ditsyǝbi nǝ nlɛ bo bote kase ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa lekateko ntuyiyi bomfóo, mɔmɔ laafo bo lǝ nkpǝ. Yenyifo ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto keni buflǝ kewui bomuu, iyifo kɛnyɛklekle ku Onanto, kɛnyɛklekle ka lekpa nya ketsyi taa bo akɔɛsi kǝmiǝ ke. Onanto aafo bo lǝ nkpǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo eto botaka ketsyi ɔkɔmǝ kǝbǝ nkpǝ ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: Christ is now in heaven, where he sits at the right side of God. All angels, authorities, and powers are under his control.
translation_verse: Kristo ǝmfo ni nwǝ dísu kato nya unsi lǝ Onanto eto sediani, wǝ nlɛ seka budi lǝ Onanto eto batɔnkpe kenke ku kato eto bǝsuǝalenyǝ ku ǝsuǝale nnya nkpe kenke ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Christ suffered here on earth. Now you must be ready to suffer as he did, because suffering shows that you have stopped sinning.
translation_verse: Nyaso se Kristo dínyǝ kanyi lǝ sinǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, mi tsya fi wǝ nsusu bomfo ke eto okle bekpé mi ǝsuǝ nkɛale, itsyise utsyuǝ saa ke lǝǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ensifi ǝsuǝ kakpé lebuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: It means you have turned from your own desires and want to obey God for the rest of your life.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso idu mɔmɔ ɛntɔɔ, bisiǝ mi nkpǝ fɛfɛ lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝ, inni lǝ nnya laalɛ utidi ɔkuɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You have already lived long enough like people who don't know God. You were immoral and followed your evil desires. You went around drinking and partying and carrying on. In fact, you even worshiped disgusting idols.
translation_verse: Kɔɔ bísiǝ nkpǝ bíyifo asa fe bamamonyǝ ɛklɛ tinti. Nkpe bo bísiǝ lǝ lefe nǝmfó áyɛ lǝ setsyetɔ eto nkpǝsiǝsiǝ, ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto nkpǝsiǝsiǝ, sitekpe, sidikpũũ, budi ku bunǝ eto ake eti susu ku sifiǝsumu eto eyifosa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Now your former friends wonder why you have stopped running around with them, and they curse you for it.
translation_verse: Nya se biensiankɔ ani ku mǝ keyifo mǝ eyifosa kpǝ nnya lǝmbǝ kasɔnɔnɔ esoo, yeeyifo mǝ yanii nya baaka mi.

english_verse: But they will have to answer to God, who judges the living and the dead.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ yuubǝ ibǝ bǝ buulǝkǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kɛnyɛ lǝ Onanto wǝ lookponko mba nsi nkpǝ ku bekpenkpe akpo.

english_verse: The good news has even been preached to the dead, so that after they have been judged for what they have done in this life, their spirits will live with God.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso Kristo ábe Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya bǝtǝ bekpenkpe tsya, ite bǝ Onanto ákponko mǝ lekpo fe kase baakponko utidinini saa lekpo tsyaa, bǝ lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ bǝsiǝ nkpǝ fe kase Onanto nsi seka. Ele Bǝ Bafokanɔfɔ Kenke Kawunsǝko Bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Everything will soon come to an end. So be serious and be sensible enough to pray.
translation_verse: Asa nnya kenke eto kalosǝkɔ boyo elo. Nyaso bińyǝ bikabe kusu lǝ bɛlɛ ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ, bǝ lǝ befo ola boto.

english_verse: Most important of all, you must sincerely love each other, because love wipes away many sins.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nnya nso bofe enso kenke ni bǝ bikala bǝtsyuǝ kafo faa. Itsyise lelabi ǝǝtǝkǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ eto kabua kpǝ ka uyifo kato.

english_verse: Welcome people into your home and don't grumble about it.
translation_verse: Befo mi bayimitsyuǝ kafo faa, bɔwɔnɔnɔ saa mankɛ.

english_verse: Each of you has been blessed with one of God's many wonderful gifts to be used in the service of others. So use your gift well.
translation_verse: Mi nti eto utsyuǝ saa áfo ǝtǝsa ate ate itsyi lǝ Onanto ɔflɔ. Nya fe unyɛsiǝ sɛɛ saa wǝ laalɛ ǝtǝsa ate ate nyamfo ola kǝtǝ Onantoo, biyifo ǝtǝsa nyamfo eto keyifo, bǝ lǝ ibǝ kutǝkǝ itǝ mi bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: If you have the gift of speaking, preach God's message. If you have the gift of helping others, do it with the strength that God supplies. Everything should be done in a way that will bring honor to God because of Jesus Christ, who is glorious and powerful forever. Amen. Suffering for Being a Christian
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ lɛ Anantotiki budii, udi nnya fe kase Onanto dítǝ wǝ nkǝ udi nnya utǝ betidi. Nya lǝ utsyuǝ lɛ kesumu eto keyifoo, uyifo ke ku ǝsuǝale nnya Onanto dífi útǝ wǝ nkǝ uyifo ke ǝsuǝ, itǝ lǝ befi atɛsǝ bǝtǝ Onanto lefe saa ɛyɛ lǝ Yesu Kristo, wǝ eto ale ni diyǝnde ku ǝsuǝalǝ idu manlo isu manlo. Ibǝ itǝ. Binyǝ Kanyi Fe Kristo Seka.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't be surprised or shocked that you are going through testing that is like walking through fire.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi lala, kase banlɛ mi boto kabe bɛnlɛ kanyi bunyǝ keklekee, yenyifo mi naa bǝnkǝ lesa nǝ bɛnnlɛ kusi bobe kǝtǝǝ, mǝǝmbǝ tɔ lǝ kutsyuǝ saa ǝsuǝ inyǝ.

english_verse: Be glad for the chance to suffer as Christ suffered. It will prepare you for even greater happiness when he makes his glorious return.
translation_verse: Bomu lǝ nyamfo esoo, binyǝ disuǝnyuǝ bǝ mi tsya lɛ kanyi bunyǝ fe Kristo ke seka, bǝ lǝ ɔbɔ lǝ wǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝǝ, mi tsya ebofo disuǝnyuǝ bunyǝ kato keyuluu.

english_verse: Count it a blessing when you suffer for being a Christian. This shows that God's glorious Spirit is with you.
translation_verse: Binyǝ disuǝnyuǝ lǝ betidi áka mi se bintǝkǝko Kristo eso. Itsyise diyǝnde eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ ni Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ siko mi.

english_verse: But you deserve to suffer if you are a murderer, a thief, a crook, or a busybody.
translation_verse: Lǝ mi utsyuǝ ǝǝnyǝ kanyii, yenyifo bǝ uyifo uwudifɔ, uyu, obuayifo, nye nwǝ laakpe ditiki nǝ dimanle wǝ kɛnyɛ eso.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to suffer for being a Christian. Praise God that you belong to him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ biǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ mi bafokanɔfɔ esoo, biǝntǝ lǝ ɛlɛ mi kofani. Bomu bǝsɔ Onanto ani bǝ Kristo eto diye teke fǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God has already begun judging his own people. And if his judgment begins with us, imagine how terrible it will be for those who refuse to obey his message. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Lefe nǝmǝ eboyo elo bǝ betsyiko lekpokponkpo nǝmǝ kasɔ, nya Onanto eto betidi ǝsuǝ yuutsyǝ kasɔ itsyiko. Lǝ betsyiko kasɔ itsyi lǝ bo ǝsuǝǝ, ntsyǝ yuutsyǝ itǝ mba dímamfo Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ banɔ?

english_verse: “If good people barely escape, what will happen to sinners and to others who don't respect God?”
translation_verse: Bawɔni bakpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue bǝnkǝ, “Lǝ ite mǝǝ, bǝ yɔɔkɛ ale fɛ betidi sɛɛ lǝ bǝnyǝ bofoo, ntsyǝ yuutsyǝ itǝ babuayifo ba dímamfo banɔ?”

english_verse: If you suffer for obeying God, you must have complete faith in your faithful Creator and keep on doing right.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyasoo, mba lǝǝnyǝ kanyi ka diyifo Onanto eto lelabii, lǝ mǝ asa sɛɛ buyifo ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ befi mǝ ǝsuǝ bakpe lǝ nwǝ díyifo mǝ lǝ kɔni kenke, nwǝ leeyifo lefe saa lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Church leaders, I am writing to encourage you. I too am a leader, as well as a witness to Christ's suffering, and I will share in his glory when it is shown to us.
translation_verse: Mɔ kosate nwǝ ni bafokanɔfɔ eto uninǝ lǝ mi ntii, nla miǝ maalɛ bafokanɔfɔ eto beninǝ ba nkpe mi lenti kɔlɛ. Mɔ kosate ǝnyǝ kase Kristo dínyǝ kanyi, nya lǝ bǝlǝkǝ wǝ batee, muunyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ diyǝnde nǝmǝ kǝmiǝ. Nla miǝ maatɛyi mi minkɛ,

english_verse: Just as shepherds watch over their sheep, you must watch over everyone God has placed in your care. Do it willingly in order to please God, and not simply because you think you must. Let it be something you want to do, instead of something you do merely to make money.
translation_verse: bɛlɛ Onanto eto bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝ béfi bákpe mi lǝ kɔni bǝ bebe ola ku kafo faa, fe kase Onanto lɛtɔ utsyiko mi ɔflɔ. Bienyifo keyifo kamfo bǝ lǝ bifi bɛbɛbɛ kutǝkǝ ko dimǝnńyǝ itǝ, bomu biyifo ke ku kesumu seka.

english_verse: Don't be bossy to those people who are in your care, but set an example for them.
translation_verse: Bienyifo ke bidi sɛkplɛ lǝ mba béfi bákpe mi kalɔ ǝsuǝ, bomu bete ditsyǝbi sɛɛ itǝ basamu eto etsyukpa nnya nkpe mi kalɔ.

english_verse: Then when Christ the Chief Shepherd returns, you will be given a crown that will never lose its glory.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ Kristo, Nwǝ Laayɛnko Basamu eto Uninǝ Kenke luubǝǝ, lǝ uti mi lekankpakpa kosate nǝmǝ, nǝ ni nǝ laambia kulefe.

english_verse: All of you young people should obey your elders. In fact, everyone should be humble toward everyone else. The Scriptures say, “God opposes proud people, but he helps everyone who is humble.”
translation_verse: Nko ke ini itǝ mi lekososa tsya nɛ, bǝ bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ bafokanɔfɔ ninǝ ba eto kalɔ benkpe. Mimblɛ kenke bebokosǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ bitǝ bǝtsyuǝ lǝ mi eyifosa ǝsuǝ. Itsyise Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto Kukue lɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Onanto ǝǝńyǝ lǝ mba laabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato ǝsuǝ, fɛɛ woawunsǝko mba laabokosǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ kasɔ.”

english_verse: Be humble in the presence of God's mighty power, and he will honor you when the time comes.
translation_verse: Nyaso beboksǝ mi ǝsuǝ kasɔ bɛkɛ lǝ Onanto eto kɔni kekleke komǝ kalɔ, bǝ lǝ obesǝ mi kato lǝ wǝ lefe sɛɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God cares for you, so turn all your worries over to him.
translation_verse: Bifi mi asa nnya kenke laakpé mi bulǝ bekpe lǝ Onanto eto ani, itsyise wǝ laalɛ mi ola.

english_verse: Be on your guard and stay awake. Your enemy, the devil, is like a roaring lion, sneaking around to find someone to attack.
translation_verse: Bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ, bisiǝ bikabe kusu. Mi olo Obonsam lɛ botsyilama kafa, kato ɔkɔɛ fe tsyata, nya ɔnlɛ utidi bɔbɛbɛ nkǝ lǝ usǝnsǝ ɔyimi.

english_verse: But you must resist the devil and stay strong in your faith. You know that all over the world the Lord's followers are suffering just as you are.
translation_verse: Bifi bofokanɔ kekleke bińyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, se binyi biǝ mi bayimi bafokanɔfɔ lǝ kawunsiǝ kenke tsya kpé lǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ kamfo ke eto okle ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But God shows undeserved kindness to everyone. That's why he appointed Christ Jesus to choose you to share in his eternal glory. You will suffer for a while, but God will make you complete, steady, strong, and firm.
translation_verse: Fɛ lǝ binyǝ kanyi kamfo itǝ lefe kliminti kamaa, Onanto, nwǝ eto lefonǝ lǝmbǝ kalokɔ, wǝǝ lékpadi mi nkǝ bibǝ binyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ diyǝnde manlo nǝ diyifo lɔni ku Kristoo, wǝ kosate ǝbɔflɔsǝ mi, okpe mi nkǝ ale lǝ binyǝ kekleke.

english_verse: God will be in control forever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Wǝ ni ǝsuǝale idu manlo isu manlo. Ibǝ itǝ. Bokla Fɛfɛ

english_verse: Silvanus helped me write this short letter, and I consider him a faithful follower of the Lord. I wanted to encourage you and tell you how kind God really is, so you will keep on having faith in him.
translation_verse: Nlɛ kukue kliminti komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi ɛyɛ lǝ Silvano wǝ mimfi fe ɔyimi wǝ lefo ɔnɔ ǝsuǝ. Nla miǝ maakpe mi nkɛale ku nnya mɔ kosate dínyǝ miǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ kosate nǝmǝ ni nǝmfo. Nyaso bińyǝ kekleke lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Greetings from the Lord's followers in Babylon. They are God's chosen ones. Mark, who is like a son to me, sends his greetings too.
translation_verse: Mi bafokanɔfɔ tsyuǝ ba tsya Onanto dílǝkǝ lǝ Babilonia eto kasɔ ku mɔ ubi Marko bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ mi o-o.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. I pray that God will give peace to everyone who belongs to Christ.
translation_verse: Bɛbuta bǝtsyuǝ lǝ bisiǝsǝ bǝtsyuǝ ku bafokanɔfɔ eto lelabi. Diyuǝsǝ lǝ disiǝko mimblɛ ba kenke diyifo bani ku Kristo.

english_verse: From Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ. To everyone who shares with us in the privilege of believing that our God and Savior Jesus Christ will do what is just and fair.
translation_verse: Mɔ, Simon Petro, wǝ ni Yesu Kristo eto uyifoyifo ku ɔtɔnkpe, mɔ ni nwǝ nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mimba ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto ku Ofomfokǝtǝ Yesu Kristo eto kasɛyifoyifo ǝsuǝǝ, dítǝ bínyǝ bofokanɔ bo lefo koya fe bo bole bomfo eto okle.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to you and will let you live in perfect peace! May you keep learning more and more about God and our Lord Jesus. Living as the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Onanto lǝ usi unǝ mi kafo eso mmǝ, nya lǝ utǝ mi diyuǝ kpǝ ɛyɛ lǝ mi Onanto ǝmǝ ku Bonamute Yesu eto bote ǝsuǝ eso. Kase Onanto Lékpadi Nya Úlǝkǝ Betidi.

english_verse: We have everything we need to live a life that pleases God. It was all given to us by God's own power, when we learned he had invited us to share in his wonderful goodness.
translation_verse: Onanto éfi wǝ kosate eto ǝsuǝale útǝ bo lesa saa nǝ loofe itǝ bo faa lǝ bo nkpǝ ǝsuǝ, bǝ lǝ bofó nkpǝ busiǝ fe bafokanɔfɔ. Úyifo nyamfo itsyise buyi wǝ nwǝ lékpadi bo nkǝ bunyǝ kedikɔ lǝ wǝ kosate eto diyǝnde ku kasɛɛ kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: concern for others, and love.
translation_verse: Sɛyimila wunsǝko Onanto sikpitete, nya lǝ lelabi lǝ lɛwunsǝko sɛyimila.

english_verse: If you keep growing in this way, it will show that what you know about our Lord Jesus Christ has made your lives useful and meaningful.
translation_verse: Ǝtsyǝbi nyamfo lefe itǝ mi nɛ nya lǝ nyamblɛ kenke aka mi kɔni nya yefo disiǝ isiǝ lǝ mii, yuutǝ mi eyifosa ebokpa wuee, nya yɔɔbɔ kutǝkǝ se binyi Bonamute Yesu Kristo eso.

english_verse: But if you don't grow, you are like someone who is nearsighted or blind, and you have forgotten that your past sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ utsyuǝ ǝmbǝ ditsyǝbi nǝmfoo, nyalɛ utidi ǝmfo ǝnnyǝ asa kukɔnɔ, eso weemunyǝ asa lǝ katsyontsyokɔ. Itǝ bǝ ótasuǝ nkǝ Onanto ǝflǝ abua nnya úyifo kɔ bewui.

english_verse: My friends, you must do all you can to show God has really chosen and selected you. If you keep on doing this, you won't stumble and fall.
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, bekplatsya lǝ bińyǝ kekleke eso kɔ, itǝ lǝ Onanto eto bokpadi bo ókpadi mi nya úlǝkǝ mii, menyifo ebimbale, nya lǝ biyifo nkoo, nyafɛ biemubǝ kama lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Then our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ will give you a glorious welcome into his kingdom that will last forever.
translation_verse: Lǝ biyifo nkoo, biunyǝ kusu wuee bidufǝ Bonamute ku Ofomfokǝtǝ Yesu Kristo eto seka kedikɔ manlo siamǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You are holding firmly to the truth you were given. But I am still going to remind you of these things.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ bíyi nyamfo koko nya bíkabɔ keyudu lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ tsyaa, nyifo nnya minkǝ muukaklomasǝ mi asa nyamfo lefe saa.

english_verse: In fact, I think I should keep on reminding you until I leave this body.
translation_verse: Nya se minsi minkpe nkpǝ koo, yɔɔlɛkɛ bǝ nkaklomasǝ mi asa nyamfo nya lǝ nkasanklisǝ mi lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And our Lord Jesus Christ has already told me that I will soon leave it behind.
translation_verse: Nyi minkǝ ibu sɛkɛ lǝ mbɔ lǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ siamfo ǝsuǝ fe kase Bonamute Yesu Kristo lɛtɛyi mɛ okpasǝ.

english_verse: This is why I am doing my best to make sure that each of you remembers all of this after I am gone. The Message about the Glory of Christ
translation_verse: Mɔɔbɛbɛ kusu saa ko ǝsuǝ biokakloma asa nyamfo lefe saa lǝ mɔ ukpǝ kama ntsyǝ. Bo Kosate Ǝnyǝ Yesu Eto Diyǝnde Nǝmǝ Ku Bo Ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: When we told you about the power and the return of our Lord Jesus Christ, we were not telling clever stories someone had made up. But with our own eyes we saw his true greatness.
translation_verse: Etiki nnya bɔ́tɛyi mi itsyi lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto businkli kǝbǝ lǝ ǝsuǝale kplɛ ǝsuǝǝ, menyifo etiki woenwoe. Bo kosate dínyǝ wǝ ku bo ǝnǝmi lǝ wǝ sɛkplɛ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God, our great and wonderful Father, truly honored him by saying, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him.”
translation_verse: Búńyǝ mfó lǝ lefe nǝ Anto Onanto dífi dibu ku diyǝnde útǝ wǝ. Nya ɔkɔɛ lɛbɔ útsyi diyǝnde kenke eto Onanto ɔflɔ nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Nyǝ nwǝmfo ni mɔ ubi lala, wǝ ǝsuǝ mǝǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: We were there with Jesus on the holy mountain and heard this voice speak from heaven.
translation_verse: Bo kosate lɛnɔ ɔkɔɛ ǝmfo lɛbɔ utsyi kato, lǝ lefe nǝ bɔ́kɛ lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ lǝ kɔtini kɛnkɛ komǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: All of this makes us even more certain that what the prophets said is true. So you should pay close attention to their message, as you would to a lamp shining in some dark place. You must keep on paying attention until daylight comes and the morning star rises in your hearts.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso busi bófo Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi eto etiki nnya bábe letsya bǝtsyǝ enso nɛ. Bekplatsya lǝ bɛlɛ letsyabebe nǝmǝ fe okandiɛ wǝ nlɛ buyǝnde lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ, isu ese lǝ kolensiǝnto ko kalesiǝsiǝ eto sefandebi luubɛ siyǝnde lǝ mi ketu kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: But you need to realize that no one alone can understand any of the prophecies in the Scriptures.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ lefe ele bǝ binyǝ bitsyǝ lekpo ni bǝnkǝ, kuutsyuǝ saa antaka mmǝ ete ulǝkǝ Onanto eto katɛyikǝtsyǝ ka nkpe lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ kasɔ lǝ wǝ kosate eto kobetete ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The prophets did not think these things up on their own, but they were guided by the Spirit of God.
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto eto katɛyikǝtsyǝ eto ditiki saa méntsyi lǝ utidi kuutsyuǝ eto lelabi ǝsuǝ díbǝ. Bomu Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ lɛyɛ lǝ betidi ǝsuǝ bátɛyi kɛnyɛ ka ditsyi Onanto ɔflɔ kǝbǝ bǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: Sometimes false prophets spoke to the people of Israel. False teachers will also sneak in and speak harmful lies to you. But these teachers don't really belong to the Master who paid a great price for them, and they will quickly destroy themselves.
translation_verse: Fe kase bidiabidia eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi lɛkɛ lǝ betidi nti kɔɔ, nko ke bidiabidia eto bateasa lɔɔbɔ bakɛ mi lenti nɛ. Bɔɔyɛ lǝ awɛsu bate bidiabidia eto asa nnya laabiasǝ betidi eto bofokanɔ. Nya bɔɔni Bonamute wǝ dílǝkǝ mǝ kulaa tsya. Mǝ eyifosa nyamfo ebutǝ batsylɔsǝ ǝsuǝ mlǝ.

english_verse: Many people will follow their evil ways and cause others to tell lies about the true way.
translation_verse: Betidi kpǝ ebutǝkǝko mǝ nkpǝ bua siǝsiǝ kama, nya lǝ bateasa eto eyifosa esoo, betidi ebɔtɛyi asa bua bǝńyǝ lǝ kɔnukualɛsu komǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: They will be greedy and cheat you with smooth talk. But long ago God decided to punish them, and God doesn't sleep.
translation_verse: Se bateasa bamǝ dífi kǝnǝnsɛ bǝtǝkǝ lǝ atabi bɔbɛbɛ ǝsuǝ esoo, boowoe etiki nnya ni bidiabidia befi bǝnyǝ kutǝkǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ, Onanto ébolo mǝ dikpi koko, nya úkǝmuǝ utsyuǝ ǝsuǝ itǝ mǝ bɔtsylɔsǝ!

english_verse: God did not have pity on the angels that sinned. He had them tied up and thrown into the dark pits of hell until the time of judgment.
translation_verse: Onanto mémfi ɔ́tsyɛ wǝ batɔnkpe ba léta wǝ bebu. Bomu okpé mǝ lǝ amana óto mǝ ókpe lǝ ute kǝmiǝ lǝ kaka lena tũũ isu ese lefe nǝ okponko mǝ lekpo.

english_verse: And during Noah's time, God did not have pity on the ungodly people of the world. He destroyed them with a flood, though he did save eight people, including Noah, who preached the truth.
translation_verse: Nko ke Onanto dímǝnyǝ betidi ba dísiǝ nkpǝ kɔ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo ǝsuǝ kaminsǝ se báni nkpǝ sɛɛ busiɛ eso. Bǝntǝ Onanto dibu esoo, útǝ ɔsɔmi áni nya ntu díyi bófo kawunsiǝ kenke nya betidi lɛtsylɔ. Ini Noah wǝ lébe nkpǝ sɛɛ siǝsiǝ letsya útǝ betidi bamǝ ku bitidi ekuanse bamba ba Onanto dílǝkǝ hã díbu.

english_verse: God punished the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by burning them to ashes, and this is a warning to anyone else who wants to sin.
translation_verse: Onanto álo Sodom ku Gomora dikpi nya útǝ ute lɛtsylɔsǝ imǝnkplɛ inuǝ nyamfó kenke káfiani ntɔ, úfi óte lesa nǝ luutu betidi ba lɛni bǝ bembufi dibu bǝtǝ wǝ.

english_verse: Lot lived right and was greatly troubled by the terrible way those wicked people were living. He was a good man, and day after day he suffered because of the evil things he saw and heard. So the Lord rescued him.
translation_verse: Utidi sɛɛ ǝmfo ákɛ lǝ mǝ nti lefe saa. Ɔ́nɔ nnya kenke nlɛ bubǝ, nya únyǝ nnya ku wǝ ǝnǝmi tsya, itǝ bǝ betidi bamfó eto nkpǝ bua siǝsiǝ bomǝ ǝkǝlǝ wǝ tinti lǝ lɛkɔɛsi.

english_verse: This shows that the Lord knows how to rescue godly people from their sufferings and to punish evil people while they wait for the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Nyamfo lɛ bote kase Boanto laafo betidi sɛɛ bulǝkǝ ketsyiko lǝ botokabe bo ǝsuǝ bankpe ku kase waalɔ babuayifo kǝtsyǝ itǝ lefe nǝ Lekpoyi Fɛfɛ looyo itǝ mǝ kotonǝnǝ.

english_verse: The Lord is especially hard on people who disobey him and don't think of anything except their own filthy desires. They are reckless and proud and are not afraid of cursing the glorious beings in heaven.
translation_verse: Nya mba wuunǝ koto enso ni mba lǝǝtǝkǝko ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ biabia eto nkpǝsiasiǝ kama nya baani beentsyue Onanto eto afi koto. Bidiabidia eto bateasa bamfo kpé ale nya bembu kulesa ku diyǝnde eto ǝsuǝalǝ nnya nkpe kato bomuu, baaka mǝ kulaa tsya.

english_verse: Although angels are more powerful than these evil beings, even the angels don't dare to accuse them to the Lord.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Onanto eto batɔnkpe ba nkpe ǝsuǝalǝ nya bankpe kɛnyɛale banso bidiabidia eto bateasa bamfo kulaa tsya anla ǝsuǝale nnya nkpe kato kɛnyɛ, kaaka mǝ lǝ Boanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: These people are no better than senseless animals that live by their feelings and are born to be caught and killed. They speak evil of things they don't know anything about. But their own corrupt deeds will destroy them.
translation_verse: Betidi bamfo eto okle te fe bebutubuki ba lenyi kobe ba boofo bumuǝ kalo, nya bǝǝńyǝ lǝ lesa saa nǝ bannɔ kasɔ ǝsuǝ nya beedi etiki bua saa eto okle. Bɔɔtsylɔsǝ mǝ fe kase baalo bebutubuki seka.

english_verse: They have done evil, and they will be rewarded with evil. They think it is fun to have wild parties during the day. They are immoral, and the meals they eat with you are spoiled by the shameful and selfish way they carry on.
translation_verse: Boonyǝ kanyi fe kase bǝtǝ betidi dínyǝ kanyi ke. Beedi nkpe keyifo lesa saa nǝ ke baala lǝ nkɔminti tsya itsyise beefi nnya fe lesa nǝ lookpe mǝ disuǝyuǝ. Beyifo mba leeyifo afanisa ku mba leeyifo asa nnya laannɔ bobe. Baakɔ ku mi mba nlɛ eyi budi nya bǝǝnyǝ disuǝyuǝ lǝ mǝ asa bua nnya beeyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: All they think about is having sex with someone else's husband or wife. There is no end to their wicked deeds. They trick people who are easily fooled, and their minds are filled with greedy thoughts. But they are headed for trouble!
translation_verse: Bakpé disǝnkpo eto ǝnǝmi nya beeyifo lebua lefe saa nya yennlǝ mǝ. Baawɛ betidi ba eto bofokanɔ lǝmbǝ ale kakpe lǝ lebua ǝsuǝ. Mǝ ketu emmi kulefe. Onanto ékudi betidi bamfo sitinti!

english_verse: They have left the true road and have gone down the wrong path by following the example of the prophet Balaam. He was the son of Beor and loved what he got from being a crook.
translation_verse: Báyani kususɛ bǝtsyǝ nya bánya kusu! Bǝǝtǝnko Onanto eto unyǝlǝkǝtidi Baalam wǝ ni Boer eto ubi eto ditsyǝbi kama. Waala atabi nnya wuunyǝ lǝ asa buayifoyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But a donkey corrected him for this evil deed. It spoke to him with a human voice and made him stop his foolishness.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyaso Onanto ǝyǝnki ókpe wǝ lǝ lebua nǝ úyifo ǝsuǝ. Wǝ Baalam kosate eto ɔflimu édi wǝ etiki lǝ utidi eto ɔkɔɛ ǝsuǝ nya úti wǝ kusu lǝ disibiabia eto asa nnya ɔnlɛ buyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: These people are like dried up water holes and clouds blown by a windstorm. The darkest part of hell is waiting for them.
translation_verse: Betidi bamfo eyifo fe etubiǝ nnya lensianyifǝ ntu, fe asɔmiloku nnya ufiebi lekpa ɔnyɛko. Onanto ébu kǝsiǝkɔ utsyǝ mbamfo eto okle lǝ ketuntu tũũ kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: They brag out loud about their stupid nonsense. And by being vulgar and crude, they trap people who have barely escaped from living the wrong kind of life.
translation_verse: Beedi etiki bimba kabesǝ ǝsuǝ kato. Nya beedi akɔɛntiki nnya laabiasǝ utidi ǝsuǝ, kawɛ mba nlɛ bɔbɔ lǝ betidi ba nsi nkpǝ bua ǝsuǝ eto nti kakpe.

english_verse: They promise freedom to everyone. But they are merely slaves of filthy living, because people are slaves of whatever controls them.
translation_verse: Bidiabidia eto bateasa bamfo ǝǝtsyǝ mǝ kɛnyɛ bǝnkǝ bootǝ bǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ buusiǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ lefe nǝ eto lefe mǝ kosate nsi nkpǝ bo loobiasɛ mǝ bafiani ndomufɔ, itsyise lesa nǝ eto kalɔ fankpee, aafiani ni ndomunyǝ.

english_verse: When they learned about our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they escaped from the filthy things of this world. But they are again caught up and controlled by these filthy things, and now they are in worse shape than they were at first.
translation_verse: Lǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝbǝ bate Bonamute Yesu Kristo wǝ ni Ofomfokǝtǝǝ, nya bǝnǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝlǝkǝ lǝ asa nnya laanansǝ etidisuǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo, nya yanklɛ fɛ asa nyamǝ disinkli ibǝ imuǝ mǝ itǝkǝ mǝ katoo, bǝǝbǝ kǝsiǝ nkpǝ bo lǝ kalosǝkɔɔ, laabia kaso mbo bǝsiǝ kɔ.

english_verse: They would have been better off if they had never known about the right way. Even after they knew what was right, they turned their backs on the holy commandments they were given.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya ete betidi bamfo dímante kulesa itsyi lǝ nkpǝ sɛɛ siǝsiǝ eto kusu ǝsuǝǝ, eni ɛlɛkɛ itǝ mǝ, eso bǝ lǝ bate kusu sɛɛ komǝ fɛ lǝ besinkli lǝ kɔfi kɛnkɛ ko Onanto lékpe mǝ eto kama.

english_verse: What happened to them is just like the true saying, “A dog will come back to lick up its own vomit. A pig that has been washed will roll in the mud.”
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ díbǝ mǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ ǝlǝkǝ ete wuee lesa nǝ akpa nyamfo nlɛ bɔtɛyi bǝ, “Okpa esinkli ɔlɛ wǝ kala budi,” nya “Okplako wǝ bǝflǝsǝ ntu kukɔnɔ esinkli úsu ɔlɛ kota boke.”

english_verse: what God's prophets said would happen. You must never forget what the holy prophets taught in the past. And you must remember what the apostles told you our Lord and Savior has commanded us to do.
translation_verse: Nla miǝ lǝ nklomasǝ mi etiki nya Onanto eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi kɛnkɛ lɛtɛyi lǝ lefe nǝ lefe mǝ, ku lesa nǝ batɔnkpe bamǝ lété mi itsyi lǝ Bonamute we ni Ofomfokǝtǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But first you must realize that in the last days some people won't think about anything except their own selfish desires. They will make fun of you
translation_verse: Tutɛɛ, bitǝ lǝ ekpako mi wuee biǝ, lǝ eyi fɛfɛ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, betidi bǝtsyuǝ ebubǝ ba difi mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ eto afanisa yifoyifo. Boomǝ mi.

english_verse: and say, “Didn't your Lord promise to come back? Yet the first leaders have already died, and the world hasn't changed a bit.”
translation_verse: Nya bɔɔtɔ mi bǝnkǝ, “Nwǝ dítsyǝ kɛnyɛ nkǝ ɔlɛ bubǝ nkpǝ, sieti onkpe? Itsyise idu lefe nǝ bo bana mǝ díkpe ibǝ ese mmi, nko ete asa nsi nte fe kase itsyǝ taa lefe nǝ Onato díyifo kawunsiǝ nɛ.”

english_verse: They will say this because they want to forget that long ago the heavens and the earth were made at God's command. The earth came out of water and was made from water.
translation_verse: Beyi fɛ betsyǝ báni ɔnukualɛ mǝ bǝ etiki te Onanto didi nya úyifo kato ku kasɔ. Wǝ ke dítǝ kasɔ lɛbɔ ketsyi lǝ ntu ǝsuǝ nya kabɔ lǝ ntu ǝsuǝ kankpe.

english_verse: Later it was destroyed by the waters of a mighty flood.
translation_verse: Nya ɛyɛ lǝ ntuyiyi ǝsuǝ nya Onanto lɛtsylɔsǝ kawunsiǝ ka kɔ kenke.

english_verse: But God has commanded the present heavens and earth to remain until the day of judgment. Then they will be set on fire, and ungodly people will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ ke dimuǝ kato ku kasɔ kanlɛ nya ɔnlɛ ke bɔlɔ kǝtsyǝ itǝ ke botonsǝ. Ɔ́lɔ mǝ utsyǝ itǝ diyi nǝ wookponko betidi ba laante Onanto lekpo batsylɔsɛ mǝ.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't forget that for the Lord one day is the same as
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi lala, bianta ǝsuǝ biǝnkǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmii, letekɛkɛ saa ǝmbǝ lǝ diyi lɔni ku alɛ kɔkpi eto nti. Lǝ wǝ ɔflɔɔ, nyamblɛ akate iyifo ani.

english_verse: The Lord isn't slow about keeping his promises, as some people think he is. In fact, God is patient, because he wants everyone to turn from sin and no one to be lost.
translation_verse: Lǝ bǝtsyuǝ eto nsusu ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto annlɛ bɔkɔse lǝ kɛnyɛ ka utsyǝ ǝsuǝ. Inni nko ini. Bomu ɔlɛ ǝsuǝ butsyǝ ku mi itsyise waanla nkǝ batsylɔsǝ kuutsyuǝ saa. Fɛɛ ola nkǝ utsyuǝ saa tsyi ɔwuninsǝ lǝ ɔyɛ abua buyifo.

english_verse: The day of the Lord's return will surprise us like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a loud noise, and the heat will melt the whole universe. Then the earth and everything on it will be seen for what they are.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ Bonamute eto diyi nǝmǝ ebubǝ fe kase uyu lǝǝbǝ. Diyi nǝmfoo, lǝ ɔkɔɛ kɛnɛnɛnɛ eto bɔbɔ ketsyi kato ǝsuǝ asa nnya nkpe kato ebonya. Nya asa nnya nkpe kato kenke looto ɛtsylɔ nya asa nnya kenke nkpe lǝ kasɔ loonya.

english_verse: Everything will be destroyed. So you should serve and honor God by the way you live.
translation_verse: Se asa nyamfo kenke loobia mmǝǝ, nte betidi ba eto okle ele bǝ bidi? Ele bǝ bisiǝ nkpǝ bo diyifo kɛnkɛ lǝ bifi ǝsuǝ bitǝ Onanto.

english_verse: You should look forward to the day when God judges everyone, and you should try to make it come soon. On that day the heavens will be destroyed by fire, and everything else will melt in the heat.
translation_verse: Nya lǝ kase binsi bǝnlɛ kusu bobe itǝ Onanto eto diyi nǝmǝ bekplatsya lǝ dibǝ mlǝ. Diyi nǝmfoo, kato kenke looto katsylɔ, nya ute loolonsǝ kato eto ǝsuǝale kenke ebiasǝ.

english_verse: But God has promised us a new heaven and a new earth, where justice will rule. We are really looking forward to this!
translation_verse: Fɛɛ boo, buunyǝ bukabe kusu itǝ Onanto eto kɛnyɛ ka úsyǝ. Kato fɔfɔ ku kasɔ fɔfɔ ka luubǝ kaka kasɛyifoyifo sɔ̃ɔ̃ lɔɔkɛ mfó kenke.

english_verse: My friends, while you are waiting, you should make certain the Lord finds you pure, spotless, and living at peace.
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, se bífi mi kusubebe kenke bítǝkǝ lǝ diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ esoo, bekplatsya lǝ biyifo mi ǝsuǝ kɛnkɛ, kabua saa mankɛ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi, lǝ bɛkɛ lɛ diyuǝ ǝsuǝ ku wǝ.

english_verse: Don't forget that the Lord is patient because he wants people to be saved. This is also what our dear friend Paul said when he wrote you with the wisdom God had given him.
translation_verse: Ele bǝ bifi kase Bonamute dífi dibusǝ útǝǝ, fe kusu ko útǝ mi nkǝ lǝ bafo mi lǝ binyǝ bulǝkǝ fe kase bo ɔyimi lala Paulo lɛwɔni útǝ mi ɛyɛ lǝ kobe ko Onanto dítǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Paul talks about these same things in all his letters, but part of what he says is hard to understand. Some ignorant and unsteady people even destroy themselves by twisting what he said. They do the same thing with other Scriptures too.
translation_verse: Nyamfo ni lesa nǝ waatɛyi lǝ wǝ ekue nnya kenke waawɔni katsyese mi lǝ etiki nyamfo ǝsuǝ nɛ. Asa ǝtsyuǝ nnya waawɔni katsyese kpé ale nyaso betidi ba lenyi ku mba lǝnńyǝ kekleke lǝ mǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝǝ, eefi kasɔlǝkǝlǝkǝ ka dimamflɔ kǝtǝ nnya fe kase beeyifo lǝ Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ eto nlebe ntsyuǝ. Nyamfo luutǝ baatsylɔsǝ ǝsuǝ nɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you have been warned ahead of time! So don't let the errors of evil people lead you down the wrong path and make you lose your balance.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ, mɔ balala, bifi biyi nyamfo koko. Nyaso bitǝkǝ ǝnǝ bǝ babuatidi saa embɔwɛ mi bakpe lǝ mǝ abuayifoyifo saa ku mǝ esubuayɛyɛ ǝsuǝ. Manla miǝ lǝ beta bibu lǝ mi bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ!

english_verse: Let the gift of undeserved grace and the understanding that come from our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ help you keep on growing. Praise Jesus now and forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Bomu bisukosǝ lǝ bebe lǝ Onanto eto lefonǝ ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo wǝ ni bo Ofomfokǝtǝ eto bote ǝsuǝ. Wǝ boǝtǝ dibu idu mɔmɔ isu manlo manlo. Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: The Word that gives life was from the beginning, and this is the one our message is about. Our ears have heard, our eyes have seen, and our hands have touched this Word.
translation_verse: Bɔlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi, ko nyɛ lǝ Nkpe eto ditiki nǝ nsi nkpǝ itsyi ta kawunsiǝ eto ketsyikokɔ ke ǝsuǝ. Bɔ́nɔ etiki itsyi lǝ ni ǝsuǝ nya búkǝnyǝ ni ku bo ǝnǝmi tsya. Sitinti ini bǝ búnyǝ ni ku bo ǝnǝmi nya búkǝtidi ni ku bo ani tsya.

english_verse: The one who gives life appeared! We saw it happen, and we are witnesses to what we have seen. Now we are telling you about this eternal life that was with the Father and appeared to us.
translation_verse: Se Onanto dílǝkǝ ditiki nǝ lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ le lekpelee, búnyǝ wǝ nya búdi etiki itsyi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Bóbe letsya lǝ nkpǝ manlo bo nkpe lǝ wǝ, nya onkpe lǝ Anto Onanto ǝmǝ ɔflɔ. Nya Onanto dílǝkǝ wǝ óte bo tsya.

english_verse: We are telling you what we have seen and heard, so you may share in this life with us. And we share in it with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Lesa nǝ búkǝnyǝ nya bɔ́nɔɔ, ni bɔnlɛ letsya bobe kǝtǝ mi nɛ, bǝ lǝ mi tsya lǝ bibǝ bɛkɔ ku bo lǝ lɔniyifoyifo nǝ ǝsuǝ bonkpe ku Anto ǝmǝ ku wǝ ubi Yesu Kristo.

english_verse: We are writing to tell you these things, because this makes us truly happy. God Is Light
translation_verse: Nyaso bɔnlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi, bǝ disuǝyuǝ nǝ bɔnlɛ bunyǝǝ, lǝ lɛflɔ lelo. Onanto Ni Diyǝnde.

english_verse: Jesus told us God is light and doesn't have any darkness in him. Now we are telling you.
translation_verse: Mɔmɔɔ, ditiki nǝ bɔ́nɔ butsyiko lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝmǝ ɔflɔ nya búfi ni bɔnlɛ letsya bobe kǝtǝ mi ni nkǝ Onanto ni diyǝnde, nya ketuntu saa lǝmbǝ lǝ wǝ.

english_verse: If we say we share in life with God and keep on living in the dark, we are lying and are not living by the truth.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ bɔlɛ bɔtɛyi boǝ buyifo bani ku wǝ, fɛ busi bunsi nkpǝ lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ bɔlɛ sidia bɔtɛyi lǝ bo etiki ku lǝ bo eyifosa ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: But if we live in the light, as God does, we share in life with each other. And the blood of his Son Jesus washes all our sins away.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ busi nkpe lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ fe kase unsi lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ ete bǝ busi lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ ku bo bayimitsyuǝ. Nya Yesu Kristo wǝ ni wǝ Ubi eto kɔtɔ ǝflǝ lebua saa lebua lǝ bo ǝsuǝ kúwi.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we are fooling ourselves, and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Lǝ bɔ́tɛyi boǝ lebua saa ǝmbǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ, bɔ́wɛ ǝsuǝ nya bɔnnlɛ ɔnukualɛ bɔtɛyi.

english_verse: But if we confess our sins to God, he can always be trusted to forgive us and take our sins away.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ bulǝkǝ bo abua kasɔ butǝ Onantoo, wɔɔyɛ lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛtsyǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ uyifo lesa nǝ lɛlɛkɛ utǝ bo, wuufi bo abua ɔtsyɛ bo, uflǝ nnya uwui lǝ bo.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar, and his message isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ lǝ bɔni boǝ lebua saa mbǝ bo lǝ ǝsuǝǝ, nyalɛ bútǝkǝ Onanto sidia, nya wǝ ditiki ǝmbǝ lǝ bo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My children, I am writing this so you won't sin. But if you do sin, Jesus Christ always does the right thing, and he will speak to the Father for us.
translation_verse: Mɔ bebi lala, nlɛ nyamfo bɔwɔni katsyese mi bǝ lǝ bienyifo lebua. Fɛɛ lǝ utsyuǝ éyifo lebuaa, bokpé utsyuǝ wǝ lǝǝńyǝ lǝ bo kɛnyɛ kalɛ Onanto lekpakpa kǝtǝ bo. Wǝ ni Yesu Kristo wǝ ni ɔsɛɛ ǝmǝ.

english_verse: Christ is the sacrifice that takes away our sins and the sins of all the world's people.
translation_verse: Nya Kristo kosate ni nwǝ ǝsuǝ Onanto laayɛ kefi bo abua katsyɛ bo. Inni bo mate eto ale ete woefi katsyɛ, bomu kawunsiǝ kenke eto betidi eto ale.

english_verse: When we obey God, we are sure we know him.
translation_verse: Lǝ butsyue Onanto eto afi kotoo, eté bǝ buyi wǝ.

english_verse: But if we claim to know him and don't obey him, we are lying and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ lǝ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Nyi wǝ,” fɛɛ woenyifo lǝ wǝ afi ǝsuǝǝ, utsyuǝ ǝmfo eyifo odia. Nya ɔnukualɛ saa ǝmbǝ lǝ wǝ.

english_verse: We truly love God only when we obey him as we should, and then we know we belong to him.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa ke leetsyue wǝ ditiki koto, wǝ lelabi itǝ Onanto ni nǝ lɛflɔ nɛ. Bitǝ lǝ ntɛyi mi kase boate boǝ buyifo bani ku Onanto nya ni benkǝ,

english_verse: If we say we are his, we must follow the example of Christ. The New Commandment
translation_verse: utsyuǝ saa ke laatɛyi nkǝ uyifo ɔni ku Onanto, ele bǝ usiǝ nkpǝ fe kase Yesu Kristo dísiǝ. Ele Bǝ Siǝ Nkpe Lǝ Diyǝnde Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: My dear friends, I am not writing to give you a new commandment. It is the same one you were first given, and it is the message you heard.
translation_verse: Mɔ balala, nnya minlɛ bɔwɔni katsyese mi enni kɔfi fɔfɔ. Bomu kɔfi koko ko nte taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ke. Kɔfi koko komfo eyifo nko fákanɔ taa kɔ.

english_verse: But it really is a new commandment, and you know its true meaning, just as Christ does. You can see the darkness fading away and the true light already shining.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kɔfi ko minlɛ bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi mfoo, lǝ sitinti kuyifo kɔfɔfɔ itsyise ko ɔnukualɛ yɛ lǝ Kristo ku mi tsya ǝsuǝ. Itsyise ketuntu kamǝ lɛ bofe nya diyǝnde nǝmǝ kosate fe lɛlɛ buyǝnde.

english_verse: If we claim to be in the light and hate someone, we are still in the dark.
translation_verse: Nya utsyuǝ saa ke laatɛyi nkǝ okpé lǝ diyǝnde nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ fɛ weekisi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝǝ, si okpé lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ ibǝ ese mɔmɔ.

english_verse: But if we love others, we are in the light, and we don't cause problems for them.
translation_verse: Nya utsyuǝ saa ke laala wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ, kpé lǝ diyǝnde ǝsuǝ, nya kulesa ǝmbǝ lǝ wǝ nǝ luutǝ bǝ utsyuǝ bamba dufǝ lǝ lebua ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If we hate others, we are living and walking in the dark. We don't know where we are going, because we can't see in the dark.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa wǝ leekisi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝǝ, kpé lǝ ketuntu ǝsuǝ, nya ɔnyɛ lǝ ke kǝmiǝ. Nya unyi kaka ɔntɔ, itsyise ketuntu kamǝ ǝtǝ óba ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because your sins have been forgiven in the name of Christ.
translation_verse: Mɔ bebi lala, nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi lǝ bete biǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, Onanto éfi mi abua ɔtsyɛ mi.

english_verse: Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Antomǝ, mi minlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ nɛ itsyise biyi Kristo wǝ nsi nkpǝ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ǝmǝ. Nya nko ǝmǝ ke minlɛ bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi bakosobi nɛ itsyise bítǝkǝ Obuale ǝmǝ tsya kato.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because you have known the Father. Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you are strong. God's message is firm in your hearts, and you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Nya mi, mɔ bebi lala, nlɛ mi kukue komfo bɔwɔni itsyise biyi Anto ǝmǝ. Mi antomǝ, mi minlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ itsyise biyi Kristo wǝ nsi nkpǝ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ǝmǝ. Nya mi bakosobi, nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ itsyise bekpé ǝsuǝale, nya Onanto eto ditiki nǝmǝ nsi nkpǝ lǝ mi nya bíkǝtǝkǝ Obuale ǝmǝ kato.

english_verse: Don't love the world or anything that belongs to the world. If you love the world, you cannot love the Father.
translation_verse: Biemfi lelabi bitǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo nye kulesa nǝ nkpe lǝ ke, itsyise utsyuǝ saa ke laala kawunsiǝ kamfoo, anla Anto ǝmǝ.

english_verse: Our foolish pride comes from this world, and so do our selfish desires and our desire to have everything we see. None of this comes from the Father.
translation_verse: Lesa saa nǝ ni kawunsiǝ kamfo eto lele ni fe asa bua nnya laalɛ utidi ɔkɔɛ, asa bua nnya betidi lǝǝnyǝ nya nnya akɛ mǝ ɔkɔɛ ku lesa saa nǝ nkpe lǝ kawunsiǝ nǝ ǝsuǝ utidi laabesǝ ǝsuǝ katoo, nyamfo eto kuditsyuǝ mentsyi Anto ǝmǝ flɔ. Bomu nyamblɛ etsyi kawunsiǝ mfo.

english_verse: The world and the desires it causes are disappearing. But if we obey God, we will live forever. The Enemy of Christ
translation_verse: Kawunsiǝ kamfo ku kǝ asa nnya laalɛ utidi ɔkɔɛɛ, ǝbǝ ɛlɛ bofe. Fɛɛ nwǝ leeyifo lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝǝ, ebusiǝ nkpǝ lefe saa. Mimblɛ Kenke Yi Onanto Eto Ditiki Nǝmǝ Kosate.

english_verse: Children, this is the last hour. You heard that the enemy of Christ would appear at this time, and many of Christ's enemies have already appeared. So we know the last hour is here.
translation_verse: Mɔ bebi lala, kawunsiǝ kamfo eto kalosǝkɔ eboyo kalo! Nya fe kase bátɛyi mii, bíɔnɔ biǝ Kristo eto olo ǝmǝ ébubǝ, nya mɔmɔɔ, Kristo eto balo kpǝ ébubɛ bakpe. Nyaso buyi boǝ kawunsiǝ eto kalosǝkɔ ebɔfi.

english_verse: These people came from our own group, yet they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But they left, which proves they did not belong to our group.
translation_verse: Lǝ sitintii, betidi bamfo ǝmbǝ lǝ bo ditsyukpa nǝmfo ǝsuǝ, nyaso bábɔ bo lǝ nti nɛ. Lǝ bo betidi kosate benii, eni besi bakpé lǝ bo nti. Fɛɛ mǝ budu lǝ bo nti lɛ bote nkǝ mǝ nti eto kuutsyuǝ menyifo bo ole.

english_verse: Christ, the Holy One, has blessed you, and now all of you understand.
translation_verse: Fɛ mii, Kristo éfi Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝmǝ ókpé mi lǝ ǝsuǝ, nya mimblɛ kenke nyi ɔnukualɛ eto ditiki nǝmǝ.

english_verse: I did not need to write you about the truth, since you already know it. You also know that liars do not belong to the truth.
translation_verse: Inni lǝ kase binnyi ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ eso minlɛ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmfo bɔwɔni katsyese mi, bomu se binyi ni eso. Nya binyi tsya biǝ sidia saa eni Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: And a liar is anyone who says Jesus isn't truly Christ. Anyone who says this is an enemy of Christ and rejects both the Father and the Son.
translation_verse: Nya owoe ni odia ǝmǝ? Odia ǝmǝ ni nwǝ lɛni nkǝ Yesu eni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝ. Utidi ǝmfo eto okle tututu ni Kristo eto olo nɛ. Nya wǝ ni nwǝ lɛni Onanto ku wǝ Ubi ǝmǝ nɛ.

english_verse: If we reject the Son, we reject the Father. But if we say we accept the Son, we have the Father.
translation_verse: Itsyise nwǝ ke lɛni Ubi ǝmfo áni Anto ǝmǝ tsya. Nwǝ ke léfo Ubi ǝmǝ ɔ́nɔɔ, áfo Anto ǝmǝ tsya.

english_verse: Keep thinking about the message you first heard, and you will always be one in your heart with the Son and with the Father.
translation_verse: Bebe kukɔnɔ biǝ ditiki nǝ béfo idu taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ eyo mɔmɔɔ, edufǝ mi lǝ akɔɛsi kenke. Nya lǝ bɛlɛ nnya kukɔnɔɔ, nyalɛ biusiǝ nkpǝ lǝ Ubi ǝmǝ ku Anto ǝmǝ eto lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ lefe saa.

english_verse: The Son has promised us eternal life.
translation_verse: Nya nkpǝ manlo bomfo ni kɛnyɛ ka Kristo dítsyǝ nkǝ wuufi utǝ bo nɛ.

english_verse: I am writing to warn you about those people who are misleading you.
translation_verse: Nlɛ nyamfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi itsyi lǝ betidi ba loola bǝ baawɛ mi bakpé eso.

english_verse: But Christ has blessed you with the Holy Spirit. Now the Spirit stays in you, and you don't need any teachers. The Spirit is truthful and teaches you everything. So stay one in your heart with Christ, just as the Spirit has taught you to do. Children of God
translation_verse: Fɛ mimii, Kristo eto Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ ókpo lǝ mi ǝsuǝǝ, áfo disiǝ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ kenke. Lǝ nyasoo, yensife bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa lǝ usi ote mi kulesa bio. Itsyise wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ aate mi lesa saa. Nya asa nnya diate eyifo ɔnukualɛ nya sidia saa lǝmbǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Nyaso bitsyue koto lesa nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ léte mi lǝ bisiǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku Kristo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Children, stay one in your hearts with Christ. Then when he returns, we will have confidence and won't have to hide in shame.
translation_verse: Nko ini nɛ, mɔ bebi lala, biyifo lɔni ku Kristo bǝ lǝ lefe nǝ ɔɔbɔ ubǝǝ, biofo bɔbɔ kǝńyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi ku utu wuee kofanimante lǝ Diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: You know Christ always does right and everyone who does right is a child of God.
translation_verse: Lǝ biyi biǝ Kristo eyifo ɔsɛɛ, ele bǝ befo bɛnɔ biǝ utsyuǝ saa wǝ leeyifo asa lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ, eyifo Onanto eto ubi.

english_verse: Think how much the Father loves us. He loves us so much that he lets us be called his children, as we truly are. But since the people of this world did not know who Christ is, they don't know who we are.
translation_verse: Bebe kase sɔ̃ɔ̃ Anto Onanto laala bomba léfo Yesu bɔ́nɔɔ. Nyaso waakpadi bo nkǝ wǝ bebi nɛ. Nya boyifo Onanto eto bebi sitinti. Nnya eso kawunsiǝ eto betidi lenyi bo ni bǝnkǝ, benyi Onanto.

english_verse: My dear friends, we are already God's children, though what we will be hasn't yet been seen. But we do know when Christ returns, we will be like him, because we will see him as he truly is.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi lala, mɔmɔɔ, buyifo Onanto eto bebi. Fɛɛ betidi ba eto okle buubǝ bofiani, Onanto mǝnlǝkǝ óte bo tɔ. Fɛɛ buyi buǝ lefe nǝ Kristo luubǝǝ, buutsyǝ fe wǝ ke seka. Itsyise buunyǝ wǝ fe kase unte sitinti.

english_verse: This hope makes us keep ourselves holy, just as Christ is holy.
translation_verse: Nya utsyuǝ saa ke nkpe kusubebe komfo lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, aalɔ wǝ ǝsuǝ kǝtsyǝsǝ kɛnkɛ fe kase Kristo tsya diyifo kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke leeyifo lebua, aata Onanto eto kɔfi kebu. Itsyise lebua eyifo Onanto eto kɔfi bota kebu.

english_verse: You know Christ came to take away our sins. He isn't sinful,
translation_verse: Nya biyi biǝ bubǝ Kristo díbǝ nkǝ lǝ ulǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ lebuayifoyifo ǝsuǝ. Nya wǝǝ, lebua saa ǝmbǝ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: and people who stay one in their hearts with him won't keep on sinning. If they do keep on sinning, they don't know Christ, and they have never seen him.
translation_verse: Nyaso utsyuǝ saa ke nsi nkpǝ lǝ Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, ǝnsiǝ nkpǝ keyifo lebua. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa ke lǝǝsiǝ nkpǝ keyifo lebua, lǝ bote nkǝ wǝnnyǝ tɔ Kristo, nya taa mɔmɔ kulaa tsya wante wǝ tɔ.

english_verse: Anyone who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil. He has sinned from the beginning, but the Son of God came to destroy all that he has done.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke nsi nkpǝ lǝ lebua ǝsuǝǝ, eyifo Obonsam eto ole. Itsyise Obonsam éyifo lebua taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ kamǝ ke. Nyamfo eso Onanto eto Ubi díbǝ kawunsiǝ nɛ nkǝ lǝ obiasǝ Obonsam eto eyifosa bua nyamǝ.

english_verse: God's children cannot keep on being sinful. His life-giving power lives in them and makes them his children, so they cannot keep on sinning.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke ni Onanto eto ubii, ǝnsiǝ nkpǝ keyifo lebua. Itsyise Onanto eto ditsyǝbi kpé lǝ wǝ. Wǝmbofo busiǝ keyifo lebua se Onanto ni wǝ Anto eso.

english_verse: You can tell God's children from the devil's children, because those who belong to the devil refuse to do right or to love each other. Love Each Other
translation_verse: Letekɛkɛ nǝ nkpe lǝ Onanto eto bebi ku Obonsam eto bebi nti ni bǝ, utsyuǝ saa wǝ ke leenyifo kasɛɛ nye waanla wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝǝ, eni Onanto eto ubi. Bela Bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: From the beginning you were told we must love each other.
translation_verse: Kɛnyɛ ka bɛnɔ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ni bǝnkǝ, ele bǝ bola bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: Don't be like Cain, who belonged to the devil and murdered his own brother. Why did he murder him? He did it because his brother was good, and he was evil.
translation_verse: Yanle bǝ butsyǝ fe Kain, nwǝ didi Obonsam eto ubi, nya ólo wǝ ɔyimisani. Nya beso Kain lelo wǝ? Ólo wǝ itsyise wǝ Kain eto eyifosa mányɛ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ nya wǝ ɔyimisani eto eyifosa áyɛ lǝ kusu sɛɛ ǝsuǝ eso.

english_verse: My friends, don't be surprised if the people of this world hate you.
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bayimi, yenyifo mi naa lǝ kawunsiǝ eto betidi ekisi mi.

english_verse: Our love for each other proves we have gone from death to life. But if you don't love each other, you are still under the power of death.
translation_verse: Buyi boǝ bɔ́bɔ lǝ ukpe kǝmiǝ bubǝ busi lǝ nkpǝ ǝsuǝ. Buyi nko itsyise boala bo bayimitsyuǝ. Utsyuǝ saa wǝ laanla wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ si nkpǝ lǝ ukpe eto ǝsuǝale kǝmiǝ.

english_verse: If you hate each other, you are murderers, and we know murderers do not have eternal life.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke leekisi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ, uyifo uwudifɔ. Nya mi kosate yi biǝ uwudifɔ saa ǝmbǝ nkpǝ manlo lǝ wǝ.

english_verse: We know what love is because Jesus gave his life for us. This is why we must give our lives for each other.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, nya bunyi lesa nǝ ni lelabi nɛ, nya nnya ni bǝ Kristo éfi wǝ nkpǝ útǝ lǝ bo disi. Nyaso ele bǝ bo tsya fi bo nkpǝ butǝ lǝ bo bayimitsyuǝ eto disi.

english_verse: If we have all we need and see one of our own people in need, we must have pity on that person, or else we cannot say we love God.
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ wǝ nkpe kɔnikalende ǝnyǝ nkǝ lesa ahiã wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ fɛ wánwunsǝko wǝ bomu útsyi kama ókpé wǝǝ, ntsyǝ woofo bɔtɛyi nkǝ woala Onanto?

english_verse: Children, you show love for others by truly helping them, and not merely by talking about it.
translation_verse: Mɔ bebi lala, biǝntǝ lǝ bulǝkǝ lelabi bote lǝ kɛnyɛ fufu eto etiki ǝsuǝ ete. Bomu bitǝ lǝ ɛyɛ lǝ bǝtsyuǝ bɔwunsǝko lǝ sitinti ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When we love others, we know we belong to the truth, and we feel at ease in the presence of God.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, boote boǝ buyifo ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ eto bale, nya buunyǝ kǝnyǝkɔ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: But even if we don't feel at ease, God is greater than our feelings, and he knows everything.
translation_verse: Lǝ bo akɔɛsi alo bo dikpi kulaa tsyaa, buyi boǝ Onanto amɔ oso bo akɔɛsi, nya unyi lesa saa.

english_verse: Dear friends, if we feel at ease in the presence of God, we will have the courage to come near him.
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bayimi lala, lǝ bo akɔɛsi manlo bo dikpii, bokpe kǝnyǝkɔ ku nkɛale lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: He will give us whatever we ask, because we obey him and do what pleases him.
translation_verse: Boafo lesa nǝ boatɔ ketsyiko lǝ wǝ ɔflɔ itsyise boetsyue wǝ afi nyamǝ koto nya boeyifo lǝ wǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God wants us to have faith in his Son Jesus Christ and to love each other. This is also what Jesus taught us to do.
translation_verse: Kɔfi ko ókpe bo ni nkǝ bofo wǝ ubi Yesu Kristo bɔnɔ lǝ bola bǝtsyuǝ fe kase Kristo lɛtɔ utsyiko bo ɔflɔ.

english_verse: If we obey God's commandments, we will stay one in our hearts with him, and he will stay one with us. The Spirit he has given us is proof that we are one with him.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke leetsyue Onanto eto kɔfi koto ǝsiǝ nkpǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ ku Onanto, nya Onanto tsya lǝǝsiǝko wǝ. Nya lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ Onanto dífi útǝ bo esoo, buyi boǝ Onanto si ko bo.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't believe everyone who claims to have the Spirit of God. Test them all to find out if they really do come from God. Many false prophets have already gone out into the world,
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi lala, biamfo utsyuǝ saa wǝ laatɛyi nkǝ Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ si lǝ wǝ bɛnɔ. Bomu beto mǝ bebe lǝ bete lǝ lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ etsyi Onanto ɔflɔ. Itsyise bidia, bidia eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi éboba bákpo lǝ kawunsiǝ eto kalebe saa.

english_verse: and you can know which ones come from God. His Spirit says that Jesus Christ had a truly human body.
translation_verse: Nya kase fɔɔyɛ ate lǝ lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ etsyi Onanto ɔflɔ ni bǝ utsyuǝ saa laatɛyi nkǝ Yesu Kristo ǝbǝ kawunsiǝ fe utidinini, kpé Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ ditsyi Onanto ɔflɔ.

english_verse: But when someone doesn't say this about Jesus, you know this person has a spirit that doesn't come from God and is the enemy of Christ. You knew this enemy was coming into the world and now is already here.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa ke dímamfo ɔ́nɔ nkǝ Yesu ǝbǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo fe utidininii, eto lɛwɔnɔ mentsyi Onanto ɔflɔ. Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ nkpe wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ eyifo Kristo eto olo eto lɛwɔnɔ. Bɛnɔ biǝ lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ ebubǝ. Nya mɔmɔɔ, díubǝ lekpé lǝ kawunsiǝ mfo koko.

english_verse: Children, you belong to God, and you have defeated these enemies. God's Spirit is in you and is more powerful than the one who is in the world.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ, mɔ bebi lala, biyifo Onanto eto bale nya bítǝkǝ bidiabidia eto bǝnyɛlǝkǝtidi kato itsyise Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ nǝ nkpe lǝ mii, kpé kɛnyɛale leso mba ni kawunsiǝ mfo eto betidi eto lɛwɔnɔ.

english_verse: These enemies belong to this world, and the world listens to them, because they speak its language.
translation_verse: Se ini kawunsiǝ mfo betsyi esoo, kawunsiǝ mfo eto asa ǝsuǝ ete beedi etiki ketsyiko, nya mba ditsyi kawunsiǝ mfo leetsyue mǝ koto.

english_verse: We belong to God, and everyone who knows God will listen to us. But the people who don't know God won't listen to us. This is how we can tell the Spirit that speaks the truth from the one that tells lies.
translation_verse: Fɛ boo, Onanto eto bale buni. Utsyuǝ saa wǝ nyi Onantoo, eetsyue bo ditiki koto, nya nwǝ ke leni Onanto eto olee, entsyue bo koto. Nyamfo ni kase boǝnyǝ kǝtsyǝ lekpoo, Lɛwɔnɔ nǝ ni ɔnukualɛ eto lele ku nǝ ni bidiabidia eto lele. Nyamfo Lǝǝlǝkǝ Onanto Eto Lelabi Kate Nɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, we must love each other. Love comes from God, and when we love each other, it shows we have been given new life. We are now God's children, and we know him.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimi lala, bitǝ lǝ bola bǝtsyuǝ. Itsyise lelabi etsyi Onanto ɔflɔ. Nya utsyuǝ saa wǝ laala utidii, eyifo Onanto eto ubi, nya unyi Onanto tsya.

english_verse: God is love, and anyone who doesn't love others has never known him.
translation_verse: Nya utsyuǝ saa ke laanla betidii, enyi Onanto. Itsyise Onanto eyifo lelabi.

english_verse: God showed his love for us when he sent his only Son into the world to give us life.
translation_verse: Kusu ko Onanto lɛyɛ úlǝkǝ wǝ lelabi ote bo ni bǝ ótsyese wǝ Ubi lala ɔni ǝmǝ kplo lǝ kawunsiǝ, bǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ bunyǝ nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: Real love isn't our love for God, but his love for us. God sent his Son to be the sacrifice by which our sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Ɛyɛ lǝ nyamfo ǝsuǝǝ, nya bóte lesa nǝ ko ni lelabi nɛ. Inni lǝ kase boala Onanto bomu bǝ waala bo nya ótsyese wǝ Ubi nkǝ lǝ ɛyɛ wǝ ǝsuǝǝ, lǝ ufi bo abua batsyɛ bo.

english_verse: Dear friends, since God loved us this much, we must love each other.
translation_verse: Bayimi lala, lǝ mmǝ ni kase Onanto léla boo, nyalɛ ele bǝ bola bo bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. But if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is truly in our hearts.
