translation_verse: Kuutsyuǝ mǝnyǝ tɔ Onanto unyǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ boala bǝtsyuǝǝ, Onanto eyifo ɔni ku bo, nya ɔflɔsǝ wǝ lelabi lǝ bo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: God has given us his Spirit. This is how we know we are one with him, just as he is one with us.
translation_verse: Buyi sitinti boǝ bokpé lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ nya wuutsya nkpe lǝ bo, itsyise úfi wǝ Lɛwɔnɔ útǝ bo.

english_verse: God sent his Son to be the Savior of the world. We saw his Son and are now telling others about him.
translation_verse: Búnyǝ nya búfi nnya bóbe letsya butǝ bǝtidi bamba boǝ Onanto átsyese wǝ Ubi nkǝ lǝ ubǝ ofiani Ofomfokǝtǝ itǝ kawunsiǝ kenke.

english_verse: God stays one with everyone who openly says Jesus is the Son of God. This is how we stay one with God
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ ǝlǝkǝ ote nkǝ Yesu eyifo Onanto eto Ubii, ete bǝ Onanto kpé wǝ ǝsuǝ nya wuutsya nkpe lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: and are sure God loves us. God is love. If we keep on loving others, we will stay one in our hearts with God, and he will stay one with us.
translation_verse: Nya bunyi nya bófo lelabi nǝ Onanto dífi útǝ bo bɔ́nɔ. Onanto eyifo lelabi, nya nwǝ nsi nkpǝ lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝǝ, si nkpǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ ku Onanto nya Onanto tsya nsi nkpǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ ku bo.

english_verse: If we truly love others and live as Christ did in this world, we won't be worried about the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eso ele bǝ lelabi flɔ lǝ bofo ǝsuǝ, bǝ lǝ bofo buńyǝ kekleke lǝ Lekpoyi Fɛfɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ, itsyise bo nkpǝsiǝsiǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ mfo akateko Kristo eto nle.

english_verse: A real love for others will chase those worries away. The thought of being punished is what makes us afraid. It shows we have not really learned to love.
translation_verse: Sikpitete saa ǝmbǝ lǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ. Bomu lelabi nǝ lɛflɔ aala sikpitete katsyese kama. Nyaso nwǝ laate asa sikpi eto lelabi mamflɔ lelo, itsyise sikpitete ku kotonǝnǝ ayɛnko bǝtsyuǝ.

english_verse: We love because God loved us first.
translation_verse: Boala Onanto itsyise wǝ leka bo bola.

english_verse: But if we say we love God and don't love each other, we are liars. We cannot see God. So how can we love God, if we don't love the people we can see?
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ aatɛyi nkǝ waala Onanto fɛ weekisi wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ, odia uni. Itsyise utsyuǝ saa wǝ laanla wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ wǝ wǝǝnyǝ ku ǝnǝmi, ntsyǝ woofo Onanto wǝ wǝǝnnyǝ ku ǝnǝmi bola?

english_verse: The commandment that God has given us is: “Love God and love each other!”
translation_verse: Kɔfi ko Kristo dítǝ bo ni nkǝ, utsyuǝ saa ke laala Onanto, ele bǝ ola wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ tsya.

english_verse: If we believe Jesus is truly Christ, we are God's children. Everyone who loves the Father will also love his children.
translation_verse: Betidi ba kenke lefo banɔ bǝ Yesu ni Nwǝ Onanto Lékpo Ɔhile Utsyǝǝ, eyifo Onanto eto bebi. Nya utsyuǝ saa ke laala antoo, ala wǝ ubi tsya.

english_verse: If we love and obey God, we know we will love his children.
translation_verse: Nyaso lǝ boala Onanto nya boeyifo lǝ wǝ afi ǝsuǝǝ, eté bo boǝ boala Onanto eto bebi tsya.

english_verse: We show our love for God by obeying his commandments, and they are not hard to follow.
translation_verse: Lǝ buyifo lǝ Onanto eto afi ǝsuǝǝ, ete bǝ boala wǝ. Onanto eto afi ǝsuǝ buyifoo, enni lesa nǝ nso ale bɔkɛ.

english_verse: Every child of God can defeat the world, and our faith is what gives us this victory.
translation_verse: Itsyise utsyuǝ saa wǝ ni Onanto eto ubi, ǝtǝkǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo kato. Nya boafo nyamfo buyifo ɛyɛ lǝ bofokanɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: No one can defeat the world without having faith in Jesus as the Son of God. Who Jesus Is
translation_verse: Nya owoe loofo kawunsiǝ kato butǝkǝ? Nwǝ hã te léfo ɔnɔ́ nkǝ Yesu ni Onanto eto ubi. Adansiɛdidi Lǝ Yesu Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Water and blood came out from the side of Jesus Christ. It wasn't just water, but water and blood. The Spirit tells about this, because the Spirit is truthful.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo ni utidi wǝ díbǝ kawunsiǝ lǝ ntu ku kɔtɔ ǝsuǝ, nya ntu ɛyɛ lǝ ntuflǝsǝflǝsǝ eto lekpa ǝsuǝ ku kɔtɔ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ ukpe ǝsuǝ. Wǝǝmbǝ lǝ ntu mate ǝsuǝ, bomu lǝ ntu ku kɔtɔ ǝsuǝ. Nya Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ kosate lɛ adansiɛ budi kate nkǝ nyamfo eyifo sitinti, itsyise Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ eyifo ɔnukualɛ.

english_verse: They are the Spirit, the water, and the blood, and they all agree.
translation_verse: Mǝ ni Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ, ntu bomǝ ku kɔtɔ komǝ. Nya mǝ itsyǝ bamǝ lɛ adansiɛ ani budi.

english_verse: We believe what people tell us. But we can trust what God says even more, and God is the one who has spoken about his Son.
translation_verse: Bofo utidi eto adansiɛ bɔnɔ, fɛɛ Onanto eto adansiɛ kpé kɛnyɛale kaso, nya wǝ dídi adansiɛ nyamfo itsyi lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: If we have faith in God's Son, we have believed what God has said. But if we don't believe what God has said about his Son, it is the same as calling God a liar.
translation_verse: Nyaso utidi wǝ ke lefo Onanto eto Ubi ɔnɔɔ, waafo asa nnya Onanto lɛtɛyi itsyi lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝsuǝ ɔnɔ. Fɛɛ utidi wǝ ke dímamfo Onanto ɔ́nɔɔ, ǝǝnyǝ Onanto fe odia etsyise wámfo sedansiɛ sia údi lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝsuǝ ɔ́nɔ

english_verse: God has also said he gave us eternal life and this life comes to us from his Son.
translation_verse: Nnya ɔ́tɛyi ni nkǝ, útǝ bo nkpǝ bo lǝmbǝ kalosǝkɔ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ Ubi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And so, if we have God's Son, we have this life. But if we don't have the Son, we don't have this life. Knowing about Eternal Life
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa wǝ léfo Onanto eto Ubi ɔ́nɔ, nkpǝ bomfo éboka mi kɔni nkoko. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa wǝ dímamfo Ubi ǝmǝ ɔ́nɔɔ, embǝ nkpǝ bomfo. Akpe Nkpe Bo Lembolo Kulefe.

english_verse: All of you have faith in the Son of God, and I have written to let you know you have eternal life.
translation_verse: Nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔnɔ kǝtǝ mimba léfo Onanto eto Ubi ǝmǝ bɛnɔ lǝ bete biǝ nkpǝ manlo éboka mi kɔni.

english_verse: We are certain God will hear our prayers when we ask for what pleases him.
translation_verse: Boakpé utu, kefi ǝnǝ kǝtǝkǝ lǝ Onantoo ǝsuǝ boǝ lǝ bɔtɔ wǝ lesaatsyuǝ ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ lelabi ǝsuǝǝ, woanɔ nnya.

english_verse: And if we know God listens when we pray, we are sure our prayers have already been answered.
translation_verse: Waanɔ lefe nǝ ke bɔtɔ wǝ asa, nya se bunyi nko esoo, buyi tsya boǝ wǝǝtǝ bo lesa nǝ bɔtɔ wǝ.

english_verse: Suppose you see one of our people commit a sin that isn't a deadly sin. You can pray, and this person will be given eternal life. But the sin must not be one that is deadly.
translation_verse: Lǝ utsyuǝ ǝnyǝ wǝ ɔyimitsyuǝ ɔnlɛ lebua ditsyue nǝ lǝǝnnǝ ukpe kaboko buyifoo, ele bǝ oto ola utǝ Onanto wǝ luutǝ wǝ nkpǝ. Mba leeyifo lebua nǝ lǝǝnnǝ ukpe kaboko eto etiki ni nyamfo nɛ. Fɛɛ lebua ditsyuǝ kpe nǝ lǝǝnǝ ukpe kaboko. Inni lebua nǝmfo eto okle eto disi minlɛ miǝ bato ola.

english_verse: Everything that is wrong is sin, but not all sins are deadly.
translation_verse: Lesa saa nǝ lanyɛ lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ buyifo eyifo lebua, fɛɛ abua ǝtsyuǝ kpé nya lǝǝnnǝ utidi kakpe lǝ ukpe ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: We are sure God's children do not keep on sinning. God's own Son protects them, and the devil cannot harm them.
translation_verse: Buyi boǝ utsyuǝ saa ke ni Onanto eto ubii, enyifo lebua, itsyise Onanto eto Ubi ǝmǝ aabe wǝ, nya obuale ǝmǝ amfo wǝ kabua saa buyifo.

english_verse: We are certain we come from God and the rest of the world is under the power of the devil.
translation_verse: Buyi boǝ Onanto eto bale buni, fɛɛ kawunsiǝ kenke kpé lǝ obuale ǝmǝ eto ǝsuǝale kalɔ.

english_verse: We know that Jesus Christ the Son of God has come and has shown us the true God. And because of Jesus, we now belong to the true God who gives eternal life.
translation_verse: Buyi boǝ Onanto eto Ubi ǝbǝ, nya útǝ bɔ́nɔ asa kasɔ nya lǝ bote Onanto tinti ǝmǝ. Busi nkpǝ lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ku wǝ ni sitinti ku wǝ Ubi Yesu Kristo. Nwǝmfo ni Onanto tinti ǝmǝ, lǝǝtǝ bo nkpǝ manlo nɛ.

english_verse: Children, you must stay away from idols.
translation_verse: Nyaso, mɔ bebi lala, bilǝkǝ mi ǝsuǝ bitsyiko lǝ bǝfiǝ eto keditǝtǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: From the church leader. To a very special woman and her children. I truly love all of you, and so does everyone else who knows the truth.
translation_verse: Kukue komfo etsyi mi bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa eto uninǝ ɔflɔ kutǝ fǝ usio wǝ Onanto dílǝkǝ útǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ ku wǝ bebi ba maala tinti. Enni mɔ maate laala mi, bomu ku mba tã nyi ɔnukualɛ eto ditiki nǝmǝ laala mi sitinti.

english_verse: We love you because the truth is now in our hearts, and it will be there forever.
translation_verse: Itsyise ɔnukualɛ eto ditiki nǝmǝ eyi bo lǝ ǝsuǝ nya diɔkɛ lǝ bo isu ese manlo.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and Jesus Christ his Son will be kind and merciful to us! May they give us peace and truth and love. Truth and Love
translation_verse: Boanto Onanto ǝmǝ ku Yesu Kristo, Anto eto Ubi ǝmǝ lǝ bǝnǝ bo kafo nya lǝ bǝnyǝ bo kaminsǝ, bǝtǝ bo diyuǝ, bo mba laala bo bǝtsyuǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ. Bitǝkǝko Kristo Eto Asatete Kama.

english_verse: I was very glad to learn that some of your children are obeying the truth, as the Father told us to do.
translation_verse: Iyifo mɛ disuǝyuǝ tinti se mínyǝ miǝ fǝ bebi bǝtsyuǝ si nkpǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ ǝsuǝ fe kase Anto ǝmǝ lɛtɔ utsyiko bo ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Dear friend, I am not writing to tell you and your children to do something you have not done before. I am writing to tell you to love each other, which is the first thing you were told to do.
translation_verse: Mmǝ eso minlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni katsyese mi, Ambe Ububutidi, bǝ bola bǝtsyuǝ. Nyamfo enni kɔfi fɔfɔ minlɛ bɔwɔni kǝtǝ mi, bomu iyifo kɔfi ko bófo itsyi taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ke.

english_verse: Many liars have gone out into the world. These deceitful liars are saying Jesus Christ did not have a truly human body. But they are liars and the enemies of Christ.
translation_verse: Betidi ba laawɛ betidi kpǝ ébɔbɔ batsyilama kawunsiǝ. Mǝ ni betidi ba laatɛyi bǝnkǝ Yesu Kristo mǝmbǝ kawunsiǝ mfo fe utidinini seka. Nwǝ laawɛ betidi ǝmǝ, eyifo Kristo eto olo.

english_verse: So be sure not to lose what we have worked for. If you do, you won't be given your full reward.
translation_verse: Nyaso bebe mi ǝsuǝ kukɔnɔ bǝ nnya bekplatsya bɛnlɛ kusu bobe kǝtǝǝ, manya, bomu bǝ lǝ binyǝ nnya kayofofo ka lɛflɔ.

english_verse: Don't keep changing what you were taught about Christ, or else God will no longer be with you. But if you hold firmly to what you were taught, both the Father and the Son will be with you.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke dímanlɛ Kristo eto asatete nyamǝ lǝ kɔni bomu óté asa bambaa, Onanto ensiko wǝ. Fɛɛ utsyuǝ saa ke lɛlɛ Kristo eto asatete lǝ kɔni, Anto ǝmǝ ku Ubi ǝmǝ tsya si ko wǝ.

english_verse: If people won't agree to this teaching, don't welcome them into your home or even greet them.
translation_verse: Nyamfo esoo, lǝ utsyuǝ ǝbǝ mi ɔflɔ nya ɔnnlɛ asateete nyamfo lǝ kɔnii, biamfo wǝ lǝ mi ayo, nya biǝntǝ wǝ diyuǝ eto edufǝ.

english_verse: Greeting them is the same as taking part in their evil deeds. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Itsyise utsyuǝ saa wǝ loofo wǝ utǝ wǝ diyuǝ eto edufǝǝ, éyifo ani ku wǝ lǝ wǝ asa buayifoyifo ǝsuǝ. Yohanes Ákla Mǝ.

english_verse: I have much more to tell you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink. I want to come and talk to you in person, because this will make us really happy.
translation_verse: Nkpe asa kpe nya ele bǝ ntɛyi mi, fɛɛ manla miǝ lǝ nwɔni nya lǝ kukue ǝsuǝ ntsyese mi. Bomu nlɛ kusu bɔbɛbɛ bǝ lǝ mbǝ mi ɔflɔ lǝ budi etiki ǝnǝmi ku ǝnǝmi butǝ bǝtsyuǝ bǝ lǝ bo disuǝyuǝ nǝmǝ lǝ lɛflɔ.

english_verse: Greetings from the children of your very special sister.
translation_verse: Fǝ ɔyimisio wǝ tsya Onanto dílǝkǝ eto bebi bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ fǝ kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: From the church leader. To my dear friend Gaius. I love you because we follow the truth,
translation_verse: Ɔyɛtsyuǝ lala Gaio, mɔ bafokanɔfɔ eto uninǝ nlɛ kukue komfo bɔwɔni kǝtǝ fǝ. Maala fǝ lǝ sitinti eto ditiki nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: dear friend, and I pray all goes well for you. I hope you are as strong in body, as I know you are in spirit.
translation_verse: Mɔ ɔyɛtsyuǝ lala, nlɛ ola boto miǝ lǝ lesa saa lǝ lɛlɛkɛ ditǝ fǝ nya lǝ akɛ ǝsuǝale. Nyi miǝ ite fe kase fǝńyǝ kekleke lǝ lɛwɔnɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: It makes me very happy when the Lord's followers come by and speak openly of how you obey the truth.
translation_verse: Nnyǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti se bafokanɔfɔ eto bayimitsyuǝ díbǝ bátɛyi mɛ kase fanlɛ ɔnukualɛtiki nǝmǝ kekleke lǝ kɔni fe kase fálɛ ni kɔ seka ke.

english_verse: Nothing brings me greater happiness than to hear that my children are obeying the truth. Working Together
translation_verse: Se mínɔ bǝ mɔ bebi lɛ nkpǝ busiǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛtiki nǝmǝ eto kusu ǝsuǝǝ, nnyǝ disuǝyuǝ tinti. Bafokanɔfɔ Átɛsǝ Gaio.

english_verse: Dear friend, you have always been faithful in helping other followers of the Lord, even the ones you didn't know before.
translation_verse: Mɔ ɔyɛtsyuǝ lala, eyifo nwǝ leeyifo kasɛyifo kǝtǝ fǝ bayimi bafokanɔfɔ tsyuǝ, lǝ bafɔ beni kulaa tsya.

english_verse: They have told the church about your love. They say you were good enough to welcome them and to send them on their mission in a way God's servants deserve.
translation_verse: Bǝbǝ bátɛyi bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa mfo kase fala mǝ. Nyaso nlɛ fǝ lekpakpa lǝ awunsǝko mǝ lǝ bakɛ mǝ asa nnya loofe itǝ mǝ fe kase ińyǝ itǝ Onanto eto keyifo bǝ lǝ besukosǝ mǝ kusu ko banyɛ sɛtɔ.

english_verse: When they left to tell others about the Lord, they decided not to accept help from anyone who wasn't a follower.
translation_verse: Itsyise bǝtsyǝ kasɔ mǝ kusu bɔyɛ kafe lǝ Kristo eto keyifo ǝsuǝ nya bámfo bɔwunsǝko saa betsyiko lǝ mba lenni bafokanɔfɔ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: We must support people like them, so we can take part in what they are doing to spread the truth.
translation_verse: Mmǝ eso ele bǝ bafokanɔfɔ wunsǝko betidi bamfo eto okle. Nyamfo loote bǝ buyifo bani ku mǝ lǝ keyifo kǝtǝ Kristo eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ. Yohanes Edi Etiki Itsyi Lǝ Diotrefo Ku Demetrio Esuǝ.

english_verse: I wrote to the church. But Diotrephes likes to be the number-one leader, and he won't pay any attention to us.
translation_verse: Nwɔni kukuǝ kutsyuǝ ntsyese bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ, fɛɛ Diotrefo wǝ léla nkǝ weedi mǝ ɔtɔnkpe mfó anla nkǝ wetsyue lesa nǝ maatɛyi koto.

english_verse: So if I come, I will remind him of how he has been attacking us with gossip. Not only has he been doing this, but he refuses to welcome any of the Lord's followers who come by. And when other church members want to welcome them, he puts them out of the church.
translation_verse: Lǝ mbǝǝ, muulǝkǝ lesa saa nǝ úyifo nte, asa bua nnya ɔnlɛ bɔtɛyi lǝ bo ǝsuǝ ku bidia bia waatɛyi. Fɛɛ nyamfo mǝnsiǝ tɔ, wǝǝmbofo bayimi ba ni bafokanɔfɔ ku kafo faa lǝ bǝbǝ mfó. Nya weeti mba laala bǝ baafo mǝ kusu nya waala nkǝ waala mǝ ulǝkǝ lǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa nǝmǝ nti.

english_verse: Dear friend, don't imitate the evil deeds of others, but follow the example of people who do kind deeds. They are God's children, but those who are always doing evil have never seen God.
translation_verse: Mɔ ɔyɛtsyuǝ lala, mǝntǝkǝko lebuayifoyifo kama. Bomu tǝkǝko kasɛyifoyifo kama. Utsyuǝ saa wǝ leeyifo kasɛɛ eyifo Onanto eto ole. Fɛɛ nwǝ leeyifo asa buaa, mánte tɔ Onanto.

english_verse: Everyone speaks well of Demetrius, and so does the true message that he teaches. I also speak well of him, and you know what I say is true. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa eedi etiki sɛɛ ketsyiko lǝ Demetrio ǝsuǝ. Nya ɔnukualɛ ǝmǝ kosate eedi etiki sɛɛ ketsyiko lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ. Bo ǝmǝ tsya lɛ adansiɛ budi lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ, nya eyi fǝ lesa nǝ boatɛyi eyifo ɔnukualɛ. Yohanes Ákla Mǝ.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink.
translation_verse: Asa kpǝ kpe ele bǝ ntɛyi fǝ, fɛɛ manla miǝ maawɔni nnya ntsyese fǝ.

english_verse: I hope to see you soon, and then we can talk in person.
translation_verse: Bomu nla miǝ mǝǝbǝ fǝ ɔflɔ lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ nya lǝ budi etiki butǝ bǝtsyuǝ ǝnǝmi ku ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: I pray that God will bless you with peace! Your friends send their greetings. Please give a personal greeting to each of our friends.
translation_verse: Diyuǝ lǝ disiǝnko fǝ. Fǝ bayimitsyuǝ lǝ mfo kenke bǝ bǝǝsiǝsǝ fǝ kukɔnɔ. Mǝǝsiǝsǝ bayimitsyuǝ saa kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: From Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ and the brother of James. To all who are chosen and loved by God the Father and are kept safe by Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Kukue komfo etsyi mɔ, Yuda, wǝ ni Yesu Kristo eto ɔtɔyɛ ku Yakobo eto ɔyimisani ɔflɔ, itǝ mba Onanto lékpadi ba nsi nkpǝ lǝ Anto Onanto eto lelabi ku Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto bobe ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I pray that God will greatly bless you with mercy, peace, and love! False Teachers
translation_verse: Onanto eto kaminsǝnyǝnyǝ, diyuǝ ku lelabi lǝ disiǝko mi kenke, lebé lekpe lǝ mi ǝsuǝ. Bulǝ Ebutu Bidiabidia Eto Bateasa.

english_verse: My dear friends, I really wanted to write you about God's saving power at work in our lives. But instead, I must write and ask you to defend the faith that God has once for all given to his people.
translation_verse: Mɔ bayimitsyuǝ lala, iyifo mɔ lelabi kekleke miǝ eni nwɔni kukue ntǝ mi itsyi lǝ kase Onanto léfo bomblɛ lǝ nkpǝ ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ nsusu bamba esi búbǝ mɛ nkǝ efe bǝ nwɔni kukue komfo ntǝ mi mlǝ lǝ mfi nkpe mi nkɛale bǝ lǝ beta bofokanɔ eto kusu komǝ disi kekleke. Bofokanɔ bo Onanto dífi útǝ wǝ betidi lɔni kplo.

english_verse: Some godless people have sneaked in among us and are saying, “God treats us much better than we deserve, and so it is all right to be immoral.” They even deny we must obey Jesus Christ as our only Master and Lord. But long ago the Scriptures warned that these godless people were doomed.
translation_verse: Itsyise betidi bǝtsyuǝ ba laante Onanto sikpi ábiɔ bédufǝ lǝ mi nti, betidi ba laatsyi Onanto eto lefonǝ nǝmǝ kawunisǝ, bǝ lǝ ekate itǝ mǝ nkpǝ bua bo bensi ǝsuǝ. Betidi bamfo áni bo Okankplɛ ɔni kplo ǝmǝ Yesu Kristo wǝ ni Bonamute. Lefe kpǝ nǝ díbǝ lefe mǝǝ, Awɔnisa Kɛnkɛ átɛyi itsyǝ dikpilolo nǝ bákafo ɛyɛ lǝ mǝ asa buayifoyifo ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Don't forget what happened to those people the Lord rescued from Egypt. Some of them did not have faith, and he later destroyed them.
translation_verse: Ite bǝ biyi nyamfo kenke tsyaa, nsi nla miǝ meedi mi etiki itsyi lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto dílǝkǝ Israelfɔ utsyiko Egipte eto kasɔ ǝsuǝ, nya ɔ́tsylɔsǝ mba dímamfo wǝ bánɔ kenke.

english_verse: You also know about the angels who didn't do their work and left their proper places. God chained them with everlasting chains and is now keeping them in dark pits until the great day of judgment.
translation_verse: Bekloma biǝ Onanto eto batɔnkpe ba dímankɛ lǝ ǝsuǝale nnya bǝtǝ mǝ kalɔɔ, nya báni mǝ nsiǝkɔ bo Onanto dítǝ mǝ, nya ókle mǝ lǝ amana ǝsuǝ óto ókpe lǝ ketuntu kamǝ kǝmiǝ kaka úfi mǝ útsyǝ isu eyo Diyi Kplɛ Fɛfɛ nɛ ǝsuǝ boolo mǝ dikpi.

english_verse: We should also be warned by what happened to the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah and the nearby towns. Their people became immoral and committed all sorts of sexual sins. Then God made an example of them and punished them with eternal fire.
translation_verse: Bekloma Sodom ku Gomora ku kǝmǝ ka letsyilama mfó ǝsuǝ, ba eto betidi díyifo fe batɔnkpe ba dísiǝ nkpe bua seka ku lǝ sɛsɔnɔdi eto nkpesiǝsiǝ ǝsuǝ. Lǝ nnya esoo, Onanto dífi ute manlo ótonsǝ mǝ bǝ lǝ iyifo kotonǝnǝ eto bulǝkǝ kate eto ditsyǝbi.

english_verse: The people I am talking about are behaving just like those dreamers who destroyed their own bodies. They reject all authority and insult angels.
translation_verse: Nkomǝ ke betidi bamǝ mfo lǝǝnyǝ kǝlǝkǝkate bo lǝtǝ beeyifo lebua kǝńyǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ eto sinǝ kula tsya ǝsuǝ. Bǝǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ nya beedi etiki kǝńyǝ lǝ kato eto asa nnya nkpé dibu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Even Michael, the chief angel, didn't dare to insult the devil, when the two of them were arguing about the body of Moses. All Michael said was, “The Lord will punish you!”
translation_verse: Kato eto Ɔtɔnkpe Ninǝ Mikael kula tsya ményifo nko. Lǝ lefe nǝ wǝ ku Obonsam lékpe dinyǝfi lǝ futsyǝ loofo Moses eto ɔkɔ ǝsuǝǝ, Mikael méntsyue Obonsam kɛnyɛ ku aka. Bomu ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute lǝ uyǝnki okpe fǝ!”

english_verse: But these people insult powers they don't know anything about. They are like senseless animals that end up getting destroyed, because they live only by their feelings.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi bamfo eto oklee, lesa nǝ ke eto kasɔ bannɔ koo, baaka nya beekudi katsyese. Nya asa nnya benyi ɛyɛ lǝ kolebe ǝsuǝ fe kase bebuki tsya nyi sekaa, nnya ni lesa nǝ tututu laatsylɔsǝ mǝ nǝ.

english_verse: Now they are in for real trouble. They have followed Cain's example and have made the same mistake that Balaam did by caring only for money. They have also rebelled against God, just as Korah did. Because of all this, they will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Mbɔbuɛ itǝ mǝ! Itsyise kusu ko ǝsuǝ Kain lɛyɛɛ, ko ǝsuǝ ke mǝ tsya lɛyɛ nɛ. Lǝ atabi esoo, mǝ tsya lǝ kǝnǝnsɛ ǝsuǝ áyɛ lǝ kusu bua fe Balam ke, bátaka bǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ nya bátsylɔsɛ mǝ fe Kora seka ke.

english_verse: These people are filthy minded, and by their shameful and selfish actions they spoil the meals you eat together. They are like clouds blown along by the wind, but never bringing any rain. They are like leafless trees, uprooted and dead, and unable to produce fruit.
translation_verse: Lǝ betsya lǝ lɔniyifoyifo ǝsuǝ biǝ biedi Bonamute eto didisaa, mǝ afanisa yifoyifo aabiasǝ mi botsya bomǝ. Baate ǝsuǝ nya beedi kemi lǝ kase ke baala ǝsuǝ. Mǝ ǝsuǝ eto lɛlɛkǝsǝ hã ete baabɛbɛ. Bete fe asɔmiloku nnya laanni ɔsɔmi nya ufiebi laasɔ nnya ketsyi kedunko. Nya beyifo fe eyi nnya laannwɔ lǝ nnya lɛwɔfe, nnya díyifo fe béku ku keyudu bákpo lǝ kasɔ nya nyamblɛ kenke díkpǝ ékoe. Nya bente fe befandebi bia nlɛ botsyilama bia Onanto lɛlɔ kalebe útsyǝ útǝ lǝ ketuntu eto ketuntu ǝsuǝ itǝ lefe manlo.

english_verse: Their shameful deeds show up like foam on wild ocean waves. They are like wandering stars forever doomed to the darkest pits of hell.
translation_verse: Beyifo fe ufiebi wǝ laasɔ lǝ lekpo ǝsuǝ nnya yǝǝtǝ mǝ afanisayifoyifo laakpɔ kabe kato fe lekpo eto efukpɔkpɔ seka.

english_verse: Enoch was the seventh person after Adam, and he was talking about these people when he said: Look! The Lord is coming with thousands and thousands of holy angels
translation_verse: Betidi bamfo ǝsuǝ Henok wǝ ni Adam eto kafo kuansele eto ubilele dídi etiki ɔ́tɛyɛ útsyǝ nkǝ, “Bonamute ku wǝ batɔnkpe kɛnkɛ akpi akpi ebubǝ.

english_verse: to judge everyone. He will punish all those ungodly people for all the evil things they have done. The Lord will surely punish those ungodly sinners for every evil thing they have ever said about him.
translation_verse: Nya ookponko betidi ba kenke lekpo. Ookponko betidi ba leentsyue koto lǝ asa bua nnya kenke béyifo ku lǝ etiki bua nnya betidi ba leentsyue wǝ koto mfo dídi bǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto ǝsuǝ tsya eso.”

english_verse: My dear friends, remember the warning you were given by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mɔ bayimi, bekloma etiki nnya Bonamute Yesu Kristo eto batɔnkpe lɛtɛyi mi lǝ lefe nǝ léfe mmǝ.

english_verse: They told you that near the end of time, selfish and godless people would start making fun of God.
translation_verse: Bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Lǝ eyi fɛfɛ ǝsuǝǝ, betidi ebɔbɔ bǝbǝ bedi etiki bǝkǝmǝ mi nya booyifo lesa saa nǝ baala lǝ Onanto membukabe ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: And now these people are already making you turn against each other. They think only about this life, and they don't have God's Spirit.
translation_verse: Mǝ ni betidi ba laakpe kǝsǝnsǝ lǝ betidi nti, ba ini mǝ ǝsuǝ eto lɛlɛkɛsǝ ete baabɛbɛ, nya Onanto eto Lɛwɔnɔ lǝmbǝ lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Dear friends, keep building on the foundation of your most holy faith, as the Holy Spirit helps you to pray.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mi, mɔ bayimii, bifi mi ǝsuǝ bitǝkǝ lǝ ǝsuǝale muǝmuǝ lǝ mi bofokanɔ kɛnkɛ ǝsuǝ. Beto ola bɛyɛnko lǝ Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ eto ǝsuǝale ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And keep in step with God's love, as you wait for our Lord Jesus Christ to show how kind he is by giving you eternal life.
translation_verse: Bifi mi ǝsuǝ bekpe lǝ Onanto eto lelabi ǝsuǝ lǝ lefe nǝ bɛnlɛ kusu bobe bǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo ebunyǝ mi kaminsǝ utǝ mi nkpǝ manlo.

english_verse: Be helpful to all who may have doubts.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo esoo, binyǝ mba eto bofokanɔ dimǝmuǝ tɔ ale kaminsǝ.

english_verse: Rescue any who need to be saved, as you would rescue someone from a fire. Then with fear in your own hearts, have mercy on everyone who needs it. But hate even the clothes of those who have been made dirty by their filthy deeds. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Bǝtsyuǝ ba nlɛ budufǝ lǝ ute ǝsuǝǝ, binǝ mǝ bilǝkǝ, nya bǝtsyuǝ tsyaa, binyǝ mǝ kaminsǝ, tsya fɛɛ lǝ sikpitete ǝsuǝ. Nya bikisi mǝ ditsyǝbi bua nǝ nte fe ǝsuǝ eto bikǝlɛlɛ bia diyi ku asinsa nnya loofo mi bobiasǝ. Maato Ola Kǝtǝ Onanto Lǝ Mi Disi.

english_verse: Offer praise to God our Savior because of our Lord Jesus Christ! Only God can keep you from falling and make you pure and joyful in his glorious presence. Before time began and now and forever, God is worthy of glory, honor, power, and authority. Amen.
translation_verse: Wǝ ni Onanto ɔni kplo wǝ ni bo Ofomfokǝtǝ ɛyɛ lǝ Bonamute Yesu Kristo ǝsuǝǝ, diyǝnde, sɛkplɛ, lɛmɔ ku ǝsuǝale itǝ wǝ idu lǝ lefe nǝ léfe, ku mɔmɔ isu manlo! Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: This is what God showed to Jesus Christ, so that he could tell his servants what must happen soon. Christ then sent his angel with the message to his servant John.
translation_verse: Kukue komfo eto asa eyifo asa nnya Onanto dítǝ nkǝ Yesu Kristo lǝkǝ ote beyifoyifo lǝ nnya lǝǝbǝ bubǝ lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ. Kristo ǝtǝ Yohanes wǝ ni wǝ uyifoyifo áte nyamfo lǝ lefe nǝ ótsyese Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe wǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: And John told everything he had seen about God's message and about what Jesus Christ had said and done.
translation_verse: Nya Yohanes lɛtɛyi asa nnya kenke únyǝ. Nyǝ nyamfo ni kɛnyɛ ka ditsyi Onanto ɔflɔ ku ɔnukualɛ eto ditiki nǝ Yesu Kristo dílǝkǝ óte.

english_verse: God will bless everyone who reads this prophecy to others, and he will bless everyone who hears and obeys it. The time is almost here.
translation_verse: Disuǝyuǝ itǝ nwǝ lookla kukue komfo, nya disuǝyuǝ itǝ betidi ba tsya lɔɔnɔ Onanto eto katɛyikǝtsyǝ eto etiki nyamfo nya bootsyue asa nnya báwɔni bákpe lǝ kukue komfo koto. Itsyise lefe nǝ ǝsuǝ asa nyamfo luubǝ ebɔfi. Yohanes Ǝsiǝsǝ Bafokanɔfɔ Eto Etsyukpa Akuanse Nya Nkpe Lǝ Asia Eto Lekpake Mfó.

english_verse: From John to the seven churches in Asia. I pray that you will be blessed with kindness and peace from God, who is and was and is coming. May you receive kindness and peace from the seven spirits before the throne of God.
translation_verse: Mɔ Yohanes uni lɛwɔni kukue komfo minlɛ mi bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa akuanse nnya nkpe lǝ Asia eto lekpake nǝmfo botsyese. Lefonǝ ku diyuǝ nǝ ditsyi Onanto wǝ nsi nkpǝ mɔmɔ, wǝ dísiǝ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ, wǝ nsi nlɛ bubǝ, lǝ usiǝko mi lefe nǝ kenke. Nko ke awɔnɔ akuanse nnya ńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto lekankpomɛ eto ǝnǝmi

english_verse: May kindness and peace be yours from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness. Jesus was the first to conquer death, and he is the ruler of all earthly kings. Christ loves us, and by his blood he set us free from our sins.
translation_verse: ku Yesu Kristo wǝ ni ɔnukualɛ odansiɛnyǝ wǝ ni nwǝ Onanto létakasǝ utsyiko ɔkɔmǝ tutɛ nya uni kasɔ mfo eto baka kenke eto oka wǝ ntǝkǝ kato eto lefonǝ ku diyuǝ lǝ disiǝko mi. Waala bo, nya úlǝkǝ bo utsyiko lǝ bo abua ǝsuǝ ku wǝ kɔtɔ.

english_verse: He lets us rule as kings and serve God his Father as priests. To him be glory and power forever and ever! Amen.
translation_verse: Nya útsyǝ sekakedikɔ útǝ bo, úyifo bo besumunyǝ lǝ busumu wǝ Onanto ku Anto ǝmǝ. Yesu Kristo eto ale ni diyǝnde ku ǝsuǝale idu manlo isu manlo. Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: Look! He is coming with the clouds. Everyone will see him, even the ones who stuck a sword through him. All people on earth will weep because of him. Yes, it will happen! Amen.
translation_verse: Bebe! Utǝkǝ lǝ asɔmiloku ǝsuǝ ɔlɛ bubɛ! Utsyuǝ saa ebunyǝ wǝ ku mba léto wǝ afle kenke tsya. Kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke ebuwi kaminsǝku bembe ku binǝntu lǝ wǝ ǝsuǝ! Ibǝ itǝ.

english_verse: The Lord God says, “I am Alpha and Omega, the one who is and was and is coming. I am God All-Powerful!” A Vision of the Risen Lord
translation_verse: Bonamute Onanto, Ǝsuǝalenyǝ Kenke ǝmǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Mɔ ni kasɔ ketsyikokɔ ku kaalosǝkɔ, wǝ nkpe mɔmɔ, wǝ lɛkɛ taa ketsyikokɔ, wǝ nsi nlɛ bubǝ.” Yesu Kpe Ǝsuǝale Lǝ Ukpe Ku Bekpenkpe Ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I am John, a follower together with all of you. We suffer because Jesus is our king, but he gives us the strength to endure. I was sent to Patmos Island, because I had preached God's message and had told about Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɔ Yohanes, mi ɔyimi wǝ dítǝkǝko Yesu ku mi, nya biakpe utu kakplatsya lǝ disuǝtsyǝ ǝsuǝ kǝnyǝ kanyi ka leetu mba ni wǝ sekakedikɔ kamǝ eto bale. Béti mɛ bakpe lǝ kasɔ ka ntu letsyilama baakpo Patmos itsyise mbe Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya ku ɔnukualɛ wǝ Yesu dílǝkǝ óte eso.

english_verse: On the Lord's day the Spirit took control of me, and behind me I heard a loud voice that sounded like a trumpet.
translation_verse: Lǝ Bonamute eto diyi nǝmǝ ǝsuǝǝ, Lɛwɔnɔ Kɛnkɛ áyifǝ dísiǝ lǝ mɛ, ete mínnɔ ɔkɔɛ wǝ léle bembembe fe kakpatsyaku eto kakle lǝ mɔ kama eti.

english_verse: The voice said, “Write in a book what you see. Then send it to the seven churches in Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, and Laodicea.”
translation_verse: Ɔkɔɛ ǝmǝ átɛyi nkǝ, “Wɔni lesa nǝ fǝnyǝ ǝtsyǝ nya lǝ efi kukue komfo atsyese bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa nnya nkpe lǝ kǝmǝnkplɛ ekuanse kamfo. Ke ni Efeso, Smirna, Pergamo, Tiatira, Sardis, Filadelfia, ku Laodikea.”

english_verse: When I turned to see who was speaking to me, I saw seven gold lampstands.
translation_verse: Nya lefe nǝ míntsyi míwunisǝmiǝ lǝ mbe futsyǝ nlɛ mɛ etiki budinkoo, nnyǝ sika sia eto kakandiɛyi ekuanse.

english_verse: There with the lampstands was someone who seemed to be the Son of Man. He was wearing a robe that reached down to his feet, and a gold cloth was wrapped around his chest.
translation_verse: Nnyǝ lǝ ke nti lesa nǝ lele utidi eto ditsyǝbi nǝ nkpe awukɛntsyɛ nnya dikulǝ ekpo wǝ lǝ nkpato nya seka eto abɔsu nkle wǝ lǝ lɛkɔɛsi.

english_verse: His head and his hair were white as wool or snow, and his eyes looked like flames of fire.
translation_verse: Wǝ disi eto sewɔni eflubi futututu fe osamu eto sele nye olokotuku nya wǝ ǝnǝmi nlɛ buyǝnde fe ute wǝ nlɛ buńyǝ.

english_verse: His feet were glowing like bronze being heated in a furnace, and his voice sounded like the roar of a waterfall.
translation_verse: Wǝ nkpato lɛ buyǝnde fe ayiwa nnya bǝlǝkǝ lǝ ute bási lele nya wǝ ɔkɔɛ eto nnya nlɛ bɔbɔ lele ketu eto ntu bo ditsyi koba kato bɔnlɛ boto lǝ ditumbu kasɔ eto kudu.

english_verse: He held seven stars in his right hand, and a sharp double-edged sword was coming from his mouth. His face was shining as bright as the sun at noon.
translation_verse: Utidi ǝmǝ ákɔbe befandebi bekuanse ɔlɛ lǝ wǝ kodiani. Nya lesiabi nyɛ nnuǝ yayaya lɛbɔ dítsyi lǝ wǝ kɛnyɛ. Nya wǝ ǝnǝmi kenke nlɛ buyǝnde fe nkɔminti eto kofe.

english_verse: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead person. But he put his right hand on me and said: Don't be afraid! I am the first, the last,
translation_verse: Se mínyǝ wǝǝ, ndu nnɔ lǝ wǝ akɔ fe utidi wǝ díkpe. Úfi wǝ kodiani útǝkǝ mɛ lǝ ǝsuǝ nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Mante sikpi! Mɔ ni Ututɛ ku Ɔfɛfɛ.

english_verse: and the living one. I died, but now I am alive forever, and I have the keys to death and the world of the dead.
translation_verse: Mɔ ni nwǝ nsi nkpe nɛ! Ńkpe, fɛ mɔmɔɔ, nsi nkpe idu isu manlo manlo. Nkpe ǝsuǝale lǝ ukpe ku bekpenkpe eto kawunsiǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Write what you have seen and what is and what will happen after these things.
translation_verse: Nyaso wɔni asa nnya fǝnyǝ, asa nnya nkpe mɔmɔ ku nnya luubǝ kama tsya ǝtsyǝ.

english_verse: I will explain the mystery of the seven stars you saw at my right side and the seven gold lampstands. The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the lampstands are the seven churches.
translation_verse: Akulasa nnya nkpe lǝ befandebi akuanse nnya fǝnyǝ lǝ mɔ kodiani ku sika sia eto kakandiɛ eto keyi ekuanse kamǝ ni bǝnkǝ befandebi bekuanse biamǝ ni Onanto batɔnkpe itǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa akuanse nyamǝ. Nya iyi ekuanse nyamǝ ni etsyukpa akuanse nyamǝ.”

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Ephesus: I am the one who holds the seven stars in my right hand, and I walk among the seven gold lampstands. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Mfo nya ɔ́tɛyi mɔ Yohanes nkǝ, “Wɔni etiki nyamfo atsyese Efeso eto bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa eto Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe fǝnkǝ, Mɔ, Yesu, nwǝ nlɛ befandebi bekuanse lǝ kodiani, nya ɔnlɛ bɔyɛ lǝ sika sia eto kakandiɛ eto keyifo ekuanse nti eto etiki ni nnya nlɛ bubǝ mfo nɛ.

english_verse: I know everything you have done, including your hard work and how you have endured. I know you won't put up with anyone who is evil. When some people pretended to be apostles, you tested them and found out they were liars.
translation_verse: Nnyi keyifo ka fékeyifo, nyi kase fákplatsya ku kase fákpe dibusǝ ku kase fákpe nkɛale fǝnyǝ kanyi. Nnyi miǝ aanla babuyifo tidi eto asa. Áto mba laakpo mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ batɔnkpe abe, fɛɛ benni, nya fǝnyǝ fǝ beyifo badiantidi.

english_verse: You have endured and gone through hard times because of me, yet you have not given up.
translation_verse: Nyi miǝ akpe dibusǝ nya fǝnyǝ kanyi lǝ mɔ disi nya ani mánlo fǝ.

english_verse: But I do have something against you! And it is this: You don't have as much love as you used to.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ kabua ka minyǝ lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ ni bǝnkǝ, ensi anla mɛ mɔmɔ fe kase fákala mɛ kɔ.

english_verse: Think about where you have fallen from, and then turn back and do as you did at first. If you don't turn back, I will come and take away your lampstand.
translation_verse: Nyaso kloma kaka fǝtǝkǝ fɛ fáfankli fetsyi ǝsuǝ. Tsyi awuninsǝ lǝ ǝtsyǝ fe kase fǝtsyǝ kɔ. Nya lǝ tsyi awunisǝ lǝ fǝ abua ǝsuǝ, lǝ inni nko muubǝ ntsyi fǝ okandiɛ eto uyi ǝmǝ lǝ wǝ kǝnyǝkɔ

english_verse: But there is one thing you are doing right. You hate what the Nicolaitans are doing, and so do I.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nnya ni fǝ afele ni bǝnkǝ, leekisi asa nnya Nikolatia eto betidi leeyifo fe kase mintsya leekisi nya.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. I will let everyone who wins the victory eat from the life-giving tree in God's wonderful garden. The Letter to Smyrna
translation_verse: Lǝ akpe atoo, nyalɛ tsyue ato lǝ anɔ lesa nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ nlɛ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa nyamǝ bɔtɛyi. Mba ditǝkǝ kato, muutǝ mǝ kuyi ko lǝǝtǝ nkpǝ ko ńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto ɔkpɔ kafo eto eyibibi ǝtsyuǝ miǝ bedi.” Kukue Ko Ɔ́wɔni Útǝ Smirna Eto Bafokanɔfɔ Eto Ditsyukpa.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Smyrna: I am the first and the last. I died, but now I am alive! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mɛ nkǝ, “Wɔni kukue komfo atsyese Smirnafɔ eto bafokanɔfɔ eto Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe fǝ, Mɔ, Yesu, wǝ ni ututɛ ku ɔfɛfɛfɛ, wǝ díkpe fɛ usi ótaka útsyi ɔkɔmǝ úbǝ nkpǝ, nlɛ nyamfo bɔtɛyi minkǝ,

english_verse: I know how much you suffer and how poor you are, but you are rich. I also know the cruel things being said about you by people who claim to be God's people. But they are not really God's people. They are a group that belongs to Satan.
translation_verse: Nnyi kanyi ka bɛnlɛ bunyǝ ko ohiã wǝ bɛnlɛ bunyǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ sitinti, biyifo batabinyǝ. Nnyi asa bua nnya mba bǝ mǝ ni Yudafɔ fɛ benni Yudafɔɔ, laatɛyi kefi kabiasǝ mi. Bomu beyifo mba nkpe lǝ Obonsam eto ditsyukpa nti.

english_verse: Don't worry about what you will suffer. The devil will throw some of you into jail, and you will be tested and made to suffer for ten days. But if you are faithful until you die, I will reward you with a glorious life.
translation_verse: Biante kanyi saa ka biǝbǝ bunyǝ sikpi. Bitsyue ato lǝ bǝnɔ. Obonsam eboto mi bǝtsyuǝ obe, utǝ bǝ beti mi bǝtsyuǝ bakpe lǝ aba eto diyo, biunyǝ kanyi itǝ eyi lefosi. Bidi ɔnukualɛ bitǝ mɛ lǝ ibǝ bǝ balo mi kulaa tsya, nya muutǝ mi nkpǝ manlo eto lekankpakpa fe mba dítǝkǝ kato.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. Whoever wins the victory will not be hurt by the second death. The Letter to Pergamum
translation_verse: Lǝ bekpe atoo, nyalɛ bɛnɔ lesa nǝ Lǝwɔnɔ nǝmǝ nlɛ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa nyamǝ bɔtɛyi! Mba luutǝkǝ lebua kato, embudufǝ lǝ ukpǝ nuǝfǝ manlo manlo ǝsuǝ.” Kukue Ko Ɔ́wɔni Útǝ Pergamo Eto Bafokanɔfɔ Eto Ditsyukpa.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Pergamum: I am the one who has the sharp double-edged sword! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Nya ɔ́tɛyi mɛ nkǝ, “Wɔni kukue ǝtǝ Pergamo eto bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa eto Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe nkǝ, Mɔ, Yesu, wǝ nkpe lesiabi nyɛ nnuǝ yayaya eto etiki ni nkǝ,

english_verse: I know you live where Satan has his throne. But you have kept true to my name. Right there where Satan lives, my faithful witness Antipas was taken from you and put to death. Even then you did not give up your faith in me.
translation_verse: Nnyi kaka binsi, kaka Obonsam dítsyǝ wǝ sekakedikɔ. Befo mɛ bɛnɔ kekleke. Nya bianyani mi bofokanɔ lǝ mɛ lǝ lefe nǝ bálo Antipa kulaa tsya, wǝ didi mɔ etiki lǝ ɔnukualɛ eto kusu ǝsuǝ lǝ kaka Obonsam nsi.

english_verse: I do have a few things against you. Some of you are following the teaching of Balaam. Long ago he told Balak to teach the people of Israel to eat food that had been offered to idols and to be immoral.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nkpe etiki sɛkɛ lǝ mi ǝsuǝ. Bekpé betidi bǝtsyuǝ lǝ mi nti ba ntekeko Balam eto asatete. Utidi ǝmfo ni nwǝ léte Balak kase ɔɔwɛ Israel bebi okpe lǝ lebua ǝsuǝ, nya ɔ́wɛ mǝ ókpe bédi lesa nǝ béfi bǝtǝ bǝfiǝ kedi, nya bédi sɛsɔnɔ.

english_verse: Now some of you are following the teaching of the Nicolaitans.
translation_verse: Nko kee, mi bǝtsyuǝ tsya ntǝkǝko Nikolatiafɔ eto asatete kama.

english_verse: Turn back! If you don't, I will come quickly and fight against these people. And my words will cut like a sword.
translation_verse: Bisinkli lǝ mi abua kama! Lenni nkoo, yǝmbɔklɛ muubǝ mi ɔflɔ nya muufi lesiabi nǝ nkpe mɛ lǝ kɛnyɛ nkpɔnko betidi bamfó lema.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. To everyone who wins the victory, I will give some of the hidden food. I will also give each one a white stone with a new name written on it. No one will know that name except the one who is given the stone. The Letter to Thyatira
translation_verse: Lǝ bekpe atoo, nyalɛ bɛnɔ lesa nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ nlɛ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa nyamǝ bɔtɛyi. Mba ditǝkǝ katoo, muutǝ mǝ manna eto didisa kulakula nǝmǝ ditsyuǝ. Muutǝ mǝ utsyuǝ saa tsya lebaflubia nǝ ǝsuǝ báwɔni diye fɔfɔ nǝ kuutsyuǝ saa lenyi bǝtǝkǝ enso nwǝ hã léfo ni.” Kukue Ko Ɔ́wɔni Útǝ Tiatira Eto Bafokanɔfɔ Eto Ditsyukpa.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Thyatira: I am the Son of God! My eyes are like flames of fire, and my feet are like bronze. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Wɔni kukue komfo atsyese Tiatira eto bafokanɔfɔ eto Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe fǝnkǝ, Kɛnyɛ kamfo etsyi Onanto eto Ubi wǝ eto ǝnǝmi nlɛ bunyǝ fe ute seka, nya wǝ akpa nlɛ buyǝnde fe ayiwa nnya bási ele kɛnkɛ.

english_verse: I know everything about you, including your love, your faith, your service, and how you have endured. I know you are doing more now than you have ever done before.
translation_verse: Nyi keyifo ka feyifo. Nyi kase fala mɛ, fǝ bofokanɔ lǝ mɛ ku fǝ kesumu lǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ ǝsuǝ ku dibusǝ nǝ nkpe fǝ, nyi miǝ alɛ bokplatsya mɔmɔ kaso kɔ.

english_verse: But I still have something against you because of that woman Jezebel. She calls herself a prophet, and you let her teach and mislead my servants to do immoral things and to eat food offered to idols.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ nnya minyǝ lǝmbǝ kɔnɔ lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ ni bǝnkǝ bítǝ usio wǝ baakpo Isabel, wǝ nkǝ uyifo Onanto eto unyɛlǝkǝtidi kusu ɔnlɛ asa bote mɔ beyifoyifo, kanyansǝ mǝ kusu kedi asɔnɔ, nya beedi edisa nnya béfi bǝtǝ bǝfiǝ kedi.

english_verse: I gave her a chance to turn from her sins, but she did not want to stop doing these immoral things.
translation_verse: Ntǝ wǝ lefe miǝ ɔtsyi ɔwuninsǝ lǝ ɔyɛ abua buyifo, fɛɛ ɔ́ni nkǝ wǝmbɔyɛ wǝ sɛsɔnɔdi.

english_verse: I am going to strike down Jezebel. Everyone who does these immoral things with her will also be punished, if they don't stop.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya esoo, muutǝ unyǝ kanyi lǝ wǝ belabeke biamǝ ǝsuǝ nya mba laakpo wǝ ebunyǝ kanyi sitinti. Muuyifo nyamfo nko lǝ bantsyi bawuninsǝ bayɛ asa bua nyamfo buyifo ku wǝ.

english_verse: I will even kill her followers. Then all the churches will see that I know everyone's thoughts and feelings. I will treat each of you as you deserve.
translation_verse: Moolo mba ntǝkǝko wǝ tsya lǝ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa kenke tsya lǝ bate bǝ nyifo nwǝ nyi utsyuǝ saa eto nsusu kǝmiǝ ku wǝ alasa. Moofo utsyuǝ saa kayo ɛyɛ lǝ wǝ eyifosa eto kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: Some of you in Thyatira don't follow Jezebel's teaching. You don't know anything about what her followers call the “deep secrets of Satan.” So I won't burden you down with any other commands.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ mi Tiatirafɔ fɛfɛ ba dímamfo wǝ asatete bua nyamǝ, mimba dímankase wǝ asatete nnya baakpo bǝ Obonsam eto asakulakula nnya eto kǝmiǝ letsyo, bɛnɔ, mensimbutsyisǝ mi bitsyike bamba saa.

english_verse: But until I come, you must hold firmly to the teaching you have.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ isu ese lefe nǝ muubǝ, bɛkɔbe lesa nǝ bɛnlɛ kɔni kekleke bɛlɛ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches.
translation_verse: Lǝ bekpe atoo, nyalɛ bitsyue koto lesa nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ nlɛ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa nyamǝ bɔtɛyi.”

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Sardis: I have the seven spirits of God and the seven stars. Listen to what I say. I know what you are doing. Everyone may think you are alive, but you are dead.
translation_verse: “Wɔni etiki nyamfo atsyese Sardisfɔ eto bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa eto Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe fǝnkǝ, Mɔ nwǝ nlɛ Onanto eto awɔnɔ akuanse ku befandebi bekuanse lǝ kɔni nlɛ bɔtɛyi nɛ. Nyi keyifo ka fanlɛ buyifo, nyi miǝ afo diye bǝ esi nkpǝ, fɛɛ ebukpǝ fɛ fanyɛ!

english_verse: Wake up! You have only a little strength left, and it is almost gone. So try to become stronger. I have found that you are not completely obeying God.
translation_verse: Nyaso taka lǝ akpe ǝsuǝ nkɛale fɛ lǝ ekpe alo kenke. Itsyise nyǝ ntsyǝ lekpo miǝ nnya fékeyifo mamflɔ tɔ elo lǝ mɔ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Remember the teaching you were given and heard. Hold firmly to it and turn from your sins. If you don't wake up, I will come when you least expect it, just as a thief does.
translation_verse: Nyaso kloma lesa nǝ báte fǝ ku lesa nǝ fánɔ, tsyue nnya koto lǝ etsyi fǝ nkpǝ awunisǝ ǝlǝkǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ lǝ abua ǝsuǝ. Fɛɛ lǝ ǝmansankli atsyi awuninsǝǝ, muubǝ fǝ ɔflɔ fe uyu seka, nya fǝmbote lefe nǝ muubǝ.

english_verse: A few of you in Sardis have not dirtied your clothes with sin. You will walk with me in white clothes, because you are worthy.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ betidi esiani lǝ mi nti lǝ Sardis ebu ba dímanansǝ tɔ mǝ awu. Bookpe awu flubia bǝtǝkǝko mɛ, itsyise mǝ dińyǝ itǝ bǝ beyifo mɔ bale.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will wear white clothes. Their names will not be erased from the book of life, and I will tell my Father and his angels that they are my followers.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke luutǝkǝ lebua kato, okpe awu flubia fe mǝ kee, membulǝkǝ wǝ aye lǝ mba nsi nkpǝ eto kukue komǝ kafo. Muudi wǝ adansiɛ lǝ mɔ Anto ku Onanto eto batɔnkpe kenke eto ǝnǝmi miǝ uyifo mɔ bale.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. The Letter to Philadelphia
translation_verse: Lǝ bekpe atoo, nyalɛ bitsyue koto lesa nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nlɛ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa nyamǝ bɔtɛyi.” Kukue Ko Ɔ́wɔni Útǝ Filadelfia Eto Bafokanɔfɔ Eto Ditsyukpa.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Philadelphia: I am the one who is holy and true, and I have the keys that belonged to David. When I open a door, no one can close it. And when I close a door, no one can open it. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, ɔ́tɛyi mɛ nkǝ, “Wɔni nyamfo atsyese Filadelfia eto bafokanɔfɔ eto ditsyukpa eto Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe fǝnkǝ, Nwǝmfo eyifo ɔkɛnkɛnyǝ nya wǝ ditiki eyifo ɔnukualɛ. Wǝ nlɛ Oka David eto ǝsuǝale eto safui sia lǝ ɔsini siku sitsyuǝǝ, kuutsyuǝ saa ǝmbǝ wǝ loofo se buti. Nya lǝ uti see, kuutsyuǝ saa embofo se bɔsini.

english_verse: I know everything you have done. And I have placed before you an open door no one can close. You were not very strong, but you obeyed my message and did not deny you are my followers.
translation_verse: Nyi keyifo ka feeyifo. Nyi miǝ akpé ǝsuǝale sɛkɛ tsya, áfo mɔ asatete nya fámani mɛ. Nsini kusu ntsyǝ fǝ sɛtɔ ko kuutsyuǝ saa lǝmbofo buti.

english_verse: Now you will see what I will do with those people who belong to Satan's group. They claim to be God's people, but they are liars. I will make them come and kneel down at your feet. Then they will know that I love you.
translation_verse: Lɔ abe! Betidi bǝtsyuǝ kpe ba nkpe lǝ Obonsam eto ditsyukpa ǝsuǝ nya baakpo mǝ ǝsuǝ bǝ Yudafɔ, fɛɛ benni Yudafɔ, badia beni. Muuyifo mǝ bǝbǝ base akonki lǝ fǝ akɔ. Muutǝ mǝmblɛ te bǝ maala fǝ.

english_verse: You obeyed my message and endured. So I will protect you from the time of testing everyone in all the world must go through.
translation_verse: Nya se bitsyue mɔ etiki koto, nya bíńyǝ kekleke bínyǝ kanyi saa eto okloe esoo, muulǝkǝ mi ntsyiko lǝ kanyinyǝnyǝ eto bulǝ kekleke eto lefe nǝ lǝǝbǝ bubǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ kamfo ǝsuǝ ka buufi bato kasɔ mfo eto betidi kenke babe.

english_verse: I am coming soon. So hold firmly to what you have, and no one will take away the crown you will be given as your reward.
translation_verse: Nlɛ bubǝ lǝ lefe kliminti ǝsuǝ. Bɛkɔbe lesa nǝ bɛnlɛ lǝ kɔni bɛlɛ kekleke bǝ kuutsyuǝ saa embɔlɛ lesa nǝ ni mi kayofofo ofo.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will be made into a pillar in the temple of my God, and they will stay there forever. I will write on each of them the name of my God and the name of his city. It is the new Jerusalem my God will send down from heaven. I will also write on them my own new name.
translation_verse: Muuyifo nwǝ luutǝkǝ kato, oseke lǝ mɔ Onanto eto Disumuyo eto diyo. Uńyǝ mfó lefe nǝ kenke nya bembudi wǝ bewui kulefe. Mɔɔwɔni mɔ Onanto eto diye ku mɔ Onanto eto umǝnkplɛ, Yerusalem fɔfɔ, wǝ lɔɔbɔ utsyi mɔ Onanto ɔflɔ kato ubǝ kasɔ ntǝkǝ lǝ wǝ. Mɔɔwɔni mɔ diye fɔfɔ tsya ntǝkǝ lǝ wǝ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. The Letter to Laodicea
translation_verse: Lǝ bekpe atoo, nyalɛ bɛnɔ lesa nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nlɛ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa bɔtɛyi.” Kukue Ko Ɔ́wɔni Útǝ Laodikea Eto Bafokanɔfɔ Eto Etsyukpa.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Laodicea: I am the one called Amen! I am the faithful and true witness and the source of God's creation. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Nya usi ɔ́tɛyi mɛ nkǝ, “Wɔni ǝtǝ Laodikea eto bafokanɔfɔ eto Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe fǝnkǝ, Nwǝ ni ibǝ itǝ wǝ ni nwǝ leeyifo asa lǝ kusu ǝsuǝ ku nwǝ laatɛyi Onanto eto ɔnukualɛɛ, wǝ ǝsuǝ ɛyɛ Onanto díyifo asa nnya kenkee, eto etiki ni bǝ,

english_verse: I know everything you have done, and you are not cold or hot. I wish you were either one or the other.
translation_verse: Nyi keyifo ka féyifo nya minyi miǝ ǝmǝnyuǝ nya famamfo ute tsya. Fɛɛ eni nla miǝ yuǝ nye fo ute.

english_verse: But since you are lukewarm and neither cold nor hot, I will spit you out of my mouth.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ se feyifo lentilenti, fǝmǝnyuǝ nye famamfo ute esoo, muutufǝ fǝ nwui lǝ mɔ kɛnyɛ.

english_verse: You claim to be rich and successful and to have everything you need. But you don't know how bad off you really are. You are pitiful, poor, blind, and naked.
translation_verse: Aatɛyi fǝ, ‘Otabinyǝ mini, bike kpé mɛ nya kulesa manhiã mɛ.’ Fɛɛ enyi fǝ uminsǝtidi ku ohiãfɔ, utidi wǝ dimamflɔ, unǝmba ku nwǝ nyɛ leyaleya feni.

english_verse: Buy your gold from me. It has been refined in a fire, and it will make you rich. Buy white clothes from me. Wear them and you can cover up your shameful nakedness. Buy medicine for your eyes, so you will be able to see.
translation_verse: Nyaso nlɛ fǝ kɔlɛ bɔlɛ minkǝ ya sika sia lɛlɛkɛ, sia báyinklisǝ lǝ ute etsyiko mɔ ɔflɔ bǝ lǝ afiani otabinyǝ, ya kafia flubia lǝ eti bǝ lǝ ayɛ leya bɔyɛ kakpe fǝ ǝsuǝ kofani. Ya ǝnǝmi eto afa akpo lǝ ǝnǝmi lǝ ǝnyǝ asa kukɔnɔ.

english_verse: I correct and punish everyone I love. So make up your minds to turn away from your sins.
translation_verse: Betidi ba maalaa, mǝ mǝǝyǝnki kakpe kǝnǝ koto nɛ. Nyaso fo ute lǝ akɔse atsyi lɛkɔɛsi awunisǝ lǝ fǝ abua ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Listen! I am standing and knocking at your door. If you hear my voice and open the door, I will come in and we will eat together.
translation_verse: Nɔɔ! Nńyǝ lǝ kesie nlɛ siku bɔsɔ. Lǝ utsyuǝ anɔ mɔ ɔkɔɛ nya ɔsini mɛ sikuu, muudufǝ wǝ diyo nya bonko wǝ lookpe kɔni lǝ ɔkpɛ ɔni budi lesa.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will sit with me on my throne, just as I won the victory and sat with my Father on his throne.
translation_verse: Utsyuǝ saa ke lɛkpɔ utǝkǝ lebua kato, muutǝ kusu usiǝ lǝ mɔ ɔflɔ lǝ kaka minsi lǝ mɔ lekankpomɛ ǝsuǝ, fe kase míntǝkǝ kato nya minsi lǝ mɔ Anto eto lekankpomɛ ɔflɔ seka.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches.
translation_verse: Lǝ bekpe ato, nyalɛ bɛnɔ lesa nǝ Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ nlɛ bafokanɔfɔ eto etsyukpa nyamǝ bɔtɛyi.”

english_verse: After this, I looked and saw a door that opened into heaven. Then the voice that had spoken to me at first and that sounded like a trumpet said, “Come up here! I will show you what must happen next.”
translation_verse: Lǝ lefe nǝmfóo, nsi nyǝ bulǝkǝkate butsyuǝ nya mínyǝ siku sia básini bǝtsyǝ leya lǝ Onanto eto. Nya mfó mínɔ ɔkɔɛ utsyuǝ wǝ nlɛ bole fe kakpatsyaku nsi nlɛ bufǝ katɛyi mɛ nkǝ, “Bǝ kato mfo, lǝ nlǝkǝ nnya lǝǝbǝ bubǝ kama nte fǝ.”

english_verse: Right then the Spirit took control of me, and there in heaven I saw a throne and someone sitting on it.
translation_verse: Lamfolamfo, Lɛwɔnɔ nǝmǝ áyifǝ dísiǝ lǝ mɛ nya mínyǝ lekankpomɛ ditsyuǝ kato mfó nǝ ǝsuǝ utsyǝ nsi.

english_verse: The one who was sitting there sparkled like precious stones of jasper and carnelian. A rainbow that looked like an emerald surrounded the throne.
translation_verse: Nwǝ nsi lǝ lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ lǝ buyǝnde fe yaspa ku sardis eto aba nnya lefo koya nya kɔlɛsensǝ ko nlɛ buyǝnde fe emeralda eto leba seka létsyilama lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ.

english_verse: Twenty-four other thrones were in a circle around that throne. And on each of these thrones there was an elder dressed in white clothes and wearing a gold crown.
translation_verse: Bétsyue akankpomɛ awosi ǝnuǝ ana tsya nya létsyilama lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ, nya beninɛ fosi ǝnuǝ ana tsya ba nkpe awuflubia, nya benti sika sia eto akankpakpa nsi lǝ akpomɛ nyamǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Flashes of lightning and roars of thunder came out from the throne in the center of the circle. Seven torches, which are the seven spirits of God, were burning in front of the throne.
translation_verse: Nya ofamfa ku ɔsitoto eto kɔsɔ lɛ bɔbɔ ketsyi lǝ lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ. Atɛ akuanse nlɛ bunyǝ lǝ lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ eto sɛtɔ. Nyamfo ni Onanto eto awɔnɔ akunse nyamǝ nɛ.

english_verse: Also in front of the throne was something that looked like a glass sea, clear as crystal. Around the throne in the center were four living creatures covered front and back with eyes.
translation_verse: Nya lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ eto sɛtɔ akpa wuee, fe lekpo befi ahũhuɛ beyifo. Asayifoyifo nya nkpe nkpǝ, nya dikǝ ǝnǝmi kpenkpenkpe sɛtɔ ku kama, ńyǝ etsyilama lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ eto akpake nnya ta kenke

english_verse: The first creature was like a lion, the second one was like a bull, the third one had the face of a human, and the fourth was like a flying eagle.
translation_verse: Etutɛ ále tsyata. Ǝnuǝfǝ ale ɔtrɔmu. Ǝtsyǝfǝ kpe ǝnǝmi fe utidi. Nya anale ale kɔlikpo ko nlɛ bufunini.

english_verse: Each of the four living creatures had six wings, and their bodies were covered with eyes. Day and night they never stopped singing, “Holy, holy, holy is the Lord, the all-powerful God, who was and is and is coming!”
translation_verse: Asa nnya nkpe mfó eto ǝsuǝ saa kpe mbamba akua akua, nya ǝnǝmi diyi nnya etsyilama kalebe saa, nya ɛnlɛ ese busǝ lefe saa katɛyi nkǝ, “Kɛnkɛ, kɛnkɛ, kɛnkɛ ni Bonamute Onanto wǝ ni ǝsuǝalenyǝ lefe nǝ ta, wǝ nsi nkpe mɔmɔ, wǝ dísiǝ taa kasɔ ketsyikokɔ, wǝ nsi nlɛ bubǝ.”

english_verse: The living creatures kept praising, honoring, and thanking the one who sits on the throne and who lives forever and ever.
translation_verse: Asa nnya nsi nkpe mfó eese atɛsɛ, dibu ku lɛninsɔ eto ese itǝ nwǝ nsi lǝ lekankpomɛ ǝsuǝ wǝ nsi nkpǝ lefe saa isu lefe saa.

english_verse: “Our Lord and God, you are worthy to receive glory, honor, and power. You created all things, and by your decision they are and were created.”
translation_verse: “Bonamute ku bo Onanto! Fǝ dińyǝ itǝ atɛsɛ ku dibu ku ǝsuǝale. Itsyise fǝ diyifo asa nnya ta kenke, nya fǝtǝ fǝ mǝmblǝ siǝ nkpǝ bo lɛflɔ lǝ fǝ lelabi ǝsuǝ.”

english_verse: In the right hand of the one sitting on the throne I saw a scroll that had writing on the inside and on the outside. And it was sealed in seven places.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, nnyǝ kukue kutsyuǝ ko bǝkǝnǝ ko nwǝ nsi lǝ lekankpomɛ ǝsuǝ nlɛ lǝ wǝ kodiani. Báwɔni asa lǝ ko lekpake nǝ ku nnɛ, nya béfi sitǝ eto etinsa beti ko kɛnyɛ lǝ akpa akuanse.

english_verse: I saw a mighty angel ask with a loud voice, “Who is worthy to open the scroll and break its seals?”
translation_verse: Mfó mínyǝ Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe kplɛ utsyuǝ wǝ léto ɔkɔɛ bembembe ɔ́tɔ nkǝ, “Owoe ni nwǝ dińyǝ utǝ bǝ ufǝ sitǝ eto etinsa siamǝ lǝ ɔsini kukue komfo?”

english_verse: No one in heaven or on earth or under the earth was able to open the scroll or look inside it.
translation_verse: Fɛɛ bǝnnyǝ kutsyuǝ saa lǝ kato lee kasɔ lee lǝ ɔkɔmǝ wǝ loofo kukue komǝ bɔsini lǝ obe ko kafo.

english_verse: I cried hard because no one was found worthy to open the scroll or look inside it.
translation_verse: Nwi keku tinti se bámfo kutsyuǝ saa bunyǝ wǝ díńyǝ utǝ bǝ umǝnkli ko lǝ okla.

english_verse: Then one of the elders said to me, “Stop crying and look! The one who is called both the ‘Lion from the Tribe of Judah’ and ‘King David's Great Descendant’ has won the victory. He will open the scroll and its seven seals.”
translation_verse: Mfó ǝmǝ nya beninǝ bamǝ eto ɔni lɛtɛyi mɛ nkǝ, “Mensiwi keku. Bee! Yesu wǝ baakpo Tsyata wǝ lɛbɔ utsyi lǝ Yuda eto kusǝ, ɔkplɛnyǝ wǝ ni Oka David eto ufluflu, wǝ dítǝkǝ kato, wǝ dińyǝ utǝ bǝ ɔsini sitǝ eto etinsa akpa akuanse nya béfi béti kukue komǝ eto kɛnyɛ nɛ.”

english_verse: Then I looked and saw a Lamb standing in the center of the throne surrounded by the four living creatures and the elders. The Lamb looked as if it had once been killed. It had seven horns and seven eyes, which are the seven spirits of God, sent out to all the earth.
translation_verse: Lǝ nnya kamaa, nnyǝ Lesamubi nǝ nńyǝ lǝ lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ eto ntinti, nya asa ana nnya nsi nkpe mfó ǝmǝ létsyilama wǝ ku beninǝ bamǝ. Nya íyifo fe bolo bálo lesamubi nǝmǝ. Aakpɛ akuanse ńyǝ ni lǝ disi ku ǝnǝmi akuanse, nya ni Onanto eto awɔnɔ akuanse nnya bátsyese kawunsiǝ kamǝ kenke.

english_verse: The Lamb went over and took the scroll from the right hand of the one who sat on the throne.
translation_verse: Lesamubi nǝmǝ ésu ófo kukue ko nwǝ nsi lǝ lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ nlɛ lǝ wǝ kodiani.

english_verse: Then they sang a new song, “You are worthy to receive the scroll and open its seals, because you were killed. And with your own blood you bought for God people from every tribe, language, nation, and race.
translation_verse: Bése kusǝ fɔfɔ ko nlɛ bɔtɛyi nkǝ, “Aflɔ ǝtǝ bǝ afo kukue komǝ, nya bǝ lǝ efe sitǝ eto etinsa ekuanse sia nti lǝ kukue komǝ eto kɛnyɛ. Itsyise bálo fǝ, nya ɛyɛ lǝ fǝ ǝsuǝ bufi kǝtǝ kedi eto ukpe ǝsuǝǝ, áfó betidi kpǝ eto disi eto kayo ǝtǝ Onanto. Betidi bamfo etsyi ese ese, bele bele, nsɔ nsɔ, ku kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke.

english_verse: You let them become kings and serve God as priests, and they will rule on earth.”
translation_verse: Éyifo mǝ báfiani besumunyǝ eto sekakedikɔ ba leesumu bo Onanto, nya boodi seka lǝ kasɔ kamfo.”

english_verse: As I looked, I heard the voices of a large number of angels around the throne and the voices of the living creatures and of the elders. There were millions and millions of them,
translation_verse: Nya se minsi mímbe, nnyǝ kato eto batɔnkpe akpi, akpi ku awo, awo ba lǝmbǝ leklabii, ńyǝ batsyilama lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ ku asa ana nnya nkpe nkpǝ nyamǝ ku beninǝ bamǝ.

english_verse: and they were saying in a loud voice, “The Lamb who was killed is worthy to receive power, riches, wisdom, strength, honor, glory, and praise.”
translation_verse: Nya banlɛ ese busǝ bembembe bǝnkǝ, “Lesamubi nǝ bálo ǝńyǝ ditǝ bǝ, lɛkɛ ǝsuǝale, setabikɛ, kobe, bofobuyifo, dibu, diyǝnde ku atɛsǝ.”

english_verse: Then I heard all beings in heaven and on the earth and under the earth and in the sea offer praise. Together, all of them were saying, “Praise, honor, glory, and strength forever and ever to the one who sits on the throne and to the Lamb!”
translation_verse: Nya mínɔ se asa nnya kenke Onanto díyifo nkpe kato ku kasɔ mfo, kasɔ kǝmiǝ ku lekpo kafo ku asa nnya kenke nsi nkpǝ nlɛ ese busǝ katɛyi nkǝ, “Nwǝ nsi lǝ lekankpomǝ ǝsuǝ ku Lesamubi nǝmǝ, mǝ mbǝ atɛsǝ, dibu, diyǝnde ku ǝsuǝale idu manlo isu manlo.”

english_verse: The four living creatures said “Amen,” while the elders knelt down and worshiped.
translation_verse: Nya asa ana nnya nsi nkpǝ léfo bátanɔ bǝ, “Ibǝ itǝ.” Nya beninǝ bamǝ lékpo lǝ kasɔ, nya bésumu Onanto ku Lesamubi nǝmǝ.

english_verse: At the same time I saw the Lamb open the first of the seven seals, I heard one of the four living creatures shout with a voice like thunder. It said, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Nya mínyǝ se Lesamubi nǝmǝ dífǝ sitǝ eto etinsa tutɛ nyamǝ ɔ́sini kukue komǝ nya mínnɔ se asa ana nnya nsi nkpǝ eto ani léto ɔkɔɛ íkumi fe ofamfa seka ɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bǝ!”

english_verse: Then I saw a white horse. Its rider carried a bow and was given a crown. He had already won some victories, and he went out to win more.
translation_verse: Mbe, nya mínyǝ ɔtɔmli flubia utsyuǝ. Nwǝ nsi lǝ wǝ lɛ sifie lǝ kɔni nya bǝtǝ wǝ lekankpakpa ditsyuǝ. Úsiǝ lǝ wǝ nya ɔ́bɔ fe omamanyǝ wǝ lǝǝtǝkǝ kato ntɔ kato kǝtǝkǝkɔ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the second seal, I heard the second living creature say, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, Lesamubi nǝmǝ ǝfǝ lɛsini sitǝ eto etinsa eto etinsa nuǝfǝ nyamǝ nya mínnɔ asa ana nnya nsi nkpǝ eto unuǝfǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bǝ!”

english_verse: Then another horse came out. It was fiery red. And its rider was given the power to take away all peace from the earth, so people would slaughter one another. He was also given a big sword.
translation_verse: Nya ɔtɔmini bamba wǝ lɛsɛ lɛbɔ úbǝ. Bǝtǝ nwǝ lǝǝsiǝ wǝ ǝsuǝale bǝ unǝ lema oboko kawunsiǝ eto betidi lǝ balo mǝ bǝtsyuǝ. Bǝtǝ wǝ lesiabi nyɛ nuǝ nǝ lɛmɔ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the third seal, I heard the third living creature say, “Come out!” Then I saw a black horse, and its rider had a balance scale in one hand.
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Lesamubi nǝmǝ ǝfǝ sitǝ eto etinsa tsyǝfǝ nyamǝ nti lǝ wǝ kukue komǝ eto kɛnyɛ. Mfó mínɔ se asa ana nnya nsi nkpǝ eto ǝtsyǝfǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bǝ!” Nya se mímbee, nnyǝ ɔtɔmini naa bamba nya nwǝ nsi lǝ wǝ lɛ nseni lǝ kɔni.

english_verse: I heard what sounded like a voice from somewhere among the four living creatures. It said, “A liter of wheat will cost you a whole day's wages! Three liters of barley will cost you a day's wages too. But don't ruin the olive oil or the wine.”
translation_verse: Nnɔ ɔkɔɛ utsyuǝ wǝ nte fe bɔbɔ ɔ́bɔ utsyi lǝ asa nnya nsi nkpǝ ɔflɔ wǝ lɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Kamɔ eto ɔkpɛ tɔ itǝ diyi lɔni eto kayofofo nya antabi eto ɛkpɛ itsyǝ ńyǝ itǝ diyi eto kayofofo. Fɛɛ mambiasǝ nnuǝbi ku wain eto eyi nnya ńyǝ mfó!”

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth living creature say, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Nya kama nnya Lesamubi nǝmǝ dífǝ sitǝ eto etinsa nale. Nya mínɔ asa nnya nsi nkpǝ eto anale didi etiki ɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bǝ!”

english_verse: Then I saw a pale green horse. Its rider was named Death, and Death's Kingdom followed close behind. They were given power over one fourth of the earth, and they could kill its people with swords, famines, diseases, and wild animals.
translation_verse: Lǝ mbe mfó, nnyǝ miǝ ɔtɔmini wǝ nte fe ntɔ eto ditsyǝbi nńyǝ. Baakpo nwǝ lǝǝsiǝ lǝ wǝ bǝ ukpe. Nya utidi bamba tsya tǝkǝko wǝ kama baakpo ɔkɔmǝ. Bǝtǝ mǝ ǝsuǝale bǝ balo kawunsiǝ eto betidi eto lekpa nale, ɛyɛ lǝ lema, kukpɛnsɛ, bufi ku ɛyɛ lǝ bebutubuki ba lǝǝmuǝ betidi ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the fifth seal, I saw under the altar the souls of everyone who had been killed for speaking God's message and telling about their faith.
translation_verse: Se Lesamubi nǝmǝ dífǝ sitǝ eto etinsa nɔnde, ńyǝ awɔnɔ ǝtsyuǝ lǝ kedikǝtǝkɔ eto lǝba nǝmǝ kalɔ, mba bálo eto awɔnɔ, se bǝbǝ Onanto eto leba nǝmǝ kalɔ, mǝ ni mba bálo se bábé Onanto eto Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ letsya nya bédi ni ɔnukualɛ eso.

english_verse: They shouted, “Master, you are holy and faithful! How long will it be before you judge and punish the people of this earth who killed us?”
translation_verse: Awɔnɔ nyamǝ áfã bembebe ɛtɛyi nkǝ, “Bonamute, eni ǝsuǝalenyǝ kenke, ɔkɛnkɛnyǝ ku ɔnukualɛnyǝ. Nte lefe nǝ eto lefe ko, fookponko kawunsiǝ eto betidi lekpo, ǝnǝ mba lélo bo koto?”

english_verse: Then each of those who had been killed was given a white robe and told to rest for a little while. They had to wait until the complete number of the Lord's other servants and followers would be killed.
translation_verse: Bǝtǝ mǝ utsyuǝ saa awu flubia kɛntsyɛ ókpe, nya bátɛyi mǝ bǝnkǝ besi babe mǝ kusu sɛkɛ isu ese lefe nǝ eto lefe bálo mǝ beyifotsyuǝ ku mǝ bayimi eto sitiditu kenke balosǝ fe kase bálo mǝ tsya.

english_verse: When I saw the Lamb open the sixth seal, I looked and saw a great earthquake. The sun turned as dark as sackcloth, and the moon became red as blood.
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, nnyǝ se Lesamubi nǝmǝ difǝ sitǝ eto etinsa lǝ lekpa kuande ǝsuǝ, kawunsiǝ kenke étinkǝ kekleke, nya kofe lɛyɛ bofa nya lesa saa lena sũũ fe kafia na, nya kofande lɛsɛ hǝǝ fe kɔtɔ.

english_verse: The stars in the sky fell to earth, just like figs shaken loose by a windstorm.
translation_verse: Befandebi, álo bitsyi kato bibǝ bɛsɔ kasɔ fe kase eyibibi mambemambe laalo kakpo lǝ kasɔ lǝ ufiebi asɔ kekleke.

english_verse: Then the sky was rolled up like a scroll, and all mountains and islands were moved from their places.
translation_verse: Difule ánya lamfolamfo fe kase bǝǝkǝnǝ kukue seka nya kɔtini saa ku kasɔ ka ntu letsyilama lɛnyi lǝ nyǝnkɔ.

english_verse: The kings of the earth, its famous people, and its military leaders hid in caves or behind rocks on the mountains. They hid there together with the rich and the powerful and with all the slaves and free people.
translation_verse: Mfó nya kawunsiǝ eto baka, Aba bamamanyǝ ninǝ, batabinyǝ ku bǝsuǝalenyǝ, ku betidi ba kenke, ndomufɔ ku mba nsi lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ ǝsuǝ, difi mǝ ǝsuǝ bákula lǝ ǝbiǝku ku abanse kalɔ ku lǝ atini ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then they shouted to the mountains and the rocks, “Fall on us! Hide us from the one who sits on the throne and from the anger of the Lamb.
translation_verse: Báfa bákpadi atini ku abanse bǝ, “Beba bekpo bo lǝ ǝsuǝ biti bo bekpe itsyi lǝ nwǝ nsi lǝ lekankpomɛ eto ǝnǝmi ku lǝ Lesamubi nǝmǝ eto lɛblɔfi eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: That terrible day has come! God and the Lamb will show their anger, and who can face it?”
translation_verse: Itsyise Onanto ku Lesamubi bamǝ eto lǝblɔfi eto diyi nǝmǝ eboyo! Nya owoe loofo bunyǝ lǝ nnya ǝnǝmi?”

english_verse: from Benjamin. People from Every Nation
translation_verse: ). Betidi bamfo étsyi Israel eto lefosi mfo nuǝ kafo.

english_verse: “Don't harm the earth or the sea or any tree! Wait until I have marked the foreheads of the servants of our God.”
translation_verse: nya ɔ́tɛyi nkǝ, “Bienyifo lesafimfi kasɔ, lekpo nye eyi saa, isu eyo lefe nǝ buufi sitǝ eto etinsa butsyǝ Onanto eto beyifoyifo eto nto lekpo.”

english_verse: Then I heard how many people had been marked on the forehead. There were
translation_verse: Nya bátɛyi mɛ bǝnkǝ betidi ba béfi Onanto eto sitǝ eto etinsa bǝtsyǝ lekpo lǝ mǝ nto eto leklabi ebuyifo betidi akpi kolofa awosi ana ana (

english_verse: and said, “Amen! Praise, glory, wisdom, thanks, honor, power, and strength belong to our God forever and ever! Amen!”
translation_verse: katɛyi nkǝ, “Ibǝ itǝ! Atɛsǝ, diyǝnde, kobe, lɛninsɔ, dibu, ǝsuǝale ku kakplɛkɔ lǝ idi bo Onanto ǝmǝ eto ale idu manlo isu manlo! Ibǝ itǝ!”

english_verse: After this, I saw a large crowd with more people than could be counted. They were from every race, tribe, nation, and language, and they stood before the throne and before the Lamb. They wore white robes and held palm branches in their hands,
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, ńyǝ sitiditu kplɛ ditsyuǝ nǝ eto betidi kuutsyuǝ lembofo bokla! Betsyi kasɔ saa, ese saa, bele tɛyi tɛyi saa, betidi betidi saa eto okle, nya bǝnyǝ lǝ lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ ku Lesamubi nǝmǝ eto ǝnǝmi, nya bankpe awuflubia, nya banlɛ bekabe lǝ ani.

english_verse: as they shouted, “Our God, who sits upon the throne, has the power to save his people, and so does the Lamb.”
translation_verse: Nya báfa ku ɔkɔɛ bembembe bátɛyi bǝnkǝ, “Bofokǝtǝ etsyi Boanto Onanto wǝ nsi lǝ lekankpomɛ ǝsuǝ ku Lesamubi nǝmǝ ɔflɔ!”

english_verse: The angels who stood around the throne knelt in front of it with their faces to the ground. The elders and the four living creatures knelt there with them. Then they all worshiped God
translation_verse: Onanto eto batɔnkpe kenke bǝńyǝ batsyilama lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ ku beninǝ bamǝ ku asa ana nyamǝ, nya batɔnkpe bǝmǝ difusǝ ǝnǝmii kasɔ lǝ lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ eto ǝnǝmi, besumu Onanto,

english_verse: One of the elders asked me, “Do you know who these people are that are dressed in white robes? Do you know where they come from?”
translation_verse: Beninǝ bamǝ eto ɔni átɔ mɛ nkǝ, “Bawoe ni betidi ba nkpe awu flubia kɛntsyɛ mfo? Nya se bétsyi?”

english_verse: “Sir,” I answered, “you must know.” Then he told me: “These are the ones who have gone through the great suffering. They have washed their robes in the blood of the Lamb and have made them white.
translation_verse: Mfó nya mintɛyi mǝ miǝ, “Bonamute, minnyi. Fǝ nyi.” Mfo nya ɔ́tɛyi mɛ nkǝ, “Mba mfó ni betidi ba dínyǝ kanyi kekleke fɛ bábɔ báfe. Bǝflǝ mǝ awu éle futufutu lǝ Lesamubi nǝmǝ eto kɔtɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: And so they stand before the throne of God and worship him in his temple day and night. The one who sits on the throne will spread his tent over them.
translation_verse: Nyasoo, bǝǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto lekakpomɛ nǝmǝ eto ǝnǝmi kesumu wǝ ketsye ku kakɔmi lǝ wǝ Disumuyo. Itsyise nwǝ nsi lǝ lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ ebota mǝ disi lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: They will never hunger or thirst again, and they won't be troubled by the sun or any scorching heat.
translation_verse: Kukpɛnsɛ nye utukuɛ esi ǝmbɔlɛ mǝ kulefe. Nya kofe nye utefofo saa ensiembufi mǝ.

english_verse: “The Lamb in the center of the throne will be their shepherd. He will lead them to streams of life-giving water, and God will wipe all tears from their eyes.”
translation_verse: Itsyise Lesamubi nǝ nkpe lǝ lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ eto ntinti mfóo, ebɔlɛ mǝ ola, obe mǝ. Wookpa mǝ ɔyɛnko usuko kaka nkpǝ eto ntu bo laayifǝ lefe saa nkpe. Nya Onanto tsya lɔɔsi mǝ binǝntu saa lǝ ǝnǝmi.”

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour.
translation_verse: Se Lesamubi nǝmǝ dífǝ sitǝ eto etinsa sia nti lǝ lekpa kuansele ǝsuǝǝ, ídi kanana lǝ kato itǝ fe lebombosɔsɔ eto kutsyǝ.

english_verse: I noticed that the seven angels who stood before God were each given a trumpet.
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, nnyǝ Onanto eto batɔnkpe ekuanse ba lǝǝńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi, nya útǝ mǝ nkpatsyaku nkuanse.

english_verse: Another angel, who had a gold container for incense, came and stood at the altar. This one was given a lot of incense to offer with the prayers of God's people on the gold altar in front of the throne.
translation_verse: Nya Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe bamba wǝ lɛlɛ sika sia eto dikplibi nǝ kafo baatonsǝ lufui kɔnii, lɛbɔ úńyǝ lǝ leba nǝ ǝsuǝ bǝǝtǝ kedi ɔflɔ. Bǝtǝ wǝ lufui kpǝ bǝ ufi ɔkɔ ku Onanto eto betidi ba kenke eto olatoto ǝsuǝ lǝ ufi utǝ kedi lǝ sika sia eto kedikǝtǝkɔ eto leba nǝ ńyǝ lǝ lekankpomɛ nǝmǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: Then the smoke of the incense, together with the prayers of God's people, went up to God from the hand of the angel.
translation_verse: Se banlɛ lufui nǝmǝ botonsǝǝ, ni kuyuǝ ko nlɛ boto kabɔ lǝ dikplibi nǝmǝ kafo ákɔ ku Onanto eto betidi eto olatoto ɛyɛ lǝ Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe wǝ nńyǝ lǝ wǝ ǝnǝmi eto ani isu Onanto ɔflɔ.

english_verse: After this, the angel filled the incense container with fire from the altar and threw it on the earth. Thunder roared, lightning flashed, and the earth shook. The Trumpets
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe ǝmǝ ǝlǝkǝ ute lǝ Disumuyo eto leba nǝmǝ ǝsuǝ úfi úyisǝ lufui eto dikplibi nǝmǝ nya úsǝ wǝ ókpo lǝ kasɔ ǝsuǝ. Se úyifo nkoo, nnɔ se kato díkumi bembembe, nya kato léto ɔsi, nya kasɔ dítinkǝ. Onanto Eto Batɔnkpe Bamǝ Éfe Mǝ Nkpatsyaku.

english_verse: The seven angels now got ready to blow their trumpets.
translation_verse: Mfó nya Onanto eto batɔnkpe ekuanse ba nlɛ nkpatsyaku dímuǝ ǝsue bǝ beefǝ mǝ nkpatsyaku bomǝ.

english_verse: When the first angel blew his trumpet, hail and fire mixed with blood were thrown down on the earth. A third of the earth, a third of the trees, and a third of all green plants were burned.
translation_verse: Onato eto ɔtɔnkpe tutɛ ǝmǝ éfe wǝ kakpatsyaku. Lamfolamfo, etubankli ku ute wǝ létsyaka ku kɔtɔ ábɔ ékpo lǝ kasɔ nya étonsǝ kawunsiǝ eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ, nya eyi eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ léto. Fɛɛ sefaa, semblɛ kenke áto.

english_verse: When the second angel blew his trumpet, something like a great fiery mountain was thrown into the sea. A third of the sea turned to blood,
translation_verse: Nyamfo eto kamaa, Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe nuǝfǝ tsya éfe wǝ kakpatsyaku. Nya lesa nǝ lele kɔtini kplɛ ko nlɛ ute bunyǝ lɛbɔ nya báto ko bákpe lǝ lekpo kǝmiǝ. Nya lekpo eto ntu bomǝ eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ léfiani kɔtɔ.

english_verse: a third of the living creatures in the sea died, and a third of the ships were destroyed.
translation_verse: Nya akpɛ ku bebuki ba nkpe lǝ ntu bomǝ eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ kenke díkpe. Nya ntu eto efue nnya ntǝkǝ lǝ ntu bomǝ eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ lébia.

english_verse: When the third angel blew his trumpet, a great star fell from heaven. It was burning like a torch, and it fell on a third of the rivers and on a third of the springs of water.
translation_verse: Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe tsyǝfǝ éfe wǝ kakpatsyaku. Mfó nya sefandebi kplɛ sitsyuǝ sia nlɛ ute bunyǝ fe lɛtɛ léfankli sitsyi kato sídufǝ lǝ ntu bo laabɔdi ku mbo ni ntuyifǝyifǝ eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The name of the star was Bitter, and a third of the water turned bitter. Many people died because the water was so bitter.
translation_verse: Baakpo sefandebi siamǝ bǝ Kalokatakata. Ntu eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ áfiani ntu bo nkpe kalo, nya betidi kpǝ bǝtsyuǝ díkpǝ itsyise bǝnǝ ntu bomǝ eso.

english_verse: When the fourth angel blew his trumpet, a third of the sun, a third of the moon, and a third of the stars were struck. They each lost a third of their light. So during a third of the day there was no light, and a third of the night was also without light.
translation_verse: Mfó nya ɔtɔnkpe nale dífǝ wǝ kakpatsyaku. Ítǝ bǝ kofe eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ, kofande eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ ku befandebi eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ, nnya ǝtsyuǝ saa eto diyǝnde eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ áni. Lǝ nyaso ketsye ku diyi eto lekpasǝ nǝ laakɛ eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ áni.

english_verse: Then I looked and saw a lone eagle flying across the sky. It was shouting, “Trouble, trouble, trouble to everyone who lives on earth! The other three angels are now going to blow their trumpets.”
translation_verse: Lǝ nyamfo eto kamaa, se minyǝ minlɛ bobe, ńnyǝ kɔlikpo kplɛ kutsyuǝ se kɔnlɛ bufunini kato fanlo, kafe katɛyi ku ɔkɔɛ bembembe katɛyi nkǝ, “Mbɔbɔɛ, mbɔbɔɛ, mbɔbɔɛ mǝǝtǝ betidi ba luubu besiǝ lǝ kawunsiǝ lǝ lefe nǝ Onanto eto batɔnkpe fɛfɛ itsyǝ ba luubu luufe mǝ nkpatsyaku ntsyǝ bomǝ.”

english_verse: When the fifth angel blew his trumpet, I saw a star fall from the sky to earth. It was given the key to the tunnel that leads down to the deep pit.
translation_verse: Mfó Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe nɔnde dífe wǝ kakpatsyaku. Nya mínyǝ sefandebi sitsyuǝ ditsyi kato síbǝ sɛsɔ lǝ kasɔ, nya béfi ukpe kǝmiǝ eto dibiǝ nǝ lena sũũ eto safui bǝtǝ se.

english_verse: As it opened the tunnel, smoke poured out like the smoke of a great furnace. The sun and the air turned dark because of the smoke.
translation_verse: Sɛsini ukpe kǝmiǝ eto dibiǝ kplɛ nǝmfo nya kuyuǝ ko nte fe ditefɛnku ǝsuǝ kɔ́bɔ kutsyii, díti kofe eto ǝnǝmi ku ko diyǝnde itǝ difule kenke lena sũũ lǝ kuyuǝ ko lɛbɔ kutsyi lǝ dikpǝmbiǝ nǝmǝ eso.

english_verse: Locusts came out of the smoke and covered the earth. They were given the same power that scorpions have.
translation_verse: Bekpese áló betsyi kuyuǝ komǝ ǝsuǝ bǝbǝ bákpo lǝ kasɔ nya Onanto dítǝ mǝ ǝsuǝale fe bakpoe ba laata seka.

english_verse: The locusts were told not to harm the grass on the earth or any plant or any tree. They were to punish only those people who did not have God's mark on their foreheads.
translation_verse: Bátɛyi mǝ bǝnkǝ, bambiansǝ afanto nye seefa nye kuyi saa enso betidi ba Onanto dímǝntǝkǝ mǝ leba lǝ mǝ nto.

english_verse: The locusts were allowed to make them suffer for five months, but not to kill them. The suffering they caused was like the sting of a scorpion.
translation_verse: Bǝtǝ bekpese bamǝ kusu bǝ bate betidi bamǝ ohiã itǝ afa anɔ, fɛɛ banlo mǝ. Lǝ bata utidi, yeefi fe kanyi ka fuunyǝ lǝ okpoe ata utidi seka.

english_verse: In those days people will want to die, but they will not be able to. They will hope for death, but it will escape from them.
translation_verse: Lǝ afa anɔ nyamfo nti, bɔɔbɛbɛ ukpe bǝ beekpe, fɛɛ bembunyǝ wǝ bekpe. Boola bǝ beekpe, fɛɛ ukpe ebutsyetsyi udu lǝ mǝ ɔflɔ.

english_verse: These locusts looked like horses ready for battle. On their heads they wore something like gold crowns, and they had human faces.
translation_verse: Bekpese bamǝ eto ditsyǝbi te fe batɔmli ba léto akpatsya itǝ lema bɔkpɔ. Béti mǝ akpakpa nnya lele sika sia eto akankpakpa lǝ mǝ esi. Nya mǝ ǝnǝmi lele betidi eto ǝnǝmi.

english_verse: Their hair was like a woman's long hair, and their teeth were like those of a lion.
translation_verse: Mǝ disi eto sewɔni ekulǝ fe besio eto sele, nya mǝ anyi lele tsyata eto ale.

english_verse: On their chests they wore armor made of iron. Their wings roared like an army of horse-drawn chariots rushing into battle.
translation_verse: Nya béfi asa ǝtsyuǝ nnya nte fe bitu eto awu nnya leeti lɛkɔɛsibi bákpe. Kudu ko nlɛ bɔbɔ ketsyi lǝ mǝ mbamba ǝsuǝ ale nkeke bo batɔmini lǝǝnǝ kpǝ bo batɔmini nlɛ bunǝ bantɔnko lǝ lema.

english_verse: Their tails were like a scorpion's tail with a stinger that had the power to hurt someone for five months.
translation_verse: Bekpese bamfo kpé kǝkǝ ku kabé bo laata fe okpoe eto ale, nya bankpe ǝsuǝale lǝ mǝ kǝkǝ ǝsuǝ boofo bufi keyifo utidi lesafimfi itǝ afa anɔ.

english_verse: Their king was the angel in charge of the deep pit. In Hebrew his name was Abaddon, and in Greek it was Apollyon.
translation_verse: Bakpé Oka wǝ nlɛ seka budi lǝ mǝ ǝsuǝ. Wǝ ni ɔtɔnkpe wǝ nsi lǝ ukpe eto dibiǝ eto kɛnyɛ mfó. Wǝ diye ni Abadon lǝ Sihibri ǝsuǝ. Nya lǝ Sigriki ǝsuǝ, Apolion eto kasɔ ni nwǝ laabiasǝ asa.

english_verse: The first horrible thing has now happened! But wait. Two more horrible things will happen soon.
translation_verse: Kanyinyǝnyǝ kplɛ tutɛ ébubǝ káfe. Nyamfo eto kamaa, nnuǝ bamba si bɔlɛ bubǝ.

english_verse: Then the sixth angel blew his trumpet. I heard a voice speak from the four corners of the gold altar that stands in the presence of God.
translation_verse: Nnya kama, nya Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe kuande dífǝ wǝ kakpatsyaku. Nya mínɔ se ɔkɔɛ utsyuǝ lɛbɔ utsyi lǝ sika sia eto Disumuyo eto leba nǝ ńyǝ lǝ Onanto eto ǝnǝmi eto akpɔ ana nyamǝ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: The voice spoke to this angel and said, “Release the four angels who are tied up beside the great Euphrates River.”
translation_verse: Ɔkɔɛ ǝmǝ átɛyi Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe kuande ǝmǝ nkǝ, “Benyankli batɔnkpe ena ba bákle bǝtsyǝ lǝ Ketukplɛ Frate ɔflɔ!”

english_verse: The four angels had been prepared for this very hour and day and month and year. Now they were set free to kill a third of all people.
translation_verse: Mfo báyankli batɔnkpe ena bamǝ. Bálɔ mǝ bǝtsyǝ nya bǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ itǝ lebombosɔsɔ nǝmǝ, diyi nǝnǝ, kofa komǝ ku lɛlɛ nǝmǝ bǝmuǝ ǝsuǝ bǝtsyǝ lǝ balo kawunsiǝ eto betidi kenke eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ.

english_verse: One third of all people were killed by the three terrible troubles caused by the fire, the smoke, and the sulfur.
translation_verse: Nya kanyinyǝnyǝ eto akpa ǝtsyǝ nyamfo, ini ute, kuyuǝ ku ute eto leba nǝ ditsyi lǝ batɔmli bamfo eto nnyɛ lelo kawunsiɛ eto betidi eto lekpa tsyǝfǝ kenke.

english_verse: The horses had powerful mouths, and their tails were like poisonous snakes that bite and hurt.
translation_verse: Batɔmli eto ǝsuǝale nyamfo ábɔ itsyi lǝ mǝ nnyɛ ku mǝ kǝkǝ ǝsuǝ. Nya mǝ kǝkǝ eyifo fe bawa ku esi nnya beefi keyifo betidi asafimfi.

english_verse: The people who lived through these terrible troubles did not turn away from the idols they had made, and they did not stop worshiping demons. They kept on worshiping idols that were made of gold, silver, bronze, stone, and wood. Not one of these idols could see, hear, or walk.
translation_verse: Betidi fɛfɛ ba kenke dímenkpe ɛyɛ lǝ kanyi kamǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ménsinkle lǝ asa nnya mǝ kosate dífi ani béyifo eto busumu kama. Bénsinkli lǝ awɔnɔ bua, sika sia ku sika flubia, bitu sia, abambi ku eyi nnya báwoe, nnya lǝǝnnyǝ, laanyɛ nye laannɔ eto busumu kama.

english_verse: No one stopped murdering or practicing witchcraft or being immoral or stealing.
translation_verse: Bántsyi bawuninsǝ lǝ mǝ betidilolo, asabɔtɔkanɔ, sɛsɔnɔdi ku mǝ kuyu ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: I saw another powerful angel come down from heaven. This one was covered with a cloud, and a rainbow was over his head. His face was like the sun, his legs were like columns of fire,
translation_verse: Nnya kamaa, nnyǝ Onanto eto ɔtɔnkpe kplɛ utsyuǝ wǝ lɛyifǝ utsyi kato úbǝ kasɔ. Okpe lǝ difule ǝsuǝ nya kɔlɛsensǝ letsyilama wǝ lǝ disi. Wǝ ǝnǝmi lɛ buyǝnde fe kofe seka nya wǝ akpa nte fe ute eto ala nnya ńyǝ kasɔ.

english_verse: and with his hand he held a little scroll that had been unrolled. He stood there with his right foot on the sea and his left foot on the land.
translation_verse: Ɔlɛ kukue kɛkɛ kutsyuǝ ko básini lǝ kɔni. Úfi wǝ kodianikpa útǝkǝ lǝ lekpo ǝsuǝ, nya úfi wǝ kǝmǝnikpa útǝkǝ lǝ kasɔ ǝsuǝ.

english_verse: Then he shouted with a voice that sounded like a growling lion. Thunder roared seven times.
